Genesis1:1 Pachiyambi Mulungu analenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi.
Genesis1:2 Dziko lapansi linali losakonzedwa ndi lopanda kanthu. Mdima wandiweyani unakuta nyanja ndipo Mzimu wa Mulungu unkayendayenda pamwamba pa madziwo.
Genesis1:3 Pamenepo Mulungu anati
Genesis1:4 Mulungu anaona kuti kuwalako kunali bwino ndipo Iye analekanitsa kuwala ndi mdima.
Genesis1:5 Mulungu anatcha kuwalako “usana” ndipo mdima anawutcha “usiku.” Ndipo panali madzulo ndiponso mmawa pa tsiku loyamba.
Genesis1:6 Kenaka Mulungu anati
Genesis1:7 Ndipo Mulungu anapanga thambo nalekanitsa madzi amene anali pansi ndi pamwamba pa thambo lija
Genesis1:8 Mulungu anatcha thambo lija “kumwamba.” Ndipo panali madzulo ndiponso mmawa pa tsiku lachiwiri.
Genesis1:9 Mulungu anati
Genesis1:10 Mulungu anawutcha mtundawo “dziko
Genesis1:11 Kenaka Mulungu anati
Genesis1:12 Dziko linabereka zomera zokhala ndi mbewu monga mwa mitundu yake ndi mitengo yokhala ndi zipatso za mbewu mʼkati mwake monga mwa mitundu yake. Ndipo Mulungu anaona kuti zinali bwino.
Genesis1:13 Ndipo panali madzulo ndiponso mmawa pa tsiku lachitatu.
Genesis1:14 Mulungu anati
Genesis1:15 zikhale kuthambo kuti ziwunikire pa dziko lapansi. Ndipo zinachitikadi.”
Genesis1:16 Mulungu anapanga zowunikira zazikulu ziwiri; chachikulu chilamulire usana ndi chachingʼono chilamulire usiku. Iye anapanganso nyenyezi.
Genesis1:17 Mulungu anaziyika mlengalenga kuti ziziwunikira pa dziko lapansi
Genesis1:18 kuti zilamulire usana ndi usiku
Genesis1:19 Ndipo panali madzulo ndiponso mmawa pa tsiku lachinayi.
Genesis1:20 Mulungu anati
Genesis1:21 Choncho Mulungu analenga zamoyo zikuluzikulu za mʼnyanja ndi chamoyo chamtundu uliwonse chokhala mʼmadzi ndi mbalame iliyonse ya mapiko monga mwa mtundu wake. Mulungu anaona kuti zinali bwino.
Genesis1:22 Mulungu anazidalitsa nati
Genesis1:23 Ndipo panali madzulo ndiponso mmawa pa tsiku lachisanu.
Genesis1:24 Kenaka Mulungu anati
Genesis1:25 Mulungu anapanga nyama zakuthengo monga mwa mitundu yawo
Genesis1:26 Zitatha izi Mulungu anati
Genesis1:27 Ndipo Mulungu analenga munthu mʼchifanizo chake. Anawalengadi mʼchifanizo cha Mulungu; analenga iwo
Genesis1:28 Mulungu anawadalitsa nati kwa iwo
Genesis1:29 Kenaka Mulungu anati
Genesis1:30 Ndaperekanso msipu kwa nyama zonse za pa dziko lapansi ndi kwa mbalame zamlengalenga ndi kwa cholengedwa chamoyo chilichonse chimene chimakwawa
Genesis1:31 Mulungu anaona zonse zimene anazilenga kuti zinali zabwino kwambiri. Ndipo panali madzulo ndiponso mmawa
Genesis2:1 Motero kumwamba
Genesis2:2 Pofika tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri Mulungu anamaliza ntchito zonse zimene ankagwira ndipo pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri anapumula ku ntchito zake zonse.
Genesis2:3 Ndipo Mulungu anadalitsa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri nalipatula
Genesis2:4 Mbiri ya momwe kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zinalengedwera pa tsiku lija Yehova Mulungu ankazilenga ndi iyi: Yehova Mulungu atapanga dziko lapansi ndi kumwamba
Genesis2:5 zitsamba zinali zisanamere ndipo chomera chilichonse chinali chisanamerenso popeza Yehova Mulungu anali asanagwetse mvula pa dziko lapansi. Panalibe munthu wolima nthaka
Genesis2:6 koma kasupe ankatuluka mʼnthaka ndi kuthirira pa dziko lonse.
Genesis2:7 Tsono Yehova Mulungu anawumba munthu kuchokera ku dothi nawuziramo mpweya wamoyo mʼmphuno mwake ndipo munthuyo anakhala wamoyo.
Genesis2:8 Kenaka Yehova Mulungu anatsekula munda wa Edeni chakummawa; kumeneko anayikako munthu amene anamupanga uja.
Genesis2:9 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anameretsa mʼmundamo mitengo ya mitundu yonse. Inali mitengo yokongola ndi ya zipatso zokoma. Pakati pa munda uja panali mtengo wopatsa moyo ndi mtengo wopatsa nzeru zodziwitsa chabwino ndi choyipa.
Genesis2:10 Mtsinje wothirira mundawo unkatuluka mu Edeni; kuchokera apo unkagawikana kukhala mitsinje inayi.
Genesis2:11 Dzina la mtsinje woyamba ndi Pisoni; uwu umazungulira dziko lonse la Havila
Genesis2:12 (Golide wa ku dziko ili ndi wabwino. Kulinso miyala yokongola ya bedola ndi onikisi).
Genesis2:13 Dzina la mtsinje wachiwiri ndi Gihoni; uwu umazungulira dziko lonse la Kusi.
Genesis2:14 Dzina la mtsinje wachitatu ndi Tigirisi; umayenda chakummawa kwa Asiriya. Ndipo mtsinje wachinayi ndi Yufurate.
Genesis2:15 Yehova Mulungu anatenga munthu uja ndi kumuyika mʼmunda wa Edeni kuti awulime ndi kuwusamalira.
Genesis2:16 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu analamula munthu uja kuti
Genesis2:17 koma usadye zipatso za mu mtengo wodziwitsa chabwino ndi choyipa
Genesis2:18 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anati
Genesis2:19 Kenaka Yehova Mulungu anawumba ndi dothi nyama zonse zakuthengo ndi mbalame zonse zamlengalenga. Ndipo Iye anapita nazo kwa munthu uja kuti akazipatse mayina; ndipo dzina lililonse limene Adamu anapereka ku chamoyo chilichonse
Genesis2:20 Choncho Adamu anazitcha mayina ziweto zonse
Genesis2:21 Tsono Yehova Mulungu anamugonetsa munthu uja tulo tofa nato; ali mtulo chomwecho
Genesis2:22 Motero Yehova Mulungu anapanga mkazi ndi nthiti ija imene anatenga kwa munthu uja nabwera naye kwa iye.
Genesis2:23 Munthu uja anati
Genesis2:24 Nʼchifukwa chake
Genesis2:25 Munthu uja ndi mkazi wakeyo
Genesis3:1 Ndipo njoka inali yochenjera kuposa nyama yakuthengo iliyonse imene Yehova Mulungu anapanga. Njokayo inati kwa mkaziyo
Genesis3:2 Mkaziyo anati kwa njokayo
Genesis3:3 koma Mulungu anati
Genesis3:4 “Ndithudi simudzafa
Genesis3:5 “Pakuti Mulungu akudziwa kuti tsiku limene mudzadye zipatso za mu mtengowo
Genesis3:6 Pamene mkaziyo anaona kuti mtengowo unali wabwino kudya ndi wokongola ndi kuti unali wopatsa nzeru
Genesis3:7 Kenaka maso awo anatsekuka

Genesis3:9 Yehova Mulungu anayitana munthu uja kuti
Genesis3:10 Iye anayankha
Genesis3:11 Ndipo anamufunsa

Genesis3:14 Choncho Yehova Mulungu anati kwa njokayo
Genesis3:15 Ndipo ndidzayika chidani pakati pa iwe ndi mkaziyo
Genesis3:16 Kwa mkaziyo Iye anati
Genesis3:17 Ndipo kwa Adamu Mulungu anati
Genesis3:18 Mʼnthakamo mudzamera minga ndi nthula ndipo udzadya zomera zakuthengo.
Genesis3:19 Kuti upeze chakudya udzayenera kukhetsa thukuta
Genesis3:20 Munthu uja anatcha mkazi wake Hava

Genesis3:22 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anati
Genesis3:23 Kotero Yehova Mulungu anatulutsa Adamu Mʼmunda wa Edeni kuti azilima mʼnthaka imene anachokera.
Genesis3:24 Atamuthamangitsa munthu uja
Genesis4:1 Adamu anagona malo amodzi ndi Hava mkazi wake ndipo mkaziyo anakhala woyembekezera nabala Kaini
Genesis4:2 Kenaka anabereka mʼbale wake Abele. Abele anali woweta nkhosa ndipo Kaini anali mlimi.
Genesis4:3 Patapita nthawi
Genesis4:4 Nayenso Abele anatenga ana ankhosa oyamba kubadwa pamodzi ndi mafuta ake nakazipereka ngati nsembe kwa Yehova. Yehova anakondwera ndi Abele ndi nsembe yake.
Genesis4:5 Koma sanakondwere ndi Kaini ndi nsembe yake. Kotero Kaini anakwiya kwambiri ndipo nkhope yake inagwa.
Genesis4:6 Choncho Yehova anati kwa Kaini
Genesis4:7 Ukanachita zabwino sindikanakulandira kodi? Koma tsopano wachita zoyipa ndipo tchimo likukudikira pa khomo pako
Genesis4:8 Tsiku lina Kaini anati kwa mʼbale wake Abele
Genesis4:9 Ndipo Yehova anamufunsa Kaini kuti
Genesis4:10 Yehova anati
Genesis4:11 Ndipo tsopano ndiwe wotembereredwa ndipo wachotsedwa mʼdziko limene nthaka yake inatsekula pakamwa pake kulandira magazi a mʼbale wako amene unakhetsa.
Genesis4:12 Udzalima munda koma nthakayo sidzakupatsanso zokolola zake. Udzakhala wosakhazikika; womangoyendayenda pa dziko lapansi.”
Genesis4:13 Kaini anati kwa Yehova
Genesis4:14 Lero mukundipirikitsa pa dziko ndi pamaso panu; ndidzakhala wosakhazikika
Genesis4:15 Koma Yehova anamuwuza kuti
Genesis4:16 Ndipo Kaini anachoka pamaso pa Yehova nakakhala ku dziko la Nodi
Genesis4:17 Kaini anagona malo amodzi ndi mkazi wake ndipo mkaziyo anakhala woyembekezera nabala Enoki. Kaini nthawi imeneyo nʼkuti akumanga mzinda ndipo anawutcha dzina la mwana wake Enoki.
Genesis4:18 Enoki anabereka Iradi; Iradi anabereka Mehuyaeli
Genesis4:19 Lameki anakwatira akazi awiri
Genesis4:20 Ada anabereka Yabala; iyeyu anali kholo la onse okhala mʼmatenti ndi oweta ziweto.
Genesis4:21 Dzina la mʼbale wake linali Yubala; iyeyu anali kholo la onse oyimba zeze ndi chitoliro.
Genesis4:22 Zila nayenso anali ndi mwana wamwamuna
Genesis4:23 Lameki anawuza akazi akewo kuti
Genesis4:24 Ngati wopha Kaini amulipsira kasanu nʼkawiri
Genesis4:25 Adamu anagonanso malo amodzi ndi mkazi wake
Genesis4:26 Seti naye anali ndi mwana wa mwamuna

Genesis6:1 Anthu atayamba kuchuluka pa dziko lapansi ndi kubereka ana aakazi
Genesis6:2 ana aamuna a Mulungu anaona kuti ana aakazi a anthuwo anali okongola. Ndipo anakwatira aliyense amene anamusankha.
Genesis6:3 Tsono Yehova anati
Genesis6:4 Masiku amenewo komanso pambuyo pake
Genesis6:5 Pamene Yehova anaona kuti kuyipa kwa munthu pa dziko lapansi kunali kwakukulu ndi kuti nthawi zonse amalingalira ndi kukhumbira kuchita zoyipa zokhazokha
Genesis6:6 Yehova anamva chisoni kuti analenga munthu ndi kumuyika pa dziko lapansi
Genesis6:7 Choncho Yehova anati
Genesis6:8 Koma Yehova anamukomera mtima Nowa.
Genesis6:9 Mbiri ya Nowa inali yotere: Nowa anali munthu wolungama ndi wopanda tchimo pakati pa anthu a mʼbado wake. Ndipo anayenda ndi Mulungu.
Genesis6:10 Nowa anabereka ana aamuna atatu: Semu
Genesis6:11 Chiwawa chinadzaza pa dziko lapansi kotero kuti dziko linakhala lowonongeka pamaso pa Mulungu.
Genesis6:12 Mulungu atayangʼana
Genesis6:13 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa Nowa
Genesis6:14 Tsono udzipangire chombo cha matabwa a mtengo wanjale; mʼkati mwake upange zipinda ndipo upake phula mʼkati ndi kunja.
Genesis6:15 Uchipange motere: Chombo chikhale mamita 140 mulitali
Genesis6:16 Uchipangire denga ndi kuchimaliza ndi zenera la masentimita makumi asanu. Uyike khomo mʼmbali mwa chombocho ndi kupanga zipinda zosanjikana; chapansi
Genesis6:17 Ndidzagwetsa mvula ya chigumula pa dziko lapansi kuti ndiwononge zamoyo zonse za pansi pa thambo ndipo chilichonse cha pa dziko lapansi chidzafa.
Genesis6:18 Koma ndidzachita pangano langa ndi iwe. Iwe
Genesis6:19 Iwe udzalowa mʼchombocho ndi zolengedwa zamoyo zonse ziwiriziwiri
Genesis6:20 Udzatenga ziwiriziwiri za mitundu yonse ya mbalame
Genesis6:21 Udzatengenso chakudya cha mtundu uliwonse ndi kuchisunga kuti inu ndi nyamazo muzidzadya.”
Genesis6:22 Nowa anachita zonse monga Mulungu anamulamulira.
Genesis7:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Nowa
Genesis7:2 Pa mtundu uliwonse wa nyama zoti nʼkudya utengepo zazimuna zisanu ndi ziwiri ndi zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwirinso. Koma pa mtundu wa nyama iliyonse yosati nʼkudya utengepo zazimuna ziwiri ndi zazikazi ziwirinso.
Genesis7:3 Chimodzimodzinso mbalame
Genesis7:4 Pakapita masiku asanu ndi awiri ndidzagwetsa mvula pa dziko lapansi kwa masiku makumi anayi usana ndi usiku ndipo ndidzawononga cha moyo chilichonse chimene ndinachipanga pa dziko lapansi.”
Genesis7:5 Ndipo Nowa anachita zonse zimene Yehova anamulamulira.
Genesis7:6 Pamene chigumula chinabwera pa dziko lapansi Nowa anali ndi zaka 600.
Genesis7:7 Ndipo Nowa
Genesis7:8 Nyama zoti nʼkudya ndi nyama zosadyedwa
Genesis7:9 Ndipo Nowa anatenga ziwiriziwiri
Genesis7:10 Patapita masiku asanu ndi awiri chigumula chinabwera pa dziko lapansi.
Genesis7:11 Pa tsiku la 17 la mwezi wachiwiri
Genesis7:12 Ndipo mvula inagwa pa dziko lapansi masiku makumi anayi usana ndi usiku.
Genesis7:13 Linali tsiku lomwelo pamene Nowa ndi ana ake aamuna
Genesis7:14 Iwowa analowa mʼchombomo pamodzi ndi nyama iliyonse ya kutchire monga mwa mtundu wake
Genesis7:15 Nowa analowa mu chombo muja pamodzi ndi zamoyo zonse.
Genesis7:16 Iye analowa nazo zazimuna ndi zazikazi monga mmene Mulungu anamulamulira. Kenaka Yehova anatseka pa khomo.
Genesis7:17 Chigumula chinagwa pa dziko la pansi kwa masiku makumi anayi. Madzi anayamba kuchuluka ndipo ananyamula chombo chija ndi kuchiyandamitsa pamwamba pa dziko.
Genesis7:18 Madzi anafika mwamphamvu ndipo anachulukirachulukira pa dziko lapansi moti chombo chinayandama pamwamba pa madziwo.
Genesis7:19 Madzi a chigumula anabwerabe molimbika motero kuti mapiri ataliatali onse a pa dziko anamizidwa.
Genesis7:20 Madzi anakwera namiza mapiri kwa mamita pafupifupi asanu ndi awiri.
Genesis7:21 Chamoyo chilichonse choyenda pa dziko lapansi chinafa: mbalame
Genesis7:22 Chilichonse chamoyo
Genesis7:23 Chamoyo chilichonse pa dziko lapansi chinawonongedwa
Genesis7:24 Madziwo anadzaza dziko lonse lapansi kwa masiku 150.
Genesis8:1 Tsono Mulungu anakumbukira Nowa ndi nyama zonse zakuthengo ndi ziweto zimene anali nazo mu chombo. Yehova anatumiza mphepo pa dziko lapansi ndipo madzi anaphwera.
Genesis8:2 Tsono akasupe a madzi ambiri a pansi pa dziko ndi zitseko za madzi a kumwamba zinatsekedwa
Genesis8:3 Madzi amaphwabe pa dziko lapansi. Pakutha pa masiku 150
Genesis8:4 ndipo pa tsiku la 17 la mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri
Genesis8:5 Madzi anapitirira kuphwa mpaka mwezi wa khumi
Genesis8:6 Patapita masiku makumi anayi
Genesis8:7 natulutsa khwangwala
Genesis8:8 Kenaka anatulutsa nkhunda kuti aone ngati madzi aphwa pa dziko.
Genesis8:9 Koma nkhunda sinapeze poti nʼkutera chifukwa panali madzi ponseponse pa dziko lapansi. Choncho inabwerera kwa Nowa mʼchombo. Nowa anatulutsa dzanja lake kunja ndi kutenga nkhundayo kuyibwezera mʼchombo mmene iye anali.
Genesis8:10 Choncho anadikirabe masiku ena asanu ndi awiri ndipo anatulutsanso nkhundayo mʼchombo muja.
Genesis8:11 Pamene nkhunda inabwerera madzulo ake
Genesis8:12 Iye anadikira masiku ena asanu ndi awiri ndipo anatumizanso nkhunda ija
Genesis8:13 Pofika tsiku loyamba la mwezi woyamba wa chaka chimene Nowa anakwanitsa zaka 601
Genesis8:14 Pokwana tsiku la 27 la mwezi wachiwiri dziko lapansi linawumiratu.
Genesis8:15 Tsono Mulungu anawuza Nowa kuti
Genesis8:16 “Iwe
Genesis8:17 Tulutsa zamoyo zonse zili ndi iwe
Genesis8:18 Nowa anatuluka pamodzi ndi ana ake aamuna
Genesis8:19 Nyama zonse
Genesis8:20 Pamenepo Nowa anamanga guwa lansembe la Yehova ndipo anatengako mtundu uliwonse wa nyama zoti nʼkudya ndi mbalame zoti nʼkudya naperekapo nsembe yopsereza.

Genesis9:2 Nyama zonse za dziko lapansi

Genesis9:4 “Koma musamadye nyama imene ikanali ndi magazi oyenda.
Genesis9:5 Aliyense wopha munthu adzaphedwa
Genesis9:6 “Aliyense wopha munthu
Genesis9:7 Inu muberekane ndi kuchulukana kuti mudzaze dziko lonse lapansi ndi kuligonjetsa.”
Genesis9:8 Mulungu anawuza Nowa ndi ana ake kuti
Genesis9:9 “Tsopano Ine ndapangana ndi iwe ndi zidzukulu zako zamʼtsogolomo
Genesis9:10 pamodzi ndi zamoyo zonse
Genesis9:11 Pangano langa ndi ili: Ine ndilonjeza kuti sindidzawononganso zamoyo ndi madzi a chigumula. Chigumula sichidzawononganso dziko lapansi.”
Genesis9:12 Ndipo Mulungu anati
Genesis9:13 Ndayika utawaleza wanga mʼmitambo
Genesis9:14 Nthawi zonse pakakhala mitambo mu mlengalenga ndipo utawaleza uwoneka
Genesis9:15 ndizikumbukira pangano langa pakati pa Ine ndi inu ndi zolengedwa zonse. Madzi sadzakhalanso chigumula chowononga dziko lapansi.
Genesis9:16 Utawaleza ukamadzaoneka mʼmitambo
Genesis9:17 Choncho Mulungu anati kwa Nowa
Genesis9:18 Ana aamuna a Nowa amene anatuluka mʼchombo muja anali Semu
Genesis9:19 Ana aamuna a Nowa amenewa ndiwo anali makolo a anthu onse pa dziko lapansi.
Genesis9:20 Nowa anali munthu woyamba kulima munda wamphesa.
Genesis9:21 Tsiku lina pamene Nowa anamwako vinyo wa zipatso za mʼmundawo analedzera ndipo anavula zovala zake zonse ndi kugona mu tenti yake ali maliseche.
Genesis9:22 Hamu
Genesis9:23 Koma Semu ndi Yafeti anatenga chofunda nachiyika pa mapewa awo; ndipo anayenda chamʼmbuyo naphimba umaliseche wa abambo awo. Anafulatira kuti asaone umaliseche wa abambo awo.

Genesis9:25 anati
Genesis9:26 Anatinso

Genesis10:5 	(Amenewa ndiwo makolo a anthu okhala mʼmphepete mwa nyanja. Awa ndi ana a Yafeti monga mwa mafuko a mu mitundu yawo

Genesis10:7 	Ana aamuna a Kusi anali: Seba

Genesis12:1 Tsiku lina Yehova anamuwuza Abramu kuti
Genesis12:2 “Ndidzakusandutsa kholo la mtundu waukulu wa anthu ndipo ndidzakudalitsa; ndi kukusandutsa wotchuka kotero kuti udzakhala dalitso kwa anthu ambiri.
Genesis12:3 Ndidzadalitsa amene adzadalitsa iwe
Genesis12:4 Choncho Abramu ananyamuka monga momwe Yehova anamuwuzira
Genesis12:5 Abramu anatenga mkazi wake Sarai
Genesis12:6 Abramu anadutsa mʼdzikomo mpaka kukafika ku Sekemu pa mtengo wa thundu wa ku More. Nthawi imeneyo Akanaani analipobe mʼdzikomo.
Genesis12:7 Yehova anadza kwa Abramu nati
Genesis12:8 Atachoka pamenepo analowera cha ku mapiri a kummawa kwa Beteli namangako tenti yake pakati pa Beteli chakumadzulo ndi Ai chakummawa. Kumeneko anamangira Yehova guwa lansembe napemphera mʼdzina la Yehovayo.
Genesis12:9 Kenaka Abramu ananyamuka kumalowera cha ku Negevi.
Genesis12:10 Kunagwa njala yayikulu mʼdzikomo
Genesis12:11 Atatsala pangʼono kulowa mu Igupto
Genesis12:12 Tsono Aigupto akakuona adzanena kuti ‘Ameneyu ndi mkazi wake.’ Tsono adzandipha ine nakusiya iwe ndi moyo.
Genesis12:13 Tsono udzikawawuza kuti iwe ndiwe mlongo wanga. Ukatero zidzandiyendera bwino ndipo ndidzapulumuka chifukwa cha iwe.”
Genesis12:14 Pamene Abramu anafika ku Igupto
Genesis12:15 Pamene akuluakulu a ku nyumba ya Farao anamuona
Genesis12:16 Abramu naye zinthu zinkamuyendera bwino chifukwa cha Sarai. Farao anamupatsa nkhosa
Genesis12:17 Koma Yehova anabweretsa matenda owopsa pa Farao pamodzi ndi banja lake lonse chifukwa cha Sarai mkazi wa Abramu.
Genesis12:18 Choncho Farao anayitanitsa Abramu namufunsa kuti
Genesis12:19 Nʼchifukwa chiyani unati ndi mlongo wako
Genesis12:20 Farao analamula asilikali ake ndipo iwo anamutulutsa Abramu pamodzi ndi mkazi wake ndi zonse anali nazo.
Genesis13:1 Choncho Abramu pamodzi ndi mkazi wake ndi zonse anali nazo
Genesis13:2 Abramu anali wolemera kwambiri; anali ndi ziweto ndiponso siliva ndi golide.
Genesis13:3 Atachoka ku Negevi
Genesis13:4 ndiponso kumene Abramu anamangira Yehova guwa lansembe kwa nthawi yoyamba ndi kupemphera mʼdzina la Yehova.
Genesis13:5 Loti amene ankayendayenda ndi Abramu nayenso anali ndi ziweto zosiyanasiyana ndi matenti.
Genesis13:6 Motero dziko linayamba kuwachepera kuti onse nʼkukhala pamodzi
Genesis13:7 Mikangano inayambika pakati pa abusa a Abramu ndi abusa a Loti. Nthawi imeneyo nʼkuti Akanaani ndi Aperezi akukhalanso mʼdziko lomwelo.
Genesis13:8 Tsono Abramu anati kwa Loti

Genesis13:11 Choncho Loti anadzisankhira yekha chigwa chonse cha Yorodani nanyamuka kulowera cha kummawa. Choncho anthu awiriwa anasiyana.

Genesis13:15 Dziko lonse ukulionalo ndidzalipereka kwa iwe ndi zidzukulu zako mpaka muyaya.
Genesis13:16 Ndidzakupatsa zidzukulu zochuluka ngati fumbi lapansi moti amene angathe kuwerenga fumbilo ndiye kuti angathenso kuwerenga zidzukulu zako.
Genesis13:17 Dzuka ndipo uyendere dziko lonseli mulitali ndi mulifupi pakuti ndalipereka kwa iwe.”

Genesis14:5 Mʼchaka cha khumi ndi chinayi

Genesis17:1 Pamene Abramu anali ndi zaka 99
Genesis17:2 Ndipo Ine ndikulonjeza kuti ndidzakupatsa zidzukulu zambiri.”
Genesis17:3 Pomwepo Abramu anadziponya pansi ndipo Mulungu anati kwa iye
Genesis17:4 “Pangano langa ndi iwe ndi ili: Udzakhala kholo la mitundu yambiri ya anthu.
Genesis17:5 Sudzatchedwanso Abramu; dzina lako lidzakhala Abrahamu
Genesis17:6 Ndidzakupatsa zidzukulu zambiri motero kuti mitundu yambiri ya anthu idzatuluka mwa iwe. Mafumunso adzatuluka mwa iwe.
Genesis17:7 Pangano langa ndi iwe pamodzi ndi zidzukulu za mibado ya mʼtsogolo lidzakhala la muyaya. Ndidzakhala Mulungu wako ndi Mulungu wa zidzukulu zako.
Genesis17:8 Dziko lonse la Kanaani
Genesis17:9 Kenaka Mulungu anati kwa Abrahamu
Genesis17:10 Iwe pamodzi ndi zidzukulu zako zobwera pambuyo pako muzisunga pangano ili loti mwamuna aliyense pakati panupa azichita mdulidwe.
Genesis17:11 Kuyambira tsopano muzichita mdulidwe ndipo ichi chidzakhala chizindikiro cha pangano langa ndi iwe.
Genesis17:12 Kuyambira tsopano mpaka mibado ya mʼtsogolomo mwana wamwamuna aliyense pakati panu amene wakwana masiku asanu ndi atatu ayenera kuchita mdulidwe. Awa ndi ana obadwa mʼbanja lako
Genesis17:13 Achite mdulidwe ndithu mwana wamwamuna aliyense
Genesis17:14 Mwamuna aliyense amene adzakhala wosachita mdulidwe adzachotsedwa pakati pa anthu ake chifukwa sanasunge pangano langa.”
Genesis17:15 Mulungu anatinso kwa Abrahamu
Genesis17:16 Ndidzamudalitsa ndipo adzakubalira mwana wamwamuna. Ndidzamudalitsa kuti akhale mayi wa mitundu ya anthu; mafumu a anthuwo adzachokera mwa iye.”

Genesis20:3 Koma usiku

Genesis20:5 Kodi Abrahamu sanandiwuze kuti iyeyu ndi mlongo wake? Ndiponso mkaziyu ankanena kuti Abrahamu ndi mlongo wake. Choncho ine pochita izi

Genesis21:6 Sara anati
Genesis21:7 Ndipo anawonjezera kuti

Genesis21:18 Munyamule mnyamatayo ndipo umugwire dzanja pakuti ndidzamupanga kukhala mtundu waukulu.”
Genesis21:19 Kenaka Mulungu anatsekula maso a Hagara ndipo anaona chitsime cha madzi. Choncho anapita nadzaza botolo lija ndi madzi ndi kumupatsa mnyamatayo kuti amwe.
Genesis21:20 Mulungu anali ndi mnyamatayo pamene ankakula. Anakhala ku chipululu nakhala katswiri wolasa uta.

Genesis21:22 Pa nthawiyo

Genesis28:1 Choncho Isake anayitanitsa Yakobo namudalitsa nʼkumuwuzitsa kuti
Genesis28:2 Panopo upite ku Padanaramu
Genesis28:3 Mulungu Wamphamvuzonse akudalitse iwe nakupatse ana ambiri mpaka udzasanduke gulu lalikulu la mitundu ya anthu.
Genesis28:4 Mulunguyo akudalitse iwe monga mmene anamudalitsira Abrahamu kuti zidzukulu zako zidzalandira dziko limene ukukhalamo ngati mlendo kuti lidzakhale lawo. Ili ndi dziko limene Mulungu anapereka kwa Abrahamu.”
Genesis28:5 Ndipo Isake anamulola Yakobo kuti anyamuke kupita ku Padanaramu kwa Labani mwana wa Betueli Mwaramu. Labani anali mlongo wa Rebeka
Genesis28:6 Tsopano Esau anadziwa kuti Isake anadalitsa Yakobo ndi kumutumiza ku Padanaramu kuti akakwatire kumeneko. Anawuzidwanso kuti
Genesis28:7 Yakobo anamvera abambo ake ndi amayi ake ndi kupita ku Padanaramu.
Genesis28:8 Ndiye pamenepo Esau anazindikira kuti abambo ake Isake sankakondwera ndi akazi a ku Kanaani;
Genesis28:9 anapita kwa Ismaeli mwana wa Abrahamu nakwatira Mahalati mwana wa Ismaeli
Genesis28:10 Yakobo ananyamuka pa ulendo kuchoka ku Beeriseba kupita ku Harani.
Genesis28:11 Atafika pa malo pena
Genesis28:12 Mʼmaloto
Genesis28:13 Tsono Yehova anayimirira pambali pake
Genesis28:14 Zidzukulu zako zidzachuluka ngati fumbi la pa dziko lapansi ndipo zidzabalalikira kumadzulo ndi kummawa
Genesis28:15 Ine ndili nawe pamodzi ndipo ndidzakuyangʼanira kulikonse upiteko
Genesis28:16 Yakobo atadzidzimuka
Genesis28:17 Tsono anachita mantha ndipo anati
Genesis28:18 Mmamawa mwake Yakobo anatenga mwala umene anatsamira mutu wake uja nawuyimika ngati chipilala ndi kuthira mafuta pamwamba pake
Genesis28:19 Iye anawatcha malowo Beteli
Genesis28:20 Pamenepo Yakobo analumbira kwa Yehova nati
Genesis28:21 ngati inu mudzandibweretsa kwathu mu mtendere
Genesis28:22 ndipo mwala uwu ndawuyimikawu udzakhala Nyumba ya Mulungu. Ine ndidzakupatsani chakhumi cha zinthu zonse zimene mudzandipatse.”
Genesis29:1 Yakobo anapitiriza ulendo wake kupita ku dziko la anthu a kummawa.
Genesis29:2 Atafika kumeneko anaona chitsime ku busa ndipo panali magulu atatu a nkhosa zitagona pafupi ndi chitsimecho chifukwa nkhosazo zimamwetsedwa madzi ochokera mʼchitsimecho. Pamwamba pa chitsimecho panali mwala waukulu.
Genesis29:3 Amati nkhosa zonse zikasonkhana
Genesis29:4 Yakobo anafunsa abusawo kuti
Genesis29:5 Iye anawafunsanso kuti
Genesis29:6 Ndipo Yakobo anawafunsanso
Genesis29:7 Iye anati
Genesis29:8 Iwo anayankha
Genesis29:9 Ali chiyankhulire nawo
Genesis29:10 Yakobo ataona Rakele mwana wa Labani
Genesis29:11 Kenaka Yakobo anapsompsona Rakele nayamba kulira mokweza.
Genesis29:12 Kenaka Yakobo anawuza Rakele kuti iye ndi mwana wa Rebeka
Genesis29:13 Labani atamva za Yakobo
Genesis29:14 Ndipo
Genesis29:15 Tsono Labani anawuza Yakobo kuti
Genesis29:16 Tsono Labani anali ndi ana aakazi awiri; dzina la wamkulu linali Leya
Genesis29:17 Leya anali ndi maonekedwe wofowoka koma Rakele anali wa maonekedwe wokongola kwambiri.
Genesis29:18 Yakobo anakonda Rakele ndipo anati
Genesis29:19 Labani anati
Genesis29:20 Choncho Yakobo anagwira ntchito zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri chifukwa cha Rakele. Koma kwa iye zaka zonsezi zinakhala ngati masiku wochepa chifukwa anamukonda Rakele.
Genesis29:21 Kenaka Yakobo anati kwa Labani
Genesis29:22 Pamenepo Labani anakonza phwando la ukwati
Genesis29:23 Koma pokwana usiku
Genesis29:24 Ndipo Labani anapereka wantchito wake wamkazi Zilipa kwa Leya kuti akhale wantchito wake.
Genesis29:25 Pakucha mmawa
Genesis29:26 Labani anayankha
Genesis29:27 Yamba watsiriza sabata ya chikondwerero cha ukwati wa Leya; kenaka ndidzakupatsanso Rakele. Koma udzayenera kundigwirira ntchito zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri.”
Genesis29:28 Yakobo anachitadi momwemo. Anamaliza sabata ya chikondwerero cha Leya
Genesis29:29 Labani anapereka wantchito wake wamkazi Biliha kwa Rakele kuti akhale wantchito wake.
Genesis29:30 Yakobo analowana ndi mkazi wake Rakele
Genesis29:31 Pamene Mulungu anaona kuti Yakobo sankamukonda Leya kwambiri
Genesis29:32 Leya anakhala ndi pathupi ndipo anabereka mwana wamwamuna. Anamutcha Rubeni pakuti anati
Genesis29:33 Anakhalanso ndi pathupi ndipo pamene anabereka mwana wamwamuna anati
Genesis29:34 Anatenganso pathupi kachitatu
Genesis29:35 Anatenganso pathupi pena
Genesis30:1 Rakele ataona kuti sakumuberekera Yakobo ana
Genesis30:2 Yakobo anapsera mtima Rakele ndipo nati
Genesis30:3 Pamenepo Rakele anati kwa Yakobo
Genesis30:4 Ndipo anamupatsa Yakobo wantchito wake Biliha kuti alowane naye. Choncho Yakobo analowana ndi Biliha
Genesis30:5 ndipo Bilihayo anatenga pathupi namubalira Yakobo mwana wamwamuna.
Genesis30:6 Pamenepo Rakele anati
Genesis30:7 Biliha
Genesis30:8 Pamenepo Rakele anati
Genesis30:9 Pamene Leya anaona kuti waleka kubereka ana
Genesis30:10 Zilipa
Genesis30:11 Pamenepo Leya anati
Genesis30:12 Zilipa
Genesis30:13 Pamenepo Leya anati
Genesis30:14 Pa nthawi yokolola tirigu
Genesis30:15 Koma iye anati kwa Rakele
Genesis30:16 Choncho pamene Yakobo ankabwera kuchokera ku munda madzulo
Genesis30:17 Mulungu anamva pemphero la Leya ndipo anatenga pathupi nabalira Yakobo mwana wa mwamuna wachisanu.
Genesis30:18 Pamenepo Leya anati
Genesis30:19 Leya anatenganso pathupi nabalira Yakobo mwana wa mwamuna wachisanu ndi chimodzi.
Genesis30:20 Pamenepo Leya anati
Genesis30:21 Patapita nthawi Leya anabereka mwana wamkazi ndipo anamutcha Dina.
Genesis30:22 Kenaka
Genesis30:23 Rakele anatenga pathupi nabala mwana wamwamuna ndipo anati
Genesis30:24 Iye anamutcha mwanayo Yosefe
Genesis30:25 Rakele atabereka Yosefe
Genesis30:26 Patseni akazi anga ndi ana anga
Genesis30:27 Koma Labani anati kwa iye
Genesis30:28 Anapitiriza kunena kuti
Genesis30:29 Koma Yakobo anati kwa iye
Genesis30:30 Poyamba munali nazo zochepa ine ndisanabwere
Genesis30:31 Labani anafunsa
Genesis30:32 Mundilole ndiyendeyende pakati pa ziweto zanu lero ndi kuchotsamo mwana wankhosa wamkazi aliyense wakuda
Genesis30:33 Ndipo chilungamo changa chidzaoneka mʼtsogolo
Genesis30:34 Labani anati
Genesis30:35 Tsiku lomwelo Labani anachotsa atonde onse ndi mbuzi zazikazi zonse zimene zinali ndi mawangamawanga kapena zamathothomathotho
Genesis30:36 Kenaka Labani anayenda mtunda wa masiku atatu kutalikirana ndi Yakobo koma Yakobo anapitiriza kuweta nkhosa zina zonse za Labani.
Genesis30:37 Tsono Yakobo anatenga nthambi zaziwisi za mitengo ya mkundi
Genesis30:38 Atatero anayika nthambi zija mʼmagome omwera madzi molunjika ziweto zija kuti pakumwa madziwo ziweto zazikazi ziziyangʼana nthambi zija popeza kuti pakumwa madzi ziweto zija zinkakwerana.
Genesis30:39 Ndiye kuti nkhosa zija zinkatenga mawere pakumwa madzi molunjika nthambi zija
Genesis30:40 Yakobo anayika padera ana a ziweto zija. Koma ziweto zina anaziyika kuti ziyangʼanane ndi za Labani
Genesis30:41 Yakobo ankayika nthambi zija momwera madzi pamene ziweto zamphamvu zazikazi zinkakweredwa pofuna kuti zitenge mawere pakumwa madzi moyangʼanana ndi nthambi zija.
Genesis30:42 Koma sankayika nthambizo pamene ziweto zofowoka zazikazi zinkakweredwa pakumwa madzi. Choncho ziweto zofowoka zonse zinakhala za Labani
Genesis30:43 Mwa njira imeneyi
Genesis31:1 Yakobo anamva zimene ana aamuna a Labani ankanena kuti
Genesis31:2 Choncho Yakobo anaona kuti Labani sankamuonetsanso nkhope yabwino monga kale.
Genesis31:3 Pamenepo Yehova anati kwa Yakobo
Genesis31:4 Choncho Yakobo anatumiza mawu kukayitana Rakele ndi Leya kuti abwere ku busa kumene ankaweta ziweto zake.
Genesis31:5 Iye anawawuza kuti
Genesis31:6 Inu mukudziwa kuti ndagwirira ntchito abambo anu ndi mphamvu zanga zonse
Genesis31:7 chonsecho abambo anu akhala akundinyenga posintha malipiro anga kakhumi konse. Komabe Mulungu sanalole kuti andichitire choyipa
Genesis31:8 Pamene abambo anu anati
Genesis31:9 Motero Mulungu walanda abambo anu ziweto zawo ndi kundipatsa.
Genesis31:10 “Pa nthawi imene ziweto zimatenga mawere ndinalota maloto
Genesis31:11 Kutulo komweko
Genesis31:12 Ndipo iye anati
Genesis31:13 Ine ndine Mulungu amene ndinadza kwa iwe pa Beteli paja. Beteli ndi kumalo kuja kumene unayimika mwala ndi kuwudzoza mafuta
Genesis31:14 Pamenepo Rakele ndi Leya anayankha
Genesis31:15 Kodi abambo athu samationa ife ngati alendo? Iwo anatigulitsa ndi kuwononga ndalama zonse anazipeza pa ifezo.
Genesis31:16 Chuma chonse chimene Mulungu walanda abambo athu
Genesis31:17 Pamenepo Yakobo anakonzeka nakweza ana ake ndi akazi ake pa ngamira
Genesis31:18 anakusa ziweto zake zonse patsogolo natenga katundu wake yense amene anamupeza ku Padanaramu
Genesis31:19 Labani atachoka pa khomo kupita kukameta nkhosa
Genesis31:20 Komanso nthawi iyi nʼkuti Yakobo atamunamiza Labani Mwaramu posamuwuza zoona kuti afuna kuthawa.
Genesis31:21 Choncho anathawa ndi zonse anali nazo. Ananyamuka nawoloka mtsinje wa Yufurate kupita cha ku Giliyadi
Genesis31:22 Patapita masiku atatu
Genesis31:23 Pomwepo anatengana ndi abale ake namulondola Yakobo kwa masiku asanu ndi awiri ndipo anakamupezera ku Giliyadi
Genesis31:24 Koma Mulungu anabwera kwa Labani
Genesis31:25 Pamene Labani amamupeza Yakobo
Genesis31:26 Tsono Labani anati kwa Yakobo
Genesis31:27 Chifukwa chiyani unandinamiza ndi kuthawa mozemba wosandiwuza? Ukanandiwuza
Genesis31:28 Sunandilole kuti ndingopsompsona adzukulu anga ndi ana anga aakazi motsanzikana nawo. Unachita zopusa.
Genesis31:29 Ndili nayo mphamvu yakukuchita choyipa; koma usiku wapitawu
Genesis31:30 Ndikudziwa kuti unachoka chifukwa unapukwa kufuna kubwerera kwanu kwa abambo ako. Koma nʼchifukwa chiyani unaba milungu yanga?”
Genesis31:31 Yakobo anayankha Labani kuti
Genesis31:32 Koma mukapeza wina aliyense ndi milungu yanu
Genesis31:33 Choncho Labani analowadi mu tenti ya Yakobo
Genesis31:34 Koma Rakele anatengadi milungu ija ndi kuyiika mʼkati mwa chokhalira cha pa ngamira
Genesis31:35 Rakele anati kwa abambo ake
Genesis31:36 Yakobo anapsa mtima nafunsa Labani mwaukali kuti
Genesis31:37 Chifukwa chiyani mwafunyulula katundu wanga? Ndipo mwapeza chiyani cha inu pamenepa? Chimene mwapezapo chiyikeni poyera pamaso pa abale anu ndi anga kuti atiweruze.
Genesis31:38 “Ndakhala nanu kwa zaka makumi awiri tsopano ndipo nkhosa ndi mbuzi zanu sizinapoloze
Genesis31:39 Chiweto chikakhadzulidwa ndi chirombo
Genesis31:40 Moyo wanga unali wotere: Dzuwa limanditentha masana ndipo usiku ndimazunzika ndi kuzizira. Tulo sindimalipeza konse.
Genesis31:41 Zinthu zinali chonchi kwa zaka makumi awiri zimene ndinali mʼnyumba mwanu. Ndinakugwirirani ntchito kwa zaka khumi ndi zinayi chifukwa cha ana anu aakazi awiri ndipo zaka zina zisanu ndi chimodzi chifukwa cha ziweto zanu
Genesis31:42 Akanapanda kukhala nane Mulungu wa abambo anga
Genesis31:43 Labani anayankha Yakobo nati
Genesis31:44 Tsono
Genesis31:45 Choncho Yakobo anayimiritsa mwala ngati chipilala.
Genesis31:46 Nati kwa abale ake
Genesis31:47 Labani anawutcha muluwo Yegara-sahaduta
Genesis31:48 Labani anati
Genesis31:49 Unatchedwanso Mizipa
Genesis31:50 Ngati ukazunza ana anga kapena kukwatira akazi enanso
Genesis31:51 Labani anatinso kwa Yakobo
Genesis31:52 Mulu wa miyala uwu ndi chipilalachi ndi mboni. Ine sindidzadutsa mulu wa miyalawu kudzalimbana ndi iwe. Iwenso usadzadutse mulu wa miyalawu kudzalimbana nane.
Genesis31:53 Mulungu wa Abrahamu ndi Mulungu wa Nahori ndiye adzatiweruze.” Choncho Yakobo analumbira mʼdzina la Mulungu amene Isake
Genesis31:54 Yakobo anapereka nsembe pa phiri paja
Genesis31:55 Mmamawa wake
Genesis32:1 Nayenso Yakobo analowera njira yake
Genesis32:2 Pamene Yakobo anawaona anati
Genesis32:3 Yakobo anatumiza amithenga ake kwa mʼbale wake Esau ku dera la Seiri
Genesis32:4 Anawalangiza kuti
Genesis32:5 Ndili ndi ngʼombe
Genesis32:6 Pamene amithenga aja anabwerera kwa Yakobo
Genesis32:7 Yakobo anali ndi mantha ndi nkhawa yayikulu kwambiri. Tsono anagawa anthu onse amene anali naye
Genesis32:8 Mʼmaganizo ake iye ankanena kuti
Genesis32:9 Pamenepo Yakobo anapemphera
Genesis32:10 Ine siwoyenera kulandira kukoma mtima kwanu ndi kukhulupirika kwanu kumene mwaonetsa wantchito wanu. Ndinali ndi ndodo yokha pamene ndinawoloka Yorodani uyu koma tsopano ndili ndi magulu awiri.
Genesis32:11 Ndipulumutseni mʼdzanja la mʼbale wanga Esau
Genesis32:12 Paja Inu munandilonjeza kuti simudzalephera kundichitira zabwino ndi kuti zidzukulu zanga zidzakhala zosawerengeka ngati mchenga wa ku nyanja.”
Genesis32:13 Iye anagona pomwepo usiku umenewo. Pambuyo pake anasankhula pa chuma chimene anali nacho zinthu izi ngati mphatso za Esau
Genesis32:14 Anasankhula mbuzi zazikazi 200 ndi atonde makumi awiri
Genesis32:15 ngamira za mkaka 30 ndi ana awo
Genesis32:16 Iye anazipereka kwa antchito ake kuti azikuse
Genesis32:17 Anawuza mnyamata wa gulu loyamba kuti
Genesis32:18 Pamenepo ukayankhe kuti
Genesis32:19 Anawuza mawu omwewo kwa wachiwiri
Genesis32:20 Muzikanena kuti
Genesis32:21 Choncho mphatso za Yakobo zinatsogola
Genesis32:22 Usiku umenewo Yakobo anauka natenga akazi ake awiri
Genesis32:23 Atatha kuwawolotsa pa mtsinjewo anawolotsanso katundu wake yense.
Genesis32:24 Tsono Yakobo anatsala yekha. Tsono munthu wina anadzalimbana naye mpaka mʼmbandakucha.
Genesis32:25 Pamene munthuyo anaona kuti sangathe kumugonjetsa
Genesis32:26 Kenaka munthuyo anati
Genesis32:27 Munthu uja anamufunsa Yakobo kuti
Genesis32:28 Pamenepo munthuyo anati
Genesis32:29 Yakobo anati
Genesis32:30 Choncho Yakobo anawatcha malowo Penueli
Genesis32:31 Dzuwa linamutulukira Yakobo pamene amachoka pa Penueli. Tsono ankayenda chotsimphina chifukwa cha nyungʼunyu yake ija.
Genesis32:32 Nʼchifukwa chake mpaka lero Aisraeli sadya nyama ya pa nyungʼunyu chifukwa Yakobo anakhudzidwa pa nyungʼunyu.
Genesis33:1 Yakobo atakweza maso ake anaona Esau akubwera ndi anthu ake 400. Choncho ana ake anawagawira Leya
Genesis33:2 Anayika antchito ndi ana awo patsogolo
Genesis33:3 Iye mwini anakhala patsogolo nawerama mpaka kukhudza pansi kasanu ndi kawiri pamene amayandikira mʼbale wake.
Genesis33:4 Koma Esau anathamanga kukakumana ndi Yakobo ndipo anamukupatira namupsompsona. Onse awiri ankangolira.
Genesis33:5 Kenaka Esau ataona amayi ndi ana awo anamufunsa Yakobo kuti
Genesis33:6 Tsono antchito aja anayandikira naweramitsa mitu pansi.
Genesis33:7 Kenaka
Genesis33:8 Esau anafunsa kuti
Genesis33:9 Koma Esau anati
Genesis33:10 Yakobo anati
Genesis33:11 Chonde
Genesis33:12 Ndipo Esau anati

Genesis33:14 Choncho
Genesis33:15 Esau anati
Genesis33:16 Choncho tsiku limenelo Esau anayamba ulendo wobwerera ku Seiri.
Genesis33:17 Komabe Yakobo anapita ku Sukoti. Kumeneko anamanga nyumba yake ndi makola a ziweto zake. Nʼchifukwa chake malowa amatchedwa Sukoti.
Genesis33:18 Mmene ankabwerera kuchokera ku Padanaramu
Genesis33:19 Malo amenewo anagula kwa zidzukulu za Hamori
Genesis33:20 Pamalopo anamanganso guwa lansembe
Genesis34:1 Tsopano Dina
Genesis34:2 Pamene Sekemu mwana wa Hamori Mhivi
Genesis34:3 Koma Sekemu anamukondadi namwali uja
Genesis34:4 Choncho Sekemu anati kwa abambo ake Hamori
Genesis34:5 Yakobo anamva kuti mwana wake Dina wagwiriridwa
Genesis34:6 Kenaka Hamori
Genesis34:7 Pa nthawi iyi nʼkuti ana a Yakobo atabwererako ku busa kuja. Iwo atangomva zimene zinachitika
Genesis34:8 Koma Hamori anawawuza kuti
Genesis34:9 Tiyeni tichite mgwirizano wa ukwati kuti ife tidzikwatira ana anu ndi inu mudzikwatira ana athu.
Genesis34:10 Khazikikani pakati pathu. Mukhoza kupeza malo wokhala kulikonse kumene mufuna. Mukhozanso kuchita malonda momasuka ndi kupeza chuma.”
Genesis34:11 Pamenepo Sekemu anati kwa abambo ndi alongo ake a Dina
Genesis34:12 Tchulani mtengo wamalowolo umene ndiyenera kupereka
Genesis34:13 Ana a Yakobo anayankha Sekemu ndi abambo ake
Genesis34:14 Iwo anati
Genesis34:15 Tikuvomerani pokhapokha mutakhala ngati ife
Genesis34:16 Kenaka tidzakulolani kuti mukwatire ana athu
Genesis34:17 Koma ngati simuvomereza kuchita mdulidwe titenga mlongo wathu ndi kupita.”
Genesis34:18 Mawu amenewa anakondweretsa Hamori ndi mwana wake Sekemu.
Genesis34:19 Mnyamata uja amene anali wolemekezeka kwambiri pa banja lake lonse
Genesis34:20 Choncho Hamori ndi mwana wake Sekemu anapita ku chipata cha mzinda wawo kukayankhula ndi anthu a mu mzindawo.
Genesis34:21 Iwo anati
Genesis34:22 Komatu anthuwa adzavomereza kukhala amodzi a ife pokhapokha ngati amuna onse pakati pathu atachita mdulidwe monga alili iwo.
Genesis34:23 Tikatero
Genesis34:24 Amuna onse amene anatuluka ku chipata cha mzinda anavomerezana ndi Hamori ndi mwana wake Sekemu
Genesis34:25 Patapita masiku atatu
Genesis34:26 Anapha Hamori ndi Sekemu. Anakatenga Dina ku nyumba kwa Sekemu nanyamuka.
Genesis34:27 Ana a Yakobo anafika kwa anthu ophedwawo ndi kututa katundu mu mzindawo chifukwa anagwiririra mlongo wawo.
Genesis34:28 Analanda nkhosa zawo
Genesis34:29 Anawatengera chuma chawo chonse
Genesis34:30 Pamenepo Yakobo anati kwa Simeoni ndi Levi
Genesis34:31 Koma iwo anayankha kuti
Genesis35:1 Tsono Mulungu anati kwa Yakobo
Genesis35:2 Choncho Yakobo anawuza a pa banja pake ndi onse amene anali naye kuti
Genesis35:3 Tiyeni tinyamuke kuchoka kuno kupita ku Beteli. Kumeneko ndikamumangira guwa lansembe Mulungu amene anandithandiza pa nthawi za masautso anga
Genesis35:4 Choncho anamupatsa Yakobo milungu yachilendo yonse imene anali nayo pamodzi ndi ndolo. Iye anazikwirira pansi pa mtengo wa thundu ku Sekemu.
Genesis35:5 Pamenepo ananyamuka
Genesis35:6 Yakobo ndi anthu onse anali naye aja anafika ku Luzi (ku Beteli) mu dziko la Kanaani.
Genesis35:7 Kumeneko anamanga guwa lansembe nalitcha Eli Beteli
Genesis35:8 Debora mlezi wa Rakele anamwalira komweko nayikidwa mʼmanda pansi pa mtengo wa thundu cha kumunsi kwa Beteli. Choncho panatchedwa Aloni-Bakuti (mtengo wamaliro).
Genesis35:9 Yakobo atabwera kuchokera ku Padanaramu
Genesis35:10 Mulungu anati kwa iye
Genesis35:11 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa iye
Genesis35:12 Dziko limene ndinapereka kwa Abrahamu ndi Isake ndiliperekanso kwa iwe. Lidzakhala lako ndi la zidzukulu zako.”
Genesis35:13 Kenaka Mulungu anamusiya Yakobo.
Genesis35:14 Yakobo anayika mwala wachikumbutso pa malo pamene Mulungu anayankhula naye paja. Iye anathirapo nsembe yachakumwa ndi yamafuta.
Genesis35:15 Yakobo anawatcha malo amene Mulungu anayankhula naye aja kuti Beteli.
Genesis35:16 Kenaka anachoka ku Beteli. Koma ali pafupi kufika ku Efurata nthawi yakuti Rakele aone mwana inakwana. Iye anavutika pobereka.
Genesis35:17 Akanali chivutikire choncho
Genesis35:18 Tsono pamene Rakele ankapuma wefuwefu (popeza ankamwalira) iye anatcha mwana uja kuti Beni-Oni. Koma abambo ake anamutcha kuti Benjamini.
Genesis35:19 Choncho Rakele anamwalira ndipo anayikidwa pa njira yopita ku Efurata (Kumeneko ndiye ku Betelehemu).
Genesis35:20 Pa manda ake
Genesis35:21 Israeli (Yakobo) anasunthanso nakamanga tenti yake kupitirira nsanja ya Ederi.
Genesis35:22 Israeli akanali mʼderali
Genesis35:23 	Ana a Leya ndi awa: Rubeni anali mwana woyamba wa Yakobo
Genesis35:24 	Ana a Rakele ndi awa: Yosefe ndi Benjamini.
Genesis35:25 	Ana a Biliha
Genesis35:26 	Ana a Zilipa wantchito wa Leya ndi awa: Gadi ndi Aseri. Awa ndiwo ana a Yakobo amene anabadwira ku Padanaramu.
Genesis35:27 Yakobo anafika ku mudzi kwa abambo ake Isake ku Mamre
Genesis35:28 Isake anakhala ndi moyo zaka 180.
Genesis35:29 Anamwalira ali wokalamba kwambiri ndipo anakakhala ndi anthu a mtundu wake. Ndipo ana ake Esau ndi Yakobo anamuyika mʼmanda.
Genesis36:1 Nazi zidzukulu za Esau amene ankatchedwanso Edomu:
Genesis36:2 Esau anakwatira akazi atatu a ku Kanaani. Iwowa ndiwo Ada mwana wa Eloni Mhiti; Oholibama mwana wa Ana amene anali mwana wa Zibeoni Mhivi
Genesis36:3 ndi Basemati mwana wa Ismaeli
Genesis36:4 Ada anaberekera Esau
Genesis36:5 ndipo Oholibama anabereka Yeusi
Genesis36:6 Esau anatenga akazi ake
Genesis36:7 Iwo anatero chifukwa dziko limene ankakhalamo silikanakwanira awiriwo. Iwowa anali ndi ziweto zochuluka motero kuti sakanatha kukhala pamodzi.
Genesis36:8 Choncho Esau (amene ndi Edomu) anakakhazikika ku dziko la mapiri ku Seiri.
Genesis36:9 Nazi zidzukulu za Esau
Genesis36:10 	Awa ndi mayina a ana aamuna a Esau: Elifazi
Genesis36:11 	Awa ndi mayina a ana a Elifazi: Temani
Genesis36:12 	Timna anali mzikazi wa Elifazi
Genesis36:13 	Awa ndi ana a Reueli: Nahati
Genesis36:14 	Ana aamuna a Oholibama
Genesis36:15 Nawa mafumu a zidzukulu za Esau: Mwa ana a Elifazi
Genesis36:16 	Kora
Genesis36:17 	Mwa ana a Reueli
Genesis36:18 	Mwa ana a Oholibama
Genesis36:19 Amenewa ndiwo zidzukulu za Esau (amene ndi Edomu) ndiponso mafumu awo.
Genesis36:20 Awa ndi ana a Seiri Mhori
Genesis36:21 	Disoni
Genesis36:22 	Ana aamuna a Lotani anali awa: Hori ndi Homamu. Timna anali mlongo wake wa Lotani.
Genesis36:23 	Ana aamuna a Sobala anali awa: Alivani
Genesis36:24 	Ana aamuna a Zibeoni anali awa: Ayiwa ndi Ana. Uyu ndi Ana amene anapeza akasupe a madzi amoto mʼchipululu pamene ankadyetsa abulu abambo wake Zibeoni.
Genesis36:25 	Ana a Ana anali: Disoni ndi Oholibama mwana wake wamkazi.
Genesis36:26 	Ana aamuna a Disoni anali awa: Hemudani
Genesis36:27 	Ana aamuna a Ezeri anali awa: Bilihani
Genesis36:28 	Ana aamuna a Disani anali awa: Uzi ndi Arani.
Genesis36:29 	Mafumu a Ahori anali awa: Lotani
Genesis36:30 Disoni
Genesis36:31 Awa ndi mafumu amene ankalamulira dziko la Edomu
Genesis36:32 	Bela mwana wa Beori anakhala mfumu ya ku Edomu. Mzinda wake ankawutcha Dinihaba.
Genesis36:33 	Bela atamwalira
Genesis36:34 	Atafa Yobabu
Genesis36:35 	Husamu atamwalira
Genesis36:36 	Hadadi atamwalira
Genesis36:37 	Samila atamwalira
Genesis36:38 	Sauli atamwalira
Genesis36:39 Pamene Baala-Hanani mwana wa Akibori anamwalira
Genesis36:40 Mayina a mafumu ochokera mwa zidzukulu za Esau malingana ndi mafuko awo ndi malo a fuko lililonse anali awa: Timna
Genesis36:41 Oholibama
Genesis36:42 Kenazi
Genesis36:43 Magidieli ndi Iramu. Awa anali mafumu a ku Edomu molingana ndi malo awo okhala mʼdzikomo. Umenewu ndi mndandanda wa mʼbado wa Esau
Genesis37:1 Yakobo ankakhala mʼdziko la Kanaani kumene abambo ake ankakhala.
Genesis37:2 Mbiri ya banja la Yakobo ndi iyi: Yosefe
Genesis37:3 Tsono Israeli ankakonda Yosefe koposa ana ake ena onse
Genesis37:4 Pamene abale ake anaona kuti abambo awo ankakonda Yosefe kuposa aliyense wa iwo
Genesis37:5 Tsiku lina Yosefe analota maloto ndipo pamene anawuza abale ake za malotowo
Genesis37:6 Iye anawawuza kuti
Genesis37:7 Ife timamanga mitolo ya tirigu ku munda ndipo mwadzidzidzi mtolo wanga unayimirira chilili
Genesis37:8 Abale ake aja anamufunsa nati
Genesis37:9 Tsiku lina analotanso maloto ena
Genesis37:10 Atawuza abambo ake ndi abale ake malotowa
Genesis37:11 Abale ake anamuchitira nsanje
Genesis37:12 Tsono abale ake anapita kukadyetsa ziweto za abambo awo ku Sekemu
Genesis37:13 ndipo Israeli anati kwa Yosefe
Genesis37:14 Choncho anati kwa iye
Genesis37:15 munthu wina anamupeza akungozungulirazungulira mʼmunda ndipo anamufunsa
Genesis37:16 Iye anayankha
Genesis37:17 Munthuyo anayankha nati
Genesis37:18 Abale ake aja anamuonera patali. Ndipo asanafike nʼkomwe kumene kunali iwo kuja
Genesis37:19 Iwo anawuzana nati
Genesis37:20 Tsono tiyeni timuphe ndi kuponya thupi lake mu chimodzi mwa zitsime izi ndipo tidzati anadyedwa ndi nyama zakuthengo zolusa. Tsono timuonera zomwe ziti zichitike ndi maloto ake aja.”
Genesis37:21 Koma Rubeni atamva izi
Genesis37:22 tisakhetse magazi. Tiyeni timuponye mʼchitsime ku chipululu konkuno. Koma tisamuvulaze nʼkomwe. Rubeni ananena zonsezi kuti apulumutse Yosefe ndi kuti pambuyo pake akamupereke kwa abambo awo.”
Genesis37:23 Choncho Yosefe atafika kwa abale ake
Genesis37:24 ndipo anamutenga namuponya mʼchitsime chopanda madzi komanso mopanda chilichonse.
Genesis37:25 Atakhala pansi kuti adye chakudya
Genesis37:26 Yuda anafunsa abale ake nati
Genesis37:27 Bwanji timugulitse kwa Aismaeliwa
Genesis37:28 Amalonda ena a ku Midiyani ankadutsa pomwepo. Tsono abale ake a Yosefe anamutulutsa Yosefe uja mu chitsime chija ndipo anamugulitsa kwa Aismaeli aja pamtengo wa masekeli makumi awiri. Choncho anapita naye Yosefe ku Igupto.
Genesis37:29 Rubeni atabwerera ku chitsime kuja anapeza kuti Yosefe mulibe mʼchitsimemo. Pamenepo iye anangʼamba zovala zake
Genesis37:30 nabwerera kwa abale ake nati
Genesis37:31 Tsono anapha kamwana ka mbuzi
Genesis37:32 Iwo anatenga mkanjo uja nabwerera nawo kwa abambo awo nati
Genesis37:33 Iye anawuzindikira ndipo anati
Genesis37:34 Pamenepo Yakobo anangʼamba zovala zake
Genesis37:35 Ngakhale kuti ana ake onse aamuna ndi aakazi anasonkhana kudzamutonthoza
Genesis37:36 Amidiyani aja anagulitsa Yosefe kwa Potifara
Genesis38:1 Pa nthawi imeneyi
Genesis38:2 Kumeneko
Genesis38:3 Iye anatenga pathupi
Genesis38:4 Anatenganso pathupi nabala mwana wa mwamuna ndipo anamutcha Onani.
Genesis38:5 Anaberekanso mwana wina wamwamuna ndipo anamutcha Sela. Ameneyu anabadwa Yuda ali ku Kezibi.
Genesis38:6 Yuda anamupezera mkazi mwana wake woyamba uja Eri
Genesis38:7 Koma ntchito zoyipa za Eri
Genesis38:8 Pamenepo Yuda anati kwa Onani
Genesis38:9 Koma Onani anadziwa kuti mwanayo sadzakhala wake. Choncho nthawi zonse pamene amagona naye mkaziyo
Genesis38:10 Zimene ankachitazi zinayipira Yehova. Choncho anamulanganso ndi imfa.
Genesis38:11 Kenaka Yuda anati kwa mpongozi wake Tamara
Genesis38:12 Patapita nthawi yayitali
Genesis38:13 Tamara atamva kuti apongozi ake akupita ku Timna kukameta nkhosa
Genesis38:14 iye anavula zovala zake za umasiye
Genesis38:15 Yuda atamuona anangomuyesa mkazi wadama chabe
Genesis38:16 Tsono anapita kwa mkaziyo pamphepete pa msewu paja nati
Genesis38:17 Iye anati
Genesis38:18 Iye anati
Genesis38:19 Kenaka Tamara anachoka
Genesis38:20 Tsono Yuda anatuma bwenzi lake Mwadulamu uja ndi kamwana kambuzi kaja kuti akapereke kwa mkazi wadama uja
Genesis38:21 Anawafunsa anthu a komweko
Genesis38:22 Choncho anabwerera kwa Yuda nati
Genesis38:23 Pamenepo Yuda anati
Genesis38:24 Patapita miyezi itatu
Genesis38:25 Akumutulutsa
Genesis38:26 Yuda anazizindikira zinthuzo ndipo anati
Genesis38:27 Pamene Tamara nthawi inamukwanira yoti abeleke
Genesis38:28 Pamene ankabereka
Genesis38:29 Koma pamene anabweza mkonowo
Genesis38:30 Pambuyo pake mʼbale wake amene anali ndi ulusi wofiira pa mkono wake uja anabadwa ndipo anapatsidwa dzina lakuti Zera.
Genesis39:1 Tsopano Yosefe anatengedwa kupita ku Igupto. Potifara Mwigupto amene anali mmodzi wa akuluakulu a Farao ndiponso mkulu wa asilikali olonda ku nyumba kwa Farao
Genesis39:2 Koma Yehova anali ndi Yosefe ndipo zake zonse zimayenda bwino. Iye ankakhala mʼnyumba ya mbuye wake wa ku Igupto.
Genesis39:3 Mbuye wake anaona kuti Yehova anali naye Yosefe ndi kuti pa chilichonse chimene anachita Yehova ankaonetsetsa kuti achite bwino.
Genesis39:4 Potifara anakondwera ndi Yosefe chifukwa cha matumikiridwe ake. Choncho anamusandutsa woyangʼanira nyumba yake ndi zonse za mʼnyumba yake.
Genesis39:5 Kuchokera pa nthawi imene anamuyika kukhala woyangʼanira wa nyumbayo ndi zonse za mʼnyumbamo
Genesis39:6 Choncho anasiyira mʼmanja mwa Yosefe chilichonse chomwe anali nacho
Genesis39:7 Patapita kanthawi
Genesis39:8 Koma iye anakana namuwuza kuti
Genesis39:9 Motero kuti palibe wina wamkulu kuposa ine mʼnyumba muno. Ndipo palibe chilichonse chimene mbuye wanga sanachipereke kwa ine kupatula inuyo
Genesis39:10 Ndipo ngakhale kuti iye anayankhula mawu omwewa ndi Yosefe tsiku ndi tsiku
Genesis39:11 Tsiku lina Yosefe analowa mʼnyumbamo kukagwira ntchito zake
Genesis39:12 Mkazi uja anamugwira mkanjo Yosefe nati
Genesis39:13 Pamene mkazi uja anaona kuti Yosefe wamusiyira mkanjo wake mʼmanja mwake nathawira kunja kwa nyumba
Genesis39:14 iye anayitana antchito ake a mʼnyumba nati
Genesis39:15 Atandimva ndikukuwa
Genesis39:16 Tsono mkazi wa Potifara uja anasunga mkanjowo mpaka mbuye wake wa Yosefe atabwera ku nyumba.
Genesis39:17 Tsono anamuwuza nkhaniyi nati: “Wantchito Wachihebri amene munatibweretsera uja anabwera kuti adzagone nane.
Genesis39:18 Koma pamene ndinakuwa
Genesis39:19 Mbuye wake wa Yosefe atamva nkhani imene mkazi wake anamuwuza kuti
Genesis39:20 Tsono iye anatenga Yosefe namuyika mʼndende mmene ankasungiramo amʼndende a mfumu. Ndipo Yosefe anakhala mʼndendemo
Genesis39:21 koma Yehova anali naye
Genesis39:22 Choncho woyangʼanira ndende uja anamuyika Yosefe kukhala woyangʼanira onse amene anayikidwa mʼndende. Ndiponso anamupatsa udindo woyangʼanira zonse zochitika mʼndendemo.
Genesis39:23 Woyangʼanira ndende uja sankayangʼaniranso china chilichonse chimene chinali mu ulamuliro wa Yosefe
Genesis40:1 Patapita nthawi
Genesis40:2 Farao anapsa mtima ndi akuluakulu awiriwa
Genesis40:3 ndipo anakawatsekera mʼndende
Genesis40:4 Mkulu wa alonda aja anawapereka mʼmanja mwa Yosefe
Genesis40:5 Usiku wina
Genesis40:6 Mmawa wake
Genesis40:7 Choncho anafunsa akuluakulu a kwa Farao amene anali naye mʼndende muja kuti
Genesis40:8 Iwo anayankha
Genesis40:9 Choncho mkulu wa operekera zakumwa uja anamuwuza Yosefe maloto ake. Anati
Genesis40:10 unali ndi nthambi zitatu. Mpesawo utangophukira
Genesis40:11 Chikho cha Farao chinali mʼmanja mwanga
Genesis40:12 Yosefe anati kwa iye
Genesis40:13 Pakangopita masiku atatu
Genesis40:14 Koma zako zikakuyendera bwino
Genesis40:15 Popezatu ine anangochita mondiba kubwera nane kuno kuchokera ku dziko la Ahebri
Genesis40:16 Mkulu wa opanga buledi ataona kuti Yosefe wapereka tanthauzo labwino
Genesis40:17 Mu nsengwa yapamwamba munali zakudya zamitundumitundu za Farao
Genesis40:18 Yosefe anati
Genesis40:19 Pakangotha masiku atatu Farao adzakutulutsa muno koma adzakupachika. Ndipo mbalame zidzadya mnofu wako.”
Genesis40:20 Tsono tsiku lachitatulo linali lokumbukira kubadwa kwa Farao
Genesis40:21 Tsono Farao anamubwezera mkulu wa operekera zakumwa uja pa udindo wake
Genesis40:22 koma mkulu wa ophika buledi anamupachika
Genesis40:23 Koma mkulu wa operekera zakumwa uja sanamukumbukire Yosefe ndipo anamuyiwaliratu.
Genesis41:1 Patapita zaka ziwiri zathunthu
Genesis41:2 ndipo anangoona ngʼombe zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri zooneka bwino ndi zonenepa zikutuluka mu mtsinje muja ndi kuyamba kudya msipu wa mu mawango.
Genesis41:3 Kenaka ngʼombe zina zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri zosaoneka bwino ndi zowonda zinatulukanso mu mtsinje wa Nailo ndipo zinayimirira pambali pa zina zija zimene zinali mʼmphepete mwa mtsinje uja.
Genesis41:4 Ndipo ngʼombe zosaoneka bwino ndi zowonda zija zinadya ngʼombe zonenepa zija. Kenaka Farao anadzidzimuka.
Genesis41:5 Posakhalitsa anagonanso ndipo analota kachiwiri: Analota ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri za tirigu zathanzi labwino zitabala pa phata limodzi.
Genesis41:6 Kenaka ngala zina zisanu ndi ziwiri zinaphuka. Izi zinali zowonda ndi zowauka ndi mphepo ya kummawa.
Genesis41:7 Ngala zowonda zija zinameza ngala zathanzi ndi zonenepa zija. Farao anadzidzimuka ndipo anaona kuti anali maloto chabe.
Genesis41:8 Mmawa
Genesis41:9 Ndipo mkulu wa operekera zakumwa anati kwa Farao
Genesis41:10 Paja nthawi ina Farao anapsera mtima antchito akefe
Genesis41:11 Tsiku lina tonse awiri tinalota maloto
Genesis41:12 Tsono momwemo munali mnyamata wina Wachihebri
Genesis41:13 Ndipo zinthu zinachitikadi monga mmene anatitanthauzira. Ine anandibwezera pa ntchito yanga ndipo winayo anapachikidwa.”
Genesis41:14 Choncho Farao anamuyitanitsa Yosefe
Genesis41:15 Farao anati kwa Yosefe
Genesis41:16 Yosefe anamuyankha Farao kuti
Genesis41:17 Ndipo Farao anati kwa Yosefe
Genesis41:18 ndipo ngʼombe zisanu ndi ziwiri zonenepa ndi zooneka bwino zinatuluka mu mtsinje muja ndi kumadya msipu wa mu mawango.
Genesis41:19 Kenaka
Genesis41:20 Ngʼombe zosaoneka bwino ndi zowonda zija zinadya zisanu ndi ziwiri zonenepa zimene zinatuluka poyamba zija.
Genesis41:21 Koma ngakhale ngʼombezi zinadya zinazo
Genesis41:22 “Nditagonanso kachiwiri
Genesis41:23 Kenaka panaphukanso ngala zina zisanu ndi ziwiri zofota
Genesis41:24 Ngala zowondazo zinameza ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri zabwino zija. Ndinawawuza amatsenga koma palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe anatha kundimasulira.”
Genesis41:25 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa Farao
Genesis41:26 Ngʼombe zisanu ndi ziwiri zabwinozo ndi zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri. Ndipo ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri zabwinozo ndi zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri. Kutanthauza kwa maloto nʼkumodzi.
Genesis41:27 Ngʼombe zisanu ndi ziwiri zowonda ndi zosaoneka bwino zimene zinatuluka pambuyozo ndiponso ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri zachabechabe
Genesis41:28 “Tsono ndi monga ndafotokozeramu kuti Mulungu wakuwuziranitu zimene adzachite.
Genesis41:29 Zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri za zokolola zochuluka zikubwera mu dziko lonse la Igupto
Genesis41:30 koma zidzatsatana ndi zaka zina zisanu ndi ziwiri za njala. Chakudya chochuluka cha mu Igupto chija chidzayiwalika ndipo njalayo idzawononga dziko.
Genesis41:31 Zakudya zochuluka za mʼdzikomo zija sizidzakumbukirikanso chifukwa njala imene iti idzabwereyo idzakhala yoopsa.
Genesis41:32 Popeza kuti malotowa aperekedwa kwa inu Mfumu kawiri
Genesis41:33 “Tsopano Farao apezeretu munthu wozindikira ndi wanzeru ndipo amuyike kukhala woyangʼanira dziko lonse la Igupto.
Genesis41:34 Asankhenso akuluakulu a mʼdziko lino. Iwowa azitenga ndi kuyika padera limodzi la magawo asanu aliwonse a zokolola za mʼdziko muno mu zaka zonse zisanu ndi ziwiri za chakudya chochuluka.
Genesis41:35 Iwo asonkhanitse zakudya zonse za mʼzaka zabwino zikubwerazi. Pansi pa ulamuliro wa Farao
Genesis41:36 Chakudya chimenechi chisungidwe kuti chidzagwiritsidwe ntchito mʼzaka zisanu ndi ziwiri za njala imene ikubwerayo mu Igupto
Genesis41:37 Farao ndi nduna zake anagwirizana nawo malangizo a Yosefe.
Genesis41:38 Choncho Farao anafunsa nduna zake nati
Genesis41:39 Farao anati kwa Yosefe
Genesis41:40 Iwe ukhala nduna yayikulu mu dziko langa ndipo anthu onse adzamvera zimene walamula. Ine ndekha ndiye amene ndidzakuposa mphamvu chifukwa ndimakhala pa mpando waufumu.”
Genesis41:41 Choncho Farao anati kwa Yosefe
Genesis41:42 Ndipo Farao anavula mphete ku chala chake nayiveka ku chala cha Yosefe. Anamuvekanso mkanjo wonyezimira ndi nkufu wagolide mʼkhosi mwake.
Genesis41:43 Anamukweza Yosefe pa galeta ngati wachiwiri pa ulamuliro. Ndipo anthu anafuwula pamaso pake nati
Genesis41:44 Kenaka Farao anati kwa Yosefe
Genesis41:45 Farao anamupatsa Yosefe dzina lakuti Zafenati-Panea ndipo anamupatsanso Asenati mwana wa mkazi wa Potifara
Genesis41:46 Yosefe anali ndi zaka 30 pamene amayamba ntchito kwa Farao
Genesis41:47 Mʼzaka zisanu ndi ziwiri za zokolola zambiri zija
Genesis41:48 Yosefe anasonkhanitsa zakudya zonse zokololedwa mʼzaka zisanu ndi ziwiri zija ndipo anazisunga mʼmizinda. Mu mzinda uliwonse anayikamo chakudya chimene chinalimidwa mʼminda yozungulira komweko.
Genesis41:49 Yosefe anasunga tirigu wochuluka kwambiri ngati mchenga wa ku nyanja. Kunali tirigu wochuluka kwambiri motero kuti analeka nʼkulembera komwe.
Genesis41:50 Zisanafike zaka zanjala
Genesis41:51 Yosefe anamutcha mwana wake woyamba
Genesis41:52 Mwana wachiwiri wa mwamuna anamutcha Efereimu popeza anati
Genesis41:53 Zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri za zokolola zochuluka zija zinatha
Genesis41:54 ndipo zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri za njala zija zinayamba monga ananenera Yosefe. Njalayi inafika ku mayiko ena onse koma ku dziko lonse la Igupto kunali chakudya.
Genesis41:55 Pamene njala ija inakwanira dziko lonse la Igupto anthu analilira Farao kuti awapatse chakudya. Koma Farao anawawuza kuti
Genesis41:56 Pamene njala inafalikira dziko lonse
Genesis41:57 Anthu ankabwera ku Igupto kuchokera ku mayiko ena onse kudzagula tirigu kwa Yosefe
Genesis42:1 Yakobo atamva kuti ku Igupto kuli tirigu
Genesis42:2 Ine ndamva kuti ku Igupto kuli tirigu. Pitani kumeneko mukatigulireko kuti tisafe ndi njala.”
Genesis42:3 Choncho abale ake khumi a Yosefe anapita kukagula tirigu ku Igupto.
Genesis42:4 Koma Yakobo sanamulole Benjamini mngʼono wake wa Yosefe kuti apite nawo chifukwa anaopa kuti choyipa chingamuchitikire.
Genesis42:5 Choncho ana a Israeli aja anapita pamodzi ndi gulu la anzawo kukagula tirigu pakuti ku Kanaani kunalinso njala.
Genesis42:6 Pakuti Yosefe anali nduna yayikulu yolamulira dziko la Igupto
Genesis42:7 Yosefe atangowaona abale ake anawazindikira
Genesis42:8 Ngakhale Yosefe anawazindikira abale ake
Genesis42:9 Pamenepo anakumbukira maloto aja amene analota za iwo ndipo anati
Genesis42:10 Iwo anayankha
Genesis42:11 Tonse ndife ana a munthu mmodzi. Ndife antchito anu okhulupirika osati akazitape.”
Genesis42:12 Iye anawawuza kuti
Genesis42:13 Koma iwo anayankha
Genesis42:14 Yosefe anawawuza kuti
Genesis42:15 Ndiye ndikuyesani motere: Ine ndikulumbira pali Farao ndithu
Genesis42:16 Tumizani mmodzi wa inu akamutenge mʼbale wanuyo ndipo ena nonsenu musungidwa mʼndende
Genesis42:17 Ndipo onse anawayika mʼndende kwa masiku atatu.
Genesis42:18 Pa tsiku lachitatu Yosefe anawawuza kuti
Genesis42:19 Ngati muli anthu achilungamo
Genesis42:20 Mukabwere naye kuno mngʼono wanu wotsirizayo kuti titsimikizire zimene munanena kuti musafe.” Ndipo anachita zomwezo.
Genesis42:21 Iwo anati kwa wina ndi mnzake
Genesis42:22 Rubeni anayankha
Genesis42:23 Koma sanadziwe kuti Yosefe ankawamva popeza kuti ankagwiritsa ntchito wotanthauzira poyankhula naye.
Genesis42:24 Yosefe anapita pambali payekha kukalira. Kenaka anabweranso nadzayankhula nawo. Iye anatenga Simeoni namumanga iwo akuona.
Genesis42:25 Yosefe analamula kuti awadzazire matumba awo ndi tirigu
Genesis42:26 Abale a Yosefe aja anasenzetsa abulu awo tirigu amene anagula uja ndipo ananyamuka ulendo wawo.
Genesis42:27 Atafika pamalo pena poti agone
Genesis42:28 Iye anati kwa abale akewo
Genesis42:29 Atafika kwa abambo awo Yakobo mʼdziko la Kanaani anafotokoza zonse zimene zinawachitikira nati
Genesis42:30 “Nduna yayikulu ya mʼdzikomo inatiyankhula mwa ukali kwambiri ndipo inkatiyesa kuti ndife akazitape.

Genesis49:30 Ili ndi phanga la mʼmunda wa Makipela
Genesis49:31 Kumeneko kunayikidwa Abrahamu ndi mkazi wake Sara
Genesis49:32 Munda ndi manda amene ali mʼmenemo zinagulidwa kwa Ahiti.”
Genesis49:33 Yakobo atamaliza kupereka malangizo kwa ana ake
Genesis50:1 Kenaka Yosefe anadzigwetsa pa nkhope ya abambo ake
Genesis50:2 Ndipo Yosefe analamula antchito ake a chipatala kuti akonze thupi la Israeli ndi mankhwala kuti lisawole. Kotero antchitowo anakonzadi thupilo.
Genesis50:3 Antchito aja zinawatengera masiku 40 kuti akonze mtembo uja popeza ntchito ngati imeneyi inafunikira masiku monga amenewa. Ndipo Aigupto anamulira Yakobo kwa masiku makumi asanu ndi awiri.
Genesis50:4 Yosefe atatha kulira maliro a abambo ake
Genesis50:5 ‘Abambo anga anandilumbiritsa ndipo anati
Genesis50:6 Farao anati
Genesis50:7 Kotero Yosefe anapita kukayika abambo ake. Nduna zonse za Farao
Genesis50:8 Anapitanso onse a pa banja la Yosefe ndi abale ake ndi onse amene anali a pa banja la abambo ake. Ana awo okha
Genesis50:9 Asilikali okwera pa magaleta ndi asilikali a pa akavalo anapita nayenso pamodzi. Linali gulu lalikulu.
Genesis50:10 Atafika pa Goreni ha-Atadi
Genesis50:11 Akanaani amene ankakhala ku Goreni ha-Atadi ataona mwambo wa maliro anati
Genesis50:12 Choncho ana a Yakobo anachita monga momwe abambo awo anawalamula:
Genesis50:13 Ndiye kuti ana a Yakobo anamunyamula kupita naye ku Kanaani kuti akamuyike mʼphanga limene lili mʼmunda wa Makipela pafupi ndi Mamre. Abrahamu anagula mundawo kwa Efroni Mhiti kuti pakhale manda.
Genesis50:14 Atatha kuyika abambo ake
Genesis50:15 Abale ake a Yosefe ataona kuti abambo awo amwalira
Genesis50:16 Motero anatumiza mawu kwa Yosefe kuti
Genesis50:17 ‘Zimene mudzayenera kunena kwa Yosefe ndi izi: Ndikukupempha kuti uwakhululukire abale ako cholakwa chawo ndi machimo awo
Genesis50:18 Kenaka abale ake anabwera nadzigwetsa pansi pamaso pake
Genesis50:19 Koma Yosefe anawawuza kuti
Genesis50:20 Inu munafuna kundichitira zoyipa
Genesis50:21 Kotero
Genesis50:22 Yosefe anakhala mu Igupto pamodzi ndi banja lonse la abambo ake. Anakhala ndi moyo zaka 110
Genesis50:23 ndipo anaona mʼbado wachitatu wa ana a Efereimu. Yosefe anatenganso ana a Makiri
Genesis50:24 Kenaka Yosefe anati kwa abale ake
Genesis50:25 Ndipo Yosefe analumbiritsa ana a Israeli lumbiro nati
Genesis50:26 Choncho Yosefe anafa ali ndi zaka 110. Motero iwo atakonza thupi lake ndi mankhwala kuti lisawole
Exodus1:1 Awa ndi mayina a ana a Israeli amene anapita ku Igupto pamodzi ndi Yakobo abambo awo
Exodus1:2 Rubeni
Exodus1:3 Isakara
Exodus1:4 Dani
Exodus1:5 Anthu onse obadwa mwa Yakobo analipo 70. Yosefe nʼkuti ali kale ku Igupto.
Exodus1:6 Tsono Yosefe ndi abale ake onse ndiponso mʼbado wawo wonse anamwalira.
Exodus1:7 Koma Aisraeli anaberekana ndi kuchuluka kwambiri nakhala amphamvu kwambiri
Exodus1:8 Pambuyo pake mfumu yatsopano imene sinkamudziwa Yosefe
Exodus1:9 Iyo inati kwa anthu ake
Exodus1:10 Tiyeni tiwachenjerere. Tikapanda kutero adzachuluka kuposa ife
Exodus1:11 Kotero anayika akapitawo kuti aziwazunza ndi kuwagwiritsa ntchito yolemetsa mokakamiza. Iwo anamangira Farao mizinda ya Pitomu ndi Ramesesi kumene ankasungirako chakudya.
Exodus1:12 Koma pamene ankawazunza kwambiri
Exodus1:13 ndipo anawagwiritsa ntchito mwankhanza kwambiri.
Exodus1:14 Aigupto anachititsa moyo wa Aisraeli kukhala owawa kwambiri powagwiritsa ntchito yakalavulagaga yowumba njerwa ndi kuponda dothi lomangira
Exodus1:15 Mfumu ya Igupto inati kwa azamba a Chihebri omwe mayina awo anali Sifira ndi Puwa
Exodus1:16 “Mukamathandiza amayi a Chihebri pa mwala wochirira
Exodus1:17 Koma azambawo ankaopa Mulungu ndipo sanachite zimene mfumu ya Igupto inawawuza kuti achite. Iwo analeka ana aamuna kuti akhale ndi moyo.
Exodus1:18 Kenaka mfumu ya Igupto inayitanitsa azamba aja ndi kuwafunsa kuti
Exodus1:19 Azambawo anamuyankha Farao kuti
Exodus1:20 Kotero Mulungu anawakomera mtima azambawo
Exodus1:21 Pakuti azambawo ankaopa Mulungu
Exodus1:22 Pamenepo Farao analamulira anthu ake onse kuti
Exodus2:1 Ndipo munthu wina wa fuko la Levi anakwatira mkazi wa fuko lomwelo.
Exodus2:2 Mkaziyo anatenga pathupi ndipo anabereka mwana wamwamuna. Ataona kuti mwanayo anali wokongola
Exodus2:3 Koma mwanayo atafika pa msinkhu woti sakanathanso kubisidwa
Exodus2:4 Mlongo wake wa mwanayo anayima pataliko kuti aone chimene chidzamuchitikira mwanayo.
Exodus2:5 Mwana wamkazi wa Farao anapita ku mtsinje wa Nailo kukasamba ndipo adzakazi ake ankayenda mʼmbali mwa mtsinjewo. Tsono mwana wa Farao uja anaona kadenguko pakati pa mabango ndipo anatuma mdzakazi wake kuti akakatenge.
Exodus2:6 Iye atavundukula anaona mwana wamwamuna akungolira. Iye anamva naye chisoni mwana uja
Exodus2:7 Kenaka mlongo wake wa mwanayo anafunsa mwana wa Farao kuti
Exodus2:8 Iye anayankha kuti
Exodus2:9 Mwana wa Farao anati
Exodus2:10 Mwanayo atakula anakamupereka kwa mwana wa Farao ndipo anakhala mwana wake. Iye anamutcha dzina lake Mose
Exodus2:11 Tsiku lina
Exodus2:12 Atayangʼana uku ndi uku
Exodus2:13 Mmawa mwake Mose anapita ndipo anaona anthu awiri a Chihebri akumenyana. Iye anafunsa amene anali wolakwa kuti
Exodus2:14 Munthu uja anati
Exodus2:15 Farao atamva zimenezi anafuna kuti aphe Mose
Exodus2:16 Wansembe wa ku Midiyaniko anali ndi ana aakazi asanu ndi awiri. Iwowa anabwera kudzatunga madzi ndi kudzaza mu zomwera kuti amwetse nkhosa za abambo awo.
Exodus2:17 Koma kunabwera abusa ena amene anathamangitsa atsikana aja. Ndiye Mose anayimirira nawathandiza atsikana aja ndi kumwetsa nkhosa zawo.
Exodus2:18 Atsikana aja atabwerera kwa abambo awo Reueli
Exodus2:19 Atsikanawo anayankha kuti
Exodus2:20 Tsono Reueli anafunsa ana ake kuti
Exodus2:21 Mose anavomera kukhala ndi Reueli
Exodus2:22 Zipora anabereka mwana wa mwamuna amene Mose anamutcha Geresomu
Exodus2:23 Nthawi yonseyo nʼkuti ana a Israeli akulira chifukwa cha ukapolo wawo uja. Iwo anafuwula kupempha thandizo
Exodus2:24 Mulungu anamva kubuwula kwawo ndipo anakumbukira pangano lake ndi Abrahamu
Exodus2:25 Mulungu ataona Aisraeli aja ndi masautso awo

Exodus4:16 Iye akayankhula kwa anthu mʼmalo mwako. Iye adzakhala wokuyankhulira ndipo iweyo udzakhala ngati Mulungu kwa iye.
Exodus4:17 Koma utenge ndodo imene ili mʼdzanja lakoyo kuti ukachite nayo zizindikiro zozizwitsa.”

Exodus4:29 Mose ndi Aaroni anapita kukasonkhanitsa pamodzi akuluakulu onse a Aisraeli.
Exodus4:30 Ndipo Aaroni anawafotokozera zonse zimene Yehova ananena kwa Mose. Anachita zizindikirozo pamaso pa anthu onse

Exodus5:7 “Inu musawapatsenso udzu wopangira njerwa monga mumachitira kale
Exodus5:8 Koma musawachepetsere chiwerengero cha njerwa chomwe munawalamulira kale kuti aziwumba. Iwowa ndi aulesi. Nʼchifukwa chake akulira kuti
Exodus5:9 Muwakhawulitse ndi ntchito anthu amenewa kuti azitanganidwa
Exodus5:10 Choncho akapitawo a thangata ndi anzawo a Chiisraeli amene ankayangʼanira anthu anapita kwa anthu aja nati
Exodus5:11 Mʼmalo mwake mupite mukadzimwetere udzu kulikonse kumene mungawupeze. Komabe ntchito yanu sichepetsedwa.’ ”
Exodus5:12 Kotero anthuwo anamwazikana mʼdziko lonse la Igupto kukamweta udzu.
Exodus5:13 Akapitawo a thangata aja anawafulumiza anthu aja nati
Exodus5:14 Akapitawo a thangata a Farao ankawamenya oyangʼanira anzawo a Chiisraeli aja nawapanikiza kuti
Exodus5:15 Pamenepo oyangʼanira anzawo a Chiisraeli aja anapita kukadandaula kwa Farao kuti
Exodus5:16 Antchito anu sakupatsidwa udzu
Exodus5:17 Farao anati
Exodus5:18 Pitani tsopano kuntchito. Simudzapatsidwanso udzu komabe muyenera kuwumba muyeso wanu wovomerezeka wa njerwa.”
Exodus5:19 Oyangʼanira anzawo a Chiisraeli anazindikira kuti ali pa mavuto pamene anawuzidwa kuti

Exodus7:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus7:2 Iwe ukanene zonse zimene ndakulamulirazi
Exodus7:3 Koma ndidzawumitsa mtima wa Farao
Exodus7:4 iyeyo sadzakumverani. Choncho ndidzakantha Igupto
Exodus7:5 Ndipo Aigupto adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova
Exodus7:6 Mose ndi Aaroni anachita monga momwe Yehova anawalamulira.
Exodus7:7 Mose anali ndi zaka 80
Exodus7:8 Yehova anati kwa Mose ndi Aaroni
Exodus7:9 “Ngati Farao adzati kwa inu
Exodus7:10 Kotero Mose ndi Aaroni anapita kwa Farao ndi kuchita monga momwe Yehova anawalamulira. Aaroni anaponya ndodo yake pansi patsogolo pa Farao ndi nduna zake ndipo inasanduka njoka.
Exodus7:11 Naye Farao anayitanitsa anthu ake anzeru ndi amatsenga
Exodus7:12 Aliyense wa iwo anaponya ndodo yake pansi ndipo inasanduka njoka. Koma ndodo ya Aaroni inameza ndodo zawo.
Exodus7:13 Koma mtima wa Farao unawuma ndipo sanawamvere monga momwe Yehova ananenera.
Exodus7:14 Kenaka Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus7:15 Upite kwa Farao mmawa pamene azidzapita ku madzi. Ukamudikire mʼmbali mwa Nailo kuti ukakumane naye ndipo unyamule ndodo imene inasanduka njoka ija mʼdzanja lako.
Exodus7:16 Ndipo ukamuwuze Farao kuti
Exodus7:17 Izi ndi zimene Yehova akunena: Ndi ndodo imene ili mʼdzanja langa ndidzamenya madzi a mu Nailo
Exodus7:18 Nsomba za mu Nailo zidzafa
Exodus7:19 Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus7:20 Mose ndi Aaroni anachita monga momwe Yehova analamulira. Anakweza ndodo yake pamaso pa Farao ndi akuluakulu ake ndipo anamenya madzi a mu Nailo
Exodus7:21 Nsomba za mu Nailo zinafa ndipo mtsinje unanunkha kwambiri kotero kuti Aigupto sanathe kumwa madzi ake. Magazi anali ponseponse mu Igupto.
Exodus7:22 Koma amatsenga a Chiigupto anachita zinthu zomwezo mwa matsenga awo. Choncho Farao anawumabe mtima
Exodus7:23 Mʼmalo mwake iye anatembenuka ndi kupita ku nyumba yake yaufumu ndipo zimenezi sanazilabadire.
Exodus7:24 Anthu onse a ku Igupto anayamba kukumba mʼmbali mwa mtsinje wa Nailo kuti apeze madzi akumwa
Exodus7:25 Panapita masiku asanu ndi awiri Yehova atamenya madzi a mu mtsinje wa Nailo.

Exodus8:24 Ndipo Yehova anachita zimenezi: Ntchentche zoluma zochuluka zinalowa mʼnyumba yaufumu ya Farao ndi nyumba za nduna zake. Choncho ntchentche zolumazi zinawononga dziko lonse la Igupto.

Exodus8:26 Koma Mose anati
Exodus8:27 Ife tiyenera kuyenda ulendo wa masiku atatu kupita ku chipululu kukapereka nsembe kwa Yehova Mulungu wathu monga anatilamulira.”

Exodus8:31 Ndipo Yehova anachita zomwe Mose anapempha: Ntchentche zoluma zinachoka kwa Farao ndi nduna zake ndiponso kwa anthu ake. Palibe ngakhale imodzi yomwe inatsala.
Exodus8:32 Koma nthawi imeneyinso Farao anawumitsa mtima wake ndipo sanalole kuti anthu atuluke.
Exodus9:1 Kenaka Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus9:2 Koma ngati ukana kuti apite ndi kupitiriza kuwaletsa
Exodus9:3 dzanja la Yehova lidzakantha ziweto zako zimene zili ku munda
Exodus9:4 Koma Yehova adzasiyanitsa pakati pa ziweto za Israeli ndi ziweto za Igupto
Exodus9:5 Yehova anayika nthawi ndipo anati
Exodus9:6 Ndipo mmawa mwake Yehova anachitadi zimenezi. Ziweto zonse za Aigupto zinafa
Exodus9:7 Farao anatuma anthu kuti akafufuze ndipo anapeza kuti palibe chiweto chilichonse cha Aisraeli chomwe chinafa. Komabe mtima wake sunagonje ndipo iye sanalole kuti anthu apite.
Exodus9:8 Kenaka Yehova anati kwa Mose ndi Aaroni
Exodus9:9 Phulusalo lidzasanduka fumbi pa dziko lonse la Igupto. Tsono fumbilo lidzasanduka zithupsa zomaphulika nʼkukhala zilonda pa munthu aliyense ndi pa nyama zomwe mʼdziko lonse la Igupto.”
Exodus9:10 Kotero anatenga phulusa la pa moto ndi kuyima pamaso pa Farao. Mose analiwaza mmwamba
Exodus9:11 Amatsenga sanathe kumuyandikira Mose chifukwa nawonso anali ndi zithupsa monga mmene analili Aigupto ena onse.
Exodus9:12 Koma Yehova anawumitsa mtima wa Farao ndipo iye sanamvere Mose ndi Aaroni monga momwe Yehova anamuwuzira Mose.
Exodus9:13 Kenaka Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus9:14 Ngati suwalola
Exodus9:15 Pakuti ndikanakhala nditatukula kale dzanja langa ndikupheratu iwe pamodzi ndi anthu ako onse pa dziko lapansi.
Exodus9:16 Koma ndakuyika kukhala mfumu ndi cholinga choti ndionetse mphamvu zanga kwa iwe ndiponso kuti dzina langa litchuke pa dziko lonse lapansi.
Exodus9:17 Komabe iwe ukudzitukumula pa anthu anga osawalola kuti atuluke.
Exodus9:18 Nʼchifukwa chake mawa
Exodus9:19 Tsopano lamula kuti ziweto zanu zonse ndi zinthu zonse zomwe zili ku minda kuti zilowetsedwe mʼkhola
Exodus9:20 Nduna za Farao zinachita mantha ndi mawu a Yehova
Exodus9:21 Koma iwo amene ananyozera mawu a Yehova anasiya akapolo ndi ziweto zawo panja.
Exodus9:22 Kenaka Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus9:23 Mose ataloza ndodo yake kumwamba
Exodus9:24 Matalala anagwa ndipo ziphaliwali zinangʼanima. Inali mphepo ya mkuntho yoopsa kwambiri imene sinakhaleponso mʼdziko lonse la Igupto chiyambire pamene Aigupto anakhala mtundu woyima pa okha.
Exodus9:25 Matalala anawononga dziko lonse la Igupto
Exodus9:26 Ku malo kokhako kumene matalala sanafikeko ndi dera la Goseni kumene kunali Aisraeli.
Exodus9:27 Kenaka Farao anayitanitsa Mose ndi Aaroni nati kwa iwo
Exodus9:28 Upemphere kwa Mulungu chifukwa mabingu ndi matalala atikwana. Ine ndidzakulolani kuti mupite. Simuyenera kukhalabe kuno.”
Exodus9:29 Mose anayankha
Exodus9:30 Koma ine ndikudziwa kuti inu ndi nduna zanu simukuopabe Yehova Mulungu.”
Exodus9:31 Thonje ndi barele zinawonongeka
Exodus9:32 Koma tirigu ndi mchewere sizinawonongeke chifukwa zimakhwima mochedwa.
Exodus9:33 Mose anasiyana ndi Farao natuluka mu mzindawo. Iye anakweza manja ake kwa Yehova. Mabingu ndi matalala zinaleka
Exodus9:34 Farao ataona kuti mvula
Exodus9:35 Choncho Farao sanalole kuti Aisraeli apite monga momwe Yehova anamuwuzira Mose.
Exodus10:1 Kenaka Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus10:2 kuti inu mudzawuze ana ndi zidzukulu zanu za mmene ndinawakhawulitsira Aigupto ndi zizindikiro zozizwitsa zimene ndinachita pakati pawo ndiponso kuti inu mudziwe kuti ine ndine Yehova.”
Exodus10:3 Ndipo Mose ndi Aaroni anapita kwa Farao ndi kukanena kuti
Exodus10:4 Ngati ukana kuwalola
Exodus10:5 Dzombeli lidzakuta nthaka yonse moti sidzaoneka konse. Lidzadya kalikonse kakangʼono kamene sikanawonongedwe ndi matalala aja
Exodus10:6 Dzombeli lidzadzaza nyumba zako ndi za nduna zako ndiponso za Aigupto onse
Exodus10:7 Nduna za Farao zinamufunsa kuti
Exodus10:8 Choncho Mose ndi Aaroni anayitanidwanso kwa Farao ndipo anati
Exodus10:9 Mose anayankha kuti
Exodus10:10 Farao anati
Exodus10:11 Ndakana! Amuna okha ndiwo apite ndi kukapembedza Yehova pakuti izi ndi zimene mwakhala mukupempha.” Kenaka Mose ndi Aaroni anathamangitsidwa pamaso pa Farao.
Exodus10:12 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus10:13 Kotero Mose anakweza ndodo yake pa dziko la Igupto
Exodus10:14 Dzombelo linafika pa dziko lonse la Igupto ndi kukhala dera lililonse la dzikolo. Dzombe lambiri ngati limenelo silinakhaleponso nʼkale lonse ndipo silidzakhalapo ngakhale mʼtsogolo.
Exodus10:15 Dzombelo linaphimba nthaka yonse mpaka kuoneka kuti bii. Linadya zonse zimene zinatsala nthawi ya matalala
Exodus10:16 Mwamsangamsanga
Exodus10:17 Tsopano ndikhululukirenso tchimo langa kano konkha ndipo pempherani kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu kuti andichotsere mliri wosakazawu.”
Exodus10:18 Mose anachoka kwa Farao nakapemphera kwa Yehova.
Exodus10:19 Ndipo Yehova anasintha mphepo ija kuti ikhale ya mphamvu yochokera ku madzulo
Exodus10:20 Koma Yehova anawumitsa mtima wa Farao
Exodus10:21 Kenaka Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus10:22 Choncho Mose anakweza dzanja lake kumwamba ndipo mdima wandiweyani unaphimba dziko lonse la Igupto kwa masiku atatu.
Exodus10:23 Palibe amene anatha kuona mnzake kapena kuchoka pa khomo pake kwa masiku atatu. Koma kumalo kumene kumakhala Aisraeli kunali kowala.

Exodus12:1 Yehova anayankhula kwa Mose ndi Aaroni mʼdziko la Igupto kuti
Exodus12:2 “Mwezi uno uzikhala mwezi wanu woyamba wa chaka.
Exodus12:3 Muliwuze khamu lonse la Israeli kuti pa tsiku la khumi la mwezi uno
Exodus12:4 Ngati banja lili lochepa moti silingathe kudya nyama yonse ya nkhosa
Exodus12:5 Ziweto zimene musankhe ziyenera kukhala zazimuna za chaka chimodzi
Exodus12:6 Muzisunge mpaka tsiku la khumi ndi chinayi la mwezi
Exodus12:7 Ndipo adzatengeko magazi anyamazo ndi kuwaza pa mphuthu ziwiri za chitseko ndiponso pamwamba pa chitseko cha nyumba mmene adzadyeremo ana ankhosawo.
Exodus12:8 Adzawotche nyamayo ndi kudya usiku womwewo
Exodus12:9 Musadzadye yayiwisi kapena yophika
Exodus12:10 Musadzasiye nyama ina mpaka mmawa
Exodus12:11 Muzidzadya nyamayo mutavala chotere
Exodus12:12 “Usiku umenewo Ine ndidzadutsa mʼdziko la Igupto ndipo ndidzapha chilichonse choyamba kubadwa kuyambira mwana wa munthu aliyense mpaka ana aziweto. Ndidzalanganso milungu yonse ya Igupto. Ine ndine Yehova.
Exodus12:13 Magazi amene mudzawaze pa mphuthu za zitseko ndi pamwamba pa zitseko aja adzakhala ngati chizindikiro. Ine ndikadzaona magaziwo ndidzakudutsani
Exodus12:14 “Ili ndi tsiku la chikumbutso. Tsiku limeneli muzidzachita chikondwerero
Exodus12:15 Kwa masiku asanu ndi awiri muzidya buledi wopanda yisiti. Tsiku loyamba muzichotsa yisiti mʼnyumba zanu
Exodus12:16 Pa tsiku loyamba muzichita msonkhano wopatulika
Exodus12:17 “Muzichita chikondwerero cha buledi wopanda yisiti
Exodus12:18 Mwezi woyamba muzidzadya buledi wopanda yisiti kuyambira madzulo tsiku la 14 la mweziwo mpaka tsiku la 21 mwezi womwewo.
Exodus12:19 Yisiti asamapezeka mʼnyumba zanu kwa masiku asanu ndi awiri. Ndipo aliyense amene adya chakudya chimene muli yisiti
Exodus12:20 Musadye chilichonse chokhala ndi yisiti. Kulikonse kumene mukukhala
Exodus12:21 Ndipo Mose anasonkhanitsa akuluakulu onse a Israeli nati
Exodus12:22 Mutengenso nthambi ya chitsamba cha hisope
Exodus12:23 Pamene Yehova adzadutsa mʼdziko kudzakantha Aigupto
Exodus12:24 “Muzimvera malamulo amenewa kwa muyaya
Exodus12:25 Mukakalowa mʼdziko limene Yehova adzakupatseni monga analonjeza
Exodus12:26 Ndipo ana anu akakakufunsani kuti
Exodus12:27 Inu mukawawuze kuti
Exodus12:28 Aisraeli anachita monga momwe Yehova analamulira Mose ndi Aaroni.
Exodus12:29 Pakati pa usiku Yehova anakantha ana onse oyamba kubadwa mʼdziko la Igupto
Exodus12:30 Farao ndi nduna zake zonse ndiponso Aigupto onse anadzuka pakati pa usiku
Exodus12:31 Pakati pa usiku Farao anayitanitsa Mose ndi Aaroni ndipo anati
Exodus12:32 Tengani ziweto ndi ngʼombe zanu ndipo pitani kapembedzeni Mulungu wanu monga munanenera kuti ine ndidalitsike.”
Exodus12:33 Aigupto anawawumiriza anthuwo kuti atuluke mofulumira ndi kusiya dziko lawo. Iwo anati
Exodus12:34 Motero anthuwo ananyamula ufa wawo wopangira buledi asanathiremo yisiti ndipo anasenza pa mapewa awo pamodzi ndi zokandiramo buledi atazikulunga mu nsalu.
Exodus12:35 Aisraeli anachita monga anawawuzira Mose kuti apemphe kwa Aigupto zozikongoletsera zasiliva ndi zagolide ndi zovala.
Exodus12:36 Yehova anafewetsa mtima Aigupto kuti akomere mtima Aisraeliwo ndipo anawapatsa zimene anawapempha. Motero Aisraeli anawalanda zinthu Aigupto.
Exodus12:37 Aisraeli anayenda ulendo kuchokera ku Ramesesi mpaka kukafika ku Sukoti. Anthu aamuna oyenda pansi analipo 600
Exodus12:38 Anthu enanso ambiri anapita nawo
Exodus12:39 Iwo anapanga buledi wopanda yisiti ndi ufa umene anachoka nawo ku Igupto. Ufawo unalibe yisiti chifukwa anachita kuthamangitsidwa ku Igupto ndipo analibe nthawi yokonzera chakudya chawo.
Exodus12:40 Ndipo Aisraeli anakhala ku Igupto kwa zaka 430.
Exodus12:41 Pa tsiku lomwelo limene anakwanitsa zaka 430
Exodus12:42 Usiku wonse Yehova anachezera kutulutsa ana a Israeli mʼdziko la Igupto. Nʼchifukwa chake pa tsiku limeneli Aisraeli onse azichezera usiku wonse kulemekeza Mulungu kamba ka mibado yonse ya mʼtsogolo.
Exodus12:43 Yehova anati kwa Mose ndi Aaroni
Exodus12:44 Kapolo aliyense amene munagula angadye ngati atayamba wachita mdulidwe.
Exodus12:45 Koma amene mukukhala naye kwa kanthawi kapena waganyu asadye Paska.
Exodus12:46 “Muzidyera Paska mʼnyumba imodzi. Musatulutse nyama iliyonse kunja kwa nyumba. Musaswe mafupa aliwonse.
Exodus12:47 Gulu lonse la Israeli lizichita mwambo wachikondwererochi.
Exodus12:48 “Ngati mlendo wokhala pakati panu angafune kuchita nawo mwambo wa chikondwerero cha Paska
Exodus12:49 Lamulo limeneli likhudza mbadwa ngakhalenso alendo wochita mdulidwe wokhala pakati panu.
Exodus12:50 “Aisraeli onse anachita monga momwe Yehova analamulira Mose ndi Aaroni.
Exodus12:51 Ndipo tsiku lomwelo Yehova anatulutsa gulu lonse la ana a Israeli mʼdziko la Igupto.”

Exodus13:7 Mudye buledi wopanda yisiti masiku asanu ndi awiri. Pasapezeke chinthu chilichonse chokhala ndi yisiti pakati panu

Exodus13:10 Muzichita mwambo uwu pa nthawi yake chaka ndi chaka.

Exodus14:19 Ndipo mngelo wa Mulungu amene amayenda patsogolo pa gulu lankhondo la Israeli anachoka ndi kupita kumbuyo kwawo. Chipilala cha mtambo chinasunthanso kuchoka kutsogolo ndi kupita kumbuyo kwawo.
Exodus14:20 Choncho mtambowo unakhala pakati pa asilikali ankhondo a dziko la Igupto ndi a dziko la Israeli. Choncho panali mdima motero kuti magulu awiri ankhondowa sanathe kuyandikizana usiku wonse.

Exodus15:2 Yehova ndiye mphamvu yanga ndi nyimbo yanga; ndiye chipulumutso changa. Iye ndiye Mulungu wanga
Exodus15:3 Yehova ndi wankhondo; Yehova ndilo dzina lake.
Exodus15:4 Magaleta a Farao ndi asilikali ake ankhondo Iye wawaponya mʼnyanja. Akatswiri ankhondo amphamvu a Farao amizidwa mʼNyanja Yofiira.
Exodus15:5 Nyanja yakuya inawaphimba; Iwo anamira pansi ngati mwala.”
Exodus15:6 Yehova

Exodus15:15 Tsopano mafumu a ku Edomu agwidwa ndi mantha aakulu
Exodus15:16 Onse agwidwa ndi mantha woopsa. Popeza anaona mphamvu zanu zazikulu
Exodus15:17 Inu mudzawalowetsa ndi kuwakhazikitsa pa phiri lanu. Pa malo pamene Inu Yehova munawapanga kuti muzikhalapo; malo wopatulika amene Inu Ambuye munawakonza ndi manja anu.

Exodus18:1 Yetero wansembe wa ku Midiyani amenenso anali mpongozi wa Mose
Exodus18:2 Mose atamubweza Zipora
Exodus18:3 mwana wake wamkaziyo pamodzi ndi ana ake aamuna awiri. Mose anamupatsa mwana wachisamba dzina loti Geresomu popeza anati
Exodus18:4 Ndipo mwana wake wachiwiri anamupatsa dzina loti Eliezara
Exodus18:5 Yetero
Exodus18:6 Yetero anali atatumiza uthenga kwa Mose kuti
Exodus18:7 Kotero Mose anatuluka kukakumana ndi mpongozi wake ndipo anawerama ndi kupsompsona. Atalonjerana anakalowa mu tenti
Exodus18:8 Mose anafotokozera mpongozi wake zonse zimene Yehova anamuchita Farao ndi Aigupto chifukwa cha Israeli komanso zowawa zonse anakumana nazo mʼnjira. Mose anafotokozanso momwe Yehova anawapulumutsira.
