Exodus18:9 Yetero anakondwa kwambiri atamva zabwino zonse zimene Yehova anachitira Aisraeli powapulumutsa mʼdzanja la Aigupto.
Exodus18:10 Iye anati
Exodus18:11 Tsopano ndikudziwa kuti Yehova ndi wopambana milungu ina yonse
Exodus18:12 Ndipo Yetero
Exodus18:13 Mmawa mwake
Exodus18:14 Mpongozi wa Mose ataona zonse zimene iye amawachitira anthu anati
Exodus18:15 Mose anamuyankha kuti
Exodus18:16 Ngati munthu akangana ndi mʼbale wake
Exodus18:17 Mpongozi wa Mose anayankha kuti
Exodus18:18 Ntchitoyi ndi yayikulu kuposa mphamvu zanu. Inu simungathe kuyigwira nokha. Inu pamodzi ndi anthuwa amene amabwera kwa inu mudzatopa.
Exodus18:19 Tsono tamverani ndikulangizeni
Exodus18:20 Aphunzitseni mawu ndi malangizo a Mulungu. Aphunzitseni mmene ayenera kukhalira ndi zimene ayenera kuchita.
Exodus18:21 Koma sankhani amuna odziwa ntchito yawo
Exodus18:22 Tsono amenewa aziweruza anthu nthawi zonse. Mlandu uliwonse waukulu azibwera nawo kwa inu
Exodus18:23 Ngati mutsatira malangizowa monga mmene Mulungu wakulamulirani ndiye kuti simudzafowoka ndipo anthu onsewa adzapita kwawo mu mtendere.”
Exodus18:24 Mose anamvera mpongozi wake ndi kuchita zonse zimene iye ananena.
Exodus18:25 Iye anasankha amuna odziwa bwino ntchito zawo ndipo anawayika kuti akhale atsogoleri
Exodus18:26 Iwowa ankaweruza anthu nthawi zonse. Milandu yovuta ankabwera nayo kwa Mose
Exodus18:27 Kenaka Mose analola kuti mpongozi wake
Exodus19:1 Ana a Israeli aja anafika ku chipululu cha Sinai pa tsiku loyamba la mwezi wachitatu chichokere mʼdziko la Igupto.
Exodus19:2 Atachoka ku Refidimu
Exodus19:3 Mose anakwera ku phiri kukakumana ndi Mulungu ndipo Yehova anamuyitana nati
Exodus19:4 ‘Inu eni munaona zimene ndinawachitira Aigupto ndiponso mmene ndinakunyamulirani
Exodus19:5 Tsopano
Exodus19:6 inu mudzakhala ansembe achifumu ndi mtundu woyera mtima. Awa ndi mawu amene uyenera kuwawuza Aisraeli.”
Exodus19:7 Ndipo Mose anabwerera ndi kuyitanitsa akuluakulu. Atabwera anawafotokozera mawu amene Yehova anamulamulira kuti adzanene.
Exodus19:8 Anthu onse anayankha pamodzi kuti
Exodus19:9 Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus19:10 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus19:11 ndipo akhale atakonzeka pofika tsiku lachitatu
Exodus19:12 Uwalembere malire anthuwo kuzungulira phirilo ndipo uwawuze kuti
Exodus19:13 Aliyense wokhudza phiri adzaphedwa ndi miyala kapena kumulasa ndi mivi. Palibe amene adzamukhudze. Palibe munthu amene adzaloledwa kukhala ndi moyo ngakhale nyama. Iwo adzayenera kuphedwa.’ Koma anthu adzapita ku phirilo akadzamva kulira kwa lipenga la nyanga yankhosa.”
Exodus19:14 Tsono Mose anatsika phiri lija nafika kwa anthu aja ndi kuwayeretsa. Iwo anachapa zovala zawo.
Exodus19:15 Kenaka iye anati kwa anthu
Exodus19:16 Mʼmamawa wa tsiku lachitatu kunali mabingu
Exodus19:17 Ndipo Mose anatsogolera anthu kutuluka mʼmisasa kukakumana ndi Mulungu
Exodus19:18 Phiri la Sinai linakutidwa ndi utsi
Exodus19:19 Liwu la lipenga linkakulirakulira. Tsono Mose anayankhula ndipo Yehova anamuyankha ndi mabingu.
Exodus19:20 Yehova anatsika nafika pamwamba pa phiri la Sinai
Exodus19:21 ndipo Yehova anati kwa iye
Exodus19:22 Ngakhale ansembe amene amatumikira pamaso pa Yehova ayenera kudziyeretsa kuopa kuti ndingadzawalange.”
Exodus19:23 Mose anati kwa Yehova
Exodus19:24 Yehova anayankha
Exodus19:25 Ndipo Mose anatsika ndi kukawawuza anthuwo.
Exodus20:1 Ndipo Mulungu anayankhula mawu onse awa nati:
Exodus20:2 “Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wako amene ndinakutulutsa ku Igupto
Exodus20:3 “Usakhale ndi milungu ina koma Ine ndekha.”
Exodus20:4 “Usadzipangire chofanizira chinthu chilichonse chakumwamba kapena cha pa dziko lapansi kapena cha mʼmadzi a pansi pa dziko.
Exodus20:5 Usazigwadire kapena kuzipembedza
Exodus20:6 Koma ndimaonetsa chikondi chosasinthika ku mibado miyandamiyanda ya anthu amene amandikonda
Exodus20:7 “Usagwiritse ntchito molakwika dzina la Yehova Mulungu wako
Exodus20:8 “Uzisunga tsiku la Sabata kuti likhale lopatulika.
Exodus20:9 Uzigwira ntchito zako zonse masiku asanu ndi limodzi.
Exodus20:10 Koma tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri ndi Sabata
Exodus20:11 Pakuti Yehova anapanga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi
Exodus20:12 “Lemekeza abambo ako ndi amayi ako kuti ukhale ndi moyo wautali mʼdziko limene Yehova Mulungu wako akukupatsa.
Exodus20:13 “Usaphe.
Exodus20:14 “Usachite chigololo.
Exodus20:15 “Usabe.
Exodus20:16 “Usapereke umboni womunamizira mnzako.
Exodus20:17 “Usasirire nyumba ya mnzako. Usasirire mkazi wa mnzako kapena wantchito wake wamwamuna kapena mdzakazi wake
Exodus20:18 Pamene anthu ankamva mabingu ndi kuona ziphaliwali ndi kumvanso lipenga ndi kuona utsi umene umafuka mʼphiri
Exodus20:19 Ndipo anati kwa Mose
Exodus20:20 Koma Mose anati kwa anthuwo
Exodus20:21 Anthu aja anayima patali koma Mose anayandikira mtambo wakuda kumene kunali Mulungu.
Exodus20:22 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus20:23 Choncho musadzipangire milungu yasiliva kapena yagolide kuti muziyipembedza pamodzi ndi Ine.’ ”
Exodus20:24 Mundimangire guwa ladothi ndipo muziperekapo nsembe zopsereza ndi nsembe zachiyanjano
Exodus20:25 Ngati mudzandimangira guwa lansembe lamiyala
Exodus20:26 Musamakwere pa makwerero popita pa guwa langa lansembe kuti mungaonetse maliseche anu.
Exodus21:1 “Uwawuze Aisraeli malamulo awa:
Exodus21:2 “Mukagula kapolo wa Chihebri
Exodus21:3 Ngati anabwera yekha
Exodus21:4 Ngati bwana wake amupatsa mkazi ndipo mkaziyo anabereka ana aamuna kapena aakazi
Exodus21:5 “Koma ngati kapoloyo alengeza kuti
Exodus21:6 mbuye wakeyo abwere naye kwa Yehova. Abwere naye pa chitseko kapena pa mphuthu zachitseko ndipo abowole khutu lake ndi chitsulo. Ndipo iye adzakhala kapolo wake moyo wake wonse.
Exodus21:7 “Ngati munthu agulitsa mwana wake wamkazi kukhala mdzakazi
Exodus21:8 Koma ngati mkaziyo sakukondweretsa bwana wake amene wamusankha kuti amukwatire
Exodus21:9 Ngati anamusankha kuti akhale mkazi wa mwana wake
Exodus21:10 Ngati akwatira mkazi wina
Exodus21:11 Koma ngati sangathe kumuchitira zonsezi
Exodus21:12 “Munthu aliyense amene amenya mnzake namupha
Exodus21:13 Koma ngati sanachite dala
Exodus21:14 Koma ngati munthu akonza chiwembu ndi kupha mnzake mwadala
Exodus21:15 “Munthu aliyense amene amenya abambo ake kapena mayi ake ayenera kuphedwa.
Exodus21:16 “Munthu aliyense amene aba munthu mnzake
Exodus21:17 “Aliyense amene atemberera abambo ake kapena amayi ake ayenera kuphedwa.
Exodus21:18 “Ngati anthu awiri akangana ndipo wina amenya mnzake ndi mwala kapena nkhonya koma wosamupha
Exodus21:19 kenaka nachira ndi kuyamba kuyenda ndi ndodo kutuluka kunja kwa nyumba yake
Exodus21:20 “Ngati munthu amenya kapolo wake wamwamuna kapena mdzakazi ndi ndodo
Exodus21:21 Koma ngati kapolo uja akhala ndi moyo tsiku lonse kapena masiku awiri
Exodus21:22 “Ngati anthu akumenyana ndi kupweteka mayi woyembekezera
Exodus21:23 Koma ngati wavulazidwa kwambiri
Exodus21:24 diso kulipira diso
Exodus21:25 Kutentha ndi moto kulipa kutentha ndi moto
Exodus21:26 “Ngati munthu amenya wantchito wake wa mwamuna kapena mdzakazi wake pa diso ndi kuliwononga
Exodus21:27 Ndipo ngati agulula dzino la wantchito wamwamuna kapena mdzakazi
Exodus21:28 “Ngati ngʼombe ipha munthu wamwamuna kapena wamkazi ndi nyanga yake
Exodus21:29 Koma ngati ngʼombeyo inali ndi chizolowezi chogunda anthu ndipo mwini wakeyo anachenjezedwa koma iye sanayimange ndipo yapha mwamuna kapena mkazi
Exodus21:30 Koma ngati wauzidwa kuti alipire
Exodus21:31 Lamulo ili ligwirenso ntchito ngati ngʼombeyo yagunda mwana wamwamuna kapena wamkazi.
Exodus21:32 Ngati ngʼombeyo yagunda kapolo wamwamuna kapena mdzakazi
Exodus21:33 “Munthu akasiya dzenje lapululu kapena akakumba dzenje koma wosaphimbapo
Exodus21:34 mwini dzenjelo amulipire mwini chiweto chakufacho koma iye atenge chiwetocho.
Exodus21:35 “Ngati ngʼombe ya munthu wina ipha ngʼombe ya mnzake
Exodus21:36 Koma zikadziwika kuti ngʼombeyo inali ndi khalidwe logunda
Exodus22:1 “Ngati munthu aba ngʼombe kapena nkhosa ndi kuyipha kapena kuyigulitsa
Exodus22:2 “Ngati mbala ipezeka ikuthyola nyumba ndipo imenyedwa nʼkufa
Exodus22:3 Koma akayipha dzuwa litatuluka
Exodus22:4 “Ngati chiweto chobedwacho chipezeka chamoyo mʼmanja mwake
Exodus22:5 “Ngati munthu alekerera ziweto zake kukalowa mʼmunda wa munthu wina kukadya mbewu zake
Exodus22:6 “Ngati munthu ayatsa moto
Exodus22:7 “Ngati munthu asungitsidwa ndi mnzake ndalama kapena katundu
Exodus22:8 Koma ngati mbalayo sipezeka
Exodus22:9 Ngati pali kukangana kokhudza ngʼombe
Exodus22:10 “Ngati munthu wina anasungitsa mnzake bulu
Exodus22:11 ndiye kuti anthu awiriwo ayenera kulumbira pamaso pa Mulungu kuti asatenge chinthu cha mnzake. Zikatero mwini katundu uja avomereze zimenezi ndipo asabwezeredwe kanthu.
Exodus22:12 Koma ngati chiwetocho chinabedwa
Exodus22:13 Ngati chinagwidwa ndi zirombo
Exodus22:14 “Ngati munthu abwereka chiweto cha mnzake ndipo chiweto chija nʼkuvulala kapena kufa chikanali ndi iyebe
Exodus22:15 Koma ngati mwini wakeyo ali ndi chiwetocho
Exodus22:16 “Ngati munthu anyenga namwali wosadziwa mwamuna amene sanapalidwe ubwenzi ndi kugona naye
Exodus22:17 Ngati abambo ake akanitsitsa kwamtuwagalu kumupereka kuti amukwatire
Exodus22:18 “Musayilole mfiti yayikazi kuti ikhale ndi moyo.
Exodus22:19 “Aliyense wogonana ndi chiweto ayenera kuphedwa.
Exodus22:20 “Aliyense wopereka nsembe kwa mulungu wina osati Yehova awonongedwe.
Exodus22:21 “Musazunze mlendo kapena kumuchitira nkhanza
Exodus22:22 “Musazunze mkazi wamasiye kapena mwana wamasiye.
Exodus22:23 Ngati muwazunza ndipo iwo nʼkulirira kwa Ine
Exodus22:24 Ine ndidzakukwiyirani ndipo ndidzakuphani ndi lupanga. Akazi anu adzakhala amasiye ndiponso ana anu adzakhala wopanda abambo.
Exodus22:25 “Ngati mukongoza ndalama kwa mʼbale wanu amene ndi mʼmphawi pakati panu
Exodus22:26 Mukatenga chovala cha mnzanu kuti chikhale chikole mumubwezere dzuwa lisanalowe
Exodus22:27 chifukwa chovala chimene amadzifundira nacho nʼchomwecho. Nanga usiku adzafunda chiyani? Tsonotu ngati adzandilirira
Exodus22:28 “Musachite chipongwe Mulungu wanu kapena kutemberera mtsogoleri wa anthu anu.
Exodus22:29 “Musachedwe kupereka kwa Ine zokolola zanu zochuluka ndi vinyo wanu wochuluka. “Mundipatse ana anu achisamba aamuna.
Exodus22:30 Muchite chimodzimodzi ndi ngʼombe zanu ndi nkhosa zanu. Mwana woyamba kubadwa azikhala ndi amayi ake masiku asanu ndi awiri. Koma pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu mwanayo muzimupereka kwa Ine.
Exodus22:31 “Inu mukhale anthu anga opatulika. Choncho musadye nyama ya chiweto chimene chaphedwa ndi zirombo. Nyamayo muwaponyere agalu.”
Exodus23:1 “Usafalitse mbiri yabodza. Usathandize munthu wolakwa pomuchitira umboni wonama.
Exodus23:2 “Usatsate gulu la anthu ndi kuchita choyipa. Pamene ukupereka umboni mʼbwalo lamilandu
Exodus23:3 Ndipo poweruza mlandu wa munthu wosauka usamukondere.
Exodus23:4 “Ngati ukumana ndi ngʼombe kapena bulu wa mdani wako zitasochera
Exodus23:5 Ngati uwona bulu wa munthu wina amene amakuda atagwa ndi katundu
Exodus23:6 “Usakhotetse milandu ya anthu osauka.
Exodus23:7 Upewe zabodza ndipo usaphetse munthu wosalakwa ndi wolungama
Exodus23:8 “Musamalandire chiphuphu
Exodus23:9 “Usamuzunze mlendo
Exodus23:10 “Muzidzala mbewu zanu mʼmunda ndi kumakolola mbewuzo kwa zaka zisanu ndi chimodzi.
Exodus23:11 Koma chaka chachisanu ndi chiwiri muzisiya osalima mindayo kuti anthu osauka pakati panu azipezamo chakudya
Exodus23:12 “Muzigwira ntchito masiku asanu ndi limodzi koma tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri musagwire ntchito kuti ngʼombe yanu ndi bulu wanu apume ndiponso kuti kapolo wobadwira mʼnyumba yanu ndi mlendo yemwe apezenso mphamvu.
Exodus23:13 “Samalani pochita zonse zimene ine ndanena. Musamapemphere kwa milungu ina ndipo mayina awo musamawatchule.
Exodus23:14 “Muzichita zikondwerero zolemekeza Ine katatu pa chaka.
Exodus23:15 “Muzichita Chikondwerero cha Buledi wopanda Yisiti. Kwa masiku asanu ndi awiri muzidya buledi wopanda yisiti monga ndinakulamulirani. Muzichita zimenezi mwezi wa Abibu pa nthawi yomwe ndayika
Exodus23:16 “Muzichita Chikondwerero cha Masika pogwiritsa ntchito zipatso zoyambirira kucha zimene munadzala mʼmunda. “Muzichitanso Chikondwerero cha Zokolola pakutha pa chaka
Exodus23:17 “Amuna onse azionekera pamaso pa Ambuye Yehova katatu pa chaka.
Exodus23:18 “Musapereke magazi anyama ngati nsembe kwa Ine pamodzi ndi chilichonse chimene chili ndi yisiti. “Ndipo musasunge mafuta anyama yansembe ya pa chikondwerero mpaka mmawa.
Exodus23:19 “Muzibwera ndi zipatso zoyambirira kucha zabwino kwambiri ku Nyumba ya Yehova Mulungu wanu. “Musamaphike kamwana kambuzi mu mkaka wa mayi wake.
Exodus23:20 “Taona Ine ndikutuma mngelo wanga patsogolo panu kuti akutetezeni mʼnjiramo ndi kukakufikitsani ku malo amene ndakonza.
Exodus23:21 Muzimumvera ndi kumvetsetsa zimene akunena. Musamuwukire chifukwa sadzakhululuka kuwukira kwanu
Exodus23:22 Ngati mudzamvera iyeyu ndi kuchita zonse zimene Ine ndikunena
Exodus23:23 Mngelo wanga adzakhala patsogolo panu ndipo adzakufikitsani mʼdziko la Aamori
Exodus23:24 Musagwadire milungu yawo kapena kuyipembedza. Ndipo musatsatire zinthu zomwe amachita. Koma inu mukawononge milungu yawo ndi kuphwasula malo amene amapembedzerapo.
Exodus23:25 Muzipembedza Yehova Mulungu wanu ndipo adzakudalitsani ndi chakudya ndi madzi ndiponso ndidzachotsa nthenda pakati panu.
Exodus23:26 Palibe mkazi amene adzapite padera kapena kukhala wosabereka mʼdziko mwanu. Ndidzakupatsani moyo wautali.
Exodus23:27 “Ine ndidzawachititsa mantha ndi kusokoneza anthu onse amene adzalimbana ndi inu ndipo adani anu onse adzakuthawani.
Exodus23:28 Ahivi
Exodus23:29 Komabe sindidzawachotseratu onse mʼchaka chimodzi chifukwa dziko lingadzakhale lopanda anthu ndipo nyama zakuthengo zidzakuchulukirani.
Exodus23:30 Ndidzawathamangitsa pangʼonopangʼono mpaka inu mutachuluka kokwanira mwakuti nʼkutenga dzikolo.
Exodus23:31 “Malire a dziko lanu adzakhala kuyambira ku Nyanja Yofiira mpaka ku nyanja ya Afilisti
Exodus23:32 Musachite pangano ndi iwo kapena ndi milungu yawo.
Exodus23:33 Asadzakhale mʼdziko lanu chifukwa angadzakuchimwitseni ndi kuyamba kupembedza milungu yawo. Mukadzatero ndiye kuti mwakodwa mu msampha.”
Exodus24:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus24:2 Koma Mose yekha ayandikire Yehova
Exodus24:3 Tsono Mose anapita kukawuza anthu mawu onse a Yehova ndi malamulo onse
Exodus24:4 Ndipo Mose analemba zonse zimene Yehova ananena. Mmawa mwake Mose anadzuka nayamba kumanga guwa lansembe mʼmunsi mwa phirilo ndipo anayimika miyala khumi ndi iwiri ngati zipilala kuyimira mafuko khumi ndi awiri a Israeli.
Exodus24:5 Kenaka Mose anatuma Aisraeli achinyamata kuti aphe ndi kukapereka kwa Yehova nsembe zopsereza zachiyanjano.
Exodus24:6 Mose anatenga theka la magazi ndi kuyika mʼmbale
Exodus24:7 Anatenganso Buku la Chipangano ndi kuwerengera anthu. Anthuwo anayankha kuti
Exodus24:8 Kenaka Mose anatenga magazi
Exodus24:9 Kenaka Mose pamodzi ndi Aaroni
Exodus24:10 ndipo anaona Mulungu wa Israeli. Pansi pa mapazi ake panali njira yoyendamo yopangidwa ndi mwala wa safiro woyalidwa bwino wa maonekedwe owala ngati thambo.
Exodus24:11 Ngakhale anaona Yehova koma sanafe
Exodus24:12 Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus24:13 Ndipo anayamba ulendo wopita ku phiri la Mulungu pamodzi ndi womuthandiza wake Yoswa.
Exodus24:14 Apa nʼkuti Mose atawawuza akuluakulu aja kuti
Exodus24:15 Mose atakwera ku phiri kuja mtambo unaphimba phirilo.
Exodus24:16 Ulemerero wa Yehova unakhala pa phiri la Sinai
Exodus24:17 Ulemerero wa Yehova uja unkaoneka ngati malawi a moto pamwamba pa phirilo.
Exodus24:18 Ndipo Mose analowa mʼmitambo nakwera phiri. Iye anakhala ku phiriko 40 usana ndi usiku.
Exodus25:1 Yehova ananena kwa Mose kuti
Exodus25:2 “Uza Aisraeli kuti abweretse chopereka kwa Ine. Iwe ulandire choperekacho mʼmalo mwanga kuchokera kwa munthu amene akupereka mwakufuna kwake.
Exodus25:3 Zopereka zimene ulandire kwa anthuwo ndi izi: Golide
Exodus25:4 Nsalu zobiriwira
Exodus25:5 zikopa za nkhosa zazimuna za utoto wofiira ndi zikopa za akatumbu; matabwa amtengo wa mkesha;
Exodus25:6 mafuta anyale a olivi
Exodus25:7 miyala yokongola ya mtundu wa onikisi ndi ina yabwino yoyika pa efodi ndi pa chovala cha pachifuwa.
Exodus25:8 “Iwo andipangire malo wopatulika
Exodus25:9 Umange chihema ndiponso ziwiya zamʼkatimo monga momwe Ine ndidzakuonetsere.
Exodus25:10 “Tsono apange bokosi lamatabwa amtengo wa mkesha
Exodus25:11 Bokosilo ulikute ndi golide wabwino kwambiri
Exodus25:12 Upange mphete zinayi zagolide ndipo uzimangirire ku miyendo yake inayi ya bokosilo
Exodus25:13 Kenaka upange mizati yamtengo wa mkesha ndi kuzikuta ndi golide.
Exodus25:14 Ndipo ulowetse nsichizo mʼmphete zija za mbali zonse ziwiri za bokosilo kuti azinyamulira.
Exodus25:15 Nsichizo zizikhala mʼmphete za bokosilo nthawi zonse
Exodus25:16 Ndipo udzayike mʼbokosilo miyala iwiri yolembedwapo malamulo imene Ine ndidzakupatse.
Exodus25:17 “Upange chivundikiro cha bokosilo cha golide wabwino kwambiri
Exodus25:18 Ndipo upange Akerubi awiri agolide osula ndi nyundo
Exodus25:19 kerubi mmodzi mbali ina ndi wina mbali inayo. Akerubiwa uwapangire limodzi ndi chivundikirocho mʼmapeto mwa mbali ziwirizo.
Exodus25:20 Mapiko a Akerubiwo adzatambasukire pamwamba pa chivundikiro cha bokosilo kuti achiphimbe. Akerubiwo adzakhale choyangʼanana
Exodus25:21 Uyike chivundikirocho pamwamba pa bokosi ndipo mʼbokosilo uyikemo miyala ya malamulo
Exodus25:22 Ndizidzakumana nawe pamenepo
Exodus25:23 “Upange tebulo la matabwa amtengo wa mkesha
Exodus25:24 Tebulolo ulikute ndi golide wabwino kwambiri ndipo upange mkombero wagolide mʼmbali mwake.
Exodus25:25 Upange feremu yozungulira tebulo
Exodus25:26 Upange mphete zinayi zagolide
Exodus25:27 Mphetezo uziyike kufupi ndi feremu kuti azikolowekamo nsichi zonyamulira tebuloyo.
Exodus25:28 Upange nsichi zamtengo wa mkesha ndi kuzikuta ndi golide kuti azinyamulira tebulolo.
Exodus25:29 Upange mbale ndi zipande zagolide wabwino
Exodus25:30 Pa tebulopo uyikepo buledi woperekedwa kosalekeza
Exodus25:31 “Upange choyikapo nyale chagolide wabwino kwambiri. Tsinde lake ndi mphanda zake zikhale zosulidwa ndi nyundo. Zikho zake zokhala ndi mphukira ndi maluwa ake zipangidwire kumodzi.
Exodus25:32 Mʼmbali mwake mukhale mphanda zisanu ndi imodzi
Exodus25:33 Zikho zitatu zokhala ngati za maluwa amtowo
Exodus25:34 Pa choyikapo nyalecho pakhale zikho zinayi zopangidwa ngati maluwa amtowo ali ndi mphukira ndi maluwa.
Exodus25:35 Mphukira yoyamba ikhale mʼmunsi mwa nthambi ziwiri zoyamba za pa choyikapo nyale. Mphukira yachiwiri ikhale mʼmunsi mwa nthambi ziwiri zinazo. Ndipo mphukira yachitatu ikhale mʼmunsi mwa nthambi zina ziwirinso. Zonse pamodzi zikhale nthambi zisanu ndi imodzi
Exodus25:36 Mphukira ndi nthambi zonse zisulidwe kumodzi ndi choyikapo nyalecho ndi golide wabwino kwambiri.
Exodus25:37 “Ndipo upange nyale zisanu ndi ziwiri ndi kuziyika pa choyikapo nyalecho kuti ziwunikire kutsogolo.
Exodus25:38 Mbaniro ndi zowolera phulusa zikhale zagolide wabwino kwambiri.
Exodus25:39 Choyikapo nyale ndi zipangizo zonse zipangidwe ndi golide wabwino kwambiri wolemera makilogalamu 34.
Exodus25:40 Uwonetsetse kuti wapanga zonse monga momwe ndikukuonetsera pa phiri pano.”
Exodus26:1 “Panga chihema pogwiritsa ntchito nsalu khumi zofewa
Exodus26:2 Nsalu zonse zikhale zofanana. Mulitali mwake zikhale mamita khumi ndi atatu
Exodus26:3 Ulumikize nsalu zisanu kuti ikhale nsalu imodzi. Uchite chimodzimodzi ndi nsalu zisanu zinazo.
Exodus26:4 Panga zokolowekamo za nsalu yobiriwira mʼmphepete mwa nsalu imodzi yotsiriza ya mbali ina. Uchitenso chimodzimodzi ndi nsalu yotsiriza ya mbali inayo.
Exodus26:5 Upange zokolowekamo 50 pa nsalu yoyamba ndi zokolowekamo makumi asanu zinanso pa nsalu inayo. Upange motero kuti zokolowekamozo ziziyangʼanana.
Exodus26:6 Kenaka upange ngowe zagolide makumi asanu zolumikizira nsalu ziwirizo kuti zipange chihema chimodzi.
Exodus26:7 “Upange nsalu za ubweya wambuzi zophimba pamwamba pa chihemacho. Nsalu zonse pamodzi zikhale khumi ndi imodzi.
Exodus26:8 Nsalu zonse khumi ndi imodzi zikhale zofanana. Mulitali mwake mukhale mamita khumi ndi anayi ndipo mulifupi mwake mukhale mamita awiri.
Exodus26:9 Ulumikize nsalu zisanu kuti ikhale nsalu imodzi ndipo zina zisanu ndi imodzi uzilumikizenso kuti ikhale nsalu imodzinso. Nsalu yachisanu ndi chimodzi imene ili kutsogolo kwa tenti uyipinde pawiri.
Exodus26:10 Upange zokolowekamo 50 mʼmphepete mwa nsalu imodzi yotsirizira ya nsalu yoyamba yolumikiza ija. Upangenso zokolowekamo zina 50 mʼmphepete mwa nsalu yotsirizira ya nsalu inanso yolumikiza ija.
Exodus26:11 Kenaka upange ngowe 50 zamkuwa ndipo uzilowetse mu zokolowekazo. Ndiye uphatikize nsalu ziwirizo kuti tentiyo ikhale imodzi.
Exodus26:12 Theka lotsalira la nsaluyo lidzalendewera kumbuyo kwa chihemacho.
Exodus26:13 Nsalu yotsalira ya masentimita 46 mulitali mwake mʼmbali zonse ziwiri idzalendewere kuphimba mbali ziwirizo.
Exodus26:14 Upange chikopa cha nkhosa zazimuna cha utoto wofiira chophimbira tentiyo ndipo pamwamba pake upangireponso chophimbira china cha zikopa za akatumbu.
Exodus26:15 “Upange maferemu amatabwa amtengo wa mkesha oyimikira chihemacho.
Exodus26:16 Feremu iliyonse ikhale yotalika mamita anayi ndipo mulifupi mwake mukhale masentimita 69.
Exodus26:17 Thabwa lililonse likhale ndi zolumikizira ziwiri. Upange maferemu onse a chihemacho ndi matabwa otere.
Exodus26:18 Upange maferemu makumi awiri a mbali yakummwera kwa chihemacho.
Exodus26:19 Ndipo upange matsinde 40 asiliva ndipo uwayike pansi pa maferemuwo. Pansi pa feremu iliyonse pakhale matsinde awiri ogwiriziza zolumikizira ziwiri zija.
Exodus26:20 Ndipo mbali yakumpoto ya chihemacho upangenso maferemu makumi awiri.
Exodus26:21 Upangenso matsinde 40 asiliva
Exodus26:22 Upange maferemu asanu ndi imodzi a kumbuyo kwa tenti
Exodus26:23 Ndipo upangenso maferemu awiri a pa ngodya yakumbuyo kwenikweni kwa tenti.
Exodus26:24 Pa ngodya ziwirizi pakhale maferemu awiri
Exodus26:25 Choncho pakhale maferemu asanu ndi atatu ndiponso matsinde 16 asiliva
Exodus26:26 “Upange mitanda ya matabwa amtengo wa mkesha: mitanda isanu ikhale ya maferemu a mbali imodzi ya chihema
Exodus26:27 mitanda isanu inanso ikhale ya maferemu a mbali inayo. Pakhalenso mitanda ina isanu ya mbali yakumadzulo
Exodus26:28 Mtanda wapakati pa maferemuwo uchokere pa maferemu a mbali ina mpaka mbali inanso.
Exodus26:29 Maferemuwo uwakute ndi golide ndiponso upange mphete zagolide zogwiriziza mitandayo. Ndipo mitandayonso uyikute ndi golide.
Exodus26:30 “Upange chihema mofanana ndi momwe ndinakuonetsera pa phiri paja.
Exodus26:31 “Upange nsalu yokhala ndi mtundu wamtambo
Exodus26:32 Nsaluyo uyikoloweke pa nsanamira zinayi zamtengo wa mkesha zokutidwa ndi golide zomwe zili ndi ngowe zagolide
Exodus26:33 Ukoloweke kataniyo ku ngowe ndipo uyike Bokosi la Chipangano mʼkatimo. Kataniyo idzalekanitse malo wopatulika ndi malo wopatulika kwambiri.
Exodus26:34 Uyike chivundikiro pa bokosi laumboni ku malo wopatulika kwambiri.
Exodus26:35 Uyike tebulo kunja kwa katani yotchinga cha kumpoto kwa chihema ndipo uyike choyikapo nyale chija kummwera moyangʼanana ndi tebulolo.
Exodus26:36 “Pa chipata cholowera mu chihema
Exodus26:37 Upange ngowe zagolide za nsaluyo ndi nsanamira zisanu zamtengo wa mkesha ndipo uzikute ndi golide. Upangenso matsinde asanu amkuwa a nsanamirazo.”
Exodus27:1 “Upange guwa lansembe lamatabwa amtengo wa mkesha. Likhale lofanana mbali zonse
Exodus27:2 Upange nyanga imodziimodzi pa ngodya zake zinayizo kuti nyangazo ndi guwalo zikhale chinthu chimodzi
Exodus27:3 Upange ziwiya zamkuwa izi zogwirira ntchito pa guwalo: miphika yochotsera phulusa
Exodus27:4 Upange sefa yachitsulo chamkuwa ndipo mʼngodya zake zinayizo upangiremo mphete zamkuwa.
Exodus27:5 Uyike sefayo mmunsi mwa khoma la guwa lansembelo
Exodus27:6 Upange nsichi zamtengo wa mkesha ndipo uzikutire ndi mkuwa.
Exodus27:7 Pamene mukunyamula guwalo
Exodus27:8 Guwalo likhale lamatabwa ndi logoba mʼkati mwake. Ulipange monga momwe ndinakuonetsera pa phiri paja.
Exodus27:9 “Upange bwalo la chihema. Mbali yakummwera ikhale yotalika mamita 46 ndipo ikhale ndi nsalu yotchinga yofewa yosalala yolukidwa bwino.
Exodus27:10 Upangenso mizati makumi awiri
Exodus27:11 Mbali yakumpoto ikhalenso yotalika mamita 46 ndipo ikhale ndi nsalu yotchinga. Pakhalenso mizati makumi awiri
Exodus27:12 “Mbali yakumadzulo ya bwalolo ikhale yotalika mamita 23 ndipo ikhale ndi nsalu yotchinga
Exodus27:13 Mbali yakummawa
Exodus27:14 Mbali imodzi yachipata kukhale nsalu yotchinga yotalika mamita asanu ndi awiri
Exodus27:15 Ndipo ku mbali inayo kukhale nsalu yotchinga ya mamita asanu ndi awiri pamodzi ndi mizati itatu ndi matsinde atatu.
Exodus27:16 “Pa chipata cha bwalolo pakhale nsalu yotchinga yamtundu wa mtambo
Exodus27:17 Mizati yonse yozungulira bwalolo ilumikizidwe ndi zingwe zasiliva. Ngowe zake zikhale zasiliva
Exodus27:18 Kutalika kwa bwalolo kukhale mamita 46
Exodus27:19 Zipangizo zonse zogwiritsa ntchito zosiyanasiyana pa chihemacho
Exodus27:20 “Lamula Aisraeli kuti akupatse mafuta anyale a olivi wabwino kwambiri kuti nyalezo ziziyaka nthawi zonse.
Exodus27:21 Mʼchihema cha msonkhano
Exodus28:1 “Aaroni mʼbale wako ndi ana ake aamuna
Exodus28:2 Umusokere mʼbale wako
Exodus28:3 Uwawuze anthu onse aluso amene Ine ndawapatsa nzeru pa ntchito yosoka kuti apange zovala za Aaroni za pa mwambo womupatula
Exodus28:4 Zovala zoti apange ndi izi: chovala chapachifuwa
Exodus28:5 Iwo agwiritse ntchito golide
Exodus28:6 “Apange efodi pogwiritsa ntchito golide
Exodus28:7 Efodiyo ikhale ndi timalamba tiwiri ta pa mapewa tosokerera ku msonga zake ziwiri kuti azitha kumanga.
Exodus28:8 Lamba womangira efodi akhale wolukidwa mwaluso ngati efodiyo. Akhale wopangidwa ndi golide
Exodus28:9 “Utenge miyala iwiri ya onikisi ndipo uzokotepo mayina a ana a Israeli.
Exodus28:10 Mayina asanu ndi limodzi akhale pa mwala umodzi
Exodus28:11 Mayina a ana a Israeli uwazokote pa miyala iwiriyo
Exodus28:12 Umangirire miyala iwiriyi pa tinsalu ta mʼmapewa ta efodi tija ngati miyala ya chikumbutso cha ana a Israeli. Aaroni azinyamula mayinawo mʼmapewa ake kuti akhale chikumbutso pamaso pa Yehova.
Exodus28:13 Upange zoyikamo za maluwa agolide
Exodus28:14 ndiponso maunyolo awiri a golide wabwino kwambiri
Exodus28:15 “Upange chovala chapachifuwa chogwiritsa ntchito poweruza mlandu ndipo uchipange mwaluso kwambiri. Uchipange ngati efodi pogwiritsa ntchito golide
Exodus28:16 Kutalika kwake kukhale kofanana mbali zonse
Exodus28:17 Uyikepo mizere inayi ya miyala yokongola kwambiri. Mzere woyamba ukhale ndi miyala ya rubi
Exodus28:18 Mzere wachiwiri pakhale miyala ya emeradi
Exodus28:19 mzere wachitatu pakhale miyala ya opera
Exodus28:20 Mzere wachinayi pakhale miyala ya topazi
Exodus28:21 Miyalayo ikhalepo khumi ndi iwiri
Exodus28:22 “Upange timaunyolo tagolide wabwino kwambiri ta pa chovala chapachifuwa
Exodus28:23 Upangenso mphete ziwiri zagolide ndipo uzimangirire pa ngodya ziwiri za pa chovala chapachifuwa.
Exodus28:24 Umangirire timaunyolo tiwiri tagolide tija pa mphete za pa ngodya pa chovala chapachifuwacho.
Exodus28:25 Ndipo mbali ina ya timaunyoloto umangirire pa zoyikapo zake ziwiri zija ndi kulumikiza pa tinsalu takutsogolo kwa mapewa a efodi.
Exodus28:26 Upangenso mphete ziwiri zagolide
Exodus28:27 Upangenso mphete zina ziwiri zagolide ndipo uzilumikize kumunsi kwa tinsalu takutsogolo kwa efodi
Exodus28:28 Tsono umangirire mphete za pa chovala chapachifuwa zija ku mphete za efodi ndi chingwe chamtundu wa mtambo
Exodus28:29 “Pamene Aaroni akulowa kumalo opatulika azivala chovala chapachifuwa cha zoweruzira chija chimene chalembedwa mayina a ana a Israeli kuti Yehova awakumbukire nthawi zonse.
Exodus28:30 Ndiponso uyike Urimu ndi Tumimu mu chovala chapachifuwa cha zoweruziracho
Exodus28:31 “Uyipangire efodiyo mkanjo wamtundu wa mtambo.
Exodus28:32 Mkanjowo ukhala ndi malo opisapo mutu pakati pakepo. Pa chibowopo pakhale chibandi chosokedwa mochita ngati kuluka monga muja akhalira malaya kuti chibowocho chilimbe
Exodus28:33 Pa mpendero wamʼmunsi wa mkanjowo
Exodus28:34 Choncho pazikhala mphonje imodzi kenaka belu limodzi
Exodus28:35 Aaroni azivala mkanjowo pamene akutumikira ngati wansembe. Kulira kwa maberu kuzimveka pamene akulowa mʼmalo opatulika pamaso pa Yehova ndiponso pamene akutuluka
Exodus28:36 “Upange duwa lagolide wabwino kwambiri kukhala ngati chidindo ndipo uzokotepo mawu akuti
Exodus28:37 Ulimange ndi chingwe cha nsalu yamtundu wa mtambo pa nduwira ya Aaroni
Exodus28:38 Lidzakhala pa mphumi ya Aaroni
Exodus28:39 “Uluke mwinjiro wa nsalu yofewa yosalala ndiponso upange nduwira ya nsalu yofewa yosalala. Lamba wake akhale wolukidwa bwino ndi munthu waluso.
Exodus28:40 Upangirenso ana a Aaroni mwinjiro
Exodus28:41 Zovala zimenezi umuveke Aaroni
Exodus28:42 “Uwapangire akabudula a nsalu yofewa oyambira mʼchiwuno kulekeza mʼntchafu kuti asamaonetse maliseche.
Exodus28:43 Aaroni ndi ana ake ayenera kuvala akabudulawo pamene akulowa mu tenti ya msonkhano kapena pamene akupita ku guwa lansembe kukatumikira malo oyera kuopa kuti angachimwe ndi kufa. “Ili likhale lamulo la nthawi zonse kwa Aaroni ndi zidzukulu zake.”
Exodus29:1 “Pofuna kumupatula Aaroni ndi ana ake kuti akhale ansembe onditumikira Ine
Exodus29:2 Utengenso buledi wopanda yisiti
Exodus29:3 Uziyike mʼdengu ndipo ubwere nazo kwa Ine pamodzi ndi ngʼombe yayimuna ija ndi nkhosa ziwiri zazimuna zija.
Exodus29:4 Kenaka ubwere naye Aaroni ndi ana ake pa khomo la tenti ya msonkhano ndipo uwasambitse ndi madzi.
Exodus29:5 Tenga zovala ndipo umuveke Aaroni mwinjiro
Exodus29:6 Umuveke nduwira kumutu
Exodus29:7 Utenge mafuta wodzozera ndipo uwatsanulire pamutu pake kumudzoza.
Exodus29:8 Ubwere ndi ana ake aamuna ndipo uwavekenso minjiro
Exodus29:9 ndi nduwira. Kenaka umange malamba Aaroniyo pamodzi ndi ana ake ndi kuwaveka nduwira. Motero unsembe udzakhala wawo malingana ndi lamulo ili losatha. “Umu ndi mmene udzadzozere Aaroni ndi ana ake aamuna.
Exodus29:10 “Ubwere ndi ngʼombe yayimuna pa khomo la tenti ya msonkhano ndipo Aaroni ndi ana ake asanjike manja awo pamutu pake.
Exodus29:11 Uphe ngʼombeyo pamaso pa Yehova pa khomo la tenti ya msonkhano.
Exodus29:12 Utenge magazi ena angʼombeyo ndi kupaka ndi chala chako pa nyanga zaguwa lansembe ndipo magazi otsalawo uwakhutulire pa tsinde laguwalo.
Exodus29:13 Kenaka utenge mafuta onse okuta matumbo
Exodus29:14 Koma nyama yangʼombeyo
Exodus29:15 “Utenge nkhosa yayimuna imodzi ndipo Aaroni ndi ana ake aamuna asanjike manja awo pamutu pake.
Exodus29:16 Uyiphe ndipo utenge magazi ake ndi kuwaza mbali zonse zaguwalo.
Exodus29:17 Uyidule nkhosayo nthulinthuli
Exodus29:18 Ndipo uwotche nkhosa yonseyo pa guwa lansembe. Iyi ndi nsembe yopsereza ya kwa Yehova. Ili ndi fungo lokoma
Exodus29:19 “Utenge nkhosa yayimuna ina ndipo Aaroni ndi ana ake aamuna asanjike manja awo pamutu pake.
Exodus29:20 Uyiphe ndipo utenge magazi ake ena ndi kupaka ndewere za makutu a kudzanja lamanja la Aaroni ndi ana ake aamuna. Upakenso pa zala zawo zazikulu za kudzanja lawo lamanja
Exodus29:21 Ndipo utenge magazi ena amene ali pa guwa lansembe komanso pa mafuta ena odzozera ndipo uwawaze pa Aaroni ndi zovala zake ndi ana ake ndi zovala zawo. Ndiye kuti iyeyo ndi ana ake aamuna adzakhala opatulika pamodzi ndi zovala zawo.
Exodus29:22 “Pa nkhosa yayimuna ija utengepo mafuta ake
Exodus29:23 Utengenso mʼdengu la buledi wopanda yisiti limene lili pamaso pa Yehova
Exodus29:24 Izi zonse uzipereke mʼmanja mwa Aaroni ndi ana ake
Exodus29:25 Kenaka uzitenge mʼmanja mwawo ndipo uzipsereze pa guwa lansembe
Exodus29:26 Kenaka utenge chidale cha nkhosa yayimuna imene inaperekedwa pamwambo wodzoza Aaroni
Exodus29:27 “Uzipatule ziwalo zonse za nkhosa ya pa mwambo wodzoza Aaroni ndi ana ake. Chidale chimene unaweyula chija ndiponso ntchafu imene inaperekedwa ija.
Exodus29:28 Nsembe izi ndi zimene Aisraeli azipereka kwa Aaroni ndi ana ake mwa zonse zimene azipereka nthawi zonse. Mwa zopereka za mtendere zimene ana a Aisraeli adzapereka kwa Yehova
Exodus29:29 “Zovala zopatulika za Aaroni zidzakhala za ana ake aamuna iye atafa kuti adzavale podzozedwa ndi polandira udindo wawo.
Exodus29:30 Mwana amene adzalowa mʼmalo mwake monga wansembe pamene adzabwerera kudzalowa mu tenti ya msonkhano kudzatumikira ku malo wopatulika
Exodus29:31 “Utenge nkhosa yayimuna ya pamwambo wodzoza ansembe ndipo uyiphike pamalo opatulika.
Exodus29:32 Aaroni ndi ana ake adye nyama ya nkhosa yayimunayi pamodzi ndi buledi amene ali mʼdengu pa khomo la tenti ya msonkhano.
Exodus29:33 Adye zonse zimene anazipereka kwa Yehova pamwambo wopepesera machimo powadzoza ndi kuwapatula. Munthu wamba asadye chifukwa ndi zopatulika.
Exodus29:34 Ndipo ngati nyama ina ya nkhosa ya pamwambo wodzoza ansembe kapena buledi zatsala mpaka mmawa
Exodus29:35 “Uchitire Aaroni ndi ana ake aamuna zonse zimene ndakulamulazi. Uchite mwambo wowapatula kukhala ansembe masiku asanu ndi awiri.
Exodus29:36 Tsiku lililonse uzipereka ngʼombe yayimuna ngati nsembe yopepesera machimo kuti machimowo akhululukidwe. Ndiponso upatule guwalo popereka nsembe yopepesera ndi kulidzoza mafuta kuti likhale lopatulika.
Exodus29:37 Pa masiku asanu ndi awiri uzipereka pa guwapo nsembe zoyeretsera guwalo
Exodus29:38 “Tsiku ndi tsiku pa guwa lansembe uzipereka izi: Ana ankhosa a chaka chimodzi awiri.
Exodus29:39 Mmawa muzipereka mwana wankhosa mmodzi ndipo winayo madzulo.
Exodus29:40 Pamodzi ndi mwana wankhosa woyambayo
Exodus29:41 Upereke mwana wankhosa winayo madzulo pamodzi ndi chopereka chachakudya monga poyamba paja ndi chopereka chachakumwa monga mmawa kuti ikhale fungo lokoma la chopereka chachakudya kwa Yehova.
Exodus29:42 “Zopereka zopsereza zimenezi ziziperekedwa nthawi zonse
Exodus29:43 Pameneponso Ine ndidzakumana ndi Aisraeli
Exodus29:44 “Tsono Ine ndidzapatula tenti ya msonkhano ndi guwa lansembe. Ndidzapatulanso Aaroni pamodzi ndi ana ake kuti akhale ansembe anga onditumikira.
Exodus29:45 Ndidzakhala pakati pa Aisraeli ndikukhala Mulungu wawo.
Exodus29:46 Adzadziwa kuti ine ndine Mulungu wawo amene ndinawatulutsa mʼdziko la Igupto kuti ndikhale pakati pawo. Ine ndine Yehova
Exodus30:1 Upange guwa lamatabwa amtengo wa mkesha lofukizirapo lubani.
Exodus30:2 Likhale lofanana mbali zonse. Mulitali masentimita 46
Exodus30:3 Ukute guwa lonse ndi golide wabwino kwambiri
Exodus30:4 Upange mphete ziwiri zagolide ndipo uzilumikize ku guwa mʼmunsi mwa mkombero
Exodus30:5 Upange mizati yamtengo wa mkesha ndipo uyikute ndi golide.
Exodus30:6 Uyike guwalo patsogolo pa nsalu yotchinga Bokosi la Chipangano. Apa ndi pamene ndizidzakumana nawe.
Exodus30:7 “Aaroni ayenera kumafukiza lubani wonunkhira pa guwalo mmawa uliwonse. Pamene akukonza nyale zija afukizenso lubani.
Exodus30:8 Aaroni ayenera kufukizanso lubani pamene ayatsa nyale madzulo kuti lubani akhale akuyaka nthawi zonse pamaso pa Yehova kwa mibado imene ikubwera.
Exodus30:9 Pa guwapo usafukize lubani wachilendo kapena kuperekapo nsembe yopsereza kapena nsembe yaufa. Usathire pa guwapo ngakhale nsembe yachakumwa.
Exodus30:10 Aaroni azidzapereka nsembe yopepesera machimo pa nyanga za guwalo kamodzi pa chaka. Mwambowu uzidzachitika pogwiritsa ntchito magazi a nsembe yopepesera machimo
Exodus30:11 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus30:12 “Pamene ukuchita kalembera wa Aisraeli
Exodus30:13 Izi ndi zimene aliyense wolembedwa mu kawundula ayenera kupereka: theka la sekeli
Exodus30:14 Aliyense wolembedwa mu kawundula amene ali ndi zaka makumi awiri kapena kupitirira ayenera kupereka chopereka kwa Yehova.
Exodus30:15 Anthu olemera asapereke koposa theka la sekeli ndipo osauka asapereke kuchepera theka la sekeli pamene mukupereka nsembe kwa Yehova yowombolera miyoyo yanu.
Exodus30:16 Ulandire ndalama zopepeserazo kuchokera kwa Aisraeli ndipo zigwiritsidwe ntchito ya ku tenti ya msonkhano. Zoperekazi zidzakhala chikumbutso cha Aisraeli pamaso pa Yehova
Exodus30:17 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus30:18 “Upange beseni lamkuwa lokhala ndi miyendo yamkuwanso. Uliyike pakati pa tenti ya msonkhano ndi guwa lansembe ndipo uthiremo madzi.
Exodus30:19 Aaroni ndi ana ake azisamba mʼmanja ndi kutsuka mapazi awo ndi madzi amenewo.
Exodus30:20 Pamene akulowa mu tenti ya msonkhano
Exodus30:21 azisamba mʼmanja mwawo ndi kutsuka mapazi kuti asadzafe. Limeneli ndi lamulo limene Aaroni
Exodus30:22 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus30:23 “Utenge zonunkhira bwino kwambiri izi: makilogalamu asanu ndi limodzi a mure wamadzi
Exodus30:24 makilogalamu asanu ndi limodzi a mkesha. Zonsezi zikhale malingana ndi muyeso wa ku Nyumba ya Mulungu. Pakhalenso malita anayi a mafuta a olivi.
Exodus30:25 Ugwiritse ntchito zinthu zimenezi kupanga mafuta opatulika odzozera
Exodus30:26 Tsono uwagwiritse ntchito podzoza tenti ya msonkhano
Exodus30:27 tebulo
Exodus30:28 guwa lansembe yopsereza ndi ziwiya zake zonse
Exodus30:29 Zonsezi uzipatule kuti zidzakhale zopatulika
Exodus30:30 “Udzoze Aaroni ndi ana ake aamuna ndi kuwapatula kuti akhale ansembe onditumikira.
Exodus30:31 Tsono awuze a Israeli kuti
Exodus30:32 Musadzadzozere munthu wamba mafuta amenewa
Exodus30:33 Wina aliyense amene adzapanga mafuta wonunkhira wofanana nawo kapena kudzozera mafutawa munthu wamba osati wansembe ayenera kuchotsedwa pakati pa anthu anzake.”
Exodus30:34 Kenaka Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus30:35 Uziphatikize pamodzi zonsezi ndi kupanga lubani monga amachitira mmisiri wopanga zonunkhira. Athire mchere ndipo akhale woyera ndi wopatulika.
Exodus30:36 Upere gawo lina mosalala kwambiri ndipo utapepo pangʼono ndi kuyika patsogolo pa Bokosi la Chipangano mu tenti ya msonkhano
Exodus30:37 Musapange lubani wanu potsatira njira iyi. Lubani yense wopangidwa mwa njira iyi akhale wopatulika
Exodus30:38 Aliyense amene adzapanga wofanana naye kuti asangalale ndi fungo lake ayenera kuchotsedwa pakati pa anthu anzake.”
Exodus31:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus31:2 “Taona
Exodus31:3 Ndipo ndamudzaza ndi Mzimu wa Mulungu kotero kuti ali ndi luso ndi nzeru zomvetsa zinthu ndipo akudziwa bwino ntchito zonse zamanja monga izi:
Exodus31:4 Kulemba ndondomeko ya ntchito zaluso ndi kupanga zinthu zagolide
Exodus31:5 kusema ndi kuyika miyala yokongola
Exodus31:6 Ndasankhanso Oholiabu mwana wa Ahisamaki wa fuko la Dani. Ndiponso ndapereka nzeru kwa anthu aluso motero adzagwira ntchito zonse zimene ndakulamulira kuti zichitike monga izi:
Exodus31:7 Kupanga tenti ya msonkhano
Exodus31:8 tebulo ndi zida zake
Exodus31:9 guwa lansembe yopsereza ndi ziwiya zake zonse
Exodus31:10 ndiponso zovala zonse zolukidwa
Exodus31:11 ndiponso mafuta odzozera ndi lubani wonunkhira wa ku malo opatulika. Iwo azipanga monga momwe Ine ndinakulamulira.”
Exodus31:12 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus31:13 “Uza ana a Israeli kuti azisunga Masabata anga. Ichi chidzakhala chizindikiro pakati pa inu ndi Ine pamodzi ndi zidzukulu zanu mʼtsogolomo
Exodus31:14 “Motero muzisunga tsiku la Sabata chifukwa ndi loyera kwa inu. Aliyense amene adetsa tsiku la Sabata ayenera kuphedwa. Aliyense amene agwira ntchito iliyonse pa tsikuli ayenera kuchotsedwa pakati pa anthu anzake.
Exodus31:15 Mugwire ntchito kwa masiku asanu ndi limodzi koma tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri ndi Sabata
Exodus31:16 Aisraeli onse komanso zidzukulu zawo mʼtsogolo azidzasunga tsiku la Sabata ngati pangano lamuyaya.
Exodus31:17 Tsiku la Sabata lidzakhala chizindikiro chamuyaya pakati pa Ine ndi Aisraeli chosonyeza kuti Yehova analenga za kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi kwa masiku asanu ndi limodzi ndi kuti pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri analeka kugwira ntchito napumula.”
Exodus31:18 Yehova atamaliza kuyankhula ndi Mose pa phiri la Sinai
Exodus32:1 Anthu ataona kuti Mose akuchedwa kutsika mʼphiri
Exodus32:2 Aaroni anawayankha kuti
Exodus32:3 Kotero anthu onse anavula ndolo zagolide ndi kubwera nazo kwa Aaroni.
Exodus32:4 Choncho Aaroni analandira golideyo ndipo anamuwumba ndi chikombole ndi kupanga fano la mwana wangʼombe. Kenaka anthu aja anati
Exodus32:5 Aaroni ataona izi
Exodus32:6 Kotero tsiku linalo anthu anadzuka mmamawa ndithu ndi kupereka nsembe zopsereza ndi nsembe zachiyanjano. Atatha kupereka nsembezo
Exodus32:7 Pamenepo Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus32:8 Iwo apatuka mwamsanga kuleka kutsatira zimene ndinawalamula. Ndiye adzipangira fano la mwana wangʼombe. Aligwadira ndi kuliperekera nsembe nʼkumati
Exodus32:9 Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus32:10 Chifukwa chake undileke kuti mkwiyo wanga uyake pa iwo ndi kuwawononga. Ndipo Ine ndidzakusandutsa kuti ukhale mtundu waukulu.”
Exodus32:11 Koma Mose anapempha chifundo cha Mulungu wake ndipo anati
Exodus32:12 Kodi mukufuna kuti Aigupto azinena kuti
Exodus32:13 Kumbukirani atumiki anu
Exodus32:14 Choncho Yehova analeka ndipo sanawachitire choyipa anthu ake monga anaopsezera.
Exodus32:15 Mose anatembenuka ndi kutsika phiri miyala iwiri ya pangano ili mʼmanja mwake. Miyalayi inalembedwa mbali zonse
Exodus32:16 Miyalayi anayikonza ndi Mulungu. Malembawo analemba ndi Mulungu mozokota pa miyalapo.
Exodus32:17 Pamene Yoswa anamva phokoso la anthu anati kwa Mose
Exodus32:18 Mose anayankha kuti
Exodus32:19 Mose atayandikira msasa ndi kuona mwana wangʼombe ndiponso kuvina
Exodus32:20 Ndipo iye anatenga mwana wangʼombe amene anthu anapanga uja ndi kumuwotcha pa moto ndi kumuperapera ndikukhala ngati fumbi. Kenaka anawaza fumbilo mʼmadzi ndi kuwamwetsa Aisraeli madziwo.
Exodus32:21 Tsono Mose anafunsa Aaroni kuti
Exodus32:22 Aaroni anayankha kuti
Exodus32:23 Iwo anati kwa ine
Exodus32:24 Choncho ine ndinawawuza kuti
Exodus32:25 Mose anaona kuti anthuwo anali osokonezekadi chifukwa Aaroni anawalekerera mpaka kusanduka anthu osekedwa pakati pa adani awo.
Exodus32:26 Choncho iye anayima pa chipata cholowera mu msasa ndipo anati
Exodus32:27 Ndipo iye anawawuza kuti
Exodus32:28 Alevi anachita zomwe Mose analamula
Exodus32:29 Kenaka Mose anati
Exodus32:30 Mmawa mwake Mose anati kwa anthu onse
Exodus32:31 Kotero Mose anabwereranso kwa Yehova ndipo anati
Exodus32:32 Koma tsopano
Exodus32:33 Yehova anamuyankha Mose kuti
Exodus32:34 Tsopano pita ukawatsogolere anthu kumalo kumene ine ndinanena
Exodus32:35 Ndipo Yehova anawakantha anthuwo ndi mliri chifukwa anawumiriza Aaroni kuti awapangire fano la mwana wangʼombe.
Exodus33:1 Ndipo Yehova anati
Exodus33:2 Ndipo ndidzatumiza mngelo patsogolo panu kuthamangitsa Akanaani
Exodus33:3 Pitani ku dziko loyenda mkaka ndi uchi. Koma ine sindidzapita nanu
Exodus33:4 Anthu atamva mawu owopsawa
Exodus33:5 Pakuti Yehova anali atanena kwa Mose kuti
Exodus33:6 Kotero Aisraeli anavula zodzikometsera zawo pa phiri la Horebu.
Exodus33:7 Tsono Mose ankatenga tenti ndi kukayimanga kunja kwa msasa chapatalipo
Exodus33:8 Ndipo nthawi ina iliyonse imene Mose amapita ku tenti anthu onse amanyamuka ndi kuyimirira pa makomo amatenti awo
Exodus33:9 Mose akamalowa mu tenti
Exodus33:10 Nthawi zonse anthu akaona chipilala cha mtambo chitayima pa khomo la tentiyo amayimirira ndi kupembedza
Exodus33:11 Yehova amayankhula ndi Mose maso ndi maso ngati mmene munthu amayankhulira ndi bwenzi lake. Kenaka Mose amabwerera ku msasa koma womuthandiza wake
Exodus33:12 Mose anati kwa Yehova
Exodus33:13 Ngati mwakondwera nane ndiphunzitseni njira zanu kuti ndikudziweni ndi kupitiriza kupeza chisomo pamaso panu. Kumbukirani kuti mtundu uwu ndi anthu anu.”
Exodus33:14 Yehova anayankha kuti
Exodus33:15 Kenaka Mose anati kwa Yehova
Exodus33:16 Kodi wina adzadziwa bwanji kuti inu mwandikomera mtima pamodzi ndi anthu awa ngati simupita nafe? Kodi nʼchiyani chomwe chidzatisiyanitse pakati pa anthu onse amene ali pa dziko lapansi?”
Exodus33:17 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus33:18 Kenaka Mose anati
Exodus33:19 Ndipo Yehova anati
Exodus33:20 Iye anati
Exodus33:21 Ndipo Yehova anati
Exodus33:22 Pamene ulemerero wanga udutsa
Exodus33:23 Kenaka ine ndidzachotsa dzanja langa ndipo iwe udzaona msana wanga
Exodus34:1 Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus34:2 Ukonzeke mmamawa
Exodus34:3 Palibe amene abwere nawe kapena kuoneka pena paliponse pafupi ndi phiri. Ndipo ngakhale nkhosa kapena ngʼombe zisadye mʼmbali mwa phirilo.”
Exodus34:4 Choncho Mose anasema miyala iwiri yofanana ndi yoyamba ija ndipo anapita ku Phiri la Sinai mmawa atanyamula miyala iwiri mʼmanja mwake monga momwe Yehova anamulamulira.
Exodus34:5 Ndipo Yehova anatsika mu mtambo ndi kuyima pamodzi ndi Mose ndi kulengeza dzina lake lakuti Yehova.
Exodus34:6 Ndipo Iye anadutsa kutsogolo kwa Mose akulengeza kuti
Exodus34:7 waonetsa chikondi chosasinthika kwa anthu miyandamiyanda
Exodus34:8 Pamenepo Mose anawerama pansi napembedza.
Exodus34:9 Iye anati
Exodus34:10 Choncho Yehova anati: “Ine ndikuchita nanu pangano. Ndidzachita zodabwitsa pamaso pa anthu onse zimene sizinachitikenso ndi mtundu wina uliwonse wa anthu pa dziko lonse lapansi. Anthu amene mudzakhala pakati pawo adzaona kuopsa kwa ntchito imene Ine Yehova ndidzakuchitireni.
Exodus34:11 Mverani zimene ndikukulamulirani lero. Ine ndidzathamangitsa pamaso panu Aamori
Exodus34:12 Musamale kuti musakachite mgwirizano ndi anthu amene akukhala mʼdziko limene mukupitalo
Exodus34:13 Mukagumule maguwa awo ansembe
Exodus34:14 Musapembedze mulungu wina
Exodus34:15 “Musamale kuti musakachite mgwirizano ndi anthu amene akukhala mʼdziko limene mukupitalo
Exodus34:16 Ndipo inu mukasankha ena mwa ana awo aakazi kukhala akazi a ana anu
Exodus34:17 “Musadzipangire milungu yosungunula.
Exodus34:18 “Muzichita chikondwerero cha buledi wopanda yisiti. Kwa masiku asanu ndi awiri muzidya buledi wopanda yisiti monga momwe ndinakulamulirani. Muzichita zimenezi pa nthawi yoyikika mwezi wa Abibu
Exodus34:19 “Mwana aliyense woyamba kubadwa ndi wanga
Exodus34:20 Muziwombola mwana woyamba kubadwa wa bulu popereka mwana wankhosa. Mukapanda kumuwombola mupheni. Muziwombola ana anu onse aamuna. “Palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe adzaonekere pamaso panga wopanda kanthu mʼdzanja lake.
Exodus34:21 “Muzigwira ntchito masiku asanu ndi limodzi
Exodus34:22 “Muzichita Chikondwerero cha Masabata
Exodus34:23 Amuna onse azionekera pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli
Exodus34:24 Ine ndidzapirikitsa mitundu inayo pamene inu mukufikako ndi kukulitsa malire anu. Palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe adzafune kulanda dziko lanu ngati inu muzidzapita katatu pa chaka pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu
Exodus34:25 “Musapereke magazi anyama ngati nsembe kwa Ine pamodzi ndi chilichonse chimene chili ndi yisiti
Exodus34:26 “Muzibwera ndi zipatso zoyambirira kucha zabwino kwambiri ku nyumba ya Yehova Mulungu wanu. “Musamaphike kamwana kambuzi mu mkaka wa mayi wake.”
Exodus34:27 Kenaka Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus34:28 Mose anakhala kumeneko pamodzi ndi Yehova masiku 40
Exodus34:29 Mose anatsika kuchokera mʼPhiri la Sinai pamodzi ndi miyala iwiri ija ya pangano mʼmanja mwake. Iye sanazindikire kuti nkhope yake imanyezimira pakuti anayankhula ndi Yehova.
Exodus34:30 Aaroni ndi Aisraeli ataona kuti nkhope ya Mose imanyezimira anaopa kumuyandikira.
Exodus34:31 Koma Mose anawayitana. Kotero Aaroni ndi atsogoleri onse a gululo anabwera kwa iye
Exodus34:32 Kenaka Aisraeli onse anamuyandikira
Exodus34:33 Mose atamaliza kuyankhula nawo anaphimba nkhope yake.
Exodus34:34 Koma nthawi zonse popita pamaso pa Yehova kukayankhula naye amachotsa chophimbacho mpaka atatuluka. Ndipo akatuluka kudzawuza Aisraeli zimene walamulidwa
Exodus34:35 iwo amaona nkhope yake ikunyezimira. Choncho Mose amaphimba nkhope yake ngakhale pamene amapita kukayankhula ndi Yehova.
Exodus35:1 Mose anasonkhanitsa gulu lonse la Aisraeli ndipo anawawuza kuti
Exodus35:2 Muzigwira ntchito zanu pa masiku asanu ndi limodzi
Exodus35:3 Pa tsiku la Sabata musakoleze moto paliponse pamene mukhala.”
Exodus35:4 Mose ananena kwa gulu lonse la Aisraeli kuti
Exodus35:5 Kuchokera pa zomwe muli nazo
Exodus35:6 nsalu zobiriwira
Exodus35:7 zikopa za nkhosa zazimuna za utoto wofiira ndi zikopa za akatumbu; matabwa amtengo wa mkesha
Exodus35:8 mafuta anyale a olivi
Exodus35:9 miyala yokongola ya mtundu wa onikisi ndi ina yabwino yoyika pa Efodi ndi pa chovala cha pachifuwa.
Exodus35:10 “Anthu onse aluso pakati panu abwere ndi kupanga zonse zimene Yehova walamula:
Exodus35:11 Chihema ndi tenti yake ndiponso chophimba chake
Exodus35:12 Bokosi la Chipangano pamodzi ndi mitengo yake yonyamulira ndiponso chovundikira chake cha bokosilo ndi nsalu zophimba bokosilo;
Exodus35:13 tebulo pamodzi ndi mitengo yake yonyamulira pamodzi ndi zipangizo zake zonse ndiponso buledi wokhala pamaso pa Yehova;
Exodus35:14 choyikapo nyale yowunikira pamodzi ndi zipangizo zake
Exodus35:15 guwa lofukizira lubani pamodzi ndi mitengo yake yonyamulira
Exodus35:16 guwa lansembe yopsereza pamodzi ndi sefa yamkuwa
Exodus35:17 nsalu yotchingira bwalo pamodzi ndi mizati yake ndi matsinde ake
Exodus35:18 zikhomo za tenti ya chihema ndiponso za bwalo
Exodus35:19 zovala zolukidwa zovala potumikira kumalo opatulika
Exodus35:20 Kenaka gulu lonse la Aisraeli linachoka pamaso pa Mose
Exodus35:21 ndipo aliyense amene anakhudzidwa mu mtima mwake nafuna kupereka
Exodus35:22 Onse amene anali ndi mtima wofuna
Exodus35:23 Aliyense amene anali ndi nsalu ya mtundu wa mtambo
Exodus35:24 Onse amene anapereka chopereka cha siliva kapena mkuwa anabweretsa monga chopereka kwa Yehova. Ndipo aliyense amene anali ndi matabwa a mtengo wa mkesha kuti awagwiritse ntchito mbali ina iliyonse ya ntchitoyo
Exodus35:25 Mayi aliyense waluso analuka ndi manja ake ndi kubweretsa chomwe analuka cha mtundu wa mtambo
Exodus35:26 Ndipo amayi onse amene anali ndi mtima wofuna ndipo anali ndi luso analuka ubweya wa mbuzi.
Exodus35:27 Atsogoleri anabweretsa miyala ya onikisi ndi miyala yokongola yoyika pa efodi ndi chovala chapachifuwa.
Exodus35:28 Anabweretsanso zonunkhiritsa ndiponso mafuta owunikira a olivi ndi odzozera ndi zofukizira zonunkhira.
Exodus35:29 Aisraeli onse aamuna ndi aakazi amene anali ndi mtima wofuna
Exodus35:30 Kenaka Mose anati kwa Aisraeli
Exodus35:31 ndipo wamudzaza ndi Mzimu wa Mulungu kotero kuti ali ndi luso ndi nzeru zomvetsa zinthu
Exodus35:32 Kulemba ndondomeko ya ntchito zaluso ndi kupanga zinthu zagolide
Exodus35:33 kusema ndi kuyika miyala yokongola
Exodus35:34 Ndipo Iye wapereka kwa Bezaleli pamodzi ndi Oholiabu mwana wa Ahisamaki
Exodus35:35 Mulungu wawapatsa maluso osiyanasiyana
Exodus36:1 Choncho Bezaleli
Exodus36:2 Ndipo Mose anayitana Bezaleli ndi Oholiabu ndiponso munthu aliyense waluso amene Yehova anamupatsa luso ndiponso amene anali ndi mtima wofuna kugwira ntchito.
Exodus36:3 Iwo analandira kuchokera kwa Mose zopereka zonse Aisraeli anabweretsa kuti agwirire ntchito yomanga malo wopatulika. Ndipo anthu anapitirira kupereka zopereka zaufulu mmawa uliwonse.
Exodus36:4 Kotero amisiri onse amene amagwira ntchito yonse ya malo wopatulika anasiya ntchitoyo
Exodus36:5 ndipo anati kwa Mose
Exodus36:6 Choncho Mose analamulira ndipo analengeza mu msasa onse
Exodus36:7 chifukwa zimene anali nazo zinali zoposera zimene zimafunika kugwirira ntchito yonse.
Exodus36:8 Anthu onse aluso pakati pa anthu ogwira ntchitoyo anapanga chihema pogwiritsa ntchito nsalu khumi zofewa
Exodus36:9 Nsalu zonse zinali zofanana. Mulitali mwake zinali mamita khumi ndi atatu
Exodus36:10 Iwo analumikiza nsalu zisanu
Exodus36:11 Kenaka anapanga zokolowekamo za nsalu yobiriwira mʼmphepete mwa nsalu imodzi yotsiriza ya mbali ina. Ndipo anachita chimodzimodzi ndi nsalu yotsiriza ya mbali inayo.
Exodus36:12 Iwo anasokerera zokolowekamo makumi asanu pa nsalu yoyamba ndi zokolowekamo makumi asanu zinanso pa nsalu inayo. Anapanga kuti zokolowekamozo ziziyangʼanana.
Exodus36:13 Kenaka anapanga ngowe zagolide 50 zolumikizira nsalu ziwirizo kotero kuti zinapanga chihema chimodzi.
Exodus36:14 Iwo anapanga nsalu za ubweya wambuzi zophimba pamwamba pa chihemacho. Nsalu zonse pamodzi zinalipo khumi ndi imodzi.
Exodus36:15 Nsalu zonse khumi ndi imodzi zinali zofanana. Mulitali mwake munali mamita khumi ndi anayi ndipo mulifupi mwake munali mamita awiri.
Exodus36:16 Iwo analumikiza nsalu zisanu kukhala nsalu imodzi ndipo nsalu zinazo zisanu ndi imodzi
Exodus36:17 Kenaka anasokerera zokolowekamo makumi asanu mʼmphepete mwa nsalu imodzi yotsirizira ya nsalu yoyamba yolumikiza ija ndiponso anapanga zokolowekamo zina makumi asanu mʼmphepete mwa nsalu yotsirizira ya nsalu inanso yolumikiza ija.
Exodus36:18 Iwo anapanga ngowe 50 zamkuwa zolowetsa mu zokolowekazo ndipo anaphatikiza nsalu ziwirizo kuti tentiyo ikhale imodzi.
Exodus36:19 Ndipo anapanga chikopa cha nkhosa zazimuna cha utoto wofiira chophimbira tentiyo ndipo pamwamba pake anapanganso chophimbira china cha zikopa za akatumbu.
Exodus36:20 Iwo anapanga maferemu amatabwa amtengo wa mkesha oyimikira chihemacho.
Exodus36:21 Feremu iliyonse inali yotalika mamita anayi ndipo mulifupi mwake munali masentimita 69.
Exodus36:22 Thabwa lililonse linali ndi zolumikizira ziwiri. Iwo anapanga maferemu onse a chihemacho ndi matabwa otere.
Exodus36:23 Anapanga maferemu makumi awiri a mbali yakummwera kwa chihemacho
Exodus36:24 ndiponso anapanga matsinde 40 asiliva ndipo anawayika pansi pa maferemuwo. Pansi pa feremu iliyonse anayika matsinde awiri ogwiriziza zolumikizira ziwiri zija.
Exodus36:25 Iwo anapanganso maferemu makumi awiri a mbali yakumpoto ya chihemacho
Exodus36:26 ndiponso matsinde makumi anayi asiliva
Exodus36:27 Anapanganso maferemu asanu ndi imodzi a kumbuyo kwa tenti
Exodus36:28 ndiponso maferemu awiri a pa ngodya yakumbuyo kwenikweni kwa tenti.
Exodus36:29 Pa ngodya ziwirizi panali maferemu awiri
Exodus36:30 Choncho panali maferemu asanu ndi atatu ndiponso matsinde 16 asiliva
Exodus36:31 Iwo anapanganso mitanda ya matabwa amtengo wa mkesha. Mitanda isanu inali ya maferemu a mbali imodzi ya chihema
Exodus36:32 mitanda isanu inanso inali ya maferemu a mbali inayo ndipo mitanda ina isanu ya mbali yakumadzulo
Exodus36:33 Anapanga mtanda wapakati omwe umachokera pa maferemu a mbali ina mpaka mbali inanso.
Exodus36:34 Iwo anakuta maferemuwo ndi golide ndiponso anapanga mphete zagolide zogwiriziza mitandayo. Ndipo mitandayonso anayikuta ndi golide.
Exodus36:35 Anapanga nsalu yokhala ndi mtundu wamtambo
Exodus36:36 Iwo anapanga nsanamira zinayi zamtengo wa mkesha zokutidwa ndi golide. Anapanganso ngowe zagolide za nsanamirazo ndi matsinde asiliva anayi.
Exodus36:37 Anapanga nsalu ya pa chipata cholowera mu chihema
Exodus36:38 Anapanga nsanamira zisanu ndi ngowe zake. Anakuta pamwamba pa nsanamirazo ndi zomangira zake ndi golide
Exodus37:1 Bezaleli anapanga Bokosi la Chipangano lamatabwa amtengo wa mkesha. Kutalika kwake kunali masentimita 114
Exodus37:2 Iye analikuta bokosilo ndi golide wabwino kwambiri mʼkati mwake ndi kunja komwe. Anapanganso mkombero wagolide kuzungulira bokosilo.
Exodus37:3 Iye anapanga mphete zinayi zagolide ndi kuzimangirira ku miyendo yake inayi ija
Exodus37:4 Kenaka anapanga mizati yamtengo wa mkesha ndi kuzikuta ndi golide.
Exodus37:5 Ndipo analowetsa nsichizo mʼmphete zija za mbali zonse ziwiri za bokosilo kuti azinyamulira.
Exodus37:6 Iye anapanga chivundikiro cha bokosilo cha golide wabwino kwambiri
Exodus37:7 Ndipo anapanga Akerubi awiri agolide osula ndi nyundo ndi kuwayika mbali ziwiri za chivundikirocho.
Exodus37:8 Iye anapanga kerubi mmodzi mbali ina ndi wina mbali inayo. Akerubiwa anawapangira limodzi ndi chivundikirocho mʼmapeto mwa mbali ziwirizo.
Exodus37:9 Mapiko a Akerubiwo anatambasukira pamwamba pa chivundikiro cha bokosilo kuti achiphimbe. Akerubiwo anakhala choyangʼanana
Exodus37:10 Iwo anapanga tebulo la matabwa amtengo wa mkesha
Exodus37:11 Kenaka analikuta ndi golide wabwino kwambiri
Exodus37:12 Iwo anapanga feremu yozungulira tebulo
Exodus37:13 Iwo anapanga mphete zinayi zagolide ndipo anazilumikiza ku ngodya zake zinayi
Exodus37:14 Mphetezo anaziyika kufupi ndi feremu kuti azikolowekamo nsichi zonyamulira tebuloyo.
Exodus37:15 Anapanga nsichi zamtengo wa mkesha ndi kuzikuta ndi golide kuti azinyamulira tebulolo.
Exodus37:16 Ndipo anapanga ziwiya za pa tebulolo zagolide wabwino
Exodus37:17 Iwo anapanga choyikapo nyale chagolide wabwino kwambiri. Tsinde lake ndi mphanda zake zinasulidwa ndi nyundo. Zikho zake zokhala ndi mphukira ndi maluwa ake zinapangidwa kumodzi.
Exodus37:18 Mʼmbali mwake munali mphanda zisanu ndi imodzi
Exodus37:19 Zikho zitatu zokhala ngati za maluwa amtowo
Exodus37:20 Pa choyikapo nyalecho panali zikho zinayi zokhala ngati maluwa amtowo
Exodus37:21 Mphukira yoyamba inali mʼmunsi mwa nthambi ziwiri zoyamba za pa choyikapo nyale. Mphukira yachiwiri inali mʼmunsi mwa nthambi ziwiri zinazo. Mphukira yachitatu inali mʼmunsi mwa nthambi zina ziwirinso. Zonse pamodzi zinali nthambi zisanu ndi imodzi
Exodus37:22 Mphukira ndi nthambi zonse zinasulidwa kumodzi ndi choyikapo nyalecho ndi golide wabwino kwambiri.
Exodus37:23 Iwo anapanga nyale zisanu ndi ziwiri
Exodus37:24 Iwo anapanga choyikapo nyale ndi zipangizo zake zonse zagolide wabwino kwambiri wolemera makilogalamu 34.
Exodus37:25 Iwo anapanga guwa lamatabwa amtengo wa mkesha lofukizirapo lubani. Linali lofanana mbali zonse
Exodus37:26 Iwo anakuta guwa lonse ndi golide wabwino kwambiri
Exodus37:27 Anapanga mphete ziwiri pansi pa mkomberowo ndi kulumikiza ku mbali zonse ziwiri kuti apisemo nsichi zonyamulira.
Exodus37:28 Anapanga mizati yamtengo wa mkesha ndipo anayikuta ndi golide.
Exodus37:29 Iwo anapanganso mafuta opatulika odzozera ndi zofukiza za fungo lokoma kwambiri. Iyi inali ntchito ya mʼmisiri waluso lopanga zonunkhiritsa.
Exodus38:1 Anapanga guwa lansembe zopsereza lamatabwa amtengo wa mkesha. Linali lofanana mbali zonse. Msinkhu wake masentimita 137
Exodus38:2 Anapanga nyanga imodziimodzi pa ngodya zake zinayizo
Exodus38:3 Anapanganso ziwiya zamkuwa izi zogwirira ntchito pa guwalo: miphika
Exodus38:4 Anapanga sefa yachitsulo chamkuwa ya guwa lansembelo kuti ikhale mmunsi mwa khoma la guwa lansembelo
Exodus38:5 Anapanga mphete zamkuwa zinayi ndipo anazilumikiza ku ngodya zinayi za sefa ija kuti zigwire nsichi zonyamulira.
Exodus38:6 Anapanga nsichi zamtengo wa mkesha ndipo anazikuta ndi mkuwa.
Exodus38:7 Iwo analowetsa nsichizo mʼmphetemo mbali zonse ziwiri za guwalo kuti azinyamulira. Guwalo linali lamatabwa ndi logoba mʼkati mwake.
Exodus38:8 Anapanga beseni lamkuwa lokhala ndi miyendo yamkuwanso kuchokera ku magalasi oyangʼanira nkhope a amayi amene ankatumikira pa chipata cha tenti ya msonkhano.
Exodus38:9 Kenaka anapanga bwalo la chihema. Mbali yakummwera inali yotalika mamita 46 ndipo kunali nsalu yotchinga yofewa yosalala yolukidwa bwino.
Exodus38:10 Anapanganso mizati makumi awiri
Exodus38:11 Mbali yakumpoto inalinso yotalika mamita 46 ndipo inali ndi mizati makumi awiri
Exodus38:12 Mbali yakumadzulo inali yotalika mamita 23 ndipo inali ndi nsalu yotchinga
Exodus38:13 Mbali yakummawa
Exodus38:14 Mbali imodzi yachipata kunali nsalu yotchinga yotalika mamita asanu ndi awiri
Exodus38:15 polowera mʼbwalo panali nsalu yotchinga ya mamita asanu ndi awiri pamodzi ndi mizati itatu ndi matsinde atatu.
Exodus38:16 Katani yonse yotchinga kuzungulira chihema inali yofewa
Exodus38:17 Matsinde amizati anali amkuwa. Ngowe ndi zingwe za mizati zinali zasiliva
Exodus38:18 Nsalu yotchinga ya pa chipata inali yamtundu wa mtambo
Exodus38:19 pamodzi ndi mizati yake inayi ndi matsinde amkuwa anayi. Ngowe ndi zingwe zake zinali za siliva
Exodus38:20 Zikhomo za chihema ndi zina zonse zozungulira chihemacho zinali zamkuwa.
Exodus38:21 Chiwerengero cha zipangizo zimene anagwiritsa ntchito popanga chihema
Exodus38:22 Bezaleli mwana wa Uri
Exodus38:23 pamodzi ndi Oholiabu mwana wa Ahisamaki
Exodus38:24 Golide yense wochokera ku nsembe yoweyula amene anagwiritsa ntchito pa ntchito yonse yopanga malo wopatulika anali wolemera makilogalamu 1
Exodus38:25 Siliva wochokera ku gulu lonse la anthu anali wolemerera makilogalamu 3
Exodus38:26 Munthu aliyense amapereka beka imodzi
Exodus38:27 Anagwiritsa ntchito siliva wolemera makilogalamu 3
Exodus38:28 Makilogalamu otsalawo anagwiritsa ntchito popanga ngowe zamzati kukutira pamwamba pa mizati ndiponso kupanga zingwe zake.
Exodus38:29 Mkuwa ochokera ku nsembe yoweyula unali makilogalamu 2
Exodus38:30 Iwo anawugwiritsa ntchito popanga matsinde a pa chipata cha tenti ya msonkhano
Exodus38:31 matsinde ozungulira bwalo ndiponso a pa chipata pake
Exodus39:1 Anapanga zovala za ansembe
Exodus39:2 Popanga efodi
Exodus39:3 Anasula golide wopyapyala ndi kumulezaleza kuti alumikize kumodzi ndi nsalu yamtundu wa mtambo
Exodus39:4 Iwo anapanga efodi imene inali ndi timalamba tiwiri ta pa mapewa
Exodus39:5 Lamba womangira efodi anali wolukidwa mwaluso ngati efodiyo. Anali nsalu imodzi ndi efodiyo
Exodus39:6 Iwo anakonza miyala ya onikisi ndi kuyiika mu zoyikamo zake zagolide ndipo anazokota mayina a ana a Israeli monga amachitira pa chidindo.
Exodus39:7 Kenaka anayimangirira pa tinsalu ta mʼmapewa ta efodi tija ngati miyala ya chikumbutso cha ana a Israeli monga momwe Yehova analamulira Mose.
Exodus39:8 Iwo anapanga chovala chapachifuwa mwaluso kwambiri. Anachipanga ngati efodi pogwiritsa ntchito golide
Exodus39:9 Kutalika kwake kunali kofanana mbali zonse
Exodus39:10 Kenaka anayikapo mizere inayi ya miyala yokongola kwambiri. Mzere woyamba anayika miyala ya rubi
Exodus39:11 mzere wachiwiri anayikapo miyala ya emeradi
Exodus39:12 mzere wachitatu anayikapo miyala ya opera
Exodus39:13 mzere wachinayi anayikapo miyala ya topazi
Exodus39:14 Miyalayo inalipo khumi ndi iwiri
Exodus39:15 Anapanga timaunyolo tagolide wabwino kwambiri ta pa chovala chapachifuwa
Exodus39:16 Anapanganso zoyikamo zake zagolide ndi mphete ziwiri zagolide
Exodus39:17 Anamangirira timaunyolo tiwiri tagolide tija pa mphete za pa ngodya pa chovala chapachifuwacho.
Exodus39:18 Ndipo mbali ina ya timaunyoloto anamangirira pa zoyikapo zake ziwiri zija
Exodus39:19 Anapanganso mphete ziwiri zagolide ndipo analumikiza ku ngodya ziwiri zamʼmunsi mwa chovala chapachifuwa
Exodus39:20 Kenaka anapanga mphete zina ziwiri zagolide ndi kuzilumikiza kumunsi kwa tinsalu takutsogolo kwa efodi
Exodus39:21 Anamangirira mphete za pa chovala chapachifuwa zija ku mphete za efodi ndi chingwe chamtundu wa mtambo
Exodus39:22 Anayipangira efodiyo mkanjo wamtundu wa mtambo
Exodus39:23 Mkanjowo unali ndi malo opisapo mutu pakati pakepo. Pa chibowopo panali chibandi chosokedwa mochita ngati kuluka monga muja akhalira malaya kuti chibowocho chilimbe
Exodus39:24 Pa mpendero wamʼmunsi wa mkanjowo
Exodus39:25 Ndipo anapanga maberu agolide wabwino kwambiri ndipo analumikiza mozungulira mpendero pakati pa makangadzawo.
Exodus39:26 Kotero panali mphonje imodzi ndi belu limodzi kuzungulira mpendero wa mkanjo wovala potumikira monga momwe Yehova analamulira Mose.
Exodus39:27 Kwa Aaroni ndi ana ake anawapangira minjiro ya nsalu yofewa yosalala
Exodus39:28 nduwira ya nsalu yofewa yosalala
Exodus39:29 Anapanga lamba wolukidwa bwino wa nsalu yofewa ndi yosalala ya mtundu wa mtambo yapepo ndi yofiira. Ili linaliluso la munthu wopanga zokometsera monga Yehova analamulira Mose.
Exodus39:30 Iwo anapanga duwa lagolide wabwino kwambiri ngati chidindo ndipo anazokotapo mawu akuti
Exodus39:31 Kenaka analimangira ndi chingwe cha nsalu yamtundu wa mtambo pa nduwira
Exodus39:32 Tsopano ntchito yonse ya tenti ya msonkhano inatha. Aisraeli anachita zonse monga momwe Yehova analamulira Mose.
Exodus39:33 Kenaka anabweretsa chihema kwa Mose. Tenti ndi zipangizo zake
Exodus39:34 chophimba cha chikopa cha nkhosa yayimuna chonyikidwa mu utoto ofiira
Exodus39:35 bokosi la umboni pamodzi ndi mitengo yake yonyamulira ndiponso chovundikira chake;
Exodus39:36 tebulo pamodzi ndi zipangizo zake ndiponso buledi wokhala pamaso pa Yehova;
Exodus39:37 choyikapo nyale chagolide wabwino kwambiri pamodzi ndi nyale zake ndi zipangizo zake zonse
Exodus39:38 guwa lagolide
Exodus39:39 guwa lamkuwa ndi sefa yamkuwa
Exodus39:40 nsalu yotchingira bwalo pamodzi ndi mizati yake ndi matsinde ake ndiponso nsalu yotchingira pa khomo lolowera ku bwalo; zingwe zake ndi zikhomo za tenti; zipangizo zonse za chihema
Exodus39:41 ndiponso zovala zolukidwa zovala potumikira kumalo opatulika
Exodus39:42 Aisraeli anagwira ntchito yonse monga momwe Yehova analamulira Mose.
Exodus39:43 Mose anayendera ntchitoyo ndipo anaona kuti anayichita monga momwe Yehova analamulira. Kotero Mose anawadalitsa.
Exodus40:1 Kenaka Yehova anati kwa Mose
Exodus40:2 “Imika chihema
Exodus40:3 Uyikemo bokosi la umboni ndipo uphimbe bokosilo ndi katani.
Exodus40:4 Ulowetsemo tebulo ndi kuyika zimene zimakhala pamenepo. Kenaka ulowetse choyikapo nyale ndipo uyikepo nyale zake.
Exodus40:5 Uyike guwa lofukiza la golide patsogolo pa bokosi la umboni ndipo uyike katani ya pa chipata cha chihema.
Exodus40:6 “Uyike guwa lansembe yopsereza patsogolo pa chipata cha chihema
Exodus40:7 Uyike beseni pakati pa tenti ya msonkhano ndi guwa lansembe ndipo uyikemo madzi.
Exodus40:8 Upange bwalo lozungulira chihemacho ndipo uyike katani ya pa chipata cha bwalolo.
Exodus40:9 “Utenge mafuta wodzozera ndipo udzoze chihema ndi chilichonse chili mʼmenemo ndipo zidzakhala zoyeretsedwa.
Exodus40:10 Kenaka udzoze guwa lansembe lopsereza ndi ziwiya zake zonse. Ulipatule guwalo ndipo lidzakhala loyera kwambiri.
Exodus40:11 Udzoze beseni ndi miyendo yake ndipo uzipatule.
Exodus40:12 “Ubwere ndi Aaroni ndi ana ake pa chipata cha tenti ya msonkhano ndipo uwasambitse ndi madzi.
Exodus40:13 Kenaka umuveke Aaroni zovala zopatulika
Exodus40:14 Ubweretse ana ake ndipo uwaveke minjiro.
Exodus40:15 Uwadzoze monga momwe unadzozera abambo awo
Exodus40:16 Mose anachita zonse monga Yehova anamulamulira.
Exodus40:17 Kotero anayimika chihema tsiku loyamba la mwezi woyamba mʼchaka chachiwiri.
Exodus40:18 Nthawi imene Mose anayimika chihema
Exodus40:19 Kenaka anayika tenti pamwamba pa chihema ndipo anayika chophimba pa tenti monga momwe Yehova analamulira Mose.
Exodus40:20 Iye anatenga miyala ya umboni nayika mʼbokosi lija ndi kuyika chivundikiro pamwamba pake.
Exodus40:21 Kenaka analowetsa bokosilo mʼchihema ndipo anapachika katani ndi kubisa bokosi la umboni monga momwe Yehova analamulira iye.
Exodus40:22 Mose anayika tebulo mu tenti ya msonkhano kumpoto kwa chihema
Exodus40:23 ndipo anayikapo buledi pamaso pa Yehova
Exodus40:24 Iye anayikanso choyikapo nyale mu tenti ya msonkhano moyangʼanana ndi tebulo mbali yakummwera kwa chihema.
Exodus40:25 Ndipo anayikapo nyale zija pamaso pa Yehova
Exodus40:26 Mose anayika guwa la golide mu tenti ya msonkhano patsogolo pa katani
Exodus40:27 ndipo anapserezapo lubani wonunkhira monga Yehova anamulamulira.
Exodus40:28 Kenaka anayika katani ya pa chipata cha chihema.
Exodus40:29 Iye anayika guwa lansembe yopsereza pafupi ndi chipata cha chihema
Exodus40:30 Iye anayika beseni pakati pa tenti ya msonkhano ndi guwa lansembe ndipo anathiramo madzi wosamba
Exodus40:31 ndipo Mose
Exodus40:32 Iwo amasamba nthawi zonse akamalowa mu tenti ya msonkhano kapena kuyandikira guwa lansembe monga Yehova analamulira Mose.
Exodus40:33 Kenaka Mose anamanga bwalo kuzungulira chihema ndi guwa lansembe ndipo anayika katani ya pa chipata cha bwalo. Kotero Mose anamaliza ntchito.
Exodus40:34 Kenaka mtambo unaphimba tenti ya msonkhano
Exodus40:35 Mose sanathe kulowa mu tenti ya msonkhano chifukwa mtambo unali utakhazikika pa chihemacho
Exodus40:36 Pa maulendo awo onse
Exodus40:37 Koma ngati mtambo sunachoke
Exodus40:38 Kotero mtambo wa Yehova unkakhala pamwamba pa chihema usana
Leviticus1:1 26 Yehova anayitana Mose mu tenti ya msonkhano. Iye anati
Leviticus1:2 “Aliyense wa inu ngati abwera ndi nsembe kwa Yehova kuchokera pa ziweto zake
Leviticus1:3 “ ‘Ngati munthu apereka nsembe yopsereza ya ngʼombe
Leviticus1:4 Munthuyo asanjike dzanja lake pa mutu pa nsembe yopserezayo
Leviticus1:5 Pambuyo pake aphe ngʼombeyo pamaso pa Yehova
Leviticus1:6 Munthuyo asende nsembe yopserezayo ndi kuyidula nthulinthuli.
Leviticus1:7 Ndipo ana a Aaroni
Leviticus1:8 Kenaka ana a Aaroni
Leviticus1:9 Munthuyo atsuke zamʼkati mwa nyamayo pamodzi ndi miyendo yake yomwe
Leviticus1:10 “ ‘Koma ngati chopereka cha nsembe yopserezayo ndi nkhosa kapena mbuzi kuchokera pa ziweto zake
Leviticus1:11 Ayiphere kumpoto kwa guwa
Leviticus1:12 Kenaka ayidule nyamayo nthulinthuli
Leviticus1:13 Munthuyo atsuke zamʼkati mwa nyamayo pamodzi ndi miyendo yake yomwe
Leviticus1:14 “ ‘Koma ngati chopereka kwa Yehova ndi nsembe yopsereza ya mbalame
Leviticus1:15 Wansembe abwere nayo ku guwa
Leviticus1:16 Iye achotse chithokomiro pamodzi ndi nthenga zake zomwe ndi kuzitaya ku malo wotayirako phulusa
Leviticus1:17 Kenaka ayingʼambe pakati
Leviticus2:1 “ ‘Munthu wina aliyense akabwera ndi nsembe ya chakudya kwa Yehova
Leviticus2:2 ndipo apite nawo kwa ansembe
Leviticus2:3 Zotsala za nsembe ya chakudyazo ndi za Aaroni pamodzi ndi ana ake. Chimenechi ndi chigawo chopatulika kwambiri chifukwa chatapidwa pa chopereka chotentha pa moto cha Yehova.
Leviticus2:4 “ ‘Ukabweretsa nsembe ya chakudya chophika mu uvuni
Leviticus2:5 Ngati nsembe yako yachakudya ndi yophika pa chitsulo chamoto
Leviticus2:6 Umuduledule bulediyo ndi kumupaka mafuta; imeneyo ndi nsembe yachakudya.
Leviticus2:7 Ngati nsembe yako yachakudya ndi yophikidwa pa chiwaya
Leviticus2:8 Munthu azibwera ndi nsembe za chakudya zimene wapanga ndi zinthu zimenezi. Atachipereka kwa wansembe
Leviticus2:9 Wansembeyo atengeko gawo lina la nsembeyo kukhala ufa wachikumbutso kuti ilandiridwe ndi Yehova mʼmalo mwa nsembe yonse ndipo ayitenthe pa moto monga nsembe yopsereza ya fungo lokomera Yehova.
Leviticus2:10 Zotsala za nsembe ya chakudyayo zikhale za Aaroni ndi ana ake. Chimenechi ndi chigawo chopatulika kwambiri chifukwa chatapidwa pa chopereka chotentha pa moto cha Yehova.
Leviticus2:11 “ ‘Nsembe ya chakudya chilichonse imene ubweretsa kwa Yehova ikhale yopanda yisiti
Leviticus2:12 Ziwirizi ungathe kubwera nazo kwa Yehova ngati chopereka cha zokolola zoyambirira. Koma usazitenthe pa guwa kuti zikhale fungo lokomera Yehova.
Leviticus2:13 Zopereka zako zonse zachakudya uzithire mchere. Usayiwale kuthira mchere pa chopereka chako popeza mcherewo ukusonyeza pangano pakati pa iwe ndi Mulungu wako. Tsono uzinthira mchere pa chopereka chako chilichonse.
Leviticus2:14 “ ‘Mukamapereka kwa Yehova chopereka cha chakudya choyamba kucha
Leviticus2:15 Uchithire mafuta ndi lubani pakuti ndi chopereka cha chakudya.
Leviticus2:16 Tsono wansembe atenthe gawo la chopereka chopunthapuntha chija kuti chikhala ufa wachikumbutso ndi cha mafuta pamodzi ndi lubani yense kuti Yehova alandire mʼmalo mwa zopereka zonse. Ichi ndi chopereka chotentha pa moto cha Yehova.
Leviticus3:1 “ ‘Ngati munthu apereka nsembe ya chiyanjano kwa Yehova
Leviticus3:2 Munthuyo asanjike dzanja lake pamutu pa ngʼombeyo
Leviticus3:3 Pa nsembe yachiyanjanopo
Leviticus3:4 Apatulenso impsyo zonse ziwiri pamodzi ndi mafuta ake omwe ndiponso mafuta okuta chiwindi amene achotsedwa pamodzi ndi impsyo zija.
Leviticus3:5 Ndipo ana a Aaroni atenthe zimenezi pa guwa
Leviticus3:6 “ ‘Ngati munthu apereka nsembe ya chiyanjano kwa Yehova
Leviticus3:7 Ngati apereka nsembe ya mwana wankhosa
Leviticus3:8 Asanjike dzanja lake pamutu pa nkhosayo ndipo ayiphere pa khomo la tenti ya msonkhano. Ndipo ana a Aaroni awaze magaziwo mbali zonse za guwalo.
Leviticus3:9 Pa nsembe yachiyanjanopo ayenera kuchotsa ndi kubweretsa: mafuta a nkhosayo
Leviticus3:10 impsyo zonse ziwiri pamodzi ndi mafuta amene akuta impsyozo
Leviticus3:11 Wansembe awotche zonsezi pa guwa. Ichi ndi chakudya chotentha pa moto choperekedwa kwa Yehova.
Leviticus3:12 “ ‘Ngati munthuyo apereka mbuzi ngati nsembe
Leviticus3:13 Asanjike dzanja lake pamutu pa mbuziyo ndipo ayiphere pa khomo la tenti ya msonkhano. Ndipo ana a Aaroni awaze magazi ake mbali zonse za guwa.
Leviticus3:14 Tsono pa nsembe yoti iwotchedwe kukhala nsembe chakudya ya Yehova
Leviticus3:15 impsyo zonse ziwiri pamodzi ndi mafuta onse omwe akuta impsyozo ndi msonga ya chiwindi imene adzachotsera pamodzi ndi impsyo zija.
Leviticus3:16 Wansembe awotche zonsezi pa guwa. Ichi ndi chakudya cha Yehova
Leviticus3:17 “ ‘Limeneli likhale lamulo lamuyaya pa mibado yanu yonse kuti musadzadye mafuta kapena magazi kulikonse kumene mudzakhale.’ ”
Leviticus4:1 Yehova anayankhula ndi Mose kuti
Leviticus4:2 “Awuze Aisraeli kuti
Leviticus4:3 “ ‘Ngati wansembe wodzozedwa achimwa
Leviticus4:4 Wansembeyo abwere nayo ngʼombeyo pa khomo la tenti ya msonkhano pamaso pa Yehova. Asanjike dzanja lake pamutu pa ngʼombeyo ndipo ayiphe pamaso pa Yehova.
Leviticus4:5 Kenaka wansembe wodzozedwa atengeko magazi a ngʼombeyo ndi kulowa nawo mu tenti ya msonkhano.
Leviticus4:6 Iye aviyike chala chake mʼmagazi
Leviticus4:7 Kenaka wansembe apake magaziwo pa nyanga za guwa lofukizira lubani limene lili pamaso pa Yehova mu tenti ya msonkhano. Magazi ena otsalawo awathire pa tsinde pa guwa lansembe zopsereza
Leviticus4:8 Pambuyo pake achotse mafuta onse a ngʼombe yayimuna yopepesera machimoyo: mafuta okuta zamʼkati kapena mafuta onse amʼkatimo.
Leviticus4:9 Achotsenso ndi kubwera ndi impsyo zonse ziwiri pamodzi ndi mafuta onse ndiponso mafuta onse amene aphimba chiwindi ndi impsyo
Leviticus4:10 monga momwe amachotsera mafuta a ngʼombe yoperekedwa kuti ikhale chopereka chachiyanjano. Tsono wansembe atenthe zimenezi pa guwa lansembe zopsereza.
Leviticus4:11 Koma chikopa cha ngʼombe yayimunayo ndi mnofu wake wonse
Leviticus4:12 kapena kuti ngʼombe yonse yotsalayo apite nayo kunja kwa msasa ku malo woyeretsedwa
Leviticus4:13 “ ‘Ngati gulu lonse la Aisraeli lichimwa mosadziwa
Leviticus4:14 Akazindikira tchimo limene achita
Leviticus4:15 Akuluakulu a anthuwo asanjike manja awo pa mutu pa ngʼombe pamaso pa Yehova
Leviticus4:16 Tsono wansembe wodzozedwa atengeko magazi a ngʼombeyo ndi kulowa nawo mu tenti ya msonkhano.
Leviticus4:17 Aviyike chala chake mʼmagaziwo ndi kuwawaza pamaso pa Yehova kasanu ndi kawiri patsogolo pa nsalu yotchinga.
Leviticus4:18 Pambuyo pake iye apake magaziwo pa nyanga za guwa limene lili pamaso pa Yehova mu tenti ya msonkhano. Magazi ena otsalawo awathire pa tsinde pa guwa lansembe zopsereza limene lili pa khomo la tenti ya msonkhano.
Leviticus4:19 Kenaka achotse mafuta onse a ngʼombeyo ndi kuwatentha pa guwa
Leviticus4:20 ndipo achite ndi ngʼombe yayimunayi monga anachitira ndi ngʼombe yayimuna yopepesera machimo. Potero
Leviticus4:21 Kenaka atulutse ngʼombeyo kunja kwa msasa ndi kuyitentha monga anatenthera ngʼombe yoyamba ija. Imeneyi ndiyo nsembe yopepesera machimo a gulu lonse.
Leviticus4:22 “ ‘Ngati mtsogoleri achimwa mosadziwa nachita zimene ndi zoletsedwa ndi Yehova Mulungu wake
Leviticus4:23 Ndipo ngati wauzidwa za tchimo limene wachita
Leviticus4:24 Asanjike dzanja lake pa mutu wa mbuziyo ndi kuyiphera pamalo pamene amaphera zopereka zopsereza pamaso pa Yehova. Ichi ndi chopereka chopepesera tchimo.
Leviticus4:25 Pambuyo pake wansembe atengeko magazi a chopereka chopepesera tchimocho ndi chala chake
Leviticus4:26 Wansembeyo atenthe mafuta onse pa guwapo monga amatenthera chopereka chachiyanjano. Pochita zimenezi
Leviticus4:27 “ ‘Ngati munthu wamba achimwa mosadziwa nachita zimene ndi zoletsedwa ndi Yehova
Leviticus4:28 Ndipo ngati wauzidwa za tchimo limene wachita
Leviticus4:29 Asanjike dzanja lake pamutu pa mbuziyo ndipo ayiphe pamalo pamene amaphera chopereka chopsereza.
Leviticus4:30 Ndipo wansembe atenge magazi ndi chala chake ndi kuwapaka pa nyanga za guwa lansembe zopsereza ndi kuthira magazi wotsalawo pa tsinde la guwalo.
Leviticus4:31 Kenaka iye achotse mafuta onse monga momwe anachotsera mafuta a chopereka chachiyanjano
Leviticus4:32 “ ‘Ngati munthu apereka mwana wankhosa ngati chopereka chopepesera tchimo lake
Leviticus4:33 Asanjike dzanja lake pa mutu wa mwana wankhosayo ndipo amuphe pamalo pamene amaphera chopereka chopsereza.
Leviticus4:34 Kenaka wansembe atengeko ndi chala chake magazi a mwana wankhosa uja ndi kuwapaka pa nyanga za guwa lansembe zopsereza. Magazi otsalawo athire pa tsinde la guwalo.
Leviticus4:35 Iye achotse mafuta onse
Leviticus5:1 “ ‘Ngati munthu anayitanidwa ku bwalo kuti akachitire umboni pa zimene anaziona kapena kuzimva koma iye nʼkukana kuchitira umboni
Leviticus5:2 “ ‘Munthu akakhudza chinthu chilichonse chodetsedwa
Leviticus5:3 “ ‘Munthu akakhudza choyipitsa munthu cha mtundu uliwonse
Leviticus5:4 “ ‘Munthu akalumbira mofulumira kapena mosasamala kuti adzachita chinthu
Leviticus5:5 “ ‘Pamene munthu wazindikira kuti wachimwa motere
Leviticus5:6 Pambuyo pake
Leviticus5:7 “ ‘Ngati munthuyo alibe mwana wankhosa
Leviticus5:8 Tsono abwere nazo kwa wansembe
Leviticus5:9 kenaka awaze magazi a chopereka chopepesera tchimocho mʼmbali mwa guwa. Magazi ena onse awathire pa tsinde la guwa. Imeneyi ndi nsembe yopepesera tchimo.
Leviticus5:10 Pambuyo pake wansembe apereke mbalame inayo kuti ikhale chopereka chopsereza potsata mwambo wake. Wansembe atatha kupereka nsembe yopepesera tchimo limene munthu uja wachita
Leviticus5:11 “ ‘Koma ngati munthuyo alibe njiwa ziwiri kapena nkhunda ziwiri
Leviticus5:12 Abweretse ufawo kwa wansembe ndipo wansembeyo atapeko dzanja limodzi kuti ukhale ufa wachikumbutso ndi kuwutentha pa guwa pamodzi ndi chopereka chopsereza kwa Yehova. Imeneyi ndi nsembe yopepesera tchimo.
Leviticus5:13 Umu ndi mmene wansembe adzachitire mwambo wopepesera machimo ena aliwonse amene munthu wachita
Leviticus5:14 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus5:15 “Munthu akachita zinthu mosakhulupirika
Leviticus5:16 Munthuyo ayenera kubweza zinthu zopatulika zimene sanaperekezo. Awonjezepo chimodzi mwa zigawo zisanu zilizonse ndi kuzipereka zonsezo kwa wansembe amene adzachita mwambo wopepesera machimo a munthuyo
Leviticus5:17 “Ngati munthu wachimwa mosadziwa pochita chilichonse chimene Yehova salola
Leviticus5:18 Abwere kwa wansembe ndi chopereka chopepesera kupalamula kwake. Chopereka chikhale nkhosa yayimuna yopanda chilema ndipo mtengo wake ukhale woyenera nsembe yopepesera kupalamula kumene anachimwa mosadziwako
Leviticus5:19 Imeneyi ndi nsembe yopepesera kupalamula popeza munthuyo wapezeka wolakwa pamaso pa Yehova.”
Leviticus6:1 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus6:2 “Ngati munthu wina aliyense achimwa
Leviticus6:3 kapena ndi kunama kuti sanatole chinthu chimene chinatayika
Leviticus6:4 ndi wopalamula ndithu
Leviticus6:5 kapena zimene analumbira monyengazo. Pa tsiku limene apezeke kuti wapalamuladi
Leviticus6:6 Pambuyo pake apereke kwa Yehova nsembe yopalamula. Nsembe yake ikhale nkhosa yayimuna yopanda chilema ndipo mtengo wake wogwirizana ndi nsembe yopepesera machimo.
Leviticus6:7 Kenaka wansembe achite mwambo wopepesera tchimo la munthuyo pamaso pa Yehova
Leviticus6:8 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus6:9 “Lamula Aaroni ndi ana ake kuti
Leviticus6:10 Tsono wansembe avale mkanjo wake wa nsalu yofewa ndi yosalala. Mʼkati avalenso kabudula wofewa
Leviticus6:11 Akatero avule zovala zakezo ndi kuvala zovala zina. Kenaka atulutse phulusalo ndi kukaliyika pa malo woyeretsedwa kunja kwa chithando.
Leviticus6:12 Moto wa pa guwa uzikhala ukuyaka nthawi zonse
Leviticus6:13 Moto uzikhala ukuyaka pa guwa nthawi zonse ndipo usazimepo.
Leviticus6:14 “ ‘Lamulo la nsembe yachakudya ndi ili: ana a Aaroni azibwera nayo nsembeyo pamaso pa Yehova
Leviticus6:15 Wansembe mmodzi atapeko dzanja limodzi la ufa wosalala wa nsembe yachakudya ija kuti ukhala ufa wachikumbutso ndi mafuta pamodzi ndi lubani yense amene ali pa nsembe ya chakudyacho
Leviticus6:16 Aaroni ndi ana ake azidya zimene zatsala koma azidya zopanda yisiti ku malo wopatulika
Leviticus6:17 Poziphika asathire yisiti. Ndawapatsa zotsalazo kuti zikhale gawo lawo la nsembe zanga zopsereza. Zonsezi ndi zopatulika kwambiri monga nsembe yopepesera tchimo ndiponso nsembe yopepesera machimo.
Leviticus6:18 Mwana aliyense wamwamuna wa Aaroni azidyako za nsembe zopsereza zopereka kwa Yehova. Ndi gawo lake lokhazikika la chopereka chopsereza kwa Yehova pa mibado yanu yonse. Chilichonse chimene chidzakhudza nsembezo chidzakhala chopatulika.’ ”
Leviticus6:19 Yehova anawuzanso Mose kuti
Leviticus6:20 “Nsembe imene Aaroni ndi ana ake ayenera kupereka kwa Yehova pa tsiku limene wansembe akudzozedwa ndi iyi: ufa wosalala kilogalamu imodzi ngati chopereka chachakudya cha nthawi zonse. Azipereka theka limodzi mmawa ndipo theka linalo madzulo.
Leviticus6:21 Ipangidwe ndi mafuta pa chiwaya ndipo ubwere nayo ili yosakaniza bwino
Leviticus6:22 Mwana wa fuko la Aaroni amene adzadzozedwe kukhala wansembe kulowa mʼmalo mwa Aaroni ndiye amene azidzakonza ndi kupereka nsembeyi kwa Yehova nthawi zonse monga kunalembedwera.
Leviticus6:23 Nsembe iliyonse yachakudya ya wansembe izitenthedwa kwathunthu
Leviticus6:24 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus6:25 “Uza Aaroni ndi ana ake kuti
Leviticus6:26 Wansembe amene apereke nsembeyi adyere ku malo wopatulika ndiye kuti mʼbwalo la tenti ya msonkhano.
