Leviticus6:27 Chilichonse chimene chidzakhudza nsembeyo chidzakhala chopatulika
Leviticus6:28 Mʼphika wadothi umene aphikira nyamayo auphwanye. Koma ngati yaphikidwa mu mʼphika wa mkuwa
Leviticus6:29 Munthu wamwamuna aliyense wa mʼbanja la wansembe angathe kuyidya popeza nsembeyi ndi yopatulika kwambiri.
Leviticus6:30 Koma nsembe yopepesera tchimo imene magazi ake amabwera nawo mu tenti ya msonkhano kudzachita mwambo wopepesera tchimo ku malo opatulika isadyedwe
Leviticus7:1 “ ‘Malamulo a nsembe yopepesera kupalamula imene ndi nsembe yopatulika kwambiri ndi awa:
Leviticus7:2 Nsembe yopepesera machimo iziphedwa pamalo pomwe amaphera nsembe yopsereza ndipo awaze magazi ake mbali zonse za guwa.
Leviticus7:3 Tsono apereke mafuta ake onse: mchira wamafuta ndi mafuta amene amakuta matumbo.
Leviticus7:4 Aperekenso impsyo ziwiri
Leviticus7:5 Wansembe azitenthe pa guwa kuti zikhale nsembe yotentha pa moto
Leviticus7:6 Munthu wamwamuna aliyense wa mʼbanja la wansembe angathe kudyako nsembeyo koma adyere ku malo opatulika. Imeneyi ndi nsembe yopatulika kwambiri.
Leviticus7:7 “ ‘Nsembe yopepesera tchimo lopalamula ndi yofanana ndi nsembe yoperekedwa chifukwa cha tchimo. Ndipo nsembe ziwiri zonsezi zili ndi lamulo limodzi lokha. Wansembe amene wachita mwambo wa nsembe yopepesera machimo a kupalamula atenge nyamayo ngati yake.
Leviticus7:8 Wansembe wopereka nsembe yopsereza ya munthu wina aliyense
Leviticus7:9 Chopereka chilichonse cha chakudya chophika mu uvuni kapena chokazinga mu mʼphika kapena mu chiwaya ndi cha wansembe amene wapereka nsembezo.
Leviticus7:10 Ndipo chopereka china chilichonse cha chakudya chosakaniza ndi mafuta kapena chowuma
Leviticus7:11 “ ‘Malamulo a nsembe ya chiyanjano imene munthu angathe kupereka kwa Yehova ndi awa:
Leviticus7:12 “ ‘Ngati munthuyo apereka chifukwa cha kuthokoza
Leviticus7:13 Pamodzi ndi nsembe yachiyanjano yothokozerayo abwerenso ndi makeke opangidwa ndi yisiti ngati chopereka chake.
Leviticus7:14 Munthuyo atenge mtanda umodzi pa mtanda wa buledi wa mtundu uliwonse kuti ukhale nsembe yopereka kwa Yehova. Tsono mtanda umenewo ndi wake wa wansembe amene awaze magazi a nsembe yachiyanjano.
Leviticus7:15 Nyama ya nsembe yachiyanjano yothokozera idyedwe pa tsiku lomwe nsembeyo yaperekedwa ndipo isatsaleko mpaka mmawa.
Leviticus7:16 “ ‘Koma ngati nsembe yakeyo apereka chifukwa cha lumbiro kapena mwaufulu
Leviticus7:17 Ngati nyama ina ya nsembe yatsalabe mpaka tsiku lachitatu
Leviticus7:18 Ngati munthu adya nyama yachiyanjano pa tsiku lachitatu
Leviticus7:19 “ ‘Nyama imene yakhudza chilichonse chodetsedwa
Leviticus7:20 Koma ngati munthu wina amene ndi wosayeretsedwa adya nyama ya nsembe yachiyanjano imene ndi ya Yehova
Leviticus7:21 Ndipo ngati munthu wina akhudza chinthu chodetsedwa
Leviticus7:22 Yehova anayankhula ndi Mose kuti
Leviticus7:23 “Awuze Aisraeli kuti
Leviticus7:24 Mafuta a nyama yofa yokha
Leviticus7:25 Pakuti munthu wakudya mafuta a nyama yoperekedwa kwa Yehova ngati nsembe yotentha pa moto
Leviticus7:26 Ndipo kulikonse kumene mukakhale musakadye magazi a mbalame iliyonse kapena magazi a nyama iliyonse.
Leviticus7:27 Ngati munthu aliyense adya magazi achotsedwe pakati pa anthu a mtundu wake.’ ”
Leviticus7:28 Yehova anayankhula ndi Mose kuti
Leviticus7:29 “Awuze Aisraeli kuti
Leviticus7:30 Atenge ndi manja ake zigawo za chopereka zoyenera kuzitentha pa moto ngati chopereka kwa Yehova. Abweretse mafuta
Leviticus7:31 Wansembe atenthe mafutawo pa guwa koma chidalecho chikhale cha Aaroni ndi ana ake.
Leviticus7:32 Mumupatse wansembe ntchafu ya kumanja ya nsembe yanu yachiyanjano kuti ikhale chopereka chanu kwa iye.
Leviticus7:33 Mwana wa Aaroni amene amapereka magazi ndi mafuta a nsembe yachiyanjano
Leviticus7:34 Choncho pa zopereka zachiyanjano za Aisraeli
Leviticus7:35 Zimenezi ndi chigawo cha Aaroni ndi ana ake chotapidwa pa zopereka kwa Yehova zoti zitenthedwe pa moto zimene zinaperekedwa pa tsiku limene anapatulidwa kuti akhale ansembe otumikira Yehova.
Leviticus7:36 Yehova ndiye analamulira kuti pa zopereka za Aisraeli azitapapo zimenezi ndi kuwapatsa ansembe ngati gawo lawo. Yehovayo analamula zimenezi pa tsiku limene ansembewo anapatulidwa ndipo anachikhazikitsa ngati lamulo la nthawi zonse.
Leviticus7:37 Awa ndi malamulo a nsembe izi: nsembe yopsereza
Leviticus7:38 Malamulo amenewa Yehova anapereka kwa Mose pa Phiri la Sinai pa tsiku limene Yehova analamulira Aisraeli kuti abwere ndi zopereka za kwa Yehova
Leviticus8:1 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus8:2 “Tenga Aaroni ndi ana ake
Leviticus8:3 ndipo usonkhanitse gulu la anthu pa khomo la tenti ya msonkhano.”
Leviticus8:4 Mose anachita zomwe Yehova anamulamula ndipo gulu la anthu linasonkhana pa khomo la tenti ya msonkhano.
Leviticus8:5 Mose anawuza gulu la anthuwo kuti
Leviticus8:6 Pamenepo Mose anabwera ndi Aaroni ndi ana ake nawasambitsa ndi madzi.
Leviticus8:7 Anamuveka Aaroni mwinjiro
Leviticus8:8 Anamuvekanso chovala chapachifuwa ndipo mʼchovalacho anayikamo Urimu ndi Tumimu.
Leviticus8:9 Kenaka anamuveka Aaroniyo nduwira kumutu ndipo patsogolo pa nduwirayo anayikapo duwa lagolide
Leviticus8:10 Pamenepo Mose anatenga mafuta wodzozera nadzoza tenti ya msonkhano pamodzi ndi zonse zimene zinali mʼmenemo
Leviticus8:11 Anawaza mafuta ena pa guwa kasanu ndi kawiri
Leviticus8:12 Anathira mafuta wodzozera ena pamutu pa Aaroni ndipo anamudzoza ndi kumupatula.
Leviticus8:13 Kenaka anabwera ndi ana a Aaroni. Anawaveka minjiro
Leviticus8:14 Kenaka Mose anabwera ndi ngʼombe yayimuna ya nsembe yopepesera machimo
Leviticus8:15 Mose anapha ngʼombeyo
Leviticus8:16 Mose anatenganso mafuta onse okuta matumbo
Leviticus8:17 Koma nyama yangʼombeyo
Leviticus8:18 Kenaka anabwera ndi nkhosa yayimuna ya nsembe yopsereza
Leviticus8:19 Ndipo Mose anapha nkhosayo ndi kuwaza magazi ake mbali zonse zaguwalo.
Leviticus8:20 Anayidula nkhosayo nthulinthuli ndipo anatentha mutu wake
Leviticus8:21 Anatsuka matumbo ake ndi miyendo yake
Leviticus8:22 Kenaka Mose anapereka nkhosa yayimuna ina pamwambo wodzoza ansembe
Leviticus8:23 Mose anayipha nkhosayo ndipo anatenga magazi ake ena ndi kupaka ndewere za khutu la kudzanja lamanja la Aaroni
Leviticus8:24 Pambuyo pake Mose anabwera ndi ana aamuna a Aaroni ndi kupaka magazi pa ndewere za makutu awo akumanja
Leviticus8:25 Anatenganso mafuta ake
Leviticus8:26 Ndipo mʼdengu la buledi wopanda yisiti limene linali pamaso pa Yehova
Leviticus8:27 Mose anapereka zonsezi mʼmanja mwa Aaroni ndi ana ake amene anazipereka kwa Yehova kuti zikhale nsembe yoweyula.
Leviticus8:28 Kenaka Mose anazitenga mʼmanja mwawo ndipo anazipsereza pa guwa lansembe pamwamba penipeni pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza ija kuti ikhale nsembe yopereka pamwambo wodzoza ansembe
Leviticus8:29 Mose anatenga chidale cha nkhosa yayimuna
Leviticus8:30 Kenaka Mose anatenga mafuta wodzozera ansembe ndi magazi amene anali pa guwa nawaza pa Aaroni ndi zovala zake ndiponso ana ake aja ndi zovala zawo. Motero Mose anapatula Aaroni ndi zovala zake
Leviticus8:31 Mose anawuza Aaroni ndi ana ake kuti
Leviticus8:32 Ndipo nyama ndi buledi zotsalazo
Leviticus8:33 Musatuluke kunja kwa tenti ya msonkhano kwa masiku asanu ndi awiri mpaka masiku amwambo wokudzozani unsembe atatha
Leviticus8:34 Zimene zachitika lerozi analamula ndi Yehova kuti zichitike ngati nsembe yopepesera machimo anu.
Leviticus8:35 Muzikhala pa khomo la tenti ya msonkhano usana ndi usiku kwa masiku asanu ndi awiri. Ndipo muzichita zimene Yehova wakulamulani kuti musafe
Leviticus8:36 Choncho Aaroni ndi ana ake anachita zonse zimene Yehova analamula kudzera mwa Mose.
Leviticus9:1 Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu Mose anayitana Aaroni
Leviticus9:2 Ndipo anawuza Aaroni kuti
Leviticus9:3 Kenaka uwawuze Aisraeli kuti
Leviticus9:4 Mutengenso ngʼombe yayimuna ndi nkhosa yayimuna kuti zikhale nsembe yachiyanjano zoti ziperekedwe pamaso pa Yehova. Pamodzi ndi izi mubwerenso ndi nsembe yachakudya yosakaniza ndi mafuta pakuti lero Yehova akuonekerani.’ ”
Leviticus9:5 Anthu anatenga zonse zimene Mose analamula nabwera nazo pa khomo la tenti ya msonkhano. Gululo linasendera pafupi ndi kuyima pamaso pa Yehova.
Leviticus9:6 Tsono Mose anati
Leviticus9:7 Pambuyo pake Mose anawuza Aaroni kuti
Leviticus9:8 Choncho Aaroni anasendera pafupi ndi guwa
Leviticus9:9 Ana a Aaroni anabwera ndi magazi kwa Aaroni ndipo iye anaviyika chala chake mʼmagaziwo
Leviticus9:10 Kenaka anatentha paguwapo
Leviticus9:11 Koma nyama ndi chikopa anazitenthera kunja kwa msasa.
Leviticus9:12 Kenaka anapha nsembe yopsereza. Ana a Aaroni atabwera ndi magazi kwa iye
Leviticus9:13 Ana akewo anamupatsa nyama yoduladula ya nsembe yopsereza ija pamodzi ndi mutu ndipo anazitentha pa guwa.
Leviticus9:14 Aaroni anatsuka matumbo ndi miyendo nazitentha pa guwa pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza ija.
Leviticus9:15 Kenaka Aaroni anapereka zopereka za anthuwo. Anatenga mbuzi yopepesera machimo a anthuwo
Leviticus9:16 Anabwera ndi nsembe yopsereza
Leviticus9:17 Anabweranso ndi chopereka cha chakudya. Anatapa ufa dzanja limodzi ndi kutentha pa guwa
Leviticus9:18 Tsono Aaroni anapha ngʼombe ndi nkhosa yayimuna monga nsembe yachiyanjano ya anthu. Ana ake anamupatsira magazi ndipo anawawaza mbali zonse za guwa.
Leviticus9:19 Anamupatsiranso mafuta a ngʼombeyo ndi nkhosa yayimunayo: mchira wamafuta
Leviticus9:20 Ana a Aaroni anayika mafutawo pa zidale. Pambuyo pake Aaroni anatentha mafutawo pa guwa lansembe.
Leviticus9:21 Koma zidale ndi ntchafu ya kumanja Aaroni anaziweyula ngati chopereka choweyula pamaso pa Yehova.
Leviticus9:22 Kenaka Aaroni anakweza manja ake pa anthuwo nawadalitsa. Ndipo atatha kupereka nsembe yopepesera machimo
Leviticus9:23 Ndipo Mose pamodzi ndi Aaroni analowa mu tenti ya msonkhano. Atatulukamo anadalitsa anthuwo ndipo ulemerero wa Yehova unaonekera kwa anthu onse.
Leviticus9:24 Pomwepo moto unatuluka pamaso pa Yehova niwutentha nsembe zopsereza ndi mafuta zimene zinali pa guwa. Anthu onse ataona zimenezi anafuwula mwachimwemwe ndipo anaweramitsa nkhope zawo pansi.
Leviticus10:1 Ana a Aaroni
Leviticus10:2 Choncho moto unatuluka pamaso pa Yehova ndi kuwapsereza
Leviticus10:3 Pamenepo Mose anawuza Aaroni kuti
Leviticus10:4 Mose anayitana Misaeli ndi Elizafani
Leviticus10:5 Choncho anabwera atavala minjiro yawo ndipo anawatenga ndi kuwatulutsa kunja kwa msasawo monga momwe Mose analamulira.
Leviticus10:6 Ndipo Mose anawuza Aaroni ndi ana ake Eliezara ndi Itamara kuti
Leviticus10:7 Musatuluke kunja kwa tenti ya msonkhano
Leviticus10:8 Pambuyo pake Yehova anayankhula ndi Aaroni nati
Leviticus10:9 “Iwe ndi ana ako musamamwe vinyo kapena chakumwa chilichonse choledzeretsa pamene mukulowa mu tenti ya msonkhano kuti mungafe. Ili ndi lamulo lamuyaya pa mibado yanu yonse.
Leviticus10:10 Muzisiyanitsa pakati pa zinthu zopatulika ndi zinthu wamba
Leviticus10:11 ndipo muyenera kuphunzitsa Aisraeli onse malamulo amene Yehova wakupatsani kudzera mwa Mose.”
Leviticus10:12 Mose anawuza Aaroni ndi ana ake otsalawo
Leviticus10:13 Muzidye pa malo wopatulika chifukwa zimenezi ndi gawo lako ndi la ana ako pa zopereka zopsereza kwa Yehova. Izitu ndi zimene Yehova anandilamulira.
Leviticus10:14 Koma iwe pamodzi ndi ana ako aamuna ndi aakazi muzidya chidale chimene chinaweyulidwa ndi ntchafu zimene zinaperekedwa nsembe. Muzidye pamalo woyeretsedwa. Zimenezi zaperekedwa kwa iwe ndi ana ako monga gawo lanu pa zopereka zachiyanjano zimene apereka Aisraeli.
Leviticus10:15 Ntchafu imene inaperekedwayo ndi chidale chomwe chinaweyulidwacho abwere nazo pamodzi ndi nsembe ya mafuta ya Yehova yotentha pa moto
Leviticus10:16 Pambuyo pake Mose anafunafuna mbuzi ya nsembe yopepesera machimo koma anapeza kuti anayitentha kale. Apa Mose anakalipira Eliezara ndi Itamara
Leviticus10:17 “Chifukwa chiyani simunadyere pamalo wopatulika nsembe yopepesera machimo ija? Kodi imene ija siyopatulika? Kodi Yehova sanapereke nyamayo kwa inu kuti muchotse machimo a mpingo wonse powachitira mwambo wa nsembe yopepesera machimo pamaso pa Yehova?
Leviticus10:18 Pakuti magazi ake sanalowe nawo ku Malo Wopatulika
Leviticus10:19 Aaroni anamuyankha Mose kuti
Leviticus10:20 Pamene Mose anamva zimenezi
Leviticus11:1 Yehova anayankhula ndi Mose ndi Aaroni kuti
Leviticus11:2 “Awuze Aisraeli kuti
Leviticus11:3 Nyama iliyonse imene ili ndi chipondero chogawikana pakati ndi yobzikula mukhoza kudya.
Leviticus11:4 “ ‘Koma pali nyama zina zimene zimabzikula kokha kapena ndi zogawikana zipondero zimene simukuyenera kudya. Nyama zimenezi ndi ngamira
Leviticus11:5 Ina ndi mbira
Leviticus11:6 Inanso ndi kalulu
Leviticus11:7 Nkhumba simabzikula ngakhale ili ndi zipondero zogawikana. Choncho ndi yodetsedwa
Leviticus11:8 Musamadye nyama yake kapena kukhudza imene yafa chifukwa ndi yodetsedwa.
Leviticus11:9 “ ‘Mwa zamoyo zonse zimene zimakhala mʼmadzi a mʼnyanja ndi a mʼmitsinje mukhoza kudya chilichonse chimene chili ndi minga ya pa msana ndi mamba.
Leviticus11:10 Koma zamoyo zonse za mʼnyanja kapena za mʼmitsinje zimene zilibe minga ya pa msana ndi mamba
Leviticus11:11 Pakuti zimenezi ndi zodetsedwa kwa inu
Leviticus11:12 Chamoyo chilichonse cha mʼmadzi chimene chilibe minga ya pa msana kapena mamba ndi chodetsedwa kwa inu.
Leviticus11:13 “ ‘Mbalame zimene simukuyenera kudya chifukwa ndi zodetsedwa ndi izi: mphungu
Leviticus11:14 nankapakapa
Leviticus11:15 akhungubwi a mitundu yonse
Leviticus11:16 kadzidzi wamphondo
Leviticus11:17 kadzidzi wamngʼono
Leviticus11:18 tsekwe
Leviticus11:19 indwa
Leviticus11:20 “ ‘Zowuluka zonse za miyendo inayi ndi zodetsedwa.
Leviticus11:21 Komabe mwa zowuluka zokhala ndi miyendo inayi zimene mukhoza kudya ndi zokhazo zimene zili ndi miyendo yolumphira.
Leviticus11:22 Pa zimenezo mungathe kudya izi: dzombe la mitundu yonse
Leviticus11:23 Koma za mapiko zina zonse zokhala ndi miyendo inayi muzitenge kukhala zodetsedwa kwa inu.
Leviticus11:24 “ ‘Zimenezi zidzakudetsani. Aliyense wozikhudza zitafa adzakhala wodetsedwa mpaka madzulo.
Leviticus11:25 Aliyense wonyamula chiwalo chilichonse cha nyama zakufazo ayenera kuchapa zovala zake
Leviticus11:26 “ ‘Nyama iliyonse imene ili ndi ziboda zogawikana koma mapazi ake wosagawikana
Leviticus11:27 Mwa nyama zonse zoyenda ndi miyendo inayi
Leviticus11:28 Aliyense wonyamula nyamazi zitafa ayenera kuchapa zovala zake
Leviticus11:29 “ ‘Mwa nyama zokwawa
Leviticus11:30 gondwa
Leviticus11:31 Mwa nyama zonse zoyenda pansi
Leviticus11:32 Iliyonse mwa nyama zimenezi ikafa ndi kugwera pa chiwiya chilichonse
Leviticus11:33 Tsono nyama ina iliyonse mwa zimenezi ikagwera mʼmbiya ya dothi
Leviticus11:34 Chakudya chilichonse chimene mungadye chikakhala kuti chathiridwa mʼmbiyamo
Leviticus11:35 Chiwalo chilichonse cha nyama yakufa chikagwera pa chinthu chilichonse kaya pa uvuni
Leviticus11:36 Koma kasupe kapena chitsime chamadzi chidzakhala choyeretsedwa ngakhale kuti chilichonse chokhudza nyama yakufayo chidzakhala chodetsedwa. Zimenezi muzitenge kukhala zodetsedwa.
Leviticus11:37 Chiwalo chilichonse cha nyama yakufayo chikagwera pa mbewu zimene akuti adzale
Leviticus11:38 Koma mbewuzo zikakhala zonyowa ndi madzi
Leviticus11:39 “ ‘Ngati nyama imene mumaloledwa kudya yafa yokha
Leviticus11:40 Aliyense amene adyako nyama yakufayo achape zovala zake
Leviticus11:41 “ ‘Chinthu chilichonse chokwawa pansi ndi chonyansa
Leviticus11:42 Musadye chilichonse chokwawa pansi
Leviticus11:43 Musadzisandutse nokha odetsedwa ndi chokwawa chilichonse. Musadziyipitse nazo
Leviticus11:44 Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu
Leviticus11:45 Ine ndine Yehova amene ndinakutulutsani ku Igupto kuti ndikhale Mulungu wanu. Tsono mukhale woyera
Leviticus11:46 “ ‘Amenewa ndi malamulo onena za nyama
Leviticus11:47 Muzisiyanitsa pakati pa chodetsedwa ndi choyeretsedwa
Leviticus12:1 Yehova anayankhula ndi Mose kuti
Leviticus12:2 “Awuze Aisraeli kuti
Leviticus12:3 Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu
Leviticus12:4 Mkaziyo adikire masiku ena 33 kuti ayeretsedwe ku matenda ake. Asakhudze kanthu kalikonse koyera kapena kulowa mʼmalo wopatulika mpaka masiku a kuyeretsedwa kwake atatha.
Leviticus12:5 Ngati abala mwana wamkazi
Leviticus12:6 “ ‘Masiku ake wodziyeretsa akatha
Leviticus12:7 Wansembeyo apereke zimenezi pamaso pa Yehova pochita mwambo wopepesera mkaziyo. Ndipo mkaziyo adzakhala woyeretsedwa ku msambo wake. “ ‘Amenewa ndiwo malamulo a mkazi amene wabala mwana wamwamuna kapena wamkazi.
Leviticus12:8 Ngati mkaziyo sangathe kupeza mwana wankhosa
Leviticus13:1 Yehova anawuza Mose ndi Aaroni kuti
Leviticus13:2 “Munthu akakhala ndi chithupsa
Leviticus13:3 Tsono wansembe ayangʼanitsitse nthendayo pa khungupo
Leviticus13:4 Ngati chikanga cha pa khungulo chikuoneka choyera
Leviticus13:5 Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri wansembe amuonenso bwino wodwalayo. Ndipo ngati waona kuti nthendayo sinasinthe ndipo sinafalikire pa khungu
Leviticus13:6 Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri wansembeyo amuonenso bwino munthuyo
Leviticus13:7 Koma ngati mʼbukowo ufalikira pakhungu atakadzionetsa kale kwa wansembe ndipo wansembeyo nʼkulengeza kuti munthuyo ndi woyeretsedwa
Leviticus13:8 Wansembe amuonetsetsenso munthuyo
Leviticus13:9 “Ngati munthu aliyense ali ndi nthenda ya pakhungu yoyipitsa thupi
Leviticus13:10 Wansembe amuonetsetse munthuyo
Leviticus13:11 limenelo ndi khate lachikhalire la pa khungu
Leviticus13:12 “Ndipo ngati
Leviticus13:13 wansembe amuonetsetse munthuyo
Leviticus13:14 Koma pa tsiku limene zilonda zidzaoneka pa iye
Leviticus13:15 Wansembe aonetsetse zilondazo ndipo alengeze kuti munthuyo ndi wodetsedwa. Zilondazo ndi zodetsedwa ndipo ili ndi khate.
Leviticus13:16 Koma zilondazo zikasinthika ndi kusanduka zoyera
Leviticus13:17 Wansembe amuonetsetse ndipo ngati zilondazo zasanduka zoyera
Leviticus13:18 “Ngati pa khungu la munthu wodwalayo pali chithupsa chimene chinapola kale
Leviticus13:19 ndipo pamalo pamene panali chithupsacho pakatuluka chotupa choyera kapena banga loyera mofiirira
Leviticus13:20 Wansembe aonetsetse bwino ndipo ngati chikuoneka kuti chazama
Leviticus13:21 Koma ngati wansembe waonetsetsa napeza kuti palibe ubweya woyera ndipo chithupsacho sichinazame
Leviticus13:22 Ngati nthendayo ikufalikira pa khungu
Leviticus13:23 Koma bangalo likakhala malo amodzi
Leviticus13:24 “Munthu akakhala ndi bala lamoto pa khungu lake
Leviticus13:25 wansembe aonetsetse bangalo
Leviticus13:26 Koma ngati wansembe waonetsetsa balalo ndipo palibe ubweya woyera
Leviticus13:27 Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri wansembe amuonenso wodwalayo
Leviticus13:28 Koma ngati bangalo likhala pa malo amodzi wosafalikira pa khungu
Leviticus13:29 “Mwamuna kapena mkazi akakhala ndi nthenda kumutu kapena ku chibwano
Leviticus13:30 wansembe aonetsetse balalo ndipo likaoneka kuti lazama
Leviticus13:31 Koma wansembe akaonetsetsa mfundu zonyerenyetsazo
Leviticus13:32 Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri wansembe aonetsetsenso mfundu zonyerenyetsazo
Leviticus13:33 wodwalayo ametedwe
Leviticus13:34 Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri wansembe aonetsetsenso mfundu zonyerenyetsazo ndipo ngati sizinafalikire pa khungu ndi kuti sizinazame
Leviticus13:35 Koma mfundu zonyerenyetsazo zikafalikira pa khungu
Leviticus13:36 wansembe amuonetsetsenso wodwalayo ndipo ngati mfunduzo zafalikira pa khungu
Leviticus13:37 Koma ngati wansembe waonetsetsa kuti mfunduzo sizinasinthe ndipo ubweya wakuda wamera pa mfundupo
Leviticus13:38 “Mwamuna kapena mkazi akakhala ndi mawanga woyera pa khungu
Leviticus13:39 wansembe aonetsetse mawangawo
Leviticus13:40 “Tsitsi la munthu likayoyoka kumutu ndiye kuti ndi dazi limenelo koma munthuyo ndi woyeretsedwa.
Leviticus13:41 Ngati tsitsi lake layoyoka chapamphumi ndiye kuti ndi dazi la pa chipumi limenelo koma munthuyo ndi woyera.
Leviticus13:42 Koma ngati pa dazi la pamutu kapena la pa chipumi pakhala chithupsa choyera mofiirira
Leviticus13:43 Tsono wansembe amuonetsetse wodwalayo ndipo ngati chithupsa cha pa dazi lapankhongo kapena pa dazi lapachipumicho ndi choyera mofiirira monga nthenda ya khate imaonekera
Leviticus13:44 ndiye kuti munthuyo ali ndi khate
Leviticus13:45 “Munthu wa khate lotere avale sanza
Leviticus13:46 Munthu wodwalayo adzakhala wodetsedwa kwa nthawi yonse imene ali ndi nthendayo. Iye ayenera kumakhala payekha kunja kwa msasa.
Leviticus13:47 “Nsalu iliyonse ikakhala ndi nguwi
Leviticus13:48 kaya ndi chovala chopangidwa ndi nsalu yathonje kapena yaubweya
Leviticus13:49 ndipo ngati pamalo pamene pachita nguwiyo pali ndi maonekedwe obiriwira kapena ofiirira imeneyo ndi nguwi yoyipitsa chovala ndipo chovalacho chikaonetsedwe kwa wansembe.
Leviticus13:50 Wansembeyo ayionetsetse nguwiyo ndipo chovalacho achiyike padera kwa masiku asanu ndi awiri.
Leviticus13:51 Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri ayionetsetsenso nguwiyo ndipo ngati nguwiyo yafalikira pa chovalacho
Leviticus13:52 Wansembe atenthe chovala chathonje kapena chaubweya chija
Leviticus13:53 “Koma ngati wansembe akayangʼanitsitsa nguwiyo apeza kuti sinafalikire pa chovalacho kapena pa chinthu chilichonse chachikopa
Leviticus13:54 iye alamulire kuti chinthu choyipitsidwacho achichape. Akatero achiyike padera kwa masiku enanso asanu ndi awiri.
Leviticus13:55 Chovalacho chitachapidwa
Leviticus13:56 Koma ngati wansembe aonetsetsa nʼkupeza kuti nguwi ija yathimbirira pa chovala chija kapena pa chinthu chachikopa chija atachichapa
Leviticus13:57 Koma ngati nguwiyo iwonekanso pa chovala chathonje kapena chaubweya ndiye kuti nguwiyo ikufalikira. Chilichonse chimene chili ndi nguwi chiyenera kutenthedwa.
Leviticus13:58 Chovala chathonje kapena chaubweya
Leviticus13:59 Amenewa ndiwo malamulo a nguwi yokhala pa chovala chaubweya kapena pa chovala chathonje
Leviticus14:1 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus14:2 “Malamulo a munthu wakhate pa tsiku la kuyeretsedwa kwake ndi awa: Abwere naye kwa wansembe.
Leviticus14:3 Wansembe atuluke kunja kwa msasa ndipo amuonetsetse wodwalayo. Ngati munthu wakhateyo wachira
Leviticus14:4 wansembe alamule anthu kuti amutengere wodwala woti ayeretsedweyo
Leviticus14:5 Wansembe alamule anthuwo kuti mbalame imodzi ayiphere mu mʼphika wa dothi pamwamba pa madzi abwino.
Leviticus14:6 Kenaka wansembe atenge mbalame yamoyo ija ndi kuyinyika pamodzi ndi nthambi yamkungudza
Leviticus14:7 Wansembe awaze magazi kasanu ndi kawiri pa munthu woti amuyeretse khateyo ndipo alengeze kuti munthuyo ndi woyeretsedwa. Kenaka wansembe awulutsire ku thengo mbalame yamoyoyo.
Leviticus14:8 “Munthu amene wayeretsedwa uja achape zovala zake
Leviticus14:9 Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri amete tsitsi lake lonse: amete kumutu
Leviticus14:10 “Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu munthuyo atenge ana ankhosa aamuna awiri ndi mwana wankhosa wamkazi wa chaka chimodzi. Zonsezi zikhale zopanda chilema. Atengenso chopereka chachakudya cha ufa wosalala wa makilogalamu atatu wosakaniza ndi mafuta wokwana limodzi mwa magawo atatu a lita.
Leviticus14:11 Wansembe amene ati ayeretse munthu wodwalayo amuyimitse munthuyo ali ndi zopereka zake zonse pamaso pa Yehova pa khomo la tenti ya msonkhano.
Leviticus14:12 “Ndipo wansembe atenge mwana wankhosa wamwamuna mmodzi ndi kumupereka kuti akhale nsembe yopepesera kupalamula
Leviticus14:13 Mwana wankhosayo amuphere pa malo amene amaphera nsembe yopepesera machimo ndi nsembe yopsereza
Leviticus14:14 Wansembe atengeko magazi a nsembe yopepesera kupalamula ndi kuwapaka pa msonga pa khutu lakumanja la munthu woti ayeretsedweyo. Apakenso pa chala chachikulu cha ku dzanja lamanja
Leviticus14:15 Wansembe atengeko mafuta pangʼono
Leviticus14:16 aviyike chala chake cha ku dzanja lamanja mʼmafuta amene ali mʼdzanja lamanzerewo
Leviticus14:17 Wansembe apake mafuta otsala mʼdzanja lake pa khutu lakumanja la munthu amene akuyeretsedwayo. Awapakenso pa chala chake chachikulu cha ku dzanja lamanja ndiponso pa chala chake chachikulu cha ku phazi lakumanja
Leviticus14:18 Mafuta onse otsala mʼdzanja la wansembe awathire pamutu pa munthu woti ayeretsedwe uja
Leviticus14:19 “Kenaka wansembe apereke nsembe yopepesera machimo kuti achite mwambo womupepesera munthu woti ayeretsedwe khate lake uja. Atatha kuchita zimenezi
Leviticus14:20 ndi kuyipereka pa guwa
Leviticus14:21 “Ngati munthu woti ayeretsedweyo ndi wosauka ndipo sangathe kupeza zinthu zimenezi
Leviticus14:22 Aperekenso njiwa ziwiri kapena mawunda awiri zomwe iye angathe kuzipeza. Imodzi ikhale nsembe yopepesera machimo
Leviticus14:23 “Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu zonsezo abwere nazo kwa wansembe
Leviticus14:24 Wansembe atenge mwana wankhosa wopereka nsembe yopepesera kupalamula
Leviticus14:25 Wansembe aphe nkhosa yopereka nsembe yopepesera kupalamula ndipo atenge magazi ake ndi kuwapaka pa msonga ya khutu lakumanja la munthu amene ayeretsedweyo. Awapakenso pa chala chachikulu cha ku dzanja lamanja
Leviticus14:26 Kenaka wansembe athire mafuta mʼdzanja lake lamanzere
Leviticus14:27 ndipo ndi chala chake cha ku dzanja lamanja awaze mafutawo kasanu ndi kawiri pamaso pa Yehova.
Leviticus14:28 Apakenso mafuta omwewo amene ali mʼdzanja lake lamanja pa msonga ya khutu la kudzanja lamanja la munthu amene akuyeretsedwayo. Apakenso pa chala chachikulu cha phazi lakumanja
Leviticus14:29 Mafuta onse otsala amene ali mʼdzanja la wansembe awapake pamutu pa munthu amene ayeretsedweyo kuti amuchitire mwambo wopepesera machimo pamaso pa Yehova.
Leviticus14:30 Ndipo munthuyo apereke njiwa ziwiri kapena mawunda ankhunda awiri
Leviticus14:31 imodzi ikhale ya nsembe yopepesera machimo ndipo inayo ikhale ya nsembe yopsereza
Leviticus14:32 “Amenewa ndi malamulo a munthu wakhate amene alibe zinthu zoti apereke pamene akuyeretsedwa.
Leviticus14:33 “Yehova anawuza Mose ndi Aaroni kuti
Leviticus14:34 Mukakalowa mʼdziko la Kanaani limene ndikukupatsani kuti likhale lanu
Leviticus14:35 mwini wake nyumbayo adzapite kwa wansembe ndi kukamuwuza kuti
Leviticus14:36 Tsono wansembe alamule kuti anthu atulutse zinthu zonse mʼnyumbamo iye asanalowemo ndi kukaonetsetsa ndereyo kuti mʼnyumbamo musapezeke chinthu choti achitchule chodetsedwa. Izi zitachitika
Leviticus14:37 Iye aonetsetse nderezo. Tsono akapeza kuti nderezo zili mʼkhoma la nyumba
Leviticus14:38 wansembe atuluke mʼnyumbamo ndi kupita pa khomo
Leviticus14:39 Pa tsiku la chisanu ndi chiwiri wansembe abwerenso kudzayangʼana mʼnyumbamo. Ngati ndere yafalikira mʼmakoma a nyumbayo
Leviticus14:40 wansembe alamule kuti anthu agumule miyala imene muli nderezo ndipo akayitaye kudzala la kunja kwa mzinda.
Leviticus14:41 Wansembe awuze anthu kuti apale makoma onse a mʼkati mwa nyumbayo
Leviticus14:42 Tsono anthuwo atenge miyala ina ndi kuyilowetsa mʼmalo mwa miyala imene anagumula ija ndipo atenge dothi latsopano ndi kumata nyumbayo.
Leviticus14:43 “Ngati ndere iwonekanso mʼnyumbamo atagumula kale miyala ndiponso atayipala kale ndi kuyimatanso
Leviticus14:44 wansembe apite kukayionetsetsenso ndipo ngati nderezo zafalikira mʼnyumbamo
Leviticus14:45 Agwetse nyumbayo
Leviticus14:46 “Aliyense amene alowa mʼnyumbamo itatsekedwa adzakhala wodetsedwa mpaka madzulo.
Leviticus14:47 Munthu amene wagona mʼnyumbamo kapena kudyeramo ayenera kuchapa zovala zake.
Leviticus14:48 “Koma ngati pambuyo pa kuyimata
Leviticus14:49 Kuti nyumbayo iyeretsedwe
Leviticus14:50 Wansembe aphe mbalame imodzi pamwamba pa madzi abwino mu mʼphika wa dothi.
Leviticus14:51 Kenaka atenge kanthambi kamkungudza
Leviticus14:52 Akatero ndiye kuti wayeretsa nyumbayo ndi magazi a mbalame
Leviticus14:53 Kenaka ayiwulutsire mbalame yamoyo ija kuthengo
Leviticus14:54 Amenewa ndiwo malamulo a nthenda ya khate
Leviticus14:55 nguwi za pa zovala
Leviticus14:56 khate la chithupsa
Leviticus14:57 kuti mudziwe ngati chinthucho ndi choyeretsedwa kapena chodetsedwa. Amenewa ndiwo malamulo a nthenda zonse za khate.
Leviticus15:1 Yehova anawuza Mose ndi Aaroni kuti
Leviticus15:2 “Yankhulani ndi Aisraeli ndipo muwawuze kuti
Leviticus15:3 Lamulo lokhudza kudziyipitsira ndi zotuluka ku maliseche a munthu nali: Malisechewo akamatulukabe mafinya
Leviticus15:4 “ ‘Bedi lililonse limene munthu wotulutsa mafinyayo agonapo
Leviticus15:5 Aliyense wokhudza bedi la munthuyo achape zovala zake ndi kusamba. Komabe adzakhala wodetsedwa mpaka madzulo.
Leviticus15:6 Aliyense wokhala pa chinthu chimene munthu wotulutsa mafinyayo anakhalapo
Leviticus15:7 “ ‘Aliyense wokhudza thupi la munthu amene akutulutsa mafinyayo achape zovala zake ndi kusamba. Komabe adzakhala wodetsedwa mpaka madzulo.
Leviticus15:8 “ ‘Munthu wotulutsa mafinya akalavulira malovu munthu wina amene ndi woyeretsedwa
Leviticus15:9 “ ‘Chilichonse chimene munthuyo akhalira akakwera pa kavalo chidzakhala chodetsedwa.
Leviticus15:10 Ndipo aliyense wokhudza chimene anakhalira munthuyo adzakhala wodetsedwanso mpaka madzulo. Aliyense wonyamula chinthucho achape zovala zake ndi kusamba. Komabe adzakhala wodetsedwa mpaka madzulo.
Leviticus15:11 “ ‘Munthu wotulutsa mafinyayo akakhudza munthu aliyense asanasambe mʼmanja
Leviticus15:12 “ ‘Mʼphika wadothi umene munthu wotulutsa mafinyayo wakhudza awuphwanye
Leviticus15:13 “ ‘Munthu wotulutsa mafinyayo akaona kuti wachira
Leviticus15:14 Pa tsiku la chisanu ndi chitatu atenge njiwa ziwiri kapena mawunda a nkhunda awiri ndi kubwera nazo pamaso pa Yehova pa khomo pa tenti ya msonkhano ndipo azipereke kwa wansembe.
Leviticus15:15 Wansembe apereke zimenezo: imodzi ikhale nsembe yopepesera machimo ndipo inayo ikhale ya nsembe yopsereza. Pamenepo ndiye kuti wansembeyo wachita mwambo wopepesera machimo a munthu wotulutsa mafinya uja pamaso pa Yehova.
Leviticus15:16 “ ‘Mwamuna akataya pansi mbewu yake yaumuna
Leviticus15:17 Chovala chilichonse kapena chikopa chilichonse pomwe pagwera mbewu yaumunayo achichape
Leviticus15:18 Mwamuna akagona ndi mkazi wake nataya mbewu yake yaumuna
Leviticus15:19 “ ‘Mkazi akakhala wosamba ndipo ikakhala kuti ndi nthawi yake yeniyeni yosamba
Leviticus15:20 “ ‘Chilichonse chimene mkaziyo agonera pa nthawi yake yosamba chidzakhala chodetsedwa
Leviticus15:21 Aliyense wokhudza bedi lake achape zovala zake ndi kusamba
Leviticus15:22 Aliyense wokhudza chimene wakhalapo achape zovala zake ndi kusamba
Leviticus15:23 Kaya ndi bedi kapena chinthu china chilichonse chimene anakhalapo
Leviticus15:24 “ ‘Mwamuna aliyense akagona naye ndipo magazi osamba kwake ndi kumukhudza
Leviticus15:25 “ ‘Mkazi akataya magazi masiku ambiri
Leviticus15:26 Bedi lililonse limene mkaziyo adzagonapo pa masiku onse pamene ali wotaya magazi
Leviticus15:27 Aliyense amene adzakhudza zinthu zimenezo adzakhala wodetsedwa ndipo ayenera kuchapa zovala zake ndi kusamba
Leviticus15:28 “ ‘Nthawi yosamba ikatha
Leviticus15:29 Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu
Leviticus15:30 Wansembe apereke imodzi kuti ikhale nsembe yopepesera machimo ndipo inayo ikhale ya nsembe yopsereza. Pamenepo ndiye kuti wansembeyo wachita mwambo wopepesera mkaziyo pamaso pa Yehova chifukwa cha matenda ake wosamba aja.
Leviticus15:31 “ ‘Choncho muwayeretsa ana a Israeli nʼkudetsedwa kwawo kuti angafe pochita tchimo lowadetsa limene polichita limadetsa malo anga wokhalamo amene ali pakati pawo.’ ”
Leviticus15:32 Amenewa ndi malamulo a munthu amene akutuluka mafinya kumaliseche kwake
Leviticus15:33 mkazi wodwala chifukwa cha msambo komanso a mwamuna kapena mkazi amene akutulutsa mafinya kumaliseche kwake ndi mwamuna wogona ndi mkazi amene akusamba.
Leviticus16:1 Atafa ana awiri a Aaroni amene anaphedwa atapita pamaso pa Yehova mosayenera
Leviticus16:2 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus16:3 “Aaroni azilowa Malo Wopatulika Kwambiri motere: azitenga mwana wangʼombe wamwamuna kuti akhale nsembe yopepesera machimo ndi nkhosa yayimuna kuti ikhale nsembe yopsereza.
Leviticus16:4 Azivala mwinjiro wopatulika wa nsalu yosalala
Leviticus16:5 Kuchokera pa gulu la Aisraeli
Leviticus16:6 “Aaroni apereke ngʼombe yayimuna kuti ikhale yopepesera machimo a iye mwini kuti achite mwambo wopepesera machimo ake pamodzi ndi a banja lake.
Leviticus16:7 Kenaka atenge mbuzi ziwiri zija ndipo aziyimike pamaso pa Yehova pa khomo la tenti ya msonkhano.
Leviticus16:8 Aaroni ndiye achite maere pa mbuzi ziwirizo kuti imodzi ikhale ya Yehova
Leviticus16:9 Aaroni abwere ndi mbuzi imene maere aonetsa kuti ndi ya Yehova
Leviticus16:10 Koma mbuzi imene maere aonetsa kuti ndi yosenza machimo
Leviticus16:11 “Aaroni apereke ngʼombe yayimuna kuti ikhale nsembe yopepesera machimo ake. Ndiye achite mwambo wopepesera machimo a iye mwini wake pamodzi ndi banja lake. Pambuyo pake aphe ngʼombe yopepesera machimo ake aja.
Leviticus16:12 Kenaka iye atenge chofukizira chodzaza ndi makala a moto ochokera pa guwa lansembe pamaso pa Yehova. Atengenso lubani wonunkhira ndi woperapera wokwanira manja awiri
Leviticus16:13 Athire lubani pa moto pamaso pa Yehova kuti utsi wa lubaniyo uphimbe chivundikiro chimene chili pamwamba pa Bokosi la Chipangano
Leviticus16:14 Ndipo atenge magazi ena a ngʼombeyo
Leviticus16:15 “Kenaka Aaroni aphe mbuzi ya nsembe yopepesera machimo a anthu
Leviticus16:16 Pamenepo ndiye kuti wansembeyo wachita mwambo wopepesera ku Malo Wopatulika chifukwa cha kudetsedwa ndi kuwukira kwa Aisraeli pa machimo ena aliwonse amene achita. Achite chimodzimodzi ndi tenti ya msonkhano imenenso ili yodetsedwa chifukwa cha machimo awo.
Leviticus16:17 Mu tenti ya msonkhano musakhale munthu ndi mmodzi yemwe nthawi imene Aaroni akupita kukachita mwambo wopepesera ku Malo Wopatulika mpaka atatulukako. Musakhale munthu mu tenti ya msonkhano mpaka atachita mwambo wopepesera machimo a iye mwini wake
Leviticus16:18 “Kenaka
Leviticus16:19 Magazi ena awawaze pa guwalo ndi chala chake kasanu ndi kawiri kuliyeretsa ndi kulipatula kuchotsa zodetsa za Aisraeli.
Leviticus16:20 “Aaroni akatsiriza mwambo wopepesera Malo Wopatulika
Leviticus16:21 Aaroni asanjike manja ake pa mutu wa mbuziyo ndipo awulule pa mbuziyo zoyipa zonse ndi zowukira zonse za Aisraeli
Leviticus16:22 Mbuziyo isenze machimo awo onse ndi kupita nawo kutali ndipo munthuyo aleke mbuziyo kuti ipite ku chipululuko.
Leviticus16:23 “Pambuyo pake Aaroni alowe mu tenti ya msonkhano ndi kuvula zovala zosalala zija zimene anavala polowa ku Malo Wopatulika ndi kuzisiya komweko.
Leviticus16:24 Asambe thupi lonse ku Malo Wopatulika ndi kuvala zovala zake za nthawi zonse. Kenaka atuluke ndi kukapereka nsembe yopsereza ya iye mwini
Leviticus16:25 Mafuta a nyama yopepesera machimo awatenthe pa guwa lansembe.
Leviticus16:26 “Tsono munthu amene anaperekeza mbuzi yosenza machimo ija achape zovala zake ndi kusamba. Pambuyo pake alowe ku msasa.
Leviticus16:27 Ngʼombe ndi mbuzi zoperekera nsembe yopepesera machimo zimene magazi ake anabwera nawo kuti achitire mwambo wopepesera Malo Wopatulika
Leviticus16:28 Munthu amene azitenthe achape zovala zake ndi kusamba. Pambuyo pake alowe mu msasa.
Leviticus16:29 “Ili likhale lamulo lanu lamuyaya: Mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri
Leviticus16:30 chifukwa tsiku limeneli kudzachitika mwambo wopepesera machimo anu
Leviticus16:31 Limeneli ndi tsiku lanu la Sabata lopumula
Leviticus16:32 Wansembe amene wadzozedwa ndi kupatulidwa kuti akhale wansembe kulowa mʼmalo mwa abambo ake ndiye azichita mwambo wopepesera machimo atavala zovala zake zosalala ndi zopatulika.
Leviticus16:33 Adzachite mwambo wopepesera machimo Malo Wopatulika
Leviticus16:34 “Ili likhale lamulo lanu lamuyaya. Mwambo wopepesera machimo uzichitika kamodzi pa chaka chifukwa cha machimo a anthu onse.” Ndipo Mose anachita monga momwe Yehova analamulira.
Leviticus17:1 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus17:2 “Uza Aaroni ndi ana ake
Leviticus17:3 Mwisraeli aliyense amene apha ngʼombe
Leviticus17:4 mʼmalo mobwera nayo pa khomo la tenti ya msonkhano pamaso pa Yehova ndi kuyipereka kuti ikhale nsembe ya Yehova
Leviticus17:5 Izi zili choncho kuti Aisraeli azibwera ndi nyama zawo za nsembe zimene akanaphera ku malo kwina kulikonse. Aisraeli azibwera nazo nyamazo kwa Yehova
Leviticus17:6 Wansembe awaze magazi ake pa guwa la Yehova limene lili pa khomo la tenti ya msonkhano ndipo atenthe mafuta ake kuti atulutse fungo lokomera Yehova.
Leviticus17:7 Motero asadzapherenso nsembe fano la mbuzi limene amachita nalo zadama. Limeneli ndi lamulo la muyaya kwa iwo ndi mibado ya mʼtsogolo.’ ”
Leviticus17:8 “Uwawuze kuti
Leviticus17:9 popanda kubwera nayo pa khomo la tenti ya msonkhano kudzayipereka pamaso pa Yehova
Leviticus17:10 “Mwisraeli aliyense kapena mlendo aliyense wokhala pakati panu amene adya magazi
Leviticus17:11 Pakuti moyo wa cholengedwa chilichonse uli mʼmagazi
Leviticus17:12 Choncho ndikuwawuza Aisraeli kuti
Leviticus17:13 “Mwisraeli aliyense kapena mlendo aliyense wokhala pakati panu amene amasaka ndi kupha nyama zakuthengo kapena mbalame zimene amadya
Leviticus17:14 chifukwa moyo wa cholengedwa chilichonse uli mʼmagazi ake. Nʼchifukwa chake ndinawawuza Aisraeli kuti
Leviticus17:15 “ ‘Munthu aliyense
Leviticus17:16 Koma ngati sachapa zovala zake ndi kusamba
Leviticus18:1 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus18:2 “Yankhula ndi Aisraeli ndipo uwawuze kuti
Leviticus18:3 Musamachite zomwe amachita anthu a ku Igupto kumene munkakhala kuja
Leviticus18:4 Inu muzimvera malamulo anga ndipo muzisamalitsa kutsatira malangizo anga. Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu.
Leviticus18:5 Choncho sungani malangizo ndi malamulo anga
Leviticus18:6 “ ‘Munthu aliyense asagonane ndi wachibale wake. Ine ndine Yehova.
Leviticus18:7 “ ‘Usachititse manyazi abambo ako pogonana ndi amayi ako. Iwo ndi amayi ako. Usagonane nawo.
Leviticus18:8 “ ‘Usagonane ndi mkazi wa abambo ako (osakhala amayi okubala). Ukatero ukuchititsa manyazi abambo ako.
Leviticus18:9 “ ‘Usagonane ndi mlongo wako
Leviticus18:10 “ ‘Usagonane ndi mdzukulu wako: mwana wa mwana wako wamwamuna kapena mwana wa mwana wako wamkazi. Kutero nʼkudzichotsa ulemu.
Leviticus18:11 “ ‘Usagonane ndi mwana wamkazi wa mkazi wa abambo ako
Leviticus18:12 “ ‘Usagonane ndi mlongo wa abambo ako; popeza ameneyo ndi thupi limodzi ndi abambo ako.
Leviticus18:13 “ ‘Usagonane ndi mchemwali wa amayi ako chifukwa ameneyo ndi thupi limodzi ndi amayi ako.
Leviticus18:14 “ ‘Usachititse manyazi mchimwene wa abambo ako pogonana ndi mkazi wake popeza amenewo ndi azakhali ako.
Leviticus18:15 “ ‘Usagonane ndi mpongozi wako popeza ameneyo ndi mkazi wa mwana wako. Choncho usamuchititse manyazi.
Leviticus18:16 “ ‘Usagonane ndi mkazi wa mchimwene wako popeza potero ukuchititsa manyazi mʼbale wakoyo.
Leviticus18:17 “ ‘Usagonane ndi mkazi ndiponso mwana wake wamkazi. Usagonane ndi mwana wamkazi wa mwana wake wamwamuna
Leviticus18:18 “ ‘Usakwatire mchemwali wa mkazi wako ndi kumagonana naye mkazi wakoyo ali moyo ngati wopikisana naye.
Leviticus18:19 “ ‘Usamuyandikire mkazi kuti ugonane naye pa nthawi yake yosamba.
Leviticus18:20 “ ‘Usagonane ndi mkazi wa mnzako ndi kudziyipitsa naye.
Leviticus18:21 “ ‘Usapereke mwana wako aliyense kuti akhale nsembe yamoto kwa Moleki ndi kuyipitsa dzina la Yehova. Ine ndine Yehova.
Leviticus18:22 “ ‘Usagonane ndi mwamuna ngati mkazi; chimenecho ndi chinthu chonyansa.
Leviticus18:23 “ ‘Usagonane ndi nyama ndi kudziyipitsa nayo. Mkazi asadzipereke kwa nyama kuti agonane nayo. Chimenecho ndi chisokonezo.
Leviticus18:24 “ ‘Musadzidetse ndi zinthu zimenezi chifukwa umo ndi mmene mitundu ina imene ndikuyithamangitsa pamaso panu inadzidetsera.
Leviticus18:25 Choncho dziko linayipa ndipo ndinalilanga chifukwa cha tchimo lake. Motero dzikolo linasanza anthu ake okhalamo.
Leviticus18:26 Koma inu mukasunge malangizo ndi malamulo anga. Mbadwa ndiponso alendo amene akukhala pakati panu asakachite china chilichonse cha zinthu zonyansazi
Leviticus18:27 pakuti zinthu zonsezi ndi zomwe ankachita anthu amene ankakhala mʼdzikomo inu musanafike
Leviticus18:28 Koma inu musachite zimenezi kuti dziko lingakusanzeni mutaliyipitsa monga linasanzira mitundu imene imakhalamo inu musanafike.
Leviticus18:29 “ ‘Aliyense wochita zinthu zonyansa zimenezi achotsedwe pakati pa anthu anzake.
Leviticus18:30 Choncho mverani malangizo anga oletsa kuchita miyambo yonyansayi imene ankatsatira anthu amene analipo inu musanafike ndi kudziyipitsa nayo. Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu.’ ”
Leviticus19:1 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus19:2 “Uza gulu lonse la Aisraeli kuti
Leviticus19:3 “ ‘Aliyense mwa inu azilemekeza abambo ake ndi amayi ake. Ndipo muzisunga masabata anga. Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu.
Leviticus19:4 “ ‘Musatembenukire ku mafano kapena kudzipangira nokha milungu ya zitsulo zosungunula. Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu.
Leviticus19:5 “ ‘Pamene mukupereka nsembe yachiyanjano kwa Yehova
Leviticus19:6 Nsembe izidyedwa tsiku lomwe mwayiperekalo kapena mmawa mwake. Chilichonse chotsala mpaka tsiku lachitatu chiyenera kutenthedwa.
Leviticus19:7 Ngati mudya choperekacho tsiku lachitatu
Leviticus19:8 Munthu aliyense amene adya chakudyacho adzasenza machimo ake chifukwa wayipitsa chinthu chimene ndi choyera kwa Yehova. Munthu ameneyo achotsedwe pakati pa anthu anzake.
Leviticus19:9 “ ‘Pamene mukolola zinthu mʼmunda mwanu musakolole mpaka mʼmphepete mwa munda
Leviticus19:10 Musakolole mphesa zonse mʼmunda wanu wa mpesa kapena kutola mphesa zakugwa mʼmundamo. Zimenezi muzisiyire anthu osauka ndi alendo. Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wako.
Leviticus19:11 “ ‘Musabe. “ ‘Musamanamizane. “ ‘Musachitirane zinthu mwachinyengo.
Leviticus19:12 “ ‘Musalumbire mʼdzina langa monyenga popeza kutero ndi kuyipitsa dzina la Mulungu wanu. Ine ndine Yehova.
Leviticus19:13 “ ‘Musapsinje mnzanu kapena kumulanda zinthu zake. “ ‘Musasunge malipiro a munthu wantchito usiku wonse mpaka mmawa.
Leviticus19:14 “ ‘Musatemberere wosamva kapena kuyikira munthu wosaona chinthu choti apunthwe nacho patsogolo pake
Leviticus19:15 “ ‘Musamaweruze mopanda chilungamo. Musachite tsankho pakati pa osauka ndi olemera
Leviticus19:16 “ ‘Musamapite uku ndi uku kunena bodza pakati pa anthu anu. “ ‘Musachite kanthu kalikonse kamene kangadzetse imfa kwa mnzanu. Ine ndine Yehova.
Leviticus19:17 “ ‘Musamude mʼbale wanu mu mtima mwanu. Koma mudzudzuleni mnzanu moona mtima kuti musakhale wolakwa.
Leviticus19:18 “ ‘Musamubwezere mnzanu choyipa kapena kumusungira kanthu kunkhosi
Leviticus19:19 “ ‘Muzisunga malangizo anga. “ ‘Tsono musamalole kuti ngʼombe zanu zikwerane ndi chiweto cha mtundu wina. “ ‘Ndiponso musamadzale mbewu za mitundu iwiri mʼmunda umodzi. “ ‘Musavale chovala chopangidwa ndi nsalu za mitundu iwiri.
Leviticus19:20 “ ‘Ngati munthu agonana ndi kapolo wamkazi amene wafunsidwa mbeta ndi munthu wina
Leviticus19:21 Koma mwamunayo abwere ndi nsembe yopepesera kupalamula kwa Yehova pa khomo la tenti ya msonkhano. Nsembe yake ikhale nkhosa yayimuna
Leviticus19:22 ndipo wansembe achite nayo mwambo wopepesera chifukwa cha kupalamula kumene anachita pamaso pa Yehova. Akatero tchimo lake lidzakhululukidwa.
Leviticus19:23 “ ‘Mukadzalowa mʼdzikomo ndi kudzala mtengo wa mtundu uliwonse wa zipatso
Leviticus19:24 Chaka chachinayi
Leviticus19:25 Koma chaka chachisanu
Leviticus19:26 “ ‘Musadye nyama ya magazi. “ ‘Musamawombeze kapena kuchita zamatsenga.
Leviticus19:27 “ ‘Musamamete mduliro kapena kumeta mʼmphepete mwa ndevu zanu.
Leviticus19:28 “ ‘Musadzichekecheke pathupi panu chifukwa cha munthu wakufa kapena kudzitema mphini pa thupi lanu. Ine ndine Yehova.
Leviticus19:29 “ ‘Musamuyipitse mwana wanu wamkazi pomusandutsa mkazi wachiwerewere. Mukatero dziko lidzasanduka la anthu achiwerewere ndi lodzaza ndi zoyipa.
Leviticus19:30 “ ‘Muzisunga Masabata anga ndipo muzilemekeza malo anga opatulika. Ine ndine Yehova.
Leviticus19:31 “ ‘Musamapite kwa woyankhula ndi mizimu ya anthu akufa
Leviticus19:32 “ ‘Muzikhala mwa ulemu pamaso pa munthu wachikulire
Leviticus19:33 “ ‘Pamene mlendo akhala nanu mʼdziko mwanu
Leviticus19:34 Mlendo amene akhala nanu akhale ngati mmodzi mwa mbadwa zanu. Mumukonde monga momwe mumadzikondera inu nomwe. Paja inu munali alendo mʼdziko la Igupto. Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu.
Leviticus19:35 “ ‘Musamachite za chinyengo poweruza mlandu
Leviticus19:36 Miyeso ya sikelo
Leviticus19:37 “ ‘Choncho muzisunga malangizo ndi malamulo angawa ndi kuwatsatira. Ine ndine Yehova.’ ”
Leviticus20:1 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus20:2 “Uza Aisraeli kuti
Leviticus20:3 Munthu ameneyo ndidzamufulatira ndi kumuchotsa pakati pa anzake.’ Popereka mwana wake kwa Moleki
Leviticus20:4 Ngati anthu a mʼderalo achita ngati sakumuona munthuyo pamene akupereka mwana wake kwa Moleki ndi kusamupha
Leviticus20:5 Ineyo ndidzamufulatira pamodzi ndi banja lake. Ndidzawachotsa pakati pa anthu anzawo onse amene anamutsatira
Leviticus20:6 “ ‘Ngati munthu adzapita kwa woyankhula ndi mizimu ya anthu akufa kapena kwa owombeza
Leviticus20:7 “ ‘Chifukwa chake dzipatuleni ndi kukhala woyera popeza Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu.
Leviticus20:8 Ndipo sungani malangizo anga ndi kuwatsata. Ine ndine Yehova amene ndimakuyeretsani.
Leviticus20:9 “ ‘Munthu aliyense amene atemberera abambo ake kapena amayi ake ayenera kuphedwa. Magazi ake adzakhala pamutu pake chifukwa iye watemberera abambo kapena amayi ake.
Leviticus20:10 “ ‘Ngati munthu wachita chigololo ndi mkazi wa mnzake
Leviticus20:11 “ ‘Ngati munthu agonana ndi mkazi wa abambo ake
Leviticus20:12 “ ‘Ngati munthu agonana ndi mkazi wa mwana wake
Leviticus20:13 “ ‘Ngati munthu agonana ndi mwamuna mnzake ngati akugonana ndi mkazi
Leviticus20:14 “ ‘Ngati munthu akwatira mkazi
Leviticus20:15 “ ‘Ngati mwamuna agonana ndi nyama
Leviticus20:16 “ ‘Ngati mkazi agonana ndi nyama
Leviticus20:17 “ ‘Ngati munthu akakwatira mlongo wake
Leviticus20:18 “ ‘Ngati munthu agonana ndi mkazi pa nthawi yake yosamba
Leviticus20:19 “ ‘Musagonane ndi mchemwali wa amayi anu kapena abambo anu
Leviticus20:20 “ ‘Ngati munthu agonana ndi azakhali ake
Leviticus20:21 “ ‘Munthu akakwatira mkazi wa mchimwene wake ndiye kuti wachita chinthu chonyansa. Wachititsa manyazi mʼbale wakeyo. Onse awiriwo adzakhala wopanda mwana.
Leviticus20:22 “ ‘Nʼchifukwa chake muzisunga malangizo anga onse ndi malamulo anga ndipo muwatsatire kuti ku dziko limene Ine ndikupita nanu kuti mukakhalemo lisakakusanzeni.
Leviticus20:23 Musatsanzire miyambo ya mitundu ya anthu imene ndi kuyipirikitsa inu mukufika. Chifukwa iwo anachita zinthu zonsezi
Leviticus20:24 Koma Ine ndinakuwuzani kuti
Leviticus20:25 “ ‘Chifukwa chake muzisiyanitsa pakati pa nyama zoyeretsedwa ndi nyama zodetsedwa ndiponso pakati pa mbalame zoyeretsedwa ndi mbalame zodetsedwa. Musadzidetse pakudya nyama iliyonse kapena mbalame
Leviticus20:26 Muzikhala woyera pamaso panga chifukwa Ine Yehova
Leviticus20:27 “ ‘Mwamuna kapena mkazi woyankhula ndi mizimu ya anthu akufa kapena wanyanga pakati panu ayenera kuphedwa. Muwagende ndi miyala
Leviticus21:1 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus21:2 Koma akhoza kukhudza thupi lakufa la amayi ake
Leviticus21:3 kapena mlongo wake wosakwatiwa amene amadalira iye chifukwa sanakwatiwe. Iye akhoza kudzidetsa pokhudza thupi lakufa la mchemwali wake wosakwatiwa yekha.
Leviticus21:4 Koma wansembe asadzidetse chifukwa cha anthu amene ali nawo pa ubale obwera chifukwa cha ukwati.
Leviticus21:5 “ ‘Ansembe asamete tsitsi kumutu kwawo kapena mʼmphepete mwa ndevu zawo
Leviticus21:6 Ayenera kukhala oyera pamaso pa Mulungu wawo ndipo asachititse manyazi dzina la Mulungu wawo. Popeza amapereka nsembe zotentha pa moto kwa Yehova
Leviticus21:7 “ ‘Asakwatire akazi amene adzidetsa ndi chiwerewere kapena akazi amene amuna awo awasudzula
Leviticus21:8 Iwo akhale oyera chifukwa amapereka nsembe kwa Mulungu wanu. Muziwaona kuti ndi oyera
Leviticus21:9 “ ‘Ngati mwana wamkazi wa wansembe adziyipitsa pochita zachiwerewere
Leviticus21:10 “ ‘Munthu amene ali mkulu wa ansembe pakati pa abale ake
Leviticus21:11 Asalowe mʼnyumba mmene muli munthu wakufa ngakhale womwalirayo ndi amayi ake kapena abambo ake.
Leviticus21:12 Asadzidetse potulukira kunja kwa malo opatulika popeza mafuta womupatula kukhala wansembe ali pamutu pake. Ine ndine Yehova.
Leviticus21:13 “ ‘Iye akwatire namwali wosadziwa mwamuna.
Leviticus21:14 Asakwatire mkazi wamasiye
Leviticus21:15 kuti mtundu wake usakhale wodetsedwa pakati pa abale popeza ndine Yehova
Leviticus21:16 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus21:17 “Muwuze Aaroni kuti
Leviticus21:18 Munthu aliyense wachilema motere: munthu wakhungu kapena wolumala miyendo
Leviticus21:19 munthu wa phazi lolumala kapena dzanja lolumala
Leviticus21:20 kapena munthu wokhota msana kapena wamfupi kwambiri
Leviticus21:21 Mdzukulu aliyense wa Aaroni wansembe
Leviticus21:22 Koma iye angathe kudya chakudya chopatulika kwambiri chija
Leviticus21:23 Koma chifukwa cha kulumala kwake
Leviticus21:24 Choncho Mose anawuza Aaroni ndi ana ake pamodzi ndi Aisraeli onse zimenezi.
Leviticus22:1 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus22:2 “Uza Aaroni ndi ana ake kuti azilemekeza zinthu zopatulika zimene Aisraeli azipereka kwa Ine
Leviticus22:3 “Uwawuze kuti ngati wina aliyense mwa zidzukulu zawo mʼmibado yonse imene ikubwera adzayandikira zinthu zopatulika zimene ana a Israeli apereka kwa Yehova
Leviticus22:4 “Munthu aliyense mwa zidzukulu za Aaroni amene ali ndi khate kapena amatulutsa zoyipa mʼthupi mwake
Leviticus22:5 kapena kukhudza chilichonse chokwawa chomwe chimadetsa munthu
Leviticus22:6 Tsono ngati wansembe angakhudze chilichonse mwa zimenezi ndiye kuti adzakhala wodetsedwa mpaka madzulo. Asadye chopereka chilichonse chopatulika mpaka atasamba thupi lake lonse.
Leviticus22:7 Munthuyo adzakhala woyeretsedwa pamene dzuwa lalowa
Leviticus22:8 Wansembe sayenera kudya chinthu chofa chokha kapena chojiwa ndi chirombo kuopa kuti angadzidetse ndi chakudyacho. Ine ndine Yehova.
Leviticus22:9 “ ‘Choncho ansembe azisunga malamulo angawa kuti asapezeke wolakwa ndi kufa chifukwa chopeputsa malamulowa. Ine ndine Yehova
Leviticus22:10 “ ‘Aliyense amene si wabanja la wansembe
Leviticus22:11 Koma kapolo amene wagulidwa ndi ndalama kapena kubadwira mʼbanja la wansembe angathe kudya chakudya cha wansembeyo.
Leviticus22:12 Mwana wamkazi wa wansembe amene wakwatiwa ndi munthu amene si wansembe
Leviticus22:13 Koma mwana wamkazi wa wansembe amene ali wamasiye kapena wosudzulidwa
Leviticus22:14 “ ‘Ngati munthu wina aliyense adya chopereka chopatulika mosadziwa
Leviticus22:15 Choncho ansembe asayipitse zopereka zopatulika za Aisraeli zimene apereka kwa Yehova
Leviticus22:16 ndipo asachimwitse ndi kupalamulitsa Aisraeli powalola kudya zakudya zawo zopatulika. Ine ndine Yehova amene ndimawayeretsa.’ ”
Leviticus22:17 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus22:18 “Yankhula ndi Aaroni
Leviticus22:19 ndiye kuti abwere ndi ngʼombe yayimuna
Leviticus22:20 Musapereke nyama iliyonse yokhala ndi chilema chifukwa sidzalandiridwa mʼmalo mwanu.
Leviticus22:21 Pamene wina aliyense abweretsa ngʼombe kapena nkhosa kuti ikhale nsembe yachiyanjano kwa Yehova
Leviticus22:22 Musapereke kwa Yehova nyama zakhungu
Leviticus22:23 Koma mungathe kupereka ngʼombe yayimuna kapena nkhosa imene ili ndi chiwalo chachitali kapena chachifupi kukhala nsembe yaufulu. Koma simungayipereke ngati nsembe yoperekera zimene munalumbirira chifukwa sidzalandiridwa.
Leviticus22:24 Nyama iliyonse imene mavalo ake ndi onyuka kapena ophwanyika
Leviticus22:25 Ndipo musalandire nyama zotere kuchokera kwa mlendo ndi kuzipereka kukhala zakudya za Mulungu wanu. Zimenezi sizidzalandiridwa mʼmalo mwanu chifukwa zili ndi chilema ndipo ndi zolumala.’ ”
Leviticus22:26 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus22:27 “Pamene mwana wangʼombe
Leviticus22:28 Musaphe ngʼombe kapena nkhosa pamodzi ndi mwana wake tsiku limodzi. Muyidye pa tsiku lomwelo; musasiyeko ina mpaka mmawa. Ine ndine Yehova.
Leviticus22:29 “Pamene mupereka nsembe yoyamika kwa Yehova
Leviticus22:30 Muyidye pa tsiku lomwelo
Leviticus22:31 “Choncho sungani malamulo anga ndi kuwatsatira. Ine ndine Yehova.
Leviticus22:32 Musanyoze dzina langa loyera. Koma lilemekezedwe pakati pa Aisraeli. Ine ndine Yehova amene ndimakuyeretsani
Leviticus22:33 ndipo ndine amene ndinakutulutsani mu Igupto kuti ndikhale Mulungu wanu. Ine ndine Yehova.”
Leviticus23:1 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus23:2 “Yankhula ndi Aisraeli ndipo uwawuze kuti
Leviticus23:3 “ ‘Pa masiku asanu ndi limodzi muzigwira ntchito
Leviticus23:4 “ ‘Awa ndiwo masiku osankhidwa a zikondwerero za Yehova
Leviticus23:5 Chikondwerero cha Paska chiziyamba madzulo a tsiku la 14 la mwezi woyamba.
Leviticus23:6 Tsiku la 15 la mwezi womwewo ndi tsiku lolemekeza Yehova ndipo muziyamba Chikondwerero cha Buledi Wopanda Yisiti. Muzidya buledi wopanda yisiti kwa masiku asanu ndi awiri.
Leviticus23:7 Pa tsiku loyamba muzichita msonkhano wopatulika. Musamagwire ntchito iliyonse.
Leviticus23:8 Pa masiku asanu ndi awiri muzipereka nsembe yopsereza kwa Yehova. Ndipo tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri muzikhala ndi msonkhano wopatulika ndipo musamagwire ntchito yolemetsa.’ ”
Leviticus23:9 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus23:10 “Yankhula ndi Aisraeli ndipo uwawuze kuti
Leviticus23:11 Wansembeyo auweyule mtolowo pamaso pa Yehova kotero mtolowo udzalandiridwa mʼmalo mwanu. Wansembe auweyule tsiku lotsatana ndi la Sabata.
Leviticus23:12 Pa tsiku limene muweyula mtolowo
Leviticus23:13 Chopereka chachakudya chake chikhale cha makilogalamu awiri a ufa wosalala wosakaniza ndi mafuta kuti chikhale nsembe yopsereza yopereka kwa Yehova
Leviticus23:14 Musadye buledi aliyense kapena tirigu wokazinga
Leviticus23:15 “ ‘Kuyambira tsiku lotsatana ndi la Sabata lija
Leviticus23:16 Ndiye kuti muwerenge masiku makumi asanu kuchokera pa tsiku lotsatana ndi Sabata la chisanu ndi chiwiri
Leviticus23:17 Kuchokera kulikonse kumene mukukhala
Leviticus23:18 Pamodzi ndi bulediyu muperekenso ana ankhosa aamuna asanu ndi awiri
Leviticus23:19 Kenaka mupereke mbuzi imodzi yayimuna kuti ikhale nsembe yopepesera machimo ndiponso ana ankhosa awiri
Leviticus23:20 Wansembe aweyule ana ankhosa awiriwo pamaso pa Yehova monga nsembe yoweyula
Leviticus23:21 Pa tsiku lomwelo mulengeze za msonkhano wopatulika ndipo musagwire ntchito zolemetsa. Limeneli ndi lamulo lamuyaya pa mibado yanu yonse
Leviticus23:22 “ ‘Pamene mukukolola zinthu mʼmunda mwanu
Leviticus23:23 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus23:24 “Uza Aisraeli kuti
Leviticus23:25 Musagwire ntchito zolemetsa koma mupereke nsembe yopsereza kwa Yehova.’ ”
Leviticus23:26 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus23:27 “Tsiku lakhumi la mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri ndi tsiku lochita Mwambo Wopepesera Machimo. Muzichita msonkhano wopatulika. Muzidzichepetsa pamaso pa Yehova ndi kupereka nsembe zopsereza kwa Yehova.
Leviticus23:28 Tsiku limeneli musamagwire ntchito chifukwa ndi tsiku la Mwambo Wopepesera Machimo
Leviticus23:29 Munthu aliyense amene sasala zakudya pa tsiku limeneli ayenera kuchotsedwa pakati pa anthu a mtundu wake.
Leviticus23:30 Aliyense wogwira ntchito tsiku limeneli ndidzamuwononga pakati pa anthu a mtundu wake.
Leviticus23:31 Inu musadzagwire ntchito iliyonse. Limeneli ndi lamulo lamuyaya pa mibado yanu yonse
Leviticus23:32 Limeneli kwa inu ndi tsiku la Sabata lopumula
Leviticus23:33 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus23:34 “Uwawuze Aisraeli kuti pa masiku asanu ndi awiri kuyambira pa tsiku la 15 la mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri pazikhala Chikondwerero cha Misasa cholemekeza Yehova.
Leviticus23:35 Tsiku loyamba ndi la msonkhano wopatulika
Leviticus23:36 Pa masiku asanu ndi awiri muzipereka nsembe zopsereza kwa Yehova. Ndipo pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu muzikhala ndi msonkhano wopatulika ndipo muzipereka nsembe yopsereza kwa Yehova. Kumeneku ndi kutsekera kwa msonkhano waukulu. Musagwire ntchito zolemetsa.
Leviticus23:37 (“ ‘Amenewa ndi masiku osankhika a chikondwerero cha Yehova
Leviticus23:38 Zopereka zimenezi ndi zowonjezera pa zopereka za Yehova za pa Sabata
Leviticus23:39 “ ‘Choncho kuyambira pa tsiku la 15 la mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri
Leviticus23:40 Pa tsiku loyamba muzitenga zipatso zabwino kwambiri zothyola mʼmitengo
Leviticus23:41 Chaka chilichonse muzichita chikondwerero cha Yehova kwa masiku asanu ndi awiri. Limeneli ndi lamulo lamuyaya pa mibado yanu yonse. Muzichita chikondwerero chimenechi mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri.
Leviticus23:42 Muzikhala mʼmisasa masiku asanu ndi awiri. Onse amene ali mbadwa mʼdziko la Israeli azikhala mʼmisasa
Leviticus23:43 kuti zidzukulu zanu zidzadziwe kuti ndine amene ndinakhazika Aisraeli mʼmisasa nditawatulutsa ku Igupto. Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu.’ ”
Leviticus23:44 Choncho Mose analengeza kwa Aisraeli masiku osankhika a zikondwerero za Yehova.
Leviticus24:1 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus24:2 “Lamula Aisraeli kuti akupatse mafuta anyale
Leviticus24:3 Kunja kwa nsalu yotchinga Bokosi la Chipangano
Leviticus24:4 Aaroni ayatse nyale zimene zili pa choyikapo nyale chagolide wabwino kwambiri kuti zikhale zoyaka nthawi zonse pamaso pa Yehova.
Leviticus24:5 “Mutenge ufa wosalala ndipo muphike makeke khumi ndi awiri ndipo keke iliyonse ikhale ya ufa wa makilogalamu awiri.
Leviticus24:6 Muwayike pa tebulo la golide wabwino kwambiri pamaso pa Yehova mʼmizere iwiri. Mzere uliwonse ukhale wa makeke asanu ndi imodzi.
Leviticus24:7 Pa mzere uliwonse muyikepo lubani wafungo lokoma kuti pamodzi ndi bulediyo akhale wachikumbutso cha nsembe yopsereza yopereka kwa Yehova.
Leviticus24:8 Sabata ndi sabata nthawi zonse Aaroni aziyika makeke amenewa pamaso pa Yehova mʼmalo mwa Aisraeli onse kuti akhale pangano lamuyaya.
Leviticus24:9 Chakudyacho ndi cha Aaroni ndi ana ake ndipo azidyera ku malo wopatulika chifukwa kwa iye chakudyacho ndi chopatulika kwambiri chochokera pa chopereka chopsereza cha Yehova.”
Leviticus24:10 Tsiku lina munthu wina wamwamuna amene amayi ake anali Mwisraeli koma abambo ake anali Mwigupto anapita kwa Aisraeli ndipo anakangana ndi Mwisraeli wina ku msasa.
Leviticus24:11 Munthu uja ananyoza dzina la Yehova ndi kulitemberera. Choncho anabwera naye kwa Mose. Dzina la amayi ake linali Selomiti
Leviticus24:12 Anamuyika mʼndende mpaka atadziwa bwino chofuna cha Yehova.
Leviticus24:13 Ndipo Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus24:14 “Pita naye kunja kwa msasa munthu wotembererayo. Onse amene anamumva akutemberera asanjike manja awo pamutu pake ndipo gulu lonse la anthu limugende miyala.
Leviticus24:15 Choncho uza Aisraeli kuti
Leviticus24:16 Aliyense wonyoza dzina la Yehova
Leviticus24:17 “ ‘Ngati munthu wina aliyense achotsa moyo wa munthu mnzake
Leviticus24:18 Aliyense wopha chiweto cha mnzake ayenera kulipira china. Moyo kulipa moyo.
Leviticus24:19 Ngati munthu avulaza mnzake
Leviticus24:20 kuthyola fupa kulipira kuthyola fupa
Leviticus24:21 Aliyense wopha chiweto cha mnzake
Leviticus24:22 Lamulo la mlendo ndi mbadwa ndi limodzi lomweli. Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu.’ ”
Leviticus24:23 Pamenepo Mose anawuza Aisraeli zimenezi
Leviticus25:1 Yehova anawuza Mose pa phiri la Sinai kuti
Leviticus25:2 “Yankhula ndi Aisraeli ndipo uwawuze kuti
Leviticus25:3 Pa zaka zisanu ndi chimodzi muzikalima minda yanu
Leviticus25:4 Koma chaka chachisanu ndi chiwiri ndi chaka choti nthaka ipume
Leviticus25:5 Musakolole zimene zinamera zokha mʼmunda mwanu. Musakakolole kapena kuthyola mphesa za mʼmitengo imene simunasadze. Chaka chimenechi nʼchoti nthaka ipumule.
Leviticus25:6 Chaka chimene nthakayo ipumula mudzakhala ndi chakudya chokwanira inuyo
Leviticus25:7 Ziweto zanu pamodzi ndi nyama za mʼdziko lanu zizidzadya zipatso za mʼnthaka.
Leviticus25:8 “ ‘Muzichotsera Masabata asanu ndi awiri a zaka
Leviticus25:9 Ndipo pa tsiku la khumi la mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri mulize lipenga mofuwula. Tsiku lochita mwambo wopepesera machimo muziliza lipenga mʼdziko lanu lonse.
Leviticus25:10 Mupatule chaka cha makumi asanu
Leviticus25:11 Kwa inu chakachi chidzakhaladi chaka choyimba lipenga kukondwerera zaka makumi asanu. Pa chaka chimenechi musadzale kanthu ndipo musakolole mbewu zomera zokha kapenanso kuthyola mphesa pa mitengo yosasadzira.
Leviticus25:12 Chimenechi ndi chaka chokondwerera zaka makumi asanu. Choncho chikhale chaka chopatulika kwa inu. Muzidya zokhazo zimene zakololedwa mʼminda.
Leviticus25:13 “ ‘Chaka chimenechi ndi choliza lipenga
Leviticus25:14 “ ‘Ngati unagulitsa kapena kugula malo ako kwa mnzako wa mʼdzikomo
Leviticus25:15 Ugule kwa mnzako potsata chiwerengero cha zaka zimene zatha kuyambira pa chikondwerero cha chaka cha makumi asanu chapita. Ndipo mnzakoyo akugulitse potsata chiwerengero cha zaka zokolola zomwe zatsala.
Leviticus25:16 Zaka zikakhala zochuluka
Leviticus25:17 Musachenjeretsane koma muope Mulungu wanu. Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu.
Leviticus25:18 “ ‘Tsatirani malangizo anga ndipo mverani mosamala malamulo anga ndipo mudzakhala mʼdzikomo mwamtendere.
Leviticus25:19 Ndipo nthaka idzakupatsani zipatso zake. Mudzadya mpaka kukhuta ndiponso mudzakhala mʼdzikomo mwamtendere.
Leviticus25:20 Mwina nʼkafunsa kuti
Leviticus25:21 Ine ndidzatumiza madalitso ambiri chaka chachisanu ndi chimodzi moti nthaka yanu idzabala zinthu zokwanira kudya zaka zitatu.
Leviticus25:22 Pamene mukudzala chaka chachisanu ndi chitatu
Leviticus25:23 “ ‘Malo asagulitsidwe mpaka muyaya chifukwa dzikolo ndi langa. Inu ndinu alendo okhala ndi Ine.
Leviticus25:24 Malo onse amene ali mʼmanja mwanu mudzalole kuti amene anakugulitsani awawombole.
Leviticus25:25 “ ‘Ngati Mwisraeli mnzanu wasauka nagulitsako gawo lina la malo ake
Leviticus25:26 Koma ngati munthuyo alibe wachibale woti nʼkuwombola malowo koma pambuyo pake iye mwini nʼkulemera ndi kupeza zokwanira kuwombolera
Leviticus25:27 Awerengerane zaka kuyambira pamene anagulitsa mundawo ndipo amubwezere amene anagulayo ndalama zimene akanayenera kuzipereka mpaka chaka chokondwerera zaka makumi asanu. Atatero angathe kubwerera pa malo ake.
Leviticus25:28 Koma ngati sakhala nazo zokwanira kuti amubwezere amene anagula malowo
Leviticus25:29 “ ‘Ngati munthu agulitsa nyumba ya mu mzinda umene uli mu linga
Leviticus25:30 Ngati nyumbayo siwomboledwa chisanathe chaka chimodzicho
Leviticus25:31 Koma nyumba za mʼmizinda yosazingidwa ndi linga ziwomboledwe monga mmene achitira ndi minda ya mʼdzikomo.
Leviticus25:32 “ ‘Alevi ali ndi ufulu owombola nyumba zawo za mʼmidzi yawo nthawi ina iliyonse.
Leviticus25:33 Koma ngati Mlevi sawombola nyumba imene inagulitsidwa mʼmudzi mwake
Leviticus25:34 Koma malo owetera ziweto a mʼmidzi yawoyo sayenera kugulitsidwa. Awa ndi malo awo mpaka muyaya.
Leviticus25:35 “ ‘Ngati mʼbale wako akhala wosauka kuti sangathe kudzisamalira yekha
Leviticus25:36 Usalandire chiwongoladzanja chilichonse kuchokera kwa iye kapena kuwonjezerapo kanthu kena
Leviticus25:37 Musakongoze mnzanu ndalama kuti mulandire chiwongoladzanja
Leviticus25:38 Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu
Leviticus25:39 “ ‘Ngati mʼbale wanu asauka ndipo adzigulitsa yekha kwa inu
Leviticus25:40 Akhale ngati wantchito kapena ngati mlendo. Akugwirireni ntchito mpaka chaka chokondwerera zaka makumi asanu.
Leviticus25:41 Kenaka iye ndi ana ake achoke
Leviticus25:42 Chifukwa Aisraeli ndi atumiki anga amene ndinawatulutsa mʼdziko la Igupto
Leviticus25:43 Musawalamulire mwankhanza koma wopani Mulungu wanu.
Leviticus25:44 “ ‘Kunena za akapolo aamuna ndi aakazi
Leviticus25:45 Mungathenso kugula akapolo kuchokera kwa alendo amene akukhala nanu kapena kuchokera ku mabanja amene mukukhala nawo amene ndi mbadwa za mʼdziko lanu. Iwowa akhoza kukhala akapolo anu.
Leviticus25:46 Akapolowo mungathe kuwasiya mʼmanja mwa ana anu inu mutafa kuti akhale cholowa chawo moyo wawo wonse. Koma musawalamulire mwankhanza Aisraeli anzanu.
Leviticus25:47 “ ‘Ngati mlendo kapena munthu amene akukhala nanu kwa kanthawi kochepa alemera ndipo mmodzi wa abale anu amene akukhala naye pafupi nʼkusauka
Leviticus25:48 wodzigulitsayo ali ndi ufulu wowomboledwa. Mmodzi mwa abale ake angathe kumuwombola:
Leviticus25:49 amalume ake kapena mwana wa amalume ake
Leviticus25:50 Iye pamodzi ndi munthu amene anamugulayo awerengerane kuyambira chaka chimene anadzigulitsa kwa iyeyo mpaka chaka chokondwerera zaka makumi asanu. Mtengo wodziwombolera ukhale wofanana ndi zakazo. Ndipo nthawi imene anali ndi mbuye wakeyo iwerengedwe ngati nthawi ya munthu wantchito.
Leviticus25:51 Ngati patsala zaka zambiri
Leviticus25:52 Ngati kwatsala zaka zochepa kuti ifike nthawi ya chaka chokondwerera zaka makumi asanu
Leviticus25:53 Azikhala naye ngati wantchito wolembedwa chaka ndi chaka. Ndipo muonetsetse kuti mbuye wakeyo sakumulamulira mwankhanza.
Leviticus25:54 “ ‘Ngakhale munthuyo atapanda kuwomboledwa mwa njira zimenezi
Leviticus25:55 pakuti Aisraeli ndi atumiki anga. Iwo ndi atumiki anga amene ndinawatulutsa mʼdziko la Igupto. Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu.
Leviticus26:1 “ ‘Musadzipangire mafano ndipo musayimike chifanizo chosema kapena mwala woti mudzipembedza. Musayike mwala wosema mʼdziko mwanu kuti muziwugwadira. Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu.
Leviticus26:2 “ ‘Muzisunga Masabata anga ndipo muzilemekeza malo anga wopatulika. Ine ndine Yehova.
Leviticus26:3 “ ‘Mukamayenda motsata malangizo anga ndi kumvera mosamalitsa malamulo anga
Leviticus26:4 ndidzakupatsani mvula pa nyengo yake. Nthaka yanu idzabala zokolola zake
Leviticus26:5 Mudzakhala mukupuntha tirigu mpaka nthawi yothyola mphesa
Leviticus26:6 “ ‘Ndidzabweretsa mtendere mʼdziko lanu
Leviticus26:7 Mudzapirikitsa adani anu
Leviticus26:8 Anthu asanu mwa inu adzapirikitsa anthu 100
Leviticus26:9 “ ‘Ndidzakukumbukirani ndi kukupatsani ana ambiri ndi kukuchulukitsani. Ndidzasunga pangano langa ndi inu.
Leviticus26:10 Mudzakhala mukudyabe chakudya chogonera ndipo mudzachotse chakudyacho mʼnkhokwe kuti mupezemo malo woyika chakudya china chatsopano.
Leviticus26:11 Ndidzakhala pakati panu
Leviticus26:12 Ine ndidzayendayenda pakati panu ndipo ndidzakhala Mulungu wanu. Inu mudzakhala anthu anga.
Leviticus26:13 Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu amene ndinakutulutsani mʼdziko la Igupto kuti musakhalenso akapolo a Aigupto. Ndinadula mipiringidzo ya goli lanu ndi kukuthandizani kuti muziyenda momasuka.
Leviticus26:14 “ ‘Koma mukadzapanda kundimvera ndi kuphwanya malamulo anga onsewa
Leviticus26:15 ndipo ngati mudzanyoza malangizo anga ndi kunyansidwa ndi malamulo anga
Leviticus26:16 Ine ndidzakuchitirani izi: ndidzabweretsa zoopsa zadzidzidzi monga chifuwa chachikulu chowondetsa ndiponso malungo amene adzawononga maso ndi kufowoketsa moyo wanu. Mudzangovutika kudzala mbewu zanu chifukwa adani anu adzazidya.
Leviticus26:17 Ndidzakufulatirani
Leviticus26:18 “ ‘Ngati simudzandimvera mutaona zonsezi
Leviticus26:19 Ndidzathyola mphamvu zanu zimene mukunyadirazo
Leviticus26:20 Mphamvu zanu zidzapita pachabe chifukwa nthaka yanu sidzabala kanthu
Leviticus26:21 “ ‘Ngati mudzapitirira kutsutsana nane ndi kukana kundimvera
Leviticus26:22 Ndidzabweretsa zirombo zolusa pakati panu
Leviticus26:23 “ ‘Mukadzapanda kutembenukira kwa Ine ngakhale nditakulangani motere
Leviticus26:24 Ine mwini ndidzalimbana nanu
Leviticus26:25 Ndipo ndidzabweretsa lupanga pa inu ndi kukulangani chifukwa chophwanya pangano langa. Mukadzasonkhana mʼmizinda yanu
Leviticus26:26 Ndikadzachepetsa buledi wanu
Leviticus26:27 “ ‘Mukadzapanda kundimvera ngakhale nditakulangani motere
Leviticus26:28 pamenepo ndidzalimbana nanu mwaukali
Leviticus26:29 Mudzadya ana anu aamuna ndiponso mudzadya ana anu aakazi.
Leviticus26:30 Ine ndidzawononga malo anu opembedzera mafano a ku mapiri. Ndidzagwetsa maguwa anu ofukizira lubani
Leviticus26:31 Ndidzasandutsa mizinda yanu kukhala mabwinja ndi kuwononga malo anu wopatulika. Sindidzakondweranso ndi fungo lokoma la zopereka zanu.
Leviticus26:32 Ndidzawononga dziko kotero kuti adani anu mʼmenemo adzadabwa.
Leviticus26:33 Ndidzakubalalitsani pakati pa mitundu ina ya anthu ndipo ndidzasolola lupanga langa ndi kukupirikitsani. Dziko lanu lidzawonongedwa
Leviticus26:34 Nthawi imeneyo nthaka idzasangalalira kuyipumitsa kwake nthawi yonse imene idzakhala yosalimidwa
Leviticus26:35 Nthawi zonse pamene dzikolo lidzakhala lopanda anthu
Leviticus26:36 “ ‘Kunena za amene adzatsale
Leviticus26:37 Iwo adzaphunthwitsana ngati akuthawa nkhondo
Leviticus26:38 Mudzatheratu pakati pa mitundu ya anthu. Dziko la adani anu lidzakudyani.
Leviticus26:39 Ngakhale iwo amene adzatsale adzatheratu mʼdziko la adani awo chifukwa cha machimo awo ndi machimo a makolo awo.
Leviticus26:40 “ ‘Tsono adzawulula machimo awo ndi machimo a makolo awo
Leviticus26:41 zomwe zinandipangitsa kuwafulatira ndi kuwapereka mʼmanja mwa adani awo. Ndipo mitima yawo yowumayo ikadzadzichepetsa ndi kuvomera kulangidwa chifukwa cha machimo awo
Leviticus26:42 Ine ndidzakumbukira pangano langa ndi Yakobo
Leviticus26:43 Pakuti adzasiya dziko lawo lopanda anthu
Leviticus26:44 Komabe ngakhale adzachite zonsezi ali mʼdziko la adani awo
Leviticus26:45 Koma powachitira chifundo
Leviticus26:46 Amenewa ndi malamulo ndi malangizo amene Yehova anawayika pakati pa Iye mwini ndi Aisraeli pa Phiri la Sinai kudzera mwa Mose.
Leviticus27:1 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Leviticus27:2 “Yankhula ndi Aisraeli ndipo uwawuze kuti
Leviticus27:3 mtengo wake ukhale masekeli a siliva makumi asanu
Leviticus27:4 Ndipo ngati ndi wamkazi
Leviticus27:5 Mtengo wa munthu wamwamuna wa zaka zapakati pa zisanu ndi makumi awiri ukhale masekeli makumi awiri ndipo munthu wamkazi ukhale masekeli khumi.
Leviticus27:6 Ngati ndi munthu wamwamuna wa pakati pa mwezi umodzi ndi zaka zisanu
Leviticus27:7 Ngati ndi munthu wa zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi kapena kuposerapo
Leviticus27:8 Ngati munthu amene anachita lumbiro ndi wosauka kwambiri kuti sangathe kulipira ndalama zimenezo
Leviticus27:9 “ ‘Ngati chimene anachitira lumbiro kuti apereke ndi nyama imene amapereka kukhala nsembe kwa Yehova
Leviticus27:10 Munthu asasinthanitse ndi ina kapena kupereka ina yabwino mʼmalo mwa yoyipa
Leviticus27:11 Ngati chimene anachitira lumbiro ndi nyama yodetsedwa
Leviticus27:12 ndipo wansembeyo atchule mtengo wake poona ngati ndi yabwino kapena ndi yoyipa. Mtengo umene wansembe atchule ndiwo udzakhale mtengo wake.
Leviticus27:13 Ngati mwini wakeyo akufuna kuwombola nyamayo
Leviticus27:14 “ ‘Ngati munthu apereka nyumba yake kuti ikhale yopatulika kwa Yehova
Leviticus27:15 Ngati munthu amene wapereka nyumbayo afuna kuyiwombola nyumbayo
Leviticus27:16 “ ‘Ngati munthu apereka kwa Yehova mbali ina ya malo a makolo ake
Leviticus27:17 Ngati munthu apereka munda wake kuyambira chaka chokondwerera zaka makumi asanu
Leviticus27:18 Koma ngati apereka mundawo chaka chokondwerera zaka makumi asanu chitapita
Leviticus27:19 Ngati munthu amene wapereka munda afuna kuwuwombola
Leviticus27:20 Koma ngati sawuwombola mundawo
Leviticus27:21 Mwini mundawo akawusiya mʼchaka chokondwerera zaka makumi asanu ndiye kuti mundawo udzakhala wopatulika monga woperekedwa kwa Yehova: udzakhala munda wa ansembe.
Leviticus27:22 “ ‘Ngati munthu apereka kwa Yehova munda umene anagula
Leviticus27:23 wansembe atchule mtengo wake kufikira pa chaka chokondwerera zaka makumi asanu
Leviticus27:24 Pa chaka chokondwerera zaka makumi asanu
Leviticus27:25 Potchula mtengo uliwonse wansembe awerengere molingana ndi mtengo wa sekeli wa ku Nyumba ya Mulungu: magera makumi awiri pa sekeli imodzi.
Leviticus27:26 “ ‘Koma pasapezeke munthu wopereka mwana woyamba kubadwa wa nyama
Leviticus27:27 Ngati ili nyama yodetsedwa
Leviticus27:28 “ ‘Koma chinthu chilichonse choperekedwa kwa Yehova
Leviticus27:29 “ ‘Munthu amene waperekedwa kotheratu sangawomboledwe. Munthuyo ayenera kuphedwa.
Leviticus27:30 “ ‘Chakhumi chilichonse chochokera mʼdziko
Leviticus27:31 Ngati munthu afuna kuwombola chakhumi chilichonse
Leviticus27:32 Chakhumi cha ngʼombe ndi nkhosa
Leviticus27:33 Palibe amene adzaloledwa kusankha nyama yomwe ili yabwino kapena kusinthitsa. Ngati asinthitsa
Leviticus27:34 Amenewa ndi malamulo amene Yehova anamupatsa Mose pa Phiri la Sinai kuti awuze Aisraeli.
Numbers1:1 Yehova anayankhula ndi Mose mʼchipululu cha Sinai
Numbers1:2 “Werengani Aisraeli onse mʼmafuko awo ndi mʼmabanja awo
Numbers1:3 Iwe ndi Aaroni mwawerenge mwa magulu awo mu Israeli
Numbers1:4 Munthu mmodzi wochokera ku fuko lililonse yemwe ndi mtsogoleri wa banja lake
Numbers1:5 Mayina a anthu amene akuthandizeniwo ndi awa: Elizuri mwana wa Sedeuri
Numbers1:6 	Selumieli mwana wa Zurisadai
Numbers1:7 	Naasoni mwana wa Aminadabu
Numbers1:8 	Netanieli mwana wa Zuwara
Numbers1:9 	Eliabu mwana wa Heloni
Numbers1:10 	Mwa ana a Yosefe: kuchokera ku fuko la Efereimu
Numbers1:11 	Abidani mwana wa Gideoni
Numbers1:12 	Ahiyezeri mwana wa Amisadai
Numbers1:13 	Pagieli mwana wa Okirani
Numbers1:14 	Eliyasafu mwana wa Deuweli
Numbers1:15 Ahira mwana wa Enani
Numbers1:16 Amenewa ndi anthu amene anasankhidwa kuchokera mʼmagulu mwawo
Numbers1:17 Mose ndi Aaroni anatenga anthu amene mayina awo anaperekedwa
Numbers1:18 ndipo pa tsiku loyamba la mwezi wachiwiri
Numbers1:19 monga momwe Yehova analamulira Mose. Motero iyeyo anawawerenga mʼchipululu cha Sinai:
Numbers1:20 	Kuchokera mwa ana a Rubeni
Numbers1:21 	Chiwerengero cha anthu ochokera mʼfuko la Rubeni chinali 46
Numbers1:22 	Kuchokera mwa zidzukulu za Simeoni: Amuna onse a zaka makumi awiri kapena kupitirirapo
Numbers1:23 	Chiwerengero cha anthu ochokera mʼfuko la Simeoni chinali 59
Numbers1:24 	Kuchokera mwa zidzukulu za Gadi: Amuna onse a zaka makumi awiri kapena kupitirirapo
Numbers1:25 	Chiwerengero cha anthu ochokera mʼfuko la Gadi chinali 45
Numbers1:26 	Kuchokera mwa zidzukulu za Yuda: Amuna onse a zaka makumi awiri kapena kupitirirapo
Numbers1:27 	Chiwerengero cha anthu ochokera mʼfuko la Yuda chinali 74
Numbers1:28 	Kuchokera mwa zidzukulu za Isakara: Amuna onse a zaka makumi awiri kapena kupitirirapo
Numbers1:29 	Chiwerengero cha anthu ochokera mʼfuko la Isakara chinali 54
Numbers1:30 	Kuchokera mwa zidzukulu za Zebuloni: Amuna onse a zaka makumi awiri kapena kupitirirapo
Numbers1:31 	Chiwerengero cha anthu ochokera mʼfuko la Zebuloni chinali 57
Numbers1:32 	Kuchokera mwa ana aamuna a Yosefe: Kuchokera mwa zidzukulu za Efereimu: Amuna onse a zaka makumi awiri kapena kupitirirapo
Numbers1:33 	Chiwerengero cha anthu ochokera mʼfuko la Efereimu chinali 40
Numbers1:34 	Kuchokera mwa zidzukulu za Manase: Amuna onse a zaka makumi awiri kapena kupitirirapo
Numbers1:35 	Chiwerengero cha anthu ochokera mʼfuko la Manase chinali 32
Numbers1:36 	Kuchokera mwa zidzukulu za Benjamini: Amuna onse a zaka makumi awiri kapena kupitirirapo
Numbers1:37 	Chiwerengero cha anthu ochokera mʼfuko la Benjamini chinali 35
Numbers1:38 	Kuchokera mwa zidzukulu za Dani: Amuna onse a zaka makumi awiri kapena kupitirirapo
Numbers1:39 	Chiwerengero cha anthu ochokera mʼfuko la Dani chinali 62
Numbers1:40 	Kuchokera mwa zidzukulu za Aseri: Amuna onse a zaka makumi awiri kapena kupitirirapo
Numbers1:41 	Chiwerengero cha anthu ochokera mʼfuko la Aseri chinali 41
Numbers1:42 	Kuchokera mwa zidzukulu za Nafutali: Aamuna onse a zaka makumi awiri kapena kupitirirapo
Numbers1:43 Chiwerengero cha anthu ochokera mʼfuko la Nafutali chinali 53
Numbers1:44 Amenewa ndiwo anthu amene Mose ndi Aaroni anawawerenga mothandizidwa ndi atsogoleri khumi ndi awiri a Israeli
Numbers1:45 Aisraeli onse a zaka makumi awiri kapena kupitirirapo
Numbers1:46 Chiwerengero cha anthu onse pamodzi chinali 603
Numbers1:47 Koma mabanja a fuko la Levi okha sanawawerenge pamodzi ndi ena.
Numbers1:48 Pakuti Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers1:49 “Usawerenge fuko la Levi kapena kuliphatikiza mʼkawundula wa Aisraeli.
Numbers1:50 Koma uyike Aleviwo kuti aziyangʼanira tenti yanga yopatulika
Numbers1:51 Pamene akusamutsa tentiyo
Numbers1:52 Aisraeli azimanga matenti awo mʼmagulumagulu
Numbers1:53 Alevi nawonso
Numbers1:54 Choncho Aisraeli anachita monga Yehova analamulira Mose.
Numbers2:1 Yehova anati kwa Mose ndi Aaroni:
Numbers2:2 “Aisraeli azimanga misasa yawo mozungulira tenti ya msonkhano motalikira pangʼono. Munthu aliyense amange pamene pali mbendera ya fuko lake.”
Numbers2:3 Kummawa
Numbers2:4 Chiwerengero cha gulu lake lankhondo ndi 74
Numbers2:5 Fuko la Isakara lidzamanga pafupi ndi Yuda. Mtsogoleri wa gulu la Isakara ndi Netanieli mwana wa Zuwara.
Numbers2:6 Chiwerengero cha gulu lake lankhondo ndi 54
Numbers2:7 Lotsatira lidzakhala fuko la Zebuloni. Mtsogoleri wa gulu la Zebuloni ndi Eliabu mwana wa Heloni.
Numbers2:8 Chiwerengero cha gulu lake lankhondo ndi 57
Numbers2:9 Anthu onse aamuna mʼmisasa ya Yuda
Numbers2:10 Kummwera kudzakhala magulu a msasa wa Rubeni pamene pali mbendera yawo. Mtsogoleri wa gulu la Rubeni ndi Elizuri mwana wa Sedeuri.
Numbers2:11 Chiwerengero cha gulu lake lankhondo ndi 46
Numbers2:12 Fuko la Simeoni lidzamanga pafupi ndi Rubeni. Mtsogoleri wa gulu la Simeoni ndi Selumieli mwana wa Zurisadai.
Numbers2:13 Chiwerengero cha gulu lake lankhondo ndi 59
Numbers2:14 Lotsatira lidzakhala fuko la Gadi. Mtsogoleri wa gulu la Gadi ndi Eliyasafu mwana wa Deuweli.
Numbers2:15 Chiwerengero cha gulu lake lankhondo ndi 45
Numbers2:16 Anthu onse aamuna mu msasa wa Rubeni
Numbers2:17 Tsono tenti ya msonkhano ndi msasa wa Alevi zidzakhala pakati pa misasayo. Iwo adzasamuka monga momwe anamangira misasa yawo
Numbers2:18 Kumadzulo kudzakhala magulu a msasa wa Efereimu pamene pali mbendera yawo. Mtsogoleri wa Aefereimuwo ndi Elisama mwana wa Amihudi.
Numbers2:19 Chiwerengero cha gulu lake lankhondo ndi 40
Numbers2:20 Fuko la Manase lidzakhala pafupi ndi Efereimu. Mtsogoleri wa Amanase ndi Gamalieli mwana wa Pedazuri.
Numbers2:21 Chiwerengero cha gulu lake lankhondo ndi 32
Numbers2:22 Lotsatira lidzakhala fuko la Benjamini. Mtsogoleri wa Abenjamini ndi Abidani mwana wa Gideoni.
Numbers2:23 Chiwerengero cha gulu lake lankhondo ndi 35
Numbers2:24 Anthu onse aamuna mu msasa wa Efereimu
Numbers2:25 Kumpoto kudzakhala msasa wa magulu a Dani pamene pali mbendera yawo. Mtsogoleri wa Adani ndi Ahiyezeri mwana wa Amisadai.
Numbers2:26 Chiwerengero cha gulu lake lankhondo ndi 62
Numbers2:27 Fuko la Aseri lidzamanga pafupi ndi iwowo. Mtsogoleri wa Aaseri ndi Pagieli mwana wa Okirani.
Numbers2:28 Chiwerengero cha gulu lake lankhondo ndi 41
Numbers2:29 Lotsatira lidzakhala fuko la Nafutali. Mtsogoleri wa Anafutali ndi Ahira mwana wa Enani.
Numbers2:30 Chiwerengero cha gulu lake lankhondo ndi 53
Numbers2:31 Anthu onse aamuna mu msasa wa Dani chiwerengero chawo ndi 157
Numbers2:32 Amenewa ndi Aisraeli monga mwa mabanja a makolo awo. Chiwerengero cha Aisraeli onse mʼmisasa chinali 603
Numbers2:33 Koma Alevi sanawawerenge pamodzi ndi Aisraeli enawo monga momwe Yehova analamulira Mose.
Numbers2:34 Choncho Aisraeli anachita zonse zomwe Yehova analamulira Mose. Umo ndi momwe amamangira misasa yawo pamene panali mbendera zawo
Numbers3:1 Iyi ndi mbiri ya banja la Aaroni ndi Mose pa nthawi yomwe Yehova anayankhula ndi Mose pa phiri la Sinai.
Numbers3:2 Mayina a ana aamuna a Aaroni anali Nadabu
Numbers3:3 Amenewa ndi mayina a ana aamuna a Aaroni
Numbers3:4 Koma Nadabu ndi Abihu
Numbers3:5 Yehova anati kwa Mose
Numbers3:6 “Bweretsa fuko la Levi ndipo ulipereke kwa Aaroni wansembe kuti lizimutumikira.
Numbers3:7 Azigwira ntchito yothandiza iyeyo ndi gulu lonse ku tenti ya msonkhano pogwira ntchito ya ku Chihema.
Numbers3:8 Azisamalira zipangizo zonse za mu tenti ya msonkhano
Numbers3:9 Pereka Alevi kwa Aaroni ndi kwa ana ake aamuna. Amenewa ndiwo Aisraeli amene aperekedwa kwa iye kwathunthu.
Numbers3:10 Usankhe Aaroni ndi ana ake aamuna kuti azitumikira pa ntchito ya unsembe. Koma wina aliyense woyandikira malo opatulika aphedwe.”
Numbers3:11 Yehova anawuzanso Mose kuti
Numbers3:12 “Pakati pa Aisraeli onse ndatenga Alevi kulowa mʼmalo mwa mwana wamwamuna aliyense woyamba kubadwa kwa amayi a Chiisraeli. Alevi ndi anga
Numbers3:13 pakuti ana onse oyamba kubadwa ndi anga. Nditakantha ana onse oyamba kubadwa mu Igupto
Numbers3:14 Yehova anawuza Mose mʼchipululu cha Sinai kuti
Numbers3:15 “Werenga Alevi monga mwa mabanja awo ndi mafuko awo. Werenga mwamuna aliyense kuyambira wa mwezi umodzi kapena kupitirirapo.”
Numbers3:16 Choncho Mose anawawerenga potsatira zomwe Yehova anamulamulira.
Numbers3:17 	Mayina a ana aamuna a Levi ndi awa: Geresoni
Numbers3:18 	Mayina a ana a Geresoni potsata mabanja awo ndi awa: Libini ndi Simei.
Numbers3:19 	Ana a Kohati potsata mabanja awo ndi awa: Amramu
Numbers3:20 	Ana a Merari potsata mabanja awo ndi awa: Mali ndi Musi. Amenewa ndiwo anali mabanja a Alevi monga mwa makolo awo.
Numbers3:21 Kwa Geresoni kunali banja la Alibini
Numbers3:22 Chiwerengero cha amuna onse amene anawawerenga a mwezi umodzi kapena kupitirirapo chinali 7
Numbers3:23 Mabanja a Ageresoni azimanga misasa yawo kumadzulo
Numbers3:24 Mtsogoleri wa mabanja a Ageresoni anali Eliyasafu mwana wa Laeli.
Numbers3:25 Ntchito imene Ageresoni anapatsidwa ku tenti ya msonkhano inali yosamalira Chihema ndi tenti
Numbers3:26 ndi makatani wotchinga bwalo
Numbers3:27 Kwa Kohati kunali mabanja a Amramu
Numbers3:28 Chiwerengero cha amuna onse a mwezi umodzi kapena kupitirirapo chinali 8
Numbers3:29 Mabanja a ana a Kohati ankamanga misasa yawo kummwera kwa Chihema.
Numbers3:30 Mtsogoleri wa magulu a mabanja a Kohati anali Elizafani mwana wa Uzieli.
