Numbers3:31 Iwo ankagwira ntchito yosamalira Bokosi la Chipangano
Numbers3:32 Mtsogoleri wamkulu wa Alevi anali Eliezara mwana wa Aaroni wansembe. Iye anasankhidwa kukhala woyangʼanira omwe ankasamalira malo wopatulika.
Numbers3:33 Kwa Merari kunali banja la Mali ndi banja la Musi. Amenewa ndiye anali mabanja a Amerari.
Numbers3:34 Chiwerengero cha amuna onse kuyambira a mwezi umodzi kapena kupitirirapo chinali 6
Numbers3:35 Mtsogoleri wa magulu a mabanja a Amerari anali Zuriyeli mwana wa Abihaili. Iwo ankamanga misasa yawo kumpoto kwa Chihema.
Numbers3:36 Amerari anapatsidwa ntchito yosamalira mitengo ya chihema
Numbers3:37 pamodzi ndi mizati yozungulira bwalo ndi matsinde ake
Numbers3:38 Mose ndi Aaroni ndi ana ake aamuna ankamanga misasa yawo kummawa kwa chihema
Numbers3:39 Alevi onse amene Mose ndi Aaroni anawawerenga potsatira lamulo la Yehova monga mwa magulu a mabanja awo
Numbers3:40 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers3:41 Unditengere Alevi onse mʼmalo mwa ana oyamba kubadwa onse a Aisraeli
Numbers3:42 Choncho Mose anawerenga ana aamuna onse oyamba kubadwa a Aisraeli monga momwe Yehova anamulamulira.
Numbers3:43 Chiwerengero chonse cha ana aamuna oyamba kubadwa kuyambira a mwezi umodzi kapena kupitirirapo chinali 22
Numbers3:44 Ndipo Yehova anawuzanso Mose kuti
Numbers3:45 “Tenga Alevi mʼmalo mwa ana aamuna oyamba kubadwa onse a Aisraeli
Numbers3:46 Pofuna kuwombola ana aamuna 273 oyamba kubadwa a Aisraeli amene anaposa chiwerengero cha aamuna a fuko la Levi
Numbers3:47 utenge masekeli asanu pa munthu aliyense. Masekeliwo akhale ofanana ndi masekeli a ku malo wopatulika
Numbers3:48 Ndalama zimenezi uzipereke kwa Aaroni ndi ana ake aamuna kuti ukhale mtengo woombolera Aisraeli woonjezerawo.”
Numbers3:49 Choncho Mose anatenga ndalama zowombolera zija kuchokera kwa Aisraeli amene chiwerengero chawo chinaposa chiwerengero cha omwe anawomboledwa ndi Alevi.
Numbers3:50 Anatenga masekeli a siliva okwana 1
Numbers3:51 Mose anapereka ndalama zowombolera zija kwa Aaroni ndi ana ake aamuna monga mwa mawu amene Yehova analamulira.
Numbers4:1 Yehova anati kwa Mose ndi Aaroni:
Numbers4:2 “Werengani Akohati omwe ndi gawo limodzi la Alevi monga mwa mafuko awo ndi mabanja awo.
Numbers4:3 Werengani amuna onse amene ali ndi zaka makumi atatu mpaka zaka makumi asanu amene amabwera kudzagwira ntchito mu tenti ya msonkhano.
Numbers4:4 “Ntchito ya Akohati mu tenti ya msonkhano ndi iyi: kusamalira zinthu zopatulika kwambiri.
Numbers4:5 Pamene anthu akusamuka pa msasa
Numbers4:6 Ndipo azikuta bokosilo ndi zikopa za akatumbu ndi kuyala pamwamba pake nsalu ya mtundu wa thambo ndi kuyika mitengo yonyamulira mʼmalo mwake.
Numbers4:7 “Pa tebulo pamene pamakhala buledi wa ansembe aziyalapo nsalu ya mtundu wa thambo
Numbers4:8 Tsono pamwamba pa izi aziyalapo nsalu yofiira
Numbers4:9 “Azitenga nsalu ya mtundu wa thambo ndi kukutira choyikapo nyale
Numbers4:10 Kenaka achikulunge pamodzi ndi zipangizo zake zonse mʼzikopa za akatumbu ndi kuchiyika pa chonyamulira chake.
Numbers4:11 “Pamwamba pa guwa la golide aziyalapo nsalu ya mtundu wa thambo ndi kukutira ndi zikopa za akatumbu ndi kuyika mʼmalo mwake mitengo yonyamulira.
Numbers4:12 “Azitenga zipangizo zonse zogwiritsira ntchito ku malo wopatulika
Numbers4:13 “Azichotsa phulusa la pa guwa lansembe lamkuwa ndi kuyalapo nsalu yapepo pamwamba pake.
Numbers4:14 Kenaka aziyikapo zipangizo zonse zogwiritsira ntchito potumikira pa guwa
Numbers4:15 “Aaroni ndi ana ake aamuna akamaliza kukutira ziwiya za ku malo wopatulika ndi zipangizo zopatulika zonse
Numbers4:16 “Eliezara mwana wa Aaroni
Numbers4:17 Yehova anawuzanso Mose ndi Aaroni kuti
Numbers4:18 “Onetsetsani kuti mabanja a fuko la Kohati asachotsedwe kwa Alevi.
Numbers4:19 Koma muziwachitira izi kuti asafe
Numbers4:20 Koma Akohati asalowe kukaona zinthu zopatulika
Numbers4:21 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers4:22 “Werenganso Ageresoni monga mwa mabanja ndi mafuko awo.
Numbers4:23 Uwerenge amuna onse a zaka makumi atatu mpaka a zaka makumi asanu zakubadwa amene amabwera kudzatumikira ku tenti ya msonkhano.
Numbers4:24 “Ntchito ya mafuko a Ageresoni pamene akugwira ntchito ndi kunyamula katundu ndi iyi:
Numbers4:25 Azinyamula makatani a ku chihema
Numbers4:26 makatani wotchingira bwalo lozungulira chihema ndi guwa
Numbers4:27 Ntchito yawo yonse
Numbers4:28 Iyi ndiye ntchito ya fuko la Ageresoni ku tenti ya msonkhano. Ntchito zawo zichitike motsogozedwa ndi Itamara mwana wa wansembe Aaroni.
Numbers4:29 “Werenga Amerari monga mwa mafuko awo ndi mabanja awo.
Numbers4:30 Werenga amuna onse a zaka makumi atatu mpaka zaka makumi asanu zakubadwa amene akatumikire mu tenti ya msonkhano.
Numbers4:31 Ntchito yawo pamene azikatumikira mu tenti ya msonkhano ndi iyi: kunyamula matabwa a chihema
Numbers4:32 ndiponso mizati yozungulira bwalo ndi matsinde ake
Numbers4:33 Iyi ndiyo ntchito ya mafuko a Amerari pamene akugwira ntchito ku tenti ya msonkhano motsogozedwa ndi Itamara mwana wa wansembe Aaroni.”
Numbers4:34 Mose
Numbers4:35 Aamuna onse a zaka makumi atatu mpaka makumi asanu amene anabwera kudzagwira ntchito ku tenti ya msonkhano
Numbers4:36 atawawerenga mwa mafuko awo
Numbers4:37 Ichi chinali chiwerengero cha mafuko a Akohati onse omwe ankatumikira mu tenti ya msonkhano. Mose ndi Aaroni anawawerenga monga mwa lamulo la Yehova.
Numbers4:38 Ageresoni anawerengedwanso monga mwa mafuko ndi mabanja awo.
Numbers4:39 Amuna onse a zaka makumi atatu mpaka makumi asanu amene anabwera kudzagwira ntchito ku tenti ya msonkhano
Numbers4:40 atawawerenga mwa mafuko ndi mabanja awo
Numbers4:41 Ichi chinali chiwerengero cha Ageresoni mwa mabanja awo amene ankatumikira ku tenti ya msonkhano. Mose ndi Aaroni anawawerenga monga mwa lamulo la Yehova.
Numbers4:42 Amerari anawawerenga monga mwa mafuko ndi mabanja awo.
Numbers4:43 Amuna onse kuyambira zaka makumi atatu mpaka makumi asanu amene anabwera kudzatumikira ntchito mu tenti ya msonkhano
Numbers4:44 atawawerenga mwa mafuko ndi mabanja awo
Numbers4:45 Ichi ndicho chinali chiwerengero cha mabanja a Amerari. Mose ndi Aaroni anawawerenga monga momwe Yehova anawalamulira kudzera mwa Mose.
Numbers4:46 Kotero Mose
Numbers4:47 Aamuna onse a zaka makumi atatu mpaka zaka makumi asanu omwe anabwera kudzagwira ntchito yonyamula zinthu ku tenti ya msonkhano
Numbers4:48 analipo 8
Numbers4:49 Aliyense anamupatsa ntchito ndi kumuwuza choti anyamule monga mwa lamulo la Yehova kudzera mwa Mose. Anawawerenga chomwechi potsata zimene Yehova analamula Mose.
Numbers5:1 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers5:2 “Lamula Aisraeli kuti achotse mu msasa aliyense amene ali ndi matenda opatsirana a pa khungu kapena matenda otuluka madzi mʼthupi a mtundu uliwonse
Numbers5:3 Muchotse amuna komanso amayi ndipo muwatulutsire kunja kwa msasa kuti asadetse msasa wawo kumene Ine ndimakhala pakati pawo.”
Numbers5:4 Aisraeli anachitadi zimenezi. Anawatulutsira kunja kwa msasa monga momwe Yehova analamulira Mose.
Numbers5:5 Yehova anati kwa Mose
Numbers5:6 “Uza Aisraeli kuti
Numbers5:7 ayenera kuwulula tchimo limene anachitalo. Ayenera kubweza zonse zimene anawononga
Numbers5:8 Ngati wolakwiridwayo alibe mʼbale komwe kungapite zinthu zobwezedwazo
Numbers5:9 Zopereka zonse zopatulika zomwe Aisraeli abwera nazo kwa wansembe zikhale za wansembeyo.
Numbers5:10 Mphatso zilizonse zopatulika ndi za munthuyo
Numbers5:11 Kenaka Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers5:12 “Yankhula ndi Aisraeli ndipo uwawuze kuti
Numbers5:13 nakagonana ndi mwamuna wina koma mwamuna wake wosadziwa
Numbers5:14 mwamuna wake ndi kuyamba kuchita nsanje ndi kukayikira mkazi wakeyo kuti ndi wodetsedwa
Numbers5:15 apite naye mkaziyo kwa wansembe. Ndipo popita atengenso gawo lakhumi la chopereka chaufa wa barele wokwana kilogalamu imodzi mʼmalo mwa mkaziyo. Asathire mafuta pa nsembeyo kapena lubani
Numbers5:16 “ ‘Wansembe abwere naye mkaziyo ndi kumuyimitsa pamaso pa Yehova.
Numbers5:17 Ndipo wansembeyo atenge madzi oyera mʼmbiya ya dothi ndi kuyika mʼmadzimo fumbi lapansi la mʼTenti ya Msonkhano.
Numbers5:18 Wansembe atayimika mkaziyo pamaso pa Yehova
Numbers5:19 Kenaka wansembeyo alumbiritse mkaziyo ndi kuti
Numbers5:20 Koma ngati wayenda njira yoyipa uli pa ukwati ndi mwamuna wako ndi kudzidetsa pogonana ndi mwamuna amene si mwamuna wako
Numbers5:21 pamenepo wansembe alumbiritse mkaziyo ndi mawu a matemberero ndi kumuwuza kuti
Numbers5:22 Madzi awa obweretsa temberero alowe mʼthupi mwako ndi kutupitsa mimba yako ndi kuwononga ntchafu yako.’ ” “Pamenepo mkaziyo anene kuti
Numbers5:23 “ ‘Wansembe alembe matemberero amenewa mʼbuku ndi kuwanyika mʼmadzi owawa aja.
Numbers5:24 Amwetse mkaziyo madzi owawawo omwe amabweretsa temberero
Numbers5:25 Wansembe achotse mʼmanja mwa mkaziyo nsembe yachakudya ya nsanje ija
Numbers5:26 Tsono wansembeyo atapeko ufa dzanja limodzi kuti ukhale wachikumbutso ndi kuwutentha pa guwa lansembe. Atatha izi
Numbers5:27 Ndipo ngati mkaziyo anadzidetsadi ndi kukhala wosakhulupirika kwa mwamuna wake
Numbers5:28 Koma ngati mkaziyo sanadzidetse ndi kuti alibe tchimo
Numbers5:29 “ ‘Limeneli ndiye lamulo la nsanje pamene mkazi wayenda njira yoyipa ndi kudzidetsa ali pa ukwati ndi mwamuna wake
Numbers5:30 kapena pamene maganizo a nsanje abwera kwa mwamuna wake chifukwa chokayikira mkazi wakeyo. Wansembe azitenga mkazi wotere ndi kumuyimiritsa pamaso pa Yehova ndipo agwiritse ntchito lamulo lonseli kwa mkaziyo.
Numbers5:31 Mwamunayo adzakhala wopanda tchimo lililonse
Numbers6:1 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers6:2 “Yankhula ndi Aisraeli ndipo uwawuze kuti
Numbers6:3 sayenera kumwa vinyo kapena zakumwa zosasa ndipo asamamwe chakumwa chilichonse cha mphesa. Asamamwe madzi a mphesa kapena kudya mphesa zaziwisi kapena zowuma.
Numbers6:4 Pa nthawi yonse imene ali Mnaziri
Numbers6:5 “ ‘Pa nthawi yonse ya lonjezo lodzipatula yekhalo
Numbers6:6 Pa nthawi yonse imene munthuyo wadzipatula yekha kwa Yehova asayandikire mtembo.
Numbers6:7 Ngakhale abambo ake kapena amayi ake kapena mchimwene wake kaya mchemwali wake atamwalira
Numbers6:8 Munthuyo ndi wopatulika masiku onse odzipereka kwake kwa Yehova.
Numbers6:9 “Ngati munthu wina afa mwadzidzidzi pafupi naye ndi kudetsa tsitsi lake loperekedwalo
Numbers6:10 Tsono pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu abweretse nkhunda ziwiri kapena mawunda awiri anjiwa kwa wansembe pa khomo lolowera ku tenti ya msonkhano.
Numbers6:11 Wansembe apereke imodzi kuti ikhale nsembe yauchimo ndi ina nsembe yopsereza yotetezera tchimo chifukwa anachimwa popezeka pafupi ndi mtembo. Ndipo tsiku lomwelo apatulenso tsitsi la pamutu pake.
Numbers6:12 Adzipereke kwa Yehova pa nthawi yodzipatula ndipo abweretse nkhosa yayimuna ya chaka chimodzi ngati nsembe yopepesera. Masiku akale sawerengedwanso chifukwa anadzidetsa pa nthawi yodzipatulira kwake.
Numbers6:13 “Tsono ili ndi lamulo la Mnaziri pamene nthawi yodzipatula kwake yatha: Abwere naye pa khomo la tenti ya msonkhano.
Numbers6:14 Pamenepo apereke chopereka chake kwa Yehova: Nkhosa yayimuna ya chaka chimodzi yopanda chilema kuti ikhale nsembe yopsereza
Numbers6:15 ndipo abwere pamodzi ndi nsembe yachakudya ndi nsembe yachakumwa ndi dengu la buledi wopanda yisiti
Numbers6:16 “Wansembe apereke zimenezi pamaso pa Yehova ndi kuchita nsembe ya uchimo ndi nsembe yopsereza.
Numbers6:17 Apereke dengu la buledi wopanda yisiti ndiponso nsembe yachiyanjano kwa Yehova ya nkhosa yayimuna
Numbers6:18 “Mnaziriyo amete tsitsi limene analipereka lija pa khomo la tenti ya msonkhano. Atenge tsitsilo ndi kuliyika pa moto umene uli pansi pa nsembe yachiyanjano.
Numbers6:19 “Mnaziriyo atatha kumeta tsitsi analiperekalo
Numbers6:20 Wansembe aziweyule pamaso pa Yehova ngati nsembe yoweyula. Zimenezi ndi zopatulika ndipo ndi za wansembe pamodzi ndi chidale chimene anachiweyula ndi ntchafu yomwe anayipereka ija. Zitatha izi
Numbers6:21 “Ili ndi lamulo la Mnaziri yemwe walonjeza kudzipereka kwa Yehova podzipatula yekha kuphatikiza pa zomwe angathe kukwaniritsa. Ayenera kukwaniritsa lonjezo lomwe wachitalo potsata lamulo la Mnaziri.”
Numbers6:22 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers6:23 “Uza Aaroni ndi ana ake aamuna kuti
Numbers6:24 “ ‘Yehova akudalitse ndi kukusunga;
Numbers6:25 Yehova awalitse nkhope yake pa iwe
Numbers6:26 Yehova akweze nkhope yake pa iwe
Numbers6:27 Choncho akadzatchula dzina langa podalitsa Aisraeli
Numbers7:1 Mose atamaliza kuyimika chihema chija
Numbers7:2 Kenaka atsogoleri a Aisraeli
Numbers7:3 Anabweretsa zopereka zawo pamaso pa Yehova: ngolo zophimbidwa zisanu ndi imodzi ndiponso ngʼombe zothena khumi ndi ziwiri. Mtsogoleri mmodzi ngʼombe yothena imodzi ndipo atsogoleri awiri ngolo imodzi. Izi anazipereka ku chihema.
Numbers7:4 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers7:5 “Ulandire zimenezi kwa iwo kuti zigwire ntchito ku tenti ya msonkhano. Uzipereke kwa Alevi
Numbers7:6 Choncho Mose anatenga ngolo ndi ngʼombe zothenazo nazipereka kwa Alevi.
Numbers7:7 Anapereka ngolo ziwiri ndi ngʼombe zothena zinayi kwa Ageresoni monga mwantchito yawo
Numbers7:8 ndiponso anapereka ngolo zinayi ndi ngʼombe zothena zisanu ndi zitatu kwa Amerari molingananso ndi ntchito yawo. Onsewa ankawayangʼanira anali Itamara mwana wa Aaroni wansembe.
Numbers7:9 Koma Mose sanapereke zimenezi kwa Akohati chifukwa zinthu zawo zopatulika zomwe ankayangʼanira zinali zoti azinyamula pa mapewa awo.
Numbers7:10 Guwa la nsembe litadzozedwa
Numbers7:11 Pakuti Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers7:12 Amene anabweretsa chopereka chake tsiku loyamba anali Naasoni mwana wa Aminadabu wa fuko la Yuda.
Numbers7:13 Chopereka chake chinali mbale imodzi yasiliva yolemera kilogalamu imodzi
Numbers7:14 mbale imodzi yagolide yolemera magalamu 110
Numbers7:15 mwana wangʼombe wamwamuna mmodzi
Numbers7:16 mbuzi yayimuna imodzi
Numbers7:17 ndi ngʼombe zothena ziwiri
Numbers7:18 Pa tsiku lachiwiri
Numbers7:19 Chopereka chomwe anabwera nacho chinali mbale imodzi yasiliva yolemera kilogalamu imodzi
Numbers7:20 Mbale imodzi yagolide yolemera magalamu 110 yodzaza ndi lubani;
Numbers7:21 mwana wangʼombe wamwamuna mmodzi
Numbers7:22 mbuzi yayimuna imodzi ya nsembe yotetezera machimo;
Numbers7:23 ndi ngʼombe ziwiri
Numbers7:24 Pa tsiku lachitatu
Numbers7:25 Chopereka chake chinali mbale imodzi yasiliva yolemera kilogalamu imodzi ndi theka
Numbers7:26 mbale imodzi yagolide yolemera magalamu 110
Numbers7:27 mwana wangʼombe wamwamuna mmodzi
Numbers7:28 mbuzi imodzi ya nsembe yopepesera machimo;
Numbers7:29 ndi ngʼombe ziwiri
Numbers7:30 Tsiku lachinayi linali la Elizuri mwana wa Sedeuri
Numbers7:31 Chopereka chake chinali mbale imodzi yasiliva yolemera kilogalamu imodzi ndi theka
Numbers7:32 Mbale imodzi yagolide yolemera magalamu 110
Numbers7:33 mwana wangʼombe wamwamuna mmodzi
Numbers7:34 mbuzi imodzi ya nsembe yopepesera machimo;
Numbers7:35 ndi ngʼombe zazimuna ziwiri
Numbers7:36 Pa tsiku lachisanu Selumieli mwana wa Zurisadai
Numbers7:37 Chopereka chake chinali mbale yasiliva yolemera kilogalamu imodzi ndi theka ndi beseni limodzi lowazira lasiliva lolemera magalamu 800
Numbers7:38 mbale yagolide imodzi yolemera 110

Numbers7:47 ngʼombe zazimuna ziwiri
Numbers7:48 Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri Elisama mwana wa Amihudi

Numbers7:61 Chopereka chakecho chinali mbale imodzi yasiliva yolemera kilogalamu imodzi ndi theka ndi beseni limodzi lowazira lolemera magalamu 800

Numbers7:66 Pa tsiku lakhumi Ahiyezeri mwana wa Amisadai

Numbers7:77 ngʼombe ziwiri zazimuna
Numbers7:78 Pa tsiku la khumi ndi chimodzi Ahira mwana wa Enani
Numbers7:79 Chopereka chakecho chinali mbale imodzi yasiliva yolemera kilogalamu imodzi ndi theka
Numbers7:80 mbale imodzi yagolide yolemera magalamu 110
Numbers7:81 mwana wangʼombe wamwamuna mmodzi
Numbers7:82 mbuzi yayimuna imodzi ya nsembe yopepesera machimo;
Numbers7:83 ngʼombe zazimuna ziwiri
Numbers7:84 Zopereka za atsogoleri a Israeli zopatulira guwa lansembe pamene linadzozedwa zinali izi: mbale khumi ndi ziwiri zasiliva
Numbers7:85 Mbale iliyonse yasiliva inkalemera kilogalamu imodzi ndi theka
Numbers7:86 Mbale khumi ndi ziwiri zagolide zodzaza ndi lubanizo zinkalemera magalamu 110 iliyonse
Numbers7:87 Chiwerengero cha nyama zonse za nsembe yopsereza chinali motere: ngʼombe zazimuna khumi ndi ziwiri
Numbers7:88 Chiwerengero cha nyama zonse za nsembe yachiyanjano chinali motere: ngʼombe zothena 24
Numbers7:89 Mose atalowa mu tenti ya msonkhano kukayankhula ndi Yehova
Numbers8:1 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers8:2 “Yankhula ndi Aaroni kuti pamene uyimika nyale zisanu ndi ziwiri
Numbers8:3 Aaroni anachitadi zomwezo. Anayimika nyale ndi kuziyangʼanitsa kumene kunali choyikapo nyale monga Yehova analamulira Mose.
Numbers8:4 Choyikapo nyalecho chinapangidwa motere: chinasulidwa kuchokera ku golide
Numbers8:5 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers8:6 “Tenga Alevi pakati pa Aisraeli ndipo uwayeretse.
Numbers8:7 Powayeretsa uchite izi: uwawaze madzi oyeretsa ndipo amete thupi lawo lonse ndi kuchapa zovala zawo kuti adziyeretse.
Numbers8:8 Atenge ngʼombe yayimuna yayingʼono ndi chopereka cha chakudya cha ufa wosalala wosakaniza ndi mafuta. Atengenso ngʼombe ina yayimuna
Numbers8:9 Ubwere nawo Aleviwo kutsogolo kwa tenti ya msonkhano ndipo usonkhanitse gulu la Aisraeli.
Numbers8:10 Ubwere nawo pamaso pa Yehova
Numbers8:11 Aaroni apereke Alevi aja pamaso pa Yehova ngati chopereka choweyula kuchokera kwa Aisraeli kuti akhale okonzeka kugwira ntchito ya Yehova.
Numbers8:12 “Alevi akatsiriza kusanjika manja awo pa mitu ya ngʼombe zazimuna
Numbers8:13 Uyimiritse Aleviwo pamaso pa Aaroni ndi ana ake aamuna ndipo uwapereke ngati nsembe yoweyula kwa Yehova.
Numbers8:14 Pochita zimenezi mudzapatula Alevi pakati pa Aisraeli ndipo Aleviwo adzakhala anga.
Numbers8:15 “Utatha kuyeretsa ndi kupereka Aleviwo monga nsembe yoweyula
Numbers8:16 Iwo ndiwo Aisraeli amene aperekedwa kwathunthu kwa Ine. Ndawatenga kuti akhale anga mʼmalo mwa mwana wamwamuna aliyense woyamba kubadwa wa Mwisraeli aliyense wamkazi.
Numbers8:17 Mwana aliyense wamwamuna woyamba kubadwa mu Israeli
Numbers8:18 Ndipo ndatenga Alevi mʼmalo mwa ana aamuna onse oyamba kubadwa mu Israeli.
Numbers8:19 Mwa Aisraeli onse
Numbers8:20 Mose
Numbers8:21 Alevi anadziyeretsa ndi kuchapa zovala zawo. Kenaka Aaroni anawapereka ngati nsembe yoweyula pamaso pa Yehova ndi kuchita nsembe yopepesera machimo yowayeretsa.
Numbers8:22 Zitatha zimenezi
Numbers8:23 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers8:24 “Ntchito za Alevi ndi izi: Amuna a zaka 24 kapena kuposera pamenepa ndiye azibwera kudzagwira ntchito ku tenti ya msonkhano.
Numbers8:25 Koma akakwana zaka makumi asanu
Numbers8:26 Atha kuthandiza abale awo kugwira ntchito za ku tenti ya msonkhano
Numbers9:1 Yehova anayankhula ndi Mose mʼchipululu cha Sinai pa mwezi woyamba wa chaka chachiwiri atatuluka mu Igupto
Numbers9:2 “Aisraeli azichita Paska pa nthawi yake yoyikika.
Numbers9:3 Muzichita Paska pa nthawi yake yoyikika
Numbers9:4 Choncho Mose anawuza Aisraeli kuti azichita Paska
Numbers9:5 ndipo anachitadi Paskayo mʼchipululu cha Sinai madzulo a tsiku la 14 la mwezi woyamba. Aisraeli anachita zonse monga momwe Yehova analamulira Mose.
Numbers9:6 Koma ena a iwo sanathe kuchita nawo Paska pa tsiku limenelo chifukwa anali odetsedwa chifukwa chokhudza mtembo. Choncho anabwera kwa Mose ndi Aaroni tsiku lomwelo
Numbers9:7 ndipo anawuza Moseyo kuti
Numbers9:8 Mose anawayankha kuti
Numbers9:9 Ndipo Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers9:10 “Uza Aisraeli kuti
Numbers9:11 Azichita chikondwererochi madzulo a pa tsiku la 14 la mwezi wachiwiri. Azidya mwana wankhosa wamwamuna pamodzi ndi buledi wopanda yisiti ndi ndiwo zowawa zamasamba.
Numbers9:12 Iwo asasiye nyama ina iliyonse mpaka mmawa. Asaswe mafupa aliwonse. Pamene akuchita chikondwerero cha Paska
Numbers9:13 Koma ngati munthu wina ali woyeretsedwa ndipo sali pa ulendo koma alephera kuchita Paska
Numbers9:14 “ ‘Mlendo amene akukhala pakati panu
Numbers9:15 Pa tsiku limene anayimika chihema
Numbers9:16 Zinkachitika motere mosalekeza: mtambo unkakhala pamwamba pa chihema
Numbers9:17 Nthawi ina iliyonse mtambo ukachoka pamwamba pa chihema
Numbers9:18 Aisraeli ankasamuka pamalopo Yehova akawalamula
Numbers9:19 Mtambowo ukakhala pa chihema nthawi yayitali
Numbers9:20 Nthawi zina mtambowo unkakhala pa chihemapo masiku owerengeka. Aisraeli ankamanga misasa molamulidwa ndi Yehova ndipo ankasamukanso molamulidwa ndi Iyeyo.
Numbers9:21 Nthawi zina mtambo unkakhala kuyambira madzulo mpaka mmawa ndipo unkachoka mmawa mwake
Numbers9:22 Ngakhale mtambo ukhale pa chihema masiku awiri kapena mwezi kapena chaka
Numbers9:23 Molamulidwa ndi Yehova ankamanga misasa yawo ndipo ankasamukanso Yehova akawalamula. Ankamvera lamulo la Yehova kudzera mwa Mose.
Numbers10:1 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers10:2 “Sula malipenga awiri a siliva
Numbers10:3 Pamene akuliza malipenga onse awiri
Numbers10:4 Akaliza limodzi lokha
Numbers10:5 Akaliza lipenga lochenjeza
Numbers10:6 Akaliza lipenga lochenjeza lachiwiri
Numbers10:7 Pofuna kusonkhanitsa anthu
Numbers10:8 “Ana a Aaroni
Numbers10:9 Pamene mukupita ku nkhondo mʼdziko lanu lomwe
Numbers10:10 Komanso pa nthawi yanu ya chisangalalo
Numbers10:11 Pa chaka chachiwiri
Numbers10:12 Ndipo Aisraeli ananyamuka kuchoka mʼchipululu cha Sinai ndipo anayenda malo osiyanasiyana mpaka pamene mtambo unayima mʼchipululu cha Parani.
Numbers10:13 Kameneka kanali koyamba kuti Aisraeli anyamuke monga momwe Yehova analamulira Mose.
Numbers10:14 Magulu a msasa wa Yuda ndiwo anayamba kunyamuka potsata mbendera yawo. Mtsogoleri wa gulu lawo anali Naasoni mwana wa Aminadabu.
Numbers10:15 Mtsogoleri wa gulu la fuko la Isakara anali Netanieli mwana wa Zuwara
Numbers10:16 Eliabu mwana wa Heloni ndiye anali mtsogoleri wa fuko la Zebuloni.
Numbers10:17 Kenaka anagwetsa chihema
Numbers10:18 Kenaka magulu a msasa wa fuko la Rubeni ananyamuka potsatira mbendera yawo. Mtsogoleri wawo anali Elizuri mwana wa Sedeuri.
Numbers10:19 Mtsogoleri wa fuko la Simeoni anali Selumieli mwana wa Zurisadai
Numbers10:20 ndipo Eliyasafu mwana wa Deuweli ndiye ankatsogolera fuko la Gadi.
Numbers10:21 Kenaka Akohati ananyamuka atanyamula zinthu zopatulika. Chihema chinkayenera kuyimikidwa iwo asanafike.
Numbers10:22 Magulu a msasa wa Aefereimu anatsatira potsatira mbendera yawo. Elisama mwana wa Amihudi ndiye anali mtsogoleri wawo.
Numbers10:23 Gamalieli mwana wa Pedazuri ndiye anali mtsogoleri wa fuko la Manase.
Numbers10:24 Abidani mwana wa Gideoni ndiye anali mtsogoleri wa mtundu wa Benjamini.
Numbers10:25 Pambuyo pa magulu onse panali magulu a msasa wa Dani
Numbers10:26 Pagieli mwana wa Okirani ndiye anali mtsogoleri wa fuko la Aseri
Numbers10:27 ndipo mtsogoleri wa mtundu wa Nafutali anali Ahira mwana wa Enani.
Numbers10:28 Umenewu ndiwo unali mndandanda wa kayendedwe ka magulu a Aisraeli pamene ankanyamuka ulendo wawo mʼmagulumagulu.
Numbers10:29 Ndipo Mose anawuza Hobabu mwana wa Reueli Mmidiyani
Numbers10:30 Hobabu anayankha kuti
Numbers10:31 Ndipo Mose anati
Numbers10:32 Iweyo ukapita nafe
Numbers10:33 Motero ananyamuka ku Phiri la Yehova nayenda ulendo wa masiku atatu. Bokosi la Chipangano cha Yehova linkayenda patsogolo pawo pa masiku atatuwo kuti apeze malo woti apumulepo.
Numbers10:34 Mtambo wa Yehova unkawaphimba masana pamene ankasamuka pa misasa yawo.
Numbers10:35 Nthawi iliyonse imene Bokosi la Chipangano likunyamuka
Numbers10:36 “Pamene likupumula
Numbers11:1 Anthu atadandaula kwa Yehova chifukwa cha mavuto awo
Numbers11:2 Anthuwo analira kwa Mose ndipo Moseyo atapemphera kwa Yehova
Numbers11:3 Motero malowo anawatcha Tabera
Numbers11:4 Anthu ena osokoneza amene anali pakati pa Aisraeli anayamba kukhumba chakudya cha ku Igupto ndipo Aisraeli nawonso anayamba kufuwula kwambiri nʼkumati
Numbers11:5 Tikukumbukira nsomba zaulere zimene tinkadya ku Igupto komanso nkhaka
Numbers11:6 Koma tsopano chilakolako chathu chatha. Sitikuona kanthu kena kakudya koma mana basi!”
Numbers11:7 Mana ankafanana ndi mbewu zamapira ndipo maonekedwe ake anali ngati ulimbo wowuma.
Numbers11:8 Anthu ankapita kukatola manawo
Numbers11:9 Mame akamagwa pa msasawo usiku ankagwera kumodzi ndi manawo.
Numbers11:10 Mose anamva anthu a banja lililonse akufuwula
Numbers11:11 Mose anafunsa Yehova kuti
Numbers11:12 Kodi Ndine amene ndinatenga pathupi pa anthu onsewa? Kodi ndinawabala ndine? Bwanji mukundiwuza kuti ndiwanyamule mʼmanja mwanga
Numbers11:13 Ndingayipeze kuti nyama yoti anthu onsewa adye? Iwowa akulirira ine kuti
Numbers11:14 Sindingathe kusamala anthu onsewa ndekha. Katundu ameneyu ndi wolemera kwambiri kwa ine.
Numbers11:15 Ngati umu ndi mmene muzichitira nane
Numbers11:16 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers11:17 Ndidzatsika ndi kuyankhula nawe kumeneko
Numbers11:18 “Uwawuze anthuwo kuti
Numbers11:19 Simudzadya tsiku limodzi lokha
Numbers11:20 koma mwezi wonse
Numbers11:21 Koma Mose anati
Numbers11:22 Kodi ngakhale titapha nkhosa ndi ngʼombe
Numbers11:23 Yehova anayankha Mose kuti
Numbers11:24 Choncho Mose anatuluka nakawuza anthu zomwe Yehova ananena. Anasonkhanitsa pamodzi akuluakulu makumi asanu ndi awiri aja ndi kuwayimiritsa mozungulira Chihema.
Numbers11:25 Ndipo Yehova anatsika mʼmitambo ndi kuyankhula naye ndipo anatengako mzimu womwe unali pa Mose ndi kuwuyika pa akuluakulu makumi asanu ndi awiri aja. Pamene mzimuwo unakhazikika pa akuluakuluwo
Numbers11:26 Koma anthu ena awiri omwe mayina awo anali Elidadi ndi Medadi
Numbers11:27 Mnyamata wina anathamanga kudzawuza Mose kuti
Numbers11:28 Yoswa mwana wa Nuni
Numbers11:29 Koma Mose anati
Numbers11:30 Mose ndi akuluakulu a Israeli aja anabwerera ku msasa.
Numbers11:31 Pamenepo Yehova anawutsa mphepo yochokera ku nyanja imene inabweretsa zinziri. Zinzirizo zinagwera pansi kuzungulira msasa
Numbers11:32 Tsiku limenelo masana onse mpaka usiku ndiponso tsiku lotsatiralo
Numbers11:33 Koma pamene anthuwo ankadya nyamayo
Numbers11:34 Nʼchifukwa chake malowo anawatcha Kibiroti Hatava chifukwa pamenepo anakwirirapo anthu osusuka aja.
Numbers11:35 Kuchoka pa Kibiroti Hatava anthuwo anayenda kupita ku Heziroti ndipo anakhala kumeneko kwa kanthawi.

Numbers12:2 Iwowo anafunsa kuti
Numbers12:3 (Koma Mose anali munthu wodzichepetsa kwambiri kuposa munthu aliyense pa dziko lapansi).

Numbers12:5 Tsono Yehova anatsika mu mtambo
Numbers12:6 Mulungu anati

Numbers13:1 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers13:2 “Tuma anthu kuti akazonde dziko la Kanaani limene ndikupereka kwa Aisraeli. Kuchokera pa fuko lililonse utume munthu mmodzi amene ndi mtsogoleri wawo.”
Numbers13:3 Monga mwa mawu a Yehova
Numbers13:4 Mayina awo ndi awa: kuchokera ku fuko la Rubeni
Numbers13:5 	kuchokera ku fuko la Simeoni
Numbers13:6 	kuchokera ku fuko la Yuda
Numbers13:7 	kuchokera ku fuko la Isakara
Numbers13:8 	kuchokera ku fuko la Efereimu
Numbers13:9 	kuchokera ku fuko la Benjamini
Numbers13:10 	kuchokera ku fuko la Zebuloni
Numbers13:11 	kuchokera ku fuko la Manase (fuko la Yosefe)
Numbers13:12 	kuchokera ku fuko la Dani
Numbers13:13 	kuchokera ku fuko la Aseri
Numbers13:14 	kuchokera ku fuko la Nafutali

Numbers13:16 Amenewa ndiwo mayina a anthu amene Mose anawatuma kukazonda dzikolo. (Hoseya mwana wa Nuni
Numbers13:17 Mose atawatuma kuti akazonde Kanaani anati
Numbers13:18 Mukaone dzikolo kuti ndi lotani ndi anthu okhala mʼmenemo ngati ndi amphamvu kapena ofowoka
Numbers13:19 Nanga dziko limene akukhalako ndi lotani? Ndi labwino kapena loyipa? Mizinda imene akukhalamo ndi yotani? Kodi ilibe malinga kapena ndi ya malinga?
Numbers13:20 Nthaka yake ndi yotani? Yachonde kapena yopanda chonde? Kodi dzikolo lili ndi mitengo kapena lilibe mitengo? Mukayesetse kubweretsako zipatso za mʼdzikomo.” (Inali nthawi yamphesa zoyamba kupsa).
Numbers13:21 Choncho anapita kukazonda dzikolo kuchokera ku chipululu cha Zini mpaka ku Rehobu
Numbers13:22 Anapita kudzera ku Negevi ndi kukafika ku Hebroni
Numbers13:23 Atafika ku chigwa cha Esikolo
Numbers13:24 Malo amenewo anawatcha chigwa cha Esikolo chifukwa cha phava la mphesa limene Aisraeli anadula kumeneko.
Numbers13:25 Patapita masiku makumi anayi
Numbers13:26 Ndipo atabwerako anapita kwa Mose ndi Aaroni ndi kwa Aisraeli onse ku Kadesi mʼchipululu cha Parani. Kumeneko anafotokozera anthu onse nawaonetsanso zipatso za mʼdzikolo.

Numbers13:29 Aamaleki amakhala ku Negevi

Numbers14:1 Usiku umenewo gulu lonse la Aisraeli linalira mofuwula kwambiri.
Numbers14:2 Ndipo Aisraeli onse anayankhula motsutsana ndi Mose ndi Aaroni. Gulu lonse linanena kwa iwo kuti
Numbers14:3 Nʼchifukwa chiyani Yehova akutilowetsa mʼdziko limenelo? Kodi kuti tikaphedwe ndi lupanga? Kuti akazi ndi ana athu akatengedwe ngati katundu wolanda ku nkhondo? Kodi sikungakhale bwino kuti tibwerere ku Igupto?”
Numbers14:4 Ndipo anawuzana wina ndi mnzake kuti
Numbers14:5 Koma Mose ndi Aaroni anadzigwetsa pansi chafufumimba pamaso pa Aisraeli onse omwe anasonkhana pamenepo.
Numbers14:6 Yoswa mwana wa Nuni ndi Kalebe mwana wa Yefune
Numbers14:7 ndipo anati kwa gulu lonse la Aisraeli
Numbers14:8 Ngati Yehova akukondwera nafe
Numbers14:9 koma musawukire Yehova. Komanso musaope anthu a mʼdzikomo
Numbers14:10 Koma gulu lonse linayankhula zofuna kuwagenda miyala. Pamenepo ulemerero wa Yehova unaonekera kwa Aisraeli onse ku tenti ya msonkhano.
Numbers14:11 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers14:12 Ndidzawakantha ndi mliri ndi kuwawononga. Koma ndidzakusandutsa iwe mtundu waukulu ndi wamphamvu kuposa iwo.”
Numbers14:13 Mose anati kwa Yehova
Numbers14:14 Ndipo iwowo adzawuza anthu okhala mʼdziko lino zimenezi. Anthuwa amva kale kuti Inu Yehova mumakhala pakati pa anthu amenewa ndi kuti Inuyo Yehova mwawaonekera maso ndi maso. Mtambo wanu umakhala pamwamba pawo ndiponso mumayenda nawo mu mtambo woyima
Numbers14:15 Tsono mukawapha anthu onsewa nthawi imodzi
Numbers14:16 ‘Yehova walephera kuwalowetsa anthuwo mʼdziko lomwe anawalonjeza molumbira
Numbers14:17 “Chonde Ambuye wonetsani mphamvu yanu monga munalonjezera kuti
Numbers14:18 ‘Yehova sakwiya msanga
Numbers14:19 Chifukwa cha kukula kwa chikondi chanu chosasinthika
Numbers14:20 Yehova anayankha kuti
Numbers14:21 Komabe
Numbers14:22 palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe mwa anthu amene anaona ulemerero wanga ndi zizindikiro zozizwitsa zimene ndinazichita ku Igupto ndi mʼchipululu muno
Numbers14:23 palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe wa anthu amenewa amene adzaone dziko limene ndinalonjeza ndi lumbiro kwa makolo awo. Aliyense amene anandinyoza sadzaliona dzikolo.
Numbers14:24 Koma mtumiki wanga Kalebe
Numbers14:25 Ndipo popeza kuti Aamaleki ndi Akanaani akukhala ku chigwa
Numbers14:26 Yehova anawuza Mose ndi Aaroni kuti
Numbers14:27 “Kodi anthu oyipawa adzangʼungʼudza ndi kutsutsana nane mpaka liti? Ndamva madandawulo a Aisraeli ongʼungʼudzawa.
Numbers14:28 Tsono awuze kuti
Numbers14:29 Mitembo yanu idzakhala ili ngundangunda mʼchipululu muno; mtembo wa munthu aliyense pakati panu amene ali ndi zaka makumi awiri kapena kupitirirapo
Numbers14:30 Palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe mwa inu amene adzalowe mʼdziko lomwe ndinalumbira mokweza manja kuti likhale lanu
Numbers14:31 Koma ana anu amene mukunena kuti adzatengedwa ngati katundu wolanda ku nkhondo
Numbers14:32 Koma inu mitembo yanu idzakhala ngundangunda mʼchipululu muno.
Numbers14:33 Ana anu adzakhala abusa mʼchipululu muno zaka makumi anayi
Numbers14:34 Mudzavutika chifukwa cha machimo anu kwa zaka makumi anayi Chaka chimodzi chikuyimira tsiku limodzi la masiku makumi anayi amene munakazonda dziko lija ndipo mudzadziwa kuyipa kwake kwa kukangana ndi Ine.’
Numbers14:35 Ine Yehova
Numbers14:36 Ndipo anthu amene Mose anawatuma kukazonda dziko aja anachoka pamaso pake nachititsa gulu lonse la anthu kuwukira Moseyo chifukwa chofalitsa mbiri yoyipa ya dzikolo.
Numbers14:37 Anthu amene ankafalitsa mbiri yoyipa ya dzikolo anakanthidwa ndi mliri ndipo anafa pamaso pa Yehova.
Numbers14:38 Mwa anthu amene anakaona dzikolo
Numbers14:39 Mose atafotokoza izi kwa Aisraeli onse
Numbers14:40 Mmamawa tsiku linalo anapita mbali ya ku dziko la mapiri. Iwo anati
Numbers14:41 Koma Mose anati
Numbers14:42 Musapite chifukwa Yehova sali pakati panu. Mudzagonjetsedwa ndi adani anu
Numbers14:43 chifukwa kumeneko mukakumana ndi Aamaleki ndi Akanaani. Popeza mwaleka kutsata Yehova
Numbers14:44 Komabe mwa maganizo awo anapita molunjika dziko la mapiri ngakhale kuti Mose sanachoke ndi Bokosi la Chipangano la Yehova pa msasa.
Numbers14:45 Koma Aamaleki ndi Akanaani amene ankakhala ku dziko lamapirilo anatsika ndi kumenyana nawo ndipo anawakantha mʼnjira yonse mpaka ku Horima.
Numbers15:1 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers15:2 “Yankhula ndi Aisraeli ndipo uwawuze kuti
Numbers15:3 ndipo mukamadzapereka kwa Yehova
Numbers15:4 munthu amene akubweretsa zopereka zake
Numbers15:5 Pamodzi ndi mwana wankhosa aliyense wa nsembe yopsereza kapena nsembe ina
Numbers15:6 “Pamodzi ndi nkhosa yayimuna
Numbers15:7 ndi vinyo wokwanira lita imodzi ndi theka ngati chopereka cha chakumwa. Muzikapereka monga nsembe yopereka fungo lokoma kwa Yehova.
Numbers15:8 “ ‘Pamene mukukonza mwana wangʼombe wamwamuna kuti akhale nsembe yopsereza kapena nsembe ina iliyonse: ya lumbiro lapadera kapena nsembe yachiyanjano kwa Yehova
Numbers15:9 pamodzi ndi mwana wangʼombe wamwamunayo muzibweretsa nsembe yachakudya yolemera makilogalamu atatu a ufa wosalala wosakaniza ndi mafuta okwana malita awiri.
Numbers15:10 Komanso muzibweretsa vinyo wokwanira malita awiri monga chopereka chachakumwa. Imeneyi idzakhala chopereka chotentha pa moto kuti likhale fungo lokoma kwa Yehova.
Numbers15:11 Ngʼombe yayimuna iliyonse kapena nkhosa yayimuna iliyonse
Numbers15:12 Ngakhale zingachuluke chotani
Numbers15:13 “ ‘Mbadwa iliyonse ya mu Israeli izichita zimenezi pamene ibweretsa nsembe yotentha pa moto kuti ikhale fungo lokoma kwa Yehova.
Numbers15:14 Ku mibado yanu yonse ya mʼtsogolo
Numbers15:15 Gulu lonse likhale ndi malamulo ofanana a inu kapena mlendo wokhala pakati panu. Limeneli ndi lamulo lamuyaya kwa mibado imene ikubwera. Inuyo ndi mlendo mudzakhala wofanana pamaso pa Yehova.
Numbers15:16 Mudzakhale ndi malamulo ndi miyambo yofanana
Numbers15:17 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers15:18 “Yankhula ndi Aisraeli ndipo unene kuti
Numbers15:19 ndipo mukakadya chakudya cha mʼdzikolo
Numbers15:20 Pa buledi wanu woyamba
Numbers15:21 Pa mibado yanu yonse muzidzapereka chopereka ichi kwa Yehova kuchokera ku zakudya zanu zoyamba za mʼnthaka.
Numbers15:22 “ ‘Ndipo ngati muchimwa mosadziwa posasunga ena mwa malamulo awa amene Yehova wapereka kwa Mose
Numbers15:23 lina lililonse mwa malamulo a Yehova amene wapereka kwa inu kudzera mwa Mose
Numbers15:24 ndipo ngati zimenezi zachitika osati mwadala ndipo gulu lonse silinadziwe
Numbers15:25 Wansembe apereke nsembe yopepesera machimo a gulu lonse la Aisraeli
Numbers15:26 Gulu lonse la Aisraeli ndi alendo okhala pakati pawo adzakhululukidwa chifukwa anthu onsewo anachimwa mosadziwa.
Numbers15:27 “ ‘Koma ngati munthu mmodzi achimwa mosadziwa
Numbers15:28 Wansembe apereke nsembe yopepesera machimowo pamaso pa Yehova chifukwa cha munthu yemwe anachimwa mosadziwayo. Nsembe yopepesera tchimo lakelo ikaperekedwa
Numbers15:29 Lamulo lomweli ligwiritsidwe ntchito kwa aliyense wochimwa mosadziwa
Numbers15:30 “ ‘Koma aliyense amene achimwa mwadala
Numbers15:31 Popeza wanyoza mawu a Yehova ndi kuphwanya malamulo ake. Munthu ameneyo achotsedwe ndithu
Numbers15:32 Aisraeli ali mʼchipululu
Numbers15:33 Amene anamupeza akutola nkhunizo anabwera naye kwa Mose ndi Aaroni ndi kwa gulu lonse
Numbers15:34 ndipo anamutsekera mʼndende chifukwa sankadziwa choti achite naye.
Numbers15:35 Pamenepo Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers15:36 Choncho gululo linamutengera kunja kwa msasa ndi kumupha pomugenda ndi miyala
Numbers15:37 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers15:38 “Yankhula ndi Aisraeli ndipo uwawuze kuti
Numbers15:39 Mudzakhala ndi mphonje zimenezi kuti mukaziona muzikakumbukira malamulo onse a Yehova ndi kuwamvera kuti musamatsatenso zilakolako za mʼmitima mwanu ndi za maso anu.
Numbers15:40 Motero mudzakumbukira kumvera malamulo anga ndipo mudzakhala opatulikira a Mulungu wanu.
Numbers15:41 Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu

Numbers16:2 ndipo anawukira Mose. Mʼgulu mwawo munali atsogoleri a Aisraeli 250
Numbers16:3 Iwo anasonkhana kudzatsutsana ndi Mose ndi Aaroni nawawuza kuti

Numbers16:5 Ndipo iye anawuza Kora ndi anthu onse amene ankamutsatira kuti
Numbers16:6 Iwe Kora pamodzi ndi onse amene akukutsatira chitani izi: Tengani zofukizira
Numbers16:7 ndipo mawa muyikemo moto ndi lubani pamaso pa Yehova. Munthu amene Yehova amusankhe ndiye amene ali woyera. Alevi inu mwawonjeza kwambiri!”
Numbers16:8 Mose anawuzanso Kora kuti
Numbers16:9 Kodi sizinakukwanireni kuti Mulungu wa Israeli anakupatulani pakati pa gulu lonse la Aisraeli ndi kukubweretsani pafupi ndi Iye

Numbers16:11 Nʼkulakwira Yehova kuti iwe ndi gulu lako lonseli mwasonkhana kuti mutsutsane ndi Yehova. Kodi Aaroni ndani kuti muzikangana naye?”
Numbers16:12 Kenaka Mose anayitana Datani ndi Abiramu
Numbers16:13 Kodi sikukwanira kuti unatitulutsa

Numbers16:18 Choncho munthu aliyense anatenga chofukizira chake nayikamo moto ndi lubani

Numbers16:26 Anachenjeza gulu lonse kuti

Numbers16:28 Tsono Mose anati
Numbers16:29 Ngati anthu awa afa ndi imfa ya chilengedwe ndi kuwachitikira zomwe zimachitikira munthu aliyense
Numbers16:30 Koma Yehova akachita china chake chachilendo
Numbers16:31 Atangotsiriza kuyankhula zimenezi
Numbers16:32 ndipo dziko linatsekula pakamwa pake ndi kuwameza pamodzi ndi nyumba zawo ndi anthu onse a Kora ndi katundu wawo yense.
Numbers16:33 Analowa mʼmanda amoyo pamodzi ndi zonse zimene anali nazo. Nthaka inawatsekera ndi kuwawononga ndipo sanaonekenso.
Numbers16:34 Atamva kulira kwawo
Numbers16:35 Ndipo moto wochokera kwa Yehova unabwera nʼkunyeketsa anthu 250 amene ankapereka nsembe yofukiza aja.

Numbers16:37 “Uza Eliezara mwana wa Aaroni

Numbers16:39 Choncho Eliezara
Numbers16:40 monga momwe Yehova anamulangizira kudzera mwa Mose. Chimenechi chinali chikumbutso kwa Aisraeli kuti munthu wina aliyense

Numbers17:1 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers17:2 “Yankhula ndi Aisraeli ndipo akupatse ndodo khumi ndi ziwiri
Numbers17:3 Pa ndodo ya Levi ulembepo dzina la Aaroni
Numbers17:4 Uyike ndodozo mu tenti ya msonkhano
Numbers17:5 Ndodo ya munthu amene ndamusankha idzachita maluwa potero ndidzaletsa madandawulo osatha a Aisraeli otsutsana nawe.”
Numbers17:6 Choncho Mose anayankhula ndi Aisraeli
Numbers17:7 Mose anayika ndodozo pamaso pa Yehova mu tenti ya msonkhano.
Numbers17:8 Pa tsiku lotsatira Mose analowa mu tenti ya msonkhanoyo ndipo anaona kuti ndodo ya Aaroni
Numbers17:9 Choncho Mose anatulutsa ndodo zonse pamaso pa Yehova napita nazo kwa Aisraeli onse. Iwowo anaziona ndipo munthu aliyense anatenga ndodo yake.

Numbers18:1 Yehova anawuza Aaroni kuti
Numbers18:2 Ubweretse Alevi
Numbers18:3 Iwowo azikutumikirani ndipo azichita ntchito zonse za ku tenti
Numbers18:4 Azikhala ndi inu ndipo azisamalira ntchito yonse ya mu tenti ya msonkhano koma munthu wina aliyense wapadera sayenera kufika pafupi nanu.
Numbers18:5 “Inuyo muzisamalira malo wopatulika ndi guwa lansembe
Numbers18:6 Ine mwini ndasankha Alevi
Numbers18:7 Koma iwe wekha ndi ana ako aamuna muzitumikira ngati ansembe ndi zina zonse zokhudza pa guwa lansembe ndi za mʼkati mwa malo wopatulika kwambiri. Ndikukupatsani mphatso ya utumiki wa unsembe. Aliyense woyandikira malo wopatulika ayenera kuphedwa.
Numbers18:8 “Kenaka Yehova anati kwa Aaroni
Numbers18:9 Uzilandiranso gawo la zopereka zopatulika kwambiri zomwe sizinawotchedwe pa moto. Kuchokera pa mphatso zonse zimene amabweretsa kwa Ine ngati zopatulika kwambiri
Numbers18:10 Muzidya zimenezo ngati zinthu zopatulika kwambiri; mwamuna aliyense adyeko. Uzitenge kukhala zopatulika.
Numbers18:11 “Izinso ndi zako: chilichonse chopatulidwa kuchokera ku mphatso zoweyula za Aisraeli ndapereka kwa iwe ndi ana ako aamuna ndi aakazi ngati gawo lako la nthawi zonse. Aliyense wa mʼnyumba mwako amene ali woyeretsedwa monga mwa mwambo angathe kudyako.
Numbers18:12 “Ndikukupatsani mafuta onse abwino kwambiri a olivi ndi vinyo yense watsopano wabwino kwambiri ndi tirigu yense zomwe Aisraeli amapereka kwa Yehova ngati zipatso zoyamba pa zokolola zawo.
Numbers18:13 Zipatso zonse zoyamba kucha za mʼdziko lawo zomwe amapereka kwa Yehova zidzakhala zako. Aliyense mʼnyumba mwako amene ali woyeretsedwa angathe kudyako.
Numbers18:14 “Chilichonse mu Israeli chomwe chapatulidwira Yehova ndi chako.
Numbers18:15 Chilichonse choyamba kubadwa kwa munthu kaya nyama
Numbers18:16 Pamene zili ndi mwezi umodzi wa kubadwa
Numbers18:17 “Koma usawombole ana oyamba kubadwa a ngʼombe
Numbers18:18 Nyama yake ikhale yanu monga momwe chimakhalira chidale cha nsembe yoweyula ndi ntchafu za miyendo ya kumanja
Numbers18:19 Zonse zimene mwazichotsa ku zopereka zoyera zomwe Aisraeli anapereka kwa Yehova ndazipereka kwa iwe ndi ana ako aamuna ndi aakazi ngati gawo lanu nthawi zonse. Ili ndi pangano losatha la mchere pamaso pa Yehova kwa iwe ndi ana ako.”
Numbers18:20 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Aaroni
Numbers18:21 “Taonani
Numbers18:22 Kuyambira tsopano mpaka mʼtsogolo Aisraeli asamapite pafupi ndi tenti ya msonkhano. Ngati atero adzasenza zotsatira za tchimo lawo ndipo adzafa.
Numbers18:23 Alevi ndi amene azidzagwira ntchito ya ku tenti ya msonkhano ndipo adzalangidwa chilichonse chikalakwika. Ili ndi lamulo losatha kwa mibado yawo yonse. Iwowo sadzalandira cholowa pakati pa Aisraeli.
Numbers18:24 Mʼmalo mwake
Numbers18:25 Yehova anati kwa Mose
Numbers18:26 “Yankhula ndi Alevi ndi kunena nawo kuti
Numbers18:27 Chopereka chanucho chidzawerengedwa kwa inu ngati tirigu wochokera kopunthira kapena ngati mphesa zopsinya kuchokera kopsinyira mphesa.
Numbers18:28 Mwa njira imeneyi inunso muzipereka chopereka kwa Yehova kuchokera ku chakhumi chanu chilichonse chimene mumalandira kuchokera kwa Aisraeli. Kuchokera ku chakhumicho muziperekako gawo la Yehova kwa Aaroni
Numbers18:29 Muyenera kupereka monga gawo la Yehova magawo abwino kwambiri ndi opatulika a chilichonse chimene chapatsidwa kwa inu.’
Numbers18:30 “Nena kwa Alevi: ‘Pamene mupereka gawo labwino lopambana zonse
Numbers18:31 Inu ndi a pa banja panu mungathe kudyera zimenezi paliponse chifukwa ndi malipiro a ntchito yanu ya ku tenti ya msonkhano.
Numbers18:32 Popereka gawo labwino kwambirilo simudzapezeka olakwa. Mukatero simudzadetsa zopereka zoyera za Aisraeli
Numbers19:1 Yehova anati kwa Mose ndi Aaroni:
Numbers19:2 “Lamulo limene Yehova wapereka ndi ili: Uzani Aisraeli kuti abweretse ngʼombe yayikazi yofiira yopanda chilema chilichonse imenenso sinakhalepo pa goli.
Numbers19:3 Muyipereke kwa Eliezara
Numbers19:4 Ndipo Eliezara wansembe atengeko ena mwa magazi a ngʼombeyo ndi chala chake ndi kuwaza kasanu nʼkawiri ku tsogolo kwa tenti ya msonkhano.
Numbers19:5 Wansembeyo akuona
Numbers19:6 Wansembe atenge mtengo wamkungudza
Numbers19:7 Zitatha izi
Numbers19:8 Munthu amene amawotcha ngʼombeyo ayeneranso kuchapa zovala zake ndi kusamba ndi madzi. Iyenso adzakhala wodetsedwa mpaka madzulo.
Numbers19:9 “Munthu amene ndi woyeretsedwa achotse phulusa la ngʼombeyo ndi kuliyika pa malo woyeretsedwa kunja kwa msasa. Aisraeli adzasunge phulusalo kuti azikaligwiritsa ntchito polithira mʼmadzi woyeretsera ndi wochotsera tchimo.
Numbers19:10 Munthu wochotsa phulusa la ngʼombeyo ayeneranso kuchapa zovala zake. Iyenso adzakhala wodetsedwa mpaka madzulo. Ili likhale lamulo la nthawi zonse kwa Aisraeli ndi alendo okhala pakati pawo.
Numbers19:11 “Aliyense wokhudza mtembo wa munthu wina aliyense adzakhala wodetsedwa masiku asanu ndi awiri.
Numbers19:12 Adziyeretse yekha ndi madzi pa tsiku lachitatu ndi pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri ndipo adzayeretsedwa. Koma ngati sadziyeretsa yekha pa tsiku la chitatu ndi lachisanu ndi chiwiri sadzakhala woyeretsedwa.
Numbers19:13 Aliyense amene akhudza mtembo wa munthu nʼkulephera kudziyeretsa yekha
Numbers19:14 “Pamene munthu wamwalira mu tenti
Numbers19:15 ndiponso chiwiya chilichonse chopanda chivundikiro chidzakhala chodetsedwa.
Numbers19:16 “Aliyense wokhudza munthu amene waphedwera kunja ndi lupanga kapena amene wafa ndi imfa ya chilengedwe
Numbers19:17 “Za munthu wodetsedwayo: ikani phulusa lochokera ku nsembe ya chiyeretso mu mtsuko ndi kuthiramo madzi abwino.
Numbers19:18 Tsono munthu woyeretsedwa atenge hisope
Numbers19:19 Munthu woyeretsedwa ndiye awaze munthu wodetsedwayo pa tsiku lachitatu ndi pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri
Numbers19:20 Koma ngati munthu wodetsedwayo sadziyeretsa yekha
Numbers19:21 Ili ndi lamulo lokhazikika kwa iwo. “Munthu amene amawaza madzi oyeretsawo ayenera kuchapa zovala zake ndipo yense wokhudza madzi oyeretserawo adzakhala wodetsedwa mpaka madzulo.
Numbers19:22 Chilichonse chimene munthu wodetsedwayo achikhudze chidzakhala chodetsedwa ndiponso aliyense wochikhudza adzakhala wodetsedwa mpaka madzulo.”
Numbers20:1 Pa mwezi woyamba gulu lonse la Aisraeli linafika ku chipululu cha Zini
Numbers20:2 Kunalibe madzi woti anthu onse ndi kumwa

Numbers20:6 Mose ndi Aaroni anachoka mu msonkhano ndi kupita pa khomo la tenti ya msonkhano
Numbers20:7 Yehova anati kwa Mose
Numbers20:8 “Tenga ndodo

Numbers20:11 Choncho Mose anatukula dzanja lake ndi kumenya thanthwelo kawiri ndi ndodo yake ndipo madzi ambiri anatuluka mwamphamvu
Numbers20:12 Koma Yehova anati kwa Mose ndi Aaroni
Numbers20:13 Awa anali madzi a ku Meriba
Numbers20:14 Mose anatumiza amithenga kuchokera ku Kadesi kupita kwa mfumu ya ku Edomu

Numbers20:16 koma titalirira Yehova
Numbers20:17 Chonde mutilole tidutse mʼdziko lanu. Sitidzera mʼminda yanu kapena mu mpesa wanu
Numbers20:18 Koma Edomu anayankha kuti
Numbers20:19 Aisraeli anayankha kuti
Numbers20:20 Koma Edomu anayankhanso kuti
Numbers20:21 Edomu anakaniza Israeli kuti adutse mʼdziko lake
Numbers20:22 Gulu lonse la Aisraeli linachoka ku Kadesi ndipo linafika ku phiri la Hori.
Numbers20:23 Ali pa phiri la Hori
Numbers20:24 “Aaroni adzakakhala ndi anthu a mtundu wake
Numbers20:25 Tenga Aaroni ndi mwana wake wamwamuna Eliezara ndipo ukwere nawo ku phiri la Hori.
Numbers20:26 Uvule Aaroni zovala zake ndipo umuveke mwana wake Eliezara
Numbers20:27 Mose anachita monga Yehova anamulamulira: Anapita ku phiri la Hori gulu lonse likuona.
Numbers20:28 Pamenepo Mose anavula Aaroni zovala zake ndi kuveka mwana wake Eliezara. Aaroni anafa kumeneko pamwamba pa phirilo. Koma Mose ndi Eliezara anatsika ku phiriko
Numbers20:29 ndipo pamene anthu onse anamva kuti Aaroni wafa

Numbers21:3 Yehova anamva pempho la Aisraeli ndipo anapereka Akanaaniwo kwa iwo. Anawawononga pamodzi ndi mizinda yawo. Kotero malowo anatchedwa Horima.
Numbers21:4 Aisraeli anayenda kuchokera ku phiri la Hori kudzera njira ya ku Nyanja Yofiira kuzungulira dziko la Edomu. Koma anthu anataya mtima mʼnjiramo

Numbers21:10 Aisraeli anayendabe nakamanga misasa yawo ku Oboti.

Numbers21:12 Kuchoka kumeneko anayendabe nakamanga misasa yawo mʼchigwa cha Zeredi.
Numbers21:13 Anasamukanso kumeneko nakamanga moyandikana ndi Arinoni mʼdera limene lili mʼchipululu chimene chimafika mʼdziko la Aamori. Arinoni ndiwo malire a Mowabu ndi Aamori.

Numbers21:15 ku matsitso a zigwa amene afika mpaka ku Ari nakhudza malire a dziko la Mowabu.”

Numbers21:21 Aisraeli anatumiza amithenga kwa Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori
Numbers21:22 “Tiloleni kuti tidutse mʼdziko mwanu. Sitidzapatukira mʼminda mwanu kapena mu mpesa wanu kapena kumwa madzi mʼchitsime chili chonse. Tidzayenda mu msewu waukulu wa mfumu mpaka titadutsa malire a dziko lanu.”
Numbers21:23 Koma Sihoni sanalole kuti Aisraeli adutse mʼdziko mwake. Iye anasonkhanitsa pamodzi ankhondo ake onse kuti akamenyane ndi Aisraeli mʼchipululu. Atafika pa Yahazi anamenyana ndi Aisraeli.

Numbers21:25 Ndipo Aisraeli analanda mizinda yonse ya Aamori

Numbers21:30 “Koma ife tawagonjetsa; Hesiboni wawonongedwa mʼnjira monse mpaka kufika ku Diboni. Tawaphwasula mpaka ku mzinda wa Nofa

Numbers22:4 Iwo anati kwa akuluakulu a ku Midiyani

Numbers22:15 Kenaka Balaki anatumanso akuluakulu ena ambiri ndi olemekezeka kwambiri kuposa oyamba aja ndipo

Numbers22:17 chifukwa ndidzakulipira bwino kwambiri ndipo ndidzakuchitira chilichonse chimene unganene. Bwera ndipo uwatemberere anthu amenewa mʼmalo mwanga.’ ”

Numbers22:23 Pamene buluyo anaona mngelo wa Yehova atayima pa njira ndi lupanga mʼmanja mwake
Numbers22:24 Kenaka mngelo wa Yehova anayima mʼkanjira kakangʼono pakati pa minda iwiri ya mpesa yokhala ndi makoma mbali zonse
Numbers22:25 Bulu uja ataona mngelo wa Yehova anadzipanikiza ku khoma
Numbers22:26 Kenaka mngelo wa Yehova anapita patsogolo ndi kuyima pamalo opanikizika pomwe panalibe poti nʼkutembenukira ku dzanja lamanja kapena lamanzere.

Numbers26:6 	kuchokera mwa Hezironi

Numbers26:9 ndipo ana a Eliabu anali Nemueli

Numbers26:16 	kuchokera mwa Ozini
Numbers26:17 	kuchokera mwa Arodi
Numbers26:18 Awa ndiwo anali mafuko a Gadi. Onse amene anawerengedwa analipo 40
Numbers26:19 Eri ndi Onani anali ana aamuna a Yuda
Numbers26:20 Zidzukulu za Yuda monga mwa mafuko awo zinali izi: kuchokera mwa Sela
Numbers26:21 	Zidzukulu za Perezi zinali izi: kuchokera mwa Hezironi

Numbers26:24 	kuchokera mwa Yasubu

Numbers26:26 Zidzukulu za Zebuloni mwa mafuko awo zinali izi: kuchokera mwa Seredi

Numbers28:17 Pa tsiku la 15 la mwezi womwewo pazikhala chikondwerero. Muzidya buledi wopanda yisiti kwa masiku asanu ndi awiri.

Numbers33:1 Malo otsatirawa ndi omwe Aisraeli anayima pa maulendo awo atatuluka mʼdziko la Igupto mʼmagulu awo motsogozedwa ndi Mose ndi Aaroni.
Numbers33:2 Mose analemba malo amene anayambira maulendo awo molamulidwa ndi Yehova. Maulendo awo ndi malo omwe anayambira ndi awa:
Numbers33:3 Aisraeli ananyamuka kuchokera ku Ramesesi pa tsiku la 15 la mwezi woyamba
Numbers33:4 pamene ankayika maliro a ana awo oyamba kubadwa
Numbers33:5 Aisraeli atachoka ku Ramesesi
Numbers33:6 Atachoka ku Sukoti anakamanga misasa yawo ku Etamu
Numbers33:7 Ndipo atachoka ku Etamu
Numbers33:8 Atachoka ku Pihahiroti anadutsa mʼkati mwa nyanja kupita ku chipululu ndipo atayenda masiku atatu mʼchipululu cha Etamu
Numbers33:9 Atachoka ku Mara anafika ku Elimu
Numbers33:10 Atachoka ku Elimu anakamanga misasa yawo mʼmbali mwa Nyanja Yofiira.
Numbers33:11 Atachoka ku Nyanja Yofiira anakamanga misasa yawo mʼchipululu cha Sini.
Numbers33:12 Atachoka ku chipululu cha Sini anakamanga ku Dofika.
Numbers33:13 Atachoka ku Dofika anakamanga misasa yawo ku Alusi.
Numbers33:14 Atachoka ku Alusi anakamanga misasa yawo ku Refidimu
Numbers33:15 Atachoka ku Refidimu anakamanga ku chipululu cha Sinai
Numbers33:16 Atachoka ku chipululu cha Sinai anakamanga misasa yawo ku Kiburoti-Hataava.
Numbers33:17 Atachoka ku Kiburoti-Hataava anakamanga misasa yawo ku Heziroti.
Numbers33:18 Atachoka ku Heziroti anakamanga ku Ritima.
Numbers33:19 Atachoka ku Ritima anakamanga ku Rimoni-Perezi.
Numbers33:20 Atachoka ku Rimoni-Perezi anakamanga ku Libina.
Numbers33:21 Atachoka ku Libina anakamanga ku Risa.
Numbers33:22 Atachoka ku Risa anakamanga ku Kehelata.
Numbers33:23 Atachoka ku Kehelata anakamanga ku phiri la Seferi.
Numbers33:24 Atachoka ku phiri la Seferi anakamanga ku Harada.
Numbers33:25 Atachoka ku Harada anakamanga ku Mekheloti.
Numbers33:26 Atachoka ku Mekheloti anakamanga ku Tahati.
Numbers33:27 Atachoka ku Tahati anakamanga ku Tera.
Numbers33:28 Atachoka ku Tera anakamanga ku Mitika.
Numbers33:29 Atachoka ku Mitika anakamanga ku Hasimona.
Numbers33:30 Atachoka ku Hasimona anakamanga ku Moseroti.
Numbers33:31 Atachoka ku Moseroti anakamanga ku Beni Yaakani.
Numbers33:32 Atachoka ku Beni Yaakani anakamanga ku Hori-Hagidigadi.
Numbers33:33 Atachoka ku Hori-Hagidigadi anakamanga ku Yotibata.
Numbers33:34 Atachoka ku Yotibata anakamanga ku Abirona.
Numbers33:35 Atachoka ku Abirona anakamanga ku Ezioni-Geberi.
Numbers33:36 Atachoka ku Ezioni-Geberi anakamanga ku Kadesi
Numbers33:37 Anachoka ku Kadesi ndi kukamanga ku phiri la Hori
Numbers33:38 Molamulidwa ndi Yehova
Numbers33:39 Aaroni anamwalira pa phiri la Hori ali ndi zaka 123.
Numbers33:40 Mfumu ya Akanaani ya ku Aradi yomwe inkakhala ku Negevi kummwera kwa Kanaani
Numbers33:41 Atachoka ku phiri la Hori anakamanga ku Zalimoni.
Numbers33:42 Atachoka ku Zalimoni anakamanga ku Punoni.
Numbers33:43 Atachoka ku Punoni anakamanga ku Oboti.
Numbers33:44 Atachoka ku Oboti anakamanga ku Iye-Abarimu.
Numbers33:45 Atachoka ku Iye-Abarimu anakamanga ku Diboni Gadi.
Numbers33:46 Atachoka ku Diboni Gadi anakamanga ku Alimoni-Dibulataimu.
Numbers33:47 Atachoka ku Alimoni-Dibulataimu anakamanga mʼmapiri a Abarimu
Numbers33:48 Atachoka ku mapiri a Abarimu anakamanga ku zigwa za Mowabu mʼmbali mwa Yorodani moyangʼanana ndi Yeriko.
Numbers33:49 Ali ku zigwa za Mowabu anamanga mʼmbali mwa Yorodani kuchokera ku Beti-Yesimoti mpaka ku Abeli-Sitimu.
Numbers33:50 Pa zigwa za Mowabu
Numbers33:51 “Nena kwa Aisraeli kuti
Numbers33:52 mukathamangitse nzika zonse za mʼdzikomo pamaso panu. Mukawononge mafano awo onse a miyala ndi osula ndi malo awo achipembedzo.
Numbers33:53 Mukalande dzikolo ndi kukhalamo chifukwa ndakupatsani dziko limenelo kuti mukhalemo.
Numbers33:54 Mukagawane dzikolo pochita maere monga mwa mafuko anu. Kwa omwe ali ambiri
Numbers33:55 “ ‘Koma ngati simukathamangitsa nzika zimene zili mʼdzikomo
Numbers33:56 Ndipo pamenepo ndidzachitira inu zomwe ndinaganiza kuwachitira iwowo.’ ”
Numbers34:1 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers34:2 “Lamula Aisraeli ndipo uwawuze kuti
Numbers34:3 “ ‘Chigawo cha kummwera kwa dziko lanu chidzayambira ku chipululu cha Zini motsatana ndi malire a Edomu. Kummawa malire anu a kummwera adzayambira kummawa
Numbers34:4 Malirewo adzapita kummwera ndipo adzakwera phiri la Akirabimu mpaka ku Zini. Mathero ake adzakhala kummwera kwa Kadesi-Baranea. Ndipo adzapitenso ku Hazari Adari mpaka kukafika ku Azimoni
Numbers34:5 kumene malirewo adzakhote kuchokera ku Azimoni mpaka ku khwawa la ku Igupto ndi kukathera ku Nyanja Yayikulu.
Numbers34:6 “ ‘Malire anu a ku madzulo adzakhala ku gombe la Nyanja Yayikulu. Amenewo ndiwo adzakhale malire anu a ku madzulo.
Numbers34:7 “ ‘Malire anu a kumpoto
Numbers34:8 ndi kuchokera ku phiri la Hori mpaka ku Lebo Hamati. Malirewa apite ku Zedadi
Numbers34:9 ndi kupitirira mpaka ku Ziforoni ndi kukathera ku Hazari-Enani. Awa ndiwo adzakhale malire anu a kumpoto.
Numbers34:10 “ ‘Za malire anu a kummawa
Numbers34:11 Malirewo adzatsikire ku Sefamu mpaka ku Ribila cha kummawa kwa Aini ndi kupitirira mpaka ku matsitso a cha kummawa kwa Nyanja ya Kinereti.
Numbers34:12 Tsono malirewo adzatsika motsatana ndi Yorodani ndi kukathera ku Nyanja ya Mchere. “ ‘Limeneli lidzakhala dziko lanu ndi malire ake mbali zonse.’ ”
Numbers34:13 Ndipo Mose analamula Aisraeli kuti
Numbers34:14 chifukwa mabanja a fuko la Rubeni
Numbers34:15 Mafuko awiriwa pamodzi ndi theka la fuko la Manase analandiriratu cholowa chawo patsidya pa mtsinje wa Yorodani ku Yeriko cha kummawa kotulukira dzuwa.”
Numbers34:16 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers34:17 “Awa ndi mayina a anthu amene adzakugawireni dzikoli kuti likhale cholowa chanu: wansembe Eliezara ndi Yoswa mwana wa Nuni.
Numbers34:18 Musankhe mtsogoleri mmodzi kuchokera ku fuko lililonse kuti athandize kugawa dzikolo.
Numbers34:19 Mayina awo ndi awa: Kalebe mwana wa Yefune
Numbers34:20 	Semueli mwana wa Amihudi
Numbers34:21 	Elidadi mwana wa Kisiloni
Numbers34:22 	Buki mwana wa Yogili
Numbers34:23 	Hanieli mwana wa Efodi
Numbers34:24 	Kemueli mwana wa Sifitani
Numbers34:25 	Elizafani mwana wa Parinaki
Numbers34:26 	Palitieli mwana wa Azani
Numbers34:27 	Ahihudi mwana wa Selomi
Numbers34:28 	Pedaheli mwana wa Amihudi
Numbers34:29 Awa ndiwo mayina a anthu amene Yehova analamula kuti agawe cholowa cha Aisraeli mʼdziko la Kanaani.
Numbers35:1 Ku zigwa za Mowabu pafupi ndi Yorodani ku Yeriko
Numbers35:2 “Lamula Aisraeli kuti apereke kwa Alevi midzi yoti azikhalamo kuchokera pa cholowa chomwe adzalandira. Muwapatsenso malo oweteramo ziweto kuzungulira midziyo.
Numbers35:3 Midziyo idzakhala yawo ndipo azidzakhala mʼmenemo. Malo a msipu adzakhala a ngʼombe
Numbers35:4 “Malo a msipu a mudziwo amene mudzawapatse Aleviwo
Numbers35:5 Kunja kwa mudzi yezani mamita 900 kummawa
Numbers35:6 “Isanu ndi umodzi mwa midzi imene mudzapereke kwa Alevi idzakhala mizinda yopulumukirako
Numbers35:7 Midzi yonse imene mudzapereke kwa Alevi idzakhale 48
Numbers35:8 Pamene mukupatula midzi imeneyi pa cholowa cha Aisraeli
Numbers35:9 Ndipo Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Numbers35:10 “Yankhula ndi Aisraeli kuti
Numbers35:11 sankhani midzi ina kuti ikhale mizinda yanu yopulumukirako
Numbers35:12 Adzakhala malo obisalako pothawa munthu wofuna kulipsira
Numbers35:13 Midzi isanu ndi umodzi imene muyiperekeyi idzakhala mizinda yopulumukirako.
Numbers35:14 Mupereke itatu mbali ino ya Yorodani ndi itatu ina mu Kanaani kuti ikhale mizinda yopulumukirako.
Numbers35:15 Midzi isanu ndi umodzi idzakhala malo opulumukirako Aisraeli
Numbers35:16 “ ‘Ngati munthu amenya mnzake ndi chitsulo
Numbers35:17 Kapenanso ngati wina wake ali ndi mwala mʼdzanja mwake womwe ungaphe munthu
Numbers35:18 Kapenanso ngati wina ali ndi chibonga mʼdzanja mwake choti nʼkupha nacho munthu
Numbers35:19 Wolipsira adzamuphanso wakuphayo. Pamene akumana naye adzayenera kumupha ndithu.
Numbers35:20 Ndipo ngati wina wake
Numbers35:21 kapena ngati
Numbers35:22 “ ‘Koma ngati popanda udani wina uliwonse
Numbers35:23 kapena mosamuona nʼkumuponyera mwala womwe utha kumupha
Numbers35:24 gulu liweruze pakati pa iye ndi wolipsira monga mwa malamulo ake.
Numbers35:25 Gulu lidzapulumutsa munthu wakuphayo mʼmanja mwa wolipsira uja ndi kumubwezera ku mzinda wopulumukirako kumene anathawira. Ayenera kukhala kumeneko kufikira imfa ya mkulu wa ansembe
Numbers35:26 “ ‘Koma ngati wolakwayo atuluka kunja kwa malire a mzinda wopulumukirako kumene anathawira
Numbers35:27 ndipo wobwezera choyipa nʼkumupeza kunja kwa mzindawo
Numbers35:28 Wolakwayo ayenera kukhala mu mzinda wopulumukiramowo mpaka imfa ya mkulu wa ansembe ndipo pamenepo atha kubwerera kwawo. Pokhapokha atafa mkulu wa ansembe ndi pamene angathe kubwerera ku malo ake.
Numbers35:29 “ ‘Amenewa akhale malamulo ndi malangizo kwa inu nthawi zonse ndi ku mibado ya mʼtsogolo
Numbers35:30 “ ‘Aliyense wopha munthu ayeneranso kuphedwa ngati pali umboni okwanira. Koma wina asaphedwe ngati pali mboni imodzi yokha.
Numbers35:31 “ ‘Osalola kulandira dipo lowombolera munthu wakupha yemwe ayenera kuphedwa. Wakupha ayenera kuphedwa.
Numbers35:32 “ ‘Simuyeneranso kulandira dipo kwa munthu amene wathawira ku mzinda wopulumikirako kuti wothawayo abwerere kwawo
Numbers35:33 “ ‘Musayipitse dziko limene mukukhalamolo. Magazi amayipitsa dziko ndipo nʼkosatheka kulipirira dziko chifukwa cha magazi amene akhetsedwa mʼmenemo
Numbers35:34 Choncho musadetse dziko limene mukukhalamo

Deuteronomy2:5 Musayambane nawo popeza sindidzakupatsani gawo lina lililonse la dziko lawo ngakhale poti mungoyika phazi. Ndamupatsa Esau dziko lamapiri la Seiri kuti likhale lakelake.
Deuteronomy2:6 Inu muyenera kuwalipira ndi siliva pa chakudya chimene mudye ndi madzi amene mumwe.’ ”
Deuteronomy2:7 Yehova Mulungu wanu wakudalitsani mʼntchito zonse za manja anu. Iye wakuyangʼanirani pa ulendo wanu wodutsa mʼchipululu chachikulu. Yehova Mulungu wanu wakhala nanu mʼzaka makumi anayi

Deuteronomy2:26 Ine ndinatuma amithenga kuchokera ku chipululu cha Kedemoti kupita kwa Sihoni mfumu ya Hesiboni kukanena mawu ofuna mtendere ndipo ndinati

Deuteronomy2:29 monga mmene anatichitira adzukulu a Esau okhala ku Seiri ndi Amowabu okhala ku Ari mpaka titawoloka Yorodani kufika ku dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wathu akutipatsa.”
Deuteronomy2:30 Koma Sihoni mfumu ya Hesiboni sanalole kuti tidutse. Popeza Yehova Mulungu wanu analimbitsa mzimu wake
