Deuteronomy3:1 Kenaka tinakhota ndi kumayenda mokwera mtunda ndi njira yolowera ku Basani. Ndipo Ogi mfumu ya ku Basani ndi gulu lake lonse lankhondo anakumana nafe ndipo anamenyana nafe ku Ederi.
Deuteronomy3:2 Yehova anati kwa ine
Deuteronomy3:3 Choncho Yehova Mulungu wathu anapereka mʼmanja mwathu Ogi mfumu ya ku Basani ndi gulu lake lonse lankhondo. Tinawakantha onsewo osasiya ndi mmodzi yemwe.
Deuteronomy3:4 Pa nthawi imeneyo tinatenga mizinda yake yonse. Pa mizinda 60
Deuteronomy3:5 Mizinda yonseyi inali yotetezedwa ndi malinga ataliatali wokhala ndi zitseko ndi zitsulo
Deuteronomy3:6 Tinawawonongeratu monga momwe tinachitira Sihoni
Deuteronomy3:7 Koma tinafunkha ziweto ndi katundu wawo yense.
Deuteronomy3:8 Choncho pa nthawi imeneyi tinalanda kwa mafumu awiri Aamori
Deuteronomy3:9 (Asidoni amatcha Herimoni kuti Siriyoni
Deuteronomy3:10 Tinalanda mizinda yonse ya ku mapiri
Deuteronomy3:11 (Ogi
Deuteronomy3:12 Dziko limene tinalanda nthawi imeneyo
Deuteronomy3:13 Theka la fuko la Manase ndinalipatsa dziko lonse lotsala la Giliyadi ndi Basani yense yemwe ndi dera la ufumu wa Ogi. (Chigawo chonse cha Arigobu mu Basani chinkadziwika kuti ndi dziko la Arefai.
Deuteronomy3:14 Yairi
Deuteronomy3:15 Ndipo ndinapereka Giliyadi kwa Makiri.
Deuteronomy3:16 Koma kwa fuko la Rubeni ndi fuko la Gadi ndinapereka chigawo chochokera ku Giliyadi kutsetsereka mpaka ku khwawa la Arinoni (pakati pa khwawalo ndiye panali malire) ndi kupitirira mpaka ku mtsinje wa Yaboki umene ndi malire Aamoni.
Deuteronomy3:17 Malire ake a chakumadzulo anali Yorodani ku Araba
Deuteronomy3:18 Ndinakulamulirani nthawi imene ija kuti
Deuteronomy3:19 Koma akazi anu
Deuteronomy3:20 mpaka Yehova atapereka mpumulo kwa abale anu
Deuteronomy3:21 Nthawi imeneyo ndinamulamula Yoswa kuti
Deuteronomy3:22 Musawaope chifukwa Yehova Mulungu mwini adzakumenyerani nkhondo.”
Deuteronomy3:23 Nthawi imeneyo ndinachonderera Yehova kuti
Deuteronomy3:24 “Ambuye Mulungu
Deuteronomy3:25 Mundilole ndipite ndi kukaona dziko labwinolo kutsidya kwa Yorodani dziko la mapiri abwinowo ndi Lebanoni.”
Deuteronomy3:26 Koma chifukwa cha inu
Deuteronomy3:27 Pita pamwamba pa phiri la Pisiga ndipo uyangʼane kumadzulo
Deuteronomy3:28 Koma langiza Yoswa ndipo umulimbikitse ndi kumupatsa mphamvu pakuti adzatsogolera anthu awa kuwoloka ndipo adzawathandiza kuti atenge dziko limene ulioneli.”
Deuteronomy3:29 Ndipo tinakhala mʼchigwa pafupi ndi Beti-Peori.
Deuteronomy4:1 Mverani inu Aisraeli
Deuteronomy4:2 Musawonjezere pa zimene ndikukulamulirani ndipo musachotserepo
Deuteronomy4:3 Inu munaona ndi maso anu zimene Yehova anachita ku Baala-Peori. Yehova Mulungu wanu anawononga aliyense amene anatsata Baala wa ku Peori pakati panu.
Deuteronomy4:4 Koma inu nonse amene munagwiritsitsa Yehova Mulungu wanu mukanali ndi moyo mpaka lero.
Deuteronomy4:5 Taonani
Deuteronomy4:6 Muwasunge mosamalitsa pakuti zimenezi zidzaonetsa nzeru zanu ndi kuzindikira kwanu kwa anthu a mitundu ina
Deuteronomy4:7 Mtundu wina wa anthu ndi uti umene uli waukulu chomwechi
Deuteronomy4:8 Ndipo ndi mtundu uti mwa mitundu ya anthu umene ndi waukulu chotere kuti nʼkukhala ndi malangizo ndi malamulo olungama ngati malamulo amene ndikuyika pamaso panu lero?
Deuteronomy4:9 Inu mungosamala ndi kudziyangʼanira kwambiri nokha kuti musayiwale zimene maso anu aona. Musalole kuti zichoke mʼmitima mwanu pa moyo wanu wonse. Zimenezi muziphunzitse kwa ana anu ndi zidzukulu zanu ngakhale mʼtsogolo.
Deuteronomy4:10 Kumbukirani tsiku limene munayimirira pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu ku Horebu
Deuteronomy4:11 Munabwera pafupi ndi kuyima pa tsinde pa phiri pamene phirilo limayaka moto umene umafika mpaka kumwamba. Panalinso mtambo wakuda ndi mdima wambiri.
Deuteronomy4:12 Kenaka Yehova anayankhula nanu kuchokera mʼmotowo. Inu munamva mawu ake okha koma simunamuone pakuti panali mawu chabe.
Deuteronomy4:13 Iye anakuwuzani Malamulo Khumi omwe ndi pangano lake limene anakulamulirani kuti mutsatire. Ndipo anawalemba malamulowo pa mapale awiri a miyala.
Deuteronomy4:14 Ndipo Yehova anandilamula nthawi imene ija kuti ndikuphunzitseni malangizo ndi malamulo amene muyenera kutsata mʼdziko limene mutenge mukawoloka Yorodani.
Deuteronomy4:15 Tsiku limene Yehova anayankhula nanu ku Horebu mʼmoto uja
Deuteronomy4:16 kuti musasokonezeke ndi kudzipangira nokha fano kapena chifanizo cha mtundu uliwonse
Deuteronomy4:17 kaya chokhala ngati nyama iliyonse ya pa dziko lapansi kapena mbalame iliyonse yowuluka mlengalenga.
Deuteronomy4:18 Kapena cholengedwa chilichonse choyenda pa nthaka kapena nsomba ya mʼmadzi akuya.
Deuteronomy4:19 Ndipo pamene muyangʼana kumwamba muona dzuwa
Deuteronomy4:20 Koma inuyo
Deuteronomy4:21 Yehova anakwiya nane chifukwa cha inu
Deuteronomy4:22 Ine ndifera mʼdziko lino
Deuteronomy4:23 Samalani
Deuteronomy4:24 Pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi moto wonyeketsa ndipo ndi Mulungu wansanje.
Deuteronomy4:25 Mukadzakhala nthawi yayitali mʼdzikomo ndi kubereka ana ndi kukhala ndi zidzukulu ndipo mukadzasokonekera ndi kupanga fano la mtundu uliwonse
Deuteronomy4:26 ine ndi kuti kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zikhale mboni lero zokutsutsani kuti mudzawonongedwa msanga ndipo mudzachotsedwa mʼdziko limene mutenge mukawoloka Yorodani. Simudzakhalitsa kumeneko koma mudzawonongedwa ndithu.
Deuteronomy4:27 Yehova adzakubalalitsani pakati pa anthu ena. Ochepa okha pakati panu ndi amene adzapulumuke pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina kumene Yehova adzakupirikitsireniko.
Deuteronomy4:28 Kumeneko mudzapembedza milungu ya mitengo ndi miyala yopangidwa ndi anthu
Deuteronomy4:29 Mukanali komweko
Deuteronomy4:30 Mukadzakhala pa chipsinjo ndipo zonsezi zikadzakuchitikirani
Deuteronomy4:31 Pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi Mulungu wachifundo
Deuteronomy4:32 Tsopano tafunsani za masiku a mʼmbuyomu
Deuteronomy4:33 Kodi uliponso mtundu wina wa anthu umene unamva mawu a Mulungu akuyankhula kuchokera mʼmoto nʼkukhala ndi moyo monga mwachitira inumu?
Deuteronomy4:34 Kodi alipo mulungu amene anayeserapo kudzitengera mtundu wa anthu kuwachotsa mu mtundu unzake mwa mayesero
Deuteronomy4:35 Iye anakuonetsani zonsezi kuti inu muzindikire kuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu
Deuteronomy4:36 Kuchokera kumwamba
Deuteronomy4:37 Popeza anakonda makolo anu ndi kusankha adzukulu awo
Deuteronomy4:38 kuti akupirikitsireni mayiko akuluakulu ndi amphamvu kuposa inu
Deuteronomy4:39 Vomerezani lero ndipo dziwani mu mtima mwanu kuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu kumwamba ndi pa dziko lapansi. Palibenso wina.
Deuteronomy4:40 Sungani malangizo ake ndi malamulo ake amene ndikukupatsani lero lino
Deuteronomy4:41 Kenaka Mose anapatula mizinda itatu cha kummawa kwa Yorodani
Deuteronomy4:42 kumene aliyense amene wapha munthu akhoza kuthawirako ngati wopha munthuyo sanaphe mnzakeyo mwadala ndi maganizo oyipa. Iye akhoza kuthawira ku umodzi mwa mizinda imeneyi napulumutsa moyo wake.
Deuteronomy4:43 Mizindayo inali iyi: ku fuko la Rubeni
Deuteronomy4:44 Awa ndi malamulo amene Mose anapereka kwa Aisraeli.
Deuteronomy4:45 Izi ndi ndondomeko
Deuteronomy4:46 Anali ku chigwa cha kufupi ndi Beti-Peori mbali ya kummawa kwa Yorodani
Deuteronomy4:47 Iye anamulanda dziko lake ndi dziko la Ogi mfumu ya ku Basani. Awa anali mafumu awiri Aamori a kummawa kwa Yorodani.
Deuteronomy4:48 Dziko ili linayambira ku Aroeri cha kumphepete kwa khwawa la Arinoni ku phiri la Siyoni (limeneli ndi phiri la Herimoni)
Deuteronomy4:49 ndi kuphatikizapo dziko lonse la Araba cha kummawa kwa Yorodani mpaka kukafika ku Nyanja ya Araba
Deuteronomy5:1 Mose anayitanitsa Aisraeli onse nati: Tamverani inu Aisraeli
Deuteronomy5:2 Yehova Mulungu wathu anachita pangano ndi ife ku Horebu.
Deuteronomy5:3 Yehova sanachite pangano ndi makolo athu koma ndi ife
Deuteronomy5:4 Yehova anayankhula nanu maso ndi maso kuchokera mʼmoto pa phiri paja.
Deuteronomy5:5 (Pa nthawi imeneyo ine ndinayimirira pakati pa Yehova ndi inu kuti ndikuwuzeni mawu a Yehova
Deuteronomy5:6 “Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wako amene ndinakutulutsa ku Igupto
Deuteronomy5:7 “Usakhale ndi milungu ina koma Ine ndekha.
Deuteronomy5:8 “Usadzipangire chofanizira chinthu chilichonse chakumwamba kapena cha pa dziko lapansi kapena cha mʼmadzi a pansi pa dziko.
Deuteronomy5:9 Usazigwadire kapena kuzipembedza
Deuteronomy5:10 koma ndimaonetsa chikondi chosasinthika ku mibado miyandamiyanda ya anthu amene amandikonda ndi kusunga malamulo anga.
Deuteronomy5:11 “Usagwiritse ntchito molakwika dzina la Yehova Mulungu wako
Deuteronomy5:12 “Uzisunga tsiku la Sabata kuti likhale lopatulika monga momwe Yehova Mulungu wako anakulamulira.
Deuteronomy5:13 Uzigwira ntchito zako zonse masiku asanu ndi limodzi
Deuteronomy5:14 koma tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri ndi Sabata
Deuteronomy5:15 Kumbukira kuti unali kapolo ku Igupto ndipo Yehova Mulungu wako anakutulutsa kumeneko ndi dzanja lamphamvu ndi lotambasuka. Choncho Yehova Mulungu wako akukulamula kuti uzisunga tsiku la Sabata.
Deuteronomy5:16 “Lemekeza abambo ako ndi amayi ako monga Yehova Mulungu wako wakulamulira iwe kuti ukhale ndi moyo wautali ndi kuti zikuyendere bwino mʼdziko limene Yehova Mulungu wako akukupatsa.
Deuteronomy5:17 “Usaphe.
Deuteronomy5:18 “Usachite chigololo.
Deuteronomy5:19 “Usabe.
Deuteronomy5:20 “Usapereke umboni womunamizira mnzako.
Deuteronomy5:21 “Usasirire mkazi wa mnzako. Usasirire nyumba ya mnzako kapena munda wake
Deuteronomy5:22 Awa ndi malamulo amene Yehova anayankhula ndi mawu okweza kwa gulu lanu lonse pa phiri paja mʼmoto
Deuteronomy5:23 Mutamva mawu kuchokera mu mdimawo
Deuteronomy5:24 Ndipo munati
Deuteronomy5:25 Koma tsopano tife chifukwa chiyani? Moto waukuluwu utinyeketsa
Deuteronomy5:26 Pakuti ndi munthu uti wolengedwa amene anamvapo mawu a Mulungu wamoyo akuyankhula kuchokera mʼmoto
Deuteronomy5:27 Pita pafupi kuti ukamvetsere zonse zimene Yehova Mulungu wathu akunena. Kenaka udzatiwuze chilichonse chimene Yehova Mulungu wathu akunena ndipo tidzamvera ndi kuchita.”
Deuteronomy5:28 Yehova anakumvani pamene munkayankhula kwa ine ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine
Deuteronomy5:29 Zikanakhala bwino akanakhala ndi mtima wondiopa ndi kusunga malamulo anga nthawi zonse kuti zinthu ziziwayendera bwino
Deuteronomy5:30 “Pita uwawuze kuti abwerere ku matenti awo.
Deuteronomy5:31 Koma iwe ukhale kuno ndi ine kuti ndikupatse malamulo
Deuteronomy5:32 Choncho samalirani kuchita zimene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukulamulirani inu
Deuteronomy5:33 Muyende mʼnjira yonse imene Yehova Mulungu wanu wakulamulirani kuti mukhale ndi moyo ndi kupambana
Deuteronomy6:1 Awa ndi malamulo
Deuteronomy6:2 kuti inuyo
Deuteronomy6:3 Mvera Israeli ndipo usamalitse kuchita malamulowa kuti zinthu zikuyendere bwino mʼdziko ndi kuti muchuluke kwambiri mʼdziko loyenda mkaka ndi uchi monga momwe Yehova Mulungu wa makolo anu anakulonjezerani.
Deuteronomy6:4 Tamvani inu Aisraeli
Deuteronomy6:5 Uzikonda Yehova Mulungu wako ndi mtima wako wonse
Deuteronomy6:6 Malamulo amene ndakupatsani lero ayenera kukhala mu mtima mwanu.
Deuteronomy6:7 Muziwaphunzitsa mwachangu kwa ana anu. Muzikamba za malamulowa pamene muli mʼnyumba zanu
Deuteronomy6:8 Muwamange ngati zizindikiro pa manja anu ndi kuwamangirira pa zipumi zanu.
Deuteronomy6:9 Muwalembe pa mphuthu za nyumba zanu ndi pa zipata zanu.
Deuteronomy6:10 Pamene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukulowetsani ndi kukupatsani dziko limene analumbirira makolo anu Abrahamu
Deuteronomy6:11 nyumba zodzaza ndi zinthu za mitundu yonse zimene inu simunayikemo
Deuteronomy6:12 samalani kuti mungayiwale Yehova amene anakutulutsani ku Igupto
Deuteronomy6:13 Muziopa Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi kumutumikira Iye yekha
Deuteronomy6:14 Musamatsatire milungu ina
Deuteronomy6:15 pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu amene ali pakati panu
Deuteronomy6:16 Musamuyese Yehova Mulungu wanu monga munachitira ku Masa.
Deuteronomy6:17 Onetsetsani kuti mukusunga malamulo a Yehova Mulungu wanu
Deuteronomy6:18 Chitani zoyenera ndi zabwino pamaso pa Yehova
Deuteronomy6:19 kupirikitsiratu adani anu onse
Deuteronomy6:20 Mʼtsogolo muno
Deuteronomy6:21 Inu mudzawawuze kuti
Deuteronomy6:22 Ifeyo tikuona Yehova anatumiza zizindikiro zozizwitsa ndi zodabwitsa
Deuteronomy6:23 Koma anatitulutsa kumeneko ndi kutilowetsa kuno natipatsa dziko limene analonjeza mwa lumbiro kwa makolo athu.
Deuteronomy6:24 Yehova anatilamula kuti tizimvera malamulo onsewa
Deuteronomy6:25 Ndipo ngati tisamala kumvera malamulo onsewa pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wathu monga momwe anatilamulira ife
Deuteronomy7:1 Pamene Yehova Mulungu wanu wakufikitsani mʼdziko limene mukukalowa ndi kulilanda ndi kuthamangitsa pamaso panu mitundu ya anthu iyi: Ahiti
Deuteronomy7:2 Yehova Mulungu wanu akadzawapereka mʼmanja mwanu
Deuteronomy7:3 Musadzakwatirane nawo. Musadzapereke ana anu aakazi kwa ana awo aamuna kapena kutenga ana anu aamuna ndi kuwapereka kwa ana awo aakazi.
Deuteronomy7:4 Mukadzatero
Deuteronomy7:5 Koma mukachite izi: Mukagumule maguwa awo ansembe
Deuteronomy7:6 Pakuti inu ndinu anthu opatulika kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu. Yehova Mulungu wanu anakusankhani pakati pa anthu onse pa dziko lapansi kuti mukhale ake
Deuteronomy7:7 Yehova sanakukondeni chifukwa choti munali ochuluka kuposa ena pakuti inuyo ndiye munali ochepetsetsa mwa anthu onse.
Deuteronomy7:8 Koma chifukwa chakuti Yehova anakukondani nasunga lumbiro lake limene analumbira kwa makolo anu. Ndi chifukwa chake anakutulutsani ndi mphamvu yake yopanda malire ndi kukupulumutsani ku dziko la ukapolo
Deuteronomy7:9 Choncho dziwani kuti Yehova Mulungu wanu
Deuteronomy7:10 Koma iwo amene amamuda adzawabwezera powawononga pamaso pawo; sadzachedwa kuwabwezera iwo amene amadana naye.
Deuteronomy7:11 Choncho muziyesetsa kusunga malamulo
Deuteronomy7:12 Mukamvera malamulo amenewa
Deuteronomy7:13 Iye adzakukondani nakudalitsani ndi kukuchulukitsani. Adzadalitsa chipatso cha mʼmimba mwanu
Deuteronomy7:14 Inu mudzadalitsika kuposa mtundu wina uliwonse wa anthu ndipo palibe mwamuna kapena mkazi aliyense pakati panu amene adzakhale wosabereka. Ziweto zanu nazonso
Deuteronomy7:15 Yehova adzakupewetsani ku matenda aliwonse. Sadzakugwetserani matenda owopsa aja munawadziwa ku Igupto
Deuteronomy7:16 Muwononge anthu onse amene Yehova Mulungu wanu awapereka kwa inu. Musawamvere chisoni ndipo musatumikire milungu yawo pakuti umenewo udzakhala msampha kwa inu.
Deuteronomy7:17 Mukhoza kunena kuti
Deuteronomy7:18 Koma musachite nawo mantha
Deuteronomy7:19 Munadzionera nokha ndi maso anu mayesero aakulu
Deuteronomy7:20 Kuwonjezera apo
Deuteronomy7:21 Musaopsedwe nawo pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu
Deuteronomy7:22 Yehova Mulungu wanu adzapirikitsa anthu a mitundu yonse pamaso panu
Deuteronomy7:23 Koma Yehova Mulungu wanu adzawapereka kwa inu
Deuteronomy7:24 Iye adzapereka mafumu awo mʼdzanja lanu
Deuteronomy7:25 Muwawotche pa moto mafano a milungu yawo. Musasirire siliva ndi golide amene ali pa mafanoyo. Musamutenge kuti akhale wanu chifukwa mukatero mudzakodwa naye ngati msampha
Deuteronomy7:26 Musabweretse chinthu chonyansa mʼnyumba mwanu kuopa kuwonongedwa ngati chonyasacho. Muziyipidwa ndi kunyansidwa nacho kwambiri pakuti chidzawonongedwanso.
Deuteronomy8:1 Samalani potsata lamulo lililonse limene ndikukupatsani lero
Deuteronomy8:2 Kumbukirani mmene Yehova Mulungu wanu anakutsogolerani njira yonse mʼchipululu kwa zaka makumi anayi
Deuteronomy8:3 Iye anakutsitsani nakumvetsani njala kenaka nʼkukudyetsani mana amene anali osadziwika kwa inu kapena makolo anu
Deuteronomy8:4 Mʼzaka makumi anayi zimenezi
Deuteronomy8:5 Tsono dziwani mu mtima mwanu kuti monga abambo amalanga mwana wawo
Deuteronomy8:6 Samalirani malamulo a Yehova Mulungu wanu
Deuteronomy8:7 Pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu akukulowetsani mʼdziko labwino
Deuteronomy8:8 dziko lokhala ndi tirigu ndi barele
Deuteronomy8:9 dziko limene buledi sadzasowa ndipo simudzasowa chilichonse; dziko limene miyala yake ndi chitsulo ndipo ku mapiri ake mukhoza kukumbako mkuwa.
Deuteronomy8:10 Mukadya ndi kukhuta
Deuteronomy8:11 Samalani kuopa kuti mungayiwale Yehova Mulungu wanu posasunga malamulo
Deuteronomy8:12 kuopa kuti mukadya ndi kukhuta
Deuteronomy8:13 ndi pamene ngʼombe zanu ndi nkhosa zanu zaswana
Deuteronomy8:14 mtima wanu udzayamba kunyada ndi kuyiwala Yehova Mulungu wanu
Deuteronomy8:15 Iye anakutsogolerani kudutsa mʼchipululu chachikulu ndi chochititsa mantha
Deuteronomy8:16 Iye anakupatsani mana kuti mudye mʼchipululu
Deuteronomy8:17 Mu mtima mwanu mukhoza kuganiza kuti
Deuteronomy8:18 Koma kumbukirani Yehova Mulungu chifukwa ndi amene amakupatsani mphamvu zopezera chuma chimenechi kuti atsimikize pangano limene analumbira kwa makolo anu
Deuteronomy8:19 Ine ndine mboni yokutsutsani lero lino
Deuteronomy8:20 Monga mitundu ina ya anthu imene Yehova anayiwononga pamaso panu
Deuteronomy9:1 Mvera Israeli. Watsala pangʼono kuwoloka Yorodani ndi kukathamangitsa mitundu ikuluikulu ndi yamphamvu kuposa iweyo
Deuteronomy9:2 Anthuwo ndi ataliatali
Deuteronomy9:3 Koma khulupirira lero kuti Yehova Mulungu wako amene ali patsogolo pako ali ngati moto wonyeketsa. Adzawononga iwowo ndipo adzawagonjetsa iweyo ukuona. Pamenepo udzawathamangitsa ndi kuwakantha mwamsanga
Deuteronomy9:4 Yehova Mulungu wako akadzawapirikitsa pamaso pako
Deuteronomy9:5 Sukalowa ndi kutenga dziko lawolo chifukwa cha kulungama kwako kapena kukhulupirika kwako koma chifukwa cha kuyipa kwa anthuwo. Yehova Mulungu wako awapirikitsa pamaso pako kuti akwaniritse zimene analumbira kwa makolo ako Abrahamu
Deuteronomy9:6 Tsono zindikira kuti si chifukwa cha kulungama kwako kuti Yehova Mulungu wako akukupatsa dziko labwinoli kuti ulitenge popeza ndiwe wokanika.
Deuteronomy9:7 Kumbukirani izi ndipo musayiwale mmene munaputira mkwiyo wa Yehova Mulungu mʼchipululu muja. Kuyambira tsiku limene munatuluka mu Igupto mpaka pamene munafika kuno
Deuteronomy9:8 Ku Horebu munaputa mkwiyo wa Yehova
Deuteronomy9:9 Nditakwera ku phiri kuti ndikalandire miyala iwiri ya malamulo
Deuteronomy9:10 Yehova anandipatsa miyala iwiri yolembedwa ndi chala chake. Pa miyalapo panali malamulo onse amene Yehova analengeza kwa inu pa phiri kuchokera mʼmoto pa tsiku la msonkhano.
Deuteronomy9:11 Pakutha pa masiku makumi anayi usiku ndi usana
Deuteronomy9:12 Tsono Yehova anandiwuza
Deuteronomy9:13 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine
Deuteronomy9:14 Ndilekeni ndiwawononge ndi kufafaniza mayina awo pa dziko lapansi. Ndipo ndidzakuyesa iwe mtundu wa anthu wamphamvu ndi wochuluka kuposa iwo.”
Deuteronomy9:15 Choncho ndinatembenuka ndi kutsika phiri moto ukanayakabe. Ndipo miyala iwiri ya pangano inali mʼmanja mwanga.
Deuteronomy9:16 Ine poyangʼana ndinaona kuti inu munachimwira Yehova Mulungu wanu. Munadzipangira fano lowumbidwa ngati mwana wangʼombe. Inuyo munapatuka msanga kuchoka pa njira imene Yehova anakulamulirani.
Deuteronomy9:17 Motero ine ndinaponya pansi miyala imene inali mʼmanja mwanga
Deuteronomy9:18 Tsono nthawi yomweyo ndinagwa chafufumimba pamaso pa Yehova kwa masiku makumi anayi usiku ndi usana. Sindinadye buledi kapena kumwa madzi chifukwa cha machimo onse amene munawachita
Deuteronomy9:19 Ine ndinachita mantha ndi mkwiyo ndi ukali wa Yehova chifukwa anakwiya nanu kokwanira kukuwonongani. Koma Yehova anandimveranso.
Deuteronomy9:20 Ndipo Yehova anakwiya ndi Aaroni ndipo akanamuwononga
Deuteronomy9:21 Ndiponso ndinatenga chinthu chanu choyipacho
Deuteronomy9:22 Inu munamukwiyitsanso Yehova ku Tabera
Deuteronomy9:23 Ndipo Yehova atakutulutsani ku Kadesi Barinea anati
Deuteronomy9:24 Kuyambira pamene ndinakudziwani
Deuteronomy9:25 Ine ndinagwa chafufumimba pamaso pa Yehova kwa masiku makumi anayi usana ndi usiku chifukwa Yehova ananena kuti akuwonongani.
Deuteronomy9:26 Ndinapemphera kwa Ambuye ndi kuti
Deuteronomy9:27 Kumbukirani atumiki anu Abrahamu
Deuteronomy9:28 Kupanda kutero
Deuteronomy9:29 Koma iwowa ndi anthu anu
Deuteronomy10:1 Pa nthawi imeneyo Yehova anati kwa ine
Deuteronomy10:2 Ndidzalembapo mawu amene anali pa miyala yoyamba ija
Deuteronomy10:3 Choncho ndinapanga bokosi lamatabwa amtengo wa mkesha ndi kusema miyala iwiri yofanana ndi yoyamba ija
Deuteronomy10:4 Yehova analemba pa miyala iwiriyo zimene analemba poyamba
Deuteronomy10:5 Tsono ndinatsika ku phiri kuja ndi kuyika miyalayo mʼbokosi ndinapanga lija monga Yehova anandilamulira
Deuteronomy10:6 Aisraeli anayenda kuchokera ku Beeroti Beni Yaakani mpaka ku Mosera. Kumeneko Aaroni anamwalira nayikidwa mʼmanda
Deuteronomy10:7 Kuchokera kumeneko Aisraeli anapita ku Gudigoda
Deuteronomy10:8 Pa nthawi imeneyo Yehova anapatula fuko la Levi kuti anyamule bokosi la pangano la Yehova lija
Deuteronomy10:9 Nʼchifukwa chake Alevi alibe gawo kapena cholowa pakati pa abale awo. Yehova ndiye cholowa chawo monga momwe Yehova Mulungu wanu anawawuzira.
Deuteronomy10:10 Tsopano ndinakhala ku phiri kuja kwa masiku makumi anayi usana ndi usiku monga ndinachitira poyamba
Deuteronomy10:11 Yehova anati kwa ine
Deuteronomy10:12 Tsopano inu Aisraeli
Deuteronomy10:13 ndi kusunga malamulo ndi malangizo amene ndikukupatsani lero kuti zizikuyenderani bwino.
Deuteronomy10:14 Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye mwini wake kumwamba ngakhale mmwambamwamba
Deuteronomy10:15 Yehova anayika mtima wake pa makolo anu okha ndipo anawakondadi nasankha adzukulu awo mwa mitundu yonse pa dziko lapansi
Deuteronomy10:16 Motero chitani mdulidwe wa mitima yanu ndipo musakhalenso opulupudza.
Deuteronomy10:17 Pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi Mulungu wa milungu
Deuteronomy10:18 Iye amatchinjiriza ana amasiye ndi akazi amasiye
Deuteronomy10:19 Muzikonda alendo popeza inuyo munali alendo mʼdziko la Igupto.
Deuteronomy10:20 Muziopa Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi kumutumikira Iye. Mumukakamire Iyeyo ndi kuchita malumbiro anu mʼdzina lake.
Deuteronomy10:21 Iye ndiye matamando anu
Deuteronomy10:22 Makolo anu amene anapita ku Igupto analipo makumi asanu ndi awiri onse pamodzi
Deuteronomy11:1 Muzikonda Yehova Mulungu wanu ndipo nthawi zonse muzitsata zimene Iyeyo anakulamulani
Deuteronomy11:2 Lero kumbukirani kuti si ana anu amene anaona ndi kulawa chilango cha Yehova Mulungu wanu: ukulu wake
Deuteronomy11:3 zizindikiro zozizwitsa zimene anazionetsa ndi zinthu zimene anazichita mʼkati mwa Igupto
Deuteronomy11:4 zimene Iye anachita kwa gulu lankhondo la Aigupto
Deuteronomy11:5 Si ana anu amene anaona zimene Iye anakuchitirani mʼchipululu kufikira pamene munafika pa malo anu
Deuteronomy11:6 ndi zimene anachitira Datani ndi Abiramu
Deuteronomy11:7 Koma ndinuyo amene munaona ntchito zonse zikuluzikulu zimenezi Yehova anakuchitirani.
Deuteronomy11:8 Tsono muzisunga malamulo onse amene ndikukupatsani lero kuti mukhale ndi mphamvu ndi kuti mupite kukalanda mʼdziko limene mwakhala pangʼono kulowamo mukawoloka Yorodani
Deuteronomy11:9 ndiponso kuti mukhalitse mʼdziko limene Yehova analumbira kupatsa makolo anu ndi zidzukulu zawo
Deuteronomy11:10 Dziko limene mukukalanda ndi kulowamo silokhala ngati dziko la ku Igupto kumene mukuchokera ayi
Deuteronomy11:11 Koma dziko limene mukalande mukawoloka Yorodani ndi dziko la mapiri ndi zigwa
Deuteronomy11:12 Ili ndi dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu amalisamalira. Maso a Yehova Mulungu wanu amaliyangʼanira nthawi zonse kuchokera ku mayambiriro a chaka mpaka kumapeto kwake.
Deuteronomy11:13 Choncho mukasunga mokhulupirika malamulo amene ndikukupatsani lero lino
Deuteronomy11:14 pamenepo ndidzatumiza mvula mʼdziko mwanu pa nthawi yake mʼnyengo ya dzinja ndi chilimwe
Deuteronomy11:15 Ndidzakupatsani udzu mʼminda mwanu woti muzidzadyetsera ngʼombe zanu ndipo inuyo mudzadya ndi kukhuta.
Deuteronomy11:16 Dzisamalireni nokha
Deuteronomy11:17 Mukatero Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakukwiyirani kwambiri
Deuteronomy11:18 Sungani mawu amenewa mu mtima mwanu ndi mʼmaganizo mwanu
Deuteronomy11:19 Mawuwa muziphunzitsa ana anu
Deuteronomy11:20 Muwalembe pa mphuthu za nyumba zanu ndi pa zipata zanu
Deuteronomy11:21 kuti inu ndi ana anu mukhale mʼdziko limene Yehova analumbira kupatsa makolo anu mpaka kalekale monga umakhalira mlengalenga pamwamba pa dziko.
Deuteronomy11:22 Mukatsatira mosamalitsa malamulo amene ndikukupatsaniwa
Deuteronomy11:23 Yehova adzapirikitsa mitundu ina yonseyi inu musanafike ndipo mudzagonjetsa mitundu ikuluikulu ndi yamphamvu kuposa inu.
Deuteronomy11:24 Malo aliwonse amene mudzaponda adzakhala anu: dziko lanu lidzachokera ku chipululu mpaka ku Lebanoni
Deuteronomy11:25 Palibe munthu amene adzalimbana nanu. Monga analonjezera
Deuteronomy11:26 Taonani
Deuteronomy11:27 dalitso ngati mumvera malamulo a Yehova Mulungu wanu amene ndikukupatsani lero.
Deuteronomy11:28 Temberero ngati simumvera malamulo a Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi kupatuka pa njira imene ndikulamulirani lero potsata milungu ina imene simunayidziwe.
Deuteronomy11:29 Yehova Mulungu wanu akakakufikitsani mʼdziko mukukalandalo kuti mulowemo mukanene za madalitso pa Phiri la Gerizimu
Deuteronomy11:30 Monga mudziwa
Deuteronomy11:31 Mwatsala pangʼono kuwoloka Yorodani kuti mulowe ndi kutenga dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukupatsani. Mukadzalitenga dzikolo ndi kukhalamo
Deuteronomy11:32 mudzaonetsetse kuti mukumvera malangizo ndi malamulo amene ndikukuwuzani lero.
Deuteronomy12:1 Awa ndi malangizo ndi malamulo amene muyenera kusamalitsanso kuti muwatsatire mʼdziko limene Yehova Mulungu wa makolo anu wakupatsani kuti mutenge pa nthawi yonse imene muti mudzakhale mʼdzikomo.
Deuteronomy12:2 Muwonongeretu kwathunthu malo onse a pamwamba pa mapiri ataliatali ndi pa mapiri angʼonoangʼono ndi pansi pa mtengo uliwonse wotambalala pamene mitundu imene muyilande dzikolo ankapembedzerapo milungu yawo.
Deuteronomy12:3 Mugumule maguwa awo ansembe
Deuteronomy12:4 Musapembedze Yehova Mulungu wanu monga mmene amachitira iwowa.
Deuteronomy12:5 Koma inu muzifunafuna kumalo kumene Yehova Mulungu wanu adzasankhe pakati pa mafuko anu kuti ayikeko dzina lake ndi kukhalako. Ku malo amenewa muyenera kupitako.
Deuteronomy12:6 Kumeneko muzipititsako zopereka zanu ndi nsembe zanu zopsereza
Deuteronomy12:7 Kumeneko
Deuteronomy12:8 Musadzachite monga tikuchitira lero lino
Deuteronomy12:9 pakuti simunafike ku malo opumulirako ndi ku cholowa chimene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukupatsani.
Deuteronomy12:10 Koma mudzawoloka Yorodani ndi kukhazikika mʼdziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukupatsani ngati cholowa chanu
Deuteronomy12:11 Tsono kumalo kumene Yehova Mulungu wanu adzasankhe kuti azikhalako muzikabweretsako chilichonse chimene ndikulamulirani inu: zopereka ndi nsembe zanu zopsereza
Deuteronomy12:12 Ndipo kumeneko inu mukasangalale pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu pamodzi ndi ana anu aamuna ndi ana anu aakazi
Deuteronomy12:13 Musamalitse kuti musakaphere nsembe zanu zopsereza paliponse pamene mungafune.
Deuteronomy12:14 Mukaphere pa malo okhawo amene Yehova adzawasankhe mwa limodzi la mafuko anu
Deuteronomy12:15 Koma mukhoza kumapha ziweto zanu mʼmizinda iliyonse ndi kudya nyama yake mmene mungafunire
Deuteronomy12:16 Koma musamadye magazi. Muziwathira pansi ngati madzi.
Deuteronomy12:17 Musamadyere mʼmizinda yanu chakhumi cha tirigu wanu ndi vinyo watsopano ndi mafuta
Deuteronomy12:18 mʼmalo mwake
Deuteronomy12:19 Muonetsetse kuti musawataye Alevi pa masiku onse amene mukhale mʼdziko lanumo.
Deuteronomy12:20 Yehova Mulungu wanu akadzakulitsa dziko lanu monga anakulonjezerani
Deuteronomy12:21 Ngati malo amene Yehova Mulungu wanu awasankha kuti ayike Dzina lake ali kutali kwambiri ndi inu
Deuteronomy12:22 Muzidye ngati mukudya gwape kapena mbawala. Onse oyeretsedwa monga mwa mwambo ndi osayeretsedwa omwe akhoza kudya.
Deuteronomy12:23 Koma muonetsetse kuti musadye magazi
Deuteronomy12:24 Inu musamadye magazi
Deuteronomy12:25 Musamadye magazi kuti zikuyendereni bwino inu pamodzi ndi ana anu a pambuyo panu
Deuteronomy12:26 Koma mutenge zinthu zanu zoyeretsedwa ndi china chilichonse chimene munalumbira kupereka
Deuteronomy12:27 Mupereke nsembe zanu zopsereza pa guwa lansembe la Yehova Mulungu wanu
Deuteronomy12:28 Onetsetsani kuti muzimvera mawu onsewa amene ndikukupatsani kuti zinthu zizikuyenderani bwino nthawi zonse inu ndi ana anu chifukwa mudzakhala mukuchita zabwino ndi zoyenera pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu.
Deuteronomy12:29 Yehova Mulungu wanu adzachotsa pamaso panu mitundu ya anthu amene mukufuna kuwathira nkhondo ndi kuwalanda dzikolo. Koma mukawapirikitsa ndi kukhazikika mʼdziko lawo
Deuteronomy12:30 ndipo pamene iwo awonongeka pamaso panu
Deuteronomy12:31 Musapembedze Yehova Mulungu wanu momwe amachitira iwowo
Deuteronomy12:32 Onetsetsani kuti mukuchita zimene ndikukulamulirani. Musawonjezerepo kapena kuchotserapo.
Deuteronomy13:1 Ngati mneneri kapena wina aliyense amene amanena zamʼtsogolo mwa maloto atuluka pakati panu
Deuteronomy13:2 chinthu nʼkuchitikadi
Deuteronomy13:3 musamumvere mneneriyo kapena wolotayo. Yehova Mulungu wanu afuna akuyeseni kuti aone ngati mumamukonda ndi mtima wanu wonse ndi moyo wanu wonse.
Deuteronomy13:4 Muyenera kutsatira Yehova Mulungu wanu
Deuteronomy13:5 Mneneri kapena wolotayo ayenera kuphedwa
Deuteronomy13:6 Ngati mʼbale wanu weniweni kapena mwana wanu wamwamuna kapena wamkazi
Deuteronomy13:7 milungu ya anthu okuzungulirani
Deuteronomy13:8 musamugonjere kapena kumumvera. Musamumvere chisoni. Musamuleke kapena kumutchinjiriza.
Deuteronomy13:9 Mumuphe ndithu. Dzanja lanu likhale loyambirira kumupha
Deuteronomy13:10 Mumuponye miyala mpaka kumupha
Deuteronomy13:11 Tsono Aisraeli onse adzamva nachita mantha
Deuteronomy13:12 Ngati mumvetsedwa kuti ku umodzi mwa mizinda imene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukupatsani kuti mukhalemo
Deuteronomy13:13 kwapezeka anthu ena oyipa pakati panu ndipo asocheretsa anthu ambiri mʼmizinda yanu
Deuteronomy13:14 mukuyenera kufunsa
Deuteronomy13:15 muyenera kuwapha onse okhala mu mzinda umenewo. Muwonongeretu kwathunthu mzindawo
Deuteronomy13:16 Katundu yense wa anthu mu mzindawo mumuwunjike pamodzi pakatikati pa bwalo losonkhanako ndipo mutenthe mzindawo pamodzi ndi katundu wake yense monga nsembe yathunthu yopsereza ya kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu. Mzinda umenewo ukhale bwinja mpaka muyaya
Deuteronomy13:17 Musapezeke ndi kanthu kalikonse koyenera kuwonongedwa kuti Yehova abweze mkwiyo wake wochititsa manthawu. Adzakuchitirani chifundo ndi kukumverani chisoni
Deuteronomy13:18 chifukwa mumamvera Yehova Mulungu wanu
Deuteronomy14:1 Inu ndinu ana a Yehova Mulungu wanu. Osamadzichekacheka kapena kudzimeta pamphumi chifukwa cha abale anu amene amwalira
Deuteronomy14:2 pakuti ndinu anthu opatulika a Yehova Mulungu wanu. Pakati pa anthu onse pa dziko lonse lapansi
Deuteronomy14:3 Musamadye chinthu chilichonse chonyansa.
Deuteronomy14:4 Nyama zomwe mukhoza kudya ndi izi: ngʼombe
Deuteronomy14:5 mbawala
Deuteronomy14:6 Nyama iliyonse imene ili ndi chipondero chogawikana pakati ndi yobzikula mukhoza kudya.
Deuteronomy14:7 Komabe pakati pa nyama zimene zimabzikula kapena zogawikana zipondero
Deuteronomy14:8 Nkhumba simabzikula ndi yodetsedwanso ngakhale ili ndi zipondero zogawikana. Musamadye nyama yake kapena kukhudza imene yafa.
Deuteronomy14:9 Mwa zamoyo zonse zimene zimakhala mʼmadzi
Deuteronomy14:10 Koma chilichonse chimene chilibe minga ya pa msana ndi mamba musadye pakuti nʼchodetsedwa.
Deuteronomy14:11 Mukhoza kudya mbalame iliyonse yoyenera kudya.
Deuteronomy14:12 Koma simukuyenera kudya izi: mphungu
Deuteronomy14:13 nankapakapa
Deuteronomy14:14 mtundu uliwonse wa khwangwala
Deuteronomy14:15 kadzidzi wamphondo
Deuteronomy14:16 kadzidzi wamngʼono
Deuteronomy14:17 tsekwe
Deuteronomy14:18 indwa
Deuteronomy14:19 Zowuluka zonse za miyendo inayi ndi zodetsedwa. Musamadye zimenezi.
Deuteronomy14:20 Koma chowuluka chilichonse choyenera kudya mukhoza kudya.
Deuteronomy14:21 Musamadye chilichonse chimene mwachipeza chofaifa. Mukhoza kupatsa mlendo amene akukhala mu mzinda wina uliwonse wa mizinda yanu. Iyeyo akhoza kudya kapena mukhoza kugulitsa kwa wina aliyense amene sali wa mtundu wanu. Koma inu ndinu anthu opatulika a Yehova Mulungu wanu. Musamaphike mwana wambuzi mu mkaka wa mayi wake.
Deuteronomy14:22 Muzionetsetsa kuti mukupatula chakhumi pa zokolola zanu chaka chilichonse.
Deuteronomy14:23 Muzidyera chakhumi cha tirigu wanu
Deuteronomy14:24 Koma ngati malo amenewa ali kutali kwambiri ndipo kuti inu mwadalitsidwa ndi Yehova Mulungu wanu
Deuteronomy14:25 ndiye musinthitse chakhumi chanucho ndi siliva
Deuteronomy14:26 Gwiritsani ntchito silivayo kugula chilichonse chimene muchifuna monga ngʼombe
Deuteronomy14:27 Alevi okhala mʼmizinda yanu musaleke kuwathandiza popeza alibe gawo lawo la chuma kapena cholowa chawochawo.
Deuteronomy14:28 Kumapeto kwa zaka zitatu zilizonse muzibweretsa zakhumi zonse pa zokolola za chaka chimenecho ndi kuzisunga mʼmidzi yanu
Deuteronomy14:29 kuti Alevi (amene alibe gawo lawo la chuma kapena cholowa chawochawo)
Deuteronomy15:1 Kumapeto kwa zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri zilizonse
Deuteronomy15:2 Zimenezi muzichita motere: wobwereketsa aliyense adzakhululukira ngongole imene anabwereketsa kwa Mwisraeli mnzake. Iye asadzafunenso kuti Mwisraeli mnzakeyo kapena mʼbale wake amubwezere chifukwa nthawi ya Ambuye yokhululukirana ngongole yalengezedwa.
Deuteronomy15:3 Mukhoza kulonjerera ngongole kwa mlendo
Deuteronomy15:4 Komabe pasadzakhale wosauka pakati panu chifukwa Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakudalitsani kwambiri mʼdziko limene adzakupatsani kuti likhale lanu ngati cholowa chanu.
Deuteronomy15:5 Adzakudalitsani pokhapokha ngati mudzamveradi Yehova Mulungu wanu posunga ndi kutsatira malamulo onse amene ndikukupatsani lero.
Deuteronomy15:6 Pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakudalitsani monga analonjeza
Deuteronomy15:7 Ngati pali mʼbale wanu wina wosauka mu mzinda wanu wina uliwonse mʼdziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukupatsani
Deuteronomy15:8 Koma mukhale ofewa manja ndipo mumukongoze mʼbale wanu momasuka pa chilichonse chimene akufuna.
Deuteronomy15:9 Musayesere ndi pangʼono pomwe kusunga maganizo oyipa awa mu mtima mwanu: “Chaka chachisanu ndi chiwiri
Deuteronomy15:10 Mumupatse iye mowolowamanja ndipo muchite zimenezi mosasungira kanthu kumtima. Tsono chifukwa cha zimenezi
Deuteronomy15:11 Anthu osauka sadzatha mʼdziko lanu. Chomwecho ndikukulamulani kuti mukhale ofewa manja kwa abale anu ndi kwa osauka
Deuteronomy15:12 Ngati mʼbale wanu wamwamuna kapena wamkazi adzigulitsa yekha kwa inu
Deuteronomy15:13 Ndipo pamene mumumasula
Deuteronomy15:14 Mumupatse mowolowamanja zochokera pa ziweto zanu
Deuteronomy15:15 Kumbukirani kuti munali akapolo mʼdziko la Igupto ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu anakupulumutsani. Nʼchifukwa chake ndikukupatsani lamulo ili lero lino.
Deuteronomy15:16 Koma ngati kapoloyo akuwuzani kuti
Deuteronomy15:17 pamenepo muzitenga chobowolera chachitsulo ndi kubowola khutu lake pa chitseko
Deuteronomy15:18 Musaone ngati chopweteka kumasula wantchito wanu
Deuteronomy15:19 Mumupatulire Yehova Mulungu wanu choyamba kubadwa chachimuna chilichonse pa ngʼombe ndi nkhosa zanu. Musamazigwiritse ntchito ngʼombe zoyamba kubadwa kapena kumeta nkhosa zoyamba kubadwa.
Deuteronomy15:20 Inuyo ndi banja lanu
Deuteronomy15:21 Ngati chiweto chili ndi chilema monga kulumala kapena chosaona
Deuteronomy15:22 Muzichidya mʼmizinda yanuyanu. Onse odetsedwa monga mwa mwambo ndi oyeretsedwa omwe akhoza kuchidya monga akudya gwape kapena mbawala.
Deuteronomy15:23 Koma musadye magazi ake. Muwathire pansi ngati madzi.
Deuteronomy16:1 Samalirani mwezi wa Abibu ndi kukondwerera Paska wa Yehova Mulungu wanu
Deuteronomy16:2 Mumuphere Yehova Mulungu wanu nsembe ya Paska
Deuteronomy16:3 Musadyere pamodzi ndi buledi wopanga ndi yisiti
Deuteronomy16:4 Yisiti asapezeke kwa masiku asanu ndi awiri pa katundu wanu mʼdziko lanu lonse. Ndipo musasunge nyama imene mwapereka nsembe madzulo a tsiku loyamba mpaka mmawa.
Deuteronomy16:5 Musamangopereka nsembe ya Paska mu mzinda wina uliwonse umene Yehova Mulungu wanu wakupatsani
Deuteronomy16:6 koma ku malo wokhawo amene Iye adzawasankhe kukhazikitsako Dzina lake. Kumeneko ndiye muzikapereka nsembe ya Paska madzulo
Deuteronomy16:7 Muyiwotche ndi kuyidya pa malo pamene Yehova Mulungu wanu adzasankhe. Kenaka mmawa mubwerere ku matenti anu.
Deuteronomy16:8 Kwa masiku asanu ndi limodzi muzidya buledi wopanda yisiti ndipo pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri muzikhala ndi msonkhano wa Yehova Mulungu wanu ndipo musamagwire ntchito iliyonse.
Deuteronomy16:9 Muziwerenga masabata asanu ndi awiri kuyambira pamene mwatenga chikwakwa ndi kuyamba kumweta tirigu wachilili.
Deuteronomy16:10 Pamenepo muzichita Chikondwerero cha Masabata pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu popereka chopereka chaufulu mofanana ndi madalitso amene Yehova Mulungu wakupatsani
Deuteronomy16:11 Ndipo inu
Deuteronomy16:12 Kumbukirani kuti inunso munali akapolo ku Igupto
Deuteronomy16:13 Mukatha kukolola tirigu wanu ndi kupsinya vinyo wanu
Deuteronomy16:14 Musangalale pa chikondwerero chanu
Deuteronomy16:15 Kwa masiku asanu ndi awiri muzichita chikondwererochi kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu kumalo kumene Yehova adzasankhe. Pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakudalitsani inu pa zokolola zanu ndi pa ntchito za manja anu
Deuteronomy16:16 Amuna onse azionekera pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu katatu pa chaka ku malo amene Iye adzasankha. Pa Chikondwerero cha Buledi wopanda Yisiti
Deuteronomy16:17 Aliyense wa inu adzabweretse mphatso molingana ndi momwe Yehova Mulungu wanu wakudalitsirani.
Deuteronomy16:18 Musankhe oweruza ndi akuluakulu a fuko lanu lililonse mu mzinda uliwonse umene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukupatsani
Deuteronomy16:19 Musamakhotetse chiweruzo kapena kukondera. Musamalandire chiphuphu pakuti chiphuphu chimadetsa mʼmaso anthu a nzeru ndi kusintha mawu awo kuti mlandu uyipire osalakwa.
Deuteronomy16:20 Tsatani chilungamo chokhachokha basi kuti mukhale ndi moyo ndi kutenga dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukupatsani.
Deuteronomy16:21 Musazike mtengo wina uliwonse wa mafano a Asera pambali pa guwa lansembe la Yehova Mulungu wanu
Deuteronomy16:22 ndipo musayimike mwala wachipembedzo pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu amadana nazo zimenezi.
Deuteronomy17:1 Musapereke nsembe kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu ngʼombe kapena nkhosa imene ili ndi chilema kapena cholakwika chilichonse
Deuteronomy17:2 Ngati mwamuna kapena mkazi pakati panu
Deuteronomy17:3 ndipo ngati motsutsana ndi lamulo langa wapembedza milungu ina
Deuteronomy17:4 ndipo inu nʼkuwuzidwa zimenezi
Deuteronomy17:5 mumutengere mwamuna kapena mkazi amene wachita chonyansa choterechi ku chipata cha mzinda wanu ndi kumupha pomugenda miyala.
Deuteronomy17:6 Munthu aziphedwa pakakhala mboni ziwiri kapena zitatu koma osati mboni imodzi yokha ayi.
Deuteronomy17:7 Wochitira umboniwo ndiwo aziyamba kumupha munthuyo
Deuteronomy17:8 Ngati akubweretserani milandu mʼmabwalo anu imene ili yovuta kuweruza kaya ndi yokhetsa magazi
Deuteronomy17:9 Mudzapite kwa ansembe Alevi ndi kwa woweruza wa pa nthawi imeneyo. Kawafunseni ndipo iwowo adzakuwuzani zoyenera kuchita.
Deuteronomy17:10 Kachiteni zimene adzakuwuzenizo kuchokera ku malo amene Yehova adzasankhe. Kaonetsetseni kuti mukutsatira zonse zimene akuwuzanizo.
Deuteronomy17:11 Kachiteni motsatira malamulo ndi malangizo amene adzakuwuzeni; osawanyoza
Deuteronomy17:12 Munthu aliyense amene adzanyoza woweruza kapena wansembe amene akutumikira kumeneko mʼmalo mwa Yehova Mulungu wanu
Deuteronomy17:13 Anthu onse adzamva zimenezi ndipo adzachita mantha
Deuteronomy17:14 Mukalowa mʼdziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukupatsani kuti mulitenge
Deuteronomy17:15 mudzakhazikitse mfumu yoti izikakulamulirani
Deuteronomy17:16 Komatu mfumuyo isadzikundikire akavalo
Deuteronomy17:17 Asadziwunjikire akazi kuopa kuti mtima wake ungamusocheretse. Asadziwunjikirenso golide ndi siliva wambiri.
Deuteronomy17:18 Akakhala pa mpando waufumuwo
Deuteronomy17:19 Asunge zimene walembazo ndipo ayenera kumaziwerenga masiku onse a moyo wake
Deuteronomy17:20 Asadzione kuti iyeyo ndi wopambana kuposa abale ake
Deuteronomy18:1 Ansembe Achilevi amene ndi fuko lonse la Alevi
Deuteronomy18:2 Iwowa sadzakhala ndi cholowa pakati pa abale awo pakuti Yehova ndiye cholowa chawo monga anawalonjezera.
Deuteronomy18:3 Anthu amene abwera kudzapereka nsembe ya ngʼombe kapena nkhosa
Deuteronomy18:4 Muziwapatsa zamasika zoyamba za tirigu wanu
Deuteronomy18:5 pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu wawasankha iwowa ndi ana awo pakati pa mafuko anu onse kuti aziyimirira ndi kutumikira mʼdzina la Yehova nthawi zonse.
Deuteronomy18:6 Ngati Mlevi asuntha achoka ku mzinda wake ndi kupita kumalo kwina kumene Yehova wasankha mu Israeli momwemo ndi mtima wake wonse
Deuteronomy18:7 kumeneko akhoza kukatumikirako mʼdzina la Yehova Mulungu wake monga Alevi anzake onse amene akutumikira pamaso pa Yehova.
Deuteronomy18:8 Iye ayenera kulandira zogawana zawo mofanana ndi anzakewo ngakhale kuti iye anagulitsa kale cholowa cha pa banja pawo.
Deuteronomy18:9 Mukafika mʼdziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukupatsani
Deuteronomy18:10 Pasapezeke pakati panu munthu wootcha pa moto mwana wake wamwamuna kapena wamkazi ngati nsembe. Asapezekenso pakati panu munthu wowombeza kapena wochita mawula
Deuteronomy18:11 wolodza
Deuteronomy18:12 Aliyense wochita zinthu zotere ndi wonyansa pamaso pa Yehova
Deuteronomy18:13 Muzikhala angwiro pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu.
Deuteronomy18:14 Mitundu ya anthu imene mudzayipirikitseyo imamvera anyanga kapena owombeza mawula. Koma inu Yehova Mulungu wanu sanakuvomerezeni kutero.
Deuteronomy18:15 Yehova Mulungu wanu adzawutsa pakati pa abale anu mneneri ngati ine. Muyenera kumumvera ameneyo.
Deuteronomy18:16 Pakuti izi ndi zimene munapempha kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu ku Horebu pa tsiku la msonkhano lija pamene munati
Deuteronomy18:17 Yehova anati kwa ine
Deuteronomy18:18 Ndidzawawutsira mneneri ngati iwe pakati pa abale awo ndipo ndidzayika mawu anga mʼkamwa mwake ndipo adzawawuza chilichonse chimene ndidzamulamula.
Deuteronomy18:19 Ine mwini ndidzaweruza aliyense amene sadzamvera mawu anga amene mneneriyo adzayankhula mʼdzina langa.
Deuteronomy18:20 Koma mneneri wonena zinthu mʼdzina langa ndisanamulamulire kutero
Deuteronomy18:21 Mwina mukhoza kumadzifunsa kuti
Deuteronomy18:22 Ngati zimene mneneriyo wanenera mʼdzina la Yehova sizinachitike kapena kukwaniritsidwa
Deuteronomy19:1 Yehova Mulungu wanu akadzawononga anthu amene dziko lawo akukupatsani
Deuteronomy19:2 mukapatule mizinda itatu imene ili pakati pa dziko lomwe Yehova Mulungu akukupatsani kukhala lanu.
Deuteronomy19:3 Mudzakonze misewu ndi kuligawa patatu dzikolo limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukupatsani ngati cholowa chanu
Deuteronomy19:4 Ili ndi lamulo lokhudza munthu amene wapha mnzake mosazindikira osati mwadala
Deuteronomy19:5 Mwachitsanzo
Deuteronomy19:6 Kupanda kutero ndiye kuti wolipsira akhoza kumuthamangitsa mwaukali ndi kumugwira ngati mtunda utalika
Deuteronomy19:7 Ichi ndi chifukwa chake ndikukulamulani kuti mudzipatulire nokha mizinda itatu.
Deuteronomy19:8 Ngati Yehova Mulungu wanu akulitsa malire anu monga analonjezera pa malumbiro ndi makolo anu
Deuteronomy19:9 chifukwa chotsatira bwino malamulo onse amene ndikukuwuzani lero
Deuteronomy19:10 Muchite zimenezi kuti musakhetse magazi wosalakwa mʼdziko lanu limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukupatsani ngati cholowa
Deuteronomy19:11 Koma ngati munthu adana ndi mnzake namubisalira panjira nʼkumuvulaza mpaka kumupha
Deuteronomy19:12 akuluakulu a mu mzinda wake akamugwire ndi kumubwezera ku mzinda wake namupereka kwa wolipsira kuti aphedwe.
Deuteronomy19:13 Osamumvera chisoni. Muyenera kuchotsa tchimo lokhetsa magazi wosalakwa mu Israeli kuti zinthu zizikuyenderani bwino.
Deuteronomy19:14 Musamasunthe mwala wa malire anu ndi mnzanu amene anayikidwa ndi makolo anu pa cholowa chimene mulandire mʼdziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukupatsani.
Deuteronomy19:15 Mboni imodzi siyokwanira kupeza munthu kuti ndi wolakwa pa mlandu uliwonse umene wapalamula. Nkhani itsimikizike ndi umboni wa anthu awiri kapena atatu.
Deuteronomy19:16 Ngati mboni yonama ifuna kunamizira munthu mlandu
Deuteronomy19:17 anthu awiri okhudzidwa ndi mlanduwo ayenera kuyima pamaso pa Yehova pali ansembe ndi oweruza amene ali pa ntchito pa nthawiyo.
Deuteronomy19:18 Oweruza afufuze bwinobwino
Deuteronomy19:19 ndiye kuti amuchitire iyeyo zimene anafuna kuchitira mʼbale wakezo. Muyenera kuchotsa choyipa pakati panu.
Deuteronomy19:20 Anthu ena onse adzamva zimenezi nachita mantha
Deuteronomy19:21 Osachita chisoni
Deuteronomy20:1 Pamene mukupita kokachita nkhondo ndi adani anu
Deuteronomy20:2 Pamene mwatsala pangʼono kuyamba nkhondo
Deuteronomy20:3 Iye aziti
Deuteronomy20:4 pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye amene apite nanu kukakumenyerani nkhondo ndi kugonjetsa adani anu.”
Deuteronomy20:5 Akuluakulu ankhondo adzati kwa gulu la ankhondolo
Deuteronomy20:6 Kodi pali wina amene analima munda wamphesa ndipo sanayambe kudyerera? Ayambe wapita ku mudzi chifukwa mwina akafera ku nkhondo ndipo wina adzadyerera mundawo.
Deuteronomy20:7 Kodi pali amene wachita chinkhoswe ndi mkazi ndipo sanamukwatire mkaziyo? Ayambe wabwerera ku mudzi chifukwa mwina akafera ku nkhondo ndipo wina adzakwatira mkaziyo.”
Deuteronomy20:8 Ndipo akuluakulu ankhondowo akapitirize kuti
Deuteronomy20:9 Akuluakuluwo akatsiriza kuyankhula ndi gulu la ankhondolo
Deuteronomy20:10 Pamene mukuyandikira kuphwanya mzinda
Deuteronomy20:11 Akavomera natsekula zipata zawo
Deuteronomy20:12 Koma akakana za mtendere nachita nanu nkhondo
Deuteronomy20:13 Yehova Mulungu wanu akakupatsani mzindawo
Deuteronomy20:14 Akazi
Deuteronomy20:15 Mizinda yonse yakutali osati ya mitundu yapafupi
Deuteronomy20:16 Komabe mʼmizinda imene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukupatsani ngati cholowa chanu
Deuteronomy20:17 Muwawononge kwathunthu Ahiti
Deuteronomy20:18 Mukapanda kutero adzakuphunzitsani kuti mutengere zinthu zonyansa zimene amachita popembedza milungu yawo ndipo mudzachimwira Yehova Mulungu wanu.
Deuteronomy20:19 Mukalimbana ndi mzinda nthawi yayitali
Deuteronomy20:20 Komabe mukhoza kudula mitengo imene mukudziwa kuti si ya zipatso ndi kuyigwiritsa ntchito pa nkhondo mpaka mzinda umene mukumenyana nawowo utagwetsedwa.
Deuteronomy21:1 Ngati munthu apezeka ataphedwa mʼmunda mʼdziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukupatsani kukhala lanu koma inu osadziwa amene wamupha
Deuteronomy21:2 akuluakulu anu ndi oweruza adzapite ndi kuyeza kutalikirana kuchokera pamene pali mtembowo ndi mizinda yoyandikira.
Deuteronomy21:3 Kenaka akuluakulu a mzinda wapafupi kwambiri ndi mtembowo adzatenge ngʼombe imene sinagwirepo ntchito kapena kuvalapo goli
Deuteronomy21:4 ndi kuyikusira ku chigwa chimene sichinalimidwepo ndiponso kumene kuli mtsinje woyenda. Ku chigwa kumeneko ayenera kukayithyola khosi ngʼombeyo.
Deuteronomy21:5 Ansembe
Deuteronomy21:6 Kenaka akuluakulu a mzinda wapafupi kwambiri ndi mtembowo adzasamba mʼmanja pamwamba pa ngʼombe yothyoledwa khosi ija
Deuteronomy21:7 nadzatsimikiza kuti
Deuteronomy21:8 Yehova
Deuteronomy21:9 Kotero mudzadzichotsera nokha tchimo lokhetsa magazi wosalakwa
Deuteronomy21:10 Mukapita kukachita nkhondo ndi adani anu
Deuteronomy21:11 ndiye ngati muona mkazi wokongola pakati pa ogwidwawo nakutengani mtima
Deuteronomy21:12 Mumutengere ku nyumba kwanu
Deuteronomy21:13 ndipo avulidwe zovala zimene anagwidwa nazo. Atakhala mʼnyumba mwanu nalira maliro a abambo ndi amayi ake kwa mwezi wathunthu
Deuteronomy21:14 Ngati simukukondweretsedwa naye
Deuteronomy21:15 Ngati munthu ali ndi akazi awiri
Deuteronomy21:16 akamagawa chuma chake akanali moyo kwa ana akewo
Deuteronomy21:17 Iye ayenera kuonetsa kuti mwana wake wamwamuna wa mkazi wosakondedwayo ndiye woyamba kubadwa pomupatsa miyeso iwiri ya zonse zimene ali nazo. Mwana wamwamuna ameneyo ndiye chizindikiro cha mphamvu za abambo ake. Ufulu wokhala mwana wamwamuna woyamba ndi wake.
Deuteronomy21:18 Ngati munthu ali ndi mwana wamwamuna wosamvera ndi wowukira amene samvera a abambo ake ndi amayi ake akamuweruza
Deuteronomy21:19 abambo ndi amayi ake amugwire ndi kupita naye kwa akuluakulu ku chipata cha mzinda wake ndipo
Deuteronomy21:20 akawawuze akuluakuluwo kuti
Deuteronomy21:21 Pamenepo anthu onse a mu mzinda wake adzamuphe ndi miyala. Muyenera kuchotsa zoyipa pakati panu. Aisraeli onse adzamva zimenezi ndipo adzachita mantha.
Deuteronomy21:22 Ngati munthu wopezeka ndi mlandu wopha mnzake waphedwa ndipo mtembo wake wapachikidwa pamtengo
Deuteronomy21:23 musasiye mtembowo pa mtengopo usiku wonse. Muonetsetse kuti mwakawukwirira tsiku lomwelo
Deuteronomy22:1 Ngati uwona ngʼombe kapena nkhosa ya mʼbale wako ikusochera
Deuteronomy22:2 Ngati mʼbale wakoyo sakhala pafupi kapena sukudziwa kuti ndi yandani
Deuteronomy22:3 Uzitero ndithu ngati upeza bulu kapena mkanjo kapena chilichonse chimene chatayika. Osachilekerera.
Deuteronomy22:4 Ngati wapeza bulu kapena ngʼombe ya mʼbale wako itagwa panjira
Deuteronomy22:5 Akazi asavale zovala za amuna
Deuteronomy22:6 Ukapeza chisa cha mbalame mʼmphepete mwa msewu
Deuteronomy22:7 Anawo mukhoza kutenga koma onetsetsani kuti mayi wawo mwamutaya kuti apite
Deuteronomy22:8 Mukamanga nyumba yatsopano
Deuteronomy22:9 Musadzale mbewu zamitundu iwiri mʼmunda wanu wa mpesa
Deuteronomy22:10 Musatipule pogwiritsa ntchito ngʼombe ndi bulu pa goli limodzi.
Deuteronomy22:11 Musamavale chovala chopangidwa mophatikiza ubweya ndi thonje.
Deuteronomy22:12 Muzipanga mphonje mʼngodya za mkanjo umene mumavala.
Deuteronomy22:13 Ngati munthu akwatira mkazi
Deuteronomy22:14 namunyoza ndi kumuyipitsira dzina nʼkumati
Deuteronomy22:15 zikatero abambo ndi amayi ake ayenera kubweretsa chitsimikizo chakuti anali namwali kwa akuluakulu a mzinda ku chipata.
Deuteronomy22:16 Abambo ake a mtsikanayo adzanene kwa akuluakuluwo kuti
Deuteronomy22:17 Tsopano wamunyoza ndipo wanena kuti
Deuteronomy22:18 ndipo akuluakuluwo adzamugwire munthuyo namupatsa chilango.
Deuteronomy22:19 Iwo adzamulipitse ndalama zasiliva zokwana 100 nazipereka kwa abambo a mtsikana
Deuteronomy22:20 Koma ngati zomunenerazo ndi zoona
Deuteronomy22:21 iyeyu ayenera kumutengera pa khomo pa abambo ake pamene anthu a mu mzinda wake akamuphere ndi miyala. Iyeyo wachita chinthu chochititsa manyazi mu Israeli pochita chiwerewere akanali pa khomo pa abambo ake. Muyenera kuchotsa zoyipa pakati panu.
Deuteronomy22:22 Ngati munthu apezeka akugona ndi mkazi wa mwini wake
Deuteronomy22:23 Ngati munthu mu mzinda akumana ndi mkazi yemwe anachita kale chinkhoswe nagona naye
Deuteronomy22:24 muwatengere awiriwo ku chipata cha mzinda ndi kuwapha ndi miyala. Aphedwe chifukwa mtsikanayo anali pafupi ndi anthu ndipo sanakuwe kuti ena amuthandize ndipo mwamunayo chifukwa anayipitsa mkazi wa mwini. Muyenera kuchotsa choyipa pakati panu.
Deuteronomy22:25 Koma ngati munthu akumana ndi mkazi kutchire yemwe anachita kale chinkhoswe namugwiririra
Deuteronomy22:26 Mtsikanayo musamuchite chilichonse
Deuteronomy22:27 pakuti mwamunayo anamupeza mtsikanayo kutchire
Deuteronomy22:28 Ngati munthu apezana ndi namwali woti sanachite chinkhoswe
Deuteronomy22:29 ayenera kuwalipira abambo ake a namwaliyo ndalama za siliva makumi asanu. Iye ayenera kumukwatira mkaziyo chifukwa wamuyipitsa
Deuteronomy22:30 Munthu asakwatire mkazi wa abambo ake pakuti ayenera kuchitira ulemu pogona pa abambo ake.
Deuteronomy23:1 Mwamuna aliyense wofulidwa kapena woduka chiwalo chachimuna asalowe nawo mu msonkhano wa Yehova.
Deuteronomy23:2 Aliyense wobadwa mʼbanja losavomerezeka
Deuteronomy23:3 Mwamoni kapena Mmowabu asalowe mu msonkhano wa anthu a Yehova ngakhale mibado khumi yobwera pambuyo pake.
Deuteronomy23:4 Pakuti iwowa sanabwere kudzakulonjerani ndi chakudya kapena madzi pamene mumadutsa pochokera ku Igupto
Deuteronomy23:5 Komabe Yehova Mulungu wanu sanamvere Balaamu koma anatembenuza temberero kukhala dalitso kwa inu chifukwa Yehova Mulungu wanu amakukondani.
Deuteronomy23:6 Musachite nawo mgwirizano uliwonse wa mtendere pa moyo wanu wonse.
Deuteronomy23:7 Musapeputse Mwedomu pakuti ndi mʼbale wanu ndithu. Musapeputse Mwigupto chifukwa munali alendo mʼdziko lake.
Deuteronomy23:8 Mʼbado wachitatu wa ana awo akhoza kulowa mu msonkhano wa anthu a Yehova.
Deuteronomy23:9 Mukamakhala pa msasa pokonzekera adani anu
Deuteronomy23:10 Wina mwa asilikali anu akadziwonongera ndi umuna usiku
Deuteronomy23:11 Koma dzuwa likapendeka ayenera kusamba ndipo polowa dzuwa akhoza kubwerera ku msasa.
Deuteronomy23:12 Mukonze malo kunja kwa msasa kumene mukhoza kukadzithandizirako.
Deuteronomy23:13 Pakati pa zida zanu muzikhala ndi china chokumbira
Deuteronomy23:14 Pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu amayendayenda ku msasa wanu kukutchinjirizani ndi kupereka adani anu kwa inu. Nʼchifukwa chake msasa wanu uzikhala wopatulika kuti mwina angaone china chonyansa nabwerera osakuyandikirani.
Deuteronomy23:15 Ngati kapolo wathawa mbuye wake nakabisala kwanu
Deuteronomy23:16 Mumulole akhale pakati panu
Deuteronomy23:17 Pasapezeke Mwisraeli wamwamuna kapena wamkazi wochita chiwerewere ku Nyumba ya Mulungu.
Deuteronomy23:18 Musabweretse malipiro a wachiwerewere wamkazi kapena wamwamuna Mʼnyumba ya Yehova Mulungu wanu kudzapereka za malumbiro aliwonse
Deuteronomy23:19 Musamalipitse mʼbale wanu chiwongoladzanja
Deuteronomy23:20 Mlendo mukhoza kumulipitsa chiwongoladzanja koma osati mʼbale wanu Mwisraeli
Deuteronomy23:21 Mukalumbira kupereka kanthu kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu
Deuteronomy23:22 Koma ngati mupewa kupanga mapangano simudzapezeka ochimwa.

Deuteronomy23:24 Mukalowa mʼmunda wamphesa wa mnzanu mukhoza kudya mphesa mmene mungafunire koma musayike zina mʼdengu mwanu.

Deuteronomy24:1 Ngati mwamuna wakwatira mkazi amene sakukondwera naye chifukwa wapeza vuto pa mkaziyo
Deuteronomy24:2 mkaziyo ndi kukakwatiwa ndi mwamuna wina
Deuteronomy24:3 ndipo mwamuna wachiwiriyo nʼkuyipidwa nayenso ndi kumulemberanso kalata ya chisudzulo nʼkumutulutsa mʼnyumba mwake
Deuteronomy24:4 mwamuna wake woyamba uja
Deuteronomy24:5 Mwamuna akangokwatira kumene asamatumizidwe ku nkhondo kapena kupatsidwa ntchito ina iliyonse. Kwa chaka chathunthu akhale ndi ufulu wokhala pa khomo pake kumasangalatsa mkazi wakeyo.
Deuteronomy24:6 Munthu akakhala nanu ndi ngongole musamutengere mwala wake wa mphero ngati chikole
Deuteronomy24:7 Ngati munthu agwidwa akuba mʼbale wake wa Chiisraeli namamuzunza ngati kapolo kapena kumugulitsa
Deuteronomy24:8 Pakagwa matenda a khate
Deuteronomy24:9 Kumbukirani zimene Yehova Mulungu wanu anachita kwa Miriamu muli paulendo mutatuluka mu Igupto.
Deuteronomy24:10 Ukabwereketsa mnzako kanthu kena kalikonse
Deuteronomy24:11 Uziyima kunja kwa nyumba kuti munthu amene wamubwereketsa kanthuyo akubweretsere kunja komweko.
Deuteronomy24:12 Ngati munthuyo ndi wosauka
Deuteronomy24:13 Pomalowa dzuwa ukhale utamubwezera mkanjo wakewo kuti akafunde. Pamenepo adzakuthokoza
Deuteronomy24:14 Osamapezera mwayi pa anthu aganyu osauka ndi aumphawi
Deuteronomy24:15 Mumulipire malipiro ake a tsiku dzuwa lisanalowe chifukwa ndi wosauka ndipo akudalira malipirowo. Kupanda kutero adzakudandaulirani kwa Yehova ndipo mudzapezeka ochimwa.
Deuteronomy24:16 Makolo asaphedwe chifukwa cha ana awo
Deuteronomy24:17 Musachitire mlendo kapena mwana wamasiye zoyipa
Deuteronomy24:18 Kumbukirani kuti munali akapolo mʼdziko la Igupto ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu anakuwombolani kumeneko. Nʼchifukwa chake ndikukulamulani kuti muzichita zimenezi.

Deuteronomy24:20 Mukathyola zipatso mu mtengo wa olivi
Deuteronomy24:21 Mukakolola mphesa mʼmunda mwanu musamabwereremonso kachiwiri. Zotsalazo muzilekere alendo
Deuteronomy24:22 Kumbukirani kuti munali akapolo mʼdziko la Igupto. Nʼchifukwa chake ndikukulamulani kuti muzichita zimenezi.

Deuteronomy25:2 Munthu akapezeka wolakwa ayenera kukwapulidwa
Deuteronomy25:3 koma asamukwapule zikoti zopitirira makumi anayi. Akakwapulidwa kupitirira apo ndiye kuti mʼbale wanuyo anyozeka pamaso panu.
Deuteronomy25:4 Musamange ngʼombe pakamwa pamene ikupuntha tirigu.
Deuteronomy25:5 Ngati abale akukhala pamodzi ndipo wina mwa iwo akamwalira wosasiya mwana wamwamuna
Deuteronomy25:6 Mwana wamwamuna woyamba amene mayiyo angabereke ayenera kutenga dzina la mwamuna wake womwalirayo kuti dzina lake lisafafanizike mu Israeli.
Deuteronomy25:7 Komabe
Deuteronomy25:8 Pamenepo akuluakulu a mu mzinda wawowo adzamuyitanitsa nakamba naye. Ngati alimbikirabe kunena kuti
Deuteronomy25:9 mkazi wamasiye wa mʼbale wakeyo adzapita kwa iye pamaso pa akuluakuluwo namuvula nsapato imodzi
Deuteronomy25:10 Mbiri ya banja la munthu ameneyo idzadziwika mu Israeli kuti ndi Banja la Wovulidwa nsapato.
Deuteronomy25:11 Ngati anthu awiri akuchita ndewu ndipo mkazi wa mmodzi wa iwo abwera kudzaleretsa mwamuna wake kwa mnzakeyo natambasula dzanja lake kugwira ku maliseche kwa winayo
Deuteronomy25:12 muyenera kumudula dzanja
Deuteronomy25:13 Musamakhale ndi miyeso iwiri yosiyana mʼthumba mwanu
Deuteronomy25:14 Musamakhale ndi milingo iwiri yosiyana mʼnyumba mwanu
Deuteronomy25:15 Muyenera kukhala ndi miyeso ndi milingo yoyenera ndi yosanyenga kuti mukhalitse mʼdziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukupatsani.
Deuteronomy25:16 Pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu amanyansidwa ndi aliyense wochita za chinyengo zoterezi.
Deuteronomy25:17 Kumbukirani zimene Aamaleki anakuchitirani pamene munali pa ulendo wochokera ku Igupto.
Deuteronomy25:18 Pamene munali otopa ndi ofowoka
