Deuteronomy26:1 Mukalowa ndi kukhazikika mʼdziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukupatsani ngati cholowa chanu
Deuteronomy26:2 mutengeko zina mwa zipatso zoyamba pa zonse zimene mudzakola mʼnthaka ya dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukupatsani ndi kuziyika mʼdengu. Mukatero mupite kumalo kumene Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakhazikitsako dzina lake
Deuteronomy26:3 ndipo mudzamuwuze wansembe amene ali pa ntchito pa nthawiyo kuti
Deuteronomy26:4 Wansembe adzatenga dengulo mʼmanja mwanu ndi kuliyika pansi patsogolo pa guwa lansembe la Yehova Mulungu wanu.
Deuteronomy26:5 Ndipo mudzanenetsa pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu kuti
Deuteronomy26:6 Koma Aigupto anatisautsa natizunza
Deuteronomy26:7 Kenaka tinafuwulira Yehova
Deuteronomy26:8 Kotero Yehova anatitulutsa ku Igupto ndi dzanja lake lamphamvu ndi mkono wotambasuka ndi zoopsa zazikulu ndi zizindikiro zozizwitsa ndi zodabwitsa.
Deuteronomy26:9 Iye anatibweretsa ku malo ano natipatsa dziko loyenda mkaka ndi uchi lino.
Deuteronomy26:10 Ndipo tsopano ndikubweretsa zipatso zoyamba zimene inu Yehova mwandipatsa.” Ikani dengulo pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi kuwerama mopereka ulemu pamaso pake.
Deuteronomy26:11 Ndipo inu ndi Alevi pamodzi ndi alendo okhala pakati panu mudzakondwera mʼzinthu zonse zabwino zimene Yehova Mulungu wanu wakupatsani
Deuteronomy26:12 Mukatha kupatula chakhumi pa zonse zimene mwakolola mʼchaka chachitatu chimene ndi chaka chakhumi
Deuteronomy26:13 Kenaka munene kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu kuti “Ndatulutsamo mʼnyumba mwanga gawo lopatulika ndipo ndalipereka kwa Mlevi
Deuteronomy26:14 Sindinadye kalikonse ka gawo lopatulika pamene ndimalira maliro kapena kuchotsapo kalikonse ka gawo lopatulika pamene ndinali wodetsedwa
Deuteronomy26:15 Yangʼanani pa dziko kuchokera kumwamba
Deuteronomy26:16 Yehova Mulungu wanu akukulamulani lero lino kuti mutsate malangizo ndi malamulo ake ndipo muwasunge mosamalitsa ndi mtima wanu wonse ndi moyo wanu wonse.
Deuteronomy26:17 Mwanena motsimikiza lero lino kuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu wanu ndi kuti mudzayenda mʼnjira zake
Deuteronomy26:18 Ndipo Yehova wanenetsa lero lino kuti inu ndinu anthu ake
Deuteronomy26:19 Iye wanenetsa kuti adzakuyikani kukhala oyamikika
Deuteronomy27:1 Mose ndi akuluakulu a Israeli analamula anthu kuti
Deuteronomy27:2 Mukawoloka mtsinje wa Yorodani kulowa mʼdziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukupatsani
Deuteronomy27:3 Mulembepo mawu onse a malamulo amenewa pamene muwoloka kulowa mʼdziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukupatsani
Deuteronomy27:4 Ndipo mukawoloka Yorodani muyimike miyala iyi pa Phiri la Ebala monga momwe ndikukulamulirani lero lino ndipo muyikulungize.
Deuteronomy27:5 Pamenepo mumange guwa lansembe la miyala la Yehova Mulungu wanu. Musagwiritse ntchito chida chilichonse chachitsulo pa miyalapo.
Deuteronomy27:6 Mumange guwa lansembe la Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi miyala yakutchire ndi kuperekerapo nsembe yopsereza kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu.
Deuteronomy27:7 Muperekerepo nsembe zopereka za chiyanjano
Deuteronomy27:8 Ndipo pa miyalapo mudzalembepo mawu onse a malamulo ndi malemba akuluakulu.”
Deuteronomy27:9 Kenaka Mose ndi ansembe
Deuteronomy27:10 Muzimvera Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi kutsata malamulo ake ndi malangizo ake omwe ndikukupatsani lero lino.”
Deuteronomy27:11 Tsiku lomwelo Mose analamula anthu kuti:
Deuteronomy27:12 Mukawoloka Yorodani
Deuteronomy27:13 Ndipo mafuko awa akayimirire pa Phiri la Ebala ndi kutchula matemberero: Rubeni
Deuteronomy27:14 Alevi adzayankhula mokweza kwa Aisraeli onse kuti:
Deuteronomy27:15 “Ndi wotembereredwa munthu amene asema chifanizo kapena kupanga fano
Deuteronomy27:16 “Ndi wotembereredwa munthu amene sachitira ulemu abambo ake kapena amayi ake.” Pamenepo anthu onse adzati
Deuteronomy27:17 “Ndi wotembereredwa munthu amene amasuntha mwala wa malire wa mnzake.” Pamenepo anthu onse adzati
Deuteronomy27:18 “Ndi wotembereredwa munthu amene amasocheretsa munthu wosaona pa msewu.” Pamenepo anthu onse adzati
Deuteronomy27:19 “Ndi wotembereredwa munthu amene sachitira chilungamo mlendo
Deuteronomy27:20 “Ndi wotembereredwa munthu amene agonana ndi mkazi wa abambo ake pakuti iye sachitira ulemu pogona pa abambo ake.” Pamenepo anthu onse adzati
Deuteronomy27:21 “Ndi wotembereredwa munthu amene achita chigololo ndi nyama ya mtundu uli wonse.” Pamenepo anthu onse adzati
Deuteronomy27:22 “Ndi wotembereredwa munthu amene agonana ndi mlongo wake
Deuteronomy27:23 “Ndi wotembereredwa munthu amene agonana ndi apongozi ake.” Pamenepo anthu onse adzati
Deuteronomy27:24 “Ndi wotembereredwa munthu amene apha mnzake mwachinsinsi.” Pamenepo anthu onse adzati
Deuteronomy27:25 “Ndi wotembereredwa munthu amene alandira chiphuphu kuti aphe munthu wosalakwa.” Pamenepo anthu onse adzati
Deuteronomy27:26 “Ndi wotembereredwa aliyense amene sachita kapena sasunga mawu a malamulo awa.” Pamenepo anthu onse adzati
Deuteronomy28:1 Ngati mumvera Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi kutsatira mosamalitsa malamulo ake onse amene ndikukupatsani lero lino
Deuteronomy28:2 Madalitso awa adzabwera kwa inu ndi kuyenda nanu ngati mumvera Yehova Mulungu wanu:
Deuteronomy28:3 Mudzadalitsika mʼmizinda yanu ndi kudalitsika mʼdzikolo.
Deuteronomy28:4 Yehova adzadalitsa ana anu
Deuteronomy28:5 Dengu lanu ndi chiwaya chanu cha buledi zidzadalitsika.
Deuteronomy28:6 Mudzadalitsika pa kulowa kwanu ndi pa kutuluka kwanu.
Deuteronomy28:7 Yehova adzaonetsetsa kuti adani anu amene adzakuwukirani agonjetsedwe pamaso panu. Iwo adzabwera kwa inu kuchokera mbali imodzi koma adzakuthawani ku mbali zisanu ndi ziwiri.
Deuteronomy28:8 Yehova adzatumiza madalitso pa nkhokwe zanu ndi pa chilichonse chimene muchikhudza. Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakudalitsani mʼdziko limene akukupatsani.
Deuteronomy28:9 Yehova Mulungu wanu adzachititsa kuti mukhale anthu ake opatulika
Deuteronomy28:10 Pamenepo anthu onse a dziko lapansi adzaona kuti mumadziwika ndi dzina la Yehova ndipo adzakuopani.
Deuteronomy28:11 Yehova adzakupambanitsani kwambiri ndipo adzakupatsani ana ambiri
Deuteronomy28:12 Yehova adzatsekula kumwamba kumene amasungirako chuma chake
Deuteronomy28:13 Yehova adzakuthandizani kukhala mutu osati mchira. Mukakhala ndi chidwi ndi malamulo a Yehova Mulungu wanu amene ndikukupatsani lero lino ndi kuwatsata mosamalitsa
Deuteronomy28:14 Musapatukire ku dzanja lamanja kapena lamanzere pa lamulo lina lililonse limene ndikukupatsani lero lino ndi kumatsatira kapena kuyitumikira milungu ina.
Deuteronomy28:15 Koma ngati simumvera Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi kusatsata mosamalitsa malamulo ake ndi malangizo ake onse amene ndikukupatsani lero lino
Deuteronomy28:16 Mudzatembereredwa mu mzinda ndi kutembereredwa mʼmudzi.
Deuteronomy28:17 Dengu lanu ndi chiwaya chanu cha buledi zidzatembereredwa.
Deuteronomy28:18 Zipatso za mʼmimba mwanu zidzatembereredwa
Deuteronomy28:19 Mudzatembereredwa pa kulowa kwanu ndi pa kutuluka kwanu.
Deuteronomy28:20 Yehova adzakutumizirani matemberero
Deuteronomy28:21 Yehova adzakugwetserani mliri wa matenda mpaka atakuwonongani mʼdziko limene mukulowa kukalitengali.
Deuteronomy28:22 Yehova adzakukanthani ndi nthenda yowondetsa
Deuteronomy28:23 Mitambo ya pamutu panu idzawuma ngati mkuwa ndipo sidzagwetsa mvula mpaka nthaka yanu idzawuma gwaa ngati chitsulo.
Deuteronomy28:24 Mʼmalo mwa mvula Yehova adzakupatsani fumbi ndi dothi ndipo lidzakugwerani kuchokera kumwamba mpaka mutawonongeka.
Deuteronomy28:25 Yehova adzalola kuti adani anu akugonjetseni. Mudzadzera njira imodzi pokalimbana ndi adani anu koma pothawa mudzabalalika mbali zisanu ndi ziwiri. Mudzakhala chinthu chochititsa mantha pakati pa maufumu onse a dziko lapansi.
Deuteronomy28:26 Mitembo yanu idzadyedwa ndi mbalame zamumlengalenga ndi nyama zakutchire
Deuteronomy28:27 Yehova adzakusautsani ndi zithupsa za ku Igupto ndi zotupatupa
Deuteronomy28:28 Yehova adzakusautsani inu ndi misala
Deuteronomy28:29 Masanasana mudzayenda ngati muli mu mdima
Deuteronomy28:30 Mudzachita chinkhoswe ndi mkazi
Deuteronomy28:31 Ngʼombe yanu yamtheno idzaphedwa inu muli pomwepo koma simudzadyako. Bulu wanu adzalandidwa kwa inu mwamakani osabwera nayenso. Nkhosa zanu zidzapatsidwa kwa adani anu
Deuteronomy28:32 Ana anu aamuna ndi aakazi adzaperekedwa kwa anthu a mitundu ina ndipo inu mudzafika potopa ndi kulefuka nʼkudikirira tsiku ndi tsiku kuti mwina anawo abwerako.
Deuteronomy28:33 Anthu amene simukuwadziwa adzakudyerani zokolola zanu
Deuteronomy28:34 Zimene muzidzaziona zidzakusokonezani mitu.
Deuteronomy28:35 Yehova adzakusautsani ndi zithupsa zaululu ndi zosachiritsika za mʼmawondo ndi mʼmiyendo ndipo zidzafalikira kuchoka kuphazi mpaka kumutu.
Deuteronomy28:36 Yehova adzakuthamangitsirani
Deuteronomy28:37 Inu mudzakhala chinthu chochititsa mantha kuchisunga ndiponso chinthu chotukwanidwa ndi chonyozeka kwa anthu a mitundu yonse kumene Yehova adzakuthamangitsirani.
Deuteronomy28:38 Mudzadzala mbewu zambiri ku munda koma mudzakolola pangʼono
Deuteronomy28:39 Mudzadzala mpesa ndi kulimirira koma vinyo wake simudzamumwa kapena kukolola mphesazo
Deuteronomy28:40 Mudzakhala ndi mitengo ya olivi mʼdziko lanu lonse koma simudzagwiritsa ntchito mafuta ake
Deuteronomy28:41 Mudzabereka ana aamuna ndi aakazi koma sadzakhala anu
Deuteronomy28:42 Magulumagulu a dzombe adzawononga mitengo yanu ndi mbewu za mʼdziko lanu.
Deuteronomy28:43 Mlendo wokhala pakati panu adzatukuka kuposa inu
Deuteronomy28:44 Iye adzakubwereketsani
Deuteronomy28:45 Matemberero onsewa adzabwera pa inu. Adzakulondolani ndi kukugonjetsani mpaka mutawonongeka
Deuteronomy28:46 Matemberero amenewa adzakhala chizindikiro ndi chozizwitsa kwa inu ndi zidzukulu zanu mpaka kalekale.
Deuteronomy28:47 Pakuti inu simunatumikire Yehova Mulungu wanu pa nthawi imene zinthu zinkakuyenderani bwino
Deuteronomy28:48 chomwecho pa nthawi ya njala ndi ludzu
Deuteronomy28:49 Yehova adzakutumizirani mtundu wa anthu kuchokera kutali kumapeto kwa dziko lapansi nudzachita ngati mphungu yowulukira pansi
Deuteronomy28:50 mtundu wooneka wochititsa mantha
Deuteronomy28:51 Iwo adzagwira ana a ziweto zanu
Deuteronomy28:52 Iwo adzathira nkhondo mizinda yonse mʼdziko lanu lonse mpaka malinga anu ataliatali omwe mumadalira aja atagwa. Adzathira nkhondo mizinda yonse ya mʼdziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akukupatsani.
Deuteronomy28:53 Chifukwa cha zosautsa zimene mdani wanu adzabweretsa pa nthawi yokuthirani nkhondo
Deuteronomy28:54 Ngakhale munthu woleza mtima ndi wachifundo kwambiri pakati panu sadzakhala ndi chifundo pa mʼbale wake weniweni kapena mkazi wake amene iye amamukonda kapena ana ake otsalawo
Deuteronomy28:55 ndipo sadzagawirako aliyense wa iwo mnofu wa ana ake amene akudyawo. Kadzakhala kali komweko basi kamene kamutsalira chifukwa cha msautso umene mdani wanu adzagwetsa pa nthawi yothira nkhondo mizinda yanu yonse.
Deuteronomy28:56 Mayi woleza mtima ndi wachifundo kwambiri pakati panu
Deuteronomy28:57 zotsalira za uchembere zochoka mʼmimba mwake ndi ana amene wabereka. Pakuti adzafuna kuti adye zimenezi yekha mobisa pa nthawi yothiridwa nkhondo chifukwa cha masautso amene mdani wanu adzagwetsa pa inu mʼmizinda yanu.
Deuteronomy28:58 Ngati simutsata mosamalitsa mawu onse a malamulo awa amene alembedwa mʼbuku lino
Deuteronomy28:59 Yehova adzatumiza pa inu ndi zidzukulu zanu miliri yoopsa
Deuteronomy28:60 Adzakubweretserani matenda onse a ku Igupto aja mumawaopawa ndipo adzakukanirirani.
Deuteronomy28:61 Yehova adzakubweretseraninso mtundu uliwonse wa matenda ndi zosautsa zimene sizinalembedwe mʼbuku la malamulo lino
Deuteronomy28:62 Inu aja munali ochuluka ngati nyenyezi zakumwamba mudzatsala ochepa chabe chifukwa simunamvere Yehova Mulungu wanu.
Deuteronomy28:63 Monga kunamukomera Yehova kukulemeretsani ndi kukuchulukitsani
Deuteronomy28:64 Kenaka Yehova adzakubalalitsani pakati pa anthu a mitundu yonse
Deuteronomy28:65 Pakati pa mitundu ya anthu imeneyi simudzapeza mpata
Deuteronomy28:66 Inu mudzakhala osakhazikika mopitirira
Deuteronomy28:67 Mmawa muzidzati
Deuteronomy28:68 Yehova adzakubwezani ku Igupto pa sitima zapamadzi paulendo umene Ine ndinati musawuyendenso. Kumeneko mudzadzitsatsa nokha kwa adani anu monga akapolo aamuna ndi aakazi
Deuteronomy29:1 Awa ndiwo mawu a mʼpangano limene Yehova analamula Mose kuti achite ndi Aisraeli ku Mowabu
Deuteronomy29:2 Mose anayitanitsa Aisraeli onse nati kwa iwo: Inu munaona zonse zimene Yehova anachita kwa Farao
Deuteronomy29:3 Ndi maso anu munaona mayesero onse aja
Deuteronomy29:4 Koma mpaka lero Yehova sanakupatseni mtima wozindikira kapena maso openya kapena makutu akumva.
Deuteronomy29:5 Mʼzaka makumi anayi zimene ndinakutsogolerani mʼchipululu
Deuteronomy29:6 Inu simunadye buledi ndi kumwa vinyo kapena chakumwa chilichonse choledzeretsa. Ndinachita izi kuti mudziwe kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu.
Deuteronomy29:7 Pamene munafika malo ano
Deuteronomy29:8 Tinatenga dziko lawo ndi kulipereka ngati cholowa cha fuko la Rubeni
Deuteronomy29:9 Tsatirani mosamalitsa mawu a mʼpangano ili kuti zinthu zizikuyenderani bwino pa zochitika zanu zonse.
Deuteronomy29:10 Lero lino nonse mukuyima pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu
Deuteronomy29:11 pamodzi ndi ana ndi akazi anu
Deuteronomy29:12 Mukuyimirira pano kuti mulowe mʼpangano ndi Yehova Mulungu wanu
Deuteronomy29:13 kukukhazikitsani lero lino ngati anthu ake
Deuteronomy29:14 Ndikupanga pangano ili ndi malumbiro ake osati kwa inu nokha
Deuteronomy29:15 amene muli pano pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wathu
Deuteronomy29:16 Inu nomwe mukudziwa mmene tinkakhalira ku Igupto ndi mmene tinadutsira mayiko pa ulendo wobwera kuno.
Deuteronomy29:17 Ife tinaona pakati pawo mafanizo ndi mafano awo onyansa
Deuteronomy29:18 Onetsetsani kuti pasapezeke mwamuna kapena mkazi
Deuteronomy29:19 Munthu wotere akamva mawu a lumbiro ili
Deuteronomy29:20 Yehova sadzamukhululukira. Mkwiyo ndi nsanje ya Yehova zidzamuyakira munthuyo. Matemberero onse wolembedwa mʼbukuli adzamugwera iye ndipo Yehova adzafafaniza dzina lake pa dziko lapansi.
Deuteronomy29:21 Yehova adzasankha pakati pa Aisraeli anthu oyenera masautso monga mwa matemberero onse a mʼpangano olembedwa Mʼbuku la Malamulo.
Deuteronomy29:22 Ana anu a mibado yakutsogolo ndi alendo amene adzachokera kutali adzaona matsoka amene adzakugwerani mʼdziko muno ndiponso matenda amene Yehova adzabweretsa pa dzikoli.
Deuteronomy29:23 Dziko lonse lidzasanduka nthaka ya mchere ndi ya sulufule. Simudzadzalamo kanthu
Deuteronomy29:24 Mitundu yonse ya anthu idzafunsa kuti
Deuteronomy29:25 Ndipo yankho la mafunso amenewa lidzakhala lakuti
Deuteronomy29:26 Iwo anachoka ndi kukatumikira milungu ina ndi kuyipembedza
Deuteronomy29:27 Choncho Yehova anakwiyira dziko lino
Deuteronomy29:28 Ndi mkwiyo komanso ukali wake woopsa Yehova anawazula mʼdziko lawo ndi kuwaponyera mʼdziko lina
Deuteronomy29:29 Zinsinsi ndi za Yehova Mulungu wathu koma zinthu zimene zaululidwa ndi zathu ndi ana athu kwamuyaya
Deuteronomy30:1 Madalitso ndi matemberero awa onse amene ndawayika pamaso panu akadzafika pa inu
Deuteronomy30:2 ndipo inu pamodzi ndi ana anu nʼkudzatembenukira kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi kumumvera ndi mtima wanu wonse ndi moyo wanu wonse molingana ndi chilichonse chimene ndakulamulani lero lino
Deuteronomy30:3 pamenepo Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakukhalitsani monga kale ndi kukuchitirani chifundo
Deuteronomy30:4 Ngakhale atakupirikitsirani ku malekezero a dziko lapansi
Deuteronomy30:5 Adzakubweretsani ku dziko limene linali la makolo anu
Deuteronomy30:6 Yehova Mulungu wanu adzasintha mitima yanu pamodzi ndi mitima ya zidzukulu zanu
Deuteronomy30:7 Yehova Mulungu wanu adzayika matemberero awa onse pa adani anu amene amadana nanu ndi kukuzunzani.
Deuteronomy30:8 Inu mudzamveranso Yehova ndi kutsatira malamulo ake onse amene ndikukupatsani lero lino.
Deuteronomy30:9 Pamenepo Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakulemeretsani pa zochita zanu zonse ndipo adzakupatsani ana ambiri
Deuteronomy30:10 ngati mudzamvera Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi kusunga malamulo ake ndi mawu ake amene alembedwa Mʼbuku ili la Malamulo ndi kutembenukira kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi mtima wanu wonse ndi moyo wanu wonse.
Deuteronomy30:11 Tsopano zimene ndikukulamulirani leroli sizovuta kapena zapatali.
Deuteronomy30:12 Sizili kumwamba
Deuteronomy30:13 Komanso sizili pa tsidya la nyanja
Deuteronomy30:14 Ayi
Deuteronomy30:15 Taonani
Deuteronomy30:16 Pakuti lero ndikukulamulani kuti mukonde Yehova Mulungu wanu
Deuteronomy30:17 Koma ngati mtima wanu udzatembenuka
Deuteronomy30:18 lero ndikulengeza kwa inu kuti mudzawonongeka ndithu. Simudzakhala nthawi yayitali mʼdziko limene mukulowamo pamene mukuwoloka Yorodani kuti mulitenge.
Deuteronomy30:19 Lero kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zikhale mboni zodzakutsutsani pakuti ndayika pamaso panu moyo ndi imfa
Deuteronomy30:20 Ndi kuti mukonde Yehova Mulungu wanu
Deuteronomy31:1 Tsono Mose anapita ndi kukayankhula mawu awa kwa Aisraeli onse:
Deuteronomy31:2 “Tsopano ndili ndi zaka 120
Deuteronomy31:3 Mwini wake Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye amene adzakutsogolerani powoloka. Iye adzawononga mitundu ina yonse
Deuteronomy31:4 Ndipo Yehova adzawawononga iwo monga momwe anawonongera Sihoni ndi Ogi
Deuteronomy31:5 Ambuye adzawapereka kwa inu
Deuteronomy31:6 Khalani amphamvu ndi olimba mtima. Musachite nawo mantha kapena kunjenjemera pamaso pawo
Deuteronomy31:7 Pamenepo Yehova anayitana Yoswa pamaso pa Aisraeli onse ndipo anamuwuza kuti
Deuteronomy31:8 Yehova mwini ndiye akukutsogolerani ndipo adzakhala nanu. Sadzakusiyani kapena kukutayani. Usachite mantha ndiponso usataye mtima.”
Deuteronomy31:9 Choncho Mose analemba malamulo awa nawapereka kwa ansembe
Deuteronomy31:10 Kenaka Mose anawalamula kuti
Deuteronomy31:11 pamene Aisraeli onse abwera kudzaonekera pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu pamalo pamene Iye adzasankhe
Deuteronomy31:12 Mudzasonkhanitse anthu onse pamodzi
Deuteronomy31:13 Ana awo amene sadziwa malamulo awa
Deuteronomy31:14 Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Deuteronomy31:15 Pamenepo Yehova anaonekera ku tenti mʼchipilala cha mtambo
Deuteronomy31:16 Ndipo Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Deuteronomy31:17 Tsiku limenelo Ine ndidzawakwiyira ndi kuwataya. Ndidzawabisira nkhope yanga
Deuteronomy31:18 Ndipo Ine ndidzabisa ndithu nkhope yanga pa tsiku limenelo chifukwa cha zoyipa zimene anachita potembenukira kwa milungu ina.
Deuteronomy31:19 “Tsopano ulembe mawu a nyimbo iyi ndipo uwaphunzitse Aisraeli
Deuteronomy31:20 Pamene ndawalowetsa mʼdziko loyenda mkaka ndi uchi
Deuteronomy31:21 Ndipo pamene masautso ambiri ndi zovuta zambiri zidzawagwera
Deuteronomy31:22 Choncho Mose analemba nyimbo iyi tsiku limenelo ndi kuwaphunzitsa Aisraeli.
Deuteronomy31:23 Yehova analamula Yoswa mwana wa Nuni kuti
Deuteronomy31:24 Mose atatha kulemba malamulowa mʼbuku
Deuteronomy31:25 analamula Alevi amene ananyamula Bokosi la Chipangano la Yehova kuti
Deuteronomy31:26 “Tengani Buku ili la Malamulo ndi kuliyika pambali pa Bokosi la Chipangano la Yehova Mulungu wanu. Likhale kumeneko ngati mboni yokutsutsani.
Deuteronomy31:27 Pakuti Ine ndikudziwa kuwukira kwanu ndi kuwuma mtima kwanu. Ngati inu mwakhala mukuwukira Yehova ine ndili moyo ndiponso ndili nanu pamodzi
Deuteronomy31:28 Mundisonkhanitsire atsogoleri onse a mafuko anu pamodzi ndi akuluakulu onse
Deuteronomy31:29 Chifukwa ndikudziwa kuti ine ndikamwalira mudzayipa kwambiri ndi kutembenuka kuleka njira imene ndinakulamulani. Masiku amene akubwera
Deuteronomy31:30 Ndipo Mose ananena mawu a nyimbo iyi kuyiimba koyambira mpaka potsiriza gulu lonse la Aisraeli likumva:
Deuteronomy32:1 Mverani
Deuteronomy32:2 Chiphunzitso changa chigwe ngati mvula ndipo mawu anga atsike ngati mame
Deuteronomy32:3 Ndidzalalikira dzina la Yehova. Aa
Deuteronomy32:4 Iye ndi Thanthwe
Deuteronomy32:5 Koma iwo achita mosakhulupirika pamaso pake
Deuteronomy32:6 Kodi mukumubwezera Yehova chotere
Deuteronomy32:7 Kumbukirani masiku amakedzana; ganizirani za mibado yakalekale. Funsa abambo ako ndipo adzakuwuza
Deuteronomy32:8 Pamene Wammwambamwamba anapereka mayiko kwa anthu a mitundu ina kukhala cholowa chawo
Deuteronomy32:9 Pakuti gawo la Yehova ndi anthu ake
Deuteronomy32:10 Anamupeza mʼchipululu
Deuteronomy32:11 ngati chiwombankhanga chimene chimasasula chisa chake nʼkumazungulira pamwamba pa ana ake
Deuteronomy32:12 Yehova yekha ndiye anamutsogolera; popanda thandizo la mulungu wachilendo.
Deuteronomy32:13 Anamuyendetsa pamwamba pa mapiri a mʼdziko ndi kumudyetsa zipatso za mʼminda. Anamudyetsa uchi wofula pa thanthwe
Deuteronomy32:14 pamodzi ndi chambiko ndi mkaka wochokera ku ngʼombe ndi nkhosa
Deuteronomy32:15 Yesuruni ananenepa ndi kuyamba kuwukira; atakhuta
Deuteronomy32:16 Anamuchititsa nsanje ndi milungu yawo yachilendo ndiponso anamukwiyitsa ndi mafano awo onyansa.
Deuteronomy32:17 Anapereka nsembe kwa ziwanda zimene si Mulungu
Deuteronomy32:18 Inu munasiya Thanthwe limene linakulerani; munayiwala Mulungu amene anakubalani.
Deuteronomy32:19 Yehova anaona zimenezi ndipo anawakana chifukwa ana ake aamuna ndi aakazi anamukwiyitsa.
Deuteronomy32:20 Iye anati
Deuteronomy32:21 Anandichititsa kukhala wansanje pamene ankapembedza chimene si mulungu ndi kundikwiyitsa chifukwa cha mafano awo achabechabe. Ine ndidzawachititsa kuti achite nsanje ndi mtundu wina wopandapake; ndidzawakwiyitsa ndi mtundu wina wachabechabe.
Deuteronomy32:22 Pakuti mkwiyo wanga wayaka ngati moto
Deuteronomy32:23 “Ndidzawawunjikira masautso ndipo mivi yanga yonse idzathera pa iwo.
Deuteronomy32:24 Ndidzawatumizira njala yoopsa
Deuteronomy32:25 Mʼmisewu lupanga lidzawasandutsa kukhala wopanda ana; mantha adzalamulira nyumba zawo. Anyamata ndi atsikana adzafa
Deuteronomy32:26 Ine ndinanena kuti ndidzawamwaza ndi kuwafafaniza kuti anthu asawakumbukirenso
Deuteronomy32:27 koma sindinafune kuti adani anga adzandinyoze
Deuteronomy32:28 Iwo ndi mtundu wopanda maganizo
Deuteronomy32:29 Ngati iwo akanakhala anzeru akanamvetsetsa izi ndi kuzindikira kuti mathero awo adzakhala otani!
Deuteronomy32:30 Kodi munthu mmodzi akanathamangitsa bwanji anthu 1
Deuteronomy32:31 Pakuti thanthwe lawo silofanana ndi Thanthwe lathu
Deuteronomy32:32 Mpesa wawo umachokera ku mpesa wa ku Sodomu ndiponso ku minda ya ku Gomora. Mphesa zawo zili ndi ululu wakupha ndipo maphava ake ndi owawa.
Deuteronomy32:33 Vinyo wawo ndi wa ululu wa njoka
Deuteronomy32:34 “Kodi zimenezi sindinazisunge ndi kuzitsekera mʼkatikati mwa chuma changa?
Deuteronomy32:35 Kubwezera chilango nʼkwanga; ndidzawalanga ndine. Pa nthawi yake phazi lawo lidzaterera; tsiku lawo la masautso layandikira ndipo chiwonongeko chawo chikubwera pa iwo mofulumira.”
Deuteronomy32:36 Yehova adzaweruza anthu ake ndipo adzachitira atumiki ake chifundo pamene adzaona kuti mphamvu zawo zatha ndipo kuti palibe amene watsala
Deuteronomy32:37 Iye adzanena kuti
Deuteronomy32:38 milungu imene inkadya mafuta a nsembe zawo ndi kumwa vinyo wa chopereka chawo cha chakumwa?” Iwuzeni ibwere kuti idzakuthandizeni! Ibwere kuti idzakutetezenitu!
Deuteronomy32:39 “Onani tsopano kuti Ine ndine Iyeyo! Palibe mulungu wina koma Ine ndekha. Ine ndimapha ndiponso kupereka moyo
Deuteronomy32:40 Ndikweza dzanja langa kumwamba ndi kulumbira kuti
Deuteronomy32:41 pamene ndidzanola lupanga langa lonyezimira ndipo dzanja liligwira pakubweretsa chiweruzo
Deuteronomy32:42 Mivi yanga idzakhuta magazi awo pamene lupanga langa lidzawononga mnofu: magazi a anthu ophedwa ndi ogwidwa ukapolo
Deuteronomy32:43 Kondwerani
Deuteronomy32:44 Mose anabwera ndi Yoswa mwana wa Nuni ndipo anayankhula mawu onsewa mʼnyimbo anthu akumva.
Deuteronomy32:45 Mose atatsiriza kunena mawu onsewa pamtima kwa Aisraeli
Deuteronomy32:46 iye anawawuza kuti
Deuteronomy32:47 Mawuwa sikuti ndi mawu achabe kwa inu. Mawuwa ndi moyo wanu. Mukawamvera mudzakhala ndi moyo wautali mʼdziko limene mukukalitenga kukhala lanu mukawoloka Yorodani.”
Deuteronomy32:48 Tsiku lomwelo Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Deuteronomy32:49 “Pita ku mapiri a ku Abarimu ukakwere pa Phiri la Nebo ku Mowabu
Deuteronomy32:50 Iwe udzafera pa phiri limenelo ndipo udzapita kumene makolo ako anapita
Deuteronomy32:51 Chifukwa chake nʼchakuti inu nonse awiri simunakhulupirike kwa Ine pamaso pa Aisraeli pa madzi a Meriba ku Kadesi mʼchipululu cha Zini chifukwa simunandilemekeze kokwanira pakati pa Aisraeli.
Deuteronomy32:52 Choncho udzalionera kutali dziko limene ndikupereka kwa Aisraeli. Sudzalowa mʼdziko limene ndi kulipereka kwa Aisraeli.”
Deuteronomy33:1 Awa ndi madalitso amene Mose
Deuteronomy33:2 Iye anati: “Yehova anabwera kuchokera ku Sinai ndipo anatulukira kuchokera ku Seiri; anawala kuchokera pa Phiri la Parani. Iye anabwera ndi chiwunyinji cha angelo kuchokera kummwera
Deuteronomy33:3 Ndithu ndinu amene mumakonda anthu anu; opatulika ake onse ali mʼmanja mwake. Onse amagwada pansi pa mapazi anu kuchokera kwa inu amalandira malangizo
Deuteronomy33:4 malamulo amene Mose anatipatsa
Deuteronomy33:5 Iye anali mfumu ya Yesuruni pamene atsogoleri a anthu anasonkhana
Deuteronomy33:6 “Lolani Rubeni akhale ndi moyo ndipo asafe
Deuteronomy33:7 Ndipo ponena za Yuda anati: “Inu Yehova
Deuteronomy33:8 Za fuko la Alevi anati: “Tumimu wanu ndi Urimu ndi za mtumiki wanu wokhulupirika. Munamuyesa ku Masa; munalimbana naye ku madzi a ku Meriba.
Deuteronomy33:9 Iye ananena za abambo ake ndi amayi ake kuti
Deuteronomy33:10 Iye amaphunzitsa Yakobo malangizo anu ndi malamulo anu kwa Israeli. Amafukiza lubani pamaso panu ndiponso amapereka nsembe zanu zonse zopsereza pa guwa lanu.
Deuteronomy33:11 Inu Yehova
Deuteronomy33:12 Za fuko la Benjamini anati: “Wokondedwa wa Yehova akhale mwamtendere mwa Iye
Deuteronomy33:13 Za fuko la Yosefe anati: “Yehova adalitse dziko lake ndi mame ambiri ochokera kumwamba ndiponso madzi ambiri ochokera pansi pa nthaka;
Deuteronomy33:14 ndi zinthu zambiri zimene zimacha ndi dzuwa ndiponso ndi zokolola zabwino kwambiri zimene zimacha ndi mwezi uliwonse;
Deuteronomy33:15 ndi zipatso zabwino kwambiri zochokera mʼmapiri amakedzanawa ndiponso zokolola zochuluka zochokera ku zitunda zakalekale;
Deuteronomy33:16 ndi mphatso zabwino kwambiri zochokera pa dziko lapansi ndi zonse zimene zili mʼmenemo ndiponso kukoma mtima kwa Iye amene amakhala mʼchitsamba choyaka moto. Madalitso onsewa akhale pa mutu pa Yosefe
Deuteronomy33:17 Ulemerero wake uli ngati ngʼombe yayimuna yoyamba kubadwa; nyanga zake zili ngati za njati. Ndi nyanga zakezo adzapirikitsa anthu a mitundu ina
Deuteronomy33:18 Za fuko la Zebuloni anati: “Kondwera Zebuloni
Deuteronomy33:19 Adzayitanira mitundu ya anthu kumapiri
Deuteronomy33:20 Za fuko la Gadi anati: “Wodala amene amakulitsa malire a Gadi! Gadi amakhala kumeneko ngati mkango
Deuteronomy33:21 Iye anadzisankhira dziko labwino kwambiri; gawo la mtsogoleri anasungira iye. Pamene atsogoleri a anthu anasonkhana
Deuteronomy33:22 Za fuko la Dani anati: “Dani ndi mwana wamkango
Deuteronomy33:23 Za fuko la Nafutali anati: “Nafutali wadzaza ndi kukoma mtima kwa Yehova ndipo ndi wodzaza ndi madalitso ake; cholowa chake chidzakhala mbali ya kummwera kwa nyanja.”
Deuteronomy33:24 Za fuko la Aseri anati: “Mwana wodalitsika kwambiri ndi Aseri; abale ake amukomere mtima
Deuteronomy33:25 Zotsekera za zipata zako zidzakhala za chitsulo ndi za mkuwa
Deuteronomy33:26 “Palibe wina wofanana ndi Mulungu wa Yesuruni
Deuteronomy33:27 Mulungu wamuyaya ndiye pothawirapo pathu
Deuteronomy33:28 Motero Israeli adzakhala yekha mwamtendere; zidzukulu za Yakobo zili pa mtendere mʼdziko la tirigu ndi vinyo watsopano
Deuteronomy33:29 Iwe Israeli
Deuteronomy34:1 Ndipo Mose anakwera Phiri la Nebo kuchokera ku chigwa cha Mowabu ndi kukafika pamwamba pa Phiri la Pisiga
Deuteronomy34:2 Dera lonse la Nafutali
Deuteronomy34:3 Negevi ndi chigawo chonse kuchokera ku Chigwa cha Yeriko
Deuteronomy34:4 Kenaka Yehova anawuza Mose kuti
Deuteronomy34:5 Choncho Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anamwalira kumeneko ku Mowabu
Deuteronomy34:6 Yehova anamuyika mʼmanda ku Mowabu
Deuteronomy34:7 Mose anamwalira ali ndi zaka 120
Deuteronomy34:8 Aisraeli analira maliro a Mose mʼchikhwawa cha Mowabu kwa masiku makumi atatu mpaka nthawi ya kulira maliro ndi kukhuza inatha.
Deuteronomy34:9 Tsono Yoswa
Deuteronomy34:10 Kuyambira nthawi imeneyi
Deuteronomy34:11 Amene anachita zizindikiro zozizwitsa zonsezi ndi zozizwitsa zimene Yehova anamutuma kuti achite mu Igupto
Deuteronomy34:12 Ndithudi palibe mneneri wina aliyense amene anachita zinthu zazikulu ndi zoopsa zofanana ndi zomwe Mose anachita pamaso pa Aisraeli onse.
Joshua1:1 Atamwalira Mose mtumiki wa Mulungu
Joshua1:2 “Mose mtumiki wanga wamwalira. Ndipo iwe ndi anthu onsewa
Joshua1:3 Paliponse pamene phazi lanu liponde
Joshua1:4 Dziko lanu lidzayambira ku chipululu kummwera mpaka ku mapiri a Lebanoni kumpoto
Joshua1:5 Palibe munthu amene adzatha kukugonjetsa masiku onse a moyo wako. Monga Ine ndinakhalira ndi Mose
Joshua1:6 “Ukhale wamphamvu ndi wolimba mtima
Joshua1:7 Ukhale wamphamvu ndi wolimba mtima kwambiri. Usamale ndithu kuti umvere malamulo onse amene mtumiki wanga Mose anakupatsa. Usachoke pa malamulo anga ndipo kulikonse kumene udzapite udzapambana.
Joshua1:8 Uziwerenga Buku la Malamuloli
Joshua1:9 Paja ndinakulamula kuti ukhale wamphamvu ndi wolimba mtima. Choncho usamachite mantha kapena kutaya mtima popeza Ine Yehova Mulungu wako ndidzakhala nawe kulikonse kumene udzapite.”
Joshua1:10 Tsono Yoswa analamula atsogoleri a Aisraeli nawawuza kuti
Joshua1:11 “Pitani ku misasa yonse ndipo muwuze anthu kuti
Joshua1:12 Koma Yoswa anawuza fuko la Rubeni
Joshua1:13 “Kumbukirani zimene Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anakulamulani kuti
Joshua1:14 Tsono akazi anu
Joshua1:15 Abale anuwo akadzalandira dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akuwapatsa monga inu mwachitira
Joshua1:16 Kenaka iwo anayankha Yoswa kuti
Joshua1:17 Monga momwe tinamvera Mose kwathunthu
Joshua1:18 Aliyense wotsutsana ndi inu kapena wosamvera zimene mutilamula adzaphedwa. Inu mukhale wamphamvu ndi wolimba mtima!”
Joshua2:1 Tsono Yoswa mwana wa Nuni anatuma anthu awiri okazonda dziko mwachinsinsi kuchokera ku Sitimu. Iye anawawuza kuti
Joshua2:2 Mfumu ya Yeriko inawuzidwa kuti
Joshua2:3 Choncho Mfumu ya Yeriko inatumiza uthenga kwa Rahabe kuti
Joshua2:4 Koma pa nthawiyi nʼkuti mkaziyo atatenga amuna awiriwo ndi kuwabisa. Tsono anayankha kuti
Joshua2:5 Iwo achoka kuno ndi chisisira
Joshua2:6 Koma nʼkuti atawakweza pa denga azondiwo ndi kuwabisa pansi pa mapesi a thonje amene iye anawayika pa dengapo.
Joshua2:7 Nthumwi za mfumu zija zitatuluka ndipo chipata chinatsekedwa. Nthumwizo zinapita kukawafunafuna azondi aja mpaka ku dooko la Yorodani.
Joshua2:8 Azondiwo asanagone
Joshua2:9 ndipo anawawuza kuti
Joshua2:10 Ife tinamva mmene Yehova anawumitsira madzi a Nyanja Yofiira inu mukufika pamene munatuluka mʼdziko la Igupto. Tamvanso zimene munachita kwa Sihoni ndi Ogi
Joshua2:11 Titamva zimenezi
Joshua2:12 Choncho mulumbire pamaso pa Yehova ndi kundipatsa chizindikiro choti mudzachitadi zimene mwalonjeza
Joshua2:13 Inu mulonjeze kuti simudzapha abambo anga ndi amayi anga
Joshua2:14 Anthuwo anamuyankha kuti
Joshua2:15 Popeza nyumba ya Rahabe inali pa linga la mzindawo
Joshua2:16 Iye anawawuza kuti
Joshua2:17 Anthuwo anati kwa iye
Joshua2:18 tikadzalowa mʼdzikoli
Joshua2:19 Ngati wina aliyense adzatuluka mʼnyumbamo kuti azikayendayenda mu msewu
Joshua2:20 Komanso iwe ukangowulula zimene ife tikuchitazi ndiye kuti ife sitidzasunga zimene talonjezazi.”
Joshua2:21 Rahabe anayankha kuti
Joshua2:22 Azondi aja anachoka napita ku mapiri ndipo anakhalako masiku atatu. Apa nʼkuti otumidwa ndi mfumu aja atawafunafuna ponseponse nʼkubwerera osawapeza.
Joshua2:23 Pambuyo pake azondi awiri aja anayamba ulendo wobwerera kwawo. Anatsika ku mapiri kuja
Joshua2:24 Iwo anati kwa Yoswa
Joshua3:1 Yoswa ndi Aisraeli onse anadzuka mmamawa nanyamuka ku Sitimu kupita ku Yorodani. Iwo anagona kumeneko asanawoloke mtsinje wa Yorodaniwo.
Joshua3:2 Patatha masiku atatu
Joshua3:3 kulangiza anthu kuti
Joshua3:4 Potero mudzadziwa njira yoti mudzere
Joshua3:5 Yoswa anawuza anthu kuti
Joshua3:6 Mmawa mwake Yoswa ananena kwa ansembe kuti
Joshua3:7 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Yoswa
Joshua3:8 Ansembe amene akunyamula Bokosi la Chipangano uwalamule kuti
Joshua3:9 Yoswa anati kwa Aisraeli
Joshua3:10 Umu ndi mmene mudzadziwira kuti Mulungu wamoyo ali pakati panu. Inu mukamadzapita patsogolo Iye adzathamangitsa Akanaani
Joshua3:11 Pamenepo
Joshua3:12 Musankhe amuna khumi ndi awiri kuchokera ku fuko lililonse la Israeli.
Joshua3:13 Mapazi a ansembe onyamula Bokosi la Yehova
Joshua3:14 Tsono Aisraeli anachoka ku misasa yawo kukawoloka mtsinje wa Yorodani. Ansembe onyamula Bokosi la Chipangano ndiwo anatsogolera anthuwo.
Joshua3:15 Nyengo imeneyi inali yokolola ndipo mtsinje wa Yorodani umakhala wodzaza. Komabe
Joshua3:16 madzi ochokera ku mtunda anasiya kuyenda. Madzi a Yorodani ochokera ku mtunda anawunjikana pamodzi ngati khoma lalitali pa mtunda wautali ndithu ndi mzinda wa Adama chapafupi ndi mzinda wa Zaretani. Madzi othamangira ku nyanja ya Araba
Joshua3:17 Ansembe onyamula Bokosi la Chipangano la Yehova anali chiyimire powuma
Joshua4:1 Anthu onse atatha kuwoloka Yorodani
Joshua4:2 “Sankha amuna khumi ndi awiri
Joshua4:3 Tsono uwalamule kuti
Joshua4:4 Choncho Yoswa anayitana amuna khumi ndi awiri amene anawasankha aja kuchokera pakati pa Aisraeli
Joshua4:5 ndipo anawawuza kuti
Joshua4:6 kuti ikhale chizindikiro kwa inu. Mʼtsogolo muno ana anu akamadzakufunsani kuti
Joshua4:7 Muzidzawawuza kuti
Joshua4:8 Aisraeli anachitadi monga Yoswa anawalamulira. Iwo ananyamula miyala khumi ndi iwiri kuchokera pakati pa Yorodani
Joshua4:9 Yoswa anayimika miyala khumi ndi iwiri imene inali pakati pa Yorodani pamalo pamene ansembe onyamula Bokosi la Chipangano anayimapo. Ndipo miyalayo ili pamalo pomwepo mpaka lero lino.
Joshua4:10 Ansembe onyamula Bokosi lija anayimirirabe pakati pa Yorodani mpaka zonse zimene Yehova analamulira Yoswa kuti awuze anthu zinatha. Zimenezi zinali monga momwe Mose anamufotokozera Yoswa. Tsono anthu anawoloka mtsinjewo mofulumira.
Joshua4:11 Anthu atatha kuwoloka
Joshua4:12 Anthu a fuko la Rubeni
Joshua4:13 Asilikali pafupifupi 40
Joshua4:14 Zimene Yehova anachita tsiku limeneli zinapatsa anthu mtima wolemekeza Yoswa. Ndipo anamulemekeza masiku onse a moyo wake
Joshua4:15 Kenaka Yehova anati kwa Yoswa
Joshua4:16 “Lamula ansembe onyamula Bokosi la Chipanganowo kuti atuluke mu Yorodani.”
Joshua4:17 Choncho Yoswa anawalamuladi ansembe aja kuti atuluke mu Yorodani muja.
Joshua4:18 Ansembe onyamula Bokosi la Chipangano la Yehova aja atangotuluka mu mtsinje muja nʼkuponda powuma
Joshua4:19 Aisraeli anawoloka Yorodani tsiku lakhumi la mwezi woyamba ndipo anakamanga misasa yawo ku Giligala mbali ya kummawa kwa Yeriko.
Joshua4:20 Ku Giligala
Joshua4:21 Ndipo iye anati kwa Aisraeli
Joshua4:22 Muzidzawawuza kuti
Joshua4:23 Pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye anawumitsa Yorodani pamaso panu mpaka inu mutawoloka. Yehova Mulungu wanu anaphwetsa madzi a Yorodani monga mmene anachitira ndi Nyanja Yofiira mpaka ife tinawoloka powuma.
Joshua4:24 Iye anachita zimenezi kuti anthu onse pa dziko lapansi adziwe kuti dzanja la Yehova ndi lamphamvu
Joshua5:1 Mafumu onse a Aamori
Joshua5:2 Tsono Yehova anati kwa Yoswa
Joshua5:3 Choncho Yoswa anapanga mipeni ya miyala ndi kuchita mdulidwe Aisraeli ku Gibeyati Haaraloti.
Joshua5:4 Chifukwa chimene Yoswa anachitira izi ndi ichi: Onse amene anatuluka mʼdziko la Igupto
Joshua5:5 Anthu onse amene anatuluka mʼdziko la Igupto anali atachita mwambo wa mdulidwe
Joshua5:6 Aisraeli anakhala akuyenda mʼchipululu kwa zaka makumi anayi mpaka amuna onse amene potuluka mʼdziko la Igupto anali a msinkhu woyenera kupita ku nkhondo anamwalira. Iwo anafa chifukwa sanamvere mawu a Yehova. Yehova anawalumbirira kuti sadzalowa konse mʼdziko loyenda mkaka ndi uchi limene analonjeza kwa makolo awo kuti adzatipatsa.
Joshua5:7 Koma ana awo amene analowa mʼmalo mwawo ndiwo amene Yoswa anawachita mdulidwe popeza sanachite pamene anali pa ulendo wawo mʼchipululu muja.
Joshua5:8 Atamaliza kuchita mdulidwe uja
Joshua5:9 Kenaka Yehova anati kwa Yoswa
Joshua5:10 Akupumulabe ku Giligala kuja mʼchigwa cha Yeriko
Joshua5:11 Mmawa mwake ndi pamene anayamba kudya zakudya za mʼdziko la Kanaani. Anaphika buledi wopanda yisiti ndi kukazinga tirigu tsiku lomwelo.
Joshua5:12 Atangodya chakudya cha mʼdzikomo
Joshua5:13 Tsiku lina pamene Yoswa anali pafupi ndi Yeriko
Joshua5:14 Iye anayankha kuti “Sindili mbali iliyonse. Ndabwera monga mkulu wa asilikali a Yehova.” Pomwepo Yoswa anadzigwetsa chafufumimba kupereka ulemu
Joshua5:15 Mkulu wa asilikali a Yehova uja anayankha kuti
Joshua6:1 Tsono mzinda wa Yeriko unali utatsekedwa kuti Aisraeli asalowe. Palibe amene amatuluka kapena kulowa.
Joshua6:2 Kenaka Yehova anati kwa Yoswa
Joshua6:3 Tsono iwe pamodzi ndi ankhondo ako onse muzizungulira mzindawu masiku asanu ndi limodzi
Joshua6:4 Ansembe asanu ndi awiri
Joshua6:5 Ansembe adzalize malipenga kosalekeza. Tsono anthu onse akadzamva kuliza kumeneku adzafuwule kwambiri
Joshua6:6 Ndipo Yoswa mwana wa Nuni anayitana ansembe ndipo anawawuza kuti
Joshua6:7 Ndipo analamulira anthu kuti
Joshua6:8 Mofanana ndi mmene Yoswa anayankhulira kwa anthu aja
Joshua6:9 Ankhondo amayenda patsogolo pa ansembe amene amayimba malipenga
Joshua6:10 Koma Yoswa nʼkuti atalamulira anthu kuti
Joshua6:11 Ansembe onyamula Bokosi la Chipangano la Yehova anazungulira mzindawo kamodzi. Kenaka anthu anabwerera ku msasa wawo kukagona.
Joshua6:12 Yoswa anadzuka mmawa tsiku linalo ndipo ansembe ananyamula Bokosi la Yehova.
Joshua6:13 Ansembe asanu ndi awiri onyamula malipenga asanu ndi awiri anakhala patsogolo pa Bokosi la Yehova akuyimba malipenga. Ankhondo anali patsogolo pawo ndipo gulu lina linatsatira Bokosi la Yehova. Apa nʼkuti malipenga akulira.
Joshua6:14 Tsiku lachiwiri anazunguliranso mzinda kamodzi ndi kubwerera ku misasa. Iwo anachita izi kwa masiku asanu ndi limodzi.
Joshua6:15 Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri
Joshua6:16 Pomwe amazungulira kachisanu ndi chiwiri
Joshua6:17 Mzindawu ndi zonse zimene zili mʼmenemo muziwononge. Rahabe yekha
Joshua6:18 Koma musatenge kanthu kalikonse koyenera kuwonongedwa. Mukadzangotenga kanthu kalikonse koyenera kuwonongedwa
Joshua6:19 Zonse za siliva ndi golide
Joshua6:20 Ansembe analiza malipenga. Anthu atamva kulira kwa malipenga
Joshua6:21 Iwo analowa mu mzindawo nawononga ndi lupanga chilichonse chamoyo kuyambira amuna
Joshua6:22 Yoswa anawuza anthu awiri amene anakazonda dziko aja kuti
Joshua6:23 Choncho iwo anapita nakatenga Rahabe
Joshua6:24 Kenaka iwo anawotcha mzinda wonse ndi chilichonse chimene chinali mʼmenemo
Joshua6:25 Koma Yoswa sanaphe Rahabe
Joshua6:26 Pa nthawi imeneyo Yoswa anapereka chenjezo motemberera kuti
Joshua6:27 Motero Yehova anali ndi Yoswa
Joshua7:1 Koma Aisraeli anachita zachinyengo ndi lamulo lija loti asatenge kalikonse koyenera kuwonongedwa. Akani mwana wa Karimi
Joshua7:2 Tsono Yoswa anatuma anthu kuchokera ku Yeriko kukazonda ku mzinda wa Ai umene uli pafupi ndi mzinda wa Beti-Aveni kummawa kwa Beteli
Joshua7:3 Atabwera kwa Yoswa
Joshua7:4 Choncho kunapita anthu 3
Joshua7:5 Anthu a ku Ai anathamangitsa Aisraeli kuchokera pa chipata cha mzindawo mpaka ku ngwenya ndipo anapha anthu 36. Iwowa anawapha pamene ankatsika phiri. Choncho mitima ya anthu inasweka ndipo analibenso mphamvu.
Joshua7:6 Tsono Yoswa anangʼamba zovala zake nagwada nʼkuweramitsa mutu wake pansi patsogolo pa Bokosi la Yehova. Akuluakulu a Israeli nawonso anadzigwetsa pansi ndipo anakhala pomwepo mpaka madzulo atadziwaza fumbi kumutu kwawo.
Joshua7:7 Ndipo Yoswa anati
Joshua7:8 Tsono Ambuye
Joshua7:9 Akanaani ndi anthu ena a dziko lino adzamva zimenezi ndipo adzatizinga ndi kutiwonongeratu. Nanga inu mudzatani ndi dzina lanu lamphamvulo?”
Joshua7:10 Koma Yehova anati kwa Yoswa
Joshua7:11 Aisraeli achimwa. Iwo aphwanya pangano limene ndinawalamula kuti asunge. Anatengako zinthu zina zofunika kuwonongedwa. Choncho anabako
Joshua7:12 Nʼchifukwa chake Aisraeli sangathe kulimbana ndi adani awo. Iwo anathawa pamaso pa adani awo chifukwa ndiwo oyenera kuwonongedwa. Ine sindikhalanso ndi inu pokhapokha mutawononga chilichonse choyenera kuwonongedwa pakati panu.
Joshua7:13 “Nyamuka
Joshua7:14 “Mawa mmamawa adzabwere pamaso pa Yehova fuko limodzilimodzi. Fuko limene Yehova adzaliloze lidzabwere patsogolo mbumba imodziimodzi. Tsono mbumba imene Yehova adzayiloze idzabwere patsogolo banja limodzilimodzi. Banja limene Yehova adzaliloze lidzabwere patsogolo munthu mmodzimmodzi.
Joshua7:15 Iye amene adzagwidwe ndi zinthu zoyenera kuwonongedwazo adzawotchedwa ndi moto
Joshua7:16 Mmawa mwake Yoswa anabweretsa Israeli fuko limodzilimodzi ndipo fuko la Yuda linalozedwa.
Joshua7:17 Anabweretsa poyera mbumba zonse za fuko la Yuda
Joshua7:18 Potsiriza anatulutsa anthu onse a banja la Zabidi ndipo Akani anagwidwa. Iyeyu anali mwana wa Karimi
Joshua7:19 Ndipo Yoswa anati kwa Akani
Joshua7:20 Akani anayankha kuti
Joshua7:21 Ndinaona mwa zinthu zolanda ku nkhondo zija
Joshua7:22 Motero Yoswa anatuma anthu
Joshua7:23 Iwo anazichotsa zinthuzo mu tenti yake nabwera nazo kwa Yoswa ndi kwa Aisraeli onse ndipo anaziyika pamaso pa Yehova.
Joshua7:24 Kenaka Yoswa pamodzi ndi Aisraeli onse anatenga Akani mwana wa Zera pamodzi ndi siliva
Joshua7:25 Yoswa anati “Chifukwa chiyani wabweretsa mavuto awa pa ife? Yehova ndiye abweretse mavuto pa iwe lero.” Kenaka Aisraeli onse anaponya miyala Akani
Joshua7:26 Anawunjika mulu waukulu wa miyala pa Akani
Joshua8:1 Kenaka Yehova anati kwa Yoswa
Joshua8:2 Mzinda wa Ai ndi mfumu yake muchite monga munachita ndi mzinda wa Yeriko ndi mfumu yake
Joshua8:3 Kotero Yoswa ndi gulu lonse la nkhondo anakonzeka kupita ku Ai. Iye anasankha amuna 30
Joshua8:4 nawapatsa malamulo awa kuti
Joshua8:5 Ine ndi gulu langa lonse tikayamba kuwuputa mzindawu
Joshua8:6 Iwo adzatithamangitsa mpaka titawakokera kutali ndi mzindawo
Joshua8:7 inu mudzatuluke pamene mwabisalapo ndi kulanda mzindawo. Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakupatsani mzindawo.
Joshua8:8 Mukakawulanda mzindawo mudzawuyatse moto. Mukachite monga mwa mawu a Yehova. Amenewa ndiwo malamulo amene ndakupatsani.”
Joshua8:9 Yoswa atawatumiza
Joshua8:10 Mmawa mwake
Joshua8:11 Gulu lonse la nkhondo limene linali ndi iye linatsogolako ndi kukamanga zithando pafupi ndi mzindawo chakumpoto mopenyana nawo. Pakati pa iwo ndi mzindawo panali chigwa.
Joshua8:12 Yoswa anali atatenga asilikali 5
Joshua8:13 Anakhazika anthuwo mokonzekera nkhondo. Gulu lalikulu la nkhondo linakamanga zithando zawo kumpoto kwa mzinda
Joshua8:14 Mfumu ya Ai itaona ankhondo a Yoswa
Joshua8:15 Yoswa ndi Aisraeli onse anachita ngati agonja ndi kumathawira ku chipululu.
Joshua8:16 Anthu onse a ku Ai anawuzidwa kuti awapirikitse. Ndipo iwo anapirikitsadi Yoswa uja
Joshua8:17 Palibe munthu wamwamuna wa mzinda wa Ai kapena wa Beteli amene sanatuluke kukapirikitsa Aisraeli. Iwo anasiya mzinda wosatseka ndi kumapirikitsa Aisraeli.
Joshua8:18 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Yoswa
Joshua8:19 Atangotambalitsa dzanja lake
Joshua8:20 Anthu a ku Ai aja atangochewukira mʼmbuyo anaona utsi uli tolotolo. Koma mpata woti athawireko panalibe pakuti Aisraeli amene amathawira ku chipululu anabwerera nayamba kuwathamangitsa.
Joshua8:21 Yoswa ndi Aisraeli onse ataona kuti obisalira aja alanda mzinda ndipo kuti utsi unali tolotolo
Joshua8:22 Nawonso Aisraeli amene anali mu mzindamo anatuluka kudzalimbana ndi anthu a ku Ai. Choncho iwo anazingidwa mbali zonse ndi Aisraeli ndipo onse anaphedwa. Palibe amene anatsala wamoyo kapena wothawa
Joshua8:23 kupatula mfumu ya ku Ai yokha imene anayigwira nabwera nayo kwa Yoswa.
Joshua8:24 Aisraeli aja atatha kupha anthu onse a ku Ai amene anali mʼthengo ndi mʼchipululu kumene anawapirikitsira
Joshua8:25 Chiwerengero cha anthu onse a ku Ai
Joshua8:26 Yoswa sanatsitse dzanja lake limene ananyamula mkondo mpaka ataona kuti onse amene amakhala mu mzinda wa Ai aphedwa.
Joshua8:27 Tsono Aisraeli anatenga zoweta ndi katundu yense wa anthu ophedwa aja
Joshua8:28 Pambuyo pake Yoswa anawutentha mzinda wa Ai ndi kuwusiya bwinja monga ulili leromu.
Joshua8:29 Iye anapachika pa mtengo mfumu ya Ai ndipo anayisiya mpaka madzulo. Pomwe dzuwa linalowa Yoswa analamula kuti akachotse mtembowo ndi kukawutaya ku chipata cha mzindawo. Pamwamba pa mtembowo anawunjikapo mulu waukulu wa miyala. Muluwo ulipobe mpaka lero lino.
Joshua8:30 Ndipo Yoswa anamanga guwa lansembe la Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli pa phiri la Ebala.
Joshua8:31 Analimanga motsata zimene Mose mtumiki wa Yehova analamulira Aisraeli
Joshua8:32 Kenaka anthu onse akupenya
Joshua8:33 Aisraeli onse
Joshua8:34 Pambuyo pake Yoswa anawerenga mawu onse a malamulo
Joshua8:35 Yoswa anawerenga mawu onse amene Mose analamula
Joshua9:1 Mafumu onse okhala kumadzulo kwa Yorodani atamva zimenezi pamodzi ndi mafumu okhala ku mayiko a ku mapiri
Joshua9:2 anapangana kuti achite nkhondo ndi Yoswa ndi Israeli.
Joshua9:3 Koma Ahivi ena a ku Gibiyoni atamva zomwe Yoswa anachitira mizinda ya Yeriko ndi Ai
Joshua9:4 anaganiza zochita zachinyengo. Anapita nasenzetsa abulu awo chakudya mʼmatumba akalekale ndiponso matumba a vinyo achikopa ongʼambikangʼambika.
Joshua9:5 Anthuwa anavala nsapato zakutha ndi zazigamba ndiponso anavala sanza. Buledi wawo yense anali wowuma ndi wowola.
Joshua9:6 Ndipo anapita kwa Yoswa ku msasa ku Giligala ndikumuwuza kuti
Joshua9:7 Koma Aisraeli anayankha Ahiviwo kuti
Joshua9:8 Iwo anati kwa Yoswa
Joshua9:9 Iwo anayankha kuti
Joshua9:10 ndi zonse zimene anachita kwa mafumu awiri a Aamori kummawa kwa Yorodani
Joshua9:11 Tsono akuluakulu athu ndi onse amene akukhala mʼdziko lathu anati kwa ife. Tengani chakudya cha pa ulendo wanu. Pitani mukakumane nawo ndipo mukati kwa iwo
Joshua9:12 Buledi wathuyu anali wotentha pamene timanyamuka ku mudzi kubwera kwa inu. Koma tsopano taonani ali gwaa ndiponso wawola.
Joshua9:13 Zikopa zimene tinathiramo vinyozi zinali zatsopano
Joshua9:14 Aisraeli anatengako chakudya chawo koma sanafunse kwa Yehova.
Joshua9:15 Choncho Yoswa anapangana nawo za mtendere kuti sadzawapha
Joshua9:16 Patatha masiku atatu atachita mgwirizano wa mtendere ndi Agibiyoni
Joshua9:17 Tsono Aisraeli ananyamuka ulendo ndipo tsiku lachitatu anafika ku mizinda ya Gibiyoni
Joshua9:18 Koma Aisraeli sanawaphe anthuwo chifukwa atsogoleri awo anali atalonjeza mʼdzina la Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli za Agibiyoniwo. Koma anthu onse anatsutsana ndi atsogoleriwo.
Joshua9:19 Koma atsogoleriwo anayankha kuti
Joshua9:20 Chimene tidzachita nawo ndi ichi: Tidzawasiya akhale ndi moyo kuti mkwiyo wa Yehova usatigwere chifukwa chophwanya lonjezo limene tinawalonjeza.”
Joshua9:21 Anapitiriza kunena kuti “Asiyeni akhale ndi moyo
Joshua9:22 Kenaka Yoswa anayitanitsa Agibiyoni aja nawafunsa kuti
Joshua9:23 Tsopano popeza mwachita izi
Joshua9:24 Iwo anayankha Yoswa kuti
Joshua9:25 Tsopanotu ife tili mʼmanja mwanu
Joshua9:26 Tsono Yoswa anawapulumutsa mʼmanja mwa Aisraeli ndipo sanawaphe.
Joshua9:27 Kuyambira tsiku limenelo Agibiyoni aja anasanduka odula nkhuni zaguwa lansembe la Yehova ndiponso otunga madzi. Mpaka lero lino iwo akuchitabe zimenezi kulikonse kumene Yehova anasankha.
Joshua10:1 Adoni-Zedeki mfumu ya ku Yerusalemu inamva kuti Yoswa wagonjetsa ndi kuwononga kotheratu mzinda wa Ai pamodzi ndi mfumu yake
Joshua10:2 Choncho iye ndi anthu ake anachita mantha aakulu
Joshua10:3 Chotsatira chake Adoni-Zedeki mfumu ya Yerusalemu inatuma uthenga kwa Hohamu mfumu ya Hebroni
Joshua10:4 Iye anatumiza mawu kuti
Joshua10:5 Mafumu asanu a Aamori aja
Joshua10:6 Koma anthu a ku Gibiyoni anatumiza uthenga kwa Yoswa ku misasa ya ku Giligala nati
Joshua10:7 Choncho Yoswa ananyamuka kuchoka ku Giligala ndi gulu lake la ankhondo pamodzi ndi anthu ake olimba mtima.
Joshua10:8 Yehova anati kwa Yoswa
Joshua10:9 Atayenda usiku wonse kuchokera ku Giligala
Joshua10:10 Yehova anachititsa mantha adani aja atangoona gulu lankhondo la Israeli. Choncho Aisraeli anagonjetsa Aamori ku Gibiyoni ndipo anawathamangitsa mu msewu wopita ku Beti-Horoni ndi kuwapha njira yonse yopita ku Azeka ndi Makeda.
Joshua10:11 Pamene ankathawa pamaso pa Israeli pa njira yochokera ku Beti-Horoni mpaka ku Azeka
Joshua10:12 Pa tsiku limene Yehova anapereka Aamori mʼmanja mwa Israeli
Joshua10:13 Choncho dzuwa linayima
Joshua10:14 Sipanakhaleponso tsiku ngati limeneli kuyambira kale
Joshua10:15 Kenaka Yoswa anabwerera pamodzi ndi Aisraeli onse ku misasa ku Giligala.
Joshua10:16 Mafumu asanu aja anathawa ndi kukabisala ku phanga la Makeda.
Joshua10:17 Koma Yoswa anamva kuti mafumu asanu awapeza akubisala ku phanga la Makeda.
Joshua10:18 Tsono Yoswa analamula kuti
Joshua10:19 Koma inu musakhaleko! Thamangitsani adani anu
Joshua10:20 Kotero Yoswa ndi Aisraeli anapha anthu aja
Joshua10:21 Kenaka gulu lonse la ankhondo linabwerera bwinobwino kwa Yoswa ku misasa ya ku Makeda
Joshua10:22 Yoswa anati
Joshua10:23 Pamenepo mafumu asanu aja anatulutsidwa
Joshua10:24 Atabwera nawo kwa Yoswa
Joshua10:25 Yoswa anawawuza kuti
Joshua10:26 Kenaka Yoswa anawabaya ndi kuwapha mafumuwo ndipo anawapachika pa mitengo isanu ndipo anakhala pamenepo mpaka madzulo.
Joshua10:27 Dzuwa litalowa
Joshua10:28 Tsiku lomwelo Yoswa analanda mzinda wa Makeda. Iye anapha anthu a mu mzindamo ndi mfumu yake ndipo sanasiye aliyense wamoyo. Yoswa anachita ndi mfumu ya ku Makeda monga anachitira ndi mfumu ya Yeriko.
Joshua10:29 Kenaka Yoswa ndi Aisraeli onse anapitirira kuchokera ku Makeda nakafika ku Libina ndi kuthira nkhondo mzindawo.
Joshua10:30 Yehova anaperekanso mzindawo ndi mfumu yake mʼmanja mwa Aisraeli. Ndipo Yoswa anapha onse amene anali mu mzindamo. Palibe amene anatsala wamoyo. Ndipo Yoswa anachita ndi mfumu ya Libina monga anachitira ndi mfumu ya Yeriko.
Joshua10:31 Kenaka Yoswa ndi Aisraeli onse anapitirira kuchokera ku Libina kupita ku Lakisi. Iye anazungulira mzindawo ndi kuwuthira nkhondo.
Joshua10:32 Yehova anapereka Lakisi kwa Israeli; ndipo Yoswa anawulanda pa tsiku lachiwiri. Monga anachita ndi mzinda wa Libina
Joshua10:33 Nthawi imeneyi nʼkuti Horamu mfumu ya Gezeri itabwera kudzathandiza Lakisi koma Yoswa anamugonjetsa pamodzi ndi asilikali ake ndipo palibe anatsala wamoyo.
Joshua10:34 Kenaka Yoswa ndi Aisraeli onse anapitirira kuchokera ku Lakisi nakafika ku Egiloni. Iwo anazungulira mzindawo ndi kuwuthira nkhondo.
Joshua10:35 Anawulanda tsiku lomwelo ndipo anapha aliyense amene anali mu mzindawo monga momwe anachitira ku Lakisi.
Joshua10:36 Kenaka Yoswa ndi Aisraeli onse anachoka ku Egiloni nakafika ku Hebroni ndi kukawuthira nkhondo.
Joshua10:37 Iwo analanda mzindawo napha ndi lupanga mfumu yake pamodzi ndi onse amene ankakhala mʼmenemo. Monga anachita ndi mzinda wa Egiloni
Joshua10:38 Pambuyo pake Yoswa ndi Aisraeli onse anatembenukira mzinda wa Debri ndi kukawuthira nkhondo.
Joshua10:39 Iwo analanda mzindawo ndi midzi ndi kupha mfumu yake pamodzi ndi onse okhala mʼmenemo. Anachita ndi mzinda wa Debri pamodzi ndi mfumu yake zofanana ndi zimene anachita ndi mzinda wa Libina ndi wa Hebroni.
Joshua10:40 Motero Yoswa anagonjetsa dziko lonselo. Anapha mafumu onse a dera la kumapiri
Joshua10:41 Yoswa anawagonjetsa iwo kuyambira ku Kadesi Barinea mpaka ku Gaza
Joshua10:42 Yoswa anagonjetsa mafumu onsewa ndi kulanda dziko lawo kamodzinʼkamodzi chifukwa Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli anawamenyera nkhondo.
Joshua10:43 Pambuyo pake Yoswa ndi Aisraeli onse anabwerera ku misasa yawo ku Giligala.
Joshua11:1 Yabini
Joshua11:2 Inatumizanso uthenga kwa mafumu a kumpoto
Joshua11:3 Inatumizanso uthenga kwa Akanaani amene ankakhala kummawa ndi kumadzulo kwa Yorodani. Uthenga unapitanso kwa Aamori
Joshua11:4 Mafumuwo anabwera pamodzi ndi ankhondo awo onse. Gulu la ankhondo linali lalikulu ngati mchenga wa mʼmbali mwa nyanja. Analinso ndi akavalo ndi magaleta ambiri.
Joshua11:5 Mafumu onsewa anasonkhana pamodzi ndipo anamanga misasa yawo ku mtsinje wa Meromu
Joshua11:6 Yehova anati kwa Yoswa
Joshua11:7 Kotero Yoswa pamodzi ndi gulu lonse la nkhondo anafika kwa adani awo aja ku mtsinje wa Meromu modzidzimutsa ndi kuwathira nkhondo.
Joshua11:8 Yehova anawapereka mʼmanja mwa Israeli mwakuti anawagonjetseratu ndi kuwapirikitsa njira yonse mpaka ku Sidoni Wamkulu ndi ku Misirefoti Maimu
Joshua11:9 Yoswa anawachita zimene Yehova analamula. Iye anadula matsinde a akavalo awo ndi kutentha magaleta awo.
Joshua11:10 Pambuyo pake Yoswa anabwera nalanda mzinda wa Hazori ndi kupha mfumu yake. (Nthawi imeneyo mzinda wa Hazori unali wopambana mizinda ina yonse).
Joshua11:11 Anapha aliyense wa mu mzindamo popanda wotsala wamoyo
Joshua11:12 Yoswa analanda mizinda yonse ndi mafumu ake. Anthu onse anaphedwa ndi lupanga monga momwe analamulira Mose
Joshua11:13 Israeli sanatenthe mizinda yomangidwa pa zitunda
Joshua11:14 Aisraeli anatenga zinthu zonse za mʼmizindayi pamodzi ndi ziweto kuti zikhale zawo
Joshua11:15 Monga momwe Yehova analamulira mtumiki wake Mose
Joshua11:16 Kotero Yoswa analanda dziko lonse: dziko la ku mapiri
Joshua11:17 Dziko lolandidwalo linayambira ku phiri la Halaki limene linali ku Seiri mpaka ku Baala-Gadi mʼchigwa cha Lebanoni
Joshua11:18 atachita nawo nkhondo kwa nthawi yayitali.
Joshua11:19 Palibe ngakhale ndi mfumu imodzi yomwe imene inachita mgwirizano wa mtendere ndi Aisraeli kupatula Ahivi okhala ku Gibiyoni. Koma mizinda ina yonse anachita kuyigonjetsa pa nkhondo.
Joshua11:20 Yehova anali atawumitsa mitima yawo kuti alimbane ndi Aisraeli kuti aphedwe popanda kuchitiridwa chifundo. Izi ndi zimene Yehova analamula Mose kuti zichitidwe.
Joshua11:21 Pa nthawi imeneyi Yoswa anapita kukawononga Aanaki okhala mʼdziko lija la ku mapiri ku Hebroni
Joshua11:22 Palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe amene anatsalako mʼdziko lonse la Israeli; komabe ku Gaza
Joshua11:23 Choncho Yoswa anagonjetsa dziko lonse monga momwe Yehova analamulira Mose. Tsono Yoswa analipereka kwa Aisraeli kuti likhale lawo
Joshua12:1 Aisraeli anagonjetsa dziko lonse la kummawa kwa Yorodani
Joshua12:2 Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori
Joshua12:3 Iye ankalamuliranso dera la chigwa cha Yorodani kuyambira ku Nyanja ya Kinereti
Joshua12:4 Ogi mfumu ya mzinda wa Basani
Joshua12:5 Dera la ufumu wake linafika ku phiri la Herimoni
Joshua12:6 Mose mtumiki wa Yehova ndi Aisraeli anawagonjetsa ndipo anapereka dziko lawo kwa anthu a fuko la Rubeni
Joshua12:7 Yoswa ndi Aisraeli onse anagonjetsa mafumu onse okhala kumadzulo kwa mtsinje wa Yorodani kuyambira ku Baala-Gadi
Joshua12:8 Dziko limeneli linali dera la ku mapiri
