Joshua13:1 Yoswa atakalamba Yehova anamuwuza kuti
Joshua13:2 “Madera amene atsala ndi awa: chigawo chonse cha Afilisti ndi Agesuri
Joshua13:3 kuchokera ku mtsinje wa Sihori kummawa kwa Igupto mpaka kumpoto kwa dziko la Ekroni. Madera onse amawerengedwa kuti ndi a Akanaani ngakhale amalamulidwa ndi mafumu asanu a Afilisti a ku Gaza
Joshua13:4 Dziko lina la Akanaani ndi Ameara limene lili mʼmanja mwa Asidoni mpaka ku Afeki
Joshua13:5 Palinso dziko lonse la Gebala ndi Lebanoni cha kummawa kuyambira ku Baala-Gadi pa tsinde pa phiri la Herimoni mpaka ku Lebo Hamati.
Joshua13:6 “Palinso anthu okhala mʼchigawo cha ku mapiri kuchokera ku Lebanoni mpaka ku Misirefoti-Maimu
Joshua13:7 Tsopano ugawire dziko limeneli mafuko asanu ndi anayi ndiponso theka la fuko la Manase
Joshua13:8 Anthu a fuko la Rubeni ndi fuko la Gadi pamodzi ndi theka lina la fuko la Manase analandira kale cholowa chawo chimene Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anawapatsa. Cholowa chawocho chinali kummawa kwa mtsinje wa Yorodani.
Joshua13:9 Dziko lawolo linayambira ku Aroeri mzinda umene uli pafupi ndi chigwa cha Arinoni
Joshua13:10 Linkaphatikizanso mizinda yonse ya mfumu Sihoni ya Aamori
Joshua13:11 Dzikoli linaphatikizanso Giliyadi
Joshua13:12 Linaphatikizanso dziko la mfumu Ogi ya ku Basani imene imalamulira kuchokera ku Asiteroti ndi Ederi. Iye yekha ndiye anali mfumu ya Arefaimu amene anapulumuka. Mose anali atawagonjetsa anthu amenewa ndi kuwathamangitsira kutali.
Joshua13:13 Koma Aisraeli sanathamangitse anthu a ku Gesuri ndi Maaka
Joshua13:14 Koma Mose sanapereke dziko kwa fuko la Alevi popeza zopereka zopatulika zimene anthu ankapereka kwa Yehova
Joshua13:15 Mose anapereka gawo lina la dziko kwa mabanja a fuko la Rubeni.
Joshua13:16 Dziko lawo linayambira ku Aroeri mzinda umene uli pafupi ndi chigwa cha Arinoni
Joshua13:17 Dzikolo linaphatikizanso Hesiboni ndi mizinda yake yonse
Joshua13:18 Yahaza
Joshua13:19 Kiriataimu
Joshua13:20 Beti-Peori
Joshua13:21 Dzikolo linaphatikizanso mizinda yonse ya ku madera okwera ndiponso dziko lonse la mfumu Sihoni ya Aamori amene ankalamulira kuchokera ku Hesiboni. Mose anamugonjetsa iye pamodzi ndi mafumu a Amidiyani awa: Evi
Joshua13:22 Kuwonjezera pa amene anaphedwa ndi nkhondo
Joshua13:23 Malire a fuko la Rubeni anali mtsinje wa Yorodani. Mizinda imeneyi pamodzi ndi midzi yake zinapatsidwa kwa mabanja a fuko la Rubeni kuti akhale cholowa chawo.
Joshua13:24 Dera limene Mose anapereka kwa mabanja a fuko la Gadi ndi ili:
Joshua13:25 Dziko la Yazeri
Joshua13:26 ndiponso kuyambira ku Hesiboni mpaka ku Ramati-Mizipa
Joshua13:27 Mu chigwa cha Yorodani analandiramo Beti-Haramu
Joshua13:28 Mizinda ndi midzi imeneyi inali cholowa cha mabanja a fuko la Gadi.
Joshua13:29 Mose anali atapereka kale gawo lina la dziko limeneli kwa theka la mabanja a fuko la Manase kuti likhale cholowa chawo.
Joshua13:30 Derali linayambira ku Mahanaimu kuphatikizapo dziko lonse la mfumu Ogi
Joshua13:31 Derali linaphatikizanso theka la Giliyadi pamodzi ndi Asiteroti ndi Ederi
Joshua13:32 Umu ndi mmene Mose anagawira malo a mʼchigwa cha Yorodani
Joshua13:33 Komatu Mose sanapereke malo kwa fuko la Levi. Mose anawawuza kuti zopereka zimene anthu ankapereka kwa Yehova ndizo cholowa chawo.
Joshua14:1 Umu ndi mmene Aisraeli analandirira cholowa chawo mʼdziko la Kanaani. Eliezara wansembe
Joshua14:2 Madera anagawidwa mwa maere kwa mafuko asanu ndi anayi ndi theka
Joshua14:3 Mose anapereka kwa mafuko awiri ndi theka dziko la kummawa kwa Yorodani
Joshua14:4 Tsono fuko la Yosefe analigawa pawiri
Joshua14:5 Choncho Aisraeli anagawana dzikolo
Joshua14:6 Tsono anthu a fuko la Yuda anabwera kwa Yoswa ku Giligala
Joshua14:7 Nthawi imene Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anandituma kuchokera ku Kadesi Barinea kudzayendera dzikoli ndinali ndi zaka makumi anayi. Ndipo nditabwerako ndinamuwuza zoona zokhazokha monga momwe ndinaonera.
Joshua14:8 Koma abale anga amene ndinapita nawo anachititsa anthu mantha. Komabe ine ndinamvera Yehova Mulungu wanga ndi mtima wonse.
Joshua14:9 Kotero tsiku limenelo Mose anandilonjeza kuti
Joshua14:10 “Tsono papita zaka 45 chiyankhulire Yehova zimenezi kwa Mose. Nthawi imeneyo nʼkuti Aisraeli akuyendayenda mʼchipululu. Yehova wandisunga ndipo tsopano ndili ndi zaka 85.
Joshua14:11 Komabe ndikanali ndi mphamvu lero
Joshua14:12 Tsopano ndipatseni dziko la ku mapiri limene Yehova anandilonjeza tsiku lija. Inu munamva nthawi ija kuti Aanaki anali kumeneko ndipo kuti mizinda yawo inali ikuluikulu ndi yotetezedwa. Komabe Yehova atakhala nane ndidzawathamangitsa monga Iye ananenera.”
Joshua14:13 Ndipo Yoswa anadalitsa Kalebe mwana wa Yefune ndi kumupatsa Hebroni kukhala dziko lake.
Joshua14:14 Choncho dera la Hebroni lakhala lili la Kalebe mwana wa Yefune Mkeni mpaka lero chifukwa anamvera Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli ndi mtima wonse.
Joshua14:15 (Hebroni ankatchedwa Kiriati Ariba chifukwa cha Ariba amene anali munthu wamphamvu kwambiri pakati pa Aanaki). Ndipo kenaka mʼdziko monse munakhala mtendere.
Joshua15:1 Chigawo cha dzikolo chimene mabanja a fuko la Yuda analandira chinafika ku malire ndi Edomu mpaka ku chipululu cha Zini kummwera kwenikweni.
Joshua15:2 Malire awo a kummwera anayambira kummwera kwenikweni kwa Nyanja ya Mchere
Joshua15:3 kudutsa cha kummwera ku Akirabimu
Joshua15:4 Anapitirira mpaka ku Azimoni motsata mtsinje umene uli malire a Igupto mpaka ku nyanja. Awa ndiwo malire awo a kummwera.
Joshua15:5 Malire a kummawa anali Nyanja Yakufa mpaka kumene Yorodani amathira mu Nyanja ya Mchere. Malire a kumpoto anayambira kumene Yorodani amathirira nyanjayo
Joshua15:6 napitirira mpaka ku Beti-Hogila ndi kupitirira kumpoto mpaka ku Beti-Araba. Anapitirira mpaka anakafika ku Mwala wa Bohani.
Joshua15:7 Ndipo malirewo anachokeranso ku chigwa cha Akori mpaka ku Debri
Joshua15:8 Ndipo anapitirira mpaka ku chigwa cha Hinomu mbali ya kummwera kwa mzinda wa Ayebusi (mzinda wa Yerusalemu). Kuchokera kumeneko anakwera mpaka pamwamba pa phiri kumadzulo kwa chigwa cha Hinomu cha kumpoto kwenikweni kwa chigwa cha Refaimu.
Joshua15:9 Ndipo anachokeranso pamwamba pa phiri
Joshua15:10 Kuchokera kumeneko anazungulira cha kumadzulo ku Baalahi mpaka ku phiri la Seiri. Anapitirira cha kumpoto kutsata phiri la Yearimu (lomwe ndi Kesaloni). Anapitirirabe kutsika ku Beti Semesi ndi kuwolokera ku Timna.
Joshua15:11 Malirewo anapitirira kumatsitso a mapiri chakumpoto kwa Ekroni
Joshua15:12 Malire a mbali ya kumadzulo anali Nyanja Yayikulu. Awa ndi malire ozungulira malo amene anapatsidwa kwa mabanja a fuko la Yuda.
Joshua15:13 Potsata lamulo la Yehova
Joshua15:14 Kuchokera ku Hebroni
Joshua15:15 Kuchokera kumeneko
Joshua15:16 Tsono Kalebe anati
Joshua15:17 Otanieli
Joshua15:18 Tsiku lina atafika Akisayo
Joshua15:19 Iye anayankha kuti “Mundikomere mtima. Popeza mwandipatsa ku Negevi
Joshua15:20 Dziko limene mabanja a fuko la Yuda analandira ngati cholowa chawo ndi ili:
Joshua15:21 Mizinda yakummwera kwenikweni kwa fuko la Yuda yoyandikana ndi malire a Edomu anali: Kabizeeli
Joshua15:22 Kina
Joshua15:23 Kedesi
Joshua15:24 Zifi
Joshua15:25 Hazori-Hadata
Joshua15:26 Amamu
Joshua15:27 Hazari-Gada
Joshua15:28 Hazari-Suwali
Joshua15:29 Baalahi
Joshua15:30 Elitoladi
Joshua15:31 Zikilagi
Joshua15:32 Lebaoti
Joshua15:33 Mizinda ya ku chigwa cha kumadzulo ndi iyi: Esitaoli
Joshua15:34 Zanowa
Joshua15:35 Yarimuti
Joshua15:36 Saaraimu
Joshua15:37 Mizinda ina inali iyi: Zenani
Joshua15:38 Dileani
Joshua15:39 Lakisi
Joshua15:40 Kaboni
Joshua15:41 Gederoti
Joshua15:42 Mizinda ina inali iyi: Libina
Joshua15:43 Ifita
Joshua15:44 Keila
Joshua15:45 Panalinso Ekroni pamodzi ndi midzi yake;
Joshua15:46 komanso yonse imene inali mʼmbali mwa Asidodi ndi midzi yake kuyambira ku Ekroni mpaka ku Nyanja Yayikulu.
Joshua15:47 Panalinso mizinda ya Asidodi ndi Gaza pamodzi ndi midzi yawo. Malire ake anafika ku mtsinje wa Igupto mpaka ku Nyanja Yayikulu.
Joshua15:48 Mizinda ya kumapiri inali: Samiri
Joshua15:49 Dana
Joshua15:50 Anabu
Joshua15:51 Goseni
Joshua15:52 Analandiranso mizinda iyi: Arabu
Joshua15:53 Yanumu
Joshua15:54 Humita
Joshua15:55 Panalinso Maoni
Joshua15:56 Yezireeli
Joshua15:57 Kaini
Joshua15:58 Mizinda ina inali: Halihuli
Joshua15:59 Maarati
Joshua15:60 Panalinso Kiriati Baala (ndiye kuti Kiriati Yearimu) ndi Raba; mizinda iwiri pamodzi ndi midzi yake.
Joshua15:61 Mizinda ya ku chipululu inali iyi: Beti-Araba
Joshua15:62 Nibisani
Joshua15:63 Koma Yuda sanathe kuthamangitsa Ayebusi amene amakhala ku Yerusalemu
Joshua16:1 Dziko limene linapatsidwa kwa fuko la Yosefe linayambira ku mtsinje wa Yorodani ku Yeriko
Joshua16:2 Kuchokera ku Beteli malire ake anakafika ku Luzi
Joshua16:3 Malirewo anatsikira cha kumadzulo kwa dziko la Yafuleti mpaka ku chigawo cha kumunsi kwa Beti-Horoni. Kuchokera kumeneko anapitirira mpaka ku Gezeri nʼkuthera ku Nyanja.
Joshua16:4 Choncho Manase ndi Efereimu
Joshua16:5 Dziko la mabanja a fuko la Efereimu ndi ili: Malire a dzikolo anachokera kummawa kwa Ataroti Adari mpaka ku mtunda kwa Beti-Horoni.
Joshua16:6 Malirewo anapitirira mpaka ku nyanja. Mikimetati anali kumpoto kwake. Kuchokera kumeneko anakhotera cha kummawa kuloza ku Taanati Silo ndi kudutsa kumeneko cha kummawa mpaka ku Yanowa.
Joshua16:7 Ndipo kuchokera ku Yanowa anatsikira ku Ataroti ndi Naara
Joshua16:8 Kuchokera ku Tapuwa anapita kumadzulo mpaka ku mtsinje wa Kana ndi kukathera ku nyanja. Dziko ili linali cholowa cha mabanja afuko la Efereimu
Joshua16:9 kuphatikizapo mizinda yonse ndi midzi yake yopatsidwa kwa Efereimu
Joshua16:10 Iwo sanapirikitse Akanaani amene amakhala ku Gezeri ndipo mpaka lero Akanaani akukhala pakati pa Aefereimu koma amagwira ntchito ngati akapolo.
Joshua17:1 Gawo lina la dzikolo linapatsidwa kwa mabanja ena a fuko la Manase
Joshua17:2 Mabanja ena otsala a fuko la Manase amene analandira dziko ndi awa: Abiezeri
Joshua17:3 Panali Zelofehadi mwana wa Heferi
Joshua17:4 Iwo anapita kwa Eliezara wansembe
Joshua17:5 Choncho kuwonjezera pa mayiko a Giliyadi ndi Basani kummawa kwa Yorodani
Joshua17:6 chifukwa ana aakazi a fuko la Manase analandira cholowa chawo pakati pa ana aamuna. Dziko la Giliyadi linali dziko la zidzukulu zonse za Manase.
Joshua17:7 Malire a dziko la Manase anayambira ku Aseri
Joshua17:8 (Manase anatenga dziko la Tapuwa
Joshua17:9 Ndipo malire ake anapitirira kummwera mpaka ku mtsinje wa ku Kana. Mizinda ya kummwera kwa mtsinjewo inali ya fuko la Efereimu ngakhale kuti inali mʼdziko la Manase. Malire a fuko la Manase anapita kumpoto kwa mtsinje wa Kana ndi kukathera ku Nyanja.
Joshua17:10 Dziko la kummwera linali la Efereimu ndipo la kumpoto linali la Manase. Dziko la Manase linafika ku nyanja ndipo linachita malire ndi Aseri
Joshua17:11 Mʼdziko la Isakara ndi Aseri
Joshua17:12 Komabe anthu a fuko la Manase sanathe kuwapirikitsa anthu okhala mʼmizinda imeneyi. Choncho Akanaani anakhalabe mʼmizindayi.
Joshua17:13 Ngakhale Aisraeli anali a mphamvu mʼdzikomo
Joshua17:14 Anthu a fuko la Yosefe anati kwa Yoswa
Joshua17:15 Yoswa anayankha kuti
Joshua17:16 Tsono zidzukulu za Yosefe zinati
Joshua17:17 Koma Yoswa anawuza zidzukulu za Yosefe
Joshua17:18 dziko la ku mapiri lidzakhalanso lanu. Ngakhale kuti ndi nkhalango yokhayokha koma inu mudzadula mitengo yake ndipo lidzakhala lanu mpaka kumapeto. Ngakhale kuti Akanaani ali ndi magaleta azitsulo ndiponso kuti iwo ndi amphamvu
Joshua18:1 Atagonjetsa dziko lonse Aisraeli anasonkhana ku Silo ndipo anayimikako tenti ya msonkhano.
Joshua18:2 Koma pa nthawiyo nʼkuti mafuko asanu ndi awiri a Aisraeli asanalandire cholowa chawo.
Joshua18:3 Ndipo Yoswa anati kwa Aisraeli
Joshua18:4 Sankhani amuna atatu kuchokera ku fuko lililonse ndipo ine ndidzawatuma kuti akayendere dzikolo ndi kukalilembera bwino kuti ndiligawe kukhala lawo. Akatero
Joshua18:5 Aligawe dzikolo mʼzigawo zisanu ndi ziwiri; fuko la Yuda lidzakhale ndi dziko lake la kummwera ndi nyumba ya Yosefe ikhalebe mʼdziko lawo la kumpoto.
Joshua18:6 Mudzalembe mawu ofotokoza za zigawo zisanu ndi ziwiri za dzikolo
Joshua18:7 Alevi asakhale ndi dziko pakati panu
Joshua18:8 Anthuwo akupita kukalembera dzikolo
Joshua18:9 Ndipo anthu anachoka ndi kukayendera dziko lonse. Iwo analemba bwinobwino mʼbuku za dzikolo
Joshua18:10 Pambuyo pake Yoswa anawachitira maere ku Silo pamaso pa Yehova
Joshua18:11 Maere anagwera mabanja a fuko la Benjamini. Dziko limene anapatsidwa linali pakati pa fuko la Yuda ndi fuko la Yosefe:
Joshua18:12 Mbali ya kumpoto malire awo anayambira ku Yorodani nalowera chakumpoto kwa matsitso a ku Yeriko kulowera cha kumadzulo kwa dziko la ku mapiri ndi kukafika ku chipululu cha Beti-Aveni.
Joshua18:13 Kuchokera kumeneko malirewo analoza ku Luzi nadutsa mʼmbali mwa mapiri kummwera kwa Luzi (ndiye Beteli) ndipo anatsika mpaka ku Ataroti Adari
Joshua18:14 Ndipo malirewo analowanso kwina
Joshua18:15 Malire a kummwera anayambira mʼmphepete mwenimweni mwa Kiriati Yearimu napita kumadzulo mpaka kukafika ku akasupe a Nefitowa.
Joshua18:16 Malire anatsikira mʼmphepete mwa phiri loyangʼanana ndi chigwa cha Beni Hinomu
Joshua18:17 Kenaka anakhotera kumpoto kupita ku Eni-Semesi
Joshua18:18 Anabzola cha kumpoto kwa chitunda cha Beti Araba ndi kutsikabe mpaka ku chigwa cha Yorodani.
Joshua18:19 Anabzolanso cha kumpoto kwa chitunda cha Beti-Hogila kukafika cha kumpoto ku gombe la Nyanja ya Mchere kumene mtsinje wa Yorodani umathirirako
Joshua18:20 Yorodani ndiye anali malire a mbali ya kummawa. Awa anali malire a dziko limene mabanja a fuko la Benjamini analandira.
Joshua18:21 Mabanja a fuko la Benjamini anali ndi mizinda iyi; Yeriko
Joshua18:22 Beti-Araba
Joshua18:23 Avimu
Joshua18:24 Kefari-Amoni
Joshua18:25 Panalinso Gibiyoni
Joshua18:26 Mizipa
Joshua18:27 Rekemu
Joshua18:28 Zera Haelefu
Joshua19:1 Maere achiwiri anagwera mabanja a fuko la Simeoni. Dziko lawo linali mʼkati mwenimweni mwa dziko la Yuda.
Joshua19:2 Dzikolo linaphatikiza zigawo izi: Beeriseba (ndi Seba)
Joshua19:3 Hazari-Suwali
Joshua19:4 Elitoladi
Joshua19:5 Zikilagi
Joshua19:6 Beti-Lebaoti ndi Saruheni. Yonse pamodzi inali mizinda 13 ndi midzi yawo.
Joshua19:7 Panalinso mizinda inayi iyi: Aini
Joshua19:8 Dzikolo linaphatikizanso midzi yonse yozungulira mizinda imeneyi mpaka ku Baalati-Beeri
Joshua19:9 Cholowa cha fuko la Simeoni chinatengedwa kuchokera ku gawo la Yuda chifukwa fuko la Yuda linali lalikulu kwambiri. Izi zinachititsa fuko la Simeoni kukhala mʼkati mwenimweni mwa dziko la Yuda.
Joshua19:10 Maere achitatu anagwera mabanja a fuko la Zebuloni: Malire a dziko lawo anafika mpaka ku Saridi.
Joshua19:11 Malirewo anakwera kupita cha kumadzulo ku Marala nakafika ku Dabeseti ndi ku mtsinje wa kummawa kwa Yokineamu.
Joshua19:12 Kuchokera ku mbali ina ya Saridi malire anakhota kupita kummawa ku malire a Kisiloti-Tabori mpaka ku Daberati nakwera mpaka ku Yafiya.
Joshua19:13 Kuchokera kumeneko anabzola kulowa cha kummawa mpaka ku Gati-Heferi ndi ku Eti Kazini ndi kumaloza ku Neya njira ya ku Rimoni.
Joshua19:14 Mbali ya kumpoto malirewo analoza ku Hanatoni ndipo anakathera ku chigwa cha Ifita Eli.
Joshua19:15 Anaphatikizapo Katati
Joshua19:16 Mizinda imeneyi pamodzi ndi midzi yake ndi imene mabanja a fuko la Zebuloni analandira.
Joshua19:17 Maere achinayi anagwera mabanja a fuko la Isakara.
Joshua19:18 Dziko lawo linaphatikiza zigawo izi: Yezireeli
Joshua19:19 Hafaraimu
Joshua19:20 Rabiti
Joshua19:21 Remeti
Joshua19:22 Malirewa anakafikanso ku Tabori
Joshua19:23 Mizinda imeneyi pamodzi ndi midzi yake ndiyo inali cholowa cha mabanja a fuko la Isakara.
Joshua19:24 Maere achisanu anagwera mabanja a fuko la Aseri.
Joshua19:25 Gawo lawo linaphatikiza Helikati
Joshua19:26 Alameleki
Joshua19:27 Kenaka anakhotera kummawa kulowera ku Beti-Dagoni nafika ku dziko la Zebuloni ndi ku chigwa cha Ifita Eli
Joshua19:28 Ebroni
Joshua19:29 Kenaka malirewo anakhotera ku Rama ndi kupita ku mzinda wotetezedwa wa ku Turo. Kuchokera pamenepo malirewo anakhota kupita ku Hosa nakatulukira ku Nyanja
Joshua19:30 Uma
Joshua19:31 Mizinda yonseyi pamodzi ndi midzi yake ndiyo inali cholowa cha mabanja a fuko la Aseri.
Joshua19:32 Maere achisanu ndi chimodzi anagwera mabanja a fuko la Nafutali.
Joshua19:33 Malire awo anayambira ku Helefu mpaka ku mtengo wa thundu wa ku Zaananimu
Joshua19:34 Tsono malirewo anakhotera kumadzulo kupita ku Azinoti-Tabori. Kuchoka kumeneko anapita ku Hukoki
Joshua19:35 Mizinda yotetezedwa inali Zidimi
Joshua19:36 Adama
Joshua19:37 Kedesi
Joshua19:38 Yironi
Joshua19:39 Mizinda yonseyi pamodzi ndi midzi yawo ndiyo inali cholowa cha mabanja a fuko la Nafutali.
Joshua19:40 Maere achisanu ndi chiwiri anagwera mabanja a fuko la Dani.
Joshua19:41 Gawo lawo linaphatikiza mizinda iyi: Zora
Joshua19:42 Saalabini
Joshua19:43 Eloni
Joshua19:44 Eliteke
Joshua19:45 Yehudi
Joshua19:46 Me-Yarikoni ndi Rakoni
Joshua19:47 Anthu a fuko la Dani atalandidwa dziko lawo
Joshua19:48 Mizinda yonseyi pamodzi ndi midzi yake ndiyo inali cholowa cha mabanja a fuko la Dani.
Joshua19:49 Atatha kugawana zigawo zosiyanasiyana za dzikolo
Joshua19:50 Potsata zimene Yehova anawalamula
Joshua19:51 Wansembe Eliezara
Joshua20:1 Pambuyo pake Yehova anati kwa Yoswa:
Joshua20:2 “Uza Aisraeli kuti apatule mizinda yopulumukiramo
Joshua20:3 kuti aliyense amene wapha munthu mosazindikira osati mwadala azithawirako. Motero adzatetezedwa kwa wolipsira.
Joshua20:4 Ngati munthu wathawira ku umodzi mwa mizinda imeneyi
Joshua20:5 Ngati munthu wolipsirayo amutsatira komweko atsogoleriwo asapereke munthu wakuphayo chifukwa anapha Mwisraeli mnzakeyo mosazindikira
Joshua20:6 Munthu wakuphayo adzakhalabe mu mzindawo mpaka atayimbidwa mlandu pamaso pa gulu lonse
Joshua20:7 Choncho iwo anapatula Kedesi mʼdera la Galileya ku mapiri a Nafutali
Joshua20:8 Kummawa kwa Yorodani
Joshua20:9 Imeneyi ndiyo inali mizinda yopulumukiramo ya Aisraeli onse ngakhalenso mlendo wokhala pakati pawo. Munthu aliyense wopha mnzake mwangozi ankathawira ku mizinda imeneyi. Munthu wolipsira sankaloledwa kuti aphe munthu wothawayo ngati mlandu wake sunazengedwe pamaso pa gulu lonse.
Joshua21:1 Tsono atsogoleri a mabanja a fuko la Levi anabwera kwa wansembe Eliezara
Joshua21:2 ku Silo mʼdziko la Kanaani ndipo anati
Joshua21:3 Choncho
Joshua21:4 Maere oyamba anagwera mabanja a Kohati
Joshua21:5 Ndipo mabanja otsala a Kohati anapatsidwa mizinda khumi kuchokera ku mafuko a Efereimu
Joshua21:6 Zidzukulu za Geresoni zinapatsidwa mizinda 13 kuchokera ku mabanja a mafuko a Isakara
Joshua21:7 Mabanja a Merari anapatsidwa mizinda khumi ndi iwiri kuchokera ku mafuko a Rubeni
Joshua21:8 Choncho Aisraeli anapereka kwa fuko la Levi mizindayi pamodzi ndi malo odyetserako ziweto pogwiritsa ntchito maere
Joshua21:9 Awa ndi mayina a mizinda ya mafuko a Yuda ndi Simeoni imene inaperekedwa kwa zidzukulu za Aaroni
Joshua21:10 ku banja la Kohati amene anali Alevi. Paja maere oyamba anagwera mabanja a Kohati kuti alandira mizinda.
Joshua21:11 Anapatsidwa mzinda wa Kiriati Ariba. (Paja Ariba ndiye kholo la Anaaki). Dzina lina la mzindawu ndi Hebroni
Joshua21:12 Komabe minda ndi midzi yozungulira mizindayi inali itaperekedwa kale kwa Kalebe
Joshua21:13 Choncho zidzukulu za Aaroni wansembe
Joshua21:14 Yatiri
Joshua21:15 Holoni
Joshua21:16 Aini
Joshua21:17 Fuko la Benjamini linapereka Gibiyoni
Joshua21:18 Anatoti ndi Alimoni
Joshua21:19 Choncho mizinda 13 pamodzi ndi malo odyetsera ziweto anapatsidwa kwa ansembe
Joshua21:20 Mabanja ena otsalira a Kohati a fuko la Levi anapatsidwa mizinda iyi kuchokera ku fuko la Efereimu:
Joshua21:21 Mizinda ya Sekemu ndi Gezeri ndiye inali mizinda wopulumukirako munthu aliyense wopha mnzake mwangozi. Mizindayi inali ku mapiri a Efereimu.
Joshua21:22 Analandiranso mizinda ya Gezeri
Joshua21:23 Fuko la Dani linapereka mizinda ya Eliteke
Joshua21:24 Ayaloni
Joshua21:25 Kuchokera ku theka la fuko la Manase analandira Taanaki ndi Gati-Rimoni pamodzi ndi malo awo owetera ziweto
Joshua21:26 Mizinda khumi yonseyi pamodzi ndi malo odyetsera ziweto
Joshua21:27 Mabanja a Ageresoni a fuko la Levi anapatsidwa mizinda iwiri kuchokera ku theka la Manase wa kummawa
Joshua21:28 	Fuko la Isakara linapereka mizinda ya Kisoni
Joshua21:29 	Yarimuti ndi Eni Ganimu
Joshua21:30 	Fuko la Aseri linapereka mizinda ya Misali
Joshua21:31 	Helikati ndi Rehobu pamodzi ndi malo awo odyetsera ziweto. Yonse pamodzi inali mizinda inayi.
Joshua21:32 	Fuko la Nafutali linapereka mizinda ya Kedesi wa ku Galileya
Joshua21:33 Mabanja onse a Ageresoni analandira mizinda 13 pamodzi ndi malo awo odyetsera a ziweto.
Joshua21:34 Mabanja a Merari amene anali otsala a fuko la Levi
Joshua21:35 	Dimuna ndi Nahalali
Joshua21:36 	Kuchokera ku fuko la Rubeni analandira Bezeri
Joshua21:37 	Kedemoti ndi Mefaati
Joshua21:38 	Kuchokera ku fuko la Gadi analandira mzinda wa Ramoti ku Giliyadi. Mzinda umene unali wopulumukiramo munthu wopha mnzake mwangozi.
Joshua21:39 Analandiranso mizinda ya Mahanaimu
Joshua21:40 Choncho mabanja onse a Merari
Joshua21:41 Motero mizinda 48 ya mʼdziko limene Aisraeli analanda inapatsidwa kwa Alevi
Joshua21:42 Iliyonse mwa mizindayi inali ndi malo owetera ziweto oyizungulira.
Joshua21:43 Motero Yehova anapereka kwa Israeli dziko limene analumbira kulipereka kwa makolo awo. Atalilandira anadzakhalamo.
Joshua21:44 Yehova anawapatsa mtendere mʼdziko lonse monga momwe analonjezera makolo awo. Palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe mwa adani awo amene anatha kuwagonjetsa chifukwa Yehova anapereka adani awo onse mʼmanja mwawo.
Joshua21:45 Yehova anakwaniritsa zonse zimene analonjeza kwa Aisraeli.
Joshua22:1 Pambuyo pake Yoswa anayitanitsa fuko la Rubeni
Joshua22:2 ndipo anawawuza kuti
Joshua22:3 Aisraeli anzanu simunawasiye nthawi yayitali yonseyi mpaka lero lino. Inu mwaonetsetsa kuti mwachita zonse zimene Yehova anakulamulani.
Joshua22:4 Tsono pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu wapereka mpumulo kwa abale anu monga anayankhulira nawo
Joshua22:5 Koma samalitsani kuti mumvere malamulo ndi malangizo amene Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anakupatsani: kukonda Yehova Mulungu wanu
Joshua22:6 Ndipo Yoswa anawadalitsa ndi kuwalola kuti apite ndipo anapitadi ku nyumba zawo.
Joshua22:7 Apa nʼkuti Mose atapereka dziko la Basani ku theka lina la fuko la Manase. Koma theka lina la fuko la Manase Yoswa analipatsa dziko la kumadzulo kwa Yorodani pamodzi ndi abale awo onse. Pamene Yoswa ankawatumiza kwawo anthu amenewa
Joshua22:8 nawawuza kuti
Joshua22:9 Choncho mafuko a Rubeni
Joshua22:10 Atafika ku Geliloti
Joshua22:11 Ndipo pamene Aisraeli ena onse anawuzidwa kuti anthu a fuko la Rubeni
Joshua22:12 gulu lonse la Aisraeli linasonkhana ku Silo kuti lipite kukachita nawo nkhondo.
Joshua22:13 Choncho Aisraeli anatumiza Finehasi mwana wa wansembe
Joshua22:14 Pamodzi ndi Finehasiyo anatumiza akuluakulu khumi ochokera ku fuko lililonse la Aisraeli. Aliyense mwa akuluakulu amenewa anali mtsogoleri wa banja limodzi la mafuko a Aisraeli.
Joshua22:15 Atafika ku Giliyadi anawuza fuko la Rubeni
Joshua22:16 “Gulu lonse likukufunsa kuti
Joshua22:17 Kodi tchimo lija la ku Peori ndi lochepa kwa inu? Paja Yehova analanga gulu lonse ndi mliri chifukwa cha tchimolo
Joshua22:18 Kodi inu tsono mufuna kupatuka kuleka kumutsata Yehova? “ ‘Ngati lero mumupandukira Yehovayo
Joshua22:19 Ngati dziko limene inu mwatenga ndi loyipitsidwa
Joshua22:20 Kumbukirani pamene Akani mwana wa Zera anakana kumvera lamulo la zinthu zoyenera kuwonongedwa
Joshua22:21 Tsono mafuko a Rubeni
Joshua22:22 “Wamphamvu uja
Joshua22:23 Ngati tinapandukira Yehova ndi kuleka kumutsata pamene tinadzimangira guwa loti tizipserezerapo nsembe kapena kupereka nsembe zaufa
Joshua22:24 “Ayi! Ife tinachita izi kuopa kuti tsiku lina zidzukulu zanu zingadzanene kwa zidzukulu zathu kuti
Joshua22:25 Yehova anayika mtsinje wa Yorodani kukhala malire pakati pa ife ndi inu
Joshua22:26 “Nʼchifukwa chake tinaganiza kuti
Joshua22:27 Koma mosiyana ndi zimenezi
Joshua22:28 “Ndipo ife tinati kuti
Joshua22:29 “Sizingatheke konse kuti ife lero nʼkupandukira Yehova. Ife sitingapatuke kuleka kumutsata Yehova ndi kumanga guwa lina la nsembe zopsereza
Joshua22:30 Tsono Finehasi wansembe ndi atsogoleri a gululo amene anali naye atamva zimene anthu a fuko la Rubeni
Joshua22:31 Ndipo Finehasi wansembe
Joshua22:32 Ndipo Finehasi mwana wa wansembe Eliezara
Joshua22:33 Mawu amenewa anakondweretsa Aisraeli onse ndipo anayamika Mulungu. Choncho sanakambenso zopita ku nkhondo kukawononga dziko limene Arubeni ndi Agadi ankakhalamo.
Joshua22:34 Arubeni ndi Agadi anatcha guwalo kuti Mboni: Mboni pakati pathu kuti Yehova ndi Mulungu.
Joshua23:1 Panapita nthawi yayitali kuchokera pamene Yehova anakhazikitsa mtendere pakati pa Aisraeli ndi adani awo owazungulira. Nthawi imeneyi nʼkuti Yoswa atakalamba
Joshua23:2 Yoswayo anayitanitsa Aisraeli onse pamodzi ndi akuluakulu
Joshua23:3 Inu mwaona zonse zimene Yehova Mulungu wanu wachita kwa mitundu yonseyi chifukwa cha inu. Ndi Yehova Mulungu wanu amene anakumenyerani nkhondo.
Joshua23:4 Tsono onani! Mitundu ya anthu otsalawa ndayipereka kwa mafuko anu pamodzi ndi mitundu ya anthu ya pakati pa Yorodani ndi Nyanja Yayikulu ya kumadzulo imene ndinayigonjetsa.
Joshua23:5 Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye adzawathamangitsa pamaso panu. Mudzatenga dziko lawo monga Yehova anakulonjezerani.
Joshua23:6 “Choncho khalani amphamvu
Joshua23:7 Musagwirizane ndi mitundu ya anthu imene yatsala pakati panu. Musatchule mayina a milungu yawo kapena kuyitchula polumbira. Musayitumikire kapena kuyigwadira.
Joshua23:8 Koma mukuyenera kugwiritsa Yehova Mulungu wanu
Joshua23:9 “Yehova wapirikitsa patsogolo panu mitundu ya anthu ikuluikulu ndi yolimba. Mpaka lero palibe amene watha kulimbana nanu.
Joshua23:10 Aliyense wa inu atha kuthamangitsa anthu 1
Joshua23:11 Choncho samalitsani kuti mukonde Yehova Mulungu wanu.
Joshua23:12 “Koma ngati mubwerera mʼmbuyo ndi kuphatikizana ndi mitundu yotsalayi imene ili pakati panu ndi kumakwatirana nayo
Joshua23:13 pamenepo mudziwe kuti Yehova
Joshua23:14 “Aliyense wa inu akudziwa mu mtima mwake komanso mʼmoyo mwake kuti zabwino zonse zimene Yehova Mulungu wanu anakulonjezani zachitika. Palibe lonjezo ndi limodzi lomwe limene silinakwaniritsidwe.
Joshua23:15 Monga momwe Yehova Mulungu wanu wakuchitirani zabwino zonse zimene ananena kuti adzachita
Joshua23:16 Ngati muphwanya pangano la Yehova Mulungu wanu
Joshua24:1 Tsono Yoswa anasonkhanitsa mafuko onse a Israeli ku Sekemu. Iye anayitanitsa akuluakulu
Joshua24:2 Yoswa anati kwa anthu onse
Joshua24:3 Koma ine ndinatenga kholo lanu Abrahamu kumuchotsa ku dziko la kutsidya kwa mtsinje wa Yufurate ndipo ndinamutsogolera kupita ku dziko la Kanaani. Ndinamupatsa zidzukulu zambiri. Ndinamupatsa Isake
Joshua24:4 ndipo Isake ndinamupatsa Yakobo ndi Esau. Ndinapereka dziko la mapiri la Seiri kwa Esau
Joshua24:5 “ ‘Kenaka ndinatuma Mose ndi Aaroni
Joshua24:6 Nditatulutsa makolo anu ku Igupto ndinafika nawo ku Nyanja Yofiira. Aigupto anawathamangira ndi magaleta ndi okwera pa akavalo mpaka ku Nyanja Yofiira.
Joshua24:7 Tsono makolo anuwo anapemphera kwa Ine kuti ndiwathandize
Joshua24:8 “ ‘Pambuyo pake Ine ndinabwera nanu ku dziko la Aamori amene amakhala kummawa kwa Yorodani. Iwo anamenyana nanu koma ndinawapereka mʼdzanja lanu. Ndinawawononga pamaso panu
Joshua24:9 Balaki mwana wa Zipori
Joshua24:10 Koma ine sindinamvere Balaamu
Joshua24:11 “ ‘Ndipo inu munawoloka Yorodani ndi kufika ku Yeriko. Anthu a ku Yeriko analimbana nanu pamodzi ndi Aamori
Joshua24:12 Ine ndinatumiza mavu amene anapirikitsa mafumu awiri Aamori aja pamaso panu. Inu simunachite izi ndi lupanga ndi uta wanu.
Joshua24:13 Motero ndinakupatsani dziko limene simunalivutikire ndiponso mizinda imene simunamange. Inu mukukhala mʼmenemo ndi kumadya zipatso za mʼmunda wamphesa ndi kuthyola zipatso mʼmitengo ya olivi zimene simunadzale.’
Joshua24:14 “Ndipo tsopano wopani Yehova ndi kumutumikira Iye mokhulupirika ndi moona. Chotsani milungu imene makolo anu ankapembedza kutsidya kwa mtsinje wa Yufurate ndi ku Igupto ndipo tumikirani Yehova.
Joshua24:15 Koma ngati kutumikira Yehova kukuyipirani
Joshua24:16 Ndipo anthu anayankha
Joshua24:17 Yehova Mulungu wathu ndiye amene anatitulutsa ife ndi makolo athu mu ukapolo
Joshua24:18 Ife tikufika Iye anapirikitsa anthu onse pamodzi ndi Aamori amene ankakhala mʼdzikoli. Ifenso tidzatumikira Yehova chifukwa Iye ndiye Mulungu.”
Joshua24:19 Koma Yoswa anati kwa anthuwo
Joshua24:20 Ngati inu musiya Yehova ndi kutumikira milungu yachilendo
Joshua24:21 Koma anthuwo anati kwa Yoswa
Joshua24:22 Kenaka Yoswa anati
Joshua24:23 Yoswa anati
Joshua24:24 Ndipo anthuwo anati kwa Yoswa
Joshua24:25 Choncho pa tsiku limenelo Yoswa anachita pangano mʼmalo mwa anthuwo
Joshua24:26 Ndipo Yoswa analemba zinthu izi mʼbuku la malamulo a Mulungu. Kenaka iye anatenga mwala waukulu nawuyimika pansi pa mtengo wa thundu pa malo wopatulika a Yehova.
Joshua24:27 Yoswa anati kwa anthu onse
Joshua24:28 Kenaka Yoswa analola anthu kuti apite
Joshua24:29 Zitatha zinthu izi
Joshua24:30 ndipo anamuyika mʼmanda mʼdziko lake
Joshua24:31 Israeli anatumikira Yehova pa nthawi yonse imene Yoswa anali ndi moyo ndiponso pa nthawi ya akuluakulu amene anali moyo Yoswa atamwalira
Joshua24:32 Ndipo mafupa a Yosefe amene Aisraeli anawatulutsa ku Igupto anawayika mʼmanda a ku Sekemu pa malo amene Yakobo anagula ndi ndalama zasiliva 100 kwa ana a Hamori
Joshua24:33 Ndipo Eliezara mwana wa Aaroni anamwalira ndipo anayikidwa mʼmanda ku Gibeya
Judges1:1 Atamwalira Yoswa Aisraeli anafunsa Yehova kuti
Judges1:2 Yehova anayankha kuti
Judges1:3 Choncho Ayuda anawuza abale awo a fuko la Simeoni kuti
Judges1:4 Choncho Ayuda ananyamuka
Judges1:5 Ku Bezekiko anakumana ndi ankhondo a mfumu Adoni-Bezeki ndipo anamenyana nawo
Judges1:6 Adoni-Bezekiyo anathawa
Judges1:7 Tsono Adoni-Bezeki anati
Judges1:8 Pambuyo pake Ayuda anakathira nkhondo mzinda wa Yerusalemu ndipo anawulanda. Anapha anthu ambiri ndi kutentha mzinda wonse.
Judges1:9 Kenaka Ayuda anapita kukamenyana ndi Akanaani omwe amakhala ku dziko la ku mapiri
Judges1:10 Anakalimbananso ndi Akanaani amene ankakhala ku Hebroni (mzinda womwe kale unkatchedwa Kiriyati-Araba). Kumeneko anagonjetsa Sesai
Judges1:11 Kuchokera kumeneko
Judges1:12 Tsono Kalebe anati
Judges1:13 Otanieli mwana wa Kenazi
Judges1:14 Tsiku lina atafika Akisayo
Judges1:15 Iye anayankha kuti
Judges1:16 Tsono zidzukulu za Hobabu
Judges1:17 Kenaka anthu a fuko la Yuda anapita pamodzi ndi abale awo a fuko la Simeoni ndi kukagonjetsa Akanaani amene amakhala ku Zefati
Judges1:18 Anthu a fuko la Yuda analandanso mzinda wa Gaza ndi dziko lonse lozungulira
Judges1:19 Yehova anathandiza anthu a fuko la Yuda. Iwo analanda dziko la kumapiri
Judges1:20 Monga analonjezera Mose
Judges1:21 Koma fuko la Benjamini linalephera kuwachotsa Ayebusi
Judges1:22 A banja la Yosefe nawonso anathira nkhondo mzinda wa Beteli
Judges1:23 Anatumiza anthu kuti akazonde Beteli. Mzindawo kale unkatchedwa Luzi.
Judges1:24 Anthu okazondawo anaona munthu akutuluka mu mzindamo ndipo anamuwuza kuti
Judges1:25 Choncho iye anawaonetsa njirayo
Judges1:26 Ndipo iye anapita ku dziko la Ahiti
Judges1:27 Koma a fuko la Manase sanachotse nzika za mzinda wa Beti-Seani pamodzi ndi mʼmidzi yake yozungulira
Judges1:28 Aisraeli atakhala amphamvu
Judges1:29 Nawonso Aefereimu sanathamangitse Akanaani amene amakhala mu Gezeri
Judges1:30 Azebuloni sanathamangitse Akanaani amene amakhala mu Kitironi kapena a ku Nahaloli. Iwo ankakhala pakati pawo ndipo ankawagwiritsa ntchito yakalavulagaga.
Judges1:31 A fuko la Aseri nawo sanathamangitse amene amakhala mu Ako
Judges1:32 Choncho anthu a fuko la Aseri anakhala pakati pa Akanaani amene ankakhala mʼdzikomo popeza sanawapirikitse.
Judges1:33 Nalonso fuko la Nafutali silinathamangitse anthu amene ankakhala ku Beti Semesi kapena ku Beti Anati. Koma Anafutaliwo ankakhala pakati pa Akanaaniwo mʼdzikomo. Koma anthu amene ankakhala ku Beti Semesi ndi ku Beti Anati anawasandutsa kukhala ogwira ntchito yathangata.
Judges1:34 Aamori anapirikitsira anthu a fuko la Dani ku dziko la ku mapiri popeza sanawalole kuti atsikire ku chigwa.
Judges1:35 Aamori anatsimikiza mtima zokhalabe ku phiri la Hara-Heresi
Judges1:36 Malire a Aamori anayambira ku chikweza cha Akirabimu nʼkulowera ku Sela napitirira kumapita chakumapiri ndithu.
Judges2:1 Mngelo wa Yehova anapita ku Bokimu kuchokera ku Giligala ndipo anati kwa Aisraeli
Judges2:2 ndipo inu musadzachite pangano ndi anthu a dziko lino
Judges2:3 Ndikukuwuzani tsopano kuti sindithamangitsa nzikazo pamene inu mukufika. Ndidzawasandutsa kukhala adani anu ndipo milungu yawo idzakhala ngati msampha kwa inu.”
Judges2:4 Mngelo wa Mulungu atayankhula izi kwa Aisraeli
Judges2:5 ndipo anatcha malowo kuti Bokimu (kutanthauza kuti Olira). Pamenepo anapereka nsembe kwa Yehova.
Judges2:6 Yoswa atawuza Aisraeli kuti achoke
Judges2:7 Anthuwo anatumikira Yehova masiku onse a moyo wa Yoswa. Atamwalira Yoswa
Judges2:8 Yoswa mwana wa Nuni
Judges2:9 Ndipo anamuyika mʼmanda a mʼdziko lake
Judges2:10 Mʼbado onse utapita kukakhala ndi anthu a mtundu awo
Judges2:11 Choncho Aisraeli anayamba kuchita zinthu zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova ndipo anatumikira Abaala.
Judges2:12 Iwo anasiya Yehova Mulungu wa makolo awo
Judges2:13 Iwo anasiya Yehova ndi kumatumikira Baala ndi Asiteroti.
Judges2:14 Yehova anapsera mtima Aisraeli ndipo anawapereka mʼmanja mwa anthu ofunkha amene ankasakaza zinthu zawo. Ndipo analola kuti adani awo owazungulira amene sanathenso kulimbana nawo
Judges2:15 Nthawi zonse Aisraeli ankati akapita ku nkhondo
Judges2:16 Choncho Yehova anawawutsira atsogoleri amene ankawapulumutsa mʼmanja mwa anthu amene ankasakaza zinthu zawo.
Judges2:17 Komabe iwo sanawamvere atsogoleri awowo popeza ankapembedza milungu ina ndi kumayigwadira. Iwo anapatuka msangamsanga mu njira imene ankayendamo makolo awo. Iwo aja ankamvera malamulo a Yehova
Judges2:18 Nthawi zonse Yehova akawautsira mtsogoleri
Judges2:19 Koma nthawi zonse mtsogoleri akamwalira
Judges2:20 Choncho Yehova anawapsera mtima Aisraeli ndipo anati
Judges2:21 Inenso sindidzapirikitsanso mtundu uli wonse wa anthu amene Yoswa anawasiya pomwalira.
Judges2:22 Ndidzatero kuti ndiwayese Aisraeli ndi kuona ngati adzasamala kuyenda mʼnjira ya Ine Yehova monga momwe ankachitira makolo awo.”
Judges2:23 Choncho Yehova anayileka mitundu imeneyi ndipo sanayithamangitse kapena kuyipereka mʼmanja mwa Yoswa.
Judges3:1 Iyi ndi mitundu ya anthu yomwe Yehova anayisiya kuti ayese nayo Aisraeli amene sanadziwe kumenya nkhondo mu Kanaani
Judges3:2 (Yehova anachita izi kuti Aisraeli onse aphunzire kumenya nkhondo; makamaka amene nʼkale lonse sanadziwe kumenya nkhondo.
Judges3:3 Mitundu ya anthuyo ndi: Mafumu asanu a Afilisti
Judges3:4 Iwowa Yehova anawasiya kuti aziyesa nawo Aisraeli kuti aone ngati angamvere malamulo a Yehova
Judges3:5 Choncho Aisraeli anakhala pakati pa Akanaani
Judges3:6 Tsono Aisraeli aja amalola ana awo aamuna ndi aakazi kuti azikwatira ndi kukwatiwa ndi anthu amitundu ina. Kenaka anayamba kupembedza milungu yawo.
Judges3:7 Aisraeli anachita zinthu zoyipira Yehova. Iwowa anayiwala Yehova Mulungu wawo ndi kumatumikira Abaala ndi Asera.
Judges3:8 Choncho Yehova anawapsera mtima Aisraeliwo ndipo anawagulitsa kwa Kusani-Risataimu mfumu ya ku Mesopotamiya. Choncho Aisraeli anakhala pansi pa ulamuliro wake zaka zisanu ndi zitatu.
Judges3:9 Koma pamene Aisraeliwo analirira kwa Yehova
Judges3:10 Mzimu wa Yehova unatsika pa iye
Judges3:11 Ndipo mʼdzikomo munakhala mtendere zaka makumi anayi. Kenaka Otanieli mwana wa Kenazi anamwalira.
Judges3:12 Aisraeli anachitanso zinthu zoyipira Yehova. Tsono Yehova anapatsa mphamvu Egiloni
Judges3:13 Egiloniyo anamemeza Aamori ndi Aamaleki kupita kukamenyana ndi Israeli
Judges3:14 Aisraeli anatumikira ngati akapolo Egiloni mfumu ya Mowabu kwa zaka 18.
Judges3:15 Aisraeli analiranso kwa Yehova
Judges3:16 Ndipo Ehudi anapanga lupanga lakuthwa kuwiri lotalika masentimita makumi asanu
Judges3:17 Iye anakapereka msonkho kwa Egiloni
Judges3:18 Ehudi atapereka msonkhowo
Judges3:19 Iye mwini anabwerera pamalo a miyala yozokotedwa ku Giligala ndipo anati
Judges3:20 Kenaka Ehudi anayandikira pafupi ndi mfumuyo
Judges3:21 Ehudi ndi dzanja lake lamanzere
Judges3:22 Lupanga linalowa mʼmimba pamodzi ndi chogwirira chake. Mafuta anaphimba lupangalo popeza silinatulutsidwe mʼmimbamo. Ndiponso matumbo anatuluka.
Judges3:23 Kenaka Ehudi anatuluka panja pa khonde
Judges3:24 Ehudi atachoka
Judges3:25 Iwo anadikira nthawi yayitali koma popanda chochitika. Koma ataona kuti mfumuyo sikutsekulabe zitseko za chipindacho
Judges3:26 Ehudi anathawa pamene iwo ankadikira. Iye anadzera ku malo a miyala yozokotedwa kuja ndi kuthawa kupita ku Seiri.

Judges3:28 Iye anawawuza kuti
Judges3:29 Nthawi imeneyo anapha Amowabu pafupifupi 10
Judges3:30 Tsiku limenelo Amowabu anakhala pansi pa ulamuliro wa Israeli

Judges5:5 Mapiri anagwedezeka pamaso pa Yehova

Judges5:8 Pamene anasankha milungu ina

Judges5:10 “Inu okwera pa abulu oyera
Judges5:11 Ku zitsime

Judges5:14 Anakalowa mʼchigwa kuchokera ku Efereimu; akutsatira iwe Benjamini ndi abale ako. Akulu a ankhondo anachokera ku Makiri
Judges5:15 Olamulira a Isakara anali pamodzi ndi Debora; inde
Judges5:16 Chifukwa chiyani munangokhala ku makola a nkhosa nʼkumangomvetsera zitoliro zoyitanira nkhosa? Pakati pa anthu a fuko la Rubeni panali kusinkhasinkha mtima kwambiri osadziwa chenicheni choyenera kuti achite.
Judges5:17 Agiliyadi anatsala pa tsidya la Yorodani. Ndipo nʼchifukwa chiyani anthu afuko la Dani anatsarira mʼsitima za pa madzi? Aseri anali pa gombe la Nyanja; anangokhala mʼmadooko mwawo.
Judges5:18 Azebuloni ndi anthu amene anayika moyo wawo mʼzoopsa. Nawonso anthu a fuko la Nafutali anayika miyoyo yawo pa chiswe pomenya nkhondo pamwamba pa mapiri.

Judges5:20 Ngakhalenso nyenyezi zakumwamba zinachita nkhondo
Judges5:21 Mtsinje wa Kisoni unawakokolola
Judges5:22 Ndipo ziboda za ngʼombe zazimuna zinachita phokoso lalikulu
Judges5:23 Mngelo wa Yehova anati ‘Tembererani Merozi.’ ‘Tembererani nzika zake mwaukali
Judges5:24 “Akhale wodala kupambana akazi onse
Judges5:25 Munthu uja anapempha madzi akumwa
Judges5:26 Anatenga chikhomo cha tenti mʼdzanja lake
Judges5:27 Anathifukira ku mapazi a mkaziyo nagwa
Judges5:28 “Amayi ake a Sisera anasuzumira pa zenera; nafuwula mokweza kuti
Judges5:29 Amayi ake anzeru kwambiri anamuyankha
Judges5:30 ‘Kodi iwo sakufunafuna zofunkha kuti agawane; akugawana wankhondo aliyense mtsikana mmodzi kapena awiri. Sisera akumupatsa zofunkha: zovala zonyikidwa mu utoto
Judges5:31 “Choncho Yehova! adani anu onse awonongeke

Judges6:3 Aisraeli amati akadzala mbewu
Judges6:4 Iwo anamanga misasa mʼdzikomo ndi kuwononga zokolola zawo zonse mpaka ku Gaza
Judges6:5 Iwo ankabwera ndi zoweta zawo ndi matenti awo omwe. Ankabwera ambiri ngati dzombe
Judges6:6 Aisraeli anasauka chifukwa cha Amidiyani ndipo analirira kwa Yehova kuti awathandize.
Judges6:7 Pamene Aisraeli analirira kwa Yehova chifukwa cha Amidiyaniwo
Judges6:8 Iye anawatumizira mneneri amene anati
Judges6:9 Ine ndinakupulumutsani ku ulamuliro wa Igupto komanso mʼmanja mwa amene amakuzunzani. Ndinawathamangitsa adani anu inu mukufika
Judges6:10 Ndipo ndinakuwuzani kuti
Judges6:11 Tsiku lina mngelo wa Yehova anabwera ku Ofura ndi kukhala pansi pa tsinde pa mtengo wa thundu umene unali wa Yowasi Mwabiezeri. Tsono Gideoni
Judges6:12 Tsono mngelo wa Yehova uja anamuonekera Gideoni nati kwa iye
Judges6:13 Gideoni anayankha
Judges6:14 Yehova anamuyangʼana namuwuza kuti
Judges6:15 Koma Gideoni anafunsa kuti
Judges6:16 Yehova anamuyankha kuti
Judges6:17 Gideoni anati
Judges6:18 Chonde musachoke msanga mpaka nditabwerera kwa inu ndi chopereka changa cha chakudya kudzachipereka kwa inu.” Ndipo Yehova anamuwuza kuti
Judges6:19 Gideoni analowa mʼnyumba
Judges6:20 Mngelo wa Mulungu anamuwuza iye kuti
Judges6:21 Mngelo wa Yehova anatenga msonga ya ndodo imene inali mʼmanja mwake nakhudza nayo nyama ndi makeke aja. Nthawi yomweyo moto unabuka pa thanthwepo ndi kupsereza nyama yonse ndi makeke aja. Ndipo mngelo wa Yehova sanaonekenso.
Judges6:22 Apo Gideoni anazindikira kuti analidi mngelo wa Ambuye
Judges6:23 Koma Yehova anamuwuza kuti
Judges6:24 Choncho Gideoni anamanga guwa lansembe la Yehova pamenepo ndipo analitcha kuti
Judges6:25 Usiku womwewo Yehova anati kwa Gideoni
Judges6:26 Kenaka umangire Yehova Mulungu wako guwa lansembe ndi miyala yoyala bwino pamwamba pa chiwunda chimenecho. Utenge ngʼombe ya mphongo yachiwiri ija ndipo uyipereke ngati nsembe yopsereza pogwiritsa ntchito mitengo ya fano la Asera imene udule ngati nkhunizo.”
Judges6:27 Choncho Gideoni anatenga antchito ake khumi nachita monga Yehova anamuwuzira. Ndipo popeza ankaopa anthu a pa banja lake ndiponso anthu a mʼmudzimo sanachite zimenezi masana koma usiku.
Judges6:28 Anthu a mu mzindamo atadzuka mʼmamawa anangoona guwa la Baala litagwetsedwa ndi fano la Asera limene linali pamwamba pake litadulidwa ndiponso ngʼombe yamphongo yachiwiri ija itaperekedwa ngati nsembe yopsereza pa guwa limene linamangidwa lija.
Judges6:29 Iwo anafunsana wina ndi mnzake
Judges6:30 Ndipo anthuwo anawuza Yowasi kuti
Judges6:31 Koma Yowasi anawuza anthu amene anamuzungulirawo kuti
Judges6:32 Choncho tsiku limenelo Gideoni anatchedwa
Judges6:33 Tsopano Amidiyani
Judges6:34 Ndipo Mzimu wa Yehova unatsikira pa Gideoni
Judges6:35 Iye anatumiza amithenga mʼdziko lonse la Manase kuti akamenye nkhondo ndipo Amanase anayitanidwanso kuti amutsate. Anatumanso amithenga kwa Aseri
Judges6:36 Gideoni anati kwa Mulungu
Judges6:37 onani
Judges6:38 Ndipo zimenezi zinachitikadi. Gideoni atadzuka mʼmamawa ndi kuwufinya ubweya uja
Judges6:39 Kenaka Gideoni anati kwa Mulungu
Judges6:40 Ndipo Mulungu anachita zomwezo usiku umenewo. Pa ubweya pokha panali powuma
Judges7:1 Yeru-Baala (Gideoni) ndi anthu ake onse anadzuka mʼmamawa nakamanga misasa pambali pa kasupe ku Harodi. Misasa ya Amidiyani inali mʼchigwa kumpoto kwa phiri la More.
Judges7:2 Yehova anati kwa Gideoni
Judges7:3 Tsono lengeza kwa anthu kuti
Judges7:4 Koma Yehova anawuza Gideoni kuti
Judges7:5 Choncho Gideoni anatenga anthuwo ndi kupita nawo ku madzi. Kumeneko Yehova anamuwuza kuti
Judges7:6 Ndipo anthu 300 anamwa mokhathira
Judges7:7 Yehova anati kwa Gideoni
Judges7:8 Choncho analola anthu ena onse kuti apite ku nyumba zawo kupatula anthu 300 osankhika aja. Iwowa anatenga zakudya ndi malipenga a anthuwo. Ndipo misasa ya ankhondo Amidiyani inali kumunsi kwa chigwa.
Judges7:9 Usiku umenewo Yehova anati kwa Gideoni
Judges7:10 Ngati ukuopa
Judges7:11 ndipo ukamvere zimene akunena ndipo pambuyo pake udzalimba mtima ndi kupita kukayithira nkhondo misasayo.” Choncho iye ndi wantchito wake Pura anapita kumbali ina ya msasawo kumene kunali ankhondo.
Judges7:12 Amidiyani
Judges7:13 Gideoni atafika anangomva munthu wina akuwuza mnzake maloto ake kuti
Judges7:14 Ndipo mnzakeyo anamuyankha kuti
Judges7:15 Gideoni atamva za malotowo ndi kumasulira kwake
Judges7:16 Anawagawa anthu 300 aja magulu atatu
Judges7:17 Anawuza anthuwo kuti
Judges7:18 Ndikadzaliza lipenga ndi onse amene ali ndi ine
Judges7:19 Choncho Gideoni pamodzi ndi amuna 100 omwe anali nawo anafika ku malire a msasa pakati pa usiku
Judges7:20 Magulu awiri ena aja anayimbanso malipenga ndi kuswa mbiya zawo. Aliyense ananyamula nsakali ya moto ku dzanja lamanzere ndi lipenga ku dzanja lamanja ndipo anafuwula kuti
Judges7:21 Aliyense anayima pa malo pake kuzungulira misasa. Ankhondo a mʼmisasa muja anadzuka nayamba kuthawa akufuwula.
Judges7:22 Anthu 300 aja ataliza malipenga
Judges7:23 Aisraeli a fuko la Nafutali
Judges7:24 Gideoni anatumiza amithenga ku dziko lonse la ku mapiri la Efereimu kukanena kuti
Judges7:25 Iwo anagwiranso atsogoleri awiri a nkhondo a Amidiyani
Judges8:1 Aefereimu anafunsa Gideoni kuti
Judges8:2 Koma iye anawayankha kuti
Judges8:3 Mulungu wapereka mafumu a Midiyani
Judges8:4 Gideoni anafika ndi kuwoloka mtsinje wa Yorodani pamodzi ndi anthu 300 amene anali naye. Ngakhale kuti anali otopa anapirikitsabe adani awo.
Judges8:5 Atafika ku Sukoti anapempha anthu a kumeneko kuti
Judges8:6 Koma atsogoleri a Sukoti anayankha kuti
Judges8:7 Gideoni anayankha kuti
Judges8:8 Atachoka pamenepo anapita ku Penueli ndipo anapemphanso buledi kwa anthu a kumeneko
Judges8:9 Gideoni anawawuzanso kuti
Judges8:10 Nthawi iyi nʼkuti Zeba ndi Zalimuna ali ku Karikori ndi ankhondo pafupifupi 15
Judges8:11 Gideoni anadzera njira ya anthu a matenti kummawa kwa Noba ndi Yogibeha ndipo anawathira nkhondo popeza ankhondo awo anali osakonzekera.
Judges8:12 Zeba ndi Zalimuna
Judges8:13 Ndipo Gideoni mwana wa Yowasi
Judges8:14 Kumeneko iye anagwira mnyamata wa ku Sukoti ndipo atamufunsa
Judges8:15 Kenaka Gideoni anabwera kwa anthu a ku Sukoti ndi kunena kuti
Judges8:16 Tsono Gideoni anatenga akuluakulu a mu mzindawo ndipo anagwira matsatsa a minga za mʼchipululu ndi kuwakwapula nawo.
Judges8:17 Anagwetsa nsanja ya ku Penueli ndi kupha amuna onse a mu mzindawo.
Judges8:18 Kenaka anafunsa Zeba ndi Zalimuna kuti
Judges8:19 Ndipo Gideoni anayankha kuti
Judges8:20 Tsono anawuza Yetero
Judges8:21 Tsono Zeba ndi Zalimuna anawuza Gideoni kuti
Judges8:22 Aisraeli anati kwa Gideoni
Judges8:23 Koma Gideoni anawawuza kuti
Judges8:24 Gideoni anatinso
Judges8:25 Iwo anayankha kuti
Judges8:26 Tsono kulemera kwa ndolo zagolide zimene anapereka kunali makilogalamu makumi awiri
Judges8:27 Gideoni anagwiritsa ntchito golide uja kupanga efodi
Judges8:28 Choncho Amidiyani anagonjetsedwa ndi Aisraeli ndipo sanayeserenso kuwawukira. Ndipo dzikolo linakhala pa mtendere kwa zaka 40 pamene Gideoni anali ndi moyo.
Judges8:29 Yeru-Baala mwana wa Yowasi anapita kukakhala kwawo.
Judges8:30 Ana a Gideoni anali 70 popeza anali ndi akazi ambiri.
Judges8:31 Mdzakazi wake amene anali ku Sekemu
Judges8:32 Gideoni mwana wa Yowasi anamwalira atakalamba ndipo anayikidwa mʼmanda a abambo ake
Judges8:33 Atangomwalira Gideoni
Judges8:34 Aisraeli sanakumbukirenso Yehova Mulungu wawo amene anawapulumutsa mʼmanja mwa adani awo mbali zonse.
Judges8:35 Ndiponso sanachite zinthu zokomera banja la Yeru-Baala (ndiye kuti Gideoni) chifukwa cha zabwino zonse zimene iye anawachitira.
Judges9:1 Abimeleki mwana wa Yeru-Baala anapita ku Sekemu kwa abale a amayi ake ndi kukawawuza iwowo ndi fuko lonse la banja la abambo a amayi ake kuti
Judges9:2 “Funsani nzika zonse za ku Sekemu kuno
Judges9:3 Abale a amayi akewo anamuyankhulira mawu amenewa kwa nzika zonse za ku Sekemu
Judges9:4 Tsono anamupatsa ndalama zasiliva 70 za mʼnyumba ya chipembedzo ya Baala Beriti. Ndi ndalama zimenezi Abimeleki analemba anthu achabechabe ndi osasamala kuti azimutsatira.
Judges9:5 Anapita ku Ofiri ku mudzi kwa abambo ake ndipo anapha abale ake makumi asanu ndi awiri
Judges9:6 Tsono nzika za ku Sekemu ndi za ku Beti-Milo zinapita kukasonkhana ku mtengo wa thundu pafupi ndi chipilala cha ku Sekemu kuti akalonge Abimeleki ufumu.
Judges9:7 Yotamu atamva izi anapita kukayima pamwamba pa phiri la Gerizimu ndipo anafuwula nati
Judges9:8 Tsiku lina mitengo inapita kukadzoza mfumu yawo. Tsono mitengoyo inati kwa mtengo wa olivi
Judges9:9 “Koma mtengo wa olivi uja unayankha kuti
Judges9:10 Apo mitengo inawuza mtengo wa mkuyu kuti
Judges9:11 Koma mtengo wa mkuyu unayankha kuti
Judges9:12 Kenaka mitengo ija inawuza mtengo wamphesa kuti
Judges9:13 Koma mtengo wamphesa unayankha kuti
Judges9:14 Pomaliza mitengo yonse inawuza mkandankhuku kuti
Judges9:15 Mkandankhuku uja unayankha kuti
Judges9:16 Yotamu anatinso
Judges9:17 Kodi suja abambo anga anakumenyerani nkhondo ndi kuyika moyo wawo pa chiswe kuti akupulumutseni mʼmanja mwa Amidiyani?
Judges9:18 Koma lero inu mwawukira banja la abambo anga. Mwapha ana ake 70 pa mwala umodzi
Judges9:19 Tsono ngati mukuti zimene mwachitira Yeru-Baala ndi banja lake mwazichita moona mtima ndiponso mokhulupirika
Judges9:20 Koma ngati sichoncho moto utuluke mwa Abimeleki ndi kupsereza anthu a ku Sekemu ndi Beti-Milo
Judges9:21 Kenaka Yotamu anathawira ku Beeri nakakhala komweko chifukwa ankaopa Abimeleki mʼbale wake.
Judges9:22 Abimeleki atalamulira Israeli zaka zitatu
Judges9:23 Mulungu anayika chidani pakati pa Abimelekiyo ndi anthu a ku Sekemu
Judges9:24 Mulungu anachita zimenezi kuti zoyipa zimene anachitira ana aamuna 70 a Yeru-Baala aja zimubwerere
Judges9:25 Choncho anthu a ku Sekemu anayika anthu omubisalira pamwamba pa mapiri. Tsono iwo ankalanda anthu odutsa mʼnjira imeneyo zinthu zawo ndipo Abimeleki anamva zimenezi.
Judges9:26 Gaali mwana wa Ebedi anasamukira ku Sekemu ndi abale ake
Judges9:27 Anthuwo anapita ku munda kukathyola mphesa ndi kuzifinya
Judges9:28 Ndipo Gaali mwana wa Ebedi anati “Kodi Abimeleki ndi ndani
Judges9:29 Anthu a mu mzindawo akanakhala pansi pa ulamuliro wanga
Judges9:30 Zebuli amene ankalamulira mzindawo atamva zimene Gaali mwana wa Ebadi ananena
Judges9:31 Anatumiza amithenga kwa Abimeleki
Judges9:32 Nʼchifukwa chake usiku womwe uno inu ndi anthu anu mupite
Judges9:33 Mmawa dzuwa likutuluka
Judges9:34 Choncho Abimeleki ndi ankhondo ake onse anadzuka usiku nakabisalira mzinda wa Sekemu mʼmagulu anayi.
Judges9:35 Gaali mwana wa Ebedi anatuluka nakayima pa khomo pa chipata cha mzinda pamene Abimeleki ndi ankhondo ake anatuluka ku malo kumene anabisala kuja.
Judges9:36 Gaaliyo atawaona
Judges9:37 Koma Gaaliyo anayankhulanso kuti
Judges9:38 Ndipo Zebuli anamufunsa iye kuti
Judges9:39 Choncho Gaaliyo anatuluka akutsogolera anthu a ku Sekemu kukamenyana ndi Abimeleki.
Judges9:40 Koma Abimeleki anamuthamangitsa ndipo Gaala anathawa. Ambiri a ankhondo ake anagwa napwetekeka njira yonse mpaka ku chipata cha mzinda.
Judges9:41 Abimeleki anakhala ku Aruma
Judges9:42 Mmawa mwake anthu a ku Sekemu anapangana zopita ku minda
Judges9:43 Tsono Abimeleki anatenga anthu ake
Judges9:44 Abimeleki pamodzi ndi magulu ake anathamangira kutsogolo nakawakhalira pa chipata cha mzinda. Ndipo magulu awiri ena aja anathamangira anthu amene anali mʼminda ndi kuwapha onse.
Judges9:45 Abimeleki anawuthira nkhondo mzindawo tsiku lonse. Kenaka anawulanda ndi kupha nzika zonse za mu mzindamo. Anawuwonongeratu mzindawo nawuwaza mchere.
Judges9:46 Anthu a mu nsanja ya Sekemu atamva zimenezi
Judges9:47 Abimeleki anamva kuti anthu ena asonkhana kumeneko.
Judges9:48 Choncho Abimeleki pamodzi ndi anthu ake onse anapita ku phiri la Zalimoni. Kumeneko anatenga nkhwangwa nadula nthambi za mitengo. Ananyamula nthambi zija pa phewa pake. Tsono anawuza anthu aja kuti
Judges9:49 Tsono aliyense anadula nthambi zake
Judges9:50 Kenaka Abimeleki anapita ku Tebezi. Anakawuzungulira mzindawo ndi kuwulanda.
Judges9:51 Koma mu mzindamo munali nsanja yolimba. Anthu onse a mu mzindamo amuna ndi akazi anathawira mu nsanjayo
Judges9:52 Abimeleki anapita ku nsanjayo nathira nkhondo. Anafika pafupi ndi chitseko cha nsanja ija kuti ayitenthe.
Judges9:53 Koma mkazi wina anaponya mwala wa mphero pa mutu wa Abimeleki ndi kuswa chibade cha mutuwo.
Judges9:54 Mwamsanga Abimeleki anayitana mnyamata womunyamulira zida za nkhondo namuwuza kuti
Judges9:55 Aisraeli ataona kuti Abimeleki wafa
Judges9:56 Mmenemu ndi mmene Mulungu analipsirira tchimo la Abimeleki limene anachitira abambo ake pakupha abale ake 70 aja.
Judges9:57 Mulungu anawalanganso anthu a ku Sekemu chifukwa cha kuyipa kwawo konse. Ndipo matemberero a Yotamu mwana wa Yeru-Baala anawagweradi.
Judges10:1 Atafa Abimeleki panabwera Tola mwana wa Puwa
Judges10:2 Iye anatsogolera Aisraeli kwa zaka 23
Judges10:3 Atafa Tola panabwera Yairi wa ku Giliyadi
Judges10:4 Iyeyu anali ndi ana aamuna makumi atatu
Judges10:5 Atamwalira Yairi anayikidwa mʼmanda ku Kamoni.
Judges10:6 Aisraeli anachitanso zoyipira Yehova. Iwo anatumikira Abaala ndi Asitoreti
Judges10:7 Tsono Yehova anapsera mtima Aisraeli ndipo anawapereka mʼmanja mwa Afilisti ndi Aamoni.
Judges10:8 Iwowa anawagonjetseratu Aisraeli mʼchaka chimenechi
Judges10:9 Aamori anawoloka mtsinje wa Yorodani kukathira nkhondo mafuko a Yuda
Judges10:10 Kenaka Aisraeli analira kwa Yehova kuti
Judges10:11 Yehova anawafunsa kuti
Judges10:12 Ndiponso pamene Asidoni
Judges10:13 Komabe inu mwandikana ndipo mukutumikira milungu ina. Choncho sindidzakupulumutsaninso.
Judges10:14 Pitani kalireni kwa milungu imene mwayisankha. Iyoyo ikupulumutseni ku mavuto anuwo.”
Judges10:15 Koma Aisraeli anayankha Yehova kuti
Judges10:16 Ndipo anachotsa milungu ya chilendo pakati pawo ndi kuyamba kutumikira Yehova. Ndipo Yehova anamva chisoni poona mmene Aisraeli ankazunzikira.
Judges10:17 Tsono Aamoni anasonkhana ndi kumanga zithando za nkhondo ku Giliyadi. Nawonso Aisraeli anasonkhana ndi kumanga zithando zawo za nkhondo ku Mizipa.
Judges10:18 Kenaka anthuwo ndi atsogoleri a Agiliyadi anayamba kufunsana kuti
Judges11:1 Yefita wa ku Giliyadi anali wankhondo wa mphamvu. Iyeyu amayi ake anali mkazi wachiwerewere
Judges11:2 Mkazi wake wa Giliyadi anabereka naye ana aamuna. Tsono ana amenewa atakula anapirikitsa Yefita ndi kumuwuza kuti
Judges11:3 Choncho Yefita anathawa kuchoka kwa abale ake ndi kukakhala mʼdziko la Tobu. Kumeneko anakakopa ndi kusonkhanitsa anthu achabechabe ndipo anatuluka pamodzi kukasakaza zinthu.
Judges11:4 Patapita nthawi Aamoni anadzachita nkhondo ndi Israeli.
Judges11:5 Tsono pamene Aamoni ankathira nkhondo Aisraeli
Judges11:6 Iwo anati kwa iye
Judges11:7 Yefita anawawuza Agiliyadi kuti
Judges11:8 Akuluakulu a ku Giliyadi aja anamuyankha kuti
Judges11:9 Yefita anawayankha akuluakulu a ku Giliyadi kuti
Judges11:10 Akuluakulu a ku Giliyadi anamuyankha kuti
Judges11:11 Choncho Yefita anapita nawo akuluakulu a ku Giliyadi aja
Judges11:12 Kenaka Yefita anatuma amithenga kwa mfumu ya Aamoni ndi funso lakuti
Judges11:13 Ndipo mfumu ya Aamoni inayankha amithenga a Yefita aja kuti
Judges11:14 Yefita anatumizanso amithenga akewo kwa mfumu ya Aamoni
Judges11:15 kukanena kuti
Judges11:16 Koma pamene Aisraeli ankachoka ku Igupto anadzera njira ya ku chipululu mpaka ku Nyanja Yofiira nakafika ku Kadesi.
Judges11:17 Kenaka Israeli anatumiza amithenga kwa mfumu ya ku Edomu kuti
Judges11:18 “Pambuyo pake
Judges11:19 “Pambuyo pake Israeli anatumiza amithenga kwa Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori
Judges11:20 Koma Sihoni sanalole Israeli kuti adzere mʼdziko mwake. Mʼmalo mwake Sihoni anasonkhanitsa ankhondo ake onse nakamanga msasa ku Yahazi ndipo anachita nkhondo ndi Israeli.
Judges11:21 “Koma Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli anamupereka Sihoni pamodzi ndi anthu ake onse mʼmanja mwa Israeli
Judges11:22 Analanda dziko lonse kuchokera ku Arinoni mpaka ku Yaboki ndiponso kuchokera ku chipululu mpaka ku mtsinje wa Yorodani.
Judges11:23 “Ndiye kuti Yehova Mulungu wa Aisraeli ndiye analanda dziko la Aamori
Judges11:24 Bwanji inu osakhazikika mʼdziko limene Kemosi mulungu wanu anakupatsani
Judges11:25 Kodi ndinu abwino kuposa Balaki mwana wa Zipori
Judges11:26 Pamene Aisraeli ankakhala mʼdziko la Hesiboni ndi mʼmidzi yake
Judges11:27 Choncho ine sindinakuchimwireni. Koma inu mukundilakwira pomenyana nane. Yehova woweruza
Judges11:28 Koma mfumu ya Aamori
Judges11:29 Tsono Mzimu wa Yehova unatsikira pa Yefita. Ndipo iye ananyamuka nadzera ku Giliyadi ndi ku Manase. Anafika ku Mizipa mʼdziko la Giliyadi
Judges11:30 Yefita analumbira kwa Yehova kuti
Judges11:31 aliyense amene atuluke pa khomo la nyumba yanga kudzandichingamira pobwerera nditagonjetsa Aamoni adzakhala wake wa Yehova
Judges11:32 Kenaka Yefita anawolokera kwa Aamoni kukamenya nawo nkhondo
Judges11:33 Iye anawononga mizinda makumi awiri kuchokera ku Ariori mpaka pafupi ndi mzinda wa Miniti. Anapitirira mpaka ku Abeli-Keranimu. Choncho Aisraeli anagonjetsa Aamoni.
Judges11:34 Pambuyo pake Yefita anabwerera ku nyumba yake. Tsono anangoona mwana wake wamkazi akutuluka kudzamuchingamira akuyimba ngʼoma ndi kuvina. Uyu anali mwana yekhayo wa Yefita. Analibenso mwana wina wamwamuna kapena wamkazi.
Judges11:35 Yefita ataona mwana wake uja
Judges11:36 Mwanayo anayankha kuti
Judges11:37 Anatinso kwa abambo ake
Judges11:38 Yefita anamuyankha kuti
Judges11:39 Miyezi iwiri itatha iye anabwerera kwa abambo ake
Judges11:40 kuti atsikana a Israeli ankapita chaka chilichonse kukalira maliro a mwana wa mkazi wa Yefita
Judges12:1 Gulu la nkhondo la fuko la Efereimu linayitanidwa ndipo anawolokera ku Zafoni nakafunsa Yefita kuti
Judges12:2 Yefita anayankha kuti
Judges12:3 Nditaona kuti simundithandiza
Judges12:4 Choncho Yefita anasonkhanitsa anthu a ku Giliyadi ndi kuchita nkhondo ndi Aefereimu. Ndipo Agiliyadi anagonjetsa Aefereimu chifukwa Aefereimuwo amati
Judges12:5 Choncho Agiliyadi analanda Aefereimu madooko a mtsinje wa Yorodani. Munthu aliyense wothawa ku Efereimu amati akanena kuti
Judges12:6 Ndiye amamuwuza kuti
Judges12:7 Yefita anatsogolera Israeli zaka zisanu ndi chimodzi. Kenaka Yefita wa ku Giliyadi anamwalira
Judges12:8 Atamwalira Yefita
Judges12:9 Iye anali ndi ana aamuna makumi atatu ndi ana aakazi makumi atatu. Anakwatitsa ana ake akaziwo kwa anthu a fuko lina
Judges12:10 Kenaka Ibizani anamwalira
Judges12:11 Iye atamwalira
Judges12:12 Kenaka Eloni anamwalira ndipo anayikidwa ku Ayaloni mʼdziko la Zebuloni.
Judges12:13 Iye atamwalira
Judges12:14 Iye anali ndi ana aamuna makumi anayi ndi zidzukulu makumi atatu
Judges12:15 Ndipo Abidoni mwana wa Hilelo Mpiratoni uja anamwalira
Judges13:1 Aisraeli anachitanso zinthu zoyipira Yehova
Judges13:2 Ku Zora kunali munthu wina dzina lake Manowa
Judges13:3 Mngelo wa Yehova anaonekera mkaziyo ndipo anati
Judges13:4 Tsono mudzisamale bwino
Judges13:5 chifukwa mudzakhala ndi pakati ndipo mudzabereka mwana wamwamuna. Mwanayo akadzabadwa lumo lisadzapite pa mutu chifukwa mnyamatayo adzakhala Mnaziri
Judges13:6 Kenaka mayiyo anapita kukawuza mwamuna wake kuti
Judges13:7 Koma anandiwuza kuti
Judges13:8 Kenaka Manowa anapemphera kwa Yehova kuti
Judges13:9 Mulungu anamva pemphero la Manowa
Judges13:10 Tsono mkaziyo anathamanga kukawuza mwamuna wake kuti
Judges13:11 Choncho Manowa ananyamuka namutsatira mkazi wake. Atafika kwa munthuyo anamufunsa kuti
Judges13:12 Kenaka Manowa anafunsa kuti
Judges13:13 Ndipo mngelo wa Yehova uja anamuyankha kuti
Judges13:14 Asadzadye chilichonse chochokera ku mphesa. Asadzamwe vinyo kapena choledzeretsa chilichonse
Judges13:15 Manowa anamuwuza mngelo wa Yehova uja kuti
Judges13:16 Mngelo wa Yehova anayankha kuti
Judges13:17 Tsono Manowa anapempha mngelo wa Yehova kuti
Judges13:18 Iye anayankha kuti
Judges13:19 Ndipo Manowa anatenga mwana wambuzi pamodzi ndi chopereka cha chakudya nakapereka nsembe pa thanthwe kwa Yehova ndipo Yehova anachita zodabwitsa kwa Manowa ndi mkazi wake akuona.
Judges13:20 Pamene malawi a moto amakwera kumwamba kuchoka pa guwa
Judges13:21 Mngelo wa Yehova uja sanaonekerenso kwa Manowa ndi mkazi wake. Choncho Manowa anazindikira kuti anali mngelo wa Yehova.
Judges13:22 Iye anawuza mkazi wake kuti
Judges13:23 Koma mkazi wake anamuyankha kuti
Judges13:24 Motero mkaziyo anabereka mwana wa mwamuna
Judges13:25 Mzimu wa Yehova unayamba kumulimbikitsa pamene ankakhala ku misasa ya anthu a fuko la Dani
Judges14:1 Samsoni anapita ku Timna ndipo kumeneko anaonako mtsikana wa Chifilisiti.
Judges14:2 Atabwerera kwawo
Judges14:3 Koma abambo ndi amayi ake anayankha kuti
Judges14:4 (Abambo ndi amayi ake sankadziwa kuti zimenezi zinali zochokera kwa Yehova
Judges14:5 Choncho Samsoni pamodzi ndi abambo ake anapita ku Timna. Akuyandikira minda ya mpesa ya ku Timna
Judges14:6 Tsono Mzimu wa Yehova unafika ndi mphamvu pa Samsoni ndipo ngakhale analibe chida mʼmanja mwake
Judges14:7 Kenaka Samsoni anapita kukakambirana ndi mkaziyo
Judges14:8 Patapita nthawi
Judges14:9 Tsono anakomberako uchi uja mʼmanja mwake ndi kumapita akudya. Atabwereranso kwa abambo ndi amayi ake
Judges14:10 Tsopano Samsoni anapita ku nyumba kwa mtsikanayo. Ndipo kumeneko Samsoni anakonza phwando monga ankachitira anyamata.
Judges14:11 Makolo a mkwatibwiyo atamuona
Judges14:12 Samsoni anawawuza kuti
Judges14:13 Koma ngati simutha kundiwuza tanthauzo lake
Judges14:14 Iye anati
Judges14:15 Tsiku lachinayi anthuwo anawuza mkazi wa Samsoni kuti
Judges14:16 Kenaka mkazi wa Samsoni anayamba kulira pamaso pake namuwuza kuti
Judges14:17 Mkaziyo anamulirira masiku onse asanu ndi awiri aphwandowo. Choncho pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri anamuwuza tanthauzo lake popeza amamukakamiza. Ndipo mkaziyo anakawuza abale ake aja tanthauzo la mwambiwo.
Judges14:18 Pambuyo pake anthu a mu mzinda aja anamuwuza Samsoni pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri dzuwa lisanalowe kuti
Judges14:19 Ndipo Mzimu wa Yehova unafika pa iye mwamphamvu. Choncho anatsikira ku Asikeloni naphako anthu makumi atatu
Judges14:20 Ndipo mkazi wa Samsoniyo anamukwatitsa kwa amene anali mnzake womuperekeza pa ukwati paja.
Judges15:1 Patapita nthawi
Judges15:2 Abambo a mkaziyo anati
Judges15:3 Samsoni anawawuza kuti
Judges15:4 Choncho Samsoni anapita nakagwira nkhandwe 300 nazimangirira michira ziwiriziwiri ndipo pa fundo iliyonse ya michirayo anamangirira nsakali.
Judges15:5 Anayatsa nsakalizo kenaka ndi kuzitayira nkhandwe zija mʼminda ya tirigu ya Afilisti
Judges15:6 Tsono Afilisti anayamba kufunsana kuti
Judges15:7 Samsoni anawawuza kuti
Judges15:8 Choncho Samsoni anamenyana nawo koopsa ndipo anapha ambiri a iwo. Kenaka anakalowa mʼphanga la Etamu
Judges15:9 Pambuyo pake Afilisti anakamanga misasa ya nkhondo mʼdziko la Yuda
Judges15:10 Anthu a fuko la Yuda anafunsa kuti
Judges15:11 Ndipo anthu 3
Judges15:12 Iwo anati kwa iye
Judges15:13 Iwo anamuyankha kuti
Judges15:14 Samsoni anafika ku Lehi
Judges15:15 Anapeza chibwano cha bulu amene anali atangofa kumene. Anachitola ndi kuphera nacho anthu 1
Judges15:16 Ndipo Samsoni anati
Judges15:17 Atatsiriza kuyankhula
Judges15:18 Pambuyo pake anamva ludzu kwambiri ndipo anayitana Yehova mopempha kuti
Judges15:19 Pamenepo Mulungu anangʼamba nthaka ku Lehi
Judges15:20 Samsoni anatsogolera Israeli pa nthawi ya Afilisti kwa zaka makumi awiri.
Judges16:1 Tsiku lina Samsoni anapita ku Gaza. Kumeneko anaonako mkazi wachiwerewere
Judges16:2 Anthu a ku Gaza anawuzidwa kuti
Judges16:3 Koma Samsoni anangogonako mpaka pakati pa usiku. Kenaka pakati pa usiku anadzuka nagwira zitseko za chipata cha mzinda ndi maferemu ake awiri
Judges16:4 Pambuyo pake
Judges16:5 Olamulira Afilisti anapita kwa mkaziyo ndipo anati
Judges16:6 Choncho Delila anati kwa Samsoni
Judges16:7 Samsoni anamuyankha kuti
Judges16:8 Tsono atsogoleri a Afilisti aja anapita kwa mkazi uja namupatsa zingwe zisanu ndi ziwiri zatsopano zosawuma
Judges16:9 Nthawi imeneyo nʼkuti mkazi uja atayika anthu omubisalira mʼchipinda. Tsono anati kwa mwamuna wake
Judges16:10 Kenaka Delila anati kwa Samsoni
Judges16:11 Iye anati
Judges16:12 Choncho Delila anatenga zingwe zatsopano namumanga nazo. Kenaka anati “Amuna anga
Judges16:13 Ndipo Delila anati kwa Samsoni
Judges16:14 Choncho iye akugona
Judges16:15 Tsono mkaziyo ananenanso kwa iye kuti
Judges16:16 Tsono popeza anamupanikiza ndi mawu ake tsiku ndi tsiku ndi kumukakamiza
Judges16:17 Choncho anamuwuza mkaziyo zonse za mu mtima mwake nati “Lumo silinapitepo pa mutu wanga chifukwa ndakhala ndili Mnaziri wopatulikira Mulungu chibadwire. Ngati nditametedwa mphamvu zanga zidzandichokera
Judges16:18 Delila ataona kuti wamuwuza zonse za mu mtima mwake anatumiza uthenga kukayitana akuluakulu a Afilisti nati
Judges16:19 Mkazi uja anagoneka Samsoni pa miyendo yake. Kenaka anayitana munthu wina ndipo anadzameta Samsoni njombi zisanu ndi ziwiri zija kumutu kwake. Pamenepo anayamba kufowoka
Judges16:20 Pambuyo pake mkaziyo anamuyitana kuti
Judges16:21 Afilisti anamugwira ndipo anamukolowola maso. Kenaka anapita naye ku Gaza atamumanga ndi maunyolo achitsulo. Kumeneko anakhala wa pamphero mu ndende.
Judges16:22 Pambuyo pake tsitsi la pa mutu wake
Judges16:23 Tsono atsogoleri a Afilisti anasonkhana kuti adzapereke nsembe yayikulu kwa Dagoni mulungu wawo ndi kukondwerera popeza ankanena kuti
Judges16:24 Anthuwo atamuona Samsoni
Judges16:25 Ali mʼkati mosangalala
Judges16:26 Pambuyo pake Samsoni anawuza mnyamata amene anamugwira dzanja kuti
Judges16:27 Nthawi imeneyi nʼkuti nyumbayo ili yodzaza ndi anthu aamuna ndi aakazi. Olamulira onse a Afilisti anali momwemo
Judges16:28 Tsono Samsoni anapemphera kwa Yehova kuti
Judges16:29 Choncho Samsoni anagwira mizati iwiri yapakati imene inkachirikiza nyumbayo. Anayitsamira ndi mphamvu zake zonse
Judges16:30 ndipo Samsoni anati
Judges16:31 Kenaka abale ake ndi onse a pa banja la abambo ake anapita kukamutenga. Ndipo anakamuyika pakati pa Zora ndi Esitaoli mʼmanda a abambo ake
Judges17:1 Munthu wina dzina lake Mika wochokera ku dziko la mapiri la Efereimu anawuza amayi ake kuti
Judges17:2 “Ndinamva inu mukutemberera munthu amene anaba ndalama zanu zasiliva 1
Judges17:3 Choncho Mika anabweza ndalama 1
Judges17:4 Tsono Mika atabweza ndalama zija kwa amayi ake
Judges17:5 Mikayu anali ndi kachisi
Judges17:6 Masiku amenewo kunalibe mfumu ku Israeli. Aliyense amachita zomwe zinamukomera.
Judges17:7 Ku Betelehemu mʼdziko la Yuda kunali mnyamata wina amene anali wa fuko la Levi.
Judges17:8 Iyeyu anachoka mu mzinda wa Betelehemu uja ku Yuda kukafuna malo ena okhala. Akuyenda
Judges17:9 Tsono Mika anamufunsa kuti
Judges17:10 Tsono Mika anati kwa iye
Judges17:11 Choncho Mleviyo anavomera kuti azikhala naye
Judges17:12 Pambuyo pake Mika anapatula Mleviyo ndipo mnyamatayu anakhala wansembe. Tsono ankakhala mʼnyumba ya Mika.
Judges17:13 Ndipo Mika anati
Judges18:1 Masiku amenewo munalibe mfumu mu Israeli. Ndipo anthu a fuko la Dani amafunafuna malo okhalamo ngati cholowa chawo
Judges18:2 Choncho fuko la Dani linatumiza kuchokera ku mabanja awo onse anthu olimba mtima asanu. Anthuwa anachokera ku Zora ndi ku Esitaoli ndipo anatumidwa kukazonda ndi kuliyendera dzikolo. Anthu amenewa ankayimira fuko lonse la Dani. Anthuwa anawawuza kuti
Judges18:3 Ali ku nyumba ya Mika anazindikira mawu a mnyamata
Judges18:4 Iye anawawuza zimene Mika anamuchitira ndipo anati
Judges18:5 Kenaka iwo anati kwa iye
Judges18:6 Wansembeyo anawayankha kuti
Judges18:7 Choncho anthu asanuwo ananyamuka ndipo anafika ku Laisi
Judges18:8 Ozonda dziko aja atabwerera kwa abale awo ku Zora ndi Esitaoli
Judges18:9 “Tiyeni tikamenyane nawo nkhondo popeza taliona dziko lawolo kuti ndi lachonde kwambiri. Kodi simuchitapo kanthu? Musachite mphwayi kupita mʼdzikomo ndi kukalilanda.
Judges18:10 Mukalowa
Judges18:11 Kenaka anthu 600 a fuko la Dani ananyamuka ku Zora ndi Esitaoli atanyamula zida za nkhondo.
Judges18:12 Tsono anakamanga msasa ku Kiriati-Yearimu mʼdziko la Yuda. Malowa ali kumadzulo kwa Kiriati-Yearimu. Ichi ndi chifukwa chake malowo akutchedwa Mahane Dani mpaka lero.
Judges18:13 Kuchokera kumeneko anapita ku dziko lamapiri la Efereimu ndipo anafika ku nyumba ya Mika.
Judges18:14 Anthu asanu amene anakazonda dziko la Laisi anati kwa abale awo
Judges18:15 Choncho anthuwa anapatuka napita ku nyumba ya Mika kumene mnyamata
Judges18:16 Nthawi imeneyi nʼkuti anthu 600 a fuko la Dani aja atayima pa chipata atanyamula zida za nkhondo.
Judges18:17 Anthu asanu amene anakazonda dziko aja analowa ndi kukatenga fano losema
Judges18:18 Anthuwo atalowa mʼnyumba ya Mika ndi kutenga fano losema
Judges18:19 Iwo anamuyankha kuti
Judges18:20 Wansembeyo anakondwera ndipo anatenga efodi
Judges18:21 Choncho iwo anatembenuka nachoka
Judges18:22 Atayenda mtunda pangʼono kuchokera pa nyumba ya Mika
Judges18:23 Atawafuwulira
Judges18:24 Iye anayankha kuti
Judges18:25 Anthu a fuko la Dani aja anayankha kuti
Judges18:26 Choncho anthu a fuko la Dani anapitiriza ulendo wawo. Mika ataona kuti anthuwo anali amphamvu kuposa iye
Judges18:27 Anthu a fuko la Dani aja anatenga zinthu zimene Mika anapanga pamodzi ndi wansembe uja. Iwo anakafika ku Laisi kwa anthu a phee
Judges18:28 Panalibe wowapulumutsa chifukwa anali kutali ndi Sidoni ndiponso sanali pa ubale ndi wina aliyense. Mzindawo unali mʼchigwa cha Beti-Rehobu. Anthu a fuko la Adaniwo anawumanganso mzindawo ndi kumakhalamo.
Judges18:29 Iwo anawutcha mzindawo Dani
Judges18:30 Anthu a fuko la Dani anayimiritsa fano losema lija. Yonatani mwana wa Geresomu
Judges18:31 Choncho anthu a fuko la Dani ankapembedza fano limene Mika anapanga nthawi yonse pamene nyumba ya Mulungu inali ku Silo.
Judges19:1 Pa nthawi imeneyo ku Israeli kunalibe mfumu. Mlevi wina ankakhala kutali ku dziko lamapiri la Efereimu. Iyeyu anatenga mzikazi wa ku Betelehemu
Judges19:2 Tsiku lina mzikazi uja anakwiyira mwamuna wake ndipo anamuchokera kupita kwa abambo ake ku Betelehemu mʼdziko la Yuda. Anakakhala kumeneko miyezi inayi.
Judges19:3 Mwamuna wake anamulondola kuti akayankhule naye mofatsa kumupempha kuti abwerere. Iye anali ndi antchito ake ndi abulu ake awiri. Anafika ku nyumba kwa mkazi uja ndipo iye anamulowetsa mʼnyumba ya abambo ake. Abambo aja atamuona mnyamata uja anamulandira mwachimwemwe.
Judges19:4 Mpongozi wake
Judges19:5 Tsiku lachinayi anadzuka mʼmamawa kukonzekera kuti azipita kwawo
Judges19:6 Choncho onse awiri anakhala pansi ndi kudya ndi kumwa pamodzi. Atadya
Judges19:7 Ndipo pamene mwamunayo anakonzeka kuti azipita
Judges19:8 Mmawa wa tsiku lachisanu
Judges19:9 Pambuyo pake munthu uja pamodzi ndi mzikazi wake ndiponso mtumiki anakonzeka kuti azipita. Koma abambo a mtsikana uja anatinso kwa iye
Judges19:10 Koma munthuyo sanafune kugonanso tsiku limenelo. Choncho ananyamuka kumapita
Judges19:11 Akuyandikira ku Yebusi nʼkuti kutada ndithu. Tsono mtumiki uja anawuza mbuye wake kuti
Judges19:12 Mbuye wake anamuyankha kuti
Judges19:13 Tsono anamuwuza mtumiki wake uja kuti
Judges19:14 Choncho nayenda ulendo wawo
Judges19:15 Ndipo anapatukira kumeneko kuti alowe mu mzinda wa Gibeya kukagona usiku umenewo. Anakalowa mu mzindamo ndi kukakhala pabwalo popeza panalibe munthu amene anawalandira ku nyumba kwake kuti akagone.
Judges19:16 Pambuyo pake anangoona munthu wina wokalamba akuchokera ku ntchito ya ku munda kwake madzulo. Iyeyu anali wa ku dziko la mapiri ku Efereimu
Judges19:17 Munthu wokalamba uja anakweza maso ndipo anaona munthu wa paulendo uja atakhala pabwalo la mzindawo
Judges19:18 Iye anayankha kuti
Judges19:19 Tili ndi udzu ndi chakudya cha abulu athu. Tilinso ndi buledi ndi vinyo wokwanira ifeyo: ine
Judges19:20 Munthu wokalambayo anati
Judges19:21 Choncho anapita nawo ku nyumba yake
Judges19:22 Pamene ankadya mosangalala
Judges19:23 Koma mwini nyumba uja anatuluka ku bwalo nawawuza kuti
Judges19:24 Onani
Judges19:25 Koma anthuwo sanafune kumumvera. Choncho mlendo uja anagwira mzikazi wake namutulutsa kuja kumene kunali iwo. Tsono iwowo anagona naye ndi kuchita naye zonyansa usiku wonse mpaka mmawa. Mʼbandakucha anamulola kuti apite.
Judges19:26 Ndipo mmawa kukucha mzikazi uja anabwerera nakagwa pansi pa khomo pa nyumba imene mwamuna wake anali
Judges19:27 Mwamuna wake anadzuka mʼmamawa
Judges19:28 Iye anati kwa mkaziyo
Judges19:29 Atafika ku nyumba yake
Judges19:30 Aliyense amene anaona zimenezi ankanena kuti
Judges20:1 Ndipo Aisraeli onse kuyambira ku dziko la Dani mpaka ku Beeriseba ndiponso ku dziko la Giliyadi ananyamuka ngati munthu mmodzi nakasonkhana pamaso pa Yehova ku Mizipa.
Judges20:2 Atsogoleri a anthu onse ndi a mafuko onse Aisraeli anali nawo pa msonkhano wa anthu a Mulungu. Onse pamodzi analipo asilikali oyenda pansi 400
Judges20:3 Anthu a fuko la Benjamini anali atamva kuti Aisraeli apita ku Mizipa. Tsono Aisraeli anati
Judges20:4 Choncho Mlevi uja
Judges20:5 Usiku anthu a ku Gibeya anandiwukira
Judges20:6 Ine ndinatenga mzikazi wangayo ndi kumudula nthulinthuli ndikuzitumiza kwa fuko lililonse la Aisraeli. Anthu amenewa
Judges20:7 Ndi zimenezotu inu Aisraeli nonse; yankhulaponi mawu ndi kupereka maganizo anu.”
Judges20:8 Anthu onse anayimirira ngati munthu mmodzi nanena kuti
Judges20:9 Koma tsopano chimene ife tichite ndi dziko la Gibeya ndi ichi: Tidzapita kukamenyana nawo potsatira zimene maere anene.
Judges20:10 Mʼmafuko onse a Aisraeli tidzasankha anthu khumi pa anthu 100 aliwonse: ndiye kuti anthu 100 pa anthu 1
Judges20:11 Choncho anthu a ku Israeli anasonkhana pamodzi nagwirizana chimodzi
Judges20:12 Mafuko a Israeli anatumiza anthu kwa fuko lonse la Benjamini kukafunsa kuti
Judges20:13 Tsono tikuti mutipatse anthu achabechabe a ku Gibeya kuti tiwaphe kuti tichotse chinthu choyipachi mʼdziko la Israeli.” Koma fuko la Benjamini silinafune kumvera zimene ananena Aisraeli anzawo.
Judges20:14 Mʼmalo mwake
Judges20:15 Tsiku limenelo Abenjamini anasonkhanitsa kuchokera ku mizinda yawo ankhondo 26
Judges20:16 Mwa onsewa panali ankhondo 70 amanzere amene aliyense anali wodziwa kulasa ngakhale tsitsi limodzi ndi mwala osaphonya.
Judges20:17 Aisraeli
Judges20:18 Ndipo Aisraeli ananyamuka kupita ku Beteli kukafunsira kwa Mulungu. Iwo anati
Judges20:19 Mmawa mwake Israeli ananyamuka nakamanga msasa moyangʼanana ndi Gibeya.
Judges20:20 Aisraeli anapita kukachita nkhondo ndi fuko la Benjamini ndipo anandandalika ankhondo awo moyangʼanana ndi Gibeya.
Judges20:21 A fuko la Benjamini anatuluka ku Gibeya ndipo tsiku limenelo anapha Aisraeli 22
Judges20:22 Koma ankhondo a Israeli analimbikitsananso mtima ndipo anasonkhanitsanso kachiwiri ankhondo awo pa malo pamene anawandandalika poyamba paja.
Judges20:23 Aisraeli anapita kukalira pamaso pa Yehova mpaka madzulo. Iwo anafunsa Yehova kuti
Judges20:24 Ndipo Aisraeli anayandikiranso pafupi ndi fuko la Benjamini tsiku lachiwiri lake kuti amenyane nawo.
Judges20:25 Pa tsiku lachiwiri lomwelo Abenjamini anatulukanso mu mzinda wa Gibeya ndipo anaphanso ankhondo 18
Judges20:26 Tsono Aisraeli onse
Judges20:27 Bokosi la Chipangano cha Yehova linali kumeneko.
Judges20:28 Finehasi mwana wa Eliezara mwana wa Aaroni ndiye ankatumikira nthawi imeneyo. Tsono Aisraeli anafunsa Yehova kuti
Judges20:29 Choncho Aisraeli anayika anthu obisalira mozungulira Gibeya.
Judges20:30 Tsiku lachitatu anapita kukamenyana ndi Benjamini ndipo anayika ankhondo mʼmalo mwawo kuti amenyane ndi Gibeya monga anachitira poyamba.
Judges20:31 Abenjamini anatuluka kukamenyana nawo anthuwo ndipo anapita kutali ndi mzindawo. Iwo anayamba kupha Aisraeli monga poyamba paja
Judges20:32 Abenjamini ankanena kuti
Judges20:33 Choncho Aisraeli onse anachoka mʼmalo mwawo ndi kukandanda ku Baala-Tamara
Judges20:34 Aisraeli osankhidwa 10
Judges20:35 Tsono Yehova anagonjetsa Abenjamini pamaso pa Israeli motero kuti Aisraeli anapha ankhondo a Abenjamini 25
Judges20:36 Choncho Abenjamini anaona kuti agonjetsedwa. Paja Aisraeli anathawa fuko la Benjamini chifukwa ankadalira anthu amene anawayika kuti abisalire mzinda wa Gibeya.
Judges20:37 Tsono anthu amene anabisala aja anachita changu kuwuthira nkhondo mzinda wa Gibeyawo. Ndipo anapha anthu onse a mu mzindawo ndi lupanga.
Judges20:38 Chizindikiro chimene Aisraeli anapangana ndi anthu obisalira aja chinali chakuti obisalira aja akangofukiza utsi wambiri ngati mtambo mu mzindamo
Judges20:39 ndiye kuti Aisraeli enawo abwerere ku nkhondo. Pa nthawiyo nʼkuti Abenjamini atayamba kale kumenya Aisraeliwo kwambiri ndi kupha pafupifupi anthu makumi atatu. Ndipo iwo ankanena kuti
Judges20:40 Koma pamene utsi wa chizindikiro uja unayamba kukwera tolotolo mmwamba kuchoka mu mzindamo
Judges20:41 Kenaka Aisraeli anabwerera ndipo Abenjamini anachita mantha
Judges20:42 Choncho anathawa pamaso pa Aisraeli kudzera njira ya ku chipululu
Judges20:43 Anawazungulira Abenjaminiwo
Judges20:44 Abenjamini 18
Judges20:45 Koma ena anatembenuka nathawira ku chipululu ku thanthwe la Rimoni. Mwa iwowa Aisraeli anapha Abenjamini 5
Judges20:46 Pa tsiku limenelo Abenjamini olimba mtima okhala ndi malupanga okwana 25
Judges20:47 Koma anthu 700 anabwerera ndi kuthawira ku chipululu ku thanthwe la Rimoni kumene anakhalako miyezi inayi.
Judges20:48 Aisraeli anabwerera kukamenyana ndi Abenjamini otsala ndi kuwapha ndi lupanga kuphatikizapo ziweto ndi zonse anali nazo. Ndipo anayatsa moto mizinda yonse anayipeza.
Judges21:1 Aisraeli anali atalumbira ku Mizipa kuti
Judges21:2 Anthu anapita ku Beteli kumene anakakhala pansi pamaso pa Mulungu mpaka madzulo. Iwo anakweza mawu nalira kwambiri.
Judges21:3 Iwo ankanena kuti
Judges21:4 Mmawa mwake anthu anadzuka namanga guwa lansembe ndi kupereka nsembe zopsereza ndi nsembe zachiyanjano.
Judges21:5 Kenaka Aisraeli anafunsa kuti
Judges21:6 Tsono Aisraeli anamva chisoni chifukwa cha abale awo
Judges21:7 Kodi tingawapezere bwanji anthu otsalawa akazi woti awakwatire? Paja ife tinalumbira kwa Yehova kuti sitidzapereka ana anthu aakazi kuti awakwatire.
Judges21:8 Kenaka anafunsa kuti
Judges21:9 Pamene anthu anawerengana anangoona kuti anthu a ku Yabesi Giliyadi palibe.
Judges21:10 Choncho msonkhano unatumiza anthu ankhondo 12
Judges21:11 Izi ndi zimene mukachite. “Mukaphe mwamuna aliyense ndi mkazi aliyense amene anadziwapo mwamuna.”
Judges21:12 Iwo anapeza atsikana 400 pakati pa anthu okhala mu Yabesi Giliyadi amene anali asanadziwepo mwamuna ndipo anabwera nawo ku misasa ku Silo mʼdziko la Kanaani.
Judges21:13 Kenaka msonkhano wonse unatumiza uthenga kwa Abenjamini amene ankakhala ku thanthwe la Rimoni kuwawuza kuti nkhondo yatha.
Judges21:14 Choncho Abenjamini anabwera nthawi imeneyo ndipo Aisraeli anawapatsa akazi a ku Yabesi Giliyadi amene sanaphedwe. Koma sanapezeke owakwanira.
Judges21:15 Aisraeli anamvera chisoni Abenjamini
Judges21:16 Choncho akuluakulu a msonkhano anati
Judges21:17 Iwo anati
Judges21:18 Ife sitingathe kuwapatsa ana anthu aakazi kuti akwatire. Paja tinalumbira kuti
Judges21:19 Ndipo anati
Judges21:20 Choncho anawalamulira Abenjamini aja kuti
Judges21:21 ndipo mukakhale tcheru. Ana aakazi a ku Silo akadzatulukira kudzavina nawo magule
Judges21:22 Ngati abambo awo kapena alongo awo adzabwera kudzadandaula kwa ife
Judges21:23 Abenjamini anachitadi zimenezi. Mwa akazi amene ankavina aja anagwirapo ena
Judges21:24 Pambuyo pake Aisraeli anachoka kumeneko ndi kubwerera kwawo
Judges21:25 Masiku amenewo kunalibe mfumu ku Israeli. Aliyense ankangochita zimene zomukomera yekha.
Ruth1:1 Mu nthawi imene oweruza ankalamulira Israeli
Ruth1:2 Dzina la munthuyo linali Elimeleki
Ruth1:3 Kenaka Elimeleki
Ruth1:4 Iwo anakwatira akazi a Chimowabu; wina dzina lake Oripa ndi wina Rute. Atakhala kumeneko pafupifupi zaka khumi
Ruth1:5 Maloni ndi Kiliyoni anamwaliranso kotero kuti Naomi anatsala yekha wopanda ana ake awiri aja ndi mwamuna wake.
Ruth1:6 Naomi ndi apongozi ake awiri aja ananyamuka kubwerera kwawo kuchokera ku Mowabu popeza anali atamva ali ku Mowabuko kuti Yehova anakomera mtima anthu ake ndi kuwapatsa chakudya.
Ruth1:7 Naomi pamodzi ndi apongozi ake awiri aja anachoka kumene ankakhala ndi kuyamba ulendo obwerera kwawo ku Yuda.
Ruth1:8 Kenaka Naomi anati kwa apongozi ake awiri aja
Ruth1:9 “Yehova akuthandizeni kuti aliyense wa inu apeze pokhala pabwino komanso mwamuna.” Kenaka anawapsompsona koma awiriwo analira mokweza.
Ruth1:10 Ndipo anati kwa Naomi
Ruth1:11 Koma Naomi anati
Ruth1:12 Bwererani kwanu ana anga muzipita kwanu. Ine ndakalamba kwambiri kotero kuti sindingakwatiwenso. Ngakhale ndikananena kuti ndili nacho chikhulupiriro
Ruth1:13 kodi inu mukanadikira kuti akule? Kodi mukanakhalabe osakwatiwa kudikira iwowo? Ayi ana anga. Zimenezi zikundiwawa kwambiri kuposa inu
Ruth1:14 Atamva zimenezi analiranso kwambiri
Ruth1:15 Naomi anati “Taona
Ruth1:16 Koma Rute anayankha kuti
Ruth1:17 Kumene mukafere inenso ndidzafera komweko ndipo komweko ndikayikidwa mʼmanda. Yehova andichite choyipa chingakule motani
Ruth1:18 Naomi atazindikira kuti Rute watsimikiza kupita naye
Ruth1:19 Choncho amayi awiriwo anapitiriza ulendo wawo mpaka anakafika ku Betelehemu. Pamene ankafika mu Betelehemu
Ruth1:20 Iye anawawuza kuti
Ruth1:21 Ine ndinapita wolemera
Ruth1:22 Naomi anabwerera kuchoka ku dziko la Mowabu pamodzi ndi Rute mpongozi wake. Ndipo anafika ku Betelehemu nthawi yoyamba kukolola barele.
Ruth2:1 Naomi anali ndi mʼbale wake wolemera kwambiri wochokera ku banja la mwamuna wake Elimeleki
Ruth2:2 Tsiku lina Rute
Ruth2:3 Choncho Rute ananyamuka kupita kukakunkha ku minda yokololedwa kale. Tsono zinangochitika kuti Rute anafika mʼmunda wa Bowazi
Ruth2:4 Posakhalitsa Bowazi anafika kuchokera ku Betelehemu ndipo analonjera okolola aja kuti
Ruth2:5 Bowazi anafunsa kapitawo wake amene ankayangʼanira okolola aja kuti
Ruth2:6 Kapitawo uja anayankha kuti
Ruth2:7 Iye anandipempha kuti

Ruth2:9 Uziyangʼana munda akukolola anyamatawo akamakolola mʼmundamu

Ruth2:11 Bowazi anayankha kuti
Ruth2:12 Yehova akubwezere pa zimene wachitazi. Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli

Ruth2:15 Atanyamuka kuti azikakunkha

Ruth2:17 Choncho Rute anakunkha mʼmundamo mpaka madzulo. Kenaka anapuntha barele anakunkhayo
Ruth2:18 Anasenza barele uja kupita naye ku mudzi
Ruth2:19 Apongozi akewo anamufunsa kuti
Ruth2:20 Naomi anati kwa mpongozi wakeyo
Ruth2:21 Choncho Rute Mmowabuyo anati
