Ruth4:1 Nthawi yomweyo Bowazi anapita ku chipata cha mzinda ndi kukhala pansi kumeneko pabwalo losonkhanira. Tsono anangoona wachibale woyenera kulowa chokolo uja akufika. Ndipo Bowazi anati

Ruth4:6 Pamenepo wachibaleyo anati

1Samuel1:2 Iye anali ndi akazi awiri
1Samuel1:3 Chaka ndi chaka Elikana ankachoka ku mudzi kwawo kupita ku Silo kukapembedza ndi kukapereka nsembe kwa Yehova Wamphamvuzonse. Ku Siloko kunali ana awiri a Eli
1Samuel1:4 Tsiku lopereka nsembe likafika Elikana amapereka magawo a nsembeyo kwa mkazi wake Penina ndi kwa ana ake onse aamuna ndi aakazi.
1Samuel1:5 Ngakhale ankamukonda Hana
1Samuel1:6 Tsono popeza Yehova sanamupatse Hana ana
1Samuel1:7 Izi zimachitika chaka ndi chaka. Hana ankati akamapita ku Nyumba ya Yehova mkazi mnzakeyo ankamunyogodola. Choncho Hana ankangokhalira kulira osafuna ndi kudya komwe.
1Samuel1:8 Tsono mwamuna wake Elikana ankamufunsa kuti
1Samuel1:9 Tsiku lina atatha kudya ndi kumwa ku Silo kuja
1Samuel1:10 Hana anavutika mʼmoyo mwake
1Samuel1:11 Ndipo iye analumbira kuti
1Samuel1:12 Akupemphera choncho kwa Yehova
1Samuel1:13 Hana ankapemphera chamumtima ndipo milomo yake inkangogwedera koma mawu ake samamveka. Choncho Eli anaganiza kuti anali ataledzera.
1Samuel1:14 Ndipo anamufunsa Hana kuti
1Samuel1:15 Koma Hana anayankha kuti
1Samuel1:16 Musaganize kuti mtumiki wanu ndi kukhala mkazi wachabechabe. Ine ndakhala ndi kupereka nkhawa yanga yayikulu ndi zowawa zanga.”
1Samuel1:17 Eli anayankha
1Samuel1:18 Hana anati
1Samuel1:19 Elikana ndi banja lake anadzuka mmawa mwake nakapemphera pamaso pa Yehova. Pambuyo pake anabwerera kwawo ku Rama. Elikana anakhala pamodzi ndi mkazi wake
1Samuel1:20 Motero Hana anakhala ndi pakati ndipo anabereka mwana wamwamuna. Anamutcha dzina lake Samueli
1Samuel1:21 Elikana ndi banja lake lonse anapita kukapereka nsembe ya pa chaka kwa Yehova ndi kukakwaniritsa malonjezo ake.
1Samuel1:22 Koma Hana sanapite nawo popeza anawuza mwamuna wake kuti
1Samuel1:23 Elikana mwamuna wake anamuwuza kuti
1Samuel1:24 Atamuletsa kuyamwa
1Samuel1:25 Tsono anapha ngʼombe yamphongo ija ndi kupereka mwana uja kwa Eli.
1Samuel1:26 Ndipo Hana anati kwa Eli
1Samuel1:27 Ndinapempha mwana uyu
1Samuel1:28 Ndiye tsopano ine ndikumupereka kwa Yehova. Pa moyo wake wonse adzakhala wa Yehova.” Ndipo onse anapembedza Yehova kumeneko.

1Samuel2:12 Ana a Eli anali ana achabechabe pakuti samasamala za Yehova.

1Samuel2:19 Chaka chilichonse amayi ake ankamusokera kamkanjo ndi kukamupatsa akamapita ndi mwamuna wake kukapereka nsembe za pa chaka.

1Samuel2:28 Ndipo ndinamusankha pakati pa mafuko a Israeli kuti akhale wansembe wanga ndi kuti azipita pa guwa langa la nsembe
1Samuel2:29 Nʼchifukwa chiyani ukunyoza nsembe ndi zopereka zanga zimene ndinalamula? Nʼchifukwa chiyani ukupereka ulemu kwa ana ako kuposa Ine podzinenepetsa nokha ndi zopereka zabwino kwambiri za nsembe zimene Aisraeli amapereka?’ ”
1Samuel2:30 “Paja Ine Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli ‘Ndinalonjeza kuti anthu a pa banja lako ndi a pa banja la abambo ako azidzanditumikira nthawi zonse.’ Koma tsopano ndikuti

1Samuel2:32 Pa mavuto ako udzayangʼana ndi maso ansanje zabwino zimene ndidzachitira Aisraeli ena. Mʼbanja lako simudzapezeka munthu wokalamba.
1Samuel2:33 Komabe pa banja lako mmodzi yekha ndidzamuleka wosamuchotsa kuti azidzanditumikira. Iyeyu azidzakuliritsa ndi kukumvetsa chisoni. Koma ena onse pa banja lako adzafa akanali aangʼono.”

1Samuel3:1 Samueli ankatumikira Yehova moyangʼaniridwa ndi Eli. Masiku amenewo mawu a Yehova sankamveka pafupipafupi. Kuona zinthu mʼmasomphenya sikunkachitikanso kawirikawiri.
1Samuel3:2 Tsiku lina Eli
1Samuel3:3 Nthawiyi nʼkuti nyale ya Mulungu isanazimitsidwe. Samueli anali gone mu Nyumba ya Yehova
1Samuel3:4 Yehova anayitana Samueli. Iye anayankha kuti
1Samuel3:5 Ndipo iyeyo anathamangira kwa Eli ndipo anati
1Samuel3:6 Yehova anayitananso
1Samuel3:7 Nthawiyi nʼkuti Samueli asanadziwe Yehova ndipo Mawu a Yehova nʼkuti asanawululidwe kwa iye.

1Samuel3:11 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Samueli
1Samuel3:12 Tsiku limenelo ndidzachitadi zonse zimene ndinayankhula zokhudza banja la Eli kuyambira poyamba mpaka pomaliza.
1Samuel3:13 Pakuti ndinamudziwitsa kuti Ine ndikhoza kulanga banja lake kwamuyaya chifukwa cha zoyipa zimene ana ake ankadziyipitsa nazo. Iye ankadziwa zimenezi koma osawaletsa.
1Samuel3:14 Nʼchifukwa chake ndinalumbira kuti
1Samuel3:15 Samueli anagona mpaka mmawa. Atadzuka anatsekula zitseko za Nyumba ya Yehova. Iye anachita mantha kumuwuza Eli za masomphenya ake.

1Samuel6:6 Nʼchifukwa chiyani mukuwumitsa mitima monga anachita Aigupto ndi Farao? Mulungu atawalanga anthu a ku Igupto aja kodi suja anawalola Aisraeli kuti azipita ndipo anapitadi?
1Samuel6:7 “Tsopano konzani galeta latsopano limodzi ndiponso ngʼombe ziwiri zazikazi zamkaka zimene sizinavalepo goli. Muzimangirire ngʼombezo ku ngoloyo
1Samuel6:8 Mutenge Bokosi la Yehova ndi kuliyika pa galetapo ndipo pambali pake pakhale Bokosi
1Samuel6:9 Koma muziliyangʼana. Ngati lilondola njira yopita kwawo kwa Bokosilo mpaka ku Beti-Semesi ndiye kuti amene watichita zoyipa zazikulu zoterezi ndi Mulungu wa Israeli. Koma ngati silitero
1Samuel6:10 Anthu aja anachitadi zimenezi. Anatenga ngʼombe zamkaka ziwiri nazimanga ku galeta lija. Koma ana awo anawatsekera mʼkhola.
1Samuel6:11 Tsono anayika Bokosi la Yehova pa galeta pamodzi ndi bokosi limene munali makoswe agolide ndi zifanizo zawo za zithupsa.
1Samuel6:12 Ngʼombe zija zinapita molunjika kutsata msewu wopita ku Beti Semesi zikulira njira yonse. Sizinakhotere kumanja kapena kumanzere. Akalonga a Afilisti anazitsatira mpaka mʼmalire a Beti-Semesi.
1Samuel6:13 Nthawi imeneyi anthu a ku Beti-Semesi amakolola tirigu mʼchigwa ndipo pamene anayangʼana ndi kuona Bokosi la Chipangano likubwera anakondwa.
1Samuel6:14 Galeta lija linafika ku munda wa Yoswa ku Beti-Semesi ndipo linayima. Kumeneko kunali mwala waukulu. Tsono anthu anawaza nkhuni galetalo
1Samuel6:15 Alevi nʼkuti atatsitsa Bokosi la Yehova
1Samuel6:16 Atsogoleri asanu a Afilisti ataona izi anabwerera ku Ekroni tsiku lomwelo.
1Samuel6:17 Zifanizo zagolide za zithupsa zimene Afilisti anatumiza ngati nsembe zopepesera machimo kwa Yehova zinkayimirira mizinda isanu iyi motere: chimodzi cha ku Asidodi
1Samuel6:18 Ndipo chiwerengero cha zifanizo za makoswe chinali chofanana ndi chiwerengero cha mizinda ya akalonga asanu a Afilisti. Mizindayi inali yotetezedwa bwino ndi ina yapamtetete. Mwala waukulu umene anayikapo Bokosi la Chipangano la Yehova mʼmunda mwa Yoswa ku Beti-Semesi uli ngati mboni mpaka lero.
1Samuel6:19 Yehova anakantha amuna a ku Beti-Semesi 70 chifukwa anasuzumira mʼBokosi la Chipangano cha Yehova. Ndipo anzawo analira chifukwa Yehova anawalanga kwambiri.
1Samuel6:20 Tsono anthu a ku Beti-Semesi anafunsa
1Samuel6:21 Tsono iwo anatumiza a mithenga kwa anthu a ku Kiriati-Yearimu kuti
1Samuel7:1 Choncho anthu a ku Kiriati-Yearimu anabwera ndi kudzatenga Bokosi la Yehova. Iwo anapita nalo ku nyumba ya Abinadabu ya ku phiri ndipo anapatula Eliezara mwana wake kuti aziyangʼanira Bokosi la Yehovalo.
1Samuel7:2 Zaka makumi awiri zinapita kuyambira pamene Bokosi la Yehova linakhala ku Kiriati-Yearimu
1Samuel7:3 Ndipo Samueli anati kwa nyumba yonse ya Israeli
1Samuel7:4 Choncho Aisraeli anachotsa milungu yawo ya Baala ndi Asitoreti ndi kutumikira Yehova yekha.
1Samuel7:5 Kenaka Samueli anati
1Samuel7:6 Choncho anasonkhana ku Mizipa
1Samuel7:7 Afilisti anamva kuti Aisraeli asonkhana ku Mizipa
1Samuel7:8 Choncho anati kwa Samueli
1Samuel7:9 Ndipo Samueli anatenga mwana wankhosa wamkazi woyamwa ndi kumupereka monga nsembe yopsereza kwa Yehova. Iye anapemphera kwa Yehova mʼmalo mwa Aisraeli
1Samuel7:10 Samueli akupereka nsembe yopsereza
1Samuel7:11 Aisraeli anatuluka ku Mizipa kuthamangitsa Afilisti aja nʼkumawapha mʼnjira yonse mpaka kumunsi kwa Beti-Kari.
1Samuel7:12 Kenaka Samueli anatenga mwala nawuyika pakati pa Mizipa ndi Seni. Iye anawutcha Ebenezeri
1Samuel7:13 Kotero Afilisti anagonjetsedwa ndipo sanadzalowenso mʼdziko la Israeli. Yehova analimbana ndi Afilisti masiku onse a Samueli.
1Samuel7:14 Mizinda yonse imene Afilisti analanda kuchokera ku Ekroni mpaka ku Gati inabwezedwa kwa Aisraeli. Choncho Aisraeli anapulumutsa dziko lawo. Ndipo panalinso mtendere pakati pa Aisraeli ndi Aamori.
1Samuel7:15 Samueli anatsogolera Aisraeli moyo wake wonse.
1Samuel7:16 Chaka ndi chaka Samueli ankakonza ulendo wozungulira kuchokera ku Beteli mpaka ku Giligala ndi Mizipa
1Samuel7:17 Koma pambuyo pake ankabwerera ku Rama
1Samuel8:1 Samueli atakalamba anasankha ana ake kuti akhale oweruza Aisraeli.
1Samuel8:2 Mwana wake woyamba anali Yoweli
1Samuel8:3 Koma ana akewo sanatengere makhalidwe ake abwino. Iwo ankapotokera ku zoyipa namatsata phindu mwachinyengo. Ankalandira ziphuphu ndi kumaweruza mwachinyengo.
1Samuel8:4 Tsono akuluakulu onse a Israeli anasonkhana pamodzi ndipo anabwera kwa Samueli ku Rama.
1Samuel8:5 Iwo anati kwa iye “Taonani
1Samuel8:6 Koma mawu oti
1Samuel8:7 Yehova anamuyankha nati

1Samuel8:9 Tsono amvere zimene akunena
1Samuel8:10 Samueli anawawuza anthu amene amamupempha mfumu aja mawu onse a Yehova.
1Samuel8:11 Iye anati
1Samuel8:12 Ena adzawayika kukhala olamulira asilikali 1
1Samuel8:13 Iyo idzatenga ana anu akazi kuti akhale oyenga mafuta onunkhira
1Samuel8:14 Idzatenga minda yanu yabwino ya mpesa ndi ya mitengo ya olivi ndipo adzayipereka kwa antchito ake.
1Samuel8:15 Idzatenga gawo lakhumi la tirigu wanu ndi mphesa zanu ndi kupereka kwa nduna zake ndi akapitawo ake.
1Samuel8:16 Mfumuyo idzatenga antchito anu aamuna ndi aakazi. Idzatenganso ngʼombe zanu zabwino ndi abulu anu nʼkumazingwiritsa ntchito.
1Samuel8:17 Iyo idzatenga gawo lakhumi la zoweta zanu
1Samuel8:18 Nthawi imeneyo ikadzafika inu mudzalira momvetsa chisoni chifukwa cha mfumu imene mwadzisankhira
1Samuel8:19 Koma anthu anakana kumumvera Samueli. Iwo anati
1Samuel8:20 Kotero ifenso tidzakhala ngati mayiko ena. Mfumu yathu idzatiweruza ndiponso idzatuluka nafe kutitsogolera kukamenya nkhondo.”

1Samuel8:22 Yehova anamuyankha nati
1Samuel9:1 Panali munthu wina wa fuko la Benjamini
1Samuel9:2 Iyeyu anali ndi mwana dzina lake Sauli

1Samuel9:6 Koma mnyamatayo anayankha kuti
1Samuel9:7 Sauli anafunsa mnyamata wake kuti
1Samuel9:8 Mnyamatayo anayankha kuti
1Samuel9:9 (Kale mu Israeli ngati munthu afuna kukapempha nzeru kwa Mulungu ankanena kuti
1Samuel9:10 Tsono Sauli anawuza mnyamata wake kuti
1Samuel9:11 Akukwera phiri kupita ku mzindawo anakumana ndi atsikana akutuluka mu mzindamo kukatunga madzi
1Samuel9:12 Iwo anayankha
1Samuel9:13 Mukangolowa mu mzindawo mumupeza asanapite ku phiri kukadya. Anthu sangayambe kudya iye asanabwere chifukwa iyeyu ayenera kudalitsa nsembeyo. Kenaka anthu oyitanidwa adzayamba kudya. Pitani tsopano
1Samuel9:14 Choncho anapita ku mzinda kuja. Akulowa mu mzindamo
1Samuel9:15 Koma chadzulo lake Sauli asanafike
1Samuel9:16 “Mawa nthawi ngati yomwe ino ndidzakutumizira munthu wochokera ku dziko la Benjamini. Udzamudzoze kuti akhale mtsogoleri wa anthu anga
1Samuel9:17 Samueli atamuona Sauli
1Samuel9:18 Tsono Sauli anayandikira Samueli pa chipata ndipo anamufunsa
1Samuel9:19 Samueli anayankha
1Samuel9:20 Musadere nkhawa za abulu anu amene akhala akusowa masiku atatu apitawa
1Samuel9:21 Sauli anayankha
1Samuel9:22 Ndipo Samueli anatenga Sauli ndi mnyamata wake uja ndi kulowa nawo mʼchipinda chachikulu ndipo anawakhazika kutsogolo kwa anthu oyitanidwa. Onse pamodzi analipo anthu makumi atatu.
1Samuel9:23 Tsono Samueli anati kwa wophika
1Samuel9:24 Kotero wophikayo anatenga mwendo wa nyama ndipo anawuyika patsogolo pa Sauli. Samueli anati “Nayi nyama imene ndinakusungira kuti pa nthawi yake udye pamodzi ndi anthu amene ndawayitana.” Ndipo Sauli anadya tsiku limenelo ndi Samueli.
1Samuel9:25 Atatsika kuchoka ku phiri kuja
1Samuel9:26 Tsono mʼbandakucha Samueli anayitana Sauli pa dengapo nati

1Samuel10:1 Ndipo Samueli anatenga botolo la mafuta nathira mafutawo pa mutu wa Sauli ndipo anapsompsona nati
1Samuel10:2 Ukachoka pano lero lino
1Samuel10:3 “Ndipo udzapyola pamenepo ndi kufika ku mtengo wa thundu wa ku Tabori. Kumeneko udzakumana ndi anthu atatu akupita kukapereka nsembe ku Nyumba ya Mulungu ku Beteli. Mmodzi adzakhala atanyamula ana ambuzi atatu
1Samuel10:4 Adzakupatsa moni ndi kukupatsa malofu awiri a buledi. Iwe udzalandire bulediyo.
1Samuel10:5 “Pambuyo pake
1Samuel10:6 Kenaka Mzimu wa Yehova udzabwera pa iwe ndi mphamvu
1Samuel10:7 Zizindikiro izi zikakachitika
1Samuel10:8 “Tsono tsogola kupita ku Giligala. Ine ndidzabwera ndithu kudzapereka nsembe zopsereza ndi nsembe zachiyanjano. Koma ukandidikire masiku asanu ndi awiri mpaka ine nditabwera kuti ndidzakuwuze zomwe udzachite.”

1Samuel10:20 Samueli atasonkhanitsa mafuko onse a Israeli
1Samuel10:21 Anasonkhanitsa fuko la Benjamini banja ndi banja. Pomaliza anasonkhanitsa banja la Matiri mmodzimmodzi ndipo Sauli mwana wa Kisi anasankhidwa. Koma atamufunafuna
1Samuel10:22 Tsono anthu anafunsanso kwa Yehova kuti
1Samuel10:23 Iwo anathamanga ndi kukamutenga kumeneko. Atayimirira pakati pa anthu anapezeka kuti anali wamtali kuposa anthu ena mwakuti ankamulekeza mʼmapewa.
1Samuel10:24 Samueli anafunsa anthu onse kuti
1Samuel10:25 Samueli anafotokozera anthu ntchito ndi udindo wa mfumu. Pambuyo pake analemba mʼbuku zonse zokhudza ntchito ndi udindo wa mfumu

1Samuel10:27 Koma anthu ena achabechabe anati

1Samuel12:1 Pambuyo pake Samueli anawuza Aisraeli onse kuti
1Samuel12:2 Tsopano muli ndi mfumu imene izikutsogolerani
1Samuel12:3 Ine ndili pano. Ngati ndinalakwa chilichonse nditsutseni pamaso pa Yehova ndi wodzozedwa wake. Kodi ndinalanda ngʼombe ya yani? Kodi ndinalanda bulu wa yani? Kodi ndani amene ndinamudyera masuku pa mutu? Kodi ndinazunza yani? Kodi ndinalandira kwa yani chiphuphu choti nʼkundidetsa mʼmaso? Ngati ndinachita chilichonse cha izi
1Samuel12:4 Iwo anayankha kuti
1Samuel12:5 Samueli anawawuza kuti

1Samuel12:13 Tsopano nayi mfumu imene mwayisankha
1Samuel12:14 Ngati muziopa Yehova ndi kumamutumikira ndi kumamumvera
1Samuel12:15 Koma mukapanda kumvera Yehova ndi kumupandukira
1Samuel12:16 “Tsono imani pomwepa kuti muone chinthu chachikulu chimene Yehova ali pafupi kuchita pamaso panu!
1Samuel12:17 Kodi ino si nthawi yokolola tirigu? Komabe ndipemphera kwa Yehova kuti agwetse mvula ya mabingu. Zikatero mudzadziwa kuti tchimo lanu limene mwachita popempha mfumu kwa Yehova ndi lalikulu.”

1Samuel12:19 Tsono anamupempha Samueli nati

1Samuel12:25 Komabe mukapitirira kuchita zoyipa

1Samuel13:5 Tsono Afilisti anasonkhana kuti amenyane ndi Aisraeli. Iwo anali ndi magaleta 3
1Samuel13:6 Pamene Aisraeli anaona kuti anali pamavuto akulu

1Samuel13:15 Kenaka Samueli anachoka ku Giligala ndi kupita ku Gibeyati ku dziko la Benjamini. Saulo anawerenga anthu amene anali naye ndipo analipo 600.
1Samuel13:16 Sauli ndi mwana wake Yonatani pamodzi ndi asilikali amene anali naye aja amakhala ku Geba ku dziko la Benjamini. Koma Afilisti anamanga misasa yawo ku Mikimasi.

1Samuel13:21 Mtengo wonolera mapulawo ndi makasu unali zigawo ziwiri za sekeli

1Samuel13:23 Tsono gulu lina lankhondo la Chifilisti linapita kukalonda mpata wa Mikimasi.
1Samuel14:1 Tsiku lina Yonatani mwana wa Sauli anawuza mnyamata wake womunyamulira zida zake za nkhondo kuti
1Samuel14:2 Sauli ankakhala mʼmalire a Gibeya pa tsinde pa mtengo wamakangadza ku Migironi. Anthu amene anali naye analipo 600.
1Samuel14:3 Pakati pawo panalinso Ahiya amene ankavala efodi. Iye anali mwana wa Ahitubi
1Samuel14:4 Pa mpata pamene Yonatani ankafuna kudutsa kukafika ku kaboma ka nkhondo ka Afilisti kunali thanthwe lotsetsereka mbali ina ndi lina lotsetsereka mbali inayo. Thanthwe limodzi linkatchedwa Bozezi ndipo linalo linkatchedwa Seni.
1Samuel14:5 Thanthwe limodzi linali chakumpoto kuyangʼanana ndi Mikimasi
1Samuel14:6 Yonatani anawuza mnyamata wake womunyamulira zida uja kuti
1Samuel14:7 Mnyamata uja anati
1Samuel14:8 Yonatani anati
1Samuel14:9 Akatiwuza kuti
1Samuel14:10 Koma akadzati
1Samuel14:11 Choncho awiriwa anadzionetsa ku kaboma ka nkhondo ka Afilisti. Tsono Afilistiwo anati
1Samuel14:12 Anthu a ku kaboma kaja anafuwula kwa Yonatani ndi mnyamata wake uja kuti
1Samuel14:13 Choncho Yonatani anakwera mokwawa
1Samuel14:14 Nthawi yoyambayo Yonatani ndi mnyamata wake uja anapha anthu makumi awiri ndipo anawaphera pa malo ochepa okwanira ngati theka la ekala.
1Samuel14:15 Tsono gulu lonse la ankhondo
1Samuel14:16 Alonda a Sauli a ku Gibeya dziko la Benjamini atangomwaza maso anangoona chigulu cha asilikali chikumwazikana uku ndi uku.
1Samuel14:17 Kenaka Sauli anawawuza anthu amene anali naye kuti
1Samuel14:18 Tsono Sauli anawuza Ahiya kuti
1Samuel14:19 Pamene Sauli amayankhula ndi wansembe
1Samuel14:20 Ndipo Sauli ndi asilikali onse amene anali naye anasonkhana kupita kukamenya nkhondo
1Samuel14:21 Aheberi ena amene kale anali ndi Afilisti mpaka kukakhala ku misasa yawo
1Samuel14:22 Ngakhale Aisraeli amene ankabisala ku dziko lamapiri la Efereimu atamva kuti Afilisti akuthawa
1Samuel14:23 Nkhondo inapitirira mpaka kufika ku Beti-Aveni. Choncho Yehova anapulumutsa Aisraeli tsiku limenelo.
1Samuel14:24 Koma asilikali a Israeli anavutika tsiku limenelo
1Samuel14:25 Gulu lonse la ankhondo linalowa mʼnkhalango mmene munali uchi.
1Samuel14:26 Atalowa mʼnkhalango
1Samuel14:27 Koma Yonatani sanamve kuti abambo ake anawalumbirira anthu aja choncho anatenga ndodo yake imene inali mʼdzanja lake ndipo anayipisa mu chisa cha njuchi. Choncho iye anadya uchiwo ndipo mʼmaso mwake munayera.
1Samuel14:28 Kenaka mmodzi mwa Asilikali anamuwuza kuti
1Samuel14:29 Yonatani anati
1Samuel14:30 Zikanakhala zabwino kwambiri anthuwa akanadya lero zofunkha za adani awo. Zikanatero tikanapha Afilisti ochuluka.”
1Samuel14:31 Tsiku limenelo Aisraeli anapha Afilisti kuchokera ku Mikimasi mpaka ku Ayaloni. Koma Aisraeliwo analefuka kwambiri ndi njala.
1Samuel14:32 Choncho iwo anathamangira pa zofunkha ndipo anatenga nkhosa
1Samuel14:33 Koma anthu ena anawuza Sauli kuti
1Samuel14:34 Kenaka Sauli anati

1Samuel14:38 Choncho Sauli anati
1Samuel14:39 Pali Yehova amene amapulumutsa Israeli

1Samuel14:41 Ndipo Sauli anapemphera kwa Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli kuti

1Samuel14:44 Sauli anati
