1Samuel14:46 Pambuyo pake Sauli analeka kulondola Afilisti
1Samuel14:47 Sauli ali mtsogoleri wa Israeli
1Samuel14:48 Anachita nkhondo mwamphamvu ndi kugonjetsa Aamaleki. Choncho anapulumutsa Aisraeli mʼmanja mwa anthu amene ankawalanda zinthu zawo.
1Samuel14:49 Ana aamuna a Sauli anali Yonatani
1Samuel14:50 Dzina la mkazi wake linali Ahinoamu. Iyeyu anali mwana wa Ahimaazi. Dzina la mkulu wa ankhondo a Sauli linali Abineri mwana wa Neri
1Samuel14:51 Kisi abambo a Sauli ndi Neri abambo a Abineri anali ana a Abieli.
1Samuel14:52 Pa moyo wake wonse
1Samuel15:1 Samueli anawuza Sauli kuti
1Samuel15:2 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
1Samuel15:3 Tsopano pita kathire nkhondo Aamaleki ndi kuwononga kwathunthu zinthu zonse zimene ali nazo. Musakasiyeko munthu ndi mmodzi yemwe. Mukaphe amuna ndi akazi
1Samuel15:4 Kotero Sauli anayitana ankhondo ake nawawerenga ku Telaimu. Ankhondo oyenda pansi analipo 200
1Samuel15:5 Sauli anapita ku mzinda wa Aamaleki nawubisalira mʼkhwawa.
1Samuel15:6 Tsono Sauli anawuza Akeni kuti
1Samuel15:7 Tsono Sauli anakantha Aamaleki kuchokera ku Havila mpaka ku Suri
1Samuel15:8 Sauli anatenga Agagi mfumu ya Aamaleki
1Samuel15:9 Koma Sauli ndi ankhondo ake sanaphe Agagi
1Samuel15:10 Kenaka Yehova anawuza Samueli kuti
1Samuel15:11 “Ine ndikumva chisoni chifukwa ndinayika Sauli kukhala mfumu. Wabwerera mʼmbuyo
1Samuel15:12 Samueli anadzuka mmamawa ndipo anapita kukakumana ndi Sauli. Koma anthu anamuwuza kuti
1Samuel15:13 Samueli atamupeza Sauli
1Samuel15:14 Koma Samueli anati
1Samuel15:15 Sauli anayankha
1Samuel15:16 Koma Samueli anati kwa Sauli
1Samuel15:17 Apo Samueli anati
1Samuel15:18 Ndipo Yehova anakutumani kuti
1Samuel15:19 Chifukwa chiyani simunamvere mawu a Yehova? Chifukwa chiyani munathamangira zofunkha ndi kuchita choyipira Yehova?”
1Samuel15:20 Koma Saulo anawuza Samueli kuti
1Samuel15:21 Koma pa zofunkhazo anthu anatengapo nkhosa
1Samuel15:22 Koma Samueli anayankha kuti
1Samuel15:23 Pakuti kuwukira kuli ngati tchimo lowombeza
1Samuel15:24 Tsono Sauli anati kwa Samueli
1Samuel15:25 Tsopano ndikukupemphani
1Samuel15:26 Koma Samueli anawuza Sauli kuti
1Samuel15:27 Samueli akutembenuka kuti azipita
1Samuel15:28 Samueli anati kwa iye
1Samuel15:29 Mulungu wa ulemerero wa Israeli sanama kapena kusintha maganizo ake; pakuti iye si munthu
1Samuel15:30 Sauli anati
1Samuel15:31 Pamenepo Samueli anabwerera ndi Sauli
1Samuel15:32 Kenaka Samueli anati
1Samuel15:33 Koma Samueli anati
1Samuel15:34 Ndipo Samueli anapita ku Rama
1Samuel15:35 Samueli sanamuonenso Sauli mpaka imfa yake ngakhale kuti ankamulira Sauliyo. Yehova anamva chisoni kuti anasankha Sauli kuti akhale mfumu ya Israeli.
1Samuel16:1 Yehova anati kwa Samueli
1Samuel16:2 Koma Samueli anati
1Samuel16:3 Ukamuyitane Yese ku mwambo wa nsembe
1Samuel16:4 Samueli anachita zimene Yehova ananena
1Samuel16:5 Samueli anayankha kuti
1Samuel16:6 Pamene anafika
1Samuel16:7 Koma Yehova anati kwa Samueli
1Samuel16:8 Kenaka Yese anayitana Abinadabu namubweretsa pamaso pa Samueli. Koma Samueli anati
1Samuel16:9 Ndipo Yese anayitana Sama
1Samuel16:10 Pambuyo pake
1Samuel16:11 Tsono Samueli anafunsa Yese kuti
1Samuel16:12 Choncho anatuma munthu kukamutenga ndipo anabwera naye. Iye anali wofiirira
1Samuel16:13 Samueli anatenga botolo la mafuta ndi kumudzoza pamaso pa abale ake
1Samuel16:14 Nthawi imeneyo Mzimu wa Yehova unamuchokera Sauli
1Samuel16:15 Atumiki a Sauli anati
1Samuel16:16 Ndiyetu
1Samuel16:17 Choncho Sauli anati kwa atumiki ake
1Samuel16:18 Mmodzi mwa antchito ake anati
1Samuel16:19 Ndipo Sauli anatumiza amithenga kwa Yese kukanena kuti
1Samuel16:20 Choncho Yese anatenga bulu namunyamulitsa buledi
1Samuel16:21 Davide anafika kwa Sauli ndipo anayamba ntchito. Sauli anamukonda kwambiri Davide ndipo anamusandutsa wonyamula zida zake za nkhondo.
1Samuel16:22 Kenaka Sauli anatumiza mawu kwa Yese ndi kuti
1Samuel16:23 Nthawi zonse mzimu woyipa wochokera kwa Mulungu umati ukamufikira Sauli
1Samuel17:1 Afilisti anasonkhanitsa ankhondo awo ku Soko mʼdziko la Yuda. Iwo anamanga misasa yawo ku Efesi-Damimu
1Samuel17:2 Sauli ndi Aisraeli anasonkhana namanga misasa mʼchigwa cha Ela ndipo anandandalitsa ankhondo kuti amenyane ndi Afilisti.
1Samuel17:3 Afilisti anali phiri lina ndipo Aisraeli analinso phiri lina
1Samuel17:4 Tsono munthu wina wamphamvu
1Samuel17:5 Iye ankavala chipewa chamkuwa ndi malaya achitsulo olemera makilogalamu 57.
1Samuel17:6 Ankavalanso zokuta miyendo yake zamkuwa
1Samuel17:7 Thunthu la mkondo wake linali ngati mkombero wowombera nsalu
1Samuel17:8 Goliatiyo anayimirira ndi kufuwula kwa ankhondo a Israeli
1Samuel17:9 Ngati angathe kumenyana nane ndi kundipha
1Samuel17:10 Ndipo Mfilisitiyo anati
1Samuel17:11 Atamva mawu a Mfilisitiyo
1Samuel17:12 Davide anali mwana wa munthu wa fuko la Efurati dzina lake Yese amene amachokera ku Betelehemu mʼdziko la Yuda. Yese anali ndi ana aamuna asanu ndi awiri. Pa nthawi ya Sauli nʼkuti ali wokalamba.
1Samuel17:13 Ana atatu oyamba kubadwa a Yese nʼkuti atapita nawo ku nkhondo pamodzi ndi Sauli. Woyamba dzina lake anali Eliabu
1Samuel17:14 Davide ndiye anali mzime. Ana aakulu atatuwo ndiwo anapita ku nkhondo ndi Sauli.
1Samuel17:15 Koma Davide ankapita ku misasa ya Sauli ndi kubwerako kuti azikaweta nkhosa za abambo ake ku Betelehemu.
1Samuel17:16 Kwa masiku makumi anayi
1Samuel17:17 Tsiku lina Yese anawuza mwana wake Davide kuti
1Samuel17:18 Utengerenso wolamulira wa gulu lawo tchizi khumi uyu. Ukaone mmene abale ako akukhalira ndipo ubwere ndi kanthu kosonyeza kuti ali bwino.
1Samuel17:19 Sauli
1Samuel17:20 Mʼmamawa mwake Davide anasiya nkhosa mʼmanja mwa munthu wina ndipo anatenga zakudyazo nanyamuka monga momwe Yese abambo ake anamulamulira. Anakafika ku misasa pamene asilikali ankapita kukandanda pa mzere ku nkhondo
1Samuel17:21 Aisraeli ndi Afilisti anandanda pa mzere wankhondo moyangʼanana.
1Samuel17:22 Tsono Davide anasiyira zakudya zija munthu wosunga katundu nathamangira kumene kunali ankhondo kuja ndi kukalonjera abale ake.
1Samuel17:23 Pamene iye ankayankhula nawo anangoona Goliati wa ku Gati uja akuchoka pa mzere wa Afilisti akufuwula mawu onyoza monga mwa masiku onse
1Samuel17:24 Aisraeli ataona munthuyo
1Samuel17:25 Ndipo Aisraeli ankanena kuti
1Samuel17:26 Davide anafunsa anthu amene anayima pafupi naye kuti
1Samuel17:27 Anthu anamuwuzanso zonse zimene mfumu inanena kuti idzachitira munthu amene adzapha Mfilisitiyo.
1Samuel17:28 Eliabu
1Samuel17:29 Davide anati
1Samuel17:30 Ndipo anamuchokera napita kwa munthu wina ndipo anamufunsa nkhani yomweyo
1Samuel17:31 Mawu amene Davide anayankhula atamveka
1Samuel17:32 Davide anati kwa Sauli
1Samuel17:33 Sauli anayankha Davide kuti
1Samuel17:34 Koma Davide anati kwa Sauli
1Samuel17:35 ine ndinkatsatira ndi kupha chirombocho. Choncho ndinkapulumutsa mwana wankhosa uja mʼkamwa mwake. Ndipo chinkati chikandiwukira
1Samuel17:36 Ine kapolo wanu ndinapha mkango ngakhalenso chimbalangondo. Tsono Mfilisiti wosachita mdulidweyu adzaphedwa monga zinazo chifukwa wanyoza ankhondo a Mulungu wamoyo.
1Samuel17:37 Yehova amene anandilanditsa mʼkamwa mwa mkango ndi chimbalangondo adzandilanditsa mʼmanja mwa Mfilisiti uyu.” Sauli anati kwa Davide
1Samuel17:38 Ndipo Sauli anamveka Davide mwinjiro wake. Anamuveka zovala zankhondo ndi chipewa cha mkuwa.
1Samuel17:39 Davide anamangirira lupanga pa mwinjirowo. Atayesa kuyenda nazo
1Samuel17:40 Pambuyo pake anatenga ndodo yake mʼmanja. Kenaka anasankha miyala yosalala bwino mu mtsinje ndi kuyiika mʼthumba lake la ku ubusa. Legeni ili mʼmanja mwake
1Samuel17:41 Tsono Mfilisiti uja anayambapo kupita kumene kunali Davide
1Samuel17:42 Mfilisitiyo atangomuona Davide
1Samuel17:43 Iye anati kwa Davide
1Samuel17:44 Iye anatinso
1Samuel17:45 Koma Davide anati kwa Mfilisitiyo
1Samuel17:46 Anatinso lero lino Yehova adzakupereka mʼmanja mwanga. Ndidzakukantha ndi kudula mutu wako. Ndidzapereka mitembo ya asilikali a Afilisti kwa mbalame za mlengalenga
1Samuel17:47 Onse amene asonkhana pano adzadziwa kuti Mulungu sapulumutsa anthu ndi lupanga kapena mkondo
1Samuel17:48 Mfilisitiyo akusendera pafupi kuti akumane naye
1Samuel17:49 Davideyo anapisa dzanja lake mʼthumba lake natengamo mwala ndipo anawuponya
1Samuel17:50 Kotero Davide anamupambana Mfilisitiyo pomugenda ndi mwala wa legeni ndi kumupha. Mʼmanja mwa Davide munalibe lupanga.
1Samuel17:51 Davide anathamanga nakayimirira pamwamba pa Mfilisiti uja. Anasolola lupanga lake lomwe moyikamo mwake
1Samuel17:52 Ndipo Aisraeli ndi anthu a ku Yuda ananyamuka
1Samuel17:53 Aisraeli anabwerako kothamangitsa Afilisti kuja ndipo anadzatenga zonse zimene zinali mʼmisasa ya Afilistiwo.
1Samuel17:54 Pambuyo pake Davide anatenga mutu wa Mfilisitiyo napita nawo ku Yerusalemu
1Samuel17:55 Sauli ataona Davide akupita kukakumana ndi Mfilisitiyo anafunsa Abineri
1Samuel17:56 Mfumu inati
1Samuel17:57 Davide atangobwerako kokapha Mfilisiti kuja
1Samuel17:58 Sauli anamufunsa
1Samuel18:1 Davide atatha kuyankhula ndi Sauli
1Samuel18:2 Choncho Sauli anamusunga Davideyo kuyambira tsiku limenelo ndipo sanamulole kuti abwerere ku nyumba ya abambo ake.
1Samuel18:3 Ndipo Yonatani anapanga pangano ndi Davide chifukwa ankamukonda monga momwe ankadzikondera.
1Samuel18:4 Yonatani anavula mkanjo umene anavala ndipo anamupatsa Davide pamodzi ndi zovala za nkhondo
1Samuel18:5 Davide ankapita kulikonse kumene Sauli ankamutuma kuti apite kukamenya nkhondo
1Samuel18:6 Anthu akubwerera kwawo Davide atapha Mfilisiti uja
1Samuel18:7 Amayiwo ankalandizana nyimbo mokondwera namati: “Sauli wapha 1
1Samuel18:8 Koma Sauli anapsa mtima kwambiri ndipo mawu amenewa anamuyipira. Iye anati
1Samuel18:9 Ndipo kuyambira tsiku limeneli Sauli ankamuchitira nsanje Davide.
1Samuel18:10 Mmawa mwake mzimu woyipa uja unabwera mwamphamvu pa Sauli. Sauli anayamba kubwebweta mʼnyumba mwake. Davide ankamuyimbira zeze monga nthawi zonse. Sauli anali ndi mkondo mʼdzanja lake.
1Samuel18:11 Tsono anawuponya mkondowo
1Samuel18:12 Pambuyo pake Sauli amamuopa Davide chifukwa Yehova anali ndi Davideyo
1Samuel18:13 Kotero Sauli anamuchotsa Davide pamaso pake ndi kumuyika kukhala mtsogoleri wa ankhondo 1
1Samuel18:14 Davide ankapambana kwambiri pa chilichonse chimene amachita chifukwa Yehova anali naye.
1Samuel18:15 Sauli ataona momwe Davide ankapambanira
1Samuel18:16 Koma Aisraeli onse ndi anthu a Yuda ankamukonda Davide chifukwa ankawatsogolera pa nkhondo zawo.
1Samuel18:17 Tsiku lina Sauli anawuza Davide kuti
1Samuel18:18 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Sauli
1Samuel18:19 Koma pa nthawi yoti Merabi mwana wa Sauli akwatiwe ndi Davide
1Samuel18:20 Koma Mikala mwana wamkazi wa Sauli anamukonda Davide ndipo Sauli atamva za zimenezi
1Samuel18:21 Sauli ankaganiza kuti
1Samuel18:22 Sauli analamulanso nduna zake kuti
1Samuel18:23 Iwo anakamuwuza Davide mawu amenewa
1Samuel18:24 Nduna za Sauli zinamuwuza zonse zimene anayankha Davide.
1Samuel18:25 Sauli anayankha kuti
1Samuel18:26 Nduna za Saulizo zitamuwuza Davide zimenezi
1Samuel18:27 Davide ndi anyamata ake anapita ndi kukapha Afilisti 200. Iye anabwera ndi timakungu tija natipereka tonse kwa mfumu kuti akhale mpongozi wa mfumu. Kotero Sauli anapereka mwana wake wamkazi
1Samuel18:28 Sauli atazindikira kuti Yehova anali ndi Davide ndiponso kuti mwana wake Mikala amamukonda Davide
1Samuel18:29 iye anapitirirabe kumuopa Davide ndi kumadana naye moyo wake wonse.
1Samuel18:30 Nthawi zonse pamene atsogoleri a Afilisti ankatuluka kukamenya nkhondo
1Samuel19:1 Sauli anawuza mwana wake Yonatani ndi nduna zake zonse kuti aphe Davide. Koma Yonatani amamukonda kwambiri Davide.
1Samuel19:2 Choncho anawuza Davide kuti
1Samuel19:3 Ine ndidzapita ndi kukayima pafupi ndi abambo anga ku munda kumene iwe ukabisale. Ndipo ndidzayankhula ndi abambo anga za iwe ndipo chilichonse chimene ndikamve ndidzakuwuza.”
1Samuel19:4 Tsono Yonatani anakanena zabwino za Davide kwa abambo ake Sauli ndipo anati
1Samuel19:5 Iye anayika moyo wake pa chiswe pamene anapha Mfilisiti uja. Choncho Yehova anachita zazikulu popambanitsa Aisraeli pa nkhondo. Inu munaona zonsezo ndipo munakondwera. Nanga nʼchifukwa chiyani mukufuna kuchimwira munthu wosalakwa pofuna kupha Davide?”
1Samuel19:6 Sauli anamvera mawu a Yonatani ndipo analumbira kuti
1Samuel19:7 Pambuyo pake Yonatani anayitana Davide namuwuza zonsezi. Choncho Yonatani anabwera naye Davide kwa Sauli ndipo ankamutumikira Sauliyo monga kale.
1Samuel19:8 Panabukanso nkhondo ina ndipo Davide anapita ndi kukamenyana ndi Afilisti. Iye anawakantha mwamphamvu kotero kuti Afilisti anathawa.
1Samuel19:9 Tsiku lina mzimu woyipa uja unafikanso pa Sauli. Nthawi imeneyi nʼkuti Sauli uja ali mʼnyumba mwake
1Samuel19:10 Sauli anafuna kumubaya Davide ndi kumukhomera kukhoma
1Samuel19:11 Usiku womwewo Sauli anatumiza anthu ku nyumba ya Davide kuti akamubisalire ndi kumupha mmamawa. Koma Mikala mkazi wake anamuchenjeza nati
1Samuel19:12 Choncho Mikala anamutulutsira Davide pa zenera
1Samuel19:13 Kenaka Mikala anatenga fano naligoneka pa bedi nayika pilo wa ubweya wa mbuzi ku mutu kwa fanolo ndipo analifunditsa nsalu.
1Samuel19:14 Pamene amithenga a Sauli aja anafika kuti akamugwire Davide
1Samuel19:15 Koma Sauli anatumanso anthuwo kuti akamuone Davide
1Samuel19:16 Koma pamene anthuwo analowa
1Samuel19:17 Tsono Sauli anafunsa Mikala kuti
1Samuel19:18 Choncho Davide anathawa napulumuka. Pambuyo pake anapita kwa Samueli ku Rama nakamuwuza zonse zimene Sauli anamuchita. Kenaka iye ndi Samueli anapita kukakhala ku Nayoti.
1Samuel19:19 Sauli anamva kuti
1Samuel19:20 Choncho iye anatumiza anthu kuti akamugwire Davide. Koma anaona gulu la aneneri likulosera ndi Samueli akuwatsogolera. Pomwepo Mzimu wa Mulungu unawafikira ndipo nawonso anayamba kulosera.
1Samuel19:21 Sauli atamva zimenezi anatumizanso anthu ena
1Samuel19:22 Pomaliza Sauli mwini wake ananyamuka kupita ku Rama ndipo anafika ku chitsime chachikulu cha ku Seku. Ndipo anafunsa
1Samuel19:23 Choncho Sauli anapita ku Nayoti ku Rama. Koma Mzimu wa Mulungu unafikanso pa iye ndipo ankalosa akuyenda mpaka anafika ku Nayoti.
1Samuel19:24 Nayenso anavula zovala zake nayamba kulosa pamaso pa Samueli. Kenaka anagona wamaliseche tsiku lonse ndi usiku wonse. Nʼchifukwa chake anthu amati
1Samuel20:1 Tsono Davide anathawa ku Nayoti ku Rama ndi kupita kwa Yonatani ndipo anamufunsa kuti
1Samuel20:2 Yonatani anayankha kuti
1Samuel20:3 Koma Davide analumbira kuti
1Samuel20:4 Yonatani anawuza Davide kuti
1Samuel20:5 Ndipo Davide anati
1Samuel20:6 Ngati abambo ako akafunsa za ine
1Samuel20:7 Akanena kuti
1Samuel20:8 Koma undikomere mtima ine mtumiki wako
1Samuel20:9 Yonatani anati
1Samuel20:10 Davide anafunsa kuti
1Samuel20:11 Yonatani anawuza Davide kuti
1Samuel20:12 Kenaka Yonatani anawuza Davide kuti
1Samuel20:13 Koma ngati abambo anga atsimikiza kukuchita choyipa
1Samuel20:14 Ndikakhalabe ndi moyo udzandionetse kukoma mtima monga kwa Yehova nthawi yonse ya moyo wanga
1Samuel20:15 Ndipo usadzaleke kuchitira chifundo banja langa. Pamene Yehova adzawatha adani onse a Davide pa dziko lapansi.”
1Samuel20:16 “Dzina la ine Yonatani lisadzafafanizidwe nawo pamodzi. Yehova alange adani onse a Davide.”
1Samuel20:17 Kenaka Yonatani anamulumbiritsanso Davide kuti asaleke kumukonda
1Samuel20:18 Kenaka Yonatani anawuzanso Davide kuti
1Samuel20:19 Mkuja adzakufunafuna. Tsono udzapite pamalo pamene unabisala poyamba paja ndipo ukadikire pa mulu wa miyala uli apowo.
1Samuel20:20 Ine ndidzaponya mivi itatu pambali pake
1Samuel20:21 Ndipo ndidzatuma mnyamata ndi kuti
1Samuel20:22 Koma ndikadzati
1Samuel20:23 Tsono zimene tapanganazi Yehova ndiye mboni pakati pa iwe ndi ine mpaka muyaya.”
1Samuel20:24 Choncho Davide anakabisala mʼmunda ndipo nthawi ya chikondwerero cha mwezi watsopano itakwana mfumu Sauli anadzakhala pansi kuti adye.
1Samuel20:25 Iye anakhala pa malo ake a nthawi zonse pafupi ndi khoma moyangʼanana ndi Yonatani
1Samuel20:26 Sauli sananene chilichonse tsiku limenelo pakuti ankaganiza kuti “Chilipo chimene chachitika ndi Davide. Mwina mwake ngosayenera za chipembedzo.”
1Samuel20:27 Koma pa tsiku lachiwiri la chikondwerero cha mwezi watsopano pamalo pa Davide panalibenso munthu. Kenaka Sauli anafunsa Yonatani kuti
1Samuel20:28 Yonatani anayankha kuti
1Samuel20:29 Anati
1Samuel20:30 Sauli anamupsera mtima Yonatani ndipo namuwuza kuti
1Samuel20:31 Mwana wa Yese akakhala ndi moyo pa dziko lapansi lino
1Samuel20:32 Yonatani anafunsa abambo ake kuti
1Samuel20:33 Apo Sauli anamuponyera mkondo wake kuti amuphe. Tsono Yonatani anadziwa kuti abambo ake atsimikiza mtima kuti aphe Davide.
1Samuel20:34 Yonatani anachoka pa tebulopo ali wopsa mtima kwambiri. Tsiku lachiwiri la chikondwererocho Yonatani sanadye chakudya. Iye anawawidwa mtima chifukwa abambo ake anatsimikiza zakupha Davide.
1Samuel20:35 Tsono mmawa Yonatani anapita ku munda kumene anapangana ndi Davide. Anali ndi mnyamata wake.
1Samuel20:36 Tsono anawuza mnyamatayo kuti
1Samuel20:37 Mnyamatayo atafika pamene muvi wa Yonatani unagwera
1Samuel20:38 Yonatani anayitananso mnyamatayo kuti
1Samuel20:39 (Mnyamatayo sanadziwe chimene chimachitika koma Yonatani ndi Davide ndiwo ankadziwa).
1Samuel20:40 Pambuyo pake Yonatani anapereka zida zake za nkhondo kwa mnyamatayo ndipo anati
1Samuel20:41 Mnyamatayo anapita. Kenaka Davide anatuluka ku mbali ina ya mulu wa miyala uja
1Samuel20:42 Yonatani anawuza Davide kuti
1Samuel21:1 Davide anapita ku Nobi kwa wansembe Ahimeleki. Ahimelekiyo ankanjenjemera pamene ankamuchingamira
1Samuel21:2 Davide anayankha Ahimeleki kuti
1Samuel21:3 Kodi muli ndi chakudya? Patseniko malofu a buledi asanu
1Samuel21:4 Koma wansembeyo anamuyankha Davide kuti
1Samuel21:5 Davide anayankha kuti
1Samuel21:6 Choncho wansembe uja anamupatsa buledi wachipembedzo popeza kunalibeko buledi wina aliyense koma yekhayo amene amaperekedwa kwa Yehova. Uyu ndi amene anachotsedwa tsiku limenelo kuti ayikepo wina wotentha.
1Samuel21:7 Koma tsiku limenelo mmodzi wa antchito a Sauli anali pomwepo kudikirira kuti achite mwambo wa chipembedzo mʼnyumba ya Mulungu. Munthuyu dzina lake anali Doegi Mwedomu
1Samuel21:8 Davide anafunsa Ahimeleki kuti
1Samuel21:9 Wansembeyo anayankha kuti
1Samuel21:10 Tsiku lomwelo Davide ananyamuka kuthawa Sauli ndipo anapita kwa Akisi
1Samuel21:11 Koma nduna za Akisi zinafunsa mfumuyo kuti
1Samuel21:12 Mawu amenewa anamulowa kwambiri Davide mu mtima ndipo anayamba kuopa kwambiri Akisi mfumu ya ku Gati.
1Samuel21:13 Choncho anasintha makhalidwe ake pamaso pawo
1Samuel21:14 Akisi anawuza nduna zake kuti
1Samuel21:15 Kodi ine ndikusowa anthu amisala kuti muzibwera naye munthuyu kwa ine kuti azidzachita zamisala zake pamaso panga? Kodi munthu ameneyu nʼkulowa mʼnyumba mwanga?”
1Samuel22:1 Davide anachoka kumeneko nathawira ku phanga la Adulamu. Abale ake ndi banja lonse la abambo ake anamva izi
1Samuel22:2 Ndipo aliyense amene anali pa mavuto
1Samuel22:3 Kuchokera kumeneko Davide anapita ku Mizipa ku Mowabu ndipo anapempha mfumu ya Mowabu kuti
1Samuel22:4 Choncho iye anawasiya kwa mfumu ya Mowabu ndipo anakhala naye nthawi yonse imene Davide ankabisala ku phanga kuja.
1Samuel22:5 Koma mneneri Gadi anawuza Davide kuti
1Samuel22:6 Tsono Sauli anamva kuti Davide ndi anthu ake apezeka. Nthawiyo nʼkuti Sauli atakhala pansi pa mtengo wa bwemba pa phiri la ku Gibeya
1Samuel22:7 Tsono Sauli anafunsa ankhondo ake aja kuti
1Samuel22:8 Mwinatu nʼchifukwa chake mwagwirizana zondichita chiwembu. Palibe amene anandiwuza pamene mwana wanga ankapanga pangano ndi mwana wa Yese. Palibe aliyense amene ankalabadirako za ine kapena kundiwuza kuti mwana wanga wautsa mtima wa wantchito wanga kuti andiwukire monga wachitira lero.”
1Samuel22:9 Koma Doegi Mwedomu anayima pafupi ndi nduna za Sauli nati
1Samuel22:10 Ahimelekiyo anafunsa kwa Yehova chomwe Davide ayenera kuchita. Iye anamupatsa zakudya ndiponso lupanga la Goliati Mfilisiti uja.”
1Samuel22:11 Pamenepo mfumu inayitanitsa wansembe Ahimeleki mwana wa Ahitubi ndi banja lonse la abambo ake
1Samuel22:12 Sauli anati
1Samuel22:13 Sauli anamufunsa kuti
1Samuel22:14 Ahimeleki anayankha mfumu kuti
1Samuel22:15 Kodi tsiku limeneli linali loyamba kuti ndimufunsire kwa Yehova? Ayi sichoncho! Mfumu musandinenere kanthu kalikonse koyipa kapena banja la abambo anga
1Samuel22:16 Koma mfumu inati
1Samuel22:17 Kenaka mfumu inalamulira alonda amene anali naye kuti
1Samuel22:18 Kotero mfumu inalamula Doegi kuti
1Samuel22:19 Kunena za Nobi
1Samuel22:20 Koma Abiatara mwana wa Ahimeleki mwana wa Ahitubi anapulumuka ndi kuthawira kwa Davide.
1Samuel22:21 Abiatara anawuza Davide kuti Sauli wapha ansembe a Yehova.
1Samuel22:22 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Abiatara
1Samuel22:23 Iwe khala ndi ine
1Samuel23:1 Davide atawuzidwa kuti “Onani
1Samuel23:2 anafunsa Yehova kuti
1Samuel23:3 Koma anthu amene anali ndi Davide anati
1Samuel23:4 Davide anafunsanso Yehova
1Samuel23:5 Choncho Davide ndi anthu ake anapita ku Keila kukamenyana ndi Afilisti. Anapha Afilisti ambiri ndi kutenga ziweto zawo. Choncho anapulumutsa anthu a ku Keila.
1Samuel23:6 (Pamene Abiatara mwana wa Ahimeleki anathawira kwa Davide anabwera ndi efodi mʼmanja mwake).
1Samuel23:7 Sauli atamva kuti Davide wapita ku Keila anati
1Samuel23:8 Choncho Sauli anasonkhanitsa ankhondo ake nawatuma ku Keila kuti akamuzungulire Davide ndi anthu ake.
1Samuel23:9 Davide atadziwa kuti Sauli akufuna kumuchita chiwembu
1Samuel23:10 Tsono Davide anayankhula ndi Yehova kuti
1Samuel23:11 Kodi anthu a Keila adzandipereka mʼmanja mwa Sauli? Kodi Sauli abweradi monga ndamvera ine mtumiki wanu? Inu Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli
1Samuel23:12 Davide anafunsanso
1Samuel23:13 Choncho Davide ndi anthu ake
1Samuel23:14 Davide ankakhala mʼmapanga mʼdziko lamapiri ku chipululu cha Zifi. Sauli ankamufufuza tsiku ndi tsiku
1Samuel23:15 Davide anaona kuti Sauli akufunafuna kuti amuphe. Nthawiyi nʼkuti Davide ali mʼchipululu cha Zifi ku Horesi.
1Samuel23:16 Ndipo Yonatani mwana wa Sauli anapita kwa Davide ku Horesi ndipo anamulimbitsa mtima pomuwuza kuti Yehova ali naye.
1Samuel23:17 Iye anamuwuza kuti
1Samuel23:18 Awiriwa anachita pangano pamaso pa Yehova. Ndipo Yonatani anabwerera kwawo
1Samuel23:19 Anthu a ku Zifi anapita kwa Sauli ku Gibeya ndipo anamuwuza kuti
1Samuel23:20 Tsopano inu
1Samuel23:21 Sauli anayankha kuti
1Samuel23:22 Pitani mukatsimikizire. Mukaone kumene amakhala ndiponso mupeze munthu amene wamuona. Anthu amandiwuza kuti ndi wochenjera kwambiri.
1Samuel23:23 Kafufuzeni ndithu malo onse kumene amabisalako
1Samuel23:24 Kotero iwo ananyamuka ndi kupita ku Zifi
1Samuel23:25 Sauli ndi anthu ake anapita kukamufufuza Davide. Koma Davide atamva izi anathawa ndi kukabisala ku thanthwe la chipululu cha Maoni. Sauli atamva kuti Davide anathawira ku Maoni anamutsatira ku chipululu komweko.
1Samuel23:26 Sauli amayenda mbali ina ya phirilo
1Samuel23:27 Nthawi yomweyo munthu wina wamthenga anabwera kudzamuwuza Sauli kuti
1Samuel23:28 Choncho Sauli analeka kuthamangitsa Davide ndipo anapita kukamenyana ndi Afilisti. Nʼchifukwa chake malowa amatchedwa Mwala wa Malekano.
1Samuel23:29 Ndipo Davide anachoka kumeneko ndi kukakhala ku mapanga a ku Eni Gedi.
1Samuel24:1 Sauli atabwera kuchokera kumene amathamangitsa Afilisti anamva kuti
1Samuel24:2 Tsono Sauli anatenga asilikali 3
1Samuel24:3 Iye anafika ku makola a nkhosa amene anali mʼmbali mwa njira. Kumeneko kunali phanga
1Samuel24:4 Tsono anthu a Davide anamuwuza kuti
1Samuel24:5 Atachita izi
1Samuel24:6 Tsono anawuza anthu ake kuti
1Samuel24:7 Choncho Davide anabweza mitima ya anthu ake ndi mawu amenewa
1Samuel24:8 Kenaka Davide anatuluka mʼphanga muja ndipo anayitana Sauli
1Samuel24:9 Anafunsa Sauli kuti
1Samuel24:10 Lero lino inu mwadzionera nokha kuti Yehova anakuperekani mʼmanja mwanga mʼphanga muja. Ena anandiwuza kuti ndikupheni
1Samuel24:11 Tsono abambo anga
1Samuel24:12 Yehova aweruze pakati pa inu ndi ine
1Samuel24:13 Paja anthu akale anati
1Samuel24:14 “Kodi mfumu ya Israeli yadzalondola yani. Inu mukuthamangitsa yani? Galu wakufa kodi? Nsabwe kodi?
1Samuel24:15 Nʼchifukwa chake Yehova agamule
1Samuel24:16 Davide atatsiriza kuyankhula mawu awa
1Samuel24:17 Anawuza Davide kuti
1Samuel24:18 Iweyo lero lino wandifotokozera zabwino zimene wandichitira. Yehova anandipereka mʼdzanja lako koma iwe sunandiphe.
1Samuel24:19 Kodi munthu atapeza mdani wake angamulole kuti apite wosamuvulaza? Motero Yehova akuchitire iwe zabwino chifukwa cha zimene wandichitira lerozi.
1Samuel24:20 Ona tsono
1Samuel24:21 Tsopano undilonjeze molumbira lero mʼdzina la Yehova kuti sudzapha zidzukulu zanga ine nditamwalira kapena kufuta dzina langa pa banja la makolo anga.”
1Samuel24:22 Choncho Davide analumbira pamaso pa Sauli. Pambuyo pake Sauli anabwerera kwawo
1Samuel25:1 Samueli anamwalira
1Samuel25:2 Kunali munthu wina wolemera kwambiri ku Maoni amene malo ake a ntchito anali ku Karimeli. Iyeyu anali ndi mbuzi 1
1Samuel25:3 Dzina lake linali Nabala ndipo anali wa fuko la Kalebe. Dzina la mkazi wake linali Abigayeli. Anali mkazi wanzeru ndi wokongola
1Samuel25:4 Davide anamva akanali ku chipululu kuti Nabala akumeta nkhosa.
1Samuel25:5 Choncho anatuma anyamata khumi nawawuza kuti
1Samuel25:6 Mukamuwuze kuti
1Samuel25:7 “ ‘Tsono ndamva kuti muli ndi anthu ometa nkhosa. Pamene abusa anu anali nafe kuno
1Samuel25:8 Muwafunse antchito anu ndipo akuwuzani. Kotero akomereni mtima anyamata anga
1Samuel25:9 Anyamata a Davide aja atafika
1Samuel25:10 Nabala anayankha anyamata a Davide kuti
1Samuel25:11 Nditengerenji buledi
1Samuel25:12 Choncho anyamata a Davide aja anatembenuka nabwerera. Atafika anafotokozera Davide mawu onse a Nabala.
1Samuel25:13 Davide anawuza anthu ake kuti
1Samuel25:14 Tsono mmodzi mwa antchito anawuza Abigayeli mkazi wa Nabala kuti
1Samuel25:15 Komatu anthuwa anatichitira zabwino kwambiri. Sanatizunze
1Samuel25:16 Ankatitchinjiriza ngati mpanda usiku ndi usana nthawi yonse tinkaweta nkhosa.
1Samuel25:17 Tsono onani chimene mungachite
1Samuel25:18 Ndipo Abigayeli sanataye nthawi. Iye anatenga malofu a buledi 200
1Samuel25:19 Kenaka anawuza antchito ake kuti
1Samuel25:20 Mayi uja atakwera pa bulu wake ndi kufika pa tsinde la phiri
1Samuel25:21 Nthawiyi nʼkuti Davide atanena kuti
1Samuel25:22 Mulungu andilange kwambiri ngati pofika mmawa nditakhale nditasiyako ngakhale munthu mmodzi mwa onse amene ali nawo.”
1Samuel25:23 Abigayeli ataona Davide
1Samuel25:24 Ali chigonere choncho pa mapazi a Davide anati
1Samuel25:25 Mbuye wanga musasamale za mwamuna wanga Nabala
1Samuel25:26 Tsono mbuye wanga muli apa
1Samuel25:27 Choncho
1Samuel25:28 Chonde khululukani zolakwa za ine mdzakazi wanu. Ndithu Yehova adzakhazikitsa banja la mbuye wanga mu ufumu
1Samuel25:29 Ngati munthu wina akuwukirani ndi kukulondani
1Samuel25:30 Yehova adzakuchitirani mbuye wanga zabwino zonse zimene anakulonjezani. Adzakuyikani kukhala wolamulira Aisraeli.
1Samuel25:31 Zikadzatero
1Samuel25:32 Tsono Davide anawuza Abigayeli kuti
1Samuel25:33 Yehova akudalitseni chifukwa cha nzeru zanu pondiletsa lero kuti ndisakhetse magazi ndi kubwezera adani anga ndi manja anga.
1Samuel25:34 Kunena zoona
1Samuel25:35 Ndipo Davide analandira kwa mayiyo zimene anamutengera ndipo anati
1Samuel25:36 Abigayeli atabwerera kwa Nabala anamupeza ali mʼnyumba akuchita mphwando ngati la mfumu. Iye anali atakondwa kwambiri popeza anali ataledzera kwambiri. Choncho mkazi wakeyo sanamuwuze kalikonse mpaka mmawa kutacha.
1Samuel25:37 Tsono mmawa
1Samuel25:38 Patapita masiku khumi
1Samuel25:39 Pamene Davide anamva kuti Nabala wamwalira
1Samuel25:40 Anyamata a Davide atafika ku Karimeli anawuza Abigayeli kuti
1Samuel25:41 Abigayeli anagwada nagunditsa nkhope yake pansi ndipo anati
1Samuel25:42 Motero Abigayeli ananyamuka mofulumira nakwera bulu wake. Tsono iye pamodzi ndi anamwali ake asanu amene ankamutumikira
1Samuel25:43 Davide nʼkuti atakwatiranso Ahinoamu wa ku Yezireeli ndipo onse awiri anali akazi ake.
1Samuel25:44 Koma Sauli anali atakwatitsa Mikala
1Samuel26:1 Anthu a ku Zifi anapita kwa Sauli ku Gibeya nati
1Samuel26:2 Choncho Sauli ananyamuka pamodzi ndi ankhondo ake 3
1Samuel26:3 Sauli anamanga msasa wake mʼmbali mwa njira yopita ku phiri la Hakila moyangʼanana ndi Yesimoni. Koma Davide anali mʼchipululumo. Davide ataona kuti Sauli amamulondola mpaka kumeneko
1Samuel26:4 iye anatumiza anthu okazonda ndipo anapeza kuti Sauli wafikadi ndithu.
1Samuel26:5 Tsono Davide ananyamuka napita kumalo kumene Sauli anamanga misasa. Iye anaona pamene Sauli ndi Abineri mwana wa Neri mkulu wa ankhondo anagona. Sauli anagona mʼkati mwa tenti ndipo asilikali anagona momuzungulira.
1Samuel26:6 Ndipo Davide anafunsa Ahimeleki Mhiti ndi Abisai mwana wa Zeruya
1Samuel26:7 Choncho Davide ndi Abisai anapita ku misasa ya ankhondowo usiku. Atafika anangopeza Sauli ali gone mu msasa wake mkondo wake atawuzika pansi pafupi ndi mutu wake
1Samuel26:8 Abisai anawuza Davide kuti
1Samuel26:9 Koma Davide anamuyankha Abisai kuti
1Samuel26:10 Davide anati
1Samuel26:11 Koma Yehova andiletse kuti ndisapweteke wodzozedwa wa Yehova. Tsopano tingotenga mkondo umene uli ku mutu kwakewo ndi botolo la madzilo ndipo tizipita.”
1Samuel26:12 Motero Davide anatenga mkondo ndi botolo lamadzi zimene zinali ku mutu kwa Sauli ndipo anachoka. Palibe amene anaona zimenezi kapena kudziwa
1Samuel26:13 Pambuyo pake Davide anadutsa nakakwerera mbali ina ya phiri
1Samuel26:14 Davide anayitana gulu lankhondo ndi Abineri mwana wa Neri nawafunsa kuti
1Samuel26:15 Davide anamufunsa Abineri kuti
1Samuel26:16 Chimene wachita iwe si chabwino. Pali Yehova wamoyo iwe ndi asilikali ako muyenera kufa chifukwa simunateteze mbuye wanu
1Samuel26:17 Sauli anazindikira mawu a Davide ndipo anafunsa kuti
1Samuel26:18 Nʼchifukwa chiyani mbuye wanga mukundilonda ine mtumiki wanu? Kodi ine ndachita chiyani ndipo ndapezeka ndi cholakwa chotani?
1Samuel26:19 Tsopano mbuye wanga mfumu tamverani mawu a mtumiki wanu. Ngati ndi Yehova wautsa mtima wanu kuti mundiwukire
1Samuel26:20 Tsopano musalole kuti magazi anga akhetsedwe kutali ndi Yehova pakuti mfumu ya Israeli yatuluka kudzafunafuna ine nsabwe
1Samuel26:21 Ndipo Sauli anati
1Samuel26:22 Davide anayankha kuti
1Samuel26:23 Yehova amadalitsa munthu aliyense wolungama ndi wokhulupirika. Yehova anakuperekani lero mʼmanja mwanga
1Samuel26:24 Monga momwe ine lero ndachitira kuwuyesa moyo wanu ngati wamtengowapatali
1Samuel26:25 Ndipo Sauli anawuza Davide kuti
1Samuel27:1 Davide anaganiza mu mtima mwake nati
1Samuel27:2 Choncho Davide ndi anthu 600 amene anali nawo anachoka napita kwa Akisi mwana wa Maoki mfumu ya ku Gati.
1Samuel27:3 Davide anakhala ndi Akisi ku Gati pamodzi ndi ankhondo ake
1Samuel27:4 Sauli anamva kuti Davide wathawira ku Gati
1Samuel27:5 Kenaka Davide anawuza Akisi kuti
1Samuel27:6 Choncho tsiku limenelo Akisi anamupatsa Zikilagi ndipo mzindawo wakhala wa mafumu a Yuda mpaka lero.
1Samuel27:7 Davide anakhala mʼdziko la Afilisti kwa chaka chimodzi ndi miyezi inayi.
1Samuel27:8 Tsono Davide ndi anthu ake ankapita kukathira nkhondo Agesuri
1Samuel27:9 Davide ankati akathira nkhondo dera lina
1Samuel27:10 Akisi akafunsa kuti
1Samuel27:11 Davide sankasiya mwamuna kapena mkazi wamoyo kuti akafotokozere anthu a ku Gati zochitikazo kuopa kuti opulumukawo akhoza kudzanena kuti “Davide watichita zakutizakuti.” Tsono izi ndi zimene Davide ankachita pamene ankakhala mʼdziko la Afilisti.
1Samuel27:12 Akisi ankamukhulupirira Davide ndipo ankati mu mtima mwake
1Samuel28:1 Mʼmasiku amenewo Afilisti anasonkhanitsa ankhondo awo kuti akamenyane ndi Aisraeli. Akisi anawuza Davide kuti
1Samuel28:2 Davide anayankha kuti
1Samuel28:3 Nthawi imeneyi nʼkuti Samueli atamwalira
1Samuel28:4 Tsono Afilisti anasonkhana nabwera kudzamanga misasa yawo ku Sunemu. Nayenso Sauli anasonkhanitsa Aisraeli onse ndi kumanga misasa yawo ku Gilibowa.
1Samuel28:5 Sauli ataona gulu lankhondo la Afilisti anaopa ndipo ananjenjemera kwambiri.
1Samuel28:6 Choncho Sauli anafunsa nzeru kwa Yehova koma Yehova sanamuyankhe ngakhale kudzera mʼmaloto
1Samuel28:7 Kenaka Sauli anawuza nduna zake kuti
1Samuel28:8 Kotero Sauli anadzizimbayitsa navala zovala zachilendo. Tsono iye pamodzi ndi anthu awiri anapita nakafika kwa mkazi uja usiku
1Samuel28:9 Koma mkaziyo anayankha kuti
1Samuel28:10 Koma Sauli analonjeza mkaziyo molumbira nati
1Samuel28:11 Kenaka mkaziyo anafunsa
1Samuel28:12 Pamene mkaziyo anaona Samueli anakuwa kwambiri
1Samuel28:13 Mfumuyo inamuwuza kuti
1Samuel28:14 Sauli anafunsa
1Samuel28:15 Samueli anafunsa Sauli kuti
1Samuel28:16 Samueli anati
1Samuel28:17 Yehova wakuchita zimene ananeneratu kudzera mwa ine. Yehova wachotsa ufumu mʼmanja mwako ndipo waupereka kwa mnansi wako
1Samuel28:18 Yehova wachita zimenezi lero chifukwa sunamvere mawu ake ndipo sunawawonongeretu Aamaleki.
1Samuel28:19 Yehova adzapereka ndithu iweyo pamodzi ndi Aisraeli kwa Afilisti. Ndipo mmawa iweyo ndi ana ako mudzakhala ndi ine kuno. Ndithu Yehova adzapereka gulu lankhondo la Aisraeli kwa Afilisti.”
1Samuel28:20 Nthawi yomweyo Sauli anagwa pansi atadzazidwa ndi mantha chifukwa cha mawu a Samueli. Analibenso mphamvu
1Samuel28:21 Mkazi uja tsono anasendera kufupi ndi Sauli
1Samuel28:22 Tsono inunso mumvere mawu a mdzakazi wanune. Mundilole kuti ndikupatseni ka buledi pangʼono kuti mukhale ndi mphamvu zoyendera pa ulendo wanu.”
1Samuel28:23 Iye anakana ndipo anati
1Samuel28:24 Mkaziyo anali ndi mwana wangʼombe wonenepa ndipo anamupha mwachangu. Anatenga ufa nawukanyanga ndipo anaphika buledi wopanda yisiti.
1Samuel28:25 Tsono anapereka bulediyo kwa Sauli ndi nduna zake ndipo anadya. Pambuyo pake ananyamuka kupita kwawo usiku womwewo.
1Samuel29:1 Afilisti anasonkhanitsa asilikali awo onse ku Afeki
1Samuel29:2 Pamene atsogoleri a Afilisti ankatsogolera magulu awo ankhondo a miyandamiyanda
1Samuel29:3 Tsono atsogoleri a Afilisti aja anafunsa kuti
1Samuel29:4 Koma atsogoleri a ankhondo a Afilisti anamukwiyira Akisi kwambiri ndipo anati
1Samuel29:5 Paja ameneyu ndi Davide yemwe ankamuvinira namuyimbira kuti
1Samuel29:6 Kotero Akisi anayitana Davide ndipo anamuwuza kuti
1Samuel29:7 Tsono bwerera. Upite mu mtendere kuopa kuti ungachite kanthu kena koyipira atsogoleri a Afilistiwa.”
1Samuel29:8 Davide anafunsa Akisi kuti
1Samuel29:9 Akisi anayankha kuti
1Samuel29:10 Tsono udzuke mmamawa
1Samuel29:11 Choncho Davide ndi anthu ake anadzuka mmamawa kubwerera ku dziko la Afilisti. Koma Afilistiwo anapita ku Yezireeli.
1Samuel30:1 Pa tsiku lachitatu
1Samuel30:2 Anatenga akazi ndi onse amene anali mʼmenemo akuluakulu ndi angʼono omwe kuti akakhale akapolo. Sanaphe aliyense koma anawatenga amoyo napita nawo.
1Samuel30:3 Davide ndi anthu ake atafika ku Zikilagi anapeza kuti mzindawo watenthedwa ndi moto ndipo akazi awo
1Samuel30:4 Kotero Davide ndi anthu ake analira mofuwula mpaka analibenso mphamvu zolirira.
1Samuel30:5 Akazi awiri a Davide
1Samuel30:6 Davide anavutika kwambiri mu mtima mwake chifukwa anthu amakamba zoti amuponye miyala popeza aliyense anali ndi chisoni pokumbukira ana ake aamuna ndi aakazi. Koma Davide anapeza mphamvu mwa Yehova Mulungu wake.
1Samuel30:7 Kenaka Davide anawuza wansembe Abiatara
1Samuel30:8 Tsono Davide anapempha nzeru kwa Yehova nati
1Samuel30:9 Davide pamodzi ndi anthu ake 600 aja ananyamuka nafika ku mtsinje wa Besori. Kumeneko anasiyako anthu ena.
1Samuel30:10 Davide ndi anthu ake 400 anapitirira kuwalondola Aamaleki aja. Koma anthu ena 200 anatsala popeza anatopa moti sakanatha kuwoloka mtsinje wa Besori uja.
1Samuel30:11 Anthu amene anali ndi Davide anapeza Mwigupto mʼmunda wina ndipo anabwera naye kwa Davide. Iwo anamupatsa madzi kuti amwe ndi chakudya kuti adye.
1Samuel30:12 Anamupatsanso chidutswa cha keke yankhuyu ndi makeke awiri a mphesa zowumika kuti adye. Atadya anapezanso mphamvu popeza anakhala masiku atatu wosadya kapena kumwa kanthu kalikonse.
1Samuel30:13 Davide anafunsa kuti
1Samuel30:14 Ife tinathira nkhondo dera la kummwera kwa mayiko a Akereti
1Samuel30:15 Davide anamupempha kuti
1Samuel30:16 Mwigupto uja anaperekeza Davide. Tsono Aamaleki anali atamwazikana ponseponse. Iwo ankadya
1Samuel30:17 Tsono Davide anawakantha kuyambira madzulo atsikulo mpaka madzulo a tsiku linalo. Palibe anapulumuka kupatula anyamata 400 amene anakwera pa ngamira nʼkuthawa.
1Samuel30:18 Choncho Davide analanditsa zinthu zonse zimene Aamaleki aja anatenga. Anapulumutsanso akazi ake awiri aja.
1Samuel30:19 Palibe chimene chinasowa anthu onse
1Samuel30:20 Anapulumutsanso nkhosa ndi ngʼombe zonse. Tsono anthu ankakusa ziwetozo namati
1Samuel30:21 Davide anafika ku malo kumene kunali anthu 200 otopa kwambiri aja amene sanathe kutsagana naye koma anangokhala ku mtsinje wa Besori. Tsono ananyamuka kuti akumane ndi Davide pamodzi ndi anthu amene anali naye. Davide anawayandikira nawalonjera.
1Samuel30:22 Tsono anthu ena oyipa mtima achabechabe mwa amene anatsagana ndi Davide aja anati
1Samuel30:23 Koma Davide anawayankha kuti
1Samuel30:24 Ndani angakumvereni zimene mukunenazi? Gawo la munthu amene anapita kukamenya nkhondo likhale lofanana ndi la munthu amene anatsala pano kuyangʼanira katundu wathu. Pasakhale kusiyana kulikonse.”
1Samuel30:25 Choncho Davide anakhazikitsa ngati lamulo mʼchitidwe woterewu pakati pa Aisraeli kuyambira tsiku limenelo mpaka lero.
1Samuel30:26 Davide atafika ku Zikilagi
1Samuel30:27 Iye anatumiza mphatsozo kwa anthu a ku Beteli
1Samuel30:28 Aroeri
1Samuel30:29 Rakala
1Samuel30:30 a ku Horima
1Samuel30:31 Hebroni pamodzi ndi onse a kumalo kumene Davide ndi anthu ake anakhala akuyendayendako.
1Samuel31:1 Tsono Afilisti anachitanso nkhondo ndi Aisraeli ndipo Aisraeli anathawa Afilistiwo
1Samuel31:2 Afilisti anapanikiza kwambiri Sauli ndi ana ake
1Samuel31:3 Nkhondo inakula kwambiri mozungulira Sauli ndipo pamene anthu amauta anamupeza
1Samuel31:4 Tsono Sauli anawuza mnyamata wake wonyamula zida zake kuti
1Samuel31:5 Mnyamata wonyamula zida zake uja ataona kuti Sauli wafa
1Samuel31:6 Motero Sauli ndi ana ake atatu
1Samuel31:7 Pamene Aisraeli amene anali tsidya lina la chigwa ndi amene anali tsidya la chigwa cha Yorodani anaona kuti gulu la ankhondo la Aisraeli lathawa komanso kuti Sauli ndi ana ake aphedwa
1Samuel31:8 Mmawa mwake
1Samuel31:9 Iwo anadula mutu wake ndi kumuvula zida zake zankhondo. Ndipo anatumiza amithenga mʼdziko lonse la Afilisti kukafalitsa nkhani yabwinoyi kwa mafano awo ndi kwa anthu awo.
1Samuel31:10 Iwo anayika zida zake zankhondo mʼnyumba yopembedzera Asitoreti
1Samuel31:11 Pamene anthu a ku Yabesi Giliyadi anamva zimene Afilisti anachitira Sauli
1Samuel31:12 anthu awo onse olimba mtima anayenda usiku wonse kupita ku Beti-Sani. Anakachotsa mtembo wa Sauli ndi mitembo ya ana ake pa khoma la mzinda wa Beti-Sani
1Samuel31:13 Pambuyo pake anatenga mafupa awo ndi kuwakwirira pansi pa mtengo wabwemba ku Yabesi
2Samuel1:1 Atamwalira Sauli
2Samuel1:2 Pa tsiku lachitatu munthu wina wochokera ku msasa wa Sauli anafika
2Samuel1:3 Davide anamufunsa iye kuti
2Samuel1:4 Davide anafunsa
2Samuel1:5 Ndipo Davide anati kwa mnyamata amene anabweretsa nkhaniyi
2Samuel1:6 Mnyamatayo anati
2Samuel1:7 Pamene anatembenuka ndi kundiona ine
2Samuel1:8 Iye anandifunsa
2Samuel1:9 “Kenaka iye anati kwa ine
2Samuel1:10 “Kotero ndinabwera pafupi ndi kumupha
2Samuel1:11 Apo Davide ndi anthu onse amene anali nawo anangʼamba zovala zawo.
2Samuel1:12 Iwo analira maliro ndi kusala zakudya mpaka madzulo chifukwa cha Sauli ndi mwana wake Yonatani
2Samuel1:13 Davide anati kwa mnyamata amene anabweretsa uthengawo
2Samuel1:14 Davide anamufunsanso kuti
2Samuel1:15 Kenaka Davide anayitana mmodzi mwa anyamata ake ndipo anati
2Samuel1:16 Pakuti Davide anali atanena kwa iye kuti
2Samuel1:17 Davide anayimba nyimbo iyi ya maliro
2Samuel1:18 Ndipo analamula kuti anthu a ku Yuda aphunzitsidwe nyimbo ya maliroyi imene yalembedwa mʼbuku la Yasari:
2Samuel1:19 “Ulemerero wako iwe Israeli
2Samuel1:20 “Musakanene zimenezi ku Gati
2Samuel1:21 “Inu mapiri a ku Gilibowa
2Samuel1:22 “Pa magazi a ophedwa
2Samuel1:23 “Sauli ndi Yonatani
2Samuel1:24 “Inu ana aakazi a Israeli
2Samuel1:25 “Taonani amphamvu agwa ku nkhondo! Yonatani wagona ataphedwa ku zitunda.
2Samuel1:26 Ine ndikuvutika mumtima chifukwa cha iwe mʼbale wanga Yonatani
2Samuel1:27 “Taonani amphamvu agwa! Zida zankhondo zawonongeka!”
2Samuel2:1 Patapita nthawi
2Samuel2:2 Choncho Davide anapita kumeneko ndi akazi ake awiri
2Samuel2:3 Davide anatenganso anthu amene anali nawo aliyense ndi banja lake
2Samuel2:4 Kenaka amuna a ku Yuda anabwera ku Hebroni ndipo kumeneko anadzoza Davide kukhala mfumu ya fuko la Yuda. Davide atawuzidwa kuti anthu a ku Yabesi Giliyadi ndi amene anayika mʼmanda Sauli
2Samuel2:5 iye anatuma amithenga kwa anthu a ku Yabesi Giliyadi kuti akayankhule nawo kuti
2Samuel2:6 Tsopano Yehova akuonetseni kukoma mtima ndi kukhulupirika kwake ndipo inenso ndidzakukomerani mtima chifukwa munachita zimenezi.
2Samuel2:7 Tsopano khalani amphamvu ndi olimba mtima
2Samuel2:8 Pa nthawi imeneyi Abineri mwana wa Neri
2Samuel2:9 Iye anamuyika kuti akhale mfumu yoyangʼanira Giliyadi
2Samuel2:10 Isi-Boseti mwana wa Sauli anali wa zaka makumi anayi pamene anakhala mfumu ya Israeli ndipo analamulira zaka ziwiri. Koma fuko la Yuda linatsatira Davide.
2Samuel2:11 Davide anakhala mfumu ku Hebroni akulamulira fuko la Yuda
2Samuel2:12 Abineri mwana wa Neri
2Samuel2:13 Yowabu mwana wa Zeruya pamodzi ndi ankhondo a Davide anapita ndi kukakumana nawo ku dziwe la ku Gibiyoni. Gulu lina linakhala mbali ina ya dziwelo pamene gulu lina linakhala mbali inayo.
2Samuel2:14 Kenaka Abineri anati kwa Yowabu
2Samuel2:15 Kotero anayimirira ndipo anawawerenga: anyamata khumi ndi awiri a fuko la Benjamini ndi Isi-Boseti mwana wa Sauli ndiponso anyamata khumi ndi awiri a Davide.
2Samuel2:16 Tsono aliyense anagwira mutu wa mnzake namubaya mnzakeyo mʼnthiti ndi mpeni ndipo onse anagwera pansi limodzi. Kotero malo amenewo ku Gibiyoni amatchedwa Helikati Hazurimu.
2Samuel2:17 Tsiku limeneli nkhondo yake inali yoopsa kwambiri
2Samuel2:18 Ana atatu aamuna a Zeruya
2Samuel2:19 Iye anathamangitsa Abineri ndipo sanakhotere kumanja kapena kumanzere pamene amamutsatira.
2Samuel2:20 Abineri anayangʼana mʼmbuyo ndipo anafunsa
2Samuel2:21 Ndipo Abineri anati kwa iye
2Samuel2:22 Abineri anamuchenjezanso Asaheli
2Samuel2:23 Koma iye anakana kuleka kumuthamangitsa. Choncho Abineri anabaya Asaheli mʼmimba ndi msonga ya mkondo wake ndipo mkondowo unatulukira mbali ina. Iye anagwa ndi kufera pamalo pomwepo. Ndipo munthu aliyense amayima akafika pamalo pamene anagwera ndi kufa.
2Samuel2:24 Koma Yowabu ndi Abisai anathamangitsa Abineri
2Samuel2:25 Pamenepo anthu a fuko la Benjamini anasonkhana kudzathandiza Abineri. Iwo anapanga gulu ndipo anayima pamwamba pa phiri.
2Samuel2:26 Abineri anayitana Yowabu
2Samuel2:27 Yowabu anayankha kuti
2Samuel2:28 Chomwecho Yowabu analiza lipenga
2Samuel2:29 Usiku wonsewo Abineri ndi ankhondo ake anayenda kudutsa Araba. Iwo anawoloka Yorodani
2Samuel2:30 Choncho Yowabu anabwerera kuchokera kothamangitsa Abineri ndipo anasonkhanitsa ankhondo ake onse. Kupatula Asaheli
2Samuel2:31 Koma ankhondo a Davide anapha ankhondo a fuko la Benjamini 360 amene anali ndi Abineri.
2Samuel2:32 Iwo anatenga Asaheli ndi kukamuyika mʼmanda a abambo ake ku Betelehemu. Ndipo Yowabu ndi ankhondo ake anayenda usiku wonse ndi kufika ku Hebroni kukucha.
2Samuel3:1 Nkhondo ya pakati pa banja la Sauli ndi banja la Davide inachitika nthawi yayitali. Mphamvu za Davide zinkakulirakulirabe
2Samuel3:2 	Ana aamuna a Davide amene anabadwira ku Hebroni anali awa: Woyamba anali Amnoni
2Samuel3:3 	Mwana wachiwiri anali Kileabu
2Samuel3:4 	wachinayi anali Adoniya
2Samuel3:5 	ndipo wachisanu ndi chimodzi anali Itireamu
2Samuel3:6 Pamene kunali nkhondo pakati pa banja la Sauli ndi banja la Davide
2Samuel3:7 Sauli anali ndi mzikazi dzina lake Rizipa mwana wa Ayiwa. Ndipo Isiboseti anati kwa Abineri
2Samuel3:8 Abineri anakwiya kwambiri chifukwa cha zimene Isi-Boseti ananena ndipo anamuyankha kuti “Kodi ukuyesa ndine mutu wagalu umene ali mbali ya Ayuda? Lero lino ndine wokhulupirika ku nyumba ya abambo ako
2Samuel3:9 Mulungu andilange ine Abineri
2Samuel3:10 Ndidzachotsa ufumu ku nyumba ya Sauli ndi kukhazikitsa ufumu wa Davide pa Aisraeli onse ndi Yuda kuchokera ku Dani mpaka ku Beeriseba.”
2Samuel3:11 Isiboseti sanayerekezenso kunena mawu ena kwa Abineri
2Samuel3:12 Kenaka Abineri anatuma amithenga kwa Davide kukanena kuti
2Samuel3:13 Davide anati
2Samuel3:14 Ndipo Davide anatuma amithenga kwa Isi-Boseti mwana wa Sauli
2Samuel3:15 Kotero Isi-Boseti analamulira ndipo anakamutenga kwa mwamuna wake Palitieli mwana wa Laisi.
2Samuel3:16 Koma mwamuna wake anapita naye akulira pambuyo pake njira yonse mpaka ku Bahurimu. Kenaka Abineri anati kwa iye
2Samuel3:17 Abineri anakambirana ndi akuluakulu a Israeli ndipo anati
2Samuel3:18 Tsopano chitani zimenezo! Pakuti Yehova analonjeza Davide kuti
2Samuel3:19 Abineri anayankhulanso nawo yekha anthu a fuko la Benjamini. Kenaka anapita ku Hebroni kukamuwuza Davide zonse zimene Aisraeli ndi fuko lonse la Benjamini amafuna kuchita.
2Samuel3:20 Abineri
2Samuel3:21 Ndipo Abineri anawuza Davide kuti
2Samuel3:22 Nthawi yomweyo ankhondo a Davide ndi Yowabu anafika kuchokera kumene anakathira nkhondo ndipo anabweretsa katundu wambiri wolanda ku nkhondo. Koma Abineri sanalinso ndi Davide ku Hebroni
2Samuel3:23 Yowabu ndi asilikali onse amene anali naye atafika
2Samuel3:24 Choncho Yowabu anapita kwa mfumu ndipo anati
2Samuel3:25 Inu mukumudziwa bwino Abineri mwana wa Neri. Iye anabwera kudzakunamizani ndi kudzaona mayendedwe anu ndiponso kudzaona zonse zimene mukuchita.”
2Samuel3:26 Kenaka Yowabu anachoka pamaso pa Davide ndipo anatumiza amithenga kutsatira Abineri
2Samuel3:27 Tsono Abineri atabwerera ku Hebroni
2Samuel3:28 Patapita nthawi
2Samuel3:29 Mlandu umenewu ukhala pa Yowabu ndi banja lonse la abambo ake! Mʼbanja la Yowabu musadzasowe munthu wodwala matenda a chizonono kapena khate
2Samuel3:30 (Yowabu ndi mʼbale wake Abisai anapha Abineri chifukwa iye anapha mʼbale wawo Asaheli ku nkhondo ku Gibiyoni).
2Samuel3:31 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Yowabu ndi anthu onse amene anali nawo
2Samuel3:32 Iwo anamuyika Abineri mʼmanda ku Hebroni ndipo mfumu inalira mokweza pa manda a Abineri. Ndipo anthu onse analiranso.
2Samuel3:33 Mfumu inayimba nyimbo iyi ya maliro a Abineri: “Abineri nʼkufa motere monga mmene chimafera chitsiru.
2Samuel3:34 Manja ako anali osamanga
2Samuel3:35 Kenaka onse anabwera kwa Davide kumuwumiriza kuti adye kusanade. Koma Davide analumbira kuti
2Samuel3:36 Anthu onse anadziwa zimenezi ndipo zinawakondweretsa ndithu. Zonse zimene mfumu inachita zinawakondweretsa.
2Samuel3:37 Kotero tsiku limeneli anthu onse ndi Aisraeli onse anadziwa kuti sikunali kufuna kwa mfumu kuti Abineri mwana wa Neri aphedwe.
2Samuel3:38 Ndipo mfumu inati kwa ankhondo ake
2Samuel3:39 Ndipo lero
2Samuel4:1 Isiboseti mwana wa Sauli atamva kuti Abineri waphedwa ku Hebroni
2Samuel4:2 Koma Isiboseti anali ndi anthu akuluakulu awiri amene ankatsogolera magulu a ankhondo. Mmodzi mwa iwo dzina lake linali Baana ndipo mnzakeyo anali Rekabu. Iwo anali ana a Rimoni wa banja la Beeroti wa fuko la Benjamini Beeroti. Iwo ankatengedwa ngati mbali imodzi ya Benjamini
2Samuel4:3 chifukwa anthu a ku Beeroti anathawira ku Gitaimu ndipo akhala ali kumeneko ngati alendo mpaka lero lino.
2Samuel4:4 (Yonatani mwana wa Sauli anali ndi mwana wamwamuna amene anali wolumala mapazi ake onse awiri. Iye anali ndi zaka zisanu pamene nkhani ya Sauli ndi Yonatani inamveka kuchokera ku Yezireeli. Amene amamulera anamunyamula ndi kuthawa naye
2Samuel4:5 Choncho Rekabu ndi Baana ana a Rimoni wa ku Beeroti ananyamuka kupita ku nyumba ya Isi-Boseti
2Samuel4:6 Iwo analowa mʼchipinda chamʼkati ngati kuti amakatenga tirigu
2Samuel4:7 Iwo analowa mʼnyumbamo iye akugona pa bedi mʼchipinda chake. Atamulasa ndi kumupha
2Samuel4:8 Iwo anabweretsa mutu wa Isi-Boseti kwa Davide ku Hebroni ndipo anati kwa mfumu
2Samuel4:9 Davide anayankha Rekabu ndi mʼbale wake Baana
2Samuel4:10 pamene munthu wina anandiwuza kuti
2Samuel4:11 Nanji pamene anthu oyipa apha munthu wosalakwa ali mʼnyumba mwake ndiponso pa bedi lake! Kodi ine ndingaleke kukulangani ndi kukuchotsani pa dziko lapansi pano?”
2Samuel4:12 Kotero Davide analamulira ankhondo ake
2Samuel5:1 Mafuko onse a Israeli anabwera kwa Davide ku Hebroni ndipo anati
2Samuel5:2 Kale lija
2Samuel5:3 Akuluakulu onse a Israeli atafika kwa Mfumu Davide ku Hebroni
2Samuel5:4 Davide anali ndi zaka makumi atatu pamene anakhala mfumu
2Samuel5:5 Analamulira Yuda ali ku Hebroni kwa zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri ndi miyezi isanu ndi umodzi
2Samuel5:6 Mfumu ndi ankhondo ake anapita ku Yerusalemu kukathira nkhondo Ayebusi amene ankakhala kumeneko. Ayebusiwo anamuwuza Davide kuti
2Samuel5:7 Komabe Davide analanda linga la Ziyoni
2Samuel5:8 Pa tsiku limenelo Davide anati
2Samuel5:9 Tsono Davide anakhazikika mu lingamo ndipo mzindawu anawutcha
2Samuel5:10 Ndipo mphamvu za Davide zinkakulirakulira chifukwa anali ndi Yehova Mulungu Wamphamvuzonse.
2Samuel5:11 Tsono Hiramu mfumu ya Turo inatumiza amithenga ake kwa Davide
2Samuel5:12 Choncho Davide anazindikira kuti Yehova wamukhazikitsa kukhala mfumu ya Israeli ndipo wakuza ufumu wake chifukwa cha anthu ake
2Samuel5:13 Davide atafika ku Yerusalemu kuchokera ku Hebroni
2Samuel5:14 Mayina a ana amene anabereka ku Yerusalemu ndi awa: Samua
2Samuel5:15 Ibihari
2Samuel5:16 Elisama
2Samuel5:17 Afilisti atamva kuti Davide wadzozedwa kukhala mfumu ya Israeli
2Samuel5:18 Ndipo Afilisti anabwera ndi kukhala momwazika mʼChigwa cha Refaimu.
2Samuel5:19 Davide anafunsa Yehova kuti
2Samuel5:20 Choncho Davide anapita ku Baala-Perazimu ndi kugonjetsa Afilistiwo. Iye anati
2Samuel5:21 Afilisti anasiya mafano awo kumeneko ndipo Davide ndi ankhondo ake anawatenga.
2Samuel5:22 Nthawi inanso Afilisti anabweranso namwazikana mʼChigwa cha Refaimu;
2Samuel5:23 Davide anafunsa Yehova ndipo Yehovayo anayankha kuti
2Samuel5:24 Mukakangomva phokoso pa msonga za mitengo ya mkandankhuku
2Samuel5:25 Kotero Davide anachita zimene Yehova anamulamulira ndipo anakantha Afilisti njira yonse kuchokera ku Geba mpaka ku Gezeri.
2Samuel6:1 Davide anasonkhanitsanso pamodzi ankhondo 3
2Samuel6:2 Iye pamodzi ndi ankhondo ake onse anapita ku Baalahi ku Yuda kukatenga Bokosi la Chipangano la Mulungu
2Samuel6:3 Iwo anayika Bokosi la Mulungu pa ngolo yatsopano nachoka nalo ku nyumba ya Abinadabu
2Samuel6:4 imene inanyamula Bokosi la Mulungu
2Samuel6:5 Davide pamodzi ndi Aisraeli onse ankakondwerera ndi mphamvu zawo zonse pamaso pa Yehova poyimba nyimbo pogwiritsa ntchito azeze
2Samuel6:6 Atafika pa malo opunthira tirigu a Nakoni
2Samuel6:7 Yehova anapsera mtima Uza chifukwa chochita chinthu chosayenera kuchitika. Choncho Mulungu anamukantha ndipo anafera pomwepo pambali pa Bokosi la Mulungulo.
2Samuel6:8 Ndipo Davide anakhumudwa chifukwa Yehova anakantha Uza ndipo mpaka lero malowo amatchedwa Perezi Uza.
2Samuel6:9 Tsiku limenelo Davide anachita mantha ndi Yehova ndipo anati
2Samuel6:10 Iye sanafunenso kubwera ndi Bokosi la Yehova kawo ku mzinda wake wa Davide. Mʼmalo mwake anapita nalo ku nyumba ya Obedi-Edomu Mgiti.
2Samuel6:11 Bokosi la Yehova linakhala mʼnyumba ya Obedi-Edomu Mgiti kwa miyezi itatu
2Samuel6:12 Tsono Mfumu Davide anawuzidwa kuti
2Samuel6:13 Anthu amene ananyamula Bokosi la Yehova ankati akayenda mapazi asanu ndi limodzi
2Samuel6:14 Davide ankavina ndi mphamvu zake zonse pamaso pa Yehova atavala efodi ya nsalu yofewa yosalala
2Samuel6:15 pamene iyeyo pamodzi ndi Aisraeli onse ankabwera ndi Bokosi la Yehova
2Samuel6:16 Bokosi la Yehova likulowa mu Mzinda wa Davide
2Samuel6:17 Iwo anabwera nalo Bokosi la Yehova ndipo analiyika pamalo pake mʼkati mwa tenti imene Davide anayimika ndipo Davideyo anapereka nsembe zopsereza ndi nsembe zachiyanjano pamaso pa Yehova.
2Samuel6:18 Atatsiriza kupereka nsembe zopsereza ndi nsembe zachiyanjano
2Samuel6:19 Kenaka iye anagawira Aisraeli onsewo
2Samuel6:20 Davide atabwerera ku nyumba kwake kukadalitsa banja lake
2Samuel6:21 Davide anamuyankha Mikala kuti
2Samuel6:22 Ineyo ndidzadzinyoza kuposa apa
2Samuel6:23 Ndipo Mikala mwana wa Sauli sanakhalenso ndi mwana mpaka anamwalira.
2Samuel7:1 Mfumu itakhazikika mʼnyumba yake yaufumu
2Samuel7:2 mfumuyo inawuza mneneri Natani kuti
2Samuel7:3 Natani anayankha mfumu kuti
2Samuel7:4 Usiku umenewo mawu a Yehova anafika kwa Natani ndipo anati
2Samuel7:5 “Pita kamuwuze mtumiki wanga Davide kuti
2Samuel7:6 Ine sindinakhalepo mʼnyumba kuyambira tsiku limene ndinatulutsa Aisraeli mʼdziko la Igupto mpaka lero lino. Ndakhala ndikuyenda uku ndi uku ndipo mokhala mwanga munali mu tenti.
2Samuel7:7 Konse ndakhala ndikuyenda ndi Aisraeli onse
2Samuel7:8 “Ndipo tsopano umuwuze mtumiki wanga Davide kuti
2Samuel7:9 Ineyo ndinali nawe kulikonse kumene unkapita
2Samuel7:10 Ndipo ndidzawapatsa malo anthu anga Aisraeli ndipo ndidzawadzala pamalo awoawo kuti asadzavutitsidwenso. Anthu oyipa sadzawazunzanso monga ankachitira poyamba paja
2Samuel7:11 monga akhala akuchitira kuchokera nthawi imene ndinasankha atsogoleri a anthu anga Aisraeli. Ine ndidzakupatsaninso mpumulo kwa adani anu onse. “ ‘Yehova akulengeza kwa iwe kuti Iye mwini adzakhazikitsa banja lako:
2Samuel7:12 Masiku ako akadzatha ndipo ukadzakapuma ndi makolo ako
2Samuel7:13 Iye ndiye amene adzamangire nyumba Dzina langa
2Samuel7:14 Ine ndidzakhala abambo ake
2Samuel7:15 Koma sindidzasiya kumukonda
2Samuel7:16 Nyumba yako ndi ufumu wako zidzakhala zamuyaya pamaso panga. Mpando wako waufumu udzakhazikika kwamuyaya!’ ”
2Samuel7:17 Natani anafotokozera Davide mawu onse avumbulutso limene analandira.
2Samuel7:18 Choncho Davide analowa mu tenti nakhala pamaso pa Yehova
2Samuel7:19 Ndipo kukhala ngati izi ndi zosakwanira pamaso panu
2Samuel7:20 Kodi Davide anenenso chiyani kwa Inu? Pakuti Inu Ambuye Wamphamvuzonse mukumudziwa mtumiki wanu.
2Samuel7:21 Chifukwa cha mawu anu komanso mwa chifuniro chanu
2Samuel7:22 Inu ndinu wamkulu
2Samuel7:23 Ndipo ndi ndani wofanana ndi anthu anu Aisraeli
2Samuel7:24 Inu mwawapanga anthu anu Aisraeli kukhala anuanu kwamuyaya
2Samuel7:25 “Ndipo tsopano Yehova Mulungu
2Samuel7:26 kotero dzina lanu lidzakhala lotchuka mpaka muyaya. Ndipo anthu adzanena kuti
2Samuel7:27 “Inu Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
2Samuel7:28 Inu Ambuye Wamphamvuzonse
2Samuel7:29 Ndipo tsopano chikukomereni kudalitsa banja la mtumiki wanu
2Samuel8:1 Patapita nthawi
2Samuel8:2 Davide anagonjetsanso Amowabu. Iye anawalamula kuti agone pansi mʼmizere itatu pa gulu lililonse ndipo anawayeza ndi chingwe. Pa gulu lililonse ankapha anthu amene anali pa mizere iwiri yoyamba
2Samuel8:3 Komanso Davide anagonjetsa Hadadezeri mwana wa Rehobu
2Samuel8:4 Davide analanda magaleta 1
2Samuel8:5 Aramu wa ku Damasiko atabwera kudzathandiza Hadadezeri mfumu ya Zoba
2Samuel8:6 Iye anakhazikitsa maboma mu ufumu wa Aramu wa ku Damasiko
2Samuel8:7 Davide anatenga zishango zagolide za akuluakulu ankhondo a Hadadezeri ndi kubwera nazo ku Yerusalemu.
2Samuel8:8 Mfumu Davide inatenga mkuwa wambiri kuchokera ku Beta ndi Berotai
2Samuel8:9 Tou
2Samuel8:10 anatumiza mwana wake Yoramu kwa mfumu Davide kukamulonjera ndi kukamuyamikira chifukwa cha kupambana kwake pa nkhondo yake ndi Hadadezeriyo
2Samuel8:11 Mfumu Davide inapereka zinthu zimenezi kwa Yehova
2Samuel8:12 Edomu ndi Mowabu
2Samuel8:13 Ndipo Davide anatchuka atabwera kokakantha Aedomu 18
2Samuel8:14 Iye anayika maboma mʼdera lonse la Edomu
2Samuel8:15 Davide analamulira dziko lonse la Israeli ndipo ankachita zonse mwachilungamo ndi molondola pamaso pa anthu ake onse.
2Samuel8:16 Yowabu mwana wa Zeruya anali mkulu wa ankhondo; Yehosafati mwana wa Ahiludi anali mlembi wa zochitika.
2Samuel8:17 Zadoki mwana wa Ahitubi ndi Ahimeleki mwana wa Abiatara anali ansembe; Seraya anali mlembi;
2Samuel8:18 Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada anali mtsogoleri wa Akereti ndi Apeleti; ndipo ana a Davide anali ansembe.
2Samuel9:1 Davide anafunsa kuti
2Samuel9:2 Tsono panali mtumiki wina wa banja la Sauli wotchedwa Ziba. Iwo anamuyitana kuti aonekere pamaso pa Davide
2Samuel9:3 Mfumu inafunsa kuti
2Samuel9:4 Mfumu inafunsa kuti
2Samuel9:5 Kotero mfumu inamubweretsa kuchokera ku Lodebara
2Samuel9:6 Mefiboseti mwana wa Yonatani
2Samuel9:7 Davide anati kwa iye
2Samuel9:8 Mefiboseti anawerama pansi ndipo anati
2Samuel9:9 Kenaka Davide anayitanitsa Ziba
2Samuel9:10 Iwe ndi ana ndi antchito anu muzimulimira mʼdziko lake ndipo muzibweretsa zokololazo kuti chidzukulu cha mbuye wako chikhale ndi chakudya. Ndipo Mefiboseti
2Samuel9:11 Ndipo Ziba anati kwa mfumu
2Samuel9:12 Mefiboseti anali ndi mwana wamngʼono wamwamuna wotchedwa Mika
2Samuel9:13 Ndipo Mefiboseti anakhala mu Yerusalemu chifukwa nthawi zonse amadya ndi mfumu. Iye anali wolumala mapazi ake onse.
2Samuel10:1 Patapita nthawi
2Samuel10:2 Davide anaganiza kuti
2Samuel10:3 atsogoleri a ankhondo a Aamoni anawuza Hanuni mbuye wawo kuti
2Samuel10:4 Choncho Hanuni anagwira anthu amene Davide anawatuma aja ndipo anameta munthu aliyense mbali imodzi ya ndevu zake
2Samuel10:5 Atamufotokozera Davide zimenezi
2Samuel10:6 Aamoni atazindikira kuti amukwiyitsa kwambiri Davide
2Samuel10:7 Davide atamva zimenezi
2Samuel10:8 Aamoni anatuluka ndi kukhala mʼmizere ya nkhondo pa chipata cha mzinda wawo
2Samuel10:9 Yowabu ataona kuti kunali mizere ya ankhondo kutsogolo kwake ndi kumbuyo kwake
2Samuel10:10 Iye anayika ankhondo ena otsalawo mʼmanja mwa Abisai mʼbale wake ndipo anawayika kuti amenyane ndi Aamoni.
2Samuel10:11 Yowabu anati
2Samuel10:12 Limba mtima ndipo timenyane nawo mopanda mantha chifukwa cha anthu athu ndi mizinda ya Mulungu wathu. Yehova achite chomukomera pamaso pake.”
2Samuel10:13 Choncho Yowabu ndi ankhondo amene anali naye anapita kukamenyana ndi Aaramu
2Samuel10:14 Aamoni atazindikira kuti Aaramu akuthawa
2Samuel10:15 Aaramu ataona kuti agonjetsedwa ndi Aisraeli
2Samuel10:16 Hadadezeri anatumiza amithenga kukayitana Aaramu amene anali ku tsidya la Mtsinje
2Samuel10:17 Davide atawuzidwa zimenezi
2Samuel10:18 Koma iwo anathawa pamaso pa Aisraeli
2Samuel10:19 Mafumu onse amene anali pansi pa Hadadezeri ataona kuti agonjetsedwa ndi Aisraeli
2Samuel11:1 Nthawi ya mphukira
2Samuel11:2 Tsiku lina cha kumadzulo Davide anadzuka pa bedi lake ndipo ankayenda pamwamba pa nyumba yake. Ali pa dengapo anaona mkazi akusamba. Mkaziyo anali wokongola kwambiri.
2Samuel11:3 Ndipo Davide anatuma munthu wina kuti akafufuze za iye. Munthuyo anati
2Samuel11:4 Ndipo Davide anatumiza amithenga kwa iye kukamuyitana. Batiseba anabwera kwa Davide ndipo anagona naye. (Nʼkuti mkaziyu atayeretsedwa ku masiku ake osamba). Kenaka anabwerera ku nyumba yake.
2Samuel11:5 Mkaziyo anakhala woyembekezera ndipo anatumiza mawu kwa Davide kunena kuti
2Samuel11:6 Ndipo Davide anatumiza mawu awa kwa Yowabu: “Nditumizire Uriya Mhiti.” Ndipo Yowabu anamutumiza kwa Davide.
2Samuel11:7 Uriya atafika kwa Davide
2Samuel11:8 Kenaka Davide anati kwa Uriya
2Samuel11:9 Koma Uriya anagona pa chipata cha nyumba yaufumu pamodzi ndi antchito onse a mbuye wake ndipo sanapite ku nyumba yake.
2Samuel11:10 Davide atawuzidwa kuti
2Samuel11:11 Uriya anayankha Davide kuti
2Samuel11:12 Ndipo Davide anati kwa iye
2Samuel11:13 Davide anayitana Uriya nadya ndi kumwa naye
2Samuel11:14 Mmawa Davide analemba kalata kwa Yowabu ndipo anayitumiza ndi Uriya.
2Samuel11:15 Mʼkalatayo analembamo kuti
2Samuel11:16 Kotero Yowabu atawuzinga mzindawo
2Samuel11:17 Ankhondo a mu mzindawo atabwera kudzamenyana ndi Yowabu
2Samuel11:18 Yowabu anatumiza wamthenga kwa Davide kukafotokoza mwatsatanetsatane za nkhondoyo.
2Samuel11:19 Iye anamulangiza wa mthengayo kuti
2Samuel11:20 mfumu ikapsa mtima
2Samuel11:21 Kodi anapha Abimeleki mwana wa Yerubeseti ndani? Kodi mkazi sanamuponyere mphero kuchokera pa khoma? Kotero kuti anakafera ku Tebezi. Nʼchifukwa chiyani munafika pafupi ndi khoma?’ Ngati iye akafunsa zimenezi
2Samuel11:22 Mthengayo ananyamuka
2Samuel11:23 Mthengayo anati kwa Davide
2Samuel11:24 Ndipo anthu oponya mivi anatiponyera kuchokera pa khoma
2Samuel11:25 Davide anamuwuza mthengayo kuti
2Samuel11:26 Mkazi wa Uriya atamva kuti mwamuna wake wafa
2Samuel11:27 Nthawi yolira maliro itatha
2Samuel12:1 Tsono Yehova anatumiza Natani kwa Davide. Atafika kwa Davide anati
2Samuel12:2 Munthu wolemerayo anali ndi nkhosa ndi ngʼombe zambiri
2Samuel12:3 koma wosaukayo analibe chilichonse kupatula kankhosa kamodzi kakakazi kamene anakagula. Iye anakasunga ndipo kanakula naye pamodzi ndi ana ake. Kamadya chakudya chake
2Samuel12:4 “Ndipo mlendo anafika kwa munthu wolemera uja
2Samuel12:5 Davide anapsa mtima kwambiri chifukwa cha munthuyo ndipo anati kwa Natani
2Samuel12:6 Iye ayenera kulipira mwana wankhosa wamkaziyo kanayi
2Samuel12:7 Kenaka Natani anati kwa Davide
2Samuel12:8 Ndinakupatsanso banja la mbuye wako ndiponso akazi a mbuye wako mʼmanja mwako. Ine ndinakupatsanso banja la Israeli ndi Yuda. Ndipo ngati zinthu zonse izi zinali zochepa
2Samuel12:9 Nʼchifukwa chiyani unanyoza mawu a Yehova pochita chimene chili choyipa pamaso pake? Iwe unakantha Uriya Mhiti ndi lupanga ndipo unatenga mkazi wake kukhala wako. Uriyayo unamupha ndi lupanga la Aamoni.
2Samuel12:10 Ndipo tsopano lupanga silidzachoka pa nyumba yako
2Samuel12:11 “Yehova akuti
2Samuel12:12 Iwe unachita zimenezi mwamseri koma Ine ndidzachita izi masanasana Aisraeli onse akuona.’ ”
2Samuel12:13 Kenaka Davide anati kwa Natani
2Samuel12:14 Komabe
2Samuel12:15 Natani atapita kwawo
2Samuel12:16 Davide anapempherera mwanayo kwa Mulungu. Iye anasala chakudya ndipo analowa mʼnyumba mwake nagona pansi usiku wonse.
2Samuel12:17 Akuluakulu a banja lake anayima pambali pake kuti amudzutse
2Samuel12:18 Mwana anamwalira pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri. Antchito a Davide anaopa kumuwuza kuti mwanayo wamwalira
2Samuel12:19 Davide anaona kuti antchito ake amanongʼonezana pakati pawo ndipo anazindikira kuti mwanayo wamwalira. Iye anafunsa kuti
2Samuel12:20 Ndipo Davide anayimirira. Anakasamba nadzola mafuta ndi kusintha zovala zake. Pambuyo pake anapita ku nyumba ya Yehova kukapembedza. Kenaka anapita ku nyumba kwake ndipo atapempha chakudya anamupatsa nadya.
2Samuel12:21 Antchito ake anamufunsa kuti
2Samuel12:22 Iye anayankha kuti
2Samuel12:23 Koma tsopano wamwalira ndisaliranji chakudya? Kodi ndingathe kumubwezanso? Ine ndidzapita kumene kuli iyeko
2Samuel12:24 Ndipo Davide anatonthoza mkazi wake Batiseba
2Samuel12:25 Ndipo chifukwa chakuti Yehova ankamukonda iyeyo
2Samuel12:26 Pa nthawi imeneyi Yowabu anamenyana ndi Raba ku Amoni ndipo analanda nsanja yaufumu.
2Samuel12:27 Ndipo Yowabu anatumiza amithenga kwa Davide kukanena kuti
2Samuel12:28 Ndipo tsopano sonkhanitsani asilikali onse ndipo muzungulire mzindawo ndi kuwulanda.”
2Samuel12:29 Kotero Davide anasonkhanitsa ankhondo onse ndipo anapita ku Raba kukawuthira nkhondo ndi kuwulanda.
2Samuel12:30 Davide anachotsa chipewa chaufumu pamutu pa mfumu yawo ndipo Davide anavala chipewacho. Chipewacho chinkalemera makilogalamu asanu agolide
2Samuel12:31 ndipo anatulutsa anthu amene anali mʼmenemo
2Samuel13:1 Patapita nthawi
2Samuel13:2 Amnoni sankagona tulo mpaka anadwala chifukwa cha Tamara mlongo wakeyo
2Samuel13:3 Koma Amnoni anali ndi mnzake dzina lake Yehonadabu mwana wamwamuna wa Simea
2Samuel13:4 Iye anafunsa Amnoni
2Samuel13:5 Yehonadabu anati
2Samuel13:6 Kotero Amnoni anagona nakhala ngati akudwala. Mfumu itabwera kudzamuona
2Samuel13:7 Davide anatumiza mawu kwa Tamara ku nyumba yaufumu kuti
2Samuel13:8 Choncho Tamara anapitadi ku nyumba ya mlongo wake Amnoni kumalo kumene ankagona. Anakanda ufa
2Samuel13:9 Kenaka iye anatenga chiwaya ndipo anamupatsa bulediyo
2Samuel13:10 Kenaka Amnoni anati kwa Tamara
2Samuel13:11 Koma atabweretsa kwa iye kuti adye
2Samuel13:12 Tamara anati kwa iye
2Samuel13:13 Kodi ukuganiza bwanji za ine? Kodi manyazi anga ndidzawachotsa bwanji? Ndipo nanga iweyo? Udzakhalatu monga mmodzi mwa zitsiru zoyipitsitsa muno mu Israeli. Chonde kapemphe kwa mfumu. Sadzakuletsa kuti undikwatire.”
2Samuel13:14 Koma sanamvere zimene amanena Tamara ndipo popeza anali wamphamvu kuposa Tamarayo
2Samuel13:15 Atatero Amnoni anadana naye kwambiri. Iyeyo anamuda kuposa momwe anamukondera. Amnoni anati
2Samuel13:16 Iye anayankha
2Samuel13:17 Amnoni anayitana wantchito wake ndipo anati
2Samuel13:18 Choncho wantchito wakeyo anamutulutsa ndipo anatseka chitseko atatuluka. Tamara anali atavala mkanjo wokongoletsedwa kwambiri
2Samuel13:19 Tamara anatsira phulusa pamutu pake ndipo anangʼamba mkanjo wokongoletsedwa umene anavalawo. Iye anagwira manja ake kumutu ndipo anachoka
2Samuel13:20 Mlongo wake Abisalomu anati
2Samuel13:21 Mfumu Davide itamva zimenezi
2Samuel13:22 Abisalomu sananene mawu aliwonse kwa Amnoni; abwino kapena oyipa. Iye anamuda Amunoniyo chifukwa anachititsa manyazi mlongo wake Tamara.
2Samuel13:23 Patapita zaka ziwiri
2Samuel13:24 Abisalomu anapita kwa mfumu ndipo anati
2Samuel13:25 Mfumu inayankha kuti
2Samuel13:26 Kenaka Abisalomu anati
2Samuel13:27 Koma Abisalomu anamuwumiriza
2Samuel13:28 Abisalomu analamula antchito ake kuti
2Samuel13:29 Kotero antchito a Abisalomu anachita kwa Amnoni zimene Abisalomu anawalamula. Kenaka ana onse a mfumu anayimirira ndipo anakwera pa abulu awo nathawa.
2Samuel13:30 Ali mʼnjira
2Samuel13:31 Mfumu inayimirira
2Samuel13:32 Koma Yehonadabu mwana wa Simea
2Samuel13:33 Mbuye wanga mfumu musavutike ndi maganizo ndi nkhani yoti ana onse a mfumu afa. Wafa ndi Amnoni yekha.”
2Samuel13:34 Nthawi imeneyi nʼkuti Abisalomu atathawa. Tsono munthu amene amalondera anayangʼana ndipo anaona anthu ambiri pa msewu wa kumadzulo kwake
2Samuel13:35 Yehonadabu anati kwa mfumu
2Samuel13:36 Pamene amatsiriza kuyankhula
2Samuel13:37 Abisalomu anathawa
2Samuel13:38 Abisalomu atathawa ndi kupita ku Gesuri
2Samuel13:39 Ndipo Davide anagwidwa ndi chifundo chofuna kumulondola Abisalomu pakuti anali atatonthozedwa pa imfa ya Amnoni.
2Samuel14:1 Yowabu mwana wa Zeruya anadziwa kuti maganizo a mfumu ali pa Abisalomu.
2Samuel14:2 Kotero Yowabu anatuma munthu wina kupita ku Tekowa ndi kukatengako mkazi wanzeru. Yowabu anati kwa mkaziyo
2Samuel14:3 Kenaka upite kwa mfumu ndipo ukayankhule mawu awa.” Ndipo Yowabu anamuwuza mawu oti akanene.
2Samuel14:4 Mkazi wochokera ku Tekowa uja atapita kwa mfumu anadzigwetsa pansi
2Samuel14:5 Mfumu inamufunsa kuti
2Samuel14:6 Ine wantchito wanu ndinali ndi ana aamuna awiri. Iwo anayamba kumenyana mʼmunda
2Samuel14:7 Tsono banja lonse landiwukira ine
2Samuel14:8 Mfumu inati kwa mkaziyo
2Samuel14:9 Koma mkazi wochokera ku Tekowayo anati kwa mfumu
2Samuel14:10 Mfumu inayankha kuti
2Samuel14:11 Mkaziyo anati
2Samuel14:12 Kenaka mkaziyo anati
2Samuel14:13 Mkaziyo anati
2Samuel14:14 Koma poti madzi akatayika sawoleka
2Samuel14:15 “Tsopano ine ndabwera kudzanena izi kwa inu mbuye wanga mfumu chifukwa anthu andichititsa mantha. Mdzakazi wanu anaganiza kuti
2Samuel14:16 Mwina mfumu idzavomereza kupulumutsa mdzakazi wake mʼdzanja la munthu amene akufuna kupha ine pamodzi ndi mwana wanga kutichotsa pa cholowa chimene Mulungu anatipatsa.’
2Samuel14:17 “Ndipo tsopano mtumiki wanu akuti
2Samuel14:18 Kenaka mfumu inati kwa mkaziyo
2Samuel14:19 Mfumu inafunsa kuti
2Samuel14:20 Mtumiki wanu Yowabu anachita zimenezi kuti asinthe mmene zinthu zilili lero. Mbuye wanga muli ndi nzeru ngati za mngelo wa Mulungu. Mumadziwa zonse zimene zikuchitika mʼdziko.”
2Samuel14:21 Mfumu inati kwa Yowabu
2Samuel14:22 Yowabu anawerama pansi kupereka ulemu kwa mfumu. Yowabuyo anati
2Samuel14:23 Choncho Yowabu anapita ku Gesuri ndipo anamubweretsa Abisalomu ku Yerusalemu.
2Samuel14:24 Koma mfumu inati
2Samuel14:25 Mʼdziko lonse la Israeli munalibe munthu amene anayamikidwa chifukwa cha maonekedwe ake wokongola ngati Abisalomu. Kuyambira kumutu mpaka ku mapazi ake
2Samuel14:26 Nthawi ina iliyonse akamameta tsitsi lake
2Samuel14:27 Abisalomu anali ndi ana aamuna atatu ndi wamkazi mmodzi. Mwana wamkazi dzina lake linali Tamara
2Samuel14:28 Abisalomu anakhala zaka ziwiri mu Yerusalemu osaonekera kwa mfumu.
2Samuel14:29 Kenaka Abisalomu anatumiza mawu kwa Yowabu
2Samuel14:30 Tsono Abisalomu anati kwa antchito ake
2Samuel14:31 Ndipo Yowabu anapita ku nyumba ya Abisalomu ndipo anati kwa iye
2Samuel14:32 Abisalomu anati kwa Yowabu
2Samuel14:33 Choncho Yowabu anapita kwa mfumu ndipo anayiwuza zimenezi. Ndipo mfumu inamuyitanitsa Abisalomu
2Samuel15:1 Patapita nthawi
2Samuel15:2 Iye amadzuka mmamawa ndi kuyima pa njira yopita ku chipata cha mzinda. Munthu wina aliyense akakhala ndi zodandaula zopita nazo kwa mfumu kuti akaweruze
2Samuel15:3 Kenaka Abisalomu amanena kwa iye kuti
2Samuel15:4 Ndipo Abisalomu amawonjezera kunena kuti
2Samuel15:5 Ndipo nthawi zonse amati munthu akasendera pafupi ndi kumugwandira
2Samuel15:6 Abisalomu amachitira izi Aisraeli onse amene amabwera kwa mfumu kuti adzaweruzidwe ndipo Abisalomuyo anagwira mtima anthu a mu Israeli.
2Samuel15:7 Patapita zaka zinayi Abisalomu anati kwa mfumu
2Samuel15:8 Pamene mtumiki wanu amakhala ku Gesuri ku Aramu
2Samuel15:9 Mfumu inati kwa iye
2Samuel15:10 Ndipo Abisalomu anatuma amithenga ake mwamseri kwa mafuko onse a Israeli kukanena kuti
2Samuel15:11 Anthu 200 ochokera mu Yerusalemu anapita naye Abisalomu. Iwo anayitanidwa monga alendo ndipo anapita osadziwa chilichonse pa nkhaniyi.
2Samuel15:12 Pamene Abisalomu amapereka nsembe
2Samuel15:13 Munthu wina anabweretsa uthenga ndi kudzamuwuza Davide kuti
2Samuel15:14 Ndipo Davide anati kwa akuluakulu ake amene anali mu Yerusalemu. “Bwerani! Tiyeni tithawe
2Samuel15:15 Akuluakulu a mfumu anamuyankha kuti
2Samuel15:16 Mfumu inanyamuka pamodzi ndi banja lake lonse. Koma iye anasiya azikazi khumi kuti azisamalira nyumba yaufumu.
2Samuel15:17 Kotero mfumu inanyamuka pamodzi ndi anthu onse oyitsatira
2Samuel15:18 Ankhondo ake onse anayamba kuyenda pamaso pa Davide
2Samuel15:19 Mfumu inati kwa Itai Mgiti
2Samuel15:20 Wangobwera dzulo lomweli
2Samuel15:21 Koma Itai anayankha mfumu kuti
2Samuel15:22 Davide anati kwa Itai
2Samuel15:23 Anthu onse a madera ozungulira analira mofuwula pamene anthu onsewo amadutsa. Mfumunso inawoloka chigwa cha Kidroni
2Samuel15:24 Zadoki anali nawonso
2Samuel15:25 Kenaka mfumu inati kwa Zadoki
2Samuel15:26 Koma iye anati
2Samuel15:27 Mfumu inatinso kwa wansembe Zadoki
2Samuel15:28 Ine ndidzadikira powolokera Yorodani ku chipululu mpaka nditalandira mawu ochokera kwa iwe ondiwuza mmene zilili zinthu.”
2Samuel15:29 Kotero Zadoki ndi Abiatara ananyamula Bokosi la Mulungu lija nabwerera nalo ku Yerusalemu
2Samuel15:30 Koma Davide anapitirira ndi kukakwera phiri la Olivi akupita nalira. Anafunda kumutu koma sanavale nsapato. Anthu onse amene anali naye anafundanso kumutu
2Samuel15:31 Tsono Davide anamva kuti
2Samuel15:32 Davide atafika pamwamba pa phiri pomwe anthu ankapembedzerapo Mulungu
2Samuel15:33 Davide anati kwa iye
2Samuel15:34 Koma ngati ubwerera ku mzinda ndi kukanena kwa Abisalomu kuti
2Samuel15:35 Kodi ansembe
2Samuel15:36 Ana awo awiri
2Samuel15:37 Ndipo Husai bwenzi la Davide anafika ku Yerusalemu pamene Abisalomu amalowa mu mzinda.
2Samuel16:1 Davide atapitirira pangʼono pamwamba pa phiri
2Samuel16:2 Mfumu inafunsa Ziba kuti
2Samuel16:3 Kenaka mfumu inafunsa kuti
2Samuel16:4 Ndipo mfumu inati kwa Ziba
2Samuel16:5 Mfumu Davide itayandikira Bahurimu
2Samuel16:6 Iye amagenda Davide miyala ndi akuluakulu onse a mfumu
2Samuel16:7 Potukwana
2Samuel16:8 Yehova wakubwezera chifukwa cha magazi onse amene unakhetsa pa nyumba ya Sauli
2Samuel16:9 Ndipo Abisai mwana wa Zeruya anati kwa mfumu
2Samuel16:10 Koma mfumu inati
2Samuel16:11 Tsono Davide anati kwa Abisai ndi akuluakulu ake onse
2Samuel16:12 Mwina Yehova adzaona mazunzo anga ndipo adzandibwezera zabwino chifukwa cha kutukwanidwa kumene ndikulandira lero.”
2Samuel16:13 Kotero Davide ndi anthu ake anapitirira kuyenda mu msewu pamene Simei amayenda mʼmbali mwa phiri moyangʼanana naye akutukwana ndi kuponya miyala pamene amayenda nʼkumamutsiranso dothi.
2Samuel16:14 Mfumu ndi anthu ake onse anafika kumene amapita atatopa kwambiri. Ndipo kumeneko anapumula.
2Samuel16:15 Pa nthawi imeneyi Abisalomu ndi Aisraeli ena onse anabwera ku Yerusalemu
2Samuel16:16 Tsono Husai Mwariki bwenzi la Davide anapita kwa Abisalomu ndipo anati kwa iye
2Samuel16:17 Abisalomu anafunsa Husai
2Samuel16:18 Husai anati kwa Abisalomu
2Samuel16:19 Kodi ndidzatumikiranso yani? Kodi sinditumikira mwana wa mfumu? Monga momwe ndinatumikira abambo anu
2Samuel16:20 Abisalomu anati kwa Ahitofele
2Samuel16:21 Ahitofele anayankha kuti
2Samuel16:22 Choncho anamangira tenti Abisalomu pa denga la nyumba ndipo iye anagona ndi azikazi a abambo ake Aisraeli onse akuona.
2Samuel16:23 Tsono masiku amenewo malangizo amene Ahitofele amapereka anali ngati mawu ochokera kwa Mulungu. Umu ndi mmene Davide ndi Abisalomu amalandirira malangizo onse a Ahitofele.
2Samuel17:1 Ahitofele anati kwa Abisalomu
2Samuel17:2 Ndipo ndikamuthira nkhondo atatopa ndiponso atataya mtima. Ndikamuchititsa mantha ndipo anthu onse amene ali naye akathawa. Ine ndikakantha mfumu yokhayo
2Samuel17:3 ndipo anthu onse ndidzabwera nawo kwa inu
2Samuel17:4 Malangizo awa anaoneka abwino kwa Abisalomu ndi kwa akuluakulu onse a Israeli.
2Samuel17:5 Koma Abisalomu anati
2Samuel17:6 Husai atabwera kwa iye
2Samuel17:7 Husai anayankha Abisalomu kuti
2Samuel17:8 Inu mukudziwa bwino abambo anu ali ndi ankhondo awo. Iwo ndi anthu ankhondo komanso ndi woopsa ngati chimbalangondo chimene chalandidwa ana ake. Kuwonjezera apa abambo anu ndi katswiri wa nkhondo. Iwo sanagone pamodzi ndi asilikali awo.
2Samuel17:9 Onani
2Samuel17:10 Tsono ngakhale msilikali wolimba mtima kwambiri
2Samuel17:11 “Kotero ine ndikukulangizani kuti: Aisraeli onse
2Samuel17:12 Ndipo ife tidzapita kukamuthira nkhondo kulikonse kumene tikamupeze
2Samuel17:13 Iye akakathawira mu mzinda
2Samuel17:14 Abisalomu ndi ankhondo ena onse a Israeli anati
2Samuel17:15 Husai anawuza ansembe Zadoki ndi Abiatara kuti
2Samuel17:16 Tsopano tumizani wamthenga msangamsanga kuti akamuwuze Davide kuti
2Samuel17:17 Yonatani ndi Ahimaazi amakhala ku Eni Rogeli. Tsono wantchito wamkazi ndiye amapita kukawawuza ndipo iwo amayenera kupita kukamuwuza mfumu Davide
2Samuel17:18 Koma mnyamata wina anawaona ndipo anakawuza Abisalomu. Kotero anthu awiriwo anachoka mofulumira ndipo anapita ku nyumba ya munthu wina ku Bahurimu. Iye anali ndi chitsime ku mpanda kwake ndipo iwo analowamo.
2Samuel17:19 Mkazi wake anatenga chophimba ndipo anachiyika pamwamba pa chitsimecho nawazapo tirigu. Palibe amene anadziwa chilichonse za izi.
2Samuel17:20 Anthu a Abisalomu atafika kwa mkaziyo pa nyumbapo anafunsa kuti
2Samuel17:21 Anthu aja atapita
2Samuel17:22 Kotero Davide ndi anthu onse amene anali nawo ananyamuka ndi kuwoloka Yorodani. Pofika mmamawa
2Samuel17:23 Ahitofele ataona kuti malangizo ake sanatsatidwe
2Samuel17:24 Davide anapita ku Mahanaimu
2Samuel17:25 Abisalomu anasankha Amasa kukhala mkulu wa ankhondo mʼmalo mwa Yowabu. Amasa anali mwana wa munthu wotchedwa Itira Mwisraeli amene anakwatira Abigayeli mwana wa Nahasi mlongo wake wa Zeruya
2Samuel17:26 Aisraeli ndi Abisalomu anamanga zithando mʼdziko la Giliyadi.

2Samuel18:1 Davide anasonkhanitsa anthu amene anali naye ndipo anasankha atsogoleri ena olamulira ankhondo 1
2Samuel18:2 Davide anatumiza asilikaliwo atawagawa patatu: gulu loyamba limalamulidwa ndi Yowabu
2Samuel18:3 Koma anthuwo anati
2Samuel18:4 Mfumu inayankha kuti
2Samuel18:5 Mfumu inalamulira Yowabu
2Samuel18:6 Ankhondo anayenda kupita kukachita nkhondo ndi Israeli
2Samuel18:7 Aisraeli anagonjetsedwa kumeneko ndi ankhondo a Davide. Tsiku limenelo anaphedwa anthu okwanira 20
2Samuel18:8 Nkhondo inafalikira ku madera onse akumidzi ndipo anthu akufa chifukwa cha zoopsa za mʼnkhalango anali ambiri tsiku limenelo kuposa akufa ndi lupanga.
2Samuel18:9 Tsono zinachitika kuti Abisalomu anakumana ndi asilikali a Davide. Iye anali atakwera bulu ndipo pamene buluyo amadutsa pansi pa nthambi zambiri za mtengo wa thundu
2Samuel18:10 Mmodzi mwa asilikali ataona zimenezi
2Samuel18:11 Yowabu anati kwa munthu amene anamuwuza zimenezi
2Samuel18:12 Koma munthuyo anayankha kuti
2Samuel18:13 Ndipo sindikanayika moyo wanga pa chiswe pakuti palibe chimene chimabisika pamaso pa mfumu komanso inu simukanditeteza.”
2Samuel18:14 Yowabu anati
2Samuel18:15 Ndipo anthu khumi onyamula zida za Yowabu anazungulira Abisalomu
2Samuel18:16 Kenaka Yowabu analiza lipenga ndipo asilikali analeka kuthamangitsa Israeli pakuti Yowabu anawaletsa.
2Samuel18:17 Iwo anatenga Abisalomu ndi kumuponya mʼdzenje lalikulu mʼchipululumo ndipo anawunjikapo miyala ikuluikulu. Nthawiyi Aisraeli onse anathawa kupita ku nyumba zawo.
2Samuel18:18 Abisalomu ali ndi moyo anadzimangira chipilala mʼchigwa cha mfumu

2Samuel19:1 Yowabu anawuzidwa kuti
2Samuel19:2 Ndipo kwa asilikali onse chipambano cha tsiku limenelo chinasandulika maliro
2Samuel19:3 Ankhondo analowa mu mzinda mwakachetechete tsiku limenelo ngati momwe amalowera anthu mwamanyazi chifukwa athawa ku nkhondo.
2Samuel19:4 Mfumu inaphimba nkhope yake ndipo inalira mofuwula
2Samuel19:5 Kenaka Yowabu analowa mʼnyumba ya mfumu nafika kwa mfumuyo ndipo anati
2Samuel19:6 Inu mumakonda amene amadana nanu ndipo mumadana ndi amene amakukondani. Inuyo mwaonetsa lero poyera kuti simusamala za atsogoleri anu a nkhondo ndi asilikali awo. Ine ndikuona kuti inu mukanakondwera ngati Abisalomu akanakhala ndi moyo lero
2Samuel19:7 Tsopano pitani mukawalimbikitse asilikali anu. Ine ndikulumbira mwa Yehova kuti ngati inu simupita palibe munthu amene adzatsale ali ndi inu polowa dzuwa. Ichi chidzakhala choyipa kwambiri kuposa zovuta zonse zimene zinakugwerani kuyambira muli mnyamata mpaka lero.”
2Samuel19:8 Kotero mfumu inanyamuka ndipo inakhala pa mpando wake pa chipata. Pamene asilikali anawuzidwa kuti
2Samuel19:9 Pakati pa mafuko onse a Israeli
2Samuel19:10 Ndipo Abisalomu amene ife tinamudzoza kuti atilamulire wafa pa nkhondo. Tsono nʼchifukwa chiyani simukunena kanthu za kubweretsanso mfumu?”
2Samuel19:11 Mfumu Davide inatumiza uthenga uwu kwa ansembe Zadoki ndi Abiatara
2Samuel19:12 Inu ndinu abale anga enieni
2Samuel19:13 Ndipo munene kwa Amasa
2Samuel19:14 Davide anakopa mitima ya anthu onse a Yuda ndipo anthuwo anakhala ngati munthu mmodzi. Iwo anatumiza mawu kwa mfumu
2Samuel19:15 Kotero mfumu inabwerera ndipo inakafika mpaka ku Yorodani. Tsono anthu a ku Yuda anabwera ku Giligala kuti akakumane ndi mfumu ndi kumuwolotsa Yorodani.
2Samuel19:16 Simei mwana wa Gera
2Samuel19:17 Iyeyo anali ndi anthu 1
2Samuel19:18 Iwo anawoloka mtsinje kukatenga banja lonse la mfumu ndi kuchita zonse zimene mfumuyo imafuna. Pamene Simei mwana wa Gera anawoloka Yorodani
2Samuel19:19 ndipo anati
2Samuel19:20 Pakuti ine mtumiki wanu ndazindikira kuti ndachimwa. Koma lero ndabwera ngati woyamba wa nyumba ya Yosefe yonse kudzakumana nanu mbuye wanga mfumu.”
2Samuel19:21 Ndipo Abisai mwana wa Zeruya anati
2Samuel19:22 Davide anayankha kuti
2Samuel19:23 Ndipo mfumu inati kwa Simei
2Samuel19:24 Mefiboseti

2Samuel19:26 Iye anayankha kuti
2Samuel19:27 Ndipo wayankhula zosinjirira za ine mtumiki wanu kwa inu mbuye wanga mfumu. Mbuye wanga mfumu ali ngati mngelo wa Mulungu ndipo chitani chimene chikukomerani.
2Samuel19:28 Zidzukulu zonse za agogo anga sizinayenera chilichonse koma imfa kuchokera kwa inu mbuye wanga mfumu
2Samuel19:29 Mfumu inayankha kuti
2Samuel19:30 Mefiboseti anati kwa mfumu
2Samuel19:31 Barizilai Mgiliyadi anabweranso kuchokera ku Rogelimu kudzawoloka Yorodani ndi mfumu ndi kumuperekeza kuchokera kumeneko.
2Samuel19:32 Tsono Barizilai anali wokalamba kwambiri
2Samuel19:33 Mfumu inati kwa Barizilai
2Samuel19:34 Barizilai anayankha mfumu kuti
2Samuel19:35 Ine tsopano ndili ndi zaka 80. Kodi ndingathe kusiyanitsa pakati pa chabwino ndi choyipa? Kodi mtumiki wanu angathe kuzindikira kukoma kwa zimene akudya ndi kumwa? Kodi ndingathe kumva kuyimba kwa amuna ndi akazi? Nʼchifukwa chiyani wantchito wanu akakhale ngati katundu kwa mbuye wanga mfumu?
2Samuel19:36 Koma ine mtumiki wanu ndingoyenda pangʼono kuti ndiwoloke Yorodani pamodzi ndi mfumu. Amfumu mungandipatsirenji mphotho yotere?
2Samuel19:37 Muloleni
2Samuel19:38 Mfumu inati
