2Kings10:36 Yehu analamulira Aisraeli ku Samariya zaka 28.
2Kings11:1 Ataliya amayi ake a Ahaziya ataona kuti mwana wawo wafa
2Kings11:2 Koma Yehoseba
2Kings11:3 Mwanayo anakhala mobisala pamodzi ndi mlezi wake mʼnyumba ya Yehova kwa zaka zisanu ndi chimodzi pamene Ataliya ankalamulira dzikolo.
2Kings11:4 Koma mʼchaka chachisanu ndi chiwiri
2Kings11:5 Yehoyada anawalamulira kuti
2Kings11:6 gulu lachiwiri lidzalondera Chipata cha Suri
2Kings11:7 Ndipo inu amene muli mʼmagulu ena awiri amene simugwira ntchito pa tsiku la Sabata
2Kings11:8 Mudzakhale mozungulira mfumuyo
2Kings11:9 Atsogoleri olamulira asilikali 100 aja anachitadi zonse monga analamulira wansembe Yehoyada. Aliyense anatenga anthu ake
2Kings11:10 Ndipo wansembeyo anawapatsa asilikaliwo mikondo ndi zishango zimene zinali za mfumu Davide ndipo zinali mʼNyumba ya Yehova.
2Kings11:11 Alondawo
2Kings11:12 Yehoyada anatulutsa mwana wa mfumuyo namuveka chipewa chaufumu ndipo anamupatsa Buku la Chipangano ndi kumuyika kukhala mfumu. Iwo anamudzoza ndipo anthu anamuwombera mʼmanja akufuwula kuti
2Kings11:13 Ataliya atamva phokoso limene alonda ndi anthuwo amachita
2Kings11:14 Iye anayangʼana naona mfumu itayima pa chipilala
2Kings11:15 Wansembe Yehoyada analamula atsogoleri a asilikali 100 amene amayangʼanira asilikaliwo kuti
2Kings11:16 Choncho anamugwira pamene amafika pa malo amene akavalo amalowera ku nyumba ya mfumu ndipo anamuphera pamenepo.
2Kings11:17 Tsono Yehoyada anachititsa pangano pakati pa Yehova ndi mfumu ndi anthu kuti adzakhala anthu a Yehova. Iye anachititsanso pangano pakati pa mfumu ndi anthu.
2Kings11:18 Anthu onse a mʼdzikomo anapita ku nyumba ya Baala nakayigwetsa. Iwo anaphwanya kotheratu maguwa ansembe ndi mafano ake ndipo anapha Matani wansembe wa Baala patsogolo pa maguwa pomwepo. Pamenepo wansembe Yehoyada anasankha oyangʼanira Nyumba ya Yehova.
2Kings11:19 Iye anatenga atsogoleri a asilikali 100 aja
2Kings11:20 Choncho anthu onse a mʼdzikomo anasangalala. Ndipo mu mzindamo munakhala bata chifukwa Ataliya nʼkuti ataphedwa ndi lupanga ku nyumba ya mfumu.
2Kings11:21 Yowasi anali wa zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri pamene anayamba kulamulira.
2Kings12:1 Mʼchaka chachisanu ndi chiwiri cha Yehu
2Kings12:2 Yowasi anachita zolungama pamaso pa Yehova masiku onse amene wansembe Yehoyada ankamulangiza.
2Kings12:3 Komabe sanachotse malo opembedzerapo mafano ndipo anthu anapitiriza kupereka nsembe ndi kufukiza lubani ku malo opembedzerako mafanowo.
2Kings12:4 Yowasi anati kwa ansembe
2Kings12:5 Wansembe aliyense alandire ndalamazo kuchokera kwa abwenzi ake
2Kings12:6 Koma pofika chaka cha 23 cha ufumu wa Yowasi
2Kings12:7 Choncho Mfumu Yowasi inayitanitsa wansembe Yehoyada ndi ansembe ena ndipo inafunsa kuti
2Kings12:8 Ansembe anavomera kuti salandiranso ndalama kuchokera kwa anthu ndipo kuti sindiwo amene ati akonzenso nyumbayo.
2Kings12:9 Koma wansembe Yehoyada anatenga bokosi ndipo anabowola chivundikiro chake. Anayika bokosilo pambali pa guwa lansembe
2Kings12:10 Nthawi zonse akaona kuti mʼbokosimo muli ndalama zambiri
2Kings12:11 Ankati akadziwa kuti ndalamazo zilipo zingati
2Kings12:12 amisiri a miyala ndiponso anthu ophwanya miyala. Iwo ankagula matabwa ndi miyala yosema yokonzera Nyumba ya Yehova ndipo ankalipira zinthu zonse zofunika pokonzanso nyumbayo.
2Kings12:13 Koma ndalama zomwe anthu ankabwera nazo ku nyumbayo sanagulire siliva wopangira mabeseni
2Kings12:14 Ndalamazi anazipereka kwa anthu antchito amene anazigwiritsa ntchito yokonzera nyumbayo.
2Kings12:15 Koma sanawafunse kuti afotokoze kagwiritsidwe ntchito ka ndalama zolipira amene ankagwira ntchito
2Kings12:16 Ndalama zomwe zinkaperekedwa pa nsembe yopepesera machimo ndi nsembe yoperekedwa chifukwa cha tchimo sanabwere nazo ku Nyumba ya Yehova pakuti zinali za ansembe.
2Kings12:17 Pa nthawi imeneyo
2Kings12:18 Koma Yowasi mfumu ya Yuda anatenga zinthu zonse zopatulika zomwe anazipatula Yehosafati
2Kings12:19 Ndipo ntchito zina za Yowasi ndi zonse zimene anachita
2Kings12:20 Akuluakulu ake anamuchitira chiwembu ndi kumupha ku Beti Milo
2Kings12:21 Yozakara mwana wa Simeati ndi Yehozabadi mwana wa Someri atumiki ake anamukantha nafa. Ndipo anamuyika mʼmanda pamodzi ndi makolo ake mu Mzinda wa Davide. Ndipo Amaziya mwana wake analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake.
2Kings13:1 Mʼchaka cha 23 cha ufumu wa Yowasi mwana wa Ahaziya mfumu ya Yuda
2Kings13:2 Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova potsatira machimo a Yeroboamu mwana Nebati amene anachimwitsa nawo Israeli ndipo iye sanawaleke machimowo.
2Kings13:3 Ndipo Yehova anakwiyira Aisraeli nawayika pansi pa ulamuliro wa Hazaeli mfumu ya Siriya ndi Beni-Hadadi mwana wa Hazaeli masiku awo onse.
2Kings13:4 Tsono Yehowahazi anapempha Yehova kuti amuchitire chifundo ndipo Yehova anamva pempho lake chifukwa anaona momwe mfumu ya Aramu inkapsinjira Aisraeli.
2Kings13:5 Yehova anapatsa Aisraeli munthu woti awapulumutse ndipo anapulumuka mʼdzanja la Aramu. Choncho Aisraeli anakhala mʼnyumba zawo monga ankachitira kale.
2Kings13:6 Komabe Aisraeli sanaleke kuchita machimo a nyumba ya Yeroboamu
2Kings13:7 Yehowahazi sanatsale ndi ankhondo ambiri koma 50 okha okwera pa akavalo
2Kings13:8 Ntchito zina za Yehowahazi ndi zonse zimene anachita
2Kings13:9 Yehowahazi anamwalira ndipo anayikidwa mʼmanda mu Samariya. Ndipo Yowasi mwana wake analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake.
2Kings13:10 Mʼchaka cha 37 cha Yowasi mfumu ya Yuda
2Kings13:11 Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova ndipo sanaleke kuchita tchimo la Yeroboamu mwana wa Nebati limene anachimwitsa nalo Israeli.
2Kings13:12 Ntchito zina za Yowasi ndi zonse zimene anachita
2Kings13:13 Yowasi anayikidwa mʼmanda pamodzi ndi makolo ake ndipo Yeroboamu mwana wake analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake. Yowasi anayikidwa mʼmanda mu Samariya pamodzi ndi mafumu a Israeli.
2Kings13:14 Tsono Elisa anadwala matenda amene anafa nawo. Yowasi mfumu ya Israeli inapita kukamuona ndipo inamulirira. Iye polira ankanena kuti
2Kings13:15 Elisa anamuwuza kuti
2Kings13:16 Elisa anawuza mfumu ya Israeli kuti
2Kings13:17 Elisa anamuwuza kuti
2Kings13:18 Kenaka Elisa anati
2Kings13:19 Munthu wa Mulungu anapsera mtima mfumuyo ndipo anati
2Kings13:20 Elisa anamwalira ndipo anayikidwa mʼmanda. Tsono magulu a ankhondo a Amowabu ankabwera kudzalowa ndi kudzathira nkhondo dzikolo nthawi ya dzinja.
2Kings13:21 Tsiku lina Aisraeli ena akukayika maliro mʼmanda
2Kings13:22 Hazaeli mfumu ya Aramu inazunza Aisraeli nthawi yonse ya ulamuliro wa Yehowahazi.
2Kings13:23 Koma Yehova anawachitira chifundo Aisraeliwo ndi kukhudzika ndi zomwe zinkawachitikira chifukwa cha pangano lake ndi Abrahamu
2Kings13:24 Hazaeli mfumu ya Aramu inamwalira ndipo mwana wake Beni-Hadadi analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake.
2Kings13:25 Pamenepo Yowasi mwana wa Yehowahazi analandanso kwa Beni-Hadadi mwana wa Hazaeli mizinda yonse imene iye analanda Yehowahazi abambo ake. Yehowasi anagonjetsa Beni-Hadadi katatu ndipo anatenganso mizinda ya Israeli.
2Kings14:1 Mʼchaka chachiwiri cha Yehowasi mwana wa Yowahazi mfumu ya Israeli
2Kings14:2 Iye anali ndi zaka 25 pamene anakhala mfumu ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu zaka 29. Amayi ake anali Yehoyadini wa ku Yerusalemu.
2Kings14:3 Iye anachita zolungama pamaso pa Yehova
2Kings14:4 Komabe sanachotse malo opembedzerapo mafano. Anthu anapitiriza kupereka nsembe ndi kufukiza lubani kumeneko.
2Kings14:5 Atakhazikika mu ufumu wake
2Kings14:6 Komatu iye sanaphe ana a anthu amene anapha abambo ake potsatira zomwe zinalembedwa mʼbuku la Malamulo a Mose. Mʼmenemo Yehova analamula kuti
2Kings14:7 Iye ndiye amene anapha Aedomu 10
2Kings14:8 Tsono Amaziya anatuma amithenga kwa Yehowasi mwana wa Yehowahazi
2Kings14:9 Koma Yehowasi mfumu ya Israeli anabweza mawu kwa Amaziya mfumu ya Yuda kuti
2Kings14:10 Inde iwe wagonjetsa Edomu ndipo tsopano wayamba kudzikuza. Dzitamandire chifukwa cha kupambana kwako
2Kings14:11 Koma Amaziya sanamvere zimenezi. Choncho Yehowasi mfumu ya Israeli anakamuthira nkhondo. Yehowasi ndi Amaziya anakumana maso ndi maso ku Beti-Semesi mʼdziko la Yuda.
2Kings14:12 Israeli anagonjetsa Yuda ndipo munthu aliyense anathawira kwawo.
2Kings14:13 Yehowasi mfumu ya Israeli anagwira Amaziya mfumu ya Yuda
2Kings14:14 Iye anatenga golide ndi siliva yense pamodzi ndi ziwiya zonse zimene zinali mʼNyumba ya Yehova ndi zimene zinali mosungira chuma cha nyumba ya mfumu. Iye anagwiranso anthu nabwerera ku Samariya.
2Kings14:15 Ntchito zina za Yehowasi ndi zonse zimene anachita
2Kings14:16 Yehowasi anamwalira ndipo anayikidwa mʼmanda mu Samariya pamodzi ndi mafumu a Israeli. Ndipo mwana wake Yeroboamu analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake.
2Kings14:17 Amaziya mwana wa Yowasi mfumu ya Yuda anakhala zaka khumi ndi zisanu atamwalira Yehowasi mwana wa Yehowahazi mfumu ya Israeli.
2Kings14:18 Ntchito zina za Amaziya
2Kings14:19 Anthu anapangana zomuchita chiwembu mu Yerusalemu ndipo Amaziya anathawira ku Lakisi
2Kings14:20 Anabwera naye ku pa kavalo ku Yerusalemu ndi kumuyika mʼmanda pamodzi ndi makolo ake mu Mzinda wa Davide.
2Kings14:21 Ndipo anthu onse a ku Yuda anatenga Azariya
2Kings14:22 Azariya anamanga mzinda wa Elati ndi kuwubwezeretsa ku Yuda
2Kings14:23 Mʼchaka cha khumi ndi chisanu cha Amaziya mwana wa Yowasi mfumu ya Yuda
2Kings14:24 Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova ndipo sanasiye machimo a Yeroboamu mwana wa Nebati
2Kings14:25 Iye ndi amene anabwezeretsanso malire a Israeli kuyambira ku Lebo Hamati mpaka ku Nyanja ya Araba
2Kings14:26 Pakuti Yehova anaona masautso a Israeli amene anali owawa kwambiri
2Kings14:27 Pakuti Yehova anali asananene zofafaniza ufumu wa Israeli pa dziko lapansi
2Kings14:28 Ntchito zina za Yeroboamu ndi zonse zimene anachita
2Kings14:29 Yeroboamu anamwalira ndipo anayikidwa mʼmanda pamodzi ndi mafumu a Israeli. Ndipo Zekariya mwana wake analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake.
2Kings15:1 Mʼchaka cha 27 cha Yeroboamu mfumu ya Israeli
2Kings15:2 Iye anakhala mfumu ali ndi zaka 16 ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu zaka 52. Amayi ake anali Yekoliya wa ku Yerusalemu.
2Kings15:3 Iyeyo anachita zabwino pamaso pa Yehova
2Kings15:4 Komabe malo opembedzerako mafano sanawachotse ndipo anthu anapitirizabe kupereka nsembe ndi kufukiza lubani kumeneko.
2Kings15:5 Ndipo Yehova analanga mfumu ndi nthenda ya khate mpaka tsiku limene inamwalira. Tsono mfumuyo inkakhala mʼnyumba yakeyake yapadera. Mwana wake Yotamu ndiye amene ankayangʼanira nyumba ya mfumu ndiponso ndiye amene ankalamulira anthu mʼdzikomo.
2Kings15:6 Ntchito zina za Azariya ndi zonse zimene anachita
2Kings15:7 Azariya anamwalira ndipo anayikidwa mʼmanda pamodzi ndi makolo ake mu Mzinda wa Davide. Ndipo Yotamu mwana wake analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake.
2Kings15:8 Mʼchaka cha 38 cha Azariya mfumu ya Yuda
2Kings15:9 Ndipo iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova monga anachitira makolo ake. Iye sanaleke machimo a Yeroboamu mwana wa Nebati
2Kings15:10 Salumu mwana wa Yabesi anachitira chiwembu Zekariya. Anamukantha anthu akuona
2Kings15:11 Ntchito zina za Zekariya
2Kings15:12 Awa ndiwo mawu a Yehova amene anayankhula kwa Yehu kuti
2Kings15:13 Salumu mwana wa Yabesi anakhala mfumu mʼchaka cha 39 cha ulamuliro wa Uziya mfumu ya Yuda ndipo analamulira mu Samariya mwezi umodzi.
2Kings15:14 Ndipo Menahemu mwana wa Gadi anachoka ku Tiriza napita ku Samariya nakantha Salumu mwana wa Yabesi ku Samariya
2Kings15:15 Ntchito zina za Salumu ndiponso za chiwembu chimene anachita
2Kings15:16 Nthawi imeneyo Menahemu
2Kings15:17 Mʼchaka cha 39 cha Azariya mfumu ya Yuda
2Kings15:18 Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova. Nthawi yonse ya ulamuliro wake sanasiye machimo a Yeroboamu mwana wa Nebati
2Kings15:19 Tsono Puli mfumu ya ku Asiriya inadzathira nkhondo dzikolo ndipo Menahemu anapatsa Puliyo makilogalamu 34
2Kings15:20 Menahemu anapeza ndalamazo kudzera mu msonkho umene ankakhometsa Aisraeli. Munthu aliyense wachuma ankapereka masekeli a siliva makumi asanu kwa mfumu ya ku Asiriya. Choncho mfumu ya ku Asiriya inabwerera ndipo sinakhalenso mʼdzikomo.
2Kings15:21 Ntchito zina za Menahemu ndi zonse zimene anachita
2Kings15:22 Menahemu anamwalira ndipo anayikidwa mʼmanda pamodzi ndi makolo ake. Ndipo Pekahiya mwana wake analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake.
2Kings15:23 Mʼchaka cha makumi asanu a Azariya mfumu ya Yuda
2Kings15:24 Pekahiya anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova. Iye sanaleke machimo a Yeroboamu mwana wa Nebati
2Kings15:25 Ndipo Peka mwana wa Remaliya
2Kings15:26 Ntchito zina za Pekahiya ndi zonse zimene anachita zinalembedwa mʼbuku la mbiri ya mafumu a Israeli.
2Kings15:27 Mʼchaka cha 52 cha Azariya mfumu ya Yuda
2Kings15:28 Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova. Sanaleke machimo a Yeroboamu mwana wa Nebati
2Kings15:29 Nthawi ya Peka mfumu ya Israeli
2Kings15:30 Kenaka Hoseya mwana wa Ela anachitira chiwembu Peka mwana wa Remaliya. Anamukantha ndi kumupha ndipo anakhala mfumu mʼmalo mwake mʼchaka makumi awiri cha Yotamu mwana wa Uziya.
2Kings15:31 Ntchito zina za Peka ndi zonse zimene anachita
2Kings15:32 Mʼchaka chachiwiri cha Peka mwana wa Remaliya mfumu ya Israeli
2Kings15:33 Iye anakhala mfumu ali ndi zaka 25 ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu zaka 16. Amayi ake anali Yerusa mwana wa Zadoki.
2Kings15:34 Iye anachita zabwino pamaso pa Yehova monga anachitira Uziya abambo ake.
2Kings15:35 Komabe malo opembedzera mafano sanawachotse ndipo anthu anapitiriza kupereka nsembe ndi kufukiza lubani kumeneko.
2Kings15:36 Ntchito zina za Yotamu ndi zonse zimene anachita
2Kings15:37 (Nthawi imeneyo
2Kings15:38 Yotamu anamwalira ndipo anayikidwa mʼmanda pamodzi ndi makolo ake mu Mzinda wa Davide abambo ake. Ndipo Ahazi mwana wake analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake.
2Kings16:1 Mʼchaka cha 17 cha Peka mwana wa Remaliya
2Kings16:2 Ahazi anakhala mfumu ali ndi zaka makumi awiri ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu zaka 16. Iye sanachite zabwino pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wake monga momwe Davide kholo lake ankachitira.
2Kings16:3 Iye anayenda mʼnjira ya mafumu a Israeli mpaka kupereka mwana wake wamwamuna pa moto ngati nsembe yopsereza
2Kings16:4 Iyeyo ankapereka nsembe ndi kufukiza lubani pa malo opembedzera mafano
2Kings16:5 Ndipo Rezini mfumu ya Aramu ndi Peka mwana wa Remaliya mfumu ya Israeli anapita kukachita naye nkhondo ku Yerusalemu ndipo anazinga Ahazi
2Kings16:6 Nthawi imeneyo Rezini mfumu ya Aramu anatenganso Elati ndi kumubwezera kwa Aaramu
2Kings16:7 Ahazi anatuma amithenga kwa Tigilati-Pileseri mfumu ya ku Asiriya kuti
2Kings16:8 Ndipo Ahazi anatenga siliva ndi golide amene anamupeza mʼNyumba ya Yehova ndi mosungira chuma cha nyumba ya mfumu ndi kutumiza ngati mphatso kwa mfumu ya ku Asiriya.
2Kings16:9 Mfumu ya ku Asiriya inamvera pokathira nkhondo mzinda wa Damasiko ndi kuwulanda. Anthu a mu mzindamo anawatumiza ku Kiri ndipo anapha Rezini.
2Kings16:10 Kenaka mfumu Ahazi inapita ku Damasiko kukakumana ndi Tigilati-Pileseri mfumu ya ku Asiriya. Iye anaona guwa lansembe ku Damasiko kuja ndipo anatumiza chitsanzo chake kwa wansembe Uriya
2Kings16:11 Choncho wansembe Uriya anamanga guwa lansembe molingana ndi chitsanzo chimene anamutumizira Mfumu Ahazi kuchokera ku Damasiko ndipo anatsiriza kumanga guwalo Ahazi asabwere kuchokera ku Damasiko kuja.
2Kings16:12 Mfumu itabwera kuchokera ku Damasiko kuja ndi kuona guwalo
2Kings16:13 Mfumu inapereka nsembe yopsereza ndi nsembe ya chakudya. Inapereka nsembe yachakumwa ndi kuwaza magazi a nsembe yake yachiyanjano paguwapo.
2Kings16:14 Guwa lamkuwa limene linali pamaso pa Yehova analichotsa kutsogolo kwa nyumbayo
2Kings16:15 Pamenepo Mfumu Ahazi inalamula wansembe Uriya kuti
2Kings16:16 Ndipo wansembe Uriya anachita monga analamulira Mfumu Ahazi.
2Kings16:17 Mfumu Ahazi anachotsa maferemu a maphaka nachotsapo mabeseni. Iye anatsitsa mbiya yayikulu imene inali pamwamba pa ngʼombe zamkuwa ndipo anayika pansi pa chiwundo cha miyala.
2Kings16:18 Iye anachotsa kadenga ka pa Sabata kamene kanamangidwa mʼkati mwa Nyumba ya Yehova ndiponso anatseka chipata cholowera mfumu cha kunja kwa nyumba ya Yehova pofuna kukondweretsa mfumu ya ku Asiriya.
2Kings16:19 Ntchito zina za Ahazi ndi zonse zimene anachita
2Kings16:20 Ahazi anamwalira ndipo anayikidwa mʼmanda pamodzi ndi makolo ake mu Mzinda wa Davide. Ndipo Hezekiya mwana wake analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake.
2Kings17:1 Mʼchaka cha 12 cha Ahazi mfumu ya Yuda
2Kings17:2 Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova
2Kings17:3 Salimenezeri mfumu ya ku Asiriya anabwera kudzathira nkhondo Hoseya amene anali pansi pa ulamuliro wake ndipo ankapereka msonkho kwa iyeyo.
2Kings17:4 Koma mfumu ya ku Asiriya inazindikira kuti Hoseya akuwukira
2Kings17:5 Mfumu ya ku Asiriya inapita kukathira nkhondo dziko lonse la Israeli ndipo inapita mpaka ku Samariya ndipo inazinga mzindawo kwa zaka zitatu.
2Kings17:6 Mʼchaka chachisanu ndi chinayi cha Hoseya
2Kings17:7 Zonsezi zinachitika chifukwa Aisraeli anachimwira Yehova Mulungu wawo
2Kings17:8 ndiponso ankatsatira miyambo ya anthu a mitundu imene Yehova anayichotsa pamene iwo ankafika mʼdzikomo pamodzinso ndi miyambo yonse imene mafumu a Israeli anayambitsa.
2Kings17:9 Ndipo Aisraeli ankachita zoyipa mwamseri kutsutsana ndi Yehova Mulungu wawo. Kuchokera ku nsanja ya alonda mpaka ku mzinda wotetezedwa
2Kings17:10 Anayimika miyala ya chipembedzo ndi mitengo ya mafano a Asera pa phiri lililonse lalitali ndi pansi pa mtengo uliwonse wa masamba ambiri.
2Kings17:11 Pa malo aliwonse opembedzera mafano
2Kings17:12 Ndipo iwowo ankapembedza mafano ngakhale Yehova ananena kuti
2Kings17:13 Yehova anachenjeza Israeli ndi Yuda kudzera mwa aneneri ake onse ndi alosi kuti
2Kings17:14 Koma anthuwa sanamvere ndipo anawumitsa khosi ngati momwe analili makolo awo
2Kings17:15 Anakana malangizo ake ndi pangano anachita ndi makolo awo ndipo ananyoza zochenjeza za Yehova. Iwo anatsatira mafano achabechabe nasanduka achabechabe. Anthuwa anatsanzira mitundu ya anthu owazungulira ngakhale kuti Yehova anawalamula kuti
2Kings17:16 Iwowo anasiya malamulo onse a Yehova Mulungu wawo
2Kings17:17 Ndipo anadutsitsa mʼmoto ana awo aamuna ndi aakazi. Iwo ankawombeza mawula
2Kings17:18 Choncho Yehova anakwiya nawo kwambiri Aisraeli ndipo anawachotsa pamaso pake. Palibe amene anatsala kupatula fuko la Yuda lokha.
2Kings17:19 Yuda nayenso sanasunge malamulo a Yehova Mulungu wawo. Iwo ankatsatira machitidwe amene Israeli anayambitsa.
2Kings17:20 Motero Yehova anakana Aisraeli onse. Iye anawazunza nawapereka mʼmanja mwa anthu ofunkha mpaka Iye atawachotseratu pamaso pake.
2Kings17:21 Yehova atangʼamba Israeli kumuchotsa ku nyumba ya Davide
2Kings17:22 Aisraeli anakakamira machimo onse amene Yeroboamu anachita ndipo sanawasiye
2Kings17:23 mpaka pamene Yehova anawachotsa pamaso pake monga anawachenjezera kudzera mwa atumiki ake onse
2Kings17:24 Mfumu ya ku Asiriya inabweretsa anthu a ku Babuloni
2Kings17:25 Iwo atayamba kukhala kumeneko
2Kings17:26 Tsono mfumu ya ku Asiriya inawuzidwa za nkhaniyi kuti
2Kings17:27 Tsono mfumu ya ku Asiriya inalamula kuti
2Kings17:28 Choncho mmodzi mwa ansembe amene anawatenga ku Samariya anabwera kudzakhala ku Beteli ndipo ankaphunzitsa anthuwo kupembedza Yehova.
2Kings17:29 Koma mtundu uliwonse wa anthu unkapangabe mafano a milungu yawoyawo mʼmizinda yambiri imene anthuwo ankakhala
2Kings17:30 Anthu a ku Babuloni anapanga Sukoti-Benoti
2Kings17:31 Aava anapanga Nibihazi ndi Taritaki
2Kings17:32 Iwo ankapembedza Yehova
2Kings17:33 Iwowo ankapembedza Yehova
2Kings17:34 Mpaka lero lino iwo akupitirizabe kuchita zimene ankachita poyamba. Sapembedza Yehova kapenanso kutsata malangizo ake ndi malamulo ake
2Kings17:35 Pamene Yehova anachita pangano ndi Aisraeli
2Kings17:36 Koma Yehova amene anakutulutsani mʼdziko la Igupto ndi dzanja lake lamphamvu ndiye amene muyenera kumupembedza.
2Kings17:37 Muyenera kusamalitsa nthawi zonse kusunga malangizo anga ndi malemba anga
2Kings17:38 Musayiwale pangano limene ndinapangana nanu ndipo musamapembedze milungu ina.
2Kings17:39 Mʼmalo mwake muzipembedza Yehova Mulungu wanu pakuti ndiye amene adzakulanditsani mʼdzanja la adani anu onse.”
2Kings17:40 Komabe iwo sanamvere ndipo anapitiriza kuchita zomwe ankachita kale.
2Kings17:41 Ngakhale anthuwo ankapembedza Yehova
2Kings18:1 Mʼchaka chachitatu cha Hoseya mwana wa Ela mfumu ya Israeli
2Kings18:2 Anakhala mfumu ali ndi zaka 25 ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu zaka 29. Amayi ake anali Abi
2Kings18:3 Iye anachita zolungama pamaso pa Yehova monga anachitira Davide kholo lake.
2Kings18:4 Anachotsa malo opembedzerako mafano
2Kings18:5 Hezekiya anadalira Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli. Kotero panalibe wina wofanana naye pakati pa mafumu onse a Yuda
2Kings18:6 Iye anakangamira Yehova ndipo sanamusiye koma anasunga malamulo amene Yehova anapatsa Mose.
2Kings18:7 Ndipo Yehova anali naye ndipo kulikonse kumene anapita zinthu zinkamuyendera bwino. Iye anagalukira mfumu ya ku Asiriya ndipo sanayitumikirenso.
2Kings18:8 Iye anakantha Afilisti kuyambira ku nsanja ya alonda mpaka ku mzinda wotetezedwa. Anakafika mpaka ku Gaza ndi ku malire ake.
2Kings18:9 Mʼchaka chachinayi cha Mfumu Hezekiya
2Kings18:10 Asiriya analanda mzindawu patatha zaka zitatu. Choncho mzinda wa Samariya unalandidwa chaka chachisanu ndi chimodzi cha Hezekiya
2Kings18:11 Mfumu ya ku Asiriya inatenga Aisraeli kupita nawo ku ukapolo ku Asiriya ndipo anakawakhazika ku Hala
2Kings18:12 Izi zinachitika chifukwa sanamvere zonena za Yehova Mulungu wawo
2Kings18:13 Mʼchaka chakhumi ndi chinayi cha ulamuliro wa Mfumu Hezekiya
2Kings18:14 Choncho Hezekiya mfumu ya Yuda anatumiza uthenga kwa mfumu ya ku Asiriya ku Lakisi wonena kuti
2Kings18:15 Mfumu Hezekiya inapereka siliva yense amene anapezeka mʼNyumba ya Yehova ndi mʼnyumba zosungiramo chuma cha mfumu.
2Kings18:16 Nthawi imeneyi Hezekiya mfumu ya Yuda anakanganula golide amene anakuta zitseko ndi mphuthu za chipata cha Nyumba ya Yehova namupereka kwa mfumu ya ku Asiriya.
2Kings18:17 Mfumu ya ku Asiriya inatuma Taritani
2Kings18:18 Iwo anayitana mfumu
2Kings18:19 Ndipo Rabusake anawawuza kuti
2Kings18:20 Iwe ukuti uli ndi luso ndiponso mphamvu pa nkhondo
2Kings18:21 Taona tsono
2Kings18:22 Ndipo ngati ukunena kwa ine kuti
2Kings18:23 “ ‘Ndipo tsopano bwera udzakambirane ndi mbuye wanga
2Kings18:24 Ungathe bwanji kugonjetsa ngakhale mmodzi mwa akazembe angʼonoangʼono a mbuye wanga
2Kings18:25 Kuwonjezera pamenepa
2Kings18:26 Pamenepo Eliyakimu mwana wa Hilikiya
2Kings18:27 Koma Rabusake anayankha kuti
2Kings18:28 Tsono Rabusake anayimirira nafuwula mu Chihebri kuti
2Kings18:29 Zimene mfumu ikunena ndi izi: ‘Musalole kuti Hezekiya akunamizeni. Iye sangakupulumutseni mʼdzanja langa.
2Kings18:30 Hezekiya asakukakamizeni kudalira Yehova ndi mawu akuti
2Kings18:31 “ ‘Musamumvere Hezekiya. Zimene mfumu ya ku Asiriya ikunena ndi izi: Pangani mtendere ndi ine ndipo mutuluke mu mzinda. Mukatero aliyense wa inu adzadya mphesa ndi nkhuyu za mʼmunda mwake ndiponso adzamwa madzi a mʼchitsime chake
2Kings18:32 mpaka nditabwera kudzakutengani kupita ku dziko lofanana ndi lanuli
2Kings18:33 Kodi mulungu wa anthu a mtundu wina uliwonse wapulumutsapo dziko lake mʼdzanja la mfumu ya ku Asiriya?
2Kings18:34 Kodi ili kuti milungu ya Hamati ndi Aripadi? Ili kuti milungu ya Sefaravaimu
2Kings18:35 Kodi ndi milungu iti mwa milungu yonse ya mayiko awa amene anapulumutsa dziko lake mʼdzanja langa? Nanga tsono Yehova adzapulumutsa Yerusalemu mʼdzanja langa motani?”
2Kings18:36 Koma anthu anakhala chete ndipo sanayankhepo kanthu
2Kings18:37 Pamenepo anthu atatu aja Eliyakimu
2Kings19:1 Mfumu Hezekiya atamva zimenezi
2Kings19:2 Iye anatuma Eliyakimu
2Kings19:3 Iwo anamuwuza kuti
2Kings19:4 Mwina Yehova Mulungu wanu adzamva mawu onse a Rabusake amene mbuye wake
2Kings19:5 Akuluakulu a Mfumu Hezekiya atafika kwa Yesaya
2Kings19:6 Yesaya anawawuza kuti
2Kings19:7 Tamverani! Ine ndidzayika mwa mfumuyo mzimu wina kotero kuti akadzamva mphekesera ya nkhondo
2Kings19:8 Rabusake atamva kuti mfumu ya ku Asiriya yachoka ku Lakisi
2Kings19:9 Nthawi imeneyi Senakeribu analandira uthenga wakuti Tirihaka
2Kings19:10 “Kawuzeni Hezekiya mfumu ya Yuda kuti: Usalole kuti Mulungu amene ukumudalira akupusitse ponena kuti
2Kings19:11 Ndithu iwe unamva chimene mafumu a Asiriya anachita ku mayiko ena onse
2Kings19:12 Kodi milungu ya mitundu imene makolo anga anayigonjetsa
2Kings19:13 Kodi mafumu a Hamati
2Kings19:14 Hezekiya analandira kalata kwa amithenga aja nayiwerenga. Pomwepo anapita ku Nyumba ya Yehova nayika kalatayo pamaso pa Yehova.
2Kings19:15 Ndipo Hezekiya anapemphera kwa Yehova nati
2Kings19:16 Inu Yehova
2Kings19:17 “Inu Yehova
2Kings19:18 Iwo anaponya milungu yawo pa moto ndi kuyiwononga pakuti sinali milungu koma mitengo ndi miyala chabe
2Kings19:19 Ndipo tsopano Inu Yehova Mulungu wathu
2Kings19:20 Ndipo Yesaya mwana wa Amozi anatumiza uthenga kwa Hezekiya wakuti
2Kings19:21 Mawu amene Yehova wayankhula wotsutsana naye ndi awa: “Namwali wa Ziyoni akukunyoza ndi kukuseka iwe. Mwana wamkazi wa Yerusalemu akupukusa mutu wake kumbuyo kwako.
2Kings19:22 Kodi iweyo wanyoza ndi kuchitira chipongwe yani? Kodi ndani amene wamufuwulira mawu ako ndi kumuyangʼana monyada? Wachitiratu izi Woyera wa Israeli!
2Kings19:23 Kudzera mwa amithenga ako wonyoza Ambuye. Ndipo wanena kuti
2Kings19:24 Ndakumba zitsime ku mayiko achilendo ndipo ndinamwa madzi a kumeneko. Ndi mapazi anga ndawumitsa mitsinje yonse ya ku Igupto.’ ”
2Kings19:25 “ ‘Kodi sunamvepo? Zimenezi ndinazikhazikitsa kalekale. Ndinazikonzeratu masiku amakedzana; tsopano ndachita kuti zichitikedi
2Kings19:26 Anthu a kumeneko ndi opanda mphamvu
2Kings19:27 “ ‘Koma Ine ndimadziwa kukhala kwako
2Kings19:28 Chifukwa chakuti wandikwiyira ndipo ndamva za mwano wako
2Kings19:29 “Koma iwe Hezekiya
2Kings19:30 Anthu a nyumba ya Yuda amene adzatsale adzazika mizu ndi kubereka zipatso.
2Kings19:31 Pakuti ku Yerusalemu kudzachokera anthu otsala
2Kings19:32 “Choncho chimene Yehova akunena za mfumu ya ku Asiriya ndi ichi: “ ‘Iye sadzalowa mu mzinda umenewu kapena kuponyamo muvi. Sadzayandikira mzindawu ndi zishango zake kapena kumanga nthumbira ya nkhondo.
2Kings19:33 Adzabwerera potsata njira imene anadzera pobwera; sadzalowa mu mzinda umenewu
2Kings19:34 Ndidzateteza mzinda umenewu kuwupulumutsa
2Kings19:35 Usiku umenewo mngelo wa Yehova anapita ku misasa ya ku Asiriya ndi kupha ankhondo 185
2Kings19:36 Choncho Senakeribu mfumu ya ku Asiriya anapasula misasa ndi kuchoka. Anabwerera ku Ninive nakakhala kumeneko.
2Kings19:37 Tsiku lina
2Kings20:1 Masiku amenewo Hezekiya anadwala ndipo anali pafupi kufa. Mneneri Yesaya
2Kings20:2 Hezekiya anatembenuka nayangʼana ku khoma ndipo anapemphera kwa Yehova kuti
2Kings20:3 “Inu Yehova
2Kings20:4 Yesaya asanatuluke mʼbwalo lapakati
2Kings20:5 “Bwerera
2Kings20:6 Ndidzawonjezera zaka khumi ndi zisanu pa moyo wako. Ndidzakupulumutsa iwe pamodzi ndi mzinda umenewu mʼdzanja la mfumu ya ku Asiriya. Ndidzateteza mzinda umenewu chifukwa cha Ine mwini ndiponso chifukwa cha Davide mtumiki wanga.’ ”
2Kings20:7 Pamenepo Yesaya anati
2Kings20:8 Tsono Hezekiya anafunsa Yesaya kuti
2Kings20:9 Yesaya anayankha kuti
2Kings20:10 Hezekiya anati
2Kings20:11 Pamenepo mneneri Yesaya anapemphera kwa Yehova ndipo Yehova anachititsa kuti chithunzithunzi chibwerere mʼmbuyo makwerero khumi pa makwerero amene mfumu Ahazi anamanga.
2Kings20:12 Pa nthawi imeneyo Merodaki-Baladani mwana wa Baladani mfumu ya Babuloni anatumiza amithenga kwa Hezekiya kukapereka makalata ndi mphatso
2Kings20:13 Hezekiya analandira amithengawo ndipo anawaonetsa zonse zimene zinali mʼnyumba zake zosungiramo chuma. Anawaonetsa siliva
2Kings20:14 Tsono mneneri Yesaya anapita kwa Mfumu Hezekiya namufunsa kuti
2Kings20:15 Mneneriyo anafunsa kuti
2Kings20:16 Pamenepo Yesaya anawuza Hezekiya kuti
2Kings20:17 Taonani
2Kings20:18 Ndipo ena mwa ana anu omwe
2Kings20:19 Hezekiya anayankha kuti
2Kings20:20 Ntchito zina za Hezekiya ndi zonse zimene anachita
2Kings20:21 Hezekiya anamwalira nagona pamodzi ndi makolo ake. Ndipo Manase mwana wake analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake.
2Kings21:1 Manase anakhala mfumu ali ndi zaka khumi ndi ziwiri ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu zaka 55. Amayi ake anali Hefiziba.
2Kings21:2 Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova
2Kings21:3 Iyetu anamanganso malo opembedzera mafano amene Hezekiya abambo ake anawawononga. Anamangira Baala maguwa a nsembe ndi mtengo wa fano la Asera monga anachitira Ahabu mfumu ya Israeli ndipo ankapembedza zolengedwa zonse zamlengalenga.
2Kings21:4 Anamanga maguwa ansembewa mʼNyumba ya Yehova
2Kings21:5 Mʼmabwalo onse awiri a Nyumba ya Yehova
2Kings21:6 Iye anapsereza mwana wake pa moto ngati nsembe
2Kings21:7 Iye anatenga fano losema la Asera limene analipanga ndi kuliyika mʼNyumba ya Yehova
2Kings21:8 Sindidzalola kuti Aisraeli achotsedwe mʼdziko lawo limene ndinapatsa makolo awo ngati iwowo adzasamala kuchita zinthu zonse zimene ndinawalamula ndi kusunga malamulo onse amene mtumiki wanga Mose anawapatsa.”
2Kings21:9 Koma anthu sanamvere. Manase anawasocheretsa
2Kings21:10 Yehova anayankhula kudzera mwa atumiki ake
2Kings21:11 “Manase mfumu ya Yuda wachita machimo onyansawa ndipo wachita zoyipa kupambana Aamori amene analipo kale iye asanabadwe ndi kuchimwitsa anthu a ku Yuda ndi mafano ake.
2Kings21:12 Choncho Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli akuti
2Kings21:13 Ndidzalanga Yerusalemu ndi Yuda pogwiritsa ntchito muyeso umene ndinalangira Samariya ndi Ahabu pamodzi ndi nyumba yake. Ndidzayeretsa Yerusalemu monga mmene munthu amachitira popukuta mbale ndipo atayipukuta amayivundikira pansi.
2Kings21:14 Ndidzawataya anthu otsala amene ndi cholowa changa ndipo ndidzawapereka mʼmanja mwa adani awo. Adzachotsedwa ndipo adaniwo adzawalanda zinthu zonse
2Kings21:15 chifukwa anachita zoyipa pamaso panga ndipo akhala akundikwiyitsa kuchokera tsiku limene makolo awo anatuluka mu Igupto mpaka lero lino.’ ”
2Kings21:16 Kuwonjezera apo
2Kings21:17 Ntchito zina za Manase ndi zonse zimene anachita
2Kings21:18 Manase anagona ndi makolo ake ndipo anayikidwa mʼmanda mʼmunda wa Uza
2Kings21:19 Amoni anakhala mfumu ali ndi zaka 22 ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu zaka ziwiri. Amayi ake anali Mesulemeti mwana wa Haruzi
2Kings21:20 Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova monga anachitira Manase abambo ake.
2Kings21:21 Anatsatira makhalidwe onse a abambo ake. Ankapembedza mafano amene abambo akewo ankawapembedza ndipo ankawagwadira.
2Kings21:22 Iyeyo anasiya Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ake ndipo sanayende mʼnjira ya Yehova.
2Kings21:23 Nduna za Amoni zinamuchita chiwembu ndipo zinamupha mʼnyumba yake.
2Kings21:24 Koma anthu a mʼdzikomo anapha onse amene anachitira chiwembu Mfumu Amoni
2Kings21:25 Ntchito zina za Amoni ndi zonse zimene anachita
2Kings21:26 Iye anayikidwa mʼmanda ake mʼmunda wa Uza. Ndipo Yosiya mwana wake analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake.
2Kings22:1 Yosiya anakhala mfumu ali ndi zaka zisanu ndi zitatu ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu zaka 31. Amayi ake anali Yedida mwana wa Adaiya wochokera ku Bozikati.
2Kings22:2 Iye anachita zolungama pamaso pa Yehova ndipo anayenda mʼnjira zonse za Davide kholo lake
2Kings22:3 Mʼchaka cha 18 cha ufumu wake
2Kings22:4 “Pita kwa mkulu wa ansembe Hilikiya ndipo ukamuwuze kuti awerenge ndalama zimene anthu abwera nazo ku Nyumba ya Yehova
2Kings22:5 Ndalamazo azipereke kwa anthu amene asankhidwa kuti ayangʼanire ntchito ya Nyumba ya Yehova. Ndipo anthu amenewa azilipira antchito amene akukonzanso Nyumba ya Yehova
2Kings22:6 amisiri a matabwa
2Kings22:7 Koma anthu amene apatsidwa ndalama zolipira antchito okonza Nyumbayo asawafunse za kagwiritsidwe ntchito ka ndalamazo
2Kings22:8 Mkulu wa ansembe Hilikiya anawuza Safani
2Kings22:9 Ndipo Safani mlembi uja
2Kings22:10 Kenaka Safani mlembiyo
2Kings22:11 Mfumu itamva mawu a mʼBuku la Malamulo
2Kings22:12 Iyo inalamula wansembe Hilikiya
2Kings22:13 “Pitani mukafunse Yehova mʼmalo mwanga ndi mʼmalo mwa anthu onse a mʼdziko la Yuda
2Kings22:14 Choncho Hilikiya wansembe
2Kings22:15 Ndipo iye anawawuza kuti
2Kings22:16 ‘Ichi ndi chimene Yehova akunena: Taonani
2Kings22:17 Chifukwa anthuwo andisiya Ine ndi kumafukiza lubani kwa milungu ina nandikwiyitsa ndi mafano onse amene manja awo anapanga
2Kings22:18 Koma mfumu ya Yuda imene inakutumani kuti mudzafunse kwa Yehova kayiwuzeni kuti
2Kings22:19 Chifukwa unasweka mtima ndi kudzichepetsa wekha pamaso pa Yehova
2Kings22:20 Choncho taona
2Kings23:1 Pamenepo mfumu inayitanitsa akuluakulu onse a ku Yuda ndi Yerusalemu.
2Kings23:2 Mfumuyo inapita ku Nyumba ya Yehova pamodzi ndi anthu onse a ku Yuda
2Kings23:3 Mfumu inayimirira pambali pa chipilala ndi kuchita pangano pamaso pa Yehova kuti idzatsatira Yehova ndi kusunga malamulo
2Kings23:4 Mfumu inalamula wansembe wamkulu Hilikiya
2Kings23:5 Iye anachotsa ansembe a mafano amene anayikidwa ndi mafumu a Yuda kuti azifukiza lubani ku malo opembedzera mafano a ku mizinda ya ku Yuda ndi kumalo ozungulira Yerusalemu
2Kings23:6 Anachotsa fano la Asera mʼNyumba ya Yehova napita nalo kunja kwa Yerusalemu
2Kings23:7 Iye anagwetsanso tinyumba ta ochita zachiwerewere
2Kings23:8 Yosiya anabweretsanso ansembe onse kuchokera mʼmizinda ya Yuda
2Kings23:9 Ngakhale kuti ansembe a ku malo opembedzera mafanowo sanawalole kuti atumikire pa guwa lansembe la Yehova mu Yerusalemu
2Kings23:10 Mfumu Yosiya anawononganso Tofeti
2Kings23:11 Anachotsa pa chipata cholowera ku Nyumba ya Yehova akavalo amene mafumu a Yuda anawapereka ngati nsembe kwa dzuwa. Akavalo anali pafupi ndi bwalo la chipinda cha mkulu wina wotchedwa Natani-Meleki. Ndipo Yosiya anatentha magaleta opembedzera dzuwa.
2Kings23:12 Anagwetsa maguwa amene mafumu a Yuda anawamanga pa denga pafupi ndi chipinda chapamwamba cha Ahazi
2Kings23:13 Mfumuyo inawononga malo opembedzera mafano amene ali kummawa kwa Yerusalemu cha kumpoto kwa Phiri la Chiwonongeko. Maguwawa Solomoni mfumu ya Israeli inamangira Asitoreti
2Kings23:14 Yosiya anaphwanya miyala ya chipembedzo ndiponso anadula mitengo ya fano la Asera ndipo anakwirira malowo ndi mafupa a anthu.
2Kings23:15 Ngakhalenso guwa lansembe la ku Beteli
2Kings23:16 Kenaka Yosiya anayangʼanayangʼana ndipo ataona manda amene anali pomwepo
2Kings23:17 Mfumu inafunsa kuti
2Kings23:18 Mfumuyo inati
2Kings23:19 Monga momwe Yosiya anachitira ku Beteli
2Kings23:20 Yosiya anapha ansembe onse amene ankatumikira ku malo opembedzera mafano
2Kings23:21 Mfumu inalamula anthu onse kuti
2Kings23:22 Paska yotere inali isanachitikepo kuyambira nthawi ya oweruza amene anatsogolera Israeli
2Kings23:23 Koma mʼchaka cha 18 cha Mfumu Yosiya
2Kings23:24 Kuwonjezera apa
2Kings23:25 Yosiyayo asanalowe ufumu
2Kings23:26 Komabe Yehova sanachotse mkwiyo wake woopsa
2Kings23:27 Choncho Yehova anati
2Kings23:28 Ntchito zina za Yosiya ndi zonse zimene anachita
2Kings23:29 Yosiya akanali mfumu
2Kings23:30 Atumiki a Yosiyayo ananyamula mtembo wake mu galeta kuchokera ku Megido mpaka ku Yerusalemu ndipo anamuyika mʼmanda akeake. Ndipo anthu a mʼdzikomo anatenga Yehowahazi mwana wa Yosiya namudzoza
2Kings23:31 Yehowahazi anakhala mfumu ali ndi 23 ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu miyezi itatu. Amayi ake anali Hamutali
2Kings23:32 Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova monga momwe anachitira makolo ake.
2Kings23:33 Farao Neko anamuyika mʼndende ku Ribula mʼdziko la Hamati kuti asalamulirenso mu Yerusalemu. Farao analamula Yuda kuti azikhoma msonkho wa siliva wolemera makilogalamu 3
2Kings23:34 Farao Neko anayika Eliyakimu mwana wa Yosiya kuti akhale mfumu mʼmalo mwa abambo ake Yosiya
2Kings23:35 Yehoyakimu anapereka kwa Farao Neko siliva ndi golide amene anamufuna uja. Koma kuti iye apereke zimenezi
2Kings23:36 Yehoyakimu anali wa zaka 25 pamene anakhala mfumu ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu zaka 11. Amayi ake anali Zebuda
2Kings23:37 Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova monga momwe anachitira makolo ake.
2Kings24:1 Pa nthawi ya ulamuliro wa Yehoyakimu
2Kings24:2 Yehova anatumiza magulu a Ababuloni
2Kings24:3 Ndithu
2Kings24:4 kuphatikizapo kukhetsa magazi a anthu osalakwa. Chifukwa iye anadzaza Yerusalemu ndi magazi a anthu osalakwa ndipo Yehova sanafune kumukhululukira.
2Kings24:5 Ntchito zina za Yehoyakimu ndi zonse zimene anachita
2Kings24:6 Yehoyakimu anamwalira ndipo anayikidwa mʼmanda pamodzi ndi makolo ake. Ndipo Yehoyakini mwana wake analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake.
2Kings24:7 Mfumu ya Igupto sinatulukenso mʼdziko lake chifukwa mfumu ya Babuloni inalanda mayiko onse kuchokera ku Mtsinje wa ku Igupto mpaka ku Mtsinje wa Yufurate.
2Kings24:8 Yehoyakini anakhala mfumu ali ndi zaka 18 ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu miyezi itatu. Amayi ake anali Nehusita mwana wa Elinatani wa ku Yerusalemu.
2Kings24:9 Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova monga anachitira abambo ake.
2Kings24:10 Nthawi imeneyo ankhondo a Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babuloni anabwera ku Yerusalemu nazinga mzindawo ndi misasa ya nkhondo
2Kings24:11 ndipo Nebukadinezara anafika ku mzindawo pamene ankhondo ake anawuzinga.
2Kings24:12 Yehoyakini mfumu ya Yuda pamodzi ndi amayi ake
2Kings24:13 Monga ananenera Yehova
2Kings24:14 Anatenga anthu onse a mu Yerusalemu kupita nawo ku ukapolo. Akuluakulu onse pamodzi ndi anthu ankhondo
2Kings24:15 Nebukadinezara anatenga Yehoyakini ngati kapolo kupita naye ku Babuloni. Mu Yerusalemu anatenganso amayi a mfumu
2Kings24:16 Mfumu ya Babuloni inatumizanso ku Babuloni anthu ankhondo 70
2Kings24:17 Iye analonga ufumu Mataniya
2Kings24:18 Zedekiya anakhala mfumu ali ndi zaka 21 ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu zaka 11. Amayi ake anali Hamutali mwana wa Yeremiya wa ku Libina.
2Kings24:19 Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova monga anachitira Yehoyakimu.
2Kings24:20 Zonsezi zinachitikira Yerusalemu ndi Yuda chifukwa cha mkwiyo wa Mulungu ndipo pa mapeto pake anawachotsa pamaso pake. Ndipo Zedekiya anawukira mfumu ya Babuloni.
2Kings25:1 Choncho mʼchaka chachisanu ndi chinayi cha ulamuliro wa Zedekiya
2Kings25:2 Mzindawo anawuzinga mpaka chaka cha khumi ndi chimodzi cha Mfumu Zedekiya.
2Kings25:3 Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chinayi pa mwezi wachinayi
2Kings25:4 Pamenepo khoma la mzindawo linabowoledwa ndipo gulu lonse la ankhondo linathawa usiku kudzera pa chipata cha pakati pa makoma awiri pafupi ndi munda wa mfumu
2Kings25:5 koma gulu la ankhondo la ku Babuloni linalondola mfumu Zedekiya ndi kumupeza mʼchigwa cha ku Yeriko. Ankhondo onse anamusiya yekha nabalalika.
2Kings25:6 Anagwidwa napita naye kwa mfumu ya ku Babuloni ku Ribula
2Kings25:7 Iwo anapha ana a Zedekiya iyeyo akuona. Kenaka anakolowola maso a Zedekiya namumanga ndi unyolo wamkuwa ndi kupita naye ku Babuloni.
2Kings25:8 Mwezi wachisanu
2Kings25:9 Iye anatentha Nyumba ya Yehova
2Kings25:10 Gulu lonse la ankhondo la ku Babuloni limene linali ndi mkulu wa asilikali oteteza mfumu ija
2Kings25:11 Nebuzaradani mkulu wa asilikali uja anatenga anthu amene anatsala mu mzindamo
2Kings25:12 Koma mkulu wa asilikaliyo anasiya anthu ena osauka kwambiri mʼdzikomo kuti azisamalira minda ya mpesa ndi minda ina.
2Kings25:13 Ababuloni anaphwanya zipilala zamkuwa
2Kings25:14 Iwo anatenganso miphika
2Kings25:15 Mkulu wa asilikali uja anatenganso zofukizira lubani ndi mbale zowazira magazi. Zonsezi zinali zopangidwa ndi golide wabwino kwambiri kapena siliva.
2Kings25:16 Mkuwa wochokera ku zipilala ziwiri zija
2Kings25:17 Chipilala chilichonse chinali chotalika mamita asanu ndi atatu. Mutu wa mkuwa umene unali pamwamba pa chipilalacho unali mita imodzi ndi theka ndipo unakongoletsedwa ndi ukonde wa makangadza a mkuwa amene anazungulira mutuwo. Chipilala chachiwiri chinali chofanana ndi chinacho
2Kings25:18 Mkulu wa asilikali uja anagwira ukapolo mkulu wa ansembe Seraya
2Kings25:19 Mwa anthu amene anali mu mzindamo
2Kings25:20 Nebuzaradani mkulu wa asilikali uja anawatenga onsewo napita nawo kwa mfumu ya Babuloni ku Ribula.
2Kings25:21 Ku Ribulako
2Kings25:22 Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babuloni anasankha Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu
2Kings25:23 Atsogoleri onse ankhondo ndi anthu awo atamva kuti mfumu ya Babuloni yasankha Gedaliya kukhala bwanamkubwa
2Kings25:24 Gedaliya analumbira powatsimikizira iwo ndi anthu awo. Iye anati
2Kings25:25 Koma pa mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri
2Kings25:26 Chifukwa cha zimenezi
2Kings25:27 Pa chaka cha 37 cha ukapolo wa Yehoyakini mfumu ya Yuda
2Kings25:28 Anamukomera mtima namukweza kupambana mafumu ena onse amene anali naye ku Babuloni.
2Kings25:29 Choncho Yoyakini anavula zovala zake za ku ndende
2Kings25:30 Mfumu inkamupatsa Yehoyakini chakudya tsiku lililonse pa moyo wake wonse.

1Chronicles27:5 Wolamulira ankhondo wachitatu

1Chronicles27:18 	mtsogoleri wa fuko la Yuda: Elihu
1Chronicles27:19 	mtsogoleri wa fuko la Zebuloni: Isimaiya mwana wa Obadiya; mtsogoleri wa fuko la Nafutali: Yerimoti mwana wa Azirieli;

1Chronicles27:21 	mtsogoleri wa fuko la theka la Manase limene linali ku Giliyadi: Ido mwana wa Zekariya; mtsogoleri wa fuko la Benjamini: Yaasieli mwana wa Abineri;
1Chronicles27:22 mtsogoleri wa fuko la Dani: Azareli mwana wa Yerohamu. Awa anali akuluakulu a mafuko a Israeli.
1Chronicles27:23 Davide sanawerenge amuna amene anali ndi zaka makumi awiri kapena kucheperapo
1Chronicles27:24 Yowabu mwana wa Zeruya anayamba kuwerenga amuna koma sanamalize. Mkwiyo unagwera Aisraeli chifukwa cha zimenezi ndipo chiwerengerochi sanachilowetse mʼbuku la mbiri ya mfumu Davide.
1Chronicles27:25 Azimaveti mwana wa Adieli ankayangʼanira nyumba zosungiramo katundu wa mfumu. Yonatani mwana wa Uziya ankayangʼanira nyumba zosungiramo katundu wa maboma ozungulira
1Chronicles27:26 Eziri mwana wa Kelubi ankayangʼanira anthu ogwira ntchito yolima ku munda.
1Chronicles27:27 Simei wa ku Rama ankayangʼanira minda ya mpesa. Zabidi wa ku Sifamu ankayangʼanira mphesa ndi mosungiramo mwake.
1Chronicles27:28 Baala-Hanani wa ku Gederi ankayangʼanira mitengo ya olivi ndi ya mikuyu ya ku Sefela. Yowasi ankayangʼanira mafuta a Olivi.
1Chronicles27:29 Sitirayi wa ku Saroni ankayangʼanira ziweto zimene amaweta ku Saroni. Safati mwana wa Adilayi ankayangʼanira ngʼombe zakuzigwa.
1Chronicles27:30 Obili Mwismaeli ankayangʼanira ngamira. Yehideya Mmerenoti ankayangʼanira abulu.
1Chronicles27:31 Yazizi Mhagiri akayangʼanira nkhosa ndi mbuzi. Onsewa anali akuluakulu oyangʼanira chuma cha mfumu Davide.

2Chronicles1:2 Tsono Solomoni anayankhula kwa Aisraeli onse
2Chronicles1:3 Solomoni pamodzi ndi gulu lonse la anthu anapita ku malo ofunika kwambiri pachipembedzo ku Gibiyoni. Tenti ya msonkhano ya Mulungu inali kumeneko
2Chronicles1:4 Davide anabweretsa Bokosi la Mulungu kuchokera ku Kiriyati Yearimu
2Chronicles1:5 Koma guwa lansembe lamkuwa limene Bezaleli mwana wa Uri
2Chronicles1:6 Solomoni anapita pamene panali guwa lansembe lamkuwa pamaso pa Yehova mu tenti ya msonkhano ndipo anapereka nsembe zopsereza 1
2Chronicles1:7 Usiku umenewo Mulungu anaonekera kwa Solomoni ndipo anati kwa iye
2Chronicles1:8 Solomoni anayankha Mulungu kuti
2Chronicles1:9 Tsopano Inu Yehova Mulungu
2Chronicles1:10 Mundipatse nzeru ndi luntha zolamulira anthu awa
2Chronicles1:11 Mulungu anati kwa Solomoni
2Chronicles1:12 Ine ndidzakupatsa nzeru ndi chidziwitso. Ndipo ndidzakupatsanso katundu
2Chronicles1:13 Kotero Solomoni anabwerera ku Yerusalemu kuchoka kumalo opembedzerako a ku Gibiyoni
2Chronicles1:14 Solomoni anasonkhanitsa magaleta ndi akavalo; anali ndi magaleta 1
2Chronicles1:15 Mfumu inasandutsa siliva ndi golide kukhala ngati miyala wamba mu Yerusalemu. Inasandutsanso mkungudza kukhala wochuluka ngati mitengo ya mkuyu ya ku zigwa.
2Chronicles1:16 Solomoni amagula akavalo ku Igupto ndi Kuwe pakuti anthu amalonda a mfumu amakawagula ku Kuwe.
2Chronicles1:17 Anthu ankagula galeta ku Igupto pa mtengo wa masekeli asiliva 600 ndipo kavalo pa mtengo wa ndalama zasiliva 150. Iwo ankazigulitsanso kwa mafumu onse a Ahiti ndi a Aramu.
2Chronicles2:1 Solomoni anatsimikiza zoti amange Nyumba ya Dzina la Yehova ndi nyumba yake yaufumu.
2Chronicles2:2 Iye analemba ntchito anthu 70
2Chronicles2:3 Solomoni anatumiza uthenga uwu kwa Hiramu mfumu ya ku Turo: “Munditumizire mitengo ya mkungudza monga munachitira ndi abambo anga pamene munawatumizira mitengo ya mkungudza yomangira nyumba yaufumu yokhalamo.
2Chronicles2:4 Tsono ine ndikufuna kumanga Nyumba ya Yehova Mulungu wanga ndi kuyipereka kwa Iye kuti tiziyikamo buledi wopatulika nthawi zonse ndiponso kuperekeramo nsembe zopsereza mmawa uliwonse ndi madzulo ndi pa masabata ndi pa masiku a chikondwerero cha mwezi watsopano ndiponso pa masiku osankhika a chikondwerero cha Yehova Mulungu wathu
2Chronicles2:5 “Nyumba ya Mulungu imene ndidzamange idzakhala yayikulu
2Chronicles2:6 Koma ndani angathe kumumangira Iye Nyumba
2Chronicles2:7 “Tsono tumizireni munthu waluso pa ntchito zagolide ndi siliva
2Chronicles2:8 “Munditumizirenso mitengo ya mkungudza
2Chronicles2:9 kuti andipatse matabwa ambiri
2Chronicles2:10 Ine ndidzalipira antchito anu amene adzacheke matabwa matani 1
2Chronicles2:11 Hiramu
2Chronicles2:12 Ndipo Hiramu anawonjezera kunena kuti
2Chronicles2:13 “Ine ndikukutumizira Hiramu Abi
2Chronicles2:14 amene amayi ake anali wochokera ku Dani ndipo abambo ake anali a ku Turo. Iye anaphunzitsidwa kugwira ntchito zagolide ndi siliva
2Chronicles2:15 “Tsono mbuye wanga tumizirani antchito anu tirigu ndi barele
2Chronicles2:16 ndipo ife tidzadula mitengo yonse imene mukuyifuna kuchokera ku Lebanoni ndipo tidzayimanga pamodzi ndi kuyiyadamitsa pa madzi mpaka ku Yopa. Ndipo inu mudzatha kuyitenga mpaka ku Yerusalemu.”
2Chronicles2:17 Solomoni anawerenga alendo onse amene anali mu Israeli
2Chronicles2:18 Iye anayika anthu 70
2Chronicles3:1 Pamenepo Solomoni anayamba kumanga Nyumba ya Yehova mu Yerusalemu pa Phiri la Moriya
2Chronicles3:2 Iye anayamba kumanga pa tsiku lachiwiri la mwezi wachiwiri mʼchaka chachinayi cha ulamuliro wake.
2Chronicles3:3 Maziko amene Solomoni anayika pomanga Nyumba ya Mulungu ndi awa: Mulitali munali mamita 27
2Chronicles3:4 Chipinda cha polowera mulitali mwake chinali mamita asanu ndi anayi ofanana ndi mulifupi mwake mwa nyumbayo. Msinkhu wake unali mamita 54. Iye anakuta nyumbayo mʼkati mwake ndi golide woyengeka bwino.
2Chronicles3:5 Chipinda chachikulu
2Chronicles3:6 Iye anakongoletsa Nyumba ya Mulunguyo ndi miyala yokongola. Ndipo golide amene anagwiritsa ntchito anali golide wa ku Paravaimu.
2Chronicles3:7 Iye anakutira ndi golide mitanda ya ku denga
2Chronicles3:8 Iye anamanga Malo Opatulika Kwambiri ndipo mulitali mwake munali mofanana ndi mulifupi mwa Nyumba mamita asanu ndi anayi. Anakuta mʼkati mwake ndi golide wosalala wolemera matani makumi awiri.
2Chronicles3:9 Misomali yagolide imalemera magalamu 570. Anakutanso ndi golide zipinda zapamwamba.
2Chronicles3:10 Ku Malo Opatulika Kwambiri iye anapangako Akerubi awiri achitsulo ndipo anawakuta ndi golide.
2Chronicles3:11 Kutalika kwa mapiko onse a Akerubi kunali mamita asanu ndi anayi. Phiko la Kerubi woyamba linali loposerapo mamita awiri ndipo limakhudza khoma la Nyumba ya Mulungu
2Chronicles3:12 Chimodzimodzinso phiko la Kerubi wachiwiri linali loposerapo mamita awiri ndipo limakhudza mbali ina ya khoma la Nyumba ya Mulungu
2Chronicles3:13 Mapiko a Akerubiwa akawatambasula amatalika mamita asanu ndi anayi. Akerubiwa anayimirira pa mapazi awo
2Chronicles3:14 Solomoni anapanga nsalu zotchingira zobiriwira
2Chronicles3:15 Kutsogolo kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu anamangako zipilala ziwiri
2Chronicles3:16 Iye anapanga maunyolo olumikizanalumikizana ndipo anawayika pamwamba pa zipilalazo. Anapanganso makangadza 100 ndipo anawalumikiza ku maunyolo aja.
2Chronicles3:17 Solomoni anayimika nsanamirazo kutsogolo kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu
2Chronicles4:1 Solomoni anapanga guwa lamkuwa limene mulitali mwake linali mamita asanu ndi anayi
2Chronicles4:2 Kenaka iye anapanga mbiya yayikulu yachitsulo. Inali yozungulira ndipo pakamwa pake panali pa mamita anayi ndi theka
2Chronicles4:3 Mʼmunsi mwa mkombero wa mbiyayo anajambulamo zithunzi zangʼombe zazimuna mozungulira
2Chronicles4:4 Mbiyayo anayisanjika pa ngʼombe zamkuwa khumi ndi ziwiri
2Chronicles4:5 Mbiyayo inali yochindikala ngati chikhatho ndipo mkombero wake unali ngati mkombero wa chikho
2Chronicles4:6 Kenaka anapanga mabeseni khumi otsukira zinthu ndipo asanu amawayika mbali ya kummwera
2Chronicles4:7 Solomoni anapanga zoyikapo nyale khumi zagolide monga momwe kunalembedwera ndipo anaziyika mʼNyumba ya Mulungu
2Chronicles4:8 Iye anapanga matebulo khumi ndipo anawayika mʼNyumba ya Mulungu
2Chronicles4:9 Iye anapanga bwalo la ansembe
2Chronicles4:10 Anayika mbiya ija mbali yakummwera pamene mbali ya kummawa ndi kummwera zimakumana.
2Chronicles4:11 Iye anapanganso miphika ndi mafosholo ndi mabeseni owazira magazi. Kotero Hiramu anatsiriza ntchito yonse ya ku Nyumba ya Mulungu imene ankagwirira Mfumu Solomoni:
2Chronicles4:12 	Nsanamira ziwiri; mbale ziwiri za mitu yapamwamba pa nsanamirazo; maukonde awiri okongoletsera mbale ziwiri za mitu yapamwamba pa nsanamirazo;
2Chronicles4:13 	makangadza 400 a maukonde awiri okongoletserawo (mizere iwiri ya makangadza pa ukonde uliwonse
2Chronicles4:14 	miyendo pamodzi ndi mabeseni ake;
2Chronicles4:15 	mbiya pamodzi ndi ngʼombe khumi ndi ziwiri zazimuna zosanjikapo mbiyayo.
2Chronicles4:16 Miphika
2Chronicles4:17 Mfumu inapangitsa zimenezi mʼchigwa cha Yorodani
2Chronicles4:18 Zinthu zonse zimene Solomoni anapanga zinali zochuluka kwambiri kotero kuti kulemera kwa mkuwa sikunadziwike.
2Chronicles4:19 Solomoni anapanganso ziwiya zonse zimene zinali mʼNyumba ya Mulungu: guwa lansembe lagolide; matebulo pamene ankayikapo buledi woperekedwa kwa Mulungu;
2Chronicles4:20 	zoyikapo nyale zagolide ndi nyale zake zagolide weniweni
2Chronicles4:21 	maluwa agolide
2Chronicles4:22 zozimitsira nyale zagolide weniweni
2Chronicles5:1 Pamene ntchito yonse imene Solomoni anagwira pa Nyumba ya Yehova inatha
2Chronicles5:2 Kenaka Solomoni anasonkhanitsa akuluakulu a Israeli mu Yerusalemu
2Chronicles5:3 Ndipo Aisraeli onse anasonkhana pamaso pa mfumu nthawi ya chikondwerero cha mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri.
2Chronicles5:4 Akuluakulu onse a Israeli atafika
2Chronicles5:5 ndipo anabwera nalo bokosi lija pamodzi ndi tenti ya msonkhano ndi ziwiya zonse zopatulika zimene zinali mʼmenemo. Ansembe ndi Alevi ndiye anazinyamula
2Chronicles5:6 ndipo Mfumu Solomoni ndi gulu lonse la Aisraeli amene anasonkhana naye anali patsogolo pa Bokosi la Chipangano
2Chronicles5:7 Ansembe anafika nalo Bokosi la Chipangano la Yehova mʼchipinda chamʼkati mwenimweni
2Chronicles5:8 Akerubiwo anatambalitsa mapiko awo pamwamba pa Bokosi la Chipangano ndipo anaphimba bokosilo pamodzi ndi mitengo yonyamulira.
2Chronicles5:9 Mitengoyi inali yayitali kwambiri ndipo inkaonekera kunja kwa chipinda chamʼkati cha Malo Opatulika
2Chronicles5:10 Mʼbokosimo munalibe kanthu kena kalikonse kupatula miyala iwiri imene Mose anayikamo ku Horebu
2Chronicles5:11 Kenaka ansembe anatulukamo mʼMalo Opatulika. Ansembe onse amene anali mʼmenemo anali atadziyeretsa posayangʼaniranso magulu awo ochokera.
2Chronicles5:12 Alevi onse amene anali oyimba: Asafu
2Chronicles5:13 Oyimba malipenga ndi oyimba nyimbo aja amayimba mogwirizana
2Chronicles5:14 choncho ansembe sanathe kugwira ntchito yawo chifukwa cha mtambowo
2Chronicles6:1 Pamenepo Solomoni anati
2Chronicles6:2 ine ndakumangirani Nyumba yokongola kwambiri
2Chronicles6:3 Aisraeli onse ali chiyimire pomwepo
2Chronicles6:4 Ndipo inati
2Chronicles6:5 ‘Kuyambira tsiku limene ndinatulutsa anthu anga ku Igupto
2Chronicles6:6 Koma tsopano ndasankha Yerusalemu kuti Dzina langa likhale kumeneko ndiponso ndasankha Davide kuti alamulire anthu anga Aisraeli.’
2Chronicles6:7 “Abambo anga Davide anali ndi maganizo mu mtima mwawo oti amangire Nyumba Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli.
2Chronicles6:8 Koma Yehova ananena kwa abambo anga Davide kuti
2Chronicles6:9 Komatu si iwe amene udzamanga Nyumba ya Mulungu koma mwana wako
2Chronicles6:10 “Yehova wasunga zimene analonjeza. Ine ndalowa mʼmalo mwa abambo anga Davide
2Chronicles6:11 Mʼmenemo ndayikamo Bokosi la Chipangano
2Chronicles6:12 Pamenepo Solomoni anayimirira patsogolo pa guwa lansembe la Yehova patsogolo pa gulu lonse la Aisraeli ndipo anakweza manja ake.
2Chronicles6:13 Iyeyo anali atapanga nsanja yamkuwa
2Chronicles6:14 Iye anati
2Chronicles6:15 Inu mwasunga lonjezo lanu kwa abambo anga Davide
2Chronicles6:16 “Ndipo tsopano
2Chronicles6:17 Ndipo tsopano Inu Yehova
2Chronicles6:18 “Kodi Mulungu angakhaledi pa dziko lapansi ndi munthu? Mlengalenga ngakhale kumwamba kwenikweni sikungakukwaneni. Nanga kuli bwanji ndi Nyumba iyi imene ndamanga!
2Chronicles6:19 Koma Inu Yehova
2Chronicles6:20 Maso anu azikhala otsekuka kuyangʼana Nyumba ino usana ndi usiku
2Chronicles6:21 Imvani mapembedzero a mtumiki wanu ndi a anthu anu Aisraeli pamene akupemphera akuyangʼana malo ano. Imvani kumwambako
2Chronicles6:22 “Munthu akalakwira mnzake
2Chronicles6:23 imvani kumwambako ndi kuchitapo kanthu. Weruzani atumiki anuwo
2Chronicles6:24 “Anthu anu Aisraeli akagonja kwa adani awo chifukwa akuchimwirani ndipo akatembenukira kwa Inu ndi kuvomereza Dzina lanu
2Chronicles6:25 pamenepo imvani kumwambako ndi kukhululukira tchimo la anthu anu Aisraeli ndi kuwabweretsa ku dziko limene munawapatsa iwo ndi makolo awo.
2Chronicles6:26 “Pamene kumwamba kwatsekeka ndipo mvula sikugwa chifukwa anthu anu akuchimwirani
2Chronicles6:27 pamenepo imvani kumwambako ndipo muwakhululukire atumiki anu
2Chronicles6:28 “Pamene mʼdziko mwagwa njala kapena mliri
2Chronicles6:29 ndipo wina aliyense mwa Aisraeli akapemphera kapena kukudandaulirani
2Chronicles6:30 pamenepo imvani kumwambako
2Chronicles6:31 motero iwo adzakuopani ndipo adzayenda mʼnjira zanu masiku onse amene adzakhale mʼdziko limene munalipereka kwa makolo athu.
2Chronicles6:32 “Ndipo kunena za mlendo amene si mmodzi wa anthu anu Aisraeli
2Chronicles6:33 pamenepo imvani kumwambako
2Chronicles6:34 “Anthu akapita ku nkhondo kukamenyana ndi adani awo
2Chronicles6:35 pamenepo imvani kumwamba pemphero lawo ndi kupempha kwawo ndipo muwapulumutse.
2Chronicles6:36 “Pamene achimwira inu
2Chronicles6:37 Ngati asintha mitima yawo ku dziko limene ali akapolo ndi kulapa ndi kukudandaulirani inu mʼdziko la ukapolo wawo ndi kunena kuti
2Chronicles6:38 Ndipo ngati atembenukira kwa inu ndi mtima ndi moyo wawo wonse mʼdziko lawo la ukapolo kumene anatengedwako ndi kupemphera moyangʼana dziko limene inu munalipereka kwa makolo awo
2Chronicles6:39 pamenepo imvani kumwamba
2Chronicles6:40 “Tsono Inu Mulungu wanga
2Chronicles6:41 “Tsopano dzukani Inu Yehova Mulungu
2Chronicles6:42 Inu Yehova Mulungu musamukane wodzozedwa wanu. Kumbukirani chikondi chanu chachikulu chimene munalonjeza kwa Davide mtumiki wanu.”
2Chronicles7:1 Solomoni atamaliza kupemphera
2Chronicles7:2 Ansembe sanathe kulowa mʼNyumba ya Mulungu chifukwa munadzaza ulemerero wa Yehova.
2Chronicles7:3 Aisraeli onse ataona moto ukuchokera kumwamba ndi ulemerero wa Yehova pamwamba pa Nyumba ya Mulungu
2Chronicles7:4 Tsono mfumu ndi anthu onse anapereka nsembe pamaso pa Yehova.
2Chronicles7:5 Ndipo mfumu Solomoni anapereka nsembe ngʼombe 22
2Chronicles7:6 Ansembe anayimirira mʼmalo mwawo
2Chronicles7:7 Solomoni anapatula malo a pakati pa bwalo kutsogolo kwa Nyumba ya Yehova ndipo pamenepo anapereka nsembe zopsereza ndi mafuta
2Chronicles7:8 Choncho nthawi imeneyi
2Chronicles7:9 Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu panali msonkhano
2Chronicles7:10 Pa tsiku la 23 la mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri
2Chronicles7:11 Solomoni atatsiriza kumanga Nyumba ya Yehova ndi nyumba yaufumu ndi kukwaniritsa kuchita zonse zimene zinali mu mtima mwake pa Nyumba ya Yehova ndi nyumba yake yaufumu
2Chronicles7:12 Yehova anamuonekera usiku ndipo anati: “Ine ndamva pemphero lako ndipo ndadzisankhira malo ano kukhala Nyumba yanga yoperekeramo nsembe.
2Chronicles7:13 “Ine ndikatseka kumwamba kuti mvula isagwe
2Chronicles7:14 ngati anthu anga
2Chronicles7:15 Ndipo maso anga adzatsekuka ndi makutu anga adzakhala tcheru kumva mapemphero a pamalo pano.
2Chronicles7:16 Ine ndasankha ndipo ndapatula Nyumba yangayi kotero kuti ndidzakhala mʼmenemo kwamuyaya. Maso ndi mtima wanga zidzakhala pano nthawi zonse.
2Chronicles7:17 “Kunena za iwe
2Chronicles7:18 Ine ndidzakhazikitsa mpando wako waufumu
2Chronicles7:19 “Koma ngati iwe udzapatuka ndi kutaya malangizo ndi malamulo amene ndakupatsa ndi kupita kukatumikira milungu ina ndi kuyipembedza
2Chronicles7:20 pamenepo Ine ndidzazula Aisraeli mʼdziko langa limene ndinawapatsa
2Chronicles7:21 Ndipo ngakhale kuti tsopano Nyumba ya Mulunguyi ndi yokongola kwambiri
2Chronicles7:22 Anthu adzayankha kuti
2Chronicles8:1 Patatha zaka makumi awiri
2Chronicles8:2 Solomoni anamanganso midzi imene anapatsidwa ndi Hiramu
2Chronicles8:3 Kenaka Solomoni anapita kukalanda Hamati-zoba.
2Chronicles8:4 Iye anamanganso Tadimori ku chipululu ndi mizinda yonse yosungiramo chuma
2Chronicles8:5 Anamanganso Beti-Horoni Wakumtunda ndi Beti-Horoni Wakumunsi
2Chronicles8:6 pamodzinso ndi Baalati ndi mizinda yake yonse yosungira chuma
2Chronicles8:7 Panali anthu amene anatsala pakati pa mitundu ya Ahiti
2Chronicles8:8 Zimenezi ndiye zinali zidzukulu zawo zotsalira mʼdzikoli
2Chronicles8:9 Koma Solomoni sanagwiritse ntchito ya ukapolo Aisraeli; Iwo anali anthu ake ankhondo
2Chronicles8:10 Amenewa ndiwo anali akuluakulu oyangʼanira ntchito za mfumu Solomoni. Onse amene ankayangʼanira anthu analipo 250.
2Chronicles8:11 Solomoni anabweretsa mwana wamkazi wa Farao mu mzinda wa Davide ku nyumba yaufumu yomwe anamumangira
2Chronicles8:12 Solomoni anapereka nsembe zopsereza pa guwa lansembe la Yehova limene anamanga patsogolo pa khonde la polowera
2Chronicles8:13 monga momwe zinkafunikira pa tsiku lililonse. Ankapereka nsembezo potsata malamulo a Mose okhudza chikondwerero cha Masabata
2Chronicles8:14 Potsata malangizo a Davide abambo ake
2Chronicles8:15 Anthu sanapatukepo pa zimene mfumu inalamula ansembe kapena Alevi pa china chilichonse
2Chronicles8:16 Ntchito yonse ya Solomoni inachitika kuyambira tsiku limene maziko a Nyumba ya Mulungu anakhazikitsidwa mpaka kumaliza. Kotero Nyumba ya Yehova inamalizidwa.
2Chronicles8:17 Kenaka Solomoni anapita ku Ezioni-Geberi ndi Eloti
2Chronicles8:18 Ndipo Hiramu anatumiza sitima zapamadzi zoyendetsedwa ndi antchito ake
2Chronicles9:1 Mfumu yayikazi ya ku Seba itamva za kutchuka kwa Solomoni
2Chronicles9:2 Solomoni anayankha mafunso ake onse ndipo panalibe kanthu kalikonse kovuta kwa iye komwe sanathe kufotokozera mfumu yayikaziyo.
2Chronicles9:3 Mfumu yayikazi ya ku Seba itaona nzeru za Solomoni komanso nyumba yaufumu imene anamanga
2Chronicles9:4 chakudya cha pa tebulo pake
2Chronicles9:5 Iyo inati kwa mfumu
2Chronicles9:6 Koma sindinakhulupirire zimene ankanena mpaka nditafika ndi kuona ndi maso anga. Kunena zoona sanandiwuze ngakhale theka lomwe la kuchuluka kwa nzeru zanu
2Chronicles9:7 Ngodala anthu anu! Ngodala atumiki anu amene amayimirira pamaso panu nthawi zonse ndi kumamva nzeru zanu!
2Chronicles9:8 Atamandike Yehova Mulungu wanu amene wakondwera nanu nakukhazikani pa mpando wake waufumu kuti mulamulire mʼmalo mwa Yehova Mulungu wanu. Chifukwa cha chikondi cha Mulungu wanu pa Israeli
2Chronicles9:9 Kenaka iyo inapereka kwa mfumu makilogalamu 4
2Chronicles9:10 (Anthu a Hiramu ndi anthu a Solomoni anabweretsa golide kuchokera ku Ofiri ndipo anabweretsanso mitengo ya mʼbawa ndi miyala yokongola.
2Chronicles9:11 Mfumu inagwiritsa ntchito mitengo ya mʼbawa pokonzera makwerero a Nyumba ya Yehova ndi nyumba yaufumu ndiponso kupangira anthu oyimba apangwe ndi azeze. Zinthu zonga zimenezi sizinaonekeponso mu Yuda).
2Chronicles9:12 Mfumu Solomoni inapereka kwa mfumu yayikazi ya ku Seba zonse zimene inazifuna ndi kuzipempha ndipo Solomoni anayipatsa mfumuyo zoposa zimene iyo inabweretsa kwa Solomoni. Ndipo mfumuyo inabwerera ku dziko lake pamodzi ndi atumiki ake.
2Chronicles9:13 Kulemera kwa golide amene Solomoni amalandira pa chaka kunali makilogalamu 23
2Chronicles9:14 osawerengera amene ankabwera ndi anthu ochita malonda ndi osinthanitsa zinthu. Komanso mafumu onse a ku Arabiya ndi abwanamkubwa a mʼdzikomo amabweretsa golide ndi siliva kwa Solomoni.
2Chronicles9:15 Mfumu Solomoni inapanga zishango zazikulu 200 zagolide wosasantha. Mʼchishango chilichonse mumalowa golide wolemera makilogalamu asanu ndi awiri.
2Chronicles9:16 Iye anapanganso zishango zingʼonozingʼono 300 zagolide wosasantha ndipo chishango chilichonse chimapangidwa ndi golide wolemera makilogalamu atatu. Mfumu inayika zishangozi mʼnyumba yaufumu yotchedwa Nkhalango ya Lebanoni.
2Chronicles9:17 Ndipo mfumu inapanganso mpando waukulu waufumu wa nyanga za njovu ndipo unakutidwa ndi golide woyengeka bwino.
2Chronicles9:18 Mpando waufumuwo unali ndi makwerero asanu ndi limodzi ndi choyikapo mapazi cholumikizidwa ku mpandowo. Mʼmbali zonse za mpandowo munali zosanjikapo manja
2Chronicles9:19 Mikango khumi ndi iwiri inayimirira pa makwerero asanu ndi imodzi aja. Umodzi mbali ina ya khwerero ndi wina mbali inayo. Palibe mpando wonga uwu umene unapangidwapo mu ufumu wina uliwonse.
2Chronicles9:20 Zikho zonse za mfumu Solomoni zinali zagolide
2Chronicles9:21 Mfumu inali ndi sitima zambiri zapamadzi zimene zimayendetsedwa ndi antchito a Hiramu. Zimabwera kamodzi pa zaka zitatu zilizonse zitanyamula golide
2Chronicles9:22 Mfumu Solomoni anapambana mafumu ena onse a dziko lapansi pa chuma ndi nzeru.
2Chronicles9:23 Mafumu onse a dziko lapansi ankafunafuna kuonana ndi Solomoni kuti adzamve nzeru zimene Mulungu anayika mu mtima mwake.
2Chronicles9:24 Chaka ndi chaka
2Chronicles9:25 Solomoni anali ndi zipinda 4
2Chronicles9:26 Iye ankalamulira mafumu onse kuyambira ku mtsinje wa Yufurate mpaka ku dziko la Afilisti
2Chronicles9:27 Mfumu inasandutsa siliva kukhala wambiri ngati miyala wamba mu Yerusalemu ndipo mikungudza kukhala yochuluka ngati mitengo ya mkuyu ya ku zigwa.
2Chronicles9:28 Solomoni ankayitanitsa akavalo ake kuchokera ku Igupto ndi mayiko ena onse.
2Chronicles9:29 Tsono ntchito zina zonse za Solomoni
2Chronicles9:30 Solomoni analamulira Aisraeli onse ku Yerusalemu zaka makumi anayi.
2Chronicles9:31 Ndipo anamwalira nagona ndi makolo ake. Anayikidwa mʼmanda mu mzinda wa Davide abambo ake. Ndipo Rehobowamu
2Chronicles10:1 Rehobowamu anapita ku Sekemu
2Chronicles10:2 Yeroboamu mwana wa Nebati atamva zimenezi (Iye anali ku Igupto
2Chronicles10:3 Kotero anthu anakayitana Yeroboamu ndipo iye ndi Aisraeli onse anapita kwa Rehobowamu ndi kumuwuza kuti
2Chronicles10:4 “Abambo anu anatisenzetsa goli lolemetsa koma tsopano mutipeputsire ntchito yolemetsayi ndi goli lolemerali limene analiyika pa ife ndipo ifeyo tidzakutumikirani.”
2Chronicles10:5 Rehobowamu anayankha kuti
2Chronicles10:6 Kenaka mfumu Rehobowamu anafunsira nzeru kwa akuluakulu amene ankatumikira abambo ake
2Chronicles10:7 Iwo anayankha kuti
2Chronicles10:8 Koma Rehobowamu anakana malangizo amene akuluakulu anamupatsa ndipo anakafunsira nzeru kwa anyamata amene anakula naye pamodzi komanso amamutumikira.
2Chronicles10:9 Iye anawafunsa kuti
2Chronicles10:10 Anyamata amene anakula pamodzi naye anamuyankha kuti
2Chronicles10:11 Abambo anga anakusenzetsani goli lolemetsa koma ine ndidzalichititsa kukhala lolemetsa kwambiri. Abambo anga anakukwapulani ndi zikoti wamba koma ine ndidzakukwapulani ndi zinkhanira.’ ”
2Chronicles10:12 Tsiku lachitatu Yeroboamu ndi anthu onse anabwerera kwa Rehobowamu monga ananenera mfumu kuti
2Chronicles10:13 Mfumu inawayankha mwankhanza
2Chronicles10:14 Iye anatsatira malangizo a anyamata ndipo anati
2Chronicles10:15 Kotero mfumu sinamvere anthuwo
2Chronicles10:16 Aisraeli onse ataona kuti mfumu yakana kuwamvera

2Chronicles10:19 Motero Israeli wakhala akuwukira banja la Davide mpaka lero lino.

2Chronicles13:11 Mmawa uliwonse ndi madzulo aliwonse amapereka nsembe zopsereza ndi kufukiza lubani kwa Yehova. Iwo amayika buledi pa tebulo loyeretsedwa monga mwa mwambo ndipo amayatsa nyale pa zoyikapo nyale zagolide madzulo aliwonse. Ife timachita zofuna za Yehova Mulungu wathu. Koma inu mwamusiya.
2Chronicles13:12 Mulungu ali nafe pakuti ndiye mtsogoleri wathu. Ansembe ake atanyamula malipenga

2Chronicles13:14 Asilikali a Yuda anatembenuka ndipo anaona kuti nkhondo imachitikira kutsogolo ndi kumbuyo. Ndipo iwo anafuwulira Yehova. Ansembe anayimba malipenga awo

2Chronicles14:1 Tsono Abiya anamwalira ndipo anayikidwa mʼmanda mu mzinda wa Davide. Asa mwana wake anakhala mfumu mʼmalo mwake ndipo pa masiku ake
2Chronicles14:2 Asa anachita zabwino ndi zolungama pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wake.
2Chronicles14:3 Iye anachotsa maguwa achilendo ndi malo opembedzerapo mafano
2Chronicles14:4 Asa analamula Yuda kuti afunefune Yehova Mulungu wa makolo awo ndi kumvera malamulo ndi zolamulira zake.
2Chronicles14:5 Iye anachotsa malo opembedzera mafano ndi maguwa ofukizira lubani mu mzinda uliwonse wa mu Yuda
2Chronicles14:6 Asa anamanga mizinda yonse yotetezedwa ya Yuda pakuti dziko linali pa mtendere. Panalibe amene anachita naye nkhondo mʼzaka zimenezo
2Chronicles14:7 Iye anati kwa Yuda “Tiyeni timange mizinda iyi ndipo timange makoma ndi nsanja
2Chronicles14:8 Asa anali ndi ankhondo 300
2Chronicles14:9 Zera wa ku Kusi anapita kukamenyana nawo ali ndi gulu lalikulu kwambiri la asilikali ndi magaleta 300 ndipo anafika mpaka ku Maresa.
2Chronicles14:10 Asa anapita kukakumana naye ndipo anakhala pa mizere yawo ya nkhondo mʼchigwa cha Zefata pafupi ndi Maresa.
2Chronicles14:11 Kenaka Asa anafuwulira Yehova Mulungu wake ndipo anati “Yehova palibe wina wofanana nanu kuti angathandize anthu opanda mphamvu pakati pa amphamvu. Tithandizeni Inu Yehova Mulungu wathu pakuti ife timadalira Inu ndipo mʼdzina lanu ife tabwera kudzalimbana ndi gulu la ankhondo lalikulu kwambiri ngati ili. Inu Yehova ndinu Mulungu wathu
2Chronicles14:12 Yehova anakantha Akusi pamaso pa Asa ndi Ayuda. Akusi anathawa
2Chronicles14:13 ndipo Asa ndi ankhondo ake anawathamangitsa mpaka ku Gerari. Gulu lonse lalikulu lija la Akusi linaphedwa. Sanapezeke mmodzi wamoyo pakati pawo. Iwo anakanthidwa pamaso pa Yehova ndi asilikali ake. Anthu a ku Yuda anatenga katundu wambiri olanda ku nkhondo.
2Chronicles14:14 Iwo anawononga midzi yonse yozungulira Gerari pakuti mantha aakulu wochokera kwa Yehova anagwera anthuwo. Analanda katundu wa midzi yonse
2Chronicles14:15 Anakathiranso nkhondo misasa ya anthu oweta ziweto ndipo anatenga nkhosa zambiri

2Chronicles21:3 Abambo awo anawapatsa mphatso zambiri za siliva
2Chronicles21:4 Yehoramu atakhazikika pa ufumu wa abambo ake
2Chronicles21:5 Yehoramu anali wa zaka 32 pamene anakhala mfumu
2Chronicles21:6 Iye anayenda mʼnjira za mafumu a Israeli
2Chronicles21:7 Komabe
2Chronicles21:8 Pa nthawi ya Yehoramu
2Chronicles21:9 Choncho Yehoramu anapita kumeneko pamodzi ndi atsogoleri ake ndi magaleta ake onse. Aedomu anamuzungulira pamodzi ndi atsogoleri ake koma iye ananyamuka ndi kuthawa usiku.
2Chronicles21:10 Mpaka lero lino Edomu ndi wowukira ulamuliro wa Yuda. Pa nthawi yomweyi
2Chronicles21:11 Iye anamanganso malo opembedzerapo mafano mʼmapiri a Yuda ndipo anachititsa anthu a mu Yerusalemu kukhala osakhulupirika. Choncho anasocheretsa anthu a ku Yuda.
2Chronicles21:12 Yehoramu analandira kalata yochokera kwa mneneri Eliya yonena kuti
2Chronicles21:13 Koma wayenda mʼnjira za mafumu a Israeli ndipo watsogolera anthu a ku Yuda ndi Yerusalemu kukhala osakhulupirika
2Chronicles21:14 Kotero tsono Yehova ali pafupi kukantha anthu ako
2Chronicles21:15 Ndipo iwe udzadwala nthenda yoopsa yamʼmimba
2Chronicles21:16 Yehova anamuutsira Yehoramuyo mkwiyo wa Afilisti ndi Aarabu amene amakhala pafupi ndi Akusi.
2Chronicles21:17 Iwo anathira nkhondo Yuda. Analowanso ndi kutenga katundu yense amene anamupeza mʼnyumba ya mfumu pamodzi ndi ana ake ndi akazi ake. Palibe mwana amene anatsala kupatula mwana wake wamngʼono kwambiri
2Chronicles21:18 Izi zonse zitachitika
2Chronicles21:19 Patapita nthawi
2Chronicles21:20 Yehoramu anali wa zaka 32 pamene anakhala mfumu. Iyeyo analamulira mu Yerusalemu zaka zisanu ndi zitatu. Ndipo anamwalira popanda odandawula
2Chronicles22:1 Anthu a mu Yerusalemu anayika Ahaziya mwana wamngʼono kwambiri wa Yehoramu kukhala mfumu mʼmalo mwake
2Chronicles22:2 Ahaziya anali wa zaka 22 pamene anakhala mfumu ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu chaka chimodzi. Dzina la amayi ake linali Ataliya
2Chronicles22:3 Nayenso anayenda mʼnjira ya banja la Ahabu
2Chronicles22:4 Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova monga momwe banja la Ahabu linachitira
2Chronicles22:5 Iyeyo anatsatiranso uphungu wawo pamene anapita ndi Yehoramu
2Chronicles22:6 kotero iye anabwerera ku Yezireeli kuti akachire mabala amene anamuvulaza ku Ramoti pa nkhondo ndi Hazaeli mfumu ya Aaramu. Ndipo Ahaziya
2Chronicles22:7 Mulungu anakonza kuti Ahaziya akaphedwe pa ulendo wake wokacheza. Ahaziya atafika
2Chronicles22:8 Pamene Yehu ankalanga banja la Ahabu anapeza atsogoleri a ku Yuda ndiponso ana aamuna a abale ake a Ahaziya amene amatumikira Ahaziya
2Chronicles22:9 Kenaka anapita kukafunafuna Ahaziya

2Chronicles22:11 Koma Yehoseba
2Chronicles22:12 Mwanayo anakhala mobisala pamodzi ndi iwo mu Nyumba ya Mulungu kwa zaka zisanu ndi chimodzi muulamuliro wa Ataliya.
2Chronicles23:1 Mʼchaka chachisanu ndi chiwiri Yehoyada anaonetsa mphamvu zake. Iye anachita pangano ndi olamulira magulu a anthu 100: Azariya mwana wa Yerohamu
2Chronicles23:2 Iwo anayendayenda mʼdziko la Yuda ndipo anasonkhanitsa Alevi ndi atsogoleri a mabanja a Aisraeli ochokera mʼmizinda yonse. Atabwera ku Yerusalemu
2Chronicles23:3 msonkhano wonse unachita pangano ndi mfumu mu Nyumba ya Mulungu. Yehoyada anawawuza kuti
2Chronicles23:4 Tsopano zimene muti muchite ndi izi: Limodzi mwa magawo atatu a ansembe ndi Alevi amene mudzakhale pa ntchito pa Sabata muzikalondera pa khomo
2Chronicles23:5 ndi limodzi la magawo atatu likakhale ku nyumba yaufumu ndipo limodzi la magawo atatu likakhale ku chipata cha Maziko ndipo anthu ena onse akakhale mʼmabwalo a Nyumba ya Yehova.
2Chronicles23:6 Musalole aliyense kulowa mʼNyumba ya Yehova kupatula ansembe ndi Alevi amene akutumikira. Iwo atha kutero chifukwa apatulidwa koma anthu ena onse ayenera kumvera zimene Yehova walamula.
2Chronicles23:7 Alevi akhale mozungulira mfumu
2Chronicles23:8 Alevi ndi anthu onse a ku Yuda anachita monga momwe wansembe Yehoyada anawalamulira. Aliyense anatenga anthu ake amene ankagwira ntchito pa Sabata ndi amene amapita kukapuma
2Chronicles23:9 Ndipo Yehoyada anapereka kwa atsogoleri a magulu a anthu 100 mikondo ndi zishango zazikulu ndi zazingʼono zimene zinali za Davide ndipo zinali mʼNyumba ya Mulungu.
2Chronicles23:10 Iye anayika anthu onse
2Chronicles23:11 Yehoyada ndi ana ake anatulutsa mwana wa mfumu ndipo anamumveka chipewa chaufumu ndipo anamupatsa Buku la Chipangano namulonga ufumu. Yehoyada ndi ana ake anamudzoza ndipo anafuwula kuti
2Chronicles23:12 Ataliya atamva phokoso la anthu akuthamanga ndi kukondwerera mfumu
2Chronicles23:13 Iye anayangʼana
2Chronicles23:14 Wansembe Yehoyada anatumiza olamulira magulu a anthu 100 aja
2Chronicles23:15 choncho anamugwira pamene amafika pa chipata cha Kavalo pa bwalo la nyumba yaufumu
2Chronicles23:16 Tsono Yehoyada anachita pangano
2Chronicles23:17 Anthu onse anapita ku kachisi wa Baala ndipo anamugwetsa. Iwo anaphwanya maguwa ndi mafano ndi kupha Matani wansembe wa Baala patsogolo pa maguwawo.
2Chronicles23:18 Kenaka Yehoyada anayika ansembe
2Chronicles23:19 Ndipo anayika alonda a pa khomo pa zipata za Nyumba ya Yehova kuti aliyense amene ndi odetsedwa asalowe.
2Chronicles23:20 Iye anatenga olamulira magulu a anthu 100
2Chronicles23:21 ndipo anthu onse a mʼderali anakondwera. Tsono mu mzinda munali bata chifukwa Ataliya anaphedwa ndi lupanga.
2Chronicles24:1 Yowasi anali wa zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri pamene anakhala mfumu
2Chronicles24:2 Yowasi anachita zolungama pamaso pa Yehova nthawi yonse ya moyo wa wansembe Yehoyada.
2Chronicles24:3 Yehoyada anamupezera iye akazi awiri
2Chronicles24:4 Patapita nthawi Yowasi anatsimikiza zokonzanso Nyumba ya Yehova.
2Chronicles24:5 Iye anayitanitsa pamodzi ansembe ndi Alevi ndipo anawawuza kuti
2Chronicles24:6 Choncho mfumu inayitanitsa Yehoyada
2Chronicles24:7 Ana a mkazi woyipa
2Chronicles24:8 Mfumu italamulira
2Chronicles24:9 Ndipo analengeza kwa anthu a mu Yuda ndi mu Yerusalemu kuti abweretse kwa Yehova msonkho umene Mose mtumiki wa Mulungu analamulira Aisraeli mʼchipululu.
2Chronicles24:10 Akuluakulu onse ndi anthu onse anabweretsa zopereka zawo mokondwera ndipo anaziponya mʼbokosi mpaka linadzaza.
2Chronicles24:11 Nthawi ina iliyonse imene Alevi abweretsa bokosilo kwa akuluakulu a mfumu ndipo akaona kuti muli ndalama zambiri
2Chronicles24:12 Mfumu pamodzi ndi Yehoyada anapereka ndalamazo kwa anthu oyangʼanira ntchito ku Nyumba ya Yehova. Analemba ntchito amisiri a miyala ndi a matabwa kuti akonzenso Nyumba ya Yehova. Analembanso ntchito amisiri a zitsulo ndi mkuwa kuti akonze Nyumba ya Mulungu.
2Chronicles24:13 Anthu amene ankagwira ntchito anali odziwa bwino
2Chronicles24:14 Atamaliza
2Chronicles24:15 Tsono Yehoyada anakalamba ndipo anali ndi zaka zambiri. Pambuyo pake iye anamwalira ali ndi zaka 130.
2Chronicles24:16 Iyeyo anayikidwa mʼmanda pamodzi ndi mafumu mu mzinda wa Davide chifukwa cha zabwino zimene anachita mu Israeli
2Chronicles24:17 Atamwalira Yehoyada
2Chronicles24:18 Iwo anasiya Nyumba ya Yehova
2Chronicles24:19 Ngakhale Yehova anatumiza aneneri kwa anthuwo kuti awabweze kwa Iye
2Chronicles24:20 Kenaka Mzimu wa Mulungu unabwera pa Zekariya mwana wa wansembe Yehoyada. Iye anayimirira pamaso pa anthu ndipo anati
2Chronicles24:21 Koma anthuwo anamuchitira chiwembu molamulidwa ndi mfumu ndipo anamugenda miyala ndi kumupha mʼbwalo la Nyumba ya Mulungu.
2Chronicles24:22 Mfumu Yowasi sinakumbukire zabwino zimene Yehoyada abambo ake a Zekariya anamuchitira
2Chronicles24:23 Pakutha kwa chaka

2Chronicles25:1 Amaziya anali wa zaka 25 pamene anakhala mfumu
2Chronicles25:2 Iye anachita zolungama pamaso pa Yehova
2Chronicles25:3 Pamene mphamvu zonse zaufumu zinali mʼmanja mwake
2Chronicles25:4 Komabe iye sanaphe ana awo koma anatsatira zolembedwa mʼbuku la Mose
2Chronicles25:5 Amaziya anasonkhanitsa anthu a ku Yuda ndipo anawapatsa zochita molingana ndi mabanja awo kukhala anthu olamulira 1
2Chronicles25:6 Iye analembanso ntchito anthu odziwa nkhondo 100
2Chronicles25:7 Koma munthu wa Mulungu anabwera kwa iye ndipo anati
2Chronicles25:8 Ngakhale mupite ndi kuchita nkhondo molimba mtima
2Chronicles25:9 Amaziya anafunsa munthu wa Mulungu kuti
2Chronicles25:10 Choncho Amaziya anachotsa asilikali amene anabwera kwa iye kuchokera ku Efereimu ndipo anawatumiza kwawo. Iwo anakwiyira anthu a ku Yuda ndipo anapita kwawo atapsa mtima kwambiri.
2Chronicles25:11 Ndipo Amaziya analimba mtima ndipo anatsogolera gulu lake lankhondo ku Chigwa cha Mchere
2Chronicles25:12 Gulu la ankhondo la Yuda linagwiranso anthu amoyo 10
2Chronicles25:13 Pa nthawi imeneyi asilikali amene Amaziya anawabweza ndipo sanawalole kuti achite nawo nkhondo
2Chronicles25:14 Amaziya atabwerera kuja anakapha Aedomu
2Chronicles25:15 Yehova anakwiyira Amaziya
2Chronicles25:16 Iye ali kuyankhula
2Chronicles25:17 Amaziya mfumu ya ku Yuda
2Chronicles25:18 Koma Yowasi mfumu ya Israeli inayankha Amaziya mfumu ya Yuda kuti
2Chronicles25:19 Iwe ukuti wagonjetsa Edomu
2Chronicles25:20 Komabe Amaziya sanamvere pakuti ndi Mulungu amene anakonzeratu kuti awapereke kwa Yehowasi
2Chronicles25:21 Kotero Yowasi mfumu ya Israeli inakamuthira nkhondo. Iye ndi Amaziya anayangʼanana maso ndi maso ku Beti-Semesi ku Yuda.
2Chronicles25:22 Yuda anagonjetsedwa ndi Israeli ndipo munthu aliyense anathawira kwawo.
2Chronicles25:23 Yehowahazi mfumu ya Israeli inagwira Amaziya mfumu ya Yuda
2Chronicles25:24 Iye anatenga golide ndi siliva yense ndi zida zonse zimene zimapezeka mʼNyumba ya Mulungu zimene ankazisamalira Obedi-Edomu
2Chronicles25:25 Amaziya mwana wa Yowasi mfumu ya Yuda anakhala ndi moyo kwa zaka khumi ndi zisanu atamwalira Yehowasi mwana wa Yehowahazi mfumu ya Israeli.
2Chronicles25:26 Ntchito zina za mfumu Amaziya
2Chronicles25:27 Kuyambira nthawi imene Amaziya analeka kutsatira Yehova anthu anamukonzera chiwembu mu Yerusalemu ndipo anathawira ku Lakisi
2Chronicles25:28 Iwo anabwera naye ali pa kavalo ndipo anayikidwa mʼmanda ndi makolo ake mu mzinda wa Yuda.
2Chronicles26:1 Kenaka anthu onse a ku Yuda anatenga Uziya amene anali wa zaka 16
2Chronicles26:2 Iye anamanganso mzinda wa Eloti ndi kuwubwezeranso ku Yuda abambo ake atamwalira.
2Chronicles26:3 Uziya anali wa zaka 16 pamene anakhala mfumu ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu kwa zaka 70. Dzina la amayi ake linali Yekoliya wa ku Yerusalemu.
2Chronicles26:4 Iye anachita zolungama pamaso pa Yehova
2Chronicles26:5 Iye anapembedza Mulungu nthawi ya Zekariya
2Chronicles26:6 Iyeyo anapita kukachita nkhondo ndi Afilisti ndipo anagwetsa makoma a Gati
2Chronicles26:7 Mulungu anamuthandiza polimbana ndi Afilisti ndi Aarabu amene amakhala ku Guri-Baala ndiponso polimbana ndi Ameuni.
2Chronicles26:8 Aamoni ankabweretsa msonkho kwa Uziya ndipo mbiri yake inamveka mpaka ku malire a dziko la Igupto chifukwa anali wamphamvu kwambiri.
2Chronicles26:9 Uziya anamanga nsanja ku Yerusalemu ku Chipata Chapangodya
2Chronicles26:10 Iye anamanganso nsanja ku chipululu ndi kukumbanso zitsime zambiri chifukwa anali ndi ziweto zambiri mʼmbali mwa phiri ndi ku zigwa. Iye anali ndi anthu amene ankagwira ntchito mʼminda yake ndiponso mʼminda yake ya mphesa mʼphiri ndi malo achonde
2Chronicles26:11 Uziya anali ndi gulu lankhondo lophunzitsidwa bwino
2Chronicles26:12 Chiwerengero chonse cha atsogoleri a mʼmabanja oyangʼanira anthu ochita nkhondo chinali 2
2Chronicles26:13 Pansi pa ulamuliro wawo panali asilikali 307
2Chronicles26:14 Uziya anawapangira asilikaliwo zishango
2Chronicles26:15 Mu Yerusalemu anapanga makina okonzedwa ndi anthu aluso amene amagwiritsidwa ntchito pa malo otetezera a pa nsanja ndi pa ngodya kuponyera mivi ndi kugubuduzira miyala. Mbiri yake inamveka kutali ndi ponseponse pakuti anathandizidwa kwambiri mpaka anakhala wamphamvu kwambiri.
2Chronicles26:16 Koma pamene Uziya anakhala wamphamvu kwambiri
2Chronicles26:17 Wansembe Azariya pamodzi ndi ansembe a Yehova ena 80 olimba mtima anamutsatira.
