2Chronicles26:23 Uziya analondola makolo ake
2Chronicles27:1 Yotamu anakhala mfumu ali ndi zaka 25 ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu kwa zaka 16. Dzina la amayi ake linali Yerusa mwana wa Zadoki.
2Chronicles27:2 Iye anachita zolungama pamaso pa Yehova
2Chronicles27:3 Yotamu anamanganso chipata chakumtunda cha Nyumba ya Yehova ndipo anagwira ntchito yayikulu yomanga khoma la ku phiri la Ofeli.
2Chronicles27:4 Iye anamanga mizinda mʼmapiri a ku Yuda ndipo anamanganso malinga ndi nsanja mʼmadera a ku nkhalango.
2Chronicles27:5 Yotamu anachita nkhondo ndi mfumu ya Aamoni ndipo anawagonjetsa. Chaka chimenecho Aamoni anapereka makilogalamu 3
2Chronicles27:6 Yotamu anakula mphamvu chifukwa anayenda molungama pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wake.
2Chronicles27:7 Zina ndi zina zokhudza ulamuliro wa Yotamu
2Chronicles27:8 Iye anakhala mfumu ali ndi zaka 25 ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu kwa zaka 16.
2Chronicles27:9 Yotamu anamwalira ndipo anayikidwa mʼmanda mu Mzinda wa Davide. Ndipo Ahazi mwana wake analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake.
2Chronicles28:1 Ahazi anali ndi zaka makumi awiri pamene anakhala mfumu ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu kwa zaka 16. Iye sanachite zolungama pamaso pa Yehova
2Chronicles28:2 Iye anayenda mʼnjira za mafumu a Israeli ndipo anawumbanso mafano a chipembedzo cha Abaala.
2Chronicles28:3 Iye amapsereza nsembe ku chigwa cha Hinomu
2Chronicles28:4 Iyeyo ankapereka nsembe ndi kufukiza lubani pa malo opembedzerapo mafano
2Chronicles28:5 Nʼchifukwa chake Yehova Mulungu wake anamupereka mʼmanja mwa mfumu ya Aramu. Aaramu anamugonjetsa ndipo anagwira ukapolo anthu ake ambiri napita nawo ku Damasiko. Yehova anamuperekanso mʼmanja mwa mfumu ya Israeli
2Chronicles28:6 Pa tsiku limodzi
2Chronicles28:7 Zikiri msilikali wa ku Efereimu
2Chronicles28:8 Aisraeli anagwira ukapolo abale awo
2Chronicles28:9 Koma kumeneko kunali mneneri wa Yehova dzina lake Odedi
2Chronicles28:10 Ndipo tsopano mukufuna kuti amuna ndi akazi a ku Yuda ndi ku Yerusalemu akhale akapolo anu.
2Chronicles28:11 Tsono mvereni! Abwezeni abale anu amene mwawagwira ukapolo
2Chronicles28:12 Tsono atsogoleri ena a ku Efereimu
2Chronicles28:13 Iwo anati
2Chronicles28:14 Kotero asilikali aja anawasiya akapolowo pamodzi ndi katundu amene analanda ku nkhondo pamaso pa akuluakulu ndi gulu lonse la anthu.
2Chronicles28:15 Anthu amene atchulidwa mayina aja anatenga akapolowo
2Chronicles28:16 Pa nthawi imeneyo mfumu Ahazi inatumiza mawu kwa mfumu ya ku Asiriya kupempha chithandizo.
2Chronicles28:17 Ankhondo a ku Edomu anabweranso ndi kuthira nkhondo Yuda ndi kugwira akapolo.
2Chronicles28:18 Pamenepo nʼkuti Afilisti atathira nkhondo mizinda ya mʼmbali mwa phiri ndi ku Negevi ku Yuda. Iwo analanda mizindayo nakhala ku Beti-Semesi
2Chronicles28:19 Yehova anapeputsa Yuda chifukwa cha mfumu Ahazi ya Israeli
2Chronicles28:20 Tigilati-Pileseri mfumu ya ku Asiriya anabwera kwa iye
2Chronicles28:21 Ahazi anatenga zinthu zochokera mʼNyumba ya Yehova ndi mʼnyumba yaufumu ndi kwa atsogoleri ndipo anazipereka kwa mfumu ya ku Asiriya
2Chronicles28:22 Pa nthawi yake yamavutoyi mfumu Ahazi inapitirira kukhalabe yosakhulupirika pamaso pa Yehova.
2Chronicles28:23 Ahazi ankapereka nsembe kwa milungu ya ku Damasiko
2Chronicles28:24 Ahazi anasonkhanitsa pamodzi zinthu zonse kuchokera mʼNyumba ya Mulungu ndipo anazitenga. Iye anatseka zitseko za Nyumba ya Yehova ndipo anayimika maguwa ansembe pa ngodya iliyonse ya msewu mu Yerusalemu.
2Chronicles28:25 Mu mzinda uliwonse wa Yuda anamangamo malo achipembedzo
2Chronicles28:26 Zochitika zina pa ulamuliro wake ndi machitidwe ake onse
2Chronicles28:27 Ahazi anamwalira ndipo anayikidwa mu mzinda wa Yerusalemu
2Chronicles29:1 Hezekiya anali wa zaka 25 pamene anakhala mfumu ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu kwa zaka 29. Dzina la amayi ake linali Abiya mwana wa Zekariya.
2Chronicles29:2 Iye anachita zolungama pamaso pa Yehova
2Chronicles29:3 Pa chaka choyamba cha ulamuliro wake
2Chronicles29:4 Iye analowetsamo ansembe ndi Alevi ndipo anawasonkhanitsa ku bwalo lakummawa
2Chronicles29:5 ndipo anati: “Mverani
2Chronicles29:6 Makolo athu anali osakhulupirika ndipo anachita zoyipa pa maso pa Yehova Mulungu wathu ndi kumusiya Yehovayo. Iwo anatembenuka ndi kusiya malo okhalako Yehova ndi kumufulatira.
2Chronicles29:7 Iwowo anatsekanso zitseko zapakhonde ndi kuzimitsa nyale. Sanafukize lubani kapena kupereka nsembe zopsereza ku malo opatulika a Mulungu wa Israeli.
2Chronicles29:8 Kotero
2Chronicles29:9 Ichi nʼchifukwa chake makolo athu anaperekedwa ku lupanga ndipo nʼchifukwa chake ana athu aamuna ndi aakazi ndi akazi athu ali ku ukapolo.
2Chronicles29:10 Tsono ine ndikuganiza zochita pangano ndi Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli
2Chronicles29:11 Ana anga
2Chronicles29:12 Ndipo Alevi awa anakonzeka kugwira ntchito: Kuchokera ku banja la Kohati
2Chronicles29:13 	kuchokera kwa zidzukulu za Elizafani
2Chronicles29:14 	kuchokera kwa zidzukulu za Hemani
2Chronicles29:15 Atasonkhanitsa abale awo ndi kudziyeretsa
2Chronicles29:16 Ansembe analowa ku malo opatulika a Yehova kukayeretsako. Anatulutsira ku bwalo la Nyumba ya Yehova chilichonse chodetsedwa chimene anachipeza mʼNyumba ya Yehova. Alevi anatenga zimenezo ndi kupita nazo ku chigwa cha Kidroni.
2Chronicles29:17 Iwo anayamba mwambo woyeretsawu tsiku loyamba la mwezi woyamba ndipo pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu la mweziwo anafika pa khonde la nyumba ya Yehova. Tsono anachita mwambo woyeretsa Nyumba ya Yehova ija masiku asanu ndi atatu
2Chronicles29:18 Ndipo anapita kwa mfumu Hezekiya ndi kukafotokoza kuti
2Chronicles29:19 Takonza ndi kuyeretsa zinthu zonse zimene mfumu Ahazi anazichotsa mwa kusakhulupirika kwake pamene anali mfumu. Taziyika kutsogolo kwa guwa la Yehova.”
2Chronicles29:20 Mmamawa tsiku linalo
2Chronicles29:21 Iwo anabweretsa ngʼombe zazimuna zisanu ndi ziwiri ndi nkhosa zazimuna zisanu ndi ziwiri
2Chronicles29:22 Choncho anthuwo anapha ngʼombe zazimunazo ndipo ansembe anatenga magazi ake ndi kuwawaza pa guwa lansembe
2Chronicles29:23 Mbuzi zoperekedwa chifukwa cha tchimo zija zinabweretsedwa pamaso pa mfumu ndi anthu onse
2Chronicles29:24 Kenaka ansembe anapha mbuzizo ndipo anapereka magazi ake pa guwa
2Chronicles29:25 Iye anayika Alevi mʼNyumba ya Yehova ali ndi ziwaya za malipenga
2Chronicles29:26 Kotero Alevi anayima okonzekera atanyamula zoyimbira za Davide ndiponso ansembe atanyamula malipenga awo.
2Chronicles29:27 Hezekiya analamulira kuti apereke nsembe zopsereza pa guwa. Pamene amayamba kupereka nsembezo
2Chronicles29:28 Anthu onse anawerama pansi ndi kulambira
2Chronicles29:29 Zopereka zitatha
2Chronicles29:30 Mfumu Hezekiya ndi akuluakulu ake analamulira Alevi kuti atamande Yehova potsata mawu a Davide ndi mlosi Asafu. Kotero anayimba nyimbo zamatamando mokondwera ndipo anaweramitsa mitu yawo ndi kulambira.
2Chronicles29:31 Kenaka Hezekiya anati
2Chronicles29:32 Chiwerengero cha nsembe zopsereza chimene anthu onse anabweretsa chinali ngʼombe zazimuna makumi asanu ndi awiri
2Chronicles29:33 Ziweto zimene zinapatulidwa kukhala nsembe zinalipo ngʼombe zazimuna 600
2Chronicles29:34 Koma ansembe anali ochepa kuti asende zonse zopsereza. Choncho abale awo Alevi anawathandiza mpaka ntchito yonse inatha ndipo mpaka ansembe ena atadziyeretsa
2Chronicles29:35 Panali nsembe zopsereza zochuluka
2Chronicles29:36 Hezekiya ndi anthu onse anakondwera pa zimene Mulungu anachitira anthu ake
2Chronicles30:1 Hezekiya anatumiza uthenga mʼdziko lonse la Israeli ndi ku Yuda ndiponso analemba makalata ku Efereimu ndi Manase
2Chronicles30:2 Mfumu ndi akuluakulu ake pamodzi ndi anthu onse a mu Yerusalemu anagwirizana kuti akondwerere Paska pa mwezi wachiwiri.
2Chronicles30:3 Iwo sanathe kukondwerera pa nthawi yake chifukwa si ansembe ambiri amene anadziyeretsa ndiponso anthu anali asanasonkhane mu Yerusalemu.
2Chronicles30:4 Chikonzerochi chinaoneka kuti chinali chabwino kwa mfumu pamodzi ndi anthu onse.
2Chronicles30:5 Iwo anagwirizana zoti alengeze mu Israeli monse kuyambira ku Beeriseba mpaka ku Dani
2Chronicles30:6 Molamulidwa ndi mfumu
2Chronicles30:7 Musakhale ngati makolo anu ndi abale anu
2Chronicles30:8 Musawumitse khosi monga anachitira makolo anu
2Chronicles30:9 Ngati inu mubwerera kwa Yehova
2Chronicles30:10 Amithenga aja anapita mzinda ndi mzinda wa ku Efereimu ndi Manase mpaka ku Zebuloni
2Chronicles30:11 Komabe anthu ena a ku Aseri
2Chronicles30:12 Dzanja la Mulungu linalinso pa anthu a ku Yuda
2Chronicles30:13 Gulu lalikulu la anthu linasonkhana mu Yerusalemu kudzachita chikondwerero cha Buledi Wopanda Yisiti pa mwezi wachiwiri.
2Chronicles30:14 Anachotsa mu Yerusalemu maguwa ofukizira lubani ndipo anakawaponya mʼchigwa cha Kidroni.
2Chronicles30:15 Iwo anapha mwana wankhosa wa Paska pa tsiku la 14 la mwezi wachiwiri. Ansembe ndi Alevi anachita manyazi ndipo anadziyeretsa ndi kubweretsa nsembe zopsereza ku Nyumba ya Yehova.
2Chronicles30:16 Ndipo anakhala mʼmalo awo a nthawi zonse potsatira zolembedwa mʼmalamulo a Mose munthu wa Mulungu. Ansembe anawaza magazi amene anawapatsa Alevi.
2Chronicles30:17 Popeza ambiri mʼgululo anali asanadziyeretse
2Chronicles30:18 Ngakhale kuti ambiri mwa anthu ochokera ku Efereimu
2Chronicles30:19 amene wayika mtima wake kufunafuna Yehova
2Chronicles30:20 Ndipo Yehova anamvera Hezekiya ndipo anachiritsa anthuwo.
2Chronicles30:21 Aisraeli amene anali mu Yerusalemu anachita chikondwerero cha Buledi Wopanda Yisiti kwa masiku asanu ndi awiri akusangalala kwambiri
2Chronicles30:22 Hezekiya anayankhula molimbikitsa Alevi onse amene anaonetsa kumvetsa bwino za kutumikira Yehova. Kwa masiku asanu ndi awiri anadya gawo lawo ndi kupereka nsembe zachiyanjano ndi kutamanda Yehova
2Chronicles30:23 Ndipo msonkhano wonse unagwirizana zopitiriza chikondwerero kwa masiku ena asanu ndi awiri. Kotero kwa masiku ena asanu ndi awiri anachita chikondwererocho mosangalala.
2Chronicles30:24 Hezekiya mfumu ya Yuda anapereka ngʼombe zamphongo 1
2Chronicles30:25 Gulu lonse la ku Yuda linasangalala
2Chronicles30:26 Munali chikondwerero chachikulu mu Yerusalemu
2Chronicles30:27 Ansembe ndi Alevi anayimirira kudalitsa anthu
2Chronicles31:1 Zonse zitatha
2Chronicles31:2 Hezekiya anakhazikitsa magulu a ansembe ndi Alevi
2Chronicles31:3 Kuchokera pa chuma chake
2Chronicles31:4 Iyo inalamula anthu amene amakhala mu Yerusalemu kupereka gawo lawo kwa ansembe ndi Alevi kuti iwowo adzipereke ku malamulo a Yehova.
2Chronicles31:5 Lamuloli atangolilengeza
2Chronicles31:6 Aisraeli ndi Ayuda amene amakhala mʼmizinda ya Yuda anabweretsanso chakhumi cha ngʼombe zawo ndi nkhosa ndi chakhumi cha zinthu zoyera zoperekedwa kwa Yehova Mulungu wawo
2Chronicles31:7 Anayamba kuchita izi mwezi wachitatu ndipo anatsiriza mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri.
2Chronicles31:8 Hezekiya ndi akuluakulu ake atabwera ndi kuona miluyo
2Chronicles31:9 Hezekiya anafunsa ansembe ndi Alevi za miluyi;
2Chronicles31:10 ndipo Azariya
2Chronicles31:11 Hezekiya analamula kuti akonze zipinda zosungiramo za mʼNyumba ya Yehova

2Chronicles31:15 Edeni
2Chronicles31:16 Kuwonjezera apa

2Chronicles32:1 Zitatha zonse zimene Hezekiya anachita mokhulupirika
2Chronicles32:2 Pamene Hezekiya anaona kuti Senakeribu wabwera ndipo wakonzeka kuchita nkhondo ndi Yerusalemu
2Chronicles32:3 iye anakambirana ndi akuluakulu ake pamodzi ndi atsogoleri a gulu lankhondo za kutseka akasupe ochoka ku kasupe amene anali kunja kwa mzinda
2Chronicles32:4 Gulu lalikulu la anthu linasonkhana
2Chronicles32:5 Kenaka iye anagwira ntchito molimbika kukonza madera ogumuka a khoma ndi kumangapo msanja. Anamanganso mpanda wina kunja kwa mpanda winawo ndipo anamanga zolimbitsa Milo ku mzinda wa Davide.
2Chronicles32:6 Iye anasankha atsogoleri a ankhondo olamulira anthu ndipo anawasonkhanitsa pamaso pake pa bwalo la chipata cha mzinda ndi kuwalimbikitsa ndi mawu awa:
2Chronicles32:7 “Khalani amphamvu ndi olimba mtima. Musachite mantha kapena kutaya mtima chifukwa cha mfumu ya ku Asiriya ndi gulu lalikulu lankhondo limene ali nalo
2Chronicles32:8 Iye ali ndi mphamvu ya anthu basi
2Chronicles32:9 Nthawi ina
2Chronicles32:10 “Senakeribu mfumu ya ku Asiriya akuti: Kodi inu mukukhulupirira chiyani
2Chronicles32:11 Pamene Hezekiya akunena kuti ‘Yehova Mulungu wathu adzatipulumutsa kuchoka mʼdzanja la mfumu ya ku Asiriya
2Chronicles32:12 Kodi si Hezekiya amene anachotsa malo opembedzerapo Mulungu ameneyu ndi maguwa ansembe ndi kunena kwa anthu a ku Yuda ndi Yerusalemu kuti
2Chronicles32:13 “Kodi inu simukudziwa zimene ine ndi makolo anga tachita kwa anthu a mitundu ina? Kodi milungu ya mitundu imeneyi inatha kupulumutsa dziko lawo kuchoka mʼdzanja langa?
2Chronicles32:14 Kodi ndi milungu iti mwa milungu ya mitundu ina ya anthuwo
2Chronicles32:15 Choncho inu musalole kuti Hezekiya akunamizeni ndi kukusocheretsani motere. Musamukhulupirire
2Chronicles32:16 Atsogoleri a ankhondo a Senakeribu anapitiriza kuyankhula zotsutsana ndi Yehova Mulungu ndi mtumiki wake Hezekiya.
2Chronicles32:17 Mfumunso inalemba makalata onyoza Yehova
2Chronicles32:18 Kenaka iwo anafuwula mu Chihebri kwa anthu a mu Yerusalemu amene anali pa khoma
2Chronicles32:19 Iwo anayankhula za Mulungu wa Yerusalemu monga anayankhulira za milungu ya anthu ena a pa dziko lapansi
2Chronicles32:20 Mfumu Hezekiya ndi mneneri Yesaya mwana wa Amozi anafuwulira kumwamba mʼpemphero chifukwa cha zimenezi.
2Chronicles32:21 Ndipo Yehova anatumiza mngelo amene anadzapha anthu onse odziwa nkhondo ndi atsogoleri ndiponso oyangʼanira misasa ya mfumu ya ku Asiriya. Choncho Senakeribu anabwerera kwawo wamanyazi. Ndipo atalowa mʼnyumba ya mulungu wake
2Chronicles32:22 Kotero Yehova anapulumutsa Hezekiya ndi anthu a ku Yerusalemu kuchoka mʼdzanja la Senakeribu mfumu ya ku Asiriya ndi mʼdzanja la anthu ena. Yehova anawateteza ku mbali zonse.
2Chronicles32:23 Anthu ambiri anabweretsa zopereka kwa Yehova ku Yerusalemu ndi mphatso zamtengowapatali kwa Hezekiya mfumu ya Yuda. Kuyambira nthawi imeneyo Hezekiya ankalemekezedwa kwambiri ndi mitundu ina yonse.
2Chronicles32:24 Pa nthawi imeneyo Hezekiya anadwala ndipo anali pafupi kufa. Iye anapemphera kwa Yehova
2Chronicles32:25 Koma Hezekiya anali ndi mtima wonyada ndipo sanachite molingana ndi kukoma mtima kumene Mulungu anamuonetsera. Choncho mkwiyo wa Yehova unali pa iye ndi pa Yuda ndi Yerusalemu.
2Chronicles32:26 Koma kenaka Hezekiya analapa za kunyada kwakeko
2Chronicles32:27 Hezekiya anali ndi chuma ndi ulemu wambiri ndipo anamanga nyumba zosungiramo chuma cha siliva wake ndi golide ndi za miyala yokongola
2Chronicles32:28 Iye anamanganso nyumba zosungiramo tirigu
2Chronicles32:29 Iyeyo anamanga midzi ndipo anali ndi nkhosa ndi ngʼombe zambiri
2Chronicles32:30 Ndi Hezekiya amene anatseka ku mtunda kwa kasupe wa Gihoni
2Chronicles32:31 Koma pamene nthumwi zotumizidwa ndi atsogoleri a ku Babuloni zinabwera kudzamufunsa za chizindikiro chozizwitsa chimene chinachitika mʼdzikomo
2Chronicles32:32 Zina ndi zina zokhudza ulamuliro wa Hezekiya ndi ntchito za kudzipereka kwake zalembedwa mʼmasomphenya a Yesaya mwana wa Amozi
2Chronicles32:33 Hezekiya anamwalira ndipo anayikidwa mʼmanda pa phiri pamene pali manda a zidzukulu za Davide. Ayuda onse ndi anthu a mu Yerusalemu anamulemekeza atamwalira. Ndipo Manase mwana wake analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake.
2Chronicles33:1 Manase anali wa zaka khumi ndi ziwiri pamene anakhala mfumu
2Chronicles33:2 Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova
2Chronicles33:3 Iyeyo anamanganso malo opembedzerapo mafano amene Hezekiya abambo ake anawaphwasula; anamanganso maguwa ansembe a Baala ndi kupanga mafano a Asera. Iye amagwadira zolengedwa zonse zamlengalenga ndi kumazipembedza.
2Chronicles33:4 Manase anamanga maguwa mʼNyumba ya Yehova
2Chronicles33:5 Mʼmabwalo onse awiri a Nyumba ya Yehova anamangamo maguwa ansembe a zolengedwa zonse zamlengalenga.
2Chronicles33:6 Iye ankakapereka ana ake aamuna ngati nsembe yopsereza ku chigwa cha Hinomu
2Chronicles33:7 Manase anatenga fano losema limene anapanga ndi kuliyika mʼNyumba ya Mulungu
2Chronicles33:8 Ine sindidzachotsanso phazi la Aisraeli kuchoka mʼdziko limene ndawapatsa makolo ako
2Chronicles33:9 Koma Manase anasocheretsa anthu a ku Yuda ndi Yerusalemu
2Chronicles33:10 Yehova anayankhula kwa Manase ndi anthu ake
2Chronicles33:11 Kotero Yehova anawatumizira atsogoleri a ankhondo a ku Asiriya amene anagwira Manase ukapolo
2Chronicles33:12 Ali pa mavuto akewo anafunafuna kuti Yehova Mulungu wake amukomere mtima ndipo anadzichepetsa kwakukulu pamaso pa Mulungu wa makolo ake.
2Chronicles33:13 Ndipo atapemphera
2Chronicles33:14 Zitapita izi iye anamanga khoma la kunja kwa Mzinda wa Davide kumadzulo kwa kasupe wa Gihoni ku chigwa mpaka polowera ku Chipata cha Nsomba kuzungulira phiri la Ofeli. Iyeyo anakweza kwambiri khomalo. Anayikanso atsogoleri a nkhondo ku mizinda yonse yotetezedwa ya Yuda.
2Chronicles33:15 Iye anachotsa milungu yonse yachilendo ndi fano mʼNyumba ya Yehova komanso maguwa ansembe onse amene anamanga pa phiri la Nyumba ya Mulungu ndi mu Yerusalemu
2Chronicles33:16 Kenaka anabwezeretsa guwa lansembe la Yehova ndi kupereka zopereka zachiyanjano ndiponso zopereka zamatamando ndipo anawuza Yuda kuti atumikire Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli.
2Chronicles33:17 Komabe anthu anapitiriza kupereka nsembe ku malo achipembedzo
2Chronicles33:18 Zina ndi zina zokhudza ulamuliro wa Manase
2Chronicles33:19 Pemphero lake ndi momwe Mulungu anakhudzidwira ndi kupempha kwakeko
2Chronicles33:20 Manase anamwalira ndipo anayikidwa mʼmanda mʼnyumba yake yaufumu. Ndipo Amoni mwana wake analowa ufumu mʼmalo mwake.
2Chronicles33:21 Amoni anali wa zaka 22 pamene anakhala mfumu ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu kwa zaka ziwiri.
2Chronicles33:22 Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova
2Chronicles33:23 Koma kusiyana ndi abambo ake Manase
2Chronicles33:24 Akuluakulu a Amoni anamuchita chiwembu ndipo anamupha mʼnyumba yake yaufumu.
2Chronicles33:25 Koma anthu a mʼdzikomo anapha onse amene anakonzera chiwembu mfumu Amoni
2Chronicles34:1 Yosiya anali wa zaka zisanu ndi zitatu pamene anakhala mfumu
2Chronicles34:2 Iye anachita zolungama pamaso pa Yehova ndi kutsata makhalidwe a Davide abambo ake
2Chronicles34:3 Mʼchaka chachisanu ndi chitatu cha ulamuliro wake
2Chronicles34:4 Maguwa ansembe a Baala anagwetsedwa iye atalamulira. Anadula zidutswazidutswa maguwa ofukizira lubani amene anali pamwamba pake
2Chronicles34:5 Iye anatentha mafupa a ansembe pa maguwa awo
2Chronicles34:6 Ku mizinda ya Manase
2Chronicles34:7 iye anagwetsa maguwa ansembe ndi mafano a Asera ndi kuphwanyaphwanya milungu yawo kukhala fumbi ndi kuduladula maguwa ofukizapo lubani mʼdziko lonse la Israeli. Atatero
2Chronicles34:8 Mʼchaka cha 18 cha ulamuliro wa Yosiya
2Chronicles34:9 Iwo anapita kwa Hilikiya
2Chronicles34:10 Ndipo anazipereka mʼmanja mwa anthu amene anasankhidwa kuti ayangʼanire ntchito ya Nyumba ya Yehova. Anthu amenewa ankalipira antchito amene ankakonzanso Nyumba ya Mulungu.
2Chronicles34:11 Iwo anaperekanso ndalama kwa amisiri a matabwa ndi amisiri omanga nyumba kuti agule miyala yosema ndi matabwa a phaso la nyumba ndi nsichi zomangira zomwe mfumu ya Yuda inalekerera kuti zigwe ndi kuwonongeka.
2Chronicles34:12 Anthuwa anagwira ntchitoyi mokhulupirika. Amene ankawayangʼanira anali Yahati ndi Obadiya
2Chronicles34:13 ankayangʼanira anthu onyamula katundu
2Chronicles34:14 Pa nthawi imene ankatulutsa ndalama zimene anabwera nazo ku Nyumba ya Yehova

2Chronicles34:16 Ndipo Safani anapita nalo bukulo kwa mfumu ndi kumufotokozera kuti: “Akuluakulu anu akuchita zonse zimene zinapatsidwa kwa iwo.
2Chronicles34:17 Iwo alipira ndalama zimene zinali mʼNyumba ya Yehova ndipo azipereka kwa akapitawo ndi anthu antchito.”

2Chronicles34:20 Iye analamula izi kwa Hilikiya
2Chronicles34:21 “Pitani ndipo mukafunse Yehova mʼmalo mwanga ndi mʼmalo mwa otsala a Israeli ndi Yuda za zimene zalembedwa mʼbuku limene lapezekali. Mkwiyo wa Yehova ndi waukulu umene watsanulidwa pa ife chifukwa makolo athu sanasunge mawu a Yehova. Iwo sanachite motsatira zonse zimene zalembedwa mʼbuku ili.”
2Chronicles34:22 Hilikiya pamodzi ndi anthu amene anawatuma aja
2Chronicles34:23 Iye anati kwa anthuwo
2Chronicles34:24 ‘Yehova akunena kuti
2Chronicles34:25 Chifukwa iwo anasiya Ine ndi kufukiza lubani kwa milungu ina ndi kuwutsa mkwiyo wanga ndi zonse zimene manja awo anapanga
2Chronicles34:26 Uzani mfumu ya Yuda imene yakutumani kuti mudzafunse kwa Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli

2Chronicles34:32 Tsono Yosiya anawuza aliyense amene anali mu Yerusalemu ndi Benjamini kuti azisunga panganoli. Anthu a mu Yerusalemu anachita izi motsata pangano la Mulungu
2Chronicles34:33 Yosiya anachotsa mafano onse onyansa mʼdziko lonse limene linali la Aisraeli ndipo anawuza onse amene anali mu Israeli kutumikira Yehova Mulungu wawo. Pa masiku onse a moyo wake
2Chronicles35:1 Yosiya anachita chikondwerero cha Paska wa Yehova mu Yerusalemu
2Chronicles35:2 Iye anasankha ansembe pa maudindo awo ndipo anawalimbikitsa pa ntchito ya mʼnyumba ya Yehova.
2Chronicles35:3 Iye anati kwa Alevi amene amalangiza Aisraeli onse omwe anadzipatula kwa Yehova: Ikani bokosi lopatulika mʼNyumba ya Mulungu amene Solomoni mwana wa Davide mfumu ya Israeli anamanga. Lisamanyamulidwe pa mapewa anu. Tsopano tumikirani Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi anthu ake Aisraeli.
2Chronicles35:4 Mukhale mʼmagulu anu molingana ndi mabanja anu
2Chronicles35:5 “Muziyima ku malo opatulika pamodzi ndi gulu la Alevi oyimira gulu lililonse lalingʼono la mabanja a abale anu amene ndi anthu wamba.
2Chronicles35:6 Muzipha ana ankhosa a Paska
2Chronicles35:7 Yosiya anapereka kwa anthu wamba onse ana ankhosa ndi ana ambuzi okwanira 30
2Chronicles35:8 Akuluakulu akenso anapereka mwaufulu kwa anthu ndi kwa ansembe ndi Alevi. Hilikiya
2Chronicles35:9 Konaniya nayenso pamodzi ndi Semaya ndi Netaneli
2Chronicles35:10 Mwambo unakonzedwa ndipo ansembe anayima pamalo pawo pamodzi ndi Alevi mʼmagulu awo monga mfumu inalamulira.
2Chronicles35:11 Ana ankhosa a Paska anaphedwa ndipo ansembe anawaza magazi amene anaperekedwa kwa iwo pamene Alevi anali kusenda nyamazo.
2Chronicles35:12 Iwo anayika padera nsembe zopsereza kuti azipereke kwa magulu angʼonoangʼono a mabanja a anthu kuti apereke kwa Yehova monga zinalembedwa mʼbuku la Mose. Ndipo anachita chimodzimodzi ndi ngʼombe.
2Chronicles35:13 Anawotcha nyama za Paska monga momwe zinalembedwera ndi kuwiritsa zopereka zopatulika mʼmiphika
2Chronicles35:14 Izi zitatha
2Chronicles35:15 Anthu oyimba nyimbo
2Chronicles35:16 Kotero pa nthawi imeneyi ntchito yonse ya Yehova ya chikondwerero cha Paska ndi nsembe zopsereza pa guwa la Yehova inachitika monga analamulira mfumu Yosiya.
2Chronicles35:17 Aisraeli amene analipo anachita chikondwerero cha Paska pa nthawi imeneyi ndi kuchita mwambo wa chikondwerero cha Buledi Wopanda Yisiti
2Chronicles35:18 Paska yofanana ndi iyi sinachitikepo ku Israeli kuyambira nthawi ya Samueli ndipo palibe mmodzi mwa mafumu a Israeli anachitapo chikondwerero cha Paska ngati anachitira Yosiya pamodzi ndi ansembe
2Chronicles35:19 Chikondwerero cha Paska ichi chinachitika mʼchaka cha 18 cha ulamuliro wa Yosiya.
2Chronicles35:20 Zimenezi zitachitika
2Chronicles35:21 Koma Neko anatumiza amithenga kwa iye kunena kuti
2Chronicles35:22 Komabe Yosiya sanatembenuke kumusiya iyeyo
2Chronicles35:23 Anthu oponya mivi analasa mfumu Yosiya
2Chronicles35:24 Choncho anamuchotsa iye mʼgaleta lake
2Chronicles35:25 Yeremiya anapeka nyimbo za maliro chifukwa cha Yosiya
2Chronicles35:26 Zochitika zina za ulamuliro wa Yosiya ndi ntchito za kudzipereka kwake
2Chronicles35:27 zochitika zonse
2Chronicles36:1 Tsono anthu a mʼdzikomo anatenga Yehowahazi mwana wa Yosiya namuyika kukhala mfumu mu Yerusalemu mʼmalo mwa abambo ake.
2Chronicles36:2 Yowahazi anali wa zaka 23 pamene anakhala mfumu ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu kwa miyezi itatu.
2Chronicles36:3 Mfumu ya Igupto inamuchotsa pa udindo wa ufumu mu Yerusalemu ndipo inakhometsa msonkho dziko la Yuda wa makilogalamu 3
2Chronicles36:4 Mfumu ya Igupto inakhazika Eliyakimu
2Chronicles36:5 Yehoyakimu anali wa zaka 25 pamene anakhala mfumu
2Chronicles36:6 Nebukadinezara
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukadinezara anatenganso zipangizo za ku Nyumba ya Yehova kupita nazo ku Babuloni ndipo anaziyika mʼnyumba ya Mulungu wake kumeneko.
2Chronicles36:8 Zochitika zina za pa ulamuliro wa Yehoyakimu
2Chronicles36:9 Yehoyakini anali ndi zaka 21 pamene anakhala mfumu ndipo analamulira mu Yerusalemu kwa miyezi itatu ndi masiku khumi. Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova.
2Chronicles36:10 Nthawi ya mphukira
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekiya anali ndi zaka 21 pamene ankakhala mfumu
2Chronicles36:12 Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wake ndipo sanadzichepetse yekha pamaso pa mneneri Yeremiya amene ankayankhula mawu a Yehova.
2Chronicles36:13 Iye anawukiranso mfumu Nebukadinezara amene anamulumbiritsa mʼdzina la Mulungu. Iyeyo anali wosamva ndipo anawumitsa mtima wake. Sanatembenukire kwa Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli.
2Chronicles36:14 Kuwonjezera apo
2Chronicles36:15 Yehova
2Chronicles36:16 Koma iwo ananyoza amithenga a Mulungu
2Chronicles36:17 Yehova anabweretsa mfumu ya anthu a ku Babuloni
2Chronicles36:18 Iye ananyamula kupita nazo ku Babuloni zipangizo zonse za mʼNyumba ya Yehova Mulungu wawo
2Chronicles36:19 Iwo anayatsa moto Nyumba ya Mulungu
2Chronicles36:20 Iye anagwira ukapolo anthu otsala amene anapulumuka ku lupanga ndi kupita nawo ku Babuloni
2Chronicles36:21 Dziko linakondwera ndi masabata ake. Pa nthawi yonse ya chipasuko chake nthaka inapuma
2Chronicles36:22 Mʼchaka choyamba cha Koresi mfumu ya Peresiya
2Chronicles36:23 Chimene mfumu Koresi ya Peresiya ikunena ndi ichi: “Yehova
Ezra1:1 Mʼchaka choyamba cha ufumu wa Koresi mfumu ya Perisiya
Ezra1:2 Iye anati
Ezra1:3 Aliyense wa inu amene ali wa Yehova
Ezra1:4 Ndipo kumalo kulikonse kumene otsalawo akukhala
Ezra1:5 Choncho atsogoleri a mabanja afuko la Yuda ndi la Benjamini komanso ansembe ndi Alevi
Ezra1:6 Onse oyandikana nawo anawathandiza powapatsa ziwiya za siliva ndi zagolide
Ezra1:7 Nayenso mfumu Koresi anatulutsa ziwiya za mʼNyumba ya Yehova zimene Nebukadinezara anazitenga kuzichotsa ku Yerusalemu ndi kuziyika mʼnyumba ya milungu yake.
Ezra1:8 Koresi
Ezra1:9 Chiwerengerochi chinali motere: Mabeseni agolide — 30 mabeseni asiliva — 1
Ezra1:10 	timiphika tagolide — 230 timiphika tasiliva — 410 ziwiya zina — 1
Ezra1:11 Ziwiya zonse zagolide ndi siliva pamodzi zinalipo 5
Ezra2:1 Awa ndi anthu a mʼchigawo cha Yuda amene anabwerako ku ukapolo
Ezra2:2 Iwo anabwerera pamodzi ndi Zerubabeli

Ezra2:60 Zidzukulu za Delaya
Ezra2:61 Ndi ena pakati pa ansembe anali awa: Zidzukulu za Hobiya
Ezra2:62 Amenewa anafufuza mayina awo mʼbuku lofotokoza mbiri ya mafuko awo
Ezra2:63 Bwanamkubwa anawawuza anthuwo kuti asamadye nawo mpaka atapezeka wansembe wodziwa kuwombeza ndi Urimu ndi Tumimu.

Ezra2:65 kuwonjezera pamenepo

Ezra2:68 Atafika ku Nyumba ya Yehova mu Yerusalemu
Ezra2:69 Anapereka kwa msungichuma wa ntchitoyo molingana ndi mmene aliyense chuma chake chinalili: golide wa makilogalamu 500
Ezra2:70 Ansembe
Ezra3:1 Utafika mwezi wa chisanu ndi chiwiri Aisraeli atakhala kale mʼmidzi yawo
Ezra3:2 Kenaka Yesuwa mwana wa Yozadaki ndi ansembe anzake pamodzi ndi Zerubabeli mwana wa Sealatieli ndi abale ake anayamba kumanga guwa lansembe la Mulungu wa Israeli. Anatero pofuna kuti aziperekapo nsembe zopsereza monga analembera mʼbuku la Mose
Ezra3:3 Ndi mantha ndi mantha chifukwa cha anthu a mʼmayikomo
Ezra3:4 Ankasunga tsiku la chikondwerero cha misasa monga momwe zinalembedwera. Ankaperekanso nsembe za tsiku ndi tsiku monga mwa chiwerengero chake potsata mwambo wake wa tsiku ndi tsiku monga zinalembedwa.
Ezra3:5 Pambuyo pake
Ezra3:6 Kuyambira pa tsiku loyamba la mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri
Ezra3:7 Ndipo anapereka ndalama kwa amisiri a miyala ndi kwa amisiri a matabwa
Ezra3:8 Tsono mu chaka chachiwiri atabwera ku Yerusalemu
Ezra3:9 Yesuwa ndi ana ake aamuna kudzanso abale ake
Ezra3:10 Amisiri omanga nyumba atamanga maziko a Nyumba ya Yehova
Ezra3:11 Iwo ankayimba motamanda ndi mothokoza Yehova nyimbo iyi: “Yehova ndi wabwino; chikondi chake pa Israeli ndi chamuyaya.” Ndipo anthu onse ankafuwula kwambiri kumutamanda Yehova
Ezra3:12 Koma ambiri mwa ansembe
Ezra3:13 Choncho panalibe amene ankatha kusiyanitsa liwu lofuwula mokondwerera ndi liwu la anthu olira
Ezra4:1 Adani a Yuda ndi Benjamini anamva kuti anthu obwera ku ukapolo aja akumangira Nyumba Yehova
Ezra4:2 Tsono anapita kwa Zerubabeli ndi kwa atsogoleri a mabanja awo ndi kunena kuti
Ezra4:3 Koma Zerubabeli
Ezra4:4 Tsono anthu a mʼdzikomo anayamba kuchititsa ulesi anthu a ku Yuda
Ezra4:5 Analemba alangizi ena kuti alepheretse cholinga chawo pa ntchitoyo pa nthawi yonse ya Koresi
Ezra4:6 Mfumu Ahasiwero atangoyamba kulamulira dzikolo
Ezra4:7 Ndiponso mʼnthawi ya Aritasasita mfumu ya Perisiya
Ezra4:8 Rehumu mkulu wankhondo ndi Simisai mlembi
Ezra4:9 Kalata yochokera kwa Rehumu
Ezra4:10 ndi mitundu ina imene mkulu wolemekezeka
Ezra4:11 Mawu a mʼkalata ya kwa Aritasasita anali awa: Kwa mfumu Aritasasita: Kuchokera kwa atumiki anu
Ezra4:12 Amfumu tati mudziwe kuti Ayuda amene anabwera kuno kuchokera kwanuko apita ku Yerusalemu ndipo akumanganso mzinda wa anthu owukira ndi oyipa uja. Akumaliza makoma ake ndipo akukonzanso maziko.
Ezra4:13 Kuwonjeza apo amfumu mudziwe kuti ngati amalize kumanganso mzindawu ndi kukonzanso makoma ake
Ezra4:14 Popeza tsono ife timadya nawo kwa mfumu sitiyenera tizingoonerera zinthu zochititsa mfumu manyazi. Nʼchifukwa chake tikutumiza uthenga kwa inu a mfumu kuti mudziwe zonse.
Ezra4:15 Choncho pachitike kafukufuku mʼbuku la mbiri yakale ya makolo anu. Mʼbuku la mbiri zakale mudzapezamo ndi kuwerenga kuti mzinda umenewu ndi waupandu
Ezra4:16 Tsono tikukudziwitsani amfumu kuti ngati mzinda umenewu umangidwanso ndi makoma ake nʼkutsirizidwanso ndiye kuti inu simudzalamuliranso chigawo cha patsidya pa Yufurate.
Ezra4:17 Mfumu inatumiza yankho ili: Mkulu wa gulu lankhondo Rehumu
Ezra4:18 Kalata imene munatumiza ija yawerengedwa bwino lomwe pamaso panga.
Ezra4:19 Ine nditalamula kuti afufuze nkhaniyi kwapezekadi kuti mzinda umenewu uli ndi mbiri yowukira mafumu ndi kuti zaupandu ndi zowukira zinkachitikadi mʼmenemo.
Ezra4:20 Mafumu amphamvu akhala akulamulira Yerusalemu ndi chigawo chonse cha Patsidya pa Yufurate. Iwo ankalandira msonkho ndi kulipira ndalama zakatundu olowa mʼdziko pa kanthu kena kalikonse.
Ezra4:21 Tsopano inu khazikitsani lamulo kuti anthu amenewo asiye ntchitoyo
Ezra4:22 Musachedwe kuchita zimenezi. Kodi ine ndingalole bwanji kuti zowononga zotere zikule ndi kupweteka ine mfumu?
Ezra4:23 Kalata ya mfumu Aritasasitayi itangowerengedwa pamaso pa Rehumu ndi Simisai mlembi uja
Ezra4:24 Motero ntchito yomanga Nyumba ya Mulungu ku Yerusalemu inayimitsidwa mpaka chaka cha chiwiri cha ulamuliro wa Dariyo mfumu ya ku Perisiya.
Ezra5:1 Nthawi imeneyo aneneri Hagai ndi Zekariya
Ezra5:2 Pambuyo pake Zerubabeli mwana wa Sealatieli ndi Yesuwa mwana wa Yozadaki ananyamuka nakayambanso kumanga Nyumba ya Mulungu mu Yerusalemu. Ndipo aneneri a Mulungu anali nawo pamodzi
Ezra5:3 Pa nthawi imeneyo Tatenai
Ezra5:4 Anawafunsanso kuti
Ezra5:5 Koma Mulungu wawo amayangʼanira atsogoleri Ayuda
Ezra5:6 Iyi ndi kalata imene Tatenai bwanamkubwa wa dera la patsidya pa Yufurate
Ezra5:7 Analemba kalatayo motere: Kwa mfumu Dariyo: Mukhale ndi mtendere wonse.
Ezra5:8 Amfumu mudziwe kuti ife tinapita ku dziko la Yuda ku Nyumba ya Mulungu wamkulu. Nyumbayo ikumangidwa ndi miyala ikuluikulu ndipo akuyala matabwa pa makoma. Ntchitoyi ikugwiridwa mwachangu ndipo ikuyenda bwino kwambiri mwautsogoleri wawo.
Ezra5:9 Ndipo tinawafunsa atsogoleriwo kuti
Ezra5:10 Tinawafunsanso mayina a atsogoleri awo
Ezra5:11 Yankho limene anatipatsa ndi ili: “Ife ndife atumiki a Mulungu wa kumwamba ndi wa dziko lapansi
Ezra5:12 Koma chifukwa chakuti makolo athu anakwiyitsa Mulungu wakumwamba
Ezra5:13 “Komabe chaka choyamba cha Koresi
Ezra5:14 Ndipo ziwiya zagolide ndi zasiliva za ku Nyumba ya Mulungu zimene Nebukadinezara anazitenga mʼNyumba ya Mulungu ku Yerusalemu ndi kukaziyika mʼnyumba ya milungu ya ku Babuloni
Ezra5:15 Tsono mfumuyo inamuwuza kuti
Ezra5:16 “Choncho Sesibazarayo anabwera ndi kumanga maziko a Nyumba ya Mulunguyo mu Yerusalemu. Kuyambira tsiku limenelo mpaka lero yakhala ikumangidwa ndipo sinathebe.”
Ezra5:17 Nʼchifukwa chake ngati chingakukomereni amfumu
Ezra6:1 Atalandira mawuwo mfumu Dariyo anapereka lamulo ndipo kafukufuku anachitikadi ku Babuloni mʼnyumba yosungira chuma ndi mabuku ambiri yakale.
Ezra6:2 Ndipo ku Ekibatana
Ezra6:3 Mʼchaka choyamba cha ufumu wa Koresi
Ezra6:4 Mumange mizere itatu ya miyala yayikulu ndi mzere umodzi wa matabwa
Ezra6:5 Ndipo ziwiya zagolide ndi zasiliva za ku Nyumba ya Mulungu zimene Nebukadinezara anatenga mʼNyumba ya Mulungu ku Yerusalemu kupita nazo ku Babuloni
Ezra6:6 Tsopano Tatenai
Ezra6:7 Ntchito yomanga Nyumba ya Mulunguyi muyileke. Mulekeni bwanamkubwa wa Ayuda ndiponso akuluakulu a Ayuda kuti amangenso Nyumba ya Mulunguyo pamalo pake.
Ezra6:8 Kuwonjezera pamenepo
Ezra6:9 Ndipo zonse zofunikira monga
Ezra6:10 Zikatero ndiye kuti azipereka nsembe za fungo lokomera Mulungu wakumwamba ndi kupempherera moyo wa mfumu ndi ana ake.
Ezra6:11 Ndikulamulanso kuti ngati wina asintha zimene ndalamulazi
Ezra6:12 Mulungu amene anasankha kuti anthu azimupembedza pa malo amenewa
Ezra6:13 Tsono potsata zomwe analamula mfumu Dariyo
Ezra6:14 Ndipo akuluakulu a Ayuda anapitiriza ntchito yomanga ija molimbikitsidwa ndi aneneri Hagai ndi Zekariya mwana wa Ido. Anamaliza ntchito yomanga Nyumbayo
Ezra6:15 Anatsiriza kumanga Nyumbayo pa tsiku lachitatu la mwezi wa Adara mʼchaka chachisanu ndi chimodzi cha ulamuliro wa mfumu Dariyo.
Ezra6:16 Choncho Aisraeli
Ezra6:17 Poporeka Nyumba ya Mulunguyi
Ezra6:18 Ndipo anakhazikitsa ansembe ndi Alevi pa ntchito zawo zotumikira Mulungu mu Yerusalemu monga zinalembedwera mʼbuku la Mose.
Ezra6:19 Pa tsiku la khumi ndi chinayi la mwezi woyamba
Ezra6:20 Ansembe ndi Alevi anali atadziyeretsa ndipo onsewo anali oyeretsedwa. Alevi anapha mwana wankhosa wa Paska kuphera onse amene anatuluka ku ukapolo
Ezra6:21 Nkhosa ya Paskayo anayidya ndi Aisraeli onse amene anatuluka ku ukapolo
Ezra6:22 Choncho pa masiku asanu ndi awiri anasangalala pa chikondwerero cha buledi wopanda yisiti
Ezra7:1 Zitatha izi
Ezra7:2 mwana wa Salumu
Ezra7:3 mwana wa Amariya
Ezra7:4 mwana wa Zerahiya
Ezra7:5 mwana wa Abisuwa
Ezra7:6 Ezara ameneyu anabwera kuchokera ku Babuloni. Iyeyu anali wophunzira kwambiri za malamulo a Mose
Ezra7:7 Tsono mʼchaka cha chisanu ndi chiwiri cha ufumu wa Aritasasita
Ezra7:8 Ezara anafika ku Yerusalemu pa mwezi wachisanu wa chaka chachisanu ndi chiwiri cha mfumu.
Ezra7:9 Iye anayamba ulendo wochoka ku Babuloni pa tsiku loyamba la mwezi woyamba
Ezra7:10 Popeza Ezara anadzipereka kuwerenga ndi kusunga malamulo a Yehova
Ezra7:11 Iyi ndi kalata imene mfumu Aritasasita anapereka kwa wansembe Ezara
Ezra7:12 Ndine Aritasasita
Ezra7:13 Tsopano ndikulamula kuti Mwisraeli aliyense
Ezra7:14 Ine mfumu pamodzi ndi alangizi anga asanu ndi awiri tikukutumani kuti mukafufuze za dziko la Yuda ndi mzinda wa Yerusalemu kuti mukaone mmene anthu akutsatira malamulo a Mulungu wanu
Ezra7:15 Utenge siliva ndi golide zimene ine mfumu ndi alangizi anga tapereka mwa ufulu kwa Mulungu wa Israeli
Ezra7:16 Mutengenso siliva yense ndi golide amene mungamupeze mʼdziko lonse la Babuloni
Ezra7:17 Ndi ndalama zimenezi mudzaonetsetse kuti mwagula ngʼombe zazimuna
Ezra7:18 Ndalama zotsala mudzagwiritse ntchito zimene inuyo ndi abale anu zikakukomerani malingana nʼkufuna kwa Mulungu wanu.
Ezra7:19 Ziwiya zonse zimene akupatsani kuti mukatumikire nazo mʼNyumba ya Mulungu wanu
Ezra7:20 Ndipo chilichonse chimene chingafunike mʼNyumba ya Mulungu wanu
Ezra7:21 Tsopano Ine
Ezra7:22 Ngakhale atafunika makilogalamu 3
Ezra7:23 Chimene Mulungu Wakumwamba walamula
Ezra7:24 Tikukudziwitsaninso kuti kudzakhala kosaloledwa kukhometsa msonkho uliwonse anthu awa: ansembe
Ezra7:25 Ndipo iwe
Ezra7:26 Ndipo amene sadzamvera lamulo la Mulungu wako ndi lamulo la mfumu alangidwe kolimba kapena aphedwe kapena achotsedwe mʼdzikolo
Ezra7:27 Ezara anati atamandike Yehova
Ezra7:28 Ameneyonso waonetsa chikondi chake chosasinthika kwa ine pamaso pa mfumu
Ezra8:1 Nawa mayina a atsogoleri a mabanja amene anabwera nane kuchokera ku Babuloni nthawi ya ulamuliro wa mfumu Aritasasita:
Ezra8:2 	Geresomu wa fuko la Finehasi; Danieli wa fuko la Itamara; Hatusi
Ezra8:3 	mwana wa Sekaniya wa fuko la Davide; Zekariya wa fuko la Parosi. Pamodzi ndi iyeyu panalembedwa anthu ena 150;
Ezra8:4 	Elihunai mwana wa Zerahiya
Ezra8:5 	Sekaniya
Ezra8:6 	Ebedi
Ezra8:7 	Yesaiya
Ezra8:8 	Zebadiya
Ezra8:9 	Obadiya
Ezra8:10 	Selomiti mwana wa Yosifiya wa fuko la Bani. Pamodzi ndi iyeyu panalinso anthu 160.
Ezra8:11 	Zekariya
Ezra8:12 	Yohanani
Ezra8:13 	Atsogoleri a fuko la Adonikamu
Ezra8:14 Atsogoleri a fuko la Bigivai anali Utai ndi Zakuri. Pamodzi ndi iwowa panali anthu 70.
Ezra8:15 Anthu onse ndinawasonkhanitsa ku mtsinje umene umapita mpaka ku Ahava
Ezra8:16 Choncho ndinayitana atsogoleri awa: Eliezara
Ezra8:17 ndipo ndinawatuma kwa Ido
Ezra8:18 Chifukwa cha kutikomera mtima kwa Mulungu wathu
Ezra8:19 Anatitumiziranso Hasabiya ndi Yesaiya wa fuko la Merari pamodzi ndi abale ake ndi adzukulu ake
Ezra8:20 Panalinso anthu ena 220 mwa anthu ogwira ntchito mʼNyumba ya Mulungu amene Davide ndi nduna zake anawasankha kuti azitumikira Alevi. Anthu onsewa analembedwa potsata mayina awo.
Ezra8:21 Ku mtsinje wa Ahava
Ezra8:22 Ine ndinali ndi manyazi kupempha mfumu kuti atipatse asilikali oyenda pansi ndi ena okwera pa akavalo kuti atiteteze kwa adani athu pa ulendo wathuwu popeza tinali titawuza kale mfumu kuti “Yehova amateteza aliyense amene amamudalira
Ezra8:23 Choncho tinasala zakudya ndi kupemphera kwa Mulungu wathu kuti atiteteze ndipo Iye anamva pemphero lathu.
Ezra8:24 Tsono ndinasankha atsogoleri a ansembe khumi ndi awiri awa
Ezra8:25 ndipo ndinawayezera siliva ndi golide
Ezra8:26 Nditayeza zonse
Ezra8:27 mbale zagolide makumi awiri zolemera makilogalamu asanu ndi atatu ndi theka ndiponso ziwiya ziwiri zamkuwa wosalala
Ezra8:28 Kenaka ndinawawuza kuti
Ezra8:29 Muzisamale bwino mpaka mutaziyeza pamaso pa atsogoleri a ansembe ndi Alevi ndi akulu a mabanja a Israeli mʼzipinda za mʼNyumba ya Mulungu ku Yerusalemu.”
Ezra8:30 Choncho ansembe ndi Alevi analandira zonse zoyezedwa zija
Ezra8:31 Pa tsiku la khumi ndi chiwiri la mwezi woyamba
Ezra8:32 Tinafika ku Yerusalemu
Ezra8:33 Pa tsiku la chinayi lake
Ezra8:34 Zonsezi anaziwerenga ndi kuziyeza ndipo analemba kulemera kwa chinthu chilichonse.
Ezra8:35 Pamenepo anthu amene anatengedwa ukapolo aja anabwerera
Ezra8:36 Iwo anaperekanso chidziwitso cha mfumu chija kwa akuluakulu a mfumu ndi kwa akazembe a mʼdera la Patsidya pa Yufurate. Pamenepo iwo anathandiza Ayuda ndiponso ntchito za pa Nyumba ya Mulungu.
Ezra9:1 Zitachitika izi
Ezra9:2 Zomwe zikuchitika ndi izi. Aisraeli ena ndi ana awo aamuna anayamba kukwatira ana aakazi a anthuwa. Choncho mtundu wopatulika wadzisokoneza ndi mitundu ya anthu a mʼderali. Ndipo atsogoleri ndi akuluakulu ndiwo akupambana pa makhalidwe osakhulupirikawa.”
Ezra9:3 Nditamva zimenezi
Ezra9:4 Ndinakhala pansi chomwecho wokhumudwa mpaka nthawi ya nsembe ya madzulo. Ndipo onse amene ankaopa mawu a Mulungu wa Israeli chifukwa cha kusakhulupirika kwa anthu obwerako ku ukapolo anayamba kubwera kwa ine kudzasonkhana.
Ezra9:5 Ndipo pa nthawi ya nsembe ya madzulo
Ezra9:6 ndipo ndinapemphera kuti
Ezra9:7 Ndipo chifukwa cha machimo athu
Ezra9:8 “Koma tsopano
Ezra9:9 Ndifedi akapolo. Koma Inu Yehova simunatileke mu ukapolo wathu. Mwationetsa chikondi chanu chosasinthika pamaso pa mafumu a ku Perisiya. Mwatitsitsimutsa kuti timange Nyumba yanu pokonzanso mabwinja ake. Mwatitchinjiriza mʼdziko la Yuda ndi Yerusalemu.
Ezra9:10 “Koma tsopano
Ezra9:11 amene munawapereka kudzera mwa atumiki anu aneneri. Inu munati
Ezra9:12 Nʼchifukwa chake
Ezra9:13 “Tsono pambuyo pa zonse zimene zatigwera chifukwa cha ntchito zathu zoyipa ndi uchimo wathu waukulu
Ezra9:14 kodi ife nʼkuphwanyanso malamulo anu ndi kukwatirana ndi anthu amitundu ina amene amachita zonyansa zimenezi? Kodi simudzatikwiyira ndi kutiwononga kwathunthu popanda wina wotsala kapena wopulumuka?
Ezra9:15 Inu Yehova
Ezra10:1 Pamene Ezara ankapemphera ndi kuvomereza tchimo lawo
Ezra10:2 Ndipo Sekaniya
Ezra10:3 Tsopano tiyeni tichite naye pangano Mulungu wathu
Ezra10:4 Tsono dzukani
Ezra10:5 Choncho Ezara anayimirira ndipo analumbiritsa akulu a ansembe
Ezra10:6 Ezara anachoka ku Nyumba ya Mulungu napita ku chipinda cha Yehohanani
Ezra10:7 Tsono anthu analengeza mʼdziko lonse la Yuda ndi mʼmizinda yonse ya Yerusalemu kwa onse ochokera ku ukapolo aja kuti asonkhane ku Yerusalemu.
Ezra10:8 Ananena kuti wina aliyense amene saonekera pakutha pa masiku atatu
Ezra10:9 Choncho anthu onse a mʼdziko la Yuda ndi a mʼdziko la Benjamini anasonkhana ku Yerusalemu asanathe masiku atatu. Limeneli linali tsiku la 20 la mwezi wa 9. Anthu onse anakhala pansi pa bwalo la Nyumba ya Mulungu akunjenjemera chifukwa cha mvula yambiri imene inagwa.
Ezra10:10 Ndipo wansembe Ezara anayimirira nawuza anthuwo kuti
Ezra10:11 Tsopano lapani kwa Yehova
Ezra10:12 Gulu lonse la anthu linayankha ndi mawu ofuwula kuti
Ezra10:13 Koma pano pali anthu ambiri ndiponso mvula ikugwa kwambiri
Ezra10:14 Tsono mulole kuti atsogoleri athu ayimirire mʼmalo mwa anthu onse. Aliyense wa mʼmizinda yathu amene anakwatira mkazi wachikunja abwere pa nthawi imene inu munene
Ezra10:15 Koma Yonatani yekha mwana wa Asaheli ndi Yahazieli mwana wa Tikiva ndiwo anatsutsapo pa zimenezi. Tsono Mesulamu ndi Mlevi Sebetai anawayikira kumbuyo.
Ezra10:16 Choncho anthu obwerako ku ukapolo aja anachita zimene zimafunika. Ndipo wansembe Ezara anasankha amuna amene anali atsogoleri a mabanja potsata mafuko awo ndipo onsewo analembedwa mayina awo. Tsiku loyamba la mwezi wa khumi anayambapo kuyifufuza nkhani imeneyi.
Ezra10:17 Ndipo pofika tsiku loyamba la mwezi woyamba anali atathana nawo anthu amene anakwatira akazi achilendo aja.
Ezra10:18 	Nawu mʼndandanda wa ansembe amene anakwatira akazi achikunja: Pa banja la Yesuwa ndi abale ake
Ezra10:19 	Iwo anatsimikiza zochotsa akazi awo ndipo chifukwa cha kulakwa kwawo aliyense anapereka nkhosa yayimuna ngati nsembe yopepesera machimo.
Ezra10:20 	Pa banja la Imeri panali awa: Hanani ndi Zebadiya.
Ezra10:21 	Pa banja la Harimu panali awa: Maseya
Ezra10:22 	Pa banja la Pasuri panali awa: Eliyoenai
Ezra10:23 	Pakati pa Alevi panali: Yozabadi
Ezra10:24 	Pakati pa oyimba nyimbo panali Eliyasibu. Ochokera kwa alonda a zipata: Salumu
Ezra10:25 	Ochokera pakati pa Aisraeli ena: a fuko la Parosi anali Ramiya
Ezra10:26 	A fuko la Elamu anali Mataniya
Ezra10:27 	A fuko la Zatu anali Eliyoenai
Ezra10:28 	A fuko la Bebai anali Yehohanani
Ezra10:29 	A fuko la Bani anali Mesulamu
Ezra10:30 	A fuko la Pahati-Mowabu anali Adina
Ezra10:31 	A fuko la Harimu anali Eliezara
Ezra10:32 	Benjamini
Ezra10:33 	A fuko la Hasumu anali Mataneyi
Ezra10:34 	A fuko la Bani anali Madai
Ezra10:35 Benaya
Ezra10:36 Vaniya
Ezra10:37 	Mataniya
Ezra10:38 	A fuko la Binuyi anali Simei
Ezra10:39 Selemiya
Ezra10:40 Makinadebayi
Ezra10:41 Azaleli
Ezra10:42 	Salumu
Ezra10:43 	A fuko la Nebo anali Yeiyeli
Ezra10:44 Onsewa anakwatira akazi achilendo. Tsono anawasudzula akaziwo ndi kuwatumiza kwawo pamodzi ndi ana awo.
Nehemiah1:1 Awa ndi mawu a Nehemiya mwana wa Hakaliya: Pa mwezi wa Kisilevi
Nehemiah1:2 Hanani mmodzi mwa abale anga
Nehemiah1:3 Anandiyankha kuti
Nehemiah1:4 Nditamva zimenezi
Nehemiah1:5 Ndinkati: “Inu Yehova
Nehemiah1:6 Tcherani khutu lanu ndi kutsekula maso anu kuti mumve pemphero la mtumiki wanune limene ndikupemphera usana ndi usiku pamaso panu kupempherera Aisraeli
Nehemiah1:7 Ife tinakuchitirani zoyipa zambiri. Sitinamvere mawu anu
Nehemiah1:8 “Kumbukirani mawu amene munawuza mtumiki wanu Mose akuti
Nehemiah1:9 Koma mukabwerera kwa Ine
Nehemiah1:10 “Iwo ndi atumiki anu ndi anthu anu
Nehemiah1:11 Inu Ambuye tcherani khutu lanu kuti mumve pemphero la mtumiki wanune ndiponso pemphero la atumiki anu amene amakondwera kuchitira ulemu dzina lanu. Lolani kuti mtumiki wanune zinthu zindiyendere bwino lero ndi kuti mfumu indichitire chifundo.” Nthawi imeneyi nʼkuti ndili woperekera zakumwa kwa mfumu.
Nehemiah2:1 Pa mwezi wa Nisani
Nehemiah2:2 Tsono mfumu inandifunsa kuti
Nehemiah2:3 Ndinawuza mfumu kuti
Nehemiah2:4 Apo mfumu inandifunsa kuti
Nehemiah2:5 Ndipo ndinayankha kuti
Nehemiah2:6 Tsono mfumu
Nehemiah2:7 Ndipo ndinatinso kwa mfumu
Nehemiah2:8 Mundipatsenso kalata yokapereka kwa Asafu woyangʼanira nkhalango ya mfumu
Nehemiah2:9 Choncho ndinanyamuka ulendo wanga ndipo ndinafika kwa abwanamkubwa a chigawo cha Patsidya pa Yufurate ndipo ndinawapatsa makalata a mfumu. Mfumu nʼkuti itatumiza akulu ankhondo ndi okwera pa akavalo kuti atsagane nane.
Nehemiah2:10 Sanibalati wa ku Horoni ndi Tobiya wa ku Amoni atamva zimenezi
Nehemiah2:11 Ndinafika ku Yerusalemu
Nehemiah2:12 Sindinawuze munthu aliyense za zimene Yehova anayika mu mtima mwanga kuti ndichitire mzinda wa Yerusalemu. Choncho ndinanyamuka usiku pamodzi ndi anthu ena owerengeka. Ndinalibe bulu wina aliyense kupatula amene ndinakwerapo.
Nehemiah2:13 Ndinatuluka usiku podzera ku Chipata cha ku Chigwa ndi kuyenda kupita ku Chitsime cha Chirombo Chamʼmadzi mpaka ku Chipata cha Zinyalala. Ndinayangʼana makoma a Yerusalemu
Nehemiah2:14 Kenaka ndinapita ku Chipata cha Kasupe ndi ku Dziwe la Mfumu. Koma panalibe malo okwanira akuti bulu wanga adutse.
Nehemiah2:15 Kotero usikuwo ndinapita ku chigwa
Nehemiah2:16 Akuluakulu sanadziwe kumene ndinapita kapena zimene ndimachita
Nehemiah2:17 Ndinawawuza kuti
Nehemiah2:18 Ndinawawuza za mmene Yehova Mulungu wanga anandichitira zabwino ndiponso mawu amene mfumu inandiwuza. Tsono anati
Nehemiah2:19 Koma Sanibalati wa ku Horoni
Nehemiah2:20 Koma ndinawayankha kuti
Nehemiah3:1 Pambuyo pake Eliyasibu mkulu wa ansembe ndi ansembe anzake anayamba kugwira ntchito ndipo anamanganso Chipata cha Nkhosa. Iwo anachipatulira Mulungu ndipo anayika zitseko zake. Khoma limene analipatula linafika mpaka pa Nsanja ya Zana ndi Nsanja ya Hananeli.
Nehemiah3:2 Anthu a ku Yeriko anamanga chigawo china pambali pake ndipo Zakuri mwana wa Imuri anamanga chigawo chinanso choyandikana nawo.
Nehemiah3:3 Chipata cha Nsomba chinamangidwanso ndi ana a fuko la Hasena. Iwo anayika mitanda yake ndi zitseko
Nehemiah3:4 Meremoti mwana wa Uriya
Nehemiah3:5 Pambali pa iwowa anthu a ku Tekowa anakonza chigawo china. Koma wolemekezeka awo anakana kugwira ntchito imene akuluakulu awo anawapatsa.
Nehemiah3:6 Chipata cha Yesana chinakonzedwa ndi Yoyada mwana wa Paseya ndi Mesulamu mwana wa Besodeya. Iwo anayika mitanda yake ndi kuyika zitseko
Nehemiah3:7 Pambali pawo Melatiya Mgibeyoni ndi Yadoni Mmerenoti ndiponso anthu a ku Gibiyoni ndi a ku Mizipa anakonza chigawo chawo mpaka ku nyumba ya bwanamkubwa wa chigawo cha Patsidya pa Yufurate.
Nehemiah3:8 Pambali pawo Uzieli mwana wa Harihaya wa mʼgulu amisiri osula golide anakonzanso chigawo china. Pambali pake Hananiya mmodzi mwa anthu oyenga mafuta onunkhira
Nehemiah3:9 Refaya mwana wa Huri wolamulira theka la chigawo cha Yerusalemu anakonza chigawo china motsatana nawo.
Nehemiah3:10 Kulumikiza ichi
Nehemiah3:11 Malikiya mwana wa Harimu ndi Hasubu mwana wa Pahati-Mowabu anakonzanso chigawo china ndiponso Nsanja ya Ngʼanjo.
Nehemiah3:12 Salumu mwana wa Halohesi wolamulira theka la chigawo cha Yerusalemu
Nehemiah3:13 Chipata cha ku chigwa chinakonzedwa ndi Hanuni ndi anthu okhala ku Zanowa. Iwo anachimanganso ndi kuyika zitseko zake ndi zotsekera ndi mipiringidzo yake. Iwo anakonzanso khoma lotalika mamita 450 mpaka ku Chipata cha Zinyalala.
Nehemiah3:14 Chipata cha Zinyalala chinakonzedwa ndi Malikiya mwana wa Rekabu
Nehemiah3:15 Chipata cha Kasupe chinakonzedwa ndi Saluni mwana wa Koli-Hoze
Nehemiah3:16 Pambali pa iyeyo
Nehemiah3:17 Pambali pake Alevi anakonza chigawo china
Nehemiah3:18 Pambuyo pa iyeyu abale awo anapitiriza kukonza
Nehemiah3:19 Motsatana naye Ezeri mwana wa Yesuwa
Nehemiah3:20 Motsatana naye
Nehemiah3:21 Motsatana naye
Nehemiah3:22 Pambuyo pake ansembe okhala ku chidikha anakonzanso chigawo china.
Nehemiah3:23 Pambuyo pawo
Nehemiah3:24 Motsatana naye
Nehemiah3:25 Palali mwana Uzai anakonza chigawo china choyangʼanana ndi ngodya ndi nsanja yotuluka pa nyumba yapamwamba ya mfumu ku bwalo la alonda. Motsatana naye
Nehemiah3:26 ndi otumikira mʼNyumba ya Mulungu amene amakhala pa khoma la Ofeli anakonza chigawo china mpaka pa malo oyangʼanana ndi Chipata cha Madzi kuloza kummawa ndiponso nsanja yayitali ija.
Nehemiah3:27 Motsatana nawo
Nehemiah3:28 Kuyambira ku Chipata cha Akavalo anakonza ndi ansembe ena ndipo aliyense amakonza khoma loyangʼanana ndi nyumba yake.
Nehemiah3:29 Motsatana nawo
Nehemiah3:30 Hananiya mwana wa Selemiya ndiponso Hanuni mwana wachisanu ndi chimodzi wa Zalafi anakonza chigawo china. Motsatana naye
Nehemiah3:31 Motsatana naye
Nehemiah3:32 Ndipo pakati pa chipinda chapamwamba chapangodya ndi Chipata cha Nkhosa anakonza ndi amisiri a golide ndi anthu amalonda.
Nehemiah4:1 Sanibalati atamva kuti tikumanganso khoma anapsa mtima nayamba kuseka ndi kunyogodola Ayuda kwambiri.
Nehemiah4:2 Ndipo anayankhula pamaso pa abale ake ndi asilikali a Samariya kuti
Nehemiah4:3 Tobiya wa ku Amoni
Nehemiah4:4 Tsono ndinayamba kupemphera kuti
Nehemiah4:5 Musawakhululukire mphulupulu zawo kapena kufafaniza machimo awo pamaso panu popeza aputa ukali wanu pamaso pa anthu omanga khoma.”
Nehemiah4:6 Choncho ife tinamangabe khomalo kufikira lonse litafika theka la msinkhu wake
Nehemiah4:7 Koma pamene Sanibalati
Nehemiah4:8 Tsono onse anapangana za chiwembu kuti abwere ndi kudzathira nkhondo anthu a ku Yerusalemu ndi kuyambitsa mapokoso pakati pawo.
Nehemiah4:9 Koma ife tinapemphera kwa Mulungu wathu ndipo tinayika alonda otiteteza kwa adaniwo usiku ndi usana.
Nehemiah4:10 Pa nthawi yomweyi anthu a ku Yuda anati
Nehemiah4:11 Adani athunso anati
Nehemiah4:12 Ndipo Ayuda amene ankhala pafupi ndi adani athuwo anabwera kakhumi konse kuchokera konse kumene ankakhala kudzatiwuza kuti tibwereko ku ntchito.
Nehemiah4:13 Choncho kumbuyo kwa khoma
Nehemiah4:14 Popeza anthu ankachita mantha
Nehemiah4:15 Adani athu atamva kuti ife tadziwa za chiwembu chawo
Nehemiah4:16 Kuyambira tsiku limenelo mpaka mʼtsogolo mwake
Nehemiah4:17 amene ankamanga khoma. Anthu onyamula zinyalala aja ankagwira ntchito ndi dzanja limodzi
Nehemiah4:18 Mʼmisiri aliyense ankamangirira lupanga lake mʼchiwuno mwake akamagwira ntchito. Koma munthu woyimba lipenga anali pambali panga nthawi zonse.
Nehemiah4:19 Ndipo ine ndinati kwa anthu olemekezeka ndi anthu ena onse
Nehemiah4:20 Tsono kulikonse kumene muliko
Nehemiah4:21 Choncho enafe tinapitiriza kugwira ntchito
Nehemiah4:22 Pa nthawi imeneyo ndinawuzanso anthuwo kuti
Nehemiah4:23 Choncho ine
Nehemiah5:1 Tsono anthu ena ndi akazi awo anayamba kudandaula kwambiri chifukwa cha Ayuda anzawo.
Nehemiah5:2 Ena ankanena kuti
Nehemiah5:3 Panali ena amene ankanena kuti
Nehemiah5:4 Panalinso ena amene ankanena kuti
Nehemiah5:5 Ngakhale kuti ndife amodzi ndi abale athuwa
Nehemiah5:6 Nditamva madandawulo awo ndi zimene amanenazi ndinapsa mtima kwambiri.
Nehemiah5:7 Nditalingalira bwino ndinatsimikiza zoti ndichitepo kanthu ndipo kenaka ndinawadzudzula anthu olemekezeka ndi akuluakuluwo. Ndinawawuza kuti
Nehemiah5:8 ndipo ndinati
Nehemiah5:9 Kotero ndinapitiriza kunena kuti
Nehemiah5:10 Ine ndi abale anga ndiponso antchito anga tikuwakongozanso anthuwa ndalama ndi tirigu. Ndipo tiyeni tilekeretu zolandira chiwongoladzanja!
Nehemiah5:11 Abwezereni lero lomwe minda yawo
Nehemiah5:12 Iwo anayankha kuti
Nehemiah5:13 Ndipo inenso ndinakutumula chovala changa ndi kuti
Nehemiah5:14 Ndiponso kuyambira nthawi imene anandisankha kuti ndikhale bwanamkubwa wa dziko la Yuda
Nehemiah5:15 Koma abwanamkubwa akale ankasautsa anthu. Iwo ankalanda anthu chakudya ndi vinyo ndi kuwalipiritsanso masekeli asiliva makumi anayi. Ngakhalenso antchito awo amavutitsa anthu kwambiri. Koma ine sindinachite zimenezo chifukwa ndimaopa Mulungu.
Nehemiah5:16 Ndiponso ndinadzipereka kugwira ntchito yomanga khoma la mzinda wa Yerusalemu popanda ngakhale kugulapo munda. Antchito anganso anasonkhana komweko kuti agwire ntchito ndipo sitinafunenso malo ena.
Nehemiah5:17 Kuwonjezera apa
Nehemiah5:18 Tsiku lililonse pamaphikidwa ngʼombe imodzi
Nehemiah5:19 Kuti zinthu zindiyendere bwino
Nehemiah6:1 Pamenepo Sanibalati
Nehemiah6:2 Sanibalati ndi Gesemu
Nehemiah6:3 Choncho ine ndinatuma amithenga ndi yankho ili: “Ine ndikugwira ntchito yayikulu kuno ndipo sindingathe kubwera kumeneko. Kodi ntchito iyime pofuna kuti ndibwere kumeneko?”
Nehemiah6:4 Ananditumizira uthenga umodzimodzi omwewu kanayi ndipo ndinawayankha chimodzimodzi.
Nehemiah6:5 Tsono kachisanu
Nehemiah6:6 Mu kalatamo munali mawu akuti
Nehemiah6:7 Mwayikanso kale aneneri amene adzalengeza za iwe mu Yerusalemu kuti ‘Mu Yuda muli mfumu!’ Tsono nkhani iyi imveka ndithu kwa mfumu. Choncho bwerani kuti tidzakambirane.”
Nehemiah6:8 Ine ndinatumiza yankho ili: “Pa zimene mukunenazo
Nehemiah6:9 Apa adani athu onsewa ankangofuna kutiopseza. Iwo ankaganiza kuti “Tichita mantha ndi kuleka kugwira ntchito.” Tsono ndinapemphera kuti
Nehemiah6:10 Tsiku lina ndinapita ku nyumba ya Semaya mwana wa Delaya mwana wa Mehatabeli. Tsono anandiwuza kuti
Nehemiah6:11 Koma ndinayankha kuti
Nehemiah6:12 Ndinazindikira kuti Mulungu sanamutume koma kuti anayankhula mawu oloserawa motsutsana nane chifukwa Tobiya ndi Sanibalati anamulemba ntchitoyi.
Nehemiah6:13 Iye analembedwa ntchitoyi ndi cholinga choti ine ndichite mantha
Nehemiah6:14 Tsono ndinapemphera kuti
Nehemiah6:15 Ndipo khoma linatsirizidwa kumanga pa tsiku la 25 la mwezi wa Eluli. Linamangidwa pa masiku okwana 52.
Nehemiah6:16 Adani athu onse atamva izi
Nehemiah6:17 Komanso masiku amenewo anthu olemekezeka a ku Yuda ankalemberana naye makalata ambiri ndi Tobiyayo
Nehemiah6:18 pakuti anthu ambiri a ku Yuda anali atalumbira kale kuti adzagwira naye ntchito popeza anali mkamwini wa Sekaniya mwana wa Ara
Nehemiah6:19 Kuwonjezera apo
Nehemiah7:1 Khoma linamangidwa ndipo zitseko zinayikidwa. Pambuyo pake alonda a Nyumba ya Mulungu
Nehemiah7:2 Kenaka ine ndinasankha mʼbale wanga Hanani pamodzi ndi Hananiya woyangʼanira nsanja yankhondo kukhala olamulira Yerusalemu chifukwa iyeyu anali munthu odalirika ndi woopa Mulungu kuposa anthu ena.
Nehemiah7:3 Ine ndinawawuza kuti
Nehemiah7:4 Tsono mzinda wa Yerusalemu unali wotambasuka ndiponso waukulu koma munali anthu ochepa ndipo nyumba zinali zisanamangidwe.
Nehemiah7:5 Ndipo Mulungu wanga anayika mu mtima mwanga maganizo oti ndisonkhanitse anthu olemekezeka
Nehemiah7:6 Awa ndi anthu a mʼchigawo cha Yuda amene anabwerera kuchokera ku ukapolo amene Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babuloni anawatenga ukapolo. Iwo anabwerera ku Yerusalemu ndi ku Yuda

Nehemiah7:57 Zidzukulu za antchito a Solomoni: Zidzukulu za Sotai
Nehemiah7:58 zidzukulu za Yaala
Nehemiah7:59 	zidzukulu za Sefatiya
Nehemiah7:60 Anthu onse ogwira ntchito ku Nyumba ya Mulungu pamodzi ndi zidzukulu za antchito a Solomoni analipo — 392.
Nehemiah7:61 Ali munsiwa anachokera ku Teli-Mela
Nehemiah7:62 	Zidzukulu za Delaya
Nehemiah7:63 Ndiponso ena pakati pa ansembe anali awa: zidzukulu za Hobiya
Nehemiah7:64 Iwowa anafufuzafufuza mayina awo mʼbuku la mibado ya mabanja awo ndipo sanapeze mayina awo kotero anachotsedwa pa unsembe nawerengedwa ngati odetsedwa pa chipembedzo.
Nehemiah7:65 Choncho bwanamkubwa anawawuza anthuwo kuti asamadye nawo chakudya china chilichonse choperekedwa kwa Mulungu mpaka patapezeka wansembe wodziwa kugwiritsa bwino ntchito ya Urimu ndi Tumimu.
Nehemiah7:66 Chiwerengero chonse cha anthuwa chinali 42
Nehemiah7:67 Kuwonjezera pamenepa panali antchito awo aamuna ndi aakazi 7
Nehemiah7:68 Panali akavalo 736
Nehemiah7:69 Ngamira zawo zinalipo 435 ndipo abulu analipo 6
Nehemiah7:70 Atsogoleri ena a mabanja anapereka mphatso zothandizira ntchito. Bwanamkubwa anapereka ku thumba losungira chuma
Nehemiah7:71 Atsogoleri ena amabanja anapereka ku thumba losungira chuma ndalama zagolide zokwana makilogalamu 168
Nehemiah7:72 Anthu ena onse otsala anapereka ndalama zagolide zokwana makilogalamu 168
Nehemiah7:73 Choncho ansembe
Nehemiah8:1 Anthu onse anasonkhana ngati munthu mmodzi pabwalo limene lili patsogolo pa Chipata cha Madzi. Iwo anawuza mlembi Ezara kuti abwere ndi buku la malamulo a Mose limene Yehova anapereka kwa Aisraeli.
Nehemiah8:2 Choncho pa tsiku loyamba la mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri wansembe Ezara
Nehemiah8:3 Choncho Ezara anawerenga bukulo atayangʼana bwalo la Chipata cha Madzi kuyambira mmawa mpaka masana pamaso pa amuna
Nehemiah8:4 Mlembi Ezara anayimirira pa nsanja ya mitengo imene anthu anamanga chifukwa cha msonkhanowu. Ku dzanja lake lamanja kunayimirira Matitiya
Nehemiah8:5 Tsono Ezara anatsekula buku
Nehemiah8:6 Ezara anatamanda Yehova
Nehemiah8:7 Anthuwo atayimiriranso Alevi awa: Yesuwa
Nehemiah8:8 Iwo anawerenga buku la malamulo a Mulungu momveka bwino ndi kutanthauzira mawuwo kuti anthu amvetse bwino zowerengedwazo.
Nehemiah8:9 Tsono bwanamkubwa Nehemiya pamodzi ndi wansembe ndi mlembi Ezara komanso Alevi amene amaphunzitsa anthu anati kwa anthu onse
Nehemiah8:10 Nehemiya anatinso
Nehemiah8:11 Alevi anakhalitsa bata anthu onse powawuza kuti
Nehemiah8:12 Anthu onse anachoka kupita kukadya ndi kumwa. Chakudya china anatumiza kwa anzawo. Choncho panali chikondwerero chachikulu popeza tsopano anali atamvetsa bwino mawu a Mulungu amene anawawerengera ndi kuwafotokozerawo.
Nehemiah8:13 Mmawa mwake atsogoleri a mabanja pamodzi ndi ansembe ndi alevi anasonkhana kwa Ezara
Nehemiah8:14 Tsono anapeza kuti zinalembedwa mʼbuku la malamulo kuti Yehova analamula kudzera mwa Mose kuti Aisraeli azikhala mʼzithando pa nthawi yonse ya chikondwerero cha mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri.
Nehemiah8:15 Choncho analengeza ndi kufalitsa mʼmizinda yawo yonse ndi mu Yerusalemu kuti
Nehemiah8:16 Choncho anthu anapita kukatenga nthambi ndipo aliyense anadzimangira misasa pa denga ya nyumba yake
Nehemiah8:17 Gulu lonse la anthu limene linabwera ku ukapolo linamanga misasa ndipo linakhala mʼmenemo. Kuyambira nthawi ya Yoswa mwana wa Nuni mpaka tsiku limenelo nʼkuti Aisraeli asanachitepo zimenezi. Choncho panali chimwemwe chachikulu.
Nehemiah8:18 Tsiku ndi tsiku
Nehemiah9:1 Pa tsiku la 24 la mwezi womwewo
Nehemiah9:2 Aisraeliwa anadzipatula pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina ndipo anayimirira nayamba kuwulula machimo awo ndi zolakwa za makolo awo.
Nehemiah9:3 Anthuwo anayimirira pomwepo
Nehemiah9:4 Pa makwerero okhalapo alevi anayimirirapo anthu awa: Yesuwa
Nehemiah9:5 Ndipo Alevi awa: Yesuwa
Nehemiah9:6 Inu nokha ndiye Yehova. Munalenga kumwamba
Nehemiah9:7 “Inu ndinu Yehova Mulungu amene munasankha Abramu ndi kumutulutsa mʼdziko la Uri wa ku Kaldeya ndi kumutcha dzina lake Abrahamu.
Nehemiah9:8 Inu munaona kuti mtima wake unali wokhulupirika kwa inu
Nehemiah9:9 “Munaona kuzunzika kwa makolo athu ku Igupto. Munamva kufuwula kwawo pa Nyanja Yofiira.
Nehemiah9:10 Inu munachita zizindikiro zozizwitsa ndi zodabwitsa kutsutsana ndi Farao
Nehemiah9:11 Inu munagawa nyanja anthu anu akupenya
Nehemiah9:12 Masana munkawunikira ndi chipilala cha mtambo ndipo usiku munkawunikira ndi chipilala cha moto njira yonse imene ankayendamo.
Nehemiah9:13 “Munatsika pa Phiri la Sinai
Nehemiah9:14 Inu munawadziwitsa kuti tsiku lanu la Sabata ndi loyera ndipo munawapatsa malamulo ndi ziphunzitso.
Nehemiah9:15 Pamene anali ndi njala munawapatsa buledi wochokera kumwamba. Pamene anali ndi ludzu munawapatsa madzi otuluka mʼthanthwe. Munawawuza kuti apite kukalanda dziko limene munalonjeza kuti mudzawapatsa.”
Nehemiah9:16 “Koma makolo athu anadzikuza ndi kuwumitsa khosi
Nehemiah9:17 Anakana kumvera ndipo sanakumbukire zodabwitsa zimene munachita pakati pawo. Koma iwo anawumitsa khosi
Nehemiah9:18 Ngakhale pamene iwo anadziwumbira fano la mwana wangʼombe ndi kuti
Nehemiah9:19 “Koma Inu ndi chifundo chanu chachikulu
Nehemiah9:20 Inu munawapatsa mzimu wanu wabwino kuti uwalangize. Inu simunawamane chakudya cha mana chija
Nehemiah9:21 Munawasunga zaka makumi anayi mʼchipululu ndipo sanasowe kanthu kalikonse. Zovala zawo sizinathe kapena mapazi awo kutupa.”
Nehemiah9:22 “Inu munawapatsa mafumu ndi mayiko mʼmanja mwawo. Munawagawiranso mayiko achilendo akutali kwambiri. Munabwera nawo mʼdziko la Sihoni mfumu ya Hesiboni ndi dziko la Ogi mfumu ya Basani kuti alowemo nʼkulitenga kukhala lawo.
Nehemiah9:23 Munachulukitsa ana awo aamuna ngati nyenyezi za mlengalenga. Ndipo munawabweretsa mʼdziko limene munawuza makolo awo kuti alilowe ndi kulitenga.
Nehemiah9:24 Choncho zidzukulu zawo zinapita ndi kukalandira dzikolo. Inu munagonjetsa pamaso pawo
Nehemiah9:25 Iwo analanda mizinda yotetezedwa ndi dziko lachonde. Anatenganso nyumba zodzaza ndi zinthu zonse zabwino
Nehemiah9:26 “Komabe iwo anakhala osamvera ndipo anakuwukirani nafulatira malamulo anu. Anapha aneneri anu
Nehemiah9:27 Pamene anazunzidwa anafuwulira kwa Inu
Nehemiah9:28 “Koma akangokhala pa mtendere ankayambanso kuchita zoyipa pamaso panu. Choncho munkawapereka mʼmanja mwa adani awo amene ankawalamulira. Komabe pamene ankabwerera ndi kumalira kwa Inu
Nehemiah9:29 “Inu munkawachenjeza kuti abwerere ndi kuyamba kutsata malamulo anu. Koma iwo ankadzitukumula ndipo sankamvera malamulo anu. Iwo anachimwira malangizo anu amene munati ‘Amapatsa moyo kwa munthu wowamvera.’ Iwo ankakufulatirani
Nehemiah9:30 Munapirira nawo kwa zaka zambiri. Munkawachenjeza ndi Mzimu wanu kudzera mwa aneneri anu
Nehemiah9:31 Komabe mwachifundo chanu chachikulu simuwatheretu kapena kuwataya pakuti ndinu Mulungu wokoma mtima ndi wachifundo.
Nehemiah9:32 “Nʼchifukwa chake
Nehemiah9:33 Koma Inu mwakhala wolungama pa zonse zimene zakhala zikutichitikira. Mwachita zokhulupirika
Nehemiah9:34 Ndipotu mafumu athu
Nehemiah9:35 Ngakhale ankadzilamulira okha
Nehemiah9:36 “Tsono
Nehemiah9:37 Tsono chifukwa cha machimo athu
Nehemiah9:38 “Chifukwa cha zonsezi

Nehemiah10:31 “Ngati anthu a mitundu ina abwera ndi zinthu za malonda
Nehemiah10:32 “Tikulonjezanso molumbira kuti chaka ndi chaka tizipereka magalamu anayi a siliva kuti zithandize ntchito ya ku Nyumba ya Mulungu wathu.

Nehemiah10:36 “Tidzabweranso nawo ku Nyumba ya Mulungu
Nehemiah10:37 “Ndiponso ku zipinda za Nyumba ya Mulungu wathu
Nehemiah10:38 Wansembe
Nehemiah10:39 Choncho Israeli
Nehemiah11:1 Nthawi imeneyo atsogoleri a anthu ankakhala ku Yerusalemu. Tsono anthu ena onse anachita maere kuti apeze munthu mmodzi pa anthu khumi aliwonse kuti azikhala ku Yerusalemu
Nehemiah11:2 Anthu anayamikira onse amene anadzipereka kuti azikhala mu Yerusalemu.
Nehemiah11:3 Aisraeli wamba
Nehemiah11:4 Ku Yerusalemu kunkakhalanso anthu ena a mafuko a Yuda ndi Benjamini. Ena mwa zidzukulu za Yuda ndi awa: Ataya
Nehemiah11:5 Ena ndi awa: Maaseya mwana wa Baruki
Nehemiah11:6 Zidzukulu zonse za Perezi
Nehemiah11:7 Nazi zidzukulu za Benjamini: Salu mwana wa Mesulamu
Nehemiah11:8 Abale ake anali Gabayi ndi Salaya. Onse pamodzi anali 928.
Nehemiah11:9 Yoweli mwana wa Zikiri ndiye anali mtsogoleri wawo
Nehemiah11:10 Ansembe anali awa: Yedaya mwana wa Yowaribu; Yakini;
Nehemiah11:11 Seraya mwana wa Hilikiya mwana wa Mesulamu
Nehemiah11:12 ndi abale awo
Nehemiah11:13 ndi abale ake
Nehemiah11:14 ndi abale ake. Onse pamodzi anali 128 ndipo anali anthu olimba mtima kwambiri. Mtsogoleri wawo wamkulu anali Zabidieli mwana wa Hagedolimu.
Nehemiah11:15 Alevi anali awa: Semaya mwana wa Hasubu
Nehemiah11:16 Sabetayi ndi Yozabadi anali atsogoleri amene ankayangʼanira ntchito ya kunja kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu.
Nehemiah11:17 Mataniya mwana wa Mika
Nehemiah11:18 Alevi onse amene anali mu mzinda woyera analipo 284.
Nehemiah11:19 Alonda a ku Nyumba ya Mulungu anali awa: Akubu
Nehemiah11:20 Aisraeli ena onse pamodzi ndi ansembe ndi Alevi ankakhala mʼmizinda ya Yuda
Nehemiah11:21 Koma antchito a ku Nyumba ya Mulungu ankakhala pa phiri la Ofeli
Nehemiah11:22 Wamkulu wa Alevi mu Yerusalemu anali Uzi mwana wa Bani
Nehemiah11:23 Pakuti mfumu inalamula kuti tsiku ndi tsiku pa nthawi zachipembedzo oyimba nyimbowo azikhalapo.
Nehemiah11:24 Petahiya mwana wa Mesezabeli
Nehemiah11:25 Anthu ena a fuko la Yuda ankakhala ku Kiriyati-Ariba ndi midzi yake
Nehemiah11:26 ku Yesuwa
Nehemiah11:27 Hazari-Suwali
Nehemiah11:28 Ku Zikilagi
Nehemiah11:29 ku Eni-Rimoni
Nehemiah11:30 Zanowa
Nehemiah11:31 Nazonso zidzukulu za Benjamini zinkakhala mʼdera lawo kuyambira ku Geba mpaka ku Mikimasi
Nehemiah11:32 ku Anatoti
Nehemiah11:33 ku Hazori
Nehemiah11:34 ku Hadidi
Nehemiah11:35 ku Lodi
Nehemiah11:36 Magulu ena a Alevi a ku Yuda ankakhala ku Benjamini.
Nehemiah12:1 Ansembe ndi Alevi amene anabwerera pamodzi ndi Zerubabeli mwana wa Sealatieli ndi Yesuwa anali awa: Seraya
Nehemiah12:2 	Amariya
Nehemiah12:3 	Sekaniya
Nehemiah12:4 	Ido
Nehemiah12:5 	Miyamini
Nehemiah12:6 	Semaya
Nehemiah12:7 Salu
Nehemiah12:8 Alevi anali Yesuwa
Nehemiah12:9 Abale awo
Nehemiah12:10 Yesuwa anabereka Yowakimu
Nehemiah12:11 Yoyada anabereka Yonatani
Nehemiah12:12 Pa nthawi ya Yowakimu
Nehemiah12:13 	wa fuko la Ezara anali Mesulamu; wa fuko la Amariya anali Yehohanani;
Nehemiah12:14 	wa fuko la Maluki anali Yonatani; wa fuko la Sebaniya anali Yosefe;
Nehemiah12:15 	wa fuko la Harimu anali Adina; wa fuko la Merayoti anali Helikayi;
Nehemiah12:16 	wa fuko la Ido anali Zekariya; wa fuko la Ginetoni anali Mesulamu;
Nehemiah12:17 	wa fuko la Abiya anali Zikiri; wa fuko la Miniyamini ndi banja la Maadiya anali Pilitayi;
Nehemiah12:18 	wa fuko la Biliga anali Samuwa; wa fuko la Semaya anali Yonatani;
Nehemiah12:19 	wa fuko la Yowaribu anali Matenayi; wa fuko la Yedaya anali Uzi;
Nehemiah12:20 	wa fuko la Salai anali Kalai; wa fuko la Amoki anali Eberi;
Nehemiah12:21 	wa fuko la Hilikiya anali Hasabiya; wa fuko la Yedaya anali Netaneli.
Nehemiah12:22 Pa nthawi ya Eliyasibu
Nehemiah12:23 Zidzukulu za Levi
Nehemiah12:24 Ndipo atsogoleri a Alevi awa
Nehemiah12:25 Mataniya
Nehemiah12:26 Iwo ndiwo ankatumikira pa nthawi ya Yowakimu mwana wa Yesuwa mwana wa Yozadaki
Nehemiah12:27 Pa mwambo wopereka khoma la Yerusalemu anayitana Alevi kulikonse kumene ankakhala kuti abwere ku Yerusalemu ku mwambo wopereka khoma kwa Mulungu
Nehemiah12:28 Tsono anthu a mabanja a Alevi oyimba nyimbo aja anasonkhana pamodzi kuchokera ku madera onse ozungulira Yerusalemu ndiponso ku midzi ya Anetofati
Nehemiah12:29 Beti-Giligala ndi ku madera a ku Geba ndi Azimaveti
Nehemiah12:30 Tsono ansembe ndi Alevi anachita mwambo wodziyeretsa. Pambuyo pake anachita mwambo woyeretsa anthu onse ndi khoma la Yerusalemu.
Nehemiah12:31 Ine ndinabwera nawo atsogoleri a dziko la Yuda ndi kukwera nawo pa khoma. Ndipo ndinasankha magulu awiri akuluakulu oyimba nyimbo za matamando. Gulu limodzi linadzera mbali ya ku dzanja lamanja pa khoma mpaka ku Chipata cha Kudzala.
Nehemiah12:32 Pambuyo pawo panali Hosayia
Nehemiah12:33 pamodzi ndi Azariya
Nehemiah12:34 Yuda
Nehemiah12:35 Ena mwa ana a ansembe amene ankayimba malipenga awo anali awa: Zekariya mwana wa Yonatani mwana wa Semaya mwana wa Mataniya
Nehemiah12:36 pamodzi ndi abale awo awa: Semaya
Nehemiah12:37 Kuchokera ku Chipata cha Kasupe anayenda nakakwera makwerero opita ku mzinda wa Davide pa njira yotsatira khoma
Nehemiah12:38 Gulu loyimba lachiwiri linadzera mbali ya kumanzere kwa khomalo. Tsono ine ndi theka lina la atsogoleri aja tinkalitsata pambuyo tikuyenda pamwamba pa khomalo. Tinapitirira Nsanja ya Ngʼanjo mpaka ku Khoma Lotambasuka.
Nehemiah12:39 Tinadutsanso Chipata cha Efereimu
Nehemiah12:40 Choncho magulu onse awiri oyimba nyimbo zothokoza aja anakayima pafupi ndi Nyumba ya Mulungu. Pamodzi ndi ine ndi theka la atsogoleri aja
Nehemiah12:41 panalinso ansembe awa akuyimba malipenga: Eliyakimu
Nehemiah12:42 Panalinso ansembe awa: Maaseya
Nehemiah12:43 Pa tsiku limenelo anthu anapereka nsembe zambiri ndipo anakondwera chifukwa Mulungu anawapatsa chimwemwe chachikulu. Nawonso akazi ndi ana anakondwera ndipo kukondwa kwa anthu a mu mzinda wa Yerusalemu kunamveka kutali.
Nehemiah12:44 Tsiku limenelo panasankhidwa anthu oyangʼanira zipinda zosungiramo zopereka zaufulu
Nehemiah12:45 Iwowa ankagwira ntchito ya Mulungu wawo
Nehemiah12:46 Pakuti kalekale
Nehemiah12:47 Choncho mu nthawi ya Zerubabeli ndi Nehemiya
Nehemiah13:1 Pa tsiku limenelo anawerenga buku la Mose anthu akumva. Ndipo anapeza mawu akuti
Nehemiah13:2 Paja iwowa sanawachingamire Aisraeli kukawapatsa chakudya ndi madzi. Mʼmalo mwake analemba ganyu Baalamu kuti adzawatemberere. Komabe Mulungu wathu anasandutsa tembererolo kukhala mdalitso.
Nehemiah13:3 Anthu atamva lamuloli
Nehemiah13:4 Izi zisanachitike
Nehemiah13:5 Choncho anamupatsa chipinda chachikulu chimene kale ankasungamo zopereka zakudya
Nehemiah13:6 Koma pamene izi zonse zinkachitika mu Yerusalemu
Nehemiah13:7 ndipo ndinabwerera ku Yerusalemu. Kumeneko ndinamva za chinthu choyipa chimene Eliyasibu anachita pomupatsa Tobiya chipinda mʼbwalo la Nyumba ya Mulungu.
Nehemiah13:8 Ndinapsa mtima kwambiri ndipo ndinataya kunja katundu yense wa Tobiya amene anali mʼchipindamo.
Nehemiah13:9 Ndinalamulira kuti ayeretse zipinda
Nehemiah13:10 Ndinapezanso kuti Alevi sankalandira magawo awo amene amayera kulandira. Chotsatira chake Alevi onse pamodzi ndi oyimba nyimbo amene ankagwira ku Nyumba ya Mulungu anathawa
Nehemiah13:11 Choncho ndinadzudzula akuluakulu aja ndipo ndinawafunsa kuti
Nehemiah13:12 Pambuyo pake Ayuda anayambanso kubwera ndi zopereka zawo za chakhumi cha tirigu
Nehemiah13:13 Ndipo ndinasankha wansembe Selemiya
Nehemiah13:14 Inu Mulungu wanga
Nehemiah13:15 Nthawi imeneyo ndinaona anthu a mu Yuda akuponda ndi kufinya mphesa pa tsiku la Sabata. Ena ankawunjika tirigu milumilu ndi kumasenzetsa abulu. Enanso ankabwera ndi vinyo
Nehemiah13:16 Nawonso anthu a ku Turo amene ankakhala mu Yerusalemu ankabweretsa nsomba ndi akatundu ena onse amalonda kudzagulitsa pa Sabata kwa anthu a mʼdziko la Yuda ndi a mu Yerusalemu.
Nehemiah13:17 Ndipo ndinadzudzula anthu olemekezeka a dziko la Yuda. Ndinawafunsa kuti
Nehemiah13:18 Makolo anu anachita zomwezi ndipo Mulungu wathu anadzetsa mavuto pa ife ndi pa mzinda uwu. Kodi inu mukufuna kuwutsanso mkwiyo wa Mulungu pa Israeli pamene mukudetsa tsiku la Sabata?”
Nehemiah13:19 Nʼchifukwa chake ndikulamula kuti pamene kuyamba kuda
Nehemiah13:20 Choncho kamodzi kapena kawiri anthu amalonda ndi anthu ogulitsa katundu osiyanasiyana ankagona usiku wonse kunja kwa Yerusalemu.
Nehemiah13:21 Koma ndinawachenjeza ndi kuwafunsa kuti
Nehemiah13:22 Ndipo ndinalamulira Alevi kuti adziyeretse okha ndi kubwera kudzalonda pa zipata ndi cholinga choti tsiku la Sabata likhale tsiku loyera. Inu Mulungu wanga
Nehemiah13:23 Masiku amenewo ndinaonanso anthu a ku Yuda amene anakwatira akazi ochokera ku Asidodi
Nehemiah13:24 Theka la ana awo linkayankhula chiyankhulo cha Asidodi kapena chiyankhulo chimodzi cha anthu ena
Nehemiah13:25 Tsono ndinakangana nawo ndi kuwatemberera. Ndinamenya ena mwa anthuwo ndi kuzula tsitsi lawo. Ine ndinawalumbiritsa mʼdzina la Mulungu kuti
Nehemiah13:26 Kodi Solomoni mfumu ya Israeli suja anachimwa chifukwa cha ukwati ngati umenewu. Pakati pa mitundu yambiri panalibe mfumu ngati iyi. Iye anakondedwa ndi Mulungu wake
Nehemiah13:27 Kodi tsopano ife tizimva inu kuti mukuchita choyipa chachikulu chimenechi
Nehemiah13:28 Mmodzi mwa ana aamuna a Yehoyada mwana Eliyasibu mkulu wa ansembe nʼkuti nthawi imeneyi ali mpongozi wa Sanibalati wa ku Horoni. Choncho ndinamuthamangitsa pamaso panga.
Nehemiah13:29 Inu Mulungu wanga
Nehemiah13:30 Motero ndinayeretsa ansembe ndi Alevi powachotsera kalikonse kachilendo. Ndipo ndinakhazikitsa ntchito zawo
Nehemiah13:31 Ndiponso kupereka nkhuni ndi zipatso zoyamba kucha pa nthawi yake. Ndikumbukireni pondikomera mtima
Esther1:1 Izi ndi zimene zinachitika pa nthawi ya ufumu wa Ahasiwero
Esther1:2 Pa nthawi imeneyi nʼkuti mfumu Ahasiwero atakhazikika pa mpando wake wa ufumu mu mzinda wa Susa
Esther1:3 ndipo mʼchaka chachitatu cha ufumu wake anakonza phwando la olemekezeka ndi nduna zake. Atsogoleri a nkhondo a ku Peresiya ndi Mediya
Esther1:4 Pa nthawi yomweyi kwa masiku 180 a phwando mfumu inkaonetsa kulemera kwa ulemerero wa ufumu wake ndiponso kukongola ndi kukula kwa ufumu wake.
Esther1:5 Atatha masiku amenewa
Esther1:6 Bwalo la mundali analikongoletsa ndi makatani a nsalu zoyera ndi za mtundu wamtambo zimene anazimangirira ndi zingwe za nsalu zoyera ndi zapepo ku mphete za siliva zimene anazikoloweka pa nsanamira za maburo. Anayika mipando yopumirapo yagolide ndi siliva pabwalo la miyala yoyala yamtengowapatali yofiira
Esther1:7 Anapereka zakumwa mʼchikho zagolide zamitundumitundu
Esther1:8 Monga mwa lamulo la mfumu aliyense anamwa mʼmene anafunira
Esther1:9 Mkazi wa mfumu Vasiti nayenso anakonzera phwando amayi ku nyumba ya ufumu ya mfumu Ahasiwero.
Esther1:10 Pa tsiku la chisanu ndi chiwiri
Esther1:11 kuti abwere naye mfumukazi Vasiti pamaso pa mfumu atavala chipewa chaufumu. Cholinga cha mfumu chinali choti adzamuonetse kwa anthu onse ndi olemekezeka
Esther1:12 Koma antchito atapereka uthenga wa mfumu kwa mfumukazi
Esther1:13 Mfumu inayankhula ndi anthu anzeru ndi ozindikira choyenera kuchita popeza chinali chikhalidwe chake kufunsa uphungu kwa akatswiri pa nkhani za malamulo ndi kuweruza kolungama.
Esther1:14 Anthu amene ankakhala pafupi ndi mfumu anali awa: Karisena
Esther1:15 Mfumu inafunsa kuti
Esther1:16 Ndipo Memukani anayankha pa maso pa mfumu ndi olemekezeka anzake kuti
Esther1:17 Pakuti amayi onse adzadziwa zimene wachita mfumukazi ndipo kotero adzapeputsa amuna awo ndi kunena kuti
Esther1:18 Lero lomwe lino amayi olemekezeka a ku Peresiya ndi Mediya amene amva zimene wachita mfumukazi adzaganiza zochita chimodzimodzi kwa nduna zonse za mfumu. Ndipo kupeputsana ndi kukongola zidzapitirira.”
Esther1:19 “Choncho
Esther1:20 Ndipo lamulo la mfumuli lilengezedwa mʼdziko lake lonse ngakhale lili lalikulu
Esther1:21 Mfumu ndi nduna zake anakondwera ndi uphungu uwu
Esther1:22 Mfumu inatumiza makalata ku madera onse a ufumu wake
Esther2:1 Pambuyo pake mtima wa Ahasiwero utatsika
Esther2:2 Tsono anyamata a mfumu amene ankamutumikira anati
Esther2:3 Mfumu isankhe oyangʼanira pa chigawo chilichonse cha ufumu wake kuti abwere nawo pamodzi anamwali onse okongola ku nyumba yosungira akazi ku Susa. Hegai
Esther2:4 Ndipo namwali amene mfumu yakondwera naye akhale mfumukazi mʼmalo mwa Vasiti.” Mfumu inakondwera ndi uphunguwu
Esther2:5 Myuda wina wa fuko la Benjamini
Esther2:6 Iyeyu anali mmodzi mwa anthu amene anatengedwa ukapolo ndi Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babuloni kuchokera ku Yerusalemu pamodzi ndi Yekoniya mfumu ya Yuda.
Esther2:7 Mordekai nʼkuti atalera Hadasa
Esther2:8 Lamulo la mfumu atalilengeza ndi kubwera nawo pamodzi anamwali ambiri ku mzinda wa Susa kuti akasamalidwe ndi Hegai
Esther2:9 Hegai anasangalatsidwa naye namwaliyo ndipo anamukomera mtima. Mosataya nthawi anamupatsa mafuta ake odzola ndi chakudya chapadera. Anamusankhiranso anamwali asanu ndi awiri a ku nyumba ya mfumu kuti azimutumikira
Esther2:10 Estere sanawulule mtundu wake ndi abale ake chifukwa Mordekai anamuletsa kutero.
Esther2:11 Tsiku ndi tsiku Mordekai ankayendayenda pafupi ndi bwalo la nyumba yosungiramo akazi ija kuti adziwe za moyo wa Estere ndi kuti zinthu zikumuyendera bwanji.
Esther2:12 Tsono nthawi inkafika kuti namwali aliyense akaonekere kwa mfumu Ahasiwero
Esther2:13 Ndipo namwali ankapita kwa mfumu motere: Ankaloledwa kutenga chilichonse angafune mʼnyumba yosungiramo akazi kupita nacho ku nyumba ya mfumu.
Esther2:14 Ankalowa madzulo kwa mfumu ndi kutuluka mmawa kupita ku nyumba ina yosungira akazi yomwe ankayangʼanira ndi Saasigazi
Esther2:15 Tsono inafika nthawi kuti Estere
Esther2:16 Anapita naye kwa mfumu Ahasiwero ku nyumba ya ufumu pa mwezi wa khumi
Esther2:17 Ndipo mfumu inamukonda Estere koposa wina aliyense wa akazi aja
Esther2:18 Ndipo mfumu inakonza phwando lalikulu
Esther2:19 Anamwali atasonkhanitsidwa pamodzi
Esther2:20 Koma Estere anali asanawululebe za mtundu wake ndi anthu a pa banja lake monga momwe analamulira Mordekai
Esther2:21 Pa nthawi imene Mordekai ankalondera pa chipata cha mfumu
Esther2:22 Koma Mordekai atazindikira za chiwembuchi anawuza mfumukazi Estere ndipo iye anakawuza mfumu mʼmalo mwa Mordekai.
Esther2:23 Ndipo pamene anafufuza za chiwembuchi kuti zinali zoona
Esther3:1 Zitachitika izi
Esther3:2 Atumiki onse a mfumu amene anali pa chipata cha nyumba ya mfumu ankagwadira ndi kuweramira Hamani monga mwa lamulo la mfumu. Koma Mordekai sankamugwadira kapena kumuweramira.
Esther3:3 Kenaka atumiki a mfumu amene anali pa chipata anafunsa Mordekai kuti
Esther3:4 Tsiku ndi tsiku ankayankhula naye koma iye sanamverebe. Choncho anamuwuza Hamani kuti aone ngati angavomereze khalidwe lotere la Mordekai
Esther3:5 Hamani ataona kuti Mordekai sankamugwadira kapena kumuweramira
Esther3:6 Hamani atamva kuti Mordekai anali Myuda
Esther3:7 Mwezi woyamba
Esther3:8 Kenaka Hamani anakawuza mfumu Ahasiwero kuti
Esther3:9 Ngati chingakukomereni mfumu
Esther3:10 Choncho mfumu inavula mphete yodindira ku chala chake ndi kumupatsa Hamani mwana wa Hamedata Mwagagi
Esther3:11 Mfumu inati kwa Hamani
Esther3:12 Alembi analemba zonse zimene Hamani analamula mʼmakalata opita kwa akazembe a mfumu
Esther3:13 Makalatawa anawatumiza amithenga ku zigawo zonse za mfumu kuti awononge
Esther3:14 Mwachidule kalatayi inanena kuti mawu olembedwamowo anayenera kuperekedwa ngati lamulo mʼchigawo chilichonse ndi kuti anthu a mtundu uliwonse adziwe ndi kukhala okonzeka pa tsikulo.
Esther3:15 Potsata lamulo la mfumu
Esther4:1 Mordekai atamva zonse zimene zinachitika
Esther4:2 Ndipo anapita ndi kuyima pa chipata cha mfumu
Esther4:3 Chigawo chilichonse kumene mawu a mfumu ndi lamulo lake zinafika
Esther4:4 Anamwali otumikira mfumukazi Estere ndi adindo ake ofulidwa atabwera ndi kumuwuza za Mordekai
Esther4:5 Kenaka Estere anayitana Hataki
Esther4:6 Choncho Hataki anapita kwa Mordekai ku bwalo la mzinda patsogolo pa chipata cha mfumu.
Esther4:7 Mordekai anamuwuza zonse zimene zinamuchitikira kuphatikizapo mtengo weniweni wa ndalama zimene Hamani analonjeza kupereka mosungira chuma cha mfumu za anthu amene adzawononge a Yuda.
Esther4:8 Mordekai anamupatsanso imodzi mwa makalata a ulamuliro wonena za chiwembuchi amene anawasindikiza ku Susa kukamuonetsa ndi kumufotokozera zonse Estere. Anamuwuzanso kuti akamudandaulire kuti akapite kwa mfumu kukapempha chifundo ndi kuyidandaulira chifukwa cha anthu a mtundu wake.
Esther4:9 Hataki anabwerera ndi kumufotokozera Estere zimene Mordekai ananena.
Esther4:10 Ndipo Estere anamutuma Hataki kuti akanene kwa Mordekai kuti
Esther4:11 “Atumiki onse amfumu ndi anthu a zigawo za mfumu ankadziwa kuti mwamuna kapena mkazi aliyense akalowa ku bwalo lake la mʼkati mosayitanidwa ndi mfumu pali lamulo limodzi: lamuloli ndi lakuti aphedwe. Zimasintha pokhapokha ngati mfumu iloza munthuyo ndi ndodo yagolide kuti akhale ndi moyo. Koma papita masiku makumi atatu ndisanayitanidwe ndi mfumu.”
Esther4:12 Tsono Mordekai anawuzidwa mawu a Estere.
Esther4:13 Kenaka Mordekai anawawuza kuti akamuyankhe Estere motere: “Usaganize kuti iwe wekha mwa Ayuda onse udzapulumuka chifukwa chakuti uli mʼnyumba ya mfumu.
Esther4:14 Pakuti ngati ukhalatu chete nthawi ino
Esther4:15 Pamenepo Estere anatumiza yankho ili kwa Mordekai:
Esther4:16 “Pitani
Esther4:17 Choncho Mordekai anapita ndi kuchita monga Estere anamupemphera.
Esther5:1 Tsiku lachitatu Estere anavala zovala zake zaufumu ndipo anayima mʼbwalo la mʼkati la nyumba yaufumu choyangʼana ku chipinda chachikulu cha mfumu. Mfumu inakhala pa mpando waufumu mʼchipinda chachikulu moyangʼana ku chipata cholowera mʼnyumba yaufumu.
Esther5:2 Mfumu itaona Estere atayima mʼbwalomo inakondwera naye ndipo anamuloza ndi ndodo yagolide imene inali mʼdzanja lake. Choncho Estere anayandikira ndi kukhudza msonga ya ndodoyo.
Esther5:3 Kenaka mfumu inati kwa iye
Esther5:4 Ndipo Estere anayankha kuti
Esther5:5 Mfumu inati
Esther5:6 Akumwa vinyo
Esther5:7 Estere anayankha kuti
Esther5:8 Ngati mwandikomera mtima mfumu ndiponso ngati chingakukondweretseni mfumu kundipatsa chimene ndapempha ndi kuchita zimene ndifuna
Esther5:9 Tsiku limenelo Hamani anatuluka wokondwa ndi wosangalala kwambiri. Koma ataona Mordekai pa chipata cha mfumu ndi kuti sanayimirire kapena kumupatsa ulemu pamene iye amadutsa
