Esther5:10 komabe Hamani anadziletsa ndipo anapita ku nyumba kwake. Anayitana abwenzi ake pamodzi ndi mkazi wake Zeresi.
Esther5:11 Hamani anawawuza za kuchuluka kwa chuma chake ndi kuti anali ndi ana aamuna ambiri. Anawawuzanso za mmene mfumu inamukwezera ndi kumuyika kukhala woposa nduna ndi olemekezeka onse.
Esther5:12 Hamani anawonjeza kuti
Esther5:13 Koma zonsezi sindikhutira nazo ndikamaona nthawi zonse Myuda uja Mordekai atakhala pa chipata cha mfumu.”
Esther5:14 Mkazi wake Zeresi ndi abwenzi ake onse aja anamuwuza kuti
Esther6:1 Usiku umenewo mfumu inalephera kugona tulo; Choncho inayitanitsa buku limene amalembamo mbiri ya zamakedzana kuti amuwerengere.
Esther6:2 Anapeza kuti mʼbukumo munalembedwa zoti Mordekai anawulula kuti Bigitana ndi Teresi
Esther6:3 Mfumu inafunsa kuti
Esther6:4 Mfumu inati
Esther6:5 Atumiki ake anamuyankha kuti
Esther6:6 Hamani atalowa
Esther6:7 Choncho Hamani anayankha mfumuyo kuti
Esther6:8 Anthu abwere ndi chovala cha ufumu ndi kavalo amene mfumu imakwerapo wokhala ndi chizindikiro chaufumu pamutu pake.
Esther6:9 Ndipo mupereke chovala cha ufumucho ndi kavalo kwa mmodzi wa akalonga a mfumu a ulemu kwambiri. Ameneyu amuveke chovalacho munthu amene mfumu yakondweretsedwa naye. Akavekedwa chovalachi amuyendetse mʼmisewu yonse ya mzinda atakwera pa kavalo wa mfumu. Kalongayu azifuwula patsogolo pa munthuyu kuti ‘Ichi ndi chimene mfumu yachita kwa munthu amene yafuna kumuchitira ulemu!’ ”
Esther6:10 Mfumu inalamulira Hamani kuti
Esther6:11 Choncho Hamani anatenga chovala ndi kavalo. Anamuveka Mordekai chovalacho ndipo anamuyendetsa mʼmisewu yonse ya mu mzinda atakwera pa kavalo
Esther6:12 Pambuyo pake Mordekai anabwerera ku chipata cha mfumu. Koma Hamani anapita msanga ku nyumba kwake
Esther6:13 Hamani anawuza Zeresi mkazi wake ndi abwenzi ake onse zonse zinamuchitikira. Anthu ake anzeru ndi mkazi wake Zeresi anamuwuza kuti
Esther6:14 Pamene anthuwa amayankhula nayebe
Esther7:1 Choncho mfumu ndi Hamani anabwera kudzadya phwando la mfumukazi Estere.
Esther7:2 Pa tsiku lachiwiri akumwa vinyo
Esther7:3 Kenaka mfumukazi Estere anayankha kuti
Esther7:4 Popeza ine ndi anthu a mtundu wanga tagulitsidwa kuti atiwononge
Esther7:5 Mfumu Ahasiwero anamufunsa mfumukazi Estere
Esther7:6 Estere anati
Esther7:7 Mfumu itakwiya kwambiri inanyamuka pa phwando nipita ku munda wa maluwa wa nyumba yaufumu. Koma Hamani
Esther7:8 Mfumu itabwerera kuchokera ku munda wa maluwa wa nyumba yaufumu uja ndi kulowanso mʼchipinda chaphwando
Esther7:9 Haribona
Esther7:10 Choncho anamupachika Hamani pa mtanda umene anakonzera Mordekai. Kenaka mkwiyo wa mfumu unatsika.
Esther8:1 Tsiku lomwelo mfumu Ahasiwero anamupatsa mfumukazi Estere nyumba ya Hamani
Esther8:2 Mfumu inavula mphete yake yodindira imene analanda kwa Hamani ndipo Estere anamusankha Mordekai kukhala woyangʼanira nyumba ya Hamani.
Esther8:3 Estere anayankhulanso ndi mfumu ndipo anadzigwetsa pa mapazi ake. Uku akulira iye anapempha mfumu kuti iletse choyipa
Esther8:4 Ndipo mfumu inamuloza Estere ndi ndodo yake yagolide ndipo Estere anadzuka ndi kuyima pamaso pake.
Esther8:5 Iye anati
Esther8:6 Kodi ndingapirire bwanji pamene ndi kuona tsoka likugwera anthu a mtundu wanga? Ndingapirire bwanji pamene abale anga akuwonongedwa?”
Esther8:7 Mfumu Ahasiwero anamuyankha mfumukazi Estere ndi Mordekai Myuda kuti
Esther8:8 Tsono inu awiri
Esther8:9 Nthawi yomweyo
Esther8:10 Mordekai analemba makalatawo mʼdzina la mfumu Ahasiwero
Esther8:11 Mʼmakalata amenewa mfumu inalola kuti Ayuda okhala mu mzinda uliwonse akhale ndi ufulu wokumana ndi kudzitchinjiriza komanso kuwononga
Esther8:12 Ayuda analoledwa kuchita zimenezi mʼzigawo zonse za Mfumu Ahasiwero pa tsiku limodzi lokha la 13 la mwezi wa 12
Esther8:13 Mawu a mʼmakalatawo anayenera kudziwitsidwa kwa anthu a mtundu uliwonse mu chigawo chilichonse kuti ndi lamulo ndithu kwa anthu a mtundu uliwonse ndi kuti Ayuda adzakhale okonzeka pa tsikulo kulipsira kwa adani awo.
Esther8:14 Atawalamulira a mfumu
Esther8:15 Mordekai anachoka pamaso pa mfumu atavala zovala zaufumu zooneka ngati mtambo ndi zofewa zoyera
Esther8:16 Kwa Ayuda inali nthawi ya nkhope zowala ndi za chimwemwe
Esther8:17 Mʼchigawo chilichonse ndi mu mzinda uliwonse
Esther9:1 Pa mwezi wa 12
Esther9:2 Ayuda anasonkhana mʼmizinda ya zigawo zonse za Mfumu Ahasiwero kuthira nkhondo onse amene anafuna kuwawononga. Palibe amene akanalimbana nawo chifukwa anthu onse a mitundu ina anachita nawo mantha.
Esther9:3 Ndipo akuluakulu onse a zigawo
Esther9:4 Pajatu Mordekai anali munthu wamkulu mʼnyumba ya ufumu. Mbiri yake inafalikira zigawo zonse
Esther9:5 Motero Ayuda anakantha adani awo onse ndi lupanga
Esther9:6 Ku likulu la mzinda wa Susa
Esther9:7 Ayuda anaphanso Parisandata
Esther9:8 Porata
Esther9:9 Parimasita
Esther9:10 ana khumi a Hamani
Esther9:11 Tsiku lomwelo anawuza mfumu chiwerengero cha anthu amene anaphedwa mu likulu la mzinda wa Susa.
Esther9:12 Mfumu inati kwa mfumukazi Estere
Esther9:13 Estere anayankha kuti
Esther9:14 Choncho mfumu inalamula kuti izi zichitike. Anapereka lamulo mu Susa ndipo mitembo ya ana khumi a Hamani anayipachika pa mtanda.
Esther9:15 Ayuda a mu mzinda wa Susa anasonkhana pamodzi pa tsiku la 14 la mwezi wa Adara ndipo anapha anthu 300 mu Susa
Esther9:16 Tsono Ayuda ena onse amene anali mu zigawo za mfumu anasonkhananso kudziteteza ndipo sanasautsidwenso ndi adani popeza anapha anthu 75
Esther9:17 Zonsezi zinachitika pa tsiku la 13 la mwezi wa Adara ndipo pa tsiku la 14 anapumula ndi kupanga tsikuli kuti likhale la madyerero ndi chikondwerero.
Esther9:18 Koma Ayuda okhala mu Susa anasonkhana pa tsiku la 13 ndi la 14 ndipo anakonza tsiku la 15 kuti likhale tsiku la madyerero ndi chikondwerero.
Esther9:19 Ichi ndi chifukwa chake Ayuda a ku midzi
Esther9:20 Mordekai analemba mawu awa mʼmakalata ndipo anawatumiza kwa Ayuda onse okhala mʼzigawo zonse za mfumu Ahasiwero
Esther9:21 Anati chaka chilichonse
Esther9:22 ngati masiku amene Ayuda anapulumutsidwa kwa adani awo
Esther9:23 Choncho Ayuda anavomereza kusunga masikuwa ngati a chikondwerero monga analembera Mordekai.
Esther9:24 Hamani mwana wa Hamedata
Esther9:25 Koma mfumu itazindikira za chiwembuchi
Esther9:26 Ndi chifukwa chake masiku amenewa amatchedwa masiku a Purimu potsata dzina lakuti Purimu. Chifukwa cha kalata ya Mordekai ndiponso chifukwa cha zimene anaziona ndi kuwachitikira
Esther9:27 Ayuda onse anagwirizana kukhazikitsa lamulo lokhudza iwo
Esther9:28 Azisunga ndi kukumbukira masiku amenewa mu mʼbado uliwonse ndi banja lililonse
Esther9:29 Choncho mfumukazi Estere
Esther9:30 Ndipo Mordekai anatumiza makalata kwa Ayuda onse ku zigawo 127 za ufumu wa Ahasiwero. Kalatayi inali ya mawu a mtendere ndiponso a kukhulupirika
Esther9:31 kuti azisunga masiku a Purimu pa nyengo imene inavomerezeka monga mmene Mordekai Myuda ndi mfumukazi Estere anawalamulira ndiponso monga anadziyikira eni okha ndi zidzukulu zawo zonena za nthawi zawo za kusala zakudya ndi kulira.
Esther9:32 Lamulo la Estere linakhazikitsa mwambo wa Purimuwu ndipo zinalembedwa mʼmabuku.
Esther10:1 Mfumu Ahasiwero anakhometsa msonkho mʼdziko lake lonse mpaka ku zilumba zonse.
Esther10:2 Ndipo ntchito zonse zochitika ndi mphamvu zake komanso ndi zonse zofotokoza za ukulu wa Mordekai
Esther10:3 Pakuti Mordekai Myuda uja anali wachiwiri wa mfumu Ahasiwero. Kwa Ayuda onse Mordekai anali munthu wamkulu ndipo ankamukonda chifukwa ankachitira zabwino mtundu wake ndi kufunira mtendere abale ake.
Job1:1 Mʼdziko la Uzi munali munthu wina
Job1:2 Anali ndi ana aamuna asanu ndi awiri ndi ana aakazi atatu
Job1:3 ndipo anali ndi nkhosa 7
Job1:4 Ana ake aamuna ankachita phwando mosinthanasinthana mʼnyumba zawo
Job1:5 Masiku aphwandowo atatha
Job1:6 Ana a Mulungu atabwera kudzadzionetsa pamaso pa Yehova
Job1:7 Yehova anati kwa Satanayo
Job1:8 Pamenepo Yehova anati kwa Satana
Job1:9 Satana anayankha kuti
Job1:10 “Kodi Inu simumamuteteza iyeyo
Job1:11 Koma tatambasulani dzanja lanu ndi kukantha zonse ali nazo ndipo iyeyo adzakutukwanani ndithu pamaso panu.”
Job1:12 Yehova anati kwa Satana
Job1:13 Tsiku lina pamene ana aamuna ndi ana aakazi a Yobu ankachita phwando ndi kumwa vinyo mʼnyumba mwa mkulu wawo
Job1:14 wamthenga anabwera kwa Yobu ndipo anati
Job1:15 tsono panabwera Aseba kudzatithira nkhondo ndi kutenga zonse. Apha antchito ndi lupanga
Job1:16 Iyeyo akuyankhulabe
Job1:17 Iyeyo akuyankhulabe
Job1:18 Iyeyo akuyankhulabe
Job1:19 mwadzidzidzi chinayamba chimphepo champhamvu chochokera ku chipululu
Job1:20 Atamva zimenezi
Job1:21 nati
Job1:22 Mu zonsezi
Job2:1 Tsiku linanso pamene ana a Mulungu anabwera kudzadzionetsa pamaso pa Yehova
Job2:2 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Satana
Job2:3 Pamenepo Yehova anati kwa Satana
Job2:4 Satana anayankha kuti
Job2:5 Koma tatambasulani dzanja lanu ndi kuwononga thupi lake
Job2:6 Yehova anati kwa Satana
Job2:7 Choncho Satana anachoka pamaso pa Yehova napita kukazunza Yobu ndi zilonda zaululu pa thupi lake lonse.
Job2:8 Pamenepo Yobu anatenga phale ndi kumadzikanda nalo atakhala pa dzala la phulusa.
Job2:9 Mkazi wake anati kwa iye
Job2:10 Yobu anayankha kuti
Job2:11 Abwenzi atatu a Yobu
Job2:12 Atamuona Yobuyo
Job2:13 Tsono anakhala naye pamodzi pansi kwa masiku asanu ndi awiri
Job3:1 Pambuyo pake Yobu anatsekula pakamwa pake nayamba kutemberera tsiku limene iyeyo anabadwa.
Job3:2 Ndipo Yobu anati:
Job3:3 “Tsiku limene ine ndinabadwa litembereredwe ndi usiku umene ananena kuti
Job3:4 Tsiku limenelo lisanduke mdima; Mulungu wa kumwambako asalilabadirenso; kuwala kusaonekenso pa tsikulo.
Job3:5 Mdima ndi mthunzi wa imfa zikhale pa tsiku limeneli; mtambo uphimbe tsikuli; mdima wandiweyani udetse kuwala kwake.
Job3:6 Usiku umenewo ukutidwe ndi mdima wandiweyani; usawerengedwenso pamodzi ndi masiku a chaka
Job3:7 Usiku umenewo usabweretse chilichonse chabwino; kusamvekenso nthungululu za chikondwerero.
Job3:8 Odziwa kutemberera masiku alitemberere tsikulo
Job3:9 Nyenyezi zake za mʼbandakucha zikhale mdima; tsikulo liyembekezere kucha pachabe ndipo lisaonenso kuwala koyamba kwa mʼbandakucha.
Job3:10 Pakuti tsiku limenelo ndiye ndinatuluka mʼmimba ya amayi anga ndipo ndi limene linandionetsa zovuta.
Job3:11 “Bwanji ine sindinawonongeke pamene ndinkabadwa ndi kufa pamene ndimatuluka mʼmimba?
Job3:12 Chifukwa chiyani panali mawondo wondilandirirapo ndi mawere woti andiyamwitsepo?
Job3:13 Pakuti tsopano bwenzi ndili gone mwamtendere; ndikanakhala nditagona tulo ndili pa mpumulo
Job3:14 pamodzi ndi mafumu ndi aphungu a dziko lapansi
Job3:15 pamodzi ndi olamulira amene anali ndi golide
Job3:16 Kapena
Job3:17 Ku mandako anthu oyipa sakhalanso pa mavuto
Job3:18 A mʼndende kumeneko akusangalala ndi mtendere; sakumvanso mawu ofuwula a kapitawo wa akapolo.
Job3:19 Anthu wamba ndi anthu apamwamba ali kumeneko
Job3:20 “Chifukwa chiyani dzuwa limawalira iwo amene ali pa mavuto
Job3:21 kwa iwo amene amalakalaka imfa imene sibwera
Job3:22 amene amakondwa ndi kusangalala akamalowa mʼmanda?
Job3:23 Chifuwa chiyani moyo umaperekedwa kwa munthu amene njira yake yabisika
Job3:24 Mʼmalo moti ndidye
Job3:25 Chimene ndinkachiopa chandigwera; chimene ndinkachita nacho mantha chandichitikira.
Job3:26 Ndilibe mtendere kapena bata
Job4:1 Pamenepo Elifazi wa ku Temani anayankha kuti
Job4:2 “Ngati wina atakuyankha
Job4:3 Taganiza momwe iwe walangizira anthu ambiri
Job4:4 Mawu ako analimbitsa anthu ofuna kugwa; unachirikiza anthu wotha mphamvu.
Job4:5 Koma tsopano mavuto akufikira ndipo wataya mtima
Job4:6 Kodi kuopa Mulungu kwako sindiko kulimbika mtima kwako? Ndipo moyo wako wosalakwa ndiye chiyembekezo chako?
Job4:7 “Ganiza bwino tsopano: Kodi munthu wosalakwa anawonongekapo nʼkale lonse? Nʼkuti kumene munthu wolungama mtima anaphedwa?
Job4:8 Monga ndaonera ine
Job4:9 Iwo amaphedwa ndi mpweya wa Mulungu; amawonongeka ndi mpweya waukali wa mkwiyo wake.
Job4:10 Mikango imabangula ndi kulira
Job4:11 Mkango umafa chifukwa chosowa nyama
Job4:12 “Mawu anabwera kwa ine mwamseri
Job4:13 Mʼkati mwa maloto ochititsa mantha usiku
Job4:14 ndinagwidwa ndi mantha
Job4:15 Pamenepo mzimu unadutsa pamaso panga
Job4:16 Chinthucho chinayimirira koma sindinathe kuzindikira kuti chinali chiyani. Chinthu chinayima patsogolo panga
Job4:17 ‘Kodi munthu angathe kukhala wolungama kupambana Mulungu? Kodi munthu angathe kukhala wangwiro kupambana Mlengi wake?
Job4:18 Ngati Mulungu sakhulupirira atumiki ake omwe
Job4:19 nanga kuli bwanji ndi iwo amene amakhala mʼnyumba zadothi
Job4:20 Mmawa ali moyo
Job4:21 Kodi zonse zimene ali nazo sizimatheratu
Job5:1 “Itana ngati ungathe
Job5:2 Mkwiyo umapha chitsiru
Job5:3 Ine ndinaona chitsiru chitamera mizu
Job5:4 Ana ake alibe ndi chitetezo chomwe; amaponderezedwa mʼbwalo la milandu popanda owateteza.
Job5:5 Anthu anjala amamudyera zokolola zake
Job5:6 Pakuti masautso satuluka mʼfumbi
Job5:7 Komatu munthu amabadwira kuti azunzike monga momwe mbaliwali zimathethekera mlengalenga.
Job5:8 “Koma ndikanakhala ine
Job5:9 Iye amachita zozizwitsa zimene sizimvetsetseka
Job5:10 Iye amagwetsa mvula pa dziko lapansi
Job5:11 Iye amakweza anthu wamba
Job5:12 Iyeyo amalepheretsa chiwembu cha anthu ochenjera
Job5:13 Iye amakola anthu ochenjera mu msampha wa kuchenjera kwawo
Job5:14 Mdima umawagwera nthawi yamasana; nthawi yamasana amayenda moyambasayambasa monga nthawi ya usiku.
Job5:15 Mulungu amapulumutsa amphawi ku lupanga la mʼkamwa mwawo; amawapulumutsa mʼmanja mwa anthu amphamvu.
Job5:16 Choncho osauka ali ndi chiyembekezo
Job5:17 “Wodala munthu amene Mulungu amamudzudzula; nʼchifukwa chake usanyoze chilango cha Wamphamvuzonse.
Job5:18 Pakuti Iye amavulaza koma amamanganso mabalawo; Iye amakantha munthu
Job5:19 Pakuti adzakupulumutsa ku masautso nthawi ndi nthawi
Job5:20 Pa nthawi ya njala adzakulanditsa ku imfa
Job5:21 Adzakuteteza kwa anthu osinjirira
Job5:22 Uzidzaseka pa nthawi ya chiwonongeko ndi ya njala
Job5:23 Pakuti udzachita pangano ndi miyala ya mʼmunda mwako
Job5:24 Udzadziwa kuti nyumba yako ndi malo otetezedwa; udzawerengera katundu wako ndipo sudzapeza kanthu kamene kasowapo.
Job5:25 Udzadziwa kuti ana ako adzakhala ambiri
Job5:26 Udzafika ku manda utakalamba
Job5:27 “Ife tafufuza zimenezi ndipo ndi zoona
Job6:1 Tsono Yobu anayankha kuti
Job6:2 “Achikhala mavuto anga anayezedwa
Job6:3 Ndithu
Job6:4 Mivi ya Wamphamvuzonse yandibaya
Job6:5 Kodi bulu wakuthengo amalira akakhala ndi msipu
Job6:6 Kodi chakudya chosakoma nʼkuchidya chopanda mchere
Job6:7 Zakudya zimenezi sindifuna nʼkuzilawa komwe; zakudya zimenezi zimabwerera kukhosi.
Job6:8 “Aa
Job6:9 achikhala chinamukomera Mulungu kuti anditswanye
Job6:10 Pamenepo ine ndikanakhalabe ndi chitonthozo ichi
Job6:11 “Kodi mphamvu zanga nʼzotani kuti ndizikhalabe ndi chiyembekezo? Nanga zoyembekezera zanga nʼzotani kuti ndipirirebe?
Job6:12 Kodi ine ndili ndi mphamvu? Nanga thupi langa ndi lolimba ngati chitsulo?
Job6:13 Kodi ndili ndi mphamvu zodzithandizira ndekha
Job6:14 “Munthu amene ali kakasi ayenera kukhala ndi abwenzi odzipereka
Job6:15 Koma abale anga ndi wosadalirika ngati mitsinje yowuma msanga
Job6:16 Ali ngati mitsinje ya madzi akuda nthawi ya dzinja
Job6:17 koma madziwo amasiya kuyenda nthawi yachilimwe
Job6:18 Anthu oyenda pa ngamira amapatukirako kufuna madzi; iwo amangoyendayenda nʼkufera mʼchipululu.
Job6:19 Anthu oyenda pa ngamira a ku Tema amafunafuna madzi
Job6:20 Amataya mtima chifukwa ankayembekezera kupeza madzi; koma akafika kumeneko
Job6:21 Tsono inunso mukuonetsa kuti ndinu osathandiza
Job6:22 Kodi ine ndinanenapo kuti
Job6:23 ndilanditseni mʼdzanja la mdani
Job6:24 “Phunzitseni
Job6:25 Ndithu
Job6:26 Kodi inu mukufuna kundidzudzula pa zimene ndikunena
Job6:27 Inu mungathe kuchita maere kuti mugulitse ana amasiye ndi kumugulitsa bwenzi lanu.
Job6:28 “Koma tsopano ndichitireni chifundo pamene mukundiyangʼana. Kodi ine ndingayankhule zabodza pamaso panu?
Job6:29 Fewani mtima
Job6:30 Kodi pali choyipa chilichonse pa milomo yanga? Kodi pakamwa panga sipangathe kuzindikira kanthu koyipa?
Job7:1 “Kodi munthu sakhala ndi ntchito yowawa pa dziko lapansi? Kodi masiku ake sali ngati munthu waganyu?
Job7:2 Monga ngati kapolo wolakalaka mthunzi wa nthawi yamadzulo
Job7:3 choncho ine ndapatsidwa nthawi yongovutika pachabe
Job7:4 Ndikamagona ndimaganiza kuti
Job7:5 Thupi langa ladzala mphutsi ndi zipsera
Job7:6 “Masiku anga ndi othamanga kupambana makina wolukira nsalu
Job7:7 Inu Mulungu kumbukirani kuti moyo wanga uli ngati mpweya; sindidzaonanso masiku achisangalalo.
Job7:8 Amene akundiona tsopano akundiona; mudzandifunafuna koma sindidzapezekanso.
Job7:9 Monga mtambo umazimirira ndi kukanganuka
Job7:10 Iye sadzabweranso ku nyumba kwake ndipo onse omudziwa adzamuyiwala.
Job7:11 “Nʼchifukwa chake ine sindidzakhala chete; ndidzayankhula mopsinjika mtima
Job7:12 Kodi ine ndine nyanja kapena chirombo chamʼnyanja kuti inu mundiyikire alonda?
Job7:13 Pamene ndikuganiza kuti ndidzapeza chitonthozo pa bedi panga ndipo pogona panga padzachepetsa madandawulo anga
Job7:14 ngakhale nthawi imeneyo mumandiopseza ndi maloto ndi kundichititsa mantha ndi masomphenya
Job7:15 kotero kuti ndimalakalaka kudzikhweza kapena kufa
Job7:16 Ine ndatopa nawo moyo wanga; sindingakonde kukhala moyo nthawi zonse. Ndisiyeni ndekha pakuti moyo wanga ulibe tanthauzo.
Job7:17 “Kodi munthu nʼchiyani kuti muzimuganizira chotere
Job7:18 kuti muzimusanthula mmawa uliwonse ndi kumamuyesa nthawi yonse?
Job7:19 Kodi simudzaleka kumandizonda kuti ndipezeko mpata wopumula?
Job7:20 Ngati ine ndachimwa
Job7:21 Chifukwa chiyani simukundikhululukira zolakwa zanga ndi kundichotsera machimo anga? Pakuti posachedwa ndilowa mʼmanda; mudzandifunafuna ine koma simudzandionanso.”
Job8:1 Pamenepo Bilidadi wa ku Suki anayankha kuti
Job8:2 “Kodi udzakhala ukuyankhula zoterezi mpaka liti? Mawu ako ali ngati mphepo yamkuntho.
Job8:3 Kodi Mulungu amapotoza chiweruzo cholungama? Kodi Wamphamvuzonse amalephera kuchita zachilungamo?
Job8:4 Pamene ana ako anamuchimwira Mulungu
Job8:5 Koma utayangʼana kwa Mulungu
Job8:6 ngati uli wangwiro ndi wolungama mtima ngakhale tsopano Iye adzachitapo kanthu mʼmalo mwako ndipo adzakubwezeretsa pa malo ako oyenera.
Job8:7 Chiyambi chako chidzaoneka ngati chochepa koma chimaliziro chako chidzakhala chopambana.
Job8:8 “Funsa kwa anthu amvulazakale ndipo upeze zimene makolo awo anaziphunzira
Job8:9 pakuti ife ndife ana adzulodzuloli ndipo sitidziwa chilichonse
Job8:10 Kodi iwo sadzakulangiza ndi kukufotokozera? Kodi sadzakuwuza mawu ochokera pa zimene amazidziwa?
Job8:11 Kodi bango nʼkumera pa nthaka yopanda chinyontho? Nanga mawango nʼkukula bwino popanda madzi?
Job8:12 Popanda madzi
Job8:13 Ndimo mmene amachitira anthu onse amene amayiwala Mulungu; ndi mmene chiyembekezo cha munthu wosapembedza Mulungu chimathera.
Job8:14 Kulimba mtima kwake kumafowoka; zimene iye amadalira zili ngati ukonde wa kangawude.
Job8:15 Iye amatsamira ukonde wake
Job8:16 Munthu woyipayo ali ngati chomera chothiriridwa bwino chimene chili pa dzuwa
Job8:17 mizu yake imayanga pa mulu wa miyala ndi kufunafuna malo woti izikike pa miyalapo.
Job8:18 Koma pamene yachotsedwa pamalo pakepo
Job8:19 Ndithudi chomeracho chimafota
Job8:20 “Ndithudi
Job8:21 Iye adzadzaza mʼkamwa mwako ndi phwete ndipo milomo yako idzafuwula ndi chimwemwe.
Job8:22 Adani ako adzachita manyazi
Job9:1 Ndipo Yobu anayankha kuti
Job9:2 “Zoonadi
Job9:3 Ngakhale wina atafuna kutsutsana naye
Job9:4 Mulungu ndi wa nzeru zambiri ndipo mphamvu zake ndi zochuluka. Ndani analimbana naye popanda kupwetekeka?
Job9:5 Iye amasuntha mapiri
Job9:6 Iye amagwedeza dziko lapansi kulisuntha pamalo pake ndipo amanjenjemeretsa mizati yake.
Job9:7 Iye amayankhula ndi dzuwa ndipo siliwala; Iyeyo amaphimba kuwala kwa nyenyezi.
Job9:8 Ndi Mulungu yekha amene anayala mayiko akumwamba ndipo amayenda pa mafunde a pa nyanja.
Job9:9 Iye ndiye mlengi wa nyenyezi zamlalangʼamba ndi akamwiniatsatana
Job9:10 Iye amachita zozizwitsa zimene sizimvetsetseka
Job9:11 Akapita pafupi ndi ine sindingathe kumuona; akadutsa
Job9:12 Ngati Iye alanda zinthu
Job9:13 Mulungu sabweza mkwiyo wake; ngakhale gulu lankhondo la Rahabe linawerama pa mapazi ake.
Job9:14 “Nanga ine ndingathe kukangana naye bwanji? Ndingawapeze kuti mawu oti nʼkutsutsana naye?
Job9:15 Ngakhale nditakhala wosalakwa
Job9:16 Ngakhale ndikanamuyitana ndipo Iye ndi kuvomera
Job9:17 Iye akanandikantha ndi mphepo yamkuntho
Job9:18 Mulungu sakanandilola kuti ndipumenso koma akanandichulukitsira zowawa.
Job9:19 Tikanena za mphamvu
Job9:20 Ngakhale ndikanakhala wosalakwa
Job9:21 “Ngakhale ine ndili wosalakwa
Job9:22 Zonse nʼzofanana; nʼchifukwa chake ndikuti
Job9:23 Pamene mkwapulo ubweretsa imfa yadzidzidzi
Job9:24 Pamene dziko lagwa mʼmanja mwa anthu oyipa Iye amawatseka maso anthu oweruza dzikolo. Ngati si Iyeyo
Job9:25 “Masiku anga ndi othamanga kwambiri kupambana munthu waliwiro; masikuwo amapita ine osaonapo zabwino.
Job9:26 Amayenda ngati mabwato a njedza pa nyanja
Job9:27 Nʼtanena kuti
Job9:28 ndikuopabe mavuto anga onse
Job9:29 Popeza ndapezeka kale wolakwa ndivutikirenji popanda phindu?
Job9:30 Ngakhale nditasamba mʼmadzi oyera kwambiri ndi kusamba mʼmanja mwanga ndi sopo
Job9:31 mutha kundiponyabe pa dzala
Job9:32 “Mulungu si munthu ngati ine kuti ndithe kumuyankha
Job9:33 Pakanapezeka munthu wina kuti akhale mʼkhalapakati wathu
Job9:34 munthu wina woti achotse ndodo ya Mulungu pa ine kuti kuopsa kwake kusandichititsenso mantha!
Job9:35 Pamenepo ine ndikanatha kuyankhula mosamuopa Mulunguyo
Job10:1 “Ine ndatopa nawo moyo wanga; choncho ndidzanena zodandaula zanga momasuka ndipo ndidzayankhula mwa kuwawidwa mtima kwanga.
Job10:2 Ndidzati kwa Mulungu wanga: Musandiweruze kuti ndine wolakwa
Job10:3 Kodi mumakondwera mukamandizunza
Job10:4 Kodi maso anu ali ngati a munthu? Kodi mumaona zinthu monga momwe amazionera munthu?
Job10:5 Kodi masiku anu ali ngati masiku a munthu
Job10:6 kuti Inu mufufuze zolakwa zanga ndi kulondola tchimo langa
Job10:7 ngakhale mukudziwa kuti sindine wolakwa ndiponso kuti palibe amene angandilanditse mʼdzanja lanu?
Job10:8 “Munandiwumba ndi kundipanga ndi manja anu. Kodi tsopano Inu mudzatembenuka ndi kundiwononga?
Job10:9 Kumbukirani kuti munandipanga ndi dothi
Job10:10 Suja munapatsa abambo anga mphamvu zoti andibale
Job10:11 Munandikuta ndi khungu ndi mnofu ndi kundilumikiza pamodzi ndi mafupa ndi mitsempha?
Job10:12 Munandipatsa moyo ndi kundionetsa chifundo chanu
Job10:13 “Koma izi ndi zimene munabisa mu mtima mwanu
Job10:14 Kuti ngati ndingachimwe mudzakhala mukundipenyetsetsa ndipo kuti simudzalola kuti ndisalangidwe chifukwa cha kulakwa kwanga.
Job10:15 Ngati ndili wolakwa
Job10:16 Ndipo ndikatukula mutu wanga
Job10:17 Mumabweretsa mboni zatsopano potsutsana nane ndipo mkwiyo wanu pa ine umanka nukulirakulira ndi magulu anu olimbana nane amanka nachulukirachulukira.
Job10:18 “Chifukwa chiyani Inu munalola kuti ndibadwe? Ndi bwino ndikanafa diso lililonse lisanandione.
Job10:19 Ndikanapanda kubadwa
Job10:20 Kodi masiku anga owerengeka sali pafupi kutha? Ndilekeni kuti ndipumule pangʼono pokha
Job10:21 ndisanapite ku malo amene munthu sabwererako ku dziko la imfa ndi kwa mdima wandiweyani
Job10:22 ku dziko la mdima wandiweyani ndi chisokonezo
Job11:1 Pamenepo Zofari wa ku Naama anayankha kuti
Job11:2 “Kodi mawu ambirimbiriwa nʼkukhala osayankhidwa? Kodi munthu woyankhulayankhulayu nʼkulungamitsidwa?
Job11:3 Kodi anthu nʼkukhala chete atamva kubwebweta kwakoku? Kodi palibe wina amene adzakudzudzule pamene ukuyankhula zonyoza?
Job11:4 Iwe ukunena kwa Mulungu kuti
Job11:5 Aa
Job11:6 ndi kukuwululira chinsinsi cha nzeru yake
Job11:7 “Kodi iwe ungathe kumvetsa zinsinsi za Mulungu? Kodi ungafufuze malire a nzeru za Wamphamvuzonse?
Job11:8 Zili kutali kupambana mayiko akumwamba
Job11:9 Muyeso wa nzeru zake ndi wautali kupambana dziko lapansi ndipo ndi wopingasa kupambana nyanja.
Job11:10 “Ngati Iye atabwera ndi kukutsekera mʼndende nakutengera ku bwalo la milandu
Job11:11 Ndithudi
Job11:12 Munthu wopanda nzeru sizingatheke kukhala wanzeru monganso mwana wa bulu wakuthengo sangasanduke munthu.
Job11:13 “Koma ngati upereka mtima wako kwa Iye ndi kutambasulira manja ako kwa Iyeyo
Job11:14 ngati utaya tchimo limene lili mʼdzanja lako ndi kusalola choyipa kuti chikhale mʼmoyo mwako
Job11:15 udzatukula mutu wako wosachita manyazi; udzayima chilili ndipo sudzachita mantha.
Job11:16 Udzayiwala ndithu zowawa zako
Job11:17 Moyo wako udzawala kupambana usana
Job11:18 Udzalimba mtima popeza pali chiyembekezo; ndipo udzayangʼana mbali zonse ndi kugona mosatekeseka.
Job11:19 Udzagona pansi
Job11:20 Koma anthu oyipa adzafuna thandizo osalipeza
Job12:1 Pamenepo Yobu anayankha kuti
Job12:2 “Ndithudi inuyo ndinu anthu ndipo nzeru zanu zidzafera nanu pamodzi!
Job12:3 Koma inenso ndili nazo nzeru ngati inu; ineyo sindine munthu wamba kwa inu. Ndani amene sadziwa zonse zimene mwanenazi?
Job12:4 “Ndasanduka chinthu choseketsa kwa abwenzi anga
Job12:5 Anthu amene ali pabwino amanyoza anzawo amene ali pa tsoka. Tsokalo limagwa pa amene wayamba kale kugwa.
Job12:6 Nyumba za anthu achifwamba zimakhala pa mtendere
Job12:7 “Koma funsa nyama zakuthengo ndipo zidzakuphunzitsa
Job12:8 kapena uyankhule ndi dziko lapansi ndipo lidzakuphunzitsa
Job12:9 Kodi mwa zonsezi ndi chiti chimene sichidziwa kuti lachita zimenezi ndi dzanja la Yehova?
Job12:10 Mʼmanja mwake ndi mʼmene muli moyo wa cholengedwa chilichonse
Job12:11 Kodi khutu sindiye limene limamva mawu monga mmene lilime limalawira chakudya?
Job12:12 Kodi nzeru sipezeka pakati pa anthu okalamba? Kodi moyo wautali sumabweretsa nzeru zomvetsa zinthu?
Job12:13 “Kwa Mulungu ndiye kuli nzeru ndi mphamvu; uphungu ndi kumvetsa zinthu ndi zake.
Job12:14 Chimene Iye wapasula palibe angachimangenso. Akatsekera munthu mʼndende palibe angamutulutse.
Job12:15 Iyeyo akamanga mvula dziko limawuma; akamasula mvulayo
Job12:16 Kwa Iye kuli mphamvu ndi kupambana; munthu wopusitsidwa ndiponso wopusitsa onse ali mu ulamuliro wake.
Job12:17 Iye amalanda aphungu nzeru zawo ndipo amapusitsa oweruza.
Job12:18 Iye amachotsa zingwe zimene mafumu anawamanga nazo ndipo amawamanga lamba mʼchiwuno mwawo.
Job12:19 Iye amasocheretsa ansembe atawalanda nzeru zawo ndipo amagonjetsa anthu amphamvu amene ndi okhazikika.
Job12:20 Iye amakhalitsa chete aphungu odalirika ndipo amalanda chidziwitso cha anthu akuluakulu.
Job12:21 Iye amanyoza anthu otchuka ndipo anthu anyonga amawatha mphamvu.
Job12:22 Iye amatulutsira poyera zinthu zozama za mu mdima ndipo mdima wandiweyaniwo amawusandutsa kuwala.
Job12:23 Iye amakuza mitundu ya anthu ndipo amayiwononganso; amachulukitsa mitundu ya anthu ndipo amayimwazanso.
Job12:24 Iye amalanda nzeru za atsogoleri a dziko lapansi; amawayendetsa mʼthengo mopanda njira.
Job12:25 Iwo amafufuzafufuza njira mu mdima wopanda chowunikira; Iye amawayendetsa dzandidzandi ngati oledzera.
Job13:1 “Ndaziona ndi maso anga zonsezi
Job13:2 Zimene inu mukudziwa
Job13:3 Koma ine ndikulakalaka nditayankhula ndi Wamphamvuzonse ndi kukamba mlandu wanga ndi Mulungu.
Job13:4 Koma inu mukundipaka mabodza; nonsenu ndinu asingʼanga opanda phindu!
Job13:5 Achikhala munangokhala chete nonsenu! Apo mukanachita zanzeru.
Job13:6 Tsopano imvani kudzikanira kwanga; imvani kudandaula kwa pakamwa panga.
Job13:7 Kodi inu mudzayankhula moyipa kuyankhulira Mulungu? Kodi mudzayankhulira Iyeyo mwachinyengo?
Job13:8 Kodi mudzaonetsa kuti Iyeyo ngokondera? Kodi inu mudzamuteteza Mulungu pa mlandu wake?
Job13:9 Mulungu atayangʼanitsitsa
Job13:10 Ndithudi
Job13:11 Kodi ulemerero wake sungakuopseni? Kodi kuopsa kwake sikungakuchititseni mantha?
Job13:12 Mawu anu anzeru ali ngati miyambi yopanda tanthauzo; mawu anu odzitchinjirizira ali ngati mpanda wadothi.
Job13:13 “Khalani chete ndipo ndilekeni ndiyankhule; tsono zimene zindichitikire zichitike.
Job13:14 Chifukwa chiyani ndikuyika moyo wanga pa chiswe ndi kutengera mʼmanja moyo wangawu?
Job13:15 Ngakhale Iye andiphe
Job13:16 Zoonadi
Job13:17 Mvetserani mosamala mawu anga; makutu anu amve zimene ndikunena.
Job13:18 Pakuti tsopano ndawukonzekera mlandu wanga
Job13:19 Kodi alipo wina amene angatsutsane nane? ngati zili choncho
Job13:20 “Inu Mulungu
Job13:21 Muchotse dzanja lanu pa ine
Job13:22 Tsono muyitane ndipo ndidzayankha
Job13:23 Kodi zolakwa zanga ndi zingati ndipo machimo anga ndi angati? Wonetseni kulakwa kwanga ndi machimo anga.
Job13:24 Chifukwa chiyani mukundifulatira ndi kundiyesa ine mdani wanu?
Job13:25 Kodi mudzazunza tsamba lowuluka ndi mphepo? Kodi mudzathamangitsa mungu wowuma?
Job13:26 Pakuti Inu mwalemba zinthu zowawa zonditsutsa nazo ndipo mukundipaka machimo a pa ubwana wanga.
Job13:27 Inu mwamanga miyendo yanga ndi maunyolo. Mumayangʼanitsitsa mayendedwe anga onse poyika zizindikiro pamene mapazi anga apondapo.
Job13:28 “Motero munthu amatha ngati chinthu chofumbwa
Job14:1 “Munthu wobadwa mwa amayi amakhala masiku owerengeka ndipo ndi odzaza ndi mavuto okhaokha.
Job14:2 Amaphuka ngati duwa ndipo kenaka amafota; amathawa ngati mthunzi ndipo sakhalitsa.
Job14:3 Kodi munthu wotereyo nʼkumuyangʼanitsitsa? Kodi mungamubweretse pamaso panu kuti mumuzenge mlandu?
Job14:4 Ndani angatulutse chabwino mʼchoyipa? Palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe!
Job14:5 Masiku a munthu ndi odziwikiratu; munakhazikitsa chiwerengero cha miyezi yake ndipo munamulembera malire amene sangathe kuwalumpha.
Job14:6 Choncho Inu mumufulatire ndipo mumuleke apumule kufikira atakondwera nawo moyo ngati munthu waganyu.
Job14:7 “Mtengo uli nacho chiyembekezo: ngati wadulidwa
Job14:8 Mizu yake ingathe kukalamba mʼnthaka ndipo chitsa chake nʼkuwola pa dothi
Job14:9 koma pamene chinyontho chafika udzaphukira ndipo udzaphuka nthambi ngati mtengo wanthete.
Job14:10 Koma munthu amafa nayikidwa mʼmanda
Job14:11 Monga madzi amaphwera mʼnyanja kapena monga mtsinje umaphwera nuwuma
Job14:12 momwemonso munthu amagona ndipo sadzukanso; mpaka zamlengalenga zidzathe
Job14:13 “Aa
Job14:14 Munthu akafa
Job14:15 Inu mudzandiyitane ndipo ndidzakuyankhani; inu mudzafunitsitsa kuona cholengedwa chimene munachipanga ndi manja anu.
Job14:16 Ndithudi pamenepo mudzayangʼana mayendedwe anga koma simudzalondola tchimo langa.
Job14:17 Zolakwa zanga zidzakulungidwa mʼthumba; inu mudzaphimba tchimo langa.
Job14:18 “Koma monga phiri limakokolokera ndi kuswekasweka ndipo monga thanthwe limasunthira kuchoka pa malo ake
Job14:19 monganso madzi oyenda amaperesera miyala ndipo madzi othamanga amakokololera nthaka
Job14:20 Inu mumamugonjetsa kamodzinʼkamodzi ndipo munthuyo nʼkutheratu; Inu mumasintha maonekedwe a nkhope yake ndipo mumamutaya kutali.
Job14:21 Ana ake akamalemekezedwa
Job14:22 Iye amangomva zowawa za mʼthupi lake ndipo amangodzilirira yekha mwini wakeyo.”
Job15:1 Pamenepo Elifazi wa ku Temani anayankha kuti
Job15:2 “Kodi munthu wanzeru angayankhe ndi mawu achabechabe otere
Job15:3 Kodi angathe kutsutsa ndi mawu opanda pake
Job15:4 Koma iwe ukuchepetsa zoopa Mulungu ndipo ukutchinga zodzikhuthulira kwa Mulungu.
Job15:5 Tchimo lako ndiye likuyankhulitsa pakamwa pakopo; ndipo watengera mayankhulidwe a atambwali.
Job15:6 Pakamwa pakopo ndiye pakukutsutsa osati pakamwa panga; milomo yakoyo ikukutsutsa.
Job15:7 “Kodi ndiwe munthu woyamba kubadwa? Kodi unalengedwa mapiri asanalengedwe?
Job15:8 Kodi unali mʼgulu la alangizi a Mulungu? Kodi ukudziyesa wanzeru ndiwe wekha?
Job15:9 Kodi iwe umadziwa chiyani chimene ife sitichidziwa? Kodi iwe uli ndi chidziwitso chanji chimene ife tilibe?
Job15:10 Anthu a imvi ndi okalamba ali mbali yathu
Job15:11 Kodi mawu otonthoza mtima ochokera kwa Mulungu sakukukwanira
Job15:12 Chifukwa chiyani ukupsa mtima
Job15:13 moti ukupsera mtima Mulungu ndi kuyankhula mawu otero pakamwa pako?
Job15:14 “Kodi munthu nʼchiyani kuti nʼkukhala woyera mtima kapena wobadwa mwa amayi nʼchiyani kuti nʼkukhala wolungama mtima?
Job15:15 Ngati Mulungu sakhulupirira ngakhale angelo ake
Job15:16 nanga kuli bwanji munthu amene ndi wonyansa ndi wa njira zokhotakhota
Job15:17 “Mvetsera kwa ine ndipo ndidzakufotokozera; ndilole ndikuwuze zimene ndaziona
Job15:18 zimene anandiphunzitsa anthu anzeru
Job15:19 (Ndi kwa iwowa kumene dziko lino linaperekedwa pamene panalibe mlendo wokhala pakati pawo).
Job15:20 Munthu woyipa amavutika ndi masautso masiku onse a moyo wake
Job15:21 Amamva mawu owopsa mʼmakutu mwake
Job15:22 Iye sakhulupirira kuti angathe kupulumuka ku mdima wa imfa; iyeyo ndi woyenera kuphedwa.
Job15:23 Amangoyendayenda pali ponse kunka nafuna chakudya; amadziwa kuti tsiku la mdima lili pafupi.
Job15:24 Masautso ndi nthumanzi zimamuchititsa mantha kwambiri; zimamugonjetsa iye monga imachitira mfumu yokonzekera kukathira nkhondo
Job15:25 chifukwa iye amatambasula dzanja lake kuyambana ndi Mulungu ndipo amadzitama yekha polimbana ndi Wamphamvuzonse.
Job15:26 Amapita mwa mwano kukalimbana naye atanyamula chishango chochindikala ndi cholimba.
Job15:27 “Ngakhale nkhope yake ndi yonenepa ndipo mʼchiwuno mwake muli mnofu wambiri
Job15:28 munthuyo adzakhala mʼmizinda yowonongeka ndi mʼnyumba zosayenera kukhalamo anthu
Job15:29 Iye sadzalemeranso ndipo chuma chake sichidzakhalitsa
Job15:30 Iyeyo sadzapulumuka mu mdimamo; lawi lamoto lidzawumitsa nthambi zake
Job15:31 Asadzinyenge yekha podalira zinthu zachabechabe
Job15:32 Iye adzalandira malipiro ake nthawi yake isanakwane
Job15:33 Iye adzakhala ngati mtengo wamphesa wopululidwa zipatso zake zisanapse
Job15:34 Pakuti anthu osapembedza Mulungu adzakhala osabala ndipo moto udzapsereza nyumba za onse okonda ziphuphu.
Job15:35 Iwo amalingalira zaupandu ndipo amachita zoyipa; mtima wawo umakonzekera zachinyengo.”
Job16:1 Pamenepo Yobu anayankha kuti
Job16:2 “Ndinamvapo zambiri monga zimenezi; nonsenu ndinu anthu osatha kutonthoza mtima mnzanu.
Job16:3 Kodi mawu anu ochulukawo adzatha? Kodi chikukuvutani nʼchiyani kuti muzingoyankhula mawu otsutsawa?
Job16:4 Inenso ndikanatha kuyankhula monga inu
Job16:5 Ndipo mawu a pakamwa panga akanakulimbikitsani; chitonthozo chochokera pa milomo yanga chikanachepetsa ululu wanu.
Job16:6 “Koma ine ndikati ndiyankhule ululu wanga sukuchepa; ndipo ndikati ndikhale chete
Job16:7 Ndithudi
Job16:8 Inu mwandimanga ndipo kundimangako kwakhala umboni; kuwonda kwanga kwandiwukira ndipo kukuchita umboni wonditsutsa.
Job16:9 Mulungu amabwera kwa ine mwankhanza ndipo amadana nane
Job16:10 Anthu amatsekula pakamwa pawo kundikuwiza; amandimenya pa tsaya mwachipongwe ndipo amagwirizana polimbana nane.
Job16:11 Mulungu wandipereka kwa anthu ochita zoyipa ndipo wandiponyera mʼmanja mwa anthu oyipa mtima.
Job16:12 Ine ndinali pamtendere
Job16:13 anthu ake oponya mauta andizungulira. Mopanda kundimvera chisoni
Job16:14 Akundivulaza kawirikawiri
Job16:15 “Ndasokerera chiguduli pa thupi langa ndipo ndayika mphamvu zanga pa fumbi.
Job16:16 Maso anga afiira ndi kulira
Job16:17 komatu manja anga sanachite zachiwawa ndipo pemphero langa ndi lolungama.
Job16:18 “Iwe dziko lapansi
Job16:19 Ngakhale tsopano mboni yanga ili kumwamba; wonditchinjiriza pa mlandu wanga ali komweko.
Job16:20 Wondipembedzera ndi bwenzi langa
Job16:21 iye
Job16:22 “Pakuti sipapita zaka zambiri ndisanayende mʼnjira imene sindidzabwerera.”
Job17:1 “Mtima wanga wasweka
Job17:2 Ndithudi
Job17:3 “Inu Mulungu
Job17:4 Inu mwatseka maganizo awo kuti asamvetse zinthu; choncho simudzawalola kuti apambane.
Job17:5 Ngati munthu apereka mnzake chifukwa cha chuma
Job17:6 “Mulungu wandisandutsa chisudzo chochiseka aliyense
Job17:7 Mʼmaso mwanga mwada ndi chisoni; ndawonda ndi mutu womwe.
Job17:8 Anthu olungama akudabwa nazo zimenezi; anthu osachimwa akupsera mtima anthu osapembedza Mulungu.
Job17:9 Komabe anthu olungama adzasunga njira zawo
Job17:10 “Tsono bwerani nonsenu
Job17:11 Masiku anga atha
Job17:12 Anthu awa amasandutsa usiku kukhala usana
Job17:13 Ngati nyumba imene ndikuyiyembekezera ndi manda
Job17:14 ngati ndinena kwa dzenje la manda ‘ndinu abambo anga
Job17:15 tsono chiyembekezo changa chili kuti? Ndani angaone populumukira panga?
Job17:16 Ndithu sindidzakhalanso ndi chiyembekezo chilichonse
Job18:1 Pamenepo Bilidadi wa ku Suki anayankha kuti
Job18:2 “Kodi iwe Yobu utsiriza liti zoyankhula zakozi? Khala munthu wozindikira zinthu ndipo ukatero ife tidzayankhula.
Job18:3 Chifukwa chiyani ukutiyesa ngati ngʼombe ndi kuoneka ngati opusa mʼmaso mwako?
Job18:4 Iwe amene ukudzipweteka wekha ndi mkwiyo wako
Job18:5 “Nyale ya munthu woyipa yazimitsidwa; malawi a moto wake sakuwalanso.
Job18:6 Kuwala kwa mʼnyumba mwake kwasanduka mdima; nyale ya pambali pake yazima.
Job18:7 Mayendedwe ake amgugu azilala; fundo zake zomwe zamugwetsa.
Job18:8 Mapazi ake amulowetsa mu ukonde ndipo akungoyendayenda mu ukondewo.
Job18:9 Msampha wamkola mwendo; khwekhwe lamugwiritsitsa.
Job18:10 Amutchera msampha pansi mobisika; atchera diwa pa njira yake.
Job18:11 Zoopsa zikumuchititsa mantha kumbali zonse
Job18:12 Mphamvu zake zatha chifukwa cha njala
Job18:13 Wagwidwa nthenda yoopsa thupi lonse; miyendo yake
Job18:14 Wachotsedwa mʼnyumba imene ankadalira
Job18:15 Mʼnyumba mwake zonse zachotsedwamo; awazamo sulufule kuti aphe tizirombo ta matenda.
Job18:16 Mizu yake ikuwuma pansi ndipo nthambi zake zikufota
Job18:17 Sadzakumbukiridwanso pa dziko lapansi; sadzakhalanso ndi chinthu chomutchukitsa mʼdziko.
Job18:18 Amuchotsa pa malo owala ndi kumuponya ku mdima
Job18:19 Iye alibe ana kapena zidzukulu pakati pa anthu ake
Job18:20 Anthu akumadzulo adabwa kwambiri ndi tsoka lake; anthu akummawa agwidwa ndi mantha aakulu.
Job18:21 Ndithudi
Job19:1 Pamenepo Yobu anayankha kuti
Job19:2 “Kodi mudzakhala mukundizunza mpaka liti
Job19:3 Inuyo mwandinyoza kwambiri; mwanditsutsa mopanda manyazi.
Job19:4 Ngati ndi zoona kuti ine ndasochera
Job19:5 Ngati ndithudi mukudziyika nokha pamwamba panga
Job19:6 pamenepa dziwani kuti Mulungu wandilakwira ndipo wandizinga ukonde wake.
Job19:7 “Ngakhale ndifuwule kuti
Job19:8 Mulungu wanditsekera njira yanga kotero sindingathe kudutsa; waphimba njira zanga ndi mdima.
Job19:9 Iye wandilanda ulemu wanga ndipo wandivula chipewa chaufumu pamutu panga.
Job19:10 Wandiphwanyaphwanya mbali zonse ndipo ndatheratu; Iye wazula chiyembekezo changa ngati mtengo.
Job19:11 Wandikwiyira ndipo akundiyesa mmodzi mwa adani ake.
Job19:12 Ankhondo ake akubwera kwa ine mwamphamvu
Job19:13 “Mulungu wandisiyanitsa ndi abale anga; wasandutsa odziwana nane kukhala achilendo kwa ine.
Job19:14 Abale anga andithawa; abwenzi anga andiyiwala.
Job19:15 Anthu odzacheza ku nyumba kwanga ndiponso antchito anga aakazi andisandutsa mlendo; ndasanduka mlendo mʼmaso mwawo.
Job19:16 Ndikayitana wa ntchito wanga
Job19:17 Mpweya wanga umamunyansa mkazi wanga; ndine chinthu chonyansa kwa abale anga a mimba imodzi.
Job19:18 Inde
Job19:19 Anzanga onse apamtima amanyansidwa nane; iwo amene ndinkawakonda andiwukira.
Job19:20 Ndangotsala khungu ndi mafupa okhaokha; ndapulumuka lokumbakumba.
Job19:21 “Mvereni chisoni
Job19:22 Chifukwa chiyani mukundilondola ngati Mulungu? Kodi simunatope nalo thupi langa?
Job19:23 “Aa
Job19:24 akanalembedwa pa mwala ndi chitsulo
Job19:25 Koma ndikudziwa kuti mpulumutsi wanga ali ndi moyo
Job19:26 Ndipo khungu langa litatha nʼkuwonongeka
Job19:27 Ine ndemwe ndidzamuona Iye ndi maso angawa
Job19:28 “Koma inu mukuti
Job19:29 Inu muyenera kuopa lupanga; pakuti mkwiyo wake umalangadi ndi lupanga; zikadzatero muzadziwa kuti chiweruzo chilipo ndithu.”
Job20:1 Pamenepo Zofari wa ku Naama anayankha kuti
Job20:2 “Kuvutika kwa mʼmaganizo kwanga kwandifulumiza kuti ndiyankhe chifukwa ndasautsidwa kwambiri.
Job20:3 Ndikumva kudzudzula kondinyoza
Job20:4 “Ndithudi iwe ukudziwa momwe zinthu zakhala zikuchitikira kuyambira kale
Job20:5 kuti chisangalalo cha woyipa nʼchosachedwa kutha
Job20:6 Ngakhale atamayenda mapewa ake ali mmwamba ndipo mutu wake uli nengʼaa
Job20:7 iye adzatheratu monga momwe imatayikira ndowe yake yomwe; iwo amene ankamuona adzati
Job20:8 Adzazimirira ngati maloto ndipo sadzapezekanso
Job20:9 Diso limene linamuona silidzamuonanso; sadzapezekanso pamalo pake.
Job20:10 Ana ake adzabwezera zonse zimene iyeyo analanda anthu osauka;
Job20:11 Mphamvu zaunyamata zimene zili mʼthupi mwake zidzagona naye limodzi mʼfumbi.
Job20:12 “Ngakhale zoyipa zili zozuna mʼkamwa mwake ndipo amazibisa kunsi kwa lilime lake
Job20:13 ngakhale salola kuzilavula
Job20:14 koma chakudya chake chidzawawasa mʼmimba mwake; chidzasanduka ngati ndulu ya njoka mʼkati mwa iyeyo.
Job20:15 Adzachisanza chuma chimene anachimeza; Mulungu adzachitulutsa mʼmimba mwa munthuyo.
Job20:16 Iye adzayamwa ndulu ya njoka ndipo ululu wa mphiri udzamupha.
Job20:17 Sadzasangalala ndi timitsinje
Job20:18 Ayenera kubweza zimene anazigwirira ntchito osazidya; sadzasangalala ndi phindu la malonda ake.
Job20:19 Pakuti iye anapondereza anthu osauka ndipo anawasiya wopanda thandizo; iyeyo analanda nyumba zimene sanamange.
Job20:20 “Chifukwa choti umbombo wake sutha
Job20:21 Palibe chatsala kuti iye adye; chuma chake sichidzachedwa kutha.
Job20:22 Ngakhale ndi munthu wachuma
Job20:23 Akadya nʼkukhuta
Job20:24 Ngakhale athawe mkondo wachitsulo
Job20:25 Muviwo adzawutulutsira ku msana
Job20:26 mdima wandiweyani ukudikira chuma chake. Moto wopanda wowukoleza udzamupsereza ndi kuwononga zonse zotsala mʼnyumba yake.
Job20:27 Zamumlengalenga zidzawulula kulakwa kwake; dziko lapansi lidzamuwukira.
Job20:28 Chigumula cha madzi chidzawononga nyumba yake
Job20:29 Izi ndi zimene Mulungu amasungira anthu oyipa
Job21:1 Pamenepo Yobu anayankha kuti
Job21:2 “Mvetserani bwino mawu anga; ichi chikhale chitonthozo changa chochokera kwa inu.
Job21:3 Ndiloleni ndiyankhule ndipo ndikatha kuyankhula munditonzetonze.
Job21:4 “Kodi ine ndikudandaulira munthu? Tsono ndilekerenji kupsa mtima?
Job21:5 Ndipenyeni ndipo mudabwe; mugwire dzanja pakamwa.
Job21:6 Ndikamaganiza zimenezi ndimachita mantha kwambiri; thupi langa limanjenjemera.
Job21:7 Chifukwa chiyani anthu oyipa amakhalabe ndi moyo
Job21:8 Amaona ana awo akukhazikika pamodzi nawo
Job21:9 Mabanja awo amakhala pa mtendere ndipo sakhala ndi mantha; mkwapulo wa Mulungu suwakhudza nʼkomwe.
Job21:10 Ngʼombe zawo zazimuna sizilephera kubereketsa; ngʼombe zawo zazikazi sizipoloza.
Job21:11 Amatulutsa ana awo ngati gulu la nkhosa; makanda awo amavinavina pabwalo.
Job21:12 Amayimba nyimbo pogwiritsa ntchito matambolini ndi azeze; amakondwa pakumva kulira kwa chitoliro.
Job21:13 Zaka zawo zimatha ali mu ulemerero ndipo amatsikira ku manda mwamtendere.
Job21:14 Koma anthuwo amawuza Mulungu kuti
Job21:15 Kodi Wamphamvuzonseyo ndani kuti timutumikire? Ife tipindula chiyani tikamapemphera kwa Iyeyo?
Job21:16 Komatu ulemerero wawo suli mʼmanja mwawo
Job21:17 “Koma nʼkangati kamene nyale ya anthu oyipa imazimitsidwa? Nʼkangati kamene tsoka limawagwera? Nʼkangati kamene Mulungu amawakwiyira ndi kuwalanga?
Job21:18 Nʼkangati kamene iwo amakhala ngati phesi lowuluka ndi mphepo
Job21:19 Paja amati
Job21:20 Mulole kuti adzionere yekha chilango chake
Job21:21 Nanga kodi amalabadira chiyani zabanja lake limene walisiya mʼmbuyo
Job21:22 “Kodi alipo wina amene angaphunzitse Mulungu nzeru
Job21:23 Munthu wina amamwalira ali ndi mphamvu zonse
Job21:24 thupi lake lili lonenepa
Job21:25 Munthu wina amamwalira ali wowawidwa mtima
Job21:26 Olemera ndi osauka omwe amamwalira ndi kuyikidwa mʼmanda ndipo onse amatuluka mphutsi.
Job21:27 “Ndikudziwa bwino zimene mukuganiza
Job21:28 Inu mukuti
Job21:29 Kodi munawafunsapo anthu amene ali pa ulendo? Kodi munaganizirapo zimene iwo amanena?
Job21:30 Zakuti munthu woyipa amasungidwa chifukwa cha tsiku la tsoka
Job21:31 Kodi ndani amadzudzula munthu wochimwayo? Ndani amamubwezera zoyipa zimene anachita?
Job21:32 Iye amanyamulidwa kupita ku manda ndipo anthu amachezera pa manda ake.
Job21:33 Dothi la ku chigwa limamukomera; anthu onse amatsatira mtembo wake
Job21:34 “Nanga inu mudzanditonthoza bwanji ine ndi mawu anu opandapakewo palibe chimene chatsala kuti muyankhe koma mabodza basi!”
Job22:1 Pamenepo Elifazi wa ku Temani anayankha kuti
Job22:2 “Kodi munthu nʼkukhala waphindu kwa Mulungu? Kodi munthu wanzeru angamupindulire Iye?
Job22:3 Kodi Wamphamvuzonse akanapeza chabwino chotani iweyo ukanakhala wolungama? Kodi iyeyo akanapeza phindu lanji makhalidwe ako akanakhala angwiro?
Job22:4 “Kodi nʼchifukwa choti umamuopa
Job22:5 Kodi osati nʼchifukwa chakuti kuyipa kwako nʼkwakukulu? Kodi machimo ako si opanda malire?
Job22:6 Iwe unkawumiriza abale ako kuti akupatse chikole popanda chifukwa; umalanda anthu zovala zawo ndi kuwasiya amaliseche.
Job22:7 Sunawapatse madzi anthu otopa
Job22:8 ngakhale unali munthu wamphamvu
Job22:9 Ndipo akazi amasiye unawachotsa wopanda kanthu
Job22:10 Nʼchifukwa chake misampha yakuzungulira
Job22:11 nʼchifukwa chake kuli mdima kuti sungathe kuona kanthu
Job22:12 “Kodi Mulungu sali kutalitali kumwamba? Ndipo ona nyenyezi zili mmwamba kwambirizo
Job22:13 Komabe iweyo ukunena kuti
Job22:14 Mitambo yakuda yamuphimba
Job22:15 Kodi iwe udzayendabe mʼnjira yakale imene anthu oyipa ankayendamo?
Job22:16 Iwo anachotsedwa nthawi yawo isanakwane
Job22:17 Anthuwo anati kwa Mulungu
Job22:18 Chonsecho ndi Iye amene anadzaza nyumba zawo ndi zinthu zabwino
Job22:19 “Anthu olungama amaona kuwonongeka kwawo ndipo amakondwera; anthu osalakwa amangoseka
Job22:20 Amanena kuti
Job22:21 “Gonjera Mulungu kuti ukhale naye pamtendere; ukatero udzaona zabwino.
Job22:22 Landira malangizo a pakamwa pake ndipo usunge mawu ake mu mtima mwako.
Job22:23 Ukabwerera kwa Wamphamvuzonse udzabwezeretsedwa; ukachotsa zoyipa zonse zimene zimachitika mʼnyumba mwako
Job22:24 ndipo chuma chamtengowapatali nuchiona ngati fumbi
Job22:25 Pamenepo Wamphamvuzonseyo adzakhala golide wako
Job22:26 Pamenepo udzakondwera naye Wamphamvuzonse ndipo udzakweza nkhope yako kwa Mulungu.
Job22:27 Udzamupempha ndipo adzakumvera
Job22:28 Chimene watsimikiza kuti uchite
Job22:29 Pamene anthu agwetsedwa pansi
Job22:30 Iye adzapulumutsa ngakhale munthu amene ndi wolakwa
Job23:1 Pamenepo Yobu anayankha kuti
Job23:2 “Leronso kudandaula kwanga nʼkwakukulu kwambiri; Iye akundilanga kwambiri ngakhale ndi kubuwula.
Job23:3 Ndikanangodziwa kumene ndikanamupeza Mulungu; ndikanangopita kumene amakhalako!
Job23:4 Ndikanafotokoza mlandu wanga pamaso pake ndipo ndikanayankhula mawu odziteteza.
Job23:5 Ndikanadziwa mawu amene Iye akanandiyankha
Job23:6 Kodi Iye akanalimbana nane mwa mphamvu zake zazikulu? Ayi
Job23:7 Kumeneko munthu wolungama akanafotokoza mlandu wake pamaso pake
Job23:8 “Taonani
Job23:9 Akamagwira ntchito kumpoto
Job23:10 Koma Iye amadziwa mmene ndimayendera; Iyeyo akandiyesa adzandipeza kuti ndili ngati golide.
Job23:11 Mapazi anga akhala akuponda mʼmapazi ake; ndasunga njira yake ndipo sindinayitaye.
Job23:12 Sindinapatuke kusiya malamulo ochokera pakamwa pake; ndasunga mawu a pakamwa pake kupambana chakudya changa cha tsiku ndi tsiku.
Job23:13 “Koma Iyeyo ndi wosasinthika
Job23:14 Iye amachita chimene watsimikiza kuti chindichitikire
Job23:15 Nʼchifukwa chake ndikuchita mantha kwambiri pamaso pake; ndikamaganiza zonsezi ndimamuopa.
Job23:16 Mulungu walefula mtima wanga; Wamphamvuzonse wandiopseza kwambiri.
Job23:17 Komatu sindinachititsidwe mantha ndi mdima
Job24:1 “Chifukwa chiyani Wamphamvuzonse sayikiratu nthawi yoti aweruze? Chifukwa chiyani iwo amene amadziwa Iyeyo amayembekezera pachabe masiku oterewa?
Job24:2 Anthu amasuntha miyala ya mʼmalire
Job24:3 Amalanda abulu a ana amasiye ndipo amatenganso ngʼombe ya mkazi wamasiye ngati chikole.
Job24:4 Amachotsa mʼmisewu anthu osauka
Job24:5 Amphawiwo amakhala ngati mbidzi mʼchipululu
Job24:6 Iwo amakolola za mʼminda ya eni ake
Job24:7 Amagona maliseche usiku wonse kusowa zovala; pa nthawi yozizira amasowa chofunda.
Job24:8 Amavumbwa ndi mvula ya mʼmapiri ndipo amakangamira ku matanthwe kusowa pobisalapo.
Job24:9 Amatsomphola mwana wamasiye wa ku bere; ndipo amagwira mwana wakhanda wa mʼmphawi kuti akhale chikole.
Job24:10 Amphawi amangoyenda maliseche kusowa zovala; amasenza mitolo ya tirigu
Job24:11 Iwo amayenga mafuta a olivi mʼminda ya anthu oyipa; amapsinya mphesa
Job24:12 Kubuwula kwa anthu amene akufa kumamveka kuchokera mu mzinda
Job24:13 “Pali ena amene amakana kuwala
Job24:14 Dzuwa likalowa
Job24:15 Munthu wachigololo amadikira chisisira; iyeyo amaganiza kuti
Job24:16 Mbala zimathyola nyumba usiku
Job24:17 Pakuti kwa onsewa mdima wandiweyani ndiye kuti kwawachera. Iwo amachita ubale ndi zoopsa za mdima.
Job24:18 “Komatu iwowo ndi thovu loyandama pa madzi; minda yawo ndi yotembereredwa pa dzikolo kotero kuti palibe amene amapita ku minda ya mpesa.
Job24:19 Monga momwe kutentha ndi chilala zimasungunulira madzi owundana ndi momwemonso mmene manda amachotsera omwe achimwa.
Job24:20 Mayi wowabereka amawayiwala
Job24:21 Amachitira nkhanza mayi wosabala ndi mayi amene alibe mwana
Job24:22 Koma Mulungu amawononga munthu wamphamvu mwa mphamvu zake; ngakhale munthuyo atakhazikika
Job24:23 Mulungu atha kuwalola kuti akhale mosatekeseka
Job24:24 Kwa kanthawi kochepa oyipa amakwezedwa ndipo kenaka saonekanso; amatsitsidwa ndipo amachotsedwa monga ena onse; amadulidwa ngati ngala za tirigu.
Job24:25 “Ngati zimenezi sizoona
Job25:1 Apo Bilidadi wa ku Suki anayankha kuti
Job25:2 “Ulamuliro ndi kuopsa ndi za Mulungu
Job25:3 Kodi magulu ake ankhondo nʼkuwerengeka? Kodi kuwala kwake sikuwalira ndani?
Job25:4 Kodi munthu angakhale bwanji wolungama pamaso pa Mulungu? Kodi munthu wobadwa mwa mayi angakhale wangwiro?
Job25:5 Ngati mwezi sutha kuwala kwenikweni
Job25:6 nanji tsono munthu amene ali ngati mphutsi
Job26:1 Pamenepo Yobu anayankha kuti
Job26:2 “Wamuthandizadi munthu wopanda mphamvu! Walimbitsadi dzanja la munthu wofowoka!
Job26:3 Wapereka malangizo kwa munthu amene alibe nzeru! Ndipotu waonetsadi nzeru zochuluka!
Job26:4 Kodi wakuthandiza ndani kuti uyankhule mawu awa? Ndipo ndi mzimu wa yani umene unayankhula pakamwa pako?
Job26:5 “Mizimu ya anthu akufa ikunjenjemera pansi pa madzi
Job26:6 Dziko la anthu akufa ndi lapululu pamaso pa Mulungu; chiwonongeko ndi chosaphimbidwa.
Job26:7 Mulungu anayala thambo la kumpoto pa phompho; Iye anakoloweka dziko lapansi mʼmalo mwake pamene panali popanda nʼkanthu komwe.
Job26:8 Amasunga madzi ambiri mʼmitambo yake
Job26:9 Iye amaphimba mwezi wowala
Job26:10 Mulungu anawalembera madzi malire wonga uta
Job26:11 Mizati yochirikiza mitambo yakumwamba imanjenjemera
Job26:12 Ndi mphamvu zake anatontholetsa nyanja; ndi nzeru zake anakantha chirombo cha mʼmadzi chija chotchedwa Rahabe.
Job26:13 Ndi mpweya wake anayeretsa zamumlengalenga
Job26:14 Zimenezi ndi pangʼono chabe mwa ntchito yake; tingomva pangʼono za Iye ngati kunongʼona! Kodi ndani angathe kudziwa kukula kwa mphamvu zake?”
Job27:1 Ndipo Yobu anapitiriza kuyankhula kwake:
Job27:2 “Ndithu pali Mulungu wamoyo
Job27:3 nthawi zonse pamene ndili ndi moyo
Job27:4 pakamwa panga sipadzatuluka mawu oyipa
Job27:5 Sindidzavomereza kuti inu mukunena zoona; mpaka imfa yanga
Job27:6 Ndidzasunga chilungamo changa ndipo sindidzalola kuti chindichokere; chikumbumtima changa sichidzanditsutsa nthawi yonse ya moyo wanga.
Job27:7 “Mdani wanga akhale ngati woyipa
Job27:8 Nanga chiyembekezo cha munthu wosapembedza nʼchiyani pamene aphedwa
Job27:9 Kodi Mulungu amamva kulira kwake pamene zovuta zamugwera?
Job27:10 Kodi adzapeza chikondwerero mwa Wamphamvuzonse? Kodi adzapemphera kwa Mulungu nthawi zonse?
Job27:11 “Ndidzakuphunzitsani za mphamvu ya Mulungu ndipo sindidzabisa njira za Wamphamvuzonse.
Job27:12 Inu mwadzionera nokha zonsezi. Nanga bwanji mukuyankhula zopanda pake?
Job27:13 “Pano pali chilango chimene Mulungu amasungira woyipa
Job27:14 Angakhale ana ake achuluke chotani adzaphedwa ndi lupanga ndipo zidzukulu zake zidzasowa zakudya.
Job27:15 Amene adzatsalireko adzafa ndi mliri
Job27:16 Ngakhale aunjike siliva ngati fumbi
Job27:17 zimene wasungazo wolungama ndiye adzavale
Job27:18 Nyumba imene akuyimanga ili ngati mokhala kadziwotche
Job27:19 Amapita kokagona ali wolemera koma kutha kwake nʼkomweko; akatsekula maso ake
Job27:20 Zoopsa zimamukokolola ngati madzi achigumula; mphepo yamkuntho imamunyamula usiku.
Job27:21 Mphepo ya kummawa imamuwulutsa ndipo iye saonekanso ndipo imamuchotsa pamalo pake.
Job27:22 Imakuntha pa iye osamuchitira chisoni
Job27:23 Mphepoyo imamuwomba ndithu ndipo kuchokera pamalo pake imamuopseza.”
Job28:1 Pali mgodi wa siliva ndiponso malo oyengerapo golide.
Job28:2 Chitsulo amachikumba pansi
Job28:3 Munthu amalowa mu mdima atatenga nyale
Job28:4 Amakumba njira zapansi mu mgodimo
Job28:5 Nthaka
Job28:6 miyala ya safiro imachokera mʼmatanthwe ake
Job28:7 Palibe mbalame yodya zinzake imene imadziwa njira yobisikayi
Job28:8 Zirombo zolusa sizipondamo mʼnjiramo
Job28:9 Munthu amaphwanya matanthwe olimba
Job28:10 Amabowola njira mʼmatanthwewo; ndipo amaona chuma chonse cha mʼphirimo.
Job28:11 Amaletsa mitsinje ya pansipo kuti isayendenso
Job28:12 “Koma nzeru zingapezeke kuti? Kodi kumvetsa zinthu kumakhala kuti?
Job28:13 Munthu sadziwa kufunika kwake kwa nzeruzo; nzeruyo sipezeka pa dziko lino la anthu amoyo.
Job28:14 Phompho likuti
Job28:15 Nzeru sungazigule ndi golide wabwino kwambiri
Job28:16 Nzeru singagulidwe ndi golide wa ku Ofiri
Job28:17 Nzeru sungayiyerekeze ndi golide kapena mwala wa galasi
Job28:18 Miyala ya korali ndi krisitali siyoyeneranso ndi kuyitchula nʼkomwe; mtengo wa nzeru ndi woposa miyala ya rubi.
Job28:19 Nzeru sungayiyerekeze ndi miyala ya topazi ya ku Kusi; nzeru singagulidwe ndi golide wabwino kwambiri.
Job28:20 “Kodi tsono nzeru zimachokera kuti? Kodi kumvetsa zinthu kumakhala kuti?
Job28:21 Malo ake ndi obisika kwa zamoyo zonse
Job28:22 Chiwonongeko ndi imfa zikuti
Job28:23 Mulungu yekha ndiye amadziwa njira yake yopita kumeneko
Job28:24 pakuti Iye amayangʼana mpaka ku malekezero a dziko lapansi ndipo amaona zonse za kunsi kwa thambo.
Job28:25 Iye atapatsa mphepo mphamvu zake
Job28:26 atakhazikitsa lamulo loti mvula izigwa ndi kukonza njira ya chingʼaningʼani cha bingu
Job28:27 pamenepo ndi pamene anayangʼana nzeruzo naziyeza mtengo wake; nazikhazikitsa ndi kuzisanthula bwino lomwe.
Job28:28 Ndipo Iye anati kwa munthu
Job29:1 Yobu anapitiriza kuyankhula kwake:
Job29:2 “Aa! Ndikanakhala momwe ndinalili miyezi yapitayi
Job29:3 pamene nyale yake inkandiwunikira ndipo ndi kuwunika kwakeko ine ndinkatha kuyenda mu mdima!
Job29:4 Ndithu
Job29:5 nthawi imene Wamphamvuzonse anali nane
Job29:6 pamene popondapo ine panali patakhathamira mafuta a mkaka
Job29:7 “Pamene ndinkapita pa chipata cha mzinda ndi kukhala pa mpando wanga pabwalo
Job29:8 anyamata amati akandiona ankapatuka ndipo anthu akuluakulu ankayimirira;
Job29:9 atsogoleri ankakhala chete ndipo ankagwira pakamwa pawo;
Job29:10 anthu otchuka ankangoti duu
Job29:11 Aliyense amene anamva za ine anayankhula zabwino zanga
Job29:12 chifukwa ndinkapulumutsa mʼmphawi wofuna chithandizo
Job29:13 Munthu amene anali pafupi kufa ankandidalitsa; ndinkasangalatsanso mkazi wamasiye.
Job29:14 Chilungamo chinali ngati chovala changa; chiweruzo cholungama ndiye chinali mkanjo ndi nduwira yanga.
Job29:15 Ndinali ngati maso kwa anthu osapenya; ndinali ngati mapazi kwa anthu olumala.
Job29:16 Ndinali ngati abambo kwa anthu aumphawi; ndinkayimira mlendo pa mlandu wake.
Job29:17 Ndinkawononga mphamvu za anthu oyipa ndi kulanditsa amene anali atagwidwa.
Job29:18 “Ndinkaganiza kuti
Job29:19 Mizu yanga idzatambalalira ku madzi
Job29:20 Ulemerero wanga udzakhala wosaguga mwa ine
Job29:21 “Anthu ankamvetsera zimene ndinkanena mwachidwi
Job29:22 Ndikayankhula
Job29:23 Ankayembekezera ine monga momwe amayembekezera mvula ndipo ankalandira mawu anga ngati mvula ya mʼmalimwe.
Job29:24 Ndikawasekerera
Job29:25 Ndinkawasankhira njira yawo ndipo ndinkawatsogolera ngati mfumu; ndinkakhala ngati mfumu pakati pa gulu lake lankhondo; ndinali ngati msangalatsi pakati pa anthu olira.”
Job30:1 “Koma tsopano akundinyoza
Job30:2 Kodi mphamvu zawo ndi za phindu lanji kwa ine
Job30:3 Anali atatheratu kuwonda ndi njala
Job30:4 Ankathyola therere ndi masamba owawa
Job30:5 Anapirikitsidwa pakati pa anthu anzawo
Job30:6 Anawumirizidwa kukhala ku zigwembe za mitsinje yowuma
Job30:7 Ankalira ngati nyama kuthengo ndipo ankawunjikana pamodzi pa ziyangoyango.
Job30:8 Anali anthu achabechabe ndi wopanda dzina
Job30:9 “Ndipo tsopano ana awo akundiyimba nyimbo zachipongwe; ineyo ndasanduka chisudzo chawo.
Job30:10 Iwo amanyansidwa nane ndipo amandithawa; akandiona salephera kundilavulira mʼmaso mwangamu.
Job30:11 Tsopano pakuti Mulungu wakhwefula uta wanga ndipo wandisautsa
Job30:12 Ku dzanja langa lamanja anthu akulimbana nane; andikumbira dzenje loti ndigweremo ndikamayenda
Job30:13 Iwo anditsekera njira; akufuna kundichititsa ngozi
Job30:14 Akundithamangitsa ngati madzi olowera pa mpanda wobowoka
Job30:15 Zoopsa zandithetsa mphamvu; ulemu wanga wachita ngati wauluzika ndi mphepo
Job30:16 “Ndipo tsopano mtima wanga wachokamo; ndili mʼmasiku amasautso.
Job30:17 Mafupa anga akuphwanya usiku pakuti zowawa zanga sizikuleka.
Job30:18 Mʼmphamvu zake Mulungu wakhala ngati chovala changa; Iye wandigwira ngati chovala chondithina pa khosi.
Job30:19 Wandiponya mʼmatope
Job30:20 “Inu Mulungu
Job30:21 Inuyo mumandichitira zankhanza; mumandizunza ndi dzanja lanu lamphamvu.
Job30:22 Mwandinyamulira ku mphepo ndipo mwandiwulutsa ndi mphepoyo; mwandiponya mʼmphepo ya mkuntho.
Job30:23 Ndikudziwa kuti Inu mudzandifikitsa ku imfa
Job30:24 “Ndithudi palibe munthu amene amalanga munthu wosweka mtima
Job30:25 Kodi ine sindinalire nawo iwo amene anali pamavuto? Kodi mtima wanga sunamvere chisoni anthu osauka?
Job30:26 Koma pamene ndinkayembekezera zabwino
Job30:27 Kuwawa kwa mʼkati mwanga sikukuleka; ndili mʼmasiku amasautso.
Job30:28 Ndikuyenda wothimbirira
Job30:29 Ndasanduka mʼbale wa nkhandwe
Job30:30 Khungu langa layamba kuda ndipo likufunduka; thupi langa likutentha chifukwa cha kuphwanya kwa thupi.
Job30:31 Pangwe wanga wasanduka woyimbira maliro
Job31:1 “Ndinachita pangano ndi maso anga kuti sindidzapenya namwali momusirira.
Job31:2 Kodi Mulungu kumwambako wandisungira zotani? Kodi cholowa changa chochokera kwa Wamphamvuzonse kumwambako nʼchotani?
Job31:3 Kodi si chiwonongeko kwa anthu oyipa
Job31:4 Kodi Mulungu saona zochita zanga
Job31:5 “Ngati ndachita zinthu mwachiphamaso
Job31:6 Mulungu andiyeze ndi muyeso wake wolungama ndipo Iye adzadziwa kuti ine ndine wosalakwa
Job31:7 ngati mayendedwe anga asempha njira
Job31:8 Pamenepo ena adye zimene ndinadzala
Job31:9 “Ngati mtima wanga unakopekapo ndi mkazi
Job31:10 pamenepo mkazi wanga aphikire mwamuna wina chakudya
Job31:11 Pakuti zimenezo zikanakhala zochititsa manyazi
Job31:12 Ndi moto umene umayaka mpaka chiwonongeko; ukanapsereza zokolola zanga.
Job31:13 “Ngati ndinkapondereza mlandu wa akapolo anga aamuna kapena aakazi
Job31:14 ndidzatani pamene Mulungu adzanditsutsa? Nanga ndidzayankha chiyani akadzandifunsa?
Job31:15 Kodi amene anapanga ine mʼmimba mwa amayi anga si yemwe anapanganso iwo? Kodi si mmodzi yemweyo amene anatipanga tonsefe mʼmimba mwa amayi athu?
Job31:16 “Ngati ndinawamana aumphawi zinthu zimene ankazikhumba
Job31:17 ngati chakudya changa ndinadya ndekha
Job31:18 chonsechotu kuyambira unyamata wanga ndinamulera monga abambo ake
Job31:19 ngati ndinaona wina aliyense akuzunzika ndi usiwa
Job31:20 ndipo ngati iyeyo sananditamandepo chifukwa chomufunditsa ndi nsalu ya ubweya wankhosa
Job31:21 ngati ndinaopsezapo mwana wamasiye
Job31:22 pamenepo phewa langa lipokonyeke
Job31:23 Popeza ine ndinaopa kwambiri chiwonongeko chochokera kwa Mulungu
Job31:24 “Ngati ndinayika mtima wanga pa chuma kapena kunena kwa golide wabwino kwambiri kuti
Job31:25 ngati ndinakondwera chifukwa choti chuma changa chinali chambiri
Job31:26 ngati pamene ndinaona dzuwa likuwala
Job31:27 ndipo kuti mtima wanga unakopeka nazo nʼkuyika dzanja langa pakamwa mozilemekeza
Job31:28 pamenepo zimenezinso zikanakhala machimo oti ndilangidwe nawo
Job31:29 “Ngati ndinasangalala ndi kuwonongeka kwa mdani wanga
Job31:30 ine sindinachimwe ndi pakamwa panga potulutsa matemberero a mdani wanga kuti awonongeke
Job31:31 ngati anthu amene ndimakhala nawo mʼnyumba mwanga sananenepo kuti
Job31:32 Komatu mlendo sindinamusiye pa msewu usiku wonse
Job31:33 ngati ndinabisa tchimo langa monga amachitira anthu ena
Job31:34 chifukwa choopa gulu la anthu
Job31:35 “Aa
Job31:36 Ndithu ine ndikanakoleka kalatayo pa phewa langa
Job31:37 Ndikanamufotokozera zonse zimene ndinachita; ndikanafika pamaso pake ngati kalonga.
Job31:38 “Ngati minda yanga ikulira monditsutsa ine ndipo malo ake onse osalimidwa anyowa ndi misozi
Job31:39 ngati ndinadya za mʼminda mwake osapereka ndalama kapena kukhumudwitsa anthu olima mʼmindamo
Job31:40 pamenepo mʼmindamo mumere namsongole mʼmalo mwa tirigu ndi udzu mʼmalo mwa barele.” Mawu a Yobu athera pano.
Job32:1 Tsono anthu atatuwa analeka kumuyankha Yobu
Job32:2 Koma Elihu
Job32:3 Anapseranso mtima abwenzi ake atatu aja chifukwa sanapeze njira yomutsutsira Yobu
Job32:4 Tsono Elihu anadikira kuti ayankhule ndi Yobu chifukwa choti abwenziwo anali akuluakulu kupambana iyeyo.
Job32:5 Koma Elihu ataona kuti anthu atatuwo analibe mawu oti ayankhulenso
Job32:6 Choncho Elihu mwana wa Barakeli wa fuko la Buzi anati: “Ine ndine wamngʼono
Job32:7 Ndimaganiza kuti
Job32:8 Koma mzimu wa Mulungu mwa munthu
Job32:9 Si okalamba amene ali ndi nzeru
Job32:10 “Nʼchifukwa chake ndikuti
Job32:11 Ndadikira nthawi yonseyi
Job32:12 ineyo ndinakumvetseranidi. Koma palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe wa inu amene anatsutsa Yobu; palibe aliyense wa inu amene anamuyankha mawu ake.
Job32:13 Musanene kuti
Job32:14 Koma Yobu sanayankhule motsutsana ndi ine
Job32:15 “Iwo asokonezeka ndipo alibe choti ayankhulenso; mawu awathera.
Job32:16 Kodi ine ndidikire chifukwa iwo sakuyankhula tsopano
Job32:17 Inenso ndiyankhulapo tsopano; nanenso ndinena zimene ndikudziwa.
Job32:18 Pakuti ndili nawo mawu ambiri
Job32:19 mʼkati mwanga ndili ngati botolo lodzaza ndi vinyo
Job32:20 Ndiyenera kuyankhula kuti mtima utsike; ndiyenera kutsekula pakamwa panga ndi kuyankha.
Job32:21 Sindidzakondera munthu wina aliyense
Job32:22 pakuti ndikanakhala wa luso loyankhula moshashalika
Job33:1 “Koma tsopano
Job33:2 Tsopano ndiyamba kuyankhula; mawu anga ali pa msonga ya lilime langa.
Job33:3 Mawu anga akuchokera mu mtima wolungama; pakamwa panga pakuyankhula zoonadi zimene ndikuzidziwa.
Job33:4 Mzimu wa Mulungu wandiwumba
Job33:5 Mundiyankhe ngati mungathe; konzekani tsopano kuti munditsutse.
Job33:6 Ine ndili monga inu pamaso pa Mulungu; nanenso ndinachokera ku dothi.
Job33:7 Musachite mantha ndipo musandiope ayi
Job33:8 “Koma inu mwayankhula ine ndikumva
Job33:9 ‘Ndine wolungama mtima ndi wopanda tchimo; ndine woyera mtima ndipo ndilibe cholakwa.
Job33:10 Komatu Mulungu wapeza zifukwa zoti anditsutsire nazo; Iye akundiyesa ngati mdani wake.
Job33:11 Iyeyo wamanga mapazi anga mʼzigologolo
Job33:12 “Koma ine ndi kuti kwa inu
Job33:13 Chifukwa chiyani mukudandaula kwa Iye kuti sayankha mawu ena aliwonse a munthu?
Job33:14 Pajatu Mulungu amayankhula mwa njira zosiyanasiyana
Job33:15 Mʼmaloto
Job33:16 amawanongʼoneza mʼmakutu ndi kuwaopseza ndi machenjezo ake
Job33:17 kumuchotsa munthu ku zoyipa
Job33:18 kumulanditsa munthu ku manda
Job33:19 “Mwina Mulungu amalanga munthu ndi matenda ndi ululu ali pa bedi pake
Job33:20 kuti asakhalenso ndi chilakolako cha chakudya
Job33:21 Thupi lake limawonda ndipo mafupa ake
Job33:22 Munthuyo amayandikira ku manda
Job33:23 “Koma patakhala mngelo ngati mthandizi
Job33:24 kudzamukomera mtima ndi kunena kuti
Job33:25 pamenepo thupi lake lidzasanduka lasee ngati la mwana; ndipo adzabwezeretsedwanso kukhala ngati mʼmasiku a unyamata wake.
Job33:26 Akapemphera kwa Mulungu
Job33:27 Ndipo adzabwera kwa anzake ndi kunena kuti
Job33:28 Iye anapulumutsa moyo wanga kuti usapite ku manda
Job33:29 “Mulungu amachita zonsezi kwa munthu kawirikawiri
Job33:30 kupulumutsa moyo wa munthuyo ku manda
Job33:31 “Abambo Yobu
Job33:32 Ngati muli nʼchoti munene
Job33:33 Koma ngati sichoncho
Job34:1 Pamenepo Elihu anapitiriza kuyankhula kuti
Job34:2 “Imvani mawu anga
Job34:3 Pakuti khutu limayesa mawu monga momwe mʼkamwa mumalawira chakudya.
Job34:4 Tsono tiyeni tizindikire chomwe chili choyenera; tiphunzire pamodzi chomwe chili chabwino.
Job34:5 “Yobu akunena kuti
Job34:6 Ngakhale ndine wolungama mtima
Job34:7 Kodi munthu wofanana ndi Yobu ndani
Job34:8 Iye amayenda ndi anthu ochita zoyipa; amayanjana ndi anthu oyipa mtima.
Job34:9 Paja iye amanena kuti
Job34:10 “Tsono mverani ine
Job34:11 Iye amamubwezera munthu molingana ndi ntchito zake; Mulungu amabweretsa pa munthu molingana ndi zomwe amachita.
Job34:12 Nʼchosayembekezeka kuti Mulungu achite cholakwa
Job34:13 Kodi anapatsa Mulungu udindo wolamulira dziko lapansi ndani? Ndani anayika Mulungu kuti azilamulira dziko lonse?
Job34:14 Mulungu akanakhala ndi maganizo oti achotse mzimu wake ndi mpweya wake
Job34:15 zamoyo zonse zikanawonongekeratu ndipo munthu akanabwerera ku fumbi.
Job34:16 “Ngati ndinu omvetsa zinthu
Job34:17 Kodi Mulungu wodana ndi chilungamo angathe kukhala wolamulira? Kodi iwe ungathe kuweruza Wolungama ndi Wamphamvuyo?
Job34:18 Kodi si Iye amene amanena kwa mafumu kuti
Job34:19 Iye sakondera akalonga ndipo salemekeza anthu olemera kupambana osauka
Job34:20 Iwo amafa mwadzidzidzi
Job34:21 “Maso a Mulungu amapenya njira za munthu; amaona mayendedwe ake onse.
Job34:22 Palibe malo obisika kapena a mdima wandiweyani kumene anthu ochita zoyipa angabisaleko.
Job34:23 Mulungu sasowa kuti apitirizebe kufufuza munthu
Job34:24 Popanda kufufuza
Job34:25 Pakuti Iyeyo amadziwa bwino ntchito zawo amawagubuduza usiku ndipo amatswanyika.
Job34:26 Iye amawalanga chifukwa cha kuyipa kwawo
Job34:27 Chifukwa anasiya kumutsata ndipo sasamaliranso njira zake zonse.
Job34:28 Anachititsa amphawi kuti kulira kwawo kufike pamaso pake
Job34:29 Koma ngati Mulungu akhala chete
Job34:30 kuti asalamuliridwe ndi anthu osapembedza
Job34:31 “Mwina munthu atanena kwa Mulungu kuti
Job34:32 ndiphunzitseni zimene sindikuziona ngati ndachita choyipa
Job34:33 Kodi Mulungu akuweruzeni potsata mmene inuyo mukuganizira
Job34:34 “Anthu omvetsa zinthu adzakambirana
Job34:35 ‘Yobu akuyankhula mopanda nzeru; mawu ake ndi opanda fundo.’
Job34:36 Aa
Job34:37 Pa tchimo lake amawonjezerapo kuwukira; amawomba mʼmanja mwake monyoza pakati pathu
Job35:1 Ndipo Elihu anawonjeza kunena kuti
Job35:2 “Kodi mukuganiza kuti mukukhoza? Mukunena kuti
Job35:3 Komanso inu mukufunsa kuti
Job35:4 “Ine ndikufuna ndikuyankheni inu pamodzi ndi abwenzi anu omwe.
Job35:5 Yangʼanani kumwamba ndipo muone mitambo imene ili kutali ndi inuyo.
Job35:6 Inuyo mukachimwa
Job35:7 Ngati inu ndinu wolungama
Job35:8 Kuyipa kwanu kumangokhudza anthu ngati inuyo
Job35:9 “Anthu akufuwula chifukwa cha kuzunzidwa; akufuna chithandizo kuti achoke pansi pa ulamuliro wa anthu amphamvu.
Job35:10 Koma palibe amene akunena kuti
Job35:11 amene amatiphunzitsa kupambana nyama za dziko lapansi ndipo amatipatsa nzeru kupambana mbalame zowuluka?’
Job35:12 Iye sayankha pamene anthu akufuwulira kwa Iye chifukwa cha kudzikuza kwa anthu oyipa.
Job35:13 Ndithu
Job35:14 Ndipo ndi bodza lalikulu kunena kuti Iye saona zimene zikuchitika. Iye adzaweruza molungama ngati inu mutamudikira
Job35:15 ndiye tsono popeza kuti ukali wake sukupereka chilango
Job35:16 abambo Yobu mumangoyankhula zopandapake
Job36:1 Ndipo Elihu anapitirira kuyankhula nati:
Job36:2 “Mundilole pangʼono pokha ndipo ndikuonetsani kuti zilipo zambiri zoti ziyankhulidwe mʼmalo mwa Mulungu.
Job36:3 Nzeru zanga ndimazitenga kutali; ndidzaonetsa kulungama kwa Mlengi wanga.
Job36:4 Ndithudi mawu anga si abodza; wanzeru zangwiro ali ndi inu.
Job36:5 “Mulungu ndi wamphamvu
Job36:6 Salola oyipa kuti akhalebe ndi moyo koma amapereka ufulu kwa anthu osautsidwa.
Job36:7 Iye saleka kuyangʼanira anthu olungama; amawayika kuti alamulire pamodzi ndi mafumu ndipo amawalemekeza mpaka muyaya.
Job36:8 Koma ngati anthu amangidwa ndi unyolo
Job36:9 Iye amawafotokozera zomwe anachita
Job36:10 Mulungu amawatsekula makutu kuti amve malangizo ake ndipo amawalamula kuti alape zoyipa zawo.
Job36:11 Ngati iwo amumvera ndi kumutumikira
Job36:12 Koma ngati samvera
Job36:13 “Anthu osapembedza amasunga mkwiyo mu mtima mwawo; akawalanga
Job36:14 Amafa akanali achinyamata
Job36:15 Koma ovutika
Job36:16 “Iye akukukopani inu kuti muchoke mʼmasautso
Job36:17 Koma tsopano inu mwapezeka wopalamula chifukwa cha kuyipa kwanu; chiweruzo ndi chilungamo chakugwerani.
Job36:18 Muchenjere kuti wina asakukopeni ndi chuma; musalole kuti chiphuphu chachikulu chikusocheretseni.
Job36:19 Kodi chuma chanu kapena mphamvu zanu zonse zingakusungeni kotero kuti simungakhale pa masautso?
Job36:20 Musalakalake kuti usiku ubwere
Job36:21 Muchenjere kuti musatembenukire ku uchimo
Job36:22 “Taonani
Job36:23 Kodi ndani amene anamuwuzapo Mulungu zoti achite
Job36:24 Kumbukirani kutamanda ntchito zake zimene anthu amaziyamika mʼnyimbo.
Job36:25 Anthu onse amaziona ntchitozo; anthuwo amaziona ali kutali.
Job36:26 Ndithudi
Job36:27 “Mulungu ndiye amakweza timadontho tamadzi kuthambo
Job36:28 mitambo imagwetsa mvulayo ndipo mvulayo imavumbwa pa anthu mokwanira.
Job36:29 Kodi ndani amene angadziwe momwe mitambo imayendera
Job36:30 Taonani momwe amawalitsira zingʼaningʼani pa malo ake onse
Job36:31 Umu ndi mmene Iye amalamulira mitundu ya anthu ndi kuwapatsa chakudya chochuluka.
Job36:32 Amadzaza manja ake ndi zingʼaningʼani
Job36:33 Mabingu ake amalengeza za kubwera kwa mvula yamkuntho; ngʼombe nazo zimalengeza za kubwera kwake.
Job37:1 “Mtima wanga ukulumphalumpha pa chimenechinso ndipo ukuchoka mʼmalo mwake.
Job37:2 Tamverani! Tamverani kubangula kwa liwu lake
Job37:3 Iye amaponya chingʼaningʼani chake pansi pa thambo lonse ndipo amachitumiza ku dziko lapansi.
Job37:4 Pambuyo pake kubangula kwake kumamveka. Iye amabangula ndi liwu lake laulemerero. Pamene wabangula
Job37:5 Liwu la Mulungu limabangula mʼnjira zambiri zodabwitsa Iye amachita zinthu zazikulu zimene sitingathe kuzimvetsa.
Job37:6 Amalamula chisanu chowundana kuti
Job37:7 Kuti anthu onse amene anawalenga athe kuzindikira ntchito yake. Iye amalepheretsa anthu kugwira ntchito zawo.
Job37:8 Zirombo zimakabisala ndipo zimakhala mʼmaenje mwawo.
Job37:9 Mphepo yamkuntho imatuluka ku malo ake
Job37:10 Mpweya wa Mulungu umawunditsa madzi ndipo madzi a mʼnyanja amawuma kuti gwaa.
Job37:11 Iye amadzaza mitambo ndi madzi a mvula
Job37:12 Mulungu amayendetsa mitamboyo mozungulirazungulira dziko lonse lapansi kuti ichite zonse zimene Iye akufuna pa dziko lapansi.
Job37:13 Iye amagwetsa mvula kuti alange anthu
Job37:14 “Abambo Yobu
Job37:15 Kodi mukudziwa momwe Mulungu amayendetsera mitambo ndi kuchititsa kuti kukhale zingʼaningʼani?
Job37:16 Kodi mukudziwa momwe Mulungu amayalira mitambo
Job37:17 Inu amene mʼzovala zanu mumatuluka thukuta pamene kunja kwatentha chifukwa cha mphepo yakummwera
Job37:18 kodi mungathe kuthandizana naye kutambasula thambo limene ndi lolimba ngati chitsulo?
Job37:19 “Tiwuzeni ife zoti tikanene kwa Iye; sitingathe kufotokoza mlandu wathu chifukwa cha mdima umene uli mwa ife.
Job37:20 Kodi nʼkofunika kumudziwitsa Mulungu kuti ndili naye mawu? Kodi kutero sikuchita ngati kupempha kuti ndiwonongeke?
Job37:21 Tsopano munthu sangathe kuyangʼana dzuwa
Job37:22 Kuwala kwake kumaonekera cha kumpoto; Mulungu amabwera ndi ulemerero woopsa.
Job37:23 Wamphamvuzonse sitingathe kumufikira pafupi ndi wa mphamvu zoposa; pa chiweruzo chake cholungama ndi mʼchilungamo chake chachikulu Iye sapondereza anthu ozunzika.
Job37:24 Nʼchifukwa chake anthu amamuopa kwambiri
Job38:1 Apo Yehova anamuyankha Yobu mʼkamvuluvulu. Ndipo anati:
Job38:2 “Kodi uyu ndani amene akusokoneza uphungu wanga poyankhula mawu opanda nzeru?
Job38:3 Onetsa chamuna; ndikufunsa ndipo undiyankhe.
Job38:4 “Kodi unali kuti pamene ndinkayika maziko a dziko lapansi? Ndiwuze ngati ukudziwa.
Job38:5 Ndani amene analemba malire ake? Ndithudi iwe ukudziwa! Ndani amene anayeza ndi chingwe dzikoli?
Job38:6 Kodi maziko ake anawakumba potani
Job38:7 pamene nyenyezi za kummawa zinkayimba pamodzi ndipo angelo onse a Mulungu ankafuwula mokondwa?
Job38:8 “Kodi ndani amene anatsekera nyanja pamene inkalengedwa
Job38:9 pamene ndinasandutsa mitambo kukhala chovala chake ndi kuyikulunga mu mdima wandiweyani
Job38:10 pamene ndinayilembera malire ake ndikuyikira zitseko ndi mipiringidzo yake.
Job38:11 Pamene ndinati
Job38:12 “Kodi chibadwire chako unalamulapo dzuwa kuti lituluke mmawa
Job38:13 kuti kuwalako kuwunikire dziko lonse lapansi ndi kuthamangitsa anthu oyipa?
Job38:14 Chifukwa cha kuwala kwa usana mapiri ndi zigwa zimaonekera bwino ngati zilembo za chidindo pa mtapo; zimaonekera bwino ngati makwinya a chovala.
Job38:15 Kuwala kwa dzuwako sikuwafikira anthu oyipa
Job38:16 “Kodi unayendapo pansi penipeni pa nyanja kapena pa magwero ake ozama?
Job38:17 Kodi anakuonetsapo zipata za imfa? Kodi unaonako ku dziko la anthu akufa kumene kuli mdima wandiweyani?
Job38:18 Kodi kukula kwa dziko lapansi umakudziwa? Undiwuze ngati ukuzidziwa zonsezi.
Job38:19 “Kodi njira yopita kumene kumakhala kuwala ili kuti? Nanga mdima umakhala kuti?
Job38:20 Kodi iwe ungathe kuziperekeza kwawoko zimenezi? Kodi ukuyidziwa njira yopita kwawoko?
Job38:21 Ndithu
Job38:22 “Kodi unalowamo mʼnyumba zosungira chisanu chowundana kapena unayionapo nyumba yosungira matalala
Job38:23 zimene ndazisungira nthawi ya mavuto ndi nthawi yomenyana ndi ya nkhondo?
Job38:24 Kodi umadziwa njira ya kumene kumachokera chingʼaningʼani kapena njira ya kumene kumachokera mphepo ya kummawa imene ili pa dziko lonse lapansi?
Job38:25 Kodi ndani amene amakonza ngalande za mvula
Job38:26 kuthirira madzi dziko limene sikukhala munthu
Job38:27 kukhutitsa nthaka yowuma yagwaa ndi kumeretsamo udzu?
Job38:28 Kodi mvula ili ndi abambo ake? Nanga madzi a mame anawabereka ndani?
Job38:29 Kodi madzi owundana anawabereka ndani? Ndani amene anabereka chisanu chochokera kumwamba
Job38:30 pamene madzi amawuma gwaa ngati mwala
Job38:31 “Kodi iwe ungayimitse kuyenda kwa nyenyezi? Kodi ungathe kuletsa kuyenda kwa nsangwe ndi akamwiniatsatana?
Job38:32 Kodi ungathe kuwongolera nyenyezi pa nyengo yake kapena kutsogolera nyenyezi yayikulu ya chimbalangondo pamodzi ndi ana ake?
Job38:33 Kodi malamulo a mlengalenga umawadziwa? Kodi ungathe kukhazikitsa ulamuliro wa Mulungu pa dziko lapansi?
Job38:34 “Kodi iwe ungathe kulamula mitambo kuti igwetse mvula ya chigumula?
Job38:35 Kodi ungathe kutumiza zingʼaningʼani kuti zingʼanime? Kodi zimabwera pamaso pako ndi kuti
Job38:36 Kodi ndani anayika nzeru mu mtima
Job38:37 Wanzeru ndani amene angathe kuwerenga mitambo? Ndani angathe kupendeketsa mitsuko ya madzi akuthambo
Job38:38 pamene fumbi limasanduka matope
Job38:39 “Kodi ndani amawusakira chakudya mkango waukazi ndi kukhutitsa misona ya mikango
Job38:40 pamene ili khale mʼmapanga mwawo kapena pamene ikubisala pa tchire?
Job38:41 Kodi amamupatsa khwangwala chakudya chake ndani pamene ana ake akulirira kwa Mulungu ndi kumayendayenda chifukwa chosowa zakudya?
Job39:1 “Kodi iwe umadziwa nthawi imene mbalale yayikazi imaswera? Kodi umaonerera pamene nswala ikubala?
Job39:2 Kodi umawerenga miyezi imene zimakhala ndi bere? Kodi nthawi imene zimaswana iwe umayidziwa?
Job39:3 Zimakhala tsonga ndi kuswa ana awo; pamenepo ululu wobereka nʼkutha.
Job39:4 Ana a nyamazi amakhala ndi mphamvu ndipo amakulira mʼthengo; kenaka amachoka ndipo sabwereranso.
Job39:5 “Kodi bulu wakuthengo amamupatsa ndani ufulu wongodziyendera? Ndani amamasula zingwe zake?
Job39:6 Ine ndinamupatsa chipululu kuti chikhale mudzi wake
Job39:7 Iye amakhala kutali ndi phokoso la mu mzinda; ndipo samva kufuwula kwa oyendetsa nyama zakatundu.
Job39:8 Amayendayenda mʼmapiri kudya msipu ndipo amafunafuna msipu uliwonse wobiriwira.
Job39:9 “Kodi njati ingavomere kukutumikira? Kodi ingagone mu gome lako usiku?
Job39:10 Kodi ungathe kuyimanga ndi zingwe kuti izilima? Kodi ingasalaze nthumbira mʼmunda mwako?
Job39:11 Kodi ungadalire njatiyo chifukwa champhamvu zake? Kodi ungayilekere kuti igwire ntchito zako zolemetsa?
Job39:12 Kodi ungadalire kuti idzakubweretsera tirigu wako ndi kumuyika ku malo opunthira?
Job39:13 “Nthiwatiwa imakupiza mapiko ake monyadira
Job39:14 Nthiwatiwa imakwirira mazira ake pansi ndipo amafundidwa ndi nthaka
Job39:15 nthiwatiwayo sidera nkhawa kuti mazira ake angathe kuswanyidwa
Job39:16 Nthiwatiwa imachitira nkhanza ana ake ngati anawo si ake; Imayiwala zoti inavutika powabala.
Job39:17 Chifukwa Mulungu anayimana nzeru
Job39:18 Komatu nthiwatiwa ikadzambatuka ndi kuyamba kuthamanga
Job39:19 “Kodi ndiwe amene umamupatsa mphamvu kavalo kapena kumuveka chenjerere mʼkhosi mwake?
Job39:20 Kodi ndiwe amene umalipatsa dzombe ulemerero wolumphira
Job39:21 Iye amalumphalumpha moopseza
Job39:22 Iye sachita mantha
Job39:23 Zida zankhondo zimachita kwichikwichi mʼchimake pambali pake pamodzi ndi mkondo wonyezimira ndi nthungo.
Job39:24 Kavaloyo amanjenjemera ndi ukali ndi kulumphalumpha; satha kungoyima pamene wamva kulira kwa lipenga.
Job39:25 Lipenga likalira amati
Job39:26 “Kodi kabawi amawuluka ndi nzeru zako
Job39:27 Kodi umalamulira chiwombankhanga ndiwe kuti chiziwuluka ndi kumanga chisa chake pamwamba penipeni?
Job39:28 Chimakhala pa phiri ndipo chimakhala pamenepo usiku; chimakhala pa msonga penipeni pa mwala.
Job39:29 Chili pamenepo chimayangʼanayangʼana choti chigwire kuti chidye; maso ake amachionera patali chinthucho.
Job39:30 Ana ake amayamwa magazi
Job40:1 Yehova anati kwa Yobu:
Job40:2 “Kodi iwe ufuna kukangana ndi Wamphamvuzonse? Iwe amene unatsutsana ndi Mulungu umuyankhe Iyeyo!”
Job40:3 Pamenepo Yobu anayankha Yehova:
Job40:4 “Ine sindili kanthu konse
Job40:5 Ndinayankhula kamodzi
Job40:6 Ndipo Yehova anayankha Yobu mʼkamvuluvulu kuti
Job40:7 “Tsopano vala dzilimbe ngati mwamuna; ndikufunsa mafunso ndipo iwe undiyankhe.
Job40:8 “Kodi iwe unganyoze chiweruzo changa cholungama? Kodi ungandidzudzule kuti iweyo ukhale wolungama?
Job40:9 Kodi uli ndi dzanja monga la Mulungu
Job40:10 Ngati zili choncho udzikometsere ndi ulemerero ndi kukongola
Job40:11 Tsanula ukali wako wosefukirawo
Job40:12 Uyangʼane aliyense wodzikweza ndipo umutsitse
Job40:13 Onsewo uwakwirire pamodzi mfumbi; ukulunge nkhope zawo mʼmanda.
Job40:14 Ukatero Ine ndidzakuvomereza kuti dzanja lako lamanja lakupulumutsadi.
Job40:15 “Taganiza za mvuwu
Job40:16 Mphamvu zake ndi zazikulu kwambiri
Job40:17 Mchira wake umayima tolotolo ngati mtengo wamkungudza; mitsempha ya ntchafu zake ndi yogwirana bwino.
Job40:18 Mafupa ake ali ngati mapayipi amkuwa
Job40:19 Mvuwuyo ndi yayikulu mwa zolengedwa za Mulungu
Job40:20 Imapeza chakudya chake ku mtunda ndipo nyama zakuthengo zonse zimasewera pambali pake.
Job40:21 Imagona pa tsinde pa zitsamba za mipeta
Job40:22 Imaphimbika ndi mthunzi wazitsamba za mipeta; imazunguliridwa ndi misondozi ya mu mtsinje.
Job40:23 Madzi a mu mtsinje akakokoma
Job40:24 Kodi alipo amene angathe kukola mvuwu ndi mbedza kapena kuyikola mu msampha?
Job41:1 “Kodi ungathe kukoka ngʼona ndi mbedza ya nsomba kapena kukanikiza lilime lake pansi ndi chingwe?
Job41:2 Kodi ungathe kumanga chingwe mʼmphuno mwake
Job41:3 Kodi ngʼonayo idzakupempha kuti uyichitire chifundo? Kodi idzakuyankhula ndi mawu ofatsa?
Job41:4 Kodi idzachita nawe mgwirizano kuti uyisandutse kapolo wako mpaka muyaya?
Job41:5 Kodi udzasewera nayo ngati mbalame
Job41:6 Kodi anthu adzayitsatsa malonda? Nanga amalondawo nʼkugawanagawana nyama yake kuti akagulitse?
Job41:7 Kodi chikopa chake ungathe kuchilasa ndi zisonga
Job41:8 Ukayiputa udziwe kuti pali nkhondo
Job41:9 Chiyembekezo choti nʼkuyigonjetsa ndi chabodza; kungoyiona kokha
Job41:10 Palibe wolimba mtima kuti ndi kuyiputa. Ndani angalimbe mtima kulimbana ndi Ine?
Job41:11 Kodi ndani anandipatsa kanthu kuti ndimubwezere? Zonse za pansi pa thambo ndi zanga.
Job41:12 “Sindidzaleka kuyankhula za ziwalo zake za chirombocho
Job41:13 Ndani angasende chikopa chake? Ndani angayiyandikire kuti abowole chikopa chake cholimbacho?
Job41:14 Ndani angatsekule kukamwa kwake
Job41:15 Kumsana kwake kuli mizere ya mamba onga zishango zolumikizanalumikizana;
Job41:16 Mambawo ndi olukanalukana kotero kuti mpweya sungathe kulowa pakati pake.
Job41:17 Ndi olumikizanalumikizana; ndi omatirirana kwambiri kotero kuti sangathe kulekana.
Job41:18 Kuyetsemula kwake kumatulutsa mbaliwali; maso ake amawala ngati kuwala kwa mʼbandakucha.
Job41:19 Mʼkamwa mwake mumatuluka nsakali zamoto ndipo mumathetheka mbaliwali zamoto.
Job41:20 Mʼmphuno mwake mumatuluka utsi ngati wa mʼnkhali yowira yomwe ili pa moto wa bango.
Job41:21 Mpweya wake umayatsa makala
