Job41:22 Mphamvu zake zili mʼkhosi mwake; aliyense wokumana nayo amangoti njenjenje ndi mantha.
Job41:23 Minyewa ya thupi lake ndi yolumikizana ndipo ndi yokhwima kwambiri ndi yolimba.
Job41:24 Pachifuwa pake ndi powuma ngati mwala
Job41:25 Ngʼonayo ikangovuwuka
Job41:26 Ngakhale ikanthidwe ndi lupanga
Job41:27 Chitsulo imachiyesa ngati phesi chabe ndi mkuwa ngati chikuni chowola.
Job41:28 Muvi sungathe kuyithawitsa
Job41:29 Zibonga zimakhala ngati ziputu; imangoseka pamene akuyibaya ndi nthungo.
Job41:30 Mamba a ku mimba kwake ali ngati chopunthira chakunthwa ndipo imasiya mkukuluzi mʼmatope ngati galeta lopunthira tirigu.
Job41:31 Imagadutsa madzi ozama ngati madzi a mʼnkhali
Job41:32 Kumbuyo kwake imasiya nthubwitubwi zambee
Job41:33 Pa dziko lapansi palibe china chofanana nacho
Job41:34 Chimanyoza nyama zina zonse; icho chija ndi mfumu ya nyama zonse.”
Job42:1 Pamenepo Yobu anayankha Yehova kuti
Job42:2 “Ndikudziwa kuti Inu mungathe kuchita zinthu zonse; chimene mufuna kuchita wina sangaletse konse.
Job42:3 Munandifunsa kuti
Job42:4 “Inu munandiwuza kuti
Job42:5 Ndinkangomva za Inu ndi makutu anga
Job42:6 Nʼchifukwa chake ndi kuchita manyazi
Job42:7 Yehova atayankhula ndi Yobu mawu amenewa anawuza Elifazi wa ku Temani kuti
Job42:8 Kotero tsopano mutenge ngʼombe zazimuna zisanu ndi ziwiri ndi nkhosa zazimuna zisanu ndi ziwiri ndi kupita nazo kwa mtumiki wanga Yobu kuti mukapereke nsembe zopsereza. Mtumiki wanga Yobu adzakupemphererani
Job42:9 Motero Elifazi wa ku Temani
Job42:10 Yobu atawapempherera abwenzi ake aja
Job42:11 Abale ake ndi alongo ake onse
Job42:12 Yehova anadalitsa Yobu pa masiku ake otsirizawa kupambana poyamba paja. Iye anali ndi nkhosa 14
Job42:13 Anaberekanso ana aamuna asanu ndi awiri ndi ana aakazi atatu.
Job42:14 Mwana wake wamkazi woyamba anamutcha Yemima
Job42:15 Mʼdziko monsemo munalibe akazi okongola ngati ana a Yobu
Job42:16 Zitachitika zimenezi
Job42:17 Potsiriza
Psalms1:1 Wodala munthu amene satsatira uphungu wa anthu ochimwa
Psalms1:2 Koma chikondwerero chake chili mʼmalamulo a Yehova ndipo mʼmalamulo akewo amalingaliramo usana ndi usiku.
Psalms1:3 Iye ali ngati mtengo wodzalidwa mʼmbali mwa mitsinje ya madzi
Psalms1:4 Sizitero ndi anthu oyipa! Iwo ali ngati mungu umene umawuluzidwa ndi mphepo.
Psalms1:5 Kotero anthu oyipa sadzatha kuyima pa chiweruzo
Psalms1:6 Pakuti Yehova amayangʼanira mayendedwe a anthu olungama
Psalms2:1 Nʼchifukwa chiyani anthu a mitundu ina akufuna kuchita chiwembu? Akonzekeranji zopanda pake anthu?
Psalms2:2 Mafumu a dziko lapansi akugwirizana nazo; ndipo olamulira asonkhana pamodzi kulimbana ndi Ambuye ndi wodzozedwa wakeyo.
Psalms2:3 Iwo akunena kuti
Psalms2:4 Wokhala mmwamba akuseka; Ambuye akuwanyoza iwowo.
Psalms2:5 Ndipo iye awadzudzula mu mkwiyo wake ndi kuwaopseza mu ukali wake
Psalms2:6 “Ine ndakhazikitsa mfumu yanga pa Ziyoni
Psalms2:7 Ine ndidzalengeza zimene Yehova walamula: Iye anati kwa Ine
Psalms2:8 Tandipempha
Psalms2:9 Iweyo udzawalamulira ndi ndodo yaufumu yachitsulo; udzawaphwanya zidutswazidutswa ngati zowumba zadothi.”
Psalms2:10 Kotero
Psalms2:11 Tumikirani Yehova mwa mantha ndi kukondwerera ulamuliro wake monjenjemera.
Psalms2:12 Mpsopsoneni mwanayo kuti angakwiye; kuti mungawonongedwe mʼnjira zanu
Psalms3:1 Salimo la Davide. Atathawa mwana wake Abisalomu. Inu Yehova
Psalms3:2 Ambiri akunena za ine kuti
Psalms3:3 Koma Inu Yehova
Psalms3:4 Kwa Yehova
Psalms3:5 Ine ndimagona ndi kupeza tulo; ndimadzukanso chifukwa Yehova amandichirikiza.
Psalms3:6 Sindidzaopa adani anga osawerengeka amene abwera kulimbana nane kuchokera ku madera onse.
Psalms3:7 Dzukani
Psalms3:8 Chipulumutso chimachokera kwa Yehova. Madalitso akhale pa anthu anu. Sela
Psalms4:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe wa zida za zingwe. Salimo la Davide. Ndiyankheni pamene ndiyitana Inu
Psalms4:2 Anthu inu
Psalms4:3 Dziwani kuti Yehova wadziyikira padera anthu okhulupirika; Yehova adzamva pamene ndidzamuyitana.
Psalms4:4 Kwiyani koma musachimwe; pamene muli pa mabedi anu
Psalms4:5 Perekani nsembe zolungama ndipo dalirani Yehova.
Psalms4:6 Ambiri akufunsa kuti
Psalms4:7 Inu mwadzaza mtima wanga ndi chimwemwe chachikulu kuposa kuchuluka kwa tirigu wawo ndi vinyo watsopano.
Psalms4:8 Ine ndidzagona ndi kupeza tulo mwamtendere
Psalms5:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe zoyimbira za zitoliro. Salimo la Davide. Tcherani khutu ku mawu anga
Psalms5:2 Mverani kulira kwanga kofuna thandizo
Psalms5:3 Mmawa
Psalms5:4 Inu si Mulungu amene mumasangalala ndi zoyipa; choyipa sichikhala pamaso panu.
Psalms5:5 Onyada sangathe kuyima pamaso panu; Inu mumadana ndi onse ochita zoyipa.
Psalms5:6 Mumawononga iwo amene amanena mabodza; anthu akupha ndi achinyengo
Psalms5:7 Koma Ine
Psalms5:8 Tsogolereni Inu Yehova
Psalms5:9 Palibe mawu ochokera mʼkamwa mwawo amene angadalirike; mtima wawo wadzaza ndi chiwonongeko. Kummero kwawo kuli ngati manda apululu; ndi lilime lawo amayankhula zachinyengo.
Psalms5:10 Lengezani kuti ndi olakwa
Psalms5:11 Koma lolani kuti onse amene apeza chitetezo mwa Inu akondwere; lolani kuti aziyimba nthawi zonse chifukwa cha chimwemwe. Aphimbeni ndi chitetezo chanu
Psalms5:12 Ndithu
Psalms6:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Pa zoyimbira za zingwe. Molingana ndi seminiti. Salimo la Davide. Inu Yehova
Psalms6:2 Ndichitireni chifundo Inu Yehova
Psalms6:3 Moyo wanga uli pa mazunzo aakulu. Mpaka liti
Psalms6:4 Tembenukani Inu Yehova
Psalms6:5 Palibe amene amakukumbukirani pamene wamwalira; Amakutamandani ndani ali ku manda?
Psalms6:6 Ine ndatopa ndi kubuwula; usiku wonse pa bedi panga pamadzaza ndi misozi yanga; ndimanyowetsa pogona panga ndi misozi.
Psalms6:7 Maso anga atupa chifukwa cha chisoni; akulephera kuona chifukwa cha adani anga.
Psalms6:8 Chokani kwa ine inu nonse amene mumachita zoyipa
Psalms6:9 Yehova wamva kupempha kwanga kofuna chifundo; Yehova walandira pemphero langa.
Psalms6:10 Adani anga onse adzachita manyazi ndipo adzakhala ndi mantha; adzabwerera msangamsanga mwa manyazi.
Psalms7:1 Sigioni wa Davide
Psalms7:2 mwina angandikadzule ngati mkango
Psalms7:3 Inu Yehova Mulungu wanga
Psalms7:4 ngati ndachita zoyipa kwa iye amene ndili naye pa mtendere
Psalms7:5 pamenepo lolani adani anga andithamangitse ndi kundipitirira
Psalms7:6 Nyamukani Yehova
Psalms7:7 Lolani gulu la anthu a mitundu ina lisonkhane mokuzungulirani. Alamulireni muli kumwambako;
Psalms7:8 Yehova aweruzeni anthu a mitundu inayo. Ndiweruzeni Yehova
Psalms7:9 Inu Mulungu wolungama
Psalms7:10 Chishango changa ndi Mulungu Wammwambamwamba
Psalms7:11 Mulungu amaweruza molungama
Psalms7:12 Ngati munthu satembenuka
Psalms7:13 Mulungu wakonza zida zake zoopsa; Iye wakonzekera mivi yake yoyaka moto.
Psalms7:14 Taonani
Psalms7:15 Iye amene akumba dzenje ndi kulizamitsa amagwera mʼdzenje limene wakumbalo.
Psalms7:16 Mavuto amene amayambitsa amamubwerera mwini; chiwawa chake chimatsikira pa mutu wake womwe.
Psalms7:17 Ine ndidzayamika Yehova chifukwa cha chilungamo chake; ndipo ndidzayimba nyimbo zamatamando pa dzina la Yehova Wammwambamwamba.
Psalms8:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Pa gititi. Salimo la Davide. Inu Yehova Ambuye athu
Psalms8:2 Kuchokera mʼkamwa mwa ana ndi makanda
Psalms8:3 Pamene ndilingalira za mayiko anu akumwamba
Psalms8:4 munthu ndani kuti Inu mumamukumbukira
Psalms8:5 Inu munamupanga kukhala wocheperapo kusiyana ndi zolengedwa zakumwamba ndipo mwamuveka ulemerero ndi ulemu.
Psalms8:6 Inu munamuyika wolamulira ntchito ya manja anu; munayika zinthu zonse pansi pa mapazi ake;
Psalms8:7 nkhosa
Psalms8:8 mbalame zamlengalenga ndi nsomba zamʼnyanja zonse zimene zimayenda pansi pa nyanja.
Psalms8:9 Inu Yehova
Psalms9:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Monga mwa mayimbidwe a nyimbo ya “Imfa ya Mwana.” Salimo la Davide. Ine ndidzakutamandani
Psalms9:2 Ndidzakondwa ndi kusangalala mwa inu; Ndidzayimba nyimbo zamatamando pa dzina lanu
Psalms9:3 Adani anga amathawa
Psalms9:4 Pakuti Inu mwatsimikiza za kulungama kwanga ndi mlandu wanga; Inu mwakhala pa mpando wanu waufumu
Psalms9:5 Mwadzudzula mitundu ya anthu ndipo mwawononga anthu oyipa; Inu mwafafaniza dzina lawo kwamuyaya.
Psalms9:6 Chiwonongeko chosatha chagwera adani
Psalms9:7 Yehova akulamulira kwamuyaya; wakhazikitsa mpando wake waufumu woweruzira.
Psalms9:8 Iye adzaweruza dziko mwachilungamo; adzalamulira mitundu ya anthu mosakondera.
Psalms9:9 Yehova ndiye kothawirako kwa opsinjika mtima
Psalms9:10 Iwo amene amadziwa dzina lanu adzadalira Inu
Psalms9:11 Imbani nyimbo zamatamando kwa Yehova
Psalms9:12 Pakuti Iye amene amabwezera chilango akupha anzawo wakumbukira; Iye salekerera kulira kwa ozunzika.
Psalms9:13 Inu Yehova
Psalms9:14 kuti ndilengeze za matamando anu pa zipata za ana aakazi a Ziyoni
Psalms9:15 Mitundu ya anthu yagwa mʼdzenje limene yakumba; mapazi awo akodwa mu ukonde umene anawubisa.
Psalms9:16 Yehova amadziwika ndi chilungamo chake; oyipa akodwa ndi ntchito za manja awo. Higayoni. Sela
Psalms9:17 Oyipa amabwerera ku manda
Psalms9:18 Koma osowa sadzayiwalika nthawi zonse
Psalms9:19 Dzukani Inu Yehova
Psalms9:20 Akantheni ndi mantha aakulu
Psalms10:1 Nʼchifukwa chiyani Yehova mwayima patali? Chifukwa chiyani mukudzibisa nokha pa nthawi ya mavuto?
Psalms10:2 Mwa kunyada kwake munthu woyipa asaka wofowoka
Psalms10:3 Iye amatamandira zokhumba za mu mtima wake; amadalitsa aumbombo ndi kuchitira chipongwe Yehova.
Psalms10:4 Mwa kunyada kwake woyipa safunafuna Mulungu; mʼmaganizo ake wonse mulibe malo a Mulungu.
Psalms10:5 Zinthu zake zimamuyendera bwino; iye ndi wamwano ndipo malamulo anu ali nawo kutali; amanyogodola adani ake onse.
Psalms10:6 Iye amadziyankhulira kuti
Psalms10:7 Mʼkamwa mwake mwadzaza matemberero
Psalms10:8 Iye amabisalira anthu pafupi ndi midzi
Psalms10:9 Amabisalira anthu ngati mkango pa zitsamba. Amabisalira kuti agwire anthu opanda mphamvu; amagwira anthu opanda mphamvu ndi kuwakokera mu ukonde wake.
Psalms10:10 Anthuwo amawapondaponda ndipo amakomoka; amakhala pansi pa mphamvu zake.
Psalms10:11 Iye amati mu mtima mwake
Psalms10:12 Dzukani Yehova! Onetsani dzanja lanu Inu Mulungu. Musayiwale anthu opanda mphamvu.
Psalms10:13 Nʼchifukwa chiyani munthu woyipa amachitira chipongwe Mulungu? Chifukwa chiyani amati mu mtima mwake
Psalms10:14 Komatu Inu Mulungu
Psalms10:15 Thyolani dzanja la woyipitsitsa ndi la munthu woyipa; muzengeni mlandu chifukwa cha zoyipa zake zimene sizikanadziwika.
Psalms10:16 Yehova ndi Mfumu kwamuyaya; mitundu ya anthu idzawonongeka kuchoka mʼdziko lake.
Psalms10:17 Mumamva Inu Yehova
Psalms10:18 Kuteteza ana amasiye ndi oponderezedwa
Psalms11:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Mwa Yehova ine ndimathawiramo. Nanga mungathe bwanji kunena kwa ine kuti
Psalms11:2 Pakuti taona oyipa akunga mauta awo; ayika bwino mivi yawo pa zingwe za uta
Psalms11:3 Tsono ngati maziko awonongeka
Psalms11:4 Yehova ali mʼNyumba yake yoyera; Yehova ali pa mpando wake waufumu kumwamba. Iye amayangʼanitsitsa ana a anthu; maso ake amawayesa.
Psalms11:5 Yehova amayesa olungama
Psalms11:6 Iye adzakhuthulira pa oyipa makala amoto ndi sulufule woyaka; mphepo yotentha idzakhala yowayenera.
Psalms11:7 Pakuti Yehova ndi wolungama
Psalms12:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Monga mwa mayimbidwe seminiti. Salimo la Davide. Thandizeni Yehova pakuti palibe munthu wokhulupirika; okhulupirika akusowa pakati pa anthu.
Psalms12:2 Aliyense amanamiza mʼbale wake; ndi pakamwa pawo pabodza amayankhula zachinyengo.
Psalms12:3 Inu Yehova tsekani milomo yonse yachinyengo ndi pakamwa paliponse podzikuza.
Psalms12:4 Pakamwa pamene pamati
Psalms12:5 “Chifukwa cha kuponderezedwa kwa anthu opanda mphamvu ndi kubuwula kwa anthu osowa
Psalms12:6 Ndipo mawu a Yehova ndi angwiro monga siliva oyengedwa mʼngʼanjo yadothi
Psalms12:7 Inu Yehova mudzatitchinjiriza ndipo mudzatiteteza kwa anthu otere kwamuyaya.
Psalms12:8 Oyipa amangoyendayenda ponseponse anthu akamayamikira zochita zawo.
Psalms13:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Mpaka liti Yehova? Kodi mudzandiyiwala mpaka kalekale? Mpaka liti mudzandibisira nkhope yanu?
Psalms13:2 Ndidzalimbana ndi maganizo anga ndi kukhala ndi chisoni mu mtima mwanga tsiku lililonse mpaka liti? Mpaka liti adani anga adzandipambana?
Psalms13:3 Ndiyangʼaneni ndi kundiyankha
Psalms13:4 mdani wanga adzati
Psalms13:5 Koma ndikudalira chikondi chanu chosasinthika; mtima wanga umakondwera ndi chipulumutso chanu.
Psalms13:6 Ine ndidzayimbira Yehova pakuti wandichitira zokoma.
Psalms14:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Chitsiru chimati mu mtima mwake
Psalms14:2 Yehova kumwamba wayangʼana pansi
Psalms14:3 Onse atembenukira kumbali
Psalms14:4 Kodi anthu ochita zoyipawa sadziwa chilichonse? Akudya anthu anga ngati chakudya chawo ndipo satamanda Yehova?
Psalms14:5 Awo ali apowo
Psalms14:6 Inu ochita zoyipa mumalepheretsa chikonzero cha anthu osauka
Psalms14:7 Ndithu
Psalms15:1 Salimo la Davide. Yehova
Psalms15:2 Munthu wa makhalidwe abwino
Psalms15:3 ndipo mʼkamwa mwake simutuluka mawu osinjirira
Psalms15:4 amene sapereka ulemu kwa munthu woyipa. Koma amalemekeza amene amaopa Yehova
Psalms15:5 amene amakongoletsa ndalama zake popanda chiwongoladzanja ndipo salandira chiphuphu pofuna kutsutsa anthu osalakwa. Iye amene amachita zinthu zimenezi sadzagwedezeka konse.
Psalms16:1 Mikitamu ya Davide. Ndisungeni Inu Mulungu
Psalms16:2 Ndinati kwa Yehova
Psalms16:3 Kunena za oyera mtima amene ali pa dziko
Psalms16:4 Anthu amene amathamangira kwa milungu ina mavuto awo adzachulukadi. Ine sindidzathira nawo nsembe zawo zamagazi kapena kutchula mayina awo ndi pakamwa panga.
Psalms16:5 Yehova
Psalms16:6 Malire a malo anga akhala pabwino; ndithudi
Psalms16:7 Ine ndidzatamanda Yehova amene amandipatsa uphungu; ngakhale usiku mtima wanga umandilangiza.
Psalms16:8 Ndayika Yehova patsogolo panga nthawi zonse. Popeza Iyeyo ali kudzanja langa lamanja
Psalms16:9 Choncho mtima wanga ndi wosangalala ndipo pakamwa panga pakukondwera; thupi langanso lidzakhala pabwino
Psalms16:10 chifukwa Inu simudzandisiya ku manda
Psalms16:11 Inu mwandidziwitsa njira ya moyo; mudzandidzaza ndi chimwemwe pamaso panu
Psalms17:1 Pemphero la Davide. Imvani Inu Yehova pempho langa lachilungamo; mverani kulira kwanga. Tcherani khutu kuti mumve pemphero langa popeza silikuchokera pakamwa pachinyengo.
Psalms17:2 Kusalakwa kwanga kuchokera kwa inu; maso anu aone chimene ndi cholungama.
Psalms17:3 Ngakhale Inu mutafufuza mtima wanga ndi kundisanthula usiku
Psalms17:4 Kunena za ntchito za anthu
Psalms17:5 Mayendedwe anga akhazikika pa njira zanu; mapazi anga sanaterereke.
Psalms17:6 Ine ndikuyitana Inu
Psalms17:7 Onetsani kudabwitsa kwa chikondi chanu chachikulu
Psalms17:8 Mundisunge ine ngati mwanadiso; mundibise mu mthunzi wa mapiko anu
Psalms17:9 kuchoka kwa oyipa amene amandizinga ine
Psalms17:10 Iwo amatseka mitima yawo yopanda chifundo
Psalms17:11 Andisaka
Psalms17:12 Iwo ali ngati mkango wofuna nyama; ngati mkango waukulu wokhala mobisala.
Psalms17:13 Dzukani Yehova
Psalms17:14 Inu Yehova
Psalms17:15 Ndipo ine mʼchilungamo ndidzaona nkhope yanu; pamene ndidzadzuka
Psalms18:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide mtumiki wa Yehova. Iye anayimbira Yehova nyimbo iyi pamene Yehovayo anamupulumutsa mʼdzanja la adani ake onse ndiponso mʼdzanja la Sauli. Davide anati: Ine ndimakukondani Inu Yehova
Psalms18:2 Yehova ndiye thanthwe langa
Psalms18:3 Ndimayitana Yehova amene ndi woyenera matamando
Psalms18:4 Zingwe za imfa zinandizinga; mitsinje yothamanga yachiwonongeko inandiopsa kwambiri.
Psalms18:5 Anandimanga ndi zingwe za ku manda; misampha ya imfa inalimbana nane.
Psalms18:6 Mʼmasautso anga ndinapemphera kwa Yehova; ndinalirira kwa Mulungu wanga kuti andithandize. Ali mʼNyumba yake
Psalms18:7 Dziko lapansi linanjenjemera ndi kuchita chivomerezi
Psalms18:8 Mʼmphuno mwake munatuluka utsi; moto wonyeketsa unatuluka mʼkamwa mwake
Psalms18:9 Iye anangʼamba thambo natsika pansi; pansi pa mapazi ake panali mitambo yakuda.
Psalms18:10 Iye anakwera pa Kerubi ndi kuwuluka; nawuluka ndi mphepo mwaliwiro.
Psalms18:11 Iye anapanga mdima kukhala chofunda chake
Psalms18:12 Mʼkuwala kumene kunali pamaso pake munkachokera matalala
Psalms18:13 Yehova anabangula kumwamba ngati bingu
Psalms18:14 Iye anaponya mivi yake nabalalitsa adani ake
Psalms18:15 Zigwa za mʼnyanja zinaonekera poyera; maziko a dziko lapansi anakhala poyera
Psalms18:16 Ali kumwamba
Psalms18:17 Anandipulumutsa kwa mdani wanga wamphamvu
Psalms18:18 Adaniwo analimbana nane pamene ndinali pa mavuto
Psalms18:19 Iye anandipititsa kumalo otakasuka; anandipulumutsa chifukwa amakondwera nane.
Psalms18:20 Yehova wandithandiza molingana ndi chilungamo changa; molingana ndi makhalidwe anga abwino
Psalms18:21 Pakuti ine ndinatsata njira za Yehova; ndilibe mlandu wochoka pamaso Mulungu wanga.
Psalms18:22 Malamulo ake onse ali pamaso panga; sindinasiye malangizo ake.
Psalms18:23 Ndakhala moyo wosalakwa pamaso pake ndipo ndakhala ndi kupewa tchimo.
Psalms18:24 Yehova wandipatsa mphotho molingana ndi chilungamo changa
Psalms18:25 Kwa wokhulupirika
Psalms18:26 kwa woyera mtima
Psalms18:27 Inu mumapulumutsa anthu odzichepetsa
Psalms18:28 Inu Yehova
Psalms18:29 Ndi thandizo lanu nditha kulimbana ndi gulu la ankhondo; ndi Mulungu wanga nditha kuchita zosatheka ndi munthu.
Psalms18:30 Kunena za Mulungu
Psalms18:31 Mulungu wina ndi uti wofanana nanu Yehova? Ndipo ndani amene ndi Thanthwe kupatula Mulungu wathu?
Psalms18:32 Ndi Mulungu amene anandipatsa mphamvu ndi kulungamitsa njira yanga.
Psalms18:33 Iye amasandutsa mapazi anga kukhala ngati ambawala yayikazi; Iye amandithandiza kuyimirira pamwamba pa mapiri.
Psalms18:34 Iye amaphunzitsa manja anga kuchita nkhondo; manja anga amatha kuthyola uta wachitsulo.
Psalms18:35 Inu mumandipatsa chishango chachipambano
Psalms18:36 Munakulitsa njira yoyendamo ine
Psalms18:37 Ndinathamangitsa adani anga ndi kuwapitirira; sindinabwerere mpaka atawonongedwa.
Psalms18:38 Ndinakantha adaniwo kotero kuti sanathenso kudzuka; anagwera pa mapazi anga.
Psalms18:39 Inu munandiveka ndi mphamvu yokachitira nkhondo
Psalms18:40 Inu munachititsa adani anga kutembenuka
Psalms18:41 Iwo anafuwula kupempha thandizo
Psalms18:42 Ine ndinawaperesa ngati fumbi lowuluka ndi mphepo. Ndinawapondaponda ngati matope a mʼmisewu.
Psalms18:43 Inu mwandipulumutsa mʼmanja mwa anthu; mwandisandutsa kukhala mtsogoleri wa anthu a mitundu ina. Anthu amene sindikuwadziwa ali pansi pa ulamuliro wanga.
Psalms18:44 Alendo amadzipereka okha pamaso panga; akangomva za ine amandigonjera.
Psalms18:45 Iwo onse anataya mtima; anatuluka mʼmalinga awo akunjenjemera.
Psalms18:46 Yehova ndi wamoyo! Litamandidwe Thanthwe langa! Akuzike Mulungu Mpulumutsi wanga!
Psalms18:47 Iye ndi Mulungu amene amabwezera chilango
Psalms18:48 amene amandipulumutsa mʼmanja mwa adani anga. Inu munandikuza kuposa adani anga; munandilanditsa mʼmanja mwa anthu ankhanza.
Psalms18:49 Choncho ine ndidzakutamandani pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina
Psalms18:50 Iye amapereka chipambano chachikulu kwa mfumu yake; amaonetsa chikondi chosasinthika kwa wodzozedwa wake
Psalms19:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Zakumwamba zimalengeza za ulemerero wa Mulungu; thambo limalalikira ntchito za manja ake.
Psalms19:2 Tsiku ndi tsiku zimayankhula mawu ambiri
Psalms19:3 Palibe kuyankhula
Psalms19:4 Koma uthenga wawo umapita pa dziko lonse lapansi
Psalms19:5 Dzuwa lili ngati mkwatibwi wobwera kuchokera ku nsanja yake
Psalms19:6 Limatuluka kuyambira mbali ina ya thambo ndi kuzungulira mpaka mbali inanso; palibe chinthu chotha kupewa kutentha kwake.
Psalms19:7 Lamulo la Yehova ndi langwiro
Psalms19:8 Malangizo a Yehova ndi olungama
Psalms19:9 Kuopa Yehova ndiye chinthu changwiro
Psalms19:10 ndi a mtengowapatali kuposa golide
Psalms19:11 Mtumiki wanu amachenjezedwa nawo; powasunga pali mphotho yayikulu.
Psalms19:12 Ndani angathe kudziwa zolakwa zake? Mundikhululukire zolakwa zanga zobisika.
Psalms19:13 Muteteze mtumiki wanunso ku machimo ochita akudziwa; iwo asandilamulire. Kotero ndidzakhala wosalakwa
Psalms19:14 Mawu a mʼkamwa mwanga ndi zolingalira za mu mtima mwanga zikhale zokondweretsa pamaso panu
Psalms20:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Yehova akuyankhe pamene uli pa msautso; dzina la Mulungu wa Yakobo likuteteze.
Psalms20:2 Iye atumize thandizo kuchokera ku malo ake opatulika; akugwirizize kuchokera ku Ziyoni.
Psalms20:3 Iye akumbukire nsembe zako zonse ndipo alandire nsembe zako zopsereza. Sela
Psalms20:4 Akupatse chokhumba cha mtima wako ndipo akuthandize kuti zonse wakonza zichitike.
Psalms20:5 Ife tidzafuwula ndi chimwemwe pamene iwe wapambana ndipo tidzanyamula mbendera zathu mʼdzina la Mulungu wathu
Psalms20:6 Tsopano ndadziwa kuti Yehova amapulumutsa wodzozedwa wake; Iye amamuyankha kuchokera kumwamba ku malo ake opatulika ndi mphamvu yopulumutsa ya dzanja lake lamanja.
Psalms20:7 Ena amadalira magaleta ndipo ena akavalo koma ife tidzadalira dzina la Yehova Mulungu wathu.
Psalms20:8 Iwo amagonjetsedwa ndi kugwa
Psalms20:9 Inu Yehova
Psalms21:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Inu Yehova
Psalms21:2 Inu mwayipatsa zokhumba za mtima wake ndipo simunayimane zopempha za pa milomo yake. Sela
Psalms21:3 Inu munayilandira ndi madalitso ochuluka ndipo munayiveka chipewa chaufumu chagolide weniweni pa mutu wake.
Psalms21:4 Iye anakupemphani moyo
Psalms21:5 Kudzera mʼzigonjetso zimene munapereka
Psalms21:6 Zoonadi Inu mwayipatsa madalitso amuyaya
Psalms21:7 Pakuti mfumu imadalira Yehova; kudzera mʼchikondi chake chosatha cha Wammwambamwamba
Psalms21:8 Dzanja lanu lidzayimitsa adani anu onse; dzanja lanu lamanja lidzagwira adani anu.
Psalms21:9 Pa nthawi ya kuonekera kwanu mudzawasandutsa ngʼanjo yamoto yotentha. Mu ukali wake Yehova adzawameza
Psalms21:10 Inu mudzawononga ana awo pa dziko lapansi
Psalms21:11 Ngakhale iwo akukonzereni chiwembu mwa kuchenjera kwawo sadzapambana;
Psalms21:12 pakuti mudzawapirikitsa ndipo adzaonetsa misana yawo pamene mudzawaloza ndi mivi yanu.
Psalms21:13 Mukwezeke Inu Yehova mʼmphamvu yanu
Psalms22:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Monga mwa “Mbawala yayikazi ya Mmawa.” Salimo la Davide. Mulungu wanga
Psalms22:2 Inu Mulungu wanga
Psalms22:3 Inu ndinu Woyera
Psalms22:4 Pa inu makolo athu anadalira; iwo anadalira ndipo Inu munawapulumutsa.
Psalms22:5 Analirira kwa inu ndipo munawapulumutsa. Iwo anakhulupirira Inu ndipo simunawakhumudwitse.
Psalms22:6 Koma ine ndine nyongolotsi osati munthu
Psalms22:7 Onse amene amandiona amandiseka; amandiyankhulira mawu achipongwe akupukusa mitu yawo kunena kuti
Psalms22:8 “Iyeyu amadalira Yehova
Psalms22:9 Komabe Inu ndinu amene munandibadwitsa
Psalms22:10 Chibadwire ine ndinaperekedwa kwa Inu; kuchokera mʼmimba mwa amayi anga Inu mwakhala muli Mulungu wanga.
Psalms22:11 Musakhale kutali ndi ine
Psalms22:12 Ngʼombe zazimuna zandizungulira; ngʼombe zazimuna zamphamvu za ku Basani zandizinga.
Psalms22:13 Mikango yobangula pokadzula nyama
Psalms22:14 Ine ndatayika pansi ngati madzi ndipo mafupa anga onse achoka mʼmalo mwake. Mtima wanga wasanduka phula; wasungunuka mʼkati mwanga.
Psalms22:15 Mphamvu zanga zauma ngati phale
Psalms22:16 Agalu andizungulira; gulu la anthu oyipa landizinga. Alasa manja ndi mapazi anga.
Psalms22:17 Ine nditha kuwerenga mafupa anga onse; anthu amandiyangʼanitsitsa ndi kundidzuma.
Psalms22:18 Iwo agawana zovala zanga pakati pawo ndi kuchita maere pa zovala zangazo.
Psalms22:19 Koma Inu Yehova
Psalms22:20 Pulumutsani moyo wanga ku lupanga
Psalms22:21 Ndilanditseni mʼkamwa mwa mikango; pulumutseni ku nyanga za njati.
Psalms22:22 Ine ndidzalengeza dzina lanu kwa abale anga; ndidzakutamandani mu msonkhano.
Psalms22:23 Inu amene mumaopa Yehova mutamandeni! Inu zidzukulu zonse za Yakobo
Psalms22:24 Pakuti Iye sanapeputse kapena kunyoza kuvutika kwa wosautsidwayo; Iye sanabise nkhope yake kwa iye. Koma anamvera kulira kwake kofuna thandizo.
Psalms22:25 Ndidzakutamandani pa msonkhano waukulu chifukwa cha zimene mwandichitira. Ndidzakwaniritsa lonjezo langa pamaso pa amene amaopa Inu.
Psalms22:26 Osauka adzadya ndipo adzakhuta; iwo amene amafunafuna Yehova adzamutamanda. Mitima yanu ikhale ndi moyo mpaka muyaya!
Psalms22:27 Malekezero onse a dziko lapansi adzakumbukira Yehova ndi kutembenukira kwa Iye
Psalms22:28 pakuti ulamuliro ndi wake wa Yehova ndipo Iye amalamulira anthu a mitundu yonse.
Psalms22:29 Anthu olemera onse a dziko lapansi adzachita phwando ndi kulambira; onse amene amapita ku fumbi adzagwada pamaso pake; iwo amene sangathe kudzisunga okha ndi moyo.
Psalms22:30 Zidzukulu zamʼtsogolo zidzamutumikira Iye; mibado ya mʼtsogolo idzawuzidwa za Ambuye.
Psalms22:31 Iwo adzalengeza za chilungamo chake kwa anthu amene pano sanabadwe pakuti Iye wachita zimenezi.
Psalms23:1 Salimo la Davide. Yehova ndiye mʼbusa wanga
Psalms23:2 Amandigoneka pa msipu wobiriwira
Psalms23:3 amatsitsimutsa moyo wanga. Amanditsogolera mʼnjira zachilungamo chifukwa cha dzina lake.
Psalms23:4 Ngakhale ndiyende mʼchigwa cha mdima wakuda bii
Psalms23:5 Mumandikonzera chakudya adani anga akuona. Mumadzoza mutu wanga ndi mafuta; chikho changa chimasefukira.
Psalms23:6 Zoonadi
Psalms24:1 Salimo la Davide. Dziko lapansi ndi la Yehova ndi zonse zimene zili mʼmenemo
Psalms24:2 pakuti Iye ndiye anayika maziko ake pa nyanja ndi kulikhazika pamwamba pa madzi.
Psalms24:3 Ndani angakwere phiri la Yehova? Ndani angathe kuyima pa malo ake opatulika?
Psalms24:4 Iye amene ali ndi mʼmanja moyera ndi mtima woyera
Psalms24:5 Iyeyo adzalandira madalitso kwa Yehova ndipo Mulungu mpulumutsi wake adzagamula kuti alibe mlandu.
Psalms24:6 Umenewo ndiwo mʼbado wa amene amafunafuna Yehova; amene amafunafuna nkhope yanu
Psalms24:7 Tukulani mitu yanu inu zipata; tsekukani

Psalms24:10 Kodi Mfumu yaulemereroyo ndani? Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Psalms25:1 Salimo la Davide. Kwa Inu Yehova
Psalms25:2 Ndimadalira Inu Mulungu wanga. Musalole kuti ndichite manyazi kapena kuti adani anga andipambane.
Psalms25:3 Aliyense amene amayembekezera kwa Ambuye sadzachititsidwa manyazi koma achinyengo ndiwo adzachititsidwe manyazi ndipo sadzakhala ndi chodzitetezera.
Psalms25:4 Ndidziwitseni njira zanu Inu Yehova
Psalms25:5 tsogolereni mʼchoonadi chanu ndi kundiphunzitsa
Psalms25:6 Kumbukirani Inu Yehova chifundo ndi chikondi chanu chachikulu
Psalms25:7 Musakumbukire machimo a ubwana wanga ndi makhalidwe anga owukira; molingana ndi chikondi chanu ndikumbukireni ine
Psalms25:8 Yehova ndi wabwino ndi wolungama; choncho Iye akulangiza ochimwa mʼnjira yake.
Psalms25:9 Amatsogolera odzichepetsa kuti achite zolungama ndipo amawaphunzitsa njira zake.
Psalms25:10 Njira zonse za Yehova ndi zachikondi ndi zokhulupirika kwa iwo amene amasunga zofuna za pangano lake.
Psalms25:11 Chifukwa cha dzina lanu
Psalms25:12 Tsono ndani munthu amene amaopa Yehova? Yehova adzamulangiza njira yoti ayitsate.
Psalms25:13 Iye adzakhala pa ulemerero masiku ake onse
Psalms25:14 Yehova amawulula chinsinsi chake kwa iwo amene amamuopa; amawulula pangano lake kwa iwowo.
Psalms25:15 Maso anga ali pa Yehova nthawi zonse
Psalms25:16 Tembenukirani kwa ine ndipo mundikomere mtima
Psalms25:17 Masautso a mu mtima mwanga achulukirachulukira; masuleni ku zowawa zanga.
Psalms25:18 Penyani mazunzo anga ndi zovuta zanga ndipo mufafanize machimo anga onse.
Psalms25:19 Onani mmene adani anga achulukira ndi momwe chidani chawo ndi ine chakulira.
Psalms25:20 Tetezani moyo wanga ndi kundilanditsa; musalole kuti ndichite manyazi
Psalms25:21 Kukhulupirika ndi kulungama kwanga kunditeteze
Psalms25:22 Wombolani Israeli Inu Mulungu
Psalms26:1 Salimo la Davide. Weruzeni Inu Yehova pakuti ndakhala moyo wosalakwa. Ndadalira Yehova popanda kugwedezeka.
Psalms26:2 Patseni mayeso
Psalms26:3 pakuti chikondi chanu chili pamaso panga nthawi zonse
Psalms26:4 Ine sindikhala pansi pamodzi ndi anthu achinyengo
Psalms26:5 Ndimanyansidwa ndi msonkhano wa anthu ochita zoyipa ndipo ndimakana kukhala pansi pamodzi ndi oyipa.
Psalms26:6 Ndimasamba mʼmanja mwanga kuonetsa kusalakwa kwanga ndi kupita kukatumikira pa guwa lanu la nsembe
Psalms26:7 kulengeza mofuwula za matamando anu ndi kuwuza onse za ntchito zanu zodabwitsa.
Psalms26:8 Ndimakonda Nyumba imene Inu Yehova mumakhalamo
Psalms26:9 Musachotse moyo wanga pamodzi ndi ochimwa
Psalms26:10 amene mʼmanja mwawo muli ndondomeko zoyipa
Psalms26:11 Koma ine ndimakhala moyo wosalakwa; mu msonkhano wa anthu anu ndidzatamanda Yehova.
Psalms26:12 Ndayima pa malo wopanda zovuta ndipo ndidzatamanda Yehova mu msonkhano waukulu.
Psalms27:1 Salimo la Davide. Yehova ndiye kuwunika kwanga ndi chipulumutso changa; ndidzaopa yani? Yehova ndi linga la moyo wanga; ndidzachita mantha ndi yani?
Psalms27:2 Pamene anthu oyipa abwera kudzalimbana nane kudzadya mnofu wanga
Psalms27:3 Ngakhale gulu lankhondo lindizinge
Psalms27:4 Chinthu chimodzi chokha chimene ndipempha kwa Yehova
Psalms27:5 Pakuti pa tsiku la msautso Iye adzanditeteza mʼmalo ake okhalamo; adzandibisa mʼkati mwa Nyumba yake ndi kukhazika ine pamwamba pa thanthwe.
Psalms27:6 Kotero mutu wanga udzakwezedwa kuposa adani anga amene andizungulira; pa Nyumba yake ndidzapereka nsembe ndi mfuwu wachimwemwe; ndidzayimba nyimbo kwa Yehova.
Psalms27:7 Imvani mawu anga pamene ndiyitana Inu Yehova mundichitire chifundo ndipo mundiyankhe.
Psalms27:8 Mtima wanga ukuti kwa Inu
Psalms27:9 Musandibisire nkhope yanu
Psalms27:10 Ngakhale abambo ndi amayi anga anditaya Yehova adzandisamala.
Psalms27:11 Phunzitseni njira yanu Inu Yehova
Psalms27:12 Musandipereke ku zokhumba za adani anga
Psalms27:13 Ine ndikutsimikiza mtima za zimenezi; ndidzaona ubwino wa Yehova mʼdziko la anthu amoyo.
Psalms27:14 Dikirani pa Yehova; khalani anyonga ndipo limbani mtima nimudikire Yehova.
Psalms28:1 Salimo la Davide. Kwa Inu ine ndiyitana
Psalms28:2 Imvani kupempha chifundo kwanga pomwe ndikuyitana kwa Inu kuti mundithandize
Psalms28:3 Musandikokere kutali pamodzi ndi anthu oyipa
Psalms28:4 Muwabwezere chifukwa cha zochita zawo ndi ntchito zawo zoyipa; abwezereni chifuwa cha zimene manja awo achita ndipo mubweretse pa iwo zimene zowayenera.
Psalms28:5 Popeza iwowo sakhudzidwa ndi ntchito za Yehova
Psalms28:6 Matamando apite kwa Yehova
Psalms28:7 Yehova ndiye mphamvu yanga ndi chishango changa; mtima wanga umadalira Iye
Psalms28:8 Yehova ndi mphamvu ya anthu ake
Psalms28:9 Pulumutsani anthu anu ndipo mudalitse cholowa chanu; mukhale mʼbusa wawo ndipo muwakweze kwamuyaya.
Psalms29:1 Salimo la Davide. Perekani kwa Yehova
Psalms29:2 Perekani kwa Yehova ulemerero woyenera dzina lake
Psalms29:3 Liwu la Yehova lili pamwamba pa madzi; Mulungu waulemerero abangula
Psalms29:4 Liwu la Yehova ndi lamphamvu; liwu la Yehova ndi laulemerero.
Psalms29:5 Liwu la Yehova limathyola mikungudza; Yehova amathyolathyola mikungudza ya ku Lebanoni.
Psalms29:6 Iye amachititsa Lebanoni kulumphalumpha ngati mwana wangʼombe
Psalms29:7 Liwu la Yehova limakantha ngati kungʼanima kwa mphenzi.
Psalms29:8 Liwu la Yehova limagwedeza chipululu; Yehova amagwedeza chipululu cha Kadesi.
Psalms29:9 Liwu la Yehova limapindapinda mibawa ndi kuyeretsa nkhalango. Ndipo mʼNyumba mwake onse amafuwula kuti
Psalms29:10 Yehova amakhala pamwamba pa madzi osefukira
Psalms29:11 Yehova amapereka mphamvu kwa anthu ake; Yehova amadalitsa anthu ake ndi mtendere.

Psalms30:3 Inu Yehova
Psalms30:4 Imbirani Yehova inu anthu ake okhulupirika; tamandani dzina lake loyera.
Psalms30:5 Pakuti mkwiyo wake umakhala kwa kanthawi koma kukoma mtima kwake ndi kwa moyo wonse; utha kuchezera kulira usiku wonse
Psalms30:6 Pamene ndinaona kuti ndili otetezedwa ndinati
Psalms30:7 Inu Yehova

Psalms30:9 “Kodi pali phindu lanji powonongeka kwanga ngati nditsikira ku dzenje? Kodi fumbi lidzakutamandani Inu? Kodi lidzalengeza za kukhulupirika kwanu?
Psalms30:10 Imvani Yehova ndipo mundichitire chifundo; Yehova mukhale thandizo langa.”
Psalms30:11 Inu munasandutsa kulira kwanga kukhala kuvina; munachotsa chiguduli changa ndi kundiveka ndi chimwemwe

Psalms31:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Mwa Inu Yehova
Psalms31:2 Tcherani khutu lanu kwa ine
Psalms31:3 Popeza Inu ndinu thanthwe langa ndi linga langa
Psalms31:4 Ndimasuleni mu msampha umene anditchera pakuti ndinu pothawirapo panga.
Psalms31:5 Mʼmanja mwanu ndipereka mzimu wanga; womboleni Yehova Mulungu wachoonadi.
Psalms31:6 Koma ine ndimadana nawo amene amamamatira mafano achabechabe; ine ndimadalira Yehova.
Psalms31:7 Ndidzakondwa ndi kusangalala mʼchikondi chanu popeza Inu munaona masautso anga ndipo mumadziwa kuwawa kwa moyo wanga.
Psalms31:8 Inu simunandipereke kwa mdani koma mwayika mapazi anga pa malo otakasuka.
Psalms31:9 Mundichitire chifundo Inu Yehova pakuti ndili pa mavuto; maso anga akulefuka ndi chisoni
Psalms31:10 Moyo wanga ukunyeka chifukwa cha kuwawidwa mtima ndi zaka zanga chifukwa cha kubuwula; mphamvu zanga zatha chifuwa cha masautso
Psalms31:11 Chifukwa cha adani anga onse
Psalms31:12 Ine ndinayiwalika kwa iwo ngati kuti ndinamwalira; ndakhala ngati mʼphika wosweka.
Psalms31:13 Pakuti ine ndamva zonena zoyipa za anthu ambiri; zoopsa zandizungulira mbali zonse; iwo akukonza chiwembu kuti alimbane nane
Psalms31:14 Koma ndikudalira Inu Yehova; ndikunena kuti
Psalms31:15 Masiku anga ali mʼmanja mwanu; ndipulumutseni kwa adani anga ndi kwa iwo amene akundithamangitsa.
Psalms31:16 Walitsani nkhope yanu pa mtumiki wanu; pulumutseni mwa chikondi chanu chosatha.
Psalms31:17 Yehova musalole kuti ndichite manyazi
Psalms31:18 Milomo yawo yabodzayo ikhale chete
Psalms31:19 Ndi waukulu ubwino wanu umene mwawasungira amene amakuopani
Psalms31:20 Mu mthunzi wa pamalo popezeka panu muwabisa
Psalms31:21 Matamando akhale kwa Yehova
Psalms31:22 Ndili mʼnkhawa zanga ndinati
Psalms31:23 Kondani Yehova oyera mtima ake onse! Yehova amasunga wokhulupirika koma amalanga kwathunthu anthu odzikuza.
Psalms31:24 Khalani ndi nyonga ndipo limbani mtima
Psalms32:1 Salimo la Davide. Malangizo. Ngodala munthu amene zolakwa zake zakhululukidwa; amene machimo ake aphimbidwa.
Psalms32:2 Ngodala munthu amene machimo ake Yehova sawawerengeranso pa iye ndipo mu mzimu mwake mulibe chinyengo.
Psalms32:3 Pamene ndinali chete
Psalms32:4 Pakuti usana ndi usiku dzanja lanu linandipsinja; mphamvu zanga zinatha monga nthawi yotentha yachilimwe. Sela
Psalms32:5 Kotero ine ndinavomereza tchimo langa kwa Inu
Psalms32:6 Choncho aliyense okhulupirika apemphere kwa Inuyo pomwe mukupezeka; ndithu pamene madzi amphamvu auka
Psalms32:7 Inu ndi malo anga obisala; muzinditeteza ku mavuto ndipo muzindizinga ndi nyimbo zachipulumutso. Sela
Psalms32:8 Ndidzakulangiza ndi kukuphunzitsa njira imene udzayendamo; ndidzakupatsa uphungu ndi kukuyangʼanira.
Psalms32:9 Usakhale ngati kavalo kapena bulu
Psalms32:10 Zowawa ndi zambiri za anthu oyipa koma chikondi chosatha cha Yehova chimamuzinga munthu amene amadalira Iye.

Psalms33:1 Imbirani Yehova mokondwera Inu olungama
Psalms33:2 Mutamandeni Yehova ndi pangwe; muyimbireni Iye nyimbo pa zeze wa zingwe khumi.
Psalms33:3 Muyimbireni nyimbo yatsopano; imbani mwaluso
Psalms33:4 Pakuti mawu a Yehova ndi olungama ndi owona; Iye ndi wokhulupirika pa zonse zimene amachita.
Psalms33:5 Yehova amakonda chilungamo ndipo amaweruza molungama; dziko lapansi ladzaza ndi chikondi chake chosatha.
Psalms33:6 Ndi mawu a Yehova mayiko akumwamba anapangidwa
Psalms33:7 Iye amasonkhanitsa pamodzi madzi a mʼnyanja mʼmitsuko; amayika zozama mʼnyumba zosungiramo.
Psalms33:8 Dziko lonse lapansi liope Yehova; anthu onse amulemekeze Iye.
Psalms33:9 Pakuti Iye anayankhula ndipo zinakhalapo; Iye analamulira ndipo zinakhazikika.
Psalms33:10 Yehova amalepheretsa chikonzero cha anthu a mitundu ina; Iye amaphwanya zolinga za anthu ambiri.
Psalms33:11 Koma chikonzero cha Yehova chimakhala mpaka muyaya
Psalms33:12 Wodala mtundu wa anthu umene Mulungu wake ndi Yehova
Psalms33:13 Kuchokera kumwamba Yehova amayangʼana pansi ndi kuona anthu onse;
Psalms33:14 kuchokera ku malo ake okhalako Iye amayangʼanira onse amene amakhala pa dziko lapansi.
Psalms33:15 Iye amene amapanga mitima ya onse
Psalms33:16 Palibe mfumu imene imapulumutsidwa chifukwa cha kukula kwa gulu lake lankhondo; palibe msilikali amene amathawa ndi mphamvu zake zazikulu.
Psalms33:17 Kavalo ndi chiyembekezo cha chabechabe cha chipulumutso
Psalms33:18 Koma maso a Yehova ali pa iwo amene amaopa Iye; amene chiyembekezo chawo chili mʼchikondi chake chosatha
Psalms33:19 kuwawombola iwo ku imfa ndi kuwasunga ndi moyo nthawi ya njala.
Psalms33:20 Ife timadikira kwa Yehova mwachiyembekezo; Iye ndiye thandizo lathu ndi chishango chathu.
Psalms33:21 Mwa Iye mitima yathu imakondwera
Psalms33:22 Chikondi chanu chosatha chikhale pa ife Inu Yehova
Psalms34:1 Salimo la Davide. Pamene iye ananyengezera misala pamaso pa Abimeleki
Psalms34:2 Moyo wanga udzanyadira Yehova; anthu osautsidwa amve ndi kukondwera.
Psalms34:3 Lemekezani Yehova pamodzi ndi ine; tiyeni pamodzi tikuze dzina lake.
Psalms34:4 Ine ndinafunafuna Yehova ndipo Iye anandiyankha; anandilanditsa ku mantha anga onse.
Psalms34:5 Iwo amene amayangʼana kwa Iye
Psalms34:6 Munthu wosauka uno anayitana
Psalms34:7 Mngelo wa Yehova amatchinjiriza amene amakonda Iye ndi kuwalanditsa.
Psalms34:8 Lawani ndipo onani kuti Yehova ndi wabwino; wodala munthu amene amathawira kwa Iye.
Psalms34:9 Wopani Yehova inu oyera mtima ake
Psalms34:10 Mikango itha kulefuka ndi kumva njala koma iwo amene amafunafuna Yehova sasowa kanthu kalikonse kabwino.
Psalms34:11 Bwerani ana anga
Psalms34:12 Aliyense wa inu amene amakonda moyo wake ndi kukhumba kuti aone masiku abwino ambiri
Psalms34:13 asunge lilime lake ku zoyipa ndi milomo yake kuti isayankhule zonama.
Psalms34:14 Tembenuka kuchoka ku zoyipa ndipo chita zabwino; funafuna mtendere ndi kuwulondola.
Psalms34:15 Maso a Yehova ali pa olungama ndipo makutu ake ali tcheru kumva kulira kwawo;
Psalms34:16 nkhope ya Yehova ikutsutsana ndi amene amachita zoyipa
Psalms34:17 Olungama amafuwula
Psalms34:18 Yehova ali pafupi kwa osweka mtima ndipo amapulumutsa iwo amene asweka mu mzimu.
Psalms34:19 Munthu wolungama atha kukhala ndi mavuto ambiri
Psalms34:20 Iye amateteza mafupa ake onse
Psalms34:21 Choyipa chidzapha anthu oyipa; adani a olungama adzapezeka olakwa.
Psalms34:22 Yehova amawombola atumiki ake; aliyense amene amathawira kwa Iye sadzapezeka wolakwa.
Psalms35:1 Salimo la Davide. Inu Yehova
Psalms35:2 Tengani chishango ndi lihawo; dzukani ndipo bwerani mundithandize.
Psalms35:3 Tengani mkondo ndi nthungo
Psalms35:4 Iwo amene akufunafuna moyo wanga anyozedwe ndi kuchita manyazi; iwo amene akukonza kuti moyo wanga uwonongeke abwerere mʼmbuyo mochititsa mantha.
Psalms35:5 Akhale ngati mankhusu owuluka ndi mphepo pamene mngelo wa Yehova akuwapirikitsa.
Psalms35:6 Njira yawo ikhale ya mdima ndi yoterera pamene mngelo wa Yehova akuwathamangitsa.
Psalms35:7 Popeza ananditchera ukonde popanda chifukwa ndipo popanda chifukwa andikumbira dzenje
Psalms35:8 chiwonongeko chiwapeza modzidzimutsa ukonde umene iwo abisa uwakole
Psalms35:9 Pamenepo moyo wanga udzakondwera mwa Yehova ndi kusangalala ndi chipulumutso chake.
Psalms35:10 Thupi langa lidzafuwula mokondwera
Psalms35:11 Mboni zopanda chisoni zinayimirira
Psalms35:12 Iwo anandibwezera zoyipa pa zabwino ndipo anasiya moyo wanga pa chisoni.
Psalms35:13 Koma pamene iwo ankadwala
Psalms35:14 ndinayendayenda ndi kulira maliro
Psalms35:15 Koma pamene ndinaphunthwa
Psalms35:16 Monga anthu osapembedza
Psalms35:17 Ambuye
Psalms35:18 Ndidzakuyamikani mu msonkhano waukulu; pakati pa gulu lalikulu la anthu ndidzakutamandani.
Psalms35:19 Musalole adani anga onyenga akondwere chifukwa cha masautso anga; musalole kuti amene amadana nane popanda chifukwa andiyangʼane chamʼmbali mondinyoza.
Psalms35:20 Iwowo sayankhula mwamtendere
Psalms35:21 Iwo amandiseka mofuwula ndipo amati
Psalms35:22 Yehova mwaona zimenezi; musakhale chete. Ambuye musakhale kutali ndi ine.
Psalms35:23 Dzukani
Psalms35:24 Onetsani kusalakwa kwanga mwa chilungamo chanu
Psalms35:25 Musalole kuti aganize kuti
Psalms35:26 Onse amene amakondwera ndi masautso anga achite manyazi ndi kusokonezeka. Onse amene amadzikweza kufuna kundipambana
Psalms35:27 Koma amene amakondwera chifukwa chakuti ndine wosalakwa
Psalms35:28 Pakamwa panga padzayankhula za chilungamo chanu ndi za matamando anu tsiku lonse.
Psalms36:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide
Psalms36:2 Pakuti iye mʼkuona kwake amadzinyenga yekha kwambiri
Psalms36:3 Mawu a pakamwa pake ndi oyipa ndi achinyengo; iyeyo waleka kukhala wanzeru ndi kuchita zabwino.
Psalms36:4 Ngakhale ali pa bedi pake amakonzekera zoyipa; iye amadzipereka yekha ku njira ya uchimo ndipo sakana cholakwa chilichonse.
Psalms36:5 Chikondi chanu Yehova
Psalms36:6 Chilungamo chanu Mulungu chili ngati mapiri aakulu
Psalms36:7 Chikondi chanu chosatha ndi chamtengowapatali! Otchuka pamodzi ndi anthu wamba pakati pa anthu amapeza pothawirapo mu mthunzi wa mapiko anu.
Psalms36:8 Iwo amadyerera zinthu zambiri za mʼnyumba yanu; Inu mumawapatsa chakumwa kuchokera mu mtsinje wanu wachikondwerero.
Psalms36:9 Pakuti kwa Inu kuli kasupe wamoyo; mʼkuwala kwanu ifenso timaona kuwala.
Psalms36:10 Pitirizani chikondi chanu pa iwo amene amakudziwani
Psalms36:11 Musalole kuti phazi la wodzikuza libwere kulimbana nane
Psalms36:12 Onani momwe ochita zoyipa agonera atagwa
Psalms37:1 Salimo la Davide. Usamavutike chifukwa cha anthu oyipa kapena kuchitira nsanje amene akuchita cholakwa;
Psalms37:2 pakuti monga udzu iwo adzafota msanga
Psalms37:3 Khulupirira Yehova ndipo uzichita zabwino; khazikika mʼdziko ndi kutsata zokhulupirika.
Psalms37:4 Udzikondweretse wekha mwa Yehova ndipo Iye adzakupatsa zokhumba za mtima wako.
Psalms37:5 Pereka njira yako kwa Yehova; dalira Iye ndipo Iyeyo adzachita izi:
Psalms37:6 Iye adzachititsa chilungamo chako kuwala ngati mʼbandakucha
Psalms37:7 Khala chete pamaso pa Yehova ndipo umudikire mofatsa; usavutike pamene anthu apambana mʼnjira zawo
Psalms37:8 Pewa kupsa mtima ndipo tembenuka kuchoka ku ukali
Psalms37:9 Pakuti anthu oyipa adzachotsedwa
Psalms37:10 Kwa kanthawi oyipa sadzapezekanso; ngakhale muwafunefune
Psalms37:11 Koma ofatsa adzalandira dziko ndipo adzasangalala ndi mtendere waukulu.
Psalms37:12 Oyipa amakonza chiwembu kutsutsana ndi olungama ndipo amawakukutira mano;
Psalms37:13 koma Ambuye amaseka oyipa pakuti Iye amadziwa kuti tsiku lawo likubwera.
Psalms37:14 Oyipa amasolola lupanga ndi kupinda uta kugwetsa osauka ndi osowa
Psalms37:15 Koma malupanga awo analasa mitima yawo yomwe
Psalms37:16 Zabwino zochepa zimene olungama ali nazo ziposa chuma cha anthu oyipa ambiri;
Psalms37:17 pakuti mphamvu ya oyipa idzasweka
Psalms37:18 Masiku a anthu osalakwa amadziwika ndi Yehova
Psalms37:19 Pa nthawi ya mavuto iwo sadzafota; mʼmasiku a njala adzakhala ndi zinthu zambiri.
Psalms37:20 Koma oyipa adzawonongeka; adani a Yehova adzakhala ngati kukongola kwa kuthengo
Psalms37:21 Oyipa amabwereka ndipo sabweza koma olungama amapereka mowolowamanja.
Psalms37:22 Iwo amene Yehova amawadalitsa adzalandira dziko
Psalms37:23 Ngati Yehova akondwera ndi njira ya munthu
Psalms37:24 ngakhale atapunthwa sadzagwa
Psalms37:25 Ine ndinali wamngʼono ndipo tsopano ndakalamba koma sindinaonepo olungama akusiyidwa kapena ana awo akupempha chakudya.
Psalms37:26 Iwo ndi owolowamanja nthawi zonse ndipo amabwereketsa mwaufulu; ana awo adzadalitsika.
Psalms37:27 Tembenuka kuchoka ku zoyipa ndipo chita zabwino; pamenepo udzakhazikika mʼdziko kwamuyaya.
Psalms37:28 Pakuti Yehova amakonda wolungama ndipo sadzasiya okhulupirika ake. Iwo adzatetezedwa kwamuyaya
Psalms37:29 olungama adzalandira dziko ndipo adzakhazikikamo kwamuyaya.
Psalms37:30 Pakamwa pa munthu wolungama pamayankhula za nzeru
Psalms37:31 Lamulo la Mulungu wake lili mu mtima mwake; mapazi ake saterereka.
Psalms37:32 Oyipa amabisala kudikira olungama; kufunafuna miyoyo yawoyo;
Psalms37:33 koma Yehova sadzawasiya pansi pa mphamvu yawo kapena kuti atsutsidwe pamene abweretsedwa pa milandu.
Psalms37:34 Khulupirira Yehova
Psalms37:35 Ine ndinaona munthu woyipa ndi munthu wopanda chifundo akupeza bwino ngati mtengo wobiriwira pa nthaka ya makolo ake.
Psalms37:36 Koma sanachedwe kumwalira ndipo sanaonekenso; ngakhale ndinamuyangʼanayangʼana
Psalms37:37 Ganizira za munthu wosalakwa
Psalms37:38 Koma anthu ochimwa adzawonongeka; iwowo pamodzi ndi zidzukulu zawo zomwe.
Psalms37:39 Chipulumutso cha olungama chimachokera kwa Yehova; Iye ndiye linga lawo pa nthawi ya masautso.
Psalms37:40 Yehova amawathandiza ndi kuwalanditsa; Iye amawalanditsa kwa oyipa ndi kuwapulumutsa
Psalms38:1 Salimo la Davide. Kupempha. Yehova musandidzudzule mutapsa mtima kapena kundilanga muli ndi ukali.
Psalms38:2 Pakuti mivi yanu yandilasa
Psalms38:3 Chifukwa cha ukali wanu mulibe thanzi mʼthupi langa; mafupa anga alibe mphamvu chifukwa cha tchimo langa.
Psalms38:4 Kulakwa kwanga kwandipsinja ngati katundu wolemera kwambiri kuposa mphamvu zanga.
Psalms38:5 Mabala anga akuwola ndipo akununkha chifukwa cha uchitsiru wa moyo wanga wauchimo.
Psalms38:6 Ine ndapindika msana ndipo ndawerama kwambiri; tsiku lonse ndimangolira.
Psalms38:7 Msana wanga wagwidwa ndi ululu wosasimbika
Psalms38:8 Ndilibe mphamvu ndipo ndakunthidwa kwathunthu; ndikubuwula ndi ululu wa mumtima.
Psalms38:9 Zokhumba zanga zonse zili poonekera pamaso panu Ambuye
Psalms38:10 Mtima wanga ukugunda
Psalms38:11 Abwenzi anga ndi anzanga akundipewa chifukwa cha mabala anga; anansi anga akhala kutali nane.
Psalms38:12 Iwo amene akufunafuna moyo wanga atchera misampha yawo
Psalms38:13 Ine ndili ngati munthu wosamva amene sangamve
Psalms38:14 Ndakhala ngati munthu amene samva
Psalms38:15 Ndikudikira Inu Yehova; mudzayankha
Psalms38:16 Pakuti Ine ndinati
Psalms38:17 Pakuti ndili pafupi kugwa
Psalms38:18 Ndikuvomereza mphulupulu zanga; ndipo ndavutika ndi tchimo langa.
Psalms38:19 Ambiri ndi adani anga amphamvu; amene amandida popanda chifukwa alipo ochuluka kwambiri.
Psalms38:20 Iwo amene amandibwezera zoyipa mʼmalo mwa zabwino amandinyoza pamene nditsatira zabwino.
Psalms38:21 Inu Yehova
Psalms38:22 Bwerani msanga kudzandithandiza
Psalms39:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Kwa Yedutuni. Salimo la Davide. Ndinati
Psalms39:2 Koma pamene ndinali chete osanena ngakhale kanthu kalikonse kabwino mavuto anga anachulukirabe.
Psalms39:3 Mtima wanga unatentha mʼkati mwanga
Psalms39:4 “Yehova ndionetseni mathero a moyo wanga ndi chiwerengero cha masiku anga; mundidziwitse kuti moyo wanga ndi wosakhalitsa motani.
Psalms39:5 Inu mwachititsa kuti masiku anga akhale ochepa kwambiri
Psalms39:6 Munthu ali ngati chithunzithunzi chake pamene akuyenda uku ndi uku: Iye amangovutika koma popanda phindu; amadzikundikira chuma
Psalms39:7 “Koma tsopano Ambuye kodi ndifunanso chiyani? Chiyembekezo changa chili mwa Inu.
Psalms39:8 Pulumutseni ku zolakwa zanga zonse; musandisandutse chonyozeka kwa opusa.
Psalms39:9 Ine ndinali chete; sindinatsekule pakamwa panga pakuti Inu ndinu amene mwachita zimenezi.
Psalms39:10 Chotsani mkwapulo wanu pa ine; ndagonjetsedwa ndi nkhonya ya dzanja lanu.
Psalms39:11 Inu mumadzudzula ndi kulanga anthu chifukwa cha tchimo lawo; mumawononga chuma chawo monga njenjete; munthu aliyense ali ngati mpweya. Sela
Psalms39:12 “Imvani pemphero langa Inu Yehova
Psalms39:13 Musandiyangʼane mwaukali
Psalms40:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Mofatsa ndinadikira Yehova Iye anatembenukira kwa ine ndipo anamva kulira kwanga.
Psalms40:2 Ananditulutsa mʼdzenje lachitayiko
Psalms40:3 Iye anayika nyimbo yatsopano mʼkamwa mwanga
Psalms40:4 Ndi wodala munthu amakhulupirira Yehova; amene sayembekezera kwa odzikuza
Psalms40:5 Zambiri
Psalms40:6 Nsembe ndi zopereka Inu simuzifuna
Psalms40:7 Kotero ndinati
Psalms40:8 Ndikufuna kuchita chifuniro chanu
Psalms40:9 Ndikulalikira uthenga wa chilungamo chanu mu msonkhano waukulu; sinditseka milomo yanga monga mukudziwa Inu Yehova.
Psalms40:10 Sindibisa chilungamo chanu mu mtima mwanga; ndinayankhula za kukhulupirika kwanu ndi chipulumutso chanu. Ine sindiphimba chikondi chanu ndi choonadi chanu pa msonkhano waukulu.
Psalms40:11 Musandichotsere chifundo chanu Yehova; chikondi chanu ndi choonadi chanu zinditeteze nthawi zonse.
Psalms40:12 Pakuti mavuto osawerengeka andizungulira; machimo anga andigonjetsa
Psalms40:13 Pulumutseni Yehova; Bwerani msanga Yehova kudzandithandiza.
Psalms40:14 Onse amene akufunafuna kuchotsa moyo wanga achititsidwe manyazi ndi kusokonezedwa; onse amene amakhumba chiwonongeko changa abwezedwe mwamanyazi.
Psalms40:15 Iwo amene amanena kwa ine kuti
Psalms40:16 Koma iwo amene amafunafuna Inu akondwere ndi kusangalala mwa Inu; iwo amene amakonda chipulumutso chanu nthawi zonse anene kuti
Psalms40:17 Komabe Ine ndine wosauka ndi wosowa; Ambuye andiganizire. Inu ndinu thandizo langa ndi wondiwombola wanga; Inu Mulungu wanga
Psalms41:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Wodala ndi munthu amene amaganizira anthu osauka; Yehova amamuwombola pa nthawi yamsautso.
Psalms41:2 Yehova adzamuteteza ndi kusunga moyo wake; Yehova adzamudalitsa iye mʼdziko ndipo sadzamupereka ku zofuna za adani ake.
Psalms41:3 Yehova adzamuthandiza pamene akudwala ndipo adzamuchiritsa pa bedi lake la matenda.
Psalms41:4 Ndinati
Psalms41:5 Adani anga mwankhwidzi amanena za ine kuti
Psalms41:6 Pamene wina abwera kudzandiona
Psalms41:7 Adani anga onse amanongʼonezana pamodzi kulimbana nane
Psalms41:8 “Matenda owopsa amugwira; sadzaukapo pamalo pamene wagona.”
Psalms41:9 Ngakhale bwenzi langa la pamtima amene ndinamudalira
Psalms41:10 Koma Yehova mundichititre chifundo
Psalms41:11 Ine ndikudziwa kuti mukukondwera nane
Psalms41:12 Mu ungwiro wanga Inu mumandisunga ndi kundiyimika pamaso panu kwamuyaya.
Psalms41:13 Atamandike Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli kuchokera muyaya mpaka muyaya. Ameni ndi Ameni.
Psalms42:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Ndakatulo ya ana a Kora. Monga mbawala ipuma wefuwefu kufunafuna mitsinje yamadzi
Psalms42:2 Moyo wanga uli ndi ludzu lofuna Mulungu
Psalms42:3 Misozi yanga yakhala chakudya changa usana ndi usiku
Psalms42:4 Zinthu izi ndimazikumbukira pamene ndikukhuthula moyo wanga: momwe ndinkapitira ndi gulu lalikulu
Psalms42:5 Nʼchifukwa chiyani uli ndi chisoni
Psalms42:6 	Mulungu wanga. Moyo wanga uli ndi chisoni mʼkati mwanga kotero ndidzakumbukira Inu kuchokera ku dziko la Yorodani
Psalms42:7 Madzi akuya akuyitana madzi akuya mu mkokomo wa mathithi anu; mafunde anu onse obwera mwamphamvu andimiza.
Psalms42:8 Koma usana Yehova amalamulira chikondi chake
Psalms42:9 Ine ndikuti kwa Mulungu Thanthwe langa
Psalms42:10 Mafupa anga ali ndi ululu wakufa nawo pamene adani anga akundinyoza
Psalms42:11 Bwanji ukumva chisoni
Psalms43:1 Onetsani kusalakwa kwanga Inu Mulungu; ndipo mundinenere mlandu wanga kutsutsana ndi mtundu wosapembedza; mundilanditse mʼmanja mwa achinyengo ndi anthu oyipa.
Psalms43:2 Pajatu Inu Mulungu ndinu mphamvu zanga. Nʼchifukwa chiyani mwandikana ine? Nʼchifukwa chiyani ndiyenera kuyenda ndikulira
Psalms43:3 Tumizani kuwunika kwanu ndi choonadi chanu kuti zinditsogolere; mulole kuti zindifikitse ku phiri lanu loyera
Psalms43:4 Ndipo ndidzapita ku guwa lansembe la Mulungu
Psalms43:5 Nʼchifukwa chiyani uli ndi chisoni iwe moyo wanga? Nʼchifukwa chiyani wakhumudwa iwe mʼkati mwanga? Khulupirira Mulungu
Psalms44:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Ndakatulo ya ana a Kora. Ife tamva ndi makutu athu
Psalms44:2 Ndi dzanja lanu munathamangitsa mitundu ya anthu ena ndi kudzala makolo athu; Inu munakantha mitundu ya anthu
Psalms44:3 Sanalande dziko ndi lupanga lawo
Psalms44:4 Inu ndinu Mfumu yanga ndi Mulungu wanga amene mumalamulira chigonjetso cha Yakobo.
Psalms44:5 Kudzera kwa inu ife timabweza adani athu; kudzera mʼdzina lanu timapondereza otiwukirawo.
Psalms44:6 Sindidalira uta wanga
Psalms44:7 koma Inu mumatigonjetsera adani athu
Psalms44:8 Timanyadira mwa Mulungu wathu tsiku lonse
Psalms44:9 Koma tsopano mwatikana ndi kutichepetsa; Inu simupitanso ndi ankhondo athu.
Psalms44:10 Munachititsa ife kubwerera mʼmbuyo pamaso pa mdani ndipo amene amadana nafe atilanda katundu.
Psalms44:11 Inu munatipereka kuti tiwonongedwe monga nkhosa ndipo mwatibalalitsa pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina.
Psalms44:12 Inu munagulitsa anthu anu pa mtengo wotsika
Psalms44:13 Mwachititsa kuti tikhale chochititsa manyazi kwa anthu a mitundu ina
Psalms44:14 Mwachititsa kuti tikhale onyozeka pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina; anthu amapukusa mitu yawo akationa.
Psalms44:15 Manyazi anga ali pamaso panga tsiku lonse ndipo nkhope yanga yaphimbidwa ndi manyazi
Psalms44:16 chifukwa cha mawu otonza a iwo amene amandinyoza ndi kundichita chipongwe
Psalms44:17 Zonsezi zinatichitikira ngakhale kuti ifeyo sitinayiwale Inu kapena kuonetsa kusakhulupirika pa pangano lanu.
Psalms44:18 Mitima yathu sinabwerere mʼmbuyo; mapazi athu sanatayike pa njira yanu.
Psalms44:19 Koma Inu mwatiphwanya ndi kuchititsa kuti tikhale ozunzidwa ndi ankhandwe ndipo mwatiphimba ndi mdima waukulu.
Psalms44:20 Tikanayiwala dzina la Mulungu wathu kapena kutambasulira manja athu kwa mulungu wachilendo
Psalms44:21 kodi Mulungu wathu sakanazidziwa zimenezi
Psalms44:22 Komabe chifukwa cha Inu timakumana ndi imfa tsiku lonse
Psalms44:23 Dzukani Ambuye! Nʼchifukwa chiyani mukugona! Dziwutseni nokha! Musatikane kwamuyaya.
Psalms44:24 Nʼchifukwa chiyani mukubisa nkhope yanu
Psalms44:25 Tatsitsidwa pansi mpaka pa fumbi; matupi athu amatirira pa dothi.
Psalms44:26 Imirirani ndi kutithandiza
Psalms45:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wamayimbidwe. Monga mwa mayimbidwe a “Maluwa a Kakombo.” Salimo la ana a Kora. Nyimbo ya pa ukwati. Mtima wanga watakasika ndi nkhani yokoma pamene ndikulakatula mawu anga kwa mfumu; lilime langa ndi cholembera cha wolemba waluso.
Psalms45:2 Inu ndinu abwino kwambiri kuposa anthu onse ndipo milomo yanu inadzozedwa ndi chikondi cha Mulungu chosasinthika
Psalms45:3 Mangirirani lupanga lanu mʼchiwuno mwanu
Psalms45:4 Mu ukulu wanu mupite mutakwera mwachigonjetso mʼmalo mwa choonadi
Psalms45:5 Mivi yanu yakuthwa ilase mitima ya adani a mfumu
Psalms45:6 Mpando wanu waufumu
Psalms45:7 Inu mumakonda chilungamo ndi kudana ndi zoyipa; choncho Mulungu
Psalms45:8 Mikanjo yanu yonse ndi yonunkhira ndi mure ndi aloe ndi kasiya; kuchokera ku nyumba zaufumu zokongoletsedwa ndi mnyanga wanjovu nyimbo za zoyimbira zazingwe zimakusangalatsani.
Psalms45:9 Ana aakazi a mafumu ali pakati pa akazi anu olemekezeka; ku dzanja lanu lamanja kuli mkwatibwi waufumu ali mu golide wa ku Ofiri.
Psalms45:10 Tamvera
Psalms45:11 Mfumu yathedwa nzeru chifukwa cha kukongola kwako; mulemekeze pakuti iyeyo ndiye mbuye wako.
Psalms45:12 Mwana wa mkazi wa ku Turo adzabwera ndi mphatso
Psalms45:13 Wokongola kwambiri ndi mwana wa mfumu ali mʼchipinda mwake
Psalms45:14 Atavala zovala zamaluwamaluwa akupita naye kwa mfumu; anamwali okhala naye akumutsatira ndipo abweretsedwa kwa inu.
Psalms45:15 Iwo akuwaperekeza ndi chimwemwe ndi chisangalalo; akulowa mʼnyumba yaufumu.
Psalms45:16 Ana ako aamuna adzatenga malo a makolo ako; udzachititsa kuti akhale ana a mfumu mʼdziko lonse.
Psalms45:17 Ndidzabukitsa mbiri yako mʼmibado yonse; choncho mitundu yonse idzakutamanda ku nthawi za nthawi.
Psalms46:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Ndakatulo ya ana a Kora. Nyimbo ya anamwali. Mulungu ndiye kothawira kwathu ndi mphamvu yathu
Psalms46:2 Nʼchifukwa chake sitidzaopa ngakhale dziko lapansi lisunthike
Psalms46:3 ngakhale madzi ake atakokoma ndi kuchita thovu
Psalms46:4 Kuli mtsinje umene njira zake za madzi zimasangalatsa mzinda wa Mulungu
Psalms46:5 Mulungu ali mʼkati mwake
Psalms46:6 Mitundu ikupokosera
Psalms46:7 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse ali ndi ife
Psalms46:8 Bwerani kuti mudzaone ntchito za Yehova
Psalms46:9 Iye amathetsa nkhondo ku malekezero a dziko lapansi; Iye amathyola uta ndi kupindapinda mkondo; amatentha zishango ndi moto.

Psalms47:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la ana a Kora. Ombani mʼmanja
Psalms47:2 Ndi woopsadi Yehova Wammwambamwamba; Mfumu yayikulu ya dziko lonse lapansi!
Psalms47:3 Iye anatigonjetsera mitundu yambirimbiri ya anthu; anayika anthu pansi pa mapazi athu.
Psalms47:4 Iye anatisankhira cholowa chathu
Psalms47:5 Mulungu wakwera
Psalms47:6 Imbani matamando kwa Mulungu
Psalms47:7 Pakuti Mulungu ndi mfumu ya dziko lonse lapansi; imbirani Iye salimo la matamando.
Psalms47:8 Mulungu akulamulira mitundu ya anthu; Mulungu wakhala pa mpando wake waufumu woyera.
Psalms47:9 Anthu otchuka mwa anthu a mitundu ina asonkhana monga anthu a Mulungu wa Abrahamu

Psalms48:2 Lokongola mu utali mwake
Psalms48:3 Mulungu ali mu malinga ake; Iye wadzionetsa yekha kuti ndiye malinga akewo.
Psalms48:4 Pamene mafumu anasonkhana pamodzi
Psalms48:5 iwo anaona mzindawo ndipo anadabwa kwambiri; anathawa ndi mantha aakulu.
Psalms48:6 Pomwepo anagwidwa nako kunjenjemera
Psalms48:7 Inu munawawononga monga sitima zapamadzi za ku Tarisisi zitawonongeka ndi mphepo ya kummawa.

Psalms48:14 Pakuti Mulungu uyu ndi Mulungu wathu ku nthawi zosatha; Iye adzakhala mtsogoleri wathu mpaka ku mapeto.
Psalms49:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la ana a Kora. Imvani izi anthu a mitundu yonse; mvetserani
Psalms49:2 anthu wamba pamodzi ndi anthu odziwika
Psalms49:3 Pakamwa panga padzayankhula mawu anzeru; mawu ochokera mu mtima mwanga adzapereka nzeru.
Psalms49:4 Ndidzatchera khutu langa ku mwambo
Psalms49:5 Ine ndichitirenji mantha pamene masiku oyipa afika
Psalms49:6 Iwo amene adalira kulemera kwawo ndi kutamandira kuchuluka kwa chuma chawo?
Psalms49:7 Palibe munthu amene angawombole moyo wa mnzake kapena kuperekera mnzake dipo kwa Mulungu.
Psalms49:8 Dipo la moyo ndi la mtengowapatali
Psalms49:9 kuti iye akhale ndi moyo mpaka muyaya ndi kusapita ku manda.
Psalms49:10 Pakuti onse amaona kuti anthu anzeru amamwalira; opusa ndi opanda nzeru chimodzimodzinso amawonongeka ndipo amasiyira chuma chawo anthu ena.
Psalms49:11 Manda awo adzakhala nyumba zawo mpaka muyaya
Psalms49:12 Ngakhale munthu akhale wachuma chotani
Psalms49:13 Izi ndi zimene zimachitikira iwo amene amadzidalira okha
Psalms49:14 Monga nkhosa iwo ayenera kupita ku manda
Psalms49:15 Koma Mulungu adzawombola moyo wanga kuchoka ku manda; ndithu Iye adzanditengera kwa Iye mwini.
Psalms49:16 Usavutike mu mtima pamene munthu akulemera
Psalms49:17 Pakuti sadzatenga kanthu pamodzi naye pamene wamwalira
Psalms49:18 Ngakhale pamene munthuyo ali moyo amadziyesa wodala
Psalms49:19 iyeyo adzakakhala pamodzi ndi mʼbado wa makolo ake
Psalms49:20 Munthu amene ali ndi chuma koma wopanda nzeru adzafa ngati nyama yakuthengo.
Psalms50:1 Salimo la Asafu. Wamphamvuyo
Psalms50:2 Kuchokera ku Ziyoni
Psalms50:3 Mulungu wathu akubwera ndipo sadzakhala chete; moto ukunyeketsa patsogolo pake
Psalms50:4 Iye akuyitanitsa zamumlengalenga ndi za pa dziko lapansi kuti aweruze anthu ake.
Psalms50:5 Mundisonkhanitsire okhulupirika anga
Psalms50:6 Ndipo mayiko akumwamba akulengeza chilungamo chake
Psalms50:7 Imvani inu anthu anga
Psalms50:8 Sindikudzudzula chifukwa cha nsembe zako
Psalms50:9 Ine sindikufuna ngʼombe yayimuna kuchokera mʼkhola lako kapena mbuzi za mʼkhola lako
Psalms50:10 pakuti nyama iliyonse yakunkhalango ndi yanga ndiponso ngʼombe za ku mapiri ochuluka.
Psalms50:11 Ine ndimadziwa mbalame iliyonse mʼmapiri ndiponso zolengedwa zonse zakutchire ndi zanga.
Psalms50:12 Ndikanakhala ndi njala sindikanakuwuzani
Psalms50:13 Kodi ndimadya nyama ya ngʼombe zazimuna kapena kumwa magazi a mbuzi?

Psalms50:16 Koma kwa woyipa

Psalms50:18 Ukaona wakuba umamutsatira
Psalms50:19 Umagwiritsa ntchito pakamwa pako pa zinthu zoyipa ndipo umakonza lilime lako kuchita chinyengo.
Psalms50:20 Nthawi zonse umayankhula motsutsana ndi mʼbale wako ndipo umasinjirira mwana wa amayi ako enieni.
Psalms50:21 Wachita zimenezi ndipo Ine ndinali chete; umaganiza kuti ndine wofanana nawe koma ndidzakudzudzula ndipo ndidzakutsutsa pamaso pako.
Psalms50:22 “Ganizira izi
Psalms50:23 Iye amene amapereka nsembe yamayamiko amandilemekeza

Psalms51:3 Pakuti ndikudziwa mphulupulu zanga
Psalms51:4 Motsutsana ndi Inu
Psalms51:5 Zoonadi ine ndinali wochimwa pomwe ndimabadwa
Psalms51:6 Zoonadi inu mumafuna choonadi mu ziwalo zamʼkati mwanga; mumandiphunzitsa nzeru mʼkati mwanga mwenimweni.
Psalms51:7 Mundiyeretse ndi hisope ndipo ndidzayera
Psalms51:8 Mundilole ndimve chimwemwe ndi chisangalalo
Psalms51:9 Mufulatire machimo anga ndi kufafaniza zolakwa zanga zonse.
Psalms51:10 Mulenge mʼkati mwanga mtima woyera Inu Mulungu ndi kukonzanso mzimu wokhazikika mwa ine.

Psalms51:13 Pamenepo ndidzaphunzitsa anthu amphulupulu njira zanu kuti ochimwa adzabwerere kwa inu.

Psalms51:15 Inu Ambuye tsekulani milomo yanga
Psalms51:16 Inu simusangalatsidwa ndi nsembe wamba. Ndikanapereka nsembe yopsereza

Psalms52:4 Umakonda mawu onse opweteka
