Psalms61:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Loyimbidwa ndi zipangizo za zingwe. Imvani kulira kwanga
Psalms61:2 Kuchokera ku malekezero a dziko lapansi ine ndimayitana Inu ndimayitana pomwe mtima wanga ukufowoka; tsogolereni ku thanthwe lalitali kuposa ineyo.
Psalms61:3 Pakuti Inu mwakhala pothawirapo panga
Psalms61:4 Ine ndikulakalaka kukhala mʼtenti yanu kwamuyaya ndi kupeza chitetezo mu mthunzi wa mapiko anu.
Psalms61:5 Pakuti Inu Mulungu mwamva malumbiro anga; mwandipatsa cholowa cha iwo amene amaopa dzina lanu.
Psalms61:6 Wonjezerani masiku a moyo wa mfumu
Psalms61:7 Iye akhale pa mpando waufumu pamaso pa Mulungu kwamuyaya; ikani chikondi chanu ndi kukhulupirika kwanu kuti zimuteteze.
Psalms61:8 Kotero ndidzayimba matamando kwamuyaya pa dzina lanu ndi kukwaniritsa malumbiro anga tsiku ndi tsiku.
Psalms62:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Kutsata mayimbidwe a Yedutuni. Salimo la Davide. Moyo wanga umapeza mpumulo mwa Mulungu yekha; chipulumutso changa chimachokera kwa Iye.
Psalms62:2 Iye yekhayo ndiye thanthwe langa ndi chipulumutso changa; Iye ndi linga langa
Psalms62:3 Kodi nonsenu mudzalimbana naye munthu mpaka liti? Kodi mudzamugwetsa pansi ngati khoma losalimba
Psalms62:4 Iwo akufunitsitsa kumugwetsa kuti achoke pa malo ake apamwamba. Iwo amakondweretsedwa ndi mabodza. Ndi pakamwa pawo amadalitsa koma mʼmitima yawo amatemberera.
Psalms62:5 Peza mpumulo mwa Mulungu yekhayo iwe moyo wanga; chiyembekezo changa chichokera mwa Iye.
Psalms62:6 Iye yekhayo ndiye thanthwe langa ndi chipulumutso changa; Iyeyo ndi linga langa; sindidzagwedezeka.
Psalms62:7 Chipulumutso changa ndi ulemu wanga zimachokera kwa Mulungu: Iye ndiye thanthwe langa lamphamvu; Mulungu ndiye pothawira panga.
Psalms62:8 Dalirani Iye nthawi zonse
Psalms62:9 Anthu wamba ndi mpweya chabe; anthu apamwamba ndi bodza chabe; ngati atayezedwa pa sikelo iwo ndi chabe; iwowo pamodzi ndi mpweya ndi chabe
Psalms62:10 Musadalire kulanda mwachinyengo kapena katundu wobedwa; ngakhale chuma chanu chichuluke
Psalms62:11 Mulungu wayankhula kamodzi
Psalms62:12 komanso Inu Ambuye
Psalms63:1 Salimo la Davide. Pamene anali mʼchipululu cha Yuda. Inu Mulungu
Psalms63:2 Inu ndinakuonani ku malo anu opatulika ndipo ndinapenya mphamvu zanu ndi ulemerero wanu.
Psalms63:3 Chifukwa chikondi chanu ndi choposa moyo
Psalms63:4 Ndidzakutamandani masiku onse a moyo wanga
Psalms63:5 Mudzakhutitsa moyo wanga ndi zonona. Ine ndidzakutamandani ndi mawu anthetemya.
Psalms63:6 Pa bedi panga ndimakumbukira inu; ndimaganiza za Inu nthawi yonse ya usiku.
Psalms63:7 Chifukwa ndinu thandizo langa
Psalms63:8 Moyo wanga umakangamira Inu; dzanja lanu lamanja limandigwiriziza.
Psalms63:9 Iwo amene akufunafuna moyo wanga adzawonongedwa; adzatsikira kunsi kozama kwa dziko lapansi.
Psalms63:10 Iwo adzaperekedwa ku lupanga ndi kukhala chakudya cha ankhandwe.
Psalms63:11 Koma mfumu idzakondwera mwa Mulungu; onse amene amalumbira mʼdzina la Mulungu adzalemekeza Mulunguyo
Psalms64:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Ndimvereni Mulungu pomwe ndikunena madandawulo anga; tetezani moyo wanga ku chiopsezo cha mdani.
Psalms64:2 Ndibiseni ku chiwembu cha anthu oyipa
Psalms64:3 Iwo amanola malilime awo ngati malupanga
Psalms64:4 Iwo amaponya mivi yawo ali pa malo wobisala kwa munthu wosalakwa; amamulasa modzidzimutsa ndi mopanda mantha.
Psalms64:5 Iwo amalimbikitsana wina ndi mnzake pa chikonzero chawo choyipa
Psalms64:6 Iwo amakonzekera zosalungama ndipo amati
Psalms64:7 Koma Mulungu adzawalasa ndi mivi; mwadzidzidzi adzakanthidwa.
Psalms64:8 Iye adzatembenuza milomo yawoyo kuwatsutsa ndi kuwasandutsa bwinja; onse amene adzawaona adzagwedeza mitu yawo mowanyoza.
Psalms64:9 Anthu onse adzachita mantha; adzalengeza ntchito za Mulungu ndi kulingalira mozama zomwe Iye wazichita.
Psalms64:10 Lolani wolungama akondwere mwa Yehova ndi kubisala mwa Iye
Psalms65:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Nyimbo. Matamando akudikira Inu Mulungu mu Ziyoni; kwa inu malumbiro athu adzakwaniritsidwa.
Psalms65:2 Inu amene mumamva pemphero
Psalms65:3 Pamene tinathedwa nzeru ndi machimo
Psalms65:4 Odala iwo amene inu muwasankha ndi kuwabweretsa pafupi kukhala mʼmabwalo anu! Ife tadzazidwa ndi zinthu zabwino za mʼNyumba mwanu
Psalms65:5 Mumatiyankha ife ndi ntchito zodabwitsa zachilungamo
Psalms65:6 amene munapanga mapiri ndi mphamvu zanu
Psalms65:7 Amene munakhalitsa bata nyanja kukokoma kwa mafunde ake
Psalms65:8 Iwo amene akukhala kutali amaopa zizindikiro zozizwitsa zanu; kumene dzuwa limatulukira ndi kumene dzuwa limalowera. Inu mumafuna nyimbo zachimwemwe.
Psalms65:9 Inu mumasamalira dziko lapansi ndi kulithirira; Inuyo mumalilemeretsa kwambiri. Mtsinje wa Mulungu ndi wodzaza ndi madzi kuti upereke tirigu kwa anthu
Psalms65:10 Mwadzaza nthaka yake ndi madzi ndi kusalaza migula yake
Psalms65:11 Inu mumaveka chaka ndi zinthu zochuluka
Psalms65:12 Malo a udzu a mʼchipululu amasefukira; mapiri avekedwa ndi chisangalalo.
Psalms65:13 Madambo akutidwa ndi zoweta ndi zigwa zavekedwa ndi tirigu; izo pamodzi zikufuwula ndi kuyimba mwachimwemwe.
Psalms66:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo. Fuwulani kwa Mulungu ndi chimwemwe
Psalms66:2 Imbani ulemerero wa dzina lake; kumutamanda kwake kukhale kwaulemerero.
Psalms66:3 Nenani kwa Mulungu
Psalms66:4 Dziko lonse lapansi limaweramira inu; limayimba matamando kwa Inu; limayimba matamando pa dzina lanu.” Sela.
Psalms66:5 Bwerani mudzaone zimene Mulungu wachita
Psalms66:6 Iye anasandutsa nyanja kukhala malo owuma
Psalms66:7 Iye amalamulira ndi mphamvu zake mpaka muyaya
Psalms66:8 Tamandani Mulungu wathu
Psalms66:9 Iye watchinjiriza miyoyo yathu ndi kusunga mapazi athu kuti angaterereke.
Psalms66:10 Pakuti Inu Mulungu munatiyesa; munatiyenga ngati siliva.
Psalms66:11 Inu mwatilowetsa mʼndende ndi kutisenzetsa zolemera pa misana yathu.
Psalms66:12 Inu munalola kuti anthu akwere pa mitu yathu; ife tinadutsa mʼmoto ndi mʼmadzi
Psalms66:13 Ine ndidzabwera ku Nyumba yanu ndi nsembe zopsereza ndi kukwaniritsa malumbiro anga.
Psalms66:14 Malumbiro amene milomo yanga inalonjeza ndi pakamwa panga panayankhula pamene ndinali pa mavuto.
Psalms66:15 Ndidzapereka nsembe nyama zonenepa kwa Inu ndi chopereka cha nkhosa zazimuna; ndidzapereka ngʼombe zamphongo ndi mbuzi. Sela
Psalms66:16 Bwerani ndipo mudzamve inu nonse amene mumaopa Mulungu. Ndidzakuwuzani zimene Iyeyo wandichitira.
Psalms66:17 Ndinafuwula kwa Iye ndi pakamwa panga
Psalms66:18 Ndikanasekerera tchimo mu mtima mwanga Ambuye sakanamvera;
Psalms66:19 koma ndithu Mulungu wamvetsera ndipo watchera khutu ku mawu a kupempha kwanga.
Psalms66:20 Matamando akhale kwa Mulungu amene sanakane pemphero langa kapena kuletsa chikondi chake pa ine!
Psalms67:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Pa zoyimbira za zingwe. Salimo. Yehova atikomere mtima ndi kutidalitsa
Psalms67:2 Kuti njira zanu zidziwike pa dziko lapansi
Psalms67:3 Mitundu ya anthu ikutamandeni Inu Mulungu; mitundu yonse ya anthu ikutamandeni.
Psalms67:4 Mitundu yonse ya anthu isangalale ndi kuyimba mwachimwemwe
Psalms67:5 Mitundu ya anthu ikutamandeni Inu Mulungu; mitundu yonse ya anthu ikutamandeni.
Psalms67:6 Nthaka yabereka zokolola zake; tidalitseni Mulungu wathu.
Psalms67:7 Mulungu atidalitse kuti pamenepo malekezero onse a dziko lapansi apembedze Iyeyo.
Psalms68:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Adzuke Mulungu
Psalms68:2 Monga momwe mphepo imachotsera utsi; Inu muwawulutsire kutali. Monga phula limasungunukira pa moto
Psalms68:3 Koma olungama asangalale ndi kukondwera pamaso pa Mulungu; iwo akondwere ndi kusangalala.
Psalms68:4 Imbirani Mulungu imbirani dzina lake matamando
Psalms68:5 Atate wa ana amasiye
Psalms68:6 Mulungu amakhazikitsa mtima pansi osungulumwa mʼmabanja
Psalms68:7 Pamene munatuluka kutsogolera anthu anu
Psalms68:8 dziko lapansi linagwedezeka
Psalms68:9 Munapereka mivumbi yochuluka
Psalms68:10 Anthu anu anakhala mʼmenemo ndipo munapatsa anthu osauka zimene zinkawasowa chifukwa cha ubwino wanu Mulungu.
Psalms68:11 Ambuye analengeza mawu
Psalms68:12 “Mafumu ndi ankhondo anathawa mwaliwiro; mʼmisasa anthu anagawana zolanda pa nkhondo.
Psalms68:13 Ngakhale mukugona pakati pa makola a ziweto
Psalms68:14 Pamene Wamphamvuzonse anabalalitsa mafumu mʼdziko
Psalms68:15 Mapiri a Basani ndi mapiri aulemerero; mapiri a Basani
Psalms68:16 Muyangʼaniranji mwansanje inu mapiri a msonga zambiri
Psalms68:17 Magaleta a Mulungu ndi osawerengeka
Psalms68:18 Pamene Inu munakwera mmwamba
Psalms68:19 Matamando akhale kwa Ambuye
Psalms68:20 Mulungu wathu ndi Mulungu amene amapulumutsa; Ambuye Wamphamvuzonse ndiye amene amatipulumutsa ku imfa.
Psalms68:21 Ndithu Mulungu adzaphwanya mitu ya adani ake
Psalms68:22 Ambuye akunena kuti
Psalms68:23 Kuti muviyike mapazi anu mʼmagazi a adani anu
Psalms68:24 Mayendedwe aulemu a anthu anu aonekera poyera
Psalms68:25 Patsogolo pali oyimba nyimbo pakamwa
Psalms68:26 Tamandani Mulungu mu msonkhano waukulu; tamandani Yehova mu msonkhano wa Israeli.
Psalms68:27 Pali fuko lalingʼono la Benjamini
Psalms68:28 Kungani mphamvu zanu Mulungu; tionetseni nyonga zanu
Psalms68:29 Chifukwa cha Nyumba yanu ku Yerusalemu
Psalms68:30 Dzudzulani chirombo pakati pa mabango
Psalms68:31 Nthumwi zidzachokera ku Igupto; Kusi adzadzipereka yekha kwa Mulungu.
Psalms68:32 Imbirani Mulungu Inu mafumu a dziko lapansi imbirani Ambuye matamando. Sela
Psalms68:33 Kwa Iye amene amakwera pa mitambo yakalekale ya mmwamba amene amabangula ndi mawu amphamvu.
Psalms68:34 Lengezani za mphamvu za Mulungu
Psalms68:35 Ndinu woopsa
Psalms69:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Potsata mayimbidwe a “Akakombo.” Pulumutseni Inu Mulungu
Psalms69:2 Ine ndikumira mʼthope lozama mʼmene mulibe popondapo. Ndalowa mʼmadzi ozama; mafunde andimiza.
Psalms69:3 Ndafowoka ndikupempha chithandizo; kummero kwanga kwawuma gwaa
Psalms69:4 Iwo amene amadana nane popanda chifukwa ndi ochuluka kuposa tsitsi la kumutu kwanga; ambiri ndi adani anga popanda chifukwa
Psalms69:5 Mukudziwa uchitsiru wanga
Psalms69:6 Iwo amene amadalira Inu asanyozedwe chifukwa cha ine
Psalms69:7 Pakuti ndimapirira kunyozedwa chifukwa cha Inu
Psalms69:8 Ndine mlendo kwa abale anga
Psalms69:9 pakuti changu chochitira nyumba yanu chandiphetsa ndipo chipongwe cha iwo amene amanyoza Inu chandigwera.
Psalms69:10 Pamene ndikulira ndi kusala kudya
Psalms69:11 pomwe ndavala chiguduli
Psalms69:12 Iwo amene amakhala pa chipata amandinena
Psalms69:13 Koma ndikupempha kwa Inu Ambuye
Psalms69:14 Mundilanditse kuchoka mʼmatope
Psalms69:15 Musalole kuti chigumula chindimeze
Psalms69:16 Ndiyankheni Inu Yehova mwa ubwino wanu wa chikondi chanu; mwa chifundo chanu chachikulu tembenukirani kwa ine.
Psalms69:17 Musabisire nkhope yanu mtumiki wanu
Psalms69:18 Bwerani pafupi ndi kundilanditsa; ndiwomboleni chifukwa cha adani anga.
Psalms69:19 Inu mukudziwa momwe ndanyozedwera
Psalms69:20 Mnyozo waswa mtima wanga ndipo wandisiya wopanda thandizo lililonse; ndinafunafuna ena woti andichitire chisoni
Psalms69:21 Iwo anayika ndulu mʼchakudya changa ndi kundipatsa vinyo wosasa chifukwa cha ludzu.
Psalms69:22 Chakudya chomwe chayikidwa patsogolo pawo chikhale msampha; chikhale chobwezera chilango ndiponso khwekhwe.
Psalms69:23 Maso awo adetsedwe kotero kuti asaonenso ndipo misana yawo ipindike mpaka kalekale.
Psalms69:24 Khuthulirani ukali wanu pa iwo; mkwiyo wanu woyaka moto uwathe mphamvu.
Psalms69:25 Malo awo akhale wopanda anthu pasapezeke ndi mmodzi yemwe wokhala mʼmatenti awo.
Psalms69:26 Pakuti iwo amazunza amene inu munamuvulaza ndi kuyankhula zowawa kwa amene munawapweteka.
Psalms69:27 Awonjezereni kulakwa pa kulakwa kwawo
Psalms69:28 Iwo afufutidwe mʼbuku la amoyo ndipo asalembedwe pamodzi ndi olungama.
Psalms69:29 Ndikumva zowawa ndi kuzunzika; lolani chipulumutso chanu
Psalms69:30 Ine ndidzatamanda dzina la Mulungu mʼnyimbo
Psalms69:31 Izi zidzakondweretsa Yehova kupambana ngʼombe
Psalms69:32 Wosauka adzaona ndipo adzasangalala
Psalms69:33 Yehova amamvera anthu osowa ndipo sanyoza anthu ake omangidwa.
Psalms69:34 Kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zitamanda Iye
Psalms69:35 pakuti Mulungu adzapulumutsa Ziyoni ndi kumanganso mizinda ya Yuda
Psalms69:36 ana atumiki ake adzalitenga kukhala cholowa chawo
Psalms70:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Pempho. Fulumirani Mulungu kundipulumutsa; Yehova bwerani msanga kudzandithandiza.
Psalms70:2 Iwo amene akufunafuna moyo wanga achititsidwe manyazi ndi kusokonezedwa; onse amene akukhumba chiwonongeko changa abwezedwe mopanda ulemu.
Psalms70:3 Onse amene akunena kwa ine kuti
Psalms70:4 Koma onse amene akufunafuna Inu akondwere ndi kusangalala mwa Inu; iwo amene amakonda chipulumutso chanu nthawi zonse anene kuti
Psalms70:5 Koma ine ndine wosauka ndi wosowa; bwerani msanga kwa ine Inu Mulungu. Inu ndinu thandizo langa ndi momboli wanga; Inu Yehova musachedwe.
Psalms71:1 Mwa Inu Yehova ine ndathawiramo; musalole kuti ndichititsidwe manyazi.
Psalms71:2 Mundilanditse ndi kundipulumutsa mwa chilungamo chanu
Psalms71:3 Mukhale thanthwe langa lothawirapo
Psalms71:4 Landitseni Inu Mulungu wanga
Psalms71:5 Pakuti Inu mwakhala chiyembekezo changa
Psalms71:6 Kuyambira pamene ndinabadwa
Psalms71:7 Ine ndakhala chinthu chodabwitsa kwa anthu ambiri koma Inu ndinu wonditchinjiriza wamphamvu.
Psalms71:8 Pakamwa panga padzaza ndi matamando anu
Psalms71:9 Musanditaye pamene ndakalamba; musandisiye pamene mphamvu zanga zatha.
Psalms71:10 Pakuti adani anga ayankhula motsutsana nane; iwo amene amadikira kuti andiphe amapangana pamodzi.
Psalms71:11 Iwo amati
Psalms71:12 Musakhale kutali ndi ine Inu Mulungu
Psalms71:13 Ondineneza anga awonongeke mwa manyazi
Psalms71:14 Koma ine ndidzakhala ndi chiyembekezo mwa Inu nthawi zonse
Psalms71:15 Pakamwa panga padzafotokoza za chilungamo chanu
Psalms71:16 Ndidzabwera ndi kulengeza za machitidwe amphamvu zanu Inu Ambuye Wamphamvuzonse. Ndidzalengeza chilungamo chanu
Psalms71:17 Kuyambira ubwana wanga
Psalms71:18 Ngakhale pamene ndakalamba ndipo imvi zili mbuu musanditaye Inu Mulungu
Psalms71:19 Mphamvu zanu ndi kulungama kwanu zimafika mpaka kumwambamwamba. Ndani wofanana nanu Inu Mulungu
Psalms71:20 Ngakhale mwandionetsa mavuto ambiri owawa
Psalms71:21 Inu mudzachulukitsa ulemu wanga ndi kunditonthozanso.
Psalms71:22 Ndidzakutamandani ndi zeze chifukwa cha kukhulupirika kwanu Mulungu
Psalms71:23 Milomo yanga idzafuwula ndi chimwemwe pamene ndidzayimba matamando kwa Inu amene mwandiwombola.
Psalms71:24 Lilime langa lidzafotokoza za ntchito zanu zachilungamo tsiku lonse
Psalms72:1 Salimo la Solomoni. Patsani mwana wa mfumu nzeru zanu zoweruzira mwa chilungamo
Psalms72:2 Iye adzaweruza anthu anu mwachilungamo
Psalms72:3 Mapiri adzabweretsa chuma kwa anthu anu
Psalms72:4 Iye adzateteza ozunzika pakati pa anthu ndi kupulumutsa ana a anthu osowa; adzaphwanya ozunza anzawo.
Psalms72:5 Adzakhala ndi moyo pa mibado yonse
Psalms72:6 Iye adzakhala kugwa kwa mvula pa minda yolimidwa ngati mivumbi yothirira dziko lapansi.
Psalms72:7 Mʼmasiku a munthu wolungama adzakhazikika; chuma chidzachuluka mpaka mwezi utaleka kuwala.
Psalms72:8 Iye adzalamulira kuchokera ku nyanja ina mpaka ku nyanja ina ndiponso kuchokera ku mtsinje mpaka ku malekezero a dziko lapansi.
Psalms72:9 Mafuko a mʼchipululu adzawerama pamaso pake ndipo adani ake adzanyambita fumbi.
Psalms72:10 Mafumu a ku Tarisisi ndi a ku zilumba zakutali adzabweretsa mitulo kwa iye
Psalms72:11 Mafumu onse adzamuweramira ndipo mitundu yonse idzamutumikira.
Psalms72:12 Pakuti iye adzawombola wosowa amene akulira
Psalms72:13 Iye adzachitira chifundo anthu ofowoka ndi anthu osowa ndi kupulumutsa osowa ku imfa.
Psalms72:14 Iye adzalanditsa iwo ku mazunzo ndi chiwawa pakuti magazi awo ndi amtengo wapatali pamaso pake.
Psalms72:15 Iye akhale ndi moyo wautali; golide ochokera ku Seba apatsidwe kwa iye. Anthu amupempherere nthawi zonse ndi kumudalitsa tsiku lonse.
Psalms72:16 Mulole kuti tirigu achuluke mʼdziko lonse; pamwamba pa mapiri pakhale tirigu. Zipatso zake zichuluke ngati za ku Lebanoni; zichuluke ngati udzu wakuthengo
Psalms72:17 Dzina lake likhazikike kwamuyaya
Psalms72:18 Matamando akhale kwa Yehova Mulungu
Psalms72:19 Matamando akhale ku dzina lake laulemerero kwamuyaya dziko lonse lapansi lidzaze ndi ulemerero wake. Ameni ndi Ameni.
Psalms72:20 Uku ndiko kumaliza kwa mapemphero a Davide mwana wa Yese.
Psalms73:1 Salimo la Asafu. Mulungu ndi wabwino ndithu kwa Israeli
Psalms73:2 Koma kunena za ine
Psalms73:3 Pakuti ndinkachitira nsanje odzitamandira
Psalms73:4 Iwo alibe zosautsa; matupi awo ndi athanzi ndi amphamvu.
Psalms73:5 Saona mavuto monga anthu ena; sazunzika ngati anthu ena onse.
Psalms73:6 Nʼchifukwa chake kunyada kuli monga mkanda wa mʼkhosi mwawo; amadziveka chiwawa.
Psalms73:7 Mʼmitima yawo yokhota mumachokera zolakwa; zoyipa zochokera mʼmaganizo awo sizidziwa malire.
Psalms73:8 Iwowo amanyogodola ndi kumayankhula zoyipa; mwa kudzikuza kwawo amaopseza ena nʼkumati
Psalms73:9 Pakamwa pawo pamayankhula monyoza Mulungu kumwamba ndipo lilime lawo limayenda pa dziko lapansi.
Psalms73:10 Nʼchifukwa chake anthu awo amapita kwa iwowo ndi kumwa madzi mochuluka.
Psalms73:11 Iwo amati
Psalms73:12 Umu ndi mmene oyipa alili; nthawi zonse ali pabwino ndipo chuma chawo chimachulukirachulukira.
Psalms73:13 Ndithudi ine ndawusunga pachabe mtima wanga woyera; pachabe ndasamba mʼmanja mwanga mwa kusalakwa kwanga.
Psalms73:14 Tsiku lonse ndapeza mavuto; ndakhala ndi kulangidwa mmawa uliwonse.
Psalms73:15 Ndikanati
Psalms73:16 Pamene ndinayesa kuti ndimvetse zonsezi
Psalms73:17 kufikira nditalowa mʼmalo opatulika a Mulungu; pamenepo ndinamvetsa mathero awo.
Psalms73:18 Zoonadi Inu munawayika pa malo woterera; Mumawagwetsa pansi kuti awonongeke.
Psalms73:19 Mwamsangamsanga iwo amawonongedwa
Psalms73:20 Monga loto pamene wina adzuka
Psalms73:21 Pamene mtima wanga unasautsidwa ndi kuwawidwa mu mzimu mwanga
Psalms73:22 ndinali wopusa ndi wosadziwa; ndinali chirombo chopanda nzeru pamaso panu.
Psalms73:23 Komabe ineyo ndili ndi Inu nthawi zonse; mumandigwira dzanja langa lamanja.
Psalms73:24 Inu mumanditsogolera ndi malangizo anu ndipo pambuyo pake mudzanditenga ku ulemerero.
Psalms73:25 Kodi kumwamba ndili ndi yani kupatula Inu? Ndipo dziko lapansi lilibe chilichonse chimene ndimachilakalaka koposa Inuyo.
Psalms73:26 Thupi ndi mtima wanga zitha kufowoka
Psalms73:27 Iwo amene ali kutali ndi Inu adzawonongeka; Inu mumawononga onse osakhulupirika pamaso panu.
Psalms73:28 Koma kunena za Ine ndi kwabwino kukhala pafupi ndi Mulungu. Ndatsimikiza kuti Ambuye Yehova ndiwo pothawirapo panga ndipo ndidzalalika ntchito zanu zonse.
Psalms74:1 Ndakatulo ya Asafu. Nʼchifukwa chiyani mwatitaya ife kwamuyaya
Psalms74:2 Kumbukirani anthu amene munawagula kalekale
Psalms74:3 Tembenuzani mapazi kuloza ku mabwinja awa amuyaya chiwonongeko ichi chonse mdani wabweretsa pa malo opatulika.
Psalms74:4 Adani anu anabangula pa malo pamene Inu munkakumana nafe; anayimika mbendera zawo monga zizindikiro zachigonjetso.
Psalms74:5 Iwo anachita ngati anthu oti anyamula mbendera zawo kuti adule mitengo mʼnkhalango.
Psalms74:6 Kenaka anaphwanya ndi nkhwangwa ndi akasemasema awo zonse zimene tinapachika.
Psalms74:7 Iwo anatentha malo anu opatulika mpaka kuwagwetsa pansi; anadetsa malo okhalamo dzina lanu.
Psalms74:8 Ndipo anati mʼmitima yawo
Psalms74:9 Ife sitinapatsidwe chizindikiro chodabwitsa; palibe aneneri amene atsala ndipo palibe aliyense wa ife akudziwa kuti izi zidzatenga nthawi yayitali bwanji.
Psalms74:10 Kodi mpaka liti
Psalms74:11 Chifukwa chiyani mukubweza dzanja lanu lamanja? Litulutseni kuchoka pachifuwa chanu ndipo muwawononge!
Psalms74:12 Koma Inu Mulungu
Psalms74:13 Ndinu amene munagawa nyanja ndi mphamvu yanu; munathyola mitu ya zirombo za mʼmadzi.
Psalms74:14 Ndinu amene munaphwanya mitu ya Leviyatani ndi kuyipereka ngati chakudya cha zirombo za mʼchipululu.
Psalms74:15 Ndinu amene munatsekula akasupe ndi mitsinje
Psalms74:16 Masana ndi anu ndipo usiku ndi wanunso; Inuyo munakhazikitsa dzuwa ndi mwezi.
Psalms74:17 Ndinu amene munakhazikitsa malire onse a dziko lapansi; munakhazikitsa chilimwe ndi dzinja.
Psalms74:18 Kumbukirani momwe mdani wakunyozerani Inu Yehova
Psalms74:19 Musapereke moyo wa nkhunda yanu ku zirombo zakuthengo; nthawi zonse musayiwale miyoyo ya anthu anu osautsidwa.
Psalms74:20 Mukumbukire pangano lanu
Psalms74:21 Musalole kuti osautsidwa abwerere mwamanyazi; osauka ndi osowa atamande dzina lanu.
Psalms74:22 Dzukani Inu Mulungu ndipo dzitetezeni pa mlandu; kumbukirani momwe opusa akukunyozerani tsiku lonse.
Psalms74:23 Musalekerere phokoso la otsutsana nanu
Psalms75:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe
Psalms75:2 Mumati
Psalms75:3 Pamene dziko lapansi ndi anthu ake onse anjenjemera
Psalms75:4 Kwa odzitama ndikuti
Psalms75:5 Musatukule nyanga zanu motsutsana ndi kumwamba; musayankhule ndi khosi losololoka.’ ”
Psalms75:6 Kugamula milandu sikuchokera kummawa kapena kumadzulo kapena ku chipululu.
Psalms75:7 Koma ndi Mulungu amene amaweruza: Iyeyo amatsitsa wina
Psalms75:8 Mʼdzanja la Yehova muli chikho chodzaza ndi vinyo wochita thovu
Psalms75:9 Kunena za ine
Psalms75:10 Ndidzadula nyanga za onse oyipa koma nyanga za olungama zidzakwezedwa.
Psalms76:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Pa zoyimbira za zingwe. Salimo la Asafu. Mulungu amadziwika mu Yuda; dzina lake ndi lotchuka mu Israeli.
Psalms76:2 Tenti yake ili mu Salemu
Psalms76:3 Kumeneko Iye anathyola mivi yowuluka
Psalms76:4 Wolemekezeka ndinu
Psalms76:5 Anthu owuma mtima amagona atalandidwa chuma
Psalms76:6 Pa kudzudzula kwanu
Psalms76:7 Inu nokha ndiye muyenera kuopedwa. Angathe kuyima pamaso panu ndani mukakwiya?
Psalms76:8 Kuchokera kumwamba Inu munalengeza chiweruzo
Psalms76:9 pamene Inu Mulungu munadzuka kuti muweruze
Psalms76:10 Zoonadi
Psalms76:11 Chitani malumbiro kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu ndipo muwakwaniritse; anthu onse omuzungulira abweretse mphatso kwa Iye amene ayenera kuopedwa.
Psalms76:12 Iye amaswa mzimu wa olamulira; amaopedwa ndi mafumu a dziko lapansi.
Psalms77:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Potsata mayimbidwe a Yedutuni. Salimo la Asafu. Ndinafuwulira Mulungu kupempha thandizo; ndinafuwula mokweza kwa Mulungu kuti anditcherere khutu.
Psalms77:2 Pamene ndinali pa masautso ndinafunafuna Ambuye; usiku ndinatambasula manja mosalekeza ndipo moyo wanga unakana kutonthozedwa.
Psalms77:3 Ndinakumbukira Inu Mulungu
Psalms77:4 Munagwira zikope zanga kuti ndisagone ndipo ndinavutika kwambiri kuti ndiyankhule.
Psalms77:5 Ndinaganizira za masiku akale
Psalms77:6 Ndinakumbukira nyimbo zanga usiku. Mtima wanga unasinkhasinkha ndipo mzimu wanga unafunsa kuti
Psalms77:7 “Kodi Ambuye adzatikana mpaka muyaya? Kodi Iwo sadzaonetsanso kukoma mtima kwawo?
Psalms77:8 Kodi Chikondi chake chosatha chija chatheratu? Kodi malonjezo ake alephera nthawi yonse?
Psalms77:9 Kodi Mulungu wayiwala kukhala wokoma mtima? Kodi mu mkwiyo wake waleka chifundo chake?”
Psalms77:10 Ndipo ndinaganiza
Psalms77:11 Ine ndidzakumbukira ntchito za Yehova; Ine ndidzakumbukira zodabwitsa zanu za kalekale.
Psalms77:12 Ndidzakumbukira ntchito zanu ndi kulingalira zodabwitsa zanu.”
Psalms77:13 Njira zanu Mulungu ndi zoyera. Kodi ndi mulungu uti ali wamkulu kuposa Mulungu wathu?
Psalms77:14 Inu ndinu Mulungu wochita zodabwitsa; Mumaonetsera mphamvu yanu pakati pa mitundu ya anthu.
Psalms77:15 Ndi dzanja lanu lamphamvu munawombola anthu anu
Psalms77:16 Madzi anakuonani Mulungu
Psalms77:17 Mitambo inakhuthula madzi ake pansi
Psalms77:18 Bingu lanu linamveka mʼmphepo ya kamvuluvulu
Psalms77:19 Njira yanu inadutsa pa nyanja
Psalms77:20 Inu munatsogolera anthu anu ngati gulu la nkhosa mwa dzanja la Mose ndi Aaroni.
Psalms78:1 Ndakatulo ya Asafu. Inu anthu anga imvani chiphunzitso changa; mvetserani mawu a pakamwa panga.
Psalms78:2 Ndidzatsekula pakamwa panga mʼmafanizo
Psalms78:3 zimene tinazimva ndi kuzidziwa
Psalms78:4 Sitidzabisira ana awo
Psalms78:5 Iye anapereka mawu wodzichitira umboni kwa Yakobo ndi kukhazikitsa lamulo mu Israeli
Psalms78:6 kotero kuti mʼbado wotsatira uthe kuzidziwa
Psalms78:7 Choncho iwo adzakhulupirira Mulungu ndipo sadzayiwala ntchito zake koma adzasunga malamulo ake.
Psalms78:8 Iwo asadzakhale monga makolo awo
Psalms78:9 Anthu a ku Efereimu
Psalms78:10 iwo sanasunge pangano la Mulungu ndipo anakana kukhala mʼmoyo wotsatira lamulo lake.
Psalms78:11 Anayiwala zimene Iye anachita
Psalms78:12 Iyeyo anachita zodabwitsa makolo athu akuona
Psalms78:13 Anagawa nyanja pakati ndi kudutsitsapo iwowo
Psalms78:14 Anawatsogolera ndi mtambo masana ndi kuwala kwa moto usiku wonse.
Psalms78:15 Iye anangʼamba miyala mʼchipululu ndi kuwapatsa madzi ochuluka ngati a mʼnyanja zambiri;
Psalms78:16 Anatulutsa mitsinje kuchokera mʼmingʼalu ya miyala ndi kuyenda madzi ngati mitsinje.
Psalms78:17 Komabe iwowo anapitiriza kumuchimwira Iye
Psalms78:18 Ananyoza Mulungu mwadala pomuwumiriza kuti awapatse chakudya chimene anachilakalaka.
Psalms78:19 Iwo anayankhula motsutsana naye ponena kuti
Psalms78:20 Iye atamenya thanthwe madzi anatuluka
Psalms78:21 Yehova atawamva anakwiya kwambiri; moto wake unayaka kutsutsana ndi Yakobo
Psalms78:22 pakuti iwo sanakhulupirire Mulungu kapena kudalira chipulumutso chake.
Psalms78:23 Komabe Iye anapereka lamulo kwa mitambo mmwamba ndi kutsekula makomo a mayiko akumwamba;
Psalms78:24 anagwetsa mana kuti anthu adye
Psalms78:25 Anthu anadya buledi wa angelo
Psalms78:26 Anamasula mphepo ya kummwera kuchokera kumwamba
Psalms78:27 Iye anawagwetsera nyama ngati fumbi
Psalms78:28 Anazibweretsa kwa iwo mʼkati mwa misasa yawo
Psalms78:29 Iwo anadya mpaka anatsala nazo zochuluka pakuti Iye anawapatsa zimene anazilakalaka.
Psalms78:30 Koma iwowo anasiya kudya chakudya anachilakalakacho
Psalms78:31 mkwiyo wa Mulungu unawayakira; Iye anapha amphamvu onse pakati pawo
Psalms78:32 Ngakhale zinali chomwechi
Psalms78:33 Kotero Mulungu anachepetsa masiku awo kuti azimirire ngati mpweya. Iye anachepetsa zaka zawo kuti zithere mʼmasautso.
Psalms78:34 Mulungu atawapha
Psalms78:35 Ankakumbukira kuti Mulungu ndiye Thanthwe lawo
Psalms78:36 Komabe ankamuthyasika ndi pakamwa pawo
Psalms78:37 Mitima yawo sinali yokhazikika pa Iye
Psalms78:38 Komabe Iye anali wachifundo; anakhululukira mphulupulu zawo ndipo sanawawononge. Nthawi ndi nthawi Iye anabweza mkwiyo wake ndipo sanawutse ukali wake wonse.
Psalms78:39 Iye anakumbukira kuti iwo anali anthu chabe
Psalms78:40 Nthawi zambiri iwo ankamuwukira Iye mʼchipululu ndi kumumvetsa chisoni mʼdziko lopanda kanthu!
Psalms78:41 Kawirikawiri iwo ankamuyesa Mulungu; ankamuputa Woyera wa Israeli.
Psalms78:42 Sanakumbukire mphamvu zake
Psalms78:43 tsiku limene Iyeyo anaonetsa poyera zizindikiro zozizwitsa zake mu Igupto
Psalms78:44 Iye anasandutsa mitsinje yawo kukhala magazi; Iwo sanathe kumwa madzi ochokera mʼmitsinje yawo.
Psalms78:45 Iye anawatumizira magulu a ntchentche zimene zinawawononga
Psalms78:46 Iye anapereka mbewu zawo kwa ziwala
Psalms78:47 Iye anawononga mphesa zawo ndi matalala ndiponso mitengo yawo yankhuyu ndi chisanu.
Psalms78:48 Iye anapereka ngʼombe zawo ku matalala
Psalms78:49 Anakhuthula moto wa ukali wake pa iwo
Psalms78:50 Analolera kukwiya
Psalms78:51 Anakantha ana oyamba kubadwa a Igupto
Psalms78:52 Koma Iye anatulutsa anthu ake ngati ziweto; anawatsogolera ngati nkhosa kudutsa mʼchipululu.
Psalms78:53 Anawatsogolera bwinobwino kotero kuti analibe mantha koma nyanja inamiza adani awo.
Psalms78:54 Kotero anawafikitsa ku malire a dziko lake loyera
Psalms78:55 Iye anathamangitsa mitundu ya anthu patsogolo pawo ndipo anapereka mayiko awo kwa Aisraeli kuti akhale awo; Iye anakhazikitsa mafuko a Israeli mʼnyumba zawo.
Psalms78:56 Koma iwo anayesa Mulungu ndi kuwukira Wammwambamwamba; sanasunge malamulo ake.
Psalms78:57 Anakhala okanika ndi osakhulupirika monga makolo awo
Psalms78:58 Anakwiyitsa Iyeyo ndi malo awo opembedzera mafano; anawutsa nsanje yake ndi mafano awo.
Psalms78:59 Pamene Mulungu anamva zimenezi
Psalms78:60 Anasiya nyumba ya ku Silo
Psalms78:61 Anatumiza mphamvu zake ku ukapolo
Psalms78:62 Anapereka anthu ake ku lupanga; anakwiya kwambiri ndi cholowa chake.
Psalms78:63 Moto unanyeketsa anyamata awo
Psalms78:64 ansembe awo anaphedwa ndi lupanga
Psalms78:65 Kenaka Ambuye anakhala ngati akudzuka kutulo
Psalms78:66 Iye anathamangitsa adani ake; anawachititsa manyazi ku nthawi zonse.
Psalms78:67 Kenaka Iye anakana matenti a Yosefe
Psalms78:68 Koma anasankha fuko la Yuda
Psalms78:69 Iye anamanga malo ake opatulika ngati zitunda
Psalms78:70 Anasankha Davide mtumiki wake ndi kumuchotsa pakati pa makola ankhosa;
Psalms78:71 kuchokera koyangʼanira nkhosa anamubweretsa kuti akhale mʼbusa wa anthu ake
Psalms78:72 Ndipo Davide anawaweta ndi mtima wolungama; ndi manja aluso anawatsogolera.
Psalms79:1 Salimo la Asafu. Inu Mulungu
Psalms79:2 Iwo anapereka mitembo ya atumiki anu kwa mbalame zamlengalenga ngati chakudya
Psalms79:3 Akhetsa magazi monga madzi kuzungulira Yerusalemu yense
Psalms79:4 Ife ndife chinthu chonyozeka kwa anansi athu
Psalms79:5 Mpaka liti Inu Yehova? Kodi mudzakwiya mpaka muyaya? Kodi mpaka liti nsanje yanu idzayaka ngati moto?
Psalms79:6 Khuthulirani ukali wanu pa anthu a mitundu ina amene sakudziwani Inu
Psalms79:7 pakuti iwo ameza Yakobo ndi kuwononga dziko lawo.

Psalms79:12 Mubwezere kwa anansi athu kasanu nʼkawiri kunyoza kumene ananyoza Inu Ambuye.
Psalms79:13 Pamenepo ife anthu anu

Psalms80:5 Mwawadyetsa buledi wa misozi; mwachitisa iwo kumwa misozi yodzaza mbale.

Psalms80:15 muzu umene dzanja lanu lamanja ladzala
Psalms80:16 Mpesa wanu wadulidwa ndi kutenthedwa ndi moto; pakudzudzula kwanu anthu anu awonongeka.
Psalms80:17 Dzanja lanu likhale pa munthu amene ali ku dzanja lanu lamanja
Psalms80:18 Ndipo ife sitidzatembenukira kumbali kuchoka kwa Inu; titsitsimutseni ndipo tidzayitana pa dzina lanu.

Psalms85:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la ana a Kora. Yehova munakomera mtima dziko lanu; munabwezeretsa ulemerero wa Yakobo.
Psalms85:2 Munakhululukira mphulupulu za anthu anu ndi kuphimba machimo awo onse. Sela
Psalms85:3 Munayika pambali ukali wanu wonse ndi kutembenuka kuchoka ku mkwiyo wanu woopsa.
Psalms85:4 Tibwezeretseninso mwakale Inu Mulungu Mpulumutsi wathu
Psalms85:5 Kodi mudzatikwiyira mpaka liti? Kodi mudzapitiriza kukwiya pa mibado yathu yonse?
Psalms85:6 Kodi simudzatitsitsimutsanso
Psalms85:7 Tionetseni chikondi chanu chosatha

Psalms85:9 Ndithu chipulumutso chake chili pafupi ndi iwo amene amaopa Iye
Psalms85:10 Chikondi ndi kukhulupirika zimakumana pamodzi; chilungamo ndi mtendere zimapsompsonana.

Psalms85:12 Ndithu Yehova adzapereka chimene chili chabwino

Psalms86:1 Pemphero la Davide. Ndimvereni Yehova ndipo mundiyankhe
Psalms86:2 Yangʼanirani moyo wanga
Psalms86:3 Mundichitire chifundo
Psalms86:4 Bweretsani chimwemwe kwa mtumiki wanu
Psalms86:5 Inu Ambuye
Psalms86:6 Yehova imvani pemphero langa; mvetserani kulira kwanga kofuna chifundo.
Psalms86:7 Pa tsiku la mavuto anga ndidzayitana Inu
Psalms86:8 Pakati pa milungu palibe wina wofanana nanu Ambuye; palibe ntchito zolingana ndi ntchito zanu.
Psalms86:9 Mitundu yonse ya anthu imene munayipanga idzabwera ndi kudzalambira pamaso panu Ambuye; iwo adzabweretsa ulemerero pa dzina lanu.
Psalms86:10 Pakuti ndinu wamkulu ndipo mumachita zodabwitsa; Inu nokha ndiye Mulungu.
Psalms86:11 Ndiphunzitseni njira yanu Yehova
Psalms86:12 Ndidzakutamandani Ambuye Mulungu wanga
Psalms86:13 Pakuti chikondi chanu nʼchachikulu kwa ine; mwandipulumutsa ku malo ozama a manda.
Psalms86:14 Inu Mulungu wanga
Psalms86:15 Koma Ambuye ndinu Mulungu wachifundo ndi wokoma mtima
Psalms86:16 Tembenukirani kwa ine ndipo ndichitireni chifundo; perekani mphamvu zanu kwa mtumiki wanu ndipo pulumutsani mwana wa mdzakazi wanu.
Psalms86:17 Mundionetse chizindikiro cha ubwino wanu kuti adani achione ndi kuchititsidwa manyazi
Psalms87:1 Salimo la Ana a Kora. Iye wakhazikitsa maziko ake pa phiri loyera;
Psalms87:2 Yehova amakonda zipata za Ziyoni kupambana malo onse okhalamo a Yakobo.
Psalms87:3 Za ulemerero wako zimakambidwa
Psalms87:4 “Ndidzanena za Rahabe ndi Babuloni pakati pa iwo amene amandidziwa. Dzikonso la Filisitiya
Psalms87:5 Ndithudi
Psalms87:6 Yehova adzalemba mʼbuku la kawundula wa anthu a mitundu ina: “Uyu anabadwira mʼZiyoni.” Sela
Psalms87:7 Oyimba ndi ovina omwe adzati
Psalms88:1 Salimo la ana a Kora. Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Potsata mayimbidwe a nyimbo yoti: “Pa Matenda ndi pa Mazunzo.” Ndakatulo ya Hemani
Psalms88:2 Pemphero langa lifike pamaso panu; tcherani khutu lanu kuti mumve kulira kwanga.
Psalms88:3 Pakuti ndili ndi mavuto ambiri ndipo moyo wanga ukuyandikira ku manda.
Psalms88:4 Ndikuwerengedwa pamodzi ndi iwo amene akutsikira ku dzenje; ndine munthu wopanda mphamvu.
Psalms88:5 Ndayikidwa pambali pamodzi ndi anthu akufa
Psalms88:6 Mwandiyika pansi pa dzenje penipeni
Psalms88:7 Ukali wanu ukundipsinja kwambiri
Psalms88:8 Mwandichotsa pakati pa abwenzi anga enieni ndipo mwachititsa kuti ndikhale chonyansa kwa iwo. Ndatsekerezedwa ndipo sindingathe kuthawa;
Psalms88:9 	maso anga ada ndi chisoni. Ndimayitana Inu Yehova tsiku lililonse; ndimakweza manja anga kwa Inu.
Psalms88:10 Kodi mumaonetsa zozizwitsa zanu kwa anthu akufa? Kodi iwo amene afa amaukanso ndi kutamanda Inu? Sela
Psalms88:11 Kodi chikondi chanu chimalalikidwa mʼmanda
Psalms88:12 Kodi zozizwitsa zanu zimadziwika ku malo a mdima
Psalms88:13 Inu Yehova
Psalms88:14 Inu Yehova nʼchifukwa chiyani mukundikana ndi kundibisira nkhope yanu?
Psalms88:15 Kuyambira ubwana wanga ndakhala ndikuzunzika pafupi kufa; ndakhala ndikuchita mantha ndipo ndine wothedwa nzeru.
Psalms88:16 Ukali wanu wandimiza; zoopsa zanu zandiwononga.
Psalms88:17 Tsiku lonse zimandizungulira ngati chigumula; zandimiza kwathunthu.
Psalms88:18 Inu mwatenga anzanga ndi okondedwa anga kuwachotsa pamaso panga; mdima ndiye bwenzi langa lenileni.

Psalms89:2 Ndidzalalikira kuti chikondi chanu chidzakhazikika mpaka muyaya

Psalms89:5 Mayiko akumwamba amatamanda zozizwitsa zanu Yehova
Psalms89:6 Pakuti ndani mu mlengalenga angalingane ndi Yehova? Ndani wofanana ndi Yehova pakati pa zolengedwa zakumwamba?
Psalms89:7 Mu msonkhano wa oyera mtima Mulungu amaopedwa kwambiri; Iye ndiye wochititsa mantha kupambana onse amene amuzungulira.
Psalms89:8 Inu Yehova Mulungu Wamphamvuzonse
Psalms89:9 Mumalamula nyanja ya mafunde awukali; pamene mafunde ake awundana Inu mumawakhalitsa bata.
Psalms89:10 Munaphwanya Rahabe monga munthu wophedwa; ndi dzanja lanu lamphamvu munabalalitsa adani anu.
Psalms89:11 Mayiko akumwamba ndi anu ndiponso dziko lapansi ndi lanu; munapanga dziko lonse ndi zonse zili mʼmenemo.
Psalms89:12 Munalenga Kumpoto ndi Kummwera; Tabori ndi Herimoni akuyimba ndi chimwemwe pa dzina lanu.
Psalms89:13 Mkono wanu ndi wamphamvu; dzanja lanu ndi lamphamvu
Psalms89:14 Chilungamo ndi chiweruzo cholungama ndiye maziko a mpando wanu waufumu; chikondi ndi kukhulupirika zimayenda patsogolo panu.
Psalms89:15 Ndi odala amene aphunzira kuyamika Inu
Psalms89:16 Amakondwera mʼdzina lanu tsiku lonse lathunthu; amasangalala koposa mʼchilungamo chanu.
Psalms89:17 Pakuti Inu ndiye ulemerero wawo ndi mphamvu yawo ndipo mwa kukoma mtima kwanu Inu mumakweza nyanga yathu.
Psalms89:18 Ndithudi
Psalms89:19 Kale munayankhula mʼmasomphenya
Psalms89:20 Ndamupeza mtumiki wanga Davide; ndamudzoza ndi mafuta opatulika.
Psalms89:21 Dzanja langa lidzamuchirikiza; zoonadi
Psalms89:22 Adani sadzamulamula kuti apereke msonkho; anthu oyipa sadzamusautsa.
Psalms89:23 Ndidzaphwanya adani ake pamaso pake ndi kukantha otsutsana naye.
Psalms89:24 Chikondi changa chokhulupirika chidzakhala naye
Psalms89:25 Ndidzayika dzanja lake pa nyanja
Psalms89:26 Iyeyo adzafuwula kwa Ine kuti
Psalms89:27 Ndidzamuyika kuti akhale mwana wanga woyamba kubadwa; wokwezedwa kwambiri pakati pa mafumu a dziko lapansi.
Psalms89:28 Ndidzamusungira chifundo changa kwamuyaya
Psalms89:29 Ine ndidzakhazikitsa zidzukulu zake mpaka muyaya
Psalms89:30 “Ngati ana ake adzataya lamulo langa ndi kusatsatira malangizo anga
Psalms89:31 ngati adzaswa malamulo anga ndi kulephera kusunga ziphunzitso zanga
Psalms89:32 Ine ndidzalanga tchimo lawo ndi ndodo
Psalms89:33 Koma sindidzachotsa chikondi changa pa iye
Psalms89:34 Sindidzaswa pangano langa kapena kusintha zimene milomo yanga yayankhula.
Psalms89:35 Ndinalumbira kamodzi mwa kuyera kwanga ndipo sindidzanama kwa Davide
Psalms89:36 kuti zidzukulu zake zidzakhale kwamuyaya ndipo mpando wake waufumu udzakhazikika pamaso panga ngati dzuwa;
Psalms89:37 udzakhazikika kwamuyaya monga mwezi
Psalms89:38 “Koma tsopano Inu mwamukana
Psalms89:39 Mwakana pangano ndi mtumiki wanu ndipo mwadetsa mʼfumbi chipewa chake chaufumu.
Psalms89:40 Inu mwagumula makoma ake onse ndipo mwasandutsa bwinja malinga ake.
Psalms89:41 Onse amene amadutsa amalanda zinthu zake; iye wakhala chotonzedwa cha anansi ake.
Psalms89:42 Mwakweza dzanja lamanja la adani ake; mwachititsa kuti adani ake akondwere.
Psalms89:43 Mwabunthitsa lupanga lake
Psalms89:44 Inu mwathetsa kukongola kwa ulemerero wake ndipo mwagwetsa pansi mpando wake waufumu.
Psalms89:45 Mwachepetsa masiku a unyamata wake; mwamuphimba ndi chofunda chochititsa manyazi. Sela
Psalms89:46 “Mpaka liti Yehova? Kodi mudzadzibisa mpaka kalekale? Mpaka liti ukali wanu udzayaka ngati moto?
Psalms89:47 Kumbukirani kuti masiku a moyo wanga ndi ochepa pakuti munalenga kwachabe anthu onse!
Psalms89:48 Kodi ndi munthu uti angakhale ndi moyo ndi kusaona imfa? Kapena kudzipulumutsa yekha ku mphamvu ya manda? Sela
Psalms89:49 Inu Ambuye kodi chili kuti chikondi chanu chachikulu choyamba chija

Psalms101:1 Salimo la Davide. Ndidzayimba za chikondi ndi chiweruzo chanu cholungama; kwa Inu Yehova ndidzayimba matamando.
Psalms101:2 Ndidzatsata njira yolungama; nanga mudzabwera liti kwa ine? Ndidzayenda mʼnyumba mwanga ndi mtima wosalakwa.
Psalms101:3 Sindidzayika chinthu chilichonse choyipa pamaso panga. Ine ndimadana ndi zochita za anthu opanda chikhulupiriro; iwo sadzadziphatika kwa ine.
Psalms101:4 Anthu a mtima wokhota adzakhala kutali ndi ine; ine sindidzalola choyipa chilichonse kulowa mwa ine.
Psalms101:5 Aliyense wosinjirira mnansi wake mseri ameneyo ndidzamuletsa; aliyense amene ali ndi maso amwano ndi mtima wodzikuza
Psalms101:6 Maso anga adzakhala pa okhulupirika mʼdziko
Psalms101:7 Aliyense wochita chinyengo sadzakhala mʼnyumba mwanga. Aliyense woyankhula mwachinyengo sadzayima pamaso panga.
Psalms101:8 Mmawa uliwonse ndidzatontholetsa anthu onse oyipa mʼdziko; ndidzachotsa aliyense wochita zoyipa mu mzinda wa Yehova.
Psalms102:1 Pemphero la munthu wosautsidwa
Psalms102:2 Musandibisire nkhope yanu pamene ndili pa msautso. Munditcherere khutu; pamene ndiyitana ndiyankheni msanga.
Psalms102:3 Pakuti masiku anga akupita ngati utsi; mafupa anga akunyeka ngati nkhuni zoyaka.
Psalms102:4 Mtima wanga wakanthidwa ndipo ukufota ngati udzu; ndipo ndimayiwala kudya chakudya changa.
Psalms102:5 Chifukwa cha kubuwula kwanga kofuwula ndatsala chikopa ndi mafupa okhaokha.
Psalms102:6 Ndili ngati kadzidzi wa ku chipululu
Psalms102:7 Ndimagona osapeza tulo; ndakhala ngati mbalame yokhala yokha pa denga.
Psalms102:8 Tsiku lonse adani anga amandichita chipongwe; iwo amene amandinyoza
Psalms102:9 Pakuti ndimadya phulusa ngati chakudya changa ndi kusakaniza chakumwa changa ndi misozi
Psalms102:10 chifukwa cha ukali wanu waukulu
Psalms102:11 Masiku anga ali ngati mthunzi wa kumadzulo; Ine ndikufota ngati udzu.
Psalms102:12 Koma Inu Yehova
Psalms102:13 Inu mudzadzuka ndi kuchitira chifundo Ziyoni pakuti ndi nthawi yoti muonetse kukoma mtima kwanu pa iyeyo; nthawi yoyikika yafika.
Psalms102:14 Pakuti miyala yake ndi yokondedwa kwa atumiki anu; fumbi lake lokha limawachititsa kuti amve chisoni.
Psalms102:15 Mitundu ya anthu idzaopa dzina la Yehova
Psalms102:16 Pakuti Yehova adzamanganso Ziyoni ndi kuonekera mu ulemerero wake.
Psalms102:17 Iye adzayankha pemphero la anthu otayika; sadzanyoza kupempha kwawo.
Psalms102:18 Zimenezi zilembedwe chifukwa cha mibado ya mʼtsogolo
Psalms102:19 “Yehova anayangʼana pansi kuchokera ku malo ake opatulika mmwamba
Psalms102:20 kuti amve kubuwula kwa anthu a mʼndende
Psalms102:21 Kotero dzina la Yehova lidzalengezedwa mu Ziyoni ndi matamando ake mu Yerusalemu
Psalms102:22 pamene mitundu ya anthu ndi maufumu adzasonkhana kuti alambire Yehova.
Psalms102:23 Iye anathyola mphamvu zanga pa nthawi ya moyo wanga; Iyeyo anafupikitsa masiku anga.
Psalms102:24 Choncho Ine ndinati: “Musandichotse
Psalms102:25 Pachiyambi Inu munakhazikitsa maziko a dziko lapansi ndipo mayiko akumwamba ndi ntchito ya manja anu.
Psalms102:26 Izi zidzatha
Psalms102:27 Koma Inu simusintha
Psalms102:28 Ana a atumiki anu adzakhala pamaso panu; zidzukulu zawo zidzakhazikika pamaso panu.”
Psalms103:1 Salimo la Davide. Tamanda Yehova
Psalms103:2 Tamanda Yehova
Psalms103:3 Amene amakhululuka machimo ako onse ndi kuchiritsa nthenda zako zonse
Psalms103:4 amene awombola moyo wako ku dzenje ndi kukuveka chikondi ndi chifundo chake ngati chipewa chaufumu
Psalms103:5 amene akwaniritsa zokhumba zako ndi zinthu zabwino
Psalms103:6 Yehova amachita chilungamo ndipo amaweruza molungama onse opsinjika.
Psalms103:7 Iye anadziwitsa Mose njira zake
Psalms103:8 Yehova ndi wachifundo ndi wokoma mtima
Psalms103:9 Iye sadzatsutsa nthawi zonse
Psalms103:10 satichitira molingana ndi machimo athu
Psalms103:11 Pakuti monga kumwamba kuli kutali ndi dziko lapansi
Psalms103:12 monga kummawa kutalikirana ndi kumadzulo
Psalms103:13 Monga bambo amachitira chifundo ana ake
Psalms103:14 pakuti Iye amadziwa momwe tinawumbidwira
Psalms103:15 Kunena za munthu
Psalms103:16 koma mphepo imawombapo ndipo silionekanso ndipo malo ake sakumbukirikanso.
Psalms103:17 Koma kuchokera muyaya mpaka muyaya chikondi cha Yehova chili ndi iwo amene amamuopa
Psalms103:18 iwo amene amasunga pangano lake ndi kukumbukira kumvera malangizo ake.
Psalms103:19 Yehova wakhazikitsa mpando wake waufumu mmwamba ndipo ufumu wake umalamulira onse.
Psalms103:20 Tamandani Yehova
Psalms103:21 Tamandani Yehova
Psalms103:22 Tamandani Yehova
Psalms104:1 	Tamanda Yehova
Psalms104:2 Iye wadzifunditsa kuwala ngati chovala; watambasula miyamba ngati tenti
Psalms104:3 ndipo wayika pa madzi mitanda ya chipinda chake. Iye amasandutsa mitambo kukhala galeta lake
Psalms104:4 Amapanga mphepo kukhala amithenga ake
Psalms104:5 Anakhazikitsa dziko lapansi pa maziko ake; silingasunthike.
Psalms104:6 Munaliphimba ndi nyanja yozama ngati chovala; madzi anayimirira pamwamba pa mapiri.
Psalms104:7 Koma pakudzudzula kwanu madzi anathawa
Psalms104:8 Inu munamiza mapiri
Psalms104:9 Inu munayika malire ndipo sangathe kudutsa
Psalms104:10 Iye achititsa akasupe kutulutsa madzi kupita ku zigwa; madziwo amayenda pakati pa mapiri.
Psalms104:11 Iwo amapereka madzi kwa zirombo zonse zakuthengo; abulu akuthengo amapha ludzu lawo.
Psalms104:12 Mbalame zamlengalenga zimayika zisa mʼmbali mwa madzi; zimayimba pakati pa thambo.
Psalms104:13 Iye amathirira mapiri kuchokera ku zipinda zake zapamwamba; dziko lapansi limakhutitsidwa ndi chipatso cha ntchito yake.
Psalms104:14 Amameretsa udzu kuti ngʼombe zidye
Psalms104:15 vinyo amene amasangalatsa mtima wa munthu
Psalms104:16 Mitengo ya Yehova ndi yothiriridwa bwino
Psalms104:17 Mbalame zimamanga zisa zawo; kakowa ali ndi malo ake mʼmikungudzamo.
Psalms104:18 Mapiri ataliatali ndi a mbalale; mʼmingʼalu ya miyala ndi mobisalamo mbira.
Psalms104:19 Mwezi umasiyanitsa nyengo ndipo dzuwa limadziwa nthawi yake yolowera.
Psalms104:20 Inu mumabweretsa mdima nukhala usiku
Psalms104:21 Mikango imabangula kufuna nyama
Psalms104:22 Dzuwa limatuluka ndipo iyo imapita kukabisala; imabwerera kukagona pansi mʼmapanga awo.
Psalms104:23 Pamenepo munthu amapita ku ntchito yake
Psalms104:24 Ntchito zanu ndi zochulukadi Inu Yehova! Munazipanga zonse mwanzeru
Psalms104:25 Kuli nyanja yayikulu ndi yotambalala
Psalms104:26 Kumeneko sitima zapamadzi zimayenda uku ndi uku
Psalms104:27 Zonsezi zimayangʼana kwa Inu kuti muzipatse chakudya chawo pa nthawi yake yoyenera.
Psalms104:28 Mukazipatsa
Psalms104:29 Mukabisa nkhope yanu
Psalms104:30 Mukatumiza mzimu wanu
Psalms104:31 Ulemerero wa Yehova ukhalebe mpaka muyaya; Yehova akondwere ndi ntchito ya manja ake;
Psalms104:32 Iye amene amayangʼana dziko lapansi ndipo limanjenjemera
Psalms104:33 Ine ndidzayimbira Yehova moyo wanga wonse; ndidzayimbira matamando Mulungu wanga nthawi yonse imene ndili ndi moyo.
Psalms104:34 Zolingalira zanga zikhale zomukomera Iye
Psalms104:35 Koma anthu ochimwa awonongeke pa dziko lapansi ndipo anthu oyipa asapezekenso. Tamanda Yehova
Psalms105:1 Yamikani Yehova
Psalms105:2 Imbirani Iye
Psalms105:3 Munyadire dzina lake loyera; mitima ya iwo amene amafunafuna Yehova ikondwere.
Psalms105:4 Dalirani Yehova ndi mphamvu zake; funafunani nkhope yake nthawi yonse.
Psalms105:5 Kumbukirani zodabwitsa zimene Iye anazichita
Psalms105:6 inu zidzukulu za Abrahamu mtumiki wake
Psalms105:7 Iye ndiye Yehova Mulungu wathu; maweruzo ake ali pa dziko lonse lapansi.
Psalms105:8 Iyeyo amakumbukira pangano lake kwamuyaya
Psalms105:9 pangano limene Iye anapanga ndi Abrahamu
Psalms105:10 Iye analitsimikiza kwa Yakobo monga zophunzitsa
Psalms105:11 “Ndidzapereka kwa iwe dziko la Kanaani ngati gawo la cholowa chako.”
Psalms105:12 Pamene iwo anali ngati anthu ochepa mʼchiwerengero
Psalms105:13 ankayendayenda kuchoka ku mtundu wina wa anthu ndi kupita ku mtundu wina
Psalms105:14 Iye sanalole wina aliyense kuwapondereza; anadzudzula mafumu chifukwa cha iwo:
Psalms105:15 “Musakhudze odzozedwa anga; musachitire choyipa aneneri anga.”
Psalms105:16 Iye anabweretsa njala pa dziko ndipo anawononga chakudya chonse;
Psalms105:17 Iyeyo anatumiza munthu patsogolo pawo
Psalms105:18 Iwo anavulaza mapazi ake ndi matangadza
Psalms105:19 mpaka zimene Iye ananeneratu zitakwaniritsidwa
Psalms105:20 Mfumu inatuma munthu kukamumasula
Psalms105:21 Anamuyika kukhala wolamulira nyumba yake
Psalms105:22 kulangiza ana a mfumu monga ankafunira ndi kuphunzitsa nzeru akuluakulu.
Psalms105:23 Tsono Israeli analowa mu Igupto; Yakobo anakhala monga mlendo mʼdziko la Hamu.
Psalms105:24 Yehova anachulukitsa anthu ake; ndipo anachititsa kuti akhale ochuluka kwambiri kuposa adani awo;
Psalms105:25 amene mitima yawo anayitembenuza kuti idane ndi anthu ake
Psalms105:26 Yehova anatuma Mose mtumiki wake
Psalms105:27 Iwo anachita zizindikiro zozizwitsa pakati pawo
Psalms105:28 Yehova anatumiza mdima nasandutsa dziko kuti likhale la mdima. Koma anthuwo anakaniratu mawu a Yehova.
Psalms105:29 Yehova anasandutsa madzi awo kukhala magazi
Psalms105:30 Dziko lawo linadzaza ndi achule amene analowa mʼzipinda zogona za olamulira awo.
Psalms105:31 Iye anayankhula
Psalms105:32 Iyeyo anatembenuza mvula yawo kukhala matalala
Psalms105:33 Anagwetsa mitengo yawo ya mpesa ndi mitengo yawo ya mkuyu
Psalms105:34 Iye anayankhula
Psalms105:35 zinadya chilichonse chobiriwira cha mʼdziko lawo
Psalms105:36 Kenaka anakantha ana onse oyamba kubadwa a mʼdziko lawo
Psalms105:37 Yehova anatulutsa Israeli
Psalms105:38 Dziko la Igupto linakondwa pamene iwo anachoka
Psalms105:39 Iye anatambasula mitambo ngati chofunda chawo
Psalms105:40 Iwo anapempha
Psalms105:41 Iye anatsekula thanthwe
Psalms105:42 Pakuti anakumbukira lonjezo lake loyera limene linaperekedwa kwa Abrahamu mtumiki wake.
Psalms105:43 Iye anatulutsa anthu ake akukondwera
Psalms105:44 Iye anawapatsa mayiko a anthu a mitundu ina ndipo anakhala olowamʼmalo a zimene ena anazivutikira
Psalms105:45 kuti iwo asunge malangizo ake ndi kutsatira malamulo ake. Tamandani Yehova.
Psalms106:1 	Tamandani Yehova. Yamikani Yehova chifukwa ndi wabwino; pakuti chikondi chake ndi chosatha.
Psalms106:2 Ndani angathe kufotokoza za ntchito zamphamvu za Yehova kapena kumutamanda mokwanira?
Psalms106:3 Odala ndi amene amasunga chilungamo
Psalms106:4 Mundikumbukire Yehova
Psalms106:5 kuti ndidzasangalale ndi chuma cha anthu anu osankhika
Psalms106:6 Ife tachimwa monga momwe anachitira makolo athu; tachita zolakwa ndipo tachita moyipa.
Psalms106:7 Pamene makolo athu anali mu Igupto
Psalms106:8 Komabe Iye anawapulumutsa chifukwa cha dzina lake
Psalms106:9 Anadzudzula Nyanja Yofiira
Psalms106:10 Anawapulumutsa mʼdzanja la amaliwongo; anawawombola mʼdzanja la mdani.
Psalms106:11 Madzi anamiza adani awo
Psalms106:12 Kenaka iwo anakhulupirira malonjezo ake ndi kuyimba nyimbo zamatamando.
Psalms106:13 Koma posachedwa anayiwala zimene Iye anachita
Psalms106:14 Mʼchipululu
Psalms106:15 Choncho Iye anawapatsa chimene anapempha
Psalms106:16 Mʼmisasa
Psalms106:17 Nthaka inatsekuka ndipo inameza Datani; inakwirira gulu la Abiramu.
Psalms106:18 Moto unayaka pakati pa otsatira awo; lawi lamoto linapsereza anthu oyipa.
Psalms106:19 Iwo anapanga mwana wangʼombe pa Horebu ndi kulambira fano loyengedwa kuchokera ku chitsulo.
Psalms106:20 Anasinthanitsa ulemerero wawo ndi fano la ngʼombe yayimuna imene imadya udzu.
Psalms106:21 Anayiwala Mulungu amene anawapulumutsa
Psalms106:22 zozizwitsa mʼdziko la Hamu ndi machitidwe ake woopsa pa Nyanja Yofiira.
Psalms106:23 Choncho Iye anawawuza kuti adzawawononga
Psalms106:24 Motero iwo ananyoza dziko lokoma; sanakhulupirire malonjezo ake.
Psalms106:25 Anangʼungʼudza mʼmatenti mwawo ndipo sanamvere Yehova.
Psalms106:26 Kotero Iye analumbira atakweza dzanja lake
Psalms106:27 kuchititsa kuti zidzukulu zawo zifere pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina ndi kuwabalalitsa mʼdziko lonse.
Psalms106:28 Iwo anayamba kupembedza Baala-Peori ndi kudya nsembe zoperekedwa kwa milungu yopanda moyo;
Psalms106:29 anaputa mkwiyo wa Yehova pa machitidwe awo oyipa
Psalms106:30 Koma Finehasi anayimirira ndi kulowererapo
Psalms106:31 Chimenechi ndicho chinayesedwa chilungamo chake
Psalms106:32 Pa madzi a ku Meriba iwo anakwiyitsa Yehova ndipo mavuto anabwera kwa Mose chifukwa cha anthuwo
Psalms106:33 pakuti iwowo anawukira mzimu wa Mulungu
Psalms106:34 Aisraeliwo sanawononge mitundu ya anthu monga momwe Yehova anawalamulira.
Psalms106:35 Koma anasakanizana ndi anthu a mitundu inayo ndi kuphunzira miyambo yawo.
Psalms106:36 Ndipo anapembedza mafano awo
Psalms106:37 Anapereka nsembe ana awo aamuna ndi ana awo aakazi kwa ziwanda.
Psalms106:38 Anakhetsa magazi a anthu osalakwa
Psalms106:39 Iwo anadzidetsa okha ndi zimene anachita; ndi machitidwe awo amakhala ngati munthu wachigololo.
Psalms106:40 Tsono Yehova anakwiya ndi anthu ake ndipo ananyansidwa ndi cholowa chake.
Psalms106:41 Iye anawapereka kwa anthu a mitundu ina
Psalms106:42 Adani awo anawazunza ndi kuwakhazika pansi pa mphamvu yawo.
Psalms106:43 Iye ankawapulumutsa nthawi zambiri
Psalms106:44 Koma Iye anaona kuzunzika kwawo pamene anamva kulira kwawo;
Psalms106:45 Chifukwa cha iwo Iye anakumbukira pangano lake ndipo anawalezera mtima chifukwa cha kukula kwa chikondi chake.
Psalms106:46 Iye anachititsa kuti amene anawagwira iwo ukapolo awamvere chisoni.
Psalms106:47 Tipulumutseni Inu Yehova Mulungu wathu
Psalms106:48 Atamandike Yehova
Psalms107:1 Yamikani Yehova chifukwa ndi wabwino; pakuti chikondi chake ndi chosatha.
Psalms107:2 Owomboledwa a Yehova anene zimenezi amene Iyeyo anawawombola mʼdzanja la mdani
Psalms107:3 iwo amene anawasonkhanitsa kuchokera ku mayiko
Psalms107:4 Ena anayendayenda mʼchipululu mopanda kanthu
Psalms107:5 Iwo anamva njala ndi ludzu
Psalms107:6 Pamenepo analirira Yehova mʼmavuto awo ndipo Iye anawapulumutsa ku masautso awo.
Psalms107:7 Iye anawatsogolera mʼnjira yowongoka kupita ku mzinda umene anakakhazikikako.
Psalms107:8 Ayamike Yehova chifukwa cha chikondi chake chosatha ndi chifukwa cha machitidwe ake odabwitsa kwa anthu onse
Psalms107:9 pakuti Iye wapha ludzu la munthu womva ludzu ndipo wakhutitsa wanjala ndi zinthu zabwino.
Psalms107:10 Ena anakhala mu mdima ndi mʼchisoni chachikulu
Psalms107:11 pakuti iwowo anawukira mawu a Mulungu ndi kunyoza uphungu wa Wammwambamwamba.
Psalms107:12 Kotero Iye anawapereka kuti agwire ntchito yakalavulagaga; anagwa pansi ndipo panalibe woti awathandize.
Psalms107:13 Pamenepo analirira Yehova mʼmasautso awo ndipo Iye anawapulumutsa ku masautso awo.
Psalms107:14 Yehova anawatulutsa mu mdima ndi mʼchisoni chachikulu ndipo anadula maunyolo awo.
Psalms107:15 Ayamike Yehova chifukwa cha chikondi chake chosatha ndi machitidwe ake odabwitsa kwa anthu onse
Psalms107:16 pakuti Iye amathyola zipata zamkuwa ndi kudula pakati mipiringidzo yachitsulo.
Psalms107:17 Ena anakhala zitsiru chifukwa cha njira zawo zowukira
Psalms107:18 Iwo ananyansidwa ndi chakudya chilichonse ndipo anafika pafupi ndi zipata za imfa.
Psalms107:19 Pamenepo analirira Yehova mʼmasautso awo ndipo Iye anawapulumutsa ku masautso awowo.
Psalms107:20 Iye anatumiza mawu ake ndi kuwachiritsa; anawalanditsa ku manda.
Psalms107:21 Ayamike Yehova chifukwa cha chikondi chake chosatha ndi machitidwe ake odabwitsa kwa anthu.
Psalms107:22 Apereke nsembe yachiyamiko ndi kufotokoza za ntchito zake ndi nyimbo zachimwemwe.
Psalms107:23 Ena anayenda pa nyanja mʼsitima zapamadzi; Iwo anali anthu amalonda pa nyanja yayikulu.
Psalms107:24 Anaona ntchito za Yehova
Psalms107:25 Pakuti Iye anayankhula ndi kuwutsa mphepo yamkuntho imene inabweretsa mafunde ataliatali.
Psalms107:26 Sitima za pamadzizo zinatukulidwa mmwamba ndi kutsikira pansi pakuya; pamene amawonongeka
Psalms107:27 Anachita chizungulire ndi kudzandira ngati anthu oledzera; anali pa mapeto a moyo wawo.
Psalms107:28 Pamenepo analirira Yehova mʼmasautso awo ndipo Iyeyo anawapulumutsa ku masautso awo.
Psalms107:29 Yehova analetsa namondwe
Psalms107:30 Anali osangalala pamene kunakhala bata
Psalms107:31 Ayamike Yehova chifukwa cha chikondi chake chosatha ndi machitidwe ake odabwitsa kwa anthu.
Psalms107:32 Akuze Iye mu msonkhano wa anthu ndi kumutamanda pabwalo la akuluakulu.
Psalms107:33 Iye anasandutsa mitsinje kukhala chipululu
Psalms107:34 ndiponso nthaka yachonde kukhala nthaka yamchere
Psalms107:35 Anasandutsa chipululu kukhala mayiwe a madzi ndi nthaka yowuma kukhala akasupe a madzi oyenda;
Psalms107:36 kumeneko Iye anabweretsa anthu anjala kuti azikhalako
Psalms107:37 Anafesa mbewu mʼminda ndi kudzala mipesa ndipo anakolola zipatso zochuluka;
Psalms107:38 Yehova anawadalitsa
Psalms107:39 Kenaka chiwerengero chawo chinachepa ndipo iwo anatsitsidwa chifukwa cha mazunzo
Psalms107:40 Iye amene amakhuthulira mʼnyozo pa olemekezeka anawachititsa kuyendayenda mʼmalo owumawo wopanda njira.
Psalms107:41 Koma Iyeyo anakweza anthu osowa kuchoka ku masautso awo ngati magulu a nkhosa.
Psalms107:42 Anthu olungama mtima amaona ndi kusangalala
Psalms107:43 Aliyense wanzeru asamalitse zinthu zimenezi ndi kuganizira za chikondi chachikulu cha Yehova.
Psalms108:1 Nyimbo. Salimo la Davide. Mtima wanga ndi wokhazikika
Psalms108:2 Dzukani
Psalms108:3 Ndidzakutamandani Yehova
Psalms108:4 Pakuti chikondi chanu nʼchachikulu
Psalms108:5 Kwezekani Inu Mulungu
Psalms108:6 Tipulumutseni ndi kutithandiza ndi dzanja lanu lamanja kuti iwo amene mumawakonda apulumutsidwe.
Psalms108:7 Mulungu wayankhula kuchokera ku malo ake opatulika: “Mwachipambano Ine ndidzagawa Sekemu ndipo ndidzayesa chigwa cha Sukoti.
Psalms108:8 Giliyadi ndi wanga
Psalms108:9 Mowabu ndi mbale yanga yosambiramo ndidzaponya nsapato zanga pa Edomu; ndidzafuwula mopambana pa Filisitiya.”
Psalms108:10 Ndani adzandifikitsa ku mzinda wotetezedwa? Ndani adzanditsogolera ku Edomu?
Psalms108:11 Kodi sindinu Mulungu
Psalms108:12 Tithandizeni ife kulimbana ndi mdani
Psalms108:13 Chifukwa cha Mulungu wathu
Psalms109:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wamayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Mulungu amene ndimakutamandani
Psalms109:2 pakuti anthu oyipa ndi achinyengo atsekula pakamwa pawo kutsutsana nane; iwo ayankhula motsutsana nane ndi malilime abodza.
Psalms109:3 Andizungulira ndi mawu audani
Psalms109:4 Mʼmalo mwa chikondi changa amandineneza
Psalms109:5 Iwo amandibwezera zoyipa mʼmalo mwa zabwino
Psalms109:6 Sankhani munthu woyipa kuti amutsutse iye; lolani wotsutsa ayime ku dzanja lake lamanja.
Psalms109:7 Pamene aweruzidwa
Psalms109:8 Masiku ake akhale owerengeka; munthu wina atenge malo ake a utsogoleri.
Psalms109:9 Ana ake akhale amasiye ndipo mkazi wake akhale wopanda mwamuna.
Psalms109:10 Ana ake akhale oyendayenda ndi opemphapempha; apirikitsidwe kuchoka pa mabwinja a nyumba zawo.
Psalms109:11 Wokongoza alande zonse zimene ali nazo; alendo afunkhe ntchito za manja ake.
Psalms109:12 Pasapezeke ndi mmodzi yemwe womukomera mtima kapena kumvera chisoni ana ake amasiye.
Psalms109:13 Zidzukulu zake zithe nʼkufa
Psalms109:14 Mphulupulu za makolo ake zikumbukiridwe pamaso pa Yehova; tchimo la amayi ake lisadzafafanizidwe.
Psalms109:15 Machimo awo akhale pamaso pa Yehova nthawi zonse
Psalms109:16 Pakuti iye sanaganizirepo zochita chifundo
Psalms109:17 Anakonda kutemberera
Psalms109:18 Anavala kutemberera ngati chovala; kutemberera kunalowa mʼthupi lake ngati madzi
Psalms109:19 Matemberero akhale ngati chofunda chodzikutira nacho
Psalms109:20 Awa akhale malipiro ochokera kwa Yehova pa onditsutsa anga
Psalms109:21 Koma Inu Ambuye Wamphamvuzonse
Psalms109:22 Pakuti ndine wosauka ndi wosowa
Psalms109:23 Ndikuzimirira ngati mthunzi wa kumadzulo
Psalms109:24 Mawondo anga afowoka chifukwa cha kusala zakudya
Psalms109:25 Ndine chinthu chotonzedwa kwa otsutsana nane; akandiona
Psalms109:26 Thandizeni Inu Yehova Mulungu wanga; pulumutseni molingana ndi chikondi chanu.
Psalms109:27 Adaniwo adziwe kuti limeneli ndi dzanja lanu
Psalms109:28 Angathe kutemberera
Psalms109:29 Onditsutsa adzavekedwa mnyozo
Psalms109:30 Ndi pakamwa panga ndidzathokoza Yehova kwambiri; ndidzamutamanda mʼgulu lalikulu la anthu.
Psalms109:31 Popeza Iye amayima ku dzanja lamanja la munthu wosowayo
Psalms110:1 Salimo la Davide. Yehova akuwuza Mbuye wanga kuti
Psalms110:2 Yehova adzakuza ndodo yamphamvu ya ufumu wako kuchokera mʼZiyoni; udzalamulira pakati pa adani ako.
Psalms110:3 Ankhondo ako adzakhala odzipereka pa tsiku lako la nkhondo. Atavala chiyero chaulemerero
Psalms110:4 Yehova walumbira ndipo sadzasintha maganizo ake: “Ndiwe wansembe mpaka muyaya monga mwa unsembe wa Melikizedeki.”
Psalms110:5 Ambuye ali kudzanja lako lamanja; Iye adzaponda mafumu pa tsiku la ukali wake.
Psalms110:6 Adzaweruza anthu a mitundu ina
Psalms110:7 Iye adzamwa mu mtsinje wa mʼmbali mwa njira; choncho adzaweramutsa mutu wake.
Psalms111:1 	Tamandani Yehova. Ndidzathokoza Yehova ndi mtima wanga wonse mʼbwalo la anthu olungama mtima ndi pa msonkhano.
Psalms111:2 Ntchito za Yehova nʼzazikulu; onse amene amakondwera nazo amazilingalira.
Psalms111:3 Zochita zake ndi za ulemerero ndi zaufumu
Psalms111:4 Iye wachititsa kuti zodabwitsa zake zikumbukirike; Yehova ndi wokoma mtima ndi wachifundo.
Psalms111:5 Amapereka chakudya kwa amene amamuopa Iye; amakumbukira pangano lake kwamuyaya.
Psalms111:6 Waonetsa anthu ake mphamvu ya ntchito zake
Psalms111:7 Ntchito za manja ake ndi zokhulupirika ndi zolungama; malangizo ake onse ndi odalirika.
Psalms111:8 Malamulo ndi okhazikika ku nthawi za nthawi
Psalms111:9 Iyeyo amawombola anthu ake; anakhazikitsa pangano lake kwamuyaya dzina lake ndi loyera ndi loopsa.
Psalms111:10 Kuopa Yehova ndicho chiyambi cha nzeru; onse amene amatsatira malangizo ake amamvetsa bwino zinthu. Iye ndi wotamandika mpaka muyaya.
Psalms112:1 	Tamandani Yehova. Wodala munthu amene amaopa Yehova
Psalms112:2 Ana ake adzakhala amphamvu mʼdziko; mʼbado wa olungama mtima udzadalitsidwa.
Psalms112:3 Kulemera ndi chuma zili mʼnyumba yake
Psalms112:4 Ngakhale mu mdima kuwala kumatulukira olungama mtima; wokoma mtima
Psalms112:5 Zinthu zabwino zidzabwera kwa iye amene amapereka mowolowamanja ndi wokongoletsa mwaufulu
Psalms112:6 Ndithu sadzagwedezeka; munthu wolungama sadzayiwalika mpaka muyaya.
Psalms112:7 Saopa akamva zoyipa zimene zachitika; mtima wake ndi wokhazikika ndipo amadalira Yehova.
Psalms112:8 Mtima wake ndi wotetezedwa
Psalms112:9 Wopereka mphatso zake mowolowamanja kwa osauka
Psalms112:10 Munthu woyipa adzaona zimenezi ndipo adzapsa mtima; adzakukuta mano ake ndipo adzasungunuka. Zolakalaka za anthu oyipa sizidzachitika konse.
Psalms113:1 	Tamandani Yehova. Mutamandeni
Psalms113:2 Yehova atamandidwe
Psalms113:3 Kuyambira ku matulukiro a dzuwa mpaka ku malowero ake
Psalms113:4 Yehova wakwezeka pa anthu a mitundu yonse
Psalms113:5 Ndani wofanana ndi Yehova Mulungu wathu
Psalms113:6 amene amawerama pansi kuyangʼana miyamba ndi dziko lapansi?
Psalms113:7 Iye amakweza munthu wosauka kuchoka pa fumbi ndi kutukula munthu wosowa kuchoka pa dzala;
Psalms113:8 amawakhazika pamodzi ndi mafumu
Psalms113:9 Amakhazikitsa mayi wosabereka mʼnyumba yake monga mayi wa ana wosangalala. Tamandani Yehova.
Psalms114:1 Pamene Israeli anatuluka mu Igupto
Psalms114:2 Yuda anasanduka malo opatulika a Mulungu
Psalms114:3 Nyanja inaona ndi kuthawa
Psalms114:4 mapiri analumphalumpha ngati nkhosa zazimuna
Psalms114:5 Nʼchifukwa chiyani iwe unathawa? iwe mtsinje wa Yorodani unabwereranji mʼmbuyo?
Psalms114:6 inu mapiri
Psalms114:7 Njenjemera pamaso pa Ambuye iwe dziko lapansi
Psalms114:8 amene anasandutsa thanthwe kukhala chitsime
Psalms115:1 Kwa ife ayi Yehova
Psalms115:2 Chifukwa chiyani anthu a mitundu ina akunena kuti
Psalms115:3 Mulungu wathu ali kumwamba; Iye amachita chilichonse chimene chimamukondweretsa.
Psalms115:4 Koma mafano awo ndi siliva ndi golide
Psalms115:5 Pakamwa ali napo koma sayankhula
Psalms115:6 makutu ali nawo koma samva
Psalms115:7 manja ali nawo koma akakhudza samva kanthu; mapazi ali nawo koma sayenda; kapena pakhosi pawo kutulutsa mawu.
Psalms115:8 Anthu amene amapanga mafanowo adzafanana nawo
Psalms115:9 Inu Aisraeli
Psalms115:10 Iwe nyumba ya Aaroni
Psalms115:11 Inu amene mumaopa Iye
Psalms115:12 Yehova watikumbukira ndipo adzatidalitsa: adzadalitsa nyumba ya Israeli
Psalms115:13 adzadalitsa iwo amene amaopa Yehova; aangʼono ndi aakulu omwe.
Psalms115:14 Yehova akuwonjezereni madalitso; inuyo pamodzi ndi ana anu.
Psalms115:15 Mudalitsidwe ndi Yehova
Psalms115:16 Kumwamba ndi kwa Yehova
Psalms115:17 Si anthu akufa amene amatamanda Yehova
Psalms115:18 ndi ife amene timatamanda Yehova
Psalms116:1 Ndimakonda Yehova pakuti Iyeyo amamva mawu anga; Iye amamva kulira kwanga kopempha chifundo.
Psalms116:2 Pakuti ananditchera khutu
Psalms116:3 Zingwe za imfa zinandizinga
Psalms116:4 Pamenepo ndinayitana dzina la Yehova: “Inu Yehova
Psalms116:5 Yehova ndi wokoma mtima ndi wolungama Mulungu wathu ndi wodzaza ndi chifundo.
Psalms116:6 Yehova amateteza munthu wodzichepetsa mtima; pamene ndinali ndi chosowa chachikulu
Psalms116:7 Pumula iwe moyo wanga
Psalms116:8 Pakuti Inu Yehova mwapulumutsa moyo wanga ku imfa
Psalms116:9 kuti ine ndiyende pamaso pa Yehova mʼdziko la anthu amoyo.
Psalms116:10 Ine ndinakhulupirira; choncho ndinati
Psalms116:11 Ndipo ndili mʼnkhawa yanga ndinati
Psalms116:12 Ndingamubwezere chiyani Yehova
Psalms116:13 Ndidzakweza chikho cha chipulumutso ndipo ndidzayitana dzina la Yehova.
Psalms116:14 Ndidzakwaniritsa malonjezo anga kwa Yehova pamaso pa anthu ake onse.
Psalms116:15 Imfa ya anthu oyera mtima ndi yamtengowapatali pamaso pa Yehova.
Psalms116:16 Inu Yehova
Psalms116:17 Ndidzapereka nsembe yachiyamiko kwa Inu ndipo ndidzayitanira pa dzina la Yehova.
Psalms116:18 Ndidzakwaniritsa malonjezo anga kwa Yehova pamaso pa anthu ake onse
Psalms116:19 mʼmabwalo a nyumba ya Yehova
Psalms117:1 Tamandani Yehova
Psalms117:2 Pakuti chikondi chake pa ife ndi chachikulu
Psalms118:1 Yamikani Yehova chifukwa ndi wabwino; pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika ndi chosatha.
Psalms118:2 Israeli anene kuti: “Chikondi chake ndi chosatha.”
Psalms118:3 Banja la Aaroni linene kuti
Psalms118:4 Iwo amene amaopa Yehova anene kuti: “Chikondi chake ndi chosatha.”
Psalms118:5 Ndili mʼmasautso anga ndinalirira Yehova
Psalms118:6 Yehova ali nane; sindidzachita mantha. Munthu angandichite chiyani?
Psalms118:7 Yehova ali nane; Iye ndiye thandizo langa. Ndidzayangʼana adani anga mwachipambano.
Psalms118:8 Nʼkwabwino kuthawira kwa Yehova kusiyana ndi kudalira munthu.
Psalms118:9 Nʼkwabwino kuthawira kwa Yehova kusiyana ndi kudalira mafumu.
Psalms118:10 Anthu a mitundu yonse anandizinga
Psalms118:11 Anandizinga mbali zonse
Psalms118:12 Anandizinga ngati njuchi
Psalms118:13 Anandikankha uku ndi uko ndipo ndinali pafupi kugwa
Psalms118:14 Yehova ndiye mphamvu yanga ndi nyimbo yanga; Iye wakhala chipulumutso changa.
Psalms118:15 Mfuwu wachimwemwe ndi chipambano ukumveka mʼmatenti a anthu olungama mtima kuti: “Dzanja lamanja la Yehova lachita zamphamvu!
Psalms118:16 Dzanja lamanja la Yehova latukulidwa mmwamba Dzanja lamanja la Yehova lachita zamphamvu!”
Psalms118:17 Sindidzafa koma ndidzakhala ndi moyo ndipo ndidzalalika za ntchito ya Yehova.
Psalms118:18 Yehova wandilanga koopsa
Psalms118:19 Tsekulireni zipata zachilungamo
Psalms118:20 Ichi ndicho chipata cha Yehova chimene olungama mtima okha adzalowerapo.
Psalms118:21 Ndidzakuyamikani chifukwa Inu munandiyankha; mwakhala chipulumutso changa.
Psalms118:22 Mwala umene amisiri omanga nyumba anawukana wasanduka wapangodya;
Psalms118:23 Yehova ndiye wachita zimenezi ndipo nʼzodabwitsa pamaso pathu.
Psalms118:24 Lero ndiye tsiku limene Yehova walipanga; tiyeni tikondwere ndi kusangalala nalo.
Psalms118:25 Inu Yehova
Psalms118:26 Wodala amene akubwera mʼdzina la Yehova. Tikukudalitsani kuchokera ku nyumba ya Yehova.
Psalms118:27 Yehova ndi Mulungu
Psalms118:28 Inu ndinu Mulungu wanga
Psalms118:29 Yamikani Yehova chifukwa ndi wabwino; pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika ndi chosatha.
Psalms119:1 Odala ndi amene moyo wawo ulibe cholakwa
Psalms119:2 Odala ndi amene amasunga malamulo ake
Psalms119:3 Sachita cholakwa chilichonse; amayenda mʼnjira zake.
Psalms119:4 Inu mwapereka malangizo ndipo ayenera kutsatidwa kwathunthu.
Psalms119:5 Aa! Ndikanakonda njira zanga zikanakhala zokhazikika pa kumvera zophunzitsa zanu!
Psalms119:6 Pamenepo ine sindikanachititsidwa manyazi
Psalms119:7 Ndidzakutamandani ndi mtima wolungama
Psalms119:8 Ndidzamvera zophunzitsa zanu; musanditaye kwathunthu.
Psalms119:9 Kodi mnyamata angathe bwanji kuyeretsa mayendedwe ake? Akawasamala potsata mawu anu.
Psalms119:10 Ndimakufunafunani ndi mtima wanga wonse; musalole kuti ndisochere kuchoka pa malamulo anu.
Psalms119:11 Ndasunga mawu anu mu mtima mwanga kuti ndisakuchimwireni.
Psalms119:12 Mutamandike Inu Yehova; phunzitseni malamulo anu.
Psalms119:13 Ndi milomo yanga ndimafotokoza malamulo anu onse amene amachokera pakamwa panu.
Psalms119:14 Ndimakondwera potsatira malamulo anu monga momwe munthu amakondwera akakhala ndi chuma chambiri.
Psalms119:15 Ndimalingalira malangizo anu ndipo ndimaganizira njira zanu.
Psalms119:16 Ndimakondwera ndi malamulo anu; sindidzayiwala konse mawu anu.
Psalms119:17 Chitirani zokoma mtumiki wanu
Psalms119:18 Tsekulani maso anga kuti ndithe kuona zinthu zodabwitsa mʼmalamulo anu.
Psalms119:19 Ine ndine mlendo pa dziko lapansi; musandibisire malamulo anu.
Psalms119:20 Moyo wanga wafowoka polakalaka malamulo anu nthawi zonse.
Psalms119:21 Inu mumadzudzula onyada
Psalms119:22 Mundichotsere chitonzo ndi mnyozo pakuti ndimasunga malamulo anu.
Psalms119:23 Ngakhale mafumu akhale pamodzi kundinyoza
Psalms119:24 Malamulo anu amandikondweretsa; ndiwo amene amandilangiza.
Psalms119:25 Moyo wanga wakangamira fumbi; tsitsimutseni molingana ndi mawu anu.
Psalms119:26 Ndinafotokoza njira zanga ndipo Inu munandiyankha; phunzitseni malamulo anu.
Psalms119:27 Mundidziwitse chiphunzitso cha malangizo anu; pamenepo ndidzalingalira zodabwitsa zanu.
Psalms119:28 Moyo wanga wafowoka ndi chisoni; limbikitseni monga mwa mawu anu.
Psalms119:29 Mundichotse mʼnjira zachinyengo; mundikomere mtima pondiphunzitsa malamulo anu.
Psalms119:30 Ndasankha njira ya choonadi; ndayika malamulo anu pa mtima panga.
Psalms119:31 Ndagwiritsitsa umboni wanu
Psalms119:32 Ndimathamanga mʼnjira ya malamulo anu
Psalms119:33 Yehova
Psalms119:34 Mundipatse mtima womvetsa zinthu ndipo ndidzasunga malamulo anu ndi kuwamvera ndi mtima wanga wonse.
Psalms119:35 Munditsogolere mʼnjira ya malamulo anu
Psalms119:36 Tembenuzani mtima wanga kuti uzikonda malamulo anu
Psalms119:37 Tembenuzani maso anga kuchoka ku zinthu zachabechabe; sungani moyo wanga monga mwa mawu anu.
Psalms119:38 Kwaniritsani lonjezo lanu kwa mtumiki wanu
Psalms119:39 Mundichotsere chipongwe chimene ndikuchiopa
Psalms119:40 Taonani
Psalms119:41 Chikondi chanu chosasinthika chibwere kwa ine
Psalms119:42 ndipo ndidzayankha amene amandinyoza
Psalms119:43 Musakwatule mawu a choonadi mʼkamwa mwanga
Psalms119:44 Ndidzasunga malamulo anu nthawi zonse
Psalms119:45 Ndidzayendayenda mwaufulu
Psalms119:46 Ndidzayankhula za umboni wanu pamaso pa mfumu ndipo sindidzachititsidwa manyazi
Psalms119:47 popeza ndimakondwera ndi malamulo anu chifukwa ndimawakonda.
Psalms119:48 Ndikweza manja anga ku malamulo anu
Psalms119:49 Kumbukirani mawu anu kwa mtumiki wanu
Psalms119:50 Chitonthozo changa pa masautso anga ndi ichi: lonjezo lanu limasunga moyo wanga.
Psalms119:51 Odzikuza amandinyoza popanda chowaletsa
Psalms119:52 Ndimakumbukira malamulo anu Yehova akalekale
Psalms119:53 Ndayipidwa kwambiri chifukwa cha oyipa amene ataya malamulo anu.
Psalms119:54 Zophunzitsa zanu ndi mitu ya nyimbo yanga kulikonse kumene ndigonako.
Psalms119:55 Usiku ndimakumbukira dzina lanu Yehova
Psalms119:56 Ichi ndicho ndakhala ndikuchita: ndimasunga malangizo anu.
Psalms119:57 Yehova
Psalms119:58 Ndimafunafuna nkhope yanu ndi mtima wanga wonse; mundikomere mtima monga mwa lonjezo lanu.
Psalms119:59 Ndinalingalira za njira zanga ndipo ndatembenuza mayendedwe anga kutsatira umboni wanu.
Psalms119:60 Ndidzafulumira ndipo sindidzazengereza kumvera malamulo anu.
Psalms119:61 Ngakhale oyipa andimange ndi zingwe
Psalms119:62 Ndimadzuka pakati pa usiku kuyamika Inu chifukwa cha malamulo anu olungama.
Psalms119:63 Ine ndine bwenzi la onse amene amakukondani
Psalms119:64 Dziko lapansi ladzaza ndi chikondi chanu chosasinthika
Psalms119:65 Inu Yehova
Psalms119:66 Phunzitseni nzeru ndi chiweruzo chabwino
Psalms119:67 Ndisanayambe kuzunzika ndinasochera
Psalms119:68 Inu ndinu abwino ndipo zimene mumachita ndi zabwino; phunzitseni malamulo anu.
Psalms119:69 Ngakhale odzikuza andipaka mabodza
Psalms119:70 Mitima yawo ndi yowuma ndi yosakhudzidwa
Psalms119:71 Ndi bwino kuti ndinasautsidwa kuti ndithe kuphunzira malamulo anu.
Psalms119:72 Lamulo lochokera mʼkamwa mwanu limandikomera kwambiri kuposa ndalama zambirimbiri za siliva ndi golide.
Psalms119:73 Manja anu anandilenga ndi kundiwumba; patseni nzeru zomvetsa zinthu kuti ndiphunzire malamulo anu.
Psalms119:74 Iwo amene amakuopani akondwere akandiona
Psalms119:75 Ine ndikudziwa
Psalms119:76 Chikondi chanu chosasinthika chikhale chitonthozo changa
Psalms119:77 Chifundo chanu chindifikire kuti ndikhale ndi moyo
Psalms119:78 Odzikuza achititsidwe manyazi chifukwa cha kundilakwira popanda chifukwa; koma ine ndidzalingalira malangizo anu.
Psalms119:79 Iwo amene amakuopani atembenukire kwa ine
Psalms119:80 Mtima wanga ukhale wopanda cholakwa pa chiphunzitso chanu kuti ndisachititsidwe manyazi.
Psalms119:81 Moyo wanga wafowoka ndi kufunafuna chipulumutso chanu
Psalms119:82 Maso anga alefuka pofunafuna lonjezo lanu; Ine ndikuti
Psalms119:83 Ngakhale ndili ngati thumba lachikopa la vinyo pa utsi sindiyiwala zophunzitsa zanu.
Psalms119:84 Kodi mtumiki wanu ayenera kudikira mpaka liti? Kodi mudzawalanga liti amene amandizunza?
Psalms119:85 Anthu osalabadira za Mulungu
Psalms119:86 Malamulo anu onse ndi odalirika; thandizeni
Psalms119:87 Iwo anatsala pangʼono kundichotsa pa dziko lapansi koma sindinataye malangizo anu.
Psalms119:88 Sungani moyo wanga molingana ndi chikondi chanu chosasinthika
Psalms119:89 Mawu anu Yehova ndi amuyaya; akhazikika kumwambako.
Psalms119:90 Kukhulupirika kwanu kumakhala mpaka ku mibado yonse; Inu munakhazikitsa dziko lapansi ndipo lilipobe.
Psalms119:91 Malamulo anu alipobe mpaka lero lino
Psalms119:92 Malamulo anu akanapanda kukhala chikondwerero changa

Psalms119:96 Ndadziwa kuti zinthu zonse zili ndi malire
Psalms119:97 Ndithu

Psalms119:99 Ndimamvetsa zinthu kwambiri kuposa aphunzitsi anga onse popeza ndimalingalira umboni wanu.
Psalms119:100 Ndili ndi nzeru zochuluka zomvetsera zinthu kuposa anthu okalamba
Psalms119:101 Ndimaletsa miyendo yanga kuyenda mʼnjira iliyonse yoyipa kuti ndithe kumvera mawu anu.
Psalms119:102 Sindinapatuke kuchoka pa malamulo anu
Psalms119:103 Mawu anu ndi otsekemera ndikawalawa
Psalms119:104 Ndimapeza nzeru zodziwira zinthu kuchokera mʼmalangizo anu; kotero ndimadana ndi njira iliyonse yoyipa.
Psalms119:105 Mawu anu ndi nyale ya kumapazi kwanga ndi kuwunika kwa pa njira yanga.
Psalms119:106 Ndalumbira ndipo ndatsimikiza
Psalms119:107 Ndazunzika kwambiri; Inu Yehova
Psalms119:108 Inu Yehova
Psalms119:109 Ngakhale moyo wanga umakhala mʼzoopsa nthawi ndi nthawi
Psalms119:110 Anthu oyipa anditchera msampha
Psalms119:111 Umboni wanu ndiye cholowa changa kwamuyaya; Iwo ndiye chimwemwe cha mtima wanga.
Psalms119:112 Mtima wanga wakhazikika pa kusunga zophunzitsa zanu mpaka kumapeto kwenikweni.
Psalms119:113 Ndimadana ndi anthu apawiripawiri
Psalms119:114 Inu ndinu pothawirapo panga ndi chishango changa; chiyembekezo changa chili mʼmawu anu.
Psalms119:115 Chokani kwa ine
Psalms119:116 Mundichirikize molingana ndi lonjezo lanu
Psalms119:117 Gwirizizeni
Psalms119:118 Inu mumakana onse amene amasochera kuchoka pa zophunzitsa zanu
Psalms119:119 Anthu onse oyipa a pa dziko lapansi mumawayesa ngati zinthu zakudzala; nʼchifukwa chake ndimakonda umboni wanu.
Psalms119:120 Thupi langa limanjenjemera chifukwa cha kuopa Inu; ndimachita mantha ndi malamulo anu.
Psalms119:121 Ndachita zolungama ndi zabwino; musandisiye mʼmanja mwa ondizunza.
Psalms119:122 Onetsetsani kuti mtumiki wanu akukhala bwino
Psalms119:123 Maso anga alefuka
Psalms119:124 Muchite naye mtumiki wanu molingana ndi chikondi chanu chosasinthika
Psalms119:125 Ine ndine mtumiki wanu; patseni mzimu wondizindikiritsa
Psalms119:126 Yehova
Psalms119:127 Chifukwa choti ndimakonda malamulo anu kuposa golide
Psalms119:128 ndiponso chifukwa choti ndimaona kuti malangizo anu onse ndi wowongoka
Psalms119:129 Maumboni anu ndi odabwitsa nʼchifukwa chake ndimawamvera.
Psalms119:130 Mawu anu akamaphunzitsidwa amapereka kuwunika; ngakhale anthu wamba amamvetsetsa.
Psalms119:131 Ndimatsekula pakamwa panga ndi kupuma wefuwefu
Psalms119:132 Tembenukirani kwa ine ndipo mundichitire chifundo
Psalms119:133 Tsogolerani mayendedwe anga molingana ndi mawu anu; musalole kuti tchimo lizindilamulira.
Psalms119:134 Ndiwomboleni mʼdzanja la anthu ondizunza
Psalms119:135 Nkhope yanu iwalire mtumiki wanu ndipo mundiphunzitse malamulo anu.
Psalms119:136 Mitsinje ya misozi ikuyenda kuchoka mʼmaso mwanga
Psalms119:137 Yehova ndinu wolungama
Psalms119:138 Maumboni amene munatipatsa ndi olungama; ndi odalirika ndithu.
Psalms119:139 Ndikusautsidwa kwambiri mʼkati mwanga chifukwa adani anu amanyalanyaza mawu anu.
Psalms119:140 Mawu anu ndi woyera kwambiri nʼchifukwa chake mtumiki wanune ndimawakonda.
Psalms119:141 Ngakhale ndili wamngʼono ndi wonyozeka
Psalms119:142 Chilungamo chanu nʼchamuyaya
Psalms119:143 Mavuto ndi masautso zandigwera
Psalms119:144 Umboni wanu ndi wabwino nthawi zonse; patseni nzeru zomvetsa zinthu kuti ine ndikhale ndi moyo.
Psalms119:145 Ndimayitana ndi mtima wanga wonse; ndiyankheni Inu Yehova
Psalms119:146 Ndikuyitana kwa Inu; pulumutseni ndipo ndidzasunga umboni wanu.
Psalms119:147 Ndimadzuka tambala asanalire kuti ndipemphe thandizo; chiyembekezo changa chili mʼmawu anu.
Psalms119:148 Maso anga amakhala chipenyere nthawi yonse ya usiku
Psalms119:149 Imvani mawu anga molingana ndi chikondi chanu chosasinthika; Yehova sungani moyo wanga
Psalms119:150 Iwo amene amakonza njira zoyipa andiyandikira
Psalms119:151 Koma Inu Yehova muli pafupi
Psalms119:152 Ndinaphunzira kalekale kuchokera mʼmaumboni anu kuti maumboni amene munakhazikitsawo ndi amuyaya.
Psalms119:153 Yangʼanani masautso anga ndipo mundipulumutse
Psalms119:154 Mundiyimirire pa mlandu wanga ndi kundiwombola; sungani moyo wanga molingana ndi lonjezo lanu.
Psalms119:155 Chipulumutso chili kutali ndi anthu oyipa
Psalms119:156 Chifundo chanu Yehova nʼchachikulu; sungani moyo wanga molingana ndi malamulo anu.
Psalms119:157 Adani amene akundizunza ndi ambiri
Psalms119:158 Ndimawayangʼana monyansidwa anthu opanda chikhulupiriro
Psalms119:159 Onani momwe ndimakondera malangizo anu; sungani moyo wanga
Psalms119:160 Mawu anu onse ndi owona; malamulo anu onse olungama ndi amuyaya.
Psalms119:161 Olamulira amandizunza popanda chifukwa
Psalms119:162 Ine ndimakondwa ndi lonjezo lanu
Psalms119:163 Ndimadana ndi chinyengo
Psalms119:164 Ndimakutamandani kasanu ndi kawiri pa tsiku pakuti malamulo anu ndi olungama.

Psalms119:172 Lilime langa liyimbe mawu anu

Psalms136:3 	Yamikani Ambuye wa ambuye
Psalms136:4 	Iye yekhayo amene amachita zodabwitsa zazikulu
Psalms136:5 	Amene mwachidziwitso chake anapanga mayiko akumwamba
Psalms136:6 	Amene anayala dziko lapansi pamwamba pa madzi
Psalms136:7 	Amene anapanga miyuni ikuluikulu
Psalms136:8 	Dzuwa lilamulire usana
Psalms136:9 	Mwezi ndi nyenyezi zilamulire usiku
Psalms136:10 	Amene anakantha ana woyamba kubadwa a Igupto
Psalms136:11 	Natulutsa Israeli pakati pawo
Psalms136:12 	Ndi dzanja lamphamvu ndi mkono wotambasuka
Psalms136:13 	Amene anagawa Nyanja Yofiira pakati
Psalms136:14 	Nadutsitsa Israeli pakati pa nyanjayo
Psalms136:15 	Koma anakokolola Farao ndi ankhondo ake mʼNyanja Yofiira
Psalms136:16 	Amene anatsogolera anthu ake mʼchipululu pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya.
Psalms136:17 	Amene anakantha mafumu akuluakulu
Psalms136:18 	Napha mafumu amphamvu

Psalms136:20 	Ogi mfumu ya Basani
Psalms136:21 	Napereka dziko lawo ngati cholowa
Psalms136:22 	Cholowa cha mtumiki wake Israeli; pakuti chikondi chake chosasinthika nʼchamuyaya.

Psalms136:24 	Amene anatimasula kwa adani athu

Psalms136:26 	Yamikani Mulungu wakumwamba

Psalms139:1 Kwa mtsogoleri wa mayimbidwe. Salimo la Davide. Inu Yehova
Psalms139:2 Inu mumadziwa pamene ndikhala pansi ndi pamene ndidzuka; mumazindikira maganizo anga muli kutali.
Psalms139:3 Mumapenyetsetsa pamene ndikutuluka ndi kugona kwanga; mumadziwa njira zanga zonse.

Psalms139:5 Mumandizinga kumbuyo ndi kutsogolo komwe; mwasanjika dzanja lanu pa ine.
