Psalms144:2 Iye ndiye Mulungu wanga wachikondi ndi malo anga otetezedwa
Psalms144:3 Inu Yehova
Psalms144:4 Munthu ali ngati mpweya; masiku ake ali ngati mthunzi wosakhalitsa.
Psalms144:5 Ngʼambani mayiko akumwamba
Psalms144:6 Tumizani zingʼaningʼani ndi kubalalitsa adani; ponyani mivi yanu ndi kuwathamangitsa.
Psalms144:7 Tambasulani dzanja lanu kuchokera kumwamba; landitseni ndi kundipulumutsa
Psalms144:8 amene pakamwa pawo ndi podzala ndi mabodza
Psalms144:9 Ndidzakuyimbirani nyimbo yatsopano Inu Mulungu; ndidzakuyimbirani nyimbo pa zeze wa nsambo khumi
Psalms144:10 kwa Iye amene amapambanitsa mafumu
Psalms144:11 Landitseni ndi kundipulumutsa
Psalms144:12 Ndipo ana aamuna pa chinyamata chawo adzakhala ngati mbewu yosamalidwa bwino
Psalms144:13 Nkhokwe zathu zidzakhala zodzaza ndi zokolola za mtundu uliwonse. Nkhosa zathu zidzaswana miyandamiyanda pa mabusa athu.
Psalms144:14 Ngʼombe zathu zidzanyamula katundu wolemera. Sipadzakhala mingʼalu pa makoma
Psalms144:15 Odala anthu amene adzalandira madalitso awa; odala anthu amene Mulungu wawo ndi Yehova.
Psalms145:1 Salimo la matamando la Davide. Ndidzakukwezani Mulungu wanga
Psalms145:2 Ndidzakutamandani tsiku ndi tsiku ndi kulemekeza dzina lanu ku nthawi za nthawi.
Psalms145:3 Yehova ndi wamkulu ndi woyenera matamando onse; ukulu wake palibe angawumvetsetse.
Psalms145:4 Mʼbado wina udzayamikira ntchito yanu kwa mʼbado wina; Iwo adzafotokoza za machitidwe anu amphamvu.
Psalms145:5 Adzayankhula ulemerero wokongola waufumu wanu
Psalms145:6 Iwo adzafotokoza za mphamvu ya ntchito zanu zoopsa kwambiri
Psalms145:7 Adzakondwerera kuchuluka kwa ubwino wanu
Psalms145:8 Yehova ndi wokoma mtima ndi wachifundo
Psalms145:9 Yehova ndi wabwino kwa onse; amachitira chifundo zonse zimene anazipanga.
Psalms145:10 Zonse zimene munazipanga zidzakutamandani
Psalms145:11 Iwo adzafotokoza za ulemerero wa ufumu wanu ndi kuyankhula za mphamvu yanu
Psalms145:12 kuti anthu onse adziwe za machitidwe anu amphamvu ndi ulemerero wokongola wa ufumu wanu.
Psalms145:13 Ufumu wanu ndi ufumu wamuyaya
Psalms145:14 Yehova amagwiriziza onse amene akugwa ndipo amakweza onse otsitsidwa.
Psalms145:15 Maso a onse amayangʼana kwa Inu
Psalms145:16 Mumatsekula dzanja lanu ndi kukwaniritsa zokhumba za chamoyo chilichonse.
Psalms145:17 Yehova ndi wolungama mʼnjira zake zonse
Psalms145:18 Yehova ali pafupi ndi onse amene amamuyitana
Psalms145:19 Iye amakwaniritsa zokhumba za iwo amene amamuopa; amamva kulira kwawo ndi kuwapulumutsa.
Psalms145:20 Yehova amayangʼana onse amene amamukonda koma adzawononga anthu onse oyipa.
Psalms145:21 Pakamwa panga padzayankhula zotamanda Yehova. Cholengedwa chilichonse chitamande dzina lake loyera ku nthawi za nthawi.
Psalms146:1 	Tamandani Yehova. Tamanda Yehova
Psalms146:2 Ndidzatamanda Yehova ndi moyo wanga wonse; ndidzayimba nyimbo zamatamando kwa Mulungu wanga nthawi yonse ya moyo wanga.
Psalms146:3 Musamadalire mafumu
Psalms146:4 Pamene mizimu yawo yachoka
Psalms146:5 Wodala ndi amene thandizo lake ndi Mulungu wa Yakobo.
Psalms146:6 Wolenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi
Psalms146:7 Iye amachitira chilungamo anthu oponderezedwa ndipo amapereka chakudya kwa anthu anjala. Yehova amamasula amʼndende
Psalms146:8 Yehova amatsekula maso anthu osaona
Psalms146:9 Yehova amasamalira alendo ndipo amathandiza ana ndi akazi amasiye
Psalms146:10 Yehova ndiye Mfumu mpaka muyaya
Psalms147:1 	Tamandani Yehova. Nʼkwabwino kwambiri kuyimba nyimbo zamatamando kwa Mulungu wathu
Psalms147:2 Yehova akumanga Yerusalemu; Iye akusonkhanitsa amʼndende a Israeli.
Psalms147:3 Akutsogolera anthu osweka mtima ndi kumanga mabala awo.
Psalms147:4 Amadziwa chiwerengero cha nyenyezi
Psalms147:5 Yehova ndi wamkulu ndi wamphamvu kwambiri; nzeru zake zilibe malire.
Psalms147:6 Yehova amagwiriziza anthu odzichepetsa
Psalms147:7 Imbirani Yehova ndi mayamiko; imbani nyimbo kwa Mulungu ndi pangwe.
Psalms147:8 Iye amaphimba mlengalenga ndi mitambo; amapereka mvula ku dziko lapansi ndi kumeretsa udzu mʼmapiri.
Psalms147:9 Iye amapereka chakudya kwa ngʼombe ndi kwa ana a makwangwala pamene akulira chakudya.
Psalms147:10 Chikondwerero chake sichili mʼmphamvu za kavalo
Psalms147:11 Yehova amakondwera ndi amene amamuopa
Psalms147:12 Lemekeza Yehova
Psalms147:13 pakuti Iye amalimbitsa mipiringidzo ya zipata zako ndi kudalitsa anthu ako mwa iwe.
Psalms147:14 Iye amabweretsa mtendere mʼmalire mwako ndi kukukhutitsa ndi ufa wa tirigu wosalala.
Psalms147:15 Iyeyo amapereka lamulo pa dziko lapansi; mawu ake amayenda mwaliwiro.
Psalms147:16 Amagwetsa chisanu ngati ubweya ndi kumwaza chipale ngati phulusa.
Psalms147:17 Amagwetsa matalala ngati miyala. Kodi ndani angathe kupirira kuzizira kwake?
Psalms147:18 Amatumiza mawu ake ndipo chisanucho chimasungunuka; amawombetsa mphepo ndipo madzi amayenda.
Psalms147:19 Iye anawulula mawu ake kwa Yakobo
Psalms147:20 Sanachitepo zimenezi kwa mtundu wina uliwonse wa anthu; anthu enawo sadziwa malamulo ake. Tamandani Yehova.

Proverbs1:1 Iyi ndi miyambi ya Solomoni mwana wa Davide
Proverbs1:2 Ndi yothandiza kuti munthu adziwe nzeru ndi malangizo; kuti amvetse mawu a matanthauzo ozama;

Proverbs22:24 Usapalane naye ubwenzi munthu wosachedwa kupsa mtima ndipo usayanjane ndi munthu amene sachedwa kukwiya
Proverbs22:25 kuopa kuti iwe ungadzaphunzire njira zake ndi kukodwa mu msampha.
Proverbs22:26 Usakhale munthu wopereka chikole kapena kukhala mboni pa ngongole;
Proverbs22:27 ngati ulephera kupeza njira yolipirira adzakulanda ngakhale bedi lako lomwe.
Proverbs22:28 Usasunthe mwala wamʼmalire akalekale amene anayikidwa ndi makolo ako.
Proverbs22:29 Kodi ukumuona munthu waluso pa ntchito yake? Iye adzatumikira mafumu; sadzatumikira anthu wamba.

Proverbs23:2 ngati ndiwe munthu wadyera udziletse kuti usaonetse dyera lakolo.
Proverbs23:3 Usasirire zakudya zake
Proverbs23:4 Usadzitopetse wekha ndi kufuna chuma
Proverbs23:5 Ukangoti wachipeza chumacho uwona posachedwa kuti palibepo. Chumacho chimachita ngati chamera mapiko mwadzidzidzi ndi kuwuluka kunka kumwamba ngati chiwombankhanga.
Proverbs23:6 Usadye chakudya cha munthu waumbombo
Proverbs23:7 paja iye ndi munthu amene nthawi zonse amaganizira za mtengo wake ngakhale amati kwa iwe

Proverbs30:33 Paja pakutha mkaka mafuta amapangidwa
Proverbs31:1 Nawa mawu a mfumu Lemueli wa ku Massa amene anamuphunzitsa amayi ake:
Proverbs31:2 Nʼchiyani mwana wanga? Nʼchiyani mwana wa mʼmimba mwanga? Nʼchiyani iwe mwana wanga amene ndinachita kupempha ndi malumbiro?
Proverbs31:3 Usapereke mphamvu yako kwa akazi. Usamayenda nawo amenewa popeza amawononga ngakhale mafumu.
Proverbs31:4 Iwe Lemueli si choyenera kwa mafumu
Proverbs31:5 kuopa kuti akamwa adzayiwala malamulo a dziko
Proverbs31:6 Perekani chakumwa choledzeretsa kwa amene ali pafupi kufa
Proverbs31:7 amwe kuti ayiwale umphawi wawo asakumbukirenso kuvutika kwawo.
Proverbs31:8 Yankhula mʼmalo mwa amene sangathe kudziyankhulira okha. Uwayankhulire anthu onse osiyidwa pa zonse zowayenera.
Proverbs31:9 Yankhula ndi kuweruza mwachilungamo. Uwateteze amphawi ndi osauka.
Proverbs31:10 Kodi mkazi wangwiro angathe kumupeza ndani? Ndi wokwera mtengo kuposa miyala yamtengowapatali.
Proverbs31:11 Mtima wa mwamuna wake umamukhulupirira ndipo mwamunayo sasowa phindu.
Proverbs31:12 Masiku onse a moyo wake mkaziyo amachitira mwamuna wake zabwino zokhazokha osati zoyipa.
Proverbs31:13 Iye amafunafuna ubweya ndi thonje; amagwira ntchito ndi manja ake mwaufulu.
Proverbs31:14 Iye ali ngati sitima zapamadzi za anthu amalonda
Proverbs31:15 Iye amadzuka kusanache kwenikweni; ndi kuyamba kukonzera a pa banja pake chakudya ndi kuwagawira ntchito atsikana ake antchito.
Proverbs31:16 Iye amalingalira za munda ndi kuwugula; ndi ndalama zimene wazipeza amalima munda wamphesa.
Proverbs31:17 Iye amavala zilimbe nagwira ntchito mwamphamvu ndi manja ake.
Proverbs31:18 Iye amaona kuti malonda ake ndi aphindu
Proverbs31:19 Iye amadzilukira thonje ndipo yekha amagwira chowombera nsalu.
Proverbs31:20 Iye amachitira chifundo anthu osauka ndipo amapereka chithandizo kwa anthu osowa.
Proverbs31:21 Iye saopa kuti banja lake lifa ndi kuzizira pa nyengo yachisanu; pakuti onse amakhala atavala zovala zofunda.
Proverbs31:22 Iye amadzipangira yekha zoyala pa bedi pake; amavala zovala zabafuta ndi zapepo.
Proverbs31:23 Mwamuna wake ndi wodziwika pa chipata cha mzinda
Proverbs31:24 Iye amasoka nsalu zabafuta nazigulitsa; amaperekanso mipango kwa anthu amalonda.
Proverbs31:25 Mphamvu ndi ulemu zimakhala ngati chovala chake; ndipo amaseka osaopa zamʼtsogolo.
Proverbs31:26 Iye amayankhula mwanzeru
Proverbs31:27 Iye amayangʼanira makhalidwe a anthu a pa banja lake ndipo sachita ulesi ndi pangʼono pomwe.
Proverbs31:28 Ana ake amamunyadira ndipo amamutcha kuti wodala; ndipo mwamuna wake
Proverbs31:29 “Pali akazi ambiri amene achita zinthu zopambana koma iwe umawaposa onsewa.”
Proverbs31:30 Nkhope yachikoka ndi yonyenga
Proverbs31:31 Mupatseni mphotho chifukwa cha zimene iye wachita ndipo ntchito zake zimutamande ku mabwalo.
Ecclesiastes1:1 Mawu a Mlaliki
Ecclesiastes1:2 “Zopandapake! Zopandapake!” atero Mlaliki. “Zopandapake kotheratu! Zopandapake.”
Ecclesiastes1:3 Kodi munthu amapindulanji pa ntchito zake zonse zimene amasautsidwa nazo pansi pano?
Ecclesiastes1:4 Mibado imabwera ndipo mibado imapita
Ecclesiastes1:5 Dzuwa limatuluka ndipo dzuwa limalowa ndipo limapita mwamsanga kumene limatulukira.
Ecclesiastes1:6 Mphepo imawombera cha kummwera ndi kukhotera cha kumpoto; imawomba mozungulirazungulira
Ecclesiastes1:7 Mitsinje yonse imakathira ku nyanja
Ecclesiastes1:8 Zinthu zonse ndi zotopetsa
Ecclesiastes1:9 Zomwe zinalipo kale zidzakhalaponso
Ecclesiastes1:10 Kodi chilipo chinthu chimene wina anganene kuti
Ecclesiastes1:11 Anthu akale sakumbukiridwa
Ecclesiastes1:12 Ine
Ecclesiastes1:13 Ndinayika mtima wanga pophunzira ndi kufunafuna mwa nzeru zinthu zonse zimene zimachitika pansi pa thambo. Ndi ntchito yolemetsa ndithu imene Mulungu anayipereka kwa anthu!
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ine ndaona zinthu zonse zochitika pansi pano; zinthu zonsezo ndi zopandapake
Ecclesiastes1:15 Chinthu chokhota sichingathe kuwongoledwa; chimene palibe sichingathe kuwerengedwa.
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ine ndinaganiza mu mtima mwanga
Ecclesiastes1:17 Ndipo ndinadzipereka kuti ndithe kumvetsa kuti nzeru nʼchiyani
Ecclesiastes1:18 Pakuti nzeru zochuluka zimabweretsa chisoni chochulukanso: chidziwitso chochuluka
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ine ndinaganiza mu mtima mwanga
Ecclesiastes2:2 “Kuseka
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ndinayesa kudzisangalatsa ndi vinyo
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ndinagwira ntchito zikuluzikulu: Ndinadzimangira nyumba ndi kuwoka mipesa.
Ecclesiastes2:5 Ndinalima madimba ndi minda yamitengo; ndipo ndinadzalamo mitengo ya zipatso za mitundu yonse.
Ecclesiastes2:6 Ndinakumba mayiwe osungiramo madzi woti ndizithirira minda ya mitengo yodzalidwa ija.
Ecclesiastes2:7 Ndinagula akapolo aamuna ndi akapolo aakazi
Ecclesiastes2:8 Ndinadzikundikira siliva ndi golide
Ecclesiastes2:9 Ndinali munthu wotchuka kupambana wina aliyense mu Yerusalemu amene analipo ndisanabadwe. Mu zonsezi nzeru zanga zinali nane.
Ecclesiastes2:10 Sindinadzimane chilichonse chimene maso anga anachifuna; mtima wanga sindinawumane zokondweretsa. Mtima wanga unakondwera ndi ntchito yanga yonse
Ecclesiastes2:11 Koma pamene ndinayamba kuyangʼanayangʼana zonse zimene ndinachita ndi manja anga
Ecclesiastes2:12 Kenaka maganizo anga anayamba kulingalira zakuti nzeru nʼchiyani
Ecclesiastes2:13 Ndinaona kuti nzeru ndi yopambana uchitsiru
Ecclesiastes2:14 Munthu wanzeru amayenda maso ali patsogolo
Ecclesiastes2:15 Pamenepo ndinalingalira mu mtima mwanga
Ecclesiastes2:16 Pakuti munthu wanzeru
Ecclesiastes2:17 Kotero ndinadana nawo moyo chifukwa ntchito zimene zimagwiridwa pansi pano ndi zosautsa kwa ine. Ntchito zonsezo ndi zopandapake
Ecclesiastes2:18 Ine ndinadana nazo ntchito zonse zimene ndinazigwira pansi pano
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ndipo ndani amadziwa kuti munthu ameneyo adzakhala wanzeru kapena chitsiru? Komabe munthuyo adzakhala wolamulira zonse zimene ndinazichita pansi pano mwa nzeru zanga. Izinso ndi zopandapake.
Ecclesiastes2:20 Motero ndinayamba kutaya mtima chifukwa cha ntchito zonse zimene ndinazivutikira pansi pano.
Ecclesiastes2:21 Pakuti munthu atha kugwira ntchito yake mwanzeru
Ecclesiastes2:22 Kodi munthu amapindulanji pa ntchito zonse zolemetsa ndi zodetsa nkhawa zimene amazichita pansi pano?
Ecclesiastes2:23 Masiku ake onse amakhala achisoni
Ecclesiastes2:24 Kwa munthu palibe chabwino china kuposa kudya
Ecclesiastes2:25 pakuti popanda Iye
Ecclesiastes2:26 Munthu amene amakondweretsa Mulungu
Ecclesiastes3:1 Chinthu chilichonse chili ndi nthawi yake
Ecclesiastes3:2 Nthawi yobadwa ndi nthawi yomwalira
Ecclesiastes3:3 Nthawi yakupha ndi nthawi yochiritsa
Ecclesiastes3:4 Nthawi yomva chisoni ndi nthawi yosangalala
Ecclesiastes3:5 Nthawi yotaya miyala ndi nthawi yokundika miyala
Ecclesiastes3:6 Nthawi yofunafuna ndi nthawi yoleka kufunafuna
Ecclesiastes3:7 Nthawi yongʼamba ndi nthawi yosoka
Ecclesiastes3:8 Nthawi yokondana ndi nthawi yodana
Ecclesiastes3:9 Kodi wantchito amapeza phindu lanji pa ntchito yake yolemetsa?
Ecclesiastes3:10 Ine ndinaona chipsinjo chimene Mulungu anayika pa anthu.
Ecclesiastes3:11 Iye anapanga chinthu chilichonse kuti chikhale chabwino pa nthawi yake. Anayika nzeru zamuyaya mʼmitima ya anthu; komabe anthuwo sangathe kuzindikira zomwe Mulungu wachita kuyambira pa chiyambi mpaka chimaliziro.
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ine ndikudziwa kuti palibenso kanthu kabwino kwa anthu kopambana kusangalala ndi kuchita zabwino pamene ali ndi moyo.
Ecclesiastes3:13 Ndi mphatso ya Mulungu kwa munthu kuti azidya
Ecclesiastes3:14 Ndikudziwa kuti chilichonse chimene Mulungu amachita chidzakhala mpaka muyaya; palibe zimene zingawonjezedwe kapena kuchotsedwa. Mulungu amazichita kuti anthu azimuopa.
Ecclesiastes3:15 Chilichonse chimene chilipo chinalipo kale
Ecclesiastes3:16 Ndipo ndinaona chinthu chinanso pansi pano: ku malo achiweruzo
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ndinalingalira mu mtima mwanga kuti; “Mulungu adzaweruza olungama pamodzi ndi oyipa omwe
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ndinalingaliranso kuti
Ecclesiastes3:19 Zimene zimachitikira munthu
Ecclesiastes3:20 Zonse zimapita kumodzimodzi; zonsezi zimachokera ku fumbi
Ecclesiastes3:21 Kodi ndani amene amadziwa ngati mzimu wa munthu umakwera kumwamba
Ecclesiastes3:22 Kotero ndinaona kuti palibe chinthu chabwino kwa munthu kuposa kuti munthu azisangalala ndi ntchito yake
Ecclesiastes4:1 Ndinayangʼananso ndi kuona chipsinjo chimene chimachitika pansi pano: ndinaona misozi ya anthu opsinjika
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ndipo ndinanena kuti akufa
Ecclesiastes4:3 Koma wopambana onsewa ndi amene sanabadwe
Ecclesiastes4:4 Ndipo ndinazindikira kuti ntchito zonse zolemetsa ndiponso ntchito zonse zaluso zimachitika chifukwa choti wina akuchitira nsanje mnzake. Izinso ndi zopandapake
Ecclesiastes4:5 Chitsiru chimangoti manja ake lobodo ndi kudzipha chokha ndi njala.
Ecclesiastes4:6 Nʼkwabwino kukhala ndi dzanja limodzi lodzaza uli pa mtendere
Ecclesiastes4:7 Ndinaonanso chinthu china chopanda phindu pansi pano:
Ecclesiastes4:8 Panali munthu amene anali yekhayekha; analibe mwana kapena mʼbale. Ntchito yake yolemetsa sinkatha
Ecclesiastes4:9 Kukhala awiri nʼkwabwino kuposa kukhala wekha
Ecclesiastes4:10 Ngati winayo agwa
Ecclesiastes4:11 Komanso ngati anthu awiri agona malo amodzi
Ecclesiastes4:12 Munthu mmodzi angathe kugonjetsedwa
Ecclesiastes4:13 Wachinyamata wosauka koma wanzeru aposa mfumu yokalamba koma yopusa imene simvanso malangizo.
Ecclesiastes4:14 Wachinyamatayo angathe kuchokera ku ndende ndi kudzakhala mfumu
Ecclesiastes4:15 Ndipo ndinaona kuti iwo onse amene anakhala ndi moyo ndi kuyenda pansi pano anatsatira wachinyamatayo
Ecclesiastes4:16 Mfumu ikhoza kulamulira anthu osawerengeka
Ecclesiastes5:1 Uzisamala mayendedwe ako pamene ukupita ku nyumba ya Mulungu. Upite pafupi kuti ukamvetsere mʼmalo mopereka nsembe ya zitsiru zimene sizizindikira kuti zikuchita zolakwa.
Ecclesiastes5:2 Usamafulumire kuyankhula
Ecclesiastes5:3 Kuchuluka kwa mavuto mu mtima kumabweretsa maloto oyipa
Ecclesiastes5:4 Pamene ulumbira kwa Mulungu usachedwe kukwaniritsa chimene walumbiracho. Iye sakondweretsedwa ndi chitsiru; kwaniritsa lumbiro lako.
Ecclesiastes5:5 Kuli bwino kusalumbira kusiyana ndi kulumbira koma osakwaniritsa lumbirolo.
Ecclesiastes5:6 Pakamwa pako pasakuchimwitse. Ndipo usanene kwa mthenga wa mʼNyumba ya Mulungu kuti
Ecclesiastes5:7 Maloto ochuluka ndi mawu ochuluka ndi zinthu zopandapake. Kotero lemekeza Mulungu.
Ecclesiastes5:8 Ngati uwona anthu osauka akuzunzika mʼdziko
Ecclesiastes5:9 Anthu onse amatengako zokolola za mʼminda: koma ndi mfumu yokha imene imapeza phindu la mindayi.
Ecclesiastes5:10 Aliyense amene amakonda ndalama sakhutitsidwa ndi ndalamazo; aliyense amene amakonda chuma sakhutitsidwa ndi zimene amapeza. Izinso ndi zopandapake.
Ecclesiastes5:11 Chuma chikachuluka akudya nawo chumacho amachulukanso. Nanga mwini wake amapindulapo chiyani kuposa kumangochiyangʼana ndi maso ake?
Ecclesiastes5:12 Wantchito amagona tulo tabwino ngakhale adye pangʼono kapena kudya kwambiri
Ecclesiastes5:13 Ine ndinaona choyipa chomvetsa chisoni pansi pano: chuma chokundikidwa chikupweteka mwini wake yemwe
Ecclesiastes5:14 kapena chuma chowonongedwa pa nthawi yatsoka
Ecclesiastes5:15 Munthu anabadwa wamaliseche kuchokera mʼmimba mwa amayi ake
Ecclesiastes5:16 Izinso ndi zoyipa kwambiri: munthu adzapita monga momwe anabwerera
Ecclesiastes5:17 Masiku ake onse ndi odzaza ndi mdima
Ecclesiastes5:18 Tsono ndinazindikira kuti nʼchabwino ndi choyenera kuti munthu azidya ndi kumwa
Ecclesiastes5:19 Komatu pamene Mulungu apereka chuma kwa munthu aliyense ndi zinthu zina
Ecclesiastes5:20 Munthu wotereyu saganizirapo za masiku a moyo wake

Ecclesiastes6:2 Mulungu amapereka chuma
Ecclesiastes6:3 Ngakhale munthu atabereka ana 100 ndi kukhala ndi moyo zaka zambiri; komatu ngakhale atakhala zaka zambiri chotani
Ecclesiastes6:4 Mtayo umangopita pachabe ndipo umapita mu mdima
Ecclesiastes6:5 Ngakhale kuti mtayowo sunaone dzuwa kapena kudziwa kanthu kalikonse
Ecclesiastes6:6 ngakhale munthuyo atakhala ndi moyo zaka 2
Ecclesiastes6:7 Ntchito yonse ya munthu imathera pakamwa pake
Ecclesiastes6:8 Kodi munthu wanzeru amaposa motani chitsiru? Kodi munthu wosauka amapindula chiyani podziwa kukhala bwino pamaso pa anthu ena?
Ecclesiastes6:9 Kuli bwino kumangoona zinthu ndi maso kusiyana ndi kumangozilakalaka mu mtima. Izinso ndi zopandapake

Ecclesiastes7:1 Mbiri yabwino ndi yopambana mafuta onunkhira bwino
Ecclesiastes7:2 Kuli bwino kupita ku nyumba yamaliro kusiyana ndi kupita ku nyumba yamadyerero: Pakuti imfa ndiye mathero a munthu aliyense; anthu amoyo azichisunga chimenechi mʼmitima mwawo.
Ecclesiastes7:3 Chisoni nʼchabwino kusiyana ndi kuseka
Ecclesiastes7:4 Mtima wa munthu wanzeru nthawi zonse umalingalira za imfa
Ecclesiastes7:5 Kuli bwino kumva kudzudzula kwa munthu wanzeru kusiyana ndi kumvera mayamiko a zitsiru.
Ecclesiastes7:6 Kuseka kwa zitsiru kuli ngati kuthetheka kwa moto kunsi kwa mʼphika
Ecclesiastes7:7 Kuzunza ena kumasandutsa munthu wanzeru kukhala chitsiru
Ecclesiastes7:8 Mathero ake a chinthu ndi abwino kupambana chiyambi chake

Ecclesiastes7:10 Usamafunse kuti
Ecclesiastes7:11 Nzeru ngati cholowa
Ecclesiastes7:12 Nzeru ndi chitetezo
Ecclesiastes7:13 Taganizirani zimene Mulungu wazichita: ndani angathe kuwongola chinthu chimene Iye anachipanga chokhota?
Ecclesiastes7:14 Pamene zinthu zili bwino
Ecclesiastes7:15 Pa moyo wanga wopanda phinduwu ndaona zinthu ziwiri izi: munthu wolungama akuwonongeka mʼchilungamo chake
Ecclesiastes7:16 Usakhale wolungama kwambiri kapena wanzeru kwambiri
Ecclesiastes7:17 Usakhale woyipa kwambiri
Ecclesiastes7:18 Nʼkwabwino kuti utsate njira imodzi
Ecclesiastes7:19 Nzeru zimapereka mphamvu zambiri kwa munthu wanzeru kupambana olamulira khumi a mu mzinda.
Ecclesiastes7:20 Palibe munthu wolungama pa dziko lapansi amene amachita zabwino zokhazokha ndipo sachimwa.
Ecclesiastes7:21 Usamamvetsere mawu onse amene anthu amayankhula
Ecclesiastes7:22 pakuti iwe ukudziwa mu mtima mwako kuti nthawi zambiri iwenso unatukwanapo ena.
Ecclesiastes7:23 Zonsezi ndinaziyesa ndi nzeru zanga ndipo ndinati
Ecclesiastes7:24 Nzeru zimene zilipo

Ecclesiastes7:29 Chokhacho chimene ndinachipeza ndi ichi: Mulungu analenga munthu
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ndani angafanane ndi munthu wanzeru? Ndani angadziwe kutanthauzira zinthu? Nzeru imabweretsa chimwemwe pa nkhope ya munthu ndipo imasintha maonekedwe ake awukali.
Ecclesiastes8:2 Ine ndikuti
Ecclesiastes8:3 Usafulumire kuchoka pamaso pa mfumu. Usawumirire chinthu choyipa
Ecclesiastes8:4 Popeza mawu a mfumu ali ndi mphamvu
Ecclesiastes8:5 Aliyense amene amamvera lamulo lake sadzapeza vuto lililonse
Ecclesiastes8:6 Pakuti pali nthawi yoyenera ndiponso machitidwe a chinthu chilichonse
Ecclesiastes8:7 Popeza palibe munthu amene amadziwa zamʼtsogolo
Ecclesiastes8:8 Palibe munthu amene ali ndi mphamvu yolamulira mpweya wa moyo kuti athe kuwusunga
Ecclesiastes8:9 Zonsezi ndinaziona pamene ndinalingalira mu mtima mwanga
Ecclesiastes8:10 Kenaka
Ecclesiastes8:11 Pamene chigamulo cha anthu opalamula mlandu chikuchedwa
Ecclesiastes8:12 Ngakhale munthu woyipa apalamule milandu yambirimbiri
Ecclesiastes8:13 Koma popeza oyipa saopa Mulungu zinthu sizidzawayendera bwino
Ecclesiastes8:14 Palinso chinthu china chopanda phindu chomwe chimachitika pa dziko lapansi: anthu olungama amalangidwa ngati anthu osalungama. Pamene oyipa amalandira zabwino ngati kuti ndi anthu abwino.
Ecclesiastes8:15 Nʼchifukwa chake ndikuti munthu azikondwerera moyo
Ecclesiastes8:16 Pamene ndinayikapo mtima wanga kuti ndidziwe nzeru ndi kuonetsetsa ntchito za munthu pa dziko lapansi
Ecclesiastes8:17 pamenepo ndinaona zonse zimene Mulungu anazichita. Palibe munthu amene angathe kuzimvetsa zonse zimene zimachitika pansi pano. Ngakhale munthu ayesetse kuzifufuza

Ecclesiastes9:2 Onsewa mathero awo ndi amodzi
Ecclesiastes9:3 Choyipa chimene chili mʼzonse zochitika pansi ndi ichi: Mathero a zonse ndi amodzi. Ndithu
Ecclesiastes9:4 Aliyense amene ali ndi moyo amakhala ndi chiyembekezo
Ecclesiastes9:5 Pakuti amoyo amadziwa kuti adzafa
Ecclesiastes9:6 Chikondi chawo
Ecclesiastes9:7 Pita
Ecclesiastes9:8 Uzivala zovala zoyera nthawi zonse
Ecclesiastes9:9 Uzikondwerera moyo pamodzi ndi mkazi wako amene umamukonda
Ecclesiastes9:10 Ntchito iliyonse imene ukuyigwira
Ecclesiastes9:11 Ine ndinaonanso chinthu china pansi pano: opambana pa kuthamanga si aliwiro
Ecclesiastes9:12 Kungoti palibe munthu amene amadziwa kuti nthawi yake idzafika liti: monga momwe nsomba zimagwidwira mu ukonde
Ecclesiastes9:13 Ine ndinaonanso pansi pano chitsanzo ichi cha nzeru chimene chinandikhudza kwambiri:
Ecclesiastes9:14 Panali mzinda waungʼono umene unali ndi anthu owerengeka. Ndipo mfumu yamphamvu inabwera kudzawuthira nkhondo
Ecclesiastes9:15 Tsono mu mzindamo munali munthu wosauka koma wanzeru
Ecclesiastes9:16 Choncho ine ndinati
Ecclesiastes9:17 Mawu oyankhula mofatsa a munthu wanzeru

Ecclesiastes10:1 Monga ntchentche zakufa zimayika fungo loyipa mʼmafuta onunkhira
Ecclesiastes10:2 Mtima wa munthu wanzeru umamutsogolera bwino
Ecclesiastes10:3 Chitsiru ngakhale chikamayenda mu msewu
Ecclesiastes10:4 Ngati wolamulira akukwiyira
Ecclesiastes10:5 Pali choyipa chimene ndinachiona pansi pano
Ecclesiastes10:6 Zitsiru amazipatsa ntchito zambiri zapamwamba
Ecclesiastes10:7 Ndaona akapolo atakwera pa akavalo
Ecclesiastes10:8 Amene amakumba dzenje adzagwamo yekha; amene amabowola khoma adzalumidwa ndi njoka.
Ecclesiastes10:9 Amene amaphwanya miyala adzapwetekedwa ndi miyalayo; amene amawaza nkhuni adzapwetekedwa nazo.
Ecclesiastes10:10 Ngati nkhwangwa ili yobuntha yosanoledwa
Ecclesiastes10:11 Nʼkopanda phindu kudziwa kuseweretsa njoka ngati njokayo yakuluma kale.
Ecclesiastes10:12 Mawu a pakamwa pa munthu wanzeru ndi okondweretsa
Ecclesiastes10:13 Chitsiru chimayamba ndi mawu opusa; potsiriza pake zoyankhula zake ndi zamisala
Ecclesiastes10:14 	ndipo chitsiru chimachulukitsa mawu. Palibe amene amadziwa zimene zikubwera mʼtsogolo
Ecclesiastes10:15 Chitsiru chimatopa msanga ndi ntchito yochepa; ndipo sichikhala ndi mphamvu zobwererera ku mudzi.
Ecclesiastes10:16 Tsoka kwa iwe
Ecclesiastes10:17 Wodala iwe
Ecclesiastes10:18 Ngati munthu ndi waulesi
Ecclesiastes10:19 Phwando ndi lokondweretsa anthu
Ecclesiastes10:20 Usanyoze mfumu ngakhale mu mtima mwako

Isaiah1:6 Kuchokera ku phazi mpaka ku mutu palibe pabwino
Isaiah1:7 Dziko lanu lasanduka bwinja
Isaiah1:8 Mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni watsala yekha ngati nsanja mʼmunda wampesa
Isaiah1:9 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akanapanda kutisiyira opulumuka
Isaiah1:10 Imvani mawu a Yehova
Isaiah1:11 Yehova akuti
Isaiah1:12 Ndani anakulamulirani kuti mubwere nazo pamaso panga? Ndani anakuwuzani kuti muzipondaponda mʼmabwalo a nyumba yanga?
Isaiah1:13 Siyani kubweretsa nsembe zachabechabezo! Nsembe zanu zofukiza zimandinyansa Ine. Sindingapirire misonkhano yanu yoyipa
Isaiah1:14 Zikondwerero zanu za Mwezi Watsopano ndi masiku anu opatulika ndimadana nazo. Zasanduka katundu wondilemera; ndatopa kuzinyamula.
Isaiah1:15 Mukamatambasula manja anu popemphera
Isaiah1:16 sambani
Isaiah1:17 phunzirani kuchita zabwino! Funafunani chilungamo
Isaiah1:18 Yehova akuti
Isaiah1:19 Ngati muli okonzeka kundimvera mudzadya zinthu zabwino za mʼdziko;
Isaiah1:20 koma mukakana ndi kuwukira mudzaphedwa ndi lupanga.” Pakuti Yehova wayankhula.
Isaiah1:21 Taonani momwe mzinda wokhulupirika wasandukira wadama! Mzinda umene kale unali wodzaza ndi chiweruzo cholungama; mu mzindamo munali chilungamo
Isaiah1:22 Siliva wako wasanduka wachabechabe
Isaiah1:23 Atsogoleri ako ndi owukira
Isaiah1:24 Nʼchifukwa chake Ambuye Yehova Wamphamvu
Isaiah1:25 Ndidzatambasula dzanja langa kuti ndilimbane nawe; ndidzasungunula machimo ako nʼkuwachotsa
Isaiah1:26 Ndidzabwezeretsa oweruza ako ngati masiku amakedzana
Isaiah1:27 Ziyoni adzawomboledwa mwa chiweruzo cholungama

Isaiah4:3 Iwo amene adzatsale mu Ziyoni

Isaiah4:5 Tsono Yehova adzayika mtambo wake pamwamba ponse pa phiri la Ziyoni

Isaiah5:1 Ndidzamuyimbira bwenzi langa nyimbo yokamba za munda wake wa mpesa: Wokondedwa wanga anali ndi munda wamphesa pa phiri la nthaka yachonde.
Isaiah5:2 Anatipula nachotsa miyala yonse ndipo anawokamo mipesa yabwino kwambiri. Anamanga nsanja yolondera pakati pa mundawo ndipo anasemanso mopsinyira mphesa mʼmundamo. Ndipo iye anayembekezera kuti mundawo udzabala mphesa zabwino
Isaiah5:3 “Tsopano
Isaiah5:4 Kodi nʼchiyaninso china chimene ndikanachitira munda wanga wa mpesa kupambana chomwe ndawuchitira kale? Pamene ndinkayembekezera kuti udzabala mphesa zabwino
Isaiah5:5 Tsopano ndikuwuzani chimene ndidzawuchitire munda wanga wa mpesa: ndidzachotsa mpanda wake
Isaiah5:6 Ndidzawusandutsa tsala
Isaiah5:7 Munda wamphesa wa Yehova Wamphamvuzonse ndi Aisraeli
Isaiah5:8 Tsoka kwa inu amene mumangokhalira kulumikiza nyumba
Isaiah5:9 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse wayankhula ine ndikumva kuti
Isaiah5:10 Munda wamphesa wa maekala khumi udzatulutsa vinyo wodzaza mbiya imodzi
Isaiah5:11 Tsoka kwa iwo amene amadzuka mmamawa nathamangira chakumwa choledzeretsa
Isaiah5:12 Pa maphwando awo pamakhala azeze
Isaiah5:13 Motero anthu anga adzatengedwa ukapolo chifukwa cha kusamvetsa zinthu; atsogoleri awo olemekezeka adzafa ndi njala
Isaiah5:14 Nʼchifukwa chake ku manda sikukhuta ndipo kwayasama kwambiri kukamwa kwake; mʼmandamo mudzagweranso anthu otchuka a mu Yerusalemu pamodzi ndi anthu wamba ochuluka; adzagweramo ali wowowo
Isaiah5:15 Ndipo munthu aliyense adzatsitsidwa
Isaiah5:16 Koma Yehova Wamphamvuzonse adzalemekezedwa chifukwa cha chiweruzo chake cholungama. Ndipo Mulungu woyera adzadzionetsa kuti ndi woyera pochita chilungamo chake.
Isaiah5:17 Tsono nkhosa zidzadya pamenepo ngati pabusa pawo; ana ankhosa adzadya mʼmabwinja a anthu olemera.
Isaiah5:18 Tsoka kwa amene amadzikokera tchimo ndi zingwe zachinyengo
Isaiah5:19 amene amanena kuti
Isaiah5:20 Tsoka kwa amene zoyipa amaziyesa zabwino ndipo zabwino amaziyesa zoyipa
Isaiah5:21 Tsoka kwa amene amadziona ngati anzeru ndipo amadziyesa ochenjera.
Isaiah5:22 Tsoka kwa zidakwa zimene zimayika mtima pa vinyo ndipo ndi akatswiri posakaniza zakumwa
Isaiah5:23 amene amamasula olakwa chifukwa cha chiphuphu koma amayipitsa mlandu wa munthu wosalakwa.
Isaiah5:24 Nʼchifukwa chake monga momwe moto umawonongera chiputu ndipo monga momwe udzu wowuma umapsera mʼmalawi a moto
Isaiah5:25 Nʼchifukwa chake mkwiyo wa Yehova wayakira anthu ake; watambasula dzanja lake pa anthuwo ndipo akuwakantha Mapiri akugwedezeka
Isaiah5:26 Yehova wakweza mbendera kuyitana mtundu wa anthu akutali
Isaiah5:27 Palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe amene akutopa kapena kupunthwa
Isaiah5:28 Mivi yawo ndi yakuthwa
Isaiah5:29 Kufuwula kwawo kuli ngati kubangula kwa mkango
Isaiah5:30 Tsiku limenelo mitundu ya anthu idzabangula ngati mkokomo wa madzi a mʼnyanja. Ndipo wina akakayangʼana dzikolo adzangoona mdima ndi zovuta; ngakhale kuwala kudzasanduka mdima chifukwa cha mitambo.

Isaiah6:2 Pamwamba pawo panayimirira Aserafi
Isaiah6:3 Ndipo Aserafiwo amafuwulirana kuti “Woyera
Isaiah6:4 Chifukwa cha kufuwulako maziko a zitseko ndi ziwundo anagwedezeka ndipo mʼNyumba ya Yehova munadzaza utsi.
Isaiah6:5 Tsono ine ndinafuwula kuti
Isaiah6:6 Pomwepo mmodzi mwa Aserafi aja anawulukira kwa ine ali ndi khala lamoto mʼdzanja lake
Isaiah6:7 Ndipo anandikhudza pakamwa panga ndi khala lamotolo nati
Isaiah6:8 Kenaka ndinamva mawu a Ambuye akuti
Isaiah6:9 Yehova anati
Isaiah6:10 Tsono anthu amenewa uwaphe mtima; uwagonthetse makutu
Isaiah6:11 Pamenepo ine ndinati
Isaiah6:12 mpaka Yehova atasamutsira aliyense kutali
Isaiah6:13 Ndipo ngakhale chigawo chakhumi cha anthu chitatsala mʼdziko
Isaiah7:1 Pamene Ahazi mwana wa Yotamu
Isaiah7:2 Tsono nyumba ya Davide inawuzidwa kuti

Isaiah7:4 Ukamuwuze kuti
Isaiah7:5 Mfumu ya Siriya
Isaiah7:6 ‘Tiyeni tikalimbane ndi Yuda. Tiyeni tiliwononge ndi kuligawa; tiligawane pakati pathu
Isaiah7:7 Komabe zimene akunena Ambuye Yehova ndi izi: “ ‘Zimenezo sizidzatheka
Isaiah7:8 pakuti Siriya amadalira Damasiko
Isaiah7:9 Dziko la Efereimu limadalira Samariya ndipo Samariya amadalira mwana wa Remaliya basi. Mukapanda kulimbika pa chikhulupiriro chanu
Isaiah7:10 Yehova anayankhulanso ndi Ahazi
Isaiah7:11 “Pempha chizindikiro kwa Yehova Mulungu wako
Isaiah7:12 Koma Ahazi anati
Isaiah7:13 Apo Yesaya anati
Isaiah7:14 Nʼchifukwa chake Ambuye mwini adzakupatsani chizindikiro: Onani
Isaiah7:15 Azidzadya chambiko ndi uchi
Isaiah7:16 Koma nthawi yokana choyipa ndi kusankha chabwino kwa mwanayo isanafike
Isaiah7:17 Yehova adzabweretsa pa inu
Isaiah7:18 Tsiku limenelo Yehova adzalizira likhweru ntchentche zochokera ku mitsinje yakutali ku Igupto
Isaiah7:19 Onsewo adzafika ndi kudzakhazikika mu zigwa zozama
Isaiah7:20 Tsiku limenelo Ambuye adzalemba ganyu ometa ochokera kutsidya kwa Mtsinje
Isaiah7:21 Tsiku limenelo adzangosunga ngʼombe yayikazi yayingʼono ndi mbuzi ziwiri.
Isaiah7:22 Ndipo chifukwa cha kuchuluka kwa mkaka umene ziwetozi zidzapereka
Isaiah7:23 Tsiku limenelo
Isaiah7:24 Anthu adzapita kumeneko kukachita uzimba ali ndi uta ndi mivi
Isaiah7:25 Ndipo mʼmapiri monse mʼmene kale munkalimidwa ndi khasu
Isaiah8:1 Yehova anati kwa ine
Isaiah8:2 Ndipo ndidzayitana wansembe Uriya ndi Zekariya mwana wa Yeberekiya kuti akhale mboni zanga zodalirika.”
Isaiah8:3 Ndipo ine ndinapita kwa mneneri wamkazi
Isaiah8:4 Mwanayo asanayambe kudziwa kuyitana kuti
Isaiah8:5 Yehova anayankhulanso ndi Ine;
Isaiah8:6 “Popeza anthu a dziko ili akana madzi anga oyenda mwachifatse a ku Siloamu
Isaiah8:7 nʼchifukwa chake Ambuye ali pafupi kubweretsa madzi amkokomo a mtsinje wa Yufurate kudzalimbana nawo; mfumu ya ku Asiriya ndi gulu lake lonse lankhondo. Madziwo adzasefukira mʼngalande zake zonse ndi mʼmagombe ake onse.
Isaiah8:8 Ndipo adzalowa mwamphamvu mʼdziko la Yuda
Isaiah8:9 Chitani phokoso lankhondo
Isaiah8:10 Konzani kachitidwe kanu kankhondo
Isaiah8:11 Yehova anandiyankhula ine mwamphamvu
Isaiah8:12 “Usamanene kuti ndi chiwembu
Isaiah8:13 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse ndiye amene uyenera kumuona kuti ndi woyera
Isaiah8:14 ndipo ndiye amene adzakhala malo opatulika; koma kwa anthu a ku Yuda ndi kwa anthu a ku Israeli adzakhala mwala wopunthwitsa
Isaiah8:15 Anthu ambiri adzapunthwapo adzagwa ndi kuthyokathyoka
Isaiah8:16 Manga umboniwu ndipo umate malamulowa pamaso pa ophunzira anga.
Isaiah8:17 Ndidzayembekezera Yehova
Isaiah8:18 Onani
Isaiah8:19 Anthu akakuwuza kuti kafunsire kwa oyankhula ndi mizimu
Isaiah8:20 kuti akalandireko mawu enieni ndi malangizo? Ngati anthuwo sayankhula monga mwa mawu awa
Isaiah8:21 Anthu adzayendayenda mʼdziko movutika kwambiri ali ndi njala; pamene afowokeratu ndi njala
Isaiah8:22 Ndipo akadzayangʼana pa dziko lapansi adzangoona mavuto okhaokha ndi mdima woopsa ndi wodetsa nkhawa
Isaiah9:1 Anthu amene anali ndi nkhawa
Isaiah9:2 Anthu oyenda mu mdima awona kuwala kwakukulu; kwa iwo okhala mʼdziko la mdima wandiweyani kuwunika kwawafikira.
Isaiah9:3 Inu mwauchulukitsa mtundu wanu ndipo mwawonjezera chimwemwe chawo. Iwo akukondwa pamaso panu
Isaiah9:4 Monga munachitira pogonjetsa Amidiyani
Isaiah9:5 Nsapato iliyonse ya munthu wankhondo
Isaiah9:6 Chifukwa mwana watibadwira
Isaiah9:7 Ulamuliro ndi mtendere wake zidzakhala zopanda malire. Iye adzalamulira ufumu wake ali pa mpando waufumu wa Davide
Isaiah9:8 Ambuye atumiza mawu otsutsa Yakobo; ndipo mawuwo agwera pa Israeli.
Isaiah9:9 Anthu onse okhala mu Efereimu ndi okhala mu Samariya
Isaiah9:10 “Ngakhale njerwa zagumuka
Isaiah9:11 Koma Yehova wadzutsa adani kuti alimbane nawo ndipo wawafulumiza adani awo kuti amenyane nawo.
Isaiah9:12 Asiriya ochokera kummawa ndi Afilisti ochokera kumadzulo ndipo ayasama pakamwa kuti adye a Israeli. Komabe
Isaiah9:13 Koma anthu sanabwerere kwa amene anawakantha uja
Isaiah9:14 Choncho Yehova adzadula mutu wa Israeli pamodzi ndi mchira womwe
Isaiah9:15 mutuwo ndiye akuluakulu ndi olemekezeka
Isaiah9:16 Amene amatsogolera anthuwa ndiwo amawasocheretsa
Isaiah9:17 Nʼchifukwa chake Ambuye adzakondwera nawo achinyamata
Isaiah9:18 Ndithu kuyipa kwa anthuwo kumayaka ngati moto; moto wake umanyeketsa mkandankhuku ndi minga
Isaiah9:19 Dziko lidzatenthedwa ndi ukali wa Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Isaiah9:20 Kudzanja lamanja adzapeza chakudya nʼkudya
Isaiah9:21 Manase adzadya Efereimu ndipo Efereimu adzadya Manase; onsewa pamodzi adzadya Yuda. Komabe pa zonsezi
Isaiah10:1 Tsoka kwa anthu amene amapanga malamulo opanda chilungamo
Isaiah10:2 kuwalanda anthu osauka ufulu wawo ndi kumana chilungamo osautsidwa pakati pa anthu anga
Isaiah10:3 Kodi mudzatani pa tsiku la chilango
Isaiah10:4 Kudzatsala nʼkungozolika mwamanyazi pakati pa anthu ogwidwa kapena kufa pamodzi ndi ophedwa. Komabe pa zonsezi mkwiyo wake sunawachokere
Isaiah10:5 “Tsoka kwa mfumu ya ku Asiriya
Isaiah10:6 Ndidzamutuma kukalimbana ndi mtundu wosapembedza Mulungu
Isaiah10:7 Koma izi si zimene akufuna kukachita
Isaiah10:8 Iye akuti
Isaiah10:9 ‘Kodi Kalino sanagonjetsedwe monga Karikemesi? Kodi Hamati sali ngati Aripadi
Isaiah10:10 Dzanja langa linakantha maufumu a anthu opembedza mafano
Isaiah10:11 nanga Ine nʼkulephera kodi kuwononga Yerusalemu pamodzi ndi mafano ake monga ndinakanthira Samariya pamodzi ndi mafano ake?’ ”
Isaiah10:12 Ambuye akadzamaliza ntchito yonse yolanga phiri la Ziyoni ndi Yerusalemu adzalanganso mfumu ya ku Asiriya chifukwa cha kudzitama ndi kunyada kwake.
Isaiah10:13 Pakuti mfumuyo ikuti
Isaiah10:14 Dzanja langa lagwira chuma cha mitundu ya anthu ngati momwe munthu amagwirira chisa cha mbalame
Isaiah10:15 Kodi nkhwangwa ingathe kudzikuza kupambana woyigwiritsa ntchito
Isaiah10:16 Nʼchifukwa chake Ambuye Yehova Wamphamvuzonse adzatumiza matenda owondetsa kwa ankhondo amphamvu; kunyada kwa mfumuyo kudzapsa ndi moto wosazima.
Isaiah10:17 Mulungu
Isaiah10:18 Ankhondo ake adzawonongedwa ngati nkhalango yayikulu ndi ngati nthaka yachonde.
Isaiah10:19 Mitengo yotsalira ya mʼnkhalango zake idzakhala yochepa kwambiri
Isaiah10:20 Tsiku limenelo otsalira a ku Israeli
Isaiah10:21 Otsalira adzabwerera
Isaiah10:22 Iwe Israeli
Isaiah10:23 Ambuye Yehova Wamphamvuzonse adzawononga ndithu dziko lonse monga momwe analamulira.
Isaiah10:24 Nʼchifukwa chake
Isaiah10:25 Patsala pangʼonongʼono kuti mkwiyo wanga uchoke pa inu ndipo ndidzaonetsa ukali wanga pa iwo mpaka kuwawononga.”
Isaiah10:26 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse adzawakwapula ndi chikwapu
Isaiah10:27 Tsiku limenelo katundu wawo adzachotsedwa pa mapewa anu

Isaiah10:29 Adutsa pa mpata uja
Isaiah10:30 Lilani mokweza

Isaiah11:1 Padzatuluka mphukira pa tsinde la Yese ndipo nthambi idzaphukira kuchokera ku mizu yake.
Isaiah11:2 Mzimu wa Yehova udzakhala pa iye Mzimu wanzeru ndi wa kumvetsa zinthu
Isaiah11:3 	Ndipo kuopa Yehova ndiye chidzakhale chinthu chomukondweretsa. Iye sadzaweruza potsata zooneka pamaso
Isaiah11:4 koma amphawi adzawaweruza mwachilungamo
Isaiah11:5 Chilungamo chidzakhala ngati lamba wake ndipo kukhulupirika kudzakhala ngati chomangira mʼchiwuno mwake.
Isaiah11:6 Mʼmbulu udzakhala pamodzi ndi mwana wankhosa
Isaiah11:7 Ngʼombe yayikazi ndi chimbalangondo zidzadya pamodzi
Isaiah11:8 Mwana wakhanda adzasewera pa dzenje la mamba
Isaiah11:9 Sipadzakhala chilichonse chopweteka kapena chowononga pa phiri lopatulika la Yehova
Isaiah11:10 Tsiku limenelo mfumu yatsopano yochokera pa Muzu wa Yese idzakhala ngati chizindikiro kwa anthu a mitundu yonse. Mitundu ya anthu idzasonkhana kwa Iye
Isaiah11:11 Tsiku limenelo Ambuye adzatambasula dzanja lake kachiwiri kuti awombole anthu ake otsalira ku Asiriya
Isaiah11:12 Adzakwezera mitundu ya anthu mbendera
Isaiah11:13 Nsanje ya Efereimu idzatha
Isaiah11:14 Yuda ndi Efereimu adzathira nkhondo pa Afilisti mbali ya kumadzulo; ndipo onsewo pamodzi adzalanda zinthu za anthu a kummawa. Adzalimbana ndi Edomu ndi Mowabu
Isaiah11:15 Yehova adzaphwetsa mwendo wa nyanja ya Igupto; adzatambasula dzanja lake ndipo adzawombetsa mphepo yotentha pa mtsinje wa Yufurate. Iye adzawugawa mtsinjewo kukhala timitsinje tisanu ndi tiwiri kuti anthu athe kuwoloka powuma atavala nsapato.
Isaiah11:16 Padzakhala msewu waukulu woti ayendepo anthu ake otsalira amene anatsalira ku Asiriya

Isaiah13:13 Tsono ndidzagwedeza miyamba ndipo dziko lapansi lidzachoka pa maziko ake. Izi zidzachitika chifukwa cha ukali wa Wamphamvuzonse pa tsiku la mkwiyo wake woopsa.

Isaiah14:1 Yehova adzachitira chifundo Yakobo; adzasankhanso Israeli ndi kuwalola kuti akhalenso mʼdziko lawo. Alendo adzabwera kudzakhala nawo ndi kudziphatika okha kukhala ngati a mʼnyumba ya Yakobo.
Isaiah14:2 Anthu a mitundu ina adzaperekeza a Israeli ku dziko lawo. Tsono Aisraeli adzasandutsa anthu a mitundu ina aja kukhala antchito awo aamuna ndi aakazi mʼdziko la Yehova. Ndiye kuti Aisraeli adzasandutsa akapolo anthu amene kale anali ambuye awo. Iwo adzasandutsa akapolo anthu amene kale ankawalamulira ndi kuwazunza.
Isaiah14:3 Yehova akadzakupumitsani ku zowawa ndi mavuto
Isaiah14:4 mudzayankhula monyogodola mfumu ya Babuloni kuti
Isaiah14:5 Yehova wathyola chikwapu cha anthu oyipa
Isaiah14:6 Mfumu ya ku Babuloni inkakantha mitundu ya anthu mwaukali powamenya kosalekeza
Isaiah14:7 Koma tsopano mayiko onse ali pa mpumulo ndi pa mtendere; ndipo akuyimba mokondwa.
Isaiah14:8 Ngakhale mitengo ya payini ndi mikungudza ya ku Lebanoni ikuyimba za iwe mokondwa ndipo ikuti
Isaiah14:9 Ku manda kwatekeseka kuti akulandire ukamabwera; mizimu ya anthu akufa
Isaiah14:10 Onse adzayankha; adzanena kwa iwe kuti
Isaiah14:11 Ulemerero wako wonse walowa mʼmanda
Isaiah14:12 Wagwa pansi bwanji kuchoka kumwamba
Isaiah14:13 Mu mtima mwako unkanena kuti
Isaiah14:14 Ndidzakwera pamwamba pa mitambo; ndidzafanana ndi Wammwambamwamba.”
Isaiah14:15 Koma watsitsidwa mʼmanda pansi penipeni pa dzenje.
Isaiah14:16 Anthu akufa adzakupenyetsetsa nadzamalingalira za iwe nʼkumati
Isaiah14:17 munthu amene anasandutsa dziko lonse chipululu
Isaiah14:18 Mafumu onse a mitundu ya anthu akugona mwaulemu aliyense mʼmanda akeake.
Isaiah14:19 Koma iwe watayidwa kunja kwa manda ako
Isaiah14:20 Sudzayikidwa nawo mʼmanda mwaulemu
Isaiah14:21 Konzani malo woti muphere ana ake aamuna chifukwa cha machimo a makolo awo; kuti angadzuke ndi kulanda dziko lapansi ndi kulidzaza dziko lonselo ndi mizinda yawo.
Isaiah14:22 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Isaiah14:23 “Ndidzawusandutsa mzindawo malo okhalamo anungu ndiponso dambo lamatope; ndidzawusesa ndi tsache lowononga
Isaiah14:24 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse walumbira kuti
Isaiah14:25 Ndidzawawononga Asiriya mʼdziko langa; ndidzawapondereza ndi mapazi pa mapiri anga; ndidzachotsa goli lawo pa anthu anga
Isaiah14:26 Izi ndizo ndakonza kuti zichitike pa dziko lonse lapansi
Isaiah14:27 Pakuti Yehova Wamphamvuzonse watsimikiza
Isaiah14:28 Uthenga uwu unabwera chaka chimene mfumu Ahazi anamwalira:
Isaiah14:29 Musakondwere inu Afilisti nonse kuti Asiriya amene anali ngati ndodo yokukanthani anathedwa; chifukwa kuchokera ku njoka yomweyi (mfumu ya Aasiriya) mudzatuluka mphiri
Isaiah14:30 Osaukitsitsa adzapeza chakudya ndipo amphawi adzakhala mwamtendere. Koma anthu ako ndidzawawononga ndi njala
Isaiah14:31 Lirani kwambiri

Isaiah15:2 Anthu a ku Diboni akupita ku nyumba ya milungu yawo
Isaiah15:3 Mʼmisewu akuvala ziguduli; pa madenga ndi mʼmabwalo aliyense akulira mofuwula
Isaiah15:4 Anthu a ku Hesiboni ndi Eleali akulira mofuwula
Isaiah15:5 Inenso ndikulirira Mowabu; chifukwa othawa nkhondo ake akupita akulira ku chikweza cha Luluti mpaka ku Zowari ndi Egilati-Selisiya akupita akulira ku chikweza cha Luhiti
Isaiah15:6 Madzi a ku Nimurimu aphwa ndipo udzu wauma; zomera zawonongeka ndipo palibe chomera chobiriwira chatsala.
Isaiah15:7 Kotero kuti chuma chomwe anachipeza ndi kuchisunga
Isaiah15:8 Kulira kwawo kukumveka mʼdziko lonse la Mowabu; kulira kwawo kosweka mtima kukumveka mpaka ku Egilaimu ndi Beeri-Elimu.
Isaiah15:9 Madzi a ku Dimoni afiira ndi magazi
Isaiah16:1 Anthu a ku Mowabu atumiza mphatso za ana ankhosa onenepa
Isaiah16:2 Monga momwe mbalame zimawulukira uku ndi uku akazimwaza mʼchisa
Isaiah16:3 Amowabu aja anawuza a ku Yuda kuti
Isaiah16:4 Lolani kuti anthu othawa nkhondo a ku Mowabu azikhala pakati panu; mukhale populumukira pawo kwa wowonongayo.” Nthawi idzafika ndipo wozunzayo sadzakhalaponso
Isaiah16:5 Mpando waufumu udzakhazikitsidwa mwachikondi; mmodzi mwa zidzukulu za Davide adzakhalapo mokhulupirika. Iyeyo poweruza adzatsata chilungamo ndipo adzalimbikitsa kuchita zachilungamo.
Isaiah16:6 Tinamva kuti Mowabu anadzikuza kwambiri. Kunyada kwawo ndi kunyogodola kwawo ndi kudzitama kwawo
Isaiah16:7 Nʼchifukwa chake Amowabu akulira kwambiri; iwo akulirira dziko lawo. Akubuma momvetsa chisoni chifukwa cha makeke a mphesa a ku Kiri Hareseti.
Isaiah16:8 Minda ya ku Hesiboni yauma
Isaiah16:9 Kotero Ine ndikulira
Isaiah16:10 Chimwemwe ndi chisangalalo zalekeka ku minda yanu ya zipatso; palibe amene akuyimba kapena kufuwula mʼminda ya mpesa; palibe amene akupsinya vinyo ku malo opsinyira mphesa
Isaiah16:11 Chifukwa chake moyo wanga ukulira ngati pangwe kulirira Mowabu
Isaiah16:12 Ngakhale anthu a ku Mowabu apite ku malo awo achipembedzo koma amangodzitopetsa ndi kutaya nthawi chabe chifukwa sizidzatheka.
Isaiah16:13 Awa ndi mawu amene Yehova wayankhula kale zokhudza Mowabu.
Isaiah16:14 Koma tsopano Yehova akuti

Isaiah17:6 Komabe Aisraeli ochepa okha ndiwo ati adzatsale monga mʼmene zimatsalira zipatso ziwiri kapena zitatu pa nthambi ya pamwamba penipeni kapena zipatso zisanu pa nthambi za mʼmunsi mwa mtengo wa olivi akawugwedeza

Isaiah19:1 Uthenga onena za Igupto: Taonani
Isaiah19:2 “Ine ndidzadzutsa Aigupto kuti amenyane okhaokha; mʼbale adzamenyana ndi mʼbale wake
Isaiah19:3 Aigupto adzataya mtima popeza ndidzalepheretsa zolinga zawo; adzapempha nzeru kwa mafano awo ndiponso kwa woyankhula ndi mizimu ya anthu akufa
Isaiah19:4 Ndidzawapereka Aigupto kwa olamulira ankhanza
Isaiah19:5 Madzi a mu mtsinje wa Nailo adzaphwa
Isaiah19:6 Ngalande zake zidzanunkha; ndipo mitsinje ya Igupto idzayamba kuchepa ndi kuwuma. Bango ndi dulu zidzafota
Isaiah19:7 ndiponso zomera za mʼmphepete mwa Nailo ndi ku mathiriro a mtsinjewo. Zonse zodzalidwa mʼmbali mwa Nailo zidzawuma
Isaiah19:8 Asodzi adzabuwula ndi kudandaula
Isaiah19:9 Amene amagwira ntchito yopota thonje adzataya mtima
Isaiah19:10 Akatswiri opanga nsalu adzangoti kakasi
Isaiah19:11 Akuluakulu a ku Zowani ndi zitsiru; aphungu a nzeru a Farao amalangiza zopusa. Kodi mungathe kunena bwanji kwa Farao kuti
Isaiah19:12 Iwe Farao
Isaiah19:13 Akuluakulu a ku Zowani asanduka zitsiru
Isaiah19:14 Yehova wasocheretsa anthu a ku Igupto. Iwo akuchita kudzandira pa zonse zimene akuchita
Isaiah19:15 Palibe chimene munthu wa mu Igupto angachite
Isaiah19:16 Tsiku limenelo Aigupto adzakhala ngati amayi. Adzanjenjemera ndi kuchita mantha akadzaona Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Isaiah19:17 Ndipo dziko la Yuda lidzaopsa dziko la Aigupto. Aliyense amene adzamve dzina la Yuda adzaopsedwa chifukwa cha zimene Yehova Wamphamvuzonse wakonzekera kuchitira dziko la Igupto.
Isaiah19:18 Tsiku limenelo ku dziko la Igupto kudzakhala mizinda isanu yoyankhula chiyankhulo cha Akanaani
Isaiah19:19 Tsiku limenelo mʼkati mwa dziko la Igupto mudzakhala guwa lansembe la Yehova
Isaiah19:20 Zimenezo zidzakhala umboni wozindikiritsa kuti Yehova Wamphamvuzonse alimo mʼdziko la Igupto. Pamene Aigupto adzalirira Yehova chifukwa cha owapondereza
Isaiah19:21 Kotero Yehova adzadziulula yekha kwa Aigupto
Isaiah19:22 Yehova adzakantha Aigupto ndi mliri. Iye adzawakanthadi ndipo kenaka adzawachiritsa. Aigupto adzatembenukira kwa Yehova ndipo Iye adzamva madandawulo awo ndi kuwachiritsa.
Isaiah19:23 Tsiku limenelo kudzakhala msewu waukulu wochoka ku Igupto kupita ku Asiriya. Aasiriya adzapita ku Igupto ndi Aigupto ku Asiriya. Aigupto ndi Aasiriya adzapembedza pamodzi.
Isaiah19:24 Tsiku limenelo Israeli adzakhala pamodzi ndi Igupto ndi Asiriya
Isaiah19:25 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse adzawadalitsa
Isaiah20:1 Mʼchaka chimene mkulu wankhondo wotumidwa ndi mfumu ya ku Asiriya
Isaiah20:2 nthawi imeneyo Yehova anawuza Yesaya mwana wa Amozi kuti
Isaiah20:3 Kenaka Yehova anati
Isaiah20:4 momwemonso mfumu ya ku Asiriya idzatenga ukapolo anthu a ku Igupto ndi a ku Kusi
Isaiah20:5 Amene ankadalira Kusi
Isaiah20:6 Tsiku limenelo anthu amene amakhala mʼmbali mwa nyanja adzati
Isaiah21:1 Uthenga wonena za chipululu cha mʼmbali mwa Nyanja. Ankhondo a ku Elamu ndi Mediya adzabwera ngati kamvuluvulu amene akuwomba modutsa mʼmbali ya nyanja
Isaiah21:2 Ine ndaona zinthu zoopsa mʼmasomphenya: Wonyenga akunyenga
Isaiah21:3 Chifukwa cha zimenezi thupi langa likunjenjemera ndi mantha
Isaiah21:4 Mtima wanga ukugunda
Isaiah21:5 Ankhondo a ku Elamu ndi Mediya akukonza matebulo
Isaiah21:6 Zimene Ambuye akunena kwa ine ndi izi; “Pita
Isaiah21:7 Taonani
Isaiah21:8 Ndipo mlondayo anafuwula kuti
Isaiah21:9 Taonani
Isaiah21:10 Inu anthu anga opunthidwa ndi kupetedwa ngati tirigu
Isaiah21:11 Uthenga wonena za Duma: Munthu wina akundiyitana kuchokera ku Seiri kuti
Isaiah21:12 Mlonda akuyankha kuti
Isaiah21:13 Uthenga wonena za Arabiya: Inu anthu amalonda a ku Dedani
Isaiah21:14 perekani madzi kwa anthu aludzu. Inu anthu a ku Tema perekani chakudya kwa anthu othawa nkhondo.
Isaiah21:15 Iwo akuthawa malupanga
Isaiah21:16 Zimene Ambuye akunena kwa ine ndi izi: “Chaka chimodzi chisanathe
Isaiah21:17 Mwa anthu okoka uta
Isaiah22:1 Uthenga wonena za Chigwa cha Masomphenya: Kodi chachitika nʼchiyani
Isaiah22:2 Iwe mzinda wodzaza ndi chisangalalo chodzaza tsaya
Isaiah22:3 Atsogoleri ako onse ngakhale anathawa limodzi; koma anagwidwa osadziteteza nʼkomwe. Inu munapezeka ndipo nonse pamodzi munatengedwa ukapolo
Isaiah22:4 Nʼchifukwa chake Ine ndinati
Isaiah22:5 Lero Ambuye Yehova Wamphamvuzonse walola kuti tione mavuto ndi kugonjetsedwa ndiponso chisokonezo mʼChigwa cha Masomphenya. Malinga agumuka
Isaiah22:6 Ankhondo a ku Elamu anadza pa magaleta ndi akavalo ali ndi mivi mʼmanja. Ankhondo a ku Kiri anakonzeka ndi zishango.
Isaiah22:7 Zigwa zanu zachonde ndi zodzaza ndi magaleta
Isaiah22:8 	zonse zoteteza Yuda zachotsedwa. Ndipo tsiku limenelo munayangʼanayangʼana zida zankhondo zomwe zinali mʼnyumba yaufumu ya nkhalango;
Isaiah22:9 inu munaona kuti makoma ambiri a mzinda wa Davide anali ndi malo ambiri ogumuka; munasunga madzi mu chidziwe chakumunsi.
Isaiah22:10 Munawerenga nyumba zonse za mu Yerusalemu ndipo munagwetsa nyumba zina kuti mulimbitse linga logumuka lija.
Isaiah22:11 Pakati pa makoma awiri munamanga chitsime chosungiramo madzi ochokera ku dziwe lakale
Isaiah22:12 Pa tsiku limenelo
Isaiah22:13 Koma mʼmalo mwake inu munakondwa ndi kusangalala; munapha ngʼombe ndi nkhosa; munadya nyama ndi kumwa vinyo. Inu mumati
Isaiah22:14 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse wandiwululira mondinongʼoneza kuti
Isaiah22:15 Chimene Ambuye
Isaiah22:16 Kodi ukuchita chiyani kuno
Isaiah22:17 “Samalira
Isaiah22:18 Iye adzakukulunga kwambiri ngati mpira ndipo adzakuponyera mʼdziko lalikulu. Kumeneko ndiko ukafere ndipo kumeneko ndiko kudzatsalire magaleta ako. Ndipo udzasanduka wochititsa manyazi nyumba ya mbuye wako.
Isaiah22:19 Ine ndidzakuchotsa pa ukapitawo wako ndipo ndidzakutsitsa pa udindo wako.
Isaiah22:20 “Tsiku limenelo ndidzayitanitsa mtumiki wanga
Isaiah22:21 Ndidzamuveka mkanjo wako ndi kumangira lamba wako mʼchiwuno mwake ndi kumupatsa ulamuliro wako. Iye adzakhala kholo la amene amakhala mu Yerusalemu ndiponso a fuko la Yuda.
Isaiah22:22 Ndidzamupatsa ulamuliro wa banja la Davide. Adzatsekula ndipo palibe adzatseke
Isaiah22:23 Ufumu wake udzakhala wokhazikika ngati chikhomo chokhomedwa pa malo olimba. Anthu adzalemekeza nyumba ya abale ake chifukwa cha iye.
Isaiah22:24 Ana ndi abale a nyumba ya abambo ake adzakhala ngati katundu pa iye ngati ziwiya zopanda ntchito zimene zapachikidwa pa chikhomo.
Isaiah22:25 “Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akunena kuti
Isaiah23:1 Uthenga wonena za Turo: Lirani mofuwula
Isaiah23:2 Khalani chete inu anthu okhala mʼmbali mwa nyanja
Isaiah23:3 Pa nyanja zazikulu panabwera tirigu wa ku Sihori; zokolola za ku Nailo
Isaiah23:4 Chita manyazi
Isaiah23:5 Mawuwa akadzamveka ku Igupto
Isaiah23:6 Wolokerani ku Tarisisi
Isaiah23:7 Kodi uwu si mzinda wachisangalalo uja
Isaiah23:8 Kodi ndani anakonza zimenezi kuti zigwere Turo
Isaiah23:9 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse anakonza zimenezi kuti athetse kunyada kwawo ndi kutsitsa anthu otchuka a pa dziko lapansi.
Isaiah23:10 Mubalalike mʼdziko mwanu ngati mtsinje wa Nailo inu anthu a ku Tarisisi
Isaiah23:11 Yehova watambasula dzanja lake kuloza ku nyanja ndipo wagwedeza maufumu ake. Iye walamula kuti Kanaani agwetse malinga ake.
Isaiah23:12 Iye anati
Isaiah23:13 Onani dziko la Ababuloni
Isaiah23:14 Lirani mofuwula
Isaiah23:15 Pa nthawi imeneyo Turo adzayiwalika pa zaka 70
Isaiah23:16 “Tenga zeze wako uzungulire mzinda
Isaiah23:17 Pakutha pa zaka 70
Isaiah23:18 Koma phindu lake ndi malipiro ake adzazipereka kwa Yehova; sadzazikundika kapena kuzisunga. Phindu lake lidzapita kwa mtumiki wa Yehova kuti agule zakudya zambiri ndi zovala zokongola.
Isaiah24:1 Taonani
Isaiah24:2 Aliyense zidzamuchitikira mofanana: wansembe chimodzimodzi munthu wamba
Isaiah24:3 Dziko lapansi lidzawonongedwa kwathunthu ndi kusakazikiratu. Yehova wanena mawu awa.
Isaiah24:4 Dziko lapansi likulira ndipo likufota
Isaiah24:5 Anthu ayipitsa dziko lapansi; posamvera malangizo ake; pophwanya mawu ake ndi pangano lake lamuyaya.
Isaiah24:6 Nʼchifukwa chake matemberero akuwononga dziko lapansi; anthu a mʼdzikomo akuzunzika chifukwa cha kulakwa kwawo
Isaiah24:7 Vinyo watsopano watha ndipo mphesa zikufota; onse okonda zosangalatsa ali ndi chisoni.
Isaiah24:8 Kulira kokometsera kwa matambolini kwatha
Isaiah24:9 Anthu sadzayimbanso akumwa vinyo; akadzamwa zaukali zidzakhala zowawa mʼkamwa mwawo.
Isaiah24:10 Mzinda wachisokonezo uja wawonongeka; nyumba iliyonse yatsekedwa.
Isaiah24:11 Anthu akulira mʼmisewu kufuna vinyo; chimwemwe chonse chatheratu
Isaiah24:12 Mzinda wasanduka bwinja zipata zake zagumuka.
Isaiah24:13 Zimenezi ndizo zidzachitikire mitundu yonse ya dziko lapansi ndiponso pakati pa mitundu ya anthu. Zidzakhala ngati pamene mitengo ya olivi yayoyoledwa
Isaiah24:14 Koma otsala onse akufuwula ndi kuyimba mwachimwemwe; anthu akumadzulo akutamanda ukulu wa Yehova.
Isaiah24:15 Nʼchifukwa chake inu akummawa
Isaiah24:16 Kuchokera kumalekezero a dziko lapansi tikumva kuyimba kotamanda “Wolungamayo.” Koma ine ndinati
Isaiah24:17 Inu anthu adziko lapansi
Isaiah24:18 Aliyense wothawa phokoso la zoopsa adzagwa mʼdzenje; ndipo aliyense wotuluka mʼdzenjemo adzakodwa ndi msampha. Zitseko zakumwamba zatsekulidwa
Isaiah24:19 Dziko lapansi lathyokathyoka
Isaiah24:20 Dziko lapansi likudzandira ngati munthu woledzera likugwedezeka ndi mphepo ngati chisimba; lalemedwa ndi machimo ake. Lidzagwa ndipo silidzadzukanso.
Isaiah24:21 Tsiku limenelo Yehova adzalanga amphamvu a kumwamba ndiponso mafumu apansi pano.
Isaiah24:22 Mulungu adzawasonkhanitsa pamodzi ngati amʼndende amene ali mʼdzenje. Adzawatsekera mʼndende ndipo adzalangidwa patapita nthawi yayitali.
Isaiah24:23 Mwezi udzanyazitsidwa
Isaiah25:1 Yehova ndinu Mulungu wanga; ine ndidzakukwezani ndi kutamanda dzina lanu
Isaiah25:2 Inu mwasandutsa mzinda uja kukhala mulu wamiyala. Ndipo mzinda wamalinga wasanduka bwinja
Isaiah25:3 Nʼchifukwa chake anthu amphamvu adzakulemekezani; mizinda ya mitundu ya anthu ankhanza idzakuopani.
Isaiah25:4 Inu mwakhala ngati populumukira pa anthu osauka
Isaiah25:5 ndiponso ngati kutentha mʼdziko lowuma. Inu mumaletsa phokoso la anthu achilendo. Monga momwe mthunzi wa mtambo umachepetsa kutentha
Isaiah25:6 Pa phiri ili Yehova Wamphamvuzonse adzakonzera anthu a mitundu yonse madyerero a zakudya zokoma ndi vinyo wabwino. Phwando la nyama yonona ndi vinyo wabwino kwambiri.
Isaiah25:7 Iye adzachotsa kulira kumene kwaphimba anthu ngati nsalu. Adzachotsa chinsalu chimene chakuta mitundu yonse ya anthu.
Isaiah25:8 Yehova adzathetsa imfa mpaka muyaya
Isaiah25:9 Tsiku limenelo iwo adzati
Isaiah25:10 Yehova adzateteza phiri limeneli ndi dzanja lake; ndipo Amowabu adzawapondereza pomwe alilipo
Isaiah25:11 Amowabuwo adzatambasula manja awo mʼmenemo
Isaiah25:12 Iye adzagumula malinga awo ataliatali ndipo adzawagwetsa ndi kuwaponya pansi
Isaiah26:1 Tsiku limenelo anthu a mʼdziko la Yuda adzayimba nyimbo iyi. Tili ndi mzinda wolimba. Mulungu amawuteteza ndi zipupa ndi malinga.
Isaiah26:2 Tsekulani zipata za mzinda kuti mtundu wolungama ndi wokhulupirika ulowemo.
Isaiah26:3 Inu mudzamupatsa munthu wa mtima wokhazikika mtendere weniweni.
Isaiah26:4 Mudalireni Yehova mpaka muyaya
Isaiah26:5 Iye amatsitsa anthu amene amadziyika pamwamba
Isaiah26:6 Mapazi a anthu akuwupondereza
Isaiah26:7 Njira ya munthu wolungama ndi yosalaza
Isaiah26:8 Inde Yehova
Isaiah26:9 Moyo wanga umalakalaka Inu usiku wonse; nthawi yammawa ndimafunafuna Inu. Pamene muweruza dziko lapansi anthu amaphunzira kuchita chilungamo.
Isaiah26:10 Ngakhale mukomere mtima anthu oyipa
Isaiah26:11 Inu Yehova
Isaiah26:12 Yehova
Isaiah26:13 Inu Yehova Mulungu wathu
Isaiah26:14 Iwo tsopano sadzadzukanso; mizimu yawo sidzabwera kudzativutitsa pakuti mwawalanga ndipo mwawawononga; palibenso amene amawakumbukira.
Isaiah26:15 Inu Yehova
Isaiah26:16 Yehova
Isaiah26:17 Monga mayi woyembekezera pamene nthawi yake yobereka yayandikira amamva kupweteka ndipo amalira ndi ululu
Isaiah26:18 Ife chimodzimodzi tinamva ululu
Isaiah26:19 Koma anthu anu amene anafa adzakhalanso ndi moyo; matupi awo adzadzuka. Iwo amene ali ku fumbi tsopano adzadzuka ndi kuyimba mosangalala. Monga mame amafewetsa pansi kutsitsimutsa zomera
Isaiah26:20 Abale anga
Isaiah26:21 Taonani
Isaiah27:1 Tsiku limenelo
Isaiah27:2 Tsiku limenelo Yehova adzati
Isaiah27:3 Ine
Isaiah27:4 Ine sindinakwiye. Ngati mkandankhuku ndi minga zikanaoneka ndikanalimbana nazo! Ndikachita nazo nkhondo; ndikanazitentha zonse ndi moto.
Isaiah27:5 Koma ngati apo ayi
Isaiah27:6 Masiku akubwerawo Yakobo adzazika mizu
Isaiah27:7 Kodi Yehova anakantha Israeli ngati momwe anakanthira anthu amene anazunza Israeli? Kapena kodi Yehova anapha Israeli ngati mmene anthu ena anaphera Israeli?
Isaiah27:8 Yehova mwawalanga powapirikitsa ndi kuwatumiza ku ukapolo
Isaiah27:9 Yehova adzakhululuka kulakwa kwa Yakobo. Iwo adzaonetsa kuti alapadi pamene adzaphwanya miyala yonse ya guwa lachikunja
Isaiah27:10 Mzinda wamalinga uja wasanduka bwinja
Isaiah27:11 Pamene nthambi za mitengoyo zauma
Isaiah27:12 Tsiku limenelo Yehova adzasonkhanitsa pamodzi anthu ake mmodzimmodzi kumalo opunthira tirigu
Isaiah27:13 Ndipo tsiku limenelo lipenga lalikulu lidzalira. Amene akuzunzika ku Asiriya iwo amene ali ku ukapolo ku Igupto adzabwera ndi kudzalambira Yehova pa phiri lopatulika mu Yerusalemu.
Isaiah28:1 Tsoka ufumu wonyada wa zidakwa za ku Efereimu. Tsoka kwa ulemerero wake wokongola umene ukufota ngati duwa limene lili pa mutu pa anthu oledzera a mʼchigwa chachonde.
Isaiah28:2 Taonani
Isaiah28:3 Ulamuliro wa atsogoleri oledzera a ku Efereimu adzawuthetsa.
Isaiah28:4 Ndipo ulemerero wokongola wa mzinda umene uli ngati duwa lofota pamutu pa anthu oledzera a mʼchigwa chachonde uja
Isaiah28:5 Tsiku limenelo Yehova Wamphamvuzonse adzakhala ngati nkhata yaufumu
Isaiah28:6 Iye adzapereka mtima wachilungamo kwa oweruza
Isaiah28:7 Nawonso awa ali dzandidzandi chifukwa cha vinyo ndipo akusochera chifukwa cha mowa: ansembe ndi aneneri akudzandira chifukwa cha mowa ndipo akusokonezeka chifukwa cha vinyo; akusochera chifukwa cha mowa
Isaiah28:8 Pa matebulo onse pali masanzi okhaokha ndipo palibenso malo wopanda zonyansa.
Isaiah28:9 Iwo akuti
Isaiah28:10 Akuyesa kumatiphunzitsa pangʼonopangʼono lemba ndi lemba
Isaiah28:11 Mulungu adzayankhula kwa anthu ake kudzera mwa anthu aziyankhulo zachilendo
Isaiah28:12 anakuwuzani kuti
Isaiah28:13 Choncho Yehova adzakuphunzitsani pangʼonopangʼono lemba ndi lemba
Isaiah28:14 Nʼchifukwa chake imvani mawu a Yehova
Isaiah28:15 Inu mumayankhula monyada kuti
Isaiah28:16 Tsono zimene Ambuye Yehova akunena ndi izi: “Taonani
Isaiah28:17 Ntchito zolungama zidzakhala ngati chingwe choyezera maziko ake
Isaiah28:18 Pangano limene munachita ndi imfa lidzathetsedwa; mgwirizano wanu ndi manda udzachotsedwa. Pakuti mliri woopsa udzafika
Isaiah28:19 Ndipo ukadzangofika udzakutengani. Udzafika mmawa uliwonse
Isaiah28:20 Mudzakhala ngati munthu wogona pa bedi lalifupi kwambiri kuti sangathe kutambalitsapo miyendo; ndiponso mudzakhala ngati munthu amene wafunda bulangeti lochepa kwambiri kuti sangathe nʼkufunda komwe.
Isaiah28:21 Yehova adzamenya nkhondo monga anachitira ku phiri la Perazimu adzakalipa monga anachitira ku chigwa cha Gibiyoni; adzagwira ntchito yake yooneka ngati yachilendo
Isaiah28:22 Tsopano lekani kunyoza
Isaiah28:23 Tcherani khutu ndipo mumve mawu anga; mvetserani ndipo mumve zimene ndikunena.
Isaiah28:24 Kodi mlimi wofuna kudzala mbewu amangokhalira kutipula kokhakokha? Kodi amangokhalira kugawula ndi kugalawuza kokhakokha?
Isaiah28:25 Pamene iye wasalaza mundawo
Isaiah28:26 Mulungu wake amamulangiza ndi kumuphunzitsa njira yabwino.
Isaiah28:27 Mawere sapunthira chopunthira cha galeta lopanda mikombero
Isaiah28:28 Tirigu ayenera kusinjidwa kuti apangire buledi
Isaiah28:29 Izinso zimachokera kwa Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Isaiah29:1 Tsoka kwa iwe
Isaiah29:2 Komatu Ine ndidzathira nkhondo Arieli ndipo kudzakhala kulira ndi kudandaula
Isaiah29:3 Ine ndidzamanga misasa ya nkhondo kulimbana ndi mzindawo; ndidzakuzungulira ndi nsanja za nkhondo ndi kumanga mitumbira yanga ya nkhondo kulimbana nawe.
Isaiah29:4 Utagwetsedwa pansi
Isaiah29:5 Koma chigulu cha adani ako chidzasanduka chifwirimbwiti. Chigulu cha ankhondo achilendo chidzabalalika ngati mungu wowuluzika ndi mphepo. Mwadzidzidzi ndi mosayembekezereka
Isaiah29:6 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse adzabwera ndi mabingu ndi chivomerezi ndi phokoso lalikulu
Isaiah29:7 Tsono chigulu chankhondo cha mitundu ina yonse chimene chikulimbana ndi mzinda wa Arieli nʼkumathira nkhondo mzindawo
Isaiah29:8 Chidzakhala ngati munthu wanjala wolota akudya
Isaiah29:9 Pitirizani kuledzera ndipo mudzakhala opusa. Dzitsekeni mʼmaso ndipo mukhale osapenya
Isaiah29:10 Yehova wakugonetsani tulo tofa nato. Watseka maso anu
Isaiah29:11 Kwa inu mawu onsewa ali ngati buku lotsekedwa
Isaiah29:12 Kapena ngati lipatsidwa kwa amene sadziwa kuwerenga ndi kunena kuti
Isaiah29:13 Ambuye akuti
Isaiah29:14 Nʼchifukwa chakenso Ine ndidzapitirira kuwachitira ntchito zodabwitsa; nzeru za anthu anzeru zidzatha
Isaiah29:15 Tsoka kwa amene amayesetsa kubisira Yehova maganizo awo
Isaiah29:16 Inu mumazondotsa zinthu ngati kuti dothi lasanduka wowumba mbiya. Kodi chinthu chopangidwa chingawuze wochipanga kuti “Sunandipange ndi iwe?” Kapena mʼphika kunena kwa amene anawuwumba kuti
Isaiah29:17 Kodi Lebanoni posachedwapa sadzasanduka munda wachonde
Isaiah29:18 Tsiku limenelo anthu osamva adzamva mawu a mʼbuku
Isaiah29:19 Anthu odzichepetsa adzakhalanso ndi chimwemwe mwa Yehova; ndipo anthu osowa adzakondwa chifukwa cha Woyerayo wa Israeli.
Isaiah29:20 Koma anthu ankhanza adzazimirira
Isaiah29:21 Yehova adzalanga amene amasinjirira munthu kuti apezeke wolakwa
Isaiah29:22 Choncho Yehova amene anawombola Abrahamu
Isaiah29:23 Akadzaona ana awo ndi ntchito ya manja anga pakati pawo
Isaiah29:24 Anthu opusa adzapeza nzeru; onyinyirika adzalandira malangizo.”
Isaiah30:1 Yehova akuti
Isaiah30:2 Amapita ku Igupto kukapempha thandizo koma osandifunsa; amathawira kwa Farao kuti awateteze
Isaiah30:3 Koma chitetezo cha Farao chidzakhala manyazi anu
Isaiah30:4 Ngakhale kuti nduna zawo zili ku Zowani
Isaiah30:5 aliyense wa ku Yuda adzachita manyazi chifukwa cha anthu opanda nawo phindu
Isaiah30:6 Uthenga wonena za nyama za ku Negevi: Akazembe akuyenda mʼdziko lovuta ndi losautsa
Isaiah30:7 Amapita ku Igupto amene thandizo lake ndi lachabechabe. Nʼchifukwa chake dzikolo ndalitcha Rahabe chirombo cholobodoka.
Isaiah30:8 Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Isaiah30:9 Amenewa ndi anthu owukira
Isaiah30:10 Iwo amawuza alosi kuti
Isaiah30:11 Patukani pa njira ya Yehova
Isaiah30:12 Nʼchifukwa chake Woyerayo wa Israeli akunena kuti
Isaiah30:13 choncho tchimo linalo lidzakhala ngati mingʼalu pa khoma lalitali ndi lopendama limene linagwa mwadzidzidzi ndi mwamsangamsanga.
Isaiah30:14 Lidzaphwanyika ngati mbiya imene yanyenyekeratu
Isaiah30:15 Zimene Ambuye Yehova
Isaiah30:16 Inu mukuti
Isaiah30:17 Anthu 1
Isaiah30:18 Komatu Yehova akufunitsitsa kuti akukomereni mtima
Isaiah30:19 Inu anthu a ku Ziyoni
Isaiah30:20 Ngakhale Ambuye adzakulowetseni mʼmasautso
Isaiah30:21 Ngati mudzapatukira kumanja kapena kumanzere
Isaiah30:22 Pamenepo mudzawononga mafano anu okutidwa ndi siliva ndiponso zifanizo zanu zokutidwa ndi golide; mudzawataya ngati zinthu zonyansa ndipo mudzati
Isaiah30:23 Yehova adzakugwetseraninso mvula pa mbewu zanu zimene mukadzale mʼnthaka
Isaiah30:24 Ngʼombe ndi abulu amene amalima mʼmunda adzadya chakudya chamchere
Isaiah30:25 Pa tsiku limene adani anu adzaphedwa ndi nsanja zawo kugwa
Isaiah30:26 Mwezi udzawala ngati dzuwa
Isaiah30:27 Taonani
Isaiah30:28 Mpweya wake uli ngati mtsinje wosefukira
Isaiah30:29 Ndipo inu mudzayimba mokondwa monga mumachitira usiku pa chikondwerero chopatulika. Mudzasangalala ngati anthu oyimba zitoliro popita ku phiri la Yehova
Isaiah30:30 Anthu adzamva liwu la ulemerero la Yehova ndipo adzaona dzanja lake likutsika pa iwo ndi mkwiyo woopsa
Isaiah30:31 Asiriya adzaopa liwu la Yehova
Isaiah30:32 Yehova akamadzalanga adani ake ndi ndodo
Isaiah30:33 Malo otenthera zinthu akonzedwa kale; anakonzera mfumu ya ku Asiriya. Dzenje la motolo ndi lozama ndi lalikulu
Isaiah31:1 Tsoka kwa amene amapita ku Igupto kukapempha chithandizo
Isaiah31:2 Komatu Yehovayo ndi wanzeru ndipo angathe kuwononga
Isaiah31:3 Aigupto ndi anthu chabe osati Mulungu; akavalo awo ndi nyama chabe osati mizimu. Yehova akangotambasula dzanja lake
Isaiah31:4 Zimene Yehova akunena kwa ine ndi izi: “Monga mkango kapena msona wamkango umabangula ukagwira nyama yake
Isaiah31:5 Monga mbalame zowuluka pamwamba pa zisa zake
Isaiah31:6 Inu Aisraeli
Isaiah31:7 Pakuti tsiku limenelo nonsenu mudzataya mafano anu a siliva ndi golide amene mumapanga ndi manja anu auchimo.
Isaiah31:8 “Aasiriya adzaphedwa ku nkhondo ndi mphamvu osati za munthu. Lupanga
Isaiah31:9 Mfumu yawo idzamwalira ndi mantha
Isaiah32:1 Taonani
Isaiah32:2 Munthu aliyense adzakhala ngati pothawirapo mphepo ndi malo obisalirapo namondwe
Isaiah32:3 Ndipo maso a anthu openya sadzakhalanso otseka
Isaiah32:4 Anthu a mtima wopupuluma adzadziwa ndi kuchita zinthu mofatsa
Isaiah32:5 Chitsiru sichidzatchedwanso munthu waulemu wake ndipo munthu woyipa sadzalemekezedwa.
Isaiah32:6 Pakuti munthu opusa amayankhula zauchitsiru
Isaiah32:7 Munthu woyipa njira zake ndi zoyipanso
Isaiah32:8 Koma munthu wolemekezeka amalingaliranso kuchita zinthu zabwino
Isaiah32:9 Khalani maso
Isaiah32:10 Pakapita chaka ndi masiku pangʼono inu akazi amatama mudzanjenjemera; chifukwa mitengo ya mphesa idzakanika ndipo zipatso sizidzaoneka.
Isaiah32:11 Nthunthumirani inu okhala mosatekesekanu; ndipo njenjemerani
Isaiah32:12 Dzigugudeni pachifuwa mwachisoni chifukwa minda yachonde
Isaiah32:13 Mʼdziko la anthu anga mwamera minga ndi mkandankhuku. Zoona
Isaiah32:14 Nyumba yaufumu idzasiyidwa
Isaiah32:15 Yehova adzatipatsa mzimu wake
Isaiah32:16 Tsono mʼchipululu mudzakhala chiweruzo cholungama ndipo mʼminda yachonde mudzakhala chilungamo.
Isaiah32:17 Mtendere udzakhala chipatso chachilungamo; zotsatira za chilungamo zidzakhala bata ndi kudzidalira mpaka muyaya.
Isaiah32:18 Anthu anga adzakhala mʼmidzi yamtendere
Isaiah32:19 Ngakhale nkhalango idzawonongedwa ndi matalala ndipo mzinda udzagwetsedwa mpaka pansi
Isaiah32:20 inutu mudzakhala odalitsika ndithu. Mudzadzala mbewu zanu mʼmbali mwa mtsinje uliwonse
Isaiah33:1 Tsoka kwa iwe
Isaiah33:2 Inu Yehova
Isaiah33:3 Mukatulutsa liwu lanu longa bingu mitundu ya anthu imathawa; pamene Inu mwadzambatuka mitundu ya anthu imabalalika.
Isaiah33:4 Zofunkha za ku nkhondo za mitundu ina Aisraeli adzazisonkhanitsa ngati mmene limachitira dzombe. Iwo adzalumphira zofunkhazo monga mmene limachitira dzombe.
Isaiah33:5 Yehova wakwezeka kwambiri pakuti amakhala pamwamba pa zonse adzadzaza Ziyoni ndi chilungamo ndi chipulumutso.
Isaiah33:6 Iye adzakupatsani mtendere pa nthawi yanu
Isaiah33:7 Taonani
Isaiah33:8 Mʼmisewu yayikulu mulibe anthu
Isaiah33:9 Dziko likulira ndipo likunka likutha. Nkhalango ya Lebanoni ikuchita manyazi
Isaiah33:10 Yehova akunena kuti
Isaiah33:11 Zolingalira zanu nʼzachabechabe ngati udzu wamanyowa. Mpweya wamoto udzakupserezani.
Isaiah33:12 Anthu a mitundu ina adzatenthedwa ngati miyala ya njereza; ndi ngati minga yodulidwa.”
Isaiah33:13 Inu amene muli kutali
Isaiah33:14 Mu mzinda wa Ziyoni anthu ochimwa agwidwa ndi mantha; anthu osapembedza Mulungu akunjenjemera: Iwo akunena kuti
Isaiah33:15 Angathe kuti ndi amene amachita zolungama ndi kuyankhula zoona
Isaiah33:16 Munthu wotere ndiye adzakhale pa nsanja
Isaiah33:17 Nthawi imeneyo maso a ana adzaona mfumu ya maonekedwe wokongola ndi kuona dziko lotambasukira kutali.
Isaiah33:18 Mu mtima mwanu muzidzalingalira zoopsa zinachitika kale zija: “Ali kuti mkulu wa Asilikali uja? Ali kuti wokhometsa misonkho uja? Ali kuti mkulu woyangʼanira nsanja?”
Isaiah33:19 Simudzawaonanso anthu odzikuza aja
Isaiah33:20 Taonani Ziyoni
Isaiah33:21 Kumeneko Yehova adzaonetsa ulemerero wake ndipo mzindawo udzakhala kasupe wa mitsinje yayikulu. Ngalawa za zopalasa sizidzapitamo
Isaiah33:22 Pakuti Yehova ndi woweruza wathu
Isaiah33:23 Zingwe za sitima zapamadzi za adani athu zamasuka
Isaiah33:24 Palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe wokhala mʼZiyoni adzanene kuti
Isaiah34:1 Inu anthu a mitundu yonse
Isaiah34:2 Yehova wayipidwa ndi anthu a mitundu yonse; wapsera mtima magulu awo onse ankhondo. Iye adzawawononga kotheratu
Isaiah34:3 Anthu awo ophedwa adzatayidwa kunja
Isaiah34:4 Dzuwa
Isaiah34:5 Yehova akuti
Isaiah34:6 Lupanga la Yehova lakhuta magazi
Isaiah34:7 Pamodzi ndi anthuwo zidzaphedwanso njati
Isaiah34:8 Iyi ndi nthawi imene Yehova adzalipsira ndi kulanga adani a Ziyoni.
Isaiah34:9 Madzi a mʼmitsinje ya Edomu adzasanduka phula
Isaiah34:10 Motowo sudzazimitsidwa usiku ndi usana; utsi wake udzafuka kosalekeza. Dzikolo lidzakhala chipululu pa mibado ndi mibado; palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe amene adzadutsemo.
Isaiah34:11 Mʼdzikomo mudzakhala akabawi ndi anungu; amantchichi ndi akhwangwala adzapanga zisa zawo mʼmenemo. Mulungu adzatambalitsa pa Edomu chingwe choyezera cha chisokonezo ndi chingwe chowongolera cha chiwonongeko.
Isaiah34:12 Anthu olemekezeka ake sadzatchedwanso mfumu kumeneko; akalonga ake onse adzachotsedwa.
Isaiah34:13 Minga idzamera mʼnyumba zake zankhondo zotetezedwa
Isaiah34:14 Avumbwe adzakumana ndi afisi
Isaiah34:15 Kadzidzi adzamangako chisa chake nʼkuyikirako mazira
Isaiah34:16 Funafunani mʼbuku la Yehova ndi kuwerenga: mwa zolengedwazi palibe chimene chidzasowa; sipadzakhala nʼchimodzi chomwe chopanda chinzake. Pakuti Yehova walamula kuti zitero
Isaiah34:17 Yehova wagawa dziko lawo; wapatsa chilichonse chigawo chake. Dziko lidzakhala lawo mpaka muyaya ndipo zidzakhala mʼmenemo pa mibado yonse.
Isaiah35:1 Chipululu ndi dziko lopanda madzi zidzasangalala; dziko lowuma lidzakondwa ndi kuchita maluwa.
Isaiah35:2 Dzikolo lidzakhala ndi maluwa ochuluka lidzasangalala kwambiri ndi kufuwula mwachimwemwe. Lidzakhala ndi ulemerero monga wa ku mapiri a ku Lebanoni
Isaiah35:3 Limbitsani manja ofowoka
Isaiah35:4 nenani kwa a mitima yamantha kuti; “Limbani mtima
Isaiah35:5 Pamenepo maso a anthu osaona adzapenyanso ndipo makutu a anthu osamva adzatsekuka.
Isaiah35:6 Anthu olumala adzalumpha ngati mbawala
Isaiah35:7 mchenga wotentha udzasanduka dziwe
Isaiah35:8 Ndipo kumeneko kudzakhala msewu waukulu; ndipo udzatchedwa Msewu Wopatulika. Anthu odetsedwa sadzayendamo mʼmenemo; zitsiru sizidzasochera mʼmenemo.
Isaiah35:9 Kumeneko sikudzakhala mkango
Isaiah35:10 Iwo amene Yehova anawawombola adzabwerera. Adzalowa mu mzinda wa Ziyoni akuyimba; kumeneko adzakondwa mpaka muyaya. Adzakutidwa ndi chisangalalo ndi chimwemwe
Isaiah36:1 Chaka cha khumi ndi chinayi cha ulamuliro wa Mfumu Hezekiya
Isaiah36:2 Kenaka mfumu ya ku Asiriya inatuma kazembe wake wankhondo pamodzi ndi gulu lalikulu lankhondo kuchokera ku Lakisi kupita kwa mfumu Hezekiya ku Yerusalemu. Tsono kazembeyo anayima pafupi ndi ngalande yamadzi yochokera ku Dziwe lakumtunda pa msewu wopita ku malo a munda wa mmisiri wochapa zovala.
Isaiah36:3 Panali anthu atatu. Woyamba anali Eliyakimu mwana wa Hilikiya komanso ndiye woyangʼanira nyumba ya mfumu. Wachiwiri anali Sebina amene anali mlembi wa bwalo; ndipo wachitatu anali Yowa mwana wa Asafu komanso anali wolemba zochitika. Anthu awa anatuluka kukakumana ndi kazembe wa ankhondo uja.
Isaiah36:4 Kazembe wa ankhondo anawawuza kuti
Isaiah36:5 Iwe ukuti uli ndi luso ndiponso mphamvu pa nkhondo
Isaiah36:6 Taona tsono
Isaiah36:7 Ndipo ngati ukunena kwa ine kuti
Isaiah36:8 “Ndipo tsopano bwera udzakambirane ndi mbuye wanga
Isaiah36:9 Iwe ungathe bwanji kugonjetsa ngakhale mmodzi mwa akazembe angʼonoangʼono a mbuye wanga
Isaiah36:10 Kuwonjezera pamenepa
Isaiah36:11 Pamenepo Eliyakimu
Isaiah36:12 Koma kazembeyo anayankha kuti
Isaiah36:13 Tsono kazembeyo anayimirira nafuwula mu Chihebri kuti
Isaiah36:14 Zimene mfumu ikunena ndi izi: Musalole kuti Hezekiya akunamizeni. Iye sangakupulumutseni!
Isaiah36:15 Hezekiya asakukakamizeni kudalira Yehova ndi mawu akuti
Isaiah36:16 “Musamumvere Hezekiya. Zimene mfumu ya ku Asiriya ikunena ndi izi: Pangani mtendere ndi ine ndipo mutuluke mu mzinda. Mukatero aliyense wa inu adzadya mphesa ndi nkhuyu za mʼmunda mwake ndiponso adzamwa madzi a mʼchitsime chake
Isaiah36:17 mpaka mfumuyo itabwera kudzakutengani kupita ku dziko lofanana ndi lanulo
Isaiah36:18 “Inu musalole kuti Hezekiya akusocheretseni pamene iye akuti
Isaiah36:19 Kodi ili kuti milungu ya Hamati ndi Aripadi? Ili kuti milungu ya Sefaravaimu? Kodi inapulumutsa Samariya mʼdzanja langa?
Isaiah36:20 Kodi ndi milungu iti mwa milungu yonse ya mayiko awa amene anapulumutsa dziko lake mʼdzanja? Nanga tsono Yehova adzapulumutsa Yerusalemu mʼdzanja langa motani?”
Isaiah36:21 Koma anthu anakhala chete ndipo sanayankhepo kanthu
Isaiah36:22 Pamenepo anthu atatu aja Eliyakimu
Isaiah37:1 Mfumu Hezekiya atamva zimenezi
Isaiah37:2 Iye anatuma Eliyakimu woyangʼanira nyumba ya mfumu
Isaiah37:3 Iwo anamuwuza kuti
Isaiah37:4 Mwina Yehova Mulungu wanu adzamva mawu onse a kazembe amene mbuye wake
Isaiah37:5 Akuluakulu a mfumu Hezekiya atafika kwa Yesaya
Isaiah37:6 Yesaya anawawuza kuti
Isaiah37:7 Tamverani! Ine ndidzayika mwa mfumuyo mzimu wina kotero kuti akadzamva mphekesera ya nkhondo
Isaiah37:8 Kazembe wa ankhondo uja atamva kuti mfumu ya ku Asiriya yachoka ku Lakisi
Isaiah37:9 Nthawi imeneyi Senakeribu analandira uthenga wakuti Tirihaka
Isaiah37:10 “Kawuzeni Hezekiya mfumu ya ku Yuda kuti: Usalole kuti Mulungu amene ukumudalira akupusitse ponena kuti
Isaiah37:11 Ndithudi iwe unamva zimene mafumu a ku Asiriya akhala akuchitira mayiko onse. Iwo anawawononga kotheratu. Tsono iwe ndiye ndi kupulumuka?
Isaiah37:12 Makolo anga anawononga mizinda ya Gozani
Isaiah37:13 Kodi mafumu a ku Hamati
Isaiah37:14 Hezekiya analandira kalata kwa amithenga nayiwerenga pomwepo. Hezekiya anapita ku Nyumba ya Yehova ndipo anayika kalatayo pamaso pa Yehova.
Isaiah37:15 Ndipo Hezekiya anapemphera kwa Yehova:
Isaiah37:16 “Inu Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Isaiah37:17 Inu Yehova tcherani khutu ndipo mumve. Inu Yehova
Isaiah37:18 “Yehova
Isaiah37:19 Iwo anaponyera pa moto milungu yawo ndi kuyiwononga pakuti sinali milungu koma mafano a mitengo ndi miyala
Isaiah37:20 Tsono Inu Yehova Mulungu wathu
Isaiah37:21 Tsono Yesaya mwana wa Amozi anatumiza uthenga wochokera kwa Yehova kwa Hezekiya poyankha pemphero lake lokhudza Senakeribu mfumu ya ku Asiriya.
Isaiah37:22 Mawu amene Yehova wayankhula motsutsana naye ndi awa: “Mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni akukunyoza ndi kukuseka. Mwana wamkazi wa Yerusalemu
Isaiah37:23 Kodi iwe wanyoza ndi kulalatira ndani? Kodi iwe wafuwulira ndi kumuyangʼana monyada ndani? Watsutsana ndi Woyerayo wa Israeli!
Isaiah37:24 Kudzera mwa amithenga ako iwe wanyoza Ambuye. Ndipo wanena kuti
Isaiah37:25 Ndakumba zitsime ku mayiko achilendo ndi kumva madzi akumeneko ndi mapazi anga ndawumitsa mitsinje yonse ya ku Igupto.’
Isaiah37:26 “Kodi sunamvepo kuti zimenezi ndinazikonzeratu kalekale? Ndinazikonzeratu masiku amakedzana; tsopano ndazichitadi
Isaiah37:27 Anthu amene ankakhala kumeneko analibenso mphamvu
Isaiah37:28 “Koma Ine ndimadziwa zonse za iwe; ndimadziwa pamene ukuyima ndi pamene ukukhala; ndimadziwa pamene ukutuluka ndi pamene ukulowa
Isaiah37:29 Chifukwa umandikwiyira Ine ndi kuti mwano wako wamveka mʼmakutu anga
Isaiah37:30 “Iwe Hezekiya
Isaiah37:31 Anthu a nyumba ya Yuda amene adzatsalire adzazika mizu yawo pansi ndipo adzabereka zipatso poyera.
Isaiah37:32 Pakuti ku Yerusalemu kudzachokera anthu otsala
Isaiah37:33 “Choncho Yehova akunena izi za mfumu ya ku Asiriya: “Iye sadzalowa mu mzinda umenewu kapena kuponyamo muvi uliwonse. Sadzafika pafupi ndi mzindawu ndi ankhondo ake a zishango kapena kuwuzinga ndi mitumbira yankhondo.
Isaiah37:34 Adzabwerera potsata njira yomwe anadzera pobwera; sadzalowa mu mzinda umenewu
Isaiah37:35 “Ine ndidzawuteteza ndi kuwupulumutsa mzindawu
Isaiah37:36 Tsopano mngelo wa Yehova anapita ku misasa ya nkhondo ya ku Asiriya ndikukapha asilikali 185
Isaiah37:37 Choncho Senakeribu mfumu ya ku Asiriya anasasula misasa nʼkuchoka kubwerera kukakhala ku Ninive.
Isaiah37:38 Tsiku lina
Isaiah38:1 Nthawi imeneyo Mfumu Hezekiya anadwala ndipo anali pafupi kufa. Mneneri Yesaya mwana wa Amozi anapita kukamuona ndipo anati “Yehova akuti: Konza bwino nyumba yako
Isaiah38:2 Hezekiya anatembenuka nayangʼana kukhoma
Isaiah38:3 “Inu Yehova
Isaiah38:4 Ndipo Yehova analamula Yesaya kuti:
Isaiah38:5 “Pita kwa Hezekiya ndipo ukamuwuze kuti
Isaiah38:6 Ndipo ndidzakupulumutsa
Isaiah38:7 “ ‘Ichi ndi chizindikiro cha Yehova kwa iwe kutsimikiza kuti Yehova adzachita zimene walonjeza:
Isaiah38:8 Chithunzithunzi chimene dzuwa likuchititsa pa makwerero a Ahazi ndidzachibweza mʼmbuyo makwerero khumi.’ ” Ndipo chithunzithunzi chinabwerera mʼmbuyo makwerero khumi.
Isaiah38:9 Ndakatulo ya Hezekiya mfumu ya ku Yuda imene analemba atadwala ndi kuchira:
Isaiah38:10 Ine ndinaganiza kuti ndidzapita ku dziko la akufa pamene moyo ukukoma.
Isaiah38:11 Ndinaganiza kuti
Isaiah38:12 Nyumba yanga yasasuka ndipo yachotsedwa. Ngati tenti ya mʼbusa mwapindapinda moyo wanga
Isaiah38:13 Ndinkalira kupempha chithandizo usiku wonse mpaka mmawa; koma Inu Yehova munaphwanya mafupa anga ngati mkango
Isaiah38:14 Ndinkalira ngati namzeze kapena chumba
Isaiah38:15 Koma ine ndinganene chiyani? Yehova wayankhula nane
Isaiah38:16 Ambuye
Isaiah38:17 Ndithudi
Isaiah38:18 Pakuti akumanda sangathe kukutamandani
Isaiah38:19 Amoyo
Isaiah38:20 Yehova watipulumutsa. Tiyeni tiyimbe ndi zoyimbira za zingwe masiku onse a moyo wathu mʼNyumba ya Yehova.
Isaiah38:21 Yesaya anati
Isaiah38:22 Hezekiya nʼkuti atafunsa kuti
Isaiah39:1 Nthawi imeneyo Merodaki-Baladani
Isaiah39:2 Hezekiya anawalandira mwasangala ndipo anawaonetsa zonse zimene zinali mʼnyumba zake zosungiramo siliva
Isaiah39:3 Tsono mneneri Yesaya anapita kwa mfumu Hezekiya ndipo anamufunsa kuti
Isaiah39:4 Mneneri anafunsanso kuti
Isaiah39:5 Pamenepo Yesaya anati kwa Hezekiya
Isaiah39:6 Yehova akuti
