Isaiah39:8 Hezekiya anayankha kuti
Isaiah40:1 Atonthozeni
Isaiah40:2 Ayankhuleni moleza mtima anthu a ku Yerusalemu ndipo muwawuzitse kuti nthawi ya ukapolo wawo yatha
Isaiah40:3 Mawu a wofuwula mʼchipululu akuti
Isaiah40:4 Chigwa chilichonse achidzaze. Phiri lililonse ndi chitunda chilichonse azitsitse; Dziko lokumbikakumbika alisalaze
Isaiah40:5 Ndipo ulemerero wa Yehova udzaonekera
Isaiah40:6 Wina ananena kuti
Isaiah40:7 Udzu umanyala ndipo maluwa amafota chifukwa cha kuwomba kwa mpweya wa Yehova.” Mawu aja anatinso
Isaiah40:8 Udzu umanyala ndipo maluwa amafota
Isaiah40:9 Iwe amene ukulengeza nkhani yabwino ku Ziyoni
Isaiah40:10 Taonani
Isaiah40:11 Iye adzasamalira nkhosa zake ngati mʼbusa: Iye adzasonkhanitsa ana ankhosa aakazi mʼmanja mwake ndipo Iye akuwanyamula pachifuwa chake ndi kutsogolera bwinobwino nkhosa zoyamwitsa.
Isaiah40:12 Kodi ndani akhoza kuyeza kuchuluka kwa madzi a mʼnyanja ndi chikhatho chake
Isaiah40:13 Ndani anapereka malangizo kwa Mzimu wa Yehova kapena kumuphunzitsa Iye monga phungu wake?
Isaiah40:14 Kodi Yehova anapemphapo nzeru kwa yani kuti akhale wopenya
Isaiah40:15 Ndithudi mitundu ya anthu ili ngati dontho la madzi ochoka mu mtsuko. Iwo akungoyesedwa ngati fumbi chabe pa sikelo; mʼmanja mwa Yehova zilumba nʼzopepuka ngati fumbi.
Isaiah40:16 Nkhalango ya ku Lebanoni singakwanire nkhuni zosonkhera moto pa guwa lansembe
Isaiah40:17 Pamaso pa Yehova mitundu yonse ya anthu ili ngati chinthu chopandapake; Iye amayiwerengera ngati chinthu chopanda phindu ndi cha chabechabe.
Isaiah40:18 Kodi tsono Mulungu mungamuyerekeze ndi yani? Kodi mungamufanizire ndi chiyani?
Isaiah40:19 Likakhala fano
Isaiah40:20 Mʼmphawi amene sangathe kupeza ngakhale chopereka nsembe chotere amasankha mtengo umene sudzawola
Isaiah40:21 Kodi simukudziwa? Kodi simunamve? Kodi sanakuwuzeni kuyambira pachiyambi pomwe? Kodi simunamvetsetse chiyambire cha dziko lapansi?
Isaiah40:22 Yehova amene amakhala pa mpando wake waufumu kumwamba ndiye analenga dziko lapansi
Isaiah40:23 Amatsitsa pansi mafumu amphamvu nasandutsa olamula a dziko kukhala achabechabe.
Isaiah40:24 Inde
Isaiah40:25 Woyera uja akuti
Isaiah40:26 Tayangʼanani mlengalenga ndipo onani. Kodi ndani analenga zonsezi mukuzionazi? Yehova ndiye amene amazitsogolera ngati gulu la ankhondo
Isaiah40:27 Iwe Yakobo
Isaiah40:28 Kodi simukudziwa? Kodi simunamve? Yehova ndiye Mulungu wamuyaya
Isaiah40:29 Iye amalimbitsa ofowoka ndipo otopa amawawonjezera mphamvu.
Isaiah40:30 Ngakhale achinyamata amalefuka ndi kufowoka
Isaiah40:31 koma iwo amene amakhulupirira Yehova adzalandira mphamvu zatsopano. Adzawuluka ngati chiwombankhanga; adzathamanga koma sadzalefuka
Isaiah41:1 “Khalani chete pamaso panga
Isaiah41:2 “Ndani anadzutsa wochokera kummawa uja amene ananka napambana kulikonse kumene ankapita? Iye amapereka anthu a mitundu ina mʼmanja mwake ndipo ndi lupanga lake anagonjetsa ndi kusandutsa mafumu kukhala ngati fumbi nawamwaza ngati mankhusu ndi uta wake.
Isaiah41:3 Amawalondola namayenda mosavutika
Isaiah41:4 Ndani anachita zimenezi ndi kuzitsiriza
Isaiah41:5 Mayiko amʼmbali mwa nyanja aona zimenezi ndipo akuopa; anthu a ku mathero a dziko lapansi akunjenjemera. Akuyandikira pafupi
Isaiah41:6 aliyense akuthandiza mnzake ndipo akuwuza mʼbale wake kuti
Isaiah41:7 Mʼmisiri wa matabwa amalimbikitsa mʼmisiri wa golide
Isaiah41:8 “Koma Iwe Israeli mtumiki wanga
Isaiah41:9 Ndinakutengani kuchokera ku mapeto a dziko lapansi
Isaiah41:10 Tsono usaope
Isaiah41:11 “Onse amene akupsera mtima adzachita manyazi ndithu ndi kunyazitsidwa; onse amene akukangana nawe sadzakhalanso kanthu
Isaiah41:12 Udzafunafuna adani ako
Isaiah41:13 Pakuti Ine Yehova
Isaiah41:14 Usachite mantha
Isaiah41:15 “Taona
Isaiah41:16 Udzawapeta ndipo adzawuluka ndi mphepo komanso adzamwazika ndi kamvuluvulu. Koma iwe udzakondwera chifukwa Ine ndine Mulungu wako
Isaiah41:17 “Pamene amphawi ndi osauka akufunafuna madzi
Isaiah41:18 Ndidzayendetsa mitsinje mʼmalo owuma
Isaiah41:19 Mʼchipululu ndidzameretsa mkungudza
Isaiah41:20 kuti anthu aone ndi kudziwa; inde
Isaiah41:21 “Yehova akuwuza milungu ina kuti
Isaiah41:22 Bwerani ndi milungu yanu kuti idzatiwuze zomwe zidzachitike mʼtsogolo. Tifotokozereni zinthu zamakedzana tiziganizire ndi kudziwa zotsatira zake. Kapena tiwuzeni zimene zidzachitike mʼtsogolo
Isaiah41:23 tiwuzeni kuti kutsogolo kuli zotani
Isaiah41:24 Koma inu sindinu kanthu ndipo zochita zanu nʼzopandapake; amene amapembedza inu ali ngati chinthu chokanidwa chifukwa ndi choyipa.
Isaiah41:25 “Ndinawutsa munthu wina kumpoto ndipo anabwera
Isaiah41:26 Ndani anawululiratu zimenezi poyamba pomwe
Isaiah41:27 Ine ndinali woyamba kumuwuza Ziyoni kuti
Isaiah41:28 Koma ndikayangʼana palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe
Isaiah41:29 Taonani
Isaiah42:1 “Nayu mtumiki wanga
Isaiah42:2 Iye sadzafuwula
Isaiah42:3 Bango lophwanyika sadzalithyola
Isaiah42:4 sadzafowoka kapena kukhumudwa mpaka atakhazikitsa chilungamo pa dziko lapansi
Isaiah42:5 Yehova Mulungu amene analenga zamlengalenga ndi kuziyalika
Isaiah42:6 “Ine Yehova
Isaiah42:7 Udzatsekula maso a anthu osaona
Isaiah42:8 “Ine ndine Yehova: dzina langa ndi limenelo! Sindidzapereka ulemerero wanga kwa wina aliyense kapena matamando anga kwa mafano.
Isaiah42:9 Taonani
Isaiah42:10 Imbirani Yehova nyimbo yatsopano
Isaiah42:11 Chipululu ndi mizinda yake zikweze mawu awo; midzi ya Akedara ikondwere. Anthu a ku Sela ayimbe mwachimwemwe; afuwule kuchokera pamwamba pa mapiri.
Isaiah42:12 Atamande Yehova ndipo alalike matamando ake kwa anthu apazilumba zonse.
Isaiah42:13 Yehova adzapita ku nkhondo ngati munthu wamphamvu
Isaiah42:14 Yehova akuti
Isaiah42:15 Ndidzawononga mapiri ndi zitunda ndipo ndidzawumitsa zomera zawo zonse; ndidzasandutsa mitsinje kukhala zilumba ndipo ndidzawumitsa maiwe.
Isaiah42:16 Ndidzatsogolera anthu osaona mʼmisewu imene sanayidziwe
Isaiah42:17 Koma onse amene amadalira mafano amene amanena kwa mafanowo kuti
Isaiah42:18 “Imvani
Isaiah42:19 Ali wosaona ndani
Isaiah42:20 Iwe waona zinthu zambiri
Isaiah42:21 Chinamukomera Yehova chifukwa cha chilungamo chake
Isaiah42:22 Koma awa ndi anthu amene afunkhidwa ndi kuwalanda zinthu zawo
Isaiah42:23 Kodi ndani wa inu amene adzamvetsera zimenezi kapena kutchera khutu ndi kumva za mʼtsogolomo?
Isaiah42:24 Ndani anapereka Yakobo kwa ofunkha
Isaiah42:25 Motero anawakwiyira kwambiri
Isaiah43:1 Koma tsopano
Isaiah43:2 Pamene ukuwoloka nyanja
Isaiah43:3 Chifukwa Ine Yehova
Isaiah43:4 Popeza kuti ndiwe wamtengowapatali wolemekezeka ndi wapamtima panga
Isaiah43:5 Usachite mantha
Isaiah43:6 Ndidzawuza a kumpoto kuti
Isaiah43:7 onsewo amadziwika ndi dzina langa; ndinawalenga chifukwa cha ulemerero wanga
Isaiah43:8 Tulutsa anthu amene ali nawo maso koma sakupenya
Isaiah43:9 Mitundu yonse ya anthu isonkhane pamodzi
Isaiah43:10 Yehova akunena kuti
Isaiah43:11 Akutero Yehova
Isaiah43:12 Ndine amene ndinaneneratu
Isaiah43:13 “Ine ndine Mulungu kuyambira nthawi yamakedzana
Isaiah43:14 Yehova akuti
Isaiah43:15 Ine ndine Yehova
Isaiah43:16 Yehova anapanga njira pa nyanja
Isaiah43:17 Iye anasonkhanitsa magaleta
Isaiah43:18 “Iwalani zinthu zakale; ndipo musaganizirenso zinthu zimene zinachitika kale.
Isaiah43:19 Taonani
Isaiah43:20 Nyama zakuthengo
Isaiah43:21 Anthu amene ndinadziwumbira ndekha kuti aziyimba nyimbo yotamanda Ine.
Isaiah43:22 “Komatu simunapemphera kwa Ine
Isaiah43:23 Simunabweretse kwa Ine nkhosa za nsembe zopsereza
Isaiah43:24 Simunandigulire bango lonunkhira kapena kundipatsa Ine mafuta okwanira a nsembe zanu. Koma inu mwandilemetsa Ine ndi machimo anu ndipo mwanditopetsa Ine ndi zolakwa zanu.
Isaiah43:25 “Ine
Isaiah43:26 Mundikumbutse zakale
Isaiah43:27 Kholo lanu loyamba linachimwa; ndipo Atsogoleri anu achipembedzo anandiwukira.
Isaiah43:28 Chifukwa chake Ine ndidzanyazitsa akuluakulu a Nyumba yanu ya mapemphero
Isaiah44:1 Yehova akuti
Isaiah44:2 Yehova amene anakupanga iwe
Isaiah44:3 Pakuti ndidzathira madzi pa nthaka yowuma
Isaiah44:4 Iwo adzakula ngati udzu wothirira bwino ndi ngati bango lomera mʼmbali mwa mitsinje ya madzi oyenda.
Isaiah44:5 Wina adzanena kuti
Isaiah44:6 “Yehova Mfumu ndi Mpulumutsi wa Israeli
Isaiah44:7 Ndani nanga angafanane ndi Ine? Muloleni kuti ayankhule. Muloleni andifotokozere ndi kundiyalira bwino lomwe zimene zinachitika kuyambira pamene ndinkakhazikitsa anthu anga akalekale
Isaiah44:8 Musanjenjemere
Isaiah44:9 Onse amene amapanga mafano ngachabe
Isaiah44:10 Ndani amasema mulungu ndi kuwumba fano
Isaiah44:11 Iye pamodzi ndi anzake onse adzawachititsa manyazi; amisiri a mafano ndi anthu chabe. Aloleni onse asonkhane ndi kuyima pabwalo la milandu; onse adzaopsedwa ndipo adzachita manyazi.
Isaiah44:12 Mmisiri wa zitsulo amatenga chitsulo ndipo amachiyika pa makala amoto; ndi dzanja lake lamphamvu amachisula pochimenya ndi nyundo. Pambuyo pake mʼmisiri uja amamva njala natha mphamvu; iye samwa madzi
Isaiah44:13 Mmisiri wa matabwa nayenso amayeza mtengo ndi chingwe ndipo amajambula chithunzi ndi cholembera; amasema bwinobwino ndi chipangizo chake ndipo amachiwongola bwino ndi chida chake. Amachipanga ngati munthu
Isaiah44:14 Amagwetsa mitengo ya mkungudza
Isaiah44:15 Mitengoyo munthu amachitako nkhuni; nthambi zina amasonkhera moto wowotha
Isaiah44:16 Chigawo china cha mtengowo amasonkhera moto wowotcherapo nyama imene amadya
Isaiah44:17 Chigawo chotsala amapanga kamulungu
Isaiah44:18 Anthu otere sadziwa kanthu
Isaiah44:19 Palibe amene amayima nʼkulingalira. Palibe wanzeru kapena womvetsa zinthu bwino woti nʼkunena kuti
Isaiah44:20 Munthu wotere ali ngati wodya phulusa
Isaiah44:21 Yehova akuti
Isaiah44:22 Ndachotsa zolakwa zako ngati mitambo
Isaiah44:23 Imbani mwachimwemwe
Isaiah44:24 Yehova Mpulumutsi wanu
Isaiah44:25 Ndine amene ndinalepheretsa mipingo ya anthu onyenga
Isaiah44:26 Ndine amene ndimatsimikiza mawu a atumiki ake ndi kukwaniritsa zimene analosera amithenga ake. “Ndine amene ndinanena za Yerusalemu kuti mudzakhalanso anthu. Ndinanenanso za mizinda ya Yuda kuti idzamangidwanso. Za mabwinja awo ndinanena kuti ndidzawawutsanso.
Isaiah44:27 Ndine amene ndinawuza nyanga yayikulu kuti
Isaiah44:28 Ndine amene ndinanena kwa Koresi kuti
Isaiah45:1 Yehova akuyankhula ndi wodzozedwa wake Koresi amene anamugwira dzanja lamanja kuti agonjetse mitundu ya anthu ndi kuwalanda mafumu zida zawo zankhondo
Isaiah45:2 Ine ndidzayenda patsogolo pako
Isaiah45:3 Ndidzakupatsa chuma chobisika mu mdima
Isaiah45:4 Chifukwa cha mtumiki wanga Yakobo
Isaiah45:5 Ine ndine Yehova ndipo palibenso wina; kupatula Ine palibenso Mulungu wina. Ndidzakupatsa mphamvu
Isaiah45:6 kotero kuti kuchokera kummawa mpaka kumadzulo anthu adzadziwa kuti palibe wina koma Ine ndekha. Ine ndine Yehova
Isaiah45:7 Ndimalenga kuwala ndi mdima
Isaiah45:8 “Iwe thambo gwetsa mvula kuchokera kumwamba; mitambo ivumbwe mivumbi ya chilungamo. Dziko lapansi litsekuke
Isaiah45:9 “Tsoka kwa wokangana ndi mlengi wake
Isaiah45:10 Tsoka kwa wofunsa abambo ake kuti
Isaiah45:11 “Yehova Woyerayo wa Israeli
Isaiah45:12 Ndine amene ndinapanga dziko lapansi ndikulenga munthu kuti akhalemo. Ine ndi manja anga ndinayalika thambo; ndimalamulira zolengedwa zonse za mlengalenga.
Isaiah45:13 Ndine amene ndidzawutsa Koresi kuti chilungamo changa chikwaniritsidwe: ndipo ndidzawongolera njira zake zonse. Iye adzamanganso mzinda wanga ndi kumasula anthu anga amene ali mu ukapolo
Isaiah45:14 Yehova akuti
Isaiah45:15 Zoonadi inu muli ndi Mulungu wobisika amene ali Mulungu ndi Mpulumutsi wa Israeli.
Isaiah45:16 Onse amene amapanga mafano adzawachititsa manyazi ndi kuwanyozetsa. Adzakhala osokonezeka maganizo.
Isaiah45:17 Koma Yehova adzapulumutsa Israeli ndi chipulumutso chamuyaya; simudzachitanso manyazi kapena kunyozeka mpaka kalekale.
Isaiah45:18 Yehova analenga zinthu zakumwamba
Isaiah45:19 Ine sindinayankhule mwachinsinsi
Isaiah45:20 Yehova akuti
Isaiah45:21 Fotokozani mlandu wanu
Isaiah45:22 “Tembenukirani kwa Ine kuti mupulumuke
Isaiah45:23 Ndalumbira ndekha
Isaiah45:24 Iwo adzanene kwa Ine kuti
Isaiah45:25 Koma mwa Yehova zidzukulu zonse za Israeli zidzapambana ndi kupeza ulemerero.
Isaiah46:1 Beli wagwada pansi
Isaiah46:2 Nyamazo zikuwerama ndi kufuna kugwa ndi milunguyo; sizikutha kupulumutsa katunduyo
Isaiah46:3 Mverani Ine
Isaiah46:4 Mpaka pamene mudzakalambe ndi kumera imvi ndidzakusamalirani ndithu. Ndinakulengani ndipo ndidzakunyamulani
Isaiah46:5 “Kodi inu mudzandifanizira ndi yani
Isaiah46:6 Anthu ena amakhuthula golide mʼzikwama zawo ndipo amayeza siliva pa masikelo; amalemba ntchito mʼmisiri wosula kuti awapangire mulungu
Isaiah46:7 Amanyamula nʼkumayenda nayo milunguyo pa mapewa awo; amayikhazika pa malo pake ndipo imakhala pomwepo. Singathe kusuntha pamalo pakepo. Ngakhale wina apemphere kwa milunguyo singathe kuyankha; kapena kumupulumutsa ku mavuto ake.
Isaiah46:8 “Kumbukirani zimenezi ndipo muchite manyazi
Isaiah46:9 Kumbukirani zinthu zakale zinthu zamakedzana; chifukwa Ine ndine Mulungu ndipo palibe wina ofanana nane.
Isaiah46:10 Ndinaneneratu zakumathero kuchokera pachiyambi pomwe. Kuyambira nthawi yamakedzana ndinaloseratu zoti zidzachitike. Ndikanena zimene ndifuna kuchita ndipo zimachitikadi. Chilichonse chimene ndafuna ndimachichita.
Isaiah46:11 Ndikuyitana chiwombankhanga kuchokera kummawa. Ndikuyitana kuchokera ku dziko lakutali munthu amene adzakwaniritsa cholinga changa. Zimene ndanena ndidzazikwaniritsadi; zimene ndafuna ndidzazichitadi.
Isaiah46:12 Ndimvereni
Isaiah46:13 Ndikubweretsa pafupi tsiku la chipulumutso changa; sichili kutali. Tsikulo layandikira ndipo sindidzachedwa kukupulumutsani ndi kupereka ulemerero wanga kwa Israeli.
Isaiah47:1 “Tsika
Isaiah47:2 Tenga mphero ndipo upere ufa; chotsa nsalu yako yophimba nkhope kwinya chovala chako mpaka ntchafu ndipo woloka mitsinje.
Isaiah47:3 Maliseche ako adzakhala poyera ndipo udzachita manyazi. Ndidzabwezera chilango ndipo palibe amene adzandiletse.”
Isaiah47:4 Woyerayo wa Israeli ndiye Mpulumutsi wathu
Isaiah47:5 “Khala chete
Isaiah47:6 Ndinawakwiyira anthu anga
Isaiah47:7 Iwe unati
Isaiah47:8 “Ndipo tsopano
Isaiah47:9 Koma mʼkamphindi
Isaiah47:10 Iwe unkadalira kuyipa kwako ndipo unati
Isaiah47:11 Ngozi yayikulu idzakugwera ndipo sudzadziwa momwe ungayipewere ndi matsenga ako. Mavuto adzakugwera ndipo sudzatha kuwachotsa; chipasupasu chimene iwe sukuchidziwa chidzakugwera mwadzidzidzi.
Isaiah47:12 “Pitiriza tsono kukhala ndi matsenga ako
Isaiah47:13 Malangizo onse amene unalandira angokutopetsa basi! Abwere patsogolopa anthu amene amatanthauzira za kumwamba kuti adzakupulumutseni. Abwere amene amayangʼana nyenyezi
Isaiah47:14 Ndithudi
Isaiah47:15 Umu ndi mmene adzachitire amatsenga
Isaiah48:1 “Mverani izi
Isaiah48:2 Komabe inu mumadzitcha nzika za mzinda wopatulika ndipo mumadalira Mulungu wa Israeli
Isaiah48:3 Zimene zinachitika poyamba ndinalosera kalekale
Isaiah48:4 Pakuti Ine ndinadziwa kuti iwe ndiwe nkhutukumve wa nkhongo gwaa
Isaiah48:5 Ine ndinakuwuziratu zinthu izi kalekale lomwe; zisanachitike ndinazilengezeratu kwa iwe kuti unganene kuti
Isaiah48:6 Inu munamva zinthu zimenezi. Kodi inu simungazivomereze? “Kuyambira tsopano mpaka mʼtsogolo ndidzakuwuzani zinthu zatsopano zinthu zobisika zimene simunazidziwe konse.
Isaiah48:7 Zinthu zimenezi zikulengedwa tsopano lino
Isaiah48:8 Inu simunazimvepo kapena kuzidziwa; makutu anu sanali otsekuka. Tsono Ine ndinadziwa bwino kuti ndinu anthu achiwembu ndi kuti chiyambire ubwana wanu munatchedwa owukira.
Isaiah48:9 Ine ndikuchedwetsa mkwiyo wanga chifukwa cha dzina langa. Ndikukulezerani ukali wanga kuti anthu andilemekeze. Sindidzakuwonongani kotheratu.
Isaiah48:10 Taonani
Isaiah48:11 Chifukwa cha ulemu wanga
Isaiah48:12 “Tamvera Ine
Isaiah48:13 Inde dzanja langa linamanga maziko a dziko lapansi
Isaiah48:14 “Sonkhanani pamodzi inu nonse ndipo mvetserani: Ndani mwa mafano anu amene analoseratu za zinthu izi? Wokondedwa wa Yehova uja adzachita zomwe Iye anakonzera Babuloni; dzanja lake lidzalimbana ndi Kaldeya.
Isaiah48:15 Ine
Isaiah48:16 “Bwerani pafupi ndipo mvetserani izi: “Kuyambira pachiyambi sindinayankhule mobisa; pa nthawi imene zinkachitika zimenezi Ine ndinali pomwepo.” Ndipo tsopano Ambuye Yehova wandipatsa Mzimu wake ndi kundituma.
Isaiah48:17 Yehova
Isaiah48:18 Ngati iwe ukanangosamalira zolamulira zanga
Isaiah48:19 Zidzukulu zako zikanachuluka ngati mchenga
Isaiah48:20 Tulukani mʼdziko la Babuloni! Thawani dziko la Kaldeya! Lengezani zimenezi ndi mawu a chisangalalo ndipo muzilalikire mpaka kumathero a dziko lapansi; muzinena kuti
Isaiah48:21 Iwo sanamve ludzu pamene Yehova ankawatsogolera mʼchipululu; anawapatsa madzi otuluka mʼthanthwe; anangʼamba thanthwelo ndipo munatuluka madzi.
Isaiah48:22 “Palibe mtendere kwa anthu ochimwa
Isaiah49:1 Mverani Ine
Isaiah49:2 Iye anasandutsa pakamwa panga kukhala ngati lupanga lakuthwa
Isaiah49:3 Iye anati kwa ine
Isaiah49:4 Koma Ine ndinati
Isaiah49:5 Yehova anandiwumba ine mʼmimba mwa amayi anga kuti ndikhale mtumiki wake kuti ndibweze fuko la Yakobo kwa Iye ndi kusonkhanitsa Israeli kwa Iye
Isaiah49:6 Yehovayo tsono akuti
Isaiah49:7 Yehova Mpulumutsi ndi Woyerayo wa Israeli akuyankhula
Isaiah49:8 Yehova akuti
Isaiah49:9 Ndidzawuza a mʼndende kuti atuluke ndi a mu mdima kuti aonekere poyera. “Adzapeza chakudya mʼmphepete mwa njira ndi msipu pa mʼmalo owuma.
Isaiah49:10 Iwo sadzamva njala kapena ludzu
Isaiah49:11 Mapiri anga onse ndidzawasandutsa njira yoyendamo
Isaiah49:12 Taonani
Isaiah49:13 Imbani mwachimwemwe
Isaiah49:14 Koma Ziyoni anati
Isaiah49:15 “Kodi amayi angathe kuyiwala mwana wawo wakubere ndi kusachitira chifundo mwana amene anabereka iwo eni? Ngakhale iye angathe kuyiwala
Isaiah49:16 Taona
Isaiah49:17 Amisiri odzakumanganso akubwerera mofulumira
Isaiah49:18 Kweza maso ako ndipo uyangʼaneyangʼane ana ako onse akusonkhana ndipo akubwera kwa iwe. Yehova akuti
Isaiah49:19 “Ngakhale unasanduka bwinja ndi kuwonongedwa ndipo dziko lako ndi kusakazidwa
Isaiah49:20 Ana obadwa nthawi yako yachisoni adzanena kuti
Isaiah49:21 Tsono iwe udzadzifunsa kuti
Isaiah49:22 Zimene Ambuye Yehova akunena ndi izi
Isaiah49:23 Mafumu adzakhala abambo wongokulera ndipo akazi a mafumu adzakhala amayi wongokulera. Iwo adzagwetsa nkhope zawo pansi. Ndiye inu mudzazindikira kuti Ine ndine Yehova; iwo amene amadalira Ine sadzakhumudwa.”
Isaiah49:24 Kodi mungathe kulanda anthu ankhondo zofunkha zawo
Isaiah49:25 Koma zimene Yehova akunena ndi izi
Isaiah49:26 Anthu amene anakuponderezani adzadya mnofu wawo omwe; adzamwa magazi awo omwe ngati aledzera ndi vinyo. Zikadzatero anthu onse adzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova
Isaiah50:1 Yehova akuti
Isaiah50:2 Nʼchifukwa chiyani pamene ndinabwera kudzakupulumutsani panalibe munthu? Pamene ndinayitana
Isaiah50:3 Ndinaphimba thambo ndi mdima ndipo chiguduli chinakhala chofunda chake.”
Isaiah50:4 Ambuye Yehova anandiphunzitsa mawu oyenera kuyankhula kudziwa mawu olimbitsa mtima anthu ofowoka. Mmawa mulimonse amandidzutsa
Isaiah50:5 Ambuye Yehova wanditsekula makutu anga
Isaiah50:6 Ndinapereka msana wanga kwa ondimenya masaya anga ndinawapereka kwa anthu ondizula ndevu; sindinawabisire nkhope yanga anthu ondinyoza ndi ondilavulira.
Isaiah50:7 Popeza Ambuye Yehova amandithandiza
Isaiah50:8 Wondikhalira kumbuyo ali pafupi
Isaiah50:9 Ambuye Yehova ndiye amene amandithandiza. Ndaninso amene adzanditsutsa? Onse adzatha ngati chovala chodyedwa ndi njenjete.
Isaiah50:10 Ndani mwa inu amaopa Yehova ndi kumvera mawu a mtumiki wake? Aliyense woyenda mu mdima
Isaiah50:11 Koma tsopano inu nonse amene mumasonkha moto ndi kuyatsa sakali za moto kufuna kuwononga anzanu
Isaiah51:1 “Mverani Ine
Isaiah51:2 taganizani za Abrahamu
Isaiah51:3 Yehova adzatonthozadi Ziyoni
Isaiah51:4 “Mverani Ine
Isaiah51:5 Ndili pafupi kubwera kudzawombola anthu anga. Ndidzabwera mofulumira ngati kuwunika kudzapulumutsa anthu anga; ndipo ndidzalamulira anthu a mitundu yonse. Mayiko akutali akundiyembekezera. Iwo akudikira kuti ndidzawapulumutse.
Isaiah51:6 Kwezani maso anu mlengalenga
Isaiah51:7 “Mverani Ine
Isaiah51:8 Pakuti njenjete idzawadya ngati chovala; mbozi idzawadya ngati thonje. Koma chilungamo changa chidzakhala mpaka muyaya
Isaiah51:9 Dzambatukani
Isaiah51:10 Kodi sindinu amene munawumitsa nyanja yayikulu
Isaiah51:11 Anthu amene Yehova anawawombola adzabwerera nakafika ku Ziyoni nyimbo ili pakamwa; chimwemwe chamuyaya chizidzaonekera pa nkhope zawo. Adzakhala ndi chikondwerero ndi chimwemwe
Isaiah51:12 Yehova akuti
Isaiah51:13 Koma inu mumayiwala Yehova Mlengi wanu
Isaiah51:14 Amʼndende adzamasulidwa posachedwa; sadzalowa mʼmanda awo
Isaiah51:15 Pakuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu
Isaiah51:16 Ndayika mawu anga mʼkamwa mwanu ndipo ndakuphimbani ndi mthunzi wa dzanja langa. Ine ndimayika pa malo pake zinthu za mlengalenga
Isaiah51:17 Dzambatuka
Isaiah51:18 Mwa ana onse amene anabereka
Isaiah51:19 Mavuto awiriwa akugwera iwe. Dziko lako lasakazika ndi kuwonongeka. Anthu afa ndi njala ndi lupanga. Ndani angakumvere chisoni? Ndani angakutonthoze?
Isaiah51:20 Ana ako akomoka; ali lambalamba pa msewu
Isaiah51:21 Nʼchifukwa chake imva izi iwe amene ukuvutika
Isaiah51:22 Ambuye Yehova wanu
Isaiah51:23 Ndidzapereka chikhocho kwa anthu amene amakuzunza
Isaiah52:1 Dzambatuka
Isaiah52:2 Sasa fumbi lako; imirira nukhale pa mpando waufumu
Isaiah52:3 Pakuti Yehova akuti
Isaiah52:4 Pakuti Ambuye Yehova akuti
Isaiah52:5 Tsopano Ine Yehova ndikuti
Isaiah52:6 Tsono tsiku limenelo anthu anga adzadziwa dzina langa; kotero adzadziwa kuti ndi Ine amene ndikuyankhula
Isaiah52:7 Ngokongoladi mapazi a amithenga obweretsa nkhani yabwino amene akuyenda pa mapiri. Iwo akukubweretserani nkhani zabwino za mtendere
Isaiah52:8 Mverani! Alonda anu akukweza mawu awo; akuyimba pamodzi mwachimwemwe. Popeza akuona chamaso kubwera kwa Yehova ku Yerusalemu.
Isaiah52:9 Imbani pamodzi mofuwula nyimbo zachimwemwe
Isaiah52:10 Yehova wagwiritsa ntchito mphamvu zake zopatulika pamaso pa anthu a mitundu yonse
Isaiah52:11 Nyamukani
Isaiah52:12 Koma simudzachoka mofulumira kapena kuchita chothawa; pakuti Yehova adzayenda patsogolo panu
Isaiah52:13 Taonani
Isaiah52:14 Anthu ambiri atamuona anadzidzimuka
Isaiah52:15 Momwemonso anthu a mitundu yonse adzadodoma naye
Isaiah53:1 Ndani wakhulupirira zimene tanenazi; kapena ndani amene Yehova wamuzindikiritsa mphamvu zake?
Isaiah53:2 Iye anakula ngati mphukira pamaso pake
Isaiah53:3 Iye ananyozedwa ndi kukanidwa ndi anthu
Isaiah53:4 Ndithudi
Isaiah53:5 Koma iye analasidwa chifukwa cha zolakwa zathu
Isaiah53:6 Ife tonse
Isaiah53:7 Anthu anamuzunza ndi kumusautsa
Isaiah53:8 Atatha kumugwira mwankhanza ndikumuyimba mlandu
Isaiah53:9 Anamukonzera manda ake pamodzi ndi anthu oyipa ndipo anamuyika mʼmanda pamodzi ndi anthu achuma
Isaiah53:10 Komatu ndi Yehova amene anafuna kuti amuzunze ndi kumusautsa. Yehova anapereka moyo wa mtumiki wake kuti ukhale nsembe yoperekedwa chifukwa cha zolakwa. Tsono iye adzaona zidzukulu zake ndipo adzakhala ndi moyo wautali
Isaiah53:11 Atatha mazunzo a moyo wake
Isaiah53:12 Motero Ine ndidzamupatsa ulemu pamodzi ndi akuluakulu
Isaiah54:1 “Sangalala
Isaiah54:2 Kulitsa malo omangapo tenti yako
Isaiah54:3 Pakuti udzasendeza malire ako kumanja ndi kumanzere; ndipo zidzukulu zako zidzalanda dziko la anthu a mitundu ina ndipo zidzakhala mʼmizinda yawo yosiyidwa.
Isaiah54:4 “Usachite mantha; sadzakunyozanso. Usakhumudwe; sudzapeputsidwanso. Udzayiwala za manyazi zimene zinakuchitikira nthawi ya unyamata wako ndipo za manyazi zimene zinakuchitikira pa nthawi ya umasiye wako sudzazikumbukanso.
Isaiah54:5 Pakuti Mlengi wako ali ngati mwamuna wako
Isaiah54:6 Yehova wakuyitananso
Isaiah54:7 “Kwa kanthawi kochepa
Isaiah54:8 Ndinakufulatira kwa kanthawi kochepa ndili wokwiya kwambiri. Koma ndi kukoma mtima kwanga kwa muyaya
Isaiah54:9 “Kwa ine zimenezi zili ngati mmene zinalili mʼnthawi ya Nowa. Monga ndinalumbira nthawi imeneyo kuti sindidzawononganso dziko lapansi ndi madzi. Kotero tsopano ndalumbira kuti sindidzakupseraninso mtima
Isaiah54:10 Ngakhale mapiri atagwedezeka ndi zitunda kusunthidwa
Isaiah54:11 “Iwe mzinda wozunzika
Isaiah54:12 Ndidzamanga nsanja zako zankhondo ndi miyala yokongola ya rubi. Ndidzamanga zipata zako ndi miyala yonyezimira ngati moto
Isaiah54:13 Yehova adzaphunzitsa ana ako onse
Isaiah54:14 Udzakhazikika mʼchilungamo chenicheni: Sudzakhalanso wopanikizika
Isaiah54:15 Ngati wina adzakuthirani nkhondo
Isaiah54:16 “Taona
Isaiah54:17 palibe chida chopangidwa ndi mdani chimene chidzakupweteke
Isaiah55:1 “Bwerani
Isaiah55:2 Chifukwa chiyani ndalama zanu mukuwonongera zinthu zimene samadya
Isaiah55:3 Tcherani makutu ndipo mubwere kwa Ine; mvereni Ine
Isaiah55:4 Taonani
Isaiah55:5 Ndithu inu mudzayitanitsa mitundu ya anthu imene simuyidziwa
Isaiah55:6 Funafunani Yehova pamene Iye akupezeka. Mupemphere kwa Iye pamene ali pafupi.
Isaiah55:7 Woyipa asiye makhalidwe ake oyipa
Isaiah55:8 “Pakuti maganizo anga siwofanana ndi maganizo anu
Isaiah55:9 “Monga momwe mlengalenga muli kutali ndi dziko lapansi
Isaiah55:10 Monga mvula ndi chisanu chowundana zimatsika kuchokera kumwamba
Isaiah55:11 Ndi mmenenso amachitira mawu ochokera mʼkamwa mwanga. Sadzabwerera kwa Ine kopanda phindu lake
Isaiah55:12 Inu mudzatuluka mu mzindawo mwachimwemwe ndipo adzakutsogolerani mwamtendere; mapiri ndi zitunda zidzakuyimbirani nyimbo
Isaiah55:13 Mʼmalo mʼmene tsopano muli mitengo ya minga mudzamera mitengo ya payini
Isaiah56:1 Yehova akuti
Isaiah56:2 Ndi wodala munthu amene amachita zimenezi
Isaiah56:3 Mlendo amene waphatikana ndi Yehova asanene kuti
Isaiah56:4 Popeza Yehova akuti
Isaiah56:5 ndidzawapatsa dzina ndi mbiri yabwino mʼkati mwa Nyumba yanga ndi makoma ake
Isaiah56:6 Yehova akuti
Isaiah56:7 amenewa Ine ndidzawafikitsa ku phiri langa lopatulika
Isaiah56:8 Ambuye Yehova
Isaiah56:9 Bwerani
Isaiah56:10 Atsogoleri onse a Israeli ndi akhungu
Isaiah56:11 Ali ngati agalu amene ali ndi njala yayikulu; sakhuta konse. Abusa nawonso samvetsa zinthu; onse amachita monga akufunira
Isaiah56:12 Aliyense amafuwulira mnzake kuti
Isaiah57:1 Anthu olungama amafa
Isaiah57:2 Iwo amene amakhala moyo wolungama amafa mwamtendere; amapeza mpumulo pamene agona mu imfa.
Isaiah57:3 “Bwerani kuno
Isaiah57:4 Kodi inu mukuseka yani? Kodi mukumunena ndani ndi kupotoza pakamwa panu? Kodi inu si ana owukira
Isaiah57:5 Inu mumapembedza mafano pamene mumalobodoka ndi zilakolako zanu pakati pa mitengo ya thundu
Isaiah57:6 Mafano a pakati pa miyala yosalala ya mu zigwa ndiye chuma chanu. Inde
Isaiah57:7 Inu munayiwala bedi lanu pa phiri lalitali ndi looneka kutali. Mumapita kumeneko kukapereka nsembe zanu.
Isaiah57:8 Mʼnyumba mwanu mwayika mafano kuseri kwa zitseko ndiponso pa mphuthu. Mwandisiya Ine
Isaiah57:9 Mumapita kukapembedza fano la Moleki mutatenga mafuta ndi zonunkhira zochuluka. Munachita kutumiza akazembe anu kutali; inu ngakhale munapita ku manda kwenikweniko!
Isaiah57:10 Inu mumatopa ndi maulendo anu
Isaiah57:11 “Kodi ndani amene mwachita naye mantha ndi kumuopa
Isaiah57:12 Koma ndaonetsa poyera ntchito zanu zomwe mumati nʼzolungama
Isaiah57:13 Pamene mufuwula kupempha thandizo
Isaiah57:14 Ndipo panamveka mawu akuti
Isaiah57:15 Pakuti Iye amene ali Wamkulu ndi Wopambanazonse
Isaiah57:16 Sindidzawatsutsa anthu mpaka muyaya kapena kuwapsera mtima nthawi zonse
Isaiah57:17 Ine ndinakwiya kwambiri chifukwa cha tchimo lawo ladyera; ndinawalanga ndi kuwafulatira mokwiya
Isaiah57:18 Ndaona zochita zawo
Isaiah57:19 anthu olira a mu Israeli adzanditamanda ndi milomo yawo. Anthu amene ali kutali ndi apafupi pomwe ndidzawapatsa mtendere
Isaiah57:20 Koma anthu oyipa ali ngati nyanja yowinduka
Isaiah57:21 “Palibe mtendere kwa oyipa
Isaiah58:1 “Fuwula kwambiri
Isaiah58:2 Pakuti tsiku ndi tsiku amafunafuna Ine; amaoneka ngati a chidwi chofuna kudziwa zimene ndimafuna
Isaiah58:3 Anthu akufunsa kuti
Isaiah58:4 Mumati uku mukusala kudya
Isaiah58:5 Kodi kusala kudya kumene ndimakufuna Ine nʼkumeneku
Isaiah58:6 “Kodi si uku kusala kudya kumene Ine ndimakufuna: Kumasula maunyolo ozunzizira anthu ndi kumasula zingwe za goli
Isaiah58:7 Anthu anjala kodi mwawagawira chakudya chanu? Osowa ndi ongoyendayenda
Isaiah58:8 Mukatero chipulumutso chanu chidzabwera ngati mʼbandakucha
Isaiah58:9 Mukamadzapemphera Yehova adzakuyankhani; mukadzapempha thandizo
Isaiah58:10 Ndipo ngati mudyetsa anthu anjala
Isaiah58:11 Yehova adzakutsogolerani nthawi zonse; adzakwaniritsa zosowa zanu mʼdziko longʼalukangʼaluka dzuwa ndipo adzalimbitsa matupi anu. Mudzakhala ngati dimba la madzi ambiri
Isaiah58:12 Anthu ako adzamanganso nyumba zimene zakhala mabwinja nthawi yayitali
Isaiah58:13 “Muzisunga osaphwanya Sabata; musamachite zimene mukufuna pa masiku anga opatulika
Isaiah58:14 mukatero mudzapeza chimwemwe mwa Yehova
Isaiah59:1 Taonani
Isaiah59:2 Koma zoyipa zanu zakulekanitsani ndi Mulungu wanu; ndipo wakufulatirani chifukwa cha machimo anu
Isaiah59:3 Pakuti manja anu ali psuu ndi magazi. Munayipitsa zala zanu ndi zamphulupulu. Pakamwa panu payankhula zabodza
Isaiah59:4 Palibe amene akuyimba mnzake mlandu molungama
Isaiah59:5 Iwo amayikira mazira a mamba ndipo amaluka ukonde wakangawude. Aliyense amene adzadya mazira awo adzafa
Isaiah59:6 Ukonde wawo wa kangawude sangawuvale ngati chovala; ndipo chimene apangacho sangachifunde. Ntchito zawo ndi zoyipa
Isaiah59:7 Amathamangira kukachita zoyipa; sachedwa kupha anthu osalakwa. Maganizo awo ndi maganizo oyipa; kulikonse kumene amapita amasiyako bwinja ndi chiwonongeko.
Isaiah59:8 Iwo sadziwa kuchita za mtendere; zonse zimene amachita nʼzopanda chilungamo. Njira zawo zonse nʼzokhotakhota; aliyense oyenda mʼnjira zimenezo sadzapeza mtendere.
Isaiah59:9 Anthu akuti
Isaiah59:10 Timapapasapapasa khoma ngati munthu wosaona
Isaiah59:11 Tonse timabangula ngati zimbalangondo: Timalira modandaula ngati nkhunda. Tinayembekezera kuweruza kolungama; koma sitikupeza. Timayembekezera chipulumutso koma chimakhala nafe kutali.”
Isaiah59:12 Pakuti zolakwa zathu nʼzochuluka pamaso panu
Isaiah59:13 Tawukira ndi kumukana Yehova. Tafulatira Mulungu wathu
Isaiah59:14 Motero kuweruza kolungama kwalekeka ndipo choonadi chili kutali ndi ife; kukhulupirika sikukupezekanso mʼmabwalo a milandu
Isaiah59:15 Choonadi sichikupezeka kumeneko
Isaiah59:16 Yehova anaona kuti panalibe ndi mmodzi yemwe
Isaiah59:17 Iye anavala chilungamo ngati chovala chachitsulo chapachifuwa
Isaiah59:18 Iye adzawabwezera chilango adani a anthu ake molingana ndi zimene anachita
Isaiah59:19 Choncho akadzabwera ngati madzi oyendetsedwa ndi mphepo yamphamvu yamkuntho. Anthu onse kuyambira kumadzulo mpaka kummawa adzaopa dzina la Yehova ndi ulemerero wake.
Isaiah59:20 “Mpulumutsi adzabwera ku Ziyoni kudzapulumutsa anthu a fuko la Yakobo amene analapa machimo awo
Isaiah59:21 Yehova akuti
Isaiah60:1 “Dzuka
Isaiah60:2 Taona
Isaiah60:3 Mitundu ya anthu idzatsata kuwunika kwako ndipo mafumu adzalondola kunyezimira kwa mʼbandakucha wako.
Isaiah60:4 “Tukula maso ako
Isaiah60:5 Ukadzaona zimenezi udzasangalala kwambiri
Isaiah60:6 Gulu la ngamira lidzaphimba dziko lako
Isaiah60:7 Ziweto zonse za ku Kedara adzazisonkhanitsa kwa inu
Isaiah60:8 “Kodi ndi zayani izo zikuwuluka ngati mitambo
Isaiah60:9 Ndithu
Isaiah60:10 “Alendo adzamanganso malinga ako
Isaiah60:11 Zipata zako zidzakhala zotsekula nthawi zonse
Isaiah60:12 Pakuti mtundu wa anthu ndi mafumu amene sakutumikira iwe; adzawonongeka kotheratu.
Isaiah60:13 “Adzabwera nayo kwa iwe mitengo ya payini
Isaiah60:14 Ana aja amene anakuzunzani adzabwera ndipo adzakugwadirani; onse amene anakunyozani adzagwada pansi pa mapazi anu. Ndipo adzakutchani kuti Mzinda wa Yehova; Ziyoni mzinda wa Woyerayo wa Israeli.
Isaiah60:15 “Ngakhale anthu anakusiya nadana nawe
Isaiah60:16 Udzamwa mkaka wa mitundu ya anthu ndi kuleredwa pa maere aufumu
Isaiah60:17 Ndidzakupatsa golide mʼmalo mwa mkuwa
Isaiah60:18 Ziwawa sizidzamvekanso mʼdziko lako
Isaiah60:19 Sipadzakhala dzuwa kuti likuwunikire
Isaiah60:20 Dzuwa lako silidzalowanso
Isaiah60:21 Ndipo anthu ako onse adzakhala olungama ndipo dzikolo lidzakhala lawo mpaka muyaya. Iwo ndi mphukira imene Ine ndayidzala
Isaiah60:22 Kabanja kakangʼono kadzasanduka fuko
Isaiah61:1 Mzimu wa Ambuye Yehova uli pa ine
Isaiah61:2 Wandituma kuti ndikalengeze nthawi imene Yehova adzapulumutsa anthu ake; za tsiku limene Yehova adzalanga adani a anthu ake. Wandituma kuti ndikatonthoze olira.
Isaiah61:3 Wandituma kuti ndiwakonzere olira a ku Ziyoni
Isaiah61:4 Adzamanganso mabwinja akale a mzinda ndipo malo amene anawonongeka kalekale aja adzakonzanso. Adzakonzanso mizinda imene inapasuka
Isaiah61:5 Anthu achilendo adzakutumikirani; adzazidyetsa ziweto zanu; iwo adzagwira ntchito mʼminda yanu ya mpesa.
Isaiah61:6 Ndipo inu mudzatchedwa ansembe a Yehova
Isaiah61:7 Chifukwa manyazi awo anali owirikiza; ndi kuti munalandira chitonzo ndi kutukwana
Isaiah61:8 “Pakuti Ine Yehova
Isaiah61:9 Ana awo adzakhala odziwika pakati pa mitundu ya anthu ndipo adzukulu awo adzakhala otchuka pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina. Aliyense wowaona adzazindikira kuti ndi anthu amene Yehova wawadalitsa.”
Isaiah61:10 Ine ndikusangalala kwambiri chifukwa cha Yehova; moyo wanga ukukondwera chifukwa cha Mulungu wanga. Pakuti Iye wandiveka zovala zachipulumutso
Isaiah61:11 Monga momwe nthaka imameretsa mbewu ndiponso monga munda umakulitsa mbewu zimene anadzala
Isaiah62:1 Chifukwa chokonda Ziyoni sindidzakhala chete
Isaiah62:2 Mitundu ya anthu idzaona iwe utapambana pa nkhondo ndipo mafumu onse adzaona ulemerero wako. Adzakuyitanira dzina latsopano limene adzakupatse ndi Yehova.
Isaiah62:3 Udzakhala ngati chipewa chaulemerero mʼdzanja la Yehova
Isaiah62:4 Sadzakutchanso “Wosiyidwa
Isaiah62:5 Monga mnyamata amakwatira namwali
Isaiah62:6 Iwe Yerusalemu
Isaiah62:7 Musamupatse mpata wopuma mpaka atakhazikitsa Yerusalemu kukhala mzinda umene dziko lapansi lidzawutamande.
Isaiah62:8 Yehova analumbira atakweza dzanja lake. Anati
Isaiah62:9 Koma amene amakakolola ndiwo amene adzadye buledi ndi kutamanda Yehova
Isaiah62:10 Tulukani
Isaiah62:11 Yehova walengeza ku dziko lonse lapansi kuti
Isaiah62:12 Iwo adzatchedwa Anthu Opatulika
Isaiah63:1 Kodi ndani uyo akubwera kuchokera ku Edomu
Isaiah63:2 Nanga bwanji zovala zanu zili psuu
Isaiah63:3 “Ndapondereza ndekha anthu a mitundu ina ngati mphesa
Isaiah63:4 Pakuti ndinatsimikiza mu mtima mwanga kuti lafika tsiku lolipsira anthu anga; ndipo chaka cha kuwomboledwa kwanga chafika.
Isaiah63:5 Ndinayangʼana ndipo panalibe munthu wondithandiza. Ndinadabwa kwambiri kuti panalibe wondichirikiza; choncho ndinapambana ndi mphamvu zanga
Isaiah63:6 Ndinapondereza mitundu ya anthu ndili wokwiya; ndipo ndinawasakaza ndipo ndinathira magazi awo pansi.”
Isaiah63:7 Ndidzafotokoza za kukoma mtima kwa Yehova
Isaiah63:8 Yehova anati
Isaiah63:9 Iyenso anasautsidwa mʼmasautso awo onse
Isaiah63:10 Komabe iwo anawukira ndi kumvetsa chisoni Mzimu Woyera. Motero Yehova anatembenuka nakhala mdani wawo ndipo Iye mwini anamenyana nawo.
Isaiah63:11 Pamenepo anthu ake anakumbukira masiku amakedzana
Isaiah63:12 Ali kuti amene anachita zinthu zodabwitsa ndi mphamvu zake zazikulu kudzera mwa Mose? Ali kuti amene anagawa madzi pa nyanja anthu ake akuona
Isaiah63:13 amene anawayendetsa pa nyanja yozama? Monga kavalo woyendayenda mʼchipululu
Isaiah63:14 Mzimu Woyera unawapumulitsa ngati mmene ngʼombe zimapumulira. Umu ndi mmene Inu munatsogolera anthu anu kuti dzina lanu lilemekezeke.”
Isaiah63:15 Inu Yehova amene muli kumwambako
Isaiah63:16 Koma Inu ndinu Atate athu
Isaiah63:17 Chifukwa chiyani
Isaiah63:18 Anthu anu atangokhala pa malo anu opatulika pa kanthawi kochepa
Isaiah63:19 Ife tili ngati anthu amene simunawalamulirepo ngati iwo amene sanakhalepo anthu anu.
Isaiah64:1 Inu Yehova
Isaiah64:2 Monga momwe moto umatenthera tchire ndiponso kuwiritsa madzi
Isaiah64:3 Pakuti nthawi ina pamene munatsika munachita zinthu zoopsa zimene sitinaziyembekezere
Isaiah64:4 Chikhalire palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe anamvapo kapena kuona Mulungu wina wonga Inu
Isaiah64:5 Inu mumabwera kudzathandiza onse amene amakondwera pochita zolungama
Isaiah64:6 Tonsefe takhala ngati anthu amene ndi odetsedwa
Isaiah64:7 Palibe amene amapemphera kwa Inu kutekeseka kuti apemphe chithandizo kwa Inu; pakuti mwatifulatira ndi kutisiya chifukwa cha machimo athu.
Isaiah64:8 Komabe
Isaiah64:9 Inu Yehova
Isaiah64:10 Mizinda yanu yopatulika yasanduka chipululu; ngakhaletu Ziyoni wasanduka chipululu
Isaiah64:11 Nyumba yanu yopatulika ndi yaulemu
Isaiah64:12 Inu Yehova
Isaiah65:1 “Ndinali wokonzeka kumva mapemphero a amene sankandipempha kanthu; ndipo ndinalola kuti anthu amene ankandifunafuna kuti andipeze. Kwa mtundu wa anthu umene sunkapempha chithandizo kwa Ine
Isaiah65:2 Tsiku lonse ndatambasulira manja anga anthu owukira aja
Isaiah65:3 Ndatambasulira manja anga anthu aja amene nthawi zonse amandikwiyitsa mopanda manyazi. Iwo amapereka nsembe mʼminda ndi kufukiza lubani pa maguwa ansembe a njerwa.
Isaiah65:4 Amakatandala ku manda ndipo amakachezera usiku wonse kumalo obisika. Amadya nyama ya nkhumba
Isaiah65:5 Amawuza ena kuti
Isaiah65:6 “Taonani
Isaiah65:7 ndi a makolo awo
Isaiah65:8 Yehova akuti
Isaiah65:9 Ndidzatulutsa zidzukulu mʼbanja la Yakobo
Isaiah65:10 Chigwa cha Saroni chidzakhala kodyetserako nkhosa
Isaiah65:11 “Koma inu amene mumasiya Yehova ndi kuyiwala phiri langa lopatulika
Isaiah65:12 ndidzakuperekani ku lupanga ngati nsembe
Isaiah65:13 Nʼchifukwa chake Ambuye Yehova akuti
Isaiah65:14 Atumiki anga adzayimba mosangalala
Isaiah65:15 Anthu anga osankhidwa adzatchula dzina lanu potemberera. Ambuye Yehova adzakuphani
Isaiah65:16 Aliyense wopempha dalitso mʼdzikomo adzachita zimenezo kwa Mulungu woona; ndipo aliyense wochita malumbiro mʼdzikomo adzalumbira mwa Mulungu woona. Pakuti mavuto akale adzayiwalika ndipo adzachotsedwa pamaso panga.
Isaiah65:17 “Taonani
Isaiah65:18 Koma inu mukhale osangalala ndi okondwa mpaka muyaya chifukwa cha zimene ndikulenga
Isaiah65:19 Ine ndidzakondwa chifuwa cha Yerusalemu ndipo ndidzasangalala chifukwa cha anthu anga. Kumeneko sikudzamvekanso kulira ndi mfuwu wodandaula.
Isaiah65:20 “Ana sadzafa ali akhanda ndipo nkhalamba zonse zidzakwaniritsa zaka zawo zonse. Wamngʼono mwa iwo adzafa ali ndi zaka 100. Amene adzalephere kufika zaka 100 adzatengedwa kukhala wotembereredwa.
Isaiah65:21 Anthu adzamanga nyumba ndi kukhalamo
Isaiah65:22 Sadzamanganso nyumba anthu ena nʼkukhalamo
Isaiah65:23 Sadzagwira ntchito pachabe kapena kubereka ana kuti aone tsoka; chifukwa adzakhala anthu odalitsidwa ndi Yehova
Isaiah65:24 Ndidzawayankha ngakhale asanathe nʼkupempha komwe. Pamene akuyankhula kumene Ine ndidzakhala nditamva kale.
Isaiah65:25 Mʼmbulu ndi mwana wankhosa wamkazi zidzadyera pamodzi. Mkango udzadya udzu monga ngʼombe
Isaiah66:1 Yehova akuti
Isaiah66:2 Kodi si manja anga amene anapanga zinthu zonsezi
Isaiah66:3 Koma aliyense amene amapereka nsembe ngʼombe yayimuna amaphanso munthu
Isaiah66:4 Inenso ndawasankhira chilango chowawa ndipo ndidzabweretsa pa iwo zimene amaziopa zija. Pakuti pamene ndinawayitana palibe amene anayankha
Isaiah66:5 Imvani mawu a Yehova
Isaiah66:6 Imvani mfuwu mu mzinda
Isaiah66:7 “Mzinda uli ngati amayi apakati amene asanayambe kumva zowawa wachira kale; asanayambe kumva ululu
Isaiah66:8 Ndani anamvapo zinthu zoterezi? Ndani anazionapo zinthu zoterezi? Kodi dziko nʼkupangika tsiku limodzi
Isaiah66:9 Kodi Ine ndingangofikitsa amayi apakati mpaka nthawi yake yochira
Isaiah66:10 “Kondwera nayeni Yerusalemu ndipo musangalale chifukwa cha Iye
Isaiah66:11 Pakuti mudzagawana naye ulemerero wake ngati kuyamwa ndi kukhuta mkaka wambiri wa mʼmawere a chitonthozo chake.”
Isaiah66:12 Yehova akuti
Isaiah66:13 Monga momwe amayi amasangalatsira mwana wawo
Isaiah66:14 Mukadzaona zimenezi mitima yanu idzakondwera. Mudzabiriwira ngati udzu. Zimenezi zidzakulimbikitsani ndi kukupatsani moyo wamphamvu. Mudzadziwa kuti ndimathandiza amene amanditumikira ndi kuti ndimakwiyira adani anga.
Isaiah66:15 Taonani
Isaiah66:16 Pakuti Yehova adzalanga anthu onse ndi moto ndi lupanga
Isaiah66:17 Yehova akuti
Isaiah66:18 “Ndipo Ine
Isaiah66:19 “Ndidzayika chizindikiro pakati pawo
Isaiah66:20 Ndipo adzabwera nawo abale anu onse ngati mphatso yopereka kwa Yehova kuchokera kwa anthu a mitundu yonse. Iwo adzakwera nawo kupita ku Yerusalemu
Isaiah66:21 Ndipo ndidzasankha ena mwa iwonso kukhala ansembe ndi Alevi
Isaiah66:22 “Monga momwe mlengalenga mwatsopano ndi dziko lapansi latsopano zimene ndidzapanga zidzakhala mpaka muyaya pamaso panga
Isaiah66:23 “Anthu a mitundu yonse adzabwera kudzandipembedza ku Yerusalemu
Isaiah66:24 “Akamachoka adzaona mitembo ya anthu amene anandiwukira Ine. Mphutsi zawo sizidzafa
Jeremiah1:1 Mawu a Yeremiya mwana wa Hilikiya
Jeremiah1:2 Mawuwa Yehova anayankhula naye mʼchaka cha 13 cha ulamuliro wa Yosiya mwana wa Amoni mfumu ya Yuda.
Jeremiah1:3 Yehova anayankhulanso naye pa nthawi yonse ya ulamuliro wa Yehoyakimu mwana wa Yosiya mfumu ya Yuda
Jeremiah1:4 Yehova anayankhula nane kuti
Jeremiah1:5 “Ndisanakuwumbe mʼmimba mwa amayi ako ndinali nditakudziwa kale

Jeremiah1:7 Koma Yehova anandiwuza kuti

Jeremiah1:12 Yehova anandiwuza kuti

Jeremiah2:1 Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Jeremiah2:2 “Pita ukalengeze kwa anthu a ku Yerusalemu kuti Yehova akuti
Jeremiah2:3 Israeli anali wopatulika wa Yehova
Jeremiah2:4 Imvani mawu a Yehova
Jeremiah2:5 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah2:6 Iwo sanafunse nʼkomwe kuti
Jeremiah2:7 Ndinakufikitsani ku dziko lachonde kuti mudye zipatso zake ndi zabwino zake zina. Koma inu mutafika munaliyipitsa dziko langa ndi kusandutsa cholowa changa kukhala chonyansa.
Jeremiah2:8 Ansembe nawonso sanafunse kuti
Jeremiah2:9 “Chifukwa chake Ine ndidzakuyimbaninso mlandu
Jeremiah2:10 Pitani kumadzulo ku chilumba cha Kitimu
Jeremiah2:11 Kodi ulipo mtundu wa anthu uliwonse umene unasinthapo milungu yake? (Ngakhale kuti si milungu nʼkomwe). Koma anthu anga asinthitsa Mulungu wawo waulemerero ndi mafano achabechabe.
Jeremiah2:12 Inu mayiko akumwamba
Jeremiah2:13 “Popeza anthu anga achita machimo awiri: Andisiya Ine kasupe wa madzi a moyo
Jeremiah2:14 Israeli si wantchito kapena kapolo wobadwira mʼnyumba
Jeremiah2:15 Adani ake abangulira ndi kumuopseza ngati mikango. Dziko lake analisandutsa bwinja; mizinda yake anayitentha popanda wokhalamo.
Jeremiah2:16 Ndiponso Aigupto a ku Mefisi ndi a ku Tapanesi akuphwanyani mitu.
Jeremiah2:17 Zimenezitu zakuchitikirani chifukwa munasiya Yehova Mulungu wanu pamene Iye ankakutsogolerani pa njira yanu?
Jeremiah2:18 Tsopano mudzapindula chiyani mukapita ku Igupto
Jeremiah2:19 Kuyipa kwanuko kudzakulangani; kubwerera mʼmbuyo kwanuko kudzakutsutsani. Tsono ganizirani bwino
Jeremiah2:20 “Kuyambira kalekale inu munathyola goli lanu ndi kudula msinga zanu; munanena kuti
Jeremiah2:21 Ine ndinakudzala iwe ngati mtengo wampesa wosankhika; unali mpesa wabwino kwambiri ndi wodalirika. Nanga nʼchifukwa chiyani wasanduka mpesa wachabechabe wonga wa kutchire?
Jeremiah2:22 Ngakhale utasamba ndi soda kapena kusambira sopo wambiri
Jeremiah2:23 “Iwe ukunena bwanji kuti
Jeremiah2:24 wakhala ngati mbidzi yozolowera mʼchipululu
Jeremiah2:25 Iwe usathamange
Jeremiah2:26 “Monga momwe mbala imachitira manyazi pamene yagwidwa
Jeremiah2:27 Iwo amawuza mtengo kuti
Jeremiah2:28 Nanga ili kuti milungu yanu imene munadzipangira nokha? Ibweretu ngati ingathe kukupulumutsani pamene muli pamavuto! Inu anthu a ku Yuda
Jeremiah2:29 “Kodi mukundizengeranji mlandu? Nonse mwandiwukira
Jeremiah2:30 “Ine ndinalanga anthu ako popanda phindu; iwo sanaphunzirepo kanthu. Monga mkango wolusa
Jeremiah2:31 “Inu anthu a mʼbado uno
Jeremiah2:32 Kodi namwali amayiwala zokongoletsera zake
Jeremiah2:33 Mumadziwa bwino njira zopezera zibwenzi! Choncho ngakhale akazi oyipa omwe mumawaphunzitsa njira zanu.
Jeremiah2:34 Ngakhale pa zovala zako anthu amapezapo magazi a anthu osauka osalakwa. Anthuwo simunawapeze akuthyola nyumba. Komabe ngakhale zinthu zili chomwechi
Jeremiah2:35 inu mukunena kuti
Jeremiah2:36 Chifukwa chiyani mukunkabe nimusinthasintha njira zanu? Aigupto adzakukhumudwitsani monga momwe Asiriya anakuchititsani manyazi.
Jeremiah2:37 Mudzachokanso kumeneko manja ali kunkhongo. Popeza Ine Yehova ndawakana anthu amene munkawadalira
Jeremiah3:1 “Ngati munthu asudzula mkazi wake ndipo mkaziyo nʼkuchoka nakakwatiwa ndi mwamuna wina
Jeremiah3:2 “Tayangʼana ku zitunda zowuma. Kodi aliponso malo ena amene iwe sunachitepo zadama? Iwe unkakhala mʼmbali mwa njira kumadikira zibwenzi zako
Jeremiah3:3 Nʼchifukwa chake Yehova wayimitsa mvula
Jeremiah3:4 Kodi iwe siposachedwa pomwepa pamene wanena kuti
Jeremiah3:5 kodi mudzandikwiyira nthawi zonse? Kodi ukali wanu udzakhalabe mpaka muyaya?’ Umu ndimo mmene umayankhulira
Jeremiah3:6 Pa nthawi ya Mfumu Yosiya Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Jeremiah3:7 Ndinaganiza kuti atachita zonsezi
Jeremiah3:8 Anaona kuti ndinasudzula Israeli wosakhulupirikayo ndi kumupirikitsa chifukwa cha zigololo zake. Komabe Yuda mʼbale wake wosakhulupirika uja sanaope
Jeremiah3:9 Chiwerewere cha Israeli chinali chochititsa manyazi kotero kuti chinayipitsa dziko lonse. Anachita chigololo popembedza mafano a miyala ndi mitengo.
Jeremiah3:10 Israeli atachita zonsezi
Jeremiah3:11 Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Jeremiah3:12 Pita ukalalikire kumpoto uthenga wakuti
Jeremiah3:13 Ungovomera kulakwa kwako kuti unawukira Yehova Mulungu wako. Vomera kuti unayendayenda kukapembedza milungu yachilendo pansi pa mtengo uliwonse wogudira
Jeremiah3:14 “Bwererani
Jeremiah3:15 Ndipo ndidzakupatsani abusa a pamtima panga amene adzakutsogolerani mwanzeru ndi mwaluntha.
Jeremiah3:16 Masiku amenewo mukadzachulukana kwambiri mʼdzikomo
Jeremiah3:17 Nthawi imeneyo adzatcha Yerusalemu Mpando Waufumu wa Yehova
Jeremiah3:18 Masiku amenewo fuko la Yuda lidzaphatikizana ndi fuko la Israeli
Jeremiah3:19 “Ine mwini ndinati
Jeremiah3:20 Koma monga mkazi wosakhulupirika amasiya mwamuna wake
Jeremiah3:21 Mawu akumveka pa magomo
Jeremiah3:22 Inu mukuti
Jeremiah3:23 Ndithu kupembedza pa magomo komanso kuchita maphwando pa mapiri zilibe phindu. Zoonadi chipulumutso cha Israeli chili mwa Yehova Mulungu wathu basi.
Jeremiah3:24 Kuyambira pa ubwana wathu milungu yochititsa manyazi ija yakhala ikutiwonongetsa phindu la ntchito za makolo athu
Jeremiah3:25 Tilekeni tigone pansi mwa manyazi
Jeremiah4:1 “Ngati mukufuna kubwerera

Jeremiah4:7 Monga mkango umatulukira mʼngaka yake momwemonso wowononga mayiko wanyamuka ndi kutuluka ku mbuto yake. Watero kuti awononge dziko lanu. Mizinda yanu idzakhala mabwinja popanda wokhalamo.
Jeremiah4:8 Choncho valani ziguduli
Jeremiah4:9 “Pa tsiku limenelo
Jeremiah4:10 Ndipo ine ndinati
Jeremiah4:11 Nthawi imeneyo anthu awa ndi Yerusalemu adzawawuza kuti

Jeremiah5:1 “Pitani uku ndi uku mʼmisewu ya Yerusalemu
Jeremiah5:2 Ngakhale anthu akulumbira kuti
Jeremiah5:3 Inu Yehova
Jeremiah5:4 Ndiye ndinati
Jeremiah5:5 Tsono ndidzapita kwa atsogoleri ndi kukayankhula nawo; ndithu iwo amadziwa njira ya Yehova

Jeremiah5:7 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah5:8 Monga amachitira akavalo onenepa akamamemesa
Jeremiah5:9 Tsono ndingaleke kuwalanga chifukwa cha zimenezi?” akutero Yehova. “Kodi nʼkuleka kuwulipsira mtundu woterewu?
Jeremiah5:10 “Pitani ku minda yake ya mipesa ndi kukayiwononga
Jeremiah5:11 Nyumba ya Israeli ndi nyumba ya Yuda onse akhala osakhulupirika kotheratu kwa Ine.”
Jeremiah5:12 Iwowa ankanama ponena za Yehova kuti
Jeremiah5:13 Mawu a aneneri azidzangopita ngati mphepo; ndipo mwa iwo mulibe uthenga wa Yehova. Choncho zimene amanena zidzawachitikira okha.”

Jeremiah5:15 Inu Aisraeli
Jeremiah5:16 Zida zawo za nkhondo zapha anthu ambirimbiri; onsewo ndi ankhondo amphamvu okhaokha.
Jeremiah5:17 Adzakudyerani zokolola zanu ndi chakudya chanu
Jeremiah5:18 “Komabe pa masiku amenewo sindidzakuwonongani kotheratu
Jeremiah5:19 Ndipo pamene anthu adzafunsa Yehova kuti
Jeremiah5:20 “Lengeza izi kwa ana a Yakobo ndipo mulalikire kwa anthu a ku Yuda kuti
Jeremiah5:21 Imvani izi
Jeremiah5:22 Kodi simuyenera kuchita nane mantha?” Akutero Yehova. “Kodi simuyenera kunjenjemera pamaso panga? Ine ndinayika mchenga kuti ukhale malire a nyanja
Jeremiah5:23 Koma anthu awa ndi nkhutukumve ndiponso a mitima yowukira; andifulatira ndipo andisiyiratu.
Jeremiah5:24 Sananenepo mʼmitima mwawo kuti
Jeremiah5:25 Koma zolakwa zanu zalepheretsa zonsezi; ndipo machimo anu akumanitsani zabwino.
Jeremiah5:26 “Pakati pa anthu anga pali anthu ena oyipa amene amabisalira anzawo monga amachitira mlenje mbalame ndiponso ngati amene amatchera misampha kuti akole anthu anzawo.
Jeremiah5:27 Nyumba zawo zadzaza ndi chuma chochipeza mwa chinyengo ngati zikwere zodzaza ndi mbalame. Nʼchifukwa chake asanduka otchuka ndi olemera.
Jeremiah5:28 Ndipo ananenepa ndi kukhala ndi matupi osalala. Ntchito zawo zoyipa nʼzopanda malire; saweruza mwachilungamo nkhani ya ana amasiye kuti iyende bwino
Jeremiah5:29 Kodi Ine ndingaleke kuwalanga chifukwa cha zimenezi? Kodi ndisawulipsire mtundu woterewu? Akutero Yehova.
Jeremiah5:30 “Chinthu chothetsa nzeru ndi choopsa kwambiri chachitika mʼdzikomo:
Jeremiah5:31 Aneneri akunenera zabodza

Jeremiah6:4 Adzanena kuti
Jeremiah6:5 Tsono nyamukani kuti tiwuthire nkhondo mzindawu usiku uno ndi kuwononga malinga ake!”
Jeremiah6:6 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Jeremiah6:7 Monga momwe chitsime chimatulutsira madzi ndi mmenenso Yerusalemu amatulutsira zoyipa zake. Chiwawa ndi chiwonongeko ndi zomwe zimamveka mu mzindamo; nthenda yake ndi mabala ake ndimaziona nthawi zonse.
Jeremiah6:8 Iwe Yerusalemu
Jeremiah6:9 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse anandiwuza kuti
Jeremiah6:10 Kodi ndiyankhule ndi yani ndi kumuchenjeza? Ndinene mawu ochenjeza kwa yani kuti amve? Makutu awo ndi otsekeka kotero kuti sangathe kumva. Mawu a Yehova ndi onyansa kwa iwo; sasangalatsidwa nawo.
Jeremiah6:11 Koma ine ndadzazidwa ndi mkwiyo wa Yehova
Jeremiah6:12 Nyumba zawo adzazipereka kwa ena
Jeremiah6:13 “Kuyambira wamngʼono mpaka wamkulu
Jeremiah6:14 Amapoletsa zilonda za anthu anga pamwamba pokha. Iwo amanena kuti
Jeremiah6:15 Kodi amachita manyazi akamachita zonyansazo? Ayi
Jeremiah6:16 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah6:17 Ine ndinakupatsani alonda oti akuyangʼanireni ndipo ndinati
Jeremiah6:18 Nʼchifukwa chake imvani
Jeremiah6:19 Imvani
Jeremiah6:20 Kodi pali phindu lanji ngakhale mubwere ndi lubani kuchokera ku Seba
Jeremiah6:21 Choncho Yehova akuti
Jeremiah6:22 Yehova akunena kuti
Jeremiah6:23 Atenga mauta ndi mikondo; ndi anthu ankhanza ndi opanda chifundo. Phokoso lawo lili ngati mkokomo wa nyanja. Akwera pa akavalo awo ndipo akonzekera ngati anthu ankhondo
Jeremiah6:24 A ku Ziyoni akuti “Ife tamva mbiri yawo
Jeremiah6:25 Musapite ku minda kapena kuyenda mʼmisewu
Jeremiah6:26 Inu anthu anga
Jeremiah6:27 “Iwe Yeremiya
Jeremiah6:28 Onsewo ali ndi khalidwe lokanika ndi lowukira ndipo akunka nanena zamiseche. Iwo ndi olimba ngati mkuwa ndi chitsulo. Onse amangochita zoyipa zokhazokha.
Jeremiah6:29 Moto mu mvukuto ukuyaka kwambiri; mtovu watha kusungunuka ndi moto. Koma ntchito yosungunulayo sikupindula chifukwa zoyipa sizikuchokapo.
Jeremiah6:30 Iwo ali ngati siliva wotayidwa
Jeremiah7:1 Mawu amene Yehova anayankhula kwa Yeremiya ndi awa
Jeremiah7:2 “Ima pa chipata cha Nyumba ya Yehova ndipo kumeneko ukalalikire uthenga uwu: “ ‘Imvani mawu a Yehova
Jeremiah7:3 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah7:4 Musamakhulupirire mawu anu achinyengo onena kuti
Jeremiah7:5 Ngati mutasinthadi makhalidwe anu ndi zochita zanu
Jeremiah7:6 ngati mutaleka kuzunza mlendo
Jeremiah7:7 Ine ndidzakulolani kukhala pa malo ano
Jeremiah7:8 Koma onani
Jeremiah7:9 “Kodi inu muziba ndi kupha
Jeremiah7:10 ndipo kenaka nʼkubwera kudzayima pamaso panga mʼNyumba ino
Jeremiah7:11 Kodi Nyumba ino imene imadziwika ndi Dzina langa
Jeremiah7:12 “ ‘Pitani tsopano ku malo anga ku Silo
Jeremiah7:13 Tsono popeza munkachita zonsezi
Jeremiah7:14 choncho ndidzachita pa Nyumba imene imadziwika ndi Dzina langayi
Jeremiah7:15 Ndidzakuthamangitsani pamaso panga
Jeremiah7:16 “Choncho iwe Yeremiya usawapempherere anthu awa ngakhale kuwapepesera kapenanso kuwapembedzera; usandidandaulire
Jeremiah7:17 Kodi sukuona zimene akuchita mʼmizinda ya ku Yuda ndi mʼmisewu ya ku Yerusalemu?
Jeremiah7:18 Ana akutorera nkhuni
Jeremiah7:19 Koma kodi akuvutitsa Ine? Kodi sakungodzivuta okha
Jeremiah7:20 “Nʼchifukwa chake Ambuye Yehova akuti: Ndidzatsanulira mkwiyo wanga pa Nyumba yangayi
Jeremiah7:21 “Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah7:22 Pakuti pamene ndinatulutsa makolo anu ku Igupto ndi kuyankhula nawo
Jeremiah7:23 koma ndinawalamula kuti: Mverani Ine
Jeremiah7:24 Koma anthuwo sanamvere kapena kulabadira; mʼmalo mwake anapitirira kusamvera ndi mitima yawo yoyipa. Iwo anabwerera mʼmbuyo mʼmalo mopita patsogolo.
Jeremiah7:25 Kuyambira tsiku limene makolo awo anachoka ku Igupto mpaka lero lino
Jeremiah7:26 Koma anthuwo sanandimvere kapena kusamalira. Anawumitsa mitima yawo ndi kuchita zoyipa kuposa makolo awo.
Jeremiah7:27 “Ngakhale iwe uwawuze zonsezi koma sadzakumvera. Ngakhale uwayitane koma sadzakuyankha.
Jeremiah7:28 Nʼchifukwa chake udzawawuze kuti
Jeremiah7:29 “Tsono meta tsitsi lako ndi kulitaya. Ulire kwambiri pa zitunda zopanda zomera
Jeremiah7:30 “Anthu a ku Yuda achita zoyipa pamaso panga
Jeremiah7:31 Amanga nsanja yopembedzera Tofeti mʼChigwa cha Hinomu kuti apserezereko ana awo aamuna ndi aakazi. Zimenezi Ine sindinawalamulire ngakhale kuziganizira nʼkomwe.
Jeremiah7:32 Nʼchifukwa chake masiku akubwera
Jeremiah7:33 Ndipo mitembo ya anthu amenewa idzakhala chakudya cha mbalame zamlengalenga ndi zirombo zakuthengo
Jeremiah7:34 Ndidzathetsa nyimbo zonse zachisangalalo ndi zachikondwerero mʼmizinda ya ku Yuda ndi mʼmisewu ya ku Yerusalemu. Sikudzamvekanso mawu a chikondwerero a mkwatibwi ndi mkwati pakuti dzikolo lidzasanduka chipululu.”
Jeremiah8:1 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah8:2 Adzawamwaza pa nthaka kuyangʼana dzuwa
Jeremiah8:3 Otsala onse a mtundu woyipawu adzafuna imfa kopambana moyo kulikonse kumene ndidzawapirikitsirako
Jeremiah8:4 “Tsono awuze anthuwa
Jeremiah8:5 Chifukwa chiyani nanga anthu awa akupitirirabe kuchimwa
Jeremiah8:6 Ine ndinatchera khutu kumvetsera koma iwo sanayankhulepo zoona. Palibe woyipa amene analapapo zoyipa zake
Jeremiah8:7 Mbalame yotchedwa kakowa ija imadziwa nthawi yake mlengalenga. Koma nkhunda
Jeremiah8:8 “ ‘Inu mukunena bwanji kuti
Jeremiah8:9 Anthu anzeru achita manyazi; athedwa nzeru ndipo agwidwa. Iwo anakana mawu a Yehova. Nanga tsono nzeru zawo ziwapinduliranji?
Jeremiah8:10 Nʼchifukwa chake akazi awo ndidzawapereka kwa amuna ena ndipo minda yawo ndidzayipereka kwa amene adzawagonjetse. Kuyambira wamngʼono mpaka wamkulu
Jeremiah8:11 Iwo amapoletsa zilonda za anthu anga pamwamba chabe nʼkumati
Jeremiah8:12 Kodi amachita manyazi akamachita zonyansazi? Ayi
Jeremiah8:13 “ ‘Ndidzatenga zokolola zawo
Jeremiah8:14 Koma amati
Jeremiah8:15 Tinkayembekezera mtendere koma palibe chabwino chomwe chinachitika
Jeremiah8:16 Kulira kwa ngʼombe zazimuna za mdani kukumveka kuchokera ku Dani; dziko lonse likunjenjemera chifukwa cha kulira kwa akavalowo. Akubwera kudzawononga dziko ndi zonse zimene zili mʼmenemo. Adzawononga mzinda ndi onse okhalamo.”
Jeremiah8:17 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah8:18 Ndadzazidwa ndi chisoni kwambiri
Jeremiah8:19 Imvani kulira kwa anthu anga kuchokera ku dziko lakutali: akuti
Jeremiah8:20 “Nthawi yokolola yapita
Jeremiah8:21 Chifukwa cha mavuto a anthu anga
Jeremiah8:22 Kodi ku Giliyadi kulibe mankhwala ochiritsa? Kodi kumeneko kulibe singʼanga? Nanga chifukwa chiyani mabala a anthu anga sanapole?
Jeremiah9:1 Aa
Jeremiah9:2 Ndani adzandipatsa malo ogona mʼchipululu kuti ndiwasiye anthu anga ndi kuwachokera kupita kutali; pakuti onse ndi achigololo
Jeremiah9:3 “Amapinda lilime lawo ngati uta. Mʼdzikomo mwadzaza ndi mabodza okhaokha osati zoonadi. Amapitirirabe kuchita zoyipa; ndipo sandidziwa Ine.” Akutero Yehova.
Jeremiah9:4 “Aliyense achenjere ndi abwenzi ake; asadalire ngakhale abale ake. Aliyense amafuna kumudyera mʼbale wake masuku pa mutu. Choncho aliyense amachitira bwenzi lake ugogodi.
Jeremiah9:5 Aliyense amamunamiza mʼbale wake ndipo palibe amene amayankhula choonadi. Anapazoloweza pakamwa pawo kunena zabodza; amalimbika kuchita machimo.
Jeremiah9:6 Iwe wakhalira mʼchinyengo ndipo ukukana kundidziwa Ine
Jeremiah9:7 Nʼchifukwa chake Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Jeremiah9:8 Lilime lawo lili ngati muvi wakuthwa; limayankhula zachinyengo. Aliyense ndi pakamwa pake amayankhula mawu achikondi kwa mnansi wake
Jeremiah9:9 Kodi ndilekerenji kuwalanga chifukwa cha zimenezi? akutero Yehova. ‘Kodi ndisawulipsire mtundu wotere wa anthu?’ ”
Jeremiah9:10 Ndidzakhetsa misozi ndi kulira kwamphamvu chifukwa cha mapiri ndipo ndidzadandaula chifukwa cha msipu wa ku chipululu. Malo onsewo awonongeka ndipo palibe amene amapitako
Jeremiah9:11 Ndipo Yehova anati
Jeremiah9:12 Ine ndinati
Jeremiah9:13 Yehova anati
Jeremiah9:14 Mʼmalo mwake
Jeremiah9:15 Tsono chimene Ine Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah9:16 Ndidzawabalalitsa pakati pa mitundu ya anthu imene iwowo kapena makolo awo sanayidziwe
Jeremiah9:17 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Jeremiah9:18 Anthu akuti
Jeremiah9:19 Kulira mwachisoni kukumveka kuchokera mu Ziyoni akuti
Jeremiah9:20 Tsono inu amayi
Jeremiah9:21 Imfa yatifikira kudzera mʼmazenera athu ndipo yalowa mʼnyumba zathu zotetezedwa; yapha ana athu mʼmisewu
Jeremiah9:22 Yehova anandiwuza kuti ndinene izi kuti
Jeremiah9:23 Yehova akuti

Jeremiah9:26 Ndidzalanga anthu a ku Igupto
Jeremiah10:1 Inu Aisraeli
Jeremiah10:2 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah10:3 Pakuti miyambo ya mitundu inayo ndiyachabechabe. Iwo amakadula mtengo ku nkhalango ndipo mmisiri amawusema ndi sompho.
Jeremiah10:4 Amakongoletsa chosemacho ndi siliva ndi golide; kenaka amachikhomerera ndi misomali kuti chisagwedezeke.
Jeremiah10:5 Mafano awo ali ngati mtengo wakanjedza woopsezera mbalame mʼmunda wa minkhaka. Mafanowo sangathe nʼkuyankhula komwe ndipo ayenera kunyamulidwa popeza sangathe nʼkuyenda komwe. Musachite nawo mantha popeza sangathe kukuchitani choyipa ndiponso alibe mphamvu yochitira chabwino chilichonse.”
Jeremiah10:6 Palibe wofanana nanu
Jeremiah10:7 Ndani amene angaleke kukuopani
Jeremiah10:8 Onsewo ndi opusa ndi opanda nzeru; malangizo awo amawatenga kuchokera kwa mafano achabechabe opanga ndi mitengo.
Jeremiah10:9 Siliva wosula amabwera naye kuchokera ku Tarisisi ndipo golide amachokera naye ku Ufazi. Mafanowo ndi ntchito ya anthu aluso ndi odziwa kuzokota golide. Tsono mafanowo amawaveka zovala za mtundu wamtambo ndi pepo. Yonseyo ndi ntchito ya anthu a luso.
Jeremiah10:10 Koma Yehova ndiye Mulungu woona; Iyeyo ndiye Mulungu wamoyo
Jeremiah10:11 “Awuze anthu awa kuti
Jeremiah10:12 Koma Mulungu analenga dziko lapansi ndi mphamvu zake; Iye anapanga dziko lonse ndi nzeru zake ndipo anayala thambo mwaluso lake.
Jeremiah10:13 Iye akayankhula
Jeremiah10:14 Anthu onse ndi opusa ndiponso opanda nzeru; mmisiri aliyense wosula golide akuchita manyazi ndi mafano ake. Mafano akewo ndi abodza; alibe moyo mʼkati mwawo.
Jeremiah10:15 Mafanowo ndi achabechabe
Jeremiah10:16 Koma Yehova amene ndi Cholowa cha Yakobo sali ngati mafanowo. Iyeyu ndi Mlengi wa zinthu zonse kuphatikizapo Israeli
Jeremiah10:17 Sonkhanitsani katundu wanu
Jeremiah10:18 Pakuti Yehova akuti
Jeremiah10:19 Aliyense ankangoti
Jeremiah10:20 Tenti yanga yawonongeka
Jeremiah10:21 Abusa ndi opusa ndipo sanapemphe nzeru kwa Yehova; choncho palibe chimene anapindula ndipo nkhosa zawo zonse zabalalika.
Jeremiah10:22 Tamvani! kukubwera mphekesera
Jeremiah10:23 Inu Yehova
Jeremiah10:24 Inu Yehova
Jeremiah10:25 Tsanulirani ukali wanu pa mitundu ya anthu amene sakudziwani
Jeremiah11:1 Yehova anayankhula ndi Yeremiya kuti
Jeremiah11:2 “Imvani mawu a pangano ili
Jeremiah11:3 Awuze kuti Yehova
Jeremiah11:4 Awa anali mawu amene ndinalamulira makolo anu nditawatulutsa mu Igupto
Jeremiah11:5 Tsono Ine ndidzakwaniritsa lumbiro lomwe ndinalumbira kwa makolo anu kuti ndidzawapatsa dziko loyenda mkaka ndi uchi
Jeremiah11:6 Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Jeremiah11:7 Kuyambira nthawi imene ndinatulutsa makolo anu ku Igupto mpaka lero
Jeremiah11:8 Koma sanamvere kapena kulabadirako. Aliyense anawumirira kuchita zoyipa za mʼmitima yawo. Ngakhale ndinawalamulira kuti asunge pangano langa koma iwo sanasunge. Choncho ndinawalanga monga ndinaneneramo.’ ”
Jeremiah11:9 Kenaka Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Jeremiah11:10 Abwereranso ku machimo a makolo awo
Jeremiah11:11 Choncho Yehova akuti
Jeremiah11:12 Anthu a mʼmizinda ya Yuda ndi anthu a ku Yerusalemu adzapita ndi kukalirira milungu imene ankayifukizira lubani
Jeremiah11:13 Iwe Yuda
Jeremiah11:14 “Tsono iwe Yeremiya usawapempherere anthu amenewa ngakhale kuwadandaulira kapena kuwapepesera
Jeremiah11:15 “Kodi anthu anga okondedwa akudzachita chiyani mʼNyumba yanga? Kodi suja iwowa amachita zoyipa zambiri? Kodi mungathe kupulumuka
Jeremiah11:16 Kale Yehova ankakutchani mtengo wa olivi wa masamba obiriwira
Jeremiah11:17 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah11:18 Yehova anandiwululira ndipo ndinadziwa. Iye anatsekula maso anga kuti ndione chiwembu chawocho.
Jeremiah11:19 Ndinali ngati mwana wankhosa wofatsa amene akupita naye kukamupha; sindinkadziwa kuti chiwembu chimene ankakonzekeracho chinkaloza ine. Iwo amati: “Tiyeni timuphe munthu ameneyu kuti dzina lake lisadzakumbukiridwenso.”
Jeremiah11:20 Koma
Jeremiah11:21 “Nʼchifukwa chake Yehova akunena za anthu a ku Anatoti amene akufuna kuwononga moyo wako namanena kuti

Jeremiah11:23 Sipadzakhala otsala ndi mmodzi yemwe
Jeremiah12:1 Yehova
Jeremiah12:2 Inu munawadzala ndipo anamera mizu; amakula ndi kubereka zipatso. Dzina lanu limakhala pakamwa pawo nthawi zonse
Jeremiah12:3 Koma Inu Yehova
Jeremiah12:4 Kodi dziko lidzakhala likulirabe mpaka liti ndipo udzu mʼmunda uliwonse udzakhalabe ofota mpaka liti? Nyama ndi mbalame kulibiretu chifukwa anthu amene amakhalamo ndi oyipa. Iwo amati: “Yehova sangathe kuona ntchito zathu.”
Jeremiah12:5 Yehova anayankha kuti
Jeremiah12:6 Ngakhale abale ako ndi anansi akuwukira
Jeremiah12:7 “Ine ndawasiya anthu anga; anthu amene ndinawasankha ndawataya. Ndapereka okondedwa anga mʼmanja mwa adani awo.
Jeremiah12:8 Anthu amene ndinawasankha asanduka ngati mkango wa mʼnkhalango. Akundibangulira mwaukali; nʼchifukwa chake Ine ndikudana nawo.
Jeremiah12:9 Anthu anga amene ndinawasankha asanduka ngati mbalame yolusa yamawangamawanga imene akabawi ayizinga. Pitani
Jeremiah12:10 Abusa ambiri anawononga munda wanga wa mpesa
Jeremiah12:11 Unawusandutsadi chipululu. Ukanali wokhawokha chomwecho ukundilirira Ine. Dziko lonse lasanduka chipululu chifukwa palibe wolisamalira.
Jeremiah12:12 Anthu onse owononga abalalikira ku zitunda zonse za mʼchipululu. Yehova watuma ankhondo ake kudzawatha kuyambira kumalire ena a dziko mpaka ku malire enanso a dziko
Jeremiah12:13 Anthu anafesa tirigu koma anatuta minga; anadzitopetsa kugwira ntchito koma osapeza phindu lililonse. Choncho mudzachita manyazi ndi zokolola zanu chifukwa cha mkwiyo wa Yehova.”
Jeremiah12:14 “Anthu oyipa oyandikana ndi anthu anga Aisraeli
Jeremiah12:15 Komabe nditawachotsa
Jeremiah12:16 Ndipo ngati iwo adzaphunzira bwino njira za anthu anga ndi kulumbira mʼdzina langa
Jeremiah12:17 Koma ngati mtundu wina uliwonse sudzamvera
Jeremiah13:1 Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Jeremiah13:2 Choncho ndinakagula lambayo
Jeremiah13:3 Kenaka Yehova anandiyankhulanso kachiwiri kuti
Jeremiah13:4 “Tenga lamba amene unagula ndi kuvala mʼchiwuno mwako uja. Tsono pita ku mtsinje wa Yufurate ndipo ukamubise lambayo mʼmingʼalu ya mʼmatanthwe.”
Jeremiah13:5 Ndipo ndinapitadi ndi kukabisa lambayo ku Yufurate
Jeremiah13:6 Patapita masiku ambiri Yehova anandiwuzanso kuti
Jeremiah13:7 Choncho ndinapita ku Yufurate kukafukula lambayo ndi kumuchotsa pamalo pamene ndinamubisa
Jeremiah13:8 Pamenepo Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Jeremiah13:9 “Izi ndi zimene ine ndikunena: ‘Umu ndi mmene ndidzawonongere zimene akunyadira kwambiri a ku Yuda ndi a ku Yerusalemu.
Jeremiah13:10 Anthuwa ndi oyipa. Iwo akana kumvera mawu anga. Mʼmalo mwake amawumirira kutsata milungu ina
Jeremiah13:11 Monga momwe lamba amakanirira mʼchiwuno cha munthu
Jeremiah13:12 “Awuze anthuwo kuti
Jeremiah13:13 Tsono iwe uwawuze kuti
Jeremiah13:14 Ndidzawagundanitsa mitu kuti aphwanyane okhaokha ngati mitsuko
Jeremiah13:15 Imvani inu Aisraeli ndipo tcherani khutu
Jeremiah13:16 Lemekezani Yehova Mulungu wanu asanagwetse mdima
Jeremiah13:17 Koma ngati simumvera
Jeremiah13:18 Uza mfumu pamodzi ndi amayi ake kuti
Jeremiah13:19 Mizinda ya ku Negevi yatsekedwa ndipo palibe wina woti nʼkuyitsekula. Yuda yense watengedwa kupita ku ukapolo
Jeremiah13:20 Tukula maso ako kuti uwone amene akubwera kuchokera kumpoto. Kodi nkhosa zimene anakusungitsa zili kuti
Jeremiah13:21 Kodi udzanena chiyani pamene [Yehova] adzakuyikira anthu amene unkanena kuti ndi abale ako akukugonjetsa ndi kukulamulira? Kodi sudzamva zowawa ngati za mayi pa nthawi yake yochira?
Jeremiah13:22 Ndipo ngati udzadzifunsa kuti
Jeremiah13:23 Kodi wa dziko la Kusi nʼkusintha khungu lake
Jeremiah13:24 “Ine ndidzakumwazani ngati mankhusu amene amawuluka ndi mphepo ya ku chipululu.
Jeremiah13:25 Limeneli ndiye gawo lanu
Jeremiah13:26 Ine ndidzakwinya zovala zanu mpaka ku maso kuti umaliseche wanu uwonekere.
Jeremiah13:27 Ndaona zonyansa zanu: zigololo zanu
Jeremiah14:1 Awa ndi mawu amene Yehova anamuwuza Yeremiya onena za chilala:
Jeremiah14:2 “Yuda akulira
Jeremiah14:3 Anthu awo wolemekezeka akutuma antchito awo kuti akatunge madzi. Apita ku zitsime osapezako madzi. Choncho amabwerera ndi mitsuko yopanda madzi. Amanyazi ndi othedwa nzeru adziphimba kumaso.
Jeremiah14:4 Popeza pansi pawumiratu chifukwa kulibe madzi
Jeremiah14:5 Ngakhale mbawala yayikazi ikusiya mwana wake wakhanda ku thengo chifukwa kulibe msipu.
Jeremiah14:6 Mbidzi zikuyima pa zitunda zopanda kanthu nʼkumapuma wefuwefu ngati nkhandwe; maso awo achita chidima chifukwa chosowa msipu.”
Jeremiah14:7 Anthu akuti
Jeremiah14:8 Inu Yehova amene Aisraeli amakukhulupirirani ndi amene mumawapulumutsa pa nthawi ya masautso
Jeremiah14:9 Chifukwa chiyani muli ngati munthu amene wadzidzimutsidwa
Jeremiah14:10 Zimene Yehova akunena za anthuwa ndi izi: “Iwo amakonda kuyendayenda kwambiri; samatha kudziretsa. Nʼchifukwa chake Ine Yehova sindingawalandire
