Jeremiah14:12 Ngakhale asale zakudya
Jeremiah14:13 Koma ine ndinati
Jeremiah14:14 Ndipo Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Jeremiah14:15 Nʼchifukwa chake Ine Yehova ndikuti aneneri amenewa akulosera mʼdzina langa pamene Ine sindinawatume. Iwo amati simudzafa pa nkhondo kapena ndi njala mʼdziko muno. Koma tsono ndi iwowo
Jeremiah14:16 Ndipo anthu amene anawaloserawo adzaponyedwa mʼmisewu ya mu Yerusalemu atafa ndi njala ndi lupanga. Sipadzapezeka wowayika mʼmanda popeza iwowo
Jeremiah14:17 “Awuze mawu awa: “ ‘Maso anga akugwetsa misozi kosalekeza usana ndi usiku; chifukwa anthu anga okondedwa apwetekeka kwambiri
Jeremiah14:18 Ndikapita kuthengo
Jeremiah14:19 Kodi anthu a ku Yuda mwawakana kwathunthu? Kodi mtima wanu wanyansidwa nawo anthu a ku Ziyoni? Chifukwa chiyani mwatikantha chotere kuti sitingathenso kuchira? Ife tinayembekezera mtendere koma palibe chabwino chomwe chabwera
Jeremiah14:20 Inu Yehova
Jeremiah14:21 Musatikane kuopa kuti dzina lanu linganyozedwe; musanyoze mpando wanu waufumu waulemerero. Kumbukirani pangano lanu ndi ife ndipo musachiphwanye.
Jeremiah14:22 Mwa milungu yachabechabe ya anthu a mitundu ina
Jeremiah15:1 Kenaka Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Jeremiah15:2 Ndipo ngati akufunsa iwe kuti
Jeremiah15:3 “Ine ndidzawatumizira mitundu inayi ya zinthu zowononga
Jeremiah15:4 Ndidzawasandutsa kukhala chinthu chonyansa kwa anthu a maufumu onse a dziko lapansi chifukwa cha zimene Manase mwana wa Hezekiya mfumu ya Yuda anachita mu Yerusalemu.
Jeremiah15:5 “Kodi adzakumvera chisoni ndani
Jeremiah15:6 Inu mwandikana Ine
Jeremiah15:7 Ine ndidzakubalalitsani kukuchotsani mʼmizinda ya mʼdzikomo monga mmene amachitira ndi mankhusu popeta ndi lichero. Anthu anga ndinawaliritsa ndi kuwawononga chifukwa sanasinthe makhalidwe awo oyipa.
Jeremiah15:8 Ndinachulukitsa amayi awo amasiye kupambana mchenga wa kunyanja. Amayiwo ndinawawonongera ana awo aamuna dzuwa lili pamutu. Mwadzidzidzi ndinawagwetsera kuwawa mtima ndi mantha.
Jeremiah15:9 Mayi wa ana asanu ndi awiri wakomoka ndipo akupuma wefuwefu. Dzuwa lake lalowa ukanali usana; anamuchititsa manyazi ndipo wathedwa nzeru. Otsala ndidzawapereka mʼmanja mwa adani awo kuti awaphe ndi lupanga
Jeremiah15:10 Kalanga ine
Jeremiah15:11 Yehova anati
Jeremiah15:12 “Palibe munthu amene angathe kudula chitsulo
Jeremiah15:13 Anthu ako ndi chuma chako ndidzazipereka kwa ofunkha popanda malipiro
Jeremiah15:14 Ndidzakusandutsani akapolo a adani anu mʼdziko limene inu simulidziwa
Jeremiah15:15 Ine ndinati
Jeremiah15:16 Munandiyankhula ndipo mawu anu ndinawalandira bwino. Mawu anu anandipatsa chimwemwe ndipo mtima wanga unasangalala. Paja ine
Jeremiah15:17 Sindinakhale nawo mʼgulu la anthu amadyera
Jeremiah15:18 Nanga nʼchifukwa chiyani mavuto anga sakutha? Bwanji chilonda changa sichikupola? Kodi inu mudzakhala ngati mtsinje wowuma nthawi yachilimwe
Jeremiah15:19 Tsono Yehova anandiyankha kuti
Jeremiah15:20 Ndidzakusandutsa ngati khoma lolimba ngati mkuwa kwa anthu awa. Adzalimbana nawe koma sadzakugonjetsa
Jeremiah15:21 “Ndidzakupulumutsa mʼdzanja la anthu oyipa ndipo ndidzakuwombola kwa anthu ankhanza.”
Jeremiah16:1 Kenaka Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Jeremiah16:2 “Usadzakwatire ndi kubereka ana aamuna kapena aakazi malo ano
Jeremiah16:3 pakuti ana aamuna ndi ana aakazi obadwira mʼdziko muno
Jeremiah16:4 adzafa ndi nthenda zoopsa. Sadzawalira maliro kapena kuyikidwa mʼmanda koma adzakhala ngati ndowe zotayikira pansi. Ena adzaphedwa ku nkhondo ndipo ena adzafa ndi njala. Mitembo yawo idzakhala chakudya cha mbalame zamlengalenga ndi zirombo zakuthengo.”
Jeremiah16:5 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah16:6 Akuluakulu ndi angʼonoangʼono omwe adzafa mʼdziko muno. Sadzayikidwa mʼmanda kapena kuliridwa
Jeremiah16:7 Palibe amene adzapereka chakudya kutonthoza amene akulira maliro
Jeremiah16:8 “Ndipo usalowe mʼnyumba mmene muli madyerero
Jeremiah16:9 Pakuti Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah16:10 “Ukawawuza anthu awa zinthu zonsezi akakufunsa kuti
Jeremiah16:11 Pamenepo ukawawuze kuti
Jeremiah16:12 Komanso inu munachimwa kwambiri kupambana makolo anu. Aliyense wa inu akutsatira zoyipa ndi mtima wake wokanikawo mʼmalo mondimvera Ine.
Jeremiah16:13 Choncho Ine ndidzakubalalitsani mʼdziko muno ndi kukulowetsani mʼdziko limene inu ndi makolo anu simunalidziwe. Kumeneko mukatumikira milungu ina usana ndi usiku
Jeremiah16:14 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah16:15 koma adzanena kuti
Jeremiah16:16 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah16:17 Maso anga akuona makhalidwe awo onse; sanabisike pamaso panga. Palibe tchimo limene sindikulidziwa.
Jeremiah16:18 Ndidzawalanga mowirikiza chifukwa cha kuyipa kwawo ndi tchimo lawo. Ndidzatero chifukwa ayipitsa dziko langa ndi mafano awo amene ali ngati mitembo
Jeremiah16:19 Inu Yehova
Jeremiah16:20 Kodi anthu nʼkudzipangira milungu? Atati atero ndiye kuti imeneyo ikhala milungu yachabechabe.”
Jeremiah16:21 “Choncho Ine ndidzawaphunzitsa
Jeremiah17:1 “Tchimo la Yuda lazokotedwa ndi cholembera cha chitsulo
Jeremiah17:2 Ngakhale ana awo amakumbukira maguwa awo ndi zoyimiritsa ngati zifanizo za mulungu wawo Asera
Jeremiah17:3 Chuma chanu ndiponso katundu wanu yense ndidzazipereka kwa ofunkha kuti zikhale dipo lawo chifukwa cha machimo ochitika mʼdziko lonse.
Jeremiah17:4 Mudzataya dziko limene ndinakupatsani kuti likhale cholowa chanu. Ndidzakusandutsani akapolo otumikira adani anu mʼdziko limene inu simukulidziwa
Jeremiah17:5 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah17:6 Munthuyo adzakhala ngati chitsamba mʼchipululu; iye sadzapeza zabwino. Adzakhala mʼchipululu mopanda madzi
Jeremiah17:7 “Koma ndi wodala munthu amene amadalira Yehova
Jeremiah17:8 Adzakhala ngati mtengo wodzalidwa mʼmphepete mwa madzi umene umatambalitsa mizu yake mʼmbali mwa mtsinje. Mtengowo suopa pamene kukutentha; masamba ake amakhala obiriwira nthawi zonse. Suchita mantha pa chaka cha chilala ndipo sulephera kubereka chipatso.”
Jeremiah17:9 Mtima wa munthu ndi wonyenga kupambana zinthu zonse ndipo kuyipa kwake nʼkosachizika. Ndani angathe kuwumvetsa?
Jeremiah17:10 “Ine Yehova ndimafufuza mtima ndi kuyesa maganizo
Jeremiah17:11 Munthu amene amapeza chuma mwachinyengo ali ngati nkhwali imene imafungatira mazira amene sinayikire. Pamene ali pakatikati pa moyo wake
Jeremiah17:12 Nyumba yathu yopemphereramo ili ngati mpando waufumu waulemerero wokhazikitsidwa pa phiri lalitali chiyambire.
Jeremiah17:13 Inu Yehova
Jeremiah17:14 Inu Yehova
Jeremiah17:15 Anthu akumandinena kuti
Jeremiah17:16 Ine sindinakuwumirizeni kuti muwalange. Mukudziwa kuti ine sindilakalaka tsiku la tsoka. Zonse zimene ndinayankhula Inu mukuzidziwa.
Jeremiah17:17 Musandichititse mantha; ndinu pothawira panga pa tsiku la mavuto.
Jeremiah17:18 Ondizunza anga achite manyazi
Jeremiah17:19 Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Jeremiah17:20 Ukawawuze kuti
Jeremiah17:21 Yehova akuti: samalani kuti pa tsiku la Sabata musanyamule katundu kapena kulowa naye pa zipata za Yerusalemu.
Jeremiah17:22 Musalowetse katundu mʼnyumba zanu kapena kugwira ntchito pa tsiku la Sabata
Jeremiah17:23 Komatu iwo sanandimvere kapena kulabadira. Ndi mitima yawo yowumayo sanamvere kapena kulandira malangizo anga.
Jeremiah17:24 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah17:25 Mukatero ndiye mafumu anu amene akukhala pa mpando wa Davide adzatulukira pa zipata za mzindawu pamodzi ndi nduna zawo. Iwo pamodzi ndi nduna zawo azidzalowa atakwera magaleta ndi akavalo
Jeremiah17:26 Anthu adzabwera kuchokera ku mizinda ya Yuda ndi ku midzi yozungulira Yerusalemu
Jeremiah17:27 Koma ngati simundimvera; mukapanda kusunga tsiku la Sabata kuti likhale lopatulika ndi kumanyamula katundu nʼkumalowa naye pa zipata za Yerusalemu pa tsikuli
Jeremiah18:1 Yehova anawuza Yeremiya kuti
Jeremiah18:2 “Pita ku nyumba ya munthu wowumba mbiya
Jeremiah18:3 Choncho ndinatsikira ku nyumba ya wowumba mbiya
Jeremiah18:4 Tsono amati ngati mbiya imene waumba ikhala yosawumbika bwino ankayiphwanya nʼkuwumbanso ina monga mmene afunira ndi dothi lake lomwe lija.
Jeremiah18:5 Kenaka Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Jeremiah18:6 “Inu Aisraeli
Jeremiah18:7 Ngati nditalengeza kuti mtundu wina wa anthu kapena ufumu wina ndiwuzula
Jeremiah18:8 ndipo ngati mtundu wa anthu umene ndawuchenjezawo ulapa zoyipa zawo
Jeremiah18:9 Ndipo ngati ndilengeza kuti ndikufuna kumanga ndi kukhazikitsa mtundu wa anthu kapena ufumu.
Jeremiah18:10 Koma mtunduwo ukachita choyipa pamaso panga nʼkusandimvera
Jeremiah18:11 “Ndipo tsopano kawawuze anthu a ku Yuda ndi amene akukhala mu Yerusalemu kuti
Jeremiah18:12 Koma iwo adzayankha kuti
Jeremiah18:13 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah18:14 Kodi chisanu chimatha pa matanthwe otsetsereka a phiri la Lebanoni? Kodi madzi ozizira amitsinje ochokera ku phiri la Lebanoni adzamphwa?
Jeremiah18:15 Komatu anthu anga andiyiwala; akufukiza lubani kwa mafano achabechabe. Amapunthwa mʼnjira zawo zakale. Amayenda mʼnjira zachidule ndi kusiya njira zabwino.
Jeremiah18:16 Dziko lawo amalisandutsa chipululu
Jeremiah18:17 Ngati mphepo yochokera kummawa
Jeremiah18:18 Anthuwo anati
Jeremiah18:19 Ndipo ndinapemphera kwa Yehova kuti
Jeremiah18:20 Kodi chinthu choyipa nʼkukhala dipo la chinthu chabwino? Komabe iwo andikumbira dzenje. Kumbukirani kuti ndinadzayima pamaso panu kudzawapempherera kuti muwachotsere mkwiyo wanu.
Jeremiah18:21 Choncho langani ana awo ndi njala; aperekeni kuti aphedwe ndi lupanga. Akazi awo asanduke opanda ana ndi amasiye; amuna awo aphedwe ndi mliri
Jeremiah18:22 Kulira kumveke kuchokera mʼnyumba zawo mutawatumizira gulu lankhondo mwadzidzidzi kuti liwakanthe. Iwo andikumbira dzenje kuti ndigweremo ndipo atchera msampha mapazi anga.
Jeremiah18:23 Koma Inu Yehova
Jeremiah19:1 Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Jeremiah19:2 ndipo mupite ku Chigwa cha Hinomu chimene chili pafupi ndi pa chipata cha mapale. Pamenepo ukalengeze mawu amene ndikakuwuze.
Jeremiah19:3 Ukanene kuti
Jeremiah19:4 Pakuti anthu andikana Ine ndipo ayipitsa malo ano. Afukiza lubani pa malo ano kwa milungu imene iwo ngakhale makolo awo ngakhalenso mafumu a ku Yuda sanayidziwe. Iwo adzaza malowa ndi magazi a anthu osalakwa.
Jeremiah19:5 Amanga nsanja zopembedzerapo Baala
Jeremiah19:6 Nʼchifukwa chake taonani
Jeremiah19:7 “ ‘Pamalo pano ndidzasokoneza maganizo a anthu a ku Yuda ndi a ku Yerusalemu. Ndidzachititsa kuti adani awo awaphe ku nkhondo. Ndidzawakanthitsa kwa anthu amene akuwazonda. Mitembo yawo ndidzayipereka kwa mbalame za mlengalenga ndi zirombo za kutchire kuti ikhale chakudya chawo.
Jeremiah19:8 Mzinda uno ndidzawusakaza ndi kuwusandutsa chinthu chochititsa mantha ndi chonyansa. Onse odutsamo adzadabwa ndi kupukusa mitu yawo chifukwa cha kuwonongeka kwake.
Jeremiah19:9 Adani awo adzawuzinga mzindawo kufuna kuwapha motero kuti anthu a mʼkatimo adzafika pomadyana wina ndi mnzake. Adzadya ana awo aamuna ndi ana awo aakazi.’
Jeremiah19:10 “Tsono iwe udzaphwanye mtsukowo anthu amene udzapite nawowo akuona
Jeremiah19:11 ndipo ukawawuze kuti
Jeremiah19:12 Umu ndi mmene ndidzachitire ndi malo ano pamodzi ndi anthu okhalamo
Jeremiah19:13 Nyumba za mu Yerusalemu ndi za mafumu a ku Yuda ndidzazisandutsa ngati za ku Tofeti chifukwa ndi nyumba zimene pa madenga ake ankafukiza lubani kwa zolengedwa zamlengalenga ndi kuthira nsembe zachakumwa kwa milungu ina.’ ”
Jeremiah19:14 Kenaka Yeremiya anabwerako ku Tofeti
Jeremiah19:15 “Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah20:1 Wansembe Pasuri mwana wa Imeri
Jeremiah20:2 Tsono iye analamula kuti mneneri Yeremiyayo amenyedwe ndi kuyikidwa mʼndende pa Chipata chakumtunda kwa Benjamini ku Nyumba ya Yehova.
Jeremiah20:3 Mmawa mwake
Jeremiah20:4 Pakuti Yehova akuti
Jeremiah20:5 Ndidzapereka kwa adani awo chuma chonse cha mu mzinda uno
Jeremiah20:6 Ndipo iwe
Jeremiah20:7 Inu Yehova
Jeremiah20:8 Nthawi iliyonse ndikamayankhula
Jeremiah20:9 Koma ndikanena kuti
Jeremiah20:10 Ndimamva anthu ambiri akunongʼona kuti
Jeremiah20:11 Koma Yehova ali nane
Jeremiah20:12 Inu Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah20:13 Imbirani Yehova! Mutamandeni Yehova! Iye amapulumutsa wosauka mʼmanja mwa anthu oyipa.
Jeremiah20:14 Litembereredwe tsiku limene ndinabadwa! Tsiku limene amayi anga anandibereka lisatamandidwe!
Jeremiah20:15 Wotembereredwa munthu amene anapita kukasangalatsa abambo anga ndi uthenga woti: “Kwabadwa mwana wamwamuna!”
Jeremiah20:16 Munthu ameneyo akhale ngati mizinda imene Yehova anayiwononga mopanda chisoni. Amve mfuwu mmawa
Jeremiah20:17 Chifukwa sanandiphere mʼmimba
Jeremiah20:18 Kodi ndinabadwira mavuto ndi chisoni kuti moyo wanga ukhale wamanyazi wokhawokha?
Jeremiah21:1 Mfumu Zedekiya inatuma Pasuri mwana wa Malikiya ndi wansembe Zefaniya mwana wa Maseya kwa Yeremiya.
Jeremiah21:2 Iwo amati akanene kwa Yeremiya mawu akuti
Jeremiah21:3 Koma Yehova anawuza Yeremiya kuti ayankhe Pasuri ndi Zefaniya kuti
Jeremiah21:4 ‘Yehova
Jeremiah21:5 Ineyo mwini wakene ndi mkono wotambasula ndi dzanja lamphamvu
Jeremiah21:6 Ndidzakantha amene amakhala mu mzinda muno
Jeremiah21:7 Pambuyo pake
Jeremiah21:8 “Yehova anati ndiwawuzenso anthu amenewa kuti asankhe pakati pa moyo ndi imfa.
Jeremiah21:9 Aliyense amene akhale mu mzinda muno adzaphedwa ndi lupanga
Jeremiah21:10 Ine ndatsimikiza kuchitira mzinda uno choyipa osati chabwino
Jeremiah21:11 “Komanso
Jeremiah21:12 inu a mʼbanja la Davide
Jeremiah21:13 Ndidzalimbana nanu
Jeremiah21:14 Ndidzakulangani molingana ndi ntchito zanu
Jeremiah22:1 Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Jeremiah22:2 ‘Imva mawu a Yehova
Jeremiah22:3 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah22:4 Pakuti ngati udzamvera malamulo awa
Jeremiah22:5 Koma ngati sumvera malamulo awa
Jeremiah22:6 Pakuti zimene Yehova akunena za nyumba yaufumu ya mfumu ya ku Yuda ndi izi: “Ngakhale iwe uli ngati Giliyadi kwa Ine
Jeremiah22:7 Ndidzatuma anthu oti adzakuwononge
Jeremiah22:8 “Pamene anthu a mitundu ina adzadutsa pa mzinda umenewu adzafunsana kuti
Jeremiah22:9 Ndipo yankho lake lidzakhala lakuti
Jeremiah22:10 Musayilire mfumu Yosiya
Jeremiah22:11 Pakuti zimene Yehova akunena za Yehowahazi mwana wa Yosiya
Jeremiah22:12 Iyeyo adzafera ku ukapoloko. Sadzalionanso dziko lino.”
Jeremiah22:13 “Tsoka kwa munthu womanga nyumba yake mopanda chilungamo
Jeremiah22:14 Munthuyo amati
Jeremiah22:15 “Kodi kukhala ndi nyumba ya mkungudza wambiri zingachititse iwe kukhala mfumu? Ganiza za abambo ako. Suja anali ndi zonse zakudya ndi zakumwa. Abambo ako ankaweruza molungama ndi mosakondera
Jeremiah22:16 Iye ankateteza anthu osauka ndi osowa
Jeremiah22:17 “Koma maso ako ndi mtima sizili penanso
Jeremiah22:18 Nʼchifukwa chake Yehova ponena za Yehoyakimu mwana wa Yosiya mfumu ya ku Yuda akuti
Jeremiah22:19 Adzayikidwa ngati bulu
Jeremiah22:20 “Tsono inu anthu a ku Yerusalemu
Jeremiah22:21 Ndinakuchenjezani pamene munali pa mtendere. Koma inu munati
Jeremiah22:22 Mphepo idzakuchotserani abusa anu onse
Jeremiah22:23 Inu amene mumakhala mʼnyumba ya ku Lebanoni
Jeremiah22:24 “Pali Ine wamoyo
Jeremiah22:25 Ndidzakupereka kwa amene akufuna kukupha
Jeremiah22:26 Iwe pamodzi ndi amayi ako amene anakubereka ndidzakupititsani ku dziko lachilendo. Ngakhale inu simunabadwire kumeneko
Jeremiah22:27 Simudzabwereranso ku dziko limene mudzafuna kubwerera.”
Jeremiah22:28 Kodi Yehoyakini wakhala ngati mbiya yonyozeka
Jeremiah22:29 Iwe dziko
Jeremiah22:30 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah23:1 “Tsoka kwa abusa amene akuwononga ndi kubalalitsa nkhosa za pabusa panga!” akutero Yehova.
Jeremiah23:2 Nʼchifukwa chake Yehova
Jeremiah23:3 “Pambuyo pake Ine mwini wakene ndidzasonkhanitsa nkhosa zanga zotsala
Jeremiah23:4 Ndidzazipatsa abusa amene adzaziweta
Jeremiah23:5 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah23:6 Pa masiku a ulamuliro wake Yuda adzapulumuka ndipo Israeli adzakhala pamtendere. Dzina limene adzamutcha ndi ili: Yehova ndiye Chilungamo Chathu.
Jeremiah23:7 Choncho
Jeremiah23:8 koma adzanena kuti
Jeremiah23:9 Kunena za aneneri awa: Mtima wanga wasweka; mʼnkhongono mwati zii. Ndakhala ngati munthu woledzera
Jeremiah23:10 Dziko ladzaza ndi anthu achigololo; lili pansi pa matemberero. Dziko lasanduka chipululu ndipo msipu wawuma. Aneneri akuchita zoyipa ndipo akugwiritsa ntchito mphamvu zawo molakwika.
Jeremiah23:11 “Mneneri ngakhale wansembe onse sapembedza Yehova. Amachita zoyipa ngakhale mʼnyumba yanga
Jeremiah23:12 “Nʼchifukwa chake njira zawo zidzakhala zoterera; adzawapirikitsira ku mdima ndipo adzagwera kumeneko. Adzaona zosaona mʼnthawi ya chilango chawo
Jeremiah23:13 “Pakati pa aneneri a ku Samariya ndinaona chonyansa ichi: Ankanenera mʼdzina la Baala ndipo anasocheretsa anthu anga
Jeremiah23:14 Ndipo pakati pa aneneri a ku Yerusalemu ndaonapo chinthu choopsa kwambiri: amachita chigololo
Jeremiah23:15 Choncho ponena za aneneriwa Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Jeremiah23:16 Koma Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Jeremiah23:17 Iwo amapita ndi kumakawuza amene amandinyoza Ine kuti
Jeremiah23:18 Ine ndikuti
Jeremiah23:19 Taonani ukali wa Yehova uli ngati chimphepo chamkuntho
Jeremiah23:20 Mkwiyo wa Yehova sudzaleka mpaka atachita zonse zimene anatsimikiza mu mtima mwake. Mudzazizindikira bwino zimenezi masiku akubwerawa.”
Jeremiah23:21 Yehova anati
Jeremiah23:22 Iwo akanakhala pa msonkhano wanga ndiye kuti akanamayankhula mawu anga kwa anthu anga. Komanso bwenzi atawachotsa anthu anga mʼnjira zawo zoyipa kuti aleke machimo awo.”
Jeremiah23:23 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah23:24 Kodi wina angathe kubisala Ine osamuona?” “Kodi Ine sindili ponseponse kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi?” Akutero Yehova.
Jeremiah23:25 “Ndamva zimene aneneri akuyankhula. Iwo amalosera zabodza mʼdzina langa nʼkumati
Jeremiah23:26 Kodi zabodzazi zidzakhalabe mʼmitima ya aneneriwa mpaka liti? Iwotu amalosera zonyenga za mʼmitima yawo.
Jeremiah23:27 Aneneriwa amakhulupirira kuti anthu anga adzayiwala mawu anga akamamva za maloto awo amene amayankhulana ngati mmene anachitira makolo awo popembedza Baala.
Jeremiah23:28 Mneneri amene ali ndi maloto afotokoze malotowo. Koma iye amene ali ndi mawu anga alalikire mawuwo mokhulupirika. Kodi phesi lingafanane ndi chimanga?
Jeremiah23:29 Kodi suja mawu anga amatentha ngati moto? Suja mawu anga amaphwanya monga ichitira nyundo kuphwanya miyala?” Akutero Yehova.
Jeremiah23:30 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah23:31 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah23:32 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah23:33 Yehova anawuza Yeremiya kuti
Jeremiah23:34 Ngati mneneri kapena wansembe kapenanso munthu wina aliyense anena kuti
Jeremiah23:35 Koma chimene aliyense wa inu azifunsa kwa mnzake kapena mʼbale wake ndi ichi: ‘Kodi Yehova wayankha chiyani?’ kapena ‘Yehova wayankhula chiyani?’
Jeremiah23:36 Koma musanenenso kuti ‘nawu uthenga wolemetsa wa Yehova
Jeremiah23:37 Tsono iwe Yeremiya udzamufunse mneneri kuti
Jeremiah23:38 Ngati mudzanena kuti
Jeremiah23:39 ndiye kuti Ine ndidzakunyamulani ngati katundu nʼkukuponyani kutali. Ndidzakuchotsani pamaso panga
Jeremiah23:40 Ndidzakunyozani mpaka muyaya. Ndidzakuchititsani manyazi osayiwalika.’ ”
Jeremiah24:1 Nebukadinezara
Jeremiah24:2 Mʼdengu limodzi munali nkhuyu zabwino kwambiri
Jeremiah24:3 Yehova anandifunsa kuti
Jeremiah24:4 Tsono Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Jeremiah24:5 “Ine Yehova
Jeremiah24:6 Ndidzaonetsesa kuti ndiwachitire zabwino ndipo ndidzabwera nawonso ku dziko lino. Ndidzawamanga osati kuwapasula; ndidzawadzala osati kuwazula.
Jeremiah24:7 Ndidzawapatsa mtima woti andidziwe kuti ndine Yehova. Adzakhala anthu anga ndipo Ine ndidzakhala Mulungu wawo
Jeremiah24:8 “ ‘Koma monga nkhuyu zoyipa zija
Jeremiah24:9 Ndidzawasandutsa chinthu chonyansa kwa maufumu onse a dziko lapansi
Jeremiah24:10 Ndidzawatumizira nkhondo
Jeremiah25:1 Yehova anayankhula ndi Yeremiya za anthu onse a ku Yuda mʼchaka chachinayi cha ufumu wa Yehoyakimu mwana wa Yosiya mfumu ya ku Yuda
Jeremiah25:2 Choncho mneneri Yeremiya anawuza anthu onse a ku Yuda pamodzi ndi onse amene amakhala mu Yerusalemu kuti:
Jeremiah25:3 Kwa zaka 23
Jeremiah25:4 Ndipo ngakhale Yehova kawirikawiri wakhala akukutumizirani atumiki ake onse
Jeremiah25:5 Aneneriwo ankanena kuti
Jeremiah25:6 Musatsatire milungu ina nʼkuyitumikira ndi kuyipembedza. Musapute mkwiyo wanga ndi mafano amene mwapanga ndi manja anu. Mukatero Ine sindidzakuwonongani.
Jeremiah25:7 “Koma inu simunandimvere
Jeremiah25:8 Nʼchifukwa chake Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Jeremiah25:9 ndidzayitana mafuko onse akumpoto
Jeremiah25:10 Ndidzathetsa mfuwu wachimwemwe ndi wachisangalalo
Jeremiah25:11 Dziko lonse lidzakhala bwinja ndi chipululu
Jeremiah25:12 “Koma zaka 70 zikadzatha
Jeremiah25:13 Ndidzachita zinthu zonse zimene ndinayankhula zotsutsa dzikolo
Jeremiah25:14 Iwo eni adzakhala akapolo a anthu a mitundu yochuluka ndi mafumu amphamvu. Ndidzawabwezera molingana ndi zochita zawo ndi ntchito za manja awo.”
Jeremiah25:15 Yehova
Jeremiah25:16 Akadzamwa adzayamba kudzandira ndi kuchita misala chifukwa cha nkhondo imene ndikuyitumiza pakati pawo.”
Jeremiah25:17 Choncho ine ndinatenga chikhocho mʼdzanja la Yehova ndipo ndinamwetsa mitundu yonse ya anthu kumene Iye ananditumako:
Jeremiah25:18 Anandituma ku Yerusalemu ndi ku mizinda ya Yuda
Jeremiah25:19 Ananditumanso kwa Farao
Jeremiah25:20 ndi kwa anthu ena onse a mitundu yachilendo; mafumu onse a ku Uzi; mafumu onse a Afilisti
Jeremiah25:21 Edomu
Jeremiah25:22 Ananditumanso kwa mafumu onse a ku Turo ndi ku Sidoni; kwa mafumu a kutsidya la nyanja;
Jeremiah25:23 ku Dedani
Jeremiah25:24 Ananditumanso kwa mafumu onse a ku Arabiya ndi mafumu onse a anthu achilendo amene amakhala mʼchipululu.
Jeremiah25:25 Anandituma kwa mafumu onse a ku Zimuri
Jeremiah25:26 ndiponso kwa mafumu onse a kumpoto
Jeremiah25:27 “Ndipo uwawuze kuti
Jeremiah25:28 Koma ngati akana kutenga chikhocho mʼdzanja lako ndi kumwa
Jeremiah25:29 Taonani
Jeremiah25:30 “Tsopano iwe nenera mawu owatsutsa ndipo uwawuze kuti
Jeremiah25:31 Phokoso lalikulu lidzamveka mpaka kumalekezero a dziko lonse lapansi
Jeremiah25:32 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Jeremiah25:33 Pa tsiku limenelo
Jeremiah25:34 Khetsani misozi ndi kufuwula mwamphamvu
Jeremiah25:35 Abusa adzasowa kothawira
Jeremiah25:36 Imvani kulira kwa abusa
Jeremiah25:37 Makola awo a nkhosa amene anali pamtendere adzasanduka bwinja chifukwa cha mkwiyo woopsa wa Yehova.
Jeremiah25:38 Ngati mkango
Jeremiah26:1 Yehoyakimu
Jeremiah26:2 “Kayime mʼbwalo la Nyumba ya Yehova. Ndipo ukayankhule kwa anthu onse okhala mʼmizinda ya ku Yuda amene amabwera kudzapembedza ku Nyumba ya Yehova. Ukawawuze zonse zomwe ndakulamula; usakasiyeko ndi mawu amodzi omwe.
Jeremiah26:3 Mwina mwake adzamvera
Jeremiah26:4 Ukawawuze kuti
Jeremiah26:5 ndipo ngati simumvera mawu a atumiki anga
Jeremiah26:6 ndiye kuti Ine ndidzasandutsa Nyumba ino kukhala ngati Silo ndipo mzinda uno udzakhala chinthu chotembereredwa pakati pa mitundu yonse ya pa dziko lapansi.’ ”
Jeremiah26:7 Ansembe
Jeremiah26:8 Yeremiya atangotsiriza kuwawuza anthu aja zonse zimene Yehova anamulamula kuti ayankhule
Jeremiah26:9 Chifukwa chiyani walosera mʼdzina la Yehova kuti Nyumba ino idzakhala ngati Silo ndipo mzinda uno udzakhala wopanda anthu ngati chipululu?” Anthu onse anamuzungulira Yeremiya mʼNyumba ya Yehova.
Jeremiah26:10 Koma nduna za ku Yuda zitamva zomwe zinachitikazi
Jeremiah26:11 Pamenepo ansembe ndi aneneri anawuza ndunazo pamodzi ndi anthu onse kuti
Jeremiah26:12 Ndipo Yeremiya anawuza nduna zija ndi anthu onse kuti
Jeremiah26:13 Tsopano konzani njira zanu ndi zochita zanu ndipo mverani Yehova Mulungu wanu. Mukatero ndiye kuti Yehova adzaleka osakupatsani chilango chimene ankati akupatseni.
Jeremiah26:14 Kunena za ine
Jeremiah26:15 Komatu dziwani kuti ngati mundipha
Jeremiah26:16 Pamenepo ndunazo pamodzi ndi anthu onse anawuza ansembe ndi aneneri kuti
Jeremiah26:17 Akuluakulu ena a mʼdzikomo anayimirira ndi kuwuza gulu lonse la anthu kuti
Jeremiah26:18 “Mʼmasiku a Hezekiya mfumu ya ku Yuda
Jeremiah26:19 Kodi Hezekiya mfumu ya ku Yuda ndi anthu onse anamupha amene uja? Kodi suja mfumu inaopa Yehova ndi kupempha kuti ayikomere mtima? Ndipo suja Yehova anasintha maganizo ake nʼkuleka kuwalanga monga mʼmene anakonzera? Ifetu tikudziyitanira tsoka lalikulu!”
Jeremiah26:20 (Panalinso munthu wina
Jeremiah26:21 Mfumu Yehoyakimu
Jeremiah26:22 Komabe Mfumu Yehoyakimu anatuma Elinatani mwana wa Akibori pamodzi ndi anthu ena
Jeremiah26:23 Iwo anakamutenga Uriya ku Igupto kuja nabwera naye kwa Mfumu Yehoyakimu. Iye anamupha ndi lupanga ndipo mtembo wake anakawutaya ku manda a anthu wamba).
Jeremiah26:24 Koma Ahikamu mwana wa Safani ndiye anateteza Yeremiya
Jeremiah27:1 Zedekiya mwana wa Yosiya
Jeremiah27:2 “Tenga zingwe zomangira ndi mitengo ya goli ndipo uzimangirire mʼkhosi mwako.
Jeremiah27:3 Tsono utumize uthenga kwa mafumu a Edomu
Jeremiah27:4 Uwapatse uthenga wokapereka kwa ambuye awo ndipo uwawuze kuti: Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah27:5 Ndi mphamvu zanga ndi dzanja langa lamphamvu ndinalenga dziko lapansi ndi anthu ake onse pamodzi ndi nyama zili mʼmenemo
Jeremiah27:6 Tsopano ndidzapereka mayiko anu onse kwa mtumiki wanga Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babuloni. Ndamupatsanso nyama zakuthengo zonse kuti zimutumikire.
Jeremiah27:7 Anthu a mitundu yonse adzamutumikira iyeyo
Jeremiah27:8 “ ‘Koma ngati anthu a mtundu wina uliwonse kapena ufumu wina uliwonse adzakana kutumikira Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babuloni kapena kusenza goli lake
Jeremiah27:9 Choncho musamvere aneneri anu
Jeremiah27:10 Iwo akukuloserani zabodza kotero kuti adani adzakuchotsani mʼdziko lanu nʼkupita nanu ku dziko lakutali. Ndidzakupirikitsani ndi kukuwonongani kotheratu.
Jeremiah27:11 Koma ngati mtundu wina uliwonse udzagonjera mfumu ya ku Babuloni ndi kuyitumukira
Jeremiah27:12 Uthenga womwewu ndinawuzanso Hezekiya mfumu ya Yuda. Ndinati
Jeremiah27:13 Nanga inu ndi anthu anu
Jeremiah27:14 Musamvere mawu a aneneri akamakuwuzani kuti
Jeremiah27:15 Sindinawatume ngakhale iwo akulosera mʼdzina langa. Nʼchifukwa chake
Jeremiah27:16 Kenaka ndinawuza ansembe pamodzi ndi anthu ena onse kuti
Jeremiah27:17 Musawamvere. Tumikirani mfumu ya ku Babuloni
Jeremiah27:18 Ngati iwo ndi aneneri ndipo ali ndi mawu a Yehova
Jeremiah27:19 Pakuti Yehova akunena za zipilala
Jeremiah27:20 Izi ndi zimene Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babuloni sanatenge pamene anatenga ukapolo Yekoniya mwana wa Yehoyakimu mfumu ya Yuda kupita ku Babuloni kuchokera ku Yerusalemu
Jeremiah27:21 Inde
Jeremiah27:22 ‘Zidzatengedwa kupita ku Babuloni ndipo zidzakhala kumeneko mpaka tsiku limene ndidzawakumbukirenso
Jeremiah28:1 Chaka chomwecho mwezi wachisanu wa chaka chachinayi
Jeremiah28:2 “Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah28:3 Pasanathe zaka ziwiri ndidzabweretsa pa malo ano ziwiya zonse za ku Nyumba ya Yehova zimene Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babuloni anazichotsa pa malo pano ndi kupita nazo ku Babuloni.
Jeremiah28:4 Ndidzabweretsanso pa malo pano Yekoniya mwana wa Yehoyakimu mfumu ya Yuda pamodzi ndi akapolo ena onse ochokera ku Yuda amene anapita ku Babuloni
Jeremiah28:5 Pamenepo mneneri Yeremiya anayankha mneneri Hananiya pamaso pa ansembe ndi anthu onse amene anasonkhana mʼNyumba ya Yehova.
Jeremiah28:6 Anati
Jeremiah28:7 Komabe
Jeremiah28:8 Kunali aneneri kalelo
Jeremiah28:9 Koma mneneri amene amalosera zamtendere adzadziwika kuti ndi woona ndi kuti watumidwa ndi Yehova ngati zimene wanenera zachitikadi.”
Jeremiah28:10 Pamenepo mneneri Hananiya anachotsa goli mʼkhosi mwa mneneri Yeremiya nalithyola
Jeremiah28:11 ndipo anawuza anthu onse kuti

Jeremiah28:17 Mʼmwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri wa chaka chomwecho
Jeremiah29:1 Yeremiya anatumiza kalata kuchokera ku Yerusalemu kupita kwa akuluakulu amene anali ku ukapolo
Jeremiah29:2 Zimenezi zinachitika mfumu Yekoniya
Jeremiah29:3 Yeremiya anapatsira kalatayo Eleasa mwana wa Safani ndi Gemariya mwana wa Hilikiya
Jeremiah29:4 Anthu onse amene anatengedwa ukapolo kuchokera ku Yerusalemu kupita ku Babuloni
Jeremiah29:5 “Mangani nyumba ndipo muzikhalamo. Limani minda ndipo mudye zipatso zake.
Jeremiah29:6 Kwatirani ndipo mubereke ana aamuna ndi aakazi. Ana anu aamuna muwasankhire akazi ndipo muwasankhire amuna ana anu aakaziwo
Jeremiah29:7 Ndiponso muzifunafuna mtendere ndi ubwino wa mzinda umene ndinakupirikitsirani ku ukapoloko. Muzipempherera mzindawo kwa Yehova
Jeremiah29:8 Inde
Jeremiah29:9 Iwo akunenera zabodza kwa inu mʼdzina langa ngakhale Ine sindinawatume
Jeremiah29:10 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah29:11 Pakuti Ine ndikudziwa zimene ndinakukonzerani
Jeremiah29:12 Nthawi imeneyo mudzandiyitana
Jeremiah29:13 Mudzandifunafuna ndipo mudzandipeza. Mukadzandifuna ndi mtima wanu wonse
Jeremiah29:14 mudzandipezadi
Jeremiah29:15 Inu mumati
Jeremiah29:16 koma zimene Yehova akunena za mfumu imene ikukhala pa mpando waufumu wa Davide pamodzi ndi anthu onse amene anatsala mu mzinda muno
Jeremiah29:17 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Jeremiah29:18 Ndidzawalondola ndi lupanga
Jeremiah29:19 Zidzatero chifukwa sanamvere mawu anga amene ndinkawatumizira kudzera mwa atumiki anga
Jeremiah29:20 Choncho
Jeremiah29:21 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah29:22 Chifukwa cha anthu awiriwo
Jeremiah29:23 Pakuti anthu amenewa achita zoyipa kwambiri mu Israeli; achita chigololo ndi akazi a eni ake ndipo mʼdzina langa ankayankhula zabodza zimene sindinawawuze kuti atero. Ine ndikuzidziwa ndipo ndine mboni ya zimenezi
Jeremiah29:24 Ukamuwuze Semaya wa ku Nehelamu kuti
Jeremiah29:25 “Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah29:26 ‘Yehova wakusankha kukhala wansembe mʼmalo mwa Yehoyada kuti ukhale wamkulu woyangʼanira Nyumba ya Yehova. Munthu aliyense wamisala amene akudziyesa kuti ndi mneneri uzimuponya mʼndende ndi kumuveka goli lachitsulo.
Jeremiah29:27 Nanga tsono chifukwa chiyani simunamuchitire zimenezi Yeremiya wa ku Anatoti
Jeremiah29:28 Yeremiyayo watitumizira uthenga uwu kuno ku Babuloni: Ukapolo wanu ukhala wa nthawi yayitali. Choncho mangani nyumba ndipo muzikhalamo; limani minda ndipo mudye zipatso zake.’ ”
Jeremiah29:29 Koma wansembe Zefaniya anayiwerenga kalatayo pamaso pa mneneri Yeremiya.
Jeremiah29:30 Ndipo Yehova anawuza Yeremiya kuti
Jeremiah29:31 “Tumiza uthenga uwu kwa akapolo onse: ‘Yehova akuti zokhudza Semaya wa ku Nehelamu: Semaya wakuloserani
Jeremiah29:32 Nʼchifukwa chake Ine Yehova ndikuti: Mʼbanja lakelo sipadzakhala munthu pakati pa mtundu uno wa anthu amene adzaone zinthu zabwino zimene ndidzachitira anthu anga chifukwa analalika zondiwukira
Jeremiah30:1 Yehova anawuza Yeremiya kuti
Jeremiah30:2 “Ine Yehova
Jeremiah30:3 Nthawi ikubwera pamene ndidzachotse anthu anga
Jeremiah30:4 Nawa mawu amene Yehova anayankhula ndi anthu a ku Israeli ndi Yuda:
Jeremiah30:5 “Yehova akuti: “Ndamva kulira chifukwa cha nkhawa
Jeremiah30:6 Tsono khalani pansi ndi kudzifunsa kuti: Kodi munthu wamwamuna angathe kubereka mwana? Nanga nʼchifukwa chiyani ndikuona munthu aliyense wamwamuna atagwira manja ake pa mimba pake ngati mayi pa nthawi yake yochira? Chifukwa chiyani nkhope iliyonse ili yakugwa?
Jeremiah30:7 Mayo ine! Tsiku limeneli ndi lalikulu kwambiri! Sipadzakhala lina lofanana nalo. Idzakhala nthawi ya masautso kwa Yakobo
Jeremiah30:8 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Jeremiah30:9 Mʼmalo mwake
Jeremiah30:10 “ ‘Tsono usachite mantha
Jeremiah30:11 Ine ndili nanu ndipo ndidzakupulumutsani
Jeremiah30:12 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah30:13 Palibe amene angathe kukutetezani pa mlandu wanu
Jeremiah30:14 Abwenzi anu onse akuyiwalani; sasamalanso za inu. Ndakukanthani ngati mmene mdani akanachitira. Ndipo ndakulangani mwa nkhanza
Jeremiah30:15 Chifukwa chiyani mukulira nacho chilonda chanu? Bala lanu silingapole ayi. Ine ndakuchitani zimenezi chifukwa machimo anu ndi ambiri ndipo kulakwa kwanu nʼkwakukulu.
Jeremiah30:16 “Tsono onse amene anakuwonongani
Jeremiah30:17 Ndidzachiza matenda anu ndi kupoletsa zilonda zanu
Jeremiah30:18 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah30:19 Anthuwo adzayimba nyimbo zoyamika Yehova ndipo kudzamveka phokoso lachisangalalo. Ndidzawachulukitsa
Jeremiah30:20 Ana awo adzakhalanso monga mmene analili kale
Jeremiah30:21 Mtsogoleri wawo adzakhala mmodzi mwa iwo. Wodzawalamulira adzachokera pakati pawo. Choncho ndidzawakokera kufupi ndi Ine ndipo iye adzandiyandikira. Ndani angalimbe mtima payekha kuyandikana nane popanda kuyitanidwa?” akutero Yehova.
Jeremiah30:22 “Choncho inu mudzakhala anthu anga
Jeremiah30:23 Taonani ukali wa Yehova wowomba ngati mphepo ya mkuntho. Mphepo ya namondwe ikuwomba pa mitu ya anthu oyipa.
Jeremiah30:24 Mkwiyo woopsa wa Yehova sudzachoka mpaka atakwaniritsa zolinga za mu mtima mwake. Mudzamvetsa zimenezi masiku akubwerawo.
Jeremiah31:1 “Pa nthawi imeneyo
Jeremiah31:2 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah31:3 Ine ndinawaonekera ndili chapatali ndipo ndinati

Jeremiah31:5 Mudzalimanso minda ya mpesa pa mapiri a Samariya; alimi adzadzala mphesa ndipo adzadya zipatso zake.
Jeremiah31:6 Lidzafika tsiku pamene alonda adzafuwula pa mapiri a Efereimu nati
Jeremiah31:7 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah31:8 Taonani
Jeremiah31:9 Adzabwera akulira; koma Ine ndikuwatonthoza mtima
Jeremiah31:10 “Imvani mawu a Yehova inu anthu a mitundu ina; lalikirani mawuwa kwa anthu a mayiko akutali a mʼmbali mwa nyanja; ‘Iye amene anabalalitsa Israeli adzawasonkhanitsanso ndipo adzayangʼanira nkhosa zake ngati mʼbusa.’
Jeremiah31:11 Pakuti Yehova wawombola fuko la Yakobo anawapulumutsa mʼdzanja la anthu owaposa mphamvu.
Jeremiah31:12 Anthuwo adzabwera akuyimba mofuwula pa mapiri a Ziyoni; adzasangalala ndi zinthu zabwino zochokera kwa Yehova. Zinthu zabwinozo ndi izi: tirigu
Jeremiah31:13 Pamenepo anamwali adzavina ndi kusangalala. Anyamata ndi okalamba nawonso adzasangalala. Kulira kwawo ndidzakusandutsa chisangalalo; ndidzawasangalatsa nʼkuchotsa chisoni chawo.
Jeremiah31:14 Ansembe ndidzawadyetsa chakudya chabwino
Jeremiah31:15 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah31:16 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah31:17 Tsono chiyembekezo chilipo pa zamʼtsogolo

Jeremiah31:20 Kodi Efereimu si mwana wanga wokondedwa

Jeremiah31:23 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah31:24 Anthu adzakhala ku Yuda ndi ku mizinda yake pamodzi ndi alimi ndi oweta nkhosa.
Jeremiah31:25 Ndidzatsitsimutsa anthu otopa ndipo ndidzadyetsa anthu anjala.”
Jeremiah31:26 Pamenepo ndinadzuka nʼkuyangʼana uku ndi uku. Tulo tanga tinali tokoma.

Jeremiah32:1 Yehova anayankhula ndi Yeremiya mʼchaka chakhumi cha Zedekiya mfumu ya Yuda
Jeremiah32:2 Pa nthawi imeneyi nʼkuti ankhondo a mfumu ya ku Babuloni atazinga Yerusalemu
Jeremiah32:3 Tsono Zedekiya mfumu ya Yuda nʼkuti itamutsekera mʼmenemo
Jeremiah32:4 Zedekiya mfumu ya Yuda sidzapulumuka mʼmanja mwa Ababuloni
Jeremiah32:5 Zedekiya adzatengedwa kupita naye ku Babuloni
Jeremiah32:6 Yeremiya anati
Jeremiah32:7 Taonani
Jeremiah32:8 Ndipo monga momwe Yehova ananenera
Jeremiah32:9 choncho ndinagula munda wa ku Anatoti kwa Hanameli msuweni wanga
Jeremiah32:10 Ndinasayina panganolo ndikulimata pamaso pa mboni
Jeremiah32:11 Pambuyo pake ndinatenga makalata anga a pangano
Jeremiah32:12 Ndinapereka makalatawo kwa Baruki mwana wa Neriya
Jeremiah32:13 “Ndinamulangiza Baruki pamaso pa onsewo kuti
Jeremiah32:14 ‘Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah32:15 Pakuti Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah32:16 Nditamupatsa makalata a panganowa Baruki mwana wa Neriya
Jeremiah32:17 “Aa
Jeremiah32:18 Mumaonetsa chikondi chanu kwa anthu osawerengeka koma mumalanga ana chifukwa cha machimo a makolo awo. Inu ndinu Mulungu Wamkulu ndi Wamphamvu. Dzina lanu ndinu Yehova Wamphamvuzonse.
Jeremiah32:19 Zolinga zanu ndi zazikulu ndipo zochita zanu ndi zamphamvu. Maso anu amaona zonse zimene anthu amachita. Mumapereka mphotho kwa munthu aliyense molingana ndi makhalidwe ake ndi ntchito zake.
Jeremiah32:20 Inu munachita zizindikiro zozizwitsa ku Igupto
Jeremiah32:21 Munatulutsa Aisraeli mʼdziko la Igupto ndi dzanja lanu lamphamvu pochita zizindikiro zozizwitsa ndi zodabwitsa zimene zinaopseza adani anu.
Jeremiah32:22 Munawapatsa dziko lino limene munalonjeza mwalumbiro kulipereka kwa makolo awo
Jeremiah32:23 Iwo analowa nʼkulitenga kukhala lawo
Jeremiah32:24 “Onani momwe adani azingira ndi mitumbira yankhondo mzindawu kuti awulande ndipo akuwuthira nkhondo. Chifukwa cha lupanga
Jeremiah32:25 Ngakhale mzindawu udzaperekedwa kwa Ababuloni
Jeremiah32:26 Tsono Yehova anawuza Yeremiya kuti
Jeremiah32:27 “Taonani
Jeremiah32:28 Nʼchifukwa chake ine Yehova ndikuti: Ndidzawupereka mzinda uno kwa Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babuloni
Jeremiah32:29 Ndipo Ababuloni amene akuwuthira nkhondo mzinda uno adzalowa ndi kuwutentha; adzatentha ndi kugwetsa nyumba zimene pa denga pake anthu ankandipsetsa mtima pofukiza lubani kwa Baala ndi popereka chopereka cha chakumwa kwa milungu ina.
Jeremiah32:30 “Aisraeli ndi Ayuda akhala akuchita zoyipa zokhazokha pamaso panga kuyambira ubwana wawo. Kunena zoona Aisraeli akumandikwiyitsa ndi ntchito zawo zoyipa
Jeremiah32:31 Kuyambira tsiku limene mzindawu unamangidwa mpaka lero
Jeremiah32:32 Aisraeli ndi Ayuda
Jeremiah32:33 Anandifulatira ndipo ngakhale ndinakhala ndikuwaphunzitsa kawirikawiri
Jeremiah32:34 Iwo anayika mafano awo onyansa mʼnyumba imene imadziwika ndi dzina langa ndipo anayipitsa.
Jeremiah32:35 Anamanga malo opembedzerapo Baala mʼChigwa cha Hinomu kuti aziperekapo ana awo aamuna ndi aakazi ngati nsembe kwa Moleki. Ine sindinawalamulire kutero
Jeremiah32:36 “Anthu ponena za mzindawu akuti udzaperekedwa kwa mfumu ya ku Babuloni mwa nkhondo
Jeremiah32:37 Ine ndidzawasonkhanitsadi anthuwa kuchokera ku mayiko onse kumene ndinawapirikitsira ndili wokwiya ndi waukali kwambiri. Ndidzabwera nawo ku malo ano ndipo ndidzawalola kukhala mwamtendere.
Jeremiah32:38 Iwo adzakhala anthu anga
Jeremiah32:39 Ndidzawapatsa mtima umodzi ndi khalidwe limodzi kotero kuti azidzandiopa nthawi zonse ndipo iwo pamodzi ndi zidzukulu zawo zinthu zidzawayendera bwino.
Jeremiah32:40 Ndidzachita nawo pangano losatha: sindidzaleka kuwachitira zabwino
Jeremiah32:41 Ndidzakondwera powachitira zabwino
Jeremiah32:42 “Yehova akuti: Monga momwe ndinagwetsera masautso aakulu onsewa pa anthuwa
Jeremiah32:43 Adzagulanso minda mʼdziko muno
Jeremiah32:44 Adzagula minda ndi ndalama zasiliva
Jeremiah33:1 Yeremiya akanali mʼndende mʼbwalo la alonda
Jeremiah33:2 “Yehova amene analenga dziko lapansi
Jeremiah33:3 ‘Unditame mopemba ndipo ndidzakuyankha. Ndidzakuwuza zinsinsi zazikulu zimene suzidziwa.’
Jeremiah33:4 Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli akunenapo pa za nyumba za mu mzinda muno ndiponso pa za nyumba za mafumu a Yuda. Zidzagwetsedwa
Jeremiah33:5 Ababuloni akubwera kudzawuthira nkhondo mzindawu ndipo nyumba zake zidzadzaza ndi mitembo ya anthu amene ndidzawapha mokwiya ndi mwaukali. Ndawufulatira mzinda uno chifukwa cha zoyipa zake zonse.
Jeremiah33:6 “ ‘Pambuyo pake mzindawu ndidzawupatsanso moyo ndi kuwuchiritsa; ndidzachiritsa anthu anga ndi kuwapatsa chitetezo ndi mtendere weniweni.
Jeremiah33:7 Ndidzawakhazikanso Ayuda ndi Aisraeli ku dziko lawo
Jeremiah33:8 Ndidzawayeretsa pochotsa zoyipa zonse zimene anandichitira
Jeremiah33:9 Mzinda wa Yerusalemu udzandipatsa chimwemwe
Jeremiah33:10 “Yehova akuti
Jeremiah33:11 mfuwu wachimwemwe ndi mawu achisangalalo
Jeremiah33:12 “Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Jeremiah33:13 Ku mizinda ya kumapiri
Jeremiah33:14 “ ‘Taonani masiku akubwera
Jeremiah33:15 “ ‘Mʼmasiku amenewo ndi pa nthawi imeneyo ndidzaphukitsa Nthambi yolungama kuchokera ku banja la Davide; munthuyo adzachita zolungama ndi zabwino mʼdziko.
Jeremiah33:16 Mʼmasiku amenewo Yuda adzapulumuka ndipo Yerusalemu adzakhala mwamtendere. Dzina limene mzindawu udzadziwike nalo ndi ili: Yehova Chilungamo Chathu.’
Jeremiah33:17 Yehova akunena kuti
Jeremiah33:18 ngakhale ansembe
Jeremiah33:19 Yehova anawuza Yeremiya kuti:
Jeremiah33:20 Mawu anga ndi awa. Ine ndinachita pangano ndi usana ndi usiku kuti zizibwera pa nthawi yake. Pangano limeneli inu simungaliphwanye.
Jeremiah33:21 Ndinachitanso pangano ndi Davide
Jeremiah33:22 Ndidzachulukitsa ngati nyenyezi zamlengalenga ndiponso ngati mchenga wa mʼmbali mwa nyanja zidzukulu za mtumiki wanga Davide ndiponso za Alevi amene amanditumikira Ine.
Jeremiah33:23 Yehova anafunsa Yeremiya kuti
Jeremiah33:24 “Kodi sunamve mmene anthu ena akumanenera kuti
Jeremiah33:25 ‘Koma Ine Yehova ndinachita pangano ndi usana ndi usiku. Ndinakhazikitsanso malamulo oyendetsa dziko lakumwamba ndi dziko lapansi
Jeremiah33:26 monga ndachita zimenezi motsimikiza
Jeremiah34:1 Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babuloni ndi gulu lake lonse lankhondo
Jeremiah34:2 “Yehova
Jeremiah34:3 Iweyo sudzapulumuka mʼmanja mwake koma udzagwidwa ndithu ndipo adzakupereka mʼmanja mwake. Udzayiona mfumu ya ku Babuloni maso ndi maso ako ndipo udzayankhula nayo pakamwa ndi pakamwa. Ndipo udzapita ku Babuloni.
Jeremiah34:4 “Koma iwe Zedekiya mfumu ya Yuda
Jeremiah34:5 udzafera pa mtendere. Monga anthu ankafukiza lubani poyika maliro a makolo ako akale
Jeremiah34:6 Ndipo mneneri Yeremiya anawuza zonsezi Zedekiya mfumu ya Yuda
Jeremiah34:7 Nthawi imeneyi nʼkuti gulu lankhondo la mfumu ya ku Babuloni likuthira nkhondo Yerusalemu ndi mizinda ina yotsala ya Yuda
Jeremiah34:8 Yehova anayankhulanso ndi Yeremiya. Nthawi imeneyi nʼkuti mfumu Zedekiya atachita pangano ndi anthu onse a mu Yerusalemu kuti alengeze zakuti akapolo awo adzawamasule.
Jeremiah34:9 Aliyense amene anali ndi akapolo a Chihebri
Jeremiah34:10 Choncho akuluakulu pamodzi ndi anthu onse amene anachita pangano ili anagwirizana kuti amasule akapolo awo aamuna ndi aakazi ndi kuti asawasungenso mu ukapolo. Iwo anachitadi zimenezi ndipo anawamasuladi.
Jeremiah34:11 Koma pambuyo pake anasintha maganizo awo ndi kuwatenganso amuna ndi akazi amene anawamasula aja ndipo anawasandutsanso akapolo.
Jeremiah34:12 Tsono Yehova anawuza Yeremiya kuti:
Jeremiah34:13 “Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli akuti: Ine ndinachita pangano ndi makolo anu pamene ndinawatulutsa ku Igupto
Jeremiah34:14 ‘Chaka chachisanu ndi chiwiri chilichonse aliyense wa inu ayenera kumasula mʼbale wake wa Chihebri amene anadzigulitsa yekha kwa inuyo. Iyeyo amasulidwe akagwira ntchito zaka zisanu ndi chimodzi
Jeremiah34:15 Posachedwa pomwepa inu munalapa ndi kuchita zinthu zabwino pamaso panga: Aliyense wa inu anamasula mʼbale wake. Ndipo munachita pangano pamaso panga mʼNyumba imene imadziwika ndi dzina langa kuti mudzachitadi zimenezi.
Jeremiah34:16 Koma tsopano mwasintha maganizo anu ndipo mwayipitsa dzina langa. Mwatenganso ukapolo aamuna ndi aakazi amene munawamasula aja kuti apite kumene akufuna. Mwawakakamiza kuti akhalebe akapolo anu.
Jeremiah34:17 “Nʼchifukwa chake Yehova akuti: Inu simunandimvere Ine; simunalengeze kuti abale anu amasulidwe. Chabwino! Ine ndidzakupatsani ufulu; ufulu wake ukhala wophedwa ndi nkhondo
Jeremiah34:18 Inu simunasunge pangano limene munachita ndi Ine. Simunasamale lonjezo limene munachita pamaso panga. Choncho ndidzakusandutsani ngati mwana wangʼombe uja amene ankamudula pawiri napita pakati pa zigawozo.
Jeremiah34:19 Amene ankadutsa pakati pa zigawozo anali atsogoleri a Yuda ndi Yerusalemu
Jeremiah34:20 Onsewa ndidzawapereka kwa adani awo amene akufuna kuwapha. Mitembo yawo idzakhala chakudya cha mbalame zamlengalenga ndi zirombo za dziko lapansi.
Jeremiah34:21 “Ndidzapereka Zedekiya mfumu ya Yuda ndi nduna zake kwa adani awo amene akufuna kuwapha
Jeremiah34:22 Taonani
Jeremiah35:1 Yehova anayankhula ndi Yeremiya nthawi ya ulamuliro wa Yehoyakimu mwana wa Yosiya mfumu ya Yuda
Jeremiah35:2 “Pita ku banja la Arekabu ndipo ukawayitane kuti abwere mʼchipinda chimodzi cha Nyumba ya Yehova ndipo akafika uwapatse vinyo kuti amwe.”
Jeremiah35:3 Choncho ndinakatenga Yaazaniya (mwana wa Yeremiya winanso amene anali mwana wa Habaziniya)
Jeremiah35:4 Ndinabwera nawo ku Nyumba ya Yehova
Jeremiah35:5 Kenaka ndinayika mabotolo odzaza ndi vinyo ndi zikho zake pamaso pa Arekabu ndipo ndinawawuza kuti
Jeremiah35:6 Koma iwo anayankha kuti
Jeremiah35:7 Musadzamange nyumba kapena kufesa mbewu
Jeremiah35:8 Ife takhala tikumvera zonse zimene kholo lathu Yehonadabu mwana wa Rekabu anatilamula. Ife ngakhale akazi athu kapena ana athu aamuna ndi aakazi sitinamwepo vinyo
Jeremiah35:9 kapena kumanga nyumba kuti tizikhalamo kapenanso kukhala ndi minda ya mpesa
Jeremiah35:10 Koma takhala mʼmatenti ndipo tamvera kwathunthu chilichonse chimene kholo lathu Yehonadabu anatilamula.
Jeremiah35:11 Koma pamene Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babuloni anathira nkhondo dziko lino
Jeremiah35:12 Yehova anayankhulanso ndi Yeremiya kuti
Jeremiah35:13 “Iyeyu
Jeremiah35:14 ‘Yehonadabu mwana wa Rekabu analamula ana ake kuti asamwe vinyo ndipo lamulo limeneli alisunga. Mpaka lero lino iwo samwa vinyo
Jeremiah35:15 Kawirikawiri ndakhala ndikutumiza atumiki anga
Jeremiah35:16 Zidzukulu za Yehonadabu mwana wa Rekabu zakhala zikumvera lamulo limene kholo lawo anazilamula
Jeremiah35:17 “Nʼchifukwa chake Yehova Mulungu Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah35:18 Yeremiya anawuza banja la Arekabu mawu onse a Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah35:19 Tsono Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah36:1 Chaka chachinayi cha Yehoyakimu mwana wa Yosiya mfumu ya Yuda
Jeremiah36:2 “Tenga buku ndipo ulembemo mawu onse amene ndayankhula nawe otsutsa Israeli
Jeremiah36:3 Mwina mwake anthu a ku Yuda adzamva za zoopsa zonse zimene ndakonza kuti ndiwachitire
Jeremiah36:4 Tsono Yeremiya anayitana Baruki mwana wa Neriya. Baruki analemba mʼbuku mawu onse amene Yeremiya ankamuwuza
Jeremiah36:5 Kenaka Yeremiya anawuza Baruki kuti
Jeremiah36:6 Tsono iwe upite ku Nyumba ya Yehova pa tsiku losala kudya ndipo ukawerenge mawu a Yehova ochokera mʼbukumu amene ndinakulembetsa anthu onse akumva. Ukawawerengere anthu onse a ku Yuda amene amabwera ku Nyumba ya Mulungu kuchokera ku mizinda yawo.
Jeremiah36:7 Mwina mwake adzapempha kwa Yehova ndipo aliyense adzatembenuka ndi kusiya makhalidwe ake oyipa pakuti mkwiyo ndi ukali wa Yehova pa anthu awa ndi woopsa kwambiri.”
Jeremiah36:8 Baruki mwana wa Neriya anachita zonse zimene mneneri Yeremiya anamuwuza kuti achite. Mʼnyumba ya Yehova
Jeremiah36:9 Pa mwezi wachisanu ndi chinayi wa chaka chachisanu cha Yehoyakimu mwana wa Yosiya mfumu ya Yuda
Jeremiah36:10 Atayima pa chipinda cha Gemariya mwana wa mlembi Safani
Jeremiah36:11 Mikaya mwana wa Gemariya
Jeremiah36:12 anapita ku nyumba ya mfumu nakalowa ku chipinda cha mlembi. Akuluakulu
Jeremiah36:13 Tsono Mikaya anawafotokozera mawu onse amene anamva pamene Baruki ankawerenga buku lija anthu onse akumva.
Jeremiah36:14 Pambuyo pake akuluakulu onsewo anatuma Yehudi mwana wa Netaniya
Jeremiah36:15 Iwo anati
Jeremiah36:16 Atamva mawu onsewo
Jeremiah36:17 Tsono anamufunsa Baruki kuti
Jeremiah36:18 Baruki anayankha kuti
Jeremiah36:19 Kenaka akuluakuluwo anamuwuza Baruki kuti
Jeremiah36:20 Atayika bukulo mʼchipinda cha mlembi Elisama
Jeremiah36:21 Itamva zimenezi mfumu inatuma Yehudi kuti akatenge bukulo
Jeremiah36:22 Unali mwezi wachisanu ndi chinayi ndipo mfumu inali mʼnyumba ya pa nyengo yozizira
Jeremiah36:23 Yehudi ankati akawerenga masamba atatu kapena anayi a bukulo
Jeremiah36:24 Mfumu pamodzi ndi omutumikira ake onse amene anamva mawu onsewa sanachite mantha kapena kungʼamba zovala zawo.
Jeremiah36:25 Ngakhale kuti Elinatani
Jeremiah36:26 Mʼmalo mwake
Jeremiah36:27 Mfumu itatentha buku limene linali ndi mawu amene Yeremiya anamulembetsa Baruki
Jeremiah36:28 “Tenganso buku lina ndipo ulembe mawu onse amene anali mʼbuku loyamba lija
Jeremiah36:29 Ndiponso akamuwuze Yehoyakimu mfumu ya Yuda kuti
Jeremiah36:30 Nʼchifukwa chake kunena za Yehoyakimu mfumu ya Yuda Yehova akuti sipadzaoneka munthu wina wolowa mʼmalo mwake pa mpando wa Davide. Akadzafa mtembo wake udzaponyedwa kunja ndipo udzakhala pa dzuwa masana
Jeremiah36:31 Ndidzamulanga pamodzi ndi ana ake ndiponso omutumikira ake chifukwa cha zoyipa zawo; ndidzagwetsa pa iwo ndi pa onse amene akukhala mu Yerusalemu ndiponso pa anthu a ku Yuda masautso onse amene ndinawanena
Jeremiah36:32 Choncho Yeremiya anatenga buku lina napatsa mlembi Baruki mwana wa Neriya
Jeremiah37:1 Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babuloni
Jeremiah37:2 Koma Zedekiya kapena atumiki ake ngakhalenso anthu a mʼdzikomo sanasamalire mawu a Yehova amene anayankhula kudzera mwa mneneri Yeremiya.
Jeremiah37:3 Tsono Zedekiya anatuma Yehukali mwana wa Selemiya ndi wansembe Zefaniya mwana wa Maseya kwa mneneri Yeremiya ndi uthenga uwu: “Chonde tipempherereni kwa Yehova Mulungu wathu.”
Jeremiah37:4 Nthawi imeneyinso nʼkuti Yeremiya ali ndi ufulu woyenda pakati pa anthu chifukwa anali asanaponyedwe mʼndende.
Jeremiah37:5 Nthawi imeneyinso nʼkuti gulu lankhondo la Farao litatuluka mʼdziko la Igupto. Ndipo Ababuloni amene anali atazinga Yerusalemu atamva zimenezi
Jeremiah37:6 Tsono Yehova anawuza mneneri Yeremiya kuti
Jeremiah37:7 “Uyiwuze mfumu ya Yuda imene inakutuma kuti udzapemphe nzeru kwa ine kuti Ine Yehova
Jeremiah37:8 Ndipo Ababuloni adzabwerera kudzathira nkhondo mzinda uno. Iwo adzawugonjetsa ndi kuwutentha.
Jeremiah37:9 “Yehova akuti: Musadzinyenge
Jeremiah37:10 Ngakhale mutagonjetsa gulu lonse lankhondo la Ababuloni limene likukuthirani nkhondo ndipo mʼmatenti mwawo ndikutsala anthu ovulala okhaokha
Jeremiah37:11 Gulu lankhondo la Ababuloni litaleka kuthira nkhondo mzinda wa Yerusalemu chifukwa choopa gulu lankhondo la Farao
Jeremiah37:12 Yeremiya ananyamuka kuchoka ku Yerusalemu ndi kumapita ku dziko la Benjamini kuti akalandire gawo lake la minda ya makolo ake.
Jeremiah37:13 Koma atafika pa Chipata cha Benjamini
Jeremiah37:14 Yeremiya anati
Jeremiah37:15 Akuluakuluwo anamupsera mtima Yeremiya ndipo anamukwapula ndi kumuyika mʼnyumba ya mlembi Yonatani
Jeremiah37:16 Yeremiya anayikidwa mʼndende ya pansi pa nthaka
Jeremiah37:17 Kenaka Mfumu Zedekiya inatuma anthu kuti akayitane Yeremiya ndipo anabwera naye ku nyumba ya mfumu. Atafika mfumu inamufunsa mwamseri kuti
Jeremiah37:18 Pamenepo Yeremiya anafunsa Mfumu Zedekiya kuti
Jeremiah37:19 Kodi ali kuti aneneri anu amene anakuloserani kuti
Jeremiah37:20 Koma tsopano
Jeremiah37:21 Tsono Mfumu Zedekiya analamula kuti Yeremiya asungidwe mʼbwalo la alonda. Ankamupatsa buledi tsiku ndi tsiku amene ankamugula kwa ophika buledi. Anapitiriza kutero mpaka buledi yense anatha mu mzindamo. Choncho Yeremiya anapitirira kukhala mʼbwalo la alonda.
Jeremiah38:1 Sefatiya mwana wa Matani
Jeremiah38:2 “Yehova akuti
Jeremiah38:3 Mzinda uno udzaperekedwa ndithu kwa gulu lankhondo la mfumu ya ku Babuloni
Jeremiah38:4 Tsono akuluakuluwo anawuza mfumu kuti
Jeremiah38:5 Mfumu Zedekiya anayankha kuti
Jeremiah38:6 Choncho iwo anatenga Yeremiya nakamuponya mʼchitsime cha Malikiya
Jeremiah38:7 Koma Ebedi-Meleki
Jeremiah38:8 Ebedi-Meleki anatuluka ku nyumba ya mfumu kukayiwuza kuti
Jeremiah38:9 “Mbuye wanga mfumu
Jeremiah38:10 Tsono mfumu inalamula Ebedi-Meleki
Jeremiah38:11 Pamenepo Ebedi-Meleki anatenga anthuwo
Jeremiah38:12 Ebedi-Meleki
Jeremiah38:13 ndipo anamukoka ndi zingwe ndi kumutulutsa mʼchitsimecho. Ndipo Yeremiya anakhalabe ku bwalo la alonda.
Jeremiah38:14 Tsiku lina Mfumu Zedekiya anayitana mneneri Yeremiya ndipo anabwera naye ku chipata chachitatu cha Nyumba ya Yehova. Mfumu inawuza Yeremiya kuti
Jeremiah38:15 Yeremiya anati kwa Zedekiya
Jeremiah38:16 Koma Mfumu Zedekiya mwachinsinsi inalumbira kwa Yeremiya kuti
Jeremiah38:17 Pamenepo Yeremiya anati kwa Zedekiya
Jeremiah38:18 Koma ngati simutuluka kukadzipereka kwa ankhondo a mfumu ya ku Babuloni
Jeremiah38:19 Mfumu Zedekiya inati kwa Yeremiya
Jeremiah38:20 Yeremiya anayankha kuti
Jeremiah38:21 Koma mukakana kudzipereka
Jeremiah38:22 Akazi onse amene atsala mʼnyumba ya mfumu ya Yuda adzaperekedwa kwa akuluakulu a mfumu ya ku Babuloni. Akazi amenewo adzakuwuzani kuti
Jeremiah38:23 “Akazi pamodzi ndi ana anu adzaperekedwa kwa Ababuloni. Inuyo simudzapulumuka mʼmanja mwawo koma mfumu ya ku Babuloni idzakugwirani; mzinda uno adzawutentha.”
Jeremiah38:24 Pamenepo Zedekiya anati kwa Yeremiya
Jeremiah38:25 Akuluakulu akamva kuti ndinayankhula nawe ndipo akabwera kwa iwe nʼkudzakufunsa kuti
Jeremiah38:26 udzawawuze kuti
Jeremiah38:27 Akuluakulu onse anabweradi kwa Yeremiya kudzamufunsa. Iye anawayankha monga momwe mfumu inamulamula. Choncho palibe amene ananenanso kanthu
Jeremiah38:28 Ndipo Yeremiya anakhalabe mʼbwalo la alonda mpaka tsiku limene mzinda wa Yerusalemu unalandidwa.
Jeremiah39:1 Mzinda wa Yerusalemu anawulanda motere: Mʼchaka chachisanu ndi chinayi cha Zedekiya mfumu ya Yuda
Jeremiah39:2 Ndipo pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chinayi la mwezi wachinayi wa chaka cha khumi ndi chimodzi cha Zedekiya
Jeremiah39:3 Pamenepo akuluakulu onse a mfumu ya ku Babuloni anabwera nakakhala pa Chipata Chapakati. Akuluwo ndi awa: Nerigali-Sarezeri
Jeremiah39:4 Zedekiya mfumu ya Yuda pamodzi ndi ankhondo ake atawaona
Jeremiah39:5 Koma gulu la ankhondo la ku Babuloni linalondola ndi kumupeza Zedekiyayo mʼchigwa cha ku Yeriko. Anamugwira napita naye kwa Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babuloni ku Ribula mʼdziko la Hamati kumene anagamula mlandu wake.
Jeremiah39:6 Ku Ribulako
Jeremiah39:7 Kenaka inakolowola maso a Zedekiya ndi kumumanga ndi maunyolo a mkuwa nʼkupita naye ku Babuloni.
Jeremiah39:8 Ababuloni anatentha nyumba ya mfumu ndi nyumba za anthu
Jeremiah39:9 Nebuzaradani
Jeremiah39:10 Koma Nebuzaradani
Jeremiah39:11 Tsono Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babuloni inatuma mawu kwa Nebuzaradani mtsogoleri wa alonda ankhondo a mfumu za Yeremiya. Iye anati:
Jeremiah39:12 “Mutenge
Jeremiah39:13 Choncho Nebuzaradani mtsogoleri wa alonda
Jeremiah39:14 anatuma anthu nakamutulutsa Yeremiya mʼbwalo la alonda. Anakamupereka kwa Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu
Jeremiah39:15 Yeremiya ali mʼndende ku bwalo la alonda
Jeremiah39:16 “Pita ukamuwuze Ebedi-Meleki
Jeremiah39:17 Koma ndidzakupulumutsa pa tsiku limenelo
Jeremiah39:18 Ndithu ndidzakupulumutsa; sudzaphedwa pa nkhondo koma udzapulumuka
Jeremiah40:1 Yehova anayankhula ndi Yeremiya pamene Nebuzaradani mtsogoleri wa asilikali olonda mfumu anamasula Yeremiyayo ku Rama. Anamupeza Yeremiya ali womangidwa ndi unyolo pamodzi ndi amʼndende ena onse a ku Yerusalemu ndi a ku Yuda amene ankapita nawo ku ukapolo ku Babuloni.
Jeremiah40:2 Mtsogoleriyu anamupeza Yeremiya
Jeremiah40:3 Ndipo tsopano Yehova wachitadi zimenezi monga mmene ananenera. Izi zonse zachitika chifukwa anthu inu munachimwira Yehova ndipo simunamumvere.
Jeremiah40:4 Koma tsopano taona
Jeremiah40:5 Yeremiya asanayankhe
Jeremiah40:6 Motero Yeremiya anapita kwa Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu ku Mizipa ndipo anakakhala naye kumeneko pakati pa anthu amene anatsala mʼdzikomo.
Jeremiah40:7 Panali atsogoleri ena a nkhondo ndi anthu awo amene sanadzipereke nawo. Iwowa anamva kuti mfumu ya ku Babuloni inasankha Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu kukhala bwanamkubwa wa dzikolo ndipo kuti yamuyika kukhala wolamulira amuna
Jeremiah40:8 Iwowa anapita ku Mizipa kwa Gedaliya. Amene anapitawo ndi awa: Ismaeli mwana wa Netaniya
Jeremiah40:9 Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu
Jeremiah40:10 Ine ndidzakhala ku Mizipa kuti ndizikuyimirirani kwa Ababuloni amene azidzabwera kwa ife
Jeremiah40:11 Nawonso Ayuda onse a ku Mowabu
Jeremiah40:12 Tsono Ayuda onsewo anabwerera ku Yuda
Jeremiah40:13 Yohanani mwana wa Kareya ndi atsogoleri a ankhondo onse amene sanadzipereke aja anabwera ku Mizipa kwa Gedaliya
Jeremiah40:14 ndipo anamufunsa kuti
Jeremiah40:15 Tsono Yohanani mwana wa Kareya
Jeremiah40:16 Koma Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu anawuza Yohanani mwana wa Kareya kuti
Jeremiah41:1 Pa mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri Ismaeli mwana wa Netaniya
Jeremiah41:2 Ismaeli mwana wa Netaniya pamodzi ndi anthu khumi aja anayimirira ndi kupha ndi lupanga Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu
Jeremiah41:3 Ismaeli anaphanso Ayuda onse amene anali pamodzi ndi Gedaliya ku Mizipa
Jeremiah41:4 Mmawa mwake
Jeremiah41:5 kunafika anthu 80 ochekera ku Sekemu
Jeremiah41:6 Ismaeli mwana wa Netaniya anachoka ku Mizipa akulira kupita kukakumana nawo. Atakumana nawo
Jeremiah41:7 Atafika pakati pa mzinda
Jeremiah41:8 Koma anthu khumi a gululo anawuza Ismaeli kuti
Jeremiah41:9 Tsono chitsime chimene anaponyamo mitembo ya anthu amene anawaphawo pamodzi ndi mtembo wa Gedaliya chinali chimene mfumu Asa anachikumba poopsedwa ndi Baasa mfumu ya Israeli. Ismaeli mwana wa Netaliya anachidzaza ndi mitembo.
Jeremiah41:10 Pambuyo pake Ismaeli anatenga ukapolo anthu ena onse amene anali ku Mizipa: ana aakazi a mfumu pamodzi ndi ena onse amene anatsalira kumeneko
Jeremiah41:11 Pamene Yohanani mwana wa Kareya ndi atsogoleri onse a ankhondo amene anali naye pamodzi anamva zoyipa zonse zimene Ismaeli mwana wa Netaniya anachita
Jeremiah41:12 anatenga ankhondo awo onse kupita kukamenyana ndi Ismaeli mwana wa Netaniya. Anakamupeza kufupi ndi chidziwe chachikulu cha ku Gibiyoni.
Jeremiah41:13 Pamene anthu onse amene Ismaeli anawagwira anaona Yohanani mwana wa Kareya pamodzi ndi atsogoleri a ankhondo amene anali naye
Jeremiah41:14 Anthu onse amene Ismaeli anawagwira ukapolo ku Mizipa anabwerera ndi kupita kwa Yohanani mwana wa Kareya.
Jeremiah41:15 Koma Ismaeli pamodzi ndi anthu ake asanu ndi atatu
Jeremiah41:16 Kenaka Yohanani mwana wa Kareya pamodzi ndi atsogoleri onse a ankhondo amene anali naye anatsogolera anthu onse otsala a ku Mizipa amene anawapulumutsa kwa Ismaeli mwana wa Netaniya atapha Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu. Anthu amenewa anali: asilikali
Jeremiah41:17 Ndipo ananyamuka nayima ku Geruti Kimuhamu pafupi ndi Betelehemu pa ulendo wawo wopita ku Igupto
Jeremiah41:18 kuthawa Ababuloni. Iwo anaopa Ababuloniwo chifukwa Ismaeli mwana wa Netaniya anapha Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu
Jeremiah42:1 Atsogoleri onse a ankhondo pamodzi ndi Yohanani mwana wa Kareya ndi Azariya mwana wa Hosayia
Jeremiah42:2 kwa mneneri Yeremiya ndipo anamuwuza kuti
Jeremiah42:3 Mupemphere kuti Yehova Mulungu wanu atiwuze kumene tiyenera kupita ndi chimene tiyenera kuchita.”
Jeremiah42:4 Mneneri Yeremiya anawayankha kuti
Jeremiah42:5 Ndipo iwo anawuza Yeremiya kuti
Jeremiah42:6 Kaya ndi zotikomera kapena zosatikomera
Jeremiah42:7 Patapita masiku khumi
Jeremiah42:8 Choncho Yeremiya anayitana Yohanani mwana wa Kareya pamodzi ndi atsogoleri onse a ankhondo amene anali naye ndiponso anthu onse
Jeremiah42:9 Yehova
Jeremiah42:10 “Ngati mukhala mʼdziko muno
Jeremiah42:11 Musayiope mfumu ya ku Babuloni
Jeremiah42:12 Ndidzakuchitirani chifundo
Jeremiah42:13 “Koma mwina simudzamvera Yehova Mulungu wanu nʼkumanena kuti
Jeremiah42:14 ndipo ngati mukunena kuti
Jeremiah42:15 Tsono
Jeremiah42:16 ndiye nkhondo imene mukuyiopayo idzakugonjetsani ku Igupto komweko. Njala imene mukuyiopayo idzakupezani ku Igupto komweko ndipo mudzafera kumeneko.
Jeremiah42:17 Kunena zoona
Jeremiah42:18 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah42:19 “Inu otsala a ku Yuda
Jeremiah42:20 kuti munalakwitsa kwambiri. Inu munandituma kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu nʼkumati ‘Mukatipempherere kwa Yehova Mulungu wathu
Jeremiah42:21 Ine lero ndakuwuzani
Jeremiah42:22 Tsono dziwani ichi: mudzafadi ndi nkhondo
Jeremiah43:1 Yeremiya atatsiriza kuwawuza anthuwo mawu onse a Yehova Mulungu wawo
Jeremiah43:2 Azariya mwana wa Hosayia ndi Yohanani mwana wa Kareya pamodzi ndi anthu onse odzikuza anawuza Yeremiya kuti
Jeremiah43:3 Koma ndi Baruki mwana wa Neriya amene akukulimbikitsa kuti utiletse zopita ku Igupto ndi kuti mʼmalo mwake tidzipereke mʼmanja mwa Ababuloni
Jeremiah43:4 Motero Yohanani mwana wa Kareya ndi atsogoleri onse a ankhondo pamodzi ndi anthu onse sanamvere lamulo la Yehova loti akhale mʼdziko la Yuda.
Jeremiah43:5 Mʼmalo mwake
Jeremiah43:6 Mʼgulu la anthu otengedwalo munali amuna onse
Jeremiah43:7 Kotero anthuwo analowa mʼdziko la Igupto chifukwa anakana kumvera Yehova
Jeremiah43:8 Ndipo Yehova anayankhula ndi Yeremiya ku Tapanesi kuti
Jeremiah43:9 “Tenga miyala inayi yayikulu ndipo uyikwirire mʼdothi pa chiwundo cha polowera ku nyumba yaufumu ya Farao ku Tapanesi. Uchite zimenezi Ayuda onse akuona.
Jeremiah43:10 Ndipo uwawuze kuti
Jeremiah43:11 Iye adzabwera kudzathira nkhondo Igupto. Iwo oyenera kufa ndi mliri adzafa ndi mliri
Jeremiah43:12 Adzayatsa moto mʼnyumba zopembedzera milungu ya Igupto. Adzayeretsa dziko la Igupto monga momwe mʼbusa amayeretsera chovala chake pochotsamo nsabwe. Pambuyo pake adzachoka mʼdziko la Igupto mwa mtendere.
Jeremiah43:13 Ku Iguptoko adzagwetsa zipilala zachipembedzo za ku nyumba yopembedzera mulungu wa dzuwa. Adzatentha ndi moto nyumba za milungu ya ku Igupto.’ ”
Jeremiah44:1 Uthenga umene Yeremiya analandira wonena za Ayuda onse amene ankakhala ku Igupto
Jeremiah44:2 “Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah44:3 Zimenezi zinachitika chifukwa cha zoyipa zomwe anachita. Iwo anaputa mkwiyo wanga pofukiza lubani ndi potumikira milungu ina imene iwo kapena inu ngakhalenso makolo anu sanayidziwe.
Jeremiah44:4 Kawirikawiri Ine ndakhala ndikutuma atumiki anga
Jeremiah44:5 Koma iwo sanamvere kapena kulabadira; sanatembenuke kusiya zoyipa zawo kapena kuleka kufukiza lubani kwa milungu ina.
Jeremiah44:6 Nʼchifukwa chake mkwiyo wanga unayaka ngati moto kutentha mizinda ya ku Yuda ndi misewu ya mu Yerusalemu ndi kuyisandutsa bwinja mpaka lero.
Jeremiah44:7 “Ndiye tsopano Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah44:8 Chifukwa chiyani mukuputa mkwiyo wanga popembedza mafano pofukiza lubani kwa milungu ina mʼdziko lino la Igupto mʼmene mukukhalamo. Kodi mukuchita zimenezi kuti mudziwononge nokha ndi kuti mudzisandutse chinthu choseketsa ndi chonyozeka pakati pa mitundu yonse ya dziko lapansi?
Jeremiah44:9 Kodi mwayiwala zoyipa zimene anachita makolo anu
Jeremiah44:10 Koma mpaka lero simunalape. Simunandilemekeze kapena kumvera malamulo anga amene ndinayikira inuyo ndi makolo anu.
Jeremiah44:11 “Nʼchifukwa chake Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah44:12 Ndidzatenga anthu otsala a ku Yuda amene atsimikiza zopita ku Igupto ndi kukakhala kumeneko. Onse adzathera ku Igupto. Adzaphedwa ndi lupanga kapena kufa ndi njala. Kuyambira wamngʼono mpaka wamkulu
Jeremiah44:13 Ndidzalanga Ayuda okhala ku Igupto ndi lupanga
Jeremiah44:14 Motero mwa anthu amene anapita ku Igupto palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe adzapulumuke
Jeremiah44:15 Tsono amuna onse amene anadziwa kuti akazi awo ankafukiza lubani kwa milungu ina
Jeremiah44:16 “Ife sitimvera uthenga umene watiwuza mʼdzina la Yehova!
Jeremiah44:17 Koma tidzachitadi chilichonse chimene tinanena kuti tidzachita: Tidzafukiza lubani kwa mfumukazi yakumwamba ndipo tidzayipatsa nsembe yachakumwa ngati mmene tinkachitira ifeyo ndi makolo athu
Jeremiah44:18 Koma kuchokera nthawi imene tinasiya kufukiza lubani ndi kupereka chopereka cha chakumwa kwa mfumukazi yakumwamba
Jeremiah44:19 Akazi anawonjezera kunena kuti
Jeremiah44:20 Yeremiya atamva kuyankha kumeneku anawawuza kuti
Jeremiah44:21 “Kodi mukuganiza kuti Yehova nʼkuyiwala kuti inuyo ndi makolo anu
Jeremiah44:22 Ndiye Yehova sakanathanso kupirira ndi machitidwe anu ndi zonyansa zimene munkachita. Nʼchifukwa chake dziko lanu linasanduka chipululu
Jeremiah44:23 Mavuto awa akugwerani chifukwa munkafukiza lubani ndipo munkachimwira Yehova pokana kumvera mawu ake ndi kutsatira malamulo ndi malangizo ake.”
Jeremiah44:24 Kenaka Yeremiya anawuza anthu onse
Jeremiah44:25 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah44:26 Koma imvani mawu a Yehova
Jeremiah44:27 Pakuti ndionetsetsa kuti ndiwachitire choyipa
Jeremiah44:28 Amene adzapulumuke ku lupanga ndi kubwerera ku dziko la Yuda kuchokera ku Igupto adzakhala ochepa kwambiri. Choncho otsala onse a ku Yuda amene anapita kukakhala ku Igupto adzadziwa kuti mawu woona ndi ati
Jeremiah44:29 “Ine Yehova ndikukupatsani chizindikiro chakuti ndidzakulangani ku malo ano. Motero mudzadziwa kuti mawu anga akuti ndidzakulangani ndi woona.
Jeremiah44:30 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah45:1 Uwu ndi uthenga umene mneneri Yeremiya anawuza Baruki mwana wa Neriya mʼchaka cha chinayi cha Yehoyakimu mwana wa mwana ya Yosiya kuti alembe mʼbuku.
Jeremiah45:2 “Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli
Jeremiah45:3 Iwe unati
Jeremiah45:4 Koma Yehova akukuwuza kuti
Jeremiah45:5 Kodi tsono ukudzifunira wekha zinthu zazikulu? Usadzifunire. Pakuti ndidzagwetsa mavuto pa anthu onse
Jeremiah46:1 Yehova anamupatsa Yeremiya uthenga wonena za anthu a mitundu ina.
Jeremiah46:2 Kunena za Igupto: Yehova ananena za gulu lankhondo la Farao Neko mfumu ya ku Igupto limene Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babuloni analigonjetsa ku Karikemesi ku mtsinje wa Yufurate mʼchaka cha chinayi cha Yehoyakimu mwana wa Yosiya mfumu ya Yuda
Jeremiah46:3 anati
Jeremiah46:4 Mangani akavalo
Jeremiah46:5 Yeremiya anati: Kodi ndikuona chiyani? Achita mantha akubwerera
Jeremiah46:6 Waliwiro sangathe kuthawa ngakhale wankhondo wamphamvu sangathe kupulumuka. Akunka napunthwa ndi kugwa kumpoto kwa mtsinje wa Yufurate.
Jeremiah46:7 “Kodi ndani amene akukwera ngati Nailo
Jeremiah46:8 Igupto akusefukira ngati Nailo
Jeremiah46:9 Tiyeni
Jeremiah46:10 Koma tsikulo ndi la Ambuye Yehova Wamphamvuzonse; tsiku lolipsira
Jeremiah46:11 “Pita ku Giliyadi ukatenge mankhwala iwe namwali Igupto. Wayesayesa mankhwala ambiri koma osachira; palibe mankhwala okuchiritsa.
Jeremiah46:12 Anthu a mitundu ina amva za manyazi ako; kulira kwako kwadzaza dziko lapansi. Ankhondo akunka nagwetsanagwetsana
Jeremiah46:13 Uthenga umene Yehova anapatsa mneneri Yeremiya wonena za kubwera kwa Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babuloni kudzathira nkhondo Igupto ndi uwu:
Jeremiah46:14 “Mulengeze ku Igupto. Mulengeze ku Migidoli. Mulengezenso ku Mefisi ndi ku Tapanesi. Muwawuze anthu akumeneko kuti
Jeremiah46:15 Chifukwa chiyani mulungu wanu wamphamvu uja Apisi wathawa? Iye sakanatha kulimba chifukwa Yehova anamugwetsa.
Jeremiah46:16 Ankhondo anu apunthwa ndi kugwa. Aliyense akuwuza mnzake kuti
Jeremiah46:17 Kumeneku iwo adzafuwula kuti
Jeremiah46:18 “Pali Ine wamoyo
Jeremiah46:19 Konzani katundu wanu wopita naye ku ukapolo inu anthu a ku Igupto
Jeremiah46:20 “Igupto ali ngati mwana wangʼombe wokongola
Jeremiah46:21 Ngakhale ankhondo aganyu amene ali naye ali ngati ana angʼombe onenepa. Nawonso abwerera mʼmbuyo
Jeremiah46:22 Aigupto akuthawa ndi liwu lawo lili ngati la njoka yothawa pamene adani abwera ndi zida zawo
Jeremiah46:23 Iwo adzadula nkhalango ya Igupto
Jeremiah46:24 Anthu a ku Igupto achita manyazi atengedwa ukapolo ndi anthu a kumpoto.”
Jeremiah46:25 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah46:26 Ndidzawapereka kwa amene akufuna kuwapha
Jeremiah46:27 “Iwe mtumiki wanga Yakobo
Jeremiah46:28 Iwe mtumiki wanga Yakobo
Jeremiah47:1 Uthenga umene Yehova anamupatsa mneneri Yeremiya wonena za Afilisti
Jeremiah47:2 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah47:3 akadzamva mgugu wa ngʼombe zazimuna zothamanga
Jeremiah47:4 Pakuti tsiku lafika lowononga Afilisti onse ndi kupha onse otsala
Jeremiah47:5 Anthu a ku Gaza ameta mipala; anthu a ku Asikeloni akhala chete. Inu otsala a ku chigwa
Jeremiah47:6 “Mukulira kuti
Jeremiah47:7 Koma lupangalo lidzapumula bwanji pamene Yehova walilamulira kuti lithire nkhondo Asikeloni ndi anthu a mʼmbali mwa nyanja?”
Jeremiah48:1 Ponena za Mowabu: Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah48:2 Palibenso amene akutamanda Mowabu; ku Hesiboni anthu anamupanganira zoyipa: ‘Bwerani
Jeremiah48:3 Tamvani mfuwu wa anthu a ku Horonaimu. Iwo akulira kuti
Jeremiah48:4 Mowabu wawonongeka; ana ake angʼonoangʼono akulira kwambiri.
Jeremiah48:5 Anthu akukwera chikweza cha ku Luhiti
Jeremiah48:6 Thawani! Dzipulumutseni; khalani ngati mbidzi ya mʼchipululu.
Jeremiah48:7 Popeza inu munkadalira ntchito zanu ndi chuma chanu
Jeremiah48:8 Wowononga adzabwera ndi kusakaza mzinda uliwonse
Jeremiah48:9 Mtsineni khutu Mowabu chifukwa adzasakazika; mizinda yake idzasanduka mabwinja
Jeremiah48:10 “Wotembereredwa munthu amene amagwira ntchito ya Yehova monyinyirika! Wotembereredwa munthu amene amaletsa lupanga lake kupha anthu!
Jeremiah48:11 “Mowabu wakhala pa mtendere kuyambira ubwana wake
Jeremiah48:12 Nʼchifukwa chake masiku akubwera
Jeremiah48:13 Pamenepo Mowabu adzachita manyazi ndi Kemosi
Jeremiah48:14 “Kodi munganene bwanji kuti
Jeremiah48:15 Owononga Mowabu ndi mizinda yake abwera ndipo ankhondo adzalowa mʼmidzi yake; anyamata ake okongola apita kukaphedwa
Jeremiah48:16 Kugwa kwa Mowabu kuli pafupi; masautso ake akubwera posachedwa.
Jeremiah48:17 Mulireni kwambiri
Jeremiah48:18 “Tsikani pa ulemerero wanu ndipo khalani pansi powuma
Jeremiah48:19 Inu amene mumakhala ku Aroeri
Jeremiah48:20 Iwo adzayankha kuti
Jeremiah48:21 Chiweruzo chabwera ku mizinda ya ku mapiri
Jeremiah48:22 Diboni
Jeremiah48:23 Kiriyataimu
Jeremiah48:24 Keriyoti ndi Bozira ndi mizinda yonse ya Mowabu
Jeremiah48:25 Mphamvu za Mowabu zawonongeka; mkono wake wathyoka
Jeremiah48:26 “Muledzeretseni Mowabu
Jeremiah48:27 Kodi suja Israeli anali kwa iwe ngati chinthu chomachiseka? Kodi Israeli anapezeka pakati pa akuba kuti nthawi zonse poyankhula za iye
Jeremiah48:28 Inu amene mumakhala ku Mowabu
Jeremiah48:29 “Tamva za kunyada kwa Mowabu
Jeremiah48:30 Ine ndikuzidziwa ntchito zake
Jeremiah48:31 Nʼchifukwa chake ndidzamulira Mowabu
Jeremiah48:32 Ndikukhetsa misozi chifukwa cha inu
Jeremiah48:33 Chimwemwe ndi chisangalalo zatha ku minda ya zipatso ya ku Mowabu. Ndaletsa kuchucha kwa vinyo mopsinyira mphesa; palibe amene akufuwula mokondwa akamapsinya mphesa. Ngakhale kufuwula kulipo
Jeremiah48:34 “A ku Hesiboni ndi Eleali akulira ndipo mfuwu wawo ukumveka mpaka ku Yahazi
Jeremiah48:35 Ndidzawaletsa anthu a ku Mowabu kupereka nsembe mʼmalo awo opembedzera ndi kufukiza lubani kwa milungu yawo
Jeremiah48:36 “Nʼchifukwa chake mtima wanga ukulirira Mowabu ngati chitoliro. Mtima wanga ukulirira anthu a ku Kiri Heresi ngati chitoliro chifukwa chuma chimene anachipata chatha.
Jeremiah48:37 Aliyense wameta mutu wake ndi ndevu zake; manja a munthu aliyense ndi ochekacheka
Jeremiah48:38 Pa madenga onse a ku Mowabu ndiponso mʼmisewu yake anthu akungolira
Jeremiah48:39 “Taonani mmene waphwanyikira! Tamvani momwe akulirira! Taonani momwe Mowabu wachititsidwira manyazi. Mowabu wasanduka chinthu chonyozeka
Jeremiah48:40 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah48:41 Mizinda idzagwidwa ndipo malinga adzalandidwa. Pa tsiku limenelo mitima ya ankhondo a ku Mowabu idzakhala ngati mtima wa mayi pa nthawi yake yochira.
Jeremiah48:42 Mowabu sudzakhala mtundu wa anthu chifukwa unadzikuza powukira Yehova.
Jeremiah48:43 Zoopsa
Jeremiah48:44 “Aliyense wothawa zoopsa adzagwera mʼdzenje
Jeremiah48:45 “Anthu othawa nkhondo ayima pa mthunzi wa Hesiboni chifukwa chotopa. Koma moto wayaka kuchokera ku Hesiboni
Jeremiah48:46 Tsoka kwa iwe Mowabu! Anthu opembedza Kemosi awonongeka. Ana ako aamuna ndi aakazi atengedwa ukapolo.
Jeremiah48:47 “Komabe masiku akutsogolo ndidzabwezeranso Mowabu chuma chake
Jeremiah49:1 Yehova ananena izi: Amoni
Jeremiah49:2 Koma nthawi ikubwera
Jeremiah49:3 “Lirani
Jeremiah49:4 Chifukwa chiyani mukunyadira chigwa chanu
Jeremiah49:5 Ndidzabweretsa zoopsa pa iwe zochokera kwa onse amene akuzungulira
Jeremiah49:6 “Komabe pambuyo pake
Jeremiah49:7 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse ananena izi za Edomu: “Kodi nzeru sizikupezekanso ku Temani? Kodi anzeru analeka kupereka uphungu? Kodi nzeru zawo zinatheratu?
Jeremiah49:8 Inu anthu a ku Dedani
Jeremiah49:9 Kodi anthu othyola mphesa akanafika kwa inu akanakusiyiraniko mphesa pangʼono pokha? Anthu akuba akanafika usiku akanangotengako zimene akuzifuna zokha?
Jeremiah49:10 Koma ine ndazivula zidzukulu za Esau. Ndaonetsa poyera malo awo obisalamo
Jeremiah49:11 ‘Siyani ana anu amasiye; Ine ndidzawateteza. Amayi anu amasiye akhoza kudalira Ine.’ ”
Jeremiah49:12 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah49:13 Ine ndikulumbira
Jeremiah49:14 Ndamva uthenga wochokera kwa Yehova: Nthumwi yatumidwa kupita kwa anthu a mitundu ina kukanena kuti
Jeremiah49:15 “Ndidzakuchepetsani pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina. Mudzakhala anthu onyozeka pakati pa anthu.
Jeremiah49:16 Kuopseza kwako kwakunyenga; kudzikuza kwa mtima wako kwakusocheretsa
Jeremiah49:17 “Dziko la Edomu lidzasanduka chinthu chochititsa mantha. Onse odutsamo adzadabwa ndi kupukusa mitu yawo chifukwa cha kuwonongeka kwake.
Jeremiah49:18 Monga momwe anawonongekera Sodomu ndi Gomora
Jeremiah49:19 “Monga mkango wotuluka ku nkhalango za ku Yorodani kupita ku malo a msipu wobiriwira
Jeremiah49:20 Nʼchifukwa chake imvani. Izi ndi zimene Ine Yehova ndakonza zolangira anthu a ku Edomu ndi a ku Temani. Ngakhale ana omwe adzatengedwa ukapolo ndipo aliyense adzachita mantha chifukwa cha iwo.
Jeremiah49:21 Akadzagwa Edomu padzakhala mfuwu waukulu ndipo dziko lapansi lidzanjenjemera; kulira kwawo kudzamveka mpaka ku Nyanja Yofiira.
Jeremiah49:22 Taonani
Jeremiah49:23 Mawu a Yehova onena za Damasiko ndi awa: “Anthu a ku Hamati ndi a ku Aripadi akuchita mantha chifukwa amva nkhani yoyipa. Mitima yawo yagwidwa ndi mantha ndipo ali ngati muja ichitira nyanja yosakhazikika.
Jeremiah49:24 Anthu a ku Damasiko alefuka. Abwerera mʼmbuyo kufuna kuthawa chifukwa agwidwa ndi mantha aakulu. Ali ndi nkhawa komanso mantha ngati za mayi pa nthawi yake yochira.
Jeremiah49:25 Mzinda wotchuka ndi wachikondwerero uja wasiyidwa!
Jeremiah49:26 Nʼchifukwa chake anyamata ake adzagwa mʼmisewu ndi kufa; ankhondo ake onse adzawonongedwa tsiku limenelo
Jeremiah49:27 “Ndidzatentha malinga a Damasiko; moto udzanyeketsa nyumba zaufumu za Beni-Hadadi.”
Jeremiah49:28 Mawu a Yehova onena za Kedara ndi maufumu a ku Hazori
Jeremiah49:29 Landani matenti awo ndi nkhosa zawo
Jeremiah49:30 “Thawani mofulumira! Kabisaleni mʼmakhwawa
Jeremiah49:31 “Nyamukani kathireni nkhondo mtundu wa anthu umene uli pamtendere
Jeremiah49:32 Ngamira zawo zidzafunkhidwa
Jeremiah49:33 “Hazori adzasanduka bwinja
Jeremiah49:34 Uthenga umene Yehova anapatsa mneneri Yeremiya wonena za Elamu
Jeremiah49:35 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Jeremiah49:36 Ndidzabweretsa mphepo zinayi pa Elamu kuchokera ku zigawo zinayi zamlengalenga; ndidzawabalalitsira ku mphepo zinayi
Jeremiah49:37 A ku Elamuwo ndidzachititsa mantha pamaso pa adani awo komanso pamaso pa iwo amene akufuna kuwononga moyo wawo. Ndidzawagwetsera mkwiyo wanga ndipo adzakhala pa mavuto
Jeremiah49:38 Ndidzakhazika mpando wanga waufumu ku Elamu ndipo ndidzawononga mfumu yake pamodzi ndi akuluakulu ake
Jeremiah49:39 “Komabe mʼtsogolomo ndidzabwezera anthu a ku Elamu dziko lawo
Jeremiah50:1 Uthenga umene Yehova anayankhula ndi mneneri Yeremiya wonena za mzinda wa Babuloni ndi anthu ake ndi uwu:
Jeremiah50:2 “Lengeza ndi kulalika pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina
Jeremiah50:3 Mtundu wa anthu wochokera kumpoto wadzathira nkhondo Babuloni ndi kusandutsa bwinja dziko lake. Kumeneko sikudzakhalanso munthu kapena nyama.
Jeremiah50:4 “Masiku amenewo
Jeremiah50:5 Adzafunsa njira ya ku Ziyoni ndi kuyamba ulendo wopita kumeneko. Iwo adzadzipereka kwa Yehova pochita naye pangano lamuyaya limene silidzayiwalika.
Jeremiah50:6 “Anthu anga ali ngati nkhosa zotayika; abusa awo anawasocheretsa mʼmapiri. Iwo anayendayenda mʼmapiri ndi mʼzitunda mpaka kuyiwala kwawo.
Jeremiah50:7 Aliyense amene anawapeza anawawononga; adani awo anati
Jeremiah50:8 “Thawaniko ku Babuloni; chokani mʼdziko la Ababuloni. Muyambe inu kutuluka ngati atonde amene amatsogolera ziweto.
Jeremiah50:9 Taonani
Jeremiah50:10 Motero Ababuloni adzafunkhidwa; ndipo onse omufunkha adzakhuta
Jeremiah50:11 “Inu Ababuloni
Jeremiah50:12 Koma mzinda wanu udzachititsidwa manyazi kwambiri. Mzinda umene uli ngati mayi wanu udzanyazitsidwa. Babuloni adzasanduka chitsirizira cha anthu onse. Mzinda wawo udzakhala ngati thengo
Jeremiah50:13 Chifukwa cha mkwiyo wa Yehova Babuloni adzakhala wopanda anthu ndipo adzakhala chipululu chokhachokha. Onse odutsa kumeneko adzachita mantha ndipo azidzangotsonya chifukwa cha chiwonongeko chake chachikulu.
Jeremiah50:14 “Inu okoka uta
Jeremiah50:15 Mufuwulireni mbali zonse pakuti wagonja. Nsanja zake zagwa. Malinga ake agwetsedwa. Kumeneku ndiko kulipsira kwa Yehova. Mulipsireni
Jeremiah50:16 Chotsani ku Babuloni munthu wofesa mbewu aliyense
Jeremiah50:17 “Aisraeli ali ngati nkhosa zomwe zabalalika pothamangitsidwa ndi mikango. Mfumu ya ku Asiriya ndiye inayamba kuwapha Aisraeliwo. Wotsiriza anali Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babuloni amene anachita ngati kuphwanya mafupa ake.”
Jeremiah50:18 Nʼchifukwa chake Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah50:19 Koma ndidzabwezera Israeli ku msipu wake ndipo adzadya mʼminda ya ku Karimeli ndi Basani; adzadya nakhuta ku mapiri a ku Efereimu ndi Giliyadi.
Jeremiah50:20 Masiku amenewo
Jeremiah50:21 “Lithireni nkhondo dziko la Merataimu ndi anthu okhala ku Pekodi. Muwaphe ndi lupanga ndi kuwawonongeratu
Jeremiah50:22 Mʼdziko muli phokoso la nkhondo
Jeremiah50:23 Taonani mʼmene waphwanyikira ndi kuwonongekera uja amati ndi nyundo ya dziko lonse lapansi. Mzinda wa Babuloni wasanduka chinthu chochititsa mantha pakati pa mitundu ina!
Jeremiah50:24 Ndinakutchera msampha
Jeremiah50:25 Yehova watsekula nyumba ya zida zake ndipo watulutsa zida za ukali wake
Jeremiah50:26 Mumenyane naye Babuloni mbali zonse. Anthu ake muwawunjike ngati milu ya tirigu. Muwawononge kotheratu ndipo pasakhale wopulumuka ndi mmodzi yemwe.
Jeremiah50:27 Iphani ankhondo ake onse. Onse aphedwe ndithu. Tsoka lawagwera pakuti tsiku lawo lachilango lafika.
Jeremiah50:28 Tikumva anthu othawa nkhondo ochokera ku Babuloni akulengeza mu Yerusalemu za kulipsira kwa Yehova Mulungu wathu. Iye akulipsira chifukwa chowononga Nyumba yake.
Jeremiah50:29 “Itanani anthu oponya mivi kudzathira nkhondo Babuloni. Muyitanenso onse amene amakoka mauta. Mangani misasa ya nkhondo momuzungulira; musalole munthu aliyense kuthawa. Muchiteni monga momwe iye anachitira anthu ena. Iyeyu ananyoza Yehova
Jeremiah50:30 Nʼchifukwa chake
Jeremiah50:31 “Taona
Jeremiah50:32 Wodzikuzawe udzapunthwa nʼkugwa ndipo palibe amene adzakudzutse; ndidzayatsa moto mʼmizinda yake umene udzanyeketsa onse amene amuzungulira.”
Jeremiah50:33 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Jeremiah50:34 Koma Mpulumutsi wawo ndi wamphamvu; dzina lake ndi Yehova Wamphamvuzonse. Iye adzawateteza molimba pa mlandu wawo nʼcholinga choti abweretse mtendere mʼdziko lawo
Jeremiah50:35 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah50:36 Imfa yalunjika pa aneneri abodza kuti asanduke zitsiru. Imfa yalunjika pa ankhondo ake kuti agwidwe ndi mantha aakulu.
Jeremiah50:37 Imfa ilunjike pa akavalo ake ndi magaleta ake. Ilunjikanso pa magulu ankhondo achilendo amene ali pakati pawo kuti asanduke ngati akazi. Chiwonongeko chilunjikenso pa chuma chake kuti chidzafunkhidwe.
Jeremiah50:38 Chilala chilunjike pa madzi ake kuti aphwe. Babuloni ndi dziko la mafano
Jeremiah50:39 “Nʼchifukwa chake nyama zakuthengo ndi afisi zidzakhala kumeneko ndipo kudzakhalanso akadzidzi. Kumeneko sikudzapezekako anthu
Jeremiah50:40 Monga momwe Mulungu anawonongera Sodomu ndi Gomora pamodzi ndi mizinda yonse yozungulira
Jeremiah50:41 “Taonani! Gulu lankhondo likubwera kuchokera kumpoto; mtundu wa anthu amphamvu pamodzi ndi mafumu ambiri
Jeremiah50:42 Atenga mauta ndi mikondo; ndi anthu ankhanza ndipo alibe chifundo. Phokoso lawo likumveka ngati mkokomo wa nyanja. Akwera pa akavalo awo
Jeremiah50:43 Mfumu ya ku Babuloni yamva za mbiri yawo
Jeremiah50:44 Taonani
Jeremiah50:45 Nʼchifukwa chake imvani. Izi ndi zimene Ine Yehova ndakonza zolangira anthu a ku Babuloni. Ngakhale ana omwe adzatengedwa ukapolo ndipo aliyense adzachita mantha chifukwa cha iwo.
Jeremiah50:46 Akadzagwa Babuloni padzakhala mfuwu waukulu ndipo dziko lapansi lidzanjenjemera
Jeremiah51:1 Yehova akuti
Jeremiah51:2 Ndidzatuma alendo ku Babuloni kudzamupeta ndi kuwononga dziko lake kotheratu. Iwo adzalimbana naye ku mbali zonse pa tsiku la masautso ake.
Jeremiah51:3 Okoka uta musawalekerere kapena wonyadira chovala chawo chankhondo. Musawasiye anyamata ake kuti akhale ndi moyo; koma muwononge ankhondo ake kotheratu.
Jeremiah51:4 Adzavulazidwa ndi kufera mʼdziko la Babuloni lomwelo ndi mʼmisewu yawo yomwe.
Jeremiah51:5 Pakuti Yuda ndi Israeli sanasiyidwe ngati amasiye ndi Mulungu wawo
Jeremiah51:6 “Thawaniko ku Babuloni! Aliyense apulumutse moyo wake! Musawonongeke naye pamodzi chifukwa cha machimo ake. Imeneyi ndi nthawi yoti Yehova amulange; Yehova adzamulipsira.
Jeremiah51:7 Babuloni anali ngati chikho cha golide mʼdzanja la Yehova; kuti aledzeretse dziko lonse lapansi. Mitundu yambiri ya anthu inamwa vinyo wake; nʼchifukwa chake tsopano inachita misala.
Jeremiah51:8 Babuloni wagwa mwadzidzidzi ndi kusweka. Mulireni! Mfunireni mankhwala opha ululu wake; mwina iye nʼkuchira.”
Jeremiah51:9 Ena anati
Jeremiah51:10 “ ‘Yehova waonetsa poyera kuti ndife osalakwa; tiyeni tilengeze mu Ziyoni zimene Yehova Mulungu wathu wachita.’
Jeremiah51:11 “Yehova wadzutsa mitima ya mafumu a Amedi
Jeremiah51:12 Kwezani mbendera yankhondo kuti muwononge malinga a Babuloni! Limbitsani oteteza
Jeremiah51:13 Inu muli ndi mitsinje yambiri ndi chuma chambiri. Koma chimaliziro chanu chafika
Jeremiah51:14 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse analumbira pali Iye mwini kuti: Ndidzakutumizira adani ochuluka ngati dzombe
Jeremiah51:15 “Yehova analenga dziko lapansi ndi mphamvu zake; Iye anapanga dziko lonse ndi nzeru zake ndipo anayala thambo mwaluso lake.
Jeremiah51:16 Iye akayankhula
Jeremiah51:17 “Anthu onse ndi opusa ndiponso opanda nzeru; mmisiri aliyense wosula golide akuchita manyazi ndi mafano ake. Mafano akewo ndi abodza; alibe moyo mʼkati mwawo.
Jeremiah51:18 Mafanowo ndi achabechabe
Jeremiah51:19 Koma Yehova amene ndi Cholowa cha Yakobo sali ngati mafanowo. Iyeyu ndi Mlengi wa zinthu zonse
Jeremiah51:20 “Iwe Babuloni ndi ndodo yanga
Jeremiah51:21 ndi iwe ndimaphwanya kavalo ndi wokwerapo
Jeremiah51:22 Ndi iwe ndimaphwanya mwamuna ndi mkazi
Jeremiah51:23 Ndi iwe ndimaphwanya mʼbusa ndi ziweto
