Jeremiah51:24 “Inu mukuona ndidzalanga Babuloni ndi onse amene amakhala mʼdziko la Babuloni chifukwa cha zolakwa zonse anachita ku Ziyoni
Jeremiah51:25 “Taonani
Jeremiah51:26 Palibe ngakhale ndi mwala wako umodzi umene anthu adzawutenga kuti awugwiritse ntchito kumangira nyumba
Jeremiah51:27 “Kwezani mbendera ya nkhondo mʼdziko! Lizani lipenga pakati pa mitundu ya anthu! Konzekeretsani mitundu ya anthu kuti ikamuthire nkhondo; itanani maufumu awa: Ararati
Jeremiah51:28 Konzekeretsani mitundu ya anthu. Amenewa ndiwo mafumu a Amedi
Jeremiah51:29 Dziko likunjenjemera ndi kunthunthumira
Jeremiah51:30 Ankhondo a ku Babuloni aleka kuchita nkhondo; iwo angokhala mʼmalinga awo. Mphamvu zawo zatheratu; ndipo akhala ngati akazi. Malo ake wokhala atenthedwa; mipiringidzo ya zipata zake yathyoka.
Jeremiah51:31 Othamanga akungopezanapezana
Jeremiah51:32 Madooko onse alandidwa
Jeremiah51:33 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Jeremiah51:34 A ku Yerusalemu akuti
Jeremiah51:35 Anthu a ku Ziyoni anene kuti
Jeremiah51:36 Nʼchifukwa chake Yehova akuti
Jeremiah51:37 Motero Babuloni adzasanduka mulu wa nyumba zogumuka
Jeremiah51:38 Anthu ake onse adzabangula ngati mkango
Jeremiah51:39 Ngati achita dyera ndiye ndidzawakonzera madyerero ndi kuwaledzeretsa
Jeremiah51:40 “Ine ndidzawatenga kuti akaphedwe ngati ana ankhosa onenepa
Jeremiah51:41 “Ndithu Babuloni walandidwa
Jeremiah51:42 Nyanja yakwera ndi kumiza Babuloni; mafunde ake okokoma aphimba Babuloni.
Jeremiah51:43 Mizinda yake yasanduka bwinja
Jeremiah51:44 Ndidzalanga Beli mulungu wa Ababuloni
Jeremiah51:45 “Tulukani mʼBabuloni anthu anga! Pulumutsani miyoyo yanu! Thawani mkwiyo woopsa wa Yehova.
Jeremiah51:46 Musataye mtima kapena kuchita mantha pamene mphekesera zikumveka mʼdziko mwanu. Chaka ndi chaka pamabuka mphekesera za ziwawa mʼdziko lapansi
Jeremiah51:47 Pakuti taonani
Jeremiah51:48 Pamenepo kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi ndi zonse zili mʼmenemo zidzayimba mokondwa chifukwa cha kugwa kwa Babuloni. Anthu owononga ochokera kumpoto adzamuthira nkhondo
Jeremiah51:49 “Babuloni anapha anthu ambiri pa dziko lapansi. Tsono
Jeremiah51:50 Inu amene munapulumuka ku nkhondo ya Babuloni
Jeremiah51:51 Inu mukuti
Jeremiah51:52 Nʼchifukwa chake Yehova akuti
Jeremiah51:53 Ngakhale Babuloni atadzikweza mpaka mlengalenga ndi kulimbitsa nsanja zake
Jeremiah51:54 “Imvani mfuwu wolira kuchokera ku Babuloni. Imvani phokoso lachiwonongeko chachikulu kuchokera mʼdziko la Babuloni.
Jeremiah51:55 Pakuti Yehova akuwononga Babuloni
Jeremiah51:56 Pakuti wowononga wafika kudzamenyana ndi Babuloni
Jeremiah51:57 Ndidzaledzeretsa akuluakulu ake pamodzi ndi anzeru ake
Jeremiah51:58 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Jeremiah51:59 Zedekiya mfumu ya Yuda inali ndi phungu wake wamkulu amene dzina lake linali Seraya mwana wa Neriya chidzukulu cha Maseya. Mʼchaka chachinayi cha ulamuliro wake
Jeremiah51:60 Yeremiya anali atalemba mʼbuku za masautso onse amene adzafike pa Babuloni ndi zina zonse zokhudza Babuloni.
Jeremiah51:61 Yeremiya anawuza Seraya kuti
Jeremiah51:62 Ndipo ukanene kuti
Jeremiah51:63 Ukakatha kuwerenga bukuli
Jeremiah51:64 Ndipo ukanene kuti
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiya anali wa zaka 21 pamene analowa ufumu
Jeremiah52:2 Iye anachita zoyipa pamaso pa Yehova
Jeremiah52:3 Chifukwa cha zonse zimene zinachitika ku Yerusalemu ndi ku Yuda Yehova anakwiyira anthu ake mpaka kuwachotsa pamaso pake. Tsono Zedekiya anawukira mfumu ya ku Babuloni.
Jeremiah52:4 Choncho mʼchaka cha chisanu ndi chinayi cha ulamuliro wa Zedekiya
Jeremiah52:5 Mzindawo unazingidwa mpaka chaka cha khumi ndi chimodzi cha ulamuliro wa Mfumu Zedekiya.
Jeremiah52:6 Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chinayi la mwezi wachinayi njala inakula kwambiri mu mzindamo kotero kuti munalibe chakudya choti anthu nʼkudya.
Jeremiah52:7 Tsono linga la mzindawo linabowoledwa
Jeremiah52:8 koma gulu la ankhondo la ku Babuloni linalondola mfumu Zedekiya ndi kumupeza mʼchigwa cha ku Yeriko. Ankhondo onse anamusiya yekha nabalalika.
Jeremiah52:9 Anagwidwa napita naye kwa mfumu ya ku Babuloni ku Ribula mʼdziko la Hamati
Jeremiah52:10 Ku Ribulako mfumu ya ku Babuloni inapha ana aamuna a Zedekiya iyeyo akuona; ndiponso inapha akuluakulu onse a ku Yuda.
Jeremiah52:11 Ndipo inamukolowola maso Zedekiya
Jeremiah52:12 Mwezi wachisanu
Jeremiah52:13 Ndipo anatentha Nyumba ya Yehova
Jeremiah52:14 Tsono gulu lonse lankhondo la Ababuloni limene linali ndi mtsogoleri wa ankhondo a mfumu uja linagwetsa malinga onse ozungulira Yerusalemu.
Jeremiah52:15 Nebuzaradani mtsogoleri wa ankhondo anatenga anthu amene anatsala mu mzindamo
Jeremiah52:16 Komabe Nebuzaradani mtsogoleri wa ankhondo anasiya anthu ena onse osaukitsitsa a mʼdzikomo kuti azigwira ntchito mʼminda ya mpesa ndi minda ina.
Jeremiah52:17 Ababuloni anaphwanya nsanamira za mkuwa
Jeremiah52:18 Ankhondowo anatenganso mbiya
Jeremiah52:19 Nebuzaradani uja anatenganso mabeseni
Jeremiah52:20 Nsanamira ziwiri zija
Jeremiah52:21 Nsanamira imodzi kutalika kwake kunali mamita asanu ndi atatu
Jeremiah52:22 Pamwamba pa nsanamira iliyonse panali mutu wamkuwa umene kutalika kwake kunali mamita awiri. Pozungulira pake panali ukonde ndi makangadza
Jeremiah52:23 Mʼmbali mwake munali makangadza 96; makangadza onse pamodzi analipo 100 kuzungulira ukonde onse.
Jeremiah52:24 Mtsogoleri wa ankhondo uja
Jeremiah52:25 Mu mzindamo anagwiramo mkulu amene ankalamulira ankhondo
Jeremiah52:26 Nebuzaradani
Jeremiah52:27 Ku Ribulako
Jeremiah52:28 Chiwerengero cha anthu amene Nebukadinezara anawatenga kupita nawo ku ukapolo ndi ichi: Mʼchaka cha chisanu ndi chiwiri cha ulamuliro wake
Jeremiah52:29 	mʼchaka cha 18 cha ulamuliro wa Nebukadinezara
Jeremiah52:30 	mʼchaka cha 23 cha ulamuliro wa Nebukadinezara
Jeremiah52:31 Mʼchaka chimene Evili-Merodaki analowa ufumu wa Babuloni
Jeremiah52:32 Evili-Merodaki anakomera mtima Yehoyakini
Jeremiah52:33 Choncho Yehoyakini analoledwa kuvula zovala zake za ku ndende ndipo tsiku ndi tsiku ankadya ndi mfumu pa moyo wake wonse.
Jeremiah52:34 Tsiku ndi tsiku mfumu ya ku Babuloni inkamupatsa Yehoyakini phoso lake nthawi yonse ya moyo wake
Lamentations1:1 Haa! Mzinda uja wasiyidwa wokhawokha
Lamentations1:2 Ukulira mowawidwa mtima usiku wonse
Lamentations1:3 Yuda watengedwa ku ukapolo
Lamentations1:4 Misewu yopita ku Ziyoni ikulira
Lamentations1:5 Adani ake asanduka mabwana ake; odana naye akupeza bwino. Yehova wamubweretsera mavuto chifukwa cha machimo ake ambiri. Ana ake atengedwa ukapolo pamaso pa mdani.
Lamentations1:6 Ulemerero wonse wa mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni wachokeratu. Akalonga ake ali ngati mbawala zosowa msipu; alibe mphamvu zothawira owathamangitsa.
Lamentations1:7 Pa masiku a masautso ndi kuzunzika kwake
Lamentations1:8 Yerusalemu wachimwa kwambiri ndipo potero wakhala wodetsedwa. Onse amene ankamulemekeza pano akumunyoza
Lamentations1:9 Uve wake umaonekera pa zovala zake; iye sanaganizire za tsogolo lake. Nʼchifukwa chake kugwa kwake kunali kwakukulu; ndipo analibe womutonthoza. “Inu Yehova
Lamentations1:10 Adani amulanda chuma chake chonse; iye anaona mitundu ya anthu achikunja ikulowa mʼmalo ake opatulika
Lamentations1:11 Anthu ake onse akubuwula pamene akufunafuna chakudya; asinthanitsa chuma chawo ndi chakudya kuti akhale ndi moyo. “Inu Yehova
Lamentations1:12 “Kodi zimenezi mukuziyesa zachabe
Lamentations1:13 “Anatumiza moto kuchokera kumwamba
Lamentations1:14 “Wazindikira machimo anga onse ndipo ndi manja ake anawaluka pamodzi. Machimowa afika pakhosi panga
Lamentations1:15 “Ambuye wakana anthu anga onse amphamvu omwe ankakhala nane: wasonkhanitsa gulu lankhondo kuti lilimbane nane
Lamentations1:16 “Chifukwa cha zimenezi ndikulira ndipo maso anga adzaza ndi misozi. Palibe aliyense pafupi woti anditonthoze
Lamentations1:17 “Ziyoni wakweza manja ake
Lamentations1:18 “Yehova ndi wolungama
Lamentations1:19 “Ndinayitana abwenzi anga koma anandinyenga. Ansembe ndi akuluakulu anga anafa mu mzinda pamene ankafunafuna chakudya kuti akhale ndi moyo.
Lamentations1:20 “Inu Yehova
Lamentations1:21 “Anthu amva kubuwula kwanga
Lamentations1:22 “Lolani kuti ntchito zawo zoyipa zifike pamaso panu; muwalange ngati mmene mwandilangira ine chifukwa cha machimo anga onse. Ndikubuwula kwambiri ndipo mtima wanga walefuka.”
Lamentations2:1 Haa
Lamentations2:2 Ambuye anawononga midzi yonse ya Yakobo mopanda chifundo; mu mkwiyo wake anagwetsa malinga a mwana wamkazi wa Yuda. Anagwetsa pansi mochititsa manyazi maufumu ndi akalonga ake.
Lamentations2:3 Atakwiya kwambiri
Lamentations2:4 Wakokera uta wake pa ife ngati ndife adani; wayimiritsa dzanja lake pa ife ngati ndife adani
Lamentations2:5 Ambuye ali ngati mdani; wawonongeratu Israeli; wawonongeratu nyumba zake zonse zaufumu ndipo wawononga malinga ake. Iye wachulukitsa kubuma ndi kulira kwa mwana wamkazi wa Yuda.
Lamentations2:6 Wagwetsa malo ake okhalamo ngati khumbi la mʼmunda; wawononga malo ake a msonkhano. Yehova wayiwalitsa Ziyoni maphwando ake oyikika ndi masabata ake. Mokwiya kwambiri
Lamentations2:7 Ambuye wakana guwa lake la nsembe ndipo wasiya malo ake opatulika. Iye wapereka makoma a nyumba zake zaufumu kwa mdani wake; adaniwo anafuwula mʼnyumba ya Yehova ngati kuti ndi pa tsiku la chikondwerero.
Lamentations2:8 Yehova anatsimikiza kugwetsa makoma a mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni. Anawayesa ndi chingwe ndipo sanafune kuleka kuwagwetsa. Analiritsa malinga ndi makoma; onse anawonongeka pamodzi.
Lamentations2:9 Zipata za Yerusalemu zalowa pansi; wathyola ndi kuwononga mipiringidzo yake. Mfumu ndi akalonga ake agwidwa ukapolo pakati pa mitundu ya anthu
Lamentations2:10 Akuluakulu a mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni akhala chete pansi; awaza fumbi pa mitu yawo ndipo avala ziguduli. Anamwali a Yerusalemu aweramitsa mitu yawo pansi.
Lamentations2:11 Maso anga atopa ndi kulira
Lamentations2:12 Anawo akufunsa amayi awo kuti
Lamentations2:13 Ndinganene chiyani za iwe? Ndingakufanizire ndi chiyani
Lamentations2:14 Masomphenya a aneneri ako anali abodza ndi achabechabe. Iwo sanakupulumutse kuti usapite ku ukapolo poyika poyera mphulupulu zako. Mauthenga amene anakupatsa anali achabechabe ndi osocheretsa.
Lamentations2:15 Onse oyenda mʼnjira yako akukuwombera mʼmanja; akugwedeza mitu yawo ndi kukunyodola iwe mwana wamkazi wa Yerusalemu: “Kodi mzinda uja ndi uwu umene unkatchedwa wokongola kotheratu
Lamentations2:16 Adani ako onse akutsekulira pakamwa ndi kukunyoza; iwo akunyogodola ndi kukukuta mano awo
Lamentations2:17 Yehova wachita chimene anakonzeratu; wakwaniritsa mawu ake
Lamentations2:18 Mitima ya anthu ikufuwulira Ambuye. Iwe khoma la mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni
Lamentations2:19 Dzuka
Lamentations2:20 Inu Yehova
Lamentations2:21 Anyamata ndi okalamba aligone pamodzi pa fumbi la mʼmisewu ya mu mzinda; anyamata anga ndi anamwali anga aphedwa ndi lupanga. Inu Yehova mwawapha pa tsiku la mkwiyo wanu; mwawapha mopanda chifundo.
Lamentations2:22 Ngati momwe mumayitanira pa tsiku la phwando
Lamentations3:1 Ine ndine munthu amene ndaona masautso ndi ndodo ya ukali wake.
Lamentations3:2 Wandipititsa kutali ndipo wandiyendetsa mu mdima osati mʼkuwala;
Lamentations3:3 zoonadi anandikantha ndi dzanja lake mobwerezabwereza tsiku lonse.
Lamentations3:4 Wakalambitsa khungu langa ndi mnofu wanga
Lamentations3:5 Wandizinga ndi kundizungulira ndi zowawa ndi zolemetsa.
Lamentations3:6 Wandikhazika mu mdima ngati amene anafa kale.
Lamentations3:7 Wandimangira khoma kotero kuti sindingathawe
Lamentations3:8 Ngakhale pamene ndifuwula kapena kupempha chithandizo
Lamentations3:9 Wanditsekera njira yanga ndi miyala yosema; ndipo wakhotetsa tinjira tanga.
Lamentations3:10 Wandidikirira ngati chimbalangondo
Lamentations3:11 Wandikokera pambali ndi kundingʼambangʼamba
Lamentations3:12 Wakoka uta wake ndipo walunjikitsa mivi yake pa ine.
Lamentations3:13 Walasa mtima wanga ndi mivi ya mʼphodo mwake.
Lamentations3:14 Ndinakhala choseketsa cha anthu anga onse; amandinyodola mʼnyimbo zawo tsiku lonse.
Lamentations3:15 Wandidyetsa zowawa ndipo wandimwetsa ndulu.
Lamentations3:16 Wathyola mano anga ndi miyala; wandiviviniza mʼfumbi;
Lamentations3:17 Wandichotsera mtendere; ndayiwala kuti kupeza bwino nʼchiyani.
Lamentations3:18 Choncho ndikuti
Lamentations3:19 Kukumbukira masautso anga ndi kusowa pokhala
Lamentations3:20 Ine ndikuzikumbukira bwino izi
Lamentations3:21 Komabe ndimakumbukira zimenezi
Lamentations3:22 Ife sitinawonongekeretu chifukwa chikondi cha Yehova ndi chachikulu
Lamentations3:23 Zimaoneka zatsopano mmawa uliwonse; kukhulupirika kwanu nʼkwakukulu.
Lamentations3:24 Mu mtima mwanga ndimati
Lamentations3:25 Yehova ndi wabwino kwa amene amayembekezera Iye
Lamentations3:26 nʼkwabwino kudikira chipulumutso cha Yehova modekha.
Lamentations3:27 Nʼkwabwino kuti munthu asenze goli pamene ali wamngʼono.
Lamentations3:28 Akhale chete pa yekha
Lamentations3:29 Abise nkhope yake mʼfumbi mwina chiyembekezo nʼkukhalapobe.
Lamentations3:30 Apereke tsaya lake kwa iye amene angamumenye
Lamentations3:31 Chifukwa Ambuye satayiratu anthu nthawi zonse.
Lamentations3:32 Ngakhale amabweretsa zowawa
Lamentations3:33 Pakuti sabweretsa masautso mwadala
Lamentations3:34 Kuphwanya ndi phazi a mʼndende onse a mʼdziko
Lamentations3:35 kukaniza munthu ufulu wake pamaso pa Wammwambamwamba
Lamentations3:36 kumana munthu chiweruzo cholungama— kodi Ambuye saona zonsezi?
Lamentations3:37 Kodi ndani angayankhule zinthu nʼkuchitika ngati Ambuye sanavomereze?
Lamentations3:38 Kodi zovuta ndi zabwino sizituluka mʼkamwa mwa Wammwambamwamba?
Lamentations3:39 Kodi nʼchifukwa chiyani munthu aliyense wamoyo amadandaula akalangidwa chifukwa cha machimo ake?
Lamentations3:40 Tiyeni tisanthule ndi kuyesa njira zathu
Lamentations3:41 Tiyeni tikweze mitima yathu ndi manja athu kwa Mulungu kumwamba ndipo tinene kuti:
Lamentations3:42 “Ife tachimwa ndi kuwukira ndipo inu simunakhululuke.
Lamentations3:43 “Mwadzikuta ndi mkwiyo ndi kutilondola ndipo mwatitha mopanda chifundo.
Lamentations3:44 Mwadzikuta mu mtambo kotero mapemphero athu sakukufikani.
Lamentations3:45 Mwatisandutsa zinyatsi ndi zinyalala pakati pa mitundu ya anthu.
Lamentations3:46 “Adani anthu atitsekulira pakamwa.
Lamentations3:47 Ife tadzazidwa ndi mantha pakuti tagwa mʼdzenje
Lamentations3:48 Misozi mʼmaso mwanga ikungoti mbwembwembwe chifukwa anthu anga akuwonongedwa.
Lamentations3:49 Misozi idzatsika kosalekeza
Lamentations3:50 mpaka Yehova ayangʼane pansi kuchokera kumwamba ndi kuona.
Lamentations3:51 Mtima wanga ukupweteka poona zimenezi chifukwa cha akazi onse a mu mzinda.
Lamentations3:52 Akundisaka ngati mbalame
Lamentations3:53 Ayesa kundipha pondiponya mʼdzenje ndi kundiponya miyala;
Lamentations3:54 madzi anamiza mutu wanga ndipo ndinkaganiza kuti imfa yayandikira.
Lamentations3:55 Ndinayitana dzina lanu Inu Yehova
Lamentations3:56 Inu munamva kudandaula kwanga. “Mundimvere kulira kwanga kopempha thandizo.”
Lamentations3:57 Munafika pafupi pamene ndinakuyitanani
Lamentations3:58 Inu Ambuye munandiwombola ku mlandu wanga; munapulumutsa moyo wanga.
Lamentations3:59 Yehova
Lamentations3:60 Mwaona kuzama kwa kubwezera kwawo
Lamentations3:61 Inu Yehova mwamva kunyoza kwawo
Lamentations3:62 manongʼonongʼo a adani anga ondiwukira ine tsiku lonse.
Lamentations3:63 Tawaonani! Kaya ali pansi kapena kuyimirira
Lamentations3:64 Inu Yehova
Lamentations3:65 Phimbani mitima yawo
Lamentations3:66 Muwalondole mwaukali ndipo muwawonongeretu pa dziko lapansi.
Lamentations4:1 Haa! Golide wathimbirira
Lamentations4:2 Haa! Ana a Ziyoni amtengowapatali amene kale anali ngati golide
Lamentations4:3 Ngakhale nkhandwe zimapereka bere kuyamwitsa ana ake
Lamentations4:4 Lilime la mwana lakangamira kukhosi chifukwa cha ludzu
Lamentations4:5 Iwo amene kale ankadya zonona akupemphetsa mʼmisewu ya mu mzinda. Iwo amene kale ankavala zokongola tsopano akugona pa phulusa.
Lamentations4:6 Kuyipa kwa anthu anga kunali kwakukulu kuposa anthu a ku Sodomu
Lamentations4:7 Akalonga ake anali owala koposa chisanu chowundana ndi oyera kuposa mkaka. Matupi awo anali ofiira kuposa miyala ya rubi
Lamentations4:8 Koma tsopano maonekedwe awo ndi akuda kuposa mwaye; palibe angawazindikire mʼmisewu ya mu mzinda. Khungu lawo lachita makwinyamakwinya pa mafupa awo; lawuma gwaa ngati nkhuni.
Lamentations4:9 Amene anaphedwa ndi lupanga aliko bwino kuposa amene anafa ndi njala; chifukwa chosowa chakudya cha mʼmunda iwowa ankafowoka ndi njala mpaka kufa.
Lamentations4:10 Amayi achifundo afika pophika ana awo enieni
Lamentations4:11 Yehova wakwaniritsa ukali wake; wagwetsa pansi mkwiyo wake woopsa. Ndipo wayatsa moto mʼZiyoni kuti uwononge maziko ake.
Lamentations4:12 Mafumu a pa dziko lapansi sanakhulupirire
Lamentations4:13 Koma izi zinachitika chifukwa cha kuchimwa kwa aneneri ake ndi mphulupulu za ansembe ake
Lamentations4:14 Tsopano akungoyendayenda mʼmisewu ya mu mzinda ngati anthu osaona. Iwo ndi odetsedwa kwambiri ndi magazi palibe yemwe angayerekeze nʼkukhudza komwe chovala chawo.
Lamentations4:15 Anthu akuwafuwulira kuti
Lamentations4:16 Yehova mwini wake wawabalalitsa; Iye sakuwalabadiranso. Ansembe sakulandira ulemu
Lamentations4:17 Ndiponso maso athu atopa nʼkuyangʼana
Lamentations4:18 Anthu ankalondola mapazi athu
Lamentations4:19 Otilondola akuthamanga kwambiri kuposa ziwombankhanga mu mlengalenga; anatithamangitsa mpaka ku mapiri ndi kutibisalira mʼchipululu.
Lamentations4:20 Wodzozedwa wa Yehova
Lamentations4:21 Kondwera ndi kusangalala
Lamentations4:22 Iwe mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni
Lamentations5:1 Inu Yehova
Lamentations5:2 Apereka cholowa chathu kwa obwera
Lamentations5:3 Takhala amasiye ndi wopanda abambo
Lamentations5:4 Tiyenera kugula madzi amene timamwa
Lamentations5:5 Otilondola atigwira pakhosi; tafowoka ndipo sakutilola kupumula.
Lamentations5:6 Tinadzipereka kwa Aigupto ndi kwa Asiriya kuti tipeze chakudya.
Lamentations5:7 Makolo athu anachimwa ndipo anafa kale
Lamentations5:8 Akapolo akutilamulira
Lamentations5:9 Timapeza chakudya chathu poyika miyoyo yathu pa chiswe chifukwa cha lupanga mʼchipululu.
Lamentations5:10 Khungu lathu latentha ngati uvuni mʼngʼanjo
Lamentations5:11 Amayi agwiriridwa mu Ziyoni
Lamentations5:12 Akalonga athu akuwapachika pomangirira manja awo
Lamentations5:13 Achinyamata akukakamizidwa kupera tirigu; anyamata akudzandira ndi mitolo ya nkhuni.
Lamentations5:14 Akuluakulu anachokapo pa chipata cha mzinda; achinyamata aleka nyimbo zawo.
Lamentations5:15 Chimwemwe chachoka mʼmitima yathu; kuvina kwathu kwasanduka maliro.
Lamentations5:16 Chipewa chathu chaufumu chagwa pamutu pathu. Tsoka kwa ife
Lamentations5:17 Mitima yathu yakomoka chifukwa cha zimenezi
Lamentations5:18 pakuti phiri la Ziyoni
Lamentations5:19 Inu Yehova
Lamentations5:20 Chifukwa chiyani mumatiyiwala nthawi zonse? Chifukwa chiyani mwatitaya nthawi yayitali chotere?
Lamentations5:21 Yehova mutitembenuzire kwa Inu
Lamentations5:22 pokhapokha ngati mwatitaya kotheratu
Ezekiel1:1 Tsiku lachisanu la mwezi wachinayi
Ezekiel1:2 Pa tsiku lachisanu la mwezi
Ezekiel1:3 Yehova anayankhula ndi wansembe Ezekieli
Ezekiel1:4 Ndinayangʼana ndipo ndinangoona mphepo yamkuntho ikubwera kuchokera kumpoto. Panali mtambo waukulu wozunguliridwa ndi kuwala ndipo moto unali lawilawi kuchokera mu mtambowo. Pakati pa motowo pankaoneka ngati mkuwa wonyezimira.
Ezekiel1:5 Mʼkatikati mwa motowo munali zinthu zinayi zamaonekedwe a nyama. Thupi lawo limaoneka ngati la munthu
Ezekiel1:6 koma chilichonse chinali ndi nkhope zinayi ndiponso mapiko anayi.
Ezekiel1:7 Miyendo yake inali yowongoka; mapazi ake anali a ziboda ngati phazi la mwana wangʼombe. Ndipo zibodazo zinkawala ngati mkuwa wonyezimira.
Ezekiel1:8 Mʼmunsi mwa mapiko awo kumbali zonse zinayi
Ezekiel1:9 ndipo mapiko awowo anakhudzana. Chilichonse chimapita molunjika kutsogolo; sizimatembenuka pamene zimayenda.
Ezekiel1:10 Nkhope zawo zimaoneka motere: Chilichonse chinali ndi nkhope ya munthu
Ezekiel1:11 Ndi mʼmene zinalili nkhope zawo. Mapiko awo anali otambasukira mmwamba. Chamoyo chilichonse chinali ndi mapiko awiri okhudzana ndi mapiko a chinzake. Chinalinso ndi mapiko ena awiri ophimbira thupi lake.
Ezekiel1:12 Zamoyozo zinkayenda molunjika kutsogolo. Kulikonse kumene mzimu umazitsogolera kupita
Ezekiel1:13 Pakati pa zamayozo panali chinthu chooneka ngati makala oyaka kapena miyuni yoyaka. Moto umayendayenda pakati pa zamayozo; wowala kwambiri
Ezekiel1:14 Zamoyozo zinkathamanga uku ndi uko ngati kungʼanima kwa mphenzi.
Ezekiel1:15 Pamene ndinali kuyangʼana zamoyozo
Ezekiel1:16 Maonekedwe a mikomberoyo anali ngati mwala wonyezimira. Mikombero yonse inali yofanana ndipo mapangidwe awo anali ngati wongolowanalowana.
Ezekiel1:17 Mikombero ija poyenda inkatha kupita mbali iliyonse yomwe zamoyozo zinayangʼana popanda kutembenuka.
Ezekiel1:18 Marimu a mikomberoyo anali aatali ndi ochititsa mantha ndipo marimu onse anayi anali ndi maso ponseponse.
Ezekiel1:19 Zamoyozo zinkati zikamayenda
Ezekiel1:20 Kulikonse kumene mzimu wake unkazitsogolera
Ezekiel1:21 Zamoyo zija zinkati zikamayenda mikombero imayendanso. Zamoyozo zimati zikayima
Ezekiel1:22 Pamwamba pa mitu ya zamoyozo panali chinthu chonga thambo
Ezekiel1:23 Zamoyozo zinatambalitsa mapiko ake mʼmunsi mwa thambo lija
Ezekiel1:24 Pamene zamoyo zimayenda ndimamva phokoso la mapiko ake
Ezekiel1:25 Ndipo panamveka mawu kuchokera pamwamba pa thambo la pa mitu ya zamoyo zija. Nthawi iyi nʼkuti zamoyozo zitayima ndi kugwetsa pansi mapiko ake.
Ezekiel1:26 Pamwamba pa thambo la pa mitu yake panali chinthu chimene chimaoneka ngati mpando waufumu wopangidwa ndi mwala wa safiro
Ezekiel1:27 Ndinaona kuti mmwamba mwa chiwuno chake munali ngati chitsulo chowala konsekonse ngati moto. Mʼmunsi mwa chiwuno chake munalinso ngati moto wokhawokha. Kuwala kwa mphamvu kunamuzungulira munthuyo.
Ezekiel1:28 Kuwalako kunali ndi maonekedwe a utawaleza mʼmitambo tsiku limene kwagwa mvula. Umu ndi mmene ulemerero wa Yehova umaonekera. Pamene ndinawuona ndinagwa pansi ndipo ndinamva mawu akundiyankhula.
Ezekiel2:1 Iye anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel2:2 Pamene ankayankhula nane
Ezekiel2:3 Iye anati
Ezekiel2:4 Ndikukutuma kwa anthu okanika ndiponso nkhutukumve. Ndikukutuma kuti akawawuze zimene Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikunena.
Ezekiel2:5 Kaya akamva kaya sakamvera
Ezekiel2:6 Tsono iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel2:7 Ukawawuze ndithu mawu anga
Ezekiel2:8 Koma iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel2:9 Nditayangʼana ndinangoona dzanja litaloza ine
Ezekiel2:10 Anawufunyulura pamaso panga. Mpukutu wonse unali wolembedwa kuseri nʼkuseri. Ndipo mawu amene analembedwa mʼmenemo anali a madandawulo
Ezekiel3:1 Tsono Mulungu anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel3:2 Choncho ndinayasama ndipo anandipatsa mpukutuwo kuti ndidye.
Ezekiel3:3 Kenaka Iye anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel3:4 Pamenepo Iye anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel3:5 Sindikukutuma kwa anthu oyankhula chiyankhulo chachilendo ndi chovuta
Ezekiel3:6 Sindikukutuma kwa mitundu yambiri ya anthu oyankhula chiyankhulo chachilendo ndi chovuta
Ezekiel3:7 Koma Aisraeli sadzakumvera chifukwa iwo sakufuna kumvera Ine. Paja Aisraeli onse ndi okanika ndiponso a mtima wowuma.
Ezekiel3:8 Tsono ine ndakhwimitsa nkhope yako mofanana ndi nkhope zawo. Ndalimbitsanso mutu wako mofanana ndi mitu yawo.
Ezekiel3:9 Ine ndidzakusandutsa wolimba ngati mwala wa dayimondi umene uposa thanthwe lina lililonse kulimba kwake. Usachite nawo mantha kapena kuopsedwa nawo. Paja anthuwa ndi awupandu.”
Ezekiel3:10 Anatinso
Ezekiel3:11 Tsopano upite kwa Aisraeli anzako amene ali ku ukapolo ndipo ukayankhule nawo. ‘Kaya akamvera kaya sakamvera
Ezekiel3:12 Pamenepo Mzimu unandinyamula ndipo kumbuyo kwanga ndinamva liwu lamphamvu ngati chivomerezi chachikulu
Ezekiel3:13 Phokoso ndinkalimvalo linali la kugundana kwa mapiko a zamoyo ndiponso phokoso la mikombero ya pambali pake ija
Ezekiel3:14 Mzimu wa Yehova unandikweza ndi kundinyamula ndipo ndinachokapo ndili wowawidwa ndi wonyuka mu mtima. Ndipo dzanja la Yehova linali pa ine mwa mphamvu.
Ezekiel3:15 Choncho ndinafika kwa amene anali mu ukapolo ku Telabibu pafupi ndi mtsinje wa Kebara. Ndinakhala pansi pakati pawo masiku asanu ndi awiri
Ezekiel3:16 Atatha masiku asanu ndi awiriwo
Ezekiel3:17 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel3:18 Ndikawuza munthu woyipa kuti
Ezekiel3:19 Koma ukamuchenjeza munthu woyipa koma iye osatembenuka mtima kuleka zoyipa zake kapena kusiya njira zake zoyipa
Ezekiel3:20 “Ngati munthu wolungama asiya chilungamo chake ndi kuchita uchimo ndipo Ine nʼkumuyika mʼzoopsa
Ezekiel3:21 Koma ngati umuchenjeza munthu wolungama kuti asachimwe ndipo iye nʼkuleka kuchimwa adzakhala ndi moyo ndithu chifukwa anamvera chenjezo
Ezekiel3:22 Nthawi ina dzanja la Yehova linali pa ine ndipo anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel3:23 Choncho ndinanyamuka kupita ku chigwa. Ndipo ndinaona ulemerero wa Yehova kumeneko
Ezekiel3:24 Koma Mzimu wa Mulungu unalowa mwa ine ndipo unandiyimiritsa. Tsono Yehova anandiyankhula nati: “Pita
Ezekiel3:25 Ndipo iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel3:26 Ndidzamatirira lilime lako kukhosi
Ezekiel3:27 Koma pamene ndidzayankhula kwa iwe
Ezekiel4:1 Mulungu anati
Ezekiel4:2 Ndipo uwuzinge mzindawo motere: uwumangire nsanja zowuzinga
Ezekiel4:3 Kenaka utenge chiwaya chachitsulo uchiyike ngati khoma lachitsulo pakati pa iwe ndi mzindawo. Uyangʼanitsitse mzindawo ndipo udzakhala wozingidwa ndi nsanja za nkhondo. Choncho umangire nsanja zankhondo. Chimenechi chidzakhala chizindikiro kwa Aisraeli.
Ezekiel4:4 “Tsono iwe ugonere kumanzere kwako ndipo ndidzayika pa iwe tchimo la Aisraeli. Iwe udzasenza tchimolo masiku onse amene udzagonere mbali imeneyo.
Ezekiel4:5 Ine ndakuyikira masiku okwana 390 malingana ndi zaka za machimo awo. Umu ndi mmene udzasenzere machimo a Aisraeli.
Ezekiel4:6 “Utatha zimenezo udzagonerenso mbali ya kudzanja lamanja
Ezekiel4:7 Tsono udzayangʼanitsitse nsanja za nkhondo zozinga. Dzanja la mkanjo wako utalikwinya ndi dzanja lako utakweza
Ezekiel4:8 Ine ndidzakumanga ndi zingwe kotero kuti sudzatha kutembenukira uku ndi uku mpaka utatsiriza masiku akuzingidwa ako.
Ezekiel4:9 “Tsono tenga tirigu ndi barele
Ezekiel4:10 Uyeze theka la kilogalamu la chakudyacho kuti uzidya tsiku lililonse kamodzi kokha.
Ezekiel4:11 Uyezenso zikho ziwiri zamadzi ndipo uzimwa tsiku ndi tsiku.
Ezekiel4:12 Uzidya chakudya chako ngati momwe amadyera keke ya barele. Uzidzaphika chakudyacho anthu akuona pogwiritsa ntchito ndowe ya munthu ngati nkhuni.”
Ezekiel4:13 Yehova anati
Ezekiel4:14 Koma ine ndinati
Ezekiel4:15 Iye anati
Ezekiel4:16 Pambuyo pake anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel4:17 Ndidzachita zimenezi kuti adzasowe chakudya ndi madzi. Choncho adzachita nkhawa akumapenyana ndipo adzatheratu ndi kuwonda chifukwa cha machimo awo.”
Ezekiel5:1 Tsiku lina Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel5:2 Kuzinga mzinda kuja kukatha
Ezekiel5:3 Koma utengeko tsitsi pangʼono
Ezekiel5:4 Pa tsitsi limeneli utapepo lina
Ezekiel5:5 Ambuye Yehova akunena kuti
Ezekiel5:6 Koma anthu a Yerusalemu aphwanya malamulo anga pochita zoyipa kuposa anthu a mitundu ina. Iwo anandipandukira kupambana anthu ena amene awazungulira. Iwo anakana malamulo anga ndipo sanasunge malangizo anga.
Ezekiel5:7 “Nʼchifukwa chake Ambuye Yehova akuti: Popeza mwakhala osamvera kupambana anthu a mitundu ina amene akuzungulirani
Ezekiel5:8 “Tsono Ambuye Yehova akuti: Ine mwini ndikutsutsana nawe
Ezekiel5:9 Chifukwa cha ntchito zanu zonyansa ndidzakulangani ndi chilango chimene sindinakulangeni nacho nʼkale lomwe ndipo sindidzakulangani ndi chofanana nacho mʼtsogolomo.
Ezekiel5:10 Tsono pakati panu makolo adzadya ana awo
Ezekiel5:11 Ndithu
Ezekiel5:12 Chimodzi mwa zigawo zitatu za anthu ako chidzafa ndi mliri
Ezekiel5:13 “Ndi mmene udzachitire mkwiyo wanga. Ndikadzatsiriza kuwalanga
Ezekiel5:14 “Ndidzakusandutsa iwe bwinja ndi chinthu chonyozeka pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina amene akuzungulira
Ezekiel5:15 Udzakhala chinthu chonyozeka ndi chonyogodoledwa. Udzakhala chenjezo ndi chinthu choopsa kwa anthu a mitundu ina amene akuzungulira ndikadzakulanga mokwiya ndi mwaukali ndi kugamula mlandu wako mokwiya. Ine Yehova ndayankhula.
Ezekiel5:16 Pamene ndidzakulasa ndi njala yolasa ngati mivi yoopsa ndi yosakaza ndidzatero nʼcholinga choti ndikuwonongeni. Ndidzagwetsa njalayo pa iwe mowirikiza pochepetsa chakudya chako cha tsiku ndi tsiku.
Ezekiel5:17 Ndidzatumiza njala ndi zirombo za kuthengo
Ezekiel6:1 Yehova anandipatsa uthenga uwu kuti
Ezekiel6:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel6:3 kuti
Ezekiel6:4 Maguwa anu ansembe adzagumulidwa ndipo maguwa anu ofukizira lubani adzaphwanyidwa; ndipo ndidzapha anthu anu pamaso pa mafano anu.
Ezekiel6:5 Ine ndidzagoneka mitembo ya Aisraeli pamaso pa mafano awo
Ezekiel6:6 Konse kumene mumakhala
Ezekiel6:7 Anthu anu adzaphedwa pakati panu
Ezekiel6:8 “Komabe ndidzasiya ena pangʼono opulumuka ku nkhondo. Iwowa ndidzawamwazira ku mayiko ena pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina.
Ezekiel6:9 Pamenepo opulumuka mwa inu adzandikumbukira ku mayiko kumene anatengedwa ukapolo. Ndidzawamvetsa chisoni chifukwa cha kusakhulupirika kwawo ndi kundipandukira kuja ndiponso chifukwa kuti anayika mtima wawo pa mafano. Choncho adzachita okha manyazi chifukwa cha zoyipa zimene ankachita ndi miyambo yonyansa imene ankatsata.
Ezekiel6:10 Ndipo iwo adzadziwa kuti ndine Yehova ndi kuti sindinkawaopseza chabe pamene ndinanena kuti ndidzawawononga.
Ezekiel6:11 “Ambuye Yehova akuti: Womba mʼmanja mwako ndipo uponde mapazi ako pansi mwamphamvu ndipo ufuwule kuti
Ezekiel6:12 Amene ali kutali adzafa ndi mliri
Ezekiel6:13 Ndipo iwo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova
Ezekiel6:14 Choncho ndidzawalanga ndi mkono wanga ndi kusandutsa dziko kukhala bwinja. Dziko lonse kumene akukhala kuyambira ku chipululu mpaka ku mzinda wa Ribula ndidzalisandutsa bwinja. Pamenepo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova.”
Ezekiel7:1 Yehova anandipatsa uthenga uwu kuti
Ezekiel7:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel7:3 Chimaliziro chili pa iwe tsopano. Mkwiyo wanga ndidzawuthira pa iwe. Ndidzakuweruza molingana ndi machitidwe ako ndi kukulanga chifukwa cha zonyansa zako.
Ezekiel7:4 Ine sindidzakumvera chisoni kapena kukuleka. Ndidzakulanga ndithu chifukwa cha ntchito zako zoyipa komanso chifukwa cha miyambo yako yonyansa imene ili pakati pako. Pamenepo udzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova.”
Ezekiel7:5 “Zimene ndikunena Ine Ambuye Yehova ndi izi: “Chiwonongeko! Chiwonongeko chimene sichinamvekepo! Taona chikubwera!
Ezekiel7:6 Chimaliziro chafika! Chimaliziro chafika! Chiwonongeko chakugwera. Taona chafika!
Ezekiel7:7 Inu anthu okhala mʼdziko
Ezekiel7:8 Ine ndili pafupi kukukwiyirani
Ezekiel7:9 Ine sindidzakumvera chisoni kapena kukuleka. Ndidzakulanga malingana ndi ntchito zako ndiponso chifukwa cha miyambo yako yonyansa pakati pako. ‘Pamenepo udzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova ndine amene ndimakantha.’
Ezekiel7:10 “Taona
Ezekiel7:11 Chiwawa chasanduka ndodo yowakwapulira chifukwa cha kuyipa kwawo. Palibe mwa anthu amenewo amene adzatsale. Palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe mwa unyinji wawo. Palibiretu ndipo sipadzapezeka munthu wowalira maliro.
Ezekiel7:12 Nthawi yafika! Tsiku layandikira! Munthu wogula asakondwere ndipo wogulitsa asamve chisoni
Ezekiel7:13 Wogulitsa sadzazipezanso zinthu zimene anagulitsa kwa wina chinkana onse awiri akanali ndi moyo
Ezekiel7:14 “Lipenga lalira
Ezekiel7:15 Ku bwalo kuli kumenyana ndipo mʼkati muli mliri ndi njala. Anthu okhala ku midzi adzafa ndi nkhondo. Iwo okhala ku mizinda adzafa ndi mliri ndi njala.
Ezekiel7:16 Onse amene adzapulumuka ndi kumakakhala ku mapiri
Ezekiel7:17 Dzanja lililonse lidzalefuka
Ezekiel7:18 Iwo adzavala ziguduli ndipo adzagwidwa ndi mantha. Adzakhala ndi nkhope zamanyazi ndipo mitu yawo adzameta mpala.
Ezekiel7:19 “Iwo adzataya siliva wawo mʼmisewu ndipo golide wawo adzakhala chinthu chonyansa. Siliva ndi golide wawo sizidzatha kuwapulumutsa pa tsiku la ukali wa Yehova. Chuma chawochi sichidzawathandiza kuthetsa njala
Ezekiel7:20 Iwo ankanyadira zodzikongoletsera zawo zamakaka ndipo ankazigwiritsa ntchito kupanga mafano awo onyansa ndi zonyansa zawo zina. Nʼchifukwa chake Ine ndidzazisandutsa kukhala zowanyansa.
Ezekiel7:21 Ndidzazipereka kwa alendo kuti azifunkhe. Anthu oyipa a dziko lapansi adzazilanda ndi kudziyipitsa.
Ezekiel7:22 Ine ndidzawalekerera anthuwo ndipo adzayipitsa malo anga apamtima. Adzalowamo ngati mbala ndi kuyipitsamo.
Ezekiel7:23 “Konzani maunyolo
Ezekiel7:24 Ndidzabweretsa mitundu ya anthu oyipitsitsa kuti idzalande nyumba zawo. Ndidzathetsa kunyada kwa anthu amphamvu pamene anthu akunja adzalowa mʼmalo awo achipembedzo ndi kuyipitsamo.
Ezekiel7:25 Nkhawa ikadzawafikira adzafunafuna mtendere koma osawupeza.
Ezekiel7:26 Tsoka lidzatsatana ndi tsoka linzake
Ezekiel7:27 Mfumu idzalira
Ezekiel8:1 Tsiku lachisanu la mwezi wachisanu ndi chimodzi
Ezekiel8:2 Nditayangʼana ndinangoona chinthu chooneka ngati munthu. Kuchokera pamene pamaoneka ngati chiwuno chake kumatsika mʼmunsi anali ngati moto
Ezekiel8:3 Iye anatambasula chinthu chooneka ngati dzanja ndipo anagwira tsitsi la pamutu panga. Nthawi yomweyo Mzimu unandikweza mlengalenga. Tsono ndikumachita ngati ndikuona Mulungu kutulo
Ezekiel8:4 Kumeneko ndinaona ulemerero wa Mulungu wa Israeli ngati momwe ndinaonera mʼmasomphenya mʼchigwa muja.
Ezekiel8:5 Tsono Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel8:6 Ndipo Yehova anandifunsa kuti
Ezekiel8:7 Kenaka Iye anandipititsa ku khomo lolowera ku bwalo la Nyumba ya Mulungu. Nditayangʼanitsitsa ndinangoona dzenje pa khomapo.
Ezekiel8:8 Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel8:9 Ndipo Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel8:10 Motero Ine ndinalowa ndi kuyangʼana
Ezekiel8:11 Patsogolo pa zimenezi panayima akuluakulu makumi asanu ndi awiri a Aisraeli
Ezekiel8:12 Tsono Yehova anandifunsa kuti
Ezekiel8:13 Iye anandiwuzanso kuti
Ezekiel8:14 Kenaka anapita nane pa khomo la ku khomo la chipata cha Nyumba ya Mulungu choyangʼana kumpoto
Ezekiel8:15 Yehova anandifunsa kuti
Ezekiel8:16 Kenaka Iye anapita nane mʼkati mwa bwalo la Nyumba ya Yehova. Kumeneko ku khomo lolowera ku Nyumba ya Yehova pakati pa khonde ndi guwa lansembe
Ezekiel8:17 Yehova anandifunsa kuti
Ezekiel8:18 Choncho Ine ndidzawalanga ndili wokwiya. Sindidzawamvera chisoni kapena kuwaleka. Ngakhale atandifuwulira mʼmakutu mwanga sindidzawamvera.”
Ezekiel9:1 Pambuyo pake Yehova anandiyankhula mofuwula kuti
Ezekiel9:2 Ndipo ndinaona anthu asanu ndi mmodzi akubwera kuchokera ku chipata chakumtunda chimene chimaloza kumpoto
Ezekiel9:3 Tsono ulemerero wa Mulungu wa Israeli unakwera kuchokera pamwamba pa akerubi
Ezekiel9:4 ndipo anamuwuza kuti
Ezekiel9:5 Kenaka ndinamva Yehova akuwuza anthu ena aja kuti
Ezekiel9:6 Mukaphe kotheratu anthu okalamba
Ezekiel9:7 Ndipo Yehova anawawuza kuti
Ezekiel9:8 Pamene iwo ankapha anthu
Ezekiel9:9 Iye anandiyankha kuti
Ezekiel9:10 Choncho sindidzawamvera chisoni kapena kuwaleka
Ezekiel9:11 Ndipo munthu wovala chovala chabafuta uja atatenga zolembera pambali pake anadzafotokozera Yehova kuti
Ezekiel10:1 Ine nditayangʼana ku thambo limene lili pamwamba pa mitu ya akerubi ndinangoona chinthu chooneka ngati mpando waufumu wa mwala wa safiro.
Ezekiel10:2 Tsono Yehova anawuza munthu wovala chovala chabafuta uja kuti
Ezekiel10:3 Apa akerubiwo anali atayima mbali ya kummwera kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu pamene munthuyo ankalowa. Tsono mtambo unadzaza bwalo lamʼkati.
Ezekiel10:4 Ndipo ulemerero wa Yehova unachoka pamwamba pa akerubi ndipo unafika ku chiwundo cha Nyumba ya Mulungu. Mtambo unadzaza Nyumba ya Mulungu
Ezekiel10:5 Phokoso la mapiko a akerubi limamveka mpaka ku bwalo lakunja
Ezekiel10:6 Kenaka Yehova analamula munthu wovala chovala chabafuta uja kuti
Ezekiel10:7 Ndipo mmodzi wa akerubi anatambalitsa dzanja lake mpaka pa moto umene unali pakati pawo. Iye anapalako motowo ndipo anapatsa munthu wovala chovala chabafuta uja. Tsono iye anawulandira natuluka.
Ezekiel10:8 Ndiye kuti kunsi kwa mapiko akerubi kumaoneka zinthu zooneka ngati manja a munthu.
Ezekiel10:9 Ine nditayangʼanitsitsa ndinaona mikombero inayi pambali pa akerubi. Pambali pa kerubi aliyense panali mkombero umodzi; mikomberoyo inkanyezimira ngati miyala yokongola ya krizoliti.
Ezekiel10:10 Maonekedwe a mikombero inayi ija anali ofanana. Mkombero uliwonse umaoneka ngati mkombero wolowana ndi unzake.
Ezekiel10:11 Poyenda akerubiwo
Ezekiel10:12 Matupi awo onse
Ezekiel10:13 Ine ndinamva mikombero ikutchedwa kuti
Ezekiel10:14 Kerubi aliyense anali ndi nkhope zinayi. Nkhope yoyamba inali ya Kerubi
Ezekiel10:15 Tsono akerubi aja anawuluka. Izi zinali zamoyo zija zimene ndinaziona ku mtsinje wa Kebara.
Ezekiel10:16 Pamene akerubi ankayenda
Ezekiel10:17 Akerubiwo ankati akayima
Ezekiel10:18 Pamenepo ulemerero wa Yehova unachoka pa chiwundo cha Nyumba ya Mulungu ndi kukakhala pamwamba pa akerubi.
Ezekiel10:19 Ine ndikuona akerubi
Ezekiel10:20 Izi ndizo zamoyo ndinaziona pansi pa Mulungu wa Israeli ku mtsinje wa Kebara
Ezekiel10:21 Kerubi aliyense anali ndi nkhope zinayi ndi mapiko anayi
Ezekiel10:22 Nkhope zawo zinali zofanana ndi zomwe ndinaziona ku mtsinje wa Kebara. Kerubi aliyense amayenda molunjika.
Ezekiel11:1 Pamenepo Mzimu wa Mulungu unandinyamula ndi kubwera nane ku chipata cha kummawa cha Nyumba ya Yehova. Kumeneko pa khomo la chipata panali anthu 25
Ezekiel11:2 Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel11:3 Iwo amawuza anthu kuti
Ezekiel11:4 Choncho iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel11:5 Ndipo Mzimu wa Yehova unandigwera ndipo unandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel11:6 Mwapha anthu ambiri mu mzinda muno ndipo mwadzaza misewu yake ndi mitembo.
Ezekiel11:7 “Nʼchifukwa chake Ambuye Yehova akuti
Ezekiel11:8 Inu mumaopa lupanga
Ezekiel11:9 Ine ndidzakuthamangitsani mu mzinda ndipo ndidzakuperekani mʼdzanja la alendo kuti akulangeni.
Ezekiel11:10 Mudzaphedwa ndi lupanga ndipo ndidzakulangani mpaka kumalire a Israeli. Pamenepo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova.
Ezekiel11:11 Mzinda uno sudzakhala ngati mʼphika wokutetezani ndipo simudzakhalanso ngati nyama ya mʼmenemo. Ndidzakulangani mpaka kumalire a Israeli.
Ezekiel11:12 Ndipo inu mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova. Inu simunatsatire malangizo anga kapena kusunga malamulo anga koma mwakhala mukutsata zochita za mitundu ina ya anthu imene yakuzungulirani.’ ”
Ezekiel11:13 Tsono pamene ndinkanenera
Ezekiel11:14 Yehova anayankhula nane kuti
Ezekiel11:15 “Anthu okhala ku Yerusalemu akuwanena abale ako
Ezekiel11:16 “Nʼchifukwa chake nena kwa anzako a ku ukapolo kuti
Ezekiel11:17 “Nʼchifukwa chake uwawuze zimene Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikunena kuti
Ezekiel11:18 “Akadzalowa mʼdzikomo adzachotsa mafano awo onse oyipa ndi onyansa.
Ezekiel11:19 Ndidzawapatsa mtima watsopano ndipo ndidzayika mzimu watsopano mwa iwo. Ndidzachotsa mtima wowuma ngati mwala mwa iwo
Ezekiel11:20 Motero adzatsata malamulo anga ndipo adzasunga mosamala malamulo anga. Adzakhala anthu anga
Ezekiel11:21 Koma kunena za amene akupembedza mafano oyipa ndi onyansa
Ezekiel11:22 Tsono akerubi aja anatambasula mapiko awo kuyamba kuwuluka
Ezekiel11:23 Ulemerero wa Yehova unakwera ndi kusiya mzindawo ndipo unakayima pa phiri cha kummawa kwake kwa mzindawo.
Ezekiel11:24 Pambuyo pake Mzimu wa Mulungu unandinyamula ndi kukandifikitsa. Zimenezi zinkachitika mʼmasomphenya monga mmene Mzimu wa Mulungu unkandionetsera. Kenaka masomphenya amene ndinkawaonawo anayamba kuzimirira.
Ezekiel11:25 Ndipo ndinafotokozera akapolowo zonse zimene Yehova anandionetsa.
Ezekiel12:1 Yehova anayankhula nane kuti
Ezekiel12:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel12:3 “Choncho
Ezekiel12:4 Utulutse katundu wako wopita naye ku ukapolo nthawi ya masana iwo akuona. Ndipo nthawi ya madzulo
Ezekiel12:5 Iwo akuona
Ezekiel12:6 Usenze katundu wako pa phewa iwo akuona
Ezekiel12:7 Choncho ine ndinachita monga momwe anandilamulira. Nthawi yamasana ndinatulutsa zinthu zanga nditazimanga ngati ndikupita ku ukapolo. Ndipo nthawi yamadzulo ndinabowola khoma ndi manja anga. Pamene chisisira chinkayamba
Ezekiel12:8 Mmawa mwake Yehova anandiyankhula nati:
Ezekiel12:9 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel12:10 “Uwawuze kuti
Ezekiel12:11 Uwawuze kuti
Ezekiel12:12 “Kalonga wawo adzatenga katundu wake nʼchisisira nʼkunyamuka. Adzatulukira pa bowo limene anthu anabowola pa khoma. Adzaphimba nkhope yake kuti asaone kumene akupita.
Ezekiel12:13 Ndidzayala ukonde wanga pa iye ndi kumukola mu msampha wanga. Ndidzabwera naye ku Babuloni
Ezekiel12:14 Ine ndidzabalalitsa kumbali zonse zinayi onse okhala naye pafupi
Ezekiel12:15 “Iwo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova
Ezekiel12:16 Koma ndidzasiyako ena pangʼono amene adzapulumuke ku lupanga
Ezekiel12:17 Pambuyo pake Yehova anandiyankhulanso nati
Ezekiel12:18 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel12:19 Uwawuze anthu a mʼdzikomo kuti izi ndi zimene Ambuye Wamphamvuzonse akunena za anthu okhala mu Yerusalemu ndi dziko la Israeli: Iwo adzadya chakudya chawo ndi mantha ndi kumwa madzi awo ndi nkhawa. Zonse za mʼdziko lawo zidzalandidwa chifukwa cha ziwawa za anthu onse okhala mʼmenemo.
Ezekiel12:20 Mizinda imene ili ndi anthu idzasakazika ndipo dziko lidzasanduka chipululu. Pamenepo inu mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova.”
Ezekiel12:21 Yehova anayankhulanso nane kuti
Ezekiel12:22 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel12:23 Choncho uwawuze anthuwo kuti
Ezekiel12:24 Pakuti masiku amenewo sikudzakhalanso masomphenya abodza kapena kuwombeza kwa chinyengo pakati pa anthu a Israeli.
Ezekiel12:25 Koma Ine Ambuye ndidzayankhula chimene ndikufuna
Ezekiel12:26 Yehova anandiyankhula nati:
Ezekiel12:27 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel12:28 “Choncho uwawuze kuti
Ezekiel13:1 Yehova anayankhulanso nane kuti
Ezekiel13:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu unenere modzudzula aneneri a Israeli amene akunenera za kukhosi kwawo. Uwawuze iwowa kuti
Ezekiel13:3 Ambuye Yehova akuti
Ezekiel13:4 Iwe Israeli
Ezekiel13:5 Simunakwere khoma kuti mukakonze mʼmene munagumuka
Ezekiel13:6 Masomphenya awo ndi achabe ndipo kuwombeza kwawo ndi kwabodza. Iwo amati
Ezekiel13:7 Koma Ine ndikuti masomphenya anu ngachabechabe ndi zimene mwawombedzazo nʼzabodza. Mumanena kuti
Ezekiel13:8 “Tsono Ine Ambuye Wamphamvuzonse ndikukutsutsani chifukwa cha zoyankhula zanu zonama ndi masomphenya anu abodzawo. Ndikutero Ine Yehova.
Ezekiel13:9 Ndidzalanga aneneri amene amanenera zabodza za zinthu zimene amati anaziona mʼmasomphenya. Sadzakhala nawo mʼbwalo la anthu anga ndipo mayina awo sadzalembedwa mu kawundula wa nzika za Israeli. Sadzalowa nawo mʼdziko la Israeli. Pamenepo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Ambuye Yehova.
Ezekiel13:10 “Popeza kuti aneneri asocheretsa anthu anga pomanena kuti
Ezekiel13:11 choncho ufotokozere amene alipaka njerezawo kuti khomalo lidzagwa. Mvula idzagwa mwamphamvu
Ezekiel13:12 Pamene khomalo lagwa
Ezekiel13:13 “Nʼchifukwa chake Ambuye Yehova akuti: Mwa ukali ndidzakunthitsa mphepo ya mkuntho. Ndidzagwetsa matalala akuluakulu ndili ndi ukali ndipo ndidzavumbwitsa mvula yamphamvu ndi mkwiyo mpaka khomalo litawonongeka kotheratu.
Ezekiel13:14 Ndidzagwetsa khoma limene munalipaka njerezalo. Ndidzaligumuliratu mpaka pansi kotero kuti maziko ake adzaoneka. Khomalo likadzagwa
Ezekiel13:15 Kotero ndidzagwiritsa ntchito mkwiyo wanga pa khomali ndi pa amene analipaka njereza. Pambuyo pake ndidzakuwuzani kuti
Ezekiel13:16 Agwanso aneneri a Yerusalemu amene ankalosa za Yerusalemu nʼkumati anaona mʼmasomphenya za mtendere wa Yerusalemu pamene mtendere kunalibe konse
Ezekiel13:17 “Tsono iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel13:18 Uwawuze kuti
Ezekiel13:19 Ponamiza anthu anga amene amamva za mabodza anu
Ezekiel13:20 “ ‘Nʼchifukwa chake Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Ine ndikudana ndi zithumwa zanu zimene mumakokera nazo mitima ya anthu ngati mbalame. Ndidzazingʼamba kudzichotsa pa mikono yanu. Choncho ndidzapulumutsa miyoyo ya anthu amene munawakola ngati mbalame.
Ezekiel13:21 Ndidzangʼamba nsalu zanu za matsengazo ndi kupulumutsa anthu anga mʼmanja mwanu
Ezekiel13:22 Popeza kuti munatayitsa mtima anthu olungama ngakhale sindinafune kuti ataye mtima; ndipo munalimbitsa anthu oyipa kuti asaleka machimo awo motero sakutha kupulumutsa moyo wawo
Ezekiel13:23 choncho inu simudzaonanso masomphenya abodza kapena kuwombeza. Ine ndidzapulumutsa anthu anga mʼmanja mwanu. Ndipo pamenepo inu mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova.’ ”
Ezekiel14:1 Tsiku lina ena mwa akuluakulu a Israeli anabwera kwa ine ndipo anakhala pansi pamaso panga.
Ezekiel14:2 Ndipo Yehova anandipatsa uthenga uwu nati
Ezekiel14:3 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel14:4 Tsono yankhula nawo ndi kuwawuza kuti zimene akunena Ambuye Yehova: ‘Ngati Mwisraeli aliyense ayika mtima wake pa mafano ndi kuyika maso ake pa zinthu zoyipa zopunthwitsa
Ezekiel14:5 Ine ndidzachita zimenezi kuti mwina nʼkukopa mitima ya anthu a Israeli
Ezekiel14:6 “Nʼchifukwa chake uwawuze Aisraeli kuti Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Lapani! Siyani mafano anu ndi ntchito zanu zonse zonyansa!
Ezekiel14:7 “ ‘Ngati Mwisraeli wina aliyense kapena mlendo wina aliyense wokhala pakati pa Israeli adzichotsa yekha kwa Ine ndi kuyika mtima pa mafano ake ndi kuyikanso maso ake pa zinthu zopunthwitsa ndipo kenaka nʼkupita kwa mneneri kukafunsa nzeru
Ezekiel14:8 Ine ndidzalimbana naye munthu ameneyo ndipo ndidzamusandutsa chitsanzo ndi chisudzo. Ndidzamuchotsa pakati pa anthu anga. Pamenepo inu mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova.
Ezekiel14:9 “ ‘Ndipo ngati mneneri anyengedwa nanenera
Ezekiel14:10 Iwo adzalangidwa chifukwa cha kulakwa kwawo. Chilango cha wodzafunsira nzeru kwa mneneri chidzafanana ndi chilango cha mneneriyo.
Ezekiel14:11 Ndidzachita zimenezi kuti Aisraeli asasocherenso kundisiya Ine ndi kuti asadziyipitsenso ndi machimo awo. Adzakhala anthu anga
Ezekiel14:12 Yehova anayankhula nane kuti
Ezekiel14:13 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel14:14 Ngakhale anthu atatu awa
Ezekiel14:15 “Kapena ndikanatumiza zirombo mʼdziko monse ndi kulisiya lopanda anthu
Ezekiel14:16 Apanso
Ezekiel14:17 “Kapena ndikanatumiza lupanga mʼdzikolo ndi kunena kuti
Ezekiel14:18 Apanso ndikunenetsa Ine Ambuye Yehova kuti
Ezekiel14:19 “Kapena ndikanatumiza mliri mʼdzikomo ndi kuonetsa ukali wanga pokhetsa magazi
Ezekiel14:20 Apanso ndikunenetsa Ine Ambuye Yehova kuti ngakhale Nowa
Ezekiel14:21 “Pakuti Ambuye Yehova akuti: Kudzakhala zoopsa kwambiri pamene ndidzatumiza pa Yerusalemu zilango zanga zinayi izi: lupanga
Ezekiel14:22 Komabe padzakhala ena opulumuka
Ezekiel14:23 Mitima yanu idzakhala pansi mukadzaona makhalidwe awo ndi zochita zawo. Tsono mudzadziwa kuti Yerusalemu sindinamuchite zimenezi popanda chifukwa
Ezekiel15:1 Yehova anayankhulanso nane kuti
Ezekiel15:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel15:3 Mtengo umene uja nʼkupangira chiyani? Kodi anthu angathe kupangira chikhomo chokolekapo zinthu zawo?
Ezekiel15:4 Taonani
Ezekiel15:5 Ngati pamene unali wosapsa sukanatheka kuwugwiritsa ntchito
Ezekiel15:6 “Nʼchifukwa chake Ambuye Yehova akuti
Ezekiel15:7 Ndidzawalanga pamenepo ngakhale iwo atuluka pa moto
Ezekiel15:8 Ine ndidzasandutsa dziko kukhala chipululu chifukwa anthu akhala osakhulupirika
Ezekiel16:1 Yehova anayankhula nane kuti
Ezekiel16:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel16:3 Umuwuze kuti
Ezekiel16:4 Pa tsiku lomwe unabadwa sanadule mchombo wako. Sanakusambitse mʼmadzi kuti uyere. Sanakuthire mchere kapena kukukulunga mʼnsalu.
Ezekiel16:5 Palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe anakusamala kapena kukumvera chisoni kuti akuchitire zimenezi. Mʼmalo mwake anakutaya panja poyera
Ezekiel16:6 “ ‘Tsono pamene ndinkadutsa
Ezekiel16:7 ndi kuti ukule ngati mbewu ya mʼmunda. Iwe unakula ndipo unatalika ndi kutha msinkhu. Mawere ako anayamba kumera ndi tsitsi lakonso linayamba kutalika. Komabe unali wamaliseche ndi wausiwa.
Ezekiel16:8 “ ‘Tsono pamene ndinkadutsanso ndinaona kuti nthawi yako yomanga banja inakwana. Tsono ndinakufunditsa chovala changa ndi kubisa umaliseche wako. Ndinachita nawe pangano la ukwati ndipo unakhala wanga
Ezekiel16:9 “ ‘Ine ndinakusambitsa mʼmadzi kutsuka magazi ako ndikukudzoza mafuta.
Ezekiel16:10 Ndinakuveka zovala zopetapeta ndi nsapato za chikopa. Ndinakuveka zovala zabafuta ndi kukuveka zovala za bafuta.
Ezekiel16:11 Ndinakukongoletsa ndi zokometsera zamtengowapatali: ndinakuveka zibangiri mʼmanja mwako ndi mkanda mʼkhosi mwako
Ezekiel16:12 ndipo ndinakuveka chipini pa mphuno yako
Ezekiel16:13 Choncho unavala zokongoletsa zagolide ndi siliva. Zovala zako zinali zabafuta
Ezekiel16:14 Ndipo mbiri ya kukongola kwako inawanda pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina
Ezekiel16:15 “ ‘Koma iwe unatama kukongola kwako ndipo unayamba kuchita zadama chifukwa cha kutchuka kwako. Unkachita chigololo ndi kumangodzipereka kwa aliyense wodutsa ndipo kukongola kwako kunakhala kwake.
Ezekiel16:16 Unatenga zovala zako zina nukakongoletsera malo opembedzerako mafano
Ezekiel16:17 Unatenga zokongoletsera zopangidwa ndi golide ndi siliva zimene ndinakupatsa ndipo unadzipangira wekha mafano aamuna amene unkachita nawo za dama.
Ezekiel16:18 Ndipo iwe unatenga zovala zako zopetapeta ndi kuveka mafano. Mafuta anga ndi lubani wanga unapereka kwa mafanowo.
Ezekiel16:19 Chakudya chimene ndinakupatsa
Ezekiel16:20 “ ‘Ndipo unatenga ana ako aamuna ndi ana aakazi amene unandibalira ine
Ezekiel16:21 kuti uziphanso ana anga ndi kuwapereka ngati nsembe kwa mafano akowo?
Ezekiel16:22 Chifukwa cha zadama zako zonyansazi unayiwala masiku a ubwana wako pamene unali wamaliseche
Ezekiel16:23 “ ‘Tsoka! Tsoka kwa iwe
Ezekiel16:24 wadzimangira wekha nsanja ndi guwa pa mabwalo onse.
Ezekiel16:25 Pa msewu uliwonse wamanga nsanjazo. Motero wanyazitsa kukongola kwako podzipereka kwa aliyense amene adutsapo.
Ezekiel16:26 Umachita chigololo ndi Aigupto
Ezekiel16:27 Nʼchifukwa chake ndinatambasula dzanja langa kukukantha ndi kuchepetsa dziko lako. Ndinakupereka kwa adani ako
Ezekiel16:28 Chifukwa cha chilakolako chako unachitanso zadama ndi Aasiriya. Ngakhale unachita nawo chigololo koma sunakhutitsidwebe.
Ezekiel16:29 Choncho unapitirirabe kuchita chigololo ndi Ababuloni
Ezekiel16:30 “ ‘Ambuye Yehova akuti: Mtima wako ndi wofowoka kwambiri chifukwa unachita zonsezo monga ngati mkazi wopanga manyazi.
Ezekiel16:31 Unamanga nsanja pa msewu uliwonse. Unamanganso kachisi pabwalo lililonse. Komabe sunachite ngati mkazi wadama chifukwa unakana malipiro.
Ezekiel16:32 “ ‘Iwe mkazi wachigololo! Umakonda amuna achilendo kupambana mwamuna wakowako!
Ezekiel16:33 Amuna ndiwo amapereka malipiro kwa mkazi wadama. Koma iwe ndi amene ukupereka mphatso kwa zibwenzi zako zonse. Choncho umazinyengerera kuti zizibwera kwa iwe kuchokera mbali zonse kudzagona nawe.
Ezekiel16:34 Chotero iwe ukusiyana ndi akazi ena achigololo
Ezekiel16:35 “ ‘Tsono mkazi wachigololo iwe
Ezekiel16:36 Ambuye Yehova akuti
Ezekiel16:37 nʼchifukwa chake Ine ndidzasonkhanitsa zibwenzi zako zonse
Ezekiel16:38 Ine ndidzakulanga monga mmene amalangira akazi amene amachita chigololo ndiponso opha anthu. Chifukwa cha ukali wanga ndi nsanje yanga
Ezekiel16:39 Ndidzakupereka mʼmanja mwa zibwenzi zako ndi kuwononga nyumba zopembedzera mafano ako. Iwo adzakuvula zovala zako ndi kutenga zodzikometsera zako zabwino. Choncho adzakusiya wa maliseche ndi wausiwa.
Ezekiel16:40 Iwo adzabweretsa gulu la anthu limene lidzakuponya miyala ndi kukutematema ndi malupanga awo.
Ezekiel16:41 Adzatentha nyumba zako ndi kukulanga iwe pamaso pa akazi ambiri. Ndidzathetsa chigololo chako
Ezekiel16:42 Ukali wanga udzalekera pamenepo ndipo sindidzakuchitiranso nsanje. Ndidzakhala chete osakwiyanso.
Ezekiel16:43 “ ‘Popeza sunakumbukire masiku a ubwana wako koma unandikwiyitsa ndi zinthu zonsezi
Ezekiel16:44 “ ‘Taona
Ezekiel16:45 Ndiwedi mwana weniweni wamkazi wa mayi wako
Ezekiel16:46 Mkulu wako anali Samariya
Ezekiel16:47 Iwe sunangotsatira kokha njira zawo zoyipa ndi kuchita zonyansa zawo
Ezekiel16:48 Ndithu pali Ine wamoyo
Ezekiel16:49 “ ‘Tsono tchimo la mʼbale wako Sodomu linali ili: Iye ndi ana ake aakazi ankanyadira kuchuluka kwa chakudya ndi chuma chawo. Koma sanalabadireko kuthandiza osauka ndi aumphawi.
Ezekiel16:50 Anali odzitukumula ndipo ankachita zonyansa pamaso panga. Nʼchifukwa chake ndinawachotsa monga mmene waoneramu.
Ezekiel16:51 Samariya sanachite ngakhale theka la machimo amene unachita. Iwe wachita zinthu zonyansa zambiri kuposa iwo
Ezekiel16:52 Tsono iwenso uyenera kuchita manyazi popeza waonetsa abale ako ngati osachimwa. Popeza kuti machimo ako ndi onyansa kwambiri kupambana awo
Ezekiel16:53 “ ‘Koma
Ezekiel16:54 Ndidzatero kuti uchite manyazi ndi kunyozeka chifukwa cha zonse zimene unachita powatonthoza anthuwa.
Ezekiel16:55 Motero mʼbale wako Sodomu ndi ana ake akadzakhala monga mmene analili poyamba paja
Ezekiel16:56 Kale lija pamene unkanyada
Ezekiel16:57 kuyipa kwako kusanadziwike? Koma tsopano wafanana naye. Wasandukano chinthu chonyozeka kwa anthu a ku Edomu ndi kwa onse owazungulira ndiponso kwa Afilisti. Ndithu onse amene akuzungulira amakunyoza.
Ezekiel16:58 Choncho udzalangidwa chifukwa cha zigololo zako ndi machitidwe anu onyansa
Ezekiel16:59 “ ‘Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Ndidzakulanga molingana ndi zimene unachita. Iwe unanyoza lumbiro lako pophwanya pangano langa.
Ezekiel16:60 Komabe
Ezekiel16:61 Tsono udzakumbukira njira zako zakale. Udzachita manyazi polandiranso abale ako
Ezekiel16:62 Kotero ndidzakhazikitsa pangano langa ndi iwe
Ezekiel16:63 Ndikadzakukhululukira zoyipa zako zonse zimene unachita
Ezekiel17:1 Yehova anayankhula nane kuti
Ezekiel17:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel17:3 Uwawuze kuti Ambuye Yehova akuti
Ezekiel17:4 Chinabudula msonga yeniyeni ya nthambiyo nʼkupita nayo ku dziko lamalonda ndipo anakayika mu mzinda wa anthu amalonda.
Ezekiel17:5 “ ‘Kenaka chinatenga mbewu ina ya mʼdziko ndi kukayidzala ku malo a chonde kumene kunali madzi ambiri. Anayidzala ngati mmene amadzalira mtengo wa msondozi.
Ezekiel17:6 Ndipo inaphuka nisanduka mtengo wa mpesa wotambalala chamʼmunsi. Nthambi zake zinaloza mmwamba kumene kunali chiwombankhangacho
Ezekiel17:7 “ ‘Koma panali chiwombankhanga chinanso chachikulu
Ezekiel17:8 Koma mtengowo unadzalidwa kale pa nthaka yabwino mʼmbali mwa madzi kuti ukhale ndi nthambi zambiri
Ezekiel17:9 “Ukawawuze Aisraeli kuti
Ezekiel17:10 Ngakhale utawokedwa pena
Ezekiel17:11 Kenaka Yehova anandiyankhula nati:
Ezekiel17:12 “Tawafunsa anthu owukirawa kuti
Ezekiel17:13 Ndipo anatenga mmodzi wa banja laufumu ndi kuchita naye mgwirizano
Ezekiel17:14 kuti ufumu wa dzikolo utsitsidwe
Ezekiel17:15 Koma mfumu inawukira mfumu ya ku Babuloni potumiza nthumwi ku dziko la Igupto kukatenga akavalo ndi gulu lalikulu la nkhondo. Kodi mfumu yotereyi ingapambane? Kodi wochita zinthu zoterezi angapulumuke? Kodi angaphwanye mgwirizano ndi kupulumuka?
Ezekiel17:16 “ ‘Ndithu pali Ine wamoyo
Ezekiel17:17 Farao ndi gulu lake lankhondo lamphamvu sadzatha kumuthandiza pa nkhondo
Ezekiel17:18 Mfumu ya ku Yuda inanyoza lumbiro lake pophwanya pangano. Inalonjeza komabe sinatsatire malonjezo ake. Choncho sidzapulumuka.
Ezekiel17:19 “ ‘Nʼchifukwa chake Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Ndithu pali Ine wamoyo
Ezekiel17:20 Ndidzayitchera ukonde ndipo idzakodwa mu msampha wanga. Ndidzapita nayo ku Babuloni ndi kuyilanga kumeneko chifukwa inali yosakhulupirika kwa Ine.
Ezekiel17:21 Asilikali ake onse amene akuthawa adzaphedwa ndi lupanga
Ezekiel17:22 “ ‘Ambuye Yehova akuti: Ine mwini ndidzatenga nthambi pamwamba penipeni pa mkungudza ndi kuyidzala; ndidzathyola nthambi yanthete kuchokera pa nthambi zapamwamba penipeni ndi kuyidzala pamwamba pa phiri lalitali.
Ezekiel17:23 Ndidzayidzaladi pa phiri lalitali la Israeli. Idzaphuka nthambi ndi kubereka zipatso. Choncho idzasanduka mkungudza wamphamvu. Mbalame za mtundu uliwonse zidzamanga zisa zawo mʼmenemo; zidzapeza malo okhala mu mthunzi wa nthambi zake.
Ezekiel17:24 Mitengo yonse yakuthengo idzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova amene ndimafupikitsa mitengo yayitali ndi kutalikitsa mitengo yayifupi. Ndimawumitsa mitengo yabiriwiri ndi kubiriwitsa mitengo yowuma. “ ‘Ine Yehova ndayankhula zimenezi
Ezekiel18:1 Yehova anandiyankhula nati:
Ezekiel18:2 “Kodi anthu inu mumatanthauza chiyani mukamabwerezabwereza kunena mwambi uwu wokhudza dziko la Israeli kuti: “ ‘Nkhuyu zodya akulu zimapota ndi ana omwe?’ ”
Ezekiel18:3 “Ndithu pali Ine wamoyo
Ezekiel18:4 Pakuti moyo uliwonse ndi wanga. Moyo wa abambo ndi wanga
Ezekiel18:5 “Tiyerekeze kuti pali munthu wolungama amene amachita zolungama ndi zolondola.
Ezekiel18:6 Iye sadyera nawo pa mapiri a chipembedzo kapena kupembedza mafano a Aisraeli. Iye sayipitsa mkazi wa mnzake kapena kugonana ndi mkazi pamene akusamba.
Ezekiel18:7 Iye sapondereza munthu wina aliyense
Ezekiel18:8 Iye sakongoletsa ndalama mwa katapira
Ezekiel18:9 Iye amatsatira malangizo anga
Ezekiel18:10 “Tiyerekeze kuti munthu wolungama chotere wabala mwana chimbalangondo amene amakhalira kupha anthu ndi kuchita zinthu zina zotere.
Ezekiel18:11 Iye nʼkumachita zinthu zimene ngakhale abambo ake sanachitepo. “Amadyera nawo ku mapiri achipembedzo. Amayipitsa mkazi wa mnzake.
Ezekiel18:12 Iye amapondereza munthu wosauka ndi wosowa. Amalanda zinthu za osauka. Sabweza chikole cha munthu wa ngongole. Iye amatembenukira ku mafano nachita zonyansa.
Ezekiel18:13 Iye amakongoletsa mwa katapira ndipo amalandira chiwongoladzanja chachikulu. Kodi munthu wotereyu nʼkukhala ndi moyo? Ayi ndithu! Chifukwa wachita zinthu zonyansa zonsezi
Ezekiel18:14 “Tsono tiyerekeze kuti munthu woyipa uyu wabala mwana amene amaona machimo onse amene abambo ake ankachita. Ngakhale amaona koma osatsanzira ntchito zake zoyipazo.
Ezekiel18:15 “Sadyera nawo pa mapiri achipembedzo. Sapembedza mafano a ku Israeli. Sayipitsa mkazi wa mnzake.
Ezekiel18:16 Sapondereza munthu wina aliyense. Satenga chikole akabwereketsa chinthu. Salanda zinthu za osauka. Salanda zinthu za munthu. Amapereka chakudya kwa anthu anjala. Amapereka zovala kwa anthu aumphawi.
Ezekiel18:17 Amadziletsa kuchita zoyipa. Sakongoletsa kuti apezepo phindu. Salandira chiwongoladzanja. Amasunga malangizo anga ndi kumvera malamulo anga. Munthu wotereyo sadzafa chifukwa cha machimo a abambo ake. Adzakhala ndi moyo ndithu.
Ezekiel18:18 Koma abambo ake
Ezekiel18:19 “Mwina inu mukhoza kufunsa kuti
Ezekiel18:20 Munthu wochimwa ndiye amene adzafe. Mwana sadzapezeka wolakwa chifukwa cha abambo ake
Ezekiel18:21 “ ‘Munthu woyipa akatembenuka mtima ndi kusiya machimo amene ankachita ndi kuyamba kumvera malamulo anga ndi kumachita zolungama ndi zokhulupirika
Ezekiel18:22 Zoyipa zake zonse zidzakhululukidwa. Chifukwa cha zinthu zolungama zimene anazichita adzakhala ndi moyo.
Ezekiel18:23 Kodi Ine ndimakondwera ndi imfa ya munthu woyipa? Ayi
Ezekiel18:24 “ ‘Koma ngati munthu wolungama apatuka kusiya zachilungamo ndi kuyamba kuchita tchimo ndi zonyansa za mtundu uliwonse zimene amachita anthu oyipa
Ezekiel18:25 “Komabe inu mukunena kuti
Ezekiel18:26 Ngati munthu wolungama atembenuka kusiya chilungamo chake ndi kuchita tchimo
Ezekiel18:27 Koma ngati munthu woyipa aleka zoyipa zake zimene anazichita ndi kuyamba kuchita zimene ndi zolungama ndi zolondola
Ezekiel18:28 Popeza waganizira za zolakwa zonse ankachita ndipo wazileka
Ezekiel18:29 Komabe Aisraeli akunena kuti
Ezekiel18:30 “Chifukwa chake Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: inu Aisraeli
Ezekiel18:31 Tayani zolakwa zanu zonse zimene munandichimwira nazo ndipo khalani ndi mtima watsopano ndi mzimu watsopano. Kodi muferanji inu Aisraeli?
Ezekiel18:32 Ine sindikondwera ndi imfa ya munthu aliyense
Ezekiel19:1 “Imba nyimbo ya madandawulo
Ezekiel19:2 Uzinena kuti
Ezekiel19:3 Unalera mmodzi mwa ana ake
Ezekiel19:4 Anthu amitundu anamva za mkangowo
Ezekiel19:5 “ ‘Amayi aja ataona kuti mwana ankamukhulupirira uja wagwidwa ndi kuti chiyembekezo chake chapita padera
Ezekiel19:6 Unkayendayenda pakati pa mikango inzake
Ezekiel19:7 Unagwetsa malinga awo
Ezekiel19:8 Pamenepo mitundu ya anthu
Ezekiel19:9 Anawukoka ndi ngowe nawuponya mʼchitatanga. Anabwera nawo kwa mfumu ya ku Babuloni ndipo mfumuyo inawuponya mʼndende ndi cholinga choti liwu lake lisamamvekenso ku mapiri a Israeli.
Ezekiel19:10 “ ‘Amayi ako anali ngati mpesa mʼmunda wamphesa wodzalidwa mʼmbali mwa madzi. Unabereka bwino ndipo unali ndi nthambi zambiri chifukwa cha kuchuluka kwa madzi.
Ezekiel19:11 Nthambi zake zinali zolimba
Ezekiel19:12 Koma unazulidwa mwaukali ndipo unagwetsedwa pansi. Unawuma ndi mphepo ya kummawa
Ezekiel19:13 Ndipo tsopano anawuwokeranso ku chipululu
Ezekiel19:14 Moto unatulukanso mu mtengomo ndi kupsereza nthambi ndi zipatso zake. Palibe nthambi yolimba inatsala pa mtengowo yoyenera kupangira ndodo yaufumu. Imeneyi ndi nyimbo yachisoni ndipo yasanduka nyimbo ya pa maliro.’ ”
Ezekiel20:1 Tsiku lakhumi la mwezi wachisanu
Ezekiel20:2 Tsono Yehova anandiyankhula nati:
Ezekiel20:3 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel20:4 “Kodi uwaweruza? Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel20:5 ‘Ambuye Yehova akuti: Pa tsiku limene ndinasankha Israeli
Ezekiel20:6 Pa tsiku limenelo ndinalumbira kwa iwo kuti ndidzawatulutsa mʼdziko la Igupto ndi kupita nawo ku dziko limene ndinawapezera
Ezekiel20:7 Ndipo ndinawawuza kuti
Ezekiel20:8 “ ‘Koma iwo anandiwukira ndipo sanafune kundimvera. Palibe amene anataya zonyansa zonse zimene ankasangalala nazo. Panalibenso amene anasiya mafano a ku Igupto. Tsono ndinaganiza zowakhuthulira ukali wanga ndi kuwaonetsa mkwiyo wanga mʼdziko la Igupto momwemo.
Ezekiel20:9 Koma sindinachite zimenezi chifukwa cha dzina langa
Ezekiel20:10 Choncho ndinawatulutsa mʼdziko la Igupto ndi kubwera nawo mʼchipululu.
Ezekiel20:11 Ndinawapatsa malangizo anga ndi kuwadziwitsa malamulo anga amene munthu aliyense akawamvera adzakhala ndi moyo.
Ezekiel20:12 Ndinawapatsanso Masabata ngati chizindikiro pakati pathu
Ezekiel20:13 “ ‘Komabe anthu a Israeli anandiwukira mʼchipululu. Iwo sanatsatire malangizo anga koma anakana malamulo anga amene munthu aliyense akawamvera adzakhala ndi moyo. Ndipo anayipitsa kotheratu Masabata anga. Choncho
Ezekiel20:14 Koma sindinachite zimenezi chifukwa cha dzina langa
Ezekiel20:15 Ndinalumbiranso kwa iwo mʼchipululu muja
Ezekiel20:16 Paja anakana malamulo anga
Ezekiel20:17 Komabe ndinawamvera chisoni ndipo sindinawawononge kapena kuwatheratu mʼchipululu.
Ezekiel20:18 Tsono kwa ana awo mʼchipululu ndinati
Ezekiel20:19 Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu; tsatirani malangizo anga ndipo sungani malamulo anga.
Ezekiel20:20 Masabata anga muziwasunga ngati opatulika kuti akhale chizindikiro pakati pa Ine ndi inu. Mukatero mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu.’
Ezekiel20:21 “ ‘Koma ana awo anandiwukira. Iwo sanatsatire malangizo anga
Ezekiel20:22 Koma sindinatero chifukwa cha dzina langa kuti lisayipitsidwe pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina amene anandiona ndikutulutsa Aisraeliwo mu Iguptomo.
Ezekiel20:23 Choncho ndinalumbira mʼchipululu
Ezekiel20:24 chifukwa sanamvere malamulo anga
Ezekiel20:25 Ine ndinawapatsanso malangizo amene sanali abwino ndi malamulo amene sakanatha kupeza nawo moyo.
Ezekiel20:26 Ndinawalekerera kuti adziyipitse ndi mphatso zawo zomwe
Ezekiel20:27 “Tsono iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel20:28 Nditawalowetsa mʼdziko limene ndinachita kulumbirira kuti ndidzawapatsa
Ezekiel20:29 Tsono ndinawafunsa kuti: Kodi chitunda chimene mukupitako nʼchotani? Chitundachi chakhala chikutchedwa mpaka lero kuti ‘Chitunda cha Chipembedzo.’
Ezekiel20:30 “Tsono uwawuze Aisraeli kuti
Ezekiel20:31 Pamene mubwera kudzapereka mphatso zanu ndi kudzapereka ana kuti akhale ngati nsembe zopsereza mumadziyipitsa ndi mafano anu mpaka lero. Kodi Aisraeli
Ezekiel20:32 “ ‘Inu munanena kuti
Ezekiel20:33 Ndithu pali Ine wamoyo
Ezekiel20:34 Ndidzakuchotsani pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina ndikukusonkhanitsani kuchokera ku mayiko kumene munamwazikirako
Ezekiel20:35 Ndidzakulowetsani mʼchipululu cha anthu a mitundu ina ndipo kumeneko
Ezekiel20:36 Monga ndinawalangira makolo anu mʼchipululu cha dziko la Igupto
Ezekiel20:37 Ndidzakuwerengani ndi ndodo ya mʼbusa
Ezekiel20:38 Ndidzakuchotserani anthu amene anandigalukira ndi kundiwukira. Ngakhale ndidzawatulutsa mʼdziko limene akukhalamo
Ezekiel20:39 “ ‘Koma inu Aisraeli
Ezekiel20:40 Pakuti pa phiri langa lopatulika
Ezekiel20:41 Ndidzakulandirani ngati nsembe ya fungo lokoma ndikadzakutulutsani pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina ndi kukusokhanitsani kuchokera ku mayiko kumene munabalalitsidwirako. Motero ndidzadzionetsa pakati panu kuti ndine woyera ndipo mitundu ya anthu idzaona.
Ezekiel20:42 Tsono mudzadziwa kuti ndine Yehova ndikadzabwera nanu ku dziko la Israeli
Ezekiel20:43 Kumeneko mudzakumbukira makhalidwe anu ndi machitidwe anu onse amene munadziyipitsa nawo
Ezekiel20:44 Inu mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova
Ezekiel20:45 Yehova anandiyankhula nati:
Ezekiel20:46 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel20:47 Iwuze nkhalango yakummwera kuti
Ezekiel20:48 Aliyense adzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova ndi amene ndayatsa motowo
Ezekiel20:49 Ndipo ine ndinati
Ezekiel21:1 Yehova anandiyankhula nati:
Ezekiel21:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel21:3 Uwawuze kuti
Ezekiel21:4 Motero ndidzapha aliyense kuchokera kummawa mpaka kumpoto.
Ezekiel21:5 Pamenepo anthu onse adzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova ndi amene ndasolola lupanga langa mʼchimake; sindidzalilowetsanso mʼchimakemo.’
Ezekiel21:6 “Tsono iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel21:7 Ndipo akadzakufunsa kuti
Ezekiel21:8 Yehova anandiyankhulanso kuti
Ezekiel21:9 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel21:10 Lanoledwa kuti likaphe
Ezekiel21:11 “ ‘Lupanga laperekedwa kuti lipukutidwe
Ezekiel21:12 Fuwula ndi kulira
Ezekiel21:13 “ ‘Ambuye Wamphamvuzonse akuti: Ndikuwayesa anthu anga
Ezekiel21:14 “Tsono mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel21:15 Ndawayikira pa zipata zawo zonse lupanga laphuliphuli kuti ataye mtima ndiponso kuti anthu ambiri agwe. Aa! Lapangidwa lupanga kuti lizingʼanima ngati mphenzi ndi kuti azilisolola kuphera anthu.
Ezekiel21:16 Iwe lupanga
Ezekiel21:17 Inenso ndidzawomba mʼmanja mwanga
Ezekiel21:18 Yehova anandiyankhulanso kuti
Ezekiel21:19 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel21:20 Ulembe chizindikiro pa msewu umene lupanga lidzadzere popita ku Raba wa ku Amoni
Ezekiel21:21 Pakuti mfumu ya ku Babuloni yayima pa msewu
Ezekiel21:22 Mʼdzanja lake lamanja muli muvi waula wolembedwa Yerusalemu. Kumeneko mfumuyo idzayika zida zogumulira
Ezekiel21:23 Koma kwa anthu a ku Yerusalemu zidzaoneka ngati zowombeza zabodza chifukwa cha malumbiro amene anachita kwa mfumuyo. Koma mfumuyo idzawakumbutsa za zolakwa zawo kuti atengedwe ku ukapolo.
Ezekiel21:24 “Nʼchifukwa chake Ambuye Yehova akuti
Ezekiel21:25 “ ‘Tsono iwe kalonga wonyozedwa ndi woyipa wa Israeli
Ezekiel21:26 Ambuye Yehova akuti: Vula nduwira
Ezekiel21:27 Chipasupasu! Chipasupasu! Ine ndidzawupasula mzindawo! Ndipo sadzawumanganso mpaka atafika amene ali woyenera kuwulandira; Ine ndidzawupereka kwa iyeyo.’
Ezekiel21:28 “Ndipo iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel21:29 Zimene akuti akuona mʼmasomphenya zokhudza inu ndi zabodza. Mawula awo okhudza inu ndi abodzanso. Mudzakhala pamodzi ndi anthu oyipa amene tsiku lawo lafika
Ezekiel21:30 “ ‘Bwezerani lupanga mʼchimake. Ku malo kumene inu munabadwira
Ezekiel21:31 Ndidzakhuthula ukali wanga pa inu
Ezekiel21:32 Mudzakhala ngati nkhuni pa moto. Ena adzakhetsa magazi anu mʼdziko lanu lomwe. Simudzakumbukiridwanso pakuti Ine Yehova ndayankhula.’ ”
Ezekiel22:1 Yehova anandiyankhula nati:
Ezekiel22:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel22:3 ndipo unene kuti
Ezekiel22:4 wapezekatu wolakwa chifukwa cha magazi amene wakhetsa
Ezekiel22:5 Mayiko amene ali pafupi ndi mayiko omwe ali kutali adzakunyoza
Ezekiel22:6 “ ‘Taona momwe aliyense wa atsogoleri a Israeli amagwiritsira mphamvu zake kupha anthu.
Ezekiel22:7 Mu mzindamo anthu amanyoza abambo ndi amayi awo. Iwo amapondereza alendo ndi kuzunza ana amasiye ndi akazi amasiye.
Ezekiel22:8 Wanyoza zinthu zanga zopatulika ndi kuyipitsa Masabata anga.
Ezekiel22:9 Mwa iwe muli anthu onenera anzawo zabodza kuti aphedwe. Mwa iwe mulinso amene amadyera zansembe pa mapiri a chipembedzo. Enanso amachita zonyansa.
Ezekiel22:10 Mwa iwe muli ena ogonana ndi akazi a abambo awo
Ezekiel22:11 Ena amachita chigololo ndi akazi a anzawo
Ezekiel22:12 Mwa iwe muli anthu amene amalandira ziphuphu kuti aphe anzawo; ena amachita katapira ndi kupeza phindu loposera muyeso; enanso amapeza phindu mwachinyengo poopseza anzawo. Ndipo mwandiyiwala Ine
Ezekiel22:13 “ ‘Koma Ine ndachita kuwomba mʼmanja kuti phuu nʼkudabwa chifukwa cha phindu lachinyengo limene mwapeza ndiponso chifukwa cha kuphana kumene kumachitika pakati panu.
Ezekiel22:14 Kodi mtima wako udzakhala wolimbabe kapena manja ako adzakhalabe amphamvu ndikadzatsiriza kukulanga iwe? Ine Yehova ndayankhula
Ezekiel22:15 Ndidzakubalalitsani pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina ndi kukumwazirani ku mayiko onse. Umu ndi mmene ndidzachotsere zoyipa zako.
Ezekiel22:16 Udzanyozedwa pamaso pa anthu a mitundu ina. Pambuyo pake udzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova.’ ”
Ezekiel22:17 Yehova anandiyankhula nati:
Ezekiel22:18 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel22:19 Nʼchifukwa chake Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: ‘Pakuti nonse mwasanduka chinthu cha chabechabe
Ezekiel22:20 Monga momwe anthu amasonkhanitsira siliva
Ezekiel22:21 Ndidzakusonkhanitsani mu mzindamo ndi kukoleza moto wa mkwiyo wanga
Ezekiel22:22 Monga siliva amasungunulidwa mʼngʼanjo
Ezekiel22:23 Yehova anandiyankhulanso nati
Ezekiel22:24 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel22:25 Atsogoleri ake mu mzindamo ali ngati mkango wobangula pogwira nyama. Apha anthu
Ezekiel22:26 Ansembe ake amaphwanya lamulo langa ndi kuyipitsa zinthu zanga zopatulika. Sasiyanitsa pakati pa zinthu zopatulika ndi zinthu wamba. Saphunzitsa anthu kusiyana kwa zinthu zoyenera pa chipembedzo ndi zinthu zosayenera. Sasamalira za kusunga masabata anga. Motero Ine ndimanyozedwa pakati pawo.
Ezekiel22:27 Atsogoleri ake ali ngati mimbulu yokhadzula nyama; amakhetsa magazi ndi kupha anthu kuti apeze phindu loyipa.
Ezekiel22:28 Aneneri ake amabisa zonsezi monga muja amachitira anthu popaka njereza. Amazimphimba ndi zabodza zimene aona mʼmasomphenya awo ndi zonama za mʼmawula awo. Iwo amati
Ezekiel22:29 Anthu a mʼdzikomo amasautsa anzawo ndi kulanda anthu osowa. Amazunza anthu osauka ndi amphawi. Amavutitsa alendo posawachitira zinthu mwachilungamo.
Ezekiel22:30 “Ndinafunafuna munthu pakati pawo woti amange linga
Ezekiel22:31 Nʼchifukwa chake ndawakwiyira kwambiri. Ndawawonongeratu ndi mkwiyo wanga woyaka ngati moto. Ndawalanga molingana ndi zimene anachita. Akutero Ambuye Yehova.”
Ezekiel23:1 Yehova anandiyankhula nati:
Ezekiel23:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel23:3 Iwo ankachita za chiwerewere ku Igupto. Za chiwerewerezo anayamba ali achichepere. Kumeneko anthu ankangowasisita pa chifuwa ndi kuwagwiragwira mawere awo aja.
Ezekiel23:4 Wamkulu dzina lake anali Ohola
Ezekiel23:5 “Ohola anachita zachiwerewere ngakhale anali mkazi wanga; ndipo iye anakangamira abwenzi ake a ku Asiriya.
Ezekiel23:6 Amenewo anali asilikali ovala zibakuwa zamlangali
Ezekiel23:7 Ohola anachita zachiwerewere ndi onsewa
Ezekiel23:8 Iye sanaleke za chiwerewere zimene anaziphunzira ku Igupto. Paja akanali mtsikana anyamata ankagona naye. Iwo ankamusisita mawere akanali anthete nachita naye zachiwerewere.
Ezekiel23:9 “Nʼchifukwa chake Ine ndinamupereka kwa achikondi ake
Ezekiel23:10 Iwowa anamuvula
Ezekiel23:11 “Mphwake Oholiba anaona zimenezi natengerako. Koma iye anachita zachiwerewere kuposa mkulu wake.
Ezekiel23:12 Iyenso anakangamira Asiriya
Ezekiel23:13 Ndinaona kuti iyenso anadziyipitsa; ndipo onse awiriwo anatsata njira imodzi.
Ezekiel23:14 “Koma Oholiba uja anachita chigololo kopitirira mkulu wake. Iye anaona zithunzi za amuna pa khoma
Ezekiel23:15 atamanga malamba mʼchiwuno mwawo ndi kuvala nduwira pa mitu yawo. Onse amaoneka ngati atsogoleri a magaleta a Ababuloni
Ezekiel23:16 Oholiba atangowaona
Ezekiel23:17 Ndipo Ababuloni anabwera nʼkudzagona naye. Choncho mwa chilakolako chawo anamuyipitsa. Koma atamuyipitsa choncho
Ezekiel23:18 Iye atachita chiwerewere chake poyera ndi kuonetsa umaliseche wake
Ezekiel23:19 Koma anachitabe zachiwerewere osalekeza. Ankakumbukira masiku a ubwana wake pamene ankachita za chiwerewere mʼdziko la Igupto.
Ezekiel23:20 Kumeneko iye ankalakalaka zibwenzi zake
Ezekiel23:21 Motero
Ezekiel23:22 “Tsono iwe Oholiba
Ezekiel23:23 Ndidzayitana anthu a ku Babuloni ndi Akaldeya onse
Ezekiel23:24 Iwo adzabwera kudzalimbana nawe ndi zida za nkhondo
Ezekiel23:25 Ndidzaonetsa mkwiyo wanga pa iwe ndipo iwo adzakulanga iwe mwankhanza. Adzadula mphuno zanu ndi makutu anu
Ezekiel23:26 Adzakuvulaninso zovala zanu ndikukulandani zodzikongoletsera zanu zamtengowapatali.
Ezekiel23:27 Motero ndidzathetsa zonyansa zako ndi zachigololo zomwe unaziyamba ku Igupto. Choncho sudzalakalaka za ku Igupto kapena kuzikumbukiranso.
Ezekiel23:28 “Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Ndikukupereka mʼmanja mwa amene amadana nawe
Ezekiel23:29 Adzachita nawe mwachidani. Adzakulanda zonse zimene unagwirira ntchito. Adzakusiya wamaliseche ndiponso wausiwa. Kuyipa kwa makhalidwe ako achiwerewere kudzakhala pammbalambanda. Zonyansa zako ndi chiwerewere chako
Ezekiel23:30 zabweretsa izi pa iwe chifukwa unachita zonyansa ndi anthu a mitundu ndi kudziyipitsa ndi mafano awo.
Ezekiel23:31 Unatsata zochita za mkulu wako; choncho Ine ndidzayika chikho cha chilango chake mʼdzanja lako.
Ezekiel23:32 “Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: “Udzamwera chikho cha mkulu wako
Ezekiel23:33 Udzaledzera ndipo mtima wako udzadzaza ndi chisoni. Chimenechi ndi chikho chachiwonongeko ndi chipasupasu
Ezekiel23:34 Udzamwa chikhocho mpaka kugugudiza. Tsono udzaphwanyaphwanya chikhocho ndipo udzangʼamba mawere ako ndi zigoba zake. Ine ndayankhula
Ezekiel23:35 “Chifukwa chake
Ezekiel23:36 Yehova anandifunsa kuti
Ezekiel23:37 Iwo achita chigololo ndipo anapha anthu. Anachita chigololo popembedza mafano awo. Ngakhale ana amene anandiberekera Ine anawapereka kwa mafanowo ngati chakudya chawo.
Ezekiel23:38 Anachitanso izi: Iwo anayipitsa malo anga opatulika ndi kudetsa masabata anga.
Ezekiel23:39 Atapereka ana awo kwa mafano
Ezekiel23:40 “Iwo anatuma amithenga kukayitana amuna a ku mayiko akutali. Anthuwo atabwera
Ezekiel23:41 Anakhala pa bedi lokongola ndipo patsogolo pawo panali tebulo pamene munayikapo lubani ndi mafuta. Zonse zowapatsa Ine.
Ezekiel23:42 “Mfuwu wa chigulu cha anthu unamveka. Anthu oledzera ochokera ku chipululu anabwera pamodzi ndi anthu wamba ndipo anaveka akaziwo zibangiri kumanja ndi zipewa zaufumu zokongola ku mutu.
Ezekiel23:43 Ndipo ine ndinati za mkazi wotheratu ndi chigololoyo
Ezekiel23:44 Tsono anapita kwa iwo monga mmene anthu amapitira kwa mkazi wadama. Momwemo anapita kwa Ohola ndi kwa Oholiba kukachita nawo zadama.
Ezekiel23:45 Koma anthu olungama adzawazenga anthuwa mlandu wa chigololo ndi wa kupha anthu. Ndi iwodi anthu achigololo ndiponso mʼmanja mwawo muli magazi.
Ezekiel23:46 “Ambuye Yehova akuti: Itanitsani chigulu cha anthu kuti chidzawalange ndi kulanda chuma chawo.
Ezekiel23:47 Anthuwo adzawaponye miyala akazi awiriwo ndi kuwatema ndi malupanga awo. Ana awo aamuna ndi aakazi adzawaphe ndi kutentha nyumba zawo.
Ezekiel23:48 “Motero Ine ndidzathetsa zachigololo mʼdzikomo
Ezekiel23:49 Ndidzawalanga chifukwa cha ntchito zawo za dama ndipo adzazunzika chifukwa cha tchimo lawo lopembedza mafano. Choncho adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Ambuye Yehova.”
Ezekiel24:1 Pa tsiku lakhumi la mwezi wakhumi chaka chachisanu ndi chinayi
Ezekiel24:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu lemba dzina la tsiku lalero
Ezekiel24:3 Uwaphere mwambi anthu owukirawa ndi kuwawuza kuti: ‘Ambuye Yehova akuti
Ezekiel24:4 Mu mʼphikamo muyikemo nthuli za nyama
Ezekiel24:5 Pa gulu la nkhosa musankhepo nkhosa yabwino kwambiri. Muyike nkhuni pansi pa mʼphikawo. Madzi awire. Kenaka muphike nyamayo pamodzi ndi mafupa omwe.’
Ezekiel24:6 “ ‘Nʼchifukwa chake
Ezekiel24:7 “ ‘Paja magazi amene anakhetsa akanali pakati pake mu mzindamo. Iye awakhuthulira pa thanthwe losalala. Sanawakhutulire pa dothi kuopa kuti fumbi lingawafotsere.
Ezekiel24:8 Ndinasiya magaziwo pa mwala wosalala kuti asafotseredwe ndi fumbi chifukwa ndinafuna kuonetsa mkwiyo wanga ndi kulipsira.
Ezekiel24:9 “ ‘Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: “ ‘Tsoka kwa mzinda wokhetsa magazi! Inenso
Ezekiel24:10 Choncho wonjeza nkhuni ndipo muyatse moto. Phikani nyamayo bwinobwino
Ezekiel24:11 Tsono muyike pa makala mʼphika wopanda kanthuwo mpaka utenthe kuchita kuti psuu kuti zonyansa zake zisungunuke ndi kuti dzimbiri lake lichoke.
Ezekiel24:12 Koma mʼphikawo walephereka kuyeretsedwa. Dzimbiri lake linalowerera silingatheke kuchoka ngakhale ndi moto womwe.
Ezekiel24:13 “ ‘Tsono dzimbiri limeneli ndi zilakolako za dama lako. Pakuti ine ndinayesa kukutsuka koma iwe sunayere
Ezekiel24:14 “ ‘Ine Yehova ndayankhula. Zimenezi zikubwera ndipo ndidzazichitadi. Sindidzabwerera mʼmbuyo. Sindidzakulekerera kapena kukuchitira chifundo. Ndidzakulanga molingana ndi makhalidwe ndi machitidwe ako
Ezekiel24:15 Yehova anandiyankhula kuti:
Ezekiel24:16 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel24:17 Ubuwule koma mwakachetechete. Usamulire wakufayo. Uvale nduwira yako ndithu
Ezekiel24:18 Choncho ndinayankhula ndi anthu mmawa
Ezekiel24:19 Ndipo anthu anandifunsa kuti
Ezekiel24:20 Ndinawayankha kuti
Ezekiel24:21 ‘Awuze Aisraeli kuti: Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: ndidzayipitsa Nyumba yanga yopatulika
Ezekiel24:22 Ndipo mudzachita monga ndachitira inemu. Inu simudzaphimba nkhope zanu kapena kudya chakudya cha anamfedwa.
Ezekiel24:23 Mudzavala nduwira zanu kumutu ndi nsapato zanu ku mapazi anu. Simudzabuma maliro kapena kukhetsa misozi koma mudzavutika kwambiri chifukwa cha machimo anu ndipo mudzabuwula pakati panu.
Ezekiel24:24 Ine Ezekieli ndidzakhala chitsanzo chanu. Mudzachita monga momwe ndachitira. Izi zikadzachitika
Ezekiel24:25 “Ndipo Yehova anandiyankhula nati: Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel24:26 Pa tsiku limenelo wothawa nkhondo adzabwera kudzakuwuzani zimenezo.
Ezekiel24:27 Pa tsiku limenelo pakamwa pako padzatsekuka. Udzatha kuyankhula naye ndipo sudzakhalanso chete. Motero udzakhala chizindikiro kwa iwo
Ezekiel25:1 Yehova anandiyankhula kuti:
Ezekiel25:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel25:3 Awawuze kuti
Ezekiel25:4 Nʼchifukwa chake Ine ndidzakuperekani mʼmanja mwa anthu akummawa ngati cholowa chawo. Iwo adzamanga misasa yawo ndi kukhoma matenti awo pakati panu. Adzadya zipatso zanu ndi kumwa mkaka wanu.
Ezekiel25:5 Ndidzasandutsa Raba kuti akhale busa la ngamira ndi mizinda ya Aamoni kuti ikhale makola a nkhosa. Pamenepo inu mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova.
Ezekiel25:6 Zimene ndikunena Ine Ambuye Yehova ndi izi: Inu munawomba mʼmanja ndi kumalumphalumpha. Munkakondwa mu mtima mwanu pamene munkanyoza dziko la Israeli.
Ezekiel25:7 Nʼchifukwa chake ndidzatambasula dzanja langa kuti ndikulangeni
Ezekiel25:8 “Ambuye Yehova akuti
Ezekiel25:9 Nʼchifukwa chake ndidzagumula mbali ina ya Mowabu
Ezekiel25:10 Ndidzapereka Amowabu pamodzi ndi Aamoni mʼmanja mwa anthu akummawa kotero kuti Aamoni adzayiwalikiratu pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina.
Ezekiel25:11 Ndidzawalangadi Amowabuwo. Pamenepo iwo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova.”
Ezekiel25:12 “Ambuye Yehova akuti
Ezekiel25:13 Nʼchifukwa chake Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Ndidzatambasula dzanja langa kulanga Edomu ndi kupha anthu ake ndiponso nyama zawo. Ndidzawonongeratu Edomu ndipo adzaphedwa ndi lupanga kuchokera ku Temani mpaka ku Dedani.
Ezekiel25:14 Ndidzalanga Edomu ndi dzanja la anthu anga Aisraeli. Adzalanga anthu a ku Edomu molingana ndi mkwiyo ndi ukali wanga. Choncho adzaona kulipsira kwanga akutero Ambuye Yehova.’ ”
Ezekiel25:15 “Ambuye Yehova akuti
Ezekiel25:16 Nʼchifukwa chake Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Ndidzatambasula dzanja langa kukantha Afilistiwo. Ndidzafafaniza Akereti ndi kuwononga iwo amene amakhala mʼmbali mwa nyanja.
Ezekiel25:17 Ndidzawabwezera chilango choopsa ndipo ndidzawalanga mu mkwiyo wanga. Ndikadzawalipsira ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova.’ ”
Ezekiel26:1 Pa chaka cha khumi ndi chimodzi
Ezekiel26:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel26:3 Nʼchifukwa chake
Ezekiel26:4 Anthuwo adzawononga makoma a Turo ndi kugwetsa nsanja zake. Ndidzapala dothi lake ndipo ndidzamusandutsa thanthwe losalala.
Ezekiel26:5 Udzakhala poyanikapo makoka pakati pa nyanja. Ine Ambuye Yehova ndayankhula zimenezo. Udzasanduka chofunkha cha anthu a mitundu ina.
Ezekiel26:6 Anthu okhala ku mtunda adzasakazidwa ndi lupanga. Pamenepo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova.
Ezekiel26:7 “Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Iwe Turo
Ezekiel26:8 Anthu okhala ku mtunda adzawapha ndi lupanga. Adzapanga mitumbira yankhondo ndi kukukwezera zishango kuti alimbane nawe.
Ezekiel26:9 Adzagwetsa makoma ako ndi zida zogumulira khoma ndi kugwetsa nsanja zako ndi nkhwangwa zake.
Ezekiel26:10 Akavalo ake adzakhala ochuluka kwambiri kotero kuti adzakukwirira ndi fumbi lawo. Makoma ako adzagwedezeka ndi mdidi wa akavalo
Ezekiel26:11 Akavalo ake adzapondaponda mʼmisewu yako yonse ndi ziboda zawo. Adzapha anthu ako ndi lupanga. Mizati yako yolimba idzagwetsedwa.
Ezekiel26:12 Iwo adzafunkha chuma chako ndipo adzalanda zinthu zako za malonda. Adzagwetsa makoma ako ndi kuwononga nyumba zako zabwino. Adzaponya miyala yako
Ezekiel26:13 Choncho ndidzathetsa phokoso la nyimbo zanu
Ezekiel26:14 Ndidzakusandutsa thanthwe losalala
Ezekiel26:15 “Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikukuwuza
