Ezekiel26:16 Pamenepo mafumu a mʼmbali mwa nyanja adzatsika pa mipando yawo yaufumu. Adzayika pambali mikanjo yawo ndi kuvala zovala zawo zamakaka. Adzachita mantha ndipo adzakhala pansi akunjenjemera kosalekeza. Adzathedwa nzeru poona zimene zakugwera.
Ezekiel26:17 Pamenepo adzayimba nyimbo yokudandaula ndipo adzati kwa iwe: “ ‘Nʼkuchita kuwonongeka chotere
Ezekiel26:18 Tsopano mayiko a mʼmbali mwa nyanja akunjenjemera chifukwa cha kugwa kwako; okhala pa zilumba nawonso agwidwa ndi mantha aakulu chifukwa cha kugwa kwako.’
Ezekiel26:19 “Mawu a Ine Ambuye Yehova ndi awa: Ndidzakusandutsa bwinja
Ezekiel26:20 Ndidzakugwetsa pansi kuti ukhale pamodzi ndi anthu amvulazakale amene akutsikira ku manda. Ine ndidzakusunga ku dzenjeko ngati ku bwinja losiyidwa kalekale
Ezekiel26:21 Ine ndidzakuthetsa mochititsa mantha
Ezekiel27:1 Yehova anandiyankhula kuti:
Ezekiel27:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel27:3 Uza Turo
Ezekiel27:4 Malire ako anali mʼkati mwenimweni mwa nyanja; amisiri ako anakukongoletsa kwambiri.
Ezekiel27:5 Anakupanga ndi matabwa a payini ochokera ku Seniri; anatenga mikungudza ya ku Lebanoni kupangira mlongoti wako.
Ezekiel27:6 Ndi mitengo ya thundu ya ku Basani anapanga zopalasira zako; ndi matabwa a mitengo ya payini yochokera ku zilumba za Kitimu. Pakuti anapanga thandala lako pakati pa matabwawo panali minyanga ya njovu.
Ezekiel27:7 Nsalu yabafuta yopeta yochokera ku Igupto inali thanga yako
Ezekiel27:8 Anthu a ku Sidoni ndi Arivadi ndi amene anali opalasa ako. Anthu aluso ako
Ezekiel27:9 Akuluakulu ndi eni luso a ku Gebala anali mʼkati mwako
Ezekiel27:10 “Anthu a ku Perisiya
Ezekiel27:11 Anthu a ku Arivadi ndi Heleki ankalondera mbali zonse za mpanda wako; anthu a ku Gamadi anali mu nsanja zako
Ezekiel27:12 “Dziko la Tarisisi linachita nawe malonda chifukwa cha kuchuluka kwa katundu wako wamtundumtundu. Iwo ankapereka siliva
Ezekiel27:13 “Yavani
Ezekiel27:14 “Anthu a ku Beti Togarima ankapereka akavalo antchito
Ezekiel27:15 “Anthu a ku Dedani ankachita nawe malonda
Ezekiel27:16 “Anthu a ku Aramu ankachita nawe malonda chifukwa cha kuchuluka kwa zinthu zako. Iwo ankapereka miyala ya emeradi
Ezekiel27:17 “Yuda ndi Israeli ankachita nawe malonda. Iwo ankapereka tirigu ochokera ku Miniti ndi zokometsera zakudya
Ezekiel27:18 “Anthu a ku Damasiko
Ezekiel27:19 Adani ndi Agriki ochokera ku Uzala ankagula katundu wako. Iwo ankapereka chitsulo chosalala
Ezekiel27:20 “Anthu a ku Dedani ankakugulitsa nsalu zoyika pa zishalo za akavalo.
Ezekiel27:21 “Arabiya ndi mafumu onse a ku Kedara anali ogula malonda ako. Iwo ankachita nawe malonda a ana ankhosa onenepa
Ezekiel27:22 “Anthu amalonda a ku Seba ndi Raama ankachita nawe malonda. Iwo ankapereka zonunkhira zosiyanasiyana zabwino kwambiri
Ezekiel27:23 “Amalonda a ku Harani
Ezekiel27:24 Iwowa ankasinthanitsana nawe zovala zokongola
Ezekiel27:25 “Sitima za pa madzi za ku Tarisisi zinali zonyamula malonda ako. Motero iwe uli ngati sitima yapamadzi yodzaza ndi katundu wolemera.
Ezekiel27:26 Anthu opalasa ako amakupititsa pa nyanja yozama. Koma mphepo yakummawa idzakuthyolathyola pakati pa nyanja.
Ezekiel27:27 Chuma chako
Ezekiel27:28 Madera a mʼmbali mwa nyanja adzagwedezeka chifukwa cha kufuwula kwa oyendetsa sitimawo.
Ezekiel27:29 Onse amene amapalasa sitima zapamadzi
Ezekiel27:30 Iwo akufuwula
Ezekiel27:31 Akumeta mpala mitu yawo chifukwa cha iwe ndipo akuvala ziguduli. Akukulira iweyo ndi mitima yowawa kwambiri.
Ezekiel27:32 Akuyimba nyimbo yokudandaulira nʼkumati: ‘Ndani anawonongedwapo ngati Turo pakati pa nyanja?’
Ezekiel27:33 Pamene malonda ako ankawoloka nyanja unakhutitsa mitundu yambiri ya anthu. Mafumu a dziko lapansi analemera ndi chuma chako komanso ndi malonda ako.
Ezekiel27:34 Koma tsopano wathyokera mʼnyanja
Ezekiel27:35 Onse amene amakhala mʼmbali mwa nyanja aopsedwa ndi zimene zakuchitikira. Mafumu awo akuchita mantha ndipo nkhope zangoti khululu.
Ezekiel27:36 Anthu amalonda a mitundu ina akukunyogodola. Watha mochititsa mantha ndipo sudzakhalaponso mpaka muyaya.”
Ezekiel28:1 Yehova anandiyankhula nati:
Ezekiel28:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel28:3 Taona
Ezekiel28:4 Mwa nzeru zako ndi kumvetsa kwako unadzipezera chuma ndipo unasonkhanitsa golide ndi siliva mʼnyumba zosungira chuma chako.
Ezekiel28:5 Ndi nzeru zako zochitira malonda unachulukitsa chuma chako ndipo wayamba kunyada chifukwa cha chuma chakocho.
Ezekiel28:6 “ ‘Choncho Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti
Ezekiel28:7 Ine ndidzabwera ndi anthu achilendo
Ezekiel28:8 Iwo adzakuponyera ku dzenje ndipo udzafa imfa yoopsa mʼnyanja yozama.
Ezekiel28:9 Kodi udzanenabe kuti
Ezekiel28:10 Udzafa imfa ya anthu osachita mdulidwe mʼmanja mwa anthu achilendo. Ine ndayankhula zimenezi
Ezekiel28:11 Yehova anandiyankhula kuti:
Ezekiel28:12 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel28:13 Iwe unkakhala ngati mu Edeni
Ezekiel28:14 Ndinayika kerubi kuti azikulondera. Unkakhala pa phiri langa lopatulika
Ezekiel28:15 Makhalidwe ako anali abwino kuyambira pamene unalengedwa mpaka nthawi imene unayamba kuchita zoyipa.
Ezekiel28:16 Unatanganidwa ndi zamalonda. Zotsatira zake zinali zoti unachulukitsa zandewu ndi kumachimwa. Choncho ndinakuchotsa ku phiri langa lopatulika. Mkerubi amene ankakulondera uja anakupirikitsa kukuchotsa ku miyala yamoto.
Ezekiel28:17 Unkadzikuza mu mtima mwako chifukwa cha kukongola kwako
Ezekiel28:18 Ndi malonda ako achinyengo unachulukitsa machimo ako. Motero unayipitsa malo ako achipembedzo. Choncho ndinabutsa moto pakati pako
Ezekiel28:19 Anthu onse amitundu amene ankakudziwa akuchita mantha chifukwa cha iwe. Watheratu mochititsa mantha ndipo sudzakhalaponso mpaka muyaya.’ ”
Ezekiel28:20 Yehova anandiyankhula nati:
Ezekiel28:21 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel28:22 ‘Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti
Ezekiel28:23 Ndidzatumiza mliri pa iwe ndi kuchititsa magazi kuti ayende mʼmisewu yako. Anthu ophedwa ndi lupanga adzagwa mbali zonse. Pamenepo iwo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova.
Ezekiel28:24 “ ‘Nthawi imeneyo Aisraeli sadzakhalanso ndi anthu pafupi achipongwe amene ali ngati nthula zowawa ndi ngati minga zopweteka. Pamenepo iwo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Ambuye Yehova.
Ezekiel28:25 “ ‘Ine Ambuye Yehova mawu anga ndi awa: Nditasonkhanitsa Aisraeli kuchoka ku mayiko kumene anamwazikira
Ezekiel28:26 Adzakhala kumeneko mwamtendere ndipo adzamanga nyumba ndi kulima minda ya mpesa. Adzakhala kumeneko mwamtendere pamene ndidzalange anthu oyandikana nawo
Ezekiel29:1 Pa tsiku lakhumi ndi chiwiri la mwezi wakhumi
Ezekiel29:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel29:3 Uyiwuze mfumuyo kuti
Ezekiel29:4 Koma ndidzakukola ndi mbedza mʼkamwa mwako ndipo nsomba za mʼmitsinje yako zidzakangamira ku mamba ako. Tsono ndidzakutulutsa mu mtsinje mwakomo pamodzi ndi nsomba zimene zakangamira ku mamba ako.
Ezekiel29:5 Ndidzakutaya ku chipululu
Ezekiel29:6 Motero aliyense amene amakhala mu Igupto adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova. “ ‘Iwe unakhala ngati ndodo yabango ku Aisraeli.
Ezekiel29:7 Pamene anakugwira unathethekera mʼmanja mwawo ndi kucheka mapewa awo. Pamene anakutsamira
Ezekiel29:8 “ ‘Nʼchifukwa chake Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti
Ezekiel29:9 Dziko la Igupto lidzasanduka lopanda anthu. Pamenepo iwo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova. “ ‘Popeza iwe unati
Ezekiel29:10 nʼchifukwa chake Ine ndikudana nawe pamodzi ndi mitsinje yakoyo
Ezekiel29:11 Palibe phazi la munthu kapena la nyama limene lidzapondepo. Kudzakhala kopanda anthu kwa zaka makumi anayi.
Ezekiel29:12 Ndidzasandutsa dziko la Igupto kukhala chipululu ngati zipululu za mayiko ena. Kwa zaka makumi anayi mizinda yakenso idzakhala yopasuka pakati pa mizinda yopasuka. Ndipo ndidzathamangitsira Aigupto pakati pa mitundu ya anthu ndi kuwabalalitsira mʼmayiko.
Ezekiel29:13 “ ‘Komabe Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Pakutha pa zaka makumi anayi ndidzasonkhanitsa Aigupto onse kuchokera ku mayiko amene ndinawabalalitsirako.
Ezekiel29:14 Ndidzachotsa Aiguptowo ku ukapolo ndipo ndidzawabwezera ku Patirosi kumene anachokera. Kumeneko iwo adzakhala ufumu wotsika.
Ezekiel29:15 Udzakhala ufumu wotsika kwambiri kupambana maufumu ena onse ndipo sudzadzitukumula pakati pa mitundu ina. Ndidzawufowoketsa kwambiri kotero kuti sudzathanso kulamulira mitundu ya anthu.
Ezekiel29:16 Aisraeli sadzadaliranso Aigupto. Koma kuti chilango chawo chidzawakumbutsa tchimo lawo lija lofunafuna thandizo kuchokera ku Igupto. Pamenepo iwo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Ambuye Yehova.’ ”
Ezekiel29:17 Pa tsiku loyamba la mwezi woyamba
Ezekiel29:18 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel29:19 Nʼchifukwa chake Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti
Ezekiel29:20 Ndamupatsa Nebukadinezara Igupto ngati mphotho ya kulimbika kwake chifukwa iyo ndi gulu lake lankhondo anandigwirira ntchito
Ezekiel29:21 “Pa nthawi imeneyo ndidzapereka mphamvu yatsopano pa Aisraeli
Ezekiel30:1 Yehova anandiyankhula kuti:
Ezekiel30:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel30:3 Pakuti tsiku layandikira
Ezekiel30:4 Lupanga lidzabwera kudzalimbana ndi Igupto ndipo mavuto adzafika pa Kusi. Pamene anthu ambiri adzaphedwa mu Igupto
Ezekiel30:5 Kusi
Ezekiel30:6 “ ‘Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: “ ‘Onse othandiza Igupto adzaphedwa ndipo kunyadira mphamvu zake kudzatheratu. Adzaphedwa ndi lupanga kuyambira ku Migidoli mpaka ku mzinda wa Asiwani
Ezekiel30:7 “ ‘Dziko la Igupto lidzasanduka bwinja kupambana mabwinja ena onse opasuka
Ezekiel30:8 Nditatha kutentha Igupto ndi kupha onse omuthandiza
Ezekiel30:9 “ ‘Nthawi imeneyo ikadzafika
Ezekiel30:10 “ ‘Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti
Ezekiel30:11 Iye ndi gulu lake lankhondo
Ezekiel30:12 Ndidzawumitsa mtsinje wa Nailo ndi kugulitsa dziko la Igupto kwa anthu oyipa. Ndidzagwiritsa ntchito anthu achilendo kuti ndiwononge dzikolo pamodzi ndi zonse zili mʼmenemo. Ine Yehova ndayankhula.
Ezekiel30:13 “ ‘Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti
Ezekiel30:14 Ndidzasandutsa chipululu mzinda wa Patirosi
Ezekiel30:15 Ndidzakhuthulira ukali wanga pa mzinda wa Peluziumu
Ezekiel30:16 Ndidzatentha ndi moto dziko la Igupto; Peluziumu adzazunzika ndi ululu. Malinga a Thebesi adzagumuka
Ezekiel30:17 Anyamata a ku Oni ndi ku Pibeseti adzaphedwa ndi lupanga ndipo okhala mʼmizinda yake adzatengedwa ukapolo.
Ezekiel30:18 Ku Tehafinehezi kudzakhala mdima pamene ndidzathyola goli la Igupto; motero kunyada kwake kudzatha. Iye adzaphimbidwa ndi mitambo yakuda
Ezekiel30:19 Kotero ndidzalanga dziko la Igupto
Ezekiel30:20 Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri la mwezi woyamba wa chaka chakhumi ndi chimodzi
Ezekiel30:21 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel30:22 Nʼchifukwa chake Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti
Ezekiel30:23 Ndidzamwaza Aigupto pakati pa mitundu ya anthu ndikuwabalalitsira ku mayiko ambiri.
Ezekiel30:24 Ndidzalimbitsa manja a mfumu ya ku Babuloni
Ezekiel30:25 Ndidzalimbitsa manja a mfumu ya ku Babuloni
Ezekiel30:26 Ndidzamwaza Aigupto pakati pa mitundu ya anthu
Ezekiel31:1 Pa tsiku loyamba la mwezi wachitatu
Ezekiel31:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel31:3 Taonani
Ezekiel31:4 Madzi ndiwo ankawukulitsa mkungudzawo
Ezekiel31:5 Choncho unatalika kwambiri kupambana mitengo yonse ya mʼmunda. Nthambi zake zinachuluka ndi kutalika kwambiri
Ezekiel31:6 Mbalame zonse zamlengalenga zinkamanga zisa zake mʼnthambi za mtengowo. Nyama zakuthengo zonse zinkaswanirana mʼmunsi mwa nthambi zake. Mitundu yotchuka ya anthu inkakhala mu mthunzi wake.
Ezekiel31:7 Unali wokongola kwambiri
Ezekiel31:8 Mʼmunda wa Mulungu munalibe mkungudza wofanana nawo
Ezekiel31:9 Ine ndinawupanga wokongola wa nthambi zochuluka. Mitengo yonse ya mu Edeni
Ezekiel31:10 “ ‘Nʼchifukwa chake Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Chifukwa kuti mtengowo unatalika kwambiri
Ezekiel31:11 ndinawupereka mʼdzanja la mfumu ya mitundu ya anthu kuti awulange molingana ndi kuyipa kwake.
Ezekiel31:12 Anthu ankhanza kwambiri amitundu ya anthu achilendo adzawudula ndi kuwusiya. Nthambi zake zidzagwera pa mapiri ndi mu zigwa zonse. Nthambi zake zidzathyokera mʼmitsinje ya mʼdzikomo. Motero mitundu yonse ya anthu a dziko lapansi amene ankasangalala mu mthunzi wake idzawusiya.
Ezekiel31:13 Mbalame zonse zamlengalenga zidzakhala pa mtengo wakugwawo
Ezekiel31:14 Zidzakutero kuti pasakhalenso mitengo inanso ya mʼmbali mwa madzi yotalika kwambiri
Ezekiel31:15 “ ‘Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Pa nthawi imene mkungudzawo unatsikira ku manda
Ezekiel31:16 Mitundu ya anthu inagwedezeka pakumva mkokomo wa kugwa kwake
Ezekiel31:17 Amene ankakhala mu mthunzi wake
Ezekiel31:18 “ ‘Ndi mitengo iti ya mu Edeni imene ingafanane ndi kukongola kwako ndi ulemerero wako? Komabe iwenso
Ezekiel32:1 Pa tsiku loyamba la mwezi wa khumi ndi chiwiri
Ezekiel32:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu imba nyimbo ya maliro a Farao mfumu ya Igupto ndipo uyiwuze kuti
Ezekiel32:3 “Tsono Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti
Ezekiel32:4 Ndidzakuponya ku mtunda ndi kukutayira pansi. Ndidzabweretsa mbalame zamumlengalenga kuti zidzatere pa iwe
Ezekiel32:5 Ndidzayanika mnofu wako pa mapiri ndipo zigwa zidzadzaza ndi zotsalira zako.
Ezekiel32:6 Ndidzanyowetsa dziko ndi magazi ako
Ezekiel32:7 Ndikadzakuwononga
Ezekiel32:8 Zowala zonse zamumlengalenga ndidzazizimitsa; ndidzachititsa mdima pa dziko lako
Ezekiel32:9 Ndidzasautsa mitima ya anthu a mitundu yambiri pamene ndidzakupititsa ku ukapolo pakati pa mitundu ya anthu
Ezekiel32:10 Ine ndidzachititsa kuti anthu a mitundu yambiri adabwe nawe
Ezekiel32:11 “ ‘Pakuti ndikunena Ine Ambuye Yehova kuti
Ezekiel32:12 Ndidzachititsa gulu lako lankhondo kuti ligwe ndi lupanga la anthu amphamvu
Ezekiel32:13 Ndidzawononga ziweto zake zonse zokhala mʼmbali mwa madzi ambiri. Ku madziko sikudzaonekanso phazi la munthu kapena kudetsedwa ndi phazi la ziweto.
Ezekiel32:14 Pambuyo pake ndidzayeretsa madzi ake ndipo mitsinje yake idzayenda mokometsera ngati mafuta
Ezekiel32:15 Ndikadzasandutsa dziko la Igupto kukhala bwinja; ndikadzawononga dziko lonse ndi kukantha onse okhala kumeneko
Ezekiel32:16 “Mawu angawa adzakhala nyimbo ya maliro. Ana a akazi amitundu ya anthu adzayimba
Ezekiel32:17 Pa tsiku la 15 la mwezi woyamba
Ezekiel32:18 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel32:19 Ufunse kuti
Ezekiel32:20 Aigupto adzagwa pakati pa amene akuphedwa ndi lupanga. Lupanga ndi losololedwa kale. Iye adzaphedwa pamodzi ndi gulu lake lankhondo.
Ezekiel32:21 Mʼkati mwa manda atsogoleri amphamvu pamodzi ndi ogwirizana nawo azidzakambirana za Igupto nʼkumati
Ezekiel32:22 “Asiriya ali komweko ndipo ankhondo ake onse ali mʼmanda omuzungulira. Onsewo anaphedwa pa nkhondo.
Ezekiel32:23 Manda awo ali kumalo ozama a dzenje
Ezekiel32:24 “Elamu ali komweko ndipo ankhondo ake ali mʼmanda omuzungulira. Onsewa anaphedwa pa nkhondo
Ezekiel32:25 Amukonzera pogona pakati pa anthu ophedwa
Ezekiel32:26 “Mesaki ndi Tubala ali komweko
Ezekiel32:27 Iwo sanayikidwe mwaulemu ngati ankhondo amphamvu amakedzana
Ezekiel32:28 “Iwenso Farao
Ezekiel32:29 “Edomu ali kumeneko pamodzi ndi mafumu ake ndi akalonga ake onse. Ngakhale anali amphamvu
Ezekiel32:30 “Akalonga onse akumpoto pamodzi ndi anthu onse a ku Sidoni ali kumeneko. Anatsikira ku dziko la anthu akufa mwamanyazi ngakhale anali owopsa ndi mphamvu zawo. Iwo akugona osachita mdulidwe pamodzi ndi amene anaphedwa ndi lupanga ndipo akuchita manyazi pamodzi ndi iwo amene anatsikira kale ku manda.
Ezekiel32:31 “Farao ndi gulu lake lankhondo akadzawaona iwowa adzathunza mtima pokumbukira kuchuluka kwa gulu lake lankhondo limene linaphedwa pa nkhondo. Ndikutero Ine Ambuye Yehova.
Ezekiel32:32 Paja ankaopsa mʼdziko la anthu amoyo. Koma Faraoyo pamodzi ndi ankhondo ake onse adzayikidwa pamodzi ndi anthu osachita mdulidwe
Ezekiel33:1 Yehova anandiyankhula nati:
Ezekiel33:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu awuze anthu a mtundu wako kuti
Ezekiel33:3 Tsono iyeyo amati akaona nkhondo ikubwera amaliza lipenga kuti achenjeze anthuwo.
Ezekiel33:4 Wina aliyense akamva lipenga koma osasamala
Ezekiel33:5 Iye anamva kulira kwa lipenga koma sanalabadire. Ndiye kuti wadziphetsa yekha. Akanasamala kuchenjeza kwa mlonda akanapulumuka.
Ezekiel33:6 Koma ngati mlondayo aona lupanga likubwera ndipo osawomba lipengalo kuchenjeza anthu
Ezekiel33:7 “Tsono iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel33:8 Ndikawuza munthu woyipa kuti
Ezekiel33:9 Koma ngati uchenjeza munthu woyipa kuti aleke njira zake
Ezekiel33:10 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel33:11 Uwawuze kuti
Ezekiel33:12 “Tsono iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel33:13 Ngati ndiwuza munthu wolungama kuti adzafa ndithu
Ezekiel33:14 Ndipo ngati ndiwuza munthu woyipa kuti
Ezekiel33:15 monga kubweza chimene anatenga ngati chikole cha ngongole
Ezekiel33:16 Ndidzakhululuka machimo ake onse anachita. Iye wachita zimene ndi zolungama ndi zoyenera ndipo iye adzakhala ndi moyo ndithu.
Ezekiel33:17 “Komabe anthu a mtundu wako akunena kuti
Ezekiel33:18 Ngati munthu wolungama atembenuka ndi kuleka ntchito zake zolungama ndi kuyamba kuchita zoyipa
Ezekiel33:19 Ndipo ngati munthu woyipa atembenuka ndi kuleka ntchito zake zoyipa ndi kuyamba kuchita zolungama ndi zoyenera
Ezekiel33:20 Koma Inu Aisraeli
Ezekiel33:21 Pa tsiku lachisanu la mwezi wakhumi
Ezekiel33:22 Tsono madzulo ake munthuyo asanafike
Ezekiel33:23 Ndipo Yehova anandiyankhula kuti:
Ezekiel33:24 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel33:25 Choncho iwe uwawuze kuti Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti
Ezekiel33:26 Mumadalira lupanga lanu
Ezekiel33:27 “Uwawuze kuti Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti
Ezekiel33:28 Ndidzalisandutsa chipululu dzikolo
Ezekiel33:29 Ndikadzasandutsa dzikolo chipululu chifukwa cha zonyansa zimene ankachita
Ezekiel33:30 “Koma kunena za iwe
Ezekiel33:31 Anthu anga amabwera kwa iwe
Ezekiel33:32 Kunena zoona
Ezekiel33:33 “Koma zonsezi zikadzachitika
Ezekiel34:1 Yehova anandiyankhula kuti:
Ezekiel34:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel34:3 Mumadya chambiko
Ezekiel34:4 Simunalimbitse nkhosa zofowoka
Ezekiel34:5 Kotero zinabalalika chifukwa zinalibe mʼbusa
Ezekiel34:6 Nkhosa zanga zinayendayenda mʼmapiri onse ndi mʼzitunda zonse zazitali. Zinabalalika pa dziko lonse lapansi
Ezekiel34:7 “ ‘Choncho Inu abusa
Ezekiel34:8 Pali Ine wamoyo
Ezekiel34:9 Chifukwa chake
Ezekiel34:10 Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Ine ndayipidwa nanu
Ezekiel34:11 “ ‘Tsono Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti
Ezekiel34:12 Monga mʼbusa amanka nafunafuna nkhosa zake pamene zina zabalalikira kutali
Ezekiel34:13 Ndidzazitulutsa pakati pa mitundu ya anthu ndi kuzisonkhanitsa kuchokera ku mayiko ena
Ezekiel34:14 Ndidzaziwetera kumalo a msipu wabwino. Mapiri okwera a Israeli adzakhala malo azidyetserako. Kumeneko zidzapumula ku abusa abwino a msipu ndipo zizidzadyadi msipu wonenepetsa pa mapiri a Israeli.
Ezekiel34:15 Ine mwini wake ndidzaziweta nkhosa zanga ndi kuzilola kuti zipumule. Ndikutero Ine Ambuye Yehova.
Ezekiel34:16 Ndidzafunafuna zotayika ndi kubweza zosochera. Ndidzamanga mabala a zopweteka ndi kulimbikitsa zofowoka. Koma zonenepa ndi zamphamvu ndidzaziwononga. Ndidzaweta nkhosazo mwachilungamo.
Ezekiel34:17 “ ‘Kunena za inu
Ezekiel34:18 Kodi sikukukwanirani kudya msipu wabwino kuti muzichita kuponderezanso msipu umene simunadyewo? Kodi simukhutira ndi kumwa madzi abwino kuti muzinka mudetsanso madzi otsalawo ndi mapazi anu?
Ezekiel34:19 Kodi nkhosa zanga zidye zimene mwazipondaponda ndi kumwa madzi amene mwawadetsa ndi mapazi anu?
Ezekiel34:20 “ ‘Nʼchifukwa chake Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Taonani
Ezekiel34:21 Popeza zofowoka mumaziwomba ndi kuzikankhira kumbali
Ezekiel34:22 tsono Ine ndidzapulumutsa nkhosa zanga
Ezekiel34:23 Ndidzaziyikira mʼbusa mmodzi
Ezekiel34:24 Ine Yehova ndidzakhala Mulungu wake ndipo mtumiki wanga Davide adzakhala mfumu pakati pa nkhosazo. Ine Yehova ndayankhula.
Ezekiel34:25 “ ‘Ndidzapangana nazo pangano la mtendere. Ndidzachotsa mʼdzikomo zirombo zolusa. Choncho nkhosa zanga zidzakhala mu mtendere mu chipululu ngakhalenso mʼthengo.
Ezekiel34:26 Ndidzakhazika anthu anga pafupi ndi phiri langa loyera ndipo ndidzawadalitsa. Ndidzawagwetsera mvula pa nthawi yake ndipo idzakhala mvula ya madalitso.
Ezekiel34:27 Mitengo ya mʼminda idzabereka zipatso zake
Ezekiel34:28 Anthu amitundu ina sadzawafunkhanso ndipo sadzadyedwa ndi zirombo zakuthengo. Adzakhala mwamtendere ndipo palibe amene adzawaopseze.
Ezekiel34:29 Ndidzawapatsa zokolola zochuluka motero kuti sadzavutikanso ndi njala. Anthu a mitundu ina sadzawanyozanso.
Ezekiel34:30 Pamenepo iwo adzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova Mulungu wawo ndili nawo pamodzi
Ezekiel34:31 Inu ndinu nkhosa zanga
Ezekiel35:1 Yehova anandiyankhula kuti:
Ezekiel35:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel35:3 awawuze anthu a kumeneko kuti zimene ndikuyankhula Ine Ambuye Yehova ndi izi: Inu anthu a ku mapiri a Seiri ndikudana nanu. Ndidzatambasula dzanja langa kulimbana nanu
Ezekiel35:4 Mizinda yanu ndidzayisandutsa mabwinja
Ezekiel35:5 “Munali adani a Israeli nthawi zonse
Ezekiel35:6 Nʼchifukwa chake Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Pali Ine wamoyo
Ezekiel35:7 Phiri la Seiri ndidzalisandutsa chipululu ndipo ndidzapha onse amene amapita nabwerera kumeneko.
Ezekiel35:8 Ndidzaza mapiri ake ndi mitembo. Ophedwa pa nkhondo adzagwera pa zitunda zanu
Ezekiel35:9 Ndidzasandutsa dziko lanu kukhala chipululu mpaka muyaya
Ezekiel35:10 “Inu munanena kuti
Ezekiel35:11 Nʼchifukwa chake Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Pali Ine wamoyo
Ezekiel35:12 Ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova ndinamva mawu anu onse onyoza amene munanena molimbana ndi mapiri a Israeli. Inu munati
Ezekiel35:13 Mawu anu amene munayankhula monyada kundinyoza Ine ndinawamva.
Ezekiel35:14 Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Dziko lonse lapansi lidzasangalala pamene ndidzakusandutsani bwinja.
Ezekiel35:15 Monga momwe inu munasangalala pamene anthu anga Aisraeli anagwa
Ezekiel36:1 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel36:2 Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Mdani wanu ankanena kuti
Ezekiel36:3 Choncho nenera ndipo uwawuze kuti
Ezekiel36:4 choncho
Ezekiel36:5 Tsono Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Mu mkwiyo wanga woopsa ndinayankhula kuyimba mlandu mitundu ina yonse ya anthu makamaka a ku Edomu. Iwowa mwa chimwemwe chodzaza tsaya ndi mwa nkhwidzi analanda dziko langa ndi kulisandutsa lawo ndi kutengeratu dziko la msipu kukhala lawo.’
Ezekiel36:6 Nʼchifukwa chake
Ezekiel36:7 Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Ndikulumbira nditakweza dzanja langa kuti mitundu ya anthu idzatozedwanso.
Ezekiel36:8 “Koma Inu mapiri a Israeli mudzaphukanso nthambi ndipo mudzawabalira zipatso anthu anga a Israeli
Ezekiel36:9 Taonani
Ezekiel36:10 Ndidzachulukitsa chiwerengero cha anthu anu
Ezekiel36:11 Ndidzachulukitsa chiwerengero cha amuna pamodzi ndi ziweto zomwe
Ezekiel36:12 Ndidzachititsa anthu kuyenda pa inu
Ezekiel36:13 “Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Popeza anthu amanena kuti
Ezekiel36:14 nʼchifukwa chake
Ezekiel36:15 Sindidzakulolaninso kumva mnyozo wa anthu a mitundu ina
Ezekiel36:16 Yehova anandiyankhulanso kuti:
Ezekiel36:17 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel36:18 Tsono ndinawalanga chifukwa cha magazi amene anakhetsa mʼdzikomo
Ezekiel36:19 Ndinawamwaza pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina ndipo anabalalikira mʼmayiko onse. Ndinawalanga molingana ndi makhalidwe awo ndi zochita zawo.
Ezekiel36:20 Atafika kwa anthu a mitundu ina
Ezekiel36:21 Koma Ine ndinkadera nkhawa dzina langa loyera
Ezekiel36:22 “Nʼchifukwa chake awuze Aisraeliwo kuti Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Ine ndidzachita zimene ndidzachitezo osati chifukwa cha inuyo Aisraelinu ayi
Ezekiel36:23 Ndidzaonetsa chiyero cha dzina langa lotchuka
Ezekiel36:24 “Pakuti Ine ndidzakuchotsani pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina. Ndidzakusonkhanitsani kuchoka ku mayiko onse ndi kukubwezerani ku dziko lanulanu.
Ezekiel36:25 Ndidzakuwazani madzi oyera
Ezekiel36:26 Ndidzakupatsani mtima watsopano ndi kulowetsa mzimu watsopano mwa inu. Ndidzachotsa mwa inu mtima wanu wowuma ngati mwala ndi kukupatsani mtima wofewa ngati mnofu.
Ezekiel36:27 Ndipo ndidzayika Mzimu wanga mwa inu ndipo ndidzakuthandizani kutsatira malangizo anga ndi kukusungitsani mosamala kwambiri malamulo anga.
Ezekiel36:28 Mudzakhala mʼdziko limene ndinapatsa makolo anu. Mudzakhala anthu anga
Ezekiel36:29 Ndidzakupulumutsani ku zonse zokuyipitsani. Ndidzakuchulukitsirani tirigu ndipo sindidzakugwetseraninso njala.
Ezekiel36:30 Ndidzachulukitsa zipatso za mʼmitengo yanu ndi zokolola za mʼmunda mwanu
Ezekiel36:31 Pamenepo mudzakumbukira makhalidwe anu oyipa ndi ntchito zanu zoyipa. Machimo anu ndi ntchito zanu zonyansa zidzakuchititsa nokha manyazi.
Ezekiel36:32 Tsono dziwani kuti Ine sindidzachita zimenezi chifukwa cha inuyo ayi
Ezekiel36:33 “Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Pa tsiku limene ndidzayeretse machimo anu onse
Ezekiel36:34 Dziko limene linasanduka chipululu lizidzalimidwanso. Mʼmalo moti aliyense wopitamo alione dzikolo ngati chipululu tsopano adzaliona lolimidwa.
Ezekiel36:35 Iwo adzati
Ezekiel36:36 Ndipo anthu a mitundu ina okhala pafupi nanu amene anatsala adzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova ndine amene ndinamanganso mizinda yowonongeka ndi kudzalanso zinthu zatsopano mʼmalo mʼmene munali chipululu. Ine Yehova ndayankhula ndipo ndidzazichitadi.’
Ezekiel36:37 “Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Ndidzalolanso Aisraeli kuti andipemphe zoti ndiwachitire: Ndidzachulukitsa anthu awo ngati nkhosa.
Ezekiel36:38 Adzachulukadi ngati nkhosa zomwe ankapereka ngati nsembe ku Yerusalemu pa nthawi za chikondwerero. Choncho mizinda ya mabwinja idzadzaza ndi anthu. Zikadzatero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova.”
Ezekiel37:1 Dzanja la Yehova linali pa ine
Ezekiel37:2 Yehova anandiyendetsa uku ndi uku pakati pa mafupawo. Mafupawo anali ochuluka kwambiri mʼchigwa monsemo ndipo anali owuma kwambiri.
Ezekiel37:3 Tsono Yehova anandifunsa kuti
Ezekiel37:4 Pamenepo anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel37:5 Uwawuze kuti zimene Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikunena kwa mafupa ndi izi: Ndidzawuzira mpweya mwa inu
Ezekiel37:6 Ndidzakupatsani mitsempha ndi mnofu. Ndiponso ndidzakukutani ndi khungu. Pambuyo pake ndidzawuzira mpweya mwa inu ndipo mudzakhalanso ndi moyo. Pamenepo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova.”
Ezekiel37:7 Ndipo ndinanenera monga anandilamulira. Ndipo pamene ndinkanenera
Ezekiel37:8 Ine ndinayangʼana
Ezekiel37:9 Tsono Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel37:10 Choncho ndinanenera monga anandilamulira ndipo mpweya unalowa mwa iwo; apo anthu akufawo anakhala ndi moyo
Ezekiel37:11 Kenaka Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel37:12 Nʼchifukwa chake nenera ndi kuwawuza kuti
Ezekiel37:13 Ndipo inu
Ezekiel37:14 Ine ndidzayika Mzimu wanga mwa inu ndipo mudzakhalanso ndi moyo. Pambuyo pake ndidzakulowetsani mʼdziko lanulanu. Choncho mudzadziwa kuti Ambuye Yehova ndayankhula zimenezi
Ezekiel37:15 Yehova anandiyankhula kuti:
Ezekiel37:16 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel37:17 Ulumikize ndodo ziwirizi kuti zikhale ndodo imodzi mʼdzanja lako.
Ezekiel37:18 “Anthu a mtundu wako akadzakufunsa tanthauzo la zimenezi
Ezekiel37:19 iwe udzawawuze mawu awa a Ine Ambuye Yehova akuti
Ezekiel37:20 Ndodo ziwiri zimene udzalembepozo zikadzakhala mʼmanja mwako pamaso pa anthu onse
Ezekiel37:21 udzawawuze kuti Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Ndidzawachotsa Aisraeli pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina kumene anapita ku ukapolo. Ndidzawasonkhanitsa kuchokera ku mbali zonse ndi kubwera nawo ku dziko lawolawo.
Ezekiel37:22 Ndidzawasandutsa mtundu umodzi mʼdzikomo
Ezekiel37:23 Sadzadziyipitsanso ndi mafano awo
Ezekiel37:24 “ ‘Mtumiki wanga Davide adzakhala mfumu yawo
Ezekiel37:25 Iwo adzakhala mʼdziko limene ndinalipereka kwa mtumiki wanga Yakobo
Ezekiel37:26 Ndidzachita nawo pangano lamtendere; lidzakhala pangano lamuyaya. Ndidzawakhazikitsa ndi kuwachulukitsa
Ezekiel37:27 Nyumba yanga yokhalamo idzakhala pakati pawo; Ine ndidzakhala Mulungu wawo
Ezekiel37:28 Pamenepo anthu a mitundu ina adzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova ndiye amene ndimasandutsa Israeli kukhala woyera
Ezekiel38:1 Yehova anandiyankhula kuti:
Ezekiel38:2 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel38:3 Umuwuze mawu a Ine Ambuye Yehova akuti
Ezekiel38:4 Ndidzakuzunguza
Ezekiel38:5 Pamodzi ndi iwowo
Ezekiel38:6 Padzakhalanso Gomeri pamodzi ndi ankhondo ake onse ndiponso banja la Togarima ndi gulu lake lonse lankhondo lochokera kutali kumpoto. Padzakhaladi mitundu yambiri ya anthu pamodzi ndi iwe.
Ezekiel38:7 “ ‘Konzekani! Mukhaledi okonzeka
Ezekiel38:8 Pakapita masiku ambiri ndidzakuyitana. Zaka zikubwerazi ndidzakulowetsa mʼdziko limene lapulumuka ku nkhondo. Anthu ake anasonkhanitsidwa kuchokera ku mitundu ya anthu ambiri nʼkukakhazikika pa mapiri a Israeli amene kwa nthawi yayitali anali ngati chipululu. Anthu onsewa tsopano akukhala mwa mtendere.
Ezekiel38:9 Tsono iwe pamodzi ndi ankhondo ako onse ndiponso mitundu yambiri ya anthu imene ili nawe mudzabwera ngati mphepo yamkuntho. Mudzaphimba dziko lonse ngati mitambo.
Ezekiel38:10 “Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Pa tsiku limenelo mu mtima mwako mudzabwera maganizo ofuna kukonzekera kuchita zoyipa.
Ezekiel38:11 Iwe udzanena kuti
Ezekiel38:12 Ndipita kukalanda chuma chawo ndi kukafunkha zinthu zawo. Ndidzalimbana ndi midzi imene kale inali mabwinja. Ndikathira nkhondo anthu amene anasonkhanitsidwa kuchokera kwa anthu a mitundu ina. Iwowa ali ndi ziweto zambiri
Ezekiel38:13 Anthu a ku Seba
Ezekiel38:14 “Nʼchifukwa chake
Ezekiel38:15 Udzabwera kuchokera ku dziko lako kutali kumpoto
Ezekiel38:16 Udzabwera kudzalimbana ndi anthu anga Aisraeli ngati mtambo wophimba dziko. Masiku amenewo
Ezekiel38:17 “ ‘Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Kodi iwe si amene ndinayankhula za iwe masiku amakedzana kudzera mwa atumiki anga aneneri a Israeli? Pa zaka zambiri iwo ankalengeza kuti ndidzawutsa iwe kuti udzalimbane ndi Israeli.
Ezekiel38:18 Zimene chidzachitika pa tsiku limenelo ndi izi: Gogi akadzathira nkhondo dziko la Israeli
Ezekiel38:19 Chifukwa cha mkwiyo ndi ukali wanga woyakawo Ine ndikunenetsa kuti pa nthawi imeneyo padzakhala chivomerezi chachikulu mʼdziko la Israeli.
Ezekiel38:20 Nsomba za mʼnyanja
Ezekiel38:21 Ndidzawutsira Gogi nkhondo kuchokera ku mapiri anga. Ndikutero Ine Ambuye Yehova. Anthu a Gogiyo adzaphana okhaokha ndi malupanga.
Ezekiel38:22 Ine ndidzamulanga ndi mliri ndi imfa. Ndidzagwetsa mvula yoopsa ya matalala
Ezekiel38:23 Motero ndidzadzionetsa kuti ndine wamphamvu ndi woyera. Ndiponso ndidzadziwika pamaso pa anthu a mitundu ina yambiri. Momwemo adzadziwadi kuti Ine ndine Yehova.’ ”
Ezekiel39:1 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel39:2 Ine ndidzakuzunguza ndi kukupirikitsira kutsogolo. Ndidzakutenga kuchokera kutali kumpoto ndi kukutumiza kuti ukalimbane ndi anthu a ku mapiri a Israeli.
Ezekiel39:3 Kenaka Ine ndidzathyola uta wa mʼdzanja lako lamanzere ndipo ndidzagwetsa mivi ya mʼdzanja lako lamanja.
Ezekiel39:4 Udzagwa ku mapiri a ku Israeli
Ezekiel39:5 Udzafera pa mtetete kuthengo
Ezekiel39:6 Ndidzatumiza moto pa Magogi ndi pa onse amene amakhala mwamtendere mʼmbali mwa nyanja. Choncho adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova.’
Ezekiel39:7 “Ndidzachititsa kuti dzina langa loyera lidziwike pakati pa anthu anga Israeli. Sindidzalola kuti dzina langa liyipitsidwenso
Ezekiel39:8 Zikubwera! Ndipo zidzachitikadi
Ezekiel39:9 “Pamenepo okhala mʼmizinda ya Israeli adzatuluka ndipo adzasonkhanitsa zida zankhondo kuti zikhale nkhuni ndipo adzazitentha; zishango ndi lihawo
Ezekiel39:10 Iwo sadzatolera nkhuni kuthengo kapena kukadula ku nkhalango
Ezekiel39:11 “Pa tsiku limenelo ndidzamupatsa Gogi manda mu Israeli
Ezekiel39:12 “Nyumba ya Israeli idzakhala ikukwirira mitembo kwa miyezi isanu ndi iwiri ndi cholinga choyeretsa dziko.
Ezekiel39:13 Anthu onse a mʼdzikomo adzakwirira nawo mitembo. Ntchito imeneyo adzatchuka nayo pa tsiku limene ndidzaonetsa ulemerero wanga. Ndikutero Ine Ambuye Yehova.
Ezekiel39:14 “Patapita miyezi isanu ndi iwiri adzalemba ntchito anthu ena odzayenda mʼdziko lonse kufunafuna mitembo imene inatsalira nʼkumayikwirira. Choncho adzayeretseratu dzikolo.
Ezekiel39:15 Poyenda mʼdzikomo azidzati akaona fupa la munthu azidzayikapo chizindikiro pambali pake mpaka okumba manda atakalikwirira fupalo ku chigwa cha gulu lankhondo la Gogi.
Ezekiel39:16 (Komwekonso kudzakhala mzinda wotchedwa Gulu la nkhondo). Ndipo potero adzayeretsa dziko.
Ezekiel39:17 “Tsono iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel39:18 Mudzadya mnofu wa anthu ankhondo amphamvu ndi kumwa magazi a akalonga a dziko lapansi. Onsewo anaphedwa ngati nkhosa zazimuna
Ezekiel39:19 Ku phwando lansembe limene ndikukonzera inulo
Ezekiel39:20 Pa tebulo langa mudzakhuta pakudya akavalo ndi okwerapo ake
Ezekiel39:21 “Ine ndidzaonetsa ulemerero wanga pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina
Ezekiel39:22 Kuyambira tsiku limenelo mpaka mʼtsogolo Aisraeli adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wawo.
Ezekiel39:23 Ndipo anthu a mitundu ina adzadziwa kuti anthu a Israeli anatengedwa ukapolo chifukwa cha tchimo lawo
Ezekiel39:24 Ndinawachita zimenezi chifukwa cha kunyansa kwawo ndi zolakwa zawo
Ezekiel39:25 “Nʼchifukwa chake Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Tsopano ndidzakhazikanso pa bwino banja la Yakobo. Ndidzachitira chifundo Aisraeli onse
Ezekiel39:26 Anthuwo akadzakhala mwamtendere mʼdziko lawo popanda wina wowaopseza
Ezekiel39:27 Ndidzawabwezeranso kwawo kuchokera pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina ndipo ndidzawasonkhanitsa kuchokera ku mayiko a adani awo. Poteropo ndidzaonetsa pamaso pa anthu a mitundu yambiri kuti ndine Woyera.
Ezekiel39:28 Pamenepo iwo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wawo
Ezekiel39:29 Ine sindidzawabisiranso nkhope yanga
Ezekiel40:1 Kumayambiriro a chaka cha 25
Ezekiel40:2 Mʼmasomphenyawo Yehova ananditenga ndi kupita nane ku dziko la Israeli ndipo anandiyika pa phiri lalitali kwambiri
Ezekiel40:3 Atandifikitsa kumeneko ndinaona munthu wonyezimira ngati mkuwa. Iye anali atayima pa chipata ndipo mʼdzanja lake munali chingwe cha nsalu yabafuta ndi ndodo yoyezera.
Ezekiel40:4 Munthuyo anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel40:5 Ine ndinaona khoma litazungulira mbali zonse za Nyumba ya Mulungu. Mʼdzanja la munthuyo munali bango lopimira limene kutalika kwake kunali kwa mamita atatu. Atayeza chipupacho anapeza kuti kuchindikira kwake kunali mamita atatu
Ezekiel40:6 Anapita ku chipata chakummawa. Anakwera pa makwerero a nyumbayo
Ezekiel40:7 Kudutsa chiwundo choyambachi
Ezekiel40:8 Ndipo iye anayeza khonde la chipata ndipo chinali cha mamita atatu.
Ezekiel40:9 Anayeza khonde ndipo linali mamita anayi. Mphuthu zake zinali mita imodzi kuchindikira kwake. Khonde lamʼkati lapachipata linali kumapeto kwenikweni pafupi ndi Nyumba ya Mulungu.
Ezekiel40:10 Mʼkati mwa chipata chakummawa munali zipinda za alonda zitatu mbali iliyonse. Zitatu zonsezo zinali zofanana
Ezekiel40:11 Kenaka anayeza chipata cholowera; mulifupi mwake munali mamita asanu ndipo mulitali mwake munali mamita asanu ndi limodzi ndi theka.
Ezekiel40:12 Kutsogolo kwa chipinda chilichonse cha alonda kunali khoma lalifupi lotalika theka la mita
Ezekiel40:13 Ndipo anayeza kutalika kwa mulifupi mwa chipata cholowera
Ezekiel40:14 Anayezanso khonde lamʼkati ndipo linali la mamita makumi atatu. Ndipo mozungulira khondelo munali bwalo. Muyesowu sukuphatikiza khonde loyangʼanana ndi bwalo.
Ezekiel40:15 Kuchokera pa chipata cholowera mpaka ku mapeto a khonde la chipata
Ezekiel40:16 Makoma a zipinda ndiponso makoma a pakati pa zipindazo anali ndi mazenera. Khonde lamʼkati linalinso ndi mazenera mʼkati mwake. Pa makoma onsewo anajambulapo zithunzi za kanjedza.
Ezekiel40:17 Kenaka munthuyo anandilowetsa mʼbwalo lakunja
Ezekiel40:18 Utali wa mulifupi mwa msewuwo unkayenda mamita 27 kufanana ndi utali wa chipata cholowera. Uwu unali msewu wa mʼmunsi.
Ezekiel40:19 Tsono
Ezekiel40:20 Kenaka munthuyo anayeza mulitali ndi mulifupi mwa chipata chimene chimayangʼana kumpoto
Ezekiel40:21 Zipinda za alonda zimene zinalipo zitatu mbali iliyonse
Ezekiel40:22 Mipata yake
Ezekiel40:23 Panalinso chipata cholowera ku bwalo lamʼkati chofanana ndi chakummawa chimene chimayangʼanana ndi chipata chakumpoto
Ezekiel40:24 Ndipo munthuyo anapita nane ku mbali yakummwera ndipo ndinaona chipata chakummwera. Iye anayeza mphuthu zake ndi khonde ndipo zinali ndi miyeso yofanana ndi ya zina zija.
Ezekiel40:25 Mʼzipinda za chipata cholowera chimenechi ndi mʼkhonde lake munali mipata yofanana ndi ya mʼzipinda zina. Mulitali mwake munali mamita 27
Ezekiel40:26 Chipatacho chinali ndi makwerero asanu ndi awiri ndi khonde kotsirizira kwake. Chipindacho chinali ndi zojambula za kanjedza ku mbali zonse za makoma.
Ezekiel40:27 Bwalo lamʼkati linalinso ndi chipata kummwera. Munthuyo analiyeza kuchokera ku chipata chimenechi mpaka ku chipata chakunja. Kutalika kwake kunali mamita makumi asanu.
Ezekiel40:28 Ndipo munthu uja anandilowetsa mʼbwalo lamʼkati kudzera ku chipata chakummwera. Anayeza chipatachi ndipo chinali chofanana ndi zinzake zija.
Ezekiel40:29 Zipinda zake za alonda
Ezekiel40:30 (Khonde lililonse la makonde atatu a zipata zolowera bwalo lamʼkati aja linali la mamita ozungulira mʼbwalo lamʼkati anali mamita 13 mulitali mwake
Ezekiel40:31 Khonde lake linayangʼanana ndi bwalo lakunja. Pa mphuthu pake anajambulapo zithunzi za kanjedza mbali zonse ziwiri
Ezekiel40:32 Kenaka munthuyo anapita nane ku bwalo la mʼkati mbali ya kummawa
Ezekiel40:33 Zipinda zake za alonda
Ezekiel40:34 Khonde lake linayangʼanana ndi bwalo lakunja. Pa mphuthu pake anajambulapo zithunzi za kanjedza mbali zonse ziwiri
Ezekiel40:35 Kenaka anapita nane ku chipata chakumpoto ndipo anachiyeza. Chinali chofanana ndi zina zija.
Ezekiel40:36 Zipinda zake za alonda
Ezekiel40:37 Khonde lake limayangʼanana ndi bwalo lakunja. Pa mphuthu zake anajambulapo zithunzi za kanjedza mbali zonse ziwiri
Ezekiel40:38 Panali chipinda ndipo khomo lake linali pafupi ndi khonde la chipata cholowera chamʼkati. Mʼchipinda mʼmenemo ankatsukira nyama ya nsembe yopsereza.
Ezekiel40:39 Pa khonde la chipatacho panali matebulo awiri
Ezekiel40:40 Panali matebulo anayi
Ezekiel40:41 Choncho ku mbali imodzi ya chipata kunali matebulo anayi
Ezekiel40:42 Matebulo anayiwa anali a miyala yosema. Lililonse mulitali mwake linali la masentimita 75
Ezekiel40:43 Choncho pa matebulopo ankayikapo nyama za nsembe zopsereza. Mbedza zitatu zazitali ngati chikhatho amazikoleka pa makoma pozungulira ponse.
Ezekiel40:44 Munthu uja anapita nane mʼkati mwa bwalo ndipo ndinaona zipinda ziwiri. Chimodzi chinali pafupi ndi chipata chakumpoto kuyangʼana kummwera ndi china chinali pafupi ndi chipata chakummwera kuyangʼana kumpoto.
Ezekiel40:45 Munthuyo anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel40:46 ndipo chipinda chimene chikuyangʼana kumpoto ndi cha ansembe amene amayangʼanira guwa lansembe. Amenewa ndiwo ana a Zadoki
Ezekiel40:47 Kenaka munthuyo anayeza bwalo; linali lofanana mbali zonse kutalika kwake
Ezekiel40:48 Munthuyo anapita nane pa khonde la Nyumba ya Mulunguyo. Anayeza mphuthu za khondelo ndipo zinali mamita awiri ndi theka mbali zonse. Mulifupi mwa chipatacho munali mamita asanu ndi awiri ndipo mulifupi mwa makoma ake munali mamita awiri mbali zonse.
Ezekiel40:49 Mulitali mwa khonde munali mamita khumi
Ezekiel41:1 Ndipo munthuyo anapita nane mʼchipinda chopatulika cha Nyumba ya Mulungu ndipo anayeza khonde lake; mulifupi mwa khondelo munali mamita atatu mbali iliyonse kutalika kwake.
Ezekiel41:2 Mulifupi mwa khomo munali motalika mamita asanu. Makoma a mbali zonse anali a mamita awiri ndi theka mulifupi mwake. Anayezanso kutalika kwa chipinda chopatulika chija ndipo mulitali mwake munali motalika mamita makumi awiri ndi mulifupi mwake munali mamita khumi.
Ezekiel41:3 Kenaka munthuyo anakalowa mʼkati ndipo anayeza khonde la pa khomo; khondelo linali mita imodzi mulifupi mwake. Mulifupi mwa khondelo munali mamita atatu.
Ezekiel41:4 Ndiponso anayeza kutalika kwa chipinda chopatulika chenichenicho. Mulitali mwake munali mamita khumi
Ezekiel41:5 Tsono munthuyo anayeza khoma la Nyumba ya Mulungu; kuchindikira kwake kunali mamita atatu. Panalinso zipinda zina kuzungulira Nyumba ya Mulungu ndipo chilichonse chinali cha mamita awiri mulifupi wake.
Ezekiel41:6 Zipindazo zinali zitatu zosanjikizana. Chigawo chilichonse chinali ndi zipinda makumi atatu. Pa makoma a Nyumba ya Mulungu panali zochirikiza zipindazo kuti zisatsamire khoma la Nyumba ya Mulungu.
Ezekiel41:7 Zipinda za mʼmbalizo zinkapita zikulirakulira pomakwera chipinda ndi chipinda potsata kukulirakulira kwa zochirikiza za zipinda zija. Pambali pa Nyumba ya Mulungu panali makwerero okwerera pamwamba
Ezekiel41:8 Ndinaona chiwundo kuzungulira Nyumba ya Mulungu. Chinapanga maziko a zipindazo ndipo chinali cha mamita atatu.
Ezekiel41:9 Khoma lakunja la zipindazo linali la mamita awiri ndi theka kuchindikira kwake. Pakati pa chiwundocho
Ezekiel41:10 ndi zipinda za Nyumba ya Mulungu panali bwalo limeneli la mamita khumi kupingasa kwake kuzungulira Nyumba yonse ya Mulungu.
Ezekiel41:11 Zitseko za zipinda zamʼmbalizo zinali zotsekulira ku chiwundo. Chitseko chimodzi chinkayangʼana kumpoto ndipo china chinkayangʼana kummwera. Chiwundo chosamangapo kanthu chinali mamita awiri ndi theka kukula kwake kuzungulira ponseponse.
Ezekiel41:12 Nyumba imene inali chakummwera moyangʼanana ndi bwalo la Nyumba ya Mulungu inali mamita 35 mulifupi mwake. Khoma la nyumbayo linali mamita awiri ndi theka kuchindikira kwake kuzungulira ponseponse
Ezekiel41:13 Ndipo munthuyo anayeza Nyumba ya Mulungu ndipo mulitali mwake inali mamita makumi asanu. Nyumbayo ndi makoma ake
Ezekiel41:14 Kumaso kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu chakummawa kwa bwalolo mulifupi mwake munali mamita makumi asanu.
Ezekiel41:15 Kenaka anayeza kutalika kwa nyumba yoyangʼanana ndi bwalo chakumadzulo kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu
Ezekiel41:16 mazenera ndi maferemu ake
Ezekiel41:17 pamwamba pa khomo lolowera ku malo opatulika amʼkati komanso kuzungulira makoma onse kunja ndi mʼkati
Ezekiel41:18 anajambulapo zithunzi za kerubi mmodzi atakhala pakati pa kanjedza muwiri. Kerubi aliyense anali ndi nkhope ziwiri:
Ezekiel41:19 imodzi inali nkhope ya munthu yoyangʼana kanjedza mbali imodzi
Ezekiel41:20 Motero kuyambira pansi mpaka pamwamba pa khomo komanso pa makoma onse a chipinda chachikulu cha Nyumba ya Mulungu
Ezekiel41:21 Mphuthu za chipinda chachikulu cha Nyumba ya Mulungu kutalika kwake mbali zonse kunali kofanana. Ndipo kumaso kwa malo opatulika kunali chinthu china chooneka ngati
Ezekiel41:22 guwa lansembe la matabwa. Msinkhu wake unali mita imodzi ndi theka
Ezekiel41:23 Chipinda chachikulu chija chinali ndi zitseko ziwiri. Malo opatulika aja analinso ndi zitseko ziwiri.
Ezekiel41:24 Chitseko chilichonse chinali ndi zigawo ziwiri zopatukana.
Ezekiel41:25 Ndipo pa zitsekopo anajambulipo zithunzi za akerubi ndi kanjedza monga zomwe anajambulapo pa makoma. Kunja kwake kunali ngati denga lamatabwa pamwamba pa khonde lamʼkati.
Ezekiel41:26 Pa mbali zonse za khonde lamʼkatilo panali mazenera
Ezekiel42:1 Pambuyo pake munthuyo anapita nane ku bwalo lakunja chakumpoto ndipo anafika nane ku zipinda zoyangʼanana ndi bwalo la Nyumba ya Mulungu ndi nyumba ina yakumpoto.
Ezekiel42:2 Nyumba yakumpotoyi mulitali mwake munali mamita makumi asanu
Ezekiel42:3 Panali midadada iwiri
Ezekiel42:4 Kumaso kwa zipindazo kunali njira yamʼkati
Ezekiel42:5 Zipinda zammwamba zinali zazifupi mʼmimbamu kupambana zipinda zamʼmunsi ndi zipinda zapakati chifukwa njira zake zinatenga malo ambiri.
Ezekiel42:6 Popeza zipinda zinali zosanjikizana katatu ndipo zinalibe nsanamira monga za mabwalo
Ezekiel42:7 Panali khoma lakunja lomwe limatsatana ndi zipindazo kutsogolo kwake pambali pabwalo lakunja
Ezekiel42:8 Zipinda za mʼmbali mwa bwalo lakunja mulitali mwake munali mamita 25. Koma zomwe zinali mʼmbali mwa Nyumba ya Mulungu
Ezekiel42:9 Pansi pa zipinda zimenezi panali khomo chakummawa kuchokera ku bwalo lakunja kumene khoma lake linkayambira.
Ezekiel42:10 Mbali yakummwera kuyangʼanana ndi bwalo ndi nyumbayo kunali zipinda zina.
Ezekiel42:11 Kumaso kwa zipindazi kunali njira. Zipindazi mulitali mwake
Ezekiel42:12 ndi makomo a zipinda zakummwera. Kunali khomo mʼmbali ya kummawa kumene ankalowerako. Kunalinso khoma logawa zipinda.
Ezekiel42:13 Ndipo munthuyo anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel42:14 Pamene ansembe alowa ku malo opatulikawa
Ezekiel42:15 Munthuyo atamaliza kuyeza zimene zinali mʼkati mwa Nyumba ya Mulungu
Ezekiel42:16 Anayeza mbali yakummawa ndi ndodo yake yoyezera; kutalika kwake kunali mamita 250.
Ezekiel42:17 Anayeza mbali ya kumpoto ndi ndodo yake; kutalika kwake kunali mamita 250.
Ezekiel42:18 Munthuyo anayeza mbali yakummwera; kutalika kwake kunali mamita 250 atayeza ndi ndodo yake.
Ezekiel42:19 Kenaka anatembenukira ku mbali ya kumadzulo ndi kuyeza ndi ndodo yake; kutalika kwake kunali mamita 250 atayeza ndi ndodo yake.
Ezekiel42:20 Motero anayeza mbali zonse zinayi. Panali khoma lozungulira bwalolo mulitali mwake munali mamita 250 ndipo mulifupi mwake munalinso mamita 250. Khomalo linali lolekanitsa zinthu zoyera ndi zinthu wamba.
Ezekiel43:1 Pambuyo pake munthuyo anapita nane ku chipinda choyangʼana kummawa
Ezekiel43:2 ndipo ndinaona ulemerero wa Mulungu wa Israeli ukubwera kuchokera kummawa. Liwu lake linali ngati mkokomo wamadzi
Ezekiel43:3 Masomphenya amene ndinawaonawa anali ngati masomphenya amene ndinawaona pamene Yehova anabwera kudzawononga mzinda ndiponso ngati masomphenya amene ndinawaona ku mtsinje wa Kebara. Ndipo ndinadzigwetsa chafufumimba.
Ezekiel43:4 Ulemerero wa Yehova unalowa mʼNyumba ya Mulungu kudzera pa chipata choyangʼana kummawa.
Ezekiel43:5 Tsono Mzimu unandinyamula nundilowetsa mʼbwalo lamʼkati
Ezekiel43:6 Munthuyo ali chiyimire pambali panga
Ezekiel43:7 Iye anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel43:8 Ankamanga chiwundo chawo pafupi ndi chiwundo changa
Ezekiel43:9 Tsopano alekeretu kupembedza milungu ina ndipo achotseretu mitembo ya mafumu awo
Ezekiel43:10 “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel43:11 akachita manyazi ndi zoyipa zonse anachita
Ezekiel43:12 “Limeneli ndi lamulo la Nyumba ya Mulungu imene idzamangidwe pamwamba pa phiri. Malo ake onse ozungulira adzakhala oyera kwambiri. Limeneli ndilo lamulo la Nyumba ya Mulungu.
Ezekiel43:13 “Miyeso ya guwa lansembe ndi iyi: Pa tsinde pake padzakhala ngalande ya masentimita makumi asanu kuzama kwake ndi mulifupi mwake. Mʼphepete mwa ngalandeyo kuzungulira guwa lonse
Ezekiel43:14 Kuchokera mʼngalande ya pansi padzakhala mpaka pa phaka lapansi mita imodzi
Ezekiel43:15 Malo osonkhapo moto pa guwa
Ezekiel43:16 Malo osankhalapo moto pa guwa lansembe miyeso yake ndi yofanana mbali zonse. Mulitali mwake mudzakhala mamita asanu ndi limodzi ndipo mulifupi mwake mudzakhalanso mamita asanu ndi limodzi.
Ezekiel43:17 Phaka lapamwamba muyeso wake udzakhala wofanana mbali zonse. Mulitali mudzakhala mamita asanu ndi awiri ndiponso mulifupi mwake mudzakhalanso mamita asanu ndi awiri. Mkombero wake udzakhala wa masentimita 25 ndiponso ngalande yake yozungulira idzakhala ya masentimita 25. Makwerero a guwa lansembe adzayangʼana kummawa.”
Ezekiel43:18 Kenaka munthuyo anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel43:19 Udzawapatse ansembe
Ezekiel43:20 Udzatengeko magazi ake ena ndi kuwapaka pa nyanga zinayi za pa guwa lansembe
Ezekiel43:21 Udzatenge ngʼombe yayimuna yomwe yaperekedwa ngati nsembe yopepesera machimo
Ezekiel43:22 “Mmawa mwake udzatenge mbuzi yopanda chilema kuti nayonso iperekedwe ngati nsembe yopepesera machimo. Pambuyo pake idzayeretse guwa lansembe monga unachitira ndi ngʼombe yayimuna ija.
Ezekiel43:23 Utatha kuyeretsa guwa lansembelo
Ezekiel43:24 Udzapereke zonsezi pamaso pa Yehova
Ezekiel43:25 “Kwa masiku asanu ndi awiri
Ezekiel43:26 Kwa masiku asanu ndi awiriwo ansembe adzachite mwambo woyeretsa ndi kupatula guwa lansembelo.
Ezekiel43:27 Masiku amenewa atatha
Ezekiel44:1 Munthu uja anabwerera nane ku chipata chakunja kwa malo opatulika
Ezekiel44:2 Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel44:3 Kalonga yekha angathe kukhala mʼmenemo ndi kumadya chakudya pamaso pa Yehova. Iye adzalowere pa njira ya ku khonde lamʼkati ndi kutulukiranso njira yomweyo.”
Ezekiel44:4 Kenaka munthuyo anandidzeretsa pa chipata chakumpoto ndipo tinafika kumaso kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu. Nditapenyetsetsa ndinangoona ulemerero wa Yehova utadzaza mʼNyumba ya Mulungu
Ezekiel44:5 Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel44:6 Uwuze mtundu wopanduka wa Israeli kuti Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Inu Aisraeli
Ezekiel44:7 Munalowetsa alendo osachita mdulidwe mu mtima ndi mʼthupi momwe mʼNyumba yanga ndipotu anayipitsa Nyumba yanga. Pamene inu munkandipatsa chakudya changa ndi magazi omwe kuwonjezera pa zonyansa zanu zonse ndiye kuti munaphwanya pangano langa.
Ezekiel44:8 Mʼmalo moti muzisamalira zinthu zanga zopatulika
Ezekiel44:9 Ambuye Wamphamvuzonse akuti: Palibe mlendo wosachita mdulidwe mu mtima ndi mʼthupi ngakhalenso mlendo amene amakhala pakati pa Aisraeli amene adzalowe mʼmalo anga opatulika.
Ezekiel44:10 “Ndiponso Alevi amene anandisiya kutali pa nthawi imene Israeli anasochera potsata mafano
Ezekiel44:11 Adzangokhala atumiki chabe mʼmalo anga opatulika. Azidzayangʼanira zipata za Nyumba ya Mulungu ndi kugwira ntchito kumeneko. Azidzapha nyama za nsembe zopsereza ndi za nsembe zina za anthu. Choncho azidzayimirira pamaso pa anthu nʼkumawatumikira.
Ezekiel44:12 Iwowa ankatumikira anthu popembedza mafano awo
Ezekiel44:13 Iwo sayenera kufika pafupi ndi Ine ndi kunditumikira ngati ansembe
Ezekiel44:14 Komabe ndidzawayika kuti aziyangʼanira Nyumba yanga ndi kutumikira pa ntchito zake zonse zoyenera kuti zigwiridwe mʼmenemo.
Ezekiel44:15 “Koma ansembe
Ezekiel44:16 Okhawa ndiwo adzalowe ku malo anga opatulika ndi kudzayandikira tebulo langa kuti adzanditumikire. Amenewa okha ndiwo adzasamalire zinthu zanga.
Ezekiel44:17 “Pamene alowa ku zipata za bwalo lamʼkati azivala zovala zabafuta. Asamavale chovala china chilichonse cha ubweya wankhosa pamene akutumikira pa zipata za bwalo la mʼkati kapena kunja kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu.
Ezekiel44:18 Azivala nduwira za bafuta ndi kabudula wabafuta mʼkati. Asavale chilichonse chowachititsa thukuta.
Ezekiel44:19 Pamene atuluka ndi kupita ku bwalo lakunja kumene kuli anthu
Ezekiel44:20 “ ‘Ansembe asamamete mpala kapena kusunga tsitsi lalitali kwambiri
Ezekiel44:21 Wansembe asamwe vinyo pamene ali pafupi kulowa mʼbwalo la mʼkati.
Ezekiel44:22 Iwo asakwatire akazi amasiye kapena osudzulidwa; koma azikwatira anamwali osadziwa mwamuna a fuko la Israeli kapena akazi amasiye a ansembe anzawo.
Ezekiel44:23 Ansembe aziphunzitsa anthu anga kusiyanitsa pakati pa zinthu zopatulika ndi zinthu wamba
Ezekiel44:24 “ ‘Pakakhala milandu
Ezekiel44:25 “ ‘Wansembe asadziyipitse pokhudza munthu wakufa
Ezekiel44:26 Atatha kuyeretsedwa adikirebe masiku asanu ndi awiri kuti ayere ndithu.
Ezekiel44:27 Pa tsiku lomwe akukalowa mʼbwalo la mʼkati la malo opatulika kuti akatumikire
Ezekiel44:28 “ ‘Ansembe asadzakhale ndi cholowa chilichonse ayi. Cholowa chawo ndi Ine. Musadzawapatse chuma mu Israeli; Ine ndidzakhala chuma chawo.
Ezekiel44:29 Iwo azidzadya nsembe ya chakudya
Ezekiel44:30 Zabwino za zipatso zanu zoyambirira kucha ndiponso mphatso zanu zonse zapadera zidzakhala za ansembe. Inu muziwapatsa chigawo choyamba cha ufa wanu kuti pa nyumba panu pakhale madalitso.
Ezekiel44:31 Ansembe sayenera kudya kalikonse kofa kokha
Ezekiel45:1 “ ‘Mukamadzagawa dziko kuti fuko lililonse lilandire cholowa chake
Ezekiel45:2 Mʼkati mwa chigawo chimenechi
Ezekiel45:3 Mʼchigawo chopatulikacho muyeze malo a makilomita 12 ndi theka mulitali mwake
Ezekiel45:4 Malo opatulika amenewa adzakhalanso a ansembe amene amatumikira ku malo opatulika
Ezekiel45:5 Alevi otumikira ku Nyumba ya Mulungu adzakhala ndi malo a makilomita khumi ndi awiri ndi theka mulitali mwake ndi makilomita asanu mulifupi mwake. Kumeneko ndiko kudzakhale midzi yawo.
Ezekiel45:6 “ ‘Moyandikana ndi malo opatulika
Ezekiel45:7 “ ‘Mfumu idzakhale ndi malo okhudzana ndi chigawo cha malo opatulika ndi cha mzinda. Malowo ayandikane ndi zigawozo chakummawa ndi chakumadzulo. Malowo atalike ngati chigawo chimodzi cha fuko la Israeli kuyambira ku malire akummawa mpaka ku malire akumadzulo.
Ezekiel45:8 Malowa adzakhala chigawo cha mfumu mu Israeli. Choncho mafumu anga sadzazunzanso anthu anga
Ezekiel45:9 “ ‘Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Tsono pakwana
Ezekiel45:10 Miyeso yanu yoyezera zinthu monga efa ndi bati zizikhala zokhulupirika.
Ezekiel45:11 Efa ndi bati ikhale miyeso yolingana kukula kwake. Muyeso wa homeri ukhale wokwanira mabati khumi
Ezekiel45:12 Muyeso wa sekeli ukhale wokwanira magera makumi awiri. Muyeso wa mina ukhale wolemera masekeli 60.
Ezekiel45:13 “ ‘Zopereka zomwe mudzidzapereka ndi izi: chimodzi mwa zigawo 60 za tirigu
Ezekiel45:14 Gawo loyenera la mafuta
Ezekiel45:15 Muperekenso nkhosa imodzi pa gulu lankhosa 200 za pa msipu wabwino wa mu Israeli. Izi zidzagwiritsidwa ntchito monga nsembe za chakudya
Ezekiel45:16 Anthu onse a mʼdzikomo azidzapereka zimenezi kwa mfumu ya Israeli.
Ezekiel45:17 Udzakhala udindo wa mfumu kupereka zofunikira ku nsembe zopsereza
Ezekiel45:18 “ ‘Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Pa tsiku loyamba la mwezi woyamba muzitenga mwana wangʼombe wamwamuna wopanda chilema ndi kuchita mwambo woyeretsa malo opatulika.
Ezekiel45:19 Wansembe atengeko magazi a nsembe yopepesera machimoyo ndipo awapake pa mphuthu za Nyumba ya Mulungu
Ezekiel45:20 Muzichita chimodzimodzi pa tsiku la chisanu ndi chiwiri la mwezi
Ezekiel45:21 “ ‘Pa tsiku la 14 la mwezi woyamba muzichita chikondwerero cha Paska
Ezekiel45:22 Pa tsiku loyamba la chikondwererocho
Ezekiel45:23 Pa masiku asanu ndi awiri a chikondwererocho
Ezekiel45:24 Pamodzi ndi ngʼombe iliyonse yayimuna ndi nkhosa iliyonse yayimuna
Ezekiel45:25 “ ‘Pa nthawi ya chikondwerero cha masiku asanu ndi awiri
Ezekiel46:1 “Ambuye Yehova akuti
Ezekiel46:2 Mfumu izilowa podzera mʼkhonde la mʼkati la chipata pochokera kunja
Ezekiel46:3 Anthu a mʼdziko azipembedza pamaso pa Yehova pa khomo la chipata chimenechi pa masiku a sabata ndi pa tsiku la mwezi watsopano.
Ezekiel46:4 Nsembe yopsereza imene mfumu iyenera kupereka kwa Yehova ikhale motere: pa tsiku la Sabata izipereka ana ankhosa aamuna asanu ndi mmodzi wopanda chilema
Ezekiel46:5 Pamodzi ndi nkhosa yayimuna
Ezekiel46:6 Pa tsiku la mwezi watsopano mfumuyo ipereke mwana wangʼombe wamwamuna
Ezekiel46:7 Ipereke efa imodzi ya tirigu pa ngʼombe yayimuna iliyonse ndiponso efa ina pa nkhosa yayimuna iliyonse. Pa ana ankhosa ipereke tirigu monga ikufunira kutero. Pamodzi ndi efa ya tirigu
Ezekiel46:8 Pamene mfumu ikulowa
Ezekiel46:9 “Anthu a mʼdzikomo akabwera kudzapembedza Yehova pa masiku a chikondwerero
Ezekiel46:10 Mfumu izidzakhala pakati pawo. Anthu akamadzalowa mfumu idzalowa nawo. Anthu akamadzatuluka mfumu idzatuluka nawo.
Ezekiel46:11 “Pa masiku achikondwerero ndi pa masiku ena osankhidwa
Ezekiel46:12 Pamene mfumu ikufuna kupereka chopereka chaufulu kwa Yehova
Ezekiel46:13 “Tsiku lililonse nthawi ya mmawa azipereka kwa Yehova mwana wankhosa wa chaka chimodzi.
Ezekiel46:14 Pamodzi ndi nyamayo aziperekanso mmawa uliwonse chopereka cha chakudya chokwanira chimodzi mwa zigawo zisanu ndi chimodzi za efa. Aziperekanso chimodzi mwa zigawo zitatu za hini ya mafuta okandira ufa wosalala. Chopereka cha chakudya chimenechi chiziperekedwa kwa Yehova nthawi zonse mwa lamulo.
Ezekiel46:15 Motero azipereka mwana wankhosa ndi chopereka cha chakudya ndi mafuta mmawa uliwonse kuti zikhale nsembe zopsereza za tsiku ndi tsiku.
Ezekiel46:16 “ ‘Ine Ambuye Yehova ndikuti: Ngati kalonga apereka mphatso chigawo cha cholowa chake kwa mmodzi mwa ana ake
Ezekiel46:17 Koma ngati ipereka mphatso yotere kuchokera pa cholowa chake kwa mmodzi mwa antchito ake
Ezekiel46:18 Kalonga asalande cholowa chilichonse cha anthu
Ezekiel46:19 Kenaka munthu uja anandidzeretsa pa khomo la pambali pa chipata nandilowetsa ku zipinda za ansembe zoyangʼana kumpoto. Ndipo ndinaona kumeneko malo chakumadzulo kwa zipindazo.
Ezekiel46:20 Munthuyo anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel46:21 Pambuyo pake anandilowetsa mʼbwalo lakunja napita nane ku ngodya zinayi za bwalolo. Ndipo ndinaona mʼkati mwa ngodya iliyonse bwalo lina.
Ezekiel46:22 Motero pa ngodya zinayi za bwalo panalinso mabwalo ena angʼonoangʼono. Mabwalo amenewa anali ofanana. Mulitali mwake munali mamita makumi awiri ndipo mulifupi mwake munali mamita khumi ndi asanu.
Ezekiel46:23 Kuzungulira mabwalo anayi angʼonoangʼono aja panali mpanda wamiyala
Ezekiel46:24 Munthuyo anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel47:1 Munthuyo anabwerera nane ku chipata cha Nyumba ya Mulungu. Ndinaona madzi akutuluka kunsi kwa chiwundo cha Nyumba ya Mulungu chakummawa; poti Nyumba ya Mulungu inayangʼana kummawa. Madziwo ankachokera kunsi kwa mbali yakummwera ya Nyumba ya Mulungu; kummwera kwa guwa lansembe.
Ezekiel47:2 Ananditulutsira pa chipata chakumpoto ndipo anazungulira nane panja mpaka ku chipata chakunja choyangʼana kummawa. Ndipo ndinaona madzi akutuluka chakummwera kwa chipatacho.
Ezekiel47:3 Munthuyo anapita chakummawa ali ndi chingwe choyezera mʼdzanja lake. Iye anayeza mamita 500
Ezekiel47:4 Anayezanso mamita 500 ndipo analowa nane mʼmadzi amene amalekeza mʼmawondo. Iye anayezanso mamita 500 ndipo analowa nane mʼmadzi amene amalekeza mʼchiwuno.
Ezekiel47:5 Munthuyo anayezanso mamita 500
Ezekiel47:6 Munthuyo anandifunsa kuti: “Iwe mwana wa munthu
Ezekiel47:7 Nditafika pa gombepo
Ezekiel47:8 Tsono munthuyo anandiwuza kuti
Ezekiel47:9 Kulikonse kumene mtsinjewo ukuyenda cholengedwa chilichonse chidzakhala ndi moyo. Nsombanso zidzakhala zambiri. Paja madzi amenewa amapita kumeneko kuti akakometse madzi ena. Choncho kulikonse kumene madziwa akuyenda chilichonse chidzakhala ndi moyo.
Ezekiel47:10 Asodzi adzayima mʼmbali mwa Nyanja Yakufa. Pakuti kuchokera ku Eni-Gedi mpaka ku Eni Egilaimu kudzakhala malo oponyako makoka. Kudzakhala nsomba zamitundumitundu
Ezekiel47:11 Koma mathawale ake ndi maiwe ake sadzakhala ndi madzi abwino; adzakhala ndi madzi a mchere.
Ezekiel47:12 Mʼmbali zonse za mtsinje mudzamera mitengo ya zipatso zakudya za mtundu uliwonse. Masamba ake sadzafota kapena kulephera kubereka zipatso. Izidzabereka mwezi uliwonse
Ezekiel47:13 Ambuye Yehova akuti
Ezekiel47:14 Mudzawagawire dzikolo mofanana. Paja ndinalumbira kwa makolo anu kuti dzikoli lidzakhala lanulanu.
Ezekiel47:15 “Malire a dzikolo adzakhala motere: Mbali ya kumpoto adzachokera ku Nyanja Yayikulu kutsata msewu wa ku Hetiloni mpaka ku chipata cha Hamoti ndi kupitirira ku Zedadi
Ezekiel47:16 Berota ndi Sibraimu (mizinda imene ili pakati pa malire a Damasiko ndi Hamati mpaka kukafika ku Hazeri Hatikoni mzinda umene uli mʼmalire mwa Haurani.
Ezekiel47:17 	Motero malire akumpoto adzachokera ku nyanja mpaka ku mzinda wa Hazari-Enoni
Ezekiel47:18 	Mbali ya kummawa malire adzayenda pakati pa Haurani ndi Damasiko
Ezekiel47:19 	Mbali yakummwera malire adzayenda kuchokera ku dziwe la mzinda wa Tamara mpaka ku madzi a ku Meriba Kadesi. Kenaka ndi kutsata chigwa cha ku Igupto mpaka ku Nyanja Yayikulu. Awa adzakhala malire akummwera.
Ezekiel47:20 Mbali ya kumadzulo
Ezekiel47:21 “Mugawane dziko limeneli pakati panu potsata mafuko a Israeli.
Ezekiel47:22 Muligawe kuti likhale cholowa chanu ndiponso cholowa cha alendo amene akukhala pakati panu
Ezekiel47:23 Mu fuko lililonse kumene mlendoyo akukhala mumupatse cholowa chake.” Ndikutero Ine Ambuye Yehova.
Ezekiel48:1 “Nawa mayina a mafuko a Israeli: Dani adzakhala ndi chigawo chimodzi kuyambira kumalire akumpoto kuchokera ku nyanja kudzera ku Hetiloni mpaka ku chipata cha Hamati
Ezekiel48:2 “Aseri adzakhala ndi chigawo chimodzi. Chidzachita malire ndi dziko la Dani kuchokera kummawa mpaka kumadzulo.
Ezekiel48:3 “Nafutali adzakhala ndi chigawo chimodzi. Chidzachita malire ndi dziko la Aseri kuchokera kummawa mpaka kumadzulo.
Ezekiel48:4 “Manase adzakhala ndi chigawo chimodzi. Chidzachita malire ndi dziko la Nafutali kuchokera kummawa mpaka kumadzulo.
Ezekiel48:5 “Efereimu adzakhala ndi chigawo chimodzi. Chidzachita malire ndi dziko la Manase kuchokera kummawa mpaka kumadzulo.
Ezekiel48:6 “Rubeni adzakhala ndi chigawo chimodzi. Chidzachita malire ndi Efereimu kuchokera kummawa mpaka kumadzulo.
Ezekiel48:7 “Yuda adzakhala ndi chigawo chimodzi. Chidzachita malire ndi Rubeni kuchokera kummawa mpaka kumadzulo.
Ezekiel48:8 “Kuchita malire ndi Yuda kuchokera kummawa mpaka kumadzulo padzakhala chigawo chimene mudzachipereke ngati mphatso yapadera. Mulifupi mwake mudzakhala makilomita khumi ndi awiri ndi theka
Ezekiel48:9 “Chigawo chapadera chimene mudzachipereke kwa Yehova mulitali mwake mudzakhala makilomita khumi ndi awiri ndi theka ndipo mulifupi mwake makilomita asanu.
Ezekiel48:10 Ichi chidzakhala chigawo chopatulika cha ansembe ndipo chidzagawidwe motere: Mbali ya kumpoto kutalika kwake kudzakhala makilomita khumi ndi awiri ndi theka
Ezekiel48:11 Chimenechi chidzakhala chigawo cha ansembe opatulika
Ezekiel48:12 Chigawochi
Ezekiel48:13 “Moyandikana ndi chigawo cha ansembe
Ezekiel48:14 Asagulitse kapena kusinthitsa mbali iliyonse ya chigawo chimenechi. Ichi ndi chigawo chabwino kwambiri ndipo chisapatsidwe kwa anthu ena
Ezekiel48:15 “Chigawo chotsala mulifupi mwake makilomita awiri ndi theka ndipo mulitali mwake makilomita khumi ndi awiri ndi theka
Ezekiel48:16 Miyeso yake ndi iyi: kumpoto kutalika kwake kudzakhala mamita 2
Ezekiel48:17 Chigawo cha mzinda chodyetsera ziweto chidzakhala motere: kumpoto kutalika kwake kudzakhala mamita 125
Ezekiel48:18 Chigawo chotsala
Ezekiel48:19 Anthu ogwira ntchito mu mzinda amene adzalime mʼmundamo adzachokera ku mafuko onse a Israeli.
Ezekiel48:20 Chigawo chopatulika chonsechi chidzakhale makilomita khumi ndi awiri ndi theka mbali zonse. Ndiye kuti
Ezekiel48:21 “Tsono chigawo chotsala pambali zonse ziwiri za chigawo chopatulika ndi za kadziko ka mzinda
Ezekiel48:22 Choncho chigawo cha Alevi ndi chigawo cha mzinda zidzakhala ndi chigawo chimodzi. Chidzayambira mbali ya kummawa mpaka ya kumadzulo kwa dziko la Benjamini.
Ezekiel48:23 “Za mafuko ena otsala zidzayenda motere: Benjamini adzakhala ndi chigawo chimodzi. Chidzayambira mbali ya kummawa mpaka ya kumadzulo.
Ezekiel48:24 “Simeoni adzakhala ndi chigawo chimodzi. Chidzachita malire ndi chigawo cha Benjamini kuchokera kummawa mpaka kumadzulo.
Ezekiel48:25 “Isakara adzakhala ndi chigawo chimodzi. Chidzachita malire ndi chigawo cha Simeoni kuchokera kummawa mpaka kumadzulo.
Ezekiel48:26 “Zebuloni adzakhala ndi chigawo chimodzi. Chidzachita malire ndi chigawo cha Isakara kuchokera kummawa mpaka kumadzulo.
Ezekiel48:27 “Gadi adzakhala ndi chigawo chimodzi. Chidzachita malire ndi chigawo cha Zebuloni kuchokera kummawa mpaka kumadzulo.
Ezekiel48:28 “Malire a Gadi a mbali yakummwera ku Negevi adzayenda kuchokera ku Tamara mpaka ku dziwe la Meriba Kadesi komanso kuchokera ku Mtsinje wa Igupto mpaka ku Nyanja Yayikulu.
Ezekiel48:29 “Ili ndilo dziko limene mudzagawire mafuko a Israeli kuti likhale cholowa. Zimenezi zidzakhala zigawo zawo
Ezekiel48:30 “Izi ndizo zidzakhale zipata zotulukira mzinda
Ezekiel48:31 kudzakhale zipata zitatu izi: cha Rubeni
Ezekiel48:32 “Mbali ya kummawa
Ezekiel48:33 “Mbali yakummwera
Ezekiel48:34 “Mbali ya kumadzulo
Ezekiel48:35 “Choncho kutalika kwa mzinda kuzungulira kwake kudzakhala mamita 9
Daniel1:1 Chaka chachitatu cha ufumu wa Yehoyakimu mfumu ya Yuda
Daniel1:2 Ndipo Ambuye anapereka Yehoyakimu mfumu ya ku Yuda mʼdzanja lake
Daniel1:3 Tsono mfumu inalamula Asipenazi
Daniel1:4 achinyamata wopanda chilema
Daniel1:5 Ndipo mfumu imawapatsa tsiku ndi tsiku gawo la chakudya ndi vinyo wa ku nyumba yaufumu
Daniel1:6 Pakati pa amenewa panali ena ochokera ku Yuda: Danieli
Daniel1:7 Mkulu wa nduna za mfumu anawapatsa mayina atsopano: Danieli anamutcha Belitesezara; Hananiya anamutcha Sadirake; Misaeli anamutcha Mesaki; ndi Azariya anamutcha Abedenego.
Daniel1:8 Koma Danieli anatsimikiza mtima kuti asadzidetse ndi chakudya ndi vinyo wa mfumu
Daniel1:9 Ndipo Mulungu anafewetsa mtima wa ndunayo kuti amukomere mtima ndi kumuchitira chifundo Danieli
Daniel1:10 koma ndunayo inamuwuza Danieli kuti
Daniel1:11 Ndipo Danieli anati kwa kapitawo amene anali mkulu wa nduna za mfumu amene anamuyika kuti ayangʼanire Danieli
Daniel1:12 “Chonde mutiyese ife akapolo anu pa masiku khumi: mutipatse masamba okha kuti tidye ndi madzi akumwa.
Daniel1:13 Ndipo mudzafananize maonekedwe athu ndi a anyamata amene akudya chakudya cha mfumu
Daniel1:14 Choncho anawavomera ndipo anawayesa pa masiku khumi.
Daniel1:15 Pakutha pa masiku khumi iwo anaoneka athanzi ndi odya bwino kuposa aliyense wa anyamata amene ankadya chakudya cha mfumu aja.
Daniel1:16 Choncho kapitawo anawachotsera chakudya ndi vinyo za ku nyumba yaufumu zija nawapatsa ndiwo zamasamba basi.
Daniel1:17 Kwa anyamata anayiwa Mulungu anapereka chidziwitso ndi kuzindikira bwino mitundu yonse ya zolembedwa ndi za maphunziro. Ndipo Danieli ankatanthauzira masomphenya ndi maloto a mitundu yonse.
Daniel1:18 Ndipo kumapeto kwa masiku amene mfumu inayika kuti adzaonetse anyamatawa ku nyumba yake
Daniel1:19 Mfumu inayankhula nawo
Daniel1:20 Nthawi zonse mfumu ikawafunsa zonse zofuna nzeru ndi chidziwitso
Daniel1:21 Ndipo Danieli anali kumeneko mpaka chaka choyamba cha ufumu wa Koresi.
Daniel2:1 Chaka chachiwiri cha ulamuliro wake
Daniel2:2 Tsono mfumu inayitana amatsenga
Daniel2:3 mfumuyo inawawuza kuti
Daniel2:4 Pamenepa alawuli anati kwa mfumu mʼChiaramu
Daniel2:5 Mfumu inayankha alawuliwo kuti
Daniel2:6 Koma ngati mundiwuza zimene ndalota ndi tanthauzo lake
Daniel2:7 Iwo anayankhanso kachiwiri kuti
Daniel2:8 Ndipo mfumu inayankha kuti
Daniel2:9 Ngati simundiwuza zimene ndalota
Daniel2:10 Alawuli anayankha mfumu kuti
Daniel2:11 Zimene mfumu yafunsa ndi zapatali. Palibe wina amene angathe kuwulula izi kwa mfumu kupatula milungu
Daniel2:12 Zimenezi zinapsetsa mtima mfumu ndipo inakwiya kwambiri kotero inalamula kuti anzeru onse a ku Babuloni aphedwe.
Daniel2:13 Choncho lamulo linaperekedwa kuti anthu anzeru aphedwe
Daniel2:14 Danieli anayankhula mwanzeru ndi mwaulemu kwa Ariyoki
Daniel2:15 Danieli anafunsa Ariyoki kapitawo wa mfumu kuti
Daniel2:16 Danieli anapita mofulumira kwa mfumu ndipo anamupempha kuti amupatse nthawi kuti amuwuze zimene walota ndi tanthauzo lake.
Daniel2:17 Kenaka Danieli anabwerera ku nyumba kwake ndi kukafotokozera anzake aja zimenezi: Hananiya
Daniel2:18 Danieli anadandaulira anzake kuti apemphe kwa Mulungu wakumwamba kuti awachitire chifundo ndi kumuwululira chinsinsi
Daniel2:19 Usiku Yehova anamuwululira Danieli chinsinsi chija mʼmasomphenya. Pamenepo Danieli anatamanda Mulungu wakumwamba
Daniel2:20 ndipo anati: “Litamandike dzina la Mulungu ku nthawi za nthawi; nzeru ndi mphamvu zonse ndi zake.
Daniel2:21 Amasintha nthawi ndi nyengo; amakweza mafumu ndipo amawatsitsanso. Amapatsa nzeru kwa anzeru ndi chidziwitso kwa ozindikira zinthu.
Daniel2:22 Amavumbulutsa zinthu zozama ndi zobisika; amadziwa zimene zili mu mdima
Daniel2:23 Ndikuyamika ndi kutamanda Inu Mulungu wa makolo anga: mwandipatsa nzeru ndi mphamvu
Daniel2:24 Motero Danieli anapita kwa Ariyoki
Daniel2:25 Ariyoki anapita naye Danieli kwa mfumu nthawi yomweyo ndipo anati
Daniel2:26 Mfumu inafunsa Danieli (wotchedwanso Belitesezara) kuti
Daniel2:27 Danieli anayankha kuti
Daniel2:28 koma kuli Mulungu kumwamba amene amawulula zinsinsi. Iye waonetsera mfumu Nebukadinezara zimene zidzachitika mʼmasiku akutsogolo. Maloto ndi masomphenya anu amene munawaona mukugona pa bedi lanu ndi awa:
Daniel2:29 “Mukugona pa bedi
Daniel2:30 Koma chinsinsi ichi chavumbulutsidwa kwa ine
Daniel2:31 “Inu mfumu
Daniel2:32 Mutu wa chowumbacho unali wagolide wabwino kwambiri. Chifuwa ndi manja ake zinali zasiliva. Mimba ndi ntchafu zake zinali zamkuwa.
Daniel2:33 Miyendo yake inali yachitsulo
Daniel2:34 Inu mukuona
Daniel2:35 Tsono chitsulo
Daniel2:36 “Maloto aja ndi amenewa; tidzafotokoza tanthauzo lake kwa mfumu.
Daniel2:37 Inu mfumu
Daniel2:38 Iye anayika mʼmanja mwanu anthu ndi nyama zakuthengo ndi mbalame zamlengalenga. Kulikonse kumene zikhala
Daniel2:39 “Pambuyo pa inu
Daniel2:40 Pomaliza
Daniel2:41 Ndipo monga munaonera kuti mapazi ndi zala zake zinali za chitsulo chosakaniza ndi dongo
Daniel2:42 Monga zala zinali za chitsulo chosakaniza ndi dongo
Daniel2:43 Ndipo monga munaona chitsulo chosakanizidwa ndi dongo
Daniel2:44 “Pa nthawi ya mafumu amenewo
Daniel2:45 Limeneli ndilo tanthauzo la masomphenya a mwala umene unagamuka pa phiri
Daniel2:46 Pamenepo mfumu Nebukadinezara inadzigwetsa chafufumimba pamaso pa Danieli ndi kumupatsa ulemu. Ndipo inalamula kuti anthu onse amuthirire Danieli nsembe ndi kumufukizira lubani.
Daniel2:47 Mfumu inati kwa Danieli
Daniel2:48 Ndipo mfumu inamukweza Danieli ndi kumupatsa mphatso zambiri. Anamuyika kuti akhale wolamulira chigawo chonse cha Babuloni ndi kutinso akhale woyangʼanira anthu ake onse anzeru.
Daniel2:49 Komanso
Daniel3:1 Mfumu Nebukadinezara anapangitsa fano la golide lotalika mamita 27 ndi mulifupi mwake mamita atatu
Daniel3:2 Kenaka iye anayitanitsa akalonga
Daniel3:3 Choncho akalonga
Daniel3:4 “Inu anthu a mitundu yonse ndi a ziyankhulo zonse
Daniel3:5 mukadzamva kulira kwa lipenga
Daniel3:6 Aliyense amene sadzalambira ndi kupembedza adzaponyedwa nthawi yomweyo mʼngʼanjo ya moto.”
Daniel3:7 Choncho anthu onse aja atangomva kulira kwa lipenga
Daniel3:8 Pa nthawi imeneyi alawuli ena anafika ndi kuwanenera zoyipa Ayuda.
Daniel3:9 Iwo anati kwa mfumu Nebukadinezara
Daniel3:10 Inu mfumu
Daniel3:11 ndi kuti aliyense osalambira ndi kupembedza adzaponyedwa mʼngʼanjo ya moto.
Daniel3:12 Koma alipo Ayuda ena Sadirake
Daniel3:13 Tsono Nebukadinezara anakwiya ndi kupsa mtima kwambiri
Daniel3:14 ndipo Nebukadinezara anawafunsa kuti
Daniel3:15 Tsopano ngati muli okonzeka kulambira ndi kupembedza fano ndinalipanga
Daniel3:16 Sadirake
Daniel3:17 Ngati tiponyedwa mʼngʼanjo ya moto
Daniel3:18 Koma ngakhale Mulungu wathu atapanda kutipulumutsa
Daniel3:19 Pamenepo Nebukadinezara anapsa mtima ndi Sadirake
Daniel3:20 ndipo analamula ena mwa asilikali amphamvu kwambiri mʼgulu lake lankhondo kuti amange Sadirake
Daniel3:21 Choncho amuna awa
Daniel3:22 Tsono popeza lamulo la mfumu linali lofulumiza
Daniel3:23 ndipo anyamata atatuwa
Daniel3:24 Kenaka mfumu Nebukadinezara anadabwa ndipo anafunsa nduna zake kuti
Daniel3:25 Iye anati
Daniel3:26 Pamenepo Nebukadinezara anayandikira pa khomo langʼanjo ya moto ndi kufuwula kuti
Daniel3:27 ndipo akalonga
Daniel3:28 Kenaka Nebukadinezara anati
Daniel3:29 Tsono ndikulamula kuti anthu a mitundu ina kaya chiyankhulo china chili chonse amene anganyoze Mulungu wa Sadirake
Daniel3:30 Ndipo mfumu Nebukadinezara anakweza pa ntchito Sadirake
Daniel4:1 Mfumu Nebukadinezara anatumiza mawu awa kwa anthu a mitundu yonse
Daniel4:2 Chandikomera kukuwuzani zizindikiro zozizwitsa ndi zodabwitsa zimene Mulungu Wammwambamwamba wandichitira.
Daniel4:3 Zizindikiro zake ndi zazikulu
Daniel4:4 Ine Nebukadinezara
Daniel4:5 Ndili chigonere pa bedi langa
Daniel4:6 Choncho ndinalamula kuti anthu onse a nzeru a ku Babuloni abwere pa maso panga kunditanthauzira malotowo.
Daniel4:7 Pamene amatsenga
Daniel4:8 Potsiriza
Daniel4:9 Ndinati
Daniel4:10 Awa ndi masomphenya amene ine ndinaona pamene ndinali kugona pa bedi: Ndinaona
Daniel4:11 Mtengowo unakula ndi kulimba ndipo msonga yake inafika mpaka mlengalenga; umaonekera pa dziko lonse lapansi.
Daniel4:12 Masamba ake anali okongola
Daniel4:13 “Ndikanali chigonere ndinaona mʼmasomphenya mngelo atayima pamaso panga
Daniel4:14 Anayankhula mofuwula kuti
Daniel4:15 Koma musiye tsinde ndi mizu yake mʼnthaka. Tsindelo mulimange maunyolo a chitsulo ndi mkuwa
Daniel4:16 Maganizo ake a umunthu asinthidwe ndipo apatsidwe maganizo a nyama ya kuthengo
Daniel4:17 “ ‘Angelo oyera ndiwo akutsimikiza chilangochi. Tsono anthu adziwe kuti Mulungu Wammwambamwamba ali ndi mphamvu yolamulira maufumu onse
Daniel4:18 “Amenewa ndi maloto amene ine
Daniel4:19 Pamenepo Danieli
Daniel4:20 Mtengo munawuona uja
Daniel4:21 mtengo umene masamba ake anali okongola ndiponso unali ndi zipatso zochuluka zokwanira kudya anthu onse a dziko lapansi. Mtengowu unkapereka mthunzi ku zirombo zonse zakuthengo
Daniel4:22 Inu mfumu
Daniel4:23 “Inu mfumu munaona mthenga woyera
Daniel4:24 “Tanthauzo lake ndi ili mfumu
Daniel4:25 Inu mudzachotsedwa pakati pa anthu ndipo mudzakhala ndi nyama zakuthengo; mudzadya udzu monga ngʼombe ndi kunyowa ndi mame akumwamba. Zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri zidzadutsa mpaka mudzavomereze kuti Mulungu Wammwambamwamba ndiye mwini ulamuliro pa ma ufumu a anthu
Daniel4:26 Lamulo losiya tsinde la mtengo ndi mizu yake litanthauza kuti ufumu wanu udzabwezeredwa kwa inu mukadzavomereza kuti Mulungu ndiye amalamulira.
Daniel4:27 Nʼchifukwa chake mfumu
Daniel4:28 Zonsezi zinamuchitikira mfumu Nebukadinezara.
Daniel4:29 Itapita miyezi khumi ndi iwiri
Daniel4:30 iye anati
Daniel4:31 Akuyankhulabe izi mawu anamveka kuchokera kumwamba kuti
Daniel4:32 Udzachotsedwa pakati pa anthu ndipo udzakhala ndi zirombo zakuthengo; udzadya udzu monga ngʼombe. Zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri zidzadutsa mpaka iwe utavomereza kuti Wammwambamwamba ndiye mwini ulamuliro pa maufumu a anthu ndipo amawupereka kwa aliyense amene iye afuna.”
Daniel4:33 Nthawi yomweyo zonse zimene zinanenedwa zokhudza Nebukadinezara zinakwaniritsidwa. Iye anachotsedwa pakati pa anthu ndipo ankadya udzu ngati ngʼombe. Thupi lake linanyowa ndi mame akumwamba mpaka tsitsi lake linakula ngati nthenga za chiwombankhanga ndi zikhadabo ngati zikhadabo za mbalame.
Daniel4:34 Pomaliza pa zaka zimenezo ine
Daniel4:35 Anthu onse a dziko lapansi ali chabe pamaso pake. Pakati pa angelo akumwamba ndi anthu a dziko lapansi palibe amene akhoza kumuletsa Mulungu kuchita zimene afuna. Kapena kunena kwa Iye kuti
Daniel4:36 Pa nthawi yomweyo nzeru zanga zinabwereramo. Ndinalandiranso ulemu wanga ndi ufumu wanga. Nduna ndi akalonga anga anandilandiranso. Ndipo anandibwezera ufumu wanga ndi kukhalanso wamphamvu kuposa kale.
Daniel4:37 Tsopano ine Nebukadinezara
Daniel5:1 Tsiku lina mfumu Belisazara anakonza phwando lalikulu la akalonga ake 1
Daniel5:2 Pamene Belisazara ankamwa vinyo
Daniel5:3 Choncho anabweretsa ziwiya zagolide zimene anazitenga mʼNyumba ya Mulungu; ndipo mfumu ndi akalonga ake
Daniel5:4 Akumwa vinyo
Daniel5:5 Mwadzidzidzi zala za dzanja la munthu zinaonekera ndi kulemba pa khoma
Daniel5:6 Nkhope yake inasandulika ndipo inachita mantha
Daniel5:7 Mfumu inafuwula kuyitana owombeza
Daniel5:8 Pamenepo anzeru onse a mfumu anabwera
Daniel5:9 Choncho mfumu Belisazara anachita mantha koposa ndipo nkhope yake inapitirira kusinthika. Akalonga ake anathedwa nzeru.
Daniel5:10 Mfumukazi
Daniel5:11 Pali munthu wina mu ufumu wanu uno amene mwa iye muli mzimu wa milungu yoyera. Pa nthawi ya ulamuliro wa abambo anu iye anapezeka kuti ali ndi chidziwitso
Daniel5:12 Munthu ameneyu dzina lake ndi Danieli
Daniel5:13 Choncho anabwera naye Danieli pamaso pa mfumu ndipo inati kwa iye
Daniel5:14 Ndamva kuti mzimu wa milungu uli mwa iwe ndi kuti uli ndi chidziwitso
Daniel5:15 Anzeru ndi owombeza anabwera pamaso panga kuti awerenge zolembedwazi ndi kundiwuza tanthauzo lake koma sanakwanitse kundifotokozera.
Daniel5:16 Tsopano ndamva kuti iwe ukhoza kupereka matanthauzo ndi kuthetsa mavuto. Ngati ungawerenge zolembedwazi ndi kundiwuza tanthauzo lake
Daniel5:17 Pamenepo Danieli anayankha mfumu kuti
Daniel5:18 “Inu mfumu
Daniel5:19 Chifukwa cha udindo waukulu umene anapatsidwanso
Daniel5:20 Koma pamene inayamba kudzitama ndi kuwumitsa mtima wake ndi kuyamba kunyada
Daniel5:21 Iyo inachotsedwa pakati pa anthu ndi kupatsidwa mtima ngati wa nyama; inakhala pamodzi ndi abulu akutchire ndi kudya udzu ngati ngʼombe; ndipo thupi lake linanyowa ndi mame akumwamba
Daniel5:22 “Koma inu mwana wake
Daniel5:23 Mʼmalo mwake
Daniel5:24 Choncho Iye watumiza dzanja limene lalemba mawu amenewa.
Daniel5:25 “Mawu amene analembedwa ndi awa: MENE
Daniel5:26 “Zimene mawuwa akutanthauza ndi izi: Mene: Mulungu wawerenga masiku a ufumu wanu ndipo wauthetsa.
Daniel5:27 Tekeli: Inu mwayesedwa pa sikelo ndipo mwapezeka kuti mukuperewera.
Daniel5:28 Parasini: Ufumu wanu wagawidwa ndi kupatsidwa kwa Amedi ndi Aperezi.”
Daniel5:29 Mwa lamulo la Belisazara
Daniel5:30 Usiku womwewo Belisazara
Daniel5:31 ndipo Dariyo Mmedi analanda ufumuwo ali ndi zaka 62.
Daniel6:1 Kunamukomera Dariyo kusankha akalonga 120 kuti alamulire mu ufumu wonse
Daniel6:2 ndikusankha nduna zazikulu zitatu kuti ziwayangʼanire ndipo imodzi mwa ndunazo anali Danieli. Akalongawo amayangʼaniridwa ndi nduna zazikuluzo kuti zinthu za mfumu zisawonongeke.
Daniel6:3 Tsono Danieli anadzionetsa kuti akhoza kugwira ntchito bwino kopambana nduna zinzake chifukwa anali wanzeru kwambiri. Ndiye mfumu inaganiza zomuyika kuti akhale woyangʼanira ufumu wonse.
Daniel6:4 Chifukwa cha ichi
Daniel6:5 Pomaliza
Daniel6:6 Choncho akalonga ndi nduna pamodzi anapita kwa mfumu ndipo anati: “Inu mfumu Dariyo
Daniel6:7 Nduna zoyendetsa ufumu wanu
Daniel6:8 Tsopano inu mfumu khazikitsani lamulo limeneli ndipo musindikizepo dzina lanu kuti lisasinthike monga mwa malamulo a Amedi ndi Aperezi
Daniel6:9 Choncho mfumu Dariyo anasindikizapo dzina lake pa lamuloli.
Daniel6:10 Danieli atamva kuti lamulo lasindikizidwa
Daniel6:11 Ndipo anthu awa anapita pamodzi ndi kukapeza Danieli akupemphera ndi kupempha Mulungu wake kuti amuthandize.
Daniel6:12 Kotero iwo anapita kwa mfumu ndipo anayankhula naye za lamulo lake kuti
Daniel6:13 Kenaka iwo anati kwa mfumu
Daniel6:14 Mfumu itamva izi
Daniel6:15 Ndipo anthuwo anapita pamodzi kwa mfumu ndipo anati kwa iye
Daniel6:16 Choncho mfumu inalamula
Daniel6:17 Anatenga mwala natseka pa khoma pa dzenje la mikango
Daniel6:18 Kenaka mfumu inabwerera ku nyumba yake ndipo inakhala usiku wonse osadya kanthu
Daniel6:19 Mʼbandakucha
Daniel6:20 Itayandikira pa dzenjelo
Daniel6:21 Danieli anayankha kuti
Daniel6:22 Mulungu wanga anatumiza mngelo wake
Daniel6:23 Mfumu inali ndi chimwemwe chopambana ndipo inalamulira kuti amutulutse Danieli mʼdzenjemo. Ndipo atamutulutsa Danieli mʼdzenjemo
Daniel6:24 Mwa lamulo la mfumu
Daniel6:25 Kenaka mfumu Dariyo inalembera anthu a mitundu yonse
Daniel6:26 “Ndikukhazikitsa lamulo kuti paliponse mʼdziko langa anthu ayenera kuopa ndi kuchitira ulemu Mulungu wa Danieli. “Popeza Iye ndi Mulungu wamoyo ndi wamuyaya; ufumu wake sudzawonongeka
Daniel6:27 Iye amalanditsa ndipo amapulumutsa
Daniel6:28 Choncho Danieli anapeza ufulu pa nthawi ya ulamuliro wa Dariyo ndi ulamuliro wa Koresi wa ku Perisiya.
Daniel7:1 Chaka choyamba cha ufumu wa Belisazara wa ku Babuloni
Daniel7:2 Danieli anati
Daniel7:3 Ndipo mʼnyangayo munatuluka zirombo zazikulu zinayi
Daniel7:4 “Choyamba chinali ngati mkango
Daniel7:5 “Ndipo ndinaona chirombo chachiwiri
Daniel7:6 “Pambuyo pake
Daniel7:7 “Zitatha izi
Daniel7:8 “Ndikulingalira za nyangazo
Daniel7:9 “Ine ndikuyangʼanabe ndinaona “mipando yaufumu ikukhazikitsidwa
Daniel7:10 Mtsinje wa moto unkayenda
Daniel7:11 “Ndinapitiriza kuyangʼanitsitsa chifukwa cha mawu odzitamandira amene nyanga ija inkayankhula. Ndili chiyangʼanire choncho chirombo chachinayi chija chinaphedwa ndipo thupi lake linawonongedwa ndi kuponyedwa mʼngʼanjo ya moto.
Daniel7:12 Zirombo zina zija zinalandidwa ulamuliro wawo
Daniel7:13 “Ndikuyangʼanabe zinthu mʼmasomphenya usiku
Daniel7:14 Anapatsidwa ulamuliro
Daniel7:15 “Ine Danieli ndinavutika mu mzimu
Daniel7:16 Ndinayandikira mmodzi mwa amene anayima pamenepo ndi kumufunsa tanthauzo lenileni la zonsezi. “Kotero anandiwuza ndi kundipatsa tanthauzo la zinthu zonse izi:
Daniel7:17 ‘Zirombo zikuluzikulu zinayi zija ndi maufumu anayi amene adzaoneka pa dziko lapansi.
Daniel7:18 Koma oyera mtima a Wammwambamwamba adzalandira ufumu ndipo udzakhala nawo mpaka muyaya
Daniel7:19 “Kenaka ndinafuna kudziwa tanthauzo lenileni la chirombo chachinayi chija
Daniel7:20 Ndinafunanso kudziwa za nyanga khumi za pa mutu pake ndiponso ina ija
Daniel7:21 Ndikuyangʼanitsitsa
Daniel7:22 mpaka pamene Mkulu Wachikhalire uja anafika ndi kuweruza mokomera oyera mtima a Wammwambamwamba. Tsono nthawi inafika imene anthu oyera mtimawo analandira ufumu.
Daniel7:23 “Tsono anandifotokozera kuti
Daniel7:24 Nyanga khumi zija ndiwo mafumu khumi amene adzatuluka mu ufumu umenewu. Pambuyo pake mfumu ina idzadzuka
Daniel7:25 Idzayankhula motsutsana ndi Wammwambamwamba ndipo adzazunza oyera mtima ndi kusintha masiku azikondwerero ndi malamulo. Oyera mtimawo adzalamulidwa ndi mfumuyi kwa zaka zitatu ndi theka.
Daniel7:26 “ ‘Koma bwalo lidzapereka chiweruzo
Daniel7:27 Kenaka ulamuliro
Daniel7:28 “Apa ndiye pa mapeto pa nkhaniyi. Ine Danieli
Daniel8:1 Chaka chachitatu cha ulamuliro wa mfumu Belisazara
Daniel8:2 Ndinaona mʼmasomphenya kuti ndinali mu mzinda wotetezedwa wa Susa mʼchigawo cha Elamu. Mʼmasomphenyawo ndinaona nditayima pafupi ndi mtsinje wa Ulai.
Daniel8:3 Nditakweza maso ndinaona nkhosa yayimuna ya nyanga ziwiri
Daniel8:4 Ndinaona nkhosa yayimunayo ikuthamanga mwaukali kupita kumadzulo
Daniel8:5 Pamene ndinali kulingalira za zinthu zimenezi
Daniel8:6 Inabwera molunjika nkhosa yayimuna ya nyanga ziwiri ija imene ndinaona itayima pafupi ndi mtsinje. Ndipo inayithamangira mwaukali.
Daniel8:7 Inafika pafupi ndipo inalimbana nayo mwaukali nkhosa yayimuna ija nʼkuthyola nyanga zake ziwiri. Nkhosa yayimunayo inalibenso mphamvu zogonjetsera mbuziyo; choncho mbuzi ija inagwetsa nkhosayo pansi nʼkuyipondaponda
Daniel8:8 Mbuziyo inayamba kudzikuza kwambiri chifukwa cha mphamvu zake koma pamene mphamvuzo zinakula kwambiri nyanga yake yayikulu inathyoka
