Daniel8:9 Pa imodzi mwa nyangazo panatuluka nyanga imene inali yocheperapo koma inakula kwambiri kuloza kummwera ndi kummawa ndi kuloza dziko lokongola.
Daniel8:10 Inakula mpaka inafikira gulu lankhondo la kumwamba
Daniel8:11 Inadzikuza yokha mpaka kufikira kwa mfumu ya gululo: inathetsa nsembe zimene zinkaperekedwa tsiku ndi tsiku
Daniel8:12 Gulu lake la nkhondo linathetsa nsembe zoperekera machimo za tsiku ndi tsiku; chipembedzo choonadi chinaponderezedwa pansi. Nyangayi inapambana mu zonse zimene inachita.
Daniel8:13 Kenaka ndinamva wina akuyankhula; ndipo woyera winanso anamufunsa kuti
Daniel8:14 Iye anandiyankha kuti
Daniel8:15 Ine Danieli ndikuyangʼanitsitsa masomphenyawa ndi kuyesa kuwazindikira
Daniel8:16 Ndipo ndinamva mawu a munthu kuchokera mʼmbali mwa mtsinje wa Ulai akuyitana kuti
Daniel8:17 Atayandikira kumene ndinayima
Daniel8:18 Pamene ankandiyankhula ndinadzigwetsa pansi chafufumimba
Daniel8:19 Iye anati
Daniel8:20 Nkhosa yayimuna ya nyanga ziwiri imene unayiona
Daniel8:21 Mbuzi yayimuna ija ndi mfumu ya Agriki
Daniel8:22 Kunena za nyanga inathyoka ija ndi nyanga zinayi zimene zinaphuka mʼmalo mwake zikutanthauza maufumu anayi amene adzatuluka mʼdziko lake; koma sizidzafanana mphamvu ndi ufumu woyambawo.
Daniel8:23 “Pa masiku otsiriza a maufumuwa
Daniel8:24 Idzakhala yamphamvu kwambiri koma osati mphamvu za iyo yokha. Idzawononga koopsa ndipo idzapambana mu chilichonse chimene idzachite. Mfumuyi idzawononga anthu amphamvu ndi anthu oyera omwe.
Daniel8:25 Chifukwa cha kuchenjera kwake chinyengo chidzachuluka pa nthawi ya ulamuliro wake
Daniel8:26 “Masomphenya okhudza madzulo ndi mmawa amene unawaona aja ndi woona
Daniel8:27 Ine Danieli ndinafowoka ndipo ndinadwala masiku angapo. Kenaka ndinadzuka ndi kupitiriza ntchito za mfumu. Ndinada nkhawa ndi masomphenyawo; ndipo sindinathe kuwamvetsa.
Daniel9:1 Mʼchaka choyamba cha Dariyo mwana wa Ahasiwero (wochokera kwa Amedi)
Daniel9:2 ine Danieli ndinazindikira powerenga mawu a Yehova opatsidwa kwa mneneri Yeremiya
Daniel9:3 Choncho ndinatembenukira kwa Ambuye Mulungu ndipo ndinamudandaulira ndi kupempha posala kudya
Daniel9:4 Ndinapemphera kwa Yehova Mulungu wanga ndi kuvomereza kuti tinachimwa: Ndinati
Daniel9:5 tachimwa ndipo tachita zolakwa ndi zoyipa. Takuwukirani posiya malangizo ndi malamulo anu.
Daniel9:6 Sitinamvere aneneri atumiki anu
Daniel9:7 “Ambuye ndinu olungama
Daniel9:8 Inu Yehova
Daniel9:9 Ambuye Mulungu wathu ndi wachifundo ndi wokhululuka
Daniel9:10 Ife sitinamvere Yehova Mulungu wathu kapena kusunga malamulo ake amene anatipatsa kudzera mwa aneneri atumiki ake.
Daniel9:11 Aisraeli onse anachimwira lamulo lanu motero anapatuka
Daniel9:12 Inu mwakwaniritsa mawu amene munayankhula otitsutsa ife ndi otsutsa otilamulira potibweretsera tsoka lalikulu. Pa dziko lapansi sipanachitikenso zinthu ngati zimene zaonekera Yerusalemu.
Daniel9:13 Monga kunalembedwa mʼMalamulo a Mose
Daniel9:14 Choncho Yehova anakonza kuti atigwetsere tsoka limeneli
Daniel9:15 “Inu Ambuye Mulungu wathu
Daniel9:16 Inu Ambuye
Daniel9:17 “Tsopano Mulungu wathu
Daniel9:18 Tcherani khutu
Daniel9:19 Inu Ambuye imvani mawu athu! Ambuye khululukani! Ambuye timvereni
Daniel9:20 Ndikuyankhula ndi kupemphera
Daniel9:21 Gabrieli
Daniel9:22 Anandilangiza kuti
Daniel9:23 Utangoyamba kupemphera
Daniel9:24 “Zaka 490 zinayikidwa kuti anthu a mtundu wako ndi mzinda wanu woyera aleke zoyipa
Daniel9:25 “Tsono udziwe ndipo uzindikire izi kuti kuyambira pamene lamulo linaperekedwa kuti Yerusalemu akonzedwenso mpaka pamene mfumu Yodzozedwa idzafike padzapita zaka 49. Pa zaka 434 mzinda wa Yerusalemu udzamangidwanso
Daniel9:26 Patatha zaka 434
Daniel9:27 Adzachita pangano lolimba ndi anthu ambiri kwa zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri. Koma pakatinʼpakati pa sabata limodzilo iye adzaletsa kupereka nsembe ndi chopereka. Chonyansa chosakaza chija adzachiyika mʼNyumba ya Mulungu
Daniel10:1 Chaka chachitatu cha Koresi mfumu ya Aperezi
Daniel10:2 Pa nthawi imeneyi
Daniel10:3 Sindinadye chakudya chokoma; nyama ndi vinyo sizinakhudze milomo yanga ndi pangʼono pomwe; ndipo sindinadzole mafuta aliwonse mpaka patatha masabata atatu.
Daniel10:4 Pa tsiku la 24 la mwezi woyamba
Daniel10:5 ndinakweza maso ndipo ndinaona kuti pafupi ndi ine panali munthu wochokera ku Ufazi atavala zovala zosalala ndi lamba wa golide woyengeka bwino mʼchiwuno mwake.
Daniel10:6 Thupi lake linali ngati mwala wonyezimira
Daniel10:7 Ine Danieli ndinali ndekha pamene ndinaona masomphenyawa; anthu amene anali ndi ine sanawaone
Daniel10:8 Choncho ndinatsala ndekha
Daniel10:9 Kenaka ndinamva iye akuyankhula
Daniel10:10 Dzanja linandikhudza ndi kundinyamula ndipo ndinachita ngati kuwerama pa mawondo manja atagwira pansi.
Daniel10:11 Iye anati
Daniel10:12 Ndipo iye anapitiriza nati
Daniel10:13 Koma mtsogoleri wa ufumu wa Peresiya ananditchingira pa masiku 21
Daniel10:14 Tsopano ndafika kuti ndidzakufotokozere zimene zidzachitika kwa anthu a mtundu wako kutsogolo. Ndipo pali masomphenya enanso okhudza nthawi imene ikudza.”
Daniel10:15 Pa nthawi yomwe ankanena izi kwa ine
Daniel10:16 Kenaka wina wa maonekedwe ngati munthu anakhudza milomo yanga
Daniel10:17 Kodi ine mtumiki wamba wa mbuye wanga ndingathe bwanji kuyankhula ndi inu mbuye wanga? Mphamvu zanga zatha
Daniel10:18 Kenaka wooneka ngati munthu uja anandikhudzanso ndipo anandipatsa mphamvu.
Daniel10:19 Iye anati
Daniel10:20 Ndipo iye anati
Daniel10:21 Koma ndikuwuza zimene zalembedwa mʼbuku la zoona koma palibe wondithandiza kulimbana nawo kupatula Mikayeli
Daniel11:1 Ndipo chaka choyamba cha Dariyo Mmedi ine Mikayeli ndinabwera kumuthandiza ndi kumuteteza Gabrieli.
Daniel11:2 “Ndipo tsopano ndikuwuza zoona: Mafumu ena atatu adzalamulira ku Peresiya
Daniel11:3 Kenaka mfumu yamphamvu idzafika imene idzalamulira ndi ufumu waukulu ndi kuchita zimene ifuna.
Daniel11:4 Koma ufumu wake ukadzafika pachimake
Daniel11:5 “Mfumu ya kummwera idzakhala yamphamvu
Daniel11:6 Patapita zaka zingapo
Daniel11:7 “Mmodzi wochokera ku banja la mkaziyo adzadzuka nadzalamulira mʼmalo mwake. Iye adzamenyana ndi ankhondo a mfumu ya kumpoto ndi kulowa mʼmalo ake otetezedwa; adzachita nawo nkhondo ndi kupambana.
Daniel11:8 Iye adzalandanso milungu yawo
Daniel11:9 Kenaka mfumu ya kumpoto idzathira nkhondo dziko la mfumu ya kummwera koma idzalephera ndi kubwerera kwawo.
Daniel11:10 Ana ake adzakonzekera nkhondo ndi kusonkhanitsa gulu lankhondo lalikulu
Daniel11:11 “Kenaka mfumu yakummwera idzatuluka mokwiya ndi kumenya nkhondo ndi mfumu yakumpoto
Daniel11:12 Gulu la nkhondoli likadzagwidwa
Daniel11:13 Popeza mfumu ya kumpoto idzasonkhanitsa gulu lina lankhondo
Daniel11:14 “Nthawi imeneyo ambiri adzawukira mfumu ya kummwera. Anthu achisokonezo pakati panu nawonso adzawukira pokwaniritsa masomphenya
Daniel11:15 Kenaka mfumu ya kumpoto idzafika ndikuzinga mzinda powunda nthumbira za nkhondo ndipo idzagonjetsa mzinda wotetezedwa. Gulu lankhondo la kummwera lidzasowa mphamvu; ngakhale akatswiri awo ankhondo sadzakhala ndi mphamvu zogonjetsera ankhondo a kumpoto.
Daniel11:16 Mfumu ya kumpoto idzachita zofuna zake; palibe aliyense adzayigonjetse. Idzakhazikitsa ulamuliro wake mu Dziko Lokongola. Zonse zidzakhala mu ulamuliro wa mfumu yakumpoto ija.
Daniel11:17 Idzafika ndi mphamvu za ufumu wake wonse ndipo idzayesa kuchita pangano la mtendere ndi mfumu ya kummwera. Ndipo idzamupatsa mwana wake wamkazi kuti amukwatire ndi cholinga cholanda ufumu
Daniel11:18 Kenaka idzatembenukira ku mayiko a mʼmbali mwa nyanja ndi kulanda mizinda yambiri
Daniel11:19 Zikadzatha izi
Daniel11:20 “Mfumu imene idzatenga malo ake idzatumiza wokhometsa msonkho kuti chuma cha ufumu wake chichuluke. Komabe mʼzaka zochepa mfumuyo idzawonongedwa osati mu mkwiyo kapena ku nkhondo.
Daniel11:21 “Mʼmalo mwake mudzalowa munthu wonyozeka amene si wa banja laufumu. Iye adzabwera pamene anthu akuganiza kuti ali pa mtendere
Daniel11:22 Kenaka adzagonetsa gulu lalikulu lankhondo kuphatikizapo Mkulu wa Ansembe wapangano.
Daniel11:23 Atatha kuchita naye pangano
Daniel11:24 Mwadzidzidzi
Daniel11:25 “Mfumu ya kumpoto idzalimba mtima
Daniel11:26 Amene amadya chakudya ndi mfumu adzamuukira; gulu lake lankhondo lidzagonjetsedwa
Daniel11:27 Mafumu awiriwa mitima yawo idzalinga ku zoyipa. Azidzanamizana ali pa tebulo limodzi
Daniel11:28 Mfumu ya kumpoto idzabwerera ku dziko la kwawo ndi chuma chambiri
Daniel11:29 “Patapita nthawi mfumu ya kumpoto idzabwereranso kummwera koma sidzapambana monga inachitira kale.
Daniel11:30 Sitima zapamadzi zochokera ku mayiko a ku madzulo zidzalimbana naye
Daniel11:31 “Ankhondo ake adzayipitsa linga la Nyumba ya Mulungu ndipo adzathetsa nsembe za tsiku ndi tsiku. Kenaka adzakhazikitsa chonyansa chimene chabweretsa chiwonongeko.
Daniel11:32 Ndi mawu oshashalika mfumuyo idzakopa amene anaphwanya pangano
Daniel11:33 “Amene ndi anzeru adzalangiza ambiri. Koma patapita kanthawi adzaphedwa ndi lupanga kapena kutenthedwa
Daniel11:34 Pa nthawi yozunzikayi ena adzawathandiza pangʼono
Daniel11:35 Ena mwa anzeruwo adzaphedwa ndi cholinga chakuti ayengedwe
Daniel11:36 “Mfumu ya kumpoto idzachita zimene ikufuna. Idzadzikweza ndi kudziyesa yopambana mulungu aliyense ndipo idzanenera za mwano Mulungu wa milungu. Iyo idzapambana mpaka nthawi yoti Mulungu ayilange mwa mkwiyo itakwana popeza chimene chatsimikizika chiyenera kuchitika.
Daniel11:37 Mfumuyo idzanyoza milungu ya makolo ake ndiponso mulungu wokondedwa ndi akazi
Daniel11:38 Mʼmalo mwa onsewo
Daniel11:39 Anthu opembedza mulungu wachilendo adzakhala ngati linga lake. Idzalemekeza iwowa kwambiri
Daniel11:40 “Pa nthawi yomaliza mfumu yakummwera idzachita nkhondo ndi mfumu yakumpoto. Koma mfumu yakumpotoyi idzayikantha ndi magaleta ndi akavalo ndi sitima zapamadzi zambiri ngati mphepo yamkokomo. Idzalowa mʼmayiko ambiri ndikuwakokolola onse ngati madzi osefukira.
Daniel11:41 Idzalowanso mʼDziko Lokongola ndipo anthu ambiri adzaphedwa. Koma Edomu
Daniel11:42 Idzathira nkhondo mayiko ambiri ndipo ngakhale Igupto sadzapulumuka.
Daniel11:43 Idzalanda chuma cha golide
Daniel11:44 Koma uthenga wochokera kummawa ndi kumpoto udzayiopsa
Daniel11:45 Mfumuyo idzayimika matenti ake aufumu
Daniel12:1 “Pa nthawi imeneyo Mikayeli
Daniel12:2 Ambiri mwa amene akugona mʼnthaka adzadzuka: ena adzapita ku moyo wosatha
Daniel12:3 Amene ali anzeru mʼnjira ya chilungamo adzawala ngati kuwala kwa mlengalenga
Daniel12:4 Koma iweyo
Daniel12:5 Kenaka ine Danieli poyangʼana ndinaona anthu ena awiri atayima
Daniel12:6 Mmodzi mwa awiriwo anafunsa munthu wovala chovala chosalala amene anali mʼmbali mwa madzi a mu mtsinje uja kuti
Daniel12:7 Munthu wovala chovala chosalala
Daniel12:8 Ndinamva
Daniel12:9 Ndipo anandiyankha kuti
Daniel12:10 Anthu ambiri adzayeretsedwa nakhala olungama wopanda chodetsa
Daniel12:11 “Kuyambira pamene nsembe ya tsiku ndi tsiku idzathetsedwa ndi kukhazikitsa kwa chonyansa chobweretsa chisokonezo chija
Daniel12:12 Wodala munthu amene adikirabe nadzafika pa mapeto a masiku 1
Daniel12:13 “Koma iweyo Danieli
Hosea1:1 Awa ndi mawu amene Yehova anayankhula kwa Hoseya mwana wa Beeri pa nthawi ya ulamuliro wa Uziya
Hosea1:2 Yehova atayamba kuyankhula kudzera mwa Hoseya
Hosea1:3 Motero Hoseya anakwatira Gomeri mwana wamkazi wa Dibulaimu
Hosea1:4 Tsono Yehova anati kwa Hoseya
Hosea1:5 Tsiku limenelo ndidzathyola uta wa Israeli mʼchigwa cha Yezireeli.”
Hosea1:6 Gomeri anakhala woyembekezeranso ndipo anabereka mwana wamkazi. Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Hoseya
Hosea1:7 Komatu ndidzaonetsa chikondi pa nyumba ya Yuda; ndipo ndidzawapulumutsa
Hosea1:8 Sakondedwa ataleka kuyamwa
Hosea1:9 Pamenepo Yehova anati
Hosea1:10 “Komabe Aisraeli adzachuluka ngati mchenga wa mʼmbali mwa nyanja umene sangathe kuwuyeza kapena kuwuwerenga. Pamalo omwe ananena kuti
Hosea1:11 Anthu a ku Yuda ndi anthu a ku Israeli adzasonkhananso pamodzi ndipo adzasankha mtsogoleri mmodzi ndi kutuluka mʼdzikomo
Hosea2:1 “Nena kwa abale ako kuti
Hosea2:2 “Dzudzulani amayi anu
Hosea2:3 Akapanda kutero ndidzamuvula
Hosea2:4 Sindidzaonetsa chikondi changa pa ana ake
Hosea2:5 Amayi awo akhala akuchita zachiwerewere ndipo anawabereka anawo akuchita zinthu zochititsa manyazi. Iwo anati
Hosea2:6 Choncho njira yake ndidzayitseka ndi minga; ndidzamuzinga ndi khoma kotero kuti sadzapezanso njira yotulukira.
Hosea2:7 Adzathamangira zibwenzi zake koma sadzazipeza; adzazifunafuna koma sadzazipeza. Pamenepo iye adzati
Hosea2:8 Iye sanazindikire kuti ndine amene ndinkamupatsa tirigu
Hosea2:9 “Choncho Ine ndidzamulanda tirigu wanga pa nthawi yokolola
Hosea2:10 Motero tsopano ndidzaonetsa maliseche ake pamaso pa zibwenzi zake; palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe adzamupulumutse mʼmanja mwanga.
Hosea2:11 Ndidzathetsa zikondwerero zake zonse: zikondwerero zake za chaka ndi chaka
Hosea2:12 Ndidzawononga mitengo yake ya mpesa ndi mitengo yake yamkuyu
Hosea2:13 Ndidzamulanga chifukwa cha masiku amene anafukiza lubani kwa Abaala; anadzikongoletsa povala mphete ndi mikanda yamtengowapatali ndipo anathamangira zibwenzi zake
Hosea2:14 “Koma tsopano ndidzamukopa mkaziyo; ndidzapita naye ku chipululu ndipo ndidzamuyankhula mwachikondi.
Hosea2:15 Kumeneko ndidzamubwezera minda yake ya mpesa
Hosea2:16 “Tsiku limeneli
Hosea2:17 Ndidzachotsa mayina a Abaala pakamwa pake; sadzatchulanso mayina awo popemphera.
Hosea2:18 Tsiku limenelo ndidzachita pangano ndi zirombo zakuthengo ndi mbalame zamumlengalenga ndiponso zolengedwa zokwawa pansi kuti ziyanjane ndi anthu anga. Ndidzachotsa mʼdzikomo uta
Hosea2:19 Ndidzakutomera kuti ukhale mkazi wanga mpaka muyaya; ndidzakutomera mwachilungamo
Hosea2:20 Ndidzakutomera mokhulupirika ndipo udzadziwa Yehova.
Hosea2:21 “Tsiku limenelo Ine ndidzayankha
Hosea2:22 ndipo nthaka idzamvera kupempha kwa tirigu
Hosea2:23 Ndidzadzala Israeli mʼdziko kuti akhale wanga: ndidzaonetsa chikondi changa kwa anthu amene ndinkawatchula dzina loti
Hosea3:1 Yehova anati kwa ine
Hosea3:2 Motero ndinamukwatira popereka ndalama khumi ndi zisanu zasiliva
Hosea3:3 Kenaka ndinamuwuza mkaziyo kuti
Hosea3:4 Pakuti Aisraeli adzakhala masiku ambiri opanda mfumu kapena kalonga
Hosea3:5 Pambuyo pake Aisraeli adzabwerera ndi kufunafuna Yehova Mulungu wawo ndi Davide mfumu yawo. Adzabwera kwa Yehova akunjenjemera ndipo adzalandira madalitso mʼmasiku awo otsiriza.
Hosea4:1 Inu Aisraeli
Hosea4:2 Muli kutemberera kokha
Hosea4:3 Chifukwa chake dziko likulira ndipo onse amene amakhalamo akuvutika; zirombo zakuthengo ndi mbalame zamumlengalenga ndiponso nsomba zamʼnyanja zikufa.
Hosea4:4 “Koma wina asapeze mnzake chifukwa
Hosea4:5 Mumapunthwa usana ndi usiku ndipo aneneri amapunthwa nanu pamodzi. Choncho ndidzawononga amayi anu.
Hosea4:6 	Anthu anga akuwonongeka chifukwa chosadziwa. “Pakuti mwakana kudziwa
Hosea4:7 Ansembe ankati akachuluka iwo ankandichimwiranso kwambiri; iwo anasinthanitsa ulemerero wawo ndi chinthu china chonyansa.
Hosea4:8 Amalemererapo pa machimo a anthu anga ndipo amafunitsitsa kuti anthuwo azipitiriza kuchimwa.
Hosea4:9 Ndipo zidzakhala motere: zochitikira anthu ena
Hosea4:10 “Iwo azidzadya koma sadzakhuta; azidzachita zachiwerewere koma sadzachulukana
Hosea4:11 ku zachiwerewere
Hosea4:12 za anthu anga. Anthu anga amapempha nzeru ku fano lamtengo ndipo ndodo yawo yamtengo imawayankha. Mzimu wachiwerewere umawasocheretsa; iwo sakukhulupirika kwa Mulungu wawo.
Hosea4:13 Amapereka nsembe pamwamba pa mapiri ndi kufukiza lubani pa zitunda
Hosea4:14 “Ine sindidzalanga ana anu aakazi pamene iwo adzachita zachiwerewere
Hosea4:15 “Ngakhale umachita chigololo
Hosea4:16 Aisraeli ndi nkhutukumve
Hosea4:17 Efereimu waphathana ndi mafano; mulekeni!
Hosea4:18 Ngakhale pamene zakumwa zawo zatha
Hosea4:19 Adzachotsedwa ndi kamvuluvulu ndipo adzachita manyazi chifukwa cha nsembe zawo.
Hosea5:1 “Ansembe inu
Hosea5:2 Owukira azama mʼmoyo wakupha
Hosea5:3 Ndimadziwa zonse za Efereimu; Aisraeli ndi osabisika kwa Ine. Efereimu wayamba tsopano kuchita zachiwerewere; Israeli wadziyipitsa.
Hosea5:4 “Ntchito zawo siziwalola kubwerera kwa Mulungu wawo. Mʼmitima mwawo muli mzimu wachiwerewere; Iwo sadziwa Yehova.
Hosea5:5 Kudzikuza kwa Israeli kwakhala umboni womutsutsa; Aisraeli
Hosea5:6 Pamene adzapita ndi nkhosa zawo ndi ngʼombe zawo kukapereka nsembe kwa Yehova
Hosea5:7 Iwo ndi osakhulupirika kwa Yehova; amabereka ana amʼchigololo ndipo chikondwerero chawo cha mwezi watsopano chidzawawononga pamodzi ndi minda yawo.
Hosea5:8 “Womba lipenga mu Gibeya
Hosea5:9 Efereimu adzasanduka bwinja pa tsiku la chilango. Ine ndikulengeza zomwe zidzachitikadi pakati pa mafuko a Israeli.
Hosea5:10 Atsogoleri a Yuda ali ngati anthu amene amasuntha miyala ya mʼmalire. Ndidzawakhutulira ukali wanga ngati madzi a chigumula.
Hosea5:11 Efereimu waponderezedwa
Hosea5:12 Ine ndili ngati njenjete kwa Efereimu
Hosea5:13 “Efereimu ataona nthenda yake
Hosea5:14 Pakuti Ine ndidzakhala ngati mkango kwa Efereimu. Ngati mkango wamphamvu kwa Yuda. Ndidzawakhadzula nʼkuchokapo; ndidzawatenga ndipo palibe amene adzawalanditse.
Hosea5:15 Ndipo ndidzabwerera ku malo anga mpaka anthu anga atavomereza kulakwa kwawo. Ndipo iwo adzafunafuna nkhope yanga; mʼmasautso awo adzandifunitsitsa Ine.”
Hosea6:1 “Bwerani
Hosea6:2 Pakapita masiku awiri adzatitsitsimutsa; pa tsiku lachitatu Iye adzatiukitsa kuti tikhale ndi moyo pamaso pake.
Hosea6:3 Tiyeni timudziwe Yehova
Hosea6:4 Iwe Efereimu
Hosea6:5 Choncho ndakuwazani ngati nkhuni kudzera mwa aneneri anga
Hosea6:6 Pakuti Ine ndimafuna chifundo osati nsembe
Hosea6:7 Monga Adamu
Hosea6:8 Giliyadi ndi mzinda wa anthu ochita zoyipa
Hosea6:9 Monga momwe mbala zimadikirira anthu
Hosea6:10 Ndaona chinthu choopsa kwambiri mʼnyumba ya Israeli. Kumeneko Efereimu akuchita zachiwerewere
Hosea6:11 “Kunenanso za iwe Yuda
Hosea7:1 Pamene ndichiritsa Israeli
Hosea7:2 Koma sazindikira kuti Ine ndimakumbukira zoyipa zawo zonse. Azunguliridwa ndi zolakwa zawo; ndipo sizichoka mʼmaso mwanga.
Hosea7:3 “Anthuwa amasangalatsa mfumu ndi zoyipa zawozo
Hosea7:4 Onsewa ndi anthu azigololo
Hosea7:5 Pa tsiku la chikondwerero cha mfumu yathu akalonga amaledzera ndi vinyo
Hosea7:6 Mitima yawo ili ngati uvuni; amayandikira Mulungu mwachiwembu. Ukali wawo umanyeka usiku wonse
Hosea7:7 Onsewa ndi otentha ngati uvuni
Hosea7:8 “Efereimu wasakanikirana ndi mitundu ya anthu ena; Efereimu ndi buledi amene wapsa mbali imodzi.
Hosea7:9 Alendo atha mphamvu zake
Hosea7:10 Kunyada kwake Israeli kukumutsutsa
Hosea7:11 “Efereimu ali ngati nkhunda yopusa yopanda nzeru. Amayitana Igupto namapita ku Asiriya.
Hosea7:12 Akamadzapita
Hosea7:13 Tsoka kwa iwo
Hosea7:14 Iwo salirira kwa Ine kuchokera pansi pa mtima
Hosea7:15 Ine ndinawaphunzitsa ndikuwalimbitsa
Hosea7:16 Iwo satembenukira kwa Wammwambamwamba; ali ngati uta woonongeka. Atsogoleri awo adzaphedwa ndi lupanga chifukwa cha mawu awo achipongwe. Motero iwo adzasekedwa mʼdziko la Igupto.
Hosea8:1 “Ika lipenga pakamwa pako. Ngati chiwombankhanga
Hosea8:2 Israeli akulirira kwa Ine kuti
Hosea8:3 Koma Israeli wakana zabwino; mdani adzamuthamangitsa.
Hosea8:4 Amalonga mafumu mosatsata kufuna kwanga. Amasankha akalonga popanda chilolezo changa. Amadzipangira mafano asiliva ndi agolide koma adzawonongeka nawo.
Hosea8:5 Iwe Samariya
Hosea8:6 Mafanowa ndi ochokera ku Israeli! Mwana wa ngʼombe uyu anapangidwa ndi munthu waluso; si Mulungu amene anamupanga. Adzaphwanyidwa nʼkukhala zidutswa
Hosea8:7 “Aisraeli amadzala mphepo ndipo amakolola kamvuluvulu. Tirigu alibe ngala; sadzabala chakudya. Akanabala chakudya alendo akanadya chakudyacho.
Hosea8:8 Israeli wamezedwa
Hosea8:9 Pakuti iwo anapita ku Asiriya ngati mbidzi yongodziyendera pa yokha. Efereimu wadzigulitsa kwa zibwenzi zake.
Hosea8:10 Ngakhale wadzigulitsa pakati pa mitundu ya anthu
Hosea8:11 “Ngakhale Efereimu anamanga maguwa ambiri a nsembe zoperekedwa chifukwa cha tchimo
Hosea8:12 Ndinawalembera zinthu zambiri za malamulo anga
Hosea8:13 Amapereka nsembe za nyama kwa Ine ndipo iwo amadya nyamayo
Hosea8:14 Israeli wayiwala Mlengi wake ndipo wamanga nyumba zaufumu; Yuda wachulukitsa mizinda ya malinga. Koma Ine ndidzaponya moto pa mizinda yawoyo
Hosea9:1 Iwe Israeli
Hosea9:2 Malo opunthira tirigu ndi malo opsinyira mphesa sadzadyetsa anthu; adzasowa vinyo watsopano.
Hosea9:3 Sadzakhalanso mʼdziko la Yehova. Efereimu adzabwerera ku Igupto ndipo mudzadya chakudya chodetsedwa ku Asiriya.
Hosea9:4 Iwo sadzaperekanso chopereka cha chakumwa kwa Yehova
Hosea9:5 Kodi mudzachita chiyani pa tsiku la maphwando anu oyikika; pa masiku a zikondwerero za Yehova?
Hosea9:6 Ngakhale iwo atathawa chiwonongeko
Hosea9:7 Masiku achilango akubwera
Hosea9:8 Mneneri pamodzi ndi Mulungu wanga ndiwo alonda a Efereimu
Hosea9:9 Iwo azama mu zachinyengo monga masiku a Gibeya. Mulungu adzakumbukira zolakwa zawo ndipo adzawalanga chifukwa cha machimo awo.
Hosea9:10 “Pamene ndinamupeza Israeli zinali ngati kupeza mphesa mʼchipululu. Nditaona makolo anu
Hosea9:11 Ulemerero wa Efereimu udzawuluka ngati mbalame. Sipadzakhalanso kubereka ana
Hosea9:12 Ngakhale atalera ana ndidzachititsa kuti mwana aliyense amwalire. Tsoka kwa anthuwo pamene Ine ndidzawafulatira!
Hosea9:13 Ndaona Efereimu ngati Turo
Hosea9:14 Inu Yehova
Hosea9:15 “Chifukwa cha zoyipa zawo zonse ku Giligala
Hosea9:16 Efereimu wathedwa
Hosea9:17 Mulungu wanga adzawakana chifukwa sanamumvere Iye; adzakhala oyendayenda pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina.
Hosea10:1 Israeli anali mpesa wotambalala; anabereka zipatso zambiri. Pamene zipatso zawo zinanka zichuluka
Hosea10:2 Mtima wawo ndi wonyenga ndipo tsopano ayenera kulangidwa chifukwa cha kulakwa kwawo. Yehova adzagumula maguwa awo ansembe ndi kuwononga miyala yawo yopatulika.
Hosea10:3 Pamenepo anthuwo adzanena kuti
Hosea10:4 Mafumu amalonjeza zambiri
Hosea10:5 Anthu amene amakhala mu Samariya akuchita mantha chifukwa cha fano la mwana wangʼombe ku Beti-Aveni. Anthu ake adzalirira fanolo
Hosea10:6 Fanolo lidzatengedwa kupita ku Asiriya ngati mphatso kwa mfumu yayikulu. Efereimu adzachititsidwa manyazi chifukwa cha mafano ake amitengo.
Hosea10:7 Samariya ndi mfumu yake adzatengedwa kupita kutali ngati kanthambi koyenda pa madzi.
Hosea10:8 Malo opembedzerako mafano a ku Aveni adzawonongedwa. Ili ndiye tchimo la Israeli. Minga ndi mitungwi zidzamera ndi kuphimba maguwa awo ansembe. Kenaka anthu adzawuza mapiri kuti
Hosea10:9 “Iwe Israeli
Hosea10:10 Pamene ndifunire
Hosea10:11 Efereimu ndi mwana wangʼombe wamkazi wophunzitsidwa amene amakonda kupuntha tirigu
Hosea10:12 Mufese nokha chilungamo ndipo mudzakolola chipatso cha chikondi changa chosasinthika. Ndipo tipulani munda wanu wosalimidwawo; pakuti ino ndi nthawi yofunafuna Yehova
Hosea10:13 Koma inu munadzala zolakwa
Hosea10:14 phokoso lankhondo lidzamveka pakati pa anthu anga kotero kuti malinga anu onse adzawonongeka
Hosea10:15 Momwemonso zidzakuchitikira
Hosea11:1 “Israeli ali mwana
Hosea11:2 Koma ndimati ndikamapitiriza kuyitana iwo amandithawa kupita kutali. Ankapereka nsembe kwa Abaala ndipo ankafukiza lubani kwa mafano.
Hosea11:3 Ndi Ine amene ndinaphunzitsa Efereimu kuyenda
Hosea11:4 Ndinawatsogolera ndi zingwe zachifundo cha anthu ndi zomangira za chikondi; ndinachotsa goli mʼkhosi mwawo ndipo ndinawerama nʼkuwadyetsa.
Hosea11:5 “Sadzabwerera ku Igupto
Hosea11:6 Malupanga adzangʼanima mʼmizinda yawo
Hosea11:7 Anthu anga atsimikiza zondifulatira Ine. Ngakhale atayitana Wammwambamwamba
Hosea11:8 “Kodi ndingakusiye bwanji iwe Efereimu? Kodi ndingakupereke bwanji iwe Israeli? Kodi ndingakuchitire bwanji zimene ndinachitira Adima? Kodi ndingathe bwanji kukuchitira zimene ndinachitira Zeboimu? Mtima wanga wakana kutero; chifundo changa chonse chikusefukira.
Hosea11:9 Sindidzalola kuti ndikulange ndi mkwiyo wanga woopsa
Hosea11:10 Iwo adzatsatira Yehova; Iye adzabangula ngati mkango. Akadzabangula
Hosea11:11 Adzabwera akunjenjemera ngati mbalame kuchokera ku Igupto
Hosea11:12 Efereimu wandizungulira ndi mabodza
Hosea12:1 Efereimu amadya mpweya; tsiku lonse amasaka mphepo ya kummawa ndipo amachulukitsa mabodza ndi chiwawa. Amachita mgwirizano ndi Asiriya ndipo amatumiza mphatso za mafuta a olivi ku Igupto.
Hosea12:2 Yehova akuyimba mlandu Yuda; Iye adzalanga Yakobo molingana ndi makhalidwe ake
Hosea12:3 Akali mʼmimba mwa amayi ake
Hosea12:4 Yakobo analimbana ndi mngelo ndipo anapambana; analira napempha kuti amukomere mtima. Mulungu anakumana naye ku Beteli ndipo anayankhula naye kumeneko
Hosea12:5 Yehova Mulungu Wamphamvuzonse
Hosea12:6 Koma inu muyenera kubwerera kwa Mulungu wanu; pitirizani chikondi ndi chiweruzo cholungama
Hosea12:7 Munthu wamalonda amagwiritsa ntchito masikelo achinyengo; iyeyo amakonda kubera anthu.
Hosea12:8 Efereimu amadzitama ponena kuti
Hosea12:9 “Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wako amene ndinakutulutsa mu Igupto. Ndidzakukhazikaninso mʼmatenti
Hosea12:10 Ndinayankhula ndi aneneri
Hosea12:11 Kodi Giliyadi ndi woyipa? Anthu ake ndi achabechabe! Kodi amapereka nsembe za ngʼombe zazimuna ku Giligala? Maguwa awo ansembe adzakhala ngati milu ya miyala mʼmunda molimidwa.
Hosea12:12 Yakobo anathawira ku dziko la Aramu
Hosea12:13 Yehova anagwiritsa ntchito mneneri kuti atulutse Israeli mu Igupto; kudzera mwa mneneriyo Iye anawasamalira.
Hosea12:14 Koma Efereimu wamukwiyitsa kwambiri. Nʼchifukwa chake Yehova adzawalanga ndi imfa. Adzawalanga chifukwa anamuchititsa manyazi kwambiri.
Hosea13:1 Kale Efereimu ankati akayankhula
Hosea13:2 Tsopano akunka nachimwirachimwirabe; akudzipangira mafano pogwiritsa ntchito siliva wawo
Hosea13:3 Choncho adzakhala ngati nkhungu yammawa
Hosea13:4 Koma Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu
Hosea13:5 Ndinakusamalira mʼchipululu
Hosea13:6 Pamene ndinawadyetsa
Hosea13:7 Motero ndidzawalumphira ngati mkango
Hosea13:8 Ngati chimbalangondo cholandidwa ana ake
Hosea13:9 “Iwe Israeli
Hosea13:10 Kodi mfumu yako ili kuti
Hosea13:11 Choncho Ine ndinakupatsani mfumu mwachipseramtima
Hosea13:12 Kulakwa kwa Efereimu kwasungidwa
Hosea13:13 Zowawa zonga za mayi pa nthawi yobala mwana zamugwera
Hosea13:14 “Ndidzawapulumutsa ku mphamvu ya manda; ndidzawawombola ku imfa. Kodi iwe imfa
Hosea13:15 ngakhale Efereimu akondwe pakati pa abale ake
Hosea13:16 Anthu a ku Samariya adzalangidwa chifukwa cha zolakwa zawo
Hosea14:1 Iwe Israeli bwerera kwa Yehova Mulungu wako. Machimo anu ndi amene akugwetsani!
Hosea14:2 Bweretsani zopempha zanu ndipo bwererani kwa Yehova. Munene kwa Iye kuti
Hosea14:3 Asiriya sangatipulumutse; ife sitidzakwera pa akavalo ankhondo
Hosea14:4 Ine ndidzachiza kusakhulupirika kwawo ndipo ndidzawakonda mwaufulu pakuti ndaleka kuwakwiyira.
Hosea14:5 Ndidzakhala ngati mame kwa Israeli Ndipo iye adzachita maluwa ngati kakombo. Adzazika mizu yake pansi ngati mkungudza wa ku Lebanoni;
Hosea14:6 mphukira zake zidzakula. Kukongola kwake kudzakhala ngati mtengo wa olivi
Hosea14:7 Anthu adzakhalanso mu mthunzi wake. Iye adzakula bwino ngati tirigu. Adzachita maluwa ngati mphesa ndipo kutchuka kwake kudzakhala ngati vinyo wochokera ku Lebanoni.
Hosea14:8 Efereimu adzati
Hosea14:9 Ndani ali ndi nzeru? Adzazindikire zinthu izi. Ndani amene amamvetsa zinthu? Adzamvetse izi. Njira za Yehova ndi zolungama; anthu olungama amayenda mʼmenemo
Joel1:1 Yehova anayankhula ndi Yoweli mwana wa Petueli.
Joel1:2 Inu akuluakulu
Joel1:3 Muwafotokozere ana anu
Joel1:4 Chimene dzombe losamera mapiko lasiya dzombe lowuluka ladya; chimene dzombe lowuluka lasiya dzombe lalingʼono ladya; chimene dzombe lalingʼono lasiya chilimamine wadya.
Joel1:5 Dzukani
Joel1:6 Mtundu wa anthu wathira nkhondo dziko langa
Joel1:7 Wawononga mphesa zanga ndipo wathyola mitengo yanga ya mkuyu. Wakungunula makungwa ake ndi kuwataya
Joel1:8 Lirani ngati namwali wovala chiguduli
Joel1:9 Chopereka cha chakudya ndi cha chakumwa sizikuperekedwa ku nyumba ya Yehova. Ansembe akulira
Joel1:10 Minda yaguga
Joel1:11 Khalani ndi nkhawa
Joel1:12 Mpesa wauma ndipo mtengo wamkuyu wafota; makangadza
Joel1:13 Inu ansembe
Joel1:14 Lengezani tsiku lopatulika losala zakudya
Joel1:15 Kalanga ine tsikulo! Pakuti tsiku la Yehova layandikira; lidzabwera ngati chiwonongeko chochokera kwa Wamphamvuzonse.
Joel1:16 Kodi chakudya chathu sichachotsedwa ife tikuona? Kodi mʼnyumba ya Mulungu wathu simulibe chimwemwe ndi chisangalalo?
Joel1:17 Mbewu zikunyala poti pansi ndi powuma. Nyumba zosungiramo zinthu zawonongeka; nkhokwe zapasuka popeza tirigu wauma.
Joel1:18 Taonani mmene zikulirira ziweto; ngʼombe zikungoyenda uku ndi uku chifukwa zilibe msipu; ngakhalenso nkhosa zikusauka.
Joel1:19 Kwa Inu Yehova ndilirira
Joel1:20 Ngakhale nyama zakuthengo zikulirira Inu; timitsinje tonse taphwa ndipo moto wapsereza msipu wa kuthengo.
Joel2:1 Lizani lipenga mu Ziyoni. Chenjezani pa phiri langa loyera. Onse okhala mʼdziko anjenjemere
Joel2:2 tsiku la mdima ndi chisoni
Joel2:3 Patsogolo pawo moto ukupsereza
Joel2:4 Maonekedwe awo ali ngati akavalo; akuthamanga ngati akavalo ankhondo.
Joel2:5 Akulumpha pamwamba pa mapiri ndi phokoso ngati la magaleta
Joel2:6 Akangowaona
Joel2:7 Amathamanga ngati ankhondo; amakwera makoma ngati asilikali. Onse amayenda pa mizere
Joel2:8 Iwo sakankhanakankhana
Joel2:9 Amakhamukira mu mzinda
Joel2:10 Patsogolo pawo dziko limagwedezeka
Joel2:11 Yehova amabangula patsogolo pawo
Joel2:12 “Ngakhale tsopano
Joel2:13 Ngʼambani mtima wanu osati zovala zanu. Bwererani kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu
Joel2:14 Akudziwa ndani? Mwina adzasintha maganizo nʼkutimvera chisoni
Joel2:15 Lizani lipenga mu Ziyoni
Joel2:16 Sonkhanitsani anthu pamodzi
Joel2:17 Ansembe amene amatumikira pamaso pa Yehova
Joel2:18 Pamenepo Yehova adzachitira nsanje dziko lake ndi kuchitira chisoni anthu ake.
Joel2:19 Yehova adzawayankha kuti
Joel2:20 “Ine ndidzachotsa ankhondo akumpoto kuti apite kutali ndi inu
Joel2:21 Iwe dziko usachite mantha; sangalala ndipo kondwera. Zoonadi Yehova wachita zinthu zazikulu.
Joel2:22 Inu nyama zakuthengo
Joel2:23 Inu anthu a ku Ziyoni sangalalani
Joel2:24 Pa malo opunthira padzaza tirigu; mʼmitsuko mudzasefukira vinyo watsopano ndi mafuta.
Joel2:25 “Ine ndidzakubwezerani zonse zimene zinawonongedwa ndi dzombe
Joel2:26 Mudzakhala ndi chakudya chambiri
Joel2:27 Pamenepo inu mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndili mu Israeli
Joel2:28 “Ndipo patapita nthawi
Joel2:29 Ngakhalenso pa antchito anga aamuna ndi aakazi ndidzakhuthulira Mzimu wanga masiku amenewo.
Joel2:30 Ndidzaonetsa zodabwitsa mlengalenga ndi pa dziko lapansi
Joel2:31 Dzuwa lidzadetsedwa ndipo mwezi udzaoneka ngati magazi lisanafike tsiku lalikulu ndi loopsa la Ambuye.
Joel2:32 Ndipo aliyense amene adzayitana pa dzina la Ambuye adzapulumuka; pakuti chipulumutso chidzakhala pa Phiri la Ziyoni ndi mu Yerusalemu
Joel3:1 “Masiku amenewo ndiponso nthawi imeneyo
Joel3:2 ndidzasonkhanitsa anthu a mitundu yonse ndipo ndidzawabweretsa ku Chigwa cha Yehosafati. Kumeneko ndidzawaweruza chifukwa cha cholowa changa
Joel3:3 Anagawana anthu anga pochita maere ndipo anyamata anawasinthanitsa ndi akazi achiwerewere; anagulitsa atsikana chifukwa cha vinyo kuti iwo amwe.
Joel3:4 “Kodi tsopano inu a ku Turo ndi Sidoni ndi madera onse a Filisitiya
Joel3:5 Pakuti munatenga siliva ndi golide wanga ndi kupita nacho chuma changa chamtengowapatali ku nyumba zanu zopembedzera mafano.
Joel3:6 Inu munagulitsa anthu a ku Yuda ndi Yerusalemu kwa Agriki
Joel3:7 “Taonani
Joel3:8 Ndidzagulitsa ana anu aamuna ndi ana anu aakazi kwa anthu a ku Yuda
Joel3:9 Lengezani izi pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina: Konzekerani nkhondo! Dzutsani ankhondo amphamvu! Asilikali onse afike pafupi ndipo ayambe nkhondo.
Joel3:10 Sulani makasu anu kuti akhale malupanga ndipo zikwanje zanu zikhale mikondo. Munthu wofowoka anene kuti
Joel3:11 Bwerani msanga
Joel3:12 “Mitundu ya anthu idzuke; ipite ku Chigwa cha Yehosafati
Joel3:13 Tengani chikwakwa chodulira tirigu
Joel3:14 Chigulu cha anthu
Joel3:15 Dzuwa ndi mwezi zidzadetsedwa
Joel3:16 Yehova adzabangula kuchokera mu Ziyoni ndipo mawu ake adzamveka ngati bingu kuchokera mu Yerusalemu; dziko lapansi ndi thambo zidzagwedezeka. Koma Yehova adzakhala pothawira pa anthu ake
Joel3:17 “Pamenepo inu mudzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova Mulungu wanu
Joel3:18 “Tsiku limenelo mapiri adzachucha vinyo watsopano
Joel3:19 Koma Igupto adzasanduka bwinja
Joel3:20 Koma Yuda adzakhala ndi anthu mpaka muyaya ndi Yerusalemu ku mibadomibado.
Joel3:21 Kukhetsa magazi kwawo kumene Ine sindinakhululuke ndidzakhululuka.” Yehova amakhala mu Ziyoni!
Amos1:1 Mawu a Amosi
Amos1:2 Amosi anati: “Yehova akubangula mu Ziyoni ndipo akumveka ngati bingu mu Yerusalemu; msipu wa abusa ukulira
Amos1:3 Yehova akuti
Amos1:4 Ine ndidzatumiza moto pa nyumba ya Hazaeli umene udzanyeketsa nyumba zaufumu za Beni-Hadadi.
Amos1:5 Ndidzathyola chipata cha Damasiko; ndidzawononga mfumu yokhala ku Chigwa cha Aveni
Amos1:6 Yehova akuti
Amos1:7 ndidzatumiza moto pa makoma a Gaza umene udzanyeketsa nyumba zake zaufumu.
Amos1:8 Ndidzawononga mfumu ya ku Asidodi komanso amene akugwira ndodo yaufumu ku Asikeloni. Ndidzalanga Ekroni
Amos1:9 Yehova akuti
Amos1:10 Ine ndidzatumiza moto pa makoma a Turo umene udzanyeketsa nyumba zake zaufumu.”
Amos1:11 Yehova akuti
Amos1:12 Ine ndidzatumiza moto pa Temani umene udzanyeketsa nyumba zaufumu za Bozira.”
Amos1:13 Yehova akuti
Amos1:14 Ine ndidzayatsa moto pa makoma a ku Raba umene udzanyeketsa nyumba zake zaufumu. Padzakhala kulira kwakukulu pa tsiku la nkhondoyo
Amos1:15 Mfumu yawo idzatengedwa kupita ku ukapolo
Amos2:1 Yehova akuti
Amos2:2 Ine ndidzatumiza moto pa Mowabu
Amos2:3 Ndidzawononga wolamulira wake ndi kupha akuluakulu onse amene ali pamodzi ndi iye
Amos2:4 Yehova akuti
Amos2:5 Ine ndidzatumiza moto pa Yuda
Amos2:6 Yehova akuti
Amos2:7 Amapondereza anthu osauka ngati akuponda fumbi
Amos2:8 Anthuwo amakagonana mʼmbali mwa guwa lililonse la nsembe pa zovala zimene anatenga ngati chikole. Mʼnyumba ya mulungu wawo amamweramo vinyo amene analipiritsa anthu pa milandu.
Amos2:9 “Ine ndinawononga Aamori pamaso pawo
Amos2:10 “Ine ndinakutulutsani ku Igupto
Amos2:11 Ine ndinawutsanso ena mwa ana ako kuti akhale aneneri
Amos2:12 “Koma inu munawamwetsa vinyo anaziri aja
Amos2:13 “Tsono Ine ndidzakupsinjani monga imapsinjikira ngolo imene yadzaza ndi tirigu.
Amos2:14 Munthu waliwiro sadzatha kuthawa
Amos2:15 Munthu wa uta sadzalimbika
Amos2:16 Ngakhale asilikali olimba mtima kwambiri adzathawa ali maliseche pa tsikulo
Amos3:1 Inu Aisraeli
Amos3:2 “Inu nokha ndi amene ndinakusankhani pakati pa mabanja onse a dziko lapansi; nʼchifukwa chake ndidzakulangani chifukwa cha machimo anu onse.”
Amos3:3 Kodi anthu awiri nʼkuyendera limodzi asanapangane?
Amos3:4 Kodi mkango umabangula mʼnkhalango usanagwire nyama? Kodi msona wamkango umalira mʼphanga mwake pamene sunagwire kanthu?
Amos3:5 Kodi mbalame nʼkutera pa msampha pamene palibe nyambo yake? Kodi msampha umafwamphuka usanakole kanthu?
Amos3:6 Kodi pamene lipenga la nkhondo lalira mu mzinda
Amos3:7 Zoonadi Ambuye Yehova sachita kanthu asanawulule zimene akufuna kuchita kwa atumiki ake
Amos3:8 Mkango wabangula
Amos3:9 Lengezani zimenezi ku nyumba zaufumu za ku Asidodi ndiponso ku nyumba zaufumu za ku Igupto: “Sonkhanani ku mapiri a ku Samariya; onani chisokonezo pakati pake ndiponso kuponderezana pakati pa anthu ake.”
Amos3:10 “Iwo sadziwa kuchita zolungama
Amos3:11 Nʼchifukwa chake Ambuye Yehova akunena izi: “Mdani adzalizungulira dzikoli; iye adzagwetsa malinga ako
Amos3:12 Yehova akuti
Amos3:13 “Imvani izi ndipo mupereke umboni wotsutsa nyumba ya Yakobo
Amos3:14 “Pa tsiku limene ndidzalange Israeli chifukwa cha machimo ake
Amos3:15 Ndidzagwetsa nyumba ya pa nthawi yozizira pamodzi ndi nyumba ya pa nthawi yotentha; nyumba zokongoletsedwa ndi minyanga ya njovu zidzawonongedwa ndipo nyumba zikuluzikulu zidzaphwasulidwa
Amos4:1 Imvani mawu awa
Amos4:2 Ambuye Yehova
Amos4:3 Mudzatulukira mʼmingʼalu ya pa khoma aliyense payekhapayekha
Amos4:4 “Bwerani ku Beteli mudzachimwe; ndi ku Giligala kuti mudzapitirize kuchimwa. Bweretsani nsembe zanu mmawa uliwonse
Amos4:5 Wotchani buledi wokhala ndi yisiti ngati nsembe yachiyamiko ndi kumanyadira poyera za zopereka zanu zaufulu. Inu Aisraeli
Amos4:6 “Ndine amene ndinakusendetsani milomo mʼmizinda yanu yonse
Amos4:7 “Ndinenso amene ndinamanga mvula patangotsala miyezi itatu kuti mukolole. Ndinagwetsa mvula pa mzinda wina
Amos4:8 Anthu ankayenda mzinda ndi mzinda kufuna madzi
Amos4:9 “Nthawi zambiri ndinakantha mbewu zanu ndiponso minda ya mpesa
Amos4:10 “Ine ndinabweretsa miliri pakati panu monga ndinachitira ku Igupto. Ndinapha anyamata anu ndi lupanga
Amos4:11 “Ndinawononga ena mwa inu monga ndinawonongera Sodomu ndi Gomora. Inu munali ngati chikuni choyaka chimene chafumulidwa pa moto. Komabe inu simunabwerere kwa Ine
Amos4:12 “Choncho izi ndi zimene ndidzakuchitire iwe Israeli
Amos4:13 Iye amene amawumba mapiri
Amos5:1 Israeli
Amos5:2 “Namwali Israeli wagwa
Amos5:3 Ambuye Yehova akuti
Amos5:4 Zimene Yehova akunena kwa nyumba ya Israeli ndi izi: “Mundifunefune kuti mukhale ndi moyo;
Amos5:5 musafunefune Beteli
Amos5:6 Funani Yehova kuti mukhale ndi moyo
Amos5:7 Inu amene mumasandutsa chiweruzo cholungama kukhala chowawa ndi kunyoza chilungamo.
Amos5:8 (Iye amene analenga nyenyezi za Nsangwe ndi Akamwiniatsatana
Amos5:9 Iyeyo amabweretsa chiwonongeko modzidzimutsa pa anthu amphamvu ndi kuwononga mizinda yotetezedwa)
Amos5:10 inu mumadana ndi amene amadzudzula mʼbwalo la milandu ndi kunyoza amene amanena zoona.
Amos5:11 Mumapondereza munthu wosauka ndi kumukakamiza kuti akupatseni tirigu. Nʼchifukwa chake
Amos5:12 Pakuti Ine ndikudziwa kuchuluka kwa zolakwa zanu ndi kukula kwa machimo anu. Inu mumapondereza anthu olungama ndi kulandira ziphuphu ndipo anthu osauka simuwaweruza mwachilungamo mʼmabwalo anu amilandu.
Amos5:13 Nʼchifukwa chake pa nthawi yotere munthu wanzeru sayankhulapo kanthu
Amos5:14 Muyike mtima wanu pa zabwino osati pa zoyipa
Amos5:15 Mudane ndi zoyipa
Amos5:16 Choncho izi ndi zimene Ambuye
Amos5:17 Mʼminda yonse ya mpesa mudzakhala kulira kokhakokha
Amos5:18 Tsoka kwa inu amene mumalakalaka tsiku la Yehova! Chifukwa chiyani mumalakalaka tsiku la Yehova? Tsikulo kudzakhala mdima osati kuwala.
Amos5:19 Lidzakhala ngati tsiku limene munthu pothawa mkango amakumana ndi chimbalangondo
Amos5:20 Kodi tsiku la Yehova silidzakhala mdima osati kuwala
Amos5:21 “Ndimadana nawo masiku anu achikondwerero ndipo ndimawanyoza; sindikondwera nayo misonkhano yanu.
Amos5:22 Ngakhale mupereke nsembe zopsereza ndi nsembe zachakudya
Amos5:23 Musandisokose nazo nyimbo zanu! Sindidzamvetsera kulira kwa azeze anu.
Amos5:24 Koma chiweruzo cholungama chiyende ngati madzi
Amos5:25 “Kodi pa zaka makumi anayi zimene munakhala mʼchipululu muja munkandibweretsera nsembe ndi zopereka
Amos5:26 Inu mwanyamula kachisi wa mfumu yanu
Amos5:27 Nʼchifukwa chake Ine ndidzakupititsani ku ukapolo
Amos6:1 Tsoka kwa amene simukulabadira kanthu ku Ziyoni
Amos6:2 Pitani ku mzinda wa Kaline mukawuyangʼane; mukapitenso ku Hamati-raba mzinda waukulu uja
Amos6:3 Inu simulabadirako kuti tsiku loyipa lidzafika
Amos6:4 Mumagona pa mabedi owakongoletsa ndi minyanga ya njovu
Amos6:5 Mumayimba azeze anu ndi kumangopeka nyimbo pa zingʼwenyengʼwenye ngati Davide.
Amos6:6 Mumamwera vinyo mʼzipanda zodzaza ndipo mumadzola mafuta abwino kwambiri
Amos6:7 Nʼchifukwa chake inu mudzakhala mʼgulu la anthu oyamba kupita ku ukapolo; maphwando ndi zikondwerero zanu zidzatheratu.
Amos6:8 Ambuye Yehova walumbira mʼdzina lake. Yehova Mulungu Wamphamvuzonse walengeza kuti
Amos6:9 Ngati anthu khumi otsala adzabisala mʼnyumba imodzi
Amos6:10 Ndipo ngati mʼbale wake wa wina wakufayo
Amos6:11 Pakuti Yehova walamula kuti nyumba zikuluzikulu Iye adzazigamulagamula
Amos6:12 Kodi akavalo amathamanga pa thanthwe? Kodi wina amatipula ndi ngʼombe mʼnyanja? Koma chiweruzo cholungama mwachisandutsa kukhala zinthu zakupha ndipo chipatso cha chilungamo mwachisandutsa kukhala chowawa.
Amos6:13 Inu amene mukunyadira kuti munagonjetsa Lo Debara ndipo mukunena kuti
Amos6:14 Koma Yehova Mulungu Wamphamvuzonse akulengeza kuti
Amos7:1 Zimene Ambuye Yehova anandionetsa ndi izi: Yehova ankasonkhanitsa gulu la dzombe nthawi imene gawo la zokolola za mfumu linali litakololedwa kale ndipo mbewu zachiwiri zinali zitangoyamba kumera kumene.
Amos7:2 Dzombelo litadya zomera zonse za mʼdzikomo
Amos7:3 Kotero Yehova anakhululuka. Yehovayo anati
Amos7:4 Zimene Ambuye Yehova anandionetsa ndi izi: Ambuye Yehova ankayitana malawi a moto kuti alange anthu. Motowo unawumitsa nyanja yakuya ndi kupsereza dziko.
Amos7:5 Tsono ine ndinafuwula kuti
Amos7:6 Kotero Yehova anakhululuka. Ambuye Yehova anati
Amos7:7 Zimene Iye anandionetsa ndi izi: Ambuye anayima pambali pa khoma lomangamanga
Amos7:8 Ndipo Ambuye anandifunsa kuti
Amos7:9 “Malo achipembedzo a Isake adzawonongedwa ndipo malo opatulika a Israeli adzasanduka bwinja; ndidzagwetsa nyumba ya Yeroboamu ndi lupanga langa.”
Amos7:10 Pamenepo Amaziya wansembe wa ku Beteli anatumiza uthenga kwa Yeroboamu mfumu ya Israeli kuti
Amos7:11 Pakuti zimene Amosi akunena ndi izi: “ ‘Yeroboamu adzaphedwa ndi lupanga
Amos7:12 Ndipo Amaziya anawuza Amosi kuti
Amos7:13 Usanenerenso ku Beteli
Amos7:14 Amosi anayankha Amaziya kuti
Amos7:15 Koma Yehova ananditenga ndikuweta nkhosa ndipo anati
Amos7:16 Tsono imva mawu a Yehova. Iwe ukunena kuti
Amos7:17 “Tsono zimene akunena Yehova ndi izi: “ ‘Mkazi wako adzasanduka wachiwerewere mu mzindamu
Amos8:1 Zimene Ambuye Yehova anandionetsa ndi izi: dengu la zipatso zakupsa.

Amos8:3 “Tsiku limenelo
Amos8:4 Imvani izi
Amos8:5 Mumanena kuti
Amos8:6 tigule osauka ndi ndalama zasiliva ndi osowa powapatsa nsapato
Amos8:7 Yehova amene Yakobo amamunyadira
Amos8:8 “Kodi dziko silidzagwedezeka chifukwa cha zimenezi
Amos8:9 “Tsiku limenelo
Amos8:10 Maphwando anu achipembedzo ndidzawasandutsa kulira kwa chisoni ndipo kuyimba kwanu konse ndidzakusandutsa maliro. Ndidzakuvekani chiguduli nonsenu ndi kumeta mipala mitu yanu. Nthawi imeneyo idzakhala ngati yolira mwana wamwamuna mmodzi yekhayo
Amos8:11 “Nthawi ikubwera
Amos8:12 Anthu azidzangoyendayenda kuchoka ku nyanja ina kupita ku nyanja ina. Azidzangoyendayenda kuchoka kumpoto kupita kummawa
Amos8:13 “Tsiku limenelo “anamwali okongola ndi anyamata amphamvu adzakomoka ndi ludzu.
Amos8:14 Onse amene amalumbira pa tchimo la Samariya
Amos9:1 Ine ndinaona Ambuye atayima pambali pa guwa lansembe
Amos9:2 Ngakhale atakumba pansi mpaka ku malo a anthu akufa
Amos9:3 Ngakhale atakabisala pamwamba pa phiri la Karimeli
Amos9:4 Ngakhale adani awo awakusire ku ukapolo
Amos9:5 Ambuye Yehova Wamphamvuzonse amene amakhudza dziko lapansi ndipo dzikolo limasungunuka
Amos9:6 Iye amene amamanga malo ake okhalamo kumwamba
Amos9:7 “Kodi kwa Ine
Amos9:8 “Taonani
Amos9:9 “Pakuti ndidzalamula

Amos9:11 “Tsiku limenelo ndidzabwezeretsa nyumba ya Davide imene inagwa. Ndidzakonzanso malo amene anagumuka
Amos9:12 kuti adzatengenso otsala a Edomu ndi mitundu yonse imene imatchedwa ndi dzina langa
Amos9:13 Yehova akunena kuti “Nthawi ikubwera pamene mlimi wotipula adzapyola wokolola ndipo woponda mphesa adzapyola wodzala mbewu. Mapiri adzachucha vinyo watsopano ndi kuyenderera pa zitunda zonse.
Amos9:14 Ndidzawabwezeranso pabwino anthu anga Aisraeli; mizinda imene inali mabwinja idzamangidwanso ndipo azidzakhalamo. Adzalima minda ya mpesa ndipo adzamwa vinyo wake; adzalima minda ndipo adzadya zipatso zake.
Amos9:15 Ndidzakhazika Aisraeli mʼdziko mwawo
Obadiah1:1 Masomphenya a Obadiya. Ambuye Yehova akunena kwa Edomu kuti
Obadiah1:2 “Taona
Obadiah1:3 Kudzikuza kwa mtima wako kwakusocheretsa
Obadiah1:4 Koma ngakhale umawuluka ngati chiwombankhanga ndi kumanga chisa chako pakati pa nyenyezi
Obadiah1:5 “Anthu akuba akanabwera kwa iwe
Obadiah1:6 Koma Esau adzalandidwa zinthu zonse
Obadiah1:7 Anthu onse ogwirizana nawo adzakupirikitsira kumalire; abwenzi ako adzakunyenga ndi kukugonjetsa; amene amadya chakudya chako adzakutchera msampha
Obadiah1:8 Yehova akunena kuti
Obadiah1:9 Ankhondo ako
Obadiah1:10 Chifukwa cha nkhanza zimene unachitira mʼbale wako Yakobo
Obadiah1:11 Pamene adani ankamulanda chuma chake pamene alendo analowa pa zipata zake ndi kuchita maere pa Yerusalemu
Obadiah1:12 Iwe sunayenera kunyoza mʼbale wako pa nthawi ya tsoka lake
Obadiah1:13 Iwe sunayenera kudutsa pa zipata za anthu anga pa nthawi ya masautso awo
Obadiah1:14 Sunayenera kudikirira pamphambano ya misewu kuti uphe Ayuda othawa
Obadiah1:15 “Tsiku la Yehova layandikira limene adzaweruza mitundu yonse ya anthu. Adzakuchitira zomwe unawachitira ena; zochita zako zidzakubwerera wekha.
Obadiah1:16 Iwe unamwa pa phiri langa loyera
Obadiah1:17 Koma pa Phiri la Ziyoni padzakhala chipulumutso; phirilo lidzakhala lopatulika
Obadiah1:18 Nyumba ya Yakobo idzasanduka moto ndipo nyumba ya Yosefe idzasanduka lawi la moto; nyumba ya Esau idzasanduka chiputu
Obadiah1:19 Anthu ochokera ku Negevi adzakhala ku mapiri a Esau
Obadiah1:20 Aisraeli amene ali ku ukapolo adzalandira dziko la Kanaani mpaka ku Zarefati; a ku Yerusalemu amene ali ku ukapolo ku Sefaradi adzalandira mizinda ya ku Negevi.
Obadiah1:21 Opulumukawo adzapita ku Phiri la Ziyoni ndipo adzalamulira mapiri a Esau. Koma ufumuwo udzakhala wa Yehova.
Jonah1:1 Yehova anayankhula ndi Yona mwana wa Amitai kuti
Jonah1:2 “Nyamuka
Jonah1:3 Koma Yona anathawa Yehova ndi kulowera ku Tarisisi. Anapita ku Yopa
Jonah1:4 Koma Yehova anatumiza chimphepo champhamvu pa nyanja
Jonah1:5 Onse oyendetsa sitimayo anachita mantha ndipo aliyense anayamba kupemphera kwa mulungu wake. Ndipo anaponya katundu mʼnyanja kuti sitimayo ipepuke. Koma Yona pa nthawiyi nʼkuti atatsikira mʼkatikati mwa sitimayo kumene anagona tulo tofa nato.
Jonah1:6 Mkulu wa oyendetsa sitimayo anapita kwa iye ndipo anati
Jonah1:7 Ndipo oyendetsa sitimayo anayamba kuwuzana kuti
Jonah1:8 Tsono anamufunsa kuti
Jonah1:9 Iye anayankha kuti
Jonah1:10 Izi zinawachititsa mantha kwambiri ndipo anafunsa kuti
Jonah1:11 Namondwe ananka nakulirakulirabe pa nyanjapo. Tsono anamufunsa iye kuti
Jonah1:12 Iye anayankha kuti
Jonah1:13 Komabe oyendetsa sitimayo anayesetsa kupalasa kwambiri kuti abwerere ku mtunda koma analephera ndithu poti nyanja inawinduka kwambiri kuposa poyamba paja
Jonah1:14 Pamenepo iwo anafuwulira kwa Yehova nati
Jonah1:15 Ndipo anatenga Yona namuponya mʼnyanja
Jonah1:16 Anthuwo ataona zimenezi anachita mantha akulu ndi Yehova
Jonah1:17 Koma Yehova anatuma nsomba yayikulu kuti imeze Yona. Motero Yona anakhala mʼmimba mwa nsombayo masiku atatu
Jonah2:1 Yona ali mʼmimba mwa chinsomba chija anapemphera kwa Yehova Mulungu wake.

Jonah2:3 Munandiponya mʼnyanja yozama
Jonah2:4 Ndinati
Jonah2:5 Madzi wondimiza anandichititsa mantha
Jonah2:6 Ndinatsikira kunsi ndithu
Jonah2:7 “Pamene moyo wanga umachoka mwa ine
Jonah2:8 “Iwo amene amagwiritsitsa mafano achabechabe amataya chisomo chawo.
Jonah2:9 Koma ine ndidzapereka kwa Inu nsembe ndikuyimba nyimbo yamayamiko. Chimene ndinalonjeza ndidzachikwaniritsa. Chipulumutso chimachokera kwa Yehova.”

Jonah3:4 Yona analowa mu mzindawo

Jonah3:7 Tsono mfumuyo inalengeza mu Ninive kuti

Jonah3:10 Mulungu ataona zimene anthuwo anachita

Micah1:1 Yehova anayankhula ndi Mika wa ku Moreseti pa nthawi ya ulamuliro wa Yotamu
Micah1:2 Tamverani
Micah1:3 Taonani! Yehova akubwera kuchokera ku malo ake; Iye akutsika ndipo akuponda pa malo okwera a dziko lapansi.
Micah1:4 Mapiri akusungunuka pansi pake
Micah1:5 Zonsezi ndi chifukwa cha cholakwa cha Yakobo
Micah1:6 “Choncho Ine ndidzasandutsa Samariya kukhala bwinja
Micah1:7 Mafano ake onse ndidzawaphwanyaphwanya; mphatso zake zonse ndidzazitentha ndi moto; ndidzawononga zifanizo zonse za milungu yake. Popeza analandira mphatso zake kuchokera ku malipiro a akazi achiwerewere
Micah1:8 Chifukwa cha zimenezi ine ndidzalira momvetsa chisoni; ndidzayenda wopanda nsapato ndi wamaliseche. Ndidzafuwula ngati nkhandwe ndi kulira ngati kadzidzi.
Micah1:9 Pakuti chilonda cha Samariya nʼchosachizika; chafika ku Yuda. Chafika pa chipata chenicheni cha anthu anga
Micah1:10 Musanene zimenezi ku Gati; musalire nʼkomwe. Mugubuduzike mu fumbi ku Beti-Leafura.
Micah1:11 Inu anthu okhala ku Safiro
Micah1:12 Anthu amene amakhala ku Maroti akubuwula ndi ululu
Micah1:13 Inu anthu okhala ku Lakisi mangani akavalo ku magaleta. Inu amene munayamba kuchimwitsa mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni
Micah1:14 Chifukwa chake perekani mphatso zolawirana ndi a ku Moreseti Gati. Mzinda wa Akizibu udzaonetsa kunama kwa mafumu a Israeli.
Micah1:15 Ndidzabweretsa mgonjetsi kudzalimbana ndi inu okhala mu Maresa. Ulemerero wa Israeli udzafika ku Adulamu.
Micah1:16 Metani mipala mitu yanu kuonetsa kuti mukulirira ana anu amene mumawakonda; mudzichititse dazi ngati dembo

Micah2:2 Amasirira minda ndi kuyilanda

Micah2:4 Tsiku limenelo anthu adzakuchitani chipongwe; adzakunyogodolani ndi nyimbo iyi yamaliro: ‘Tawonongeka kotheratu; dziko la anthu anga lagawidwa. Iye wandilanda! Wapereka minda yathu kwa anthu otiwukira.’ ”
Micah2:5 Nʼchifukwa chake simudzakhala ndi munthu mu msonkhano wa Yehova kuti agawe dziko pochita maere.
Micah2:6 Aneneri awo amanena kuti
Micah2:7 Inu nyumba ya Yakobo

Micah2:9 Mumatulutsa akazi a anthu anga mʼnyumba zawo zabwino. Mumalanda ana awo madalitso anga kosatha.
Micah2:10 Nyamukani
Micah2:11 Ngati munthu wabodza ndi wachinyengo abwera nʼkunena kuti
Micah2:12 “Inu banja la Yakobo

Micah4:1 Mʼmasiku otsiriza
Micah4:2 Mayiko ambiri adzabwera ndikunena kuti
Micah4:3 Iye adzaweruza pakati pa anthu amitundu yambiri ndipo adzathetsa kusamvana pakati pa anthu amphamvu akutali ndi apafupi omwe. Anthuwo adzasandutsa malupanga awo kukhala makasu ndiponso mikondo yawo kukhala zomwetera. Mtundu wina sudzatenganso lupanga kumenyana ndi mtundu wina
Micah4:4 Munthu aliyense adzakhala pansi pa tsinde pa mtengo wake wa mpesa ndi pa tsinde pa mtengo wake wamkuyu
Micah4:5 Mitundu yonse ya anthu itha kutsatira milungu yawo; ife tidzayenda mʼnjira za Yehova Mulungu wathu mpaka muyaya.

Micah4:12 Koma iwo sakudziwa maganizo a Yehova; iwo sakuzindikira cholinga chake

Micah5:1 Iwe mzinda wa anthu ankhondo
Micah5:2 “Koma iwe Betelehemu Efurata
Micah5:3 Nʼchifukwa chake Israeli adzasiyidwa mpaka pa nthawi imene mayi amene ali woyembekezera adzachire. Ndipo abale ake onse otsalira adzabwerera kudzakhala pamodzi ndi Aisraeli.
Micah5:4 Iye adzalimbika
Micah5:5 Ndipo Iye adzakhala mtendere wawo. Asiriya akadzalowa mʼdziko lathu ndi kuyamba kuthira nkhondo malo athu otetezedwa
Micah5:6 Iwo adzagonjetsa dziko la Asiriya ndi lupanga
Micah5:7 Otsalira a Yakobo adzakhala pakati pa mitundu yambiri ya anthu ngati mame ochokera kwa Yehova

Micah5:9 Mudzagonjetsa adani anu
Micah5:10 Yehova akuti
Micah5:11 Ndidzawononga mizinda ya mʼdziko mwanu ndi kugwetsa malinga anu onse.
Micah5:12 Ndidzawononga ufiti wanu ndipo sikudzakhalanso anthu owombeza mawula.
Micah5:13 Ndidzawononga mafano anu osema pamodzi ndi miyala yanu yopatulika imene ili pakati panu; simudzagwadiranso zinthu zopanga ndi manja anu.
Micah5:14 Ndidzazula mitengo ya mafano a Asera imene ili pakati panu
Micah5:15 Ndidzayilanga mwaukali ndi mokwiya mitundu imene sinandimvere Ine.”

Micah7:1 Tsoka ine! Ndili ngati munthu wokunkha zipatso nthawi yachilimwe
Micah7:2 Anthu opembedza atha mʼdziko; palibe wolungama ndi mmodzi yemwe amene watsala. Anthu onse akubisalirana kuti aphane; aliyense akusaka mʼbale wake ndi khoka.
Micah7:3 Manja awo onse ndi aluso pochita zoyipa; wolamulira amafuna mphatso
Micah7:4 Munthu wabwino kwambiri pakati pawo ali ngati mtengo waminga
Micah7:5 Usadalire mnansi; usakhulupirire bwenzi. Usamale zoyankhula zako ngakhale kwa mkazi amene wamukumbatira.
Micah7:6 Pakuti mwana wamwamuna akunyoza abambo ake
Micah7:7 Koma ine ndikudikira Yehova mwachiyembekezo
Micah7:8 Iwe mdani wanga
Micah7:9 Ndidzapirira mkwiyo wa Yehova
Micah7:10 Ndipo mdani wanga adzaona zimenezi nadzagwidwa ndi manyazi
Micah7:11 Idzafika nthawi yomanganso makoma anu
Micah7:12 Nthawi imeneyo anthu adzabwera kwa inu kuchokera ku Asiriya ndi mizinda ya ku Igupto
Micah7:13 Dziko lapansi lidzasanduka chipululu chifukwa cha anthu okhala mʼdzikomo
Micah7:14 Wetani anthu anu ndi ndodo yanu yowateteza
Micah7:15 “Ndidzawaonetsa zodabwitsa zanga
Micah7:16 Mitundu ya anthu idzaona zimenezi ndipo idzachita manyazi
Micah7:17 Adzabwira fumbi ngati njoka
Micah7:18 Kodi alipo Mulungu wofanana nanu
Micah7:19 Inu mudzatichitiranso chifundo; mudzapondereza pansi machimo athu ndi kuponyera zolakwa zathu zonse pansi pa nyanja.
Micah7:20 Mudzakhala wokhulupirika kwa Yakobo
Nahum1:1 Uthenga wonena za Ninive. Buku la masomphenya a Nahumu wa ku Elikosi.
Nahum1:2 Yehova ndi Mulungu wansanje ndiponso wobwezera; Yehova amabwezera ndipo ndi waukali. Yehova amabwezera adani ake ndipo ukali wake umakhala nthawi zonse pa adani akewo.
Nahum1:3 Yehova sakwiya msanga koma ndi wa mphamvu yayikulu; ndipo sadzalola kuti munthu wolakwa asalangidwe. Iye amayenda mʼkamvuluvulu ndi mʼnamondwe
Nahum1:4 Amalamulira nyanja ndipo imawuma; amawumitsa mitsinje yonse. Zomera za ku Basani ndi Karimeli zimawuma ndipo maluwa a ku Lebanoni amafota.
Nahum1:5 Mapiri amagwedera pamaso pake ndipo zitunda zimasungunuka. Dziko lapansi limanjenjemera pamaso pake
Nahum1:6 Ndani angathe kuyima pamaso pake Iye akalusa? Ndani angapirire mkwiyo wake woopsa? Ukali wake ukuyaka ngati moto; matanthwe akunyeka pamaso pake.
Nahum1:7 Yehova ndi wabwino
Nahum1:8 koma ndi madzi achigumula choopsa Iye adzawononga adani ake (Ninive); adzapirikitsira adani ake ku malo a mdima.
Nahum1:9 Chiwembu chilichonse chimene akukonzekera kumuchitira Yehova adzachiwononga kotheratu; msautso sudzabweranso kachiwiri.
Nahum1:10 Iwo adzakodwa mu ziyangoyango za minga ndipo adzaledzera ndi vinyo wawo; adzatenthedwa ngati ziputu zowuma.
Nahum1:11 Kwa iwe
Nahum1:12 Yehova akuti
Nahum1:13 Tsopano ndidzathyola goli lake pa khosi lako ndipo ndidzadula maunyolo ako.”
Nahum1:14 Yehova walamulira za iwe
Nahum1:15 Taonani
Nahum2:1 Wodzathira nkhondo akubwera kudzalimbana nawe
Nahum2:2 Yehova adzabwezeretsa ulemerero wa Yakobo ngati ulemerero wa Israeli
Nahum2:3 Zishango za ankhondo ake ndi zofiira; asilikali ake avala zovala zofiirira. Zitsulo za pa magaleta zikunyezimira tsiku la kukonzekera kwake. Akuonetsa mikondo ya mkungudza yonoledwa.
Nahum2:4 Magaleta akuthamanga mʼmisewu akungothamangathamanga pa mabwalo. Akuoneka ngati miyuni yoyaka; akuthamanga ngati chingʼaningʼani.
Nahum2:5 Iye akuyitanitsa asilikali ake wolemekezeka
Nahum2:6 Atsekula zipata zotchinga madzi a mu mtsinje ndipo nyumba yaufumu yagwa.
Nahum2:7 Zatsimikizika kuti mzinda utengedwa ndi kupita ku ukapolo. Akapolo aakazi akulira ngati nkhunda ndipo akudziguguda pachifuwa.
Nahum2:8 Ninive ali ngati dziwe
Nahum2:9 Funkhani siliva! Funkhani golide! Katundu wake ndi wochuluka kwambiri
Nahum2:10 Iye wawonongedwa
Nahum2:11 Kodi tsopano dzenje la mikango lili kuti
Nahum2:12 Mkango waumuna unkapha nyama yokwanira ana ake ndiponso kuphera nyama mkango waukazi
Nahum2:13 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Nahum3:1 Tsoka kwa mzinda wopha anthu
Nahum3:2 Kulira kwa zikwapu
Nahum3:3 Kuthamanga kwa anthu okwera pa akavalo
Nahum3:4 Zonsezi ndi chifukwa cha zilakolako za mkazi wachiwerewere
Nahum3:5 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Nahum3:6 Ndidzakuthira zonyansa
Nahum3:7 Onse amene adzakuona adzakuthawa ndipo adzati
Nahum3:8 Kodi ndiwe wopambana Tebesi
Nahum3:9 Mphamvu zake zinali Kusi ndi Igupto
Nahum3:10 Komabe anthu a ku Tebesi anagwidwa ndipo anapita ku ukapolo. Ana ake anawaphwanyitsa pansi mʼmisewu yonse ya mu mzindamo. Anachita maere ogawana anthu ake otchuka
Nahum3:11 Iwenso Ninive udzaledzera; udzabisala ndipo udzafunafuna malo othawirako kuopa mdani.
Nahum3:12 Malo ako onse otetezedwa ali ngati mitengo ya mkuyu yokhala ndi zipatso zoyambirira kucha; pamene agwedeza mitengoyo
Nahum3:13 Tayangʼana ankhondo ako
Nahum3:14 Tungani madzi woti mudzamwe nthawi ya kuzunguliridwa kwanu
Nahum3:15 Kumeneko moto udzakupserezani; lupanga lidzakukanthani ndipo lidzakuwonongani ngati likuwononga ziwala. Chulukanani ngati ziwala
Nahum3:16 Mwachulukitsa chiwerengero cha anthu a malonda anu mpaka kupambana nyenyezi za mlengalenga
Nahum3:17 Akalonga ako ali ngati dzombe
Nahum3:18 Iwe mfumu ya ku Asiriya
Nahum3:19 Palibe chimene chingachize bala lako; chilonda chako sichingapole. Aliyense amene amamva za iwe amawomba mʼmanja chifukwa cha kugwa kwako
Habakkuk1:1 Uthenga umene mneneri Habakuku analandira mʼmasomphenya.
Habakkuk1:2 Kodi inu Yehova
Habakkuk1:3 Chifukwa chiyani mukundionetsa zinthu zoyipa? Chifukwa chiyani mukundionetsa mavutowa? Ndikuona chiwonongeko ndi chiwawa; pali ndewu ndi kukangana kwambiri.
Habakkuk1:4 Kotero malamulo anu atha mphamvu
Habakkuk1:5 “Yangʼanani pakati pa mitundu ya anthu
Habakkuk1:6 Pakuti taonani
Habakkuk1:7 Iwowa ndi anthu ochititsa mantha
Habakkuk1:8 Akavalo awo ndi aliwiro kwambiri kupambana akambuku ndi owopsa kupambana mimbulu yolusa nthawi ya madzulo. Okwerapo awo akuthamanga molunjika; a pa akavalo awo ndi ochokera kutali
Habakkuk1:9 onse akubwera atakonzekera zachiwawa. Gulu la ankhondo likubwera ngati mphepo ya mʼchipululu ndi kugwira akapolo ochuluka ngati mchenga.
Habakkuk1:10 Akunyoza mafumu ndiponso kuchitira chipongwe olamulira. Akupeputsa mizinda yonse yotetezedwa; akumanga mitumbira ndi kulanda mizindayo.
Habakkuk1:11 Kenaka amasesa mofulumira ngati mphepo nʼkumangopitirirabe
Habakkuk1:12 Inu Yehova
Habakkuk1:13 Maso anu ndi oyera kwambiri safuna kuona choyipa; Inu simulekerera cholakwa. Chifukwa chiyani nanga mukulekerera anthu ochita zachinyengowa? Chifukwa chiyani muli chete pamene anthu oyipa akuwononga anthu olungama kupambana iwowo?
Habakkuk1:14 Mwasandutsa anthu kukhala ngati nsomba zamʼnyanja
Habakkuk1:15 Mdani wawo woyipa amakoka anthu onse ndi mbedza
Habakkuk1:16 Choncho iye amaperekera nsembe ukonde wake ndiponso kufukizira lubani khoka lake
Habakkuk1:17 Kodi iye azipitirabe kugwiritsa ntchito makoka akewo
Habakkuk2:1 Ndidzakhala pa malo anga aulonda
Habakkuk2:2 Tsono Yehova anandiyankha
Habakkuk2:3 Pakuti masomphenyawa akudikira nthawi yake; masomphenyawa akunena zamʼtsogolo ndipo sizidzalephera kuchitika. Ngakhale achedwe kukwaniritsidwa
Habakkuk2:4 “Taona
Habakkuk2:5 Ndithu
Habakkuk2:6 “Kodi onse ogwidwawo sadzamunyoza ndi kumunyogodola ponena kuti
Habakkuk2:7 Kodi angongole ako sadzakuwukira mwadzidzidzi? Kodi sadzadzuka ndi kukuchititsa mantha? Pamenepo iwe udzalandidwa kalikonse.
Habakkuk2:8 Pakuti unafunkha mitundu yambiri ya anthu
Habakkuk2:9 “Tsoka kwa amene amalemera ndi chuma chochipeza mwachinyengo
Habakkuk2:10 Wakonzekera kuwononga mitundu yambiri ya anthu
Habakkuk2:11 Mwala pa khoma udzafuwula
Habakkuk2:12 “Tsoka kwa amene amanga mzinda pokhetsa magazi ndi kukhazikitsa mzinda pochita zoyipa!
Habakkuk2:13 Kodi Yehova Wamphamvuzonse sanatsimikize kuti ntchito za anthu zili ngati nkhuni pa moto
Habakkuk2:14 Pakuti dziko lapansi lidzadzaza ndi chidziwitso cha ulemerero wa Yehova
Habakkuk2:15 “Tsoka kwa amene amamwetsa anzake zakumwa zoledzeretsa
Habakkuk2:16 Udzachita manyazi mʼmalo mokhala ndi ulemerero. Tsopano ino ndi nthawi yako! Imwa mpaka umaliseche wako uwonekere! Chikho chochokera mʼdzanja lamanja la Yehova chikubwera kwa iwe
Habakkuk2:17 Udzathedwa nzeru ndi chiwawa chimene unachita ku Lebanoni
Habakkuk2:18 “Kodi fano lili ndi phindu lanji
Habakkuk2:19 Tsoka kwa amene amawuza mtengo kuti
Habakkuk2:20 Koma Yehova ali mʼNyumba yake yopatulika; dziko lonse lapansi likhale chete pamaso pake.”
Habakkuk3:1 Pemphero la mneneri Habakuku potsata mayimbidwe a Sigionoti.
Habakkuk3:2 Inu Yehova
Habakkuk3:3 Mulungu anabwera kuchokera ku Temani
Habakkuk3:4 Kuwala kwa ulemerero wake kunali ngati kutuluka kwa dzuwa; kunyezimira kunkatuluka mʼdzanja lake
Habakkuk3:5 Patsogolo pake pankagwa mliri; nthenda yoopsa inkagwa kumbuyo kwake.
Habakkuk3:6 Iye anayimirira ndi kugwedeza dziko lapansi; anayangʼana ndipo mitundu ya anthu inanjenjemera. Mapiri okhazikika anagumuka ndipo zitunda zakalekale zinatitimira. Njira zake ndi zachikhalire.
Habakkuk3:7 Ndinaona matenti a ku Kusani ali pa mavuto
Habakkuk3:8 Inu Yehova
Habakkuk3:9 Munasolola uta wanu mʼchimake
Habakkuk3:10 mapiri anakuonani ndipo anagwedezeka. Madzi amphamvu anasefukira; nyanja yozama inakokoma ndipo mafunde ake anakwera kwambiri.
Habakkuk3:11 Dzuwa ndi mwezi zinayima chilili mlengalenga
Habakkuk3:12 Munayendayenda mʼdziko lapansi muli ndi ukali
Habakkuk3:13 Munapita kukalanditsa anthu anu

Habakkuk3:15 Munapondaponda pa nyanja ndi akavalo anu
Habakkuk3:16 Ndinamva ndipo mtima wanga unagunda kwambiri

Habakkuk3:19 Ambuye Yehova ndiye mphamvu yanga; amalimbitsa miyendo yanga ngati ya mbawala yayikazi
Zephaniah1:1 Yehova anayankhula ndi Zefaniya mwana wa Kusi
Zephaniah1:2 “Ndidzawononga kotheratu zinthu zonse pa dziko lapansi
Zephaniah1:3 “Ndidzawononga anthu pamodzi ndi nyama zomwe; ndidzawononga mbalame zamlengalenga ndi nsomba za mʼnyanja. Ndidzawononga anthu oyipa
Zephaniah1:4 Ndidzatambasula dzanja langa pa Yuda ndi onse okhala mu Yerusalemu. Ndidzawononga pamalo pano otsalira opembedza Baala
Zephaniah1:5 amene amagwada pa madenga a nyumba zawo kupembedza zolengedwa zamumlengalenga
Zephaniah1:6 amene abwerera mʼmbuyo osatsata Yehova
Zephaniah1:7 Khalani chete pamaso pa Ambuye Yehova
Zephaniah1:8 Pa tsiku la nsembe ya Yehova ndidzalanga akalonga ndi ana aamuna a mfumu ndi onse amene amavala zovala zachilendo.
Zephaniah1:9 Pa tsiku limenelo ndidzalanga onse amene safuna kuponda pa chiwundo
Zephaniah1:10 “Pa tsiku limenelo
Zephaniah1:11 Lirani mwachisoni
Zephaniah1:12 Pa nthawi imeneyo ndidzafufuzafufuza mu Yerusalemu ndi nyale ndi kulanga onse amene sakulabadira
Zephaniah1:13 Chuma chawo chidzafunkhidwa
Zephaniah1:14 Tsiku lalikulu la Yehova layandikira
Zephaniah1:15 Tsiku limenelo lidzakhala la ukali
Zephaniah1:16 Tsiku loliza lipenga ndi la mfuwu wankhondo
Zephaniah1:17 Ndidzabweretsa msautso pa anthu ndipo adzayenda ngati anthu osaona
Zephaniah1:18 Ngakhale siliva wawo kapena golide wawo sadzatha kuwapulumutsa pa tsiku la ukali wa Yehova. Dziko lonse lapansi lidzanyeka mʼmoto wa nsanje yake chifukwa adzakantha modzidzimutsa onse okhala pa dziko lapansi.

Zechariah1:1 Mwezi wachisanu ndi chitatu

Zechariah1:5 Kodi makolo anuwo ali kuti tsopano? Nanga aneneri
Zechariah1:6 Kodi mawu anga ndi malangizo anga
Zechariah1:7 Tsiku la 24 la mwezi wa 11
Zechariah1:8 Nthawi ya usiku ndinaona masomphenya. Ndinaona munthu atakwera pa kavalo wofiira. Iye anayima pakati pa mitengo ya mchisu mʼchigwa. Kumbuyo kwake kunali akavalo ofiira
Zechariah1:9 Ine ndinafunsa kuti
Zechariah1:10 Pamenepo munthu amene anayima pakati pa mitengo ya mchisu anafotokoza kuti

Zechariah4:1 Kenaka mngelo amene amayankhula nane anabwerera nandidzutsa
Zechariah4:2 Anandifunsa kuti

Zechariah4:4 Ndinamufunsa mngelo amene amayankhula nane kuti
Zechariah4:5 Iye anandiyankha kuti
Zechariah4:6 Choncho iye anandiwuza kuti
Zechariah4:7 “Kodi ndiwe yani
Zechariah4:8 Ndipo Yehova anayankhulanso nane kuti
Zechariah4:9 “Manja a Zerubabeli ndiwo ayika maziko a Nyumbayi; adzatsiriza ndi manja ake omwewo. Pamenepo iwe udzadziwa kuti Yehova Wamphamvuzonse ndiye anakutuma.
Zechariah4:10 “Ndani wanyoza tsiku la zinthu zazingʼono? Anthu adzasangalala akadzaona chingwe choyezera mʼmanja mwa Zerubabeli. (“Nyale zisanu ndi ziwirizi ndi maso a Yehova

Zechariah5:1 Ndinayangʼananso ndipo taonani ndinaona chikalata chimene chimawuluka.

Zechariah5:4 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akunena kuti

Zechariah5:6 Ndinafunsa kuti

Zechariah6:1 Ndinayangʼananso ndipo taonani ndinaona magaleta anayi akutuluka pakati pa mapiri awiri

Zechariah6:3 lachitatu ndi akavalo oyera
Zechariah6:4 Ndinafunsa mngelo amene amayankhula nane uja kuti
Zechariah6:5 Mngeloyo anandiyankha kuti
Zechariah6:6 Galeta la akavalo akuda likupita ku dziko la kumpoto
Zechariah6:7 Pamene akavalo amphamvuwa ankapita
Zechariah6:8 Pamenepo anandiyitana
Zechariah6:9 Yehova anayankhula nane kuti
Zechariah6:10 “Landira mphatso kuchokera kwa anthu amene abwera ku ukapolo
Zechariah6:11 Tenga siliva ndi golide upange chipewa chaufumu

Zechariah6:14 Chipewa cha ufumucho adzachipereka kwa Helemu
Zechariah6:15 Anthu okhala kutali adzabwera kudzathandiza kumanga Nyumba ya Yehova
Zechariah7:1 Pa chaka chachinayi cha Mfumu Dariyo
Zechariah7:2 Anthu a ku Beteli anali atatuma Sarezeri ndi Regemu-Meleki pamodzi ndi anthu awo
Zechariah7:3 pokafunsa kwa ansembe a ku Nyumba ya Yehova Wamphamvuzonse ndi aneneri kuti
Zechariah7:4 Pamenepo Yehova Wamphamvuzonse anayankhula nane kuti
Zechariah7:5 “Funsa anthu onse a mʼdziko ndi ansembe kuti
Zechariah7:6 Ndipo pamene munkadya ndi kumwa
Zechariah7:7 Kodi awa si mawu amene Yehova ankanena kudzera mwa aneneri oyamba aja pamene Yerusalemu ndi mizinda yake yozungulira anali pa mtendere ndi pa ulemerero
Zechariah7:8 Ndipo Yehova anayankhulanso ndi Zekariya kuti
Zechariah7:9 “Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Zechariah7:10 Musamazunze akazi amasiye kapena ana amasiye
Zechariah7:11 “Koma makolo anu anakana kumvera uthenga umenewu; anawumitsa mtima nandifulatira
Zechariah7:12 Anawumitsa mitima yawo ngati mwala wa sangalabwi ndipo sanamvere lamulo kapena mawu amene Yehova Wamphamvuzonse anawatumiza mwa Mzimu wake kudzera mwa aneneri oyamba aja. Kotero Yehova Wamphamvuzonse anakwiya kwambiri.
Zechariah7:13 “ ‘Pamene ndinawayitana
Zechariah7:14 ‘Ndinawamwaza ndi kamvuluvulu pakati pa mitundu yonse ya anthu

Zechariah8:2 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Zechariah8:3 Yehova akuti
Zechariah8:4 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Zechariah8:5 Ndipo misewu ya mu mzindamo idzadzaza ndi anyamata ndi atsikana akusewera.”
Zechariah8:6 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Zechariah8:7 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Zechariah8:8 Ndidzawabweretsa kuti adzakhale mu Yerusalemu; adzakhala anthu anga
Zechariah8:9 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Zechariah8:10 Mpaka nthawi imeneyi panalibe munthu wolandira malipiro pa ntchito kapena ndalama zolipirira nyama zogwira ntchito. Panalibe munthu amene ankadzigwirira ntchito mwamtendere chifukwa choopa adani ake
Zechariah8:11 Koma tsopano sindidzachitira otsala mwa anthu awa zomwe ndinachita kale
Zechariah8:12 “Pakuti mbewu zidzamera bwino
Zechariah8:13 Monga mwakhala muli chinthu chotembereredwa pakati pa mitundu ina ya anthu
Zechariah8:14 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Zechariah8:15 “Choncho tsopano ndatsimikiza mtima kuchitiranso zabwino Yerusalemu ndi Yuda. Musachite mantha.
Zechariah8:16 Zinthu zoti muchite ndi izi: Muziwuzana zoona zokhazokha
Zechariah8:17 musamachitire mnzanu chiwembu
Zechariah8:18 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse anayankhulanso nane.
Zechariah8:19 Ndipo ananena kuti
Zechariah8:20 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Zechariah8:21 ndipo nzika za mzinda wina zidzapita ku mzinda wina
Zechariah8:22 Anthu ambiri ndiponso a ku mayiko amphamvu adzabwera ku Yerusalemu kudzapembedza Yehova Wamphamvuzonse ndi kudzapempha madalitso.”
Zechariah8:23 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Zechariah9:1 Mawu a Yehova odzudzula dziko la Hadiraki ndi mzinda wa Damasiko pakuti maso a anthu ndiponso mafuko onse a Israeli ali pa Yehova—
Zechariah9:2 ndiponso mzinda wa Hamati
Zechariah9:3 Ndipo Turo anadzimangira linga; wadziwunjikira siliva ngati fumbi
Zechariah9:4 Taonani Ambuye adzamulanda chuma chakecho ndi kuwononga mphamvu zake mʼnyanja
Zechariah9:5 Mzinda wa Asikeloni udzaona zimenezi
Zechariah9:6 Mu Asidodi mudzakhala mlendo
Zechariah9:7 Ndidzachotsa nyama ya magazi mʼkamwa mwawo
Zechariah9:8 Koma Ine ndidzalondera Nyumba yanga ndi kuyiteteza kwa ankhondo osakaza. Palibenso mdani amene adzagonjetse anthu anga
Zechariah9:9 Sangalala kwambiri
Zechariah9:10 Ndidzachotsa magaleta ankhondo ku Efereimu ndi akavalo ankhondo ku Yerusalemu
Zechariah9:11 Tsono kunena za iwe
Zechariah9:12 Bwererani ku malo anu otetezedwa
Zechariah9:13 Ndidzakoka Yuda monga ndimakokera uta wanga
Zechariah9:14 Pamenepo Yehova adzaonekera kwa anthu ake; mivi yake idzangʼanima ngati chingʼaningʼani. Ambuye Yehova adzaliza lipenga; ndipo adzayenda mu mkuntho wochokera kummwera
Zechariah9:15 ndipo Yehova Wamphamvuzonse adzawateteza. Iwo adzawononga ndipo adzagonjetsa ndi miyala ya legeni. Adzamwa magazi ndi kubangula ngati amwa vinyo; magazi adzayenderera ngati a mʼmbale yowazira magazi pa ngodya za guwa lansembe.
Zechariah9:16 Tsiku limenelo Yehova Mulungu wawo adzawapulumutsa pakuti anthu ake ali ngati nkhosa. Adzanyezimira mʼdziko lake ngati miyala yokongola pa chipewa chaufumu.
Zechariah9:17 Taonani chikoka ndi kukongola kwawo! Tirigu adzasangalatsa anyamata
Zechariah10:1 Pemphani mvula kwa Yehova pa nthawi yamphukira; ndi Yehova amene amapanga mitambo ya mvula. Iye amagwetsa mivumbi ya mvula kwa anthu
Zechariah10:2 Mafano amayankhula zachinyengo
Zechariah10:3 “Ine ndawakwiyira kwambiri abusa
Zechariah10:4 Mu Yuda mudzachokera mwala wapangodya
Zechariah10:5 Onse pamodzi adzakhala ngati ngwazi zankhondo zoponda mʼmatope a mʼmisewu nthawi yankhondo. Chifukwa Yehova adzakhala nawo
Zechariah10:6 “Ndidzalimbitsa nyumba ya Yuda ndi kupulumutsa nyumba ya Yosefe. Ndidzawabwezeretsa chifukwa ndawamvera chisoni. Adzakhala ngati kuti sindinawakane
Zechariah10:7 Aefereimu adzakhala ngati ankhondo amphamvu adzasangalala ngati anthu amene amwa vinyo. Ana awo adzaziona zimenezi ndipo adzasangalala; mʼmitima mwawo adzakondwa mwa Ambuye.
Zechariah10:8 Ndidzaliza mluzu ndi kuwasonkhanitsa pamodzi. Ndithu ndawawombola; adzachulukana ngati poyamba paja.
Zechariah10:9 Ndinawamwaza pakati pa mitundu ina ya anthu
Zechariah10:10 Ndidzawabweretsa kuchokera ku Igupto ndipo ndidzawasonkhanitsa kuchokera ku Asiriya. Ndidzawabwezera ku Giliyadi ndi ku Lebanoni
Zechariah10:11 Adzawoloka nyanja ya masautso; nyanja yokokoma idzagonja ndipo madzi onse a mu Nailo adzaphwa. Kudzikuza kwa Asiriya kudzatha ndipo ndodo yaufumu ya Igupto idzathyoka.
Zechariah10:12 Ndidzalimbitsa iwo mwa Yehova ndipo adzayenda mʼdzina lake
Zechariah11:1 Tsekula zitseko zako
Zechariah11:2 Lira mwachisoni
Zechariah11:3 Imvani kulira mwachisoni kwa abusa; msipu wawo wobiriwira wawonongeka! Imvani kubangula kwa mikango; nkhalango yowirira ya ku Yorodani yawonongeka!
Zechariah11:4 Yehova Mulungu wanga akuti
Zechariah11:5 Amene amagula nkhosazo amazipha ndipo salangidwa. Amene amazigulitsa amanena kuti
Zechariah11:6 Pakuti Ine sindidzamveranso chisoni anthu okhala mʼdziko
Zechariah11:7 Choncho ine ndinadyetsa nkhosa zokaphedwa
Zechariah11:8 Pa mwezi umodzi ndinachotsa abusa atatu. Abusawo anadana nane
Zechariah11:9 Ndinawuza gulu la nkhosalo kuti
Zechariah11:10 Kenaka ndinatenga ndodo yanga yotchedwa Kukoma mtima ndi kuyithyola
Zechariah11:11 Linaphwanyidwa tsiku limenelo ndipo nkhosa zosautsidwa zimene zimandiyangʼanitsitsa zinadziwa kuti anali mawu a Yehova.
Zechariah11:12 Ndinawawuza kuti
Zechariah11:13 Ndipo Yehova anandiwuza kuti
Zechariah11:14 Kenaka ndinathyola ndodo yanga yachiwiri yotchedwa Umodzi
Zechariah11:15 Pamenepo Yehova anayankhula nane kuti
Zechariah11:16 Pakuti ndidzawutsa mʼbusa mʼdzikomo amene sadzasamalira zotayika
Zechariah11:17 “Tsoka kwa mʼbusa wopandapake
Zechariah12:1 Uthenga wa Yehova kwa Israeli. Yehova
Zechariah12:2 “Taonani
Zechariah12:3 Pa tsiku limenelo
Zechariah12:4 Pa tsiku limenelo kavalo aliyense ndidzamuchititsa mantha kuti asokonezeke
Zechariah12:5 Pamenepo atsogoleri a Yuda adzayankhula mʼmitima mwawo kuti
Zechariah12:6 “Pa tsiku limenelo ndidzasandutsa atsogoleri a Yuda kukhala ngati mbawula yotentha pakati pa nkhuni
Zechariah12:7 “Yehova adzapulumutsa malo okhala Yuda poyamba
Zechariah12:8 Pa tsiku limenelo Yehova adzatchinjiriza onse okhala mu Yerusalemu
Zechariah12:9 Pa tsiku limenelo ndidzawononga mitundu yonse yofuna kuthira nkhondo Yerusalemu.
Zechariah12:10 “Ndipo pa nyumba ya Davide ndi pa anthu okhala mu Yerusalemu ndidzakhuthulirapo mzimu wachisomo ndi wopemphera. Iwo adzandiyangʼana Ine
Zechariah12:11 Pa tsiku limenelo mudzakhala kulira kwakukulu mu Yerusalemu
Zechariah12:12 Dziko lidzalira kwambiri
Zechariah12:13 nyumba ya Levi pamodzi ndi akazi awo
Zechariah12:14 ndiponso mafuko onse pamodzi ndi akazi awo.
Zechariah13:1 “Pa tsiku limenelo nyumba ya Davide adzayitsekulira kasupe wa madzi pamodzi ndi okhala mu Yerusalemu
Zechariah13:2 “Pa tsiku limenelo
Zechariah13:3 Ndipo ngati wina aliyense adzafuna kunenera
Zechariah13:4 “Pa tsiku limenelo mneneri aliyense adzachita manyazi chifukwa cha masomphenya ake. Sadzavala chovala chake chaubweya ndi cholinga chonamiza anthu.
Zechariah13:5 Iye adzati
Zechariah13:6 Ngati wina adzamufunsa
Zechariah13:7 “Dzambatuka iwe lupanga
Zechariah13:8 Mʼdziko monse
Zechariah13:9 Chigawo chachitatuchi ndidzachiyika pa moto; ndidzawayeretsa monga momwe amayeretsera siliva ndi kuwayesa monga momwe amayesera golide. Adzayitana pa dzina langa ndipo Ine ndidzawayankha; Ine ndidzanena kuti
Zechariah14:1 Taonani tsiku la Yehova likubwera pamene zinthu zimene adani ako anakulanda azidzagawana iwe ukuona.
Zechariah14:2 Ndidzasonkhanitsa anthu a mitundu yonse kuti adzathire nkhondo Yerusalemu; mzindawu udzalandidwa
Zechariah14:3 Pamenepo Yehova adzabwera kudzamenyana ndi mitundu ya anthu imeneyi
Zechariah14:4 Tsiku limenelo adzayimirira pa Phiri la Olivi
Zechariah14:5 Inu mudzathawa podzera mʼchigwa chapakati pa phirilo
Zechariah14:6 Tsiku limenelo sipadzakhala kuwala
Zechariah14:7 Lidzakhala tsiku lapaderadera
Zechariah14:8 Tsiku limenelo madzi amoyo adzatuluka mu Yerusalemu
Zechariah14:9 Ndipo Yehova adzakhala mfumu pa dziko lonse lapansi. Tsiku limenelo padzakhala Ambuye mmodzi yekha
Zechariah14:10 Dziko lonse
Zechariah14:11 Mʼmenemo mudzakhala anthu; sadzawonongedwanso. Yerusalemu adzakhala pa mtendere.
Zechariah14:12 Mliri umene Yehova adzakanthire nawo mitundu yonse ya anthu imene inkamenyana ndi Yerusalemu ndi uwu: Matupi awo adzawola iwo eni akuyenda
Zechariah14:13 Pa tsiku limenelo Yehova adzasokoneza anthu akuluakulu. Munthu aliyense adzagwira dzanja la mnzake
Zechariah14:14 Yuda nayenso adzachita nkhondo ku Yerusalemu. Chuma chonse cha anthu a mitundu yozungulira adzachisonkhanitsa pamodzi; golide
Zechariah14:15 Mliri womwewo udzapha akavalo ndi nyulu
Zechariah14:16 Kenaka opulumuka ochokera mwa mitundu yonse ya anthu amene anathira nkhondo Yerusalemu
Zechariah14:17 Ngati mitundu ina ya anthu pa dziko lapansi sidzapita ku Yerusalemu kukapembedza Mfumu Yehova Wamphamvuzonse
Zechariah14:18 Ndipo ngati anthu a ku Igupto sadzapita ndi kukakhala nawo kumeneko
Zechariah14:19 Chimenechi chidzakhala chilango cha Igupto ndiponso mitundu ina yonse imene sidzapita ku Chikondwerero cha Misasa.
Zechariah14:20 Pa tsiku limenelo pa maberu a akavalo padzalembedwa mawu oti WOPATULIKIRA YEHOVA
Zechariah14:21 Mʼphika uliwonse ku Yerusalemu ndi ku Yuda udzakhala wopatulikira Yehova Wamphamvuzonse

Malachi1:3 koma ndinamuda Esau
Malachi1:4 Mwina Edomu nʼkunena kuti
Malachi1:5 Inu mudzaziona zimenezi ndi maso anu ndipo mudzati
Malachi1:6 “Mwana amalemekeza abambo ake
Malachi1:7 “Inu mwanyoza dzina langa popereka chakudya chodetsedwa pa guwa langa lansembe. “Komatu mukufunsa kuti
Malachi1:8 Mukamapereka nsembe nyama zosaona
Malachi1:9 “Tsopano tayesani kupempha Mulungu kuti akuchitireni chifundo. Kodi ndi zopereka zotere mʼmanja mwanu
Malachi1:10 “Ndikulakalaka mmodzi wa inu akanatseka zitseko za Nyumba ya Mulungu
Malachi1:11 Dzina langa lidzalemekezedwa pakati pa mitundu ya anthu
Malachi1:12 “Koma inu mumalinyoza ponena kuti tebulo la Ambuye
Malachi1:13 Ndipo inu mumati

Malachi2:2 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Malachi2:3 “Ine ndidzalanga zidzukulu zanu chifukwa cha inu; ndidzakupakani kumaso ndowe za nsembe zanu zachikondwerero
Malachi2:4 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Malachi2:5 Ine ndinali naye pa pangano
Malachi2:6 Pakamwa pake pankatuluka malangizo woona
Malachi2:7 “Pakuti wansembe ayenera kukhala ndi chidziwitso
Malachi2:8 Koma inu mwasiya njira yanga ndipo mwapunthwitsa anthu ambiri ndi ziphunzitso zanu; mwayipitsa pangano langa ndi Levi
Malachi2:9 “Choncho Ine ndachititsa kuti munyozedwe ndi kuchititsidwa manyazi pamaso pa anthu onse
Malachi2:10 Kodi sitili naye Atate mmodzi tonsefe? Kodi anatilenga si Mulungu mmodzi? Chifukwa chiyani tikudetsa pangano la makolo athu posamakhulupirirana wina ndi mnzake?
Malachi2:11 Yuda waleka kukhulupirika. Chinthu chonyansa chachitika mu Israeli ndi mu Yerusalemu: Yuda wayipitsa malo opatulika amene Yehova amawakonda
Malachi2:12 Ndipo wina aliyense wochita zimenezi
Malachi2:13 China chimene mumachita ndi ichi: Mumakhathamiritsa guwa lansembe la Yehova ndi misozi. Mumalira ndi kufuwula kwambiri chifukwa Iye amakana kuyangʼana nsembe zanu
Malachi2:14 Inu mukufunsa kuti
Malachi2:15 Kodi Yehova sanawalenge iwo ngati munthu mmodzi? Ndi ake mʼthupi ndi mu mzimu. Nʼchifukwa chiyani ali mmodzi? Chifukwa Iye amafuna ana opembedza Mulungu. Motero samala moyo wako wauzimu
Malachi2:16 Yehova Mulungu wa Israeli akuti
Malachi2:17 Mwamutopetsa Yehova ndi zoyankhula zanu. Inu mukufunsa kuti
Malachi3:1 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Malachi3:2 Koma ndani adzatha kupirira pa tsiku la kubwera kwake? Ndani adzatha kuyima pamene Iye wafika? Pakuti adzakhala ngati moto wa mmisiri wa pa ngʼanjo
Malachi3:3 Iye adzachita kukhalira pansi ngati mmisiri woyenga ndi woyeretsa siliva. Iye adzayeretsa Alevi ndi kuwayenga ngati golide ndi siliva. Pamenepo Yehova adzakhala ndi anthu amene azidzabweretsa zopereka mwachilungamo
Malachi3:4 ndipo Yehova adzalandira zopereka za Yuda ndi Yerusalemu
Malachi3:5 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Malachi3:6 “Ine ndine Yehova
Malachi3:7 Kuyambira nthawi ya makolo anu mwakhala mukuphwanya malamulo anga ndipo simunawatsatire. Bwererani kwa Ine
Malachi3:8 “Kodi munthu angathe kuba za Mulungu? Komatu inu mumandibera. “Koma inu mukufunsa kuti
Malachi3:9 Mtundu wanu wonse ndinu otembereredwa
Malachi3:10 Bweretsani chakhumi chathunthu ku nyumba yosungira
Malachi3:11 Ndidzaletsa tizirombo kuti tisawononge mbewu zanu
Malachi3:12 “Motero anthu amitundu yonse adzakutchulani odala
Malachi3:13 Yehova akuti
Malachi3:14 “Mwanena kuti
Malachi3:15 Koma tsono ife timati anthu odzikuza ndiye odalitsika. Kunena zoona anthu oyipa ndiye amapeza bwino
Malachi3:16 Ndipo woopa Yehova anayamba kukambirana
Malachi3:17 Yehova Wamphamvuzonse akuti
Malachi3:18 Pamenepo mudzaonanso kusiyana pakati pa anthu olungama ndi oyipa
