Matthew1:1 Buku lofotokoza za mʼbado wa Yesu Khristu mwana wa Davide
Matthew1:2 	Abrahamu anabereka Isake
Matthew1:3 	Yuda anabereka Perezi ndi Zara
Matthew1:4 	Aramu anabereka Aminadabu
Matthew1:5 	Salimoni anabereka Bowazi amene amayi ake anali Rahabe
Matthew1:6 	Yese anabereka Mfumu Davide. Ndipo Davide anabereka Solomoni
Matthew1:7 	Solomoni anabereka Rehabiamu
Matthew1:8 	Asa anabereka Yehosafati
Matthew1:9 	Uziya anabereka Yotamu
Matthew1:10 	Hezekiya anabereka Manase
Matthew1:11 	Yosiya anali atabala Yekoniya ndi abale ake pamene Ayuda anatengedwa ukapolo kupita ku Babuloni.
Matthew1:12 	Ali ku ukapolo ku Babuloni
Matthew1:13 	Zerubabeli anabereka Abiudi
Matthew1:14 	Azoro anabereka Zadoki
Matthew1:15 	Eliudi anabereka Eliezara
Matthew1:16 Yakobo anabereka Yosefe
Matthew1:17 Kuyambira pa Abrahamu mpaka pa Davide
Matthew1:18 Kubadwa kwa Yesu Khristu kunali motere: Amayi ake
Matthew1:19 Popeza Yosefe mwamuna wake anali munthu wolungama
Matthew1:20 Koma akuganiza zimenezi
Matthew1:21 Ndipo adzabala mwana wamwamuna
Matthew1:22 Zonsezi zinachitika kukwaniritsa zimene Ambuye ananena mwa mneneri kuti
Matthew1:23 “Onani namwali adzakhala woyembekezera ndipo adzabala mwana wamwamuna
Matthew1:24 Yosefe atadzuka
Matthew1:25 Koma sanagone malo amodzi mpaka mwanayo atabadwa ndipo anamutcha dzina lake Yesu.
Matthew2:1 Atabadwa Yesu mʼBetelehemu wa ku Yudeya
Matthew2:2 nafunsa kuti
Matthew2:3 Mfumu Herode atamva zimenezi
Matthew2:4 Ndipo anayitanitsa anthu onse
Matthew2:5 Ndipo anamuyankha kuti
Matthew2:6 “ ‘Koma iwe Betelehemu
Matthew2:7 Pomwepo Herode anawayitanira mseri Anzeruwo nawafunsitsa nthawi yeniyeni yomwe nyenyeziyo inaoneka.
Matthew2:8 Ndipo anawatumiza ku Betelehemu nawawuza kuti
Matthew2:9 Atamva mawu a mfumu
Matthew2:10 Pamene iwo anaona nyenyeziyo
Matthew2:11 Pofika ku nyumbayo
Matthew2:12 Ndipo atachenjezedwa mʼmaloto kuti asapitenso kwa Herode
Matthew2:13 Atachoka
Matthew2:14 Atadzuka
Matthew2:15 nakhala kumeneko mpaka Herode atamwalira. Ndipo zinakwaniritsidwa zomwe ananena Ambuye mwa mneneri kuti
Matthew2:16 Herode atazindikira kuti Anzeruwo anamupusitsa
Matthew2:17 Pamenepo
Matthew2:18 “Kulira kukumveka ku Rama
Matthew2:19 Atamwalira Herode
Matthew2:20 nanena kuti
Matthew2:21 Tsono Yosefe atadzuka anatenga mwanayo ndi amayi ake kupita ku dziko la Israeli.
Matthew2:22 Koma atamva kuti Arikelao akulamulira mu Yudeya mʼmalo mwa abambo ake
Matthew2:23 ndipo anakakhazikika mu mzinda wa Nazareti. Pamenepo zinakwaniritsidwa zonenedwa ndi aneneri kuti
Matthew3:1 Mʼmasiku amenewo
Matthew3:2 kuti
Matthew3:3 Uyu ndi amene mneneri Yesaya ananena za iye kuti
Matthew3:4 Zovala za Yohane zinali zopangidwa ndi ubweya wa ngamira
Matthew3:5 Anthu ankapita kwa iye kuchokera ku Yerusalemu ndi ku Yudeya konse ndi ku madera onse a Yorodani.
Matthew3:6 Ndipo akavomereza machimo awo ankabatizidwa mu mtsinje wa Yorodani.
Matthew3:7 Koma iye ataona Afarisi ndi Asaduki ambiri akubwera kumene ankabatiza
Matthew3:8 Onetsani chipatso cha kutembenuka mtima.
Matthew3:9 Ndipo musaganize ndi kunena mwa inu nokha kuti
Matthew3:10 Tikukamba pano nkhwangwa yayikidwa kale pa mizu ya mitengo
Matthew3:11 “Ine ndikubatizani ndi madzi kusonyeza kutembenuka mtima. Koma pambuyo panga akubwera wina amene ali ndi mphamvu kuposa ine
Matthew3:12 Mʼdzanja lake muli chopetera ndipo adzayeretsa popunthirapo pake nadzathira tirigu wake mʼnkhokwe ndi kutentha zotsalira zonse ndi moto wosazima.”
Matthew3:13 Pamenepo Yesu anabwera kuchokera ku Galileya kudzabatizidwa ndi Yohane mu mtsinje wa Yorodani.
Matthew3:14 Koma Yohane anayesetsa kumukanira nati
Matthew3:15 Yesu anayankha kuti
Matthew3:16 Yesu atangobatizidwa
Matthew3:17 Ndipo mawu anamveka kuchokera kumwamba kuti
Matthew4:1 Pambuyo pake Yesu anatsogozedwa ndi Mzimu Woyera kupita ku chipululu kukayesedwa ndi mdierekezi.
Matthew4:2 Ndipo atasala kudya masiku makumi anayi usana ndi usiku
Matthew4:3 Woyesayo anadza kwa Iye nati
Matthew4:4 Yesu anayankha kuti
Matthew4:5 Pamenepo mdierekezi anapita naye ku mzinda woyera namuyimiritsa pamwamba penipeni pa Nyumba ya Mulungu.
Matthew4:6 Ndipo anati
Matthew4:7 Yesu anamuyankha kuti
Matthew4:8 Kenaka mdierekezi anamutengera Yesu ku phiri lalitali kwambiri namuonetsa maufumu onse a dziko lapansi ndi ulemerero wawo.
Matthew4:9 Ndipo anati kwa Iye
Matthew4:10 Yesu anati kwa iye
Matthew4:11 Pamenepo mdierekezi anamusiya ndipo angelo anamutumikira Iye.
Matthew4:12 Yesu atamva kuti Yohane anamutsekera mʼndende
Matthew4:13 Ndipo atachoka ku Nazareti anapita ku Kaperenawo ndi kukhala mʼmbali mwa nyanja
Matthew4:14 pokwaniritsa zimene zinanenedwa kudzera mwa mneneri Yesaya kuti
Matthew4:15 “Dziko la Zebuloni ndi dziko la Nafutali
Matthew4:16 anthu okhala mu mdima awona kuwala kwakukulu; ndi kwa iwo okhala mʼdziko la mthunzi wa imfa kuwunika kwawafikira.”
Matthew4:17 Kuyambira nthawi imeneyo
Matthew4:18 Pamene Yesu ankayenda mʼmbali mwa nyanja ya Galileya
Matthew4:19 Yesu anati
Matthew4:20 Nthawi yomweyo anasiya makoka awo namutsata Iye.
Matthew4:21 Atapita patsogolo
Matthew4:22 Nthawi yomweyo anasiya bwato ndi abambo awo namutsata Iye.
Matthew4:23 Yesu anayendayenda mu Galileya kuphunzitsa mʼmasunagoge awo
Matthew4:24 Mbiri yake yonse inawanda ku Siriya konse ndipo anthu anabweretsa kwa Iye onse amene anali odwala nthenda zosiyanasiyana
Matthew4:25 Magulu ambiri a anthu anachokera ku Galileya
Matthew5:1 Iye ataona anthu ambiri
Matthew5:2 ndipo anayamba kuwaphunzitsa kuti
Matthew5:3 	 “Odala ndi amene ali osauka mu mzimu
Matthew5:4 	 Odala ndi amene ali achisoni
Matthew5:5 	 Odala ndi amene ali ofatsa
Matthew5:6 	 Odala ndi amene akumva njala ndi ludzu la chilungamo
Matthew5:7 	 Odala ndi amene ali ndi chifundo
Matthew5:8 	 Odala ndi amene ali oyera mtima
Matthew5:9 	 Ndi odala amene amabweretsa mtendere
Matthew5:10 	 Odala ndi amene akuzunzidwa chifukwa cha chilungamo
Matthew5:11 “Inu ndinu odala anthu akamakunyozani
Matthew5:12 Sangalalani
Matthew5:13 “Inu ndinu mchere wa dziko lapansi. Koma ngati mcherewo usukuluka
Matthew5:14 “Inu ndinu kuwunika kwa dziko lapansi. Mzinda wa pa phiri sungathe kubisika.
Matthew5:15 Anthu sayatsa nyale ndikuyivundikira ndi mbiya
Matthew5:16 Momwemonso kuwunika kwanu kuwale pamaso pa anthu kuti aone ntchito zanu zabwino ndi kulemekeza Atate anu akumwamba.
Matthew5:17 “Musaganize kuti ndinadza kudzathetsa malamulo kapena zonena za aneneri; sindinabwere kudzathetsa koma kukwaniritsa.
Matthew5:18 Ine ndikukuwuzani zoonadi kuti
Matthew5:19 Chifukwa chake aliyense amene aphwanya limodzi la malamulowa ngakhale lalingʼonongʼono ndi kuphunzitsa ena kuti achite chimodzimodzi
Matthew5:20 Chifukwa chake ndikuwuzani kuti ngati chilungamo chanu sichiposa cha Afarisi ndi aphunzitsi amalamulo
Matthew5:21 “Munamva kuti kunanenedwa kwa anthu kale kuti
Matthew5:22 Koma Ine ndikukuwuzani kuti aliyense wokwiyira mʼbale wake adzapezeka wolakwa ku bwalo la milandu. Ndiponso aliyense amene wonena mʼbale wake kuti
Matthew5:23 “Nʼchifukwa chake
Matthew5:24 usiye choperekacho pa guwa lansembepo
Matthew5:25 “Fulumira kuyanjana ndi mnzako amene unamulakwira nthawi ya milandu isanafike chifukwa angakupereke kwa oweruza amene angakupereke kwa mlonda ndipo mlondayo angakutsekere mʼndende.
Matthew5:26 Zoonadi
Matthew5:27 “Munamva kuti kunanenedwa kuti
Matthew5:28 Koma Ine ndikuwuzani kuti aliyense woyangʼana mkazi momusirira wachita naye kale chigololo mu mtima mwake.
Matthew5:29 Ngati diso lako lakumanja likuchimwitsa
Matthew5:30 Ndipo ngati dzanja lako lamanja likuchimwitsa
Matthew5:31 “Ananena kuti
Matthew5:32 Koma Ine ndikukuwuzani kuti aliyense amene asudzula mkazi wake pa chifukwa china chilichonse osati chifukwa cha chiwerewere
Matthew5:33 “Munamvanso kuti kunanenedwa kwa anthu akale kuti
Matthew5:34 Koma ndikuwuzani kuti musalumbire ndi pangʼono pomwe kutchula kumwamba chifukwa kuli mpando waufumu wa Mulungu.
Matthew5:35 Kapena kutchula dziko lapansi
Matthew5:36 Ndipo musalumbire ndi mutu wanu chifukwa simungathe kuyeretsa ngakhale kudetsa tsitsi limodzi.
Matthew5:37 Koma ‘Inde’ wanu akhaledi ‘Inde’ kapena ‘Ayi’ wanu akhaledi ‘Ayi
Matthew5:38 “Munamva kuti
Matthew5:39 Koma ndikuwuzani kuti musamukanize munthu woyipa
Matthew5:40 Ndipo ngati wina afuna kukuzenga mlandu kuti akulande malaya ako
Matthew5:41 Ngati wina akukakamiza kuti uyende naye mtunda umodzi
Matthew5:42 Wina akakupempha kanthu umupatse
Matthew5:43 “Munamva kuti
Matthew5:44 Koma Ine ndikuwuzani kuti
Matthew5:45 kuti mukhale ana a Atate anu akumwamba
Matthew5:46 Ngati mukonda amene akukondani inu
Matthew5:47 Ndipo ngati inu mupatsa moni abale anu okhaokha mukuchita chiyani choposa ena? Kodi ngakhale akunja sachita chimodzimodzi?
Matthew5:48 Nʼchifukwa chake
Matthew6:1 “Samalani kuti musachite ntchito zanu zolungama pamaso pa anthu kuti akuoneni. Popeza ngati mutero simudzalandira mphotho yochokera kwa Atate anu akumwamba.
Matthew6:2 “Pamene mupereka zachifundo
Matthew6:3 Koma pamene mupereka zachifundo
Matthew6:4 kotero kuti kupereka kwanu kukhale mwachinsinsi. Ndipo Atate anu amene amaona zochitika mwachinsinsi
Matthew6:5 “Pamene mupemphera
Matthew6:6 Koma pamene mupemphera
Matthew6:7 Ndipo pamene mukupemphera
Matthew6:8 Musakhale ngati iwo chifukwa Atate anu amadziwa zimene musowa musanapemphe.
Matthew6:9 “Chifukwa chake pempherani motere: “ ‘Atate athu akumwamba
Matthew6:10 	 Ufumu wanu ubwere
Matthew6:11 	 Mutipatse chakudya chathu chalero.
Matthew6:12 	 Mutikhululukire mangawa athu
Matthew6:13 	 Ndipo musatitengere kokatiyesa; koma mutipulumutse kwa woyipayo.’
Matthew6:14 Ngati inu mukhululukira anthu pamene akuchimwirani
Matthew6:15 Koma ngati inu simukhululukira anthu zolakwa zawo
Matthew6:16 “Pamene mukusala kudya
Matthew6:17 Koma pamene ukusala kudya
Matthew6:18 kuti usaonekere kwa anthu kuti ukusala kudya koma kwa Atate ako ali mseri; ndipo Atate ako amene amaona za mseri adzakupatsa mphotho.
Matthew6:19 “Musadziwunjikire chuma pa dziko lapansi
Matthew6:20 Koma mudziwunjikire chuma kumwamba kumene njenjete ndi dzimbiri siziwononga ndipo mbala sizithyola ndi kuba.
Matthew6:21 Pakuti kumene kuli chuma chako
Matthew6:22 “Diso ndi nyale ya thupi. Ngati maso ako ali bwino
Matthew6:23 Koma ngati maso ako sali bwino
Matthew6:24 “Palibe munthu angathe kukhala kapolo wa ambuye awiri. Pakuti pena adzamuda mmodzi ndi kukonda winayo kapena adzagwira ntchito mokhulupirika kwa mmodzi
Matthew6:25 “Nʼchifukwa chake ndikuwuzani kuti musadere nkhawa za moyo wanu kuti mudzadya chiyani kapena mudzamwa chiyani; kapenanso za thupi lanu kuti mudzavala chiyani. Kodi moyo suposa chakudya? Kodi thupi siliposa zovala?
Matthew6:26 Onani mbalame zamlengalenga sizifesa kapena kukolola kapena kusunga mʼnkhokwe komabe Atate anu akumwamba amazidyetsa. Kodi inu simuziposa kwambiri?
Matthew6:27 Kodi ndani wa inu podandaula angathe kuwonjeza ora limodzi pa moyo wake?
Matthew6:28 “Ndipo bwanji inu mudera nkhawa za zovala? Onani makulidwe a maluwa akutchire. Sagwira ntchito kapena kuwomba nsalu.
Matthew6:29 Ndikukuwuzani kuti angakhale Solomoni mu ulemerero wake sanavale mofanana ndi limodzi la maluwa amenewa.
Matthew6:30 Ngati umu ndi mmene Mulungu avekera udzu wa kutchire umene ulipo lero ndipo mawa uponyedwa ku moto
Matthew6:31 Chifukwa chake musadere nkhawa ndi kuti
Matthew6:32 Pakuti anthu akunja amazifuna zinthu zonsezi ndipo Atate anu akumwamba adziwa kuti musowa zimenezi.
Matthew6:33 Koma muyambe mwafuna ufumu wake ndi chilungamo chake ndipo zinthu zonsezi zidzapatsidwa kwa inu.
Matthew6:34 Chifukwa chake musadere nkhawa ndi za mawa
Matthew7:1 “Musaweruze ena
Matthew7:2 Pakuti momwe inu muweruzira ena
Matthew7:3 “Chifukwa chiyani iwe uyangʼana kachitsotso ka mʼdiso la mʼbale wako koma susamalira chimtengo chili mʼdiso mwako?
Matthew7:4 Kodi unganene bwanji kwa mʼbale wako kuti
Matthew7:5 Wachiphamaso iwe! Yamba wachotsa chimtengo chili mʼdiso mwako ndipo pamenepo udzatha kuona bwino ndi kuchotsa kachitsotso kali mʼdiso mwa mʼbale wako.
Matthew7:6 “Musapatse agalu zinthu zopatulika; kapena musaponyere nkhumba ngale zanu. Pakuti ngati mutero
Matthew7:7 “Pemphani ndipo mudzapatsidwa; funafunani ndipo mudzapeza; gogodani ndipo adzakutsekulirani.
Matthew7:8 Pakuti wopempha aliyense amalandira; ndi wofuna amapeza; ndipo iye amene agogoda
Matthew7:9 “Ndani mwa inu
Matthew7:10 Kapena ngati mwana apempha nsomba
Matthew7:11 Tsono ngati inu woyipitsitsa mumadziwa kupatsa ana anu mphatso zabwino
Matthew7:12 Nʼchifukwa chake zinthu zilizonse mukafuna kuti anthu akuchitireni
Matthew7:13 “Lowani pa chipata chopapatiza. Pakuti chipata cholowera kuchiwonongeko nʼchachikulu ndipo msewu wake ndi waukulunso. Ndipo anthu ambiri amalowera pamenepo.
Matthew7:14 Koma chipata ndi chopapatiza ndi msewu ndi waungʼono umene utsogolera anthu ku moyo wosatha ndipo ndi owerengeka okha amene ayipeza njirayo.
Matthew7:15 “Chenjerani nawo aneneri onyenga. Amabwera kwa inu atavala zikopa zankhosa
Matthew7:16 Mudzawazindikira iwo ndi zipatso zawo. Kodi anthu amathyola mpesa pa mtengo wa minga
Matthew7:17 Chimodzimodzinso mtengo wabwino umabala chipatso chabwino
Matthew7:18 Mtengo wabwino sungabale chipatso choyipa
Matthew7:19 Mtengo uliwonse umene subala chipatso chabwino umadulidwa ndi kuponyedwa pa moto.
Matthew7:20 Momwemonso
Matthew7:21 “Si munthu aliyense amene amanena kwa Ine
Matthew7:22 Ambiri adzati kwa Ine pa tsikulo
Matthew7:23 Pamenepo ndidzawawuza momveka bwino kuti
Matthew7:24 “Nʼchifukwa chake aliyense amene amva mawu anga ndi kuwachita akufanana ndi munthu wanzeru amene anamanga nyumba yake pa thanthwe.
Matthew7:25 Mvula inagwa
Matthew7:26 Koma aliyense amene amva mawu angawa ndi kusawachita ali ngati munthu wopusa amene anamanga nyumba yake pa mchenga.
Matthew7:27 Mvula inagwa
Matthew7:28 Yesu atamaliza kunena zonsezi
Matthew7:29 chifukwa anaphunzitsa ngati amene anali ndi ulamuliro osati ngati aphunzitsi amalamulo.

Matthew8:2 Ndipo munthu wakhate anadza kwa Yesu namugwadira nati
Matthew8:3 Yesu anatambasula dzanja lake namukhudza munthuyo nati
Matthew8:4 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye
Matthew8:5 Yesu atalowa mʼKaperenamu
Matthew8:6 nati
Matthew8:7 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye
Matthew8:8 Kenturiyo uja anayankha kuti
Matthew8:9 Pakuti inenso ndili pansi pa ulamuliro ndipo ndili ndi asilikali amene ndiwalamulira. Ndikalamulira mmodzi kuti
Matthew8:10 Yesu atamva zimenezi
Matthew8:11 Ndikuwuzani kuti ambiri adzabwera kuchokera kummawa ndi kumadzulo
Matthew8:12 Koma eni ake ufumuwo adzaponyedwa ku mdima wakunja kumene kudzakhala kulira ndi kukukuta mano.”

Matthew8:14 Ndipo Yesu atalowa mʼnyumba ya Petro
Matthew8:15 Ndipo Yesu anakhudza dzanja lake ndipo pomwepo anachira nayamba kumutumikira.

Matthew8:17 Uku kunali kukwaniritsa zimene ananena mneneri Yesaya kuti
Matthew8:18 Yesu ataona gulu la anthu litamuzungulira

Matthew8:20 Yesu anayankha kuti
Matthew8:21 Wophunzira wina anati kwa Iye
Matthew8:22 Koma Yesu anamuwuza kuti
Matthew8:23 Iye atalowa mʼbwato
Matthew8:24 Ndipo taonani mwadzidzidzi mphepo yayikulu yamkuntho inawomba pa nyanjapo
Matthew8:25 Ophunzira ake anapita namudzutsa nati
Matthew8:26 Iye anawayankha kuti
Matthew8:27 Ndipo ophunzirawo anadabwa nafunsa kuti
Matthew8:28 Ndipo atafika ku mbali ina ya dera la Gadara
Matthew8:29 Ndipo iwo anafuwulira kwa Yesu nati
Matthew8:30 Ndipo patali pake panali gulu la nkhumba zimene zimadya.
Matthew8:31 Ndipo ziwandazo zinamupempha Yesu kuti
Matthew8:32 Iye anati kwa ziwandazo
Matthew8:33 Koma amene amaziweta anathawa nalowa mʼmudzi nafotokoza zonse
Matthew8:34 Ndipo anthu onse a mʼmudziwo anatuluka kukakumana ndi Yesu. Ndipo atamuona Iye
Matthew9:1 Yesu analowa mʼbwato nawoloka
Matthew9:2 Amuna ena anabwera ndi munthu wakufa ziwalo kwa Iye atamugoneka pa mphasa. Yesu ataona chikhulupiriro chawo anati kwa wakufa ziwaloyo
Matthew9:3 Pamenepo aphunzitsi ena amalamulo anaganiza mu mtima mwawo kuti
Matthew9:4 Ndipo podziwa maganizo awo Yesu anati
Matthew9:5 Chapafupi ndi chiti kunena kuti
Matthew9:6 Tsono kuti mudziwe kuti Mwana wa Munthu ali ndi ulamuliro pa dziko wokhululuka machimo
Matthew9:7 Ndipo munthuyo anayimirira napita kwawo.
Matthew9:8 Gulu la anthu litaona izi
Matthew9:9 Ndipo Yesu atachoka kumeneko
Matthew9:10 Ndipo pamene Iye ankadya mʼnyumba
Matthew9:11 Ndipo Afarisi poona izi
Matthew9:12 Yesu atamva
Matthew9:13 Koma pitani kaphunzireni tanthauzo la mawu awa: ‘Ndimafuna chifundo osati nsembe ayi.’ Pakuti sindinabwere kudzayitana olungama koma ochimwa.”
Matthew9:14 Ndipo ophunzira a Yohane anabwera namufunsa Iye kuti
Matthew9:15 Yesu anayankha kuti
Matthew9:16 Ndipo palibe munthu amasokerera chigamba chatsopano pa chovala chakale chifukwa chigambacho chidzachoka ndipo chibowocho chidzakula kuposa kale.
Matthew9:17 Kapena sathira vinyo watsopano mʼmatumba akale; akatero
Matthew9:18 Pamene ankanena zimenezi
Matthew9:19 Yesu ndi ophunzira ake ananyamuka napita naye pamodzi.
Matthew9:20 Panali mayi wina amene ankadwala nthenda yotaya magazi kwa zaka khumi ndi ziwiri ndipo anadza mʼmbuyo mwake nakhudza mkanjo wake.
Matthew9:21 Iyeyo anati mwa iye yekha
Matthew9:22 Ndipo Yesu anatembenuka namuona mayiyo nati
Matthew9:23 Yesu atalowa mʼnyumba ya mkulu wa sunagoge ndi kuona oyimba zitoliro ndi gulu la anthu ochita phokoso
Matthew9:24 anati
Matthew9:25 Atangowatulutsa anthuwo
Matthew9:26 Mbiriyi inamveka mʼdera lonse.
Matthew9:27 Yesu atapitirira ulendo wake
Matthew9:28 Atalowa mʼnyumba
Matthew9:29 Pomwepo anakhudza maso awo nati
Matthew9:30 Ndipo anayamba kuona. Yesu anawachenjeza kwambiri nati
Matthew9:31 Koma iwo anatuluka mʼnyumbamo nafalitsa za Iye mʼchigawo chonse.
Matthew9:32 Pamene iwo ankatuluka kunja
Matthew9:33 Ndipo atatulutsa mzimuwo
Matthew9:34 Koma Afarisi anati
Matthew9:35 Yesu anayendayenda mʼmizinda yonse ndi mʼmidzi

Matthew9:37 Pamenepo anati kwa ophunzira ake
Matthew9:38 Nʼchifukwa chake
Matthew10:1 Yesu anayitana ophunzira ake khumi ndi awiri ndipo anawapatsa ulamuliro otulutsa mizimu yoyipa ndi kuchiritsa nthenda iliyonse ndi zofowoka zilizonse.
Matthew10:2 Mayina a atumwi khumi ndi awiriwo ndi awa: woyamba
Matthew10:3 Filipo ndi Bartumeyu
Matthew10:4 Simoni Mzerote ndi Yudasi Isikarioti
Matthew10:5 Yesu anatuma khumi ndi awiriwo ndi kuwalamula kuti
Matthew10:6 Koma pitani kwa nkhosa zotayika za banja la Israeli.
Matthew10:7 Pamene mukupita
Matthew10:8 Chiritsani odwala
Matthew10:9 “Musatenge ndalama zagolide kapena zasiliva kapena zakopala mʼzikwama mwanu;
Matthew10:10 musatenge thumba la paulendo
Matthew10:11 Mukalowa mu mzinda ndi mʼmudzi uliwonse
Matthew10:12 Pamene mulowa mʼnyumba mupereke moni.
Matthew10:13 Mtendere wanu ukhale pa a mʼnyumbayo ngati ndi oyenera. Koma ngati siwoyenera
Matthew10:14 Ngati wina aliyense sakakulandirani kapena sakamvera mawu anu
Matthew10:15 Zoonadi
Matthew10:16 “Taonani ndikukutumizani inu monga nkhosa pakati pa mimbulu. Chifukwa chake khalani ochenjera ngati njoka ndi woona mtima ngati nkhunda.
Matthew10:17 Chenjerani ndi anthu pakuti adzakuperekani ku mabwalo amilandu nadzakukwapulani mʼmasunagoge mwawo.
Matthew10:18 Chifukwa cha Ine
Matthew10:19 Koma pamene akumangani
Matthew10:20 pakuti sindinu mudzanena
Matthew10:21 “Mʼbale adzapereka mʼbale kuti aphedwe ndi abambo mwana wawo: ndipo ana adzawukira makolo awo ndi kuwapereka kuti aphedwe.
Matthew10:22 Anthu onse adzada inu chifukwa cha Ine
Matthew10:23 Pamene akuzunzani pamalo ena thawirani kwina. Pakuti ndikuwuzani zoonadi kuti simudzamaliza mizinda yonse ya Israeli Mwana wa Munthu asanabwere.
Matthew10:24 “Wophunzira saposa mphunzitsi wake ndipo wantchito saposa bwana wake.
Matthew10:25 Nʼkoyenera kuti wophunzira akhale ngati mphunzitsi wake
Matthew10:26 “Chifukwa chake musaope iwo. Pakuti palibe chinthu chobisika chimene sichidzavundukulidwa
Matthew10:27 Chimene ndikuwuzani Ine mu mdima
Matthew10:28 Musamaope amene amapha thupi koma sangathe kuchotsa moyo. Koma muziopa Iye amene akhoza kupha mzimu ndi kuwononga thupi mu gehena.
Matthew10:29 Kodi suja amagulitsa mbalame ziwiri ndi ndalama imodzi? Koma palibe imodzi ya izo imene idzagwa pansi wopanda chifuniro cha Atate anu.
Matthew10:30 Ndipo ngakhale tsitsi la mʼmutu mwanu linawerengedwa kale.
Matthew10:31 Potero musaope; inu ndinu a mtengo woposa mbalame zambiri.
Matthew10:32 “Aliyense amene avomereza Ine pamaso pa anthu
Matthew10:33 Koma iye amene andikana Ine pamaso pa anthu
Matthew10:34 “Musaganize kuti Ine ndabweretsa mtendere pa dziko lapansi. Sindinabwere kudzapereka mtendere koma lupanga.
Matthew10:35 Pakuti Ine ndabwera kudzalekanitsa “ ‘Munthu ndi abambo ake
Matthew10:36 	 adani a munthu adzakhala a mʼbanja mwake momwe.’
Matthew10:37 “Aliyense amene akonda abambo kapena amayi ake koposa Ine sayenera kukhala wanga; aliyense amene akonda mwana wake wamwamuna kapena wamkazi koposa Ine sayenera kukhala wanga.
Matthew10:38 Aliyense amene satenga mtanda wake ndi kunditsata Ine sayenera kukhala wanga.
Matthew10:39 Aliyense amene asunga moyo wake adzawutaya koma aliyense amene ataya moyo chifukwa cha Ine adzawupeza.
Matthew10:40 “Iye amene alandira inu alandira Ine
Matthew10:41 Aliyense amene alandira mneneri chifukwa chakuti ndi mneneri alandira mphotho ya mneneri
Matthew10:42 Ngati aliyense apereka madzi ozizira a mʼchikho kwa mmodzi wa angʼonoangʼono awa chifukwa cha kuti ndi ophunzira anga
Matthew11:1 Ndipo Yesu atamaliza kulangiza ophunzira ake khumi ndi awiri aja
Matthew11:2 Yohane ali mʼndende anamva zimene Khristu ankachita
Matthew11:3 Anamufunsa kuti
Matthew11:4 Yesu anayankha kuti
Matthew11:5 Osaona akuona
Matthew11:6 Odala ndi munthu amene sakhumudwa chifukwa cha Ine.”
Matthew11:7 Pamene ophunzira a Yohane ankachoka
Matthew11:8 Nanga munkapita kukaona chiyani
Matthew11:9 Nanga munkapita kukaona chiyani? Mneneri kodi? Inde ndikuwuzani kuti munkakaona woposa mneneri.
Matthew11:10 Uyu ndi amene malemba akunena za iye kuti
Matthew11:11 Zoonadi
Matthew11:12 Kuyambira masiku a Yohane Mʼbatizi mpaka tsopano
Matthew11:13 Pakuti aneneri onse ndi malamulo ananenera kufikira nthawi ya Yohane.
Matthew11:14 Ndipo ngati inu mufuna kulandira izi
Matthew11:15 Iye amene ali ndi makutu amve.
Matthew11:16 “Kodi mʼbado uwu ndingawufanizire ndi chiyani? Uli ngati ana opezeka mʼmisika amene akuyitana anzawo nʼkumati:
Matthew11:17 	 “ ‘Tinakuyimbirani zitoliro
Matthew11:18 Pakuti Yohane sanabwerere kudya kapena kumwa koma iwo ankanena kuti
Matthew11:19 Mwana wa Munthu anabwera ndi kumadya ndi kumwa koma iwo akuti
Matthew11:20 Pamenepo Yesu anayamba kudzudzula mizinda imene zodabwitsa zake zambiri zinachitikamo
Matthew11:21 “Tsoka kwa iwe Korazini! Tsoka kwa iwe Betisaida! Ngati zodabwitsa zimene zinachitika mwa iwe zikanachitidwa mu Turo ndi Sidoni
Matthew11:22 Koma ndikuwuzani inu kuti pa tsiku lachiweruzo mlandu wa Turo ndi Sidoni udzachepako kusiyana ndi wanu.
Matthew11:23 Ndipo iwe Kaperenawo
Matthew11:24 Koma Ine ndikuwuzani kuti pa tsiku la chiweruziro mlandu wa Sodomu udzachepako kusiyana ndi wanu.”
Matthew11:25 Pa nthawi imeneyo Yesu anati
Matthew11:26 Inde
Matthew11:27 “Zinthu zonse zapatsidwa kwa Ine ndi Atate anga. Palibe mmodzi amene adziwa Mwana kupatula Atate ndipo palibe mmodzi amene adziwa Atate kupatula Mwana ndi kwa iwo amene Mwana awasankha kuwawululira.
Matthew11:28 “Idzani kwa Ine
Matthew11:29 Senzani goli langa ndipo phunzirani kwa Ine
Matthew11:30 Pakuti goli langa ndi losavuta ndipo katundu wanga ndi wopepuka.”
Matthew12:1 Pa nthawi imeneyo Yesu anadutsa pakati pa minda ya tirigu pa tsiku la Sabata. Ophunzira ake anamva njala nayamba kuthyola ngala za tirigu nʼkumadya.
Matthew12:2 Afarisi ataona zimenezi anati kwa Iye
Matthew12:3 Iye anayankha kuti
Matthew12:4 Analowa mʼNyumba ya Mulungu
Matthew12:5 Kodi simunawerenge mʼmalamulo kuti pa Sabata ansembe mʼNyumba ya Mulungu amaphwanya lamulo la Sabata komabe sawayesa olakwa?
Matthew12:6 Ine ndikuwuzani kuti wamkulu kuposa Nyumba ya Mulunguyo ali pano.
Matthew12:7 Ngati mukanadziwa zomwe mawu awa atanthauza
Matthew12:8 Pakuti Mwana wa Munthu ndiye Mbuye wa Sabata.”
Matthew12:9 Atachoka kumeneko anakalowa mʼsunagoge mwawo.
Matthew12:10 Ndipo mʼmenemo munali munthu wolumala dzanja. Pofuna chifukwa chokamunenezera
Matthew12:11 Iye anawawuza kuti
Matthew12:12 Nanga munthu sali oposa nkhosa kwambiri! Chifukwa chake nʼkololedwa kuchita zabwino pa Sabata.”
Matthew12:13 Pamenepo Yesu anati kwa munthuyo
Matthew12:14 Koma Afarisi anatuluka kunja ndi kukonza njira yoti amuphere.
Matthew12:15 Podziwa zimenezi
Matthew12:16 nawachenjeza kuti asamuwulule kuti yani.
Matthew12:17 Uku kunali kukwaniritsa zimene zinayankhulidwa kudzera mwa mneneri Yesaya kuti
Matthew12:18 “Taonani mnyamata wanga amene ndinamusankha
Matthew12:19 Sadzalimbana
Matthew12:20 Bango lophwanyika sadzalithyola
Matthew12:21 Ndipo akunja adzakhulupirira dzina lake.”
Matthew12:22 Pomwepo anthu anabwera naye kwa Yesu munthu wogwidwa ndi chiwanda amene anali wosaona ndi wosamva ndipo Yesu anamuchiritsa kotero kuti atatha anayamba kumva ndi kuona.
Matthew12:23 Anthu onse anadabwa ndipo anati
Matthew12:24 Koma Afarisi atamva zimenezi
Matthew12:25 Yesu anadziwa maganizo awo ndipo anawawuza kuti
Matthew12:26 Ngati Satana atulutsa Satana
Matthew12:27 Ndipo ngati Ine nditulutsa ziwanda ndi Belezebule
Matthew12:28 Koma ngati Ine ndimatulutsa ziwanda ndi Mzimu wa Mulungu
Matthew12:29 “Kapenanso wina aliyense angathe bwanji kulowa mʼnyumba ya munthu wamphamvu ndi kunyamulamo zinthu zake
Matthew12:30 “Iye amene sali ndi Ine atsutsana nane ndipo iye amene sasonkhanitsa pamodzi ndi Ine amamwaza.
Matthew12:31 Ndipo potero Ine ndikuwuzani inu
Matthew12:32 Aliyense amene anena mawu otsutsana ndi Mwana wa Munthu adzakhululukidwa koma aliyense wonena motsutsana ndi Mzimu Woyera sadzakhululukidwa mu mʼbado uno kapena umene ukubwerawo.
Matthew12:33 “Mtengo wabwino umabala zipatso zabwino ndipo mtengo woyipa umabalanso zipatso zoyipa
Matthew12:34 Ana anjoka inu
Matthew12:35 Munthu wabwino amatulutsa zinthu zabwino zomwe zili mumtima mwake ndipo munthu woyipa amatulutsanso zinthu zoyipa zomwe zili mwa iye.
Matthew12:36 Ine ndikukuwuzani kuti pa tsiku la chiweruziro munthu adzazengedwa mlandu chifukwa cha mawu aliwonse wopanda pake amene anayankhula.
Matthew12:37 Pakuti ndi mawu anu mudzapezeka osalakwa ndiponso ndi mawu anu mudzapezeka olakwa.”
Matthew12:38 Pamenepo ena mwa Afarisi ndi aphunzitsi amalamulo anati kwa Iye
Matthew12:39 Iye anayankha kuti
Matthew12:40 Pakuti monga Yona anali mʼmimba mwa nsomba yayikulu masiku atatu
Matthew12:41 Anthu a ku Ninive adzayimirira pachiweruzo ndi mʼbado uwu ndi kuwutsutsa pakuti iwo analapa Yona atalalikira ndipo tsopano wamkulu kuposa Yona ali pano.
Matthew12:42 Mfumu yayikazi yakummwera idzayimirira pa tsiku lachiweruzo ndi mʼbado uwu ndipo idzawutsutsa pakuti inachokera kumathero a dziko lapansi kudzamva nzeru za Solomoni
Matthew12:43 “Pamene mzimu woyipa utuluka mwa munthu
Matthew12:44 Pamenepo umati
Matthew12:45 Kenaka umapita kukatenga mizimu ina isanu ndi iwiri yoyipa kwambiri kuposa uwowo ndipo imapita ndi kukakhala mʼmenemo. Choncho khalidwe lotsiriza la munthu uyu limakhala loyipa kwambiri kuposa loyambalo. Umo ndi mmene zidzakhalire ndi mʼbado oyipawu.”
Matthew12:46 Pamene Yesu anali kuyankhulabe ndi gulu la anthu
Matthew12:47 Wina anamuwuza Iye kuti
Matthew12:48 Iye anayankha kuti
Matthew12:49 Ndipo akuloza ophunzira ake
Matthew12:50 Pakuti aliyense amene achita chifuniro cha Atate anga akumwamba ndiye mʼbale wanga
Matthew13:1 Tsiku lomwelo Yesu anatuluka mʼnyumba ndipo anakhala mʼmbali mwa nyanja.
Matthew13:2 Magulu a anthu anasonkhana mozungulira ndipo Iye analowa mʼbwato nakhala pansi ndipo anthu onse anayimirira ku mtunda.
Matthew13:3 Pamenepo Iye anawawuza zinthu zambiri mʼmafanizo ndi kuti
Matthew13:4 Akufesa
Matthew13:5 Zina zinagwa pamalo a miyala pamene panalibe dothi lambiri. Zinamera mofulumira chifukwa panalibe dothi lambiri.
Matthew13:6 Koma dzuwa litakwera
Matthew13:7 Mbewu zina zinagwa pa minga ndipo mingayo inayanga ndi kuzirepheretsa kukula.
Matthew13:8 Koma mbewu zina zinagwa pa nthaka yabwino ndipo zinabala zipatso 100
Matthew13:9 Amene ali ndi makutu amve.”
Matthew13:10 Ophunzira anabwera kwa Iye ndikumufunsa kuti
Matthew13:11 Iye anayankha kuti
Matthew13:12 Aliyense amene ali nazo adzapatsidwa zowonjezera ndipo iye adzakhala nazo zambiri. Aliyense amene alibe
Matthew13:13 Ichi ndi chifukwa chake ndimayankhula kwa iwo mʼmafanizo: “Ngakhale akupenya koma saona
Matthew13:14 Mwa iwo zimene ananenera Yesaya zikwaniritsidwa: “ ‘Kumva mudzamva koma osamvetsetsa. Kupenya mudzapenya koma osaona kanthu.
Matthew13:15 	 Pakuti mtima wa anthu awa ndi wokanika
Matthew13:16 Koma maso anu ndi odala chifukwa amapenya ndi makutu anu chifukwa amamva.
Matthew13:17 Zoonadi
Matthew13:18 “Tamverani tsono zimene fanizo la wofesa litanthauza:
Matthew13:19 Pamene aliyense akumva uthenga wa ufumu koma sawuzindikira
Matthew13:20 Zimene zinafesedwa pa malo amiyala ndi munthu amene amamva mawu ndi kuwalandira msanga ndi chimwemwe.
Matthew13:21 Koma popeza alibe muzu
Matthew13:22 Zimene zinafesedwa pakati pa minga
Matthew13:23 Koma zimene zinafesedwa pa nthaka yabwino
Matthew13:24 Yesu anawawuza fanizo lina kuti: “Ufumu wakumwamba ufanana ndi munthu amene anafesa mbewu zabwino mʼmunda mwake.
Matthew13:25 Koma aliyense akugona usiku mdani wake anabwera ndi kufesa namsongole pakati pa tirigu ndipo anachoka.
Matthew13:26 Pamene tirigu anamera ndi kutulutsa ngala
Matthew13:27 “Antchito ake anabwera kwa iye ndi kuti
Matthew13:28 “Iye anayankha kuti
Matthew13:29 “Iye anakana nati
Matthew13:30 Zisiyeni zonse zikulire pamodzi mpaka nthawi yokolola. Pa nthawi imeneyo ndidzawuza okolola kuti: Poyamba sonkhanitsani namsongole ndi kumumanga mʼmitolo kuti atenthedwe
Matthew13:31 Iye anawawuza fanizo lina kuti
Matthew13:32 Ngakhale mbewuyi ndi yayingʼono mwa mbewu zanu zonse za mʼmunda
Matthew13:33 Iye anawawuzanso fanizo lina nati: “Ufumu wakumwamba ufanana ndi yisiti amene mayi anatenga ndi kusakaniza mu ufa wambiri mpaka wonse unafufuma.”
Matthew13:34 Yesu anayankhula zinthu zonsezi kwa gulu la anthu mʼmafanizo ndipo Iye sananene kalikonse kwa iwo osagwiritsa ntchito fanizo.
Matthew13:35 Kotero zinakwaniritsidwa zimene zinayankhulidwa ndi mneneri kuti
Matthew13:36 Kenaka Iye anasiya gulu la anthu ndi kukalowa mʼnyumba. Ophunzira ake anapita kwa Iye nati
Matthew13:37 Iye anayankha nati
Matthew13:38 Munda ndi dziko lapansi ndipo mbewu yabwino ndi ana a ufumu. Namsongole ndi ana a woyipayo.
Matthew13:39 Ndipo amene anafesa namsongole ndi Satana. Kukolola ndiko kutha kwa dzikoli ndipo otuta ndi angelo.
Matthew13:40 “Monga momwe namsongole azulidwa ndi kutenthedwa ndi moto
Matthew13:41 Mwana wa Munthu adzatumiza angelo ake ndipo iwo adzachotsa mu ufumu wake chilichonse chochimwitsa ndi onse amene amachita zoyipa.
Matthew13:42 Adzawaponya mʼngʼanjo yamoto kumene kudzakhala kulira ndi kukuta mano.
Matthew13:43 Pamenepo olungama adzawala ngati dzuwa mu ufumu wa Atate awo. Amene ali ndi makutu amve.”
Matthew13:44 “Ufumu wakumwamba ufanana ndi chuma chobisika mʼmunda. Munthu atachipeza anachibisanso ndipo ndi chimwemwe anapita nakagulitsa zonse anali nazo
Matthew13:45 “Komanso Ufumu wakumwamba ufanana ndi wogulitsa malonda amene amafuna ngale zabwino.
Matthew13:46 Atapeza imodzi ya mtengowapatali
Matthew13:47 “Komanso Ufumu wakumwamba ufanana ndi khoka limene linaponyedwa mʼnyanja ndipo linakola mitundu yonse ya nsomba.
Matthew13:48 Litadzaza
Matthew13:49 Umu ndi mmene kudzakhalira pakutha kwa dziko. Angelo adzabwera ndi kulekanitsa oyipa ndi olungama.
Matthew13:50 Ndipo oyipa adzawaponya mʼngʼanjo ya moto kumene kudzakhala kulira ndi kukukuta mano.”
Matthew13:51 Yesu anawafunsa kuti
Matthew13:52 Iye anawawuza kuti
Matthew13:53 Yesu atatsiriza mafanizowa anachoka kumeneko.
Matthew13:54 Atafika ku mudzi kwawo anayamba kuphunzitsa mʼmasunagoge awo ndipo iwo anadabwa nati
Matthew13:55 Kodi si mwana wa wopala matabwa? Kodi dzina la amayi ake si Mariya ndipo kodi abale ake si Yakobo
Matthew13:56 Kodi alongo ake onse sali ndi ife? Tsono ndi kuti kumene anazitenga zinthu izi?”
Matthew13:57 Ndipo iwo anakhumudwa chifukwa cha Iye. Koma Yesu anawawuza kuti
Matthew13:58 Ndipo Iye sanachite zodabwitsa zambiri kumeneko chifukwa cha kusowa kwa chikhulupiriro kwawo.
Matthew14:1 Pa nthawi imeneyo Mfumu Herode anamva za mbiri ya Yesu.
Matthew14:2 Ndipo iye anati kwa antchito ake
Matthew14:3 Pakuti Herode anamugwira Yohane ndi kumumanga ndipo anamuyika mʼndende chifukwa cha Herodia mkazi wa mʼbale wake Filipo.
Matthew14:4 Chifukwa Yohane anakhala akunena kwa iye kuti
Matthew14:5 Herode anafuna kupha Yohane koma iye anaopa anthu chifukwa anamuyesa iye mneneri.
Matthew14:6 Pa tsiku lokumbukira kubadwa kwa Herode
Matthew14:7 Kotero Herode analonjeza ndi lumbiro kumupatsa chilichonse chimene mwanayo angamupemphe.
Matthew14:8 Ndipo atamupangira amayi ake anati
Matthew14:9 Mfumuyo inamva chisoni koma chifukwa cha lumbiro lake ndi alendo amene anali pa phwando lake analamulira kuti chofuna chake chipatsidwe;
Matthew14:10 ndipo anakadula mutu wa Yohane mʼndende.
Matthew14:11 Mutu wake anawubweretsa mʼmbale ndi kumupatsa mtsikanayo amene anawutengera kwa amayi ake.
Matthew14:12 Ophunzira a Yohane anabwera nadzatenga mtembo wake ndi kukawuyika mʼmanda. Pomwepo iwo anapita kukamuwuza Yesu.
Matthew14:13 Yesu atamva zimene zinachitika
Matthew14:14 Yesu atafika ku mtunda
Matthew14:15 Kutayamba mdima
Matthew14:16 Yesu anawayankha kuti
Matthew14:17 Iwo anayankha kuti
Matthew14:18 Koma Iye anati
Matthew14:19 Analamula anthu kuti akhale pansi pa udzu ndipo anatenga buledi musanu ndi nsomba ziwiri nayangʼana kumwamba
Matthew14:20 Onse anadya nakhuta ndipo ophunzira anatola zotsalira ndi kudzaza madengu khumi ndi awiri.
Matthew14:21 Chiwerengero cha amene anadya kupatulako amayi ndi ana chinali pafupifupi amuna 5
Matthew14:22 Nthawi yomweyo anawawuza ophunzira ake kuti alowe mʼbwato ndi kuti atsogole kupita kutsidya lina pamene Iye ankawuza anthu kuti azipita kwawo.
Matthew14:23 Atatha kuwawuza kuti azipita kwawo
Matthew14:24 Pamenepo nʼkuti bwato litapita patali pangʼono kuchokera ku mtunda ndipo linavutika ndi mafunde chifukwa mphepo inkawomba mokumana nalo.
Matthew14:25 Pa ora lachinayi usiku
Matthew14:26 Ophunzira atamuona akuyenda pa nyanja
Matthew14:27 Koma Yesu nthawi yomweyo anawawuza kuti
Matthew14:28 Petro anayankha nati
Matthew14:29 Iye anati
Matthew14:30 Koma ataona mphepo
Matthew14:31 Ndipo mofulumira Yesu anatambasula dzanja lake namugwira iye
Matthew14:32 Ndipo atalowa mʼbwato mphepo inaleka.
Matthew14:33 Pamenepo amene anali mʼbwato anamulambira Iye
Matthew14:34 Atawoloka
Matthew14:35 Anthu akumeneko atamuzindikira Yesu
Matthew14:36 Ndipo anamupempha alole kuti akhudze mphonje ya mkanjo wake
Matthew15:1 Pamenepo Afarisi ena ndi aphunzitsi amalamulo anabwera kwa Yesu kuchokera ku Yerusalemu ndipo anamufunsa kuti
Matthew15:2 “Chifukwa chiyani ophunzira anu amaphwanya mwambo wa akuluakulu? Iwo sasamba mʼmanja pakudya!”
Matthew15:3 Yesu anayankha kuti
Matthew15:4 Pakuti Mulungu anati
Matthew15:5 Koma inu mumati
Matthew15:6 iye sakulemekeza nayo abambo ake ndipo ndi khalidwe lotere inu mumapeputsa nalo Mawu a Mulungu chifukwa cha mwambo wanu.
Matthew15:7 Inu anthu achiphamaso
Matthew15:8 	 “ ‘Anthu awa amandilemekeza Ine ndi milomo yawo
Matthew15:9 	 Amandilambira Ine kwachabe ndi kuphunzitsa malamulo ndi malangizo a anthu.’ ”
Matthew15:10 Yesu anayitana gulu la anthu nati
Matthew15:11 Chimene chimalowa mʼkamwa mwa munthu sichimuchititsa kukhala woyipa
Matthew15:12 Pamenepo ophunzira anabwera kwa Iye ndipo anamufunsa kuti
Matthew15:13 Iye anayankha kuti
Matthew15:14 Alekeni
Matthew15:15 Petro anati
Matthew15:16 Yesu anawafunsa kuti
Matthew15:17 Kodi inu simudziwa kuti chilichonse cholowa mʼkamwa chimapita mʼmimba ndipo kenaka chimatuluka kunja kwa thupi?
Matthew15:18 Koma zinthu zimene zituluka mʼkamwa zimachokera mu mtima ndipo zimenezi zimamuchititsa munthu kukhala woyipa.
Matthew15:19 Pakuti mu mtima mumatuluka maganizo oyipa
Matthew15:20 Izi ndi zimene zimachititsa munthu kukhala woyipa; koma kudya ndi mʼmanja mosasamba sikumuchititsa munthu kukhala woyipa.”
Matthew15:21 Yesu atachoka kumalo amenewo anapita kudera la ku Turo ndi ku Sidoni.
Matthew15:22 Mayi wa Chikanaani wochokera dera la komweko anabwera kwa Iye akulira
Matthew15:23 Yesu sanayankhe kanthu. Ndipo ophunzira ake anabwera namupempha Iye kuti
Matthew15:24 Iye anayankha kuti
Matthew15:25 Mayiyo anabwera ndi kugwada pamaso pake
Matthew15:26 Iye anayankha kuti
Matthew15:27 Mayiyo anati
Matthew15:28 Pomwepo Yesu anayankha kuti
Matthew15:29 Yesu anachoka kumeneko napita mʼmbali mwa nyanja ya Galileya. Ndipo anakwera ku phiri nakhala pansi.
Matthew15:30 Gulu lalikulu la anthu linabwera kwa Iye ndi anthu olumala
Matthew15:31 Anthu ataona osayankhula akuyankhula
Matthew15:32 Yesu anayitana ophunzira ake nati
Matthew15:33 Ophunzira anayankha kuti
Matthew15:34 Yesu anawafunsa kuti
Matthew15:35 Iye anawuza gululo kuti likhale pansi.
Matthew15:36 Kenaka anatenga malofu asanu ndi awiri aja ndi tinsombato ndipo atayamika anagawa napatsa ophunzira ake ndipo iwo anagawira anthuwo.
Matthew15:37 Onse anadya ndipo anakhuta. Pomaliza ophunzira anatolera zotsalira nadzaza madengu asanu ndi awiri.
Matthew15:38 Chiwerengero cha anthu amene anadya chinali 4
Matthew15:39 Yesu atatha kuwuza gululo kuti lipite kwawo
Matthew16:1 Afarisi ndi Asaduki anabwera kwa Yesu ndi kumuyesa pomufunsa kuti awaonetse chizindikiro chochokera kumwamba.
Matthew16:2 Iye anayankha kuti
Matthew16:3 Ndipo mmawa mumati
Matthew16:4 Mʼbado woyipa ndi wachigololo umafuna chizindikiro chodabwitsa koma palibe ngakhale chimodzi chidzapatsidwa kupatula chizindikiro cha Yona.” Pamenepo Yesu anawasiya nachoka.
Matthew16:5 Koma atawoloka nyanja
Matthew16:6 Yesu anawawuza kuti
Matthew16:7 Iwo anakambirana pakati pawo za izi ndipo anati
Matthew16:8 Yesu atadziwa zokambirana zawo
Matthew16:9 Kodi inu simukumvetsetsabe? Kodi simukukumbukira za buledi musanu amene anadya anthu 5
Matthew16:10 Kapena buledi musanu ndi muwiri amene anadya anthu 4
Matthew16:11 Zitheka bwanji kuti inu simukumvetsetsa kuti Ine sindinkayankhula nanu za buledi? Koma inu chenjerani ndi yisiti wa Afarisi ndi Asaduki.”
Matthew16:12 Kenaka iwo anazindikira kuti Iye samawawuza kuti achenjere ndi yisiti wa buledi koma ndi chiphunzitso cha Afarisi ndi Asaduki.
Matthew16:13 Yesu atafika ku chigawo cha Kaisareya Filipo
Matthew16:14 Iwo anayankha kuti
Matthew16:15 Iye anafunsa kuti
Matthew16:16 Simoni Petro anayankha kuti
Matthew16:17 Yesu anati kwa iye
Matthew16:18 Ndipo Ine ndikuwuza iwe kuti ndiwe Petro ndipo pa thanthwe ili Ine ndidzamangapo mpingo wanga ndipo makomo a ku gehena sadzawugonjetsa.
Matthew16:19 Ine ndidzakupatsa makiyi a Ufumu wakumwamba
Matthew16:20 Pamenepo Iye anachenjeza ophunzira ake kuti asawuze wina aliyense kuti ndi Khristu.
Matthew16:21 Kuyambira nthawi imeneyo Yesu anayamba kuwafotokozera ophunzira ake kuti Iye ayenera kupita ku Yerusalemu ndi kukazunzidwa kwambiri mʼmanja mwa akulu a ansembe ndi aphunzitsi amalamulo kuti ayenera kuphedwa
Matthew16:22 Petro anamutengera Iye pambali nayamba kumudzudzula kuti
Matthew16:23 Yesu anatembenuka nati kwa Petro
Matthew16:24 Pamenepo Yesu anati kwa ophunzira ake
Matthew16:25 Pakuti aliyense amene afuna kupulumutsa moyo wake adzawutaya koma aliyense amene ataya moyo wake chifukwa cha Ine adzawupeza.
Matthew16:26 Kodi munthu adzapindula chiyani ngati atapeza zonse za dziko lapansi nataya moyo wake? Kapena munthu angapereke chiyani chosinthana ndi moyo wake?
Matthew16:27 Pakuti Mwana wa Munthu adzabwera mu ulemerero wa Atate ake ndi angelo ake ndipo pamenepo Iye adzapereka mphotho kwa munthu mofanana ndi zimene anachita.
Matthew16:28 “Ine ndikuwuzani inu choonadi
Matthew17:1 Patapita masiku asanu ndi limodzi Yesu anatenga Petro
Matthew17:2 Pamenepo Iye anasinthika maonekedwe ake pamaso pawo. Nkhope yake inawala ngati dzuwa ndipo zovala zake zinayera kuti mbuu.
Matthew17:3 Nthawi yomweyo Mose ndi Eliya anaonekera kwa iwo akuyankhulana ndi Yesu.
Matthew17:4 Petro anati kwa Yesu
Matthew17:5 Iye akuyankhulabe
Matthew17:6 Ophunzira atamva zimenezi
Matthew17:7 Ndipo Yesu anabwera nawakhudza nati
Matthew17:8 Atayangʼana
Matthew17:9 Akutsika ku phiriko
Matthew17:10 Ophunzira anamufunsa Iye kuti
Matthew17:11 Yesu anayankha kuti
Matthew17:12 Koma Ine ndikuwuzani inu kuti Eliya anabwera kale koma iwo sanamuzindikire ndipo anachita naye chilichonse chimene anafuna. Momwemonso iwo adzazunza Mwana wa Munthu.”
Matthew17:13 Pamenepo ophunzira anazindikira kuti amawawuza za Yohane Mʼbatizi.
Matthew17:14 Atafika ku gulu la anthu
Matthew17:15 Iye anati
Matthew17:16 Ine ndinabwera naye kwa ophunzira anu koma alephera kumuchiritsa.”
Matthew17:17 Yesu anayankha nati
Matthew17:18 Yesu anadzudzula chiwandacho ndipo chinatuluka mwa mnyamatayo ndipo anachira nthawi yomweyo.
Matthew17:19 Pamenepo ophunzira anabwera kwa Yesu mwamseri ndi kumufunsa kuti
Matthew17:20 Iye anayankha kuti
Matthew17:21 Chiwanda cha mtundu uwu sichingachoke chabe koma ndi pemphero ndi kusala kudya.”
Matthew17:22 Atasonkhana pamodzi ku Galileya
Matthew17:23 Iwo adzamupha koma pa tsiku lachitatu adzaukitsidwa.” Ndipo ophunzira anadzazidwa ndi chisoni.
Matthew17:24 Yesu ndi ophunzira ake atafika ku Kaperenawo
Matthew17:25 Iye anayankha kuti
Matthew17:26 Petro anayankha kuti
Matthew17:27 Koma kuti ife tisawakhumudwitse pita ku nyanja kaponye mbedza yako. Katenge nsomba imene ukayambe kuyikola; kayitsekule kukamwa ndipo ukapezamo ndalama. Katenge ndalamayo ndi kukapereka msonkho wanga ndi wanu.
Matthew18:1 Pa nthawi imeneyo ophunzira anabwera kwa Yesu ndipo anamufunsa kuti
Matthew18:2 Iye anayitana kamwana kakangʼono ndi kukayimiritsa pakati pawo.
Matthew18:3 Ndipo Iye anati
Matthew18:4 Chifukwa chake
Matthew18:5 Ndipo aliyense amene alandira kamwana kakangʼono ngati aka mu dzina langa
Matthew18:6 “Koma ngati wina aliyense achimwitsa mmodzi wa ana awa
Matthew18:7 Tsoka dziko lapansi chifukwa cha zinthu zimene ziyenera kubwera
Matthew18:8 Ngati dzanja lako kapena phazi lako likuchimwitsa
Matthew18:9 Ndipo ngati diso lako likuchimwitsa
Matthew18:10 “Onetsetsani kuti musanyoze mmodzi wa anawa. Pakuti ndikuwuzani kuti angelo awo kumwamba amakhala pamaso pa Atate anga akumwamba nthawi zonse.”
Matthew18:11 (Mwana wa Munthu anabwera kudzapulumutsa chimene chinatayika).
Matthew18:12 “Kodi mukuganiza bwanji? Ngati munthu ali ndi nkhosa 100 ndipo imodzi nʼkusowa
Matthew18:13 Zoonadi
Matthew18:14 Chimodzimodzinso Atate anu akumwamba safuna kuti mmodzi wa anawa atayike.
Matthew18:15 “Ngati mʼbale wako akuchimwira
Matthew18:16 Koma ngati sakumvera
Matthew18:17 Ngati iye akana kuwamvera iwo
Matthew18:18 “Zoonadi
Matthew18:19 “Komanso ndikukuwuzani inu kuti ngati awiri a inu pa dziko lapansi avomerezana kanthu kalikonse kamene mukapempha
Matthew18:20 Pakuti pamene awiri kapena atatu asonkhana pamodzi mʼdzina langa
Matthew18:21 Kenaka Petro anabwera kwa Yesu ndi kumufunsa kuti
Matthew18:22 Yesu anayankha kuti
Matthew18:23 “Nʼchifukwa chake
Matthew18:24 Atangoyamba kulandira
Matthew18:25 Popeza sakanatha kubweza
Matthew18:26 “Wantchitoyo anagwada pamaso pake namupempha iye kuti
Matthew18:27 Bwana wakeyo anamuchitira chifundo
Matthew18:28 “Koma wantchito uja atatuluka
Matthew18:29 “Wantchito mnzakeyo anagwada namupempha iye kuti
Matthew18:30 “Koma iye anakana. Mʼmalo mwake
Matthew18:31 Pamene antchito ena anaona zomwe zinachitikazo
Matthew18:32 “Pamenepo bwanayo anayitana wantchitoyo nati
Matthew18:33 Kodi iwe sukanamuchitira chifundo wantchito mnzako monga momwe ine ndinakuchitira iwe?’
Matthew18:34 Ndi mkwiyo
Matthew18:35 “Umu ndi mmene Atate anga akumwamba adzachitira ndi aliyense wa inu ngati simukhululukira mʼbale wanu ndi mtima wonse.”

Matthew19:4 Iye anayankha kuti
Matthew19:5 Ndipo anati

Matthew19:18 Mnyamatayo anamufunsa kuti
Matthew19:19 lemekeza abambo ako ndi amayi ako ndipo konda mnansi wako monga iwe mwini.”

Matthew20:1 “Ufumu wakumwamba uli ngati mwini munda amene anapita mmawa kukalemba anthu aganyu kuti akagwire ntchito mʼmunda wake wa mpesa.
Matthew20:2 Anagwirizana kuwalipira dinari monga malipiro a tsiku limodzi ndipo anawatumiza mʼmunda wake wamphesa.
Matthew20:3 “Nthawi 9 koloko mmawa
Matthew20:4 Anawawuza kuti
Matthew20:5 Ndipo anapita. “Anatulukanso nthawi ya 12 koloko masana
Matthew20:6 Nthawi ya 5 koloko madzulo anatulukanso ndipo anapeza enanso atangoyimirira. Anawafunsa kuti
Matthew20:7 “Iwo anayankha kuti
Matthew20:8 “Ndipo pofika madzulo
Matthew20:9 “Antchito amene anawalemba ganyu pa 5 koloko masana anafika ndipo aliyense analandira dinari.
Matthew20:10 Ndipo atabwera kwa amene analembedwa poyamba anayembekezera kuti alandira zambiri. Koma aliyense wa iwo analandira dinari.
Matthew20:11 Atalandira
Matthew20:12 Iwo anati
Matthew20:13 “Koma iye anamuyankha mmodzi wa iwo nati
Matthew20:14 Tenga malipiro ako pita. Ndikufuna kumupatsa munthu amene ndinamulemba pomaliza mofanana ndi mmene ndakupatsira iwe.
Matthew20:15 Kodi ndilibe ufulu wochita zimene ndikufuna ndi ndalama zanga? Kapena ukuyipidwa chifukwa ndine wopereka mowolowamanja?’
Matthew20:16 “Momwemo omalizira adzakhala oyamba ndipo oyamba adzakhala omalizira.”
Matthew20:17 Tsopano pamene Yesu ankapita ku Yerusalemu
Matthew20:18 “Tikupita ku Yerusalemu
Matthew20:19 ndipo adzamupereka kwa anthu a mitundu ina kuti amunyoze ndi kumukwapula ndi kumupachika. Pa tsiku lachitatu adzaukitsidwa!”
Matthew20:20 Amayi a ana a Zebedayo anabwera ndi ana ake kwa Yesu
Matthew20:21 Yesu anawafunsa kuti
Matthew20:22 Yesu anawawuza kuti
Matthew20:23 Yesu anawawuza kuti
Matthew20:24 Ophunzira khumi aja
Matthew20:25 Yesu anawayitana onse pamodzi nati
Matthew20:26 Siziyenera kutero ndi inu. Mʼmalo mwake
Matthew20:27 Ndipo aliyense amene akufuna kukhala woyamba akhale kapolo wanu.
Matthew20:28 Momwenso Mwana wa Munthu sanabwere kudzatumikiridwa
Matthew20:29 Pamene Yesu ndi ophunzira ake ankachoka ku Yeriko
Matthew20:30 Amuna awiri osaona anakhala mʼmbali mwa msewu
Matthew20:31 Gulu la anthulo linawadzudzula iwo ndi kuwawuza kuti akhale chete
Matthew20:32 Yesu anayima ndi kuwayitana ndipo anawafunsa kuti
Matthew20:33 Anamuyankha nati
Matthew20:34 Yesu anamva nawo chifundo ndipo anakhudza maso awo. Nthawi yomweyo anaona namutsata Iye.
Matthew21:1 Akuyandikira ku Yerusalemu anafika ku Betifage pa phiri la Olivi
Matthew21:2 nawawuza kuti
Matthew21:3 Wina akakayankhula
Matthew21:4 Izi zinachitika kukwaniritsa zimene zinayankhulidwa ndi mneneri:
Matthew21:5 “Uza mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni
Matthew21:6 Ophunzirawo anapita nachita monga Yesu anawalamulira.
Matthew21:7 Anabweretsa bulu ndi mwana wake
Matthew21:8 Gulu lalikulu la anthu linayala zovala zawo mu msewu pamene ena anadula nthambi zamitengo ndi kuziyala mu msewumo.
Matthew21:9 Magulu amene anali patsogolo pake ndi amene amamutsatira anafuwula kuti
Matthew21:10 Yesu atalowa mu Yerusalemu
Matthew21:11 Magulu a anthu anayankha kuti
Matthew21:12 Yesu analowa mʼdera lina la Nyumba ya Mulungu ndipo anatulutsa kunja anthu onse amene ankachita malonda. Anagubuduza matebulo a osinthira ndalama ndi mipando ya ogulitsa nkhunda.
Matthew21:13 Iye anawawuza kuti
Matthew21:14 Anthu osaona ndi olumala anabwera kwa Iye mʼNyumba ya Mulungu ndipo anawachiritsa.
Matthew21:15 Koma akulu a ansembe ndi aphunzitsi amalamulo ataona zodabwitsa zimene anachita
Matthew21:16 Anamufunsa kuti
Matthew21:17 Ndipo anawasiya natuluka mu mzindawo ndi kupita ku Betaniya
Matthew21:18 Mmamawa
Matthew21:19 Ataona mtengo wamkuyu mʼmbali mwa msewu
Matthew21:20 Ophunzira ataona zimenezi
Matthew21:21 Yesu anayankha kuti
Matthew21:22 Ngati mukhulupirira
Matthew21:23 Yesu analowa mʼNyumba ya Mulungu
Matthew21:24 Yesu anayankha kuti
Matthew21:25 Ubatizo wa Yohane unachokera kuti? Kumwamba kapena kwa anthu?” Anakambirana pakati pawo ndipo anati
Matthew21:26 Koma tikati
Matthew21:27 Choncho anamuwuza Yesu kuti
Matthew21:28 “Kodi muganiza bwanji? Panali munthu wina anali ndi ana aamuna awiri. Anapita kwa woyamba nati
Matthew21:29 “Iye anayankha kuti
Matthew21:30 “Kenaka abambowo anapita kwa mwana winayo nanena chimodzimodzi. Iye anayankha kuti
Matthew21:31 “Ndani wa awiriwa anachita chimene abambo ake amafuna?” Anamuyankha nati
Matthew21:32 Pakuti Yohane anabwera kwa inu kuti akuonetseni njira yachilungamo
Matthew21:33 “Tamverani fanizo lina: Panali mwini munda amene anadzala mphesa. Anamanga mpanda kuzungulira mundawo
Matthew21:34 Pamene nthawi yokolola inakwana
Matthew21:35 “Alimi aja anagwira antchito ake; namenya mmodzi
Matthew21:36 Kenaka anatumiza antchito ena oposa oyambawo ndipo matenantiwo anawachitira chimodzimodzi.
Matthew21:37 Pomalizira anatumiza mwana wake. Anati adzamuchitira ulemu mwana wanga.
Matthew21:38 “Koma alimiwo ataona mwanayo anati kwa wina ndi mnzake
Matthew21:39 Pamenepo anamutenga namuponyera kunja kwa munda wamphesa namupha.
Matthew21:40 “Tsono akabwera mwini munda wamphesa adzachita nawo chiyani matenantiwo?”
Matthew21:41 Iwo anayankha kuti
Matthew21:42 Yesu anawawuza kuti
Matthew21:43 “Nʼchifukwa chake ndi kukuwuzani kuti ufumu wa Mulungu udzalandidwa kwa inu ndipo udzapatsidwa kwa anthu amene adzabereka chipatso chake.
Matthew21:44 Amene agwa pa mwalawu adzadukaduka
Matthew21:45 Akulu a ansembe ndi Afarisi atamva mafanizo a Yesu
Matthew21:46 Pamenepo anafuna njira yoti amugwirire
Matthew22:1 Yesu anayankhula nawonso mʼmafanizo
Matthew22:2 “Ufumu wakumwamba uli ngati mfumu imene inakonzera phwando mwana wake wamwamuna.

Matthew22:4 “Kenaka anatumiza antchito ena nati
Matthew22:5 “Koma iwo sanalabadire ndipo anachoka; wina anapita ku munda wake ndi wina ku malonda ake.
Matthew22:6 Ndipo otsalawo anagwira antchito ake
Matthew22:7 Mfumu inakwiya. Inatumiza asilikali ake ndipo anawononga opha anzawowo ndi kutentha mzinda wawo.
Matthew22:8 “Pamenepo anati kwa antchito ake
Matthew22:9 Pitani ku mphambano za misewu ndipo kayitaneni aliyense amene mukamupeze kuti abwere ku phwando.’
Matthew22:10 Pamenepo antchitowo anapita ku misewu nakasonkhanitsa anthu onse amene anakawapeza
Matthew22:11 “Koma pamene mfumu inabwera kudzaona oyitanidwawo
Matthew22:12 Inamufunsa kuti
Matthew22:13 “Pamenepo mfumuyo inawuza otumikira kuti
Matthew22:14 “Popeza oyitanidwa ndi ambiri koma osankhidwa ndi ochepa.”
Matthew22:15 Kenaka Afarisi anatuluka nakakonza njira zomupezera zifukwa Yesu mʼmawu ake.

Matthew22:17 Tiwuzeni tsono maganizo anu ndi otani
Matthew22:18 Koma Yesu podziwa maganizo awo oyipa anati
Matthew22:19 Onetseni ndalama imene mumapereka msonkho.” Iwo anabweretsa dinari
Matthew22:20 ndipo anawafunsa kuti

Matthew22:26 Izi zinachitikiranso mʼbale wa chiwiri ndi wachitatu mpaka wachisanu ndi chiwiri.
Matthew22:27 Pa mapeto pake mkaziyo anamwaliranso.
Matthew22:28 Tsopano
Matthew22:29 Yesu anayankha kuti
Matthew22:30 Anthu akadzaukitsidwa

Matthew22:35 Mmodzi wa iwo
Matthew22:36 “Aphunzitsi

Matthew22:40 Malamulo onse ndi aneneri zakhazikika pa malamulo awiriwa.”
Matthew22:41 Afarisi atasonkhana pamodzi
Matthew22:42 “Kodi mukuganiza bwanji za Khristu? Ndi Mwana wa ndani?” Iwo anayankha kuti

Matthew23:1 Pamenepo Yesu anati kwa magulu a anthu ndi ophunzira ake:
Matthew23:2 “Aphunzitsi amalamulo ndi Afarisi amakhala pa mpando wa Mose.
Matthew23:3 Choncho muziwamvera ndi kuchita chilichonse chimene akuwuzani. Koma musachite zimene amachita
Matthew23:4 Amamanga akatundu olemera nawayika pa mapewa a anthu
Matthew23:5 “Ntchito zawo amachita ndi cholinga chakuti anthu awaone. Amadzimangirira timaphukusi tikulutikulu ta Mawu a Mulungu pa mphumi ndi pa mkono komanso amatalikitsa mphonje za mikanjo yawo.
Matthew23:6 Amakonda malo aulemu pa maphwando ndi malo ofunika kwambiri mʼmasunagoge.
Matthew23:7 Amakondwera ndi kupatsidwa moni mʼmisika ndi kutchulidwa kuti ‘Aphunzitsi.’
Matthew23:8 “Koma inu simuyenera kutchulidwa ‘Aphunzitsi
Matthew23:9 Ndipo musamatchule wina aliyense pansi pano kuti ‘Atate
Matthew23:10 Komanso musamatchedwenso ‘Mtsogoleri
Matthew23:11 Wamkulu pakati panu adzakhala wokutumikirani.
Matthew23:12 Pakuti aliyense amene adzikuza adzachepetsedwa
Matthew23:13 “Tsoka kwa inu aphunzitsi amalamulo ndi Afarisi achiphamaso! Mumatseka pa khomo la kumwamba kuti anthu asalowemo. Eni akenu simulowamo komanso simulola kuti ena amene akufuna kulowa kuti alowe.
Matthew23:14 Muli ndi tsoka
Matthew23:15 “Tsoka kwa inu
Matthew23:16 “Tsoka kwa inu
Matthew23:17 Inu akhungu opusa! Chopambana nʼchiyani: ndalama zagolide
Matthew23:18 Ndiponso mumati
Matthew23:19 Inu anthu akhungu! Chopambana nʼchiyani: mphatso
Matthew23:20 Chifukwa chake
Matthew23:21 Ndipo iye wolumbira potchula Nyumba ya Mulungu alumbira pa Nyumbayo ndi pa Iye amene amakhala mʼmenemo.
Matthew23:22 Ndipo iye wolumbira kutchula kumwamba alumbira kutchula mpando waufumu wa Mulungu ndi pa Iye wokhalapo.
Matthew23:23 “Tsoka kwa inu
Matthew23:24 Atsogoleri akhungu inu! Mumachotsa kantchentche mu chakumwa chanu koma mumameza ngamira.
Matthew23:25 “Tsoka kwa inu
Matthew23:26 Afarisi akhungu! Poyamba tsukani mʼkati mwa chikho ndi mbale
Matthew23:27 “Tsoka kwa inu
Matthew23:28 Chimodzimodzinso
Matthew23:29 “Tsoka kwa inu
Matthew23:30 Ndipo mumati
Matthew23:31 Potero mukutsimikiza kuti muli ana a iwo amene anapha aneneri.
Matthew23:32 Dzazani inu muyeso wa uchimo wa makolo anu!
Matthew23:33 “Njoka inu! Ana amamba! Mudzachithawa bwanji chilango cha gehena?
Matthew23:34 Choncho ndi kutumizirani aneneri ndi anthu anzeru ndi aphunzitsi. Ena a iwo mudzawapha ndi kuwapachika; ena mudzawakwapula mʼmasunagoge anu ndi kuwafunafuna kuchokera mudzi wina kufikira wina.
Matthew23:35 Ndipo magazi onse a olungama amene anakhetsedwa pansi pano
Matthew23:36 Zoonadi
Matthew23:37 “Haa! Yerusalemu
Matthew23:38 Taona
Matthew23:39 Chifukwa chake ndikuwuza kuti simudzandionanso kufikira pamene mudzati
Matthew24:1 Yesu anatuluka mʼNyumba ya Mulungu ndipo akuchoka ophunzira ake anadza kwa Iye ndi kumuonetsa mamangidwe a Nyumbayo.
Matthew24:2 Iye anawafunsa kuti
Matthew24:3 Pamene Yesu anakhala pansi pa phiri la Olivi
Matthew24:4 Yesu anayankha kuti
Matthew24:5 Pakuti ambiri adzabwera mʼdzina langa nadzati
Matthew24:6 Mudzamva za nkhondo ndi mbiri za nkhondo
Matthew24:7 Mtundu ndi mtundu udzawukirana
Matthew24:8 Zonsezi ndi chiyambi chabe cha zowawa.
Matthew24:9 “Pamenepo adzakuperekani kuti mukazunzidwe ndi kuphedwa
Matthew24:10 Pa nthawi imeneyo ambiri adzasiya chikhulupiriro ndipo adzadana ndi kuperekana wina ndi mnzake
Matthew24:11 ndipo aneneri onama ambiri adzaoneka ndi kunyenga anthu ambiri.
Matthew24:12 Chifukwa cha kuchuluka kwa zoyipa
Matthew24:13 koma wopirira kufikira chimaliziro adzapulumuka.
Matthew24:14 Ndipo uthenga wa ufumu udzalalikidwa ku dziko lonse lapansi ngati umboni kwa mitundu yonse
Matthew24:15 “Tsono mukadzaona chinthu chonyansa chosakaza chitayima pamalo oyera chimene anayankhula mneneri Danieli
Matthew24:16 Pamenepo amene ali ku Yudeya athawire ku mapiri.
Matthew24:17 Yemwe ali pa denga la nyumba yake asatsike kukatulutsa chinthu chilichonse mʼnyumba.
Matthew24:18 Yemwe ali ku munda asapite kukatenga mkanjo wake.
Matthew24:19 Kudzakhala koopsa kwambiri masiku amenewo kwa amayi oyembekezera ndi kwa oyamwitsa!
Matthew24:20 Pempherani kuti kuthawa kwanu kusadzachitike nthawi yozizira kapena pa Sabata.
Matthew24:21 Popeza kudzakhala masautso aakulu
Matthew24:22 Ngati masiku amenewo sakanafupikitsidwa
Matthew24:23 Pa nthawi imeneyo ngati wina adzati kwa inu
Matthew24:24 Chifukwa akhristu onama ndi aneneri onama adzaoneka ndipo adzachita zizindikiro zazikulu ndi zodabwitsa kuti akanyenge ngakhale osankhidwawo ngati kukanakhala kotheka kutero.
Matthew24:25 Onani
Matthew24:26 “Ndiye ngati wina akuwuzani inu kuti
Matthew24:27 Monga momwe mphenzi ingʼanima kuchokera kummawa kupita kumadzulo
Matthew24:28 Kulikonse kuli chinthu cha kufa
Matthew24:29 “Akadzangotha mavuto a masiku amenewo
Matthew24:30 “Pa nthawi imeneyo chizindikiro cha Mwana wa Munthu chidzaoneka mlengalenga
Matthew24:31 Ndipo adzatuma angelo ake
Matthew24:32 “Tsopano kuchokera ku mtengo wamkuyu phunzirani ichi: Pamene uyamba kuphukira
Matthew24:33 Momwemonso
Matthew24:34 Zoonadi
Matthew24:35 Kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zidzatha
Matthew24:36 “Palibe amene adziwa za tsikulo kapena nthawi
Matthew24:37 Monga momwe zinalili nthawi ya Nowa
Matthew24:38 Pakuti masiku amenewo chisanafike chigumula
Matthew24:39 ndipo sanadziwe za chimene chikanachitika mpaka pamene chigumula chinafika ndi kuwamiza onse. Umu ndi mmene zidzakhalira pobwera kwa Mwana wa Munthu.
Matthew24:40 Amuna awiri adzakhala mʼmunda; wina adzatengedwa ndi wina adzatsala.
Matthew24:41 Amayi awiri adzakhala akusinja pa mtondo; wina adzatengedwa ndi wina adzatsala.
Matthew24:42 “Chifukwa chake yangʼanirani
Matthew24:43 Koma zindikirani ichi: Ngati mwini nyumba akanadziwa nthawi yanji ya usiku imene mbala imabwera
Matthew24:44 Inunso tsono muyenera kukhala okonzeka
Matthew24:45 “Kodi wantchito wokhulupirika ndi wanzeru amene ambuye ake anamuyika kukhala woyangʼanira antchito a mʼnyumba kuti awapatse chakudya chawo pa nthawi yake ndani?
Matthew24:46 Chidzakhala chabwino kwa wantchitoyo ngati mbuye wake pofika adzamupeza akuchita zimenezi.
Matthew24:47 Zoonadi
Matthew24:48 Koma tiyerekeze kuti wantchitoyo ndi woyipa
Matthew24:49 nayamba kumenya antchito anzake
Matthew24:50 Mbuye wa wantchitoyo adzabwera pa tsiku limene iye samamuyembekezera ndi pa nthawi imene iye sakuyidziwa.
Matthew24:51 Adzamulanga koopsa ndipo adzamuyika kokhala anthu achiphamaso
Matthew25:1 “Nthawi imeneyo ufumu wakumwamba udzafanizidwa ndi anamwali khumi amene anatenga nyale zawo napita kukakumana ndi mkwati.
Matthew25:2 Asanu anali opusa ndipo asanu ena anali ochenjera.
Matthew25:3 Opusawo anatenga nyale zawo koma sanatenge mafuta;
Matthew25:4 koma ochenjerawo anatenga mafuta awo mʼmabotolo pamodzi ndi nyale zawo.
Matthew25:5 Mkwati anachedwa ndipo onse anayamba kusinza nagona.
Matthew25:6 “Pakati pa usiku kunamveka kufuwula kuti
Matthew25:7 “Pamenepo anamwali onse anadzuka nayatsa nyale zawo.
Matthew25:8 Opusawo anati kwa ochenjerawo
Matthew25:9 “Ochenjerawo anayankha
Matthew25:10 “Koma pamene ankapita kukagula mafutawo
Matthew25:11 “Pambuyo pake enawo anabwera nati
Matthew25:12 “Koma iye anayankha kuti
Matthew25:13 “Choncho khalani odikira
Matthew25:14 “Komanso udzafanizidwa ndi munthu amene ankapita pa ulendo
Matthew25:15 Wina anamupatsa ndalama 5
Matthew25:16 Munthu amene analandira ndalama 5
Matthew25:17 Chimodzimodzinso amene analandira 2
Matthew25:18 Koma munthu amene analandira 1
Matthew25:19 “Patapita nthawi yayitali
Matthew25:20 Munthu amene analandira ndalama 5
Matthew25:21 “Ambuye ake anayankha nati
Matthew25:22 “Munthu amene anali ndi ndalama 2
Matthew25:23 “Mbuye wake anayankha nati
Matthew25:24 “Kenaka munthu amene analandira ndalama 1
Matthew25:25 Choncho ndinachita mantha ndipo ndinapita ndi kukabisa ndalama yanuyo pa dzenje. Onani
Matthew25:26 “Mbuye wake anayankha nati
Matthew25:27 Bwanji sunayike ndalama yanga kwa osunga ndalama kuti ine pobwera ndidzalandire ndalama yangayo pamodzi ndi chiwongoladzanja?
Matthew25:28 “ ‘Mulandeni ndalamayo
Matthew25:29 Pakuti aliyense amene ali nazo adzapatsidwa zambiri
Matthew25:30 Ndipo muponyeni wantchito wopanda phinduyu kunja
Matthew25:31 “Pamene Mwana wa Munthu adzabwera mu ulemerero wake
Matthew25:32 Mitundu yonse ya anthu idzasonkhanitsidwa pamaso pake
Matthew25:33 Adzayika nkhosa ku dzanja lake lamanja ndi mbuzi ku lamanzere.
Matthew25:34 “Pamenepo mfumu idzati kwa a ku dzanja lamanja
Matthew25:35 Pakuti ndinali ndi njala ndipo munandipatsa chakudya
Matthew25:36 ndinali wausiwa ndipo munandiveka
Matthew25:37 “Ndipo olungamawo adzamuyankha kuti
Matthew25:38 Ndi liti tinakuonani muli mlendo ndipo tinakulandirani
Matthew25:39 Ndi liti tinakuonani mutadwala kapena ku ndende ndipo tinakuyenderani?’
Matthew25:40 “Mfumu idzayankha kuti
Matthew25:41 “Pamenepo adzanena kwa akumanzere kwake kuti
Matthew25:42 Pakuti ndinali ndi njala ndipo simunandipatse chakudya
Matthew25:43 ndinali mlendo koma inu simunandilandire
Matthew25:44 “Iwo adzayankha kuti
Matthew25:45 “Iye adzayankha kuti
Matthew25:46 “Amenewa adzapita ku chilango chosatha pamene olungama ku moyo wosatha.”
Matthew26:1 Yesu atamaliza kuyankhula zonsezi
Matthew26:2 “Monga mukudziwa
Matthew26:3 Pamenepo akulu a ansembe ndi akuluakulu anasonkhana ku nyumba ya mkulu wa ansembe dzina lake Kayafa
Matthew26:4 ndipo anapangana kuti amugwire Yesu mobisa ndi kumupha.
Matthew26:5 Ndipo anati
Matthew26:6 Yesu ali ku Betaniya mʼnyumba Simoni Wakhate
Matthew26:7 mayi wina anabwera kwa Iye ndi botolo la mafuta onunkhira a mtengowapatali
Matthew26:8 Ophunzira ataona izi anayipidwa nafunsa kuti
Matthew26:9 Mafuta amenewa akanatha kugulitsidwa pa mtengo waukulu
Matthew26:10 Yesu podziwa izi anawawuza kuti
Matthew26:11 Osauka mudzakhala nawo nthawi zonse
Matthew26:12 Pamene wathira mafuta onunkhirawa pa thupi langa
Matthew26:13 Zoonadi
Matthew26:14 Pamenepo mmodzi wa khumi ndi awiriwo wotchedwa Yudasi Isikarioti anapita kwa akulu a ansembe
Matthew26:15 nafunsa kuti
Matthew26:16 Kuyambira pamenepo Yudasi anafunafuna nthawi yabwino yoti amupereke Yesu.
Matthew26:17 Pa tsiku loyamba laphwando la buledi wopanda yisiti
Matthew26:18 Iye anayankha kuti
Matthew26:19 Pamenepo ophunzira ake anachita monga momwe Yesu anawawuzira ndipo anakonza Paska.
Matthew26:20 Kutada
Matthew26:21 Akudya
Matthew26:22 Iwo anamva chisoni kwambiri ndipo anayamba kuyankhulana naye mmodzimmodzi nati
Matthew26:23 Yesu anayankha nati
Matthew26:24 Mwana wa Munthu adzaphedwa monga mmene kunalembedwera za Iye. Koma tsoka kwa munthu amene apereka Mwana wa Munthu! Kukanakhala bwino kwa iye akanapanda kubadwa.”
Matthew26:25 Ndipo Yudasi amene anamupereka Iye anati
Matthew26:26 Pamene ankadya
Matthew26:27 Kenaka anatenga chikho
Matthew26:28 Awa ndi magazi anga a pangano amene akhetsedwa chifukwa cha ambiri kuti akhululukidwe machimo.
Matthew26:29 Ndikuwuzani kuti sindidzamwanso kuchokera ku chipatso cha mtengo wa mpesa kuyambira lero mpaka tsiku ilo pamene ndidzamwenso mwatsopano ndi inu mu ufumu wa Atate anga.”
Matthew26:30 Atayimba nyimbo
Matthew26:31 Pamenepo Yesu anawawuza kuti
Matthew26:32 Koma ndikadzauka
Matthew26:33 Petro anayankha nati
Matthew26:34 Yesu anayankha nati
Matthew26:35 Koma Petro ananenetsa nati
Matthew26:36 Kenaka Yesu anapita ku malo otchedwa Getsemani
Matthew26:37 Anatenga Petro ndi ana awiri a Zebedayo
Matthew26:38 Pamenepo anawawuza kuti
Matthew26:39 Atapita patsogolo pangʼono
Matthew26:40 Kenaka anabwera kwa ophunzira ake nawapeza ali mtulo. Iye anafunsa Petro kuti
Matthew26:41 Khalani maso ndi kupemphera kuti musagwe mʼmayesero. Mzimu ukufuna koma thupi ndi lofowoka.”
Matthew26:42 Anachokanso nakapemphera kachiwiri kuti
Matthew26:43 Atabweranso anawapeza ali mtulo chifukwa zikope zawo zinalemedwa ndi tulo.
Matthew26:44 Choncho anawasiya napitanso kukapemphera kachitatu nanenanso chimodzimodzi.
Matthew26:45 Kenaka anabwera kwa ophunzira ake nati kwa iwo
Matthew26:46 Imirirani
Matthew26:47 Akuyankhula choncho
Matthew26:48 Womuperekayo anawawuziratu chizindikiro anthuwo kuti
Matthew26:49 Pamenepo Yudasi anapita kwa Yesu nati
Matthew26:50 Yesu anayankha kuti
Matthew26:51 Pa chifukwa ichi
Matthew26:52 Yesu anati kwa iye
Matthew26:53 Kodi mukuganiza kuti sindingathe kupempha Atate anga ndipo nthawi yomweyo nʼkundipatsa magulu a angelo oposa khumi ndi awiri?
Matthew26:54 Koma nanga malemba akwaniritsidwa bwanji amene akuti ziyenera kuchitika motere?”
Matthew26:55 Pa nthawi yomweyo Yesu anati kwa gululo
Matthew26:56 Koma zonsezi zachitika kuti zolembedwa ndi aneneri zikwaniritsidwe.” Pamenepo ophunzira anamusiya nathawa.
Matthew26:57 Iwo amene anamugwira Yesu anamutengera kwa Kayafa
Matthew26:58 Koma Petro anamutsatira Iye patali
Matthew26:59 Akulu a ansembe ndi akulu olamulira Ayuda amafunafuna umboni wonama wofuna kuphera Yesu.
Matthew26:60 Koma sanathe kupeza uliwonse
Matthew26:61 Ndipo zinati
Matthew26:62 Pamenepo mkulu wa ansembe anayimirira nati kwa Yesu
Matthew26:63 Koma Yesu anakhalabe chete. Mkulu wa ansembe anati kwa Iye
Matthew26:64 Yesu anayankha nati
Matthew26:65 Pamenepo mkulu wa ansembe anangʼamba zovala zake nati
Matthew26:66 Mukuganiza bwanji?” Iwo anayankha kuti
Matthew26:67 Kenaka anamulavulira kumaso namumenya ndi zibakera. Ena anamumenya makofi.
Matthew26:68 Ndipo anati
Matthew26:69 Tsopano Petro anakhala ku bwalo la nyumbayo
Matthew26:70 Koma iye anakana pamaso pawo nati
Matthew26:71 Kenaka anachoka kupita ku khomo la mpanda
Matthew26:72 Iye anakananso molumbira kuti
Matthew26:73 Patapita kanthawi pangʼono
Matthew26:74 Pamenepo anayamba kudzitemberera ndipo analumbira kwa iwo nati
Matthew26:75 Ndipo Petro anakumbukira mawu amene Yesu anayankhula kuti
Matthew27:1 Mmamawa
Matthew27:2 Anamumanga
Matthew27:3 Yudasi
Matthew27:4 Iye anati
Matthew27:5 Pamenepo Yudasi anaponya ndalamazo mʼNyumba ya Mulungu nachoka. Kenaka anapita nakadzimangirira.
Matthew27:6 Akulu a ansembe anatola ndalamazo nati
Matthew27:7 Choncho anagwirizana kuti ndalamazo azigwiritse ntchito pogulira munda wa wowumba mbiya kuti ukhale manda alendo.
Matthew27:8 Ndi chifukwa chake umatchedwa munda wamagazi mpaka lero lino.
Matthew27:9 Pamenepo zimene anayankhula mneneri Yeremiya zinakwaniritsidwa kuti
Matthew27:10 Ndipo anazigwiritsa ntchito kugula munda wa wowumba mbiya monga mmene Ambuye anandilamulira ine.”
Matthew27:11 Pa nthawi yomweyo Yesu anayimirira pamaso pa bwanamkubwa ndipo bwanamkubwayo anamufunsa Iye kuti
Matthew27:12 Pamene akulu a ansembe ndi akuluakulu ankamuneneza
Matthew27:13 Kenaka Pilato anamufunsa Iye kuti
Matthew27:14 Koma Yesu sanayankhe ngakhale mawu amodzi mpaka bwanamkubwa anadabwa kwambiri.
Matthew27:15 Pa nthawiyi chinali chizolowezi cha bwanamkubwa kuti pachikondwerero cha Paska amamasula wamʼndende wosankhidwa ndi anthu.
Matthew27:16 Pa nthawiyo anali ndi wamʼndende woyipa kwambiri dzina lake Baraba.
Matthew27:17 Gulu la anthu litasonkhana
Matthew27:18 Pakuti anadziwa kuti anamupereka Yesu chifukwa cha kaduka.
Matthew27:19 Pamene Pilato anakhala pa mpando woweruza
Matthew27:20 Koma akulu a ansembe ndi akuluakulu ananyengerera gulu la anthu kuti apemphe Baraba ndi kuti Yesu aphedwe.
Matthew27:21 Bwanamkubwayo anafunsa kuti
Matthew27:22 Pilato anafunsa kuti
Matthew27:23 Pilato anafunsa kuti
Matthew27:24 Pilato ataona kuti samaphulapo kanthu
Matthew27:25 Anthu onse anayankha nati
Matthew27:26 Pamenepo anawamasulira Baraba koma analamula kuti Yesu akakwapulidwe
Matthew27:27 Pamenepo asilikali abwanamkubwayo anamutenga nalowa naye ku bwalo la milandu ndipo anasonkhanitsa gulu lonse la asilikali namuzungulira Iye.
Matthew27:28 Anamuvula malaya ake namuveka Iye malaya ofiira aufumu.
Matthew27:29 Ndipo kenaka analuka chipewa chaminga nachiyika pa mutu pake. Anamugwiritsa ndodo mʼdzanja lake lamanja nagwada pamaso pake namuchitira chipongwe nati
Matthew27:30 Anamuthira malovu ndipo anatenga ndodo namumenya nayo pa mutu mobwerezabwereza.
Matthew27:31 Atamaliza kumuchitira chipongwe
Matthew27:32 Pamene gululi linkatuluka ndi Yesu
Matthew27:33 Anafika ku malo wotchedwa Gologota amene atanthauza kuti malo a bade la mutu.
Matthew27:34 Pamenepo anamupatsa vinyo wosakaniza ndi ndulu kuti amwe; koma atalawa anakana kumwa.
Matthew27:35 Atamupachika Iye
Matthew27:36 Ndipo anakhala pansi namulonda Iye.
Matthew27:37 Pamwamba pa mutu wake analembapo mawu osonyeza mlandu wake akuti
Matthew27:38 Achifwamba awiri anapachikidwa pamodzi ndi Iye
Matthew27:39 Ndipo amene amadutsa anamunenera mawu a chipongwe
Matthew27:40 Ndipo anati
Matthew27:41 Chimodzimodzinso akulu a ansembe
Matthew27:42 Iwo anati
Matthew27:43 Amadalira Mulungu
Matthew27:44 Momwemonso mbala zimene zinapachikidwa naye pamodzi zinamuneneranso zachipongwe.
Matthew27:45 Kuyambira 12 koloko masana mpaka 3 koloko
Matthew27:46 Ndipo nthawi ili ngati 3 koloko
Matthew27:47 Ena a oyimirira pamalopo atamva izi anati
Matthew27:48 Mmodzi wa iwo anathamanga natenga chinkhupule. Anachidzaza ndi vinyo wosasa
Matthew27:49 Koma ena onse anati
Matthew27:50 Ndipo pamene Yesu analiranso mofuwula
Matthew27:51 Pa nthawi imeneyo chinsalu chotchinga cha mʼNyumba ya Mulungu chinangʼambika pakati kuyambira pamwamba mpaka pansi. Dziko linagwedezeka ndipo miyala inangʼambika.
Matthew27:52 Manda anatsekuka ndipo mitembo yambiri ya anthu oyera mtima amene anafa inaukitsidwa.
Matthew27:53 Anatuluka mʼmanda mwawo
Matthew27:54 Mkulu wa asilikali ndi amene ankalondera Yesu ataona chivomerezi ndi zonse zinachitika
Matthew27:55 Amayi ambirimbiri amene ankasamalira Yesu ankaonerera ali patali. Iwo anamutsatira Yesu kuchokera ku Galileya.
Matthew27:56 Pakati pawo panali Mariya wa ku Magadala
Matthew27:57 Pamene kumada
Matthew27:58 Anapita kwa Pilato kukapempha mtembo wa Yesu
Matthew27:59 Yosefe anatenga mtembowo
Matthew27:60 Ndipo anawuyika mʼmanda ake atsopano amene anasema mu thanthwe
Matthew27:61 Mariya wa Magadala ndi Mariya wina anakhala pansi moyangʼanizana ndi mandawo.
Matthew27:62 Litapita tsiku lokonzekera Sabata
Matthew27:63 Iwo anati
Matthew27:64 Choncho lamulirani kuti manda ake atetezedwe mpaka pa tsiku lachitatu. Chifukwa tikapanda kutero
Matthew27:65 Pilato anayankha kuti
Matthew27:66 Tsono anapita nakatseka manda kolimba ndi kuyikapo chizindikiro ndipo anayikapo mlonda.
Matthew28:1 Litapita tsiku la Sabata
Matthew28:2 Kunachitika chivomerezi chachikulu
Matthew28:3 Maonekedwe ake anali ngati mphenzi ndipo zovala zake zinali mbuu ngati matalala.
Matthew28:4 Alondawo anachita naye mantha kwambiri kotero kuti ananjenjemera ndi kuwuma ngati akufa.
Matthew28:5 Mngelo anati kwa amayiwo
Matthew28:6 Iye muno mulibe
Matthew28:7 Ndipo pitani msanga kawuzeni ophunzira ake kuti
Matthew28:8 Pamenepo amayiwo anachoka mofulumira ku mandako ali ndi mantha komabe atadzaza ndi chimwemwe
Matthew28:9 Mwadzidzidzi Yesu anakumana nawo nati
Matthew28:10 Ndipo Yesu anawawuza kuti
Matthew28:11 Amayi aja akupita
Matthew28:12 Akulu a ansembe atakumana ndi akuluakulu anapangana zochita. Anapatsa alonda aja ndalama zambiri
Matthew28:13 nawawuza kuti
Matthew28:14 Ngati nkhani iyi imupeze bwanamkubwa
Matthew28:15 Pamenepo alondawo anatenga ndalamazo nachita monga mmene anawuzidwira. Ndipo mbiri iyi inawanda pakati pa Ayuda mpaka lero lino.
Matthew28:16 Ndipo ophunzira khumi ndi mmodzi aja anapita ku Galileya
Matthew28:17 Atamuona Iye
Matthew28:18 Kenaka Yesu anabwera kwa iwo nati
Matthew28:19 Chifukwa chake
Matthew28:20 ndi kuwaphunzitsa amvere zonse zimene ndinakulamulirani. Ndipo onani
Mark1:1 Chiyambi cha Uthenga Wabwino wa Yesu Khristu
Mark1:2 monga zalembedwera mʼbuku la mneneri Yesaya: “Ine ndidzatuma mthenga wanga patsogolo panu
Mark1:3 “Mawu a wofuwula mʼchipululu
Mark1:4 Ndipo Yohane anabwera mʼmadera a mʼchipululu nabatiza
Mark1:5 Madera onse a ku Yudeya ndi anthu onse a ku Yerusalemu anatuluka napita kwa iye. Akavomereza machimo awo
Mark1:6 Yohane amavala zovala zopangidwa ndi ubweya wangamira
Mark1:7 Ndipo uthenga wake unali uwu: “Pambuyo panga pakubwera wina wondiposa ine mphamvu. Ine si woyenera kuwerama ndi kumasula zingwe za nsapato zake.
Mark1:8 Ine ndikubatizani ndi madzi
Mark1:9 Pa nthawi imeneyo Yesu anabwera kuchokera ku Nazareti wa ku Galileya ndipo anabatizidwa ndi Yohane mu mtsinje wa Yorodani.
Mark1:10 Pamene Yesu ankatuluka mʼmadzi
Mark1:11 Ndipo Mawu anamveka kuchokera kumwamba: “Iwe ndiwe Mwana wanga wokondedwa; ndipo ndikondwera nawe.”
Mark1:12 Nthawi yomweyo Mzimu Woyera anamutumiza Iye ku chipululu
Mark1:13 ndipo anali mʼchipululumo masiku makumi anayi
Mark1:14 Yohane atamutsekera mʼndende
Mark1:15 “Nthawi yafika
Mark1:16 Pamene Yesu ankayenda mʼmbali mwa nyanja ya Galileya
Mark1:17 Yesu anati
Mark1:18 Nthawi yomweyo anasiya makoka awo namutsata Iye.
Mark1:19 Atapita patsogolo pangʼono
Mark1:20 Mosataya nthawi anawayitana
Mark1:21 Iwo anapita ku Kaperenawo
Mark1:22 Anthu anadabwa ndi chiphunzitso chake
Mark1:23 Pomwepo munthu wina mʼsunagogemo amene anali wogwidwa ndi mzimu woyipa anafuwula kuti
Mark1:24 “Mukufuna chiyani kwa ife
Mark1:25 Yesu anadzudzula chiwandacho mwamphamvu nati
Mark1:26 Mzimu woyipawo unamugwedeza mwamphamvu ndipo unatuluka mwa iye ukufuwula.
Mark1:27 Anthu anadabwa kwambiri kotero kuti anafunsana wina ndi mnzake kuti
Mark1:28 Mbiri yake inafalikira kudera lonse la Galileya mofulumira.
Mark1:29 Atangochoka mu sunagoge
Mark1:30 Mpongozi wa Simoni anali chigonere akudwala malungo
Mark1:31 Ndipo Yesu anapita kwa iye
Mark1:32 Madzulo omwewo dzuwa litalowa anthu anabweretsa kwa Yesu anthu onse odwala ndi ogwidwa ndi ziwanda.
Mark1:33 Anthu onse a mʼmudzimo anasonkhana pa khomo
Mark1:34 Yesu anachiritsa ambiri amene anali ndi matenda osiyanasiyana
Mark1:35 Mmamawa
Mark1:36 Simoni ndi anzake anapita kokamufunafuna Iye
Mark1:37 ndipo atamupeza
Mark1:38 Yesu anayakha kuti
Mark1:39 Potero anayendayenda mu Galileya
Mark1:40 Munthu wakhate anabwera kwa Iye
Mark1:41 Yesu pomva naye chifundo
Mark1:42 Nthawi yomweyo khate linachoka ndipo anachiritsidwa.
Mark1:43 Nthawi yomweyo Yesu anamuwuza kuti apite koma anamuchenjeza kuti
Mark1:44 “Wonetsetsa kuti usawuze aliyense za zimenezi. Koma pita
Mark1:45 Mʼmalo mwake anapita nayamba kuyankhula momasuka
Mark2:1 Patapita masiku pangʼono
Mark2:2 Choncho anthu ambiri anasonkhana kotero kuti panalibenso malo
Mark2:3 Amuna anayi anabwera
Mark2:4 Popeza sakanatha kufika naye kwa Yesu chifukwa cha gulu la anthu
Mark2:5 Yesu ataona chikhulupiriro chawo
Mark2:6 Ndipo ena mwa aphunzitsi amalamulo anakhala pansi pomwepo
Mark2:7 “Nʼchifukwa chiyani munthuyu ayankhula chotere? Iye akuchitira mwano Mulungu! Ndani angakhululukire munthu machimo kupatula Mulungu yekha?”
Mark2:8 Nthawi yomweyo Yesu anadziwa mu mzimu wake kuti izi ndi zimene ankaganiza mʼmitima yawo
Mark2:9 Chapafupi nʼchiyani; kunena kwa wofa ziwaloyu kuti
Mark2:10 Koma kuti mudziwe kuti Mwana wa Munthu ali ndi ulamuliro pa dziko lapansi wokhululukira machimo.” Anati kwa wofa ziwaloyo
Mark2:11 “Ndikuwuza iwe
Mark2:12 Anayimirira
Mark2:13 Yesu anatulukanso napita kumbali ya nyanja. Gulu lalikulu la anthu linabwera kwa Iye
Mark2:14 Pamene ankayendabe
Mark2:15 Yesu atakalandira chakudya ku nyumba kwa Levi
Mark2:16 Pamene aphunzitsi amalamulo a Afarisi anamuona akudya ndi “ochimwa” ndi amisonkho
Mark2:17 Yesu atamva zimenezi
Mark2:18 Ndipo ophunzira a Yohane ndi a Afarisi amasala kudya. Anthu ena anabwera kwa Yesu namufunsa kuti
Mark2:19 Yesu anayankha nati
Mark2:20 Koma nthawi idzafika pamene mkwati adzachotsedwa pakati pawo
Mark2:21 “Palibe amene amasokerera chigamba chatsopano pa chovala chakale. Ngati atatero
Mark2:22 Ndipo palibe amene amathira vinyo watsopano mʼmatumba akale a vinyo. Ngati atatero
Mark2:23 Tsiku lina la Sabata
Mark2:24 Afarisi anati kwa Iye
Mark2:25 Iye anayankha kuti
Mark2:26 Pa nthawi ya Abiatara mkulu wa ansembe
Mark2:27 Pamenepo anawawuza kuti
Mark2:28 Choncho Mwana wa Munthu ali Ambuye ngakhale wa Sabata.”
Mark3:1 Nthawi inanso analowa mʼsunagoge
Mark3:2 Ena a iwo anafunafuna chifukwa chakuti akamuneneze Yesu
Mark3:3 Yesu anati kwa munthu wolumala dzanjayo
Mark3:4 Ndipo Yesu anawafunsa kuti
Mark3:5 Yesu anawayangʼana ndi mkwiyo ndipo powawidwa mtima chifukwa cha mitima yawo yowuma anati kwa munthuyo
Mark3:6 Kenaka Afarisi anatuluka nayamba kukonza chiwembu ndi Aherode mmene angamuphere Yesu.
Mark3:7 Yesu anachoka pamodzi ndi ophunzira ake napita ku nyanja
Mark3:8 Atamva zonse zimene amachita
Mark3:9 Chifukwa cha gulu la anthu
Mark3:10 Pakuti anachiritsa ambiri
Mark3:11 Nthawi iliyonse mizimu yoyipa ikamuona
Mark3:12 Koma anayichenjeza mwamphamvu kuti isanene kuti Iye anali ndani.
Mark3:13 Yesu anakwera ku phiri ndipo anayitana amene anawafuna
Mark3:14 Iye anasankha khumi ndi awiri
Mark3:15 ndi kuti akhale ndi ulamuliro wotulutsa ziwanda.
Mark3:16 Awa ndi khumi ndi awiri amene anawasankha: Simoni (amene anapatsidwa dzina lakuti Petro);
Mark3:17 Yakobo mwana wa Zebedayo
Mark3:18 Andreya
Mark3:19 ndi Yudasi Isikarioti
Mark3:20 Pambuyo pake Yesu analowa mʼnyumba
Mark3:21 Anthu a ku banja lake atamva zimenezi
Mark3:22 Ndipo aphunzitsi amalamulo omwe anachokera ku Yerusalemu anati
Mark3:23 Pamenepo Yesu anawayitana nawayankhula mʼmafanizo nati: “Kodi Satana angatulutse bwanji Satana?
Mark3:24 Ngati ufumu ugawanikana mwa iwo okha
Mark3:25 Ngati nyumba igawanikana mwa iyo yokha
Mark3:26 Ndipo ngati Satana adzitsutsa yekha sangathe kuyima; ulamuliro wake watha.
Mark3:27 Kunena zoona
Mark3:28 Ndikukuwuzani zoona kuti machimo onse ndi zamwano zonse za anthu zidzakhululukidwa
Mark3:29 koma aliyense amene achitira mwano Mzimu Woyera sadzakhululukidwa pakuti wachita tchimo losatha.”
Mark3:30 Ananena izi chifukwa anati
Mark3:31 Pamenepo amayi ndi abale ake a Yesu anafika. Atayima kunja
Mark3:32 Gulu la anthu linakhala momuzungulira Iye
Mark3:33 Iye anafunsa kuti
Mark3:34 Pamenepo anayangʼana anthu amene anakhala momuzungurira ndipo anati
Mark3:35 Aliyense amene achita chifuniro cha Mulungu ndi mʼbale wanga ndi mlongo wanga ndi amayi anga.”

Mark6:6 Ndipo Iye anadabwa chifukwa chakusowa chikhulupiriro kwawo. Pamenepo Yesu anayenda mudzi ndi mudzi kuphunzitsa.

Mark6:21 Pomaliza mpata unapezeka. Pa tsiku lokumbukira kubadwa kwake

Mark6:28 nabweretsa mutuwo mʼmbale. Anawupereka kwa mtsikanayo

Mark6:33 Koma ambiri amene anawaona akuchoka anawazindikira ndipo anathamanga wapansi kuchokera mʼmidzi yonse nakayambirira kufika.
Mark6:34 Yesu atafika ku mtunda ndi kuona gulu lalikulu la anthu
Mark6:35 Pa nthawi iyi nʼkuti dzuwa litapendeka
Mark6:36 Awuzeni anthuwa azipita ku midzi ndi madera ozungulira
Mark6:37 Koma Iye anayankha kuti
Mark6:38 Iye anawafunsa kuti
Mark6:39 Pamenepo Yesu anawalamulira kuti awakhazike anthu pansi mʼmagulu pa msipu obiriwira.
Mark6:40 Ndipo anakhala pansi mʼmagulu a anthu 100 ndi gulu la anthu makumi asanu.
Mark6:41 Atatenga malofu a buledi asanu ndi nsomba ziwiri
Mark6:42 Onse anadya ndipo anakhuta

Mark6:44 Chiwerengero cha amuna amene anadya chinali 5

Mark9:8 Mwadzidzidzi

Mark9:12 Yesu anayankha kuti
Mark9:13 Koma ndikuwuzani

Mark9:19 Yesu anayankha kuti
Mark9:20 Ndipo anamubweretsa kwa Iye. Mzimu woyipawo utaona Yesu
Mark9:21 Yesu anafunsa abambo a mnyamatayo kuti
Mark9:22 wakhala ukumuponya pa moto kapena mʼmadzi kuti umuphe. Koma ngati mungathe kuchita kanthu
Mark9:23 Yesu anati
Mark9:24 Nthawi yomweyo abambo a mwanayo anafuwula kuti
Mark9:25 Yesu ataona kuti gulu la anthu likuthamangira kumalowo
Mark9:26 Mzimuwo unafuwula ndi kumugubuduza kwambiri ndipo unatuluka. Mnyamatayo anaoneka ngati mtembo ndipo ambiri anati
Mark9:27 Koma Yesu anamugwira dzanja ndipo anamuyimiritsa
Mark9:28 Yesu atalowa mʼnyumba
Mark9:29 Iye anayankha kuti
Mark9:30 Anachoka malo amenewo nadutsa ku Galileya. Yesu sanafune kuti wina aliyense adziwe kumene anali

Mark9:32 Koma sanazindikire chimene amatanthauza
Mark9:33 Anafika ku Kaperenawo. Pamene anali mʼnyumba
Mark9:34 Koma anakhala chete chifukwa ali mʼnjira amatsutsana za kuti wamkulu kuposa onse ndani.
Mark9:35 Atakhala pansi
Mark9:36 Anatenga kamwana nakayimiritsa pakati pawo ndipo anawawuza kuti
Mark9:37 “Aliyense wolandira mmodzi wa ana angʼono awa mʼdzina langa alandira Ine; ndipo aliyense wolandira Ine salandira Ine koma amene anandituma.”
Mark9:38 Yohane anati
Mark9:39 Yesu anati
Mark9:40 pakuti aliyense amene satsutsana nafe ali mbali yathu.
Mark9:41 Zoonadi
Mark9:42 “Ndipo ngati wina aliyense achimwitsa mmodzi wa ana angʼono awa amene akhulupirira Ine
Mark9:43 Ngati dzanja lako likuchimwitsa
Mark9:44 (Kumene mphutsi zake sizifa ndipo moto wake suzima).
Mark9:45 Ndipo ngati phazi lako likuchimwitsa
Mark9:46 (Kumene mphutsi zake sizifa ndipo moto wake suzima).
Mark9:47 Ndipo ngati diso lako likuchimwitsa
Mark9:48 kumene “ ‘mphutsi zake sizifa ndipo moto wake suzima.’
