Luke1:4 kuti mudziwe bwinobwino zoona za zinthu zimene mwaphunzitsidwa.
Luke1:5 Mʼmasiku a Herode
Luke1:6 Onse awiri anali olungama pamaso pa Mulungu
Luke1:7 Koma analibe ana chifukwa Elizabeti anali wosabereka; ndipo onse anali okalamba.
Luke1:8 Nthawi yogwira ntchito yotumikira ansembe a gulu la Zekariya
Luke1:9 Zakariyayo anasankhidwa mwa maere
Luke1:10 Ndipo nthawi yofukiza lubani itafika
Luke1:11 Kenaka mngelo wa Ambuye anaonekera kwa iye
Luke1:12 Zakariya ataona mngeloyo
Luke1:13 Koma mngeloyo anati kwa iye: “Usachite mantha
Luke1:14 Ndipo adzakhala chimwemwe ndi chisangalalo kwa iwe
Luke1:15 chifukwa adzakhala wamkulu pamaso pa Ambuye. Iye sadzamwa vinyo kapena chakumwa choledzeretsa
Luke1:16 Iye adzabweretsanso Aisraeli ambiri kwa Ambuye Mulungu wawo.
Luke1:17 Ndipo iye adzabwera Ambuye asanabwere mu mzimu ndi mphamvu ya Eliya. Adzatembenuzira mitima ya abambo kwa ana awo ndi osamvera ku nzeru ya olungama
Luke1:18 Zakariya anamufunsa mngeloyo kuti
Luke1:19 Mngeloyo anayankha kuti
Luke1:20 Ndipo kuyambira tsopano sudzatha kuyankhula kufikira izi zitachitika chifukwa sunakhulupirire mawu awa
Luke1:21 Pa nthawiyi
Luke1:22 Atatuluka sanathe kuyankhulana nawo. Anazindikira kuti anaona masomphenya mʼNyumbamo
Luke1:23 Nthawi yake yotumikira itatha
Luke1:24 Zitatha izi
Luke1:25 Iye anati
Luke1:26 Mwezi wachisanu ndi chimodzi
Luke1:27 kwa namwali wopalidwa ubwenzi ndi Yosefe
Luke1:28 Mngeloyo anafika kwa iye nati
Luke1:29 Mariya anavutika kwambiri ndi mawu awa ndipo anadabwa ndi kulonjera kotere.
Luke1:30 Koma mngeloyo anati kwa iye
Luke1:31 Udzakhala woyembekezera ndipo udzabala mwana wamwamuna ndipo udzamupatse dzina loti Yesu.
Luke1:32 Iye adzakhala wamkulu ndipo adzatchedwa Mwana wa Wammwambamwamba. Ambuye Mulungu adzamupatsa Iye mpando waufumu wa abambo ake Davide
Luke1:33 ndipo adzalamulira pa nyumba ya Yakobo ku nthawi zonse; ufumu wake sudzatha.”
Luke1:34 Mariya anafunsa mngeloyo kuti
Luke1:35 Mngelo anayankha kuti
Luke1:36 Ngakhale Elizabeti mʼbale wako adzakhala ndi mwana mu ukalamba wake ndipo iye amene amati ndi wosabereka
Luke1:37 Pakuti palibe chinthu chosatheka ndi Mulungu.”
Luke1:38 Mariya anayankha kuti
Luke1:39 Nthawi imeneyo anakonzeka ndipo anapita mofulumira ku mudzi wa ku mapiri a dziko la Yudeya
Luke1:40 kumene anakalowa mʼnyumba ya Zakariya nalonjera Elizabeti.
Luke1:41 Elizabeti atamva moni wa Mariya
Luke1:42 Anafuwula ndi mawu akulu kuti
Luke1:43 Koma nʼchifukwa chiyani andikomera mtima kuti amayi a Ambuye anga abwere kwa ine?
Luke1:44 Nthawi yomwe ndinamva mawu akulonjera kwanu
Luke1:45 Wodala iye amene wakhulupirira kuti chimene Ambuye wanena kwa iye chidzakwaniritsidwa!”
Luke1:46 Ndipo Mariya anati: “Moyo wanga ulemekeza Ambuye.
Luke1:47 Ndipo mzimu wanga ukondwera mwa Mulungu Mpulumutsi wanga
Luke1:48 pakuti wakumbukira kudzichepetsa kwa mtumiki wake. Kuyambira tsopano mibado yonse idzanditcha wodala
Luke1:49 pakuti Wamkuluyo wandichitira ine zinthu zazikulu
Luke1:50 Chifundo chake chifikira kwa iwo amene amuopa Iye kufikira mibadomibado.
Luke1:51 Iye wachita zamphamvu ndi dzanja lake; Iye anabalalitsa iwo amene ali onyada mʼmaganizo awo.
Luke1:52 Iye anachotsa olamulira pa mipando yawo yaufumu
Luke1:53 Iye wakhutitsa a njala ndi zinthu zabwino koma anachotsa olemera wopanda kanthu.
Luke1:54 Iye anathandiza mtumiki wake Israeli
Luke1:55 Kwa Abrahamu ndi zidzukulu zake ku nthawi zonse monga ananena kwa makolo athu.”
Luke1:56 Mariya anakhala ndi Elizabeti pafupifupi miyezi itatu ndipo kenaka anabwerera kwawo.
Luke1:57 Itakwana nthawi yoti Elizabeti abereke
Luke1:58 Anansi ndi abale ake anamva kuti Ambuye anamuchitira chifundo chachikulu ndipo anakondwera naye pamodzi.
Luke1:59 Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu anabwera ndi mwana kuti adzachitidwe mdulidwe
Luke1:60 koma amayi ake anayankhula nati
Luke1:61 Iwo anati kwa iye
Luke1:62 Pamenepo anapanga zizindikiro kwa abambo ake kuti adziwe dzina limene akanakonda kumutcha mwanayo.
Luke1:63 Iye anapempha poti alembepo
Luke1:64 Nthawi yomweyo pakamwa pake panatsekuka ndi lilime lake linamasuka ndipo anayamba kuyankhula
Luke1:65 Anansi onse anachita mantha kwambiri
Luke1:66 Aliyense amene anamva izi anadabwa nazo nafunsa kuti
Luke1:67 Abambo ake
Luke1:68 “Alemekezeke Ambuye
Luke1:69 Iye wakweza nyanga yachipulumutso kwa ife mu nyumba ya mtumiki wake Davide.
Luke1:70 (Monga mmene ananenera kudzera mwa aneneri oyera)
Luke1:71 chipulumutso kuchoka kwa adani athu ndi kuchoka mʼdzanja la onse otida
Luke1:72 kuonetsa chifundo kwa makolo athu ndi kukumbukira pangano lake loyera
Luke1:73 lumbiro limene analumbira kwa kholo lathu Abrahamu:
Luke1:74 kutilanditsa ife mʼdzanja la adani athu
Luke1:75 	mʼchiyero ndi mʼchilungamo masiku athu onse.
Luke1:76 “Ndipo iwe mwana wanga udzatchedwa mneneri wa Wammwambamwamba; pakuti udzapita patsogolo pa Ambuye kukonza njira yake
Luke1:77 kupatsa anthu ake chidziwitso cha chipulumutso kudzera mwa chikhululukiro cha machimo awo
Luke1:78 chifukwa cha chifundo chachikulu cha Mulungu wathu
Luke1:79 kuwalira iwo okhala mu mdima ndi mu mthunzi wa imfa
Luke1:80 Ndipo mwanayo anakula nakhala wamphamvu mu mzimu; ndipo anakhala ku chipululu mpaka pamene anaonekera poyera mu Israeli.
Luke2:1 Mʼmasiku amenewo Kaisara Augusto anapereka lamulo kuti kalembera achitike mʼdziko lonse la Aroma.
Luke2:2 (Uyu ndi kalembera woyamba amene anachitika pamene Kureniyo anali bwanamkubwa wa Siriya).
Luke2:3 Ndipo aliyense anapita ku mzinda wa kwawo kukalembetsa.
Luke2:4 Choncho Yosefe anachoka ku Nazareti ku Galileya kupita ku Yudeya
Luke2:5 Iye anapita kumeneko kukalembetsa pamodzi ndi Mariya
Luke2:6 Ali kumeneko
Luke2:7 ndipo anabereka mwana wake woyamba
Luke2:8 Ndipo kunali abusa amene amakhala ku dera lomwelo
Luke2:9 Mngelo wa Ambuye anaonekera kwa iwo ndipo ulemerero wa Ambuye unawala mowazungulira. Iwo anachita mantha.
Luke2:10 Koma mngeloyo anawawuza kuti
Luke2:11 Lero mʼmudzi wa Davide wakubwadwirani Mpulumutsi; Iye ndi Khristu Ambuye.
Luke2:12 Ichi chidzakhala chizindikiro kwa inu: mukapeza mwana wakhanda wokutidwa ndi nsalu atagona modyera ngʼombe.”
Luke2:13 Mwadzidzidzi gulu lalikulu la angelo linaonekera pamodzi ndi mngeloyo
Luke2:14 “Ulemerero kwa Mulungu mmwambamwamba
Luke2:15 Angelowo atabwerera kumwamba
Luke2:16 Ndipo iwo anafulumira nyamuka nakapeza Mariya ndi Yosefe ndi mwana wakhanda
Luke2:17 Pamene anamuona Iye
Luke2:18 ndipo onse amene anamva zimene abusawa ananena anadabwa.
Luke2:19 Koma Mariya anasunga zonsezi mu mtima mwake ndi kumazilingalira.
Luke2:20 Abusa anabwerera
Luke2:21 Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu
Luke2:22 Nthawi yoyeretsedwa kwawo itatha
Luke2:23 (Monga mmene zinalembedwera mu lamulo la Ambuye kuti
Luke2:24 ndi kupereka nsembe posunga zimene zinanenedwa mulamulo la Ambuye: “Njiwa ziwiri kapena mawunda ankhunda awiri.”
Luke2:25 Ndipo taonani
Luke2:26 Mzimu Woyera anamuwululira kuti sadzafa asanaone Khristu wa Ambuye.
Luke2:27 Motsogozedwa ndi Mzimu Woyera
Luke2:28 Simeoni anamunyamula mʼmanja mwake nayamika Mulungu
Luke2:29 “Ambuye waulamuliro
Luke2:30 Pakuti maso anga aona chipulumutso chanu
Luke2:31 chimene Inu munakonza pamaso pa anthu onse
Luke2:32 kuwala kowunikira anthu a mitundu ina ndi kwa ulemerero kwa anthu anu Aisraeli.”
Luke2:33 Abambo ndi amayi a Mwanayo anadabwa chifukwa cha zimene zinanenedwa za Iye.
Luke2:34 Kenaka Simeoni anawadalitsa ndipo anati kwa Mariya amayi ake: “Mwana uyu wakonzedwa kukhala kugwa ndi kudzuka kwa ambiri mu Israeli
Luke2:35 kotero kuti malingaliro a mitima ya ambiri adzawululidwa. Ndipo lupanga lidzabaya moyo wakonso.”
Luke2:36 Panalinso mneneri wamkazi
Luke2:37 ndipo kenaka anakhala wamasiye mpaka pamene anali ndi zaka 84. Iye sanachoke mʼNyumba ya Mulungu koma ankapembedza usiku ndi usana
Luke2:38 Pa nthawiyo pamene ankapita kwa iwo
Luke2:39 Yosefe ndi Mariya atachita zonse zimene zinkafunikira ndi lamulo la Ambuye
Luke2:40 Ndipo Mwanayo anakula nakhala wamphamvu; Iye anadzazidwa ndi nzeru
Luke2:41 Chaka chilichonse makolo ake ankapita ku Yerusalemu ku phwando la Paska.
Luke2:42 Iye ali ndi zaka khumi ndi ziwiri
Luke2:43 Phwando litatha
Luke2:44 Poganiza kuti anali nawo mʼgulu lawo
Luke2:45 Atalephera kumupeza
Luke2:46 Patatha masiku atatu anamupeza ali mʼbwalo la Nyumba ya Mulungu
Luke2:47 Aliyense amene anamumva Iye anadabwa ndi chidziwitso chake ndi mayankho ake.
Luke2:48 Makolo ake atamuona
Luke2:49 Iye anawafunsa kuti
Luke2:50 Koma iwo sanazindikire chomwe Iye amatanthauza.
Luke2:51 Kenaka anapita nawo ku Nazareti ndipo anawamvera iwo. Koma amayi ake anasunga zinthu zonsezi mu mtima mwawo.
Luke2:52 Ndipo Yesu anakula mu nzeru

Luke4:2 kumene anayesedwa ndi mdierekezi masiku makumi anayi. Sanadye kena kalikonse pa masiku amenewo

Luke4:4 Yesu anayankha kuti
Luke4:5 Mdierekezi anamutengera Iye pamalo aatali ndipo mʼkamphindi namuonetsa maufumu onse a dziko lapansi.
Luke4:6 Ndipo anati kwa Iye
Luke4:7 Ngati mutandilambira
Luke4:8 Yesu anayankha kuti

Luke4:10 Pakuti kwalembedwa
Luke4:11 ndipo adzakunyamula ndi manja awo
Luke4:12 Yesu anayankha kuti
Luke4:13 Mdierekezi atamaliza mayesero awa onse
Luke4:14 Yesu anabwerera ku Galileya mu mphamvu ya Mzimu Woyera
Luke4:15 Iye ankaphunzitsa mʼmasunagoge awo
Luke4:16 Iye anapita ku Nazareti
Luke4:17 Anamupatsa buku la mneneri Yesaya. Atalitsekula
Luke4:18 	 “Mzimu wa Ambuye ali pa Ine; chifukwa wandidzoza kuti ndilalikire Uthenga Wabwino kwa osauka. Wandituma kuti ndilalikire kwa a mʼndende kuti amasulidwe ndi kwa osaona kuti apenyenso
Luke4:19 	 ndi kulalikira za nthawi imene Ambuye adzakomere mtima anthu awo.”
Luke4:20 Kenaka Iye anatseka bukulo
Luke4:21 ndipo anawawuza kuti
Luke4:22 Onse anayankhula zabwino za Iye ndipo anadabwa ndi mawu ogwira moyo amene anatuluka mʼkamwa mwake. Iwo anafunsa kuti
Luke4:23 Yesu anawawuza kuti
Luke4:24 Iye anapitiriza kuti
Luke4:25 Ine ndikukutsimikizirani kunali amayi ambiri amasiye mu Israeli mʼnthawi ya Eliya
Luke4:26 Komabe Eliya sanatumidwe kwa mmodzi mwa iwo
Luke4:27 Ndipo kunali akhate ambiri ku Israeli mʼnthawi ya mneneri Elisa
Luke4:28 Anthu onse mʼsunagogemo anapsa mtima atamva izi.
Luke4:29 Anayimirira namutulutsira kunja kwa mzindawo
Luke4:30 Koma Iye anangoyenda pakati pa gulu la anthulo nachokapo.
Luke4:31 Kenaka Iye anapita ku Kaperenawo
Luke4:32 Iwo anadabwa ndi chiphunzitso chake chifukwa uthenga wake unali ndi ulamuliro.
Luke4:33 Mʼsunagogemo munali munthu wogwidwa ndi mzimu woyipa. Iye analira ndi mawu akulu
Luke4:34 “Aa! Kodi mukufuna chiyani kwa ife
Luke4:35 Yesu anachidzudzula kwambiri nati
Luke4:36 Anthu onse anadabwa ndipo anati kwa wina ndi mnzake
Luke4:37 Ndipo mbiri yake inafalikira madera onse ozungulira.
Luke4:38 Yesu anatuluka mʼsunagoge ndipo anapita kwa Simoni. Tsopano mpongozi wake wa Simoni amadwala malungo akulu
Luke4:39 Ndipo anawerama nadzudzula malungowo ndipo anamusiya. Anadzuka nthawi yomweyo nayamba kuwatumikira.
Luke4:40 Pamene dzuwa linkalowa
Luke4:41 Komanso ziwanda zinkatuluka mwa anthu ambiri
Luke4:42 Kutacha
Luke4:43 Koma Iye anati
Luke4:44 Ndipo Iye anapitirirabe kulalikira mʼmasunagoge a ku Yudeya.

Luke5:4 Atatha kuyankhula anati kwa Simoni
Luke5:5 Simoni anayankha kuti
Luke5:6 Atachita izi

Luke5:8 Simoni Petro ataona izi
Luke5:9 Iye ndi anzake onse anadabwa ndi nsomba zimene anagwira
Luke5:10 chimodzimodzinso Yakobo ndi Yohane
Luke5:11 Kenaka anakokera mabwato awo ku mtunda
Luke5:12 Yesu ali ku mudzi wina
Luke5:13 Yesu anatambasula dzanja lake namukhudza munthuyo. Iye anati
Luke5:14 Kenaka Yesu anamulamula kuti

Luke5:20 Yesu ataona chikhulupiriro chawo
Luke5:21 Afarisi ndi aphunzitsi amalamulo anayamba kuganiza mwa iwo okha kuti
Luke5:22 Yesu anadziwa zomwe iwo amaganiza ndipo anafunsa kuti

Luke5:26 Aliyense anadabwa ndi kuchita mantha ndipo anayamika Mulungu. Iwo anadabwa kwambiri ndipo anati
Luke5:27 Zitatha izi
Luke5:28 Ndipo Levi anayimirira

Luke5:30 Koma Afarisi ndi aphunzitsi amalamulo amene anali a gulu lawo anadandaula kwa ophunzira ake
Luke5:31 Yesu anawayankha kuti
Luke5:32 Ine sindinabwere kudzayitana olungama
Luke5:33 Iwo anati kwa Iye
Luke5:34 Yesu anawayankha kuti
Luke5:35 Koma nthawi ikubwera pamene mkwati adzachotsedwa pakati pawo. Masiku amenewo adzasala kudya.”

Luke5:38 Ayi

Luke6:5 Kenaka Yesu anawawuza kuti

Luke6:40 Wophunzira sangapose mphunzitsi wake
Luke6:41 “Kodi ndi chifukwa chiyani mumaona kachitsotso mʼdiso la mʼbale wanu ndi kusasamala mtengo uli mʼdiso mwanu?
Luke6:42 Kodi munganene bwanji kwa mʼbale wanu kuti
Luke6:43 Palibe mtengo wabwino umene umabala chipatso choyipa
Luke6:44 Mtengo uliwonse umadziwika ndi chipatso chake. Anthu sathyola nkhuyu pa mtengo waminga
Luke6:45 Munthu wabwino amatulutsa zinthu zabwino zosungidwa mu mtima mwake

Luke6:47 Ine ndidzakuonetsani mmene alili munthu amene amabwera kwa Ine ndi kumva mawu anga ndi kuwachita.
Luke6:48 Iye ali ngati munthu womanga nyumba
Luke6:49 Koma amene amamva mawu anga koma osawachita
Luke7:1 Yesu atamaliza kunena zonsezi pamaso pa anthu amene ankamvetsera
Luke7:2 Kumeneko wantchito wa Kenturiyo

Luke7:4 Iwo atafika kwa Yesu
Luke7:5 chifukwa amakonda mtundu wathu ndipo anatimangira sunagoge wathu.”
Luke7:6 Pamenepo Yesu anapita nawo. Iye sanali patali ndi nyumba pamene Kenturiyo anatumiza anzake kuti akamuwuze kuti
Luke7:7 Nʼchifukwa chake sindinadziyenereze ndi pangʼono pomwe kuti ndibwere kwa inu. Koma nenani mawu
Luke7:8 Pakuti ndili pansi paulamuliro
Luke7:9 Yesu atamva izi
Luke7:10 Kenaka anthu amene anatumidwawo anabwerera ku nyumba ndipo anakamupeza wantchitoyo atachira.
Luke7:11 Zitangotha izi
Luke7:12 Akufika pa chipata cha mudziwo
Luke7:13 Ambuye atamuona mayiyo

Luke7:16 Onse anachita mantha kwambiri nalemekeza Mulungu. Iwo anati
Luke7:17 Mbiriyi inafalikira ku Yudeya konse ndi ku madera ozungulira.

Luke7:19 anawatumiza kwa Ambuye kukafunsa kuti
Luke7:20 Anthuwo atafika kwa Yesu anati
Luke7:21 Pa nthawi yomweyo
Luke7:22 Ndipo Iye anawayankha otumidwawo kuti
Luke7:23 Odala munthu amene sakhumudwa chifukwa cha Ine.”

Luke7:25 Ngati si choncho

Luke7:29 Anthu onse
Luke7:30 Koma Afarisi ndi akatswiri amalamulo anakana cholinga cha Mulungu kwa iwo okha

Luke7:34 Mwana wa Munthu anabwera nadya ndi kumwa
Luke7:35 Ndipo nzeru zimaoneka zolondola mwa ana ake onse.”
Luke7:36 Tsopano mmodzi mwa Afarisi anayitana Yesu kuti akadye naye ku nyumba kwake ndipo anapita nakakhala pa tebulo.

Luke7:39 Mfarisiyo anamuyitanayo ataona izi

Luke12:30 Pakuti anthu akunja amathamanga kufunafuna zinthu zotere
Luke12:31 Koma funafunani ufumu wake
Luke12:32 “Musachite mantha
Luke12:33 Gulitsani zonse zimene muli nazo
Luke12:34 Popeza kumene kuli chuma chanu
Luke12:35 “Khalani okonzekeratu ndipo nyale zanu ziziyaka
Luke12:36 ngati anthu oyembekezera kubwera kwa mbuye wawo kuchokera kuphwando la ukwati
Luke12:37 Zidzakhala bwino kwa antchitowo amene mbuye wawo pobwera adzawapeze akudikira. Zoonadi
Luke12:38 Zidzakhala bwino kwa antchitowo amene mbuye wawo adzawapeze ali okonzeka
Luke12:39 Koma zindikirani izi: Ngati mwini nyumba akanadziwa ora limene mbala ibwera
Luke12:40 Inunso muyenera kukhala okonzeka
Luke12:41 Petro anafunsa kuti
Luke12:42 Ambuye anayankha kuti
Luke12:43 Zidzamukhalira bwino wantchito amene mbuye wake adzamupeza akuchita zimene pamene iye abwera.
Luke12:44 Zoonadi
Luke12:45 Koma tiyerekeze kuti wantchitoyo aziganiza mu mtima mwake kuti
Luke12:46 Mbuye wake adzabwera tsiku limene iye sakumuyembekezera ndi ora limene iye sakudziwa. Iye adzamulanga ndi kumusiya kumalo kumene kuli osakhulupirira.
Luke12:47 “Wantchito amene amadziwa chifuniro cha mbuye wake koma wosakonzeka kapena wosachita chimene mbuye wake akufuna adzakwapulidwa zikwapu zambiri.
Luke12:48 Koma wantchito amene sadziwa koma nʼkuchita zinthu zoyenera chilango
Luke12:49 “Ine ndabwera kudzayatsa moto pa dziko lapansi
Luke12:50 Koma Ine ndiyenera kubatizidwa
Luke12:51 Kodi mukuganiza kuti Ine ndinabwera kudzabweretsa mtendere pa dziko lapansi? Ayi
Luke12:52 Kuyambira tsopano mpaka mʼtsogolo mʼbanja limodzi mudzakhala anthu asanu ndipo adzawukirana wina ndi mnzake
Luke12:53 Anthu adzawukirana. Abambo kudzawukira mwana wawo wamwamuna
Luke12:54 Iye anati kwa gulu la anthu
Luke12:55 Ndipo pamene mphepo yakummwera ikuwomba
Luke12:56 Achiphamaso inu! Inu mumadziwa kutanthauzira maonekedwe a dziko lapansi ndi thambo. Zikutheka bwanji kuti simukudziwa kumasulira kwa nthawi ino?
Luke12:57 “Bwanji simukuzindikira nokha zoyenera kuchita?
Luke12:58 Pamene mukupita kwa woweruza ndi amene munalakwirana naye
Luke12:59 Ine ndikuwuzani kuti
Luke13:1 Nthawi yomweyo panali ena amene analipo omwe amamuwuza Yesu za Agalileya amene magazi awo Pilato anawasakaniza ndi nsembe zawo.
Luke13:2 Yesu anayankha kuti
Luke13:3 Ine ndikuti
Luke13:4 Kapena anthu 18 aja amene anafa nsanja ya Siloamu itawagwera
Luke13:5 Ine ndikuti
Luke13:6 Kenaka Iye anawawuza fanizo kuti
Luke13:7 Tsono kwa munthu amene amasamalira munda wamphesawo anati
Luke13:8 “Munthuyo anayankha kuti
Luke13:9 Ngati udzabale zipatso chaka chamawa
Luke13:10 Pa Sabata Yesu ankaphunzitsa mʼsunagoge ina
Luke13:11 ndipo momwemo munali mayi amene anali ndi mzimu woyipa umene unamudwalitsa zaka 18. Iye anali wokhota msana ndipo samatha kuweramuka ndi pangʼono pomwe.
Luke13:12 Yesu atamuona anamuyitana kutsogolo ndipo anati kwa iye
Luke13:13 Kenaka anasanjika manja ake pa iye
Luke13:14 Chifukwa cha kuyipidwa kuti Yesu anachiritsa pa Sabata
Luke13:15 Ambuye anamuyankha kuti
Luke13:16 Nanga mayiyu
Luke13:17 Atanena izi
Luke13:18 Kenaka Yesu anafunsa kuti
Luke13:19 Uli ngati mbewu ya mpiru
Luke13:20 Iye anafunsanso kuti
Luke13:21 Uli ngati yisiti amene mayi anatenga ndi kusakaniza ndi ufa wambiri mpaka anafufumitsa ufawo.”
Luke13:22 Ndipo Yesu anayendayenda mʼmizinda ndi mʼmidzi
Luke13:23 Wina anamufunsa Iye kuti
Luke13:24 “Yesetsani kulowa pa khomo lopapatiza
Luke13:25 Nthawi yomwe mwini nyumba adzayimirira ndi kutseka chitseko
Luke13:26 “Ndipo inu mudzati
Luke13:27 “Koma Iye adzayankha kuti
Luke13:28 “Mudzalira ndi kukuta mano mukadzaona Abrahamu

Luke13:30 Ndithudi otsirizira ndiye adzakhale oyambirira

Luke13:32 Iye anayankha kuti
Luke13:33 Mʼnjira ina iliyonse
Luke13:34 Iwe Yerusalemu
Luke13:35 Taona
Luke14:1 Pa tsiku lina la Sabata
Luke14:2 Poteropo
Luke14:3 Yesu anafunsa Afarisi ndi akatswiri amalamulo kuti
Luke14:4 Koma iwo sanayankhe. Tsono atamutenga munthuyo
Luke14:5 Kenaka Iye anawafunsa kuti
Luke14:6 Ndipo iwo analibe choyankha.
Luke14:7 Iye ataona momwe alendo amasankhira malo aulemu pa tebulo
Luke14:8 “Pamene wina wakuyitanani ku phwando la ukwati
Luke14:9 Ngati zitatero
Luke14:10 Koma akakuyitanani
Luke14:11 Pakuti aliyense wodzikuza adzamuchepetsa
Luke14:12 Kenaka Yesu anati kwa mwini malo uja
Luke14:13 Koma ukakonza phwando
Luke14:14 Pamenepo udzakhala wodala
Luke14:15 Mmodzi mwa amene amadya naye atamva izi
Luke14:16 Yesu anayankha kuti
Luke14:17 Nthawi yaphwando itakwana anatuma wantchito wake kuti akawuze onse amene anayitanidwa kuti
Luke14:18 “Koma onse anayamba kupereka zifukwa mofanana. Woyamba anati
Luke14:19 “Wina anati
Luke14:20 “Wina anatinso
Luke14:21 “Wantchitoyo anabwera ndikudzamuwuza bwana wakeyo zimenezi. Pamenepo mphwandoyo anapsa mtima ndipo analamula wantchito wakeyo kuti
Luke14:22 “Wantchitoyo anati
Luke14:23 “Ndipo mbuye uja anawuza wantchito wake kuti
Luke14:24 Ine ndikukuwuzani inu kuti palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe mwa anthu amene anayitanidwa adzalawa phwandolo.’ ”
Luke14:25 Gulu lalikulu la anthu linkayenda naye Yesu ndipo atatembenukira kwa iwo anati
Luke14:26 “Ngati wina aliyense abwera kwa Ine ndipo sadana ndi abambo ndi amayi ake
Luke14:27 Ndipo aliyense amene sasenza mtanda wake ndi kunditsata Ine sangakhale ophunzira wanga.
Luke14:28 “Taganizani
Luke14:29 Pakuti ngati ayika maziko ndi kulephera kutsiriza
Luke14:30 nanena kuti
Luke14:31 “Kapena mfumu imene ikupita ku nkhondo kukamenyana ndi mfumu ina
Luke14:32 Ngati singathe
Luke14:33 Mʼnjira yomweyo
Luke14:34 “Mchere ndi wabwino
Luke14:35 Suyeneranso ngakhale mʼnthaka kapena kudzala la manyowa; umatayidwa kunja. “Amene ali ndi makutu akumva
Luke15:1 Tsopano amisonkho ndi “ochimwa” ankasonkhana kudzamvera mawu ake.
Luke15:2 Koma Afarisi ndi aphunzitsi amalamulo amangʼungʼudza nati
Luke15:3 Ndipo Yesu anawawuza fanizo ili:
Luke15:4 “Tiyerekeze kuti mmodzi mwa inu ali ndi nkhosa 100 ndipo imodzi yatayika
Luke15:5 Ndipo iye akayipeza
Luke15:6 ndi kupita kwawo. Kenaka amayitana anzake ndi anansi pamodzi
Luke15:7 Ine ndikukuwuzani kuti momwemonso kudzakhala chikondwerero chachikulu kumwamba chifukwa cha wochimwa mmodzi amene watembenuka mtima kusiyana ndi anthu olungama 99 amene ali otembenuka mtima kale.”
Luke15:8 “Kapena tiyeni tifanizire mayi amene anali ndi ndalama zasiliva khumi ndipo imodzi nʼkutayika
Luke15:9 Ndipo pamene wayipeza
Luke15:10 Momwemonso
Luke15:11 Yesu anapitiriza kunena kuti
Luke15:12 Wamngʼonoyo anati kwa abambo ake
Luke15:13 “Pasanapite nthawi
Luke15:14 Iye atawononga zonse
Luke15:15 Iye anapita kwa nzika ina ya dzikolo nakakhala naye ndi kumagwira ntchito
Luke15:16 Iye analakalaka atakhutitsa mimba yake ndi makoko amene nkhumbazo zinkadya
Luke15:17 “Maganizo ake atabweramo
Luke15:18 Ine ndinyamuka ndi kubwerera kwa abambo anga ndipo ndikati kwa iwo: abambo
Luke15:19 Ndine wosayeneranso kutchedwa mwana wanu; munditenge ngati mmodzi wa antchito anu.’
Luke15:20 Ndipo iye ananyamuka ndi kupita kwa abambo ake. “Koma iye akanali patali
Luke15:21 “Mwanayo anati
Luke15:22 “Koma abambowo anati kwa antchito ake
Luke15:23 Bweretsani mwana wangʼombe wonenepa ndipo iphani. Tiyeni tikhale ndi phwando ndi kukondwerera.
Luke15:24 Pakuti mwana wangayu anali wakufa
Luke15:25 “Nthawi imeneyi
Luke15:26 Ndipo iye anayitana mmodzi wa antchito
Luke15:27 Iye anayankha kuti
Luke15:28 “Mwana wamkulu anakwiya ndipo anakana kulowa. Chomwecho abambo ake anatuluka ndi kumudandaulira.
Luke15:29 Koma iye anayankha abambo ake kuti
Luke15:30 Koma pamene mwana wanu uyu amene wawononga chuma chanu ndi achiwerewere wabwera ku nyumba
Luke15:31 Abambowo anati
Luke15:32 Koma tinayenera kukondwera ndi kusangalala
Luke16:1 Yesu anawuza ophunzira ake kuti
Luke16:2 Choncho anamuyitana ndi kumufunsa kuti
Luke16:3 “Kapitawoyo analingalira kuti
Luke16:4 Ine ndikudziwa chimene ndidzachita kotero kuti
Luke16:5 “Choncho iye anayitana aliyense amene anali ndi ngongole kwa bwana wake. Iye anafunsa woyamba
Luke16:6 “Iye anayankha kuti
Luke16:7 “Kenaka iye anafunsa wachiwiri kuti
Luke16:8 “Bwana anayamikira kapitawo wosakhulupirikayo popeza anachita mochenjera. Pakuti anthu a dziko lino lapansi ndi ochenjera kwambiri akamachita zinthu ndi anthu ofanana nawo kuposa anthu a kuwunika.
Luke16:9 Ine ndikukuwuzani inu
Luke16:10 “Amene akhulupirika pa zinthu zochepa akhoza kukhulupirikanso pa zinthu zambiri
Luke16:11 Ndipo ngati simunakhale okhulupirika pogwiritsa ntchito chuma cha dziko lapansi
Luke16:12 Ndipo ngati simunakhale okhulupirika ndi chuma cha mwini wake
Luke16:13 “Palibe wantchito amene angatumikire mabwana awiri. Mwina iye adzadana ndi wina ndi kukonda winayo
Luke16:14 Afarisi amene ankakonda ndalama atamva zimenezi anamuseka Yesu.
Luke16:15 Yesu anawawuza kuti
Luke16:16 “Malamulo ndi Aneneri zinagwira ntchito mpaka nthawi ya Yohane. Kuyambira nthawi imeneyo
Luke16:17 Nʼkwapafupi kuti kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zichoke kulekana ndi kuti kalemba kakangʼono kachoke mʼMalamulo.
Luke16:18 “Aliyense amene asiya mkazi wake ndi kukakwatira mkazi wina akuchita chigololo
Luke16:19 “Panali munthu wachuma amene ankavala zovala zofiirira za mtengowapatali ndipo ankakhala moyo wachisangalalo tsiku lililonse.
Luke16:20 Pa khomo la mpanda wake ankagonekapo munthu wopempha wotchedwa Lazaro
Luke16:21 ndipo ankafunitsitsa atadya zomwe zinkagwa pansi kuchokera pamene munthu wolemerayo amadyerapo. Agalu ankabweranso ndi kumanyambita zilonda zake.
Luke16:22 “Nthawi inafika imene wopemphayo anamwalira ndipo angelo anamunyamula nakamuyika mʼmanja mwa Abrahamu. Munthu wolemerayo anamwaliranso ndipo anayikidwa mʼmanda.
Luke16:23 Ali mʼgehena kuzunzika
Luke16:24 Ndipo anafuwula kwa iye kuti
Luke16:25 “Koma Abrahamu anayankha kuti
Luke16:26 Ndipo kuwonjezera pa zonsezi
Luke16:27 “Iye anayankha kuti
Luke16:28 pakuti ine ndili ndi abale asanu. Lolani iye akawachenjeze kotero kuti asadzabwere kumalo ano amazunzo.’
Luke16:29 “Abrahamu anayankha kuti
Luke16:30 “Iye anati
Luke16:31 “Anati kwa iye
Luke17:1 Yesu anati kwa ophunzira ake
Luke17:2 Kukanakhala bwino kwa iye kuti aponyedwe mʼnyanja atamangiriridwa mwala wamphero mʼkhosi mwake kusiyana kuti achimwitse mmodzi mwa ana aangʼonowa.
Luke17:3 Nʼchifukwa chake dziyangʼanireni nokha. “Ngati mʼbale wanu achimwa
Luke17:4 Ngati iye akulakwira kasanu ndi kawiri pa tsiku
Luke17:5 Atumwiwo anati kwa Ambuye
Luke17:6 Yesu anayankha kuti
Luke17:7 “Tiyerekeze kuti mmodzi mwa inu anali ndi wantchito wolima kapena woweta nkhosa
Luke17:8 Kodi sangamuwuze kuti
Luke17:9 Kodi iye angathokoze wantchitoyo chifukwa chochita chimene anawuzidwa kuchita?
Luke17:10 Chimodzimodzi inunso
Luke17:11 Tsopano Yesu anayenda mʼmalire a pakati pa Samariya ndi Galileya pa ulendo wake wa ku Yerusalemu.
Luke17:12 Akulowa mʼmudzi wina
Luke17:13 ndipo anafuwula ndi mawu okweza kuti
Luke17:14 Iye atawaona
Luke17:15 Mmodzi wa iwo
Luke17:16 Anagwetsa nkhope yake nagwa pa mapazi a Yesu ndi kumuthokoza. Ndipo iye anali Msamariya.
Luke17:17 Yesu anafunsa kuti
Luke17:18 Kodi palibe mmodzi mwa iwo amene anabwerera kudzalemekeza Mulungu kupatula mlendoyu?”
Luke17:19 Pamenepo anati kwa iye
Luke17:20 Ndipo Afarisi atamufunsa Iye kuti
Luke17:21 kapenanso kuti anthu adzati
Luke17:22 Kenaka Iye anati kwa ophunzira ake
Luke17:23 Anthu adzakuwuzani kuti
Luke17:24 Pakuti monga mphenzi ingʼanima ndi kuwala kuchokera mbali ina ya thambo kufikira inzake
Luke17:25 Koma poyamba ayenera kuzunzika mu zambiri ndi kukanidwa ndi mʼbado uno.
Luke17:26 “Monga mmene zinkachitikira nthawi ya Nowa
Luke17:27 Anthu ankadya
Luke17:28 “Zinalinso chimodzimodzi nthawi ya Loti. Anthu ankadya ndi kumwa
Luke17:29 Koma tsiku limene Loti anachoka ku Sodomu
Luke17:30 “Zidzakhalanso choncho Mwana wa Munthu akadzaonekera.
Luke17:31 Tsiku limenelo munthu amene ali pa denga la nyumba yake
Luke17:32 Kumbukirani mkazi wa Loti!
Luke17:33 Aliyense amene ayesetsa kusunga moyo wake adzawutaya
Luke17:34 Ine ndikukuwuzani inu
Luke17:35 Amayi awiri adzakhala pamodzi akusinja; wina adzatengedwa ndi wina adzasiyidwa.
Luke17:36 Amuna awiri adzakhala akulima mʼmunda; wina adzatengedwa ndi wina adzasiyidwa.”
Luke17:37 Iwo anafunsa kuti
Luke18:1 Kenaka Yesu anawuza ophunzira ake fanizo kuwaonetsa kuti iwo ayenera kumapemphera nthawi zonse ndikuti asafowoke.
Luke18:2 Iye anati
Luke18:3 Ndipo panali mkazi wamasiye mʼmudzimo amene ankabwerabwera kwa iye ndi dandawulo lake kuti
Luke18:4 “Kwa nthawi yayitali woweruzayo ankakana. Koma pa mapeto analingalira nati
Luke18:5 koma chifukwa chakuti mkazi wamasiyeyu akundivutitsa
Luke18:6 Ndipo Ambuye anati
Luke18:7 Tsono chingamuletse nʼchiyani Mulungu kubweretsa chilungamo kwa osankhika ake

Luke18:11 Mfarisiyo anayimirira ndipo anapemphera za iye mwini kuti
Luke18:12 Ine ndimasala kudya kawiri pa Sabata ndipo ndimapereka chakhumi pa zonse ndimapeza.’
Luke18:13 “Koma wolandira msonkhoyo ali chiyimire potero
Luke18:14 “Ine ndikukuwuzani kuti munthu wolandira msonkhoyu

Luke18:16 Koma Yesu anayitana anawo kuti abwere kwa Iye nati
Luke18:17 Zoonadi
Luke18:18 Oweruza wina wake anamufunsa Iye kuti
Luke18:19 Yesu anamuyankha kuti

Luke18:21 Iye anati
Luke18:22 Yesu atamva izi
Luke18:23 Atamva zimenezi
Luke18:24 Yesu anamuyangʼana nati
Luke18:25 Ndithudi

Luke18:27 Yesu anayankha kuti
Luke18:28 Petro anati kwa Iye
Luke18:29 Yesu anawawuza kuti
Luke18:30 adzalephera kulandira mowirikiza mʼmoyo uno
Luke18:31 Yesu anatengera khumi ndi awiriwo pambali ndi kuwawuza kuti
Luke18:32 Iye adzaperekedwa kwa anthu a mitundu ina. Ndipo adzamuchita chipongwe
Luke18:33 adzamukwapula ndi kumupha. Tsiku lachitatu Iye adzaukanso.”
Luke18:34 Ophunzira sanazindikire china chilichonse cha izi. Tanthauzo lake linabisika kwa iwo
Luke18:35 Yesu atayandikira ku Yeriko
Luke18:36 anamva gulu la anthu likudutsa. Iye anafunsa chomwe chimachitika.

Luke18:42 Yesu anati kwa iye

Luke19:5 Yesu atafika pa malopo

Luke19:18 “Wachiwiri anabwera ndipo anati

Luke19:20 “Kenaka wantchito wina anabwera ndipo anati
Luke19:21 Ine ndimakuopani
Luke19:22 “Bwana wake anayankha kuti
Luke19:23 Nanga nʼchifukwa chiyani sunasungitse ndalama yanga
Luke19:24 “Ndipo iye anawuza amene anayimirira pafupi kuti
Luke19:25 Iwo anati
Luke19:26 Iye anayankha kuti
Luke19:27 Tsono adani anga aja amene sankafuna kuti ndikhale mfumu yawo
Luke19:28 Yesu atatha kunena izi
Luke19:29 Iye atayandikira ku Betifage ndi Betaniya pa phiri lotchedwa Olivi
Luke19:30 “Pitani mʼmudzi uli patsogolo panu
Luke19:31 Ngati wina aliyense akakufunsani kuti

Luke19:33 Pamene ankamasula mwana wabuluyo
Luke19:34 Iwo anayankha kuti
Luke19:35 Iwo anabweretsa buluyo kwa Yesu
Luke19:36 Pamene ankapita
Luke19:37 Iye atafika pafupi ndi pamene msewu umatsikira ku phiri la Olivi
Luke19:38 	“Yodala mfumu imene ikubwera mʼdzina la Ambuye!” “Mtendere kumwamba ndi ulemerero mmwambamwamba!”
Luke19:39 Ena mwa Afarisi mʼgulumo anati kwa Yesu
Luke19:40 Iye anayankha kuti
Luke19:41 Iye atayandikira ku Yerusalemu ndi kuona mzindawo
Luke19:42 nati

Luke19:44 Iwo adzakugwetsera pansi
Luke19:45 Kenaka Iye analowa mʼdera la Nyumba ya Mulungu ndi kuyamba kutulutsa kunja amene amachita malonda.

Luke20:1 Tsiku lina pamene Iye ankaphunzitsa anthu mʼmabwalo a Nyumba ya Mulungu ndi kuphunzitsa Uthenga Wabwino
Luke20:2 Iwo anati
Luke20:3 Iye anayankha kuti
Luke20:4 ‘Kodi ubatizo wa Yohane
Luke20:5 Iwo anakambirana pakati pawo ndikuti
Luke20:6 Koma ngati ife tinena kuti
Luke20:7 Pamenepo iwo anayankha kuti
Luke20:8 Yesu anati
Luke20:9 Iye anapitirira kuwawuza anthu fanizo ili: “Munthu wina analima munda wamphesa
Luke20:10 Pa nthawi yokolola
Luke20:11 Iye anatumiza wantchito wina
Luke20:12 Iye anatumizanso wina wachitatu ndipo iwo anamuvulaza namuponya kunja.
Luke20:13 “Kenaka mwini mundawo anati
Luke20:14 “Koma alimiwo ataona mwanayo
Luke20:15 Ndipo anamuponya kunja kwa mundawo ndi kumupha. “Nanga tsono mwini munda wamphesayo adzawatani anthuwa?
Luke20:16 Iye adzabwera ndi kupha alimi aja ndi kupereka mundawo kwa ena.” Pamene anthu anamva izi
Luke20:17 Yesu anawayangʼanitsitsa ndipo anafunsa kuti
Luke20:18 Aliyense amene agwa pa mwalawu adzapweteka
Luke20:19 Aphunzitsi amalamulo ndi akulu a ansembe amafuna njira yoti amuphe nthawi yomweyo
Luke20:20 Pamene ankamulondalonda Iye
Luke20:21 Potero akazitapewo anamufunsa Iye kuti
Luke20:22 Kodi ndi bwino kwa ife kumapereka msonkho kwa Kaisara kapena kusapereka?”
Luke20:23 Iye anaona chinyengo chawo ndipo anawawuza kuti
Luke20:24 “Onetseni ndalama. Chithunzi ndi malembawa ndi zayani?”
Luke20:25 Iwo anayankha kuti
Luke20:26 Iwo analephera kumupeza cholakwa pa zimene ankayankhula pamaso pa anthu. Ndipo pothedwa nzeru ndi yankho lake
Luke20:27 Ena mwa Asaduki
Luke20:28 Iwo anati
Luke20:29 Tsopano panali abale asanu ndi awiri. Woyambayo anakwatira mkazi ndipo anafa wopanda mwana.
Luke20:30 Wachiwiri
Luke20:31 ndipo kenaka wachitatuyo anamukwatira iye
Luke20:32 Pa mapeto pake mkaziyo anafanso.
Luke20:33 Tsopano
Luke20:34 Yesu anayankha kuti
Luke20:35 Koma mʼmoyo umene ukubwerawo
Luke20:36 Ndipo sadzafanso
Luke20:37 Ngakhale pa nkhani yachitsamba choyaka moto
Luke20:38 Mulungu si Mulungu wa akufa
Luke20:39 Ena mwa aphunzitsi amalamulo anayankha kuti
Luke20:40 Ndipo panalibe wina amene akanalimba mtima kumufunsa Iye mafunso ena.
Luke20:41 Kenaka Yesu anawawuza kuti
Luke20:42 Davide mwini wake akunenetsa mʼbuku la Masalimo kuti
Luke20:43 	 mpaka Ine nditasandutsa adani anu chopondapo mapazi anu?’
Luke20:44 Davide akumutcha Iye ‘Ambuye.’ Nanga zingatheke bwanji kuti Iye akhale mwana wake?”
Luke20:45 Pamene anthu onse ankamvetsera
Luke20:46 “Chenjerani ndi aphunzitsi amalamulo. Iwo amakonda kuyenda atavala mikanjo ndipo amakonda kulonjeredwa mʼmisika ndipo amakhala mʼmipando yofunika mʼmasunagoge ndi mʼmalo aulemu mʼmaphwando.
Luke20:47 Amawadyera akazi amasiye chuma chawo ndi kuchita mapemphero aatali kuti awaone. Anthu oterewa adzalangidwa kwambiri.”
Luke21:1 Yesu atayangʼana
Luke21:2 Iye anaonanso mkazi wamasiye wosauka akuyikamo timakopala tiwiri.
Luke21:3 Iye anati
Luke21:4 Anthu onsewa atapa mphatso zawo kuchokera pa zochuluka zimene ali nazo; koma uyu
Luke21:5 Ena mwa ophunzira ake ankachita ndemanga za mmene Nyumba ya Mulungu anayikongoletsera ndi miyala yokongola ndiponso zinthu zina zomwe anthu anapereka kwa Mulungu. Koma Yesu anati
Luke21:6 “Koma zimene mukuziona panozi
Luke21:7 Iwo anafunsa kuti
Luke21:8 Iye anayankha kuti
Luke21:9 Mukadzamva zankhondo ndi zipolowe
Luke21:10 Kenaka anawawuza kuti
Luke21:11 Kudzakhala zivomerezi zazikulu
Luke21:12 “Koma zonsezi zisanachitike
Luke21:13 Umenewu udzakhala mwayi wanu ochitira umboni.
Luke21:14 Koma tsimikizani mtima kuti musadzade nkhawa za momwe mudzadzitchinjirizire.
Luke21:15 Pakuti Ine ndidzakupatsani mawu ndi nzeru kotero kuti palibe mmodzi wa adani anu adzathe kuwakana kapena kuwatsutsa.
Luke21:16 Inu mudzaperekedwa ndi makolo anu
Luke21:17 Anthu onse adzakudani chifukwa cha Ine.
Luke21:18 Koma palibe tsitsi limodzi la mʼmutu mwanu lidzawonongeke.
Luke21:19 Mukadzalimbikira ndiye mudzapeze moyo.
Luke21:20 “Mukadzaona Yerusalemu atazingidwa ndi magulu ankhondo
Luke21:21 Pamenepo amene ali ku Yudeya adzathawire ku mapiri
Luke21:22 Pakuti iyi ndi nthawi yachilango pokwaniritsa zonse zimene zinalembedwa.
Luke21:23 Zidzakhala zoopsa nthawi imenewo kwa amayi oyembekezera ndi amayi oyamwitsa! Kudzakhala masautso aakulu mʼdziko ndipo anthu onse adzawakwiyira.
Luke21:24 Iwo adzaphedwa ndi lupanga ndi kutengedwa ukapolo kupita ku mayiko wonse. Yerusalemu adzaponderezedwa ndi anthu a mitundu ina mpaka nthawi ya a mitundu ina itakwaniritsidwa.
Luke21:25 “Padzakhala zizindikiro zodabwitsa pa dzuwa
Luke21:26 Anthu adzakomoka chifukwa cha mantha
Luke21:27 Nthawi imeneyo adzaona Mwana wa Munthu akubwera ndi mitambo
Luke21:28 Zinthu izi zikadzayamba kuchitika
Luke21:29 Iye anawawuza fanizo ili
Luke21:30 Ikamatulutsa masamba
Luke21:31 Chimodzimodzinso
Luke21:32 “Zoonadi
Luke21:33 Kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zidzatha
Luke21:34 “Samalani
Luke21:35 Pakuti lidzafika pa onse okhala pa dziko lonse lapansi.
Luke21:36 Khalani tcheru nthawi zonse ndi kupemphera kuti inu mudzathe kuthawa zonse zimene zili pafupi kuchitika
Luke21:37 Tsiku lililonse Yesu amaphunzitsa ku Nyumba ya Mulungu
Luke21:38 Ndipo anthu onse amabwera mmamawa kudzamumva Iye ku Nyumba ya Mulungu.
Luke22:1 Phwando la buledi wopanda yisiti lotchedwa Paska litayandikira
Luke22:2 akulu a ansembe ndi aphunzitsi amalamulo amafunafuna mpata woti amuphere Yesu
Luke22:3 Kenaka Satana analowa mwa Yudasi
Luke22:4 Ndipo Yudasi anapita kwa akulu a ansembe ndi akulu oyangʼanira Nyumba ya Mulungu ndi kukambirana nawo za mmene iye angaperekere Yesu.
Luke22:5 Iwo anakondwa ndipo anagwirizana zomupatsa ndalama.
Luke22:6 Iye anavomera
Luke22:7 Kenaka linafika tsiku la buledi wopanda yisiti pamene mwana wankhosa wa Paska amaperekedwa nsembe.
Luke22:8 Yesu anatuma Petro ndi Yohane nati
Luke22:9 Iwo anafunsa kuti
Luke22:10 Iye anayankha kuti
Luke22:11 ndipo mukamuwuze mwini nyumbayo kuti
Luke22:12 Iyeyo adzakuonetsani chipinda chachikulu chapamwamba
Luke22:13 Iwo anapita nakapeza zinthu monga mmene Yesu anawawuzira. Tsono anakonza Paska.
Luke22:14 Ora litakwana
Luke22:15 Ndipo Iye anawawuza kuti
Luke22:16 Pakuti Ine ndikukuwuzani kuti sindidzadyanso Paska wina mpaka Paskayi itakwaniritsidwa mu ufumu wa Mulungu.”
Luke22:17 Atanyamula chikho
Luke22:18 Pakuti ndikukuwuzani kuti
Luke22:19 Ndipo Iye anatenga buledi
Luke22:20 Chimodzimodzinso
Luke22:21 Koma dzanja la amene akundipereka Ine lili pamodzi ndi langa pa chakudya pano.
Luke22:22 Mwana wa Munthu apita monga mmene zinalembedwera
Luke22:23 Iwo anayamba kufunsana pakati pawo kuti ndi ndani wa iwo amene akanachita ichi.
Luke22:24 Komanso mkangano unabuka pakati pawo kuti ndani mwa iwo amene amaganiziridwa kukhala wamkulu.
Luke22:25 Yesu anawawuza kuti
Luke22:26 Koma inu simuyenera kukhala choncho. Mʼmalo mwake
Luke22:27 Pakuti wamkulu ndani
Luke22:28 Inu ndinu amene mwayima nane mʼmayesero.
Luke22:29 Ndipo Ine ndikupatsani inu ufumu
Luke22:30 kuti inu muthe kudya ndi kumwa pa tebulo langa mu ufumu wanga ndi kukhala pa mipando yaufumu kuweruza mafuko khumi ndi awiri a Israeli.”
Luke22:31 “Simoni
Luke22:32 Koma Ine ndakupempherera Simoni
Luke22:33 Koma iye anayankha kuti
Luke22:34 Yesu anayankha kuti
Luke22:35 Kenaka Yesu anawafunsa iwo kuti
Luke22:36 Iye anawawuza kuti
Luke22:37 Zalembedwa kuti
Luke22:38 Ophunzira anati
Luke22:39 Yesu anapitanso monga mwa masiku onse ku Phiri la Olivi
Luke22:40 Atafika pamalopo
Luke22:41 Iye anapita patsogolo pangʼono patali ngati kuponya mwala
Luke22:42 “Atate ngati mukufuna chotsereni chikho ichi. Komatu muchite zimene mukufuna osati zimene ndikufuna ine.”
Luke22:43 Mngelo wochokera kumwamba anafika namulimbikitsa.
Luke22:44 Ndipo mopsinjika mtima
Luke22:45 Iye atamaliza kupemphera
Luke22:46 Iye anafunsa kuti
Luke22:47 Pamene Iye ankayankhulabe
Luke22:48 Koma Yesu anamufunsa kuti
Luke22:49 Otsatira Yesu ataona zimene zimati zichitike
Luke22:50 Ndipo mmodzi wa iwo anatema wantchito wamkulu wa ansembe
Luke22:51 Koma Yesu anayankha kuti
Luke22:52 Kenaka Yesu anafunsa akulu a ansembe
Luke22:53 Tsiku lililonse ndinali nanu mʼmabwalo a mʼNyumba ya Mulungu ndipo inu simunandigwire. Koma iyi ndi nthawi yanu pamene mdima ukulamulira.”
Luke22:54 Pamenepo anamugwira Iye
Luke22:55 Koma pamene anasonkha moto pakati pa bwalo la milandu
Luke22:56 Mtsikana wantchito anamuona atakhala nawo pafupi ndi moto. Iye anamuyangʼanitsitsa ndipo anati
Luke22:57 Koma Petro anakana nati
Luke22:58 Patatha kanthawi pangʼono
Luke22:59 Patatha pafupifupi ora limodzi
Luke22:60 Petro anayankha kuti
Luke22:61 Ambuye anachewuka namuyangʼanitsitsa Petro. Pamenepo Petro anakumbukira mawu amene Ambuye anayankhula kwa iye kuti
Luke22:62 Ndipo iye anapita panja nakalira kwambiri.
Luke22:63 Anthu amene ankalonda Yesu anayamba kumuchita chipongwe ndi kumumenya.
Luke22:64 Anamumanga mʼmaso ndi kumufunsa kuti
Luke22:65 Ndipo iwo anamunena zachipongwe zambiri.
Luke22:66 Kutacha
Luke22:67 Iwo anati
Luke22:68 Ine nditakufunsani inu
Luke22:69 Koma kuyambira tsopano
Luke22:70 Onse anafunsa kuti
Luke22:71 Pamenepo iwo anati
Luke23:1 Kenaka gulu lonse la anthuwo linayimirira ndi kumutengera kwa Pilato.
Luke23:2 Ndipo iwo anayamba kumuneneza nati
Luke23:3 Pamenepo Pilato anamufunsa Yesu kuti
Luke23:4 Kenaka Pilato anawawuza akulu a ansembe ndi gulu la anthu
Luke23:5 Koma iwo analimbikirabe kuti
Luke23:6 Pakumva zimenezi
Luke23:7 Iye atamva kuti Yesu anali pansi pa ulamuliro wa Herode
Luke23:8 Herode ataona Yesu
Luke23:9 Iye anamufunsa mafunso ambiri
Luke23:10 Akulu a ansembe ndi aphunzitsi amalamulo
Luke23:11 Pamenepo Herode ndi asilikali ake anamuseka ndi kumunyoza Iye. Atamuveka mkanjo wonyezimira
Luke23:12 Tsiku limenelo
Luke23:13 Pilato anasonkhanitsa akulu a ansembe
Luke23:14 ndipo anawawuza kuti
Luke23:15 Herodenso sanapeze chifukwa pakuti wamutumizanso kwa ife monga mmene mukuoneramu. Iyeyu sanachite chinthu chakuti aphedwe.
Luke23:16 Nʼchifukwa chake
Luke23:17 (Pa nthawi yachikondwerero cha Paska iye ankayenera kumasula munthu mmodzi).
Luke23:18 Onse pamodzi anafuwula kuti
Luke23:19 (Baraba anaponyedwa mʼndende chifukwa choyambitsa chipolowe mu mzinda ndi kupha).
Luke23:20 Pofuna kumumasula Yesu
Luke23:21 Koma iwo anapitirirabe kufuwula kuti
Luke23:22 Kachitatu anawafunsanso iwo kuti
Luke23:23 Koma ndi mawu ofuwulitsa
Luke23:24 Choncho Pilato anatsimikiza kuchita zofuna zawozo.
Luke23:25 Iye anawamasulira munthu amene anaponyedwa mʼndende chifukwa choyambitsa chipolowe ndi kupha
Luke23:26 Ndipo pamene ankapita naye
Luke23:27 Gulu lalikulu la anthu linamutsata Iye
Luke23:28 Yesu anatembenuka nati kwa iwo
Luke23:29 Pakuti nthawi idzabwera imene inu mudzati
Luke23:30 Kenaka
Luke23:31 Chifukwa ngati anthu akuchita izi pa mtengo wauwisi
Luke23:32 Amuna ena awiri
Luke23:33 Pamene anafika pamalo otchedwa Bade
Luke23:34 Yesu anati
Luke23:35 Anthu anayimirira nʼkumaonerera
Luke23:36 Asilikalinso anabwera ndi kumunyoza Iye. Iwo anamupatsa vinyo wosasa
Luke23:37 ndipo anati
Luke23:38 Ndipo panalembedwa chikwangwani pamwamba pake chimene chinati: UYU NDI MFUMU YA AYUDA.
Luke23:39 Mmodzi wa achifwambawo
Luke23:40 Koma wachifwamba winayo anamudzudzula iye nati
Luke23:41 Ife tikulangidwa mwachilungamo
Luke23:42 Kenaka anati
Luke23:43 Yesu anayankha kuti
Luke23:44 Linali tsopano pafupi ora lachisanu ndi chimodzi
Luke23:45 pakuti dzuwa linaleka kuwala. Ndipo chinsalu cha mʼNyumba ya Mulungu chinangʼambika pakati.
Luke23:46 Yesu anafuwula ndi mawu okweza kuti
Luke23:47 Kenturiyo
Luke23:48 Anthu onse amene anasonkhana kudzaonerera izi
Luke23:49 Koma onse amene anamudziwa Iye
Luke23:50 Ndipo taonani panali munthu wina wotchedwa Yosefe
Luke23:51 Iye sanavomereze zimene anzake abwalo anagwirizana ndi kuchita. Iye ankachokera ku mudzi wa Arimateyu wa ku Yudeya ndipo ankayembekezera ufumu wa Mulungu.
Luke23:52 Atapita kwa Pilato
Luke23:53 Ndipo anawutsitsa
Luke23:54 Linali tsiku lokonzekera ndipo Sabata linatsala pangʼono kuyamba.
Luke23:55 Amayi amene anabwera ndi Yesu kuchokera ku Galileya
Luke23:56 Kenaka anapita ku mudzi ndi kukakonza mafuta onunkhira. Koma anapuma pa tsiku la Sabata pomvera malamulo.
Luke24:1 Pa tsiku loyamba la Sabata
Luke24:2 Anaona mwala wa pa manda utagubuduzika
Luke24:3 ndipo atalowamo sanapeze mtembo wa Ambuye Yesu.
Luke24:4 Pamene iwo ankadabwa za zimenezi
Luke24:5 Ndi mantha
Luke24:6 Iye sali muno ayi. Wauka! Kumbukirani zimene anakuwuzani pamene anali nanu ku Galileya:
Luke24:7 ‘Mwana wa Munthu ayenera kuperekedwa mʼmanja mwa anthu ochimwa
Luke24:8 Ndipo anakumbukira mawu ake.
Luke24:9 Atabwerera kuchokera ku mandako
Luke24:10 Amayi anali Mariya Magadalena
Luke24:11 Koma iwo sanawakhulupirire amayiwa
Luke24:12 Komabe Petro anayimirira ndi kuthamangira ku manda. Atasuzumira
Luke24:13 Ndipo tsiku lomwelo
Luke24:14 Iwo ankayankhulana za zonse zimene zinachitikazo.
Luke24:15 Pamenepo Yesu mwini wake anabwera ndi kuyenda nawo pamodzi;
Luke24:16 koma iwo sanamuzindikire.
Luke24:17 Iye anawafunsa kuti
Luke24:18 Mmodzi wa iwo wotchedwa Kaliyopa anamufunsa kuti
Luke24:19 Iye anafunsa kuti
Luke24:20 Akulu a ansembe ndi oweruza anamupereka Iye kuti aphedwe
Luke24:21 koma ife tinkayembekezera kuti Iye ndiye amene akanawombola Israeli. Ndipo kuwonjeza apo
Luke24:22 Kuwonjezanso apo
Luke24:23 koma sanakapeze mtembo wake. Iwo anabwera ndi kudzatiwuza ife kuti anaona masomphenya a angelo amene anati Yesu ali moyo.
Luke24:24 Kenaka ena mwa anzathu anapita ku manda ndipo anakapeza monga momwe amayiwo ananenera
Luke24:25 Iye anawawuza kuti
Luke24:26 Kodi Khristu sanayenera kumva zowawa izi ndipo kenaka ndi kulowa mu ulemerero wake?”
Luke24:27 Ndipo kuyambira ndi Mose ndi aneneri onse Iye anawafotokozera zimene zinalembedwa mʼmalemba wonse zokhudzana ndi Iye mwini.
Luke24:28 Atayandikira mudzi omwe amapitako
Luke24:29 Koma iwo anamupempha Iye kwambiri kuti
Luke24:30 Iye ali pa tebulo pamodzi nawo
Luke24:31 Kenaka maso awo anatsekuka ndipo anamuzindikira Iye
Luke24:32 Iwo anafunsana wina ndi mnzake kuti
Luke24:33 Nthawi yomweyo iwo anayimirira ndi kubwerera ku Yerusalemu. Iwo anapeza khumi ndi mmodziwo ndi ena anali nawo nasonkhana pamodzi
Luke24:34 ndipo anati
Luke24:35 Kenaka awiriwo anawawuza zimene zinachitika pa njira
Luke24:36 Akufotokoza zimenezi
Luke24:37 Koma chifukwa choti anathedwa nzeru ndi kuchita mantha
Luke24:38 Iye anawafunsa kuti
Luke24:39 Taonani manja anga ndi mapazi anga. Ine ndine amene! Khudzeni kuti muone. Mzukwa ulibe mnofu ndi mafupa monga mukuonera ndili nazo.”
Luke24:40 Iye atanena izi anawaonetsa manja ake ndi mapazi ake.
Luke24:41 Ndipo pamene iwo samakhulupirirabe
Luke24:42 Iwo anamupatsa Iye kachidutswa ka nsomba yophika.
Luke24:43 Iye anakatenga ndi kukadya iwo akuona.
Luke24:44 Iye anawawuza kuti
Luke24:45 Kenaka anawatsekula maganizo kuti azindikire Malemba.
Luke24:46 Iye anawawuza kuti
Luke24:47 Ndipo kutembenuka mtima ndi kukhululukidwa kwa machimo zidzalalikidwa mu dzina lake kwa anthu amitundu yonse kuyambira mu Yerusalemu.
Luke24:48 Inu ndinu mboni za zimenezi.
Luke24:49 Ine ndidzakutumizirani chimene Atate anga analonjeza. Koma khalani mu mzinda muno mpaka mutavekedwa mphamvu yochokera kumwamba.”
Luke24:50 Iye atawatengera kunja kwa mzindawo mpaka ku Betaniya
Luke24:51 Iye akuwadalitsa
Luke24:52 Pamenepo anamulambira Iye ndipo anabwerera ku Yerusalemu ndi chimwemwe chachikulu.
Luke24:53 Ndipo iwo anakhalabe ku Nyumba ya Mulungu
John1:1 Pachiyambi panali Mawu
John1:2 Mawuwa anali ndi Mulungu pachiyambi.
John1:3 Zinthu zonse zinalengedwa ndi Iye; ndipo popanda Iye sikukanakhala kanthu kalikonse kolengedwa.
John1:4 Mwa Iye munali moyo
John1:5 Kuwunika kunawala mu mdima
John1:6 Kunabwera munthu amene anatumizidwa kuchokera kwa Mulungu; Iyeyo dzina lake linali Yohane.
John1:7 Iye anabwera ngati mboni kudzachitira umboni kuwunikako kuti kudzera mwa iye anthu onse akhulupirire.
John1:8 Iyeyu sanali kuwunika; koma anabwera ngati mboni ya kuwunika.
John1:9 Kuwunika koona kumene kuwunikira munthu aliyense kunabwera ku dziko lapansi.
John1:10 Iye anali mʼdziko lapansi
John1:11 Iye anabwera kwa iwo amene anali akeake
John1:12 Koma kwa onse amene anamulandira Iye
John1:13 ana wobadwa osati monga mwachilengedwe
John1:14 Mawu anasandulika thupi ndipo anakhala pakati pathu. Ife tinaona ulemerero wake
John1:15 Yohane achitira umboni za Iye. Iye akufuwula kuti
John1:16 Kuchokera mʼkuchuluka kwa chisomo chake ife tonse talandira madalitso pamwamba pa madalitso.
John1:17 Pakuti lamulo linapatsidwa kudzera mwa Mose; chisomo ndi choonadi zinabwera kudzera mwa Yesu Khristu.
John1:18 Palibe munthu amene anaona Mulungu
John1:19 Tsopano uwu ndi umboni wa Yohane pamene Ayuda a ku Yerusalemu anatumiza ansembe ndi Alevi kudzamufunsa kuti iye anali yani.
John1:20 Iye sanalephere kuvomereza
John1:21 Iwo anamufunsa kuti
John1:22 Pomaliza iwo anati
John1:23 Yohane anayankha ndi mawu a mneneri Yesaya kuti
John1:24 Tsopano Afarisi ena amene anatumidwa
John1:25 anamufunsa Iye kuti
John1:26 Yohane anayankha kuti
John1:27 Iye ndi amene akubwera pambuyo panga
John1:28 Zonsezi zinachitika ku Betaniya kutsidya lina la mtsinje wa Yorodani
John1:29 Pa tsiku lotsatira Yohane anaona Yesu akubwera kwa iye ndipo anati
John1:30 Uyu ndi amene ndimatanthauza pamene ndinanena kuti
John1:31 Ine mwini sindinamudziwe Iye
John1:32 Kenaka Yohane anapereka umboni uwu: “Ine ndinaona Mzimu Woyera ngati nkhunda kuchokera kumwamba nakhala pa Iye.
John1:33 Ine sindikanamudziwa Iye
John1:34 Ine ndaona ndipo ndikuchitira umboni kuti uyu ndi Mwana wa Mulungu.”
John1:35 Pa tsiku lotsatira Yohane analinso pamenepo pamodzi ndi awiri a ophunzira ake.
John1:36 Iye ataona Yesu akudutsa anati
John1:37 Ophunzira ake awiriwo atamva iye akunena izi
John1:38 Atatembenuka
John1:39 Iye anayankha kuti
John1:40 Andreya mʼbale wake wa Simoni Petro
John1:41 Choncho chimene Andreya anachita ndi kukapeza mʼbale wake Simoni ndipo anamuwuza kuti
John1:42 Kenaka iye anabweretsa Simoni kwa Yesu
John1:43 Pa tsiku lotsatira Yesu anaganiza zopita ku Galileya. Atamupeza Filipo
John1:44 Filipo monga Andreya ndi Petro
John1:45 Filipo anakapeza Natanieli ndipo anamuwuza kuti
John1:46 Natanieli anafunsa kuti
John1:47 Yesu atamuona Natanieli akuyandikira
John1:48 Natanieli anafunsa kuti
John1:49 Kenaka Natanieli ananena kuti
John1:50 Yesu anati
John1:51 Ndipo Iye anapitirira kuti
John2:1 Pa tsiku lachitatu munali ukwati mu Kana wa ku Galileya. Amayi ake a Yesu anali komweko
John2:2 ndipo Yesu ndi ophunzira ake anayitanidwanso ku ukwatiwo.
John2:3 Vinyo atatha
John2:4 Yesu anayankha kuti
John2:5 Amayi ake anati kwa antchito
John2:6 Pamenepo panali mitsuko yamiyala yothiramo madzi isanu ndi umodzi
John2:7 Yesu anati kwa antchitowo
John2:8 Ndipo Iye anatinso kwa iwo
John2:9 Mkulu waphwando analawa madziwo amene anasandulika vinyo
John2:10 ndipo anati
John2:11 Ichi chinali chizindikiro chodabwitsa choyamba chimene Yesu anachita ku Kana wa ku Galileya. Potero Iye anawulula ulemerero wake
John2:12 Zitatha izi Iye anatsikira ku Kaperenawo pamodzi ndi amayi ake
John2:13 Nthawi ya Paska ya Ayuda itayandikira
John2:14 Mʼbwalo la Nyumba ya Mulungu Iye anapeza anthu akugulitsa ngʼombe
John2:15 Chifukwa cha zimenezi Iye anapanga chikwapu cha zingwe ndipo anatulutsa onse mʼbwalo la Nyumbayo
John2:16 Kwa amene amagulitsa nkhunda
John2:17 Ophunzira ake anakumbukira kuti zinalembedwa kuti

John2:19 Yesu anawayankha kuti
John2:20 Ayuda anayankha kuti

John2:24 Koma Yesu sanawakhulupirire iwo
John2:25 Iye sanafune umboni wa wina aliyense popeza amadziwa zomwe zinali mʼmitima mwa anthu.

John3:10 Yesu anati

John3:13 Palibe wina aliyense anapita kumwamba
John3:14 Tsono monga Mose anapachika njoka mʼchipululu

John3:32 Iye achita umboni pa zimene waziona ndi kuzimva

John4:3 Iye anachoka ku Yudeya ndi kubwereranso ku Galileya.
John4:4 Ndipo Iye anayenera kudutsa mu Samariya.
John4:5 Iye anafika mʼmudzi wa Asamariya wotchedwa Sukari
John4:6 Chitsime cha Yakobo chinali pamenepo ndipo Yesu atatopa ndi ulendo anakhala pansi pambali pa chitsimecho. Nthawi inali pafupifupi ora lachisanu ndi chimodzi masana.
John4:7 Mayi wa Chisamariya atabwera kudzatunga madzi

John4:17 Iye anayankha kuti

John4:19 Mayiyo anati
John4:20 Makolo athu ankapembedza mʼphiri ili koma inu Ayuda mumati malo amene tiyenera kupembedzera ali ku Yerusalemu.”
John4:21 Yesu anati
John4:22 Inu Asamariya mumapembedza chimene simukuchidziwa. Ife timapembedza chimene tikuchidziwa
John4:23 Koma nthawi ikubwera ndipo yafika kale tsopano pamene opembedza woona adzapembedza Atate mu mzimu ndi mʼchoonadi
John4:24 Mulungu ndi Mzimu

John4:28 Kenaka mayiyo anasiya mtsuko wamadzi
John4:29 “Tiyeni mukaone munthu amene wandiwuza ine zilizonse zimene ndinazichita. Kodi ameneyu sangakhale Khristu?”
John4:30 Iwo anatuluka mʼmudziwo ndi kupita kumene kunali Iye.
John4:31 Pa nthawi imeneyi ndi kuti ophunzira ake akumukakamiza kuti

John4:39 Asamariya ambiri ochokera mʼmudziwo anakhulupirira Iye chifukwa cha umboni wa mayiyo wakuti

John4:42 Iwo anati kwa mayiyo

John4:54 Ichi ndiye chinali chizindikiro chodabwitsa chachiwiri chimene Yesu anachita atafika ku Galileya kuchokera ku Yudeya.
John5:1 Patapita nthawi Yesu anakwera kupita ku Yerusalemu ku phwando la Ayuda.
John5:2 Ndipo ku Yerusalemuko pafupi ndi chipata cha Nkhosa kuli dziwe limene mʼChihebri limatchedwa Betisaida ndipo ndi lozunguliridwa ndi makumbi asanu.
John5:3 Mʼmenemo munkagonamo gulu lalikulu la anthu odwala
John5:4 Pakuti nthawi zina mngelo wa Ambuye ankatsikira mʼdziwemo nʼkuvundula madziwo. Woyamba kulowamo madzi atavundulidwa
John5:5 Mmodzi wa amene anali pamenepo anali atadwala zaka 38.
John5:6 Yesu atamuona ali chigonere
John5:7 Wodwalayo anayankha kuti
John5:8 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye
John5:9 Nthawi yomweyo munthuyo anachiritsidwa. Iye ananyamula mphasa yake nayamba kuyenda. Tsiku limene izi zinachitika linali la Sabata.
John5:10 Ndipo Ayuda anati kwa munthu amene anachiritsidwayo
John5:11 Koma iye anayankha kuti
John5:12 Pamenepo anamufunsa iye kuti
John5:13 Munthu amene anachiritsidwayo sanadziwe kuti anali ndani
John5:14 Patapita nthawi Yesu anamupeza ku Nyumba ya Mulungu ndipo anati kwa iye
John5:15 Munthu uja anachoka ndi kukawawuza Ayuda kuti anali Yesu amene anamuchiritsa iye.
John5:16 Ndipo popeza Yesu amachita zinthu izi tsiku la Sabata
John5:17 Yesu anawawuza kuti
John5:18 Chifukwa cha ichi Ayuda anawirikiza kufuna kumupha; osati chifukwa chakuswa Sabata kokha komanso chifukwa ankanena kuti Mulungu ndi Atate ake
John5:19 Yesu anawapatsa yankho ili: “Zoonadi
John5:20 Pakuti Atate amakonda Mwana
John5:21 Pakuti monga Atate amaukitsa akufa nawapatsa moyo
John5:22 Komanso
John5:23 kuti aliyense alemekeze Mwanayo monga momwe amalemekezera Atate. Munthu amene salemekeza Mwana salemekezanso Atate amene anamutuma Mwanayo.
John5:24 “Zoonadi
John5:25 Zoonadi
John5:26 Pakuti monga Atate ali gwero la moyo
John5:27 Ndipo wamupatsa Iye ulamuliro woweruza chifukwa ndi Mwana wa Munthu.
John5:28 “Musadabwe ndi zimenezi. Pakuti nthawi ikubwera pamene onse amene ali mʼmanda adzamva mawu ake
John5:29 ndi kutuluka. Iwo amene anachita zabwino adzauka ndi kupita ku moyo wosatha ndipo amene anachita zoyipa adzauka ndi kupita ku chilango chamuyaya.
John5:30 Pakuti sindingathe kuchita kena kalikonse pa ndekha. Ine ndimaweruza molingana ndi zomwe Mulungu wandiwuza ndipo kuweruza kwanga ndi kolungama. Ine sindifuna kudzikondweretsa ndekha koma Iye amene anandituma.
John5:31 “Ngati ndidzichitira umboni ndekha
John5:32 Alipo wina amene amandichitira umboni wabwino. Ine ndikudziwa kuti umboni wake wonena za Ine ndi woona.
John5:33 “Inu munatumiza amithenga kwa Yohane ndipo iye anachitira umboni choona.
John5:34 Sikuti Ine ndikudalira umboni wa munthu; koma ndikunena zimenezi kuti mupulumutsidwe.
John5:35 Yohane anali ngati nyale imene imayaka ndi kuwala
John5:36 “Koma Ine ndili ndi umboni woposa uja wa Yohane. Pakuti ntchito imene Atate andipatsa kuti ndiyikwaniritse ndi imene ndikugwira
John5:37 Ndipo Atate amene anandituma Ine
John5:38 kapena mawu ake kukhala mwa inu
John5:39 Inu mumasanthula malemba chifukwa mumaganiza kuti mʼmalembamo muli moyo wosatha. Awa ndi malemba amene akundichitira umboni.
John5:40 Koma inu mukukana kubwera kwa Ine kuti mukhale ndi moyo.
John5:41 “Ine sindilandira ulemu kuchokera kwa anthu
John5:42 koma Ine ndikukudziwani. Ndikudziwa kuti mʼmitima mwanu mulibe chikondi cha Mulungu.
John5:43 Ine ndabwera mʼdzina la Atate anga
John5:44 Kodi inu mudzakhulupirira bwanji ngati mumapatsana ulemu wina ndi mnzake
John5:45 “Koma inu musaganize kuti Ine ndidzakunenezani kwa Atate. Wokunenezani ndi Mose
John5:46 Ngati mukanakhulupirira Mose
John5:47 Koma ngati simukhulupirira zimene iye analemba

John6:7 Filipo anamuyankha Iye kuti
John6:8 Mmodzi wa ophunzira ake

John6:16 Pofika madzulo
John6:17 kumene iwo analowa mʼbwato ndi kuyamba kuwoloka nyanja kupita ku Kaperenawo. Tsopano kunali kutada ndipo Yesu anali asanabwerere kwa iwo.
John6:18 Mphepo yamphamvu inawomba ndipo nyanja inalusa.
John6:19 Iwo atayenda makilomita asanu kapena asanu ndi limodzi
John6:20 Koma Iye anawawuza kuti
John6:21 Ndipo iwo analola kumutenga mʼbwatomo

John6:24 Nthawi yomwe gulu la anthu linaona kuti Yesu kapena ophunzira ake sanali pamenepo
John6:25 Atamupeza mbali ina ya nyanjayo
John6:26 Yesu anawayankha kuti
John6:27 Gwirani ntchito
John6:28 Kenaka anamufunsa Iye kuti
John6:29 Yesu anayankha kuti
John6:30 Choncho iwo anamufunsa Iye kuti
John6:31 Makolo athu akale anadya mana mʼchipululu; monga zalembedwa: ‘anawapatsa buledi wochokera kumwamba kuti adye.’ ”
John6:32 Yesu anawawuza kuti
John6:33 Pakuti chakudya cha Mulungu ndi Iye amene wabwera kuchokera kumwamba ndi kupereka moyo ku dziko la pansi.”
John6:34 Iwo anati
John6:35 Kenaka Yesu ananenetsa kuti
John6:36 Monga ndakuwuzani kale
John6:37 Zonse zimene Atate andipatsa zidzabwera kwa Ine
John6:38 Pakuti Ine ndinatsika kuchokera kumwamba osati kudzachita chifuniro changa koma cha Iye amene anandituma Ine.
John6:39 Ndipo chifuniro cha Iye amene anandituma Ine nʼchakuti ndisatayepo ngakhale ndi mmodzi yemwe mwa onse amene Iye wandipatsa
John6:40 Pakuti chifuniro cha Atate anga ndi chakuti aliyense amene aona Mwanayo namukhulupirira akhale ndi moyo wosatha
John6:41 Pamenepo Ayuda anayamba kungʼungʼudza chifukwa anati
John6:42 Iwo anati
John6:43 Yesu anayankha kuti
John6:44 Palibe munthu amene angabwere kwa Ine
John6:45 Aneneri analemba kuti
John6:46 Palibe amene anaona Atate koma yekhayo amene achokera kwa Mulungu; yekhayo ndiye anaona Atate.
John6:47 Zoonadi
John6:48 Ine ndine chakudya chamoyo.
John6:49 Makolo anu akale anadya mana mʼchipululu
John6:50 Koma pano pali chakudya chochokera kumwamba
John6:51 Ine ndine chakudya chamoyo chochokera kumwamba. Ngati munthu adya chakudya ichi
John6:52 Kenaka Ayuda anayamba kutsutsana kwambiri pakati pawo kuti
John6:53 Yesu anawawuza kuti
John6:54 Aliyense amene adya thupi langa ndi kumwa magazi anga ali ndi moyo wosatha ndipo Ine ndidzamuukitsa kwa akufa pa tsiku lomaliza.
John6:55 Pakuti thupi langa ndi chakudya chenicheni ndipo magazi anga ndi chakumwa chenicheni.
John6:56 Aliyense amene adya thupi langa ndi kumwa magazi anga amakhala mwa Ine
John6:57 Monga Atate amoyo anandituma Ine
John6:58 Ichi ndiye chakudya chimene chinatsika kuchokera kumwamba. Makolo athu akale anadya mana ndi kufa
John6:59 Iye ankanena izi pamene ankaphunzitsa mʼsunagoge mu Kaperenawo.
John6:60 Pakumva izi ambiri a ophunzira ake anati
John6:61 Pozindikira kuti ophunzira ake ankangʼungʼudza
John6:62 Nanga mutaona Mwana wa Munthu akukwera kupita kumene Iye anali poyamba!
John6:63 Mzimu Woyera apereka moyo
John6:64 Komabe alipo ena mwa inu amene sakukhulupirira.” Pakuti Yesu ankadziwa kuyambira pachiyambi ena mwa iwo amene samakhulupirira ndi amene adzamupereka Iye.
John6:65 Iye anapitiriza kunena kuti
John6:66 Kuyambira nthawi imeneyi ophunzira ake ambiri anabwerera ndipo sanamutsatenso Iye.
John6:67 Yesu anafunsa khumi ndi awiriwo kuti
John6:68 Simoni Petro anamuyankha Iye kuti
John6:69 Ife tikhulupirira ndi kudziwa kuti Inu ndinu Woyerayo wa Mulungu.”

John8:1 Koma Yesu anapita ku phiri la Olivi.
John8:2 Mmamawa Iye anaonekeranso ku Nyumba ya Mulungu kumene anthu onse anamuzungulira ndipo Iye anakhala pansi nawaphunzitsa.
John8:3 Aphunzitsi amalamulo ndi Afarisi anabweretsa mkazi amene anagwidwa akuchita chigololo. Iwo anamuyimiritsa patsogolo pa anthu ndipo
John8:4 anati kwa Yesu
John8:5 Mʼmalamulo a Mose anatilamulira kuti akazi otere tiwagende ndi miyala. Tsopano Inu mukuti chiyani?”
John8:6 Iwo anagwiritsa ntchito funsoli ngati msampha
John8:7 Pamene iwo anapitirira kumufunsa
John8:8 Iye anaweramanso pansi ndi kulemba pa dothi.
John8:9 Iwo atamva izi anayamba kuchoka mmodzimmodzi
John8:10 Yesu anaweramuka ndipo anamufunsa iye kuti
John8:11 Iye anati
John8:12 Yesu atayankhulanso kwa anthu
John8:13 Afarisi anamutsutsa Iye nati
John8:14 Yesu anayankha kuti
John8:15 Inu mumaweruza potsata maganizo a anthu chabe. Ine sindiweruza munthu wina aliyense.
John8:16 Koma Ine ndikati ndiweruze
John8:17 Mʼmalamulo anu munalembedwa kuti umboni wa anthu awiri ndi wovomerezeka.
John8:18 Ine ndikudzichitira ndekha umboni; ndipo mboni inanso ndi Atate amene anandituma.”
John8:19 Kenaka iwo anamufunsa Iye kuti
John8:20 Iye anayankhula mawu awa pamene amaphunzitsa Nyumba ya Mulungu pafupi ndi malo amene amaponyapo zopereka. Komabe palibe amene anamugwira Iye
John8:21 Kenakanso Yesu anawawuza kuti
John8:22 Izi zinachititsa Ayuda kufunsa kuti
John8:23 Koma Iye anapitiriza kuti
John8:24 Ine ndinakuwuzani kuti mudzafera mʼmachimo anu ngati simukhulupirira kuti Ine Ndine. Ndithu inu mudzafera mʼmachimo anu.”
John8:25 Iwo anafunsa kuti
John8:26 ndili ndi zambiri zoti ndinene zoweruza inu. Koma Iye amene anandituma ndi woona
John8:27 Iwo sanazindikire kuti Iye amawawuza za Atate ake.
John8:28 Choncho Yesu anati
John8:29 Iye amene anandituma Ine ali nane pamodzi. Iye sanandisiye ndekha popeza nthawi zonse ndimachita zomwe zimamukondweretsa Iye.”
John8:30 Pamene Iye ankayankhula zimenezi
John8:31 Kwa Ayuda amene anamukhulupirira
John8:32 Tsono mudzadziwa choonadi
John8:33 Iwo anamuyankha Iye kuti
John8:34 Yesu anayankha kuti
John8:35 Pajatu kapolo alibe malo wokhazikika mʼbanja
John8:36 Nʼchifukwa chake ngati Mwana adzakumasulani
John8:37 Ine ndikudziwa kuti inu ndinu zidzukulu za Abrahamu. Chonsecho inu mwakonzeka kundipha Ine
John8:38 Ine ndikukuwuzani zimene ndaziona pamaso pa Atate
John8:39 Iwo anayankha kuti
John8:40 Koma mmene zililimu
John8:41 Inu mukuchita zinthu zimene abambo anu amachita.” Iwo anatsutsa kuti
John8:42 Yesu anawawuza kuti
John8:43 Nʼchifukwa chiyani simukumvetsetsa mawu anga? Chifukwa chake nʼchakuti simungathe kumva zoyankhula zanga.
John8:44 Inu ndinu ana a mdierekezi. Iye ndiye abambo anu ndipo mukufuna kuchita zimene abambo anuwo amakhumba. Iye anali wakupha kuyambira pachiyambi
John8:45 Koma chifukwa ndikuwuzani choonadi
John8:46 Ndani mwa inu angatsimikize kuti ndine wochimwa? Ngati Ine ndikunena choonadi
John8:47 Munthu wochokera kwa Mulungu amamva zimene Mulungu amanena. Chifukwa chimene simumvera nʼchakuti
John8:48 Ayuda anamuyankha Iye kuti
John8:49 Yesu anati
John8:50 Ine sindidzifunira ndekha ulemu; koma alipo wina amene amandifunira
John8:51 Ine ndikukuwuzani choonadi
John8:52 Pamenepo Ayuda anafuwula kuti
John8:53 Kodi ndinu wa mkulu kuposa abambo athu Abrahamu? Iye anafa
John8:54 Yesu anayankha kuti
John8:55 Ngakhale kuti inuyo simukumudziwa
John8:56 Abambo anu Abrahamu anakondwera poyembekezera kubwera kwanga. Iwo anandiona ndipo anasangalala.”
John8:57 Ayuda anati kwa Iye
John8:58 Yesu anayankha kuti
John8:59 Pamenepo iwo anatola miyala kuti amugende
John9:1 Iye akuyendabe
John9:2 Ophunzira ake anamufunsa Iye kuti
John9:3 Yesu anayankha kuti
John9:4 Ife tiyenera kugwira ntchito za Iye amene anandituma kukanali masana. Usiku ukubwera
John9:5 Pamene Ine ndili mʼdziko lapansi
John9:6 Atanena izi
John9:7 Yesu anamuwuza iye kuti
John9:8 Anzake ndi iwo amene anamuona iye poyamba akupempha anafunsa kuti
John9:9 Ena ananena kuti anali yemweyo. Ena anati
John9:10 Iwo anafunsitsa kuti
John9:11 Iye anayankha kuti
John9:12 Iwo anamufunsa iye kuti
John9:13 Iwo anabwera naye munthu amene poyamba anali wosaona kwa Afarisi.
John9:14 Tsono linali la Sabata tsiku limene Yesu anakanda dothi ndi kutsekula maso a munthuyu.
John9:15 Choncho Afarisi anamufunsanso iye momwe analandirira kuona kwake. Munthuyo anayankha kuti
John9:16 Ena a Afarisi anati
John9:17 Pomaliza iwo anatembenukiranso kwa munthu amene anali wosaona uja nati
John9:18 Ayuda sanakhulupirirebe kuti iye anali wosaona ndi kuti anayamba kuona kufikira atayitana makolo ake.
John9:19 Iwo anafunsa kuti
John9:20 Makolo anayankha kuti
John9:21 Koma sitidziwa zimene zachitika kuti tsopano azipenya. Amenenso wamupenyetsa sitikumudziwa. Mufunseni ndi wamkulu; iye adziyankhira yekha.”
John9:22 Makolo ake ananena izi chifukwa amaopa Ayuda
John9:23 Ichi ndi chifukwa chake makolo ake anati
John9:24 Iwo anamuyitanitsa kachiwiri munthu amene anali wosaonayo. Iwo anati
John9:25 Iye anayankha kuti
John9:26 Kenaka anamufunsa kuti
John9:27 Iye anayankha kuti
John9:28 Pamenepo anamunyoza ndipo anati
John9:29 Ife tikudziwa kuti Mulungu anayankhula kwa Mose
John9:30 Munthuyo anayankha kuti
John9:31 Ife tikudziwa kuti Mulungu samvera wochimwa. Iye amamvera munthu woopa Mulungu amene amachita chifuniro chake.
John9:32 Palibe amene anamvapo za kutsekula maso a munthu wobadwa wosaona.
John9:33 Ngati munthu uyu akanakhala wosachokera kwa Mulungu
John9:34 Pamenepo anayankha kuti
John9:35 Yesu anamva kuti anamutulutsa kunja ndipo pamene anamupeza anati
John9:36 Munthuyo anafunsa kuti
John9:37 Yesu anati
John9:38 Pamenepo munthuyo anati
John9:39 Yesu anati

John9:41 Yesu anati
John10:1 “Zoonadi
John10:2 Munthu amene amalowera pa khomo ndi mʼbusa wankhosazo.
John10:3 Mlonda amamutsekulira khomo
John10:4 Akazitulutsa nkhosa zake zonse
John10:5 Koma nkhosazo sizidzatsatira mlendo. Izo zidzamuthawa chifukwa sizizindikira mawu a mlendo.”
John10:6 Yesu ananena mawu ophiphiritsawa
John10:7 Choncho Yesu anatinso
John10:8 Onse amene anadza ndisanabwere Ine ndi akuba ndi achifwamba
John10:9 Ine ndine khomo
John10:10 Mbala sibwera chabe koma kuti idzabe
John10:11 “Ine ndine Mʼbusa wabwino. Mʼbusa wabwino amataya moyo wake chifukwa cha nkhosa zake.
John10:12 Wantchito ndi mʼbusa amene nkhosazo si zake. Choncho
John10:13 Munthuyo amathawa chifukwa ndi wantchito ndipo sasamalira chilichonse cha nkhosazo.
John10:14 “Ine ndine mʼbusa wabwino. Ine ndimazidziwa nkhosa zanga ndipo nkhosa zangazo zimandidziwa
John10:15 monga momwe Atate amandidziwa Ine
John10:16 Ine ndili ndi nkhosa zina zimene sizili za gulu ili. Ine ndiyenera kuzibweretsanso. Izonso zidzamvera mawu anga
John10:17 Nʼchifukwa chake Atate anga amandikonda
John10:18 Palibe amene angawuchotse mwa Ine
John10:19 Pa mawu awa Ayuda anagawikananso.
John10:20 Ambiri a iwo anati
John10:21 Koma ena anati
John10:22 Ku Yerusalemu kunali chikondwerero chokumbukira kupatulidwa kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu. Inali nthawi yozizira
John10:23 ndipo Yesu ankayenda mʼbwalo la Nyumbayo ku malo a Solomoni.
John10:24 Ayuda anamuzungulira Iye akunena kuti
John10:25 Yesu anayankha kuti
John10:26 koma inu simukhulupirira chifukwa simuli a gulu lankhosa zanga.
John10:27 Nkhosa zanga zimamva mawu anga
John10:28 Ine ndimazipatsa moyo wosatha ndipo sizidzawonongeka. Palibe amene adzazikwatula mʼdzanja langa.
John10:29 Atate anga
John10:30 Ine ndi Atate ndife amodzi.”
John10:31 Ayuda anatolanso miyala kuti amugende Iye
John10:32 koma Yesu anawawuza kuti
John10:33 Ayuda anayankha kuti
John10:34 Yesu anawayankha kuti
John10:35 Ngati anawatcha milungu anthu amene analandira mawu a Mulungu
John10:36 nanga bwanji uyu amene Atate anamuyika padera monga wake weniweni ndi kumutuma ku dziko lapansi? Nanga ndi chifukwa chiyani mukundinena Ine kuti ndikuchita chipongwe? Kodi nʼchifukwa choti ndanena kuti
John10:37 Musandikhulupirire Ine ngati sindichita ntchito za Atate anga.
John10:38 Koma ngati Ine ndikuchita zimenezi
John10:39 Iwo anafuna kumugwiranso koma anawapulumuka mʼmanja mwawo.
John10:40 Kenaka Yesu anabwereranso kutsidya la mtsinje wa Yorodani kumalo kumene Yohane ankabatiza mʼmasiku akale. Iye anakhala kumeneko
John10:41 ndipo anthu ambiri anabwera kwa Iye. Iwo anati
John10:42 Ndipo pamalo amenewo ambiri anakhulupirira Yesu.
John11:1 Tsopano munthu wina dzina lake Lazaro anadwala. Iye anali wa ku Betaniya
John11:2 Mariyayo ndi yemwe uja amene anadzoza Ambuye ndi mafuta onunkhira napukuta mapazi ake ndi tsitsi lake. Lazaro wodwalayo anali mlongo wake.
John11:3 Choncho alongo ake anatumiza mawu kwa Yesu kuti
John11:4 Atamva izi
John11:5 Yesu anakonda Marita
John11:6 Koma atamva kuti Lazaro akudwala
John11:7 Kenaka anati kwa ophunzira ake
John11:8 Ophunzira akewo anati
John11:9 Yesu anayankha kuti
John11:10 Koma amene akuyenda usiku amapunthwa
John11:11 Iye atatha kunena izi
John11:12 Ophunzira ake anayankha kuti
John11:13 Yesu ankayankhula za imfa yake koma ophunzira ake ankaganiza kuti amanena za tulo chabe.
John11:14 Ndipo kenaka anawawuza momveka kuti
John11:15 Ine ndikukondwera chifukwa cha inu kuti kunalibe kumeneko; koma kuti mukakhulupirire tiyeni tipiteko.”
John11:16 Pamenepo Tomasi
John11:17 Yesu atafika
John11:18 Mudzi wa Betaniya unali pafupi ndi Yerusalemu pa mtunda wosachepera makilomita atatu
John11:19 ndipo Ayuda ambiri anabwera kwa Marita ndi Mariya kudzawatonthoza pa imfa ya mʼbale wawo.
John11:20 Pamene Marita anamva kuti Yesu akubwera
John11:21 Marita anati kwa Yesu
John11:22 Koma ine ndikudziwa kuti ngakhale tsopano Mulungu adzakupatsani chilichonse chimene mudzamupempha.”
John11:23 Yesu anati kwa iye
John11:24 Marita anayankha kuti
John11:25 Yesu anati kwa iye
John11:26 Aliyense amene ali ndi moyo ndi kukhulupirira Ine sadzamwalira. Kodi iwe ukukhulupirira izi?”
John11:27 Marita anamuwuza Iye kuti
John11:28 Ndipo iye atanena izi anabwerera ndi kukayitana mchemwali wake Mariya namuyankhula monongʼona pambali
John11:29 Mariya atamva izi
John11:30 Tsopano nʼkuti Yesu asanalowe mʼmudzi
John11:31 Ayuda amene ankamutonthoza Mariya mʼnyumba
John11:32 Mariya anafika pamalo pamene panali Yesu ndipo atamuona
John11:33 Yesu ataona iye akulira
John11:34 Iye anafunsa kuti
John11:35 Yesu analira.
John11:36 Pamenepo Ayuda anati
John11:37 Koma ena a iwo anati
John11:38 Yesu atakhudzidwanso kwambiri anafika ku manda. Manda akewo anali phanga ndipo anatsekapo ndi mwala.
John11:39 Yesu anati
John11:40 Kenaka Yesu anati
John11:41 Choncho iwo anachotsa mwalawo. Kenaka Yesu anayangʼana kumwamba ndikuti
John11:42 Ine ndimadziwa kuti Inu mumandimvera nthawi zonse
John11:43 Yesu atanena izi
John11:44 Munthu womwalirayo anatuluka
John11:45 Choncho Ayuda ambiri amene anabwera kudzamuchereza Mariya ndi kuona zimene Yesu anachita anamukhulupirira Iye.
John11:46 Koma ena a iwo anapita kwa Afarisi ndi kukawawuza zimene Yesu anachita.
John11:47 Kenaka akulu a ansembe ndi Afarisi anayitanitsa msonkhano wa akulu olamulira. Iwo anafunsa kuti
John11:48 Ngati ife timuleka kuti apitirize chotere
John11:49 Kenaka mmodzi wa iwo
John11:50 Inu simukuzindikira kuti kuli bwino kwa inu kuti munthu mmodzi afe mʼmalo mwa anthu kusiyana ndi kuti mtundu wonse uwonongeke.”
John11:51 Iye sananene izi mwa iye yekha
John11:52 ndipo osati mtundu okhawo komanso kwa ana ena a Mulungu onse obalalikana
John11:53 Choncho kuyambira tsiku limeneli iwo anakonzekera za kuti amuphe.
John11:54 Chifukwa cha ichi Yesu sanayendenso moonekera pakati pa Ayuda. Mʼmalo mwake Iye anapita ku chigawo cha kufupi ndi chipululu
John11:55 Nthawi ya Paska wa Ayuda itayandikira
John11:56 Iwo anapitiriza kumufunafuna Yesu
John11:57 Koma akulu a ansembe ndi Afarisi anapereka lamulo kuti ngati wina aliyense adziwe kumene kunali Yesu
John12:1 Masiku asanu ndi limodzi Paska asanafike
John12:2 Kumeneko anamukonzera Yesu chakudya cha madzulo. Marita anatumikira pamene Lazaro anali mmodzi wa iwo amene anakhala nawo pa chakudyacho.
John12:3 Kenaka Mariya anatenga botolo la mafuta a nadi
John12:4 Koma mmodzi wa ophunzira ake
John12:5 “Nʼchifukwa chiyani mafuta awa sanagulitsidwe ndipo ndalama zake nʼkuzipereka kwa osauka?” Mafutawo anali a mtengo wa malipiro a chaka chimodzi.
John12:6 Iye sananene izi chifukwa cha kuganizira osauka koma chifukwa anali mbava; ngati wosunga thumba la ndalama
John12:7 Yesu anayankha kuti
John12:8 Inu mudzakhala ndi osauka nthawi zonse
John12:9 Pa nthawi imeneyi gulu lalikulu la Ayuda linadziwa kuti Yesu anali kumeneko
John12:10 Choncho akulu a ansembe anakonza njira yoti aphenso Lazaro
John12:11 pakuti chifukwa cha iye Ayuda ambiri amapita kwa Yesu ndi kumukhulupirira.
John12:12 Tsiku lotsatira
John12:13 Iwo anatenga nthambi za kanjedza ndi kupita kukakumana naye
John12:14 Yesu anapeza bulu wamngʼono ndi kukwerapo
John12:15 “Usachite mantha mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni; taona mfumu yako ikubwera
John12:16 Poyamba ophunzira ake sanamvetsetse zonsezi. Koma pomwe Yesu analemekezedwa ndi pamene anazindikira kuti zinthu izi zinalembedwa ndipo kuti anamuchitira Iye.
John12:17 Tsopano gulu la anthu lomwe linali naye pa nthawi imene amaukitsidwa Lazaro ku manda linapitiriza kuchitira umboni.
John12:18 Anthu ambiri
John12:19 Choncho Afarisi anati kwa wina ndi mnzake
John12:20 Tsopano panali Agriki ena pakati pa amene anapita kukapembedza ku phwando.
John12:21 Iwo anabwera kwa Filipo
John12:22 Filipo anapita kukawuza Andreya; Andreya ndi Filipo pamodzi anakawuza Yesu.
John12:23 Yesu anayankha kuti
John12:24 Zoonadi
John12:25 Munthu amene amakonda moyo wake adzawutaya
John12:26 Aliyense amene atumikira Ine ayenera kunditsata; ndipo kumene Ine ndili
John12:27 “Moyo wanga ukuvutika tsopano
John12:28 Atate
John12:29 Gulu la anthu lomwe linali pamenepo litamva linati
John12:30 Yesu anati
John12:31 Ino tsopano ndi nthawi yachiweruzo pa dziko lapansi; tsopano olamulira wa dziko lapansi adzathamangitsidwa.
John12:32 Koma Ine
John12:33 Iye ananena izi kuti aonetse mmene adzafere.
John12:34 Gulu la anthu linayankha kuti
John12:35 Kenaka Yesu anawawuza kuti
John12:36 Khulupirirani kuwunika
John12:37 Ngakhale Yesu anachita zizindikiro zodabwitsa zonsezi pamaso pawo
John12:38 Izi zinakwaniritsa mawu a mneneri Yesaya kuti: “Ambuye
John12:39 Pa chifukwa cha ichi iwo sanakhulupirire
John12:40 “Iye wachititsa khungu maso awo ndi kuwumitsa mitima yawo
John12:41 Yesaya ananena izi chifukwa anaona ulemerero wa Yesu ndi kuyankhula za Iye.
John12:42 Komabe pa nthawi yomweyi ambiri ngakhale atsogoleri anakhulupirira Iye. Koma chifukwa cha Afarisi iwo sanavomereze chikhulupiriro chawo chifukwa amaopa kuti angawatulutse mʼsunagoge;
John12:43 pakuti iwo amakonda kuyamikiridwa ndi anthu kuposa kuyamikiridwa ndi Mulungu.
John12:44 Kenaka Yesu anafuwula nati
John12:45 Iye amene waona Ine
John12:46 Ine ndabwera mʼdziko lapansi monga kuwunika
John12:47 “Ndipo munthu amene amva mawu anga koma osawasunga
John12:48 Iye amene akana Ine ndipo salandira mawu anga ali ndi womuweruza. Tsiku lomaliza mawu amene ndiyankhulawa adzamutsutsa.
John12:49 Pakuti Ine sindiyankhula mwa Ine ndekha
John12:50 Ine ndikudziwa kuti lamulo lake ndi moyo wosatha. Choncho chilichonse chimene Ine ndinena ndi chimene Atate andiwuza.”
John13:1 Inali pafupifupi nthawi ya phwando la Paska. Yesu anadziwa kuti nthawi yafika yoti achoke mʼdziko lapansi ndi kupita kwa Atate. Atawakonda ake amene anali mʼdziko lapansi
John13:2 Atayamba kudya mgonero
John13:3 Yesu podziwa kuti Atate anamupatsa Iye zonse mʼmanja mwake
John13:4 anayimirira kuchoka pa chakudya navula zovala zake natenga nsalu yopukutira nadzimanga mʼchiwuno mwake.
John13:5 Atachita izi
John13:6 Atafika pa Petro
John13:7 Yesu anayankha kuti
John13:8 Petro anati
John13:9 Simoni Petro anayankha kuti
John13:10 Yesu anayankha kuti
John13:11 Pakuti Iye anadziwa amene adzamupereka
John13:12 Iye atamaliza kusambitsa mapazi awo anavala zovala zake ndi kubwerera pamalo pake. Iye anawafunsa kuti
John13:13 Inu mumanditcha Ine
John13:14 Tsono ngati Ine
John13:15 Ine ndakupatsani chitsanzo kuti muzichita monga Ine ndachitira.
John13:16 Zoonadi
John13:17 Ngati inu mudziwa zinthu zimenezi
John13:18 “Ine sindikunena za inu nonse. Ine ndikudziwa amene ndinawasankha. Koma izi zikukwaniritsa malemba: ‘Iye amene akudya nawo chakudya changa
John13:19 “Ine ndikukuwuzani tsopano zisanachitike zimenezi
John13:20 Zoonadi
John13:21 Yesu atanena izi
John13:22 Ophunzira ake anapenyetsetsana wina ndi mnzake
John13:23 Mmodzi wa ophunzira ake amene Yesu anamukonda
John13:24 Simoni Petro anamukodola wophunzirayo ndi kuti
John13:25 Atamutsamiranso Yesuyo
John13:26 Yesu anayankha kuti
John13:27 Nthawi yomweyo Yudasi atangodya bulediyo
John13:28 Koma panalibe ndi mmodzi yemwe pa chakudyapo amene anamvetsa chifukwa chimene Yesu ananenera izi kwa iye.
John13:29 Popeza Yudasi amasunga ndalama
John13:30 Nthawi yomweyo Yudasi atangodya buledi
John13:31 Yudasi atatuluka

John13:33 “Ana anga

John13:36 Simoni Petro anafunsa kuti
John13:37 Petro anafunsa kuti

John14:1 “Mtima wanu usavutike. Khulupirirani Mulungu; khulupirirani Inenso.
John14:2 Mʼnyumba mwa Atate anga muli zipinda zambiri. Kukanakhala kuti mulibemo ndikanakuwuzani. Ine ndikupita kumeneko kukakukonzerani malo.
John14:3 Ndipo ndikapita kukakukonzerani malo
John14:4 Inu mukudziwa njira ya kumene Ine ndikupita.”
John14:5 Tomasi anati kwa Iye
John14:6 Yesu anayankha kuti
John14:7 Mukanandidziwadi Ine
John14:8 Filipo anati
John14:9 Yesu anayankha kuti
John14:10 Kodi sukukhulupirira kuti Ine ndili mwa Atate
John14:11 Khulupirirani Ine pamene ndi kuti Ine ndili mwa Atate ndipo Atate ali mwa Ine. Koma ngati si chomwecho
John14:12 Zoonadi
John14:13 Ndipo Ine ndidzachita chilichonse chimene inu mudzapempha mʼdzina langa kuti Atate alemekezedwe mwa Mwana.
John14:14 Ngati mudzapempha kanthu kalikonse mʼdzina langa
John14:15 “Ngati mundikonda Ine
John14:16 Ine ndidzapempha Atate
John14:17 Nkhosweyo ndiye Mzimu wachoonadi. Dziko lapansi silingalandire Nkhosweyi chifukwa samuona kapena kumudziwa. Koma inu mumamudziwa pakuti amakhala nanu ndipo adzakhala mwa inu.
John14:18 Ine sindikusiyani nokha kuti mukhale ana amasiye. Ine ndidzabweranso kwa inu.
John14:19 Patsala nthawi yochepa dziko lapansi silidzandionanso koma inu mudzandiona. Popeza kuti Ine ndili ndi moyo
John14:20 Tsiku limenelo inu mudzazindikira kuti Ine ndili mwa Atate
John14:21 Iye amene amadziwa malamulo anga ndi kuwasunga ndiye amene amandikonda. Wokonda Ine adzakondedwa ndi Atate wanga ndipo Inenso ndidzamukonda ndikudzionetsa ndekha kwa iye.”
John14:22 Kenaka Yudasi (osati Yudasi Isikarioti) anati
John14:23 Yesu anamuyankha kuti
John14:24 Iye amene sandikonda Ine sasunga mawu anga. Mawu awa amene mukumva si anga ndi a Atate amene anandituma Ine.
John14:25 “Ndayankhula zonsezi ndikanali nanu.
John14:26 Koma Nkhosweyo
John14:27 Ine ndikukusiyirani mtendere. Ndikukupatsani mtendere wanga. Ine sindikukupatsani monga dziko lapansi limaperekera. Mtima wanu usavutike ndipo musachite mantha.
John14:28 “Inu munamva Ine ndikunena kuti
John14:29 Ine ndakuwuzani tsopano zisanachitike
John14:30 Ine sindiyankhulanso nanu zambiri nthawi yayitali popeza wolamulira dziko lapansi akubwera. Iye alibe mphamvu pa Ine
John14:31 koma kuti dziko lapansi lizindikire kuti Ine ndimakonda Atate ndi kuti ndimachita zokhazokha zimene Atate wandilamulira Ine. “Nyamukani; tizipita.”
John15:1 “Ine ndine mpesa weniweni
John15:2 Iye amadula nthambi iliyonse ya mwa Ine imene sibala chipatso
John15:3 Inu ndinu oyera kale chifukwa cha mawu amene ndayankhula inu.
John15:4 Khalani mwa Ine
John15:5 “Ine ndine mpesa; inu ndinu nthambi zake. Ngati munthu akhala mwa Ine ndi Ine mwa iye
John15:6 Ngati wina aliyense sakhala mwa Ine
John15:7 Ngati inu mukhala mwa Ine ndipo mawu anga akhala mwa inu
John15:8 Atate anga amalemekezedwa mukamabereka zipatso zochuluka
John15:9 “Monga momwe Atate amandikondera Ine
John15:10 Ngati mumvera malamulo anga
John15:11 Ine ndakuwuzani izi kuti chimwemwe changa chikhale mwa Inu
John15:12 Lamulo langa ndi ili: ‘Kondanani wina ndi mnzake monga Ine ndakonda inu.’
John15:13 Palibe munthu ali ndi chikondi choposa ichi
John15:14 Inu ndinu abwenzi anga ngati muchita zimene Ine ndikulamulani.
John15:15 Ine sindikutchulaninso antchito
John15:16 Inu simunandisankhe Ine
John15:17 Lamulo langa ndi ili: ‘Muzikondana.’
John15:18 “Ngati dziko lapansi lidana nanu
John15:19 Inu mukanakhala anthu a dziko lapansi
John15:20 Kumbukirani mawu amene ndinayankhula nanu akuti
John15:21 Iwo adzakuchitani zimenezi chifukwa cha dzina langa
John15:22 Ine ndikanapanda kubwera ndi kuyankhula nawo
John15:23 Iye amene amadana ndi Ine amadananso Atate anga.
John15:24 Ine ndikanapanda kuchita pakati pawo zinthu zimene wina aliyense sanachitepo
John15:25 Koma zatere kuti zikwaniritse zimene zinalembedwa mʼmalamulo awo: ‘Iwo anandida Ine popanda chifukwa.’
