John16:1 “Ine ndakuwuzani zonsezi kuti musadzakhumudwe.
John16:2 Iwo adzakuchotsani mʼsunagoge mwawo. Kunena zoona
John16:3 Iwo adzachita zoterozo chifukwa sanadziwe Atate kapena Inenso.
John16:4 Ine ndakuwuzani izi kuti nthawi ikadzafika mudzakumbukire kuti Ine ndinakuchenjezani kale. Ine sindinakuwuzeni izi poyamba paja chifukwa ndinali nanu.”
John16:5 “Tsopano Ine ndikupita kwa Iye amene anandituma koma palibe wina mwa inu akundifunsa kuti
John16:6 Muli ndi chisoni kwambiri chifukwa ndakuwuzani zimene.
John16:7 Komatu ndakuwuzani zoona. Ine ndikuti kuli bwino kwa inu kuti ndichoke. Ngati sindichoka
John16:8 Iye akabwera
John16:9 Za uchimo
John16:10 Za chilungamo
John16:11 Za chiweruzo
John16:12 “Ine ndili ndi zambiri zoti ndiyankhule nanu
John16:13 Koma pamene Iye
John16:14 Iye adzalemekeza Ine chifukwa adzatenga za Ine nadzakudziwitsani.
John16:15 Zonse za Atate ndi zanga. Ichi nʼchifukwa chake Ine ndanena kuti Mzimu Woyera adzatenga kwa Ine zanga kuti muzidziwe.”
John16:16 Yesu anapitiriza kuyankhula kuti
John16:17 Ena a ophunzira ake anati kwa wina ndi mnzake
John16:18 Iwo anapitiriza kufunsana kuti
John16:19 Yesu anadziwa kuti ankafuna kuti amufunse za zimenezi
John16:20 Zoonadi
John16:21 Mayi akamabereka mwana amamva ululu chifukwa nthawi yake yafika; koma mwana wake akabadwa amayiwala ululu wake chifukwa cha chimwemwe chake chakuti mwana wabadwa mʼdziko lapansi.
John16:22 Chimodzimodzinso ndi inu. Tsopano ino ndi nthawi yanu yomva chisoni
John16:23 Tsiku limenelo inu simudzandipemphanso kalikonse. Ine ndikukuwuzani zoona kuti Atate anga adzakupatsani chilichonse chimene mudzapempha mʼdzina langa.
John16:24 Mpaka tsopano simunapemphe kalikonse mʼdzina langa. Pemphani ndipo mudzalandira
John16:25 “Ngakhale ndakhala ndikuyankhula mʼmafanizo
John16:26 Tsiku limenelo inu mudzapempha mʼdzina langa. Ine sindikunena kuti ndidzapempha Atate mʼmalo mwanu ayi.
John16:27 Atate mwini anakukondani chifukwa inu mwandikonda Ine ndipo mwakhulupirira kuti Ine ndinabwera kuchokera kwa Atate.
John16:28 Ine ndinabwera kuchokera kwa Atate ndi kulowa mʼdziko lapansi. Tsopano ndikulisiya dziko lapansi kubwerera kwa Atate.”
John16:29 Kenaka ophunzira ake anati
John16:30 Tsopano ife tikuona kuti Inu mumadziwa zinthu zonse ndi kuti sipafunika wina aliyense kukufunsani. Mwa ichi ife takhulupirira kuti Inu munachokera kwa Mulungu.”
John16:31 Yesu anawafunsa kuti
John16:32 Koma nthawi ikubwera ndipo yafika
John16:33 “Ine ndakuwuzani izi kuti mwa Ine mukhale nawo mtendere. Mʼdziko lapansi mudzakhala nawo mavuto. Koma limbikani mtima! Ine ndaligonjetsa dziko lapansi.”
John17:1 Yesu atatha kunena izi
John17:2 Pakuti Inu munamupatsa Iye ulamuliro pa anthu onse kuti apereke moyo wosatha kwa onse amene mwamupatsa.
John17:3 Tsono moyo wosathawo ndi uwu: Iwo akudziweni Inu
John17:4 Ine ndabweretsa ulemerero wanu pa dziko pamene ndamaliza ntchito imene munandipatsa kuti ndi igwire.
John17:5 Ndipo tsopano
John17:6 “Ine ndawadziwitsa za Inu anthu amene munandipatsa mʼdziko lapansi. Iwo anali anu. Inu munawapereka kwa Ine ndipo amvera mawu anu.
John17:7 Tsopano akudziwa kuti zonse zimene munandipatsa nʼzochokera kwa Inu.
John17:8 Pakuti Ine ndiwapatsa mawu amene Inu munandipatsa ndipo awalandira. Iwo akudziwa ndithu kuti Ine ndinachokera kwa Inu
John17:9 Ine ndikuwapempherera. Ine sindikupempherera dziko lapansi
John17:10 Zonse zimene Ine ndili nazo ndi zanu
John17:11 Ine sindikukhalanso mʼdziko lapansi nthawi yayitali
John17:12 Pamene ndinali nawo
John17:13 “Tsopano ndikubwera kwa Inu. Ndikunena izi ndikanali mʼdziko lapansi
John17:14 Ine ndawapatsa mawu anu ndipo dziko lapansi likudana nawo
John17:15 Sindikupempha kuti muwachotse mʼdziko lapansi koma kuti muwateteze kwa woyipayo.
John17:16 Iwo si a dziko lapansi
John17:17 Ayeretseni ndi choonadi chanu. Mawu anu ndiye choonadi.
John17:18 Monga Inu munandituma Ine mʼdziko lapansi
John17:19 Chifukwa cha iwowa Ine ndikudziyeretsa
John17:20 “Ine sindikupempherera iwo okhawa
John17:21 Ndikuwapempherera kuti onsewa akhale amodzi. Monga Inu Atate muli mwa Ine ndi Ine mwa Inu
John17:22 Ine ndawapatsa ulemerero umene munandipatsa Ine
John17:23 Ine ndikhale mwa iwo ndipo Inu mwa Ine kuti umodzi wawo ukhale wangwiro. Choncho dziko lapansi lidzadziwa kuti Inu munandituma Ine ndipo Inu mwawakonda iwowa monga momwe Inu munandikondera Ine.

Acts1:10 Yesu akukwera kumwamba
Acts1:11 Iwo anati

Acts2:10 ku Frugiya ndi Pamfiliya

Acts2:17 “ ‘Mulungu akuti
Acts2:18 Ngakhalenso pa antchito anga aamuna ndi aakazi
Acts2:19 Ndipo ndidzaonetsa zodabwitsa mlengalenga ndi zizindikiro pa dziko lapansi pano
Acts2:20 Dzuwa lidzadetsedwa ndipo mwezi udzaoneka ngati magazi lisanafike tsiku lalikulu ndi laulemerero la Ambuye.
Acts2:21 Ndipo aliyense amene adzayitana pa dzina la Ambuye adzapulumuka.’
Acts2:22 “Inu Aisraeli mverani mawu awa; Yesu wa ku Nazareti anali munthu amene anaperekedwa kwa inu ndi Mulungu. Ndipo Mulungu anakutsimikizirani zimenezi ndi zamphamvu
Acts2:23 Yesu ameneyu anaperekedwa kwa inu mwa kufuna ndi kudziwiratu kwa Mulungu; ndipo inu mothandizidwa ndi anthu oyipa
Acts2:24 Koma Mulungu anamuukitsa kwa akufa
Acts2:25 Pakuti Davide ananena za Iye kuti
Acts2:26 Chifukwa chake mtima wanga ndi wokondwa ndipo lilime langa likukondwera; thupi langanso lidzakhala ndi chiyembekezo.
Acts2:27 Chifukwa simudzasiya moyo wanga kumalo a anthu akufa
Acts2:28 Inu munandidziwitsa ine njira zamoyo; Inu mudzandidzaza ndi chimwemwe pamaso panu.’
Acts2:29 “Abale
Acts2:30 Koma iye anali mneneri ndipo anadziwa kuti Mulungu analonjeza ndi lumbiro kuti adzayika mmodzi wa zidzukulu zake pa mpando waufumu.
Acts2:31 Davide ataoneratu zimene zinali mʼtsogolo anayankhula za kuuka kwa Khristu
Acts2:32 Mulungu wamuukitsa Yesu ameneyu
Acts2:33 Khristu anakwezedwa kukhala kudzanja lamanja la Mulungu
Acts2:34 Pakuti si Davide anakwera kumwamba koma iye akuti
Acts2:35 mpaka nditasandutsa adani ako kukhala chopondapo mapazi ako.’
Acts2:36 “Nʼchifukwa chake
Acts2:37 Anthu atamva zimenezi
Acts2:38 Petro anawayankha kuti
Acts2:39 Pakuti lonjezoli ndi lanu ndi ana anu ndiponso la onse amene ali kutali
Acts2:40 Petro anawachenjeza ndi mawu ena ambiri
Acts2:41 Iwo amene anawulandira uthenga wake anabatizidwa ndipo tsiku lomwelo miyoyo pafupifupi 3
Acts2:42 Iwo ankasonkhana pamodzi kuphunzitsidwa ndi atumwi
Acts2:43 Aliyense ankachita mantha chifukwa cha zodabwitsa ndi zizindikiro zambiri zimene atumwi ankachita.
Acts2:44 Okhulupirira onse anali pamodzi ndipo aliyense ankapereka zinthu zake kuti zikhale za onse.
Acts2:45 Ankagulitsa minda yawo ndi katundu wawo
Acts2:46 Tsiku ndi tsiku ankasonkhana pamodzi pa bwalo la pa Nyumba ya Mulungu. Ankadya pamodzi mʼnyumba zawo mwasangala ndi mtima woona.
Acts2:47 Ankayamika Mulungu ndipo anthu onse ankawakomera mtima. Ndipo tsiku ndi tsiku Ambuye ankawonjezera ena pa chiwerengero cha olandira chipulumutso.
Acts3:1 Tsiku lina Petro ndi Yohane ankapita ku Nyumba ya Mulungu kukapemphera nthawi ya 3 koloko masana.
Acts3:2 Ndipo munthu wolumala chibadwire ankanyamulidwa tsiku ndi tsiku kukayikidwa pa khomo la Nyumbayo lotchedwa Khomo Lokongola kuti azikapempha amene amalowa ku bwalo la Nyumbayo.
Acts3:3 Ataona Petro ndi Yohane ali pafupi kulowa anawapempha ndalama.
Acts3:4 Iwo anamuyangʼanitsitsa iye. Kenaka Petro anati
Acts3:5 Munthuyo anawayangʼanitsitsa kuyembekezera kuti alandira kanthu kuchokera kwa iwo.
Acts3:6 Petro anati kwa iye
Acts3:7 Ndipo anamugwira dzanja lamanja
Acts3:8 Iye analumpha ndi kuyamba kuyenda. Kenaka analowa nawo pamodzi mʼbwalo la Nyumba ya Mulungu
Acts3:9 Anthu onse atamuona akuyenda ndiponso kuyamika Mulungu
Acts3:10 anamuzindikira kuti ndi yemwe uja ankakhala pa khomo la Nyumbayo lotchedwa Khomo Lokongola
Acts3:11 Wopempha uja akuyenda pamodzi ndi Petro ndi Yohane
Acts3:12 Petro ataona zimenezi anawawuza kuti
Acts3:13 Mulungu wa Abrahamu
Acts3:14 Koma inu munamukana Woyera ndi Wolungamayo ndipo munapempha kuti akumasulireni munthu wakupha anthu.
Acts3:15 Inu munapha mwini moyo
Acts3:16 Mwachikhulupiriro mʼdzina la Yesu
Acts3:17 “Tsopano abale ine ndikudziwa kuti inu munachita zimenezi mosadziwa
Acts3:18 Koma umu ndi mmene Mulungu anakwaniritsira zimene zinanenedwa kale ndi aneneri onse
Acts3:19 Chifukwa chake
Acts3:20 ndi kuti Iye atumize Yesu Khristu amene anasankhidwa chifukwa cha inu.
Acts3:21 Iye ayenera kukhalabe kumwamba mpaka nthawi ya kukonzanso zinthu zonse monga Mulungu analonjeza kale kudzera mwa aneneri ake oyera mtima.
Acts3:22 Pakuti Mose anati
Acts3:23 Aliyense amene sadzamvera mawu a mneneriyo
Acts3:24 “Ndipo aneneri onse ambiri amene anayankhula kuyambira Samueli
Acts3:25 Inu ndinu ana a aneneri ndiponso ana apangano limene Mulungu anachita ndi makolo anu. Iye anati kwa Abrahamu
Acts3:26 Pamene Mulungu anaukitsa mtumiki wake
Acts4:1 Pamene Petro ndi Yohane amayankhula ndi anthu
Acts4:2 Iwo anakhumudwa kwambiri chifukwa atumwiwo amaphunzitsa anthu ndi kumalalikira za kuuka kwa akufa mwa Yesu.
Acts4:3 Iwo anagwira Petro ndi Yohane
Acts4:4 Koma anthu ambiri amene anamva uthenga anakhulupirira
Acts4:5 Mmawa mwake olamulira
Acts4:6 Panali Anasi
Acts4:7 Iwo anayimiritsa Petro ndi Yohane patsogolo pawo nayamba kuwafunsa kuti
Acts4:8 Petro wodzazidwa ndi Mzimu Woyera
Acts4:9 Ngati ife tikufunsidwa lero chifukwa cha ntchito yabwino imene yachitika pa munthu wolumala miyendo ndi mmene iye anachiritsidwira
Acts4:10 tsono dziwani izi inu ndi aliyense mu Israeli: munthuyu akuyima pamaso panu
Acts4:11 Iye ndi “ ‘Mwala umene amisiri omanga nyumba anawukana
Acts4:12 Chipulumutso sichipezeka mwa wina aliyense; pakuti palibe dzina lina pansi pa thambo limene lapatsidwa kwa anthu limene tiyenera kupulumutsidwa nalo.”
Acts4:13 Ataona kulimba mtima kwa Petro ndi Yohane ndi kuzindikira kuti anali osaphunzira
Acts4:14 Koma popeza iwo amamuona munthu amene anachiritsidwa atayima pamodzi ndi iwo
Acts4:15 Chifukwa chake anawalamula kuti atuluke mʼbwalo la milandu ndipo akulu abwalowo anayamba kukambirana.
Acts4:16 Iwo anafunsana kuti
Acts4:17 Koma kuti mbiriyi isapitirire kuwanda pakati pa anthu
Acts4:18 Pamenepo anawayitananso ndipo anawalamula kuti asayankhule kapena kuphunzitsa konse mʼdzina la Yesu.
Acts4:19 Koma Petro ndi Yohane anayankha kuti
Acts4:20 Ife sitingaleke kuyankhula za zimene tinaziona ndi kuzimva.”
Acts4:21 Atawonjeza kuwaopseza anawamasula. Sanathe kugwirizana njira yowalangira
Acts4:22 Ndipo munthu amene anachiritsidwayo anali ndi zaka makumi anayi.
Acts4:23 Atamasulidwa Petro ndi Yohane anapita kwa anzawo ndipo anawafotokozera zonse zimene akulu a ansembe ndi akulu anawawuza.
Acts4:24 Anthu atamva zimenezi anafuwula ndi mtima umodzi napemphera kwa Mulungu. Iwo anati
Acts4:25 Inu munayankhula mwa Mzimu Woyera kudzera pakamwa pa Davide kholo lathu
Acts4:26 Mafumu a dziko lapansi akugwirizana nazo; ndipo olamulira asonkhana pamodzi kulimbana ndi Ambuye ndi wodzozedwa wakeyo.’
Acts4:27 Zoonadi
Acts4:28 Iwo anachita zimene munakonzeratu mwachifuniro chanu ndi mphamvu yanu kuti zichitike.
Acts4:29 Tsopano
Acts4:30 Tambasulani dzanja lanu kuchiritsa anthu ndipo kuti
Acts4:31 Iwo atatha kupemphera
Acts4:32 Okhulupirira onse anali a mtima umodzi
Acts4:33 Atumwi anapitirira kuchitira umboni mwa mphamvu zakuuka kwa Ambuye Yesu
Acts4:34 Panalibe anthu osowa kanthu pakati pawo. Pakuti amene anali ndi malo
Acts4:35 ndi kuzipereka kwa atumwi
Acts4:36 Yosefe
Acts4:37 anagulitsa munda wake ndipo anadzapereka ndalamazo kwa atumwi.
Acts5:1 Koma munthu wina dzina lake Hananiya
Acts5:2 Mogwirizana ndi mkazi wakeyo anapatulapo pa ndalamazo nazisunga
Acts5:3 Koma Petro anamufunsa kuti
Acts5:4 Kodi sunali wako usanagulitse? Ndipo utagulitsa ndalamazo sizinali mʼmanja mwako kodi? Nʼchiyani chinakuchititsa zimenezi? Iwe sunanamize anthu koma Mulungu.”
Acts5:5 Hananiya atamva mawu amenewa anagwa pansi namwalira. Onse amene anamva zimene zinachitikazi anachita mantha kwambiri.
Acts5:6 Kenaka anyamata anafika
Acts5:7 Patapita maora atatu mkazi wake analowa
Acts5:8 Petro anamufunsa iye kuti
Acts5:9 Petro anati kwa iye
Acts5:10 Nthawi yomweyo anagwa pansi pa mapazi a Petro ndipo anamwalira. Ndipo anyamata aja analowa
Acts5:11 Mpingo wonse ndi anthu onse amene anamva zimenezi anachita mantha kwambiri.
Acts5:12 Atumwi anachita zizindikiro zodabwitsa ndi zozizwitsa zambiri pakati pa anthu. Ndipo onse okhulupirira ankasonkhana pamodzi mu Khonde la Solomoni.
Acts5:13 Palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe analimba mtima kuphatikana nawo
Acts5:14 Ngakhale zinali chotere
Acts5:15 Chifukwa cha zimenezi
Acts5:16 Anthu ochuluka ochokera ku mizinda yayingʼono ozungulira Yerusalemu amasonkhananso atatenga odwala awo ndi iwo amene amasautsidwa ndi mizimu yoyipa ndipo onsewo amachiritsidwa.
Acts5:17 Koma mkulu wa ansembe pamodzi ndi onse omuthandiza
Acts5:18 Iwo anagwira atumwi ndi kuwatsekera mʼndende ya anthu wamba.
Acts5:19 Koma usiku mngelo wa Ambuye anatsekula zitseko za ndende ndi kuwatulutsa
Acts5:20 Mngeloyo anati
Acts5:21 Kutacha mmawa
Acts5:22 Koma alonda aja atafika kundende
Acts5:23 kuti
Acts5:24 Mkulu wa alonda a Nyumba ya Mulungu ndi akulu a ansembe atamva zimenezi anathedwa nzeru
Acts5:25 Ndipo wina anabwera ndi kuti
Acts5:26 Pamenepo mkulu wa alonda pamodzi ndi alonda anakawatenga atumwi. Sanakawatenge mwaukali
Acts5:27 Atafika nawo atumwi aja
Acts5:28 Iye anati
Acts5:29 Petro ndi atumwi enawo anayankha kuti
Acts5:30 Mulungu wa makolo athu anamuukitsa Yesu
Acts5:31 Mulungu anamukweza Iye ku dzanja lake lamanja kukhala Mfumu ndi Mpulumutsi kuti Iye apatse Aisraeli mtima wolapa ndi chikhululukiro cha machimo.
Acts5:32 Ife ndife mboni za zimenezi
Acts5:33 Akuluakuluwo atamva zimenezi anakwiya kwambiri nafuna kuwapha.
Acts5:34 Koma Mfarisi wina dzina lake Gamalieli
Acts5:35 Ndipo iye anawuza bwalolo kuti
Acts5:36 Pakuti masiku a mʼmbuyomu kunali Teuda amene anadzitchukitsa
Acts5:37 Pambuyo pake
Acts5:38 Chifukwa chake pa nkhani iyi ndikuwuzani kuti
Acts5:39 Koma ngati ndi zochokera kwa Mulungu inu simudzatha kuwaletsa anthu awa: inu mwina muzapezeka kuti mukulimbana ndi Mulungu.”
Acts5:40 Akuluakulu enawo anavomerezana naye. Iwo anayitana atumwi aja ndipo anawakwapula kwambiri. Ndipo anawalamula kuti asayankhulenso mʼdzina la Yesu ndipo anawamasula.
Acts5:41 Iwo anachoka ku Bwalo Lalikulu akukondwa chifukwa anayesedwa oyenera kunyozedwa chifukwa cha dzina la Yesu.
Acts5:42 Ndipo tsiku ndi tsiku
Acts6:1 Mʼmasiku amenewo pamene chiwerengero cha ophunzira chinkachuluka
Acts6:2 Tsono Atumwi khumi ndi awiriwo anasonkhanitsa ophunzira onse pamodzi ndipo anati
Acts6:3 Choncho abale
Acts6:4 Koma ife tidzadzipereka kuti tizipemphera ndi kulalikira mawu.”
Acts6:5 Mawu amenewa anakondweretsa gulu lonse la anthu. Iwo anasankha
Acts6:6 Iwo anapereka anthuwa kwa atumwi amene anawapempherera ndi kuwasanjika manja.
Acts6:7 Ndipo Mawu a Mulungu anapitirira kufalikira. Chiwerengero cha ophunzira mu Yerusalemu chinakula mofulumira ndipo ansembe ochuluka anakhulupirira.
Acts6:8 Stefano
Acts6:9 Panauka mtsutso kuchokera kwa anthu a ku Kurene ndi a ku Alekisandriya komanso a ku dera la Silisiya ndi Asiya
Acts6:10 Koma iwo sanathe kumugonjetsa chifukwa iye ankayankhula ndi nzeru zimene Mzimu Woyera anamupatsa.
Acts6:11 Iwo ananyengerera anthu ena mwamseri kuti anene kuti
Acts6:12 Motero anawutsa mitima ya anthu
Acts6:13 Iwo anabweretsa mboni zonama zimene zinati
Acts6:14 Pakuti tinamumva akunena kuti Yesu uja wa ku Nazareti adzawononga malo ano ndiponso kusintha miyambo imene Mose anatipatsa.”
Acts6:15 Onse amene anakhala pansi Mʼbwalo Lalikulu anamuyangʼanitsitsa Stefano
Acts7:1 Kenaka mkulu wa ansembe anafunsa Stefano kuti
Acts7:2 Stefano anayankha kuti
Acts7:3 Mulungu anati
Acts7:4 “Ndipo iye anatulukadi mʼdziko la Akaldeya ndi kukakhala ku Harani. Atamwalira abambo ake
Acts7:5 Mulungu sanamupatse cholowa kuno
Acts7:6 Mulungu anayankhula motere kwa iye: ‘Zidzukulu zako zidzakhala alendo mʼdziko lachilendo
Acts7:7 Mulungu anati
Acts7:8 Kenaka Mulungu anachita pangano la mdulidwe ndi Abrahamu. Ndipo Abrahamu
Acts7:9 “Makolo athu anachita nsanje ndi Yosefe ndipo anamugulitsa kuti akakhale kapolo ku Igupto. Koma Mulungu anali naye
Acts7:10 ndipo anamupulumutsa iye kumasautso ake onse. Mulungu anamupatsa Yosefe nzeru ndi chisomo pamaso pa Farao mfumu ya ku Igupto
Acts7:11 “Kenaka munalowa njala mʼdziko la Kanaani
Acts7:12 Pamene Yakobo anamva kuti ku Igupto kunali tirigu
Acts7:13 Pa ulendo wawo wachiwiri
Acts7:14 Izi zinachitika
Acts7:15 Motero Yakobo anapita ku Igupto
Acts7:16 Mitembo yawo anayinyamula ndi kupita nayo ku Sekemu kumene inayikidwa mʼmanda amene Abrahamu anagula kochokera kwa ana a Hamori ku Sekemuko.
Acts7:17 “Nthawi itayandikira yakuti Mulungu achite zimene analonjeza kwa Abrahamu
Acts7:18 Pambuyo pake mfumu yatsopano imene sinkamudziwa Yosefe
Acts7:19 Mfumuyo inachita mwachinyengo ndi mtundu wathu ndi kuwazunza kuti ataye ana awo akhanda kuti afe.
Acts7:20 “Pa nthawi imeneyo Mose anabadwa
Acts7:21 Atakamutaya
Acts7:22 Mose anaphunzira nzeru zonse za Aigupto
Acts7:23 “Mose ali ndi zaka makumi anayi
Acts7:24 Iye ataona mmodzi wa iwo akuzunzidwa ndi Mwigupto
Acts7:25 Mose anaganiza kuti abale ake adzazindikira kuti Mulungu anamuyika kuti awapulumutse koma iwo sanazindikire.
Acts7:26 Mmawa mwake Mose anaona Aisraeli awiri akukangana. Iye anayesa kuwayanjanitsa ponena kuti
Acts7:27 “Koma munthu amene amavutitsa mnzakeyo anakankha Mose ndipo anati
Acts7:28 Kodi ukufuna kundipha monga momwe unaphera Mwigupto uja dzulo?’
Acts7:29 Mose atamva mawu awa anathawira ku Midiyani
Acts7:30 “Ndipo patapita zaka makumi anayi mngelo anaonekera kwa Mose mʼmalawi amoto pa chitsamba mʼchipululu pafupi ndi Phiri la Sinai.
Acts7:31 Iye ataona zimenezi
Acts7:32 ‘Ine ndine Mulungu wa makolo ako
Acts7:33 “Ndipo Ambuye anati kwa Mose
Acts7:34 Ine ndaona ndithu mazunzo a anthu anga amene ali ku Igupto. Ndamva kulira kwawo choncho ndabwera kuti ndiwapulumutse. Tsopano tiye ndikutume ku Igupto.’
Acts7:35 “Uyu ndi Mose yemwe uja amene Aisraeli anamukana ndi kunena kuti
Acts7:36 Iye anawatulutsa mu Igupto ndipo anachita zodabwitsa ndi zizindikiro zozizwitsa mu Igupto
Acts7:37 “Uyu ndi Mose uja amene anati kwa Aisraeli
Acts7:38 Iyeyu anali mʼgulu la Aisraeli mʼchipululu pamodzi ndi mngelo amene anamuyankhula pa phiri la Sinai ndiponso makolo athu; ndipo Mose analandira mawu amoyo kuti atipatse ife.
Acts7:39 “Koma makolo athu anakana kumumvera iye. Iwo anamukana iye ndipo mʼmitima mwawo anatembenukira ku Igupto.
Acts7:40 Iwo anati kwa Aaroni
Acts7:41 Iyi ndi nthawi imene anapanga fano la mwana wangʼombe. Anapereka nsembe kwa fanoli nachita chikondwerero kulemekeza ntchito ya manja awo.
Acts7:42 Koma Mulungu anawafulatira
Acts7:43 Ayi
Acts7:44 “Makolo athu anali ndi tenti ya msonkhano pakati pawo mʼchipululu. Anayipanga monga momwe Mulungu anawuzira Mose
Acts7:45 Makolo athu
Acts7:46 amene anapeza chisomo pamaso pa Mulungu ndipo anapempha kuti amʼmangire nyumba Mulungu wa Yakobo.
Acts7:47 Koma anali Solomoni amene anamanga nyumbayo.
Acts7:48 “Komatu
Acts7:49 “ ‘Kumwamba ndi mpando wanga waufumu
Acts7:50 Kodi si dzanja langa linapanga zonsezi?’
Acts7:51 “Anthu wokanika inu
Acts7:52 Kodi analipo mneneri amene makolo anu sanamuzunze? Iwo anapha ngakhale amene ananeneratu za kubwera kwa Wolungamayo. Ndipo tsopano inu munamupereka ndi kumupha Iye.
Acts7:53 Inu amene munalandira Malamulo amene anaperekedwa ndi angelo ndipo simunawamvere.”
Acts7:54 Atamva zimenezi
Acts7:55 Koma Stefano
Acts7:56 Stefano anati
Acts7:57 Koma iwo anatseka mʼmakutu mwawo
Acts7:58 anamukokera kunja kwa mzinda ndipo anayamba kumugenda miyala. Mboni zinasungitsa zovala zawo kwa mnyamata otchedwa Saulo.
Acts7:59 Akumugenda miyala
Acts7:60 Ndipo anagwada pansi nafuwula mwamphamvu kuti
Acts8:1 Ndipo Saulo anavomerezana nawo pa imfa ya Stefano. Tsiku lomwelo
Acts8:2 Anthu okonda Mulungu anayika maliro a Stefano ndipo anamulira kwambiri.
Acts8:3 Koma Saulo anayamba kuwononga mpingo. Amapita nyumba ndi nyumba
Acts8:4 Okhulupirira amene anabalalika amalalikira konse kumene amapita.
Acts8:5 Filipo anapita ku mzinda wa ku Samariya ndipo analalikira za Khristu kumeneko.
Acts8:6 Gulu la anthu litamva Filipo akulalikira komanso kuona zizindikiro zozizwitsa zimene ankazichita
Acts8:7 Mizimu yoyipa inatuluka mwa anthu ambiri ikufuwula kwambiri ndipo ambiri amene anali akufa ziwalo ndi olumala anachiritsidwa.
Acts8:8 Kotero munali chimwemwe chachikulu mu mzindawo.
Acts8:9 Koma mu mzindawo munali munthu dzina lake Simoni
Acts8:10 ndipo anthu onse
Acts8:11 Anthu amamutsata chifukwa kwa nthawi yayitali amawadabwitsa ndi matsenga akewo.
Acts8:12 Koma atakhulupirira Filipo akulalikira Uthenga Wabwino wa ufumu wa Mulungu ndiponso dzina la Yesu Khristu
Acts8:13 Nayenso Simoni anakhulupirira ndipo anabatizidwa
Acts8:14 Atumwi a ku Yerusalemu atamva kuti anthu a ku Samariya analandira Mawu a Mulungu
Acts8:15 Atafika anawapempherera kuti alandire Mzimu Woyera
Acts8:16 chifukwa Mzimu Woyera anali asanafike pa wina aliyense wa iwo; anali atangobatizidwa mʼdzina la Ambuye Yesu.
Acts8:17 Ndipo Petro ndi Yohane anasanjika manja awo pa iwo
Acts8:18 Simoni ataona kuti Mzimu anaperekedwa kwa iwo atumwi atawasanjika manja
Acts8:19 “Inenso ndipatseni mphamvu imeneyi kuti aliyense amene ndimusanjika manja anga azilandira Mzimu Woyera.”
Acts8:20 Petro anayankha kuti
Acts8:21 Ulibe gawo kapena mbali pa utumikiwu
Acts8:22 Lapa zoyipa zakozi ndipo upemphere kwa Ambuye. Mwina adzakukhululukira maganizo a mu mtima mwako.
Acts8:23 Pakuti ine ndikuona kuti ndiwe wowawidwa mtima ndiponso kapolo wa tchimo.”
Acts8:24 Ndipo Simoni anayankha
Acts8:25 Atatha kuchitira umboni ndi kulalikira mawu a Ambuye
Acts8:26 Mngelo wa Ambuye anati kwa Filipo
Acts8:27 Ndipo ananyamuka napita
Acts8:28 ndipo akubwerera kwawo atakwera pa galeta lake amawerenga buku la mneneri Yesaya.
Acts8:29 Mzimu anamuwuza Filipo kuti
Acts8:30 Pamenepo Filipo anathamangira ku galeta ndipo anamva munthuyo akuwerenga buku la mneneri Yesaya. Filipo anamufunsa kuti
Acts8:31 Iye anayankha kuti
Acts8:32 Mawu amene ndunayo imawerenga anali awa: “Monga mwana wankhosa wopita naye kokamupha amachitira
Acts8:33 Iye ananyozedwa ndipo panalibe chilungamo pa mlandu wake. Ndipo ndani amene analabadirako za zidzukulu zake poona kuti iye anachotsedwa mʼdziko la anthu amoyo?”
Acts8:34 Ndunayo inamufunsa Filipo kuti
Acts8:35 Pamenepo Filipo anayambira pa malemba omwewo kumuwuza za Uthenga Wabwino wa Yesu.
Acts8:36 Akuyenda mu msewu anafika pamalo pamene panali madzi ndipo ndunayo inati
Acts8:37 Filipo anati
Acts8:38 Ndipo analamulira galeta kuti liyime. Onse awiriwo
Acts8:39 Pamene iwo anatuluka mʼmadzimo
Acts8:40 Koma Filipo anapezeka kuti ali ku Azoto ndipo anazungulira konse
Acts9:1 Pa nthawi imeneyi
Acts9:2 ndi kukapempha makalata a chilolezo kuti apite nawo ku masunagoge a ku Damasiko
Acts9:3 Akuyandikira ku Damasikoku paulendo wake
Acts9:4 Iye anagwa pansi ndipo anamva mawu akuti
Acts9:5 Saulo anafunsa kuti
Acts9:6 “Tsopano dzuka
Acts9:7 Anthu amene anali naye paulendo
Acts9:8 Saulo anayimirira
Acts9:9 Anakhala wosaona kwa masiku atatu ndiponso sanadye kapena kumwa kanthu kalikonse.
Acts9:10 Ku Damasiko kunali wophunzira wina dzina lake Hananiya. Ambuye anamuyitana mʼmasomphenya kuti
Acts9:11 Ambuye anamuwuza iye kuti
Acts9:12 Ndipo waona mʼmasomphenya munthu
Acts9:13 Hananiya anayankha kuti
Acts9:14 Ndipo wabwera kuno ndi ulamuliro wa akulu ansembe kuti adzamange onse amene amayitana pa dzina lanu.”
Acts9:15 Koma Ambuye anati kwa Hananiya
Acts9:16 Ine ndidzamuonetsa zowawa zonse zimene ayenera kumva chifukwa cha dzina langa.”
Acts9:17 Pamenepo Hananiya ananyamuka ndi kukalowa mʼnyumbayo. Anamusanjika manja Sauloyo ndipo anati
Acts9:18 Nthawi yomweyo mʼmaso mwa Saulo munachoka zinthu zokhala ngati mamba ansomba
Acts9:19 ndipo atadya chakudya
Acts9:20 Posakhalitsa anayamba kulalikira mʼsunagoge kuti Yesu ndiye Mwana wa Mulungu.
Acts9:21 Onse amene anamva iye akulalikira anadabwa ndipo anafunsa kuti
Acts9:22 Koma mphamvu za Saulo zinali kukulirakulira ndipo anathetsa nzeru Ayuda okhala ku Damasiko powatsimikizira kuti Yesu ndi Mpulumutsi.
Acts9:23 Patapita masiku ambiri
Acts9:24 koma iye anadziwa za chiwembucho. Anthu ankadikirira usana ndi usiku pa zipata za mzindawo kuti amuphe.
Acts9:25 Koma ophunzira ake anamutenga usiku
Acts9:26 Saulo atafika ku Yerusalemu
Acts9:27 Koma Barnaba anamutenga napita naye kwa atumwi. Iye anawafotokozera iwo za mmene Saulo anaonera Ambuye pa njira paja
Acts9:28 Kotero Saulo anakhala nawo nayendayenda mwaufulu mu Yerusalemu akulalikira molimba mtima mʼdzina la Ambuye.
Acts9:29 Anayankhula ndi kutsutsana ndi Ayuda a Chihelene
Acts9:30 Abale atadziwa zimenezi
Acts9:31 Pamenepo mpingo wa ku Yudeya konse
Acts9:32 Pamene Petro amayendera mpingo
Acts9:33 Kumeneko anakapeza munthu dzina lake Eneya
Acts9:34 Petro anati kwa iye
Acts9:35 Anthu onse amene anakhala ku Luda ndi ku Sharoni anamuona ndipo anatembenukira kwa Ambuye.
Acts9:36 Ku Yopa kunali wophunzira wina dzina lake Tabita (mʼChigriki amati Dorika) amene nthawi zonse ankachita zachifundo ndiponso kuthandiza osauka.
Acts9:37 Nthawi imeneyi anadwala ndipo anamwalira
Acts9:38 Popeza ku Yopa kunali pafupi ndi Luda; pamene ophunzira anamva kuti Petro anali ku Luda
Acts9:39 Petro ananyamuka
Acts9:40 Petro anatulutsa anthu onse mʼchipindamo; ndipo anagwada pansi ndi kupemphera. Anatembenukira mtembo uja nati
Acts9:41 Petro anamugwira dzanja
Acts9:42 Zimenezi zinadziwika ku Yopa konse
Acts9:43 Petro anakhala ku Yopa kwa masiku ambiri kwa munthu wina
Acts10:1 Ku Kaisareya kunali munthu wina dzina lake Korneliyo
Acts10:2 Iye ndi banja lake lonse amapembedza ndi kuopa Mulungu. Iye amathandiza osowa mowolowamanja ndipo amapemphera kwa Mulungu nthawi zonse.
Acts10:3 Tsiku lina
Acts10:4 Korneliyo anamuyangʼanitsitsa mngeloyo mwa mantha. Iye anafunsa kuti
Acts10:5 Tsopano tuma anthu apite ku Yopa kuti akayitane munthu dzina lake Simoni Petro.
Acts10:6 Iye akukhala ndi Simoni mmisiri wa zikopa
Acts10:7 Mngeloyo anayankhula naye anachoka
Acts10:8 Iye anawafotokozera zonse zimene zinachitika ndipo anawatuma kuti apite ku Yopa.
Acts10:9 Mmawa mwake
Acts10:10 Iye anamva njala ndipo anafuna chakudya
Acts10:11 Iye anaona kuthambo kutatsekuka
Acts10:12 Mʼmenemo munali nyama zonse zamiyendo inayi pamodzinso ndi zokwawa za dziko lapansi ndiponso mbalame zamlengalenga.
Acts10:13 Petro anamva mawu akuti
Acts10:14 Petro anayankha kuti
Acts10:15 Petro anamvanso kachiwiri mawu akuti
Acts10:16 Zimenezi zinachitika katatu ndipo nthawi yomweyo chinsalu chija chinatengedwanso kupita kumwamba.
Acts10:17 Petro akuganizira za tanthauzo la masomphenyawo
Acts10:18 Iwo anayitana nafunsa ngati Simoni amene amadziwika ndi dzina loti Petro amakhala kumeneko.
Acts10:19 Petro akuganizirabe za masomphenyawo
Acts10:20 Dzuka
Acts10:21 Petro anatsika ndipo anati kwa anthuwo
Acts10:22 Anthuwo anayankha kuti
Acts10:23 Pamenepo Petro anawalowetsa mʼnyumba ndipo anawasamala ngati alendo ake. Mmawa mwake Petro ananyamuka napita nawo ndipo abale ena a ku Yopa anapita naye pamodzi.
Acts10:24 Tsiku linalo Petro anafika ku Kaisareya. Korneliyo anawadikirira ndipo anali atawasonkhanitsa pamodzi abale ake ndi abwenzi ake a pamtima.
Acts10:25 Petro akulowa mʼnyumba
Acts10:26 Koma Petro anamuyimiritsa nati
Acts10:27 Akuyankhula naye
Acts10:28 Iye anawawuza kuti
Acts10:29 Nʼchifukwa chake ndabwera mosawiringula pamene munandiyitana. Tsopano ndikufunseni
Acts10:30 Komeliyo anayankha kuti
Acts10:31 Ndipo anati
Acts10:32 Tuma anthu ku Yopa akayitane Simoni wotchedwa Petro. Iye akukhala mʼnyumba ya Simoni mmisiri wazikopa amene amakhala mʼmbali mwa nyanja.’
Acts10:33 Nʼchifukwa chake ndinatumiza anthu nthawi yomweyo ndipo mwachita bwino kuti mwabwera. Tsopano ife tonse tili pano pamaso pa Mulungu kuti timve zonse zimene Ambuye akukulamulani kuti mutiwuze ife.”
Acts10:34 Ndipo Petro anayamba kuyankhula nati
Acts10:35 Koma amalandira anthu a mtundu uli wonse amene amaopa Iye ndiponso kuchita chilungamo.
Acts10:36 Uwu ndi uthenga umene Mulungu anatumiza kwa Aisraeli
Acts10:37 Inu mukudziwa zimene zinachitika ku Yudeya konse
Acts10:38 kuti Mulungu
Acts10:39 “Ife ndife mboni za zonse zimene anachita mʼdziko la Ayuda ndiponso ku Yerusalemu. Anamupha Iye pakumupachika pa mtengo
Acts10:40 koma Mulungu anamuukitsa kwa akufa pa tsiku lachitatu
Acts10:41 Iye sanaonekere kwa anthu onse koma kwa mboni zimene Mulungu anazisankhiratu
Acts10:42 Iye anatilamulira ife kuti tilalikire kwa anthu ndi kuchitira umboni kuti Iye ndiye amene Mulungu anamusankha kukhala woweruza wa amoyo ndi akufa.
Acts10:43 Aneneri onse achitira Iye umboni kuti aliyense amene akhulupirira Iye amakhululukidwa machimo chifukwa cha dzina lake.”
Acts10:44 Petro akuyankhulabe mawu amenewa
Acts10:45 Abale a mdulidwe omwe anabwera ndi Petro anadabwa kuona kuti mphatso ya Mzimu Woyera yapatsidwanso kwa anthu a mitundu ina.
Acts10:46 Pakuti anamva iwo akuyankhula mʼmalilime ndi kuyamika Mulungu. Ndipo Petro anati
Acts10:47 “Kodi alipo amene angawaletse anthu awa kubatizidwa mʼmadzi? Iwotu alandira Mzimu Woyera monga ifenso.”
Acts10:48 Tsono iye analamula kuti abatizidwe mʼdzina la Yesu Khristu. Ndipo anthu aja anamupempha Petro kuti akhale nawo masiku angapo.
Acts11:1 Atumwi ndi abale a ku Yudeya konse anamva kuti anthu a mitundu ina analandiranso Mawu a Mulungu.
Acts11:2 Tsono Petro atafika ku Yerusalemu
Acts11:3 ndipo anati
Acts11:4 Koma Petro anayamba kuwafotokozera zonse mwatsatanetsatane momwe zinachitikira kuti
Acts11:5 “Ine ndimapemphera mu mzinda wa Yopa ndipo ndili ngati wokomoka ndinaona masomphenya. Ndinaona chinthu chokhala ngati chinsalu chachikulu chikutsika kuchokera kumwamba chogwiridwa msonga zake zinayi
Acts11:6 Ine ndinayangʼana mʼkati mwake ndipo ndinaona nyama za miyendo inayi za mʼdziko lapansi
Acts11:7 Kenaka ine ndinamva mawu akuti
Acts11:8 “Ine ndinayankha kuti
Acts11:9 “Mawu ochokera kumwamba ananenanso kachiwiri kuti
Acts11:10 Zimenezi zinachitika katatu ndipo kenaka zonse zinatengedwa kupita kumwamba.
Acts11:11 “Nthawi yomweyo anthu atatu amene anatumidwa kuchokera ku Kaisareya anayima pa nyumba yomwe ndimakhalayo.
Acts11:12 Mzimu anandiwuza kuti ndisakayike
Acts11:13 Iye anatiwuza mmene anaonera mngelo atayimirira mʼnyumba mwake ndi kumuwuza kuti
Acts11:14 Iye adzakuwuza uthenga umene udzapulumutsa iwe ndi a pa banja ako.’
Acts11:15 “Nditangoyamba kuyankhula
Acts11:16 Kenaka ndinakumbukira zimene Ambuye ananena kuti
Acts11:17 Tsono ngati Mulungu anawapatsa iwo mphatso yomweyo imene anatipatsa ife
Acts11:18 Iwo atamva zimenezi analibenso chonena ndipo anayamika Mulungu nati
Acts11:19 Tsopano amene anabalalika chifukwa cha mazunzo amene anayamba ataphedwa Stefano
Acts11:20 Komabe
Acts11:21 Mphamvu ya Ambuye inali nawo ndipo anthu ambiri anakhulupirira natembenukira kwa Ambuye.
Acts11:22 Mbiri imeneyi inamveka ku mpingo wa ku Yerusalemu ndipo iwo anatumiza Barnaba ku Antiokeya.
Acts11:23 Atafika ndi kuona chisomo cha Mulungu pa iwo
Acts11:24 Barnabayo anali munthu wabwino
Acts11:25 Kenaka Barnaba anapita ku Tarisisi kukafuna Saulo
Acts11:26 ndipo pamene anamupeza anabwera naye ku Antiokeya. Barnaba ndi Saulo anasonkhana ndi mpingo kwa chaka chimodzi naphunzitsa anthu ambirimbiri. Okhulupirirawo anayamba kutchedwa Akhristu ku Antiokeya.
Acts11:27 Masiku amenewo ku Antiokeya kunafika aneneri ena ochokera ku Yerusalemu.
Acts11:28 Mmodzi wa iwo dzina lake Agabu
Acts11:29 Ophunzirawo
Acts11:30 Izi anazichitadi ndipo anatuma Barnaba ndi Saulo kukapereka mphatsozo kwa akulu a mpingo.
Acts12:1 Inali nthawi yomweyi imene mfumu Herode anamanga ena a mu mpingo ndi cholinga chakuti awazunze.
Acts12:2 Iye analamula kuti Yakobo mʼbale wa Yohane
Acts12:3 Ataona kuti zimenezi zinakondweretsa Ayuda
Acts12:4 Atamugwira Petro
Acts12:5 Kotero Petro anasungidwa mʼndende
Acts12:6 Usiku woti mmawa mwake Herode amuzenga mlandu
Acts12:7 Mwadzidzidzi mngelo wa Ambuye anaonekera ndipo kuwala kunawunika mʼchipindamo. Mngeloyo anamugwedeza Petro mʼnthiti ndi kumudzutsa. Iye anati
Acts12:8 Kenaka mngelo anati kwa iye
Acts12:9 Petro anatsatira natuluka mʼndende
Acts12:10 Iwo anadutsa gulu loyamba ndi lachiwiri la asilikali ndipo anafika pa chitseko chachitsulo cholowera mu mzinda. Chitsekocho chinatsekuka chokha ndipo anadutsa. Pamene anayenda kutalika kwa msewu umodzi
Acts12:11 Pamenepo Petro anazindikira nati
Acts12:12 Atazindikira zimenezi anapita ku nyumba ya Mariya amayi ake a Yohane
Acts12:13 Petro anagogoda pa chitseko cha panja
Acts12:14 Atazindikira mawu a Petro anakondwa kwambiri ndipo anabwerera osatsekula ndipo anafuwula kuti
Acts12:15 Anthuwo anati kwa iye
Acts12:16 Koma Petro anapitiriza kugogoda ndipo atatsekula chitseko ndi kumuona
Acts12:17 Petro anakweza dzanja ndi kuwawuza kuti akhale chete ndipo anawafotokozera mmene Ambuye anamutulutsira mʼndende. Iye anati
Acts12:18 Pamene kunacha kunali phokoso lalikulu pakati pa asilikali
Acts12:19 Herode atamufunafuna ndipo wosamupeza
Acts12:20 Herode anakwiyira anthu a ku Turo ndi Sidoni; anthuwo anagwirizana zoti akambirane naye. Atapeza thandizo kuchokera kwa Blasito
Acts12:21 Pa tsiku limene anasankha Herode
Acts12:22 Anthuwo anafuwula nati
Acts12:23 Nthawi yomweyo mngelo wa Mulungu anamukantha chifukwa sanapereke ulemu kwa Mulungu ndipo anadyedwa ndi mphutsi nafa.
Acts12:24 Koma Mawu a Mulungu anapitirirabe kufalikirafalikira.
Acts12:25 Barnaba ndi Saulo atamaliza ntchito yawo anachoka ku Yerusalemu
Acts13:1 Mu mpingo wa ku Antiokeya munali aneneri ndi aphunzitsi awa: Barnaba
Acts13:2 Iwo pamene ankapembedza Ambuye ndi kusala kudya
Acts13:3 Ndipo atasala kudya ndi kupemphera anasanjika manja awo pa iwo nawatumiza.
Acts13:4 Barnaba ndi Saulo motumidwa ndi Mzimu Woyera
Acts13:5 Pamene anafika ku Salamisi
Acts13:6 Iwo anayenda pa chilumba chonse mpaka anafika ku Pafo
Acts13:7 Iyeyu
Acts13:8 Koma Elima wamatsengayo
Acts13:9 Koma Saulo
Acts13:10 “Iwe ndiwe mwana wa mdierekezi ndiponso mdani wa chilungamo! Ndiwe wodzaza ndi chinyengo cha mtundu uliwonse ndi kuchenjera konse. Kodi sudzaleka kupotoza njira zolungama za Ambuye?
Acts13:11 Tsopano dzanja la Ambuye likukutsutsa iwe. Udzakhala wosaona ndipo kwa kanthawi sudzatha kuona kuwala kwa dzuwa.” Nthawi yomweyo khungu ndi mdima zinamugwera ndipo anafunafuna munthu woti amugwire dzanja kuti amutsogolere.
Acts13:12 Pamene mkulu wa bomayo anaona zimene zinachitika anakhulupirira pakuti anadabwa ndi chiphunzitso cha Ambuye.
Acts13:13 Kuchokera ku Pafo
Acts13:14 Kuchokera ku Perga anapita ku Pisidiya wa ku Antiokeya. Pa tsiku la Sabata analowa mʼsunagoge
Acts13:15 Atawerenga mawu a mʼMalamulo ndi Aneneri
Acts13:16 Atayimirira
Acts13:17 Mulungu wa Aisraeli anasankha makolo athu ndipo anawapatsa chuma chambiri pamene amakhala ku Igupto. Anawatulutsa mʼdzikomo ndi dzanja lake lamphamvu.
Acts13:18 Ndipo Iye anapirira khalidwe lawo mʼchipululu kwa zaka makumi anayi.
Acts13:19 Mulungu anawagonjetsera mitundu isanu ndi iwiri ya ku Kanaani ndipo anapereka dzikolo kwa Israeli kuti likhale lawo.
Acts13:20 Izi zonse zinatenga zaka 450. “Zitatha izi
Acts13:21 Kenaka anthu anapempha kuti awapatse mfumu
Acts13:22 Mulungu atamuchotsa Sauli
Acts13:23 “Kuchokera mwa zidzukulu za munthu ameneyu
Acts13:24 Yesu asanabwere
Acts13:25 Pamene Yohane amatsiriza ntchito yake anati: ‘Mukuganiza kuti ine ndine yani? Ine sindine ameneyo ayi
Acts13:26 “Abale
Acts13:27 Anthu a ku Yerusalemu ndi atsogoleri awo sanazindikire Yesu
Acts13:28 Ngakhale sanapeze chifukwa choti afe
Acts13:29 Atachita zonse zimene zinalembedwa za Iye
Acts13:30 Koma Mulungu anamuukitsa
Acts13:31 ndipo kwa masiku ambiri anaonekera kwa amene anayenda naye kuchokera ku Galileya mpaka ku Yerusalemu. Iwowa tsopano ndi mboni zake kwa anthu a Israeli.
Acts13:32 “Ife tikukuwuzani Uthenga Wabwino; umene Mulungu analonjeza makolo athu.
Acts13:33 Iye wakwaniritsa zimenezi kwa ife ana awo
Acts13:34 Zakuti Mulungu anamuukitsa kuti asawole konse
Acts13:35 Nʼchifukwa chakenso zinalembedwa mu Salimo lina kuti
Acts13:36 “Pakuti pamene Davide anatsiriza kutumikira Mulungu mu mʼbado wake
Acts13:37 Koma amene Mulungu anamuukitsa kwa akufa sanawole ayi.
Acts13:38 “Nʼchifukwa chake
Acts13:39 Kudzera mwa Iye aliyense amene akhulupirira
Acts13:40 Samalani kuti zimene aneneri akunena zisakuchitikireni inu:
Acts13:41 “ ‘Onani
Acts13:42 Pamene Paulo ndi Barnaba amatuluka mʼSunagoge
Acts13:43 Atatha mapemphero
Acts13:44 Pa Sabata linalo pafupifupi anthu onse a mu mzindawo anasonkhana kudzamva Mawu a Ambuye.
Acts13:45 Pamene Ayuda anaona gulu la anthu
Acts13:46 Ndipo Paulo ndi Barnaba anawayankha molimba mtima kuti
Acts13:47 Pakuti izi ndi zimene Ambuye anatilamula ife: “ ‘Ine ndakuyika iwe ukhale kuwunika kwa anthu a mitundu ina
Acts13:48 Anthu a mitundu ina atamva izi
Acts13:49 Mawu a Ambuye anafalikira mʼchigawo chonse.
Acts13:50 Koma Ayuda anawutsa mitima ya akazi otchuka opembedza Mulungu ndi akulu a mu mzindamo. Iwo anabweretsa mazunzo kwa Paulo ndi Barnaba ndipo anawathamangitsa mʼchigawo chawo.
Acts13:51 Tsono iwo anasasa fumbi la ku mapazi awo powatsutsa
Acts13:52 Ndipo ophunzira anadzazidwa ndi chimwemwe ndiponso ndi Mzimu Woyera.
Acts14:1 Ku Ikoniya
Acts14:2 Koma Ayuda amene anakana kukhulupirira anawutsa anthu a mitundu ina nawononga maganizo awo kutsutsana ndi abale.
Acts14:3 Ndipo Paulo ndi Barnaba anakhala kumeneko nthawi yayitali
Acts14:4 Anthu a mu mzindamo anagawikana; ena anali mbali ya Ayuda
Acts14:5 Pamenepo anthu a mitundu ina ndi Ayuda
Acts14:6 Koma atazindikira zimenezi
Acts14:7 kumene anapitiriza kulalikira Uthenga Wabwino.
Acts14:8 Ku Lusitra kunali munthu wolumala miyendo
Acts14:9 Iyeyu
Acts14:10 Ndipo Paulo anamuyitana mofuwula nati
Acts14:11 Gulu la anthu litaona zimene Paulo anachitazi
Acts14:12 Barnaba anamutcha Zeusi ndipo Paulo anamutcha Herimesi chifukwa ndiye amatsogolera kuyankhula.
Acts14:13 Wansembe wa Zeusi amene nyumba yopembedzera Zeusiyo inali kunja pafupi ndi mzindawo
Acts14:14 Koma Barnaba ndi Paulo atamva zimenezi
Acts14:15 “Anthu inu
Acts14:16 Kale Iye analola anthu a mitundu ina yonse kutsata njira zawozawo.
Acts14:17 Komabe wakhala akudzichitira yekha umboni: Iye amaonetsa kukoma mtima kwake pogwetsa mvula kuchokera kumwamba ndi zipatso pa nyengo yake. Amakupatsani chakudya chambiri ndipo amadzaza mitima yanu ndi chimwemwe.”
Acts14:18 Ngakhale ndi mawu awa
Acts14:19 Kenaka kunabwera Ayuda ena kuchokera ku Antiokeya ndi Ikoniya nakopa gulu la anthu lija. Iwo anamugenda miyala Paulo namukokera kunja kwa mzindawo
Acts14:20 Koma ophunzira atamuzungulira
Acts14:21 Iwo analalikira Uthenga Wabwino mu mzindawo ndipo anthu ambiri anatembenuka mtima ndi kukhala ophunzira. Kenaka anabwerera ku Lusitra
Acts14:22 Kumeneko analimbikitsa mitima ya ophunzira ndi kuwapatsa mphamvu kuti akhalebe woona mʼchikhulupiriro. Iwo anati
Acts14:23 Paulo ndi Barnaba anasankha akulu ampingo pa mpingo uliwonse
Acts14:24 Atadutsa Pisidiya
Acts14:25 Atalalikira Mawu ku Perga
Acts14:26 Ku Ataliyako
Acts14:27 Atangofika ku Antiokeya
Acts14:28 Ndipo anakhala kumeneko ndi ophunzira nthawi yayitali.
Acts15:1 Anthu ena ochokera ku Yudeya anafika ku Antiokeya ndipo amaphunzitsa abale kuti
Acts15:2 Zimenezi zinachititsa Paulo ndi Barnaba kuti atsutsane nawo kwambiri. Kotero Paulo ndi Barnaba anasankhidwa pamodzi ndi abale ena kuti apite ku Yerusalemu kukaonana ndi atumwi ndi akulu ampingo kukakambirana za nkhaniyi.
Acts15:3 Mpingo unawaperekeza
Acts15:4 Atafika ku Yerusalemu
Acts15:5 Kenaka
Acts15:6 Atumwi ndi akulu ampingo anasonkhana kuti akambirane za nkhaniyi.
Acts15:7 Atakambirana kwambiri Petro anayimirira
Acts15:8 Mulungu amene amadziwa mtima wa munthu
Acts15:9 Iye sanasiyanitse pakati pa ife ndi iwo
Acts15:10 Tsopano
Acts15:11 Osatero! Ife tikukhulupirira kuti tinapulumutsidwa mwachisomo cha Ambuye athu Yesu Khristu
Acts15:12 Gulu lonse linakhala chete pamene amamvetsera Barnaba ndi Paulo akuwawuza za zizindikiro zodabwitsa zimene Mulungu anazichita pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina kudzera mwa iwo.
Acts15:13 Iwo atatha kuyankhula
Acts15:14 Simoni watifotokozera mmene Mulungu poyamba paja anaonetsa kukhudzidwa kwake pomwe anatenga anthu a mitundu ina kukhala ake.
Acts15:15 Mawu a aneneri akuvomereza zimenezi
Acts15:16 “ ‘Zitatha izi Ine ndidzabwerera ndipo ndidzamanganso nyumba ya Davide imene inagwa. Ndidzakonzanso malo amene anagumuka
Acts15:17 kuti anthu otsalawo afunefune Ambuye
Acts15:18 zinaululidwa kuyambira kalekale.’
Acts15:19 “Chifukwa chake
Acts15:20 Koma tiwalembere iwo
Acts15:21 Pakuti malamulo a Mose akhala akulalikidwa mu mzinda uliwonse
Acts15:22 Pamenepo atumwi ndi akulu ampingo
Acts15:23 kuti akapereke kalata yonena kuti
Acts15:24 Ife tamva kuti anthu ena ochokera pakati pathu
Acts15:25 Tsono ife tagwirizana kuti
Acts15:26 anthu amene anapereka moyo wawo chifukwa cha dzina la Ambuye athu Yesu Khristu.
Acts15:27 Nʼchifukwa chake
Acts15:28 Pakuti zinakomera Mzimu Woyera ndiponso ife kuti tisakusenzetseni katundu wina
Acts15:29 Mupewe kudya chakudya choperekedwa nsembe kwa mafano
Acts15:30 Anthu aja anatumidwa ndipo anafika ku Antiokeya
Acts15:31 Anthuwo anawerenga kalatayo ndipo abalewo anakondwa chifukwa cha mawu ake achirimbikitso.
Acts15:32 Yudasi ndi Sila amene analinso aneneri
Acts15:33 Atakhala kumeneko kwa kanthawi
Acts15:34 Koma Sila anasankha kuti akhale komweko.
Acts15:35 Koma Paulo ndi Barnaba anatsalira ku Antiokeya kumene iwo pamodzi ndi ena ambiri anaphunzitsa ndi kulalikira Mawu a Ambuye.
Acts15:36 Patapita masiku ena Paulo anati kwa Barnaba
Acts15:37 Barnaba anafuna kutenga Yohane
Acts15:38 Koma Paulo anaganiza kuti sichinali cha nzeru kumutenga Yohane chifukwa iye anawathawa ku Pamfiliya ndipo sanapitirire nawo pa ntchito.
Acts15:39 Iwo anatsutsana kwambiri kotero kuti anapatukana. Barnaba anatenga Marko ndipo anakwera sitima ya pamadzi kupita ku Kupro.
Acts15:40 Paulo anasankha Sila. Abale atawapempherera kwa Ambuye kuti alandire chisomo
Acts15:41 Iye anadutsa ku Siriya ndi ku Kilikiya kupita akulimbikitsa mipingo.
Acts16:1 Paulo anafika ku Derbe ndi Lusitra
Acts16:2 Abale a ku Lusitra ndi Ikoniya anamuchitira iye umboni wabwino.
Acts16:3 Paulo anafuna kumutenga pa ulendo
Acts16:4 Pamene amayenda mzinda ndi mzinda
Acts16:5 Kotero mipingo inalimbikitsidwa mʼchikhulupiriro ndipo anthu amachulukirachulukirabe tsiku ndi tsiku.
Acts16:6 Paulo ndi anzake anadutsa mayiko a Frugiya ndi Galatiya
Acts16:7 Atafika ku malire a Musiya
Acts16:8 Ndipo iwo anadutsa Musiya ndipo anapita ku Trowa.
Acts16:9 Nthawi ya usiku Paulo anaona masomphenya
Acts16:10 Paulo ataona masomphenyawa
Acts16:11 Kuchokera ku Trowa tinakwera sitima ya pamadzi kupita ku Samotrake ndipo mmawa mwake tinapitirira mpaka ku Neapoli.
Acts16:12 Kuchokera kumeneko tinapita ku Filipi
Acts16:13 Pa tsiku la Sabata tinatuluka mu mzindawo kupita ku mtsinje kumene timayembekezera kukapeza malo opempherera. Tinakhala pansi ndipo tinayamba kuyankhula ndi amayi amene anasonkhana pamenepo.
Acts16:14 Mmodzi wa amayi amene amamvetserawo ndi Lidiya amene amagulitsa nsalu zofiira
Acts16:15 Iye ndi a mʼbanja lake atabatizidwa
Acts16:16 Tsiku lina pamene timapita kumalo wopempherera
Acts16:17 Mtsikanayu anatsatira Paulo ndi ife
Acts16:18 Iye anachita izi masiku ambiri. Kenaka Paulo anavutika mu mtima
Acts16:19 Pamene ambuye a mtsikana uja anazindikira kuti chiyembekezo chawo chopezera ndalama chatha
Acts16:20 Anawabweretsa iwo kwa oweruza milandu ndipo anati
Acts16:21 Ndipo akuphunzitsa miyambo imene ife Aroma sitiloledwa kuyilandira kapena kuyichita.”
Acts16:22 Gulu la anthu linatsutsana ndi Paulo ndi Sila
Acts16:23 Atawakwapula kwambiri anawaponya mʼndende
Acts16:24 Chifukwa cha mawu amenewa woyangʼanira ndende anakawayika mʼchipinda chamʼkati mwa ndende
Acts16:25 Koma pakati pa usiku Paulo ndi Sila ankapemphera ndi kuyimba nyimbo zolemekeza Mulungu
Acts16:26 Mwadzidzidzi kunachitika chivomerezi champhamvu kotero kuti maziko a ndende anagwedezeka. Nthawi yomweyo zitseko zonse za ndende zinatsekuka
Acts16:27 Woyangʼanira ndende uja atadzuka ku tulo
Acts16:28 Koma Paulo anafuwula kuti
Acts16:29 Woyangʼanira ndendeyo anayitanitsa nyale
Acts16:30 Iye anawatulutsa kunja ndipo anawafunsa kuti
Acts16:31 Iwo anayankha kuti
Acts16:32 Kenaka analalikira mawu a Ambuye kwa iyeyo ndi onse amene anali mʼnyumba mwake.
Acts16:33 Usiku womwewo woyangʼanira ndendeyo anawatenga nakawatsuka mabala awo; ndipo pomwepo iye ndi a mʼbanja lake anabatizidwa.
Acts16:34 Woyangʼanira ndendeyo anapita nawo ku nyumba yake
Acts16:35 Kutacha
Acts16:36 Woyangʼanira ndendeyo anawuza Paulo kuti
Acts16:37 Koma Paulo anati kwa asilikaliwo: “Iwo anatikwapula pa gulu la anthu asanatiweruze
Acts16:38 Asilikali aja anakafotokozera woweruza milandu ndipo pamene anamva kuti Paulo ndi Sila anali nzika za Chiroma
Acts16:39 Iye anabwera kudzawapepesa ndipo anawatulutsa mʼndende
Acts16:40 Paulo ndi Sila atatuluka mʼndende
Acts17:1 Atadutsa ku Amfipoli ndi Apoloniya
Acts17:2 Paulo
Acts17:3 kuwafotokozera ndi kuwatsimikizira kuti Khristu anayenera kufa ndi kuuka. Iye anati
Acts17:4 Ena mwa Ayuda anakopeka mtima ndipo anatsatira Paulo ndi Sila
Acts17:5 Koma Ayuda ena anachita nsanje; kotero anasonkhanitsa anthu akhalidwe loyipa ochokera pa msika ndipo napanga gulu nayambitsa chipolowe mu mzindawo. Anathamangira ku nyumba ya Yasoni kukafuna Paulo ndi Sila kuti awabweretse pa gulu la anthu.
Acts17:6 Koma atalephera kuwapeza
Acts17:7 Yasoni ndiye anawalandira mʼnyumba mwake. Onsewa akuchita zotsutsana ndi malamulo a Kaisara pomanena kuti palinso mfumu ina
Acts17:8 Atamva zimenezi
Acts17:9 Iwo analipiritsa Yasoni ndi anzakewo ndipo anawamasula.
Acts17:10 Mdima utagwa
Acts17:11 Tsopano anthu a ku Bereya anali akhalidwe labwino kusiyana ndi Atesalonika
Acts17:12 Ayuda ambiri anakhulupirira
Acts17:13 Ayuda a ku Tesalonika atadziwa kuti Paulo akulalikira Mawu a Mulungu ku Bereya
Acts17:14 Nthawi yomweyo abale anatumiza Paulo ku nyanja koma Sila ndi Timoteyo anatsalira ku Bereya.
Acts17:15 Anthu amene anamuperekeza Paulo nafika naye ku Atene
Acts17:16 Paulo akudikira Timoteyo ndi Sila ku Atene
Acts17:17 Tsono anakambirana ndi Ayuda ndi Agriki amene amaopa Mulungu mʼsunagoge
Acts17:18 Gulu la Aepikureya ndi Astoiki
Acts17:19 Kenaka iwo anamutenga nafika naye ku bwalo la Areopagi kumene anamufunsa kuti
Acts17:20 Iwe ukubweretsa zinthu zina zachilendo mʼmakutu mwathu
Acts17:21 Atene onse ndi alendo amene amakhala kumeneko samachita kanthu kena koma kufotokoza ndi kumvera fundo zatsopano.
Acts17:22 Paulo anayimirira mʼbwalo la Areopagi nati: “Inu anthu a ku Atene! Ine ndikuona kuti mʼnjira zonse ndinu opembedza kwambiri.
Acts17:23 Pakuti pamene ndimayenda ndi kuona zinthu zimene mumazipembedza
Acts17:24 “Mulungu amene analenga dziko lapansi ndiponso zonse zili mʼmenemo ndiye Ambuye wakumwamba ndi dziko lapansi ndipo sakhala mʼnyumba zachipembedzo zomangidwa ndi manja.
Acts17:25 Ndipo satumikiridwa ndi manja a anthu ngati kuti Iye amasowa kanthu
Acts17:26 Kuchoka kwa munthu mmodzi Iye analenga mtundu uliwonse wa anthu
Acts17:27 Mulungu anachita izi kuti anthu amufunefune
Acts17:28 ‘Pakuti timakhala mwa Iye
Acts17:29 “Tsono popeza ndife ana a Mulungu
Acts17:30 Nthawi imene anthu sankadziwa
Acts17:31 Pakuti Iye wayika tsiku limene adzaweruze dziko lapansi mwa chilungamo kudzera mwa Munthu amene anamusankha. Iye watsimikizira anthu onse zimenezi pomuukitsa.”
Acts17:32 Atamva za kuuka kwa akufa
Acts17:33 Ndipo Paulo anatuluka mʼBwalolo.
Acts17:34 Anthu ena ochepa anamutsatira Paulo ndipo anakhulupirira. Pakati pawo panali Dionisiyo mmodzi wa bwalo la Areopagi ndi mayi wina wotchedwa Damalisi ndi enanso.

Acts19:1 Apolo ali ku Korinto
Acts19:2 Iye anawafunsa kuti

Acts19:4 Paulo anati
Acts19:5 Atamva zimenezi
Acts19:6 Pamene Paulo anawasanjika manja
Acts19:7 Anthu onsewo analipo khumi ndi awiri.
Acts19:8 Paulo analowa mʼsunagoge ndipo anayankhula molimba mtima kwa miyezi itatu
Acts19:9 Koma ena anawumitsa mitima; anakana kukhulupirira ndipo ananyoza Njirayo pa gulu la anthu. Kotero Paulo anawasiya. Iye anatenga ophunzirawo ndipo amakambirana tsiku ndi tsiku mʼsukulu ya Turano.
Acts19:10 Izi zinachitika kwa zaka ziwiri
Acts19:11 Mulungu anachita zodabwitsa zapadera kudzera mwa Paulo.
Acts19:12 Kotero kuti mipango yopukutira thukuta ndi yovala pogwira ntchito
Acts19:13 Ayuda ena amene ankayendayenda kutulutsa mizimu yoyipa anayesa kugwiritsa ntchito dzina la Ambuye Yesu pa amene anali ndi ziwanda. Iwo popemphera amati
Acts19:14 Amene ankachita zimenezi anali ana asanu ndi awiri a Skeva
Acts19:15 Tsiku lina mzimu woyipa unawayankha kuti
Acts19:16 Pamenepo munthu amene anali ndi mzimu woyipa anawalumphira nawagwira onse. Iye anawamenya kwambiri
Acts19:17 Ayuda ndi Agriki okhala ku Efeso atamva zimenezi
Acts19:18 Ambiri a iwo amene tsopano anakhulupirira anafika ndi kuvomereza poyera ntchito zawo zoyipa.
Acts19:19 Ambiri amene amachita za matsenga anasonkhanitsa mabuku awo pamodzi nawatentha pamaso pa anthu onse. Atawonkhetsa mtengo wa mabukuwo
Acts19:20 Kotero Mawu a Ambuye anapitirira kufalikira ndipo anagwira ntchito mwamphamvu.
Acts19:21 Zonsezi zitachitika Paulo anatsimikiza zopita ku Yerusalemu kudzera ku Makedoniya ndi ku Akaya. Iye anati
Acts19:22 Iye anatuma anthu awiri amene amamuthandiza
Acts19:23 Pa nthawi yomweyo panachitika chipolowe chachikulu chifukwa cha Njira ya Ambuye.
Acts19:24 Mmisiri wantchito zasiliva
Acts19:25 Iye anasonkhanitsa pamodzi amisiriwo
Acts19:26 Ndipo inu mukuona ndi kumva kuti munthu uyu Paulo wakopa ndi kusokoneza anthu ambiri a ku Efeso ndiponso pafupifupi dziko lonse la Asiya. Iye akunena kuti milungu yopangidwa ndi anthu si milungu ayi.
Acts19:27 Choopsa ndi chakuti sikungowonongeka kwa ntchito yathu yokha ayi
Acts19:28 Atamva zimenezi
Acts19:29 Nthawi yomweyo mu mzinda wonse munabuka chipolowe. Anthu anagwira Gayo ndi Aristariko
Acts19:30 Paulo anafuna kulowa pakati pa gulu la anthu
Acts19:31 Ngakhale olamulira ena aderalo
Acts19:32 Munali chisokonezo mʼbwalomo pakuti ena amafuwula zina
Acts19:33 Ayuda anamukankhira Alekisandro kutsogolo
Acts19:34 Koma pamene anthuwo anazindikira kuti ndi Myuda
Acts19:35 Mlembi wa mzindawo anakhazikitsa bata gulu la anthuwo ndipo anati
Acts19:36 Chifukwa chake popeza zinthu izi palibe amene angazikane
Acts19:37 Inu mwabweretsa anthu awa pano
Acts19:38 Ngati tsono Demetriyo ndi amisiri anzake ali ndi nkhani ndi munthu wina aliyense
Acts19:39 Ngati mukufuna kubweretsa kanthu kali konse
Acts19:40 Monga mmene zililimu
Acts19:41 Iye atatha kunena zimenezi anawuza gulu la anthulo kuti libalalike.

Acts20:2 Iye anayendera madera a kumeneko

Acts20:4 Iye anapita pamodzi ndi Sopatro mwana wa Puro wa ku Bereya
Acts20:5 Anthu amenewa anatsogola ndipo anakatidikira ku Trowa.
Acts20:6 Koma ife tinayenda pa sitima ya pamadzi kuchokera ku Filipi chitatha Chikondwerero cha Buledi wopanda Yisiti. Patapita masiku asanu tinakumana nawo enawo ku Trowa
Acts20:7 Pa tsiku loyamba la Sabata
Acts20:8 Munali nyale zambiri mʼchipinda chammwamba mʼmene tinasonkhanamo.

Acts20:22 “Ndipo tsopano
Acts20:23 Chimene ndikudziwa ndi chakuti Mzimu Woyera wandichenjeza mu mzinda uliwonse kuti ndende ndi mavuto zikundidikira.
Acts20:24 Koma sindilabadira konse za moyo wanga ngati kuti ndi wa mtengo wapatali kwa ine
Acts20:25 “Tsopano ndikudziwa kuti inu nonse amene ndinakuyenderani ndi kumakulalikirani ufumu wa Mulungu simudzaonanso nkhope yanga.
Acts20:26 Chifukwa chake
Acts20:27 Pakuti sindinakubisireni pokulalikirani chifuniro chonse cha Mulungu.
Acts20:28 Mudziyangʼanire nokha ndiponso muyangʼanire gulu lankhosa limene Mzimu Woyera anakuyikani kuti mukhale oyangʼanira ake. Khalani abusa a mpingo wa Mulungu umene Iye anawugula ndi magazi ake.
Acts20:29 Ndikudziwa kuti ndikachoka ine
Acts20:30 Ngakhale pakati pa inu nokha padzapezeka anthu oyankhula zonama ndi cholinga chofuna kukhala ndi ophunzira kuti awatsate.
Acts20:31 Tsono inu
Acts20:32 “Tsopano ine ndikukuperekani kwa Mulungu ndiponso kwa mawu a chisomo chake
Acts20:33 Ine sindinasirire siliva kapena golide kapena zovala za munthu aliyense.
Acts20:34 Inu nomwe mukudziwa kuti manja angawa ananditumikira kuti tipeze zimene ine ndi anzanga tinkazifuna.
Acts20:35 Pa zonse zimene ndinachita
Acts20:36 Atanena zimenezi
Acts20:37 Onse analira pamene amamukumbatira ndi kupsompsona.
Acts20:38 Chimene chinamvetsa chisoni kwambiri ndi mawu ake akuti sadzaonanso nkhope yake. Kenaka iwo anamuperekeza ku sitima yapamadzi.

Acts21:17 Titafika ku Yerusalemu

Acts21:19 Paulo anawalonjera ndi kuwafotokozera mwatsatanetsatane zimene Mulungu anachita pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina kudzera mu utumiki wake.
Acts21:20 Atamva zimenezi
Acts21:21 Iwo anawuzidwa kuti iwe umaphunzitsa Ayuda onse amene akukhala pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina kuti asiye kutsatira Mose
Acts21:22 Nanga pamenepa ife titani? Iwo adzamva ndithu kuti iwe wabwera
Acts21:23 tsono iwe chita zimene ife tikuwuze. Tili nawo amuna anayi pano amene anachita lumbiro kwa Mulungu.
Acts21:24 Muwatenge anthu amenewa
Acts21:25 Koma kunena za anthu a mitundu ina amene asandulika okhulupirira
Acts21:26 Mmawa mwake Paulo anatenga amuna aja ndipo anachita mwambo wodziyeretsa. Kenaka anapita ku Nyumba ya Mulungu nakadziwitsa ansembe za tsiku limene adzatsiriza nthawi ya kudziyeretsa ndi kuperekera nsembe aliyense wa iwo.
Acts21:27 Ali pafupi kutsiriza masiku asanu ndi awiriwo
Acts21:28 akufuwula kuti
Acts21:29 Iwo ananena izi chifukwa anali ataona Trofimo wa ku Efeso ali ndi Paulo mu mzindamo ndipo iwo ankaganiza kuti Paulo anamulowetsa mʼbwalo la Nyumba ya Mulungu.
Acts21:30 Mzinda wonse unasokonezeka
Acts21:31 Pamene anthuwo ankafuna kupha Paulo
Acts21:32 Nthawi yomweyo iye anatenga asilikali ndi atsogoleri a magulu a asilikali ndi kuthamangira kumene kunali anthuwo. Anthuwo ataona mkuluyo ndi asilikali ake analeka kumenya Paulo.
Acts21:33 Mkulu wa asilikaliyo anabwera nagwira Paulo
Acts21:34 Ena mʼgulumo anafuwula chinthu china ndi enanso chinanso. Tsono popeza mkulu wa asilikaliyo sanathe kudziwa choonadi chenicheni chifukwa cha phokoso

Acts22:5 Mkulu wa ansembe ndiponso akuluakulu a Ayuda angathe kundichitira umboni. Iwowa anandipatsa makalata opita nawo kwa abale awo ku Damasiko. Ndipo ndinapita kumeneko kuti ndikawagwire anthu amenewa ndi kubwera nawo ku Yerusalemu kuti adzalangidwe.

Acts22:13 Iye anayimirira pafupi nane nati
Acts22:14 “Ndipo iye anati
Acts22:15 Iwe udzakhala mboni yake kwa anthu onse pa zimene waziona ndi kuzimva.
