Acts22:20 Ndipo pamene ankapha Stefano
Acts22:21 Pamenepo Ambuye anandiwuza kuti
Acts22:22 Gulu la anthu linamvetsera mawu a Paulo mpaka pamene ananena izi
Acts22:23 Akufuwula ndi kuponya zovala zawo ndi kuwaza fumbi kumwamba
Acts22:24 mkulu wa asilikali analamulira kuti amutenge Paulo kupita naye ku malo a asilikali. Iye analamula kuti Paulo akwapulidwe kwambiri ndi kumufunsa kuti apeze chimene anthu ankafuwulira chotere.
Acts22:25 Atamumanga kuti amukwapule
Acts22:26 Wolamulira asilikali 100 uja atamva zimenezi
Acts22:27 Mkulu wa asilikali uja anapita kwa Paulo ndipo anamufunsa kuti
Acts22:28 Kenaka mkulu wa asilikaliyo anati
Acts22:29 Iwo amene anati amufunse analeka nthawi yomweyo. Mkulu wa asilikali uja anachita mantha atazindikira kuti wamanga Paulo amene ndi nzika ya Chiroma.
Acts22:30 Mmawa mwake
Acts23:1 Paulo anayangʼanitsitsa anthu a Bwalo Lalikulu nati
Acts23:2 Chifukwa cha mawu amenewa
Acts23:3 Pamenepo Paulo anamuwuza kuti
Acts23:4 Anthu amene anayimirira pafupi ndi Paulo anati
Acts23:5 Paulo anayankha nati
Acts23:6 Paulo atazindikira kuti ena mwa iwo anali Asaduki ndiponso ena anali Afarisi
Acts23:7 Iye atanena zimenezi
Acts23:8 Asaduki amati kulibe kuuka kwa akufa
Acts23:9 Panali phokoso lalikulu
Acts23:10 Mkangano unakula kwambiri kotero kuti mkulu wa asilikali anachita mantha kuti mwina anthu angakhadzule Paulo. Iye analamulira asilikali ake apite kukamuchotsa pakati pawo mwamphamvu ndi kubwera naye ku malo a asilikaliwo.
Acts23:11 Usiku omwewo Ambuye anayimirira pambali pa Paulo nati
Acts23:12 Kutacha Ayuda ena anakonza chiwembu ndipo analumbira kuti sadya kapena kumwa mpaka atapha Paulo.
Acts23:13 Anthu amene anakonza chiwembuchi analipo makumi anayi.
Acts23:14 Iwo anapita kwa akulu a ansembe ndi akuluakulu a Ayuda nakawawuza kuti
Acts23:15 Tsopano inu pamodzi ndi akuluakulu a Bwalo Lalikulu mupemphe mkulu wa asilikali kuti akubweretsereni Paulo ngati kuti mukufuna kudziwa bwino za mlandu wake. Ife takonzeka kudzamupha asanafike kumeneko.”
Acts23:16 Koma mwana wa mlongo wake wa Paulo atamva za chiwembuchi
Acts23:17 Paulo anayitana mmodzi wa wolamulira asilikali 100 aja
Acts23:18 Anamutengadi mnyamatayo napita naye kwa mkulu wa asilikali uja
Acts23:19 Mkulu wa asilikali uja anagwira dzanja mnyamatayo napita naye paseli ndipo anamufunsa kuti
Acts23:20 Mnyamatayo anati
Acts23:21 Inu musawamvere
Acts23:22 Mkulu wa asilikaliyo anawuza mnyamatayo kuti apite koma anamuchenjeza kuti
Acts23:23 Kenaka mkulu wa asilikaliyo anayitana awiri a asilikali olamulira asilikali 100 nawalamula kuti
Acts23:24 Mumukonzerenso Paulo akavalo woti akwerepo kuti akafike bwino kwa bwanamkubwa Felike.”
Acts23:25 Iye analemba kalata iyi:
Acts23:26 Ine Klaudiyo Lusiya
Acts23:27 Munthuyo Ayuda anamugwira ndipo anali pafupi kumupha
Acts23:28 Ndinkafuna kudziwa mlandu umene anapalamula
Acts23:29 Ine ndinapeza kuti amamuyimba mlandu wa nkhani ya malamulo awo
Acts23:30 Nditawuzidwa kuti amukonzera chiwembu munthuyu
Acts23:31 Pamenepo asilikali aja anatenga Paulo monga anawalamulira napita naye ku Antipatri usiku.
Acts23:32 Mmawa mwake iwo anabwerera ku malo a asilikali nasiya okwera pa akavalo kuti apitirire ndi Paulo.
Acts23:33 Asilikali okwera pa akavalowo atafika ku Kaisareya anapereka kalatayo kwa bwanamkubwa
Acts23:34 Bwanamkubwayo anawerenga kalatayo ndipo anamufunsa Paulo za dera limene amachokera. Atazindikira kuti amachokera ku Kilikiya
Acts23:35 iye anati
Acts24:1 Patapita masiku asanu mkulu wa ansembe Hananiya
Acts24:2 Atamuyitana Paulo
Acts24:3 Wolemekezeka Felike ife timazilandira zimenezi moyamika kwambiri ponseponse ndi mwa njira iliyonse.
Acts24:4 Koma kuti tisakuchedwetseni
Acts24:5 “Ife tapeza kuti munthu uyu amayambitsa mavuto ndi kuwutsa mapokoso pakati pa Ayuda onse a dziko lonse lapansi. Iyeyu ndi mtsogoleri wa mpatuko wa Anazareti.
Acts24:6 Anayesera ngakhale kudetsa Nyumba ya Mulungu wathu. Ndiye ife tinamugwira.
Acts24:7 Koma
Acts24:8 Ndipo Lusiya analamula kuti amene anali naye ndi mlandu abwere kwa inu. Mukamufunsa ameneyu kwa nokha mudzadziwa choonadi cha zimene ife tikumunenera.”
Acts24:9 Ayuda anavomereza nanenetsa kuti zimenezi zinali zoona.
Acts24:10 Bwanamkubwayo atakodola Paulo ndi kulola kuti ayankhule
Acts24:11 Inu mukhoza kupeza umboni wake. Sipanapite masiku khumi ndi awiri chipitireni changa ku Yerusalemu kukapembedza.
Acts24:12 Amene akundiyimba mlanduwa sanandipeze mʼNyumba ya Mulungu ndi kutsutsana ndi wina aliyense kapena kuyambitsa chisokonezo mʼsunagoge kapena pena paliponse mu mzindamo.
Acts24:13 Ndipo sangathe kupereka umboni wa mlandu umene akundiyimba inewu.
Acts24:14 Komatu ine ndikuvomera kuti ndimapembedza Mulungu wa makolo athu
Acts24:15 Ine ndili nacho chiyembekezo chomwecho chimene iwo ali nacho mwa Mulungu
Acts24:16 Kotero ine ndimayesetsa kuti ndikhale ndi chikumbumtima chosanditsutsa pamaso pa Mulungu ndi anthu onse.
Acts24:17 “Patapita zaka zambiri
Acts24:18 Pamene ndinkachita zimenezi
Acts24:19 Koma pali Ayuda ena ochokera ku Asiya
Acts24:20 Kapena awa amene ali panowa anene mlandu umene anapeza mwa ine
Acts24:21 Koma cholakwa changa chingathe kukhala chokhachi chakuti
Acts24:22 Kenaka Felike
Acts24:23 Iye analamulira woyangʼanira asilikali 100 kuti alondere Paulo
Acts24:24 Patapita masiku angapo Felike anabwera pamodzi ndi mkazi wake Drusila
Acts24:25 Paulo atayankhula za chilungamo
Acts24:26 Pa nthawi imeneyi amayembekeza kuti Paulo adzamupatsa ndalama
Acts24:27 Patapita zaka ziwiri
Acts25:1 Patapita masiku atatu Festo atafika mʼdera lake
Acts25:2 Kumeneko akulu a ansembe ndi atsogoleri a Chiyuda anabwera kwa iye ndi kumufotokozera mlandu wa Paulo.
Acts25:3 Iwo anamupempha Festo kuti awakomere mtima potumiza Paulo ku Yerusalemu
Acts25:4 Festo anayankha kuti
Acts25:5 Ena mwa atsogoleri anu apite nane kumeneko
Acts25:6 Festo atakhala nawo masiku asanu ndi atatu kapena khumi iye anapita ku Kaisareya
Acts25:7 Paulo atafika
Acts25:8 Kenaka Paulo ananena mawu ake odziteteza kuti
Acts25:9 Festo
Acts25:10 Paulo anayankha kuti
Acts25:11 Koma ngati ndili wolakwa
Acts25:12 Festo atakambirana ndi akuluakulu abwalo lake
Acts25:13 Patapita masiku ochepa mfumu Agripa pamodzi ndi Bernisi anabwera ku Kaisareya kudzalonjera Festo.
Acts25:14 Atakhala kumeneko masiku angapo
Acts25:15 Nditapita ku Yerusalemu akulu a ansembe ndi akuluakulu a Ayuda anandifotokozera mlandu wake ndipo anandipempha kuti ndigamule kuti ndi wolakwa.
Acts25:16 “Ine ndinawayankha kuti si mwambo wa Aroma kungomupereka munthu ayi. Munthu woyimbidwa mlanduyo amayenera kukumana nawo omunenezawo
Acts25:17 Atabwera kuno pamodzi ndi ine
Acts25:18 Omuyimba mlandu aja atayimirira kuti ayankhule
Acts25:19 Mʼmalo mwake
Acts25:20 Ine ndinathedwa nzeru wosadziwa momwe ndikanafufuzira nkhaniyi; kotero ndinafunsa ngati akanafuna kupita ku Yerusalemu kuti akaweruzidwe kumeneko.
Acts25:21 Koma Paulo anapempha kuti akaonekere pamaso pa mfumu ya Chiroma
Acts25:22 Ndipo Agripa anati kwa Festo
Acts25:23 Mmawa mwake Agripa ndi Bernisi anabwera mwaulemu waukulu waufumu nalowa mʼbwalo la milandu pamodzi ndi akulu a asilikali ndiponso akuluakulu a mu mzindawo. Atalamula Festo kuti Paulo abwere
Acts25:24 Festo anati
Acts25:25 Ine ndinapeza kuti iyeyu sanachite kanthu koyenera kufa
Acts25:26 Koma ndilibe kanthu kenikeni koti ndilembere Wolemekezekayo za iyeyu. Nʼchifukwa chake ndabwera naye pamaso pa nonsenu
Acts25:27 Pakuti ine ndikuganiza kuti ndi chinthu chopanda nzeru kutumiza wamʼndende popanda kutchula zifukwa zenizeni za mlandu wake.”
Acts26:1 Ndipo Agripa anawuza Paulo kuti
Acts26:2 “Mfumu Agripa ine ndikudziyesa wa mwayi kuyima pamaso panu lero lino ndi kudziteteza
Acts26:3 ndipo makamaka chifukwa inu mukudziwa bwino miyambo yonse ya Chiyuda ndiponso zonse zimene amatsutsana. Nʼchifukwa chake ndikukupemphani kuti mundimvetsere moleza mtima.
Acts26:4 “Ayuda onse akudziwa za moyo wanga mmene ndakhalira kuyambira ndili mwana
Acts26:5 Iwo akundidziwa kuyambira kalekale ndipo angathe kuchitira umboni kuti ndakhala ndili Mfarisi moyo wanga wonse
Acts26:6 Ndipo tsopano ndikuyimbidwa mlandu lero chifukwa cha chiyembekezo changa pa zimene Mulungu analonjeza makolo athu.
Acts26:7 Ili ndi lonjezo limene mafuko athu khumi ndi awiri akuyembekezera kuti likwaniritsidwe pamene akupembedza Mulungu molimbika usana ndi usiku. Wolemekezeka Mfumu
Acts26:8 Nʼchifukwa chiyani ena a inu mukuganiza kuti nʼkosatheka kuti Mulungu aukitse akufa?
Acts26:9 “Inenso ndimaganiza kuti ndimayenera kuchita zinthu zambiri pofuna kuthana ndi dzina la Yesu wa ku Nazareti.
Acts26:10 Ndipo izi ndi zimene ndinazichita ku Yerusalemu. Ndi ulamuliro wa akulu a ansembe
Acts26:11 Nthawi zambiri ndinkapita mʼsunagoge iliyonse kuti alangidwe
Acts26:12 “Pa ulendo wina wotere
Acts26:13 Wolemekezeka Mfumu
Acts26:14 Tonse tinagwa pansi ndipo ndinamva mawu mʼChihebri akuti
Acts26:15 Ndipo ine ndinafunsa kuti
Acts26:16 Tsopano dzuka ndipo imirira. Ine ndaonekera kwa iwe kuti ndikusankhe kuti ukhale mtumiki ndiponso mboni ya zimene waziona za Ine ndiponso zimene ndidzakuonetsa.
Acts26:17 Ine ndidzakulanditsa mʼmanja mwa anthu a mtundu wako ndiponso mwa anthu a mitundu ina. Ine ndikukutuma kwa iwo
Acts26:18 kuti ukatsekule maso awo kuti atembenuke mtima kuchoka ku mdima ndi kulowa mʼkuwala
Acts26:19 “Nʼchifukwa chake Mfumu Agripa
Acts26:20 Kuyambira kwa anthu a ku Damasiko
Acts26:21 Ichi nʼchifukwa chake Ayuda anandigwira mʼbwalo la Nyumba ya Mulungu nafuna kundipha.
Acts26:22 Koma Mulungu wakhala akundithandiza mpaka lero lino. Ine ndayima pano kuti ndichitire umboni kwa anthu onse otchuka ndi anthu wamba. Ine sindikunena zina zowonjezera koma zimene Aneneri ndi Mose ananena kuti zidzachitika.
Acts26:23 Iwo ananena kuti Khristu adzamva zowawa ndipo popeza Iye adzakhala woyamba kuuka kwa akufa
Acts26:24 Paulo akudziteteza
Acts26:25 Paulo anayankha nati
Acts26:26 Mfumu ikuzidziwa bwino zinthu izi
Acts26:27 Mfumu Agripa
Acts26:28 Kenaka Agripa anati kwa Paulo
Acts26:29 Paulo anayankha kuti
Acts26:30 Mfumu inayimirira pamodzi ndi bwanamkubwa ndi Bernisi ndiponso anthu onse amene anakhala nawo pamodzi.
Acts26:31 Inatuluka mʼchipindamo
Acts26:32 Agripa anati kwa Festo
Acts27:1 Zitatsimikizika kuti tiyenera kupita ku Italiya pa sitima ya pa madzi
Acts27:2 Tinakwera sitima ya pamadzi yochokera ku Adramutiyo imene inali yokonzeka kale kupita ku madooko a ku Asiya
Acts27:3 Mmawa mwake tinafika ku Sidoni; ndipo Yuliyo
Acts27:4 Kuchokera kumeneko tinayambanso ulendo pa nyanja ndipo tinadutsa kumpoto kwa chilumba cha Kupro chifukwa mphepo imawomba kuchokera kumene ife timapita.
Acts27:5 Titawoloka nyanja mbali ya gombe la Kilikiya ndi Pamfiliya
Acts27:6 Kumeneko wolamulira asilikali 100 uja anapeza sitima ya pamadzi ya ku Alekisandriya imene imapita ku Italiya
Acts27:7 Tinayenda pangʼonopangʼono kwa masiku ambiri ndipo tinakafika kufupi ndi Knido movutikira. Pamene mphepo sinatilole kupitirira ulendo wathu molunjika
Acts27:8 Timayenda movutikira mʼmbali mwa chilumbacho ndipo tinafika pa malo wotchedwa Madooko Okoma
Acts27:9 Tinataya nthawi yayitali
Acts27:10 “Anthu inu
Acts27:11 Koma wolamulira asilikali 100 uja
Acts27:12 Popeza kuti dookolo silinali labwino kukhalako nthawi yozizira anthu ambiri anaganiza kuti tichoke. Ife tinkayembekeza kukafika ku Foinikisi ndi kukhala kumeneko nthawi yachisanu. Ili linali dooko la ku Krete
Acts27:13 Mphepo yochokera kummwera itayamba kuwomba pangʼonopangʼono
Acts27:14 Pasanathe nthawi yayitali
Acts27:15 Mphepo yamkunthoyo inawomba sitima ija ndipo sinathe kulimbana nayo
Acts27:16 Tikudutsa mʼmbali mwa kachilumba kakangʼono kotchedwa Kawuda
Acts27:17 Anthuwo atakweza bwatolo mʼsitima
Acts27:18 Ife tinavutika kwambiri ndi namondwe kotero kuti mmawa mwake tinayamba kuponya katundu mʼmadzi.
Acts27:19 Pa tsiku lachitatu anaponya mʼnyanja zipangizo za mʼsitima ndi manja awo.
Acts27:20 Sitinaone dzuwa kapena nyenyezi kwa masiku ambiri ndipo namondwe anapitirira kuwomba kwambiri
Acts27:21 Anthu aja atakhala nthawi yayitali osadya
Acts27:22 Koma tsopano ndikuti limbani mtima
Acts27:23 Usiku wathawu mngelo wa Mulungu
Acts27:24 ndipo iyeyu anati
Acts27:25 Tsono limbani mtima
Acts27:26 Komabe tiyenera kukatsakamira pa chilumba china chake.”
Acts27:27 Pakati pa usiku wa tsiku la khumi ndi chinayi tikukankhidwabe ndi mphepo mʼnyanja ya Adriya
Acts27:28 Iwo anatenga choyezera kuzama kwa nyanja ndi kupeza kuti kuzama kwake kunali mamita 36. Atayendanso pangʼono anatenganso choyezera chija napeza kuti kuzama kwake kunali 27.
Acts27:29 Poopa kuti tingagunde miyala
Acts27:30 Pofuna kuthawa mʼsitimayo
Acts27:31 Pamenepo Paulo anawuza wolamulira asilikali uja ndi asilikaliwo kuti
Acts27:32 Pamenepo asilikaliwo anadula zingwe za bwatolo ndipo linagwera mʼmadzi.
Acts27:33 Kutatsala pangʼono kucha
Acts27:34 Tsopano ine ndikukupemphani kuti mudye. Muyenera kudya kuti mupulumuke. Palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe wa inu adzataye ngakhale tsitsi limodzi la pamutu pake.”
Acts27:35 Paulo atanena zimenezi
Acts27:36 Onse analimba mtima nayamba kudyanso.
Acts27:37 Tonse pamodzi mʼsitimamo tinalipo anthu 276.
Acts27:38 Onse atadya
Acts27:39 Kutacha
Acts27:40 Atadula anangula aja
Acts27:41 Koma sitimayo inagunda mchenga wobisika ndipo inayima. Mbali ya kutsogolo ya sitimayo inakanirira ndipo sinathe kuyendanso
Acts27:42 Asilikali anaganiza za kupha amʼndende onse
Acts27:43 Koma wolamulira asilikali uja anafuna kupulumutsa Paulo ndipo anawaletsa kuchita zimene anakonza. Iye analamulira asilikali kuti amene amatha kusambira kuti adziponye mʼmadzi ndi kuyamba kukafika pa mtunda.
Acts27:44 Otsalawo anayenera kugwira matabwa kapena tizidutswa ta sitimayo. Motero onse anapulumuka nakafika pa mtunda.
Acts28:1 Titapulumuka choncho
Acts28:2 Anthu a pa chilumbacho anatichitira zokoma zimene sizichitika kawirikawiri. Iwo anakoleza moto natilandira tonse chifukwa kumagwa mvula ndipo kumazizira.
Acts28:3 Paulo anatola mtolo wankhuni
Acts28:4 Anthu a pa chilumbacho ataona njokayo ili lende pa dzanja lake
Acts28:5 Koma Paulo anayikutumulira pa moto njokayo
Acts28:6 Anthu anayembekezera kuti thupi lake litupa kapena agwa ndi kufa mwadzidzidzi
Acts28:7 Pafupi ndi malowa panali munda wa Popliyo
Acts28:8 Abambo ake anali gone
Acts28:9 Zitachitika zimenezi
Acts28:10 Anthuwo anatilemekeza ife mʼnjira zambiri ndipo pamene tinakonzeka kuti tiyambe ulendo
Acts28:11 Patapita miyezi itatu
Acts28:12 Tinakafika ku Surakusa ndipo kumeneko tinakhalako masiku atatu.
Acts28:13 Kuchokera kumeneko tinayenda ndi kukafika ku Regio. Mmawa mwake mphepo yochokera kummwera inawomba
Acts28:14 Kumeneko tinapezako abale amene anatiyitana kuti tikhale nawo sabata limodzi. Ndipo kenaka tinapita ku Roma.
Acts28:15 Abale kumeneko atamva kuti tikubwera
Acts28:16 Titafika ku Roma
Acts28:17 Patapita masiku atatu
Acts28:18 Iwo anandifufuza ndipo anafuna kundimasula chifukwa sanandipeze wopalamula mlandu woyenera kuphedwa.
Acts28:19 Koma Ayuda atakana
Acts28:20 Pa chifukwa ichi ndapempha kuti ndionane nanu ndi kuyankhula nanu. Pakuti nʼchifukwa cha chiyembekezo cha Israeli ndamangidwa unyolo uwu.”
Acts28:21 Iwo anayankha kuti
Acts28:22 Koma ife tikufuna kumva maganizo ako ndi otani
Acts28:23 Iwo anakonza tsiku lina loti akumane ndi Paulo
Acts28:24 Ena anakopeka ndi zimene Paulo ananena
Acts28:25 Ndipo anayamba kuchoka popeza sanagwirizane pakati pawo Paulo atanena mawu awa omaliza akuti
Acts28:26 “Pita kwa anthu awa ndi kuwawuza kuti
Acts28:27 Pakuti mtima wa anthu ndi wokanika; mʼmakutu mwawo ndi mogontha
Acts28:28 “Chifukwa chake ine ndikufuna mudziwe kuti chipulumutso cha Mulungu chatumizidwa kwa anthu a mitundu ina
Acts28:29 Paulo atanena mawu amenewa
Acts28:30 Paulo anakhala kumeneko zaka ziwiri zathunthu mʼnyumba yobwereka yomwe amalipira ndipo ankalandira aliyense amene amabwera kudzamuona.
Acts28:31 Molimba mtima ndi popanda womuletsa
Romans1:1 Ndine Paulo
Romans1:2 umene analonjeza kale mʼMalemba Oyera kudzera mwa aneneri ake.
Romans1:3 Uthengawu ndi wonena za Mwana wake amene mwa umunthu wake anali wochokera mwa Davide.
Romans1:4 Iyeyu ndi amene anatsimikizidwa kukhala Mwana wa Mulungu mwamphamvu za Mzimu Woyera pamene anauka kwa akufa. Kudzera mwa Ambuye athu Yesu Khristu
Romans1:5 ife tinalandira chisomo chokhala atumwi oyitana anthu a mitundu yonse kuti amukhulupirire ndi kumumvera mwachikhulupiriro kuti dzina lake lilemekezedwe.
Romans1:6 Inunso muli mʼgulu la Amitundu oyitanidwawo kukhala ake a Yesu Khristu.
Romans1:7 Ndikulembera kwa onse okhala ku Roma amene Mulungu amakukondani nakuyitanani kuti mukhale oyera mtima. Chisomo ndi mtendere zochokera kwa Mulungu Atate athu ndi kwa Ambuye Yesu Khristu zikhale ndi inu.
Romans1:8 Poyamba
Romans1:9 Mulungu amene ndimamutumikira ndi mtima wanga onse polalikira Uthenga Wabwino wa Mwana wake
Romans1:10 Mʼmapemphero anga
Romans1:11 Ine ndikulakalaka kukuonani kuti ndikugawireni mphatso zina zauzimu kuti zikulimbikitseni
Romans1:12 ndiponso kuti tonsefe tilimbikitsane mʼchikhulupiriro wina ndi mnzake.
Romans1:13 Abale
Romans1:14 Ine ndi wokakamizidwa ndi udindo wotumikira Agriki pamodzi ndi omwe si Agriki
Romans1:15 Pa chifukwa chimenechi
Romans1:16 Ine sindichita manyazi ndi Uthenga Wabwino chifukwa ndiwo mphamvu za Mulungu zopulumutsa aliyense amene akhulupirira
Romans1:17 Pakuti mu Uthenga Wabwino anawulula kuti chilungamo chimachokera kwa Mulungu. Kuyambira pachiyambi mpaka potsiriza ndi chilungamo chobwera mwachikhulupiriro
Romans1:18 Mkwiyo wa Mulungu ukuonekera kuchokera kumwamba. Ukutsutsana ndi kusapembedza konse ndi kuyipa kwa anthu amene amapondereza choonadi mwa chikhalidwe chawo choyipa.
Romans1:19 Za Mulungu zimene zingathe kudziwika
Romans1:20 Pakuti kuyambira pamene dziko lapansi linalengedwa
Romans1:21 Ngakhale iwo anadziwa Mulungu
Romans1:22 Ngakhale ankadzitama kuti ndi anzeru
Romans1:23 Iwo anasinthanitsa ulemerero wa Mulungu wosafa ndi mafano opangidwa ndi manja wooneka ngati munthu amene amafa
Romans1:24 Nʼchifukwa chake Mulungu anawasiya kuti azingochita zilakolako zochititsa manyazi zauchimo zomwe mitima yawo inkafuna. Zotsatira zake anachita za chiwerewere wina ndi mnzake kunyazitsa matupi awo.
Romans1:25 Iwo anasinthanitsa choonadi cha Mulungu ndi bodza ndipo anapembedza ndi kutumikira zinthu zolengedwa mʼmalo mwa Mlengi amene ali woyenera kutamandidwa mpaka muyaya. Ameni.
Romans1:26 Chifukwa cha ichi
Romans1:27 Chimodzimodzinso amuna analeka machitidwe a ukwati ndi akazi nʼkumakhumbana amuna okhaokha. Amuna ankachita zochitisa manyazizi ndi amuna anzawo
Romans1:28 Ndipo popeza anaona kuti nʼchopanda nzeru kumvera Mulungu
Romans1:29 Iwo ndi odzazidwa ndi mtundu uliwonse wa makhalidwe oyipa
Romans1:30 osinjirira
Romans1:31 alibe nzeru
Romans1:32 Ngakhale kuti amadziwa chiweruzo cholungama cha Mulungu chakuti amene amachita zinthu zotere amayenera imfa
Romans2:1 Choncho
Romans2:2 Tsopano ife tikudziwa kuti chiweruzo cha Mulungu
Romans2:3 Kodi ukuganiza kuti udzathawa chiweruzo cha Mulungu iwe munthu wamba
Romans2:4 Kodi kapena ukupeputsa kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu
Romans2:5 Koma pakuti ndiwe wosamvera ndi wa mtima wosafuna kulapa
Romans2:6 Mulungu adzabwezera aliyense molingana ndi ntchito zake.
Romans2:7 Iye adzapereka moyo wosatha kwa amene amafunafuna ulemerero
Romans2:8 Koma Mulungu adzakhuthulira mkwiyo ndi ukali wake pa amene amachita zofuna zawo ndi kukana choonadi nʼkumatsatira zoyipa.
Romans2:9 Masautso ndi zowawa zidzagwera munthu aliyense amene amachita zonyansa
Romans2:10 Koma ulemerero
Romans2:11 Pajatu Mulungu alibe tsankho.
Romans2:12 Onse amene amachimwa osadziwa Malamulo
Romans2:13 Pakuti si amene amangomva Malamulo amene amakhala wolungama pamaso pa Mulungu
Romans2:14 Ndithu
Romans2:15 Ntchito zawo zimaonetsa kuti Malamulowo alembedwa mʼmitima mwawo. Chikumbumtima chawonso chimawachitira umboni pakuti maganizo awo amawatsutsa kapena kuwavomereza.
Romans2:16 Izi zidzachitika pa tsiku limene Mulungu adzaweruza zinsinsi za anthu kudzera mwa Yesu Khristu
Romans2:17 Koma iweyo
Romans2:18 ngati umadziwa chifuniro chake
Romans2:19 ngati umadziwadi kuti ndiwe mtsogoleri wa osaona
Romans2:20 mlangizi wa anthu opusa
Romans2:21 tsono
Romans2:22 Kodi iwe amene umanena kuti anthu asachite chigololo
Romans2:23 Kodi iwe amene umadzitama ndi Malamulo
Romans2:24 Monga kwalembedwa
Romans2:25 Mdulidwe umakhala ndi phindu ngati usunga Malamulo
Romans2:26 Ngati amene sanachite mdulidwe achita zomwe zili mʼMalamulo
Romans2:27 Munthu amene sanachite mdulidwe mʼthupi koma amamvera Malamulo adzakutsutsa iwe wosamvera Malamulowe
Romans2:28 Myuda weniweni si amene angooneka ngati Myuda pamaso pa anthu
Romans2:29 Ayi
Romans3:1 Nanga kodi pali ubwino wotani pokhala Myuda
Romans3:2 Ubwino wake ndi wambiri mʼnjira zonse! Choyambirira iwo anapatsidwa Mawu a Mulungu kuti awasunge.
Romans3:3 Nanga zili bwanji ngati ena analibe chikhulupiriro? Kodi kupanda chikhulupiriro kwawo kukanalepheretsa kukhulupirika kwa Mulungu?
Romans3:4 Ayi. Mʼnjira iliyonse ayi! Mulungu akhale woona
Romans3:5 Koma ngati kuyipa mtima kwathu kuonetsa poyera kuti Mulungu ndi wolungama
Romans3:6 Ayi. Mʼnjira iliyonse ayi! Ngati zikanakhala zotero
Romans3:7 Wina atanena kuti
Romans3:8 Nʼchifukwa chiyani osanena kuti
Romans3:9 Kodi timalize bwanji? Kodi Ayuda ndife oposa anthu ena? Ayi. Mʼnjira iliyonse ayi! Ife tinanena kale kuti Ayuda ndi a mitundu ina omwe ndi ochimwa.
Romans3:10 Monga kwalembedwa kuti
Romans3:11 Palibe ndi mmodzi yemwe amene amazindikira
Romans3:12 Onse apatukira kumbali
Romans3:13 “Kummero kwawo kuli ngati manda apululu; ndi lilime lawo amayankhula zachinyengo.” “Ululu wa mamba uli pa milomo yawo.”
Romans3:14 “Mʼkamwa mwawo ndi modzaza ndi zotemberera ndi mawu owawa.”
Romans3:15 “Mapazi awo afulumira kukakhetsa magazi.
Romans3:16 Kusakaza ndi chisoni kumaonekera mʼnjira zawo
Romans3:17 ndipo njira ya mtendere sayidziwa.”
Romans3:18 “Saopa Mulungu ndi pangʼono pomwe.”
Romans3:19 Tsopano tikudziwa kuti chilichonse Malamulo amanena
Romans3:20 Chifukwa chake palibe mmodzi amene adzayesedwa wolungama pamaso pake chifukwa chosunga Malamulo
Romans3:21 Koma tsopano chilungamo chochokera kwa Mulungu
Romans3:22 Timakhala olungama pamaso pa Mulungu pamene takhulupirira Yesu Khristu. Mulungu amachitira zimenezi anthu onse amene akhulupirira Khristu. Palibe kusiyana pakati pa Myuda ndi a mitundu ina
Romans3:23 pakuti onse anachimwa naperewera pa ulemerero wa Mulungu
Romans3:24 ndipo onse alungamitsidwa mwaulere mwa chisomo chake chifukwa cha Khristu Yesu amene anawawombola.
Romans3:25 Mulungu anamupereka Iyeyu kuti pokhetsa magazi ake
Romans3:26 Iye anachita izi kuti aonetse chilungamo chake lero lino. Anthu azindikire kuti Iye ndi wolungama ndipo amalungamitsa aliyense amene akhulupirira Yesu.
Romans3:27 Nanga tsono pamenepa munthu anganyadenso? Kunyadatu kwachotsedwa. Chifukwa cha Malamulo? Kodi Malamulo samafuna ntchito za munthu? Ayi
Romans3:28 Ife tikunenabe kuti munthu amalungamitsidwa mwachikhulupiriro osati mwakusunga Malamulo.
Romans3:29 Kodi Mulungu ndi Mulungu wa Ayuda okha? Kodi si Mulungu wa a mitundu inanso? Inde wa a mitundu inanso
Romans3:30 popeza ndi Mulungu mmodzi yemweyo amene adzalungamitsa mwachikhulupiriro ochita mdulidwe ndi osachita mdulidwe kudzera mʼchikhulupiriro chomwecho.
Romans3:31 Kodi tsono ife
Romans4:1 Nanga tsono tidzati chiyani za Abrahamu kholo lathu
Romans4:2 Kunena zoona
Romans4:3 Kodi Malemba akuti chiyani? “Abrahamu anakhulupirira Mulungu
Romans4:4 Tsopano munthu amene wagwira ntchito
Romans4:5 Koma kwa munthu amene sanagwire ntchito ndipo akhulupirira Mulungu amene amalungamitsa ochimwa
Romans4:6 Davide ponena zomwezi pamene anayankhula za kudala kwa munthu amene Mulungu amulungamitsa osati chifukwa cha ntchito zake akuti
Romans4:7 “Odala ndi amene zoyipa zawo zakhululukidwa; amene machimo awo afafanizidwa.
Romans4:8 Ngodala munthu amene machimo ake Ambuye sadzawakumbukiranso.”
Romans4:9 Kodi madalitso amenewa ali kwa ochita mdulidwe okha kapena kwa amene sanachitepo mdulidwe? Ife takhala tikunena kuti chikhulupiriro cha Abrahamu chinamuchititsa kukhala wolungama.
Romans4:10 Kodi chinatengedwa bwanji? Kodi nʼkuti iye atachita mdulidwe kapena asanachite? Osati atachita mdulidwe koma asanachite!
Romans4:11 Ndipo iye anachita mdulidwe ngati chizindikiro ndi chitsimikizo cha kulungama kumene anali nako mwachikhulupiriro pomwe anali asanachite mdulidwe. Choncho
Romans4:12 Ndipo iyenso ndiyenso kholo la ochita mdulidwe osati amene anangochita mdulidwe kokha koma amene amatsata chitsanzo cha chikhulupiriro chimene kholo lathu Abrahamu anali nacho asanachite mdulidwe.
Romans4:13 Abrahamu ndi zidzukulu zake sanalandire lonjezano lakuti adzalandira dziko lapansi kudzera mu Malamulo
Romans4:14 Pakuti ngati amene amadalira Malamulo ndiye olowa mʼmalo
Romans4:15 chifukwa Malamulo anabweretsa chilango. Ndipo kumene kulibe Malamulo kulibenso kuwalakwitsa.
Romans4:16 Motero
Romans4:17 Monga kwalembedwa kuti
Romans4:18 Ngakhale zinali zosayembekezeka
Romans4:19 Iye sanafowoke mʼchikhulupiriro. Anadziwa choonadi cha thupi lake kuti linali lakufa popeza anali ndi zaka pafupifupi 100 ndiponso mimba ya Sara inali yowuma.
Romans4:20 Komabe iye sanagwedezeke chifukwa chosakhulupirira pa zokhudzana ndi lonjezo la Mulungu. Iye analimbikitsidwa mʼchikhulupiriro chake ndi kupereka ulemerero kwa Mulungu.
Romans4:21 Anatsimikiza mu mtima mwake kuti Mulungu anali ndi mphamvu yochita chomwe analonjeza.
Romans4:22 Nʼchifukwa chake “chinamuchititsa kukhala wolungama.”
Romans4:23 Mawu akuti
Romans4:24 komanso chifukwa ife amene Mulungu adzatiyesa olungama
Romans4:25 Iye anaperekedwa kuti aphedwe chifukwa cha machimo athu ndipo anaukitsidwa ndi kukhala ndi moyo kuti tilungamitsidwe.
Romans5:1 Tsopano popeza tayesedwa olungama mwa chikhulupiriro
Romans5:2 Iyeyo ndiye amene anatsekulira njira mwachikhulupiriro yolowera mʼchisomo mʼmene takhazikikamo. Ndipo tikukondwerera chiyembekezo cha ulemerero wa Mulungu.
Romans5:3 Koma si pokhapo ayi
Romans5:4 Ndipo kupirira kumabweretsa makhalidwe
Romans5:5 Ndipo chiyembekezo chimenechi sichitikhumudwitsa chifukwa Mulungu mwa Mzimu Woyera
Romans5:6 Pakuti pa nthawi yake
Romans5:7 Sizichitika kawirikawiri kuti munthu wina afere munthu wolungama
Romans5:8 Koma Mulungu anaonetsa chikondi chake kwa ife chifukwa pamene tinali ochimwabe
Romans5:9 Popeza chifukwa cha magazi ake ife tapezeka olungama pamaso pa Mulungu
Romans5:10 Pakuti pamene tinali adani a Mulungu
Romans5:11 Sikuti izi zili chomwechi chabe
Romans5:12 Choncho monga momwe tchimo linalowa mʼdziko lapansi kudzera mwa munthu mmodzi
Romans5:13 Pakuti Malamulo asanaperekedwe
Romans5:14 Komabe
Romans5:15 Koma sitingafananitse mphatso yaulereyo ndi kuchimwa kwa anthu. Pakuti ngati anthu ambiri anafa chifukwa cha kuchimwa kwa munthu mmodziyo
Romans5:16 Ndiponso
Romans5:17 Pakuti ngati
Romans5:18 Choncho monga tchimo limodzi linabweretsa kutsutsika pa anthu onse
Romans5:19 Pakuti kusamvera kwa munthu mmodzi kunasandutsa anthu ambiri kukhala ochimwa
Romans5:20 Malamulo a Mulungu anaperekedwa ndi cholinga chakuti anthu onse azindikire kuchuluka kwa machimo awo. Koma pamene machimo anachuluka
Romans5:21 Choncho monga momwe tchimo linkalamulira anthu ndi kubweretsa imfa pa iwo
Romans6:1 Nanga tinene chiyani? Kodi tipitirire kuchimwa kuti chisomo chichulukebe?
Romans6:2 Ayi. Mʼnjira iliyonse! Popeza tinafa ku tchimo
Romans6:3 Kodi simukudziwa kuti tonse amene tinabatizidwa mwa Khristu Yesu tinabatizidwa mu imfa yake?
Romans6:4 Chifukwa chake ife tinayikidwa mʼmanda pamodzi ndi Iye mwa ubatizo. Tinalowa mu imfa ndi cholinga choti monga momwe Khristu anaukitsidwa kwa akufa ndi ulemerero wa Atate
Romans6:5 Pakuti ngati ife tinakhala amodzi ndi Iye mu imfa yake
Romans6:6 Ife tikudziwa kuti umunthu wathu wakale unapachikidwa pamodzi ndi Iye kuti thupi la uchimo likhale lopanda mphamvu ndi kuti tisakakhalenso akapolo a tchimo
Romans6:7 chifukwa aliyense amene anafa anamasuka ku tchimo.
Romans6:8 Koma ngati tinafa pamodzi ndi Khristu
Romans6:9 Pakuti tikudziwa kuti popeza Khristu anaukitsidwa kwa akufa
Romans6:10 Imfa imene Iye anafa
Romans6:11 Kotero inunso
Romans6:12 Nʼchifukwa chake
Romans6:13 Musapereke ziwalo zathupi lanu ku tchimo
Romans6:14 Tchimo silidzakhalanso ndi mphamvu pa inu
Romans6:15 Nʼchiyani tsono? Kodi tidzichimwa chifukwa sitikulamulidwa ndi Malamulo koma chisomo? Ayi. Mʼnjira iliyonse ayi!
Romans6:16 Kodi inu simudziwa kuti pamene mudzipereka kwa wina wake
Romans6:17 Koma ayamikidwe Mulungu pakuti ngakhale munali akapolo a tchimo
Romans6:18 Inu munamasulidwa ku tchimo ndipo tsopano mwasanduka akapolo achilungamo.
Romans6:19 Ine ndikufanizira zinthu za tsiku ndi tsiku chifukwa chikhalidwe chanu nʼchofowoka. Monga momwe munkapereka ziwalo za matupi kukhala akapolo a zonyansa ndi makhalidwe oyipa
Romans6:20 Pomwe munali akapolo atchimo
Romans6:21 Kodi munapeza phindu lanji pochita zinthu zimenezi
Romans6:22 Koma tsopano pakuti inu mwamasulidwa ku tchimo ndipo mwasanduka akapolo a Mulungu
Romans6:23 Pakuti malipiro a tchimo ndi imfa
Romans7:1 Kodi simukudziwa abale kuti Malamulo ali ndi ulamuliro pa munthu pokhapokha ngati ali ndi moyo? Ine ndikuyankhula kwa anthu amene akudziwa Malamulo.
Romans7:2 Mwachitsanzo
Romans7:3 Koma ngati iye akwatiwa ndi mwamuna wina pamene mwamuna wake ali moyo
Romans7:4 Chimodzimodzi inunso
Romans7:5 Pakuti pamene tinkalamulidwa ndi khalidwe lathu lauchimo
Romans7:6 Koma tsopano tamasulidwa ku Malamulowo pakuti tinafa ku zimene zinkatimanga
Romans7:7 Nanga ife tinene chiyani? Kodi Malamulo ndi oyipa? Ayi. Nʼkosatheka! Kunena zoona
Romans7:8 Koma chifukwa cha Malamulo uchimo unapeza mwayi owutsa mʼkati mwanga khalidwe lililonse la kusirira. Pakuti pakanapanda Malamulo
Romans7:9 Nthawi ina ndinali ndi moyo popanda Malamulo. Koma nditayamba kudziwa Malamulo
Romans7:10 ndipo ine ndinafa. Ine ndinazindikira kuti Malamulo omwe ankayenera kubweretsa moyo anabweretsa imfa.
Romans7:11 Pakuti uchimo unapeza mwayi chifukwa cha Malamulo ndipo kudzera mʼMalamulowo
Romans7:12 Choncho lamulo ndi loyera
Romans7:13 Kodi chomwe ndi chabwino tsopano chinasanduka imfa kwa ine? Si choncho ayi! Koma kuti uchimo uzindikirike kuti ndi uchimo unabala imfa mwa ine kudzera mu chomwe chinali chabwino
Romans7:14 Ife tikudziwa kuti Malamulo ndi auzimu; koma ine ndine munthu wofowoka chabe
Romans7:15 Ine sindizindikira zimene ndimachita. Pakuti zimene ndimafuna kuchita sindizichita koma zimene ndimadana nazo ndi zimene ndimazichita.
Romans7:16 Ndipo ngati ndimachita zimene sindimafuna kuzichita
Romans7:17 Monga mmene zililimu
Romans7:18 Ine ndikudziwa kuti mwa ine mulibe kanthu kabwino
Romans7:19 Ine sindichita zabwino zimene ndimafuna koma ndimachita zonyansa zimene sindikuzifuna.
Romans7:20 Tsopano ngati ine ndimachita zimene sindikuzifuna
Romans7:21 Tsono ndapeza kuti lamuloli likugwira ntchito. Ngakhale ndimafuna kuchita zabwino
Romans7:22 Mtima wanga umakondwera ndi lamulo la Mulungu.
Romans7:23 Koma mʼkati mwanga ndimaona lamulo lina likugwira ntchito kulimbana ndi zomwe mtima wanga umavomereza. Lamulo limenelo landisandutsa wamʼndende walamulo la uchimo lomwe likugwira ntchito mʼkati mwa ziwalo zanga.
Romans7:24 Kalanga ine! Adzandipulumutsa ndani ku thupi la imfali?
Romans7:25 Atamandike Mulungu
Romans8:1 Choncho
Romans8:2 chifukwa mwa Khristu Yesu
Romans8:3 Pakuti zimene Malamulo sanathe kuzichita
Romans8:4 ndi cholinga chakuti chilungamo chofunikira cha lamulo chikwaniritsidwe kwathunthu mwa ife amene sitikhala monga mwachikhalidwe chathu cha uchimo koma mwa Mzimu.
Romans8:5 Pakuti anthu amene amakhala monga mwa makhalidwe oyipa a thupi amayika malingaliro awo pa zinthu zathupi. Koma amene amakhala monga mwa Mzimu amayika malingaliro awo pa zinthu za Mzimu.
Romans8:6 Kuyika mtima pa zathupi ndi imfa koma kuyika mtima pa za Mzimu ndi moyo ndi mtendere.
Romans8:7 Pakuti mtima umene wakhazikika pa zathupi ndi wodana ndi Mulungu. Sunagonjere lamulo la Mulungu ndipo sungathe kutero.
Romans8:8 Ndipo anthu amene amalamulidwa ndi khalidwe lauchimo sangathe kukondweretsa Mulungu.
Romans8:9 Koma inu simulamulidwanso ndi khalidwe lanu lauchimo koma ndi Mzimu ngati Mzimu wa Mulungu akhaladi mwa inu. Koma ngati munthu aliyense alibe Mzimu wa Khristu
Romans8:10 Ndipo ngati Khristu ali mwa inu
Romans8:11 Ndipo ngati Mzimu wa Mulungu amene anaukitsa Yesu kwa akufa akhala mwa inu
Romans8:12 Kotero abale
Romans8:13 Pakuti ngati inu mukhala monga mwa khalidwe lauchimo
Romans8:14 Onse amene amatsogozedwa ndi Mzimu wa Mulungu ndi ana a Mulungu.
Romans8:15 Mzimu amene inu munalandira samakusandutsani akapolo
Romans8:16 Mzimu mwini amavomerezana ndi mzimu wathu kuti ife ndife ana a Mulungu.
Romans8:17 Tsono ngati tili ana ake
Romans8:18 Ine ndiganiza kuti masautso amene tikuwamva nthawi ino
Romans8:19 Pakuti chilengedwe chikudikira ndi chiyembekezo kuonetsedwa poyera kwa ana a Mulungu.
Romans8:20 Pakuti chilengedwe sichinasankhe kugonjera zopanda pake
Romans8:21 chakuti chidzamasulidwa ku ukapolo wa chivundi ndi kulandiranso ufulu ndi ulemerero wa ana a Mulungu.
Romans8:22 Ife tikudziwa kuti chilengedwe chonse chakhala chikubuwula ndi ululu ngati ululu wa nthawi yobereka mwana mpaka tsopano lino.
Romans8:23 Si zokhazo ayi
Romans8:24 Pakuti ife tinapulumutsidwa mʼchiyembekezo ichi. Koma chiyembekezo chimene chimaoneka si chiyembekezo ayi. Kodi ndani amene amayembekezera chimene ali nacho kale?
Romans8:25 Koma ngati ife tiyembekeza chimene tikanalibe
Romans8:26 Momwemonso
Romans8:27 Koma Iye amene amasanthula mitima yathu amadziwa maganizo a Mzimu
Romans8:28 Ndipo ife tikudziwa kuti zinthu zonse zimathandizana kuwachitira ubwino amene amakonda Mulungu
Romans8:29 Pakuti amene Mulungu anawadziwiratu
Romans8:30 Iwo amene anawasankhiratu
Romans8:31 Nanga tsono tidzanena chiyani pa izi? Ngati Mulungu ali mbali yathu
Romans8:32 Iye amene sanatimane Mwana wake wa Iye yekha
Romans8:33 Ndani amene adzabweretsa mlandu kutsutsa amene Mulungu anawasankha? Ndi Mulungu amene amalungamitsa.
Romans8:34 Ndani amene angatipeze ife olakwa? Palibe. Khristu Yesu amene anafa
Romans8:35 Ndani amene adzatilekanitsa ife ndi chikondi cha Khristu? Kodi ndi masautso
Romans8:36 Monga kwalembedwa: “Chifukwa cha inu
Romans8:37 Ayi
Romans8:38 Pakuti ine ndatsimikiza ndi mtima wonse kuti ngakhale imfa
Romans8:39 ngakhale kutalika
Romans9:1 Ine ndikunena zoona mwa Khristu. Sindikunama ndipo chikumbumtima changa kudzera mwa Mzimu Woyera chikundichitira umboni.
Romans9:2 Ndili ndi chisoni chachikulu ndipo ndikumva kupwetekeka kosalekeza mu mtima mwanga.
Romans9:3 Pakuti ndikanafuna ine mwini nditatembereredwa ndi kuchotsedwa mwa Khristu chifukwa cha abale anga
Romans9:4 anthu Aisraeli. Iwo anasankhidwa kukhala ana. Mulungu anawapatsa ulemerero
Romans9:5 Awo ndi makolo athu. Kuchokera kwa iwo mʼthupi ndi kumene kunachokera makolo a Khristu Yesu amene ndi Mulungu wolamulira zinthu zonse
Romans9:6 Sikuti mawu a Mulungu analephera. Pakuti si onse obadwa mwa Israeli amene ndi Israeli.
Romans9:7 Kapena kuti ana ake chifukwa anachokera mwa Abrahamu. Koma zidzukulu zako zidzachokera mwa Isake.
Romans9:8 Kutanthauza kuti
Romans9:9 Pakuti Mulungu analonjeza ponena kuti
Romans9:10 Ndipo si pokhapo ayi. Ana awiri a Rebeka aja abambo awo anali mmodzi
Romans9:11 Komabe
Romans9:12 osati chifukwa cha ntchito za munthu koma chifuniro cha Iye mwini
Romans9:13 Monga momwe kwalembedwa kuti
Romans9:14 Nanga tsono tidzanena chiyani? Kodi Mulungu ndi osalungama? Ayi
Romans9:15 Pakuti Mulungu anawuza Mose kuti
Romans9:16 Nʼchifukwa chake
Romans9:17 Malemba akuti Mulungu anamuwuza Farao kuti
Romans9:18 Choncho Mulungu amachitira chifundo munthu amene akufuna kumuchitira chifundo ndipo amawumitsa mtima munthu amene Iye akufuna kumuwumitsa mtima.
Romans9:19 Tsono mmodzi wa inu nʼkundifunsa kuti
Romans9:20 Koma ndiwe yani
Romans9:21 Kodi wowumba alibe ufulu wowumba kuchokera ku dothi lomwelo mbiya yamtengowapatali ndi ina yamtengo wotsika?
Romans9:22 Koma Mulungu
Romans9:23 Iye anachita izi kufuna kuonetsa kulemera kwa ulemerero wake ndi kuti udziwike kwa amene analandira chifundo chake. Iye anawakonzeratu kuti alandire ulemerero wake
Romans9:24 ngakhale ifenso amene anatiyitana osati kuchokera kwa Ayuda okha komanso kwa a mitundu ina.
Romans9:25 Monga momwe Mulungu akunenera mʼbuku la Hoseya kuti
Romans9:26 ndipo
Romans9:27 Yesaya anafuwula za Aisraeli kuti
Romans9:28 Pakuti Ambuye adzagamula milandu ya anthu pa dziko lapansi mofulumira ndi kumaliziratu.”
Romans9:29 Monga momwe Yesaya ananena malo ena kuti
Romans9:30 Kodi nanga tidzati chiyani? Tidzati a mitundu ina amene sanafune chilungamo analandira chilungamo chachikhulupiriro
Romans9:31 koma Aisraeli
Romans9:32 Chifukwa chiyani? Chifukwa iwo sanachifune ndi chikhulupiriro koma ngati mwa ntchito. Iwo anapunthwa pa “Mwala wopunthwitsa.”
Romans9:33 Monga momwe kwalembedwa kuti
Romans10:1 Abale
Romans10:2 Popeza ndiwachitira umboni kuti ndi achangu pa zinthu za Mulungu koma osati mwachidziwitso.
Romans10:3 Pakuti sanadziwe chilungamo chochokera kwa Mulungu ndipo anafuna kukhazikitsa chawochawo. Iwo sanagonjere chilungamo cha Mulungu.
Romans10:4 Khristu ndiye mathero amalamulo kuti aliyense amene akhulupirira akhale olungama pamaso pa Mulungu.
Romans10:5 Mose akulemba motere zachilungamo cha malamulo
Romans10:6 Koma chilungamo cha chikhulupiriro chikuti
Romans10:7 “kapena ‘Ndani adzatsikira ku dziko la anthu akufa?’ ” (ndiko
Romans10:8 Nanga akuti chiyani? “Mawu ali pafupi ndi inu. Ali mʼkamwa mwanu ndi mu mtima mwanu.” Ndiwo mawu achikhulupiriro amene ife tikuwalalikira
Romans10:9 kuti ngati udzavomereza ndi pakamwa pako kuti
Romans10:10 Pakuti ndi mtima wanu mukhulupirira ndi kulungamitsidwa

Romans10:15 Ndipo iwo adzalalikira bwanji osatumidwa? Kwalembedwa kuti

Romans11:1 Ine ndikufunsa kuti kodi Mulungu anakana anthu ake? Ayi. Ndi pangʼono pomwe! Inenso ndine Mwisraeli
Romans11:2 Mulungu sanawakane anthu ake amene Iye anawadziwiratu. Kodi inu simukudziwa zimene Malemba akunena pa ndime imene Eliya akudandaula kwa Mulungu kuneneza Aisraeli? Iye anati
Romans11:3 “Ambuye
Romans11:4 Ndipo yankho la Mulungu linali lotani? “Ine ndadzisungira ndekha anthu 7
Romans11:5 Chimodzimodzinso lero lino
Romans11:6 Ndipo ngati ndi mwachisomo
Romans11:7 Nʼchiyani tsopano? Chimene Aisraeli anachifuna ndi mtima wonse sanachipeze koma osankhidwawo anachipeza. Enawo anawumitsidwa mtima
Romans11:8 monga kwalembedwa kuti
Romans11:9 Ndipo Davide akuti
Romans11:10 Maso awo atsekedwe kuti asaone
Romans11:11 Ine ndikufunsanso kuti
Romans11:12 Koma ngati kulakwa kwawo kwapindulitsa dziko lapansi ndi kulephera kwawo kwapindulitsa a mitundu ina
Romans11:13 Ine ndikuyankhula kwa inu a mitundu ina monga ine ndili mtumwi wa kwa a mitundu ina ndipo ndimawunyadira utumiki wangawu.
Romans11:14 Ine cholinga changa nʼchakuti ndichititse nsanje anthu a mtundu wanga kuti ena mwa iwo apulumutsidwe.
Romans11:15 Pakuti ngati kukanidwa kwawo kunayanjanitsa anthu a dziko lapansi ndi Mulungu
Romans11:16 Ngati chigawo chimodzi cha buledi woperekedwa monga zipatso zoyamba ndi choyera
Romans11:17 Ngati nthambi zina zinakhadzulidwa ndipo inu
Romans11:18 musadzitame kunyoza nthambi zinazo. Ngati mutero
Romans11:19 Tsono mudzati
Romans11:20 Nʼzoona. Koma iwo anakhadzulidwa chifukwa chosakhulupirira ndipo inu mukuyima mwachikhulupiriro. Musadzitukumule
Romans11:21 Pakuti ngati Mulungu sanalekerere nthambi zachibadwidwe
Romans11:22 Nʼchifukwa chake ganizirani za kukoma mtima ndi za ukali wa Mulungu. Ukali uli kwa iwo amene anagwa koma kukoma mtima kwa inu
Romans11:23 Ngati iwo asiya kukhala osakhulupirira
Romans11:24 Pakuti ngati inu
Romans11:25 Abale
Romans11:26 Kotero tsono Aisraeli onse adzapulumuka
Romans11:27 Ndipo ili lidzakhala pangano langa ndi iwo pamene Ine ndidzachotsa machimo awo.”
Romans11:28 Chifukwa cha Uthenga Wabwino
Romans11:29 Pakuti Mulungu akayitana munthu ndi kumupatsa mphatso sangasinthenso.
Romans11:30 Monga mmene inu munalili
Romans11:31 Chonchonso iwo akhala osamvera tsopano kuti iwonso alandire chifundo chifukwa cha chifundo cha Mulungu kwa inu.
Romans11:32 Pakuti Mulungu anasandutsa anthu onse a mʼndende ya kusamvera kuti Iye akaonetse chifundo kwa onse.
Romans11:33 Aa! Nzeru za Mulungu ndi chidziwitso chake ndi zozama kwambiri! Ndani angazindikire maweruzidwe ake

Romans12:1 Nʼchifukwa chake ine ndikukupemphani abale
Romans12:2 Musafanizidwenso ndi makhalidwe a dziko lino koma musandulike pokonzanso maganizo anu. Ndipo mudzadziwa ndi kuzindikira chifuniro chabwino cha Mulungu chomwe ndi chokondweretsa ndi changwiro.
Romans12:3 Chifukwa cha chisomo chopatsidwa kwa ine
Romans12:4 Pakuti monga aliyense wa ife ali ndi thupi limodzi koma ziwalo zambiri
Romans12:5 Momwemonso mwa Khristu ife amene tili ambiri tipanga thupi limodzi ndipo chiwalo chilichonse ndi cholumikizika ku chinzake.
Romans12:6 Ife tili ndi mphatso zosiyana
Romans12:7 Ngati ndi kutumikira
Romans12:8 Ngati ndi kulimbikitsa
Romans12:9 Chikondi chikhale chopanda chinyengo. Dana nacho choyipa; gwiritsitsa chabwino.
Romans12:10 Mukondane kwathunthu monga abale. Lemekezanani wina ndi mnzake kuposa inu eni.
Romans12:11 Musakhale aulesi mʼmachitidwe anu. Khalani achangu mu mzimu ndipo tumikirani Ambuye.
Romans12:12 Kondwerani mʼchiyembekezo
Romans12:13 Gawanani ndi anthu a Mulungu amene ali ndi chosowa. Cherezani alendo.
Romans12:14 Adalitseni amene akuzunzani. Adalitseni ndipo musawatemberere.
Romans12:15 Kondwani pamodzi ndi amene akukondwa ndipo lirani ndi amene akulira.
Romans12:16 Muyanjane wina ndi mnzake. Musakhale onyada
Romans12:17 Musabwezere choyipa ndi choyipa kwa aliyense. Samalitsani kuchita chabwino pamaso pa aliyense.
Romans12:18 Ngati nʼkotheka
Romans12:19 Okondedwa anga
Romans12:20 Koma
Romans12:21 Musagonjetsedwe ndi choyipa
Romans13:1 Aliyense ayenera kumvera akulu olamulira
Romans13:2 Kotero kuti
Romans13:3 Pakuti olamulira saopseza amene amachita zabwino koma amene amachita zoyipa. Kodi mukufuna kukhala osaopa olamulira? Tsono chitani zoyenera ndipo adzakuyamikirani.
Romans13:4 Pakuti iyeyo ndi mtumiki wa Mulungu wokuchitirani zabwino. Koma ngati muchita zoyipa muchite mantha
Romans13:5 Nʼchifukwa chake ndi koyenera kugonjera olamulira
Romans13:6 Ichi nʼchifukwa chakenso inu mumapereka msonkho. Pakuti olamulira ndi atumiki a Mulungu amene amapereka nthawi yawo yonse kulamulira.
Romans13:7 Mubwezereni aliyense amene munamukongola. Ngati inu muli ndi ngongole yamsonkho
Romans13:8 Musakhale ndi ngongole ndi wina aliyense kupatula ngongole ya kukondana wina ndi mnzake. Pakuti amene amakonda munthu mnzake wakwaniritsa lamulo.
Romans13:9 Malamulo awa: “Usachite chigololo
Romans13:10 Chikondi sichichitira mnzake zoyipa. Chifukwa chake chikondi ndicho chokwaniritsa lamulo.
Romans13:11 Ndipo chitani ichi pozindikira nthawi ino. Nthawi yafika yoti inu mudzuke kutulo
Romans13:12 Usiku watsala pafupifupi kutha. Kwatsala pangʼono kucha. Tiyeni tsono tichotse ntchito zamdima ndipo tivale chovala chakuwunika.
Romans13:13 Tiyeni tikhale moyenera monga nthawi ya masana
Romans13:14 Koma valani Ambuye Yesu Khristu ndipo musaganizire za momwe mungakwaniritsire zokhumba zachikhalidwe cha uchimo.
Romans14:1 Mulandire amene ndi ofowoka mʼchikhulupiriro
Romans14:2 Chikhulupiriro cha munthu wina chimamulola kudya china chilichonse koma munthu wina
Romans14:3 Munthu amene amadya chilichonse sayenera kunyoza amene satero
Romans14:4 Kodi ndiwe ndani kuti uweruze wantchito wamwini? Mbuye wake yekha ndiye aweruze ngati iye wakhoza kapena walephera pa ntchito yake. Ndipo adzakhoza popeza kuti Mbuye wake angathe kumukhozetsa.
Romans14:5 Munthu wina amayesa tsiku limodzi lopatulika kuposa lina. Munthu wina amayesa masiku onse ofanana. Aliyense akhale otsimikiza mʼmaganizo ake.
Romans14:6 Iye amene amaganiza kuti tsiku limodzi ndi lopambana
Romans14:7 Pakuti palibe wina wa ife amene amakhala moyo pa yekha ndiponso palibe wina wa ife amene amafa pa yekha.
Romans14:8 Ngati ife tikhala ndi moyo
Romans14:9 Pa chifukwa ichi
Romans14:10 Tsono nʼchifukwa chiyani iwe ukuweruza mʼbale wako? Kapena nʼchifukwa chiyani ukumunyoza mʼbale wako? Pakuti ife tonse tidzayima pa mpando wakuweruza wa Mulungu.
Romans14:11 Kwalembedwa
Romans14:12 Choncho tsopano
Romans14:13 Motero
Romans14:14 Monga mmodzi amene ndili mwa Ambuye Yesu
Romans14:15 Ngati mʼbale wako akuvutika chifukwa cha chimene umadya
Romans14:16 Musalole kuti chimene muchiyesa chabwino achinene ngati choyipa.
Romans14:17 Pakuti Ufumu wa Mulungu si nkhani yakudya ndi kumwa
Romans14:18 Nʼchifukwa chake aliyense amene atumikira Khristu mʼnjira iyi akondweretsa Mulungu ndi kuvomerezedwa ndi anthu.
Romans14:19 Tsono tiyeni tiyesetse kuchita zimene zidzabweretsa mtendere ndi kulimbikitsana mwachikondi.
Romans14:20 Musawononge ntchito ya Mulungu chifukwa cha chakudya. Chakudya chonse ndi choyera
Romans14:21 Nʼkwabwino kusadya kapena kumwa vinyo kapena kuchita chilichonse chimene chidzachititsa mʼbale wako kugwa.
Romans14:22 Tsono zimene ukukhulupirira pa zinthu izi zikhale pakati pa iwe ndi Mulungu. Wodala munthu amene sadzitsutsa yekha pa zimene amazivomereza.
Romans14:23 Koma munthu amene akukayika atsutsidwa ngati adya
Romans15:1 Ife amene tili ndi chikhulupiriro champhamvu tiziwalezera mtima anthu ofowoka
Romans15:2 Aliyense wa ife akondweretse mnzake pomuchitira zabwino zomulimbikitsa.
Romans15:3 Pakuti ngakhale Khristu sanadzikondweretsa yekha koma
Romans15:4 Pakuti zilizonse zimene zinalembedwa kale zinalembedwa kuti zitiphunzitse ife. Malembawo amatilimbikitsa kupirira kuti tikhale ndi chiyembekezo.
Romans15:5 Mulungu amene amapereka kupirira ndi chilimbikitso akupatseni maganizo amodzi pakati panu monga inu mukutsatira Khristu Yesu
Romans15:6 kotero kuti ndi mtima umodzi ndi movomerezana mulemekeze Mulungu ndi Atate a Ambuye athu Yesu Khristu.
Romans15:7 Tsopano landiranani wina ndi mnzake
Romans15:8 Chifukwa kunena zoona
Romans15:9 kuti a mitundu ina atamande Mulungu chifukwa cha chifundo chake. Monga kwalembedwa kuti
Romans15:10 Akutinso
Romans15:11 Ndipo akutinso
Romans15:12 Ndiponso Yesaya akuti
Romans15:13 Mulungu amene amatipatsa chiyembekezo adzaze mitima yanu ndi chimwemwe ndi mtendere pamene mukumudalira Iye
Romans15:14 Abale anga
Romans15:15 Ine ndakulemberani inu molimba mtima pa fundo zina
Romans15:16 kukhala mtumiki wa Khristu Yesu wa a mitundu ina ndi udindo wa wansembe
Romans15:17 Choncho
Romans15:18 Ine sindidzayesera kuyankhula za kanthu kalikonse koma zimene Khristu wazichita kudzera mwa ine zotsogolera a mitundu ina kuti amvere Mulungu mwa zimene ndinanena ndi kuzichita
Romans15:19 mwamphamvu ya zizindikiro ndi zodabwitsa kudzera mwamphamvu ya Mzimu Woyera. Choncho kuchokera ku Yerusalemu ndi kuzungulira ku Iluriko
Romans15:20 Chakhala chilakolako changa nthawi zonse kuti ndilalikire Uthenga Wabwino kumene Khristu sadziwika
Romans15:21 Koma monga kwalembedwa kuti
Romans15:22 Ichi nʼchifukwa chake ine ndakhala ndikuletsedwa kawirikawiri kubwera kwa inu.
Romans15:23 Koma tsopano popeza kulibenso malo anga woti ndigwire ntchito mʼmadera awa
Romans15:24 Ine ndikukonza kuti nditero pamene ndipita ku Spaniya. Ine ndikuyembekeza kudzakuchezerani pamene ndikudutsa ndi kuti inu mudzathandize popitiriza ulendo wanga
Romans15:25 Koma tsopano
Romans15:26 Pakuti kunakomera a ku Makedoniya ndi a ku Akaya kupereka thandizo kwa osauka pakati pa oyera mtima mu Yerusalemu.
Romans15:27 Iwo chinawakomera kuchita ichi
Romans15:28 Tsono ine nditamaliza ntchito iyi ndi kutsimikiza kuti alandira chipatsochi
Romans15:29 Ine ndikudziwa kuti pamene ndidzabwera kwa inu
Romans15:30 Abale
Romans15:31 Pempherani kuti ine ndilanditsidwe kwa osakhulupirira a ku Yudeya ndi kuti utumiki wanga mu Yerusalemu ukhale ovomerezeka ndi oyera mtima.
Romans15:32 Kuti mwachifuniro cha Mulungu ndibwere kwa inu ndi chimwemwe kuti ndidzapumule pamodzi ndi inu.
Romans15:33 Mulungu wamtendere akhale ndi inu nonse. Ameni.
Romans16:1 Ine ndikupereka kwa inu mlongo wathu Febe
Romans16:2 Ine ndikukupemphani kuti mumulandire mwa Ambuye mʼnjira yoyenera oyera mtima ndi kumupatsa thandizo lililonse limene akulifuna kuchokera kwa inu
Romans16:3 Perekani moni kwa Prisila ndi Akura
Romans16:4 	Iwo anapereka miyoyo yawo chifukwa cha ine. Osati ine ndekha komanso mipingo yonse ya a mitundu ina ikuyamika.
Romans16:5 	Perekaninso moni kwa mpingo umene umasonkhana mʼnyumba mwawo. Perekani moni kwa mʼbale wanga wokondedwa Epeneto
Romans16:6 	Perekani moni kwa Mariya
Romans16:7 	Perekani moni kwa Androniko ndi Yuniya abale anga amene anali mʼndende pamodzi ndi ine. Iwo amadziwika ndi atumwi
Romans16:8 	Perekani moni kwa Ampliato
Romans16:9 	Perekani moni kwa Urbano
Romans16:10 	Perekani moni kwa Apele
Romans16:11 	Perekani moni kwa Herodiona
Romans16:12 	Perekani moni kwa Trufena ndi Trufosa
Romans16:13 	Perekani moni kwa Rufo
Romans16:14 	Perekani moni kwa Asunkrito
Romans16:15 	Perekani moni kwa Filologo
Romans16:16 	Mupatsane moni wina ndi mnzake mwachikondi choona. Mipingo yonse ya Khristu ikupereka moni.
Romans16:17 Abale
Romans16:18 Pakuti otero sakutumikira Ambuye athu Khristu koma zilakolako zawo. Ndi mawu okoma ndi oshashalika iwo amanamiza anthu osalakwa.
Romans16:19 Aliyense anamva za kumvera kwanu
Romans16:20 Mulungu wamtendere adzaphwanya Satana msanga pansi pa mapazi anu. Chisomo cha Ambuye athu Yesu chikhale ndi inu.
Romans16:21 Timoteyo
Romans16:22 Ine Tertio
Romans16:23 Gayo
Romans16:24 Chisomo cha Ambuye athu Yesu Khristu chikhale ndi inu nonse. Ameni.
Romans16:25 Tsopano kwa Iye amene ali ndi mphamvu yokhazikitsa monga mwa uthenga wanga wabwino ndikulalikidwa kwa Yesu Khristu
Romans16:26 koma tsopano chavumbulutsidwa ndi kudziwika kudzera mʼMalemba a uneneri mwa lamulo la Mulungu wosatha
Romans16:27 kwa Mulungu yekhayo wanzeru kukhale ulemerero kwamuyaya kudzera mwa Yesu Khristu! Ameni.

1Corinthians1:2 Kupita ku mpingo wa Mulungu ku Korinto
1Corinthians1:3 Landirani chisomo ndi mtendere zochokera kwa Mulungu Atate athu ndi Ambuye athu Yesu Khristu.
1Corinthians1:4 Nthawi zonse ndimayamika Mulungu chifukwa cha inu chifukwa cha chisomo chake chopatsidwa kwa inu mwa Khristu Yesu.
1Corinthians1:5 Pakuti mwa Iye mwalemekezedwa mʼnjira iliyonse
1Corinthians1:6 chifukwa umboni wathu pa za Khristu unatsimikizidwa mwa inu.
1Corinthians1:7 Choncho inu simusowa mphatso yauzimu iliyonse pamene mukudikira mofunitsitsa kuti Ambuye athu Yesu Khristu avumbulutsidwe.
1Corinthians1:8 Adzakulimbikitsani mpaka kumapeto kuti mudzakhale wopanda mlandu pa tsiku lobwera Ambuye athu Yesu Khristu.
1Corinthians1:9 Mulungu amene wakuyitanani inu mu chiyanjano ndi Mwana wake Yesu Khristu Ambuye athu ngokhulupirika.
1Corinthians1:10 Ndidandaulira inu
1Corinthians1:11 Abale anga
1Corinthians1:12 Chimene ndikutanthauza ndi ichi: wina amati
1Corinthians1:13 Kodi Khristu wagawikana? Kodi Paulo anapachikidwa pa mtanda chifukwa cha inu? Kodi munabatizidwa mʼdzina la Paulo?
1Corinthians1:14 Ine ndikuyamika kuti sindinabatizepo mmodzi mwa inu kupatula Krispo ndi Gayo
1Corinthians1:15 mwakuti palibe amene anganene kuti anabatizidwa mʼdzina langa.
1Corinthians1:16 (Inde
1Corinthians1:17 Pakuti Khristu sananditume ine kudzabatiza
1Corinthians1:18 Pakuti uthenga wa mtanda ndi chopusa kwa iwo amene akuwonongeka
1Corinthians1:19 Pakuti kwalembedwa kuti
1Corinthians1:20 Munthu wanzeru ali kuti? Munthu wozama ndi maphunziro ali kuti? Munthu wodziwa zakuya zamakono ali kuti? Kodi Mulungu sanazipusitse nzeru za dziko lapansi?
1Corinthians1:21 Tsono poti mwa nzeru za Mulungu dziko lapansi mu nzeru zake silinamudziwe Iye
1Corinthians1:22 Ayuda amafuna zizindikiro zodabwitsa ndipo Agriki amafunafuna nzeru
1Corinthians1:23 koma ife timalalikira Khristu wopachikidwa. Chitsa chokhumudwitsa kwa Ayuda ndi chopusa kwa a mitundu ina.
1Corinthians1:24 Koma kwa iwo amene Mulungu anawayitana
1Corinthians1:25 Pakuti za Mulungu zooneka ngati zopusa
1Corinthians1:26 Abale taganizirani mmene munalili musanayitanidwe. Si ambiri a inu munali a nzeru
1Corinthians1:27 Koma Mulungu anasankha zinthu zopusa za dziko lapansi kuti achititse manyazi anzeru. Mulungu anasankha zinthu zofowoka za dziko lapansi kuti achititse manyazi amphamvu.
1Corinthians1:28 Anasankha zinthu zapansipansi ndi zopeputsidwa za dziko la pansi lino
1Corinthians1:29 kuti munthu asanyade pamaso pa Mulungu.
1Corinthians1:30 Nʼchifukwa cha Iye kuti inu muli mwa Khristu Yesu
1Corinthians1:31 Choncho poti zinalembedwa kuti
1Corinthians2:1 Pamene ndinabwera kwa inu
1Corinthians2:2 Pakuti ndinatsimikiza pamene ndinali ndi inu kuti ndisadziwe kanthu kena kupatula Yesu Khristu wopachikidwayo.
1Corinthians2:3 Ndinabwera kwa inu wofowoka ndi wamantha
1Corinthians2:4 Uthenga ndi ulaliki wanga sunali wa mawu anzeru ndi onyengerera koma woonetsa mphamvu za Mzimu
1Corinthians2:5 kuti chikhulupiriro chanu chisatsamire pa nzeru ya anthu koma pa mphamvu za Mulungu.
1Corinthians2:6 Komabe ife timayankhula uthenga wa nzeru kwa okhwima
1Corinthians2:7 Ayi
1Corinthians2:8 Palibe olamulira aliyense wa mʼbado uno amene anamumvetsetsa popeza anakamumvetsetsa sakanamupachika Ambuye wa ulemerero.
1Corinthians2:9 Komabe monga zalembedwa kuti
1Corinthians2:10 koma Mulungu waululira ife mwa Mzimu wake. Mzimu amafufuza zinthu zonse
1Corinthians2:11 Kodi ndani mwa anthu angadziwe maganizo a munthu wina
1Corinthians2:12 Mzimu amene tinalandira ife si wa dziko lapansi koma Mzimu wochokera kwa Mulungu wotipatsa ife mwaulere.
1Corinthians2:13 Izi ndi zimene timayankhula osati mʼmawu wophunzitsidwa ndi nzeru za munthu koma mʼmawu wophunzitsidwa ndi Mzimu
1Corinthians2:14 Munthu wopanda Mzimu savomereza zinthu zimene zichokera kwa Mzimu wa Mulungu
1Corinthians2:15 Munthu wauzimu amaweruza pa zinthu zonse
1Corinthians2:16 Pakuti “Ndani anadziwa malingaliro a Ambuye
1Corinthians3:1 Ndipo abale sindikanakuyankhulani ngati auzimu koma adziko lapansi
1Corinthians3:2 Ndinakupatsani mkaka osati chakudya cholimba pakuti munali musanakonzeke kuchilandira. Zoonadi
1Corinthians3:3 Mukanali adziko lapansi. Pakuti pakati panu pali kaduka ndi kukangana
1Corinthians3:4 Pamene wina anena kuti
1Corinthians3:5 Ndiponso kodi Apolo ndi ndani? Nanga Paulo ndi ndani? Otumikira chabe
1Corinthians3:6 Ine ndinadzala mbewu
1Corinthians3:7 Choncho kuphatikiza iye wodzala ndi iye wothirira
1Corinthians3:8 Munthu wodzala ndi munthu wothirira ali ndi cholinga chimodzi
1Corinthians3:9 Pakuti ife ndife antchito anzake a Mulungu; inu ndinu munda wa Mulungu
1Corinthians3:10 Mwachisomo chimene Mulungu wandipatsa
1Corinthians3:11 Pakuti wina sangayikenso maziko ena oposera amene anakhazikitsidwa kale
1Corinthians3:12 Ngati munthu aliyense amanga pa maziko awa pogwiritsa ntchito golide
1Corinthians3:13 ntchito yake idzaonekera pamene Tsiku la chiweruzo lidzazionetsa poyera. Tsikulo lidzafika ndi moto
1Corinthians3:14 Ngati zimene zamangidwazo sizidzagwa
1Corinthians3:15 Ndipo ngati zidzanyeke ndi moto
1Corinthians3:16 Kodi inu simukudziwa kuti ndinu Nyumba ya Mulungu ndipo kuti Mzimu wa Mulungu amakhala mwa inu?
1Corinthians3:17 Ngati wina aliyense awononga Nyumba ya Mulunguyo
1Corinthians3:18 Choncho musadzinyenge. Ngati wina wa inu akuganiza kuti ndi wanzeru pa mulingo wa mʼbado uno
1Corinthians3:19 Pakuti nzeru ya dziko lapansi ndi yopusa pamaso pa Mulungu. Monga kwalembedwera kuti
1Corinthians3:20 ndiponso
1Corinthians3:21 Choncho
1Corinthians3:22 kaya Paulo kapena Apolo kapena Kefa kapena dziko lapansi
1Corinthians3:23 ndipo inu ndinu a Khristu
1Corinthians4:1 Choncho tsono anthu atione ife monga atumiki a Khristu
1Corinthians4:2 Chofunika kwambiri nʼchakuti amene apatsidwa udindo oyangʼanira aonetse kukhulupirika.
1Corinthians4:3 Ine ndilibe nazo kanthu ngati ndiweruzidwa ndi inu kapena khothi lina lililonse. Ndithu
1Corinthians4:4 Chikumbumtima changa sichikunditsutsa
1Corinthians4:5 Chomwecho musaweruze nthawi yoweruza isanakwane. Dikirani mpaka Ambuye atabwera. Iye adzaonetsa poyera zimene zabisika mu mdima ndipo adzaonetsa maganizo a mʼmitima ya anthu. Pa nthawi imeneyo aliyense adzalandira kwa Mulungu chiyamiko.
1Corinthians4:6 Tsono abale
1Corinthians4:7 Pakuti ndani amakusiyanitsani ndi wina aliyense? Nʼchiyani muli nacho chimene simunalandire? Ndipo ngati munalandira
1Corinthians4:8 Inu muli nazo kale zonse zimene mufuna! Inu mwalemera kale! Inu mwayamba kale kulamulira ife! Ndilakalaka mukanakhaladi mafumu kuti ife tikhale nawo mafumu pamodzi ndi inu.
1Corinthians4:9 Pakuti kwa ine zikuoneka ngati kuti Mulungu watiyika ife atumwi pachionetsero
1Corinthians4:10 Ife ndife opusa chifukwa cha Khristu
1Corinthians4:11 Mpaka pano tili ndi njala ndi ludzu
1Corinthians4:12 Timagwira ntchito molimbika ndi manja athu. Akamatitemberera
1Corinthians4:13 Pamene atilalatira timayankha mwachifundo. Mpaka pano takhala ngati zinyalala za dziko
1Corinthians4:14 Sindikulemba izi kuti ndikuchititseni manyazi
1Corinthians4:15 Ngakhale muli ndi anthu 10
1Corinthians4:16 Chifukwa chake ndikukupemphani kuti munditsanze ine.
1Corinthians4:17 Chifukwa cha ichi ndikutumiza kwa inu Timoteyo
1Corinthians4:18 Ena mwa inu mukudzitukumula
1Corinthians4:19 Koma ndibwera kwanuko posachedwapa
1Corinthians4:20 Pakuti ufumu wa Mulungu si mawu chabe koma mphamvu.
1Corinthians4:21 Kodi musankha chiyani? Kodi ndidzabwere ndi chikwapu
1Corinthians5:1 Mbiri yamveka kuti pakati panu pakuchitika chigololo. Ndipo chigololo cha mtunduwu ngakhale pakati pa akunja sichingapezeke; munthu akumagonana ndi mkazi wa abambo ake.
1Corinthians5:2 Ndipo inu mukudzitukumulabe. Kodi simukanayenera kudzazidwa ndi chisoni ndipo mukanamuchotsa pa chiyanjano chanu munthu wochita zimenezi?
1Corinthians5:3 Ngakhale sindili nanu mʼthupi
1Corinthians5:4 Mukasonkhana mu dzina la Ambuye athu Yesu
1Corinthians5:5 mumupereke munthuyu kwa Satana
1Corinthians5:6 Kudziwa kwanu si kwabwino. Kodi simukudziwa kuti yisiti wochepa amafufumitsa mphumphu yaufa wonse wa tirigu?
1Corinthians5:7 Chotsani yisiti wakale kuti mukhale ndi mphumphu yopanda yisiti
1Corinthians5:8 Choncho
1Corinthians5:9 Ndakulemberani mʼkalata yanga kuti musayanjane nawo anthu achigololo.
1Corinthians5:10 Pamenepatu sindikutanthauzatu anthu a dziko lapansi lino amene ndi achigololo
1Corinthians5:11 Koma tsopano ndikukulemberani kuti musayanjane ndi aliyense amene adzitcha mʼbale koma ndi wachigololo
1Corinthians5:12 Kodi ndipindulanji kuti ndiweruze anthu amene si a mu mpingo? Kodi simuyenera kuweruza iwo amene ali mu mpingo?
1Corinthians5:13 Mulungu adzaweruza akunja. “Chotsani woyipayo pakati panu.”
1Corinthians6:1 Pamene wina wa inu ali ndi mlandu ndi mnzake
1Corinthians6:2 Kodi inu simukudziwa kuti anthu a Mulungu adzaweruza dziko lapansi? Ndipo ngati inu mungaweruze dziko lapansi
1Corinthians6:3 Kodi simukudziwa kuti mudzaweruza angelo? Nanga bwanji zinthu za mʼmoyo uno!
1Corinthians6:4 Nʼchifukwa chake
1Corinthians6:5 Ndikunena izi kuti ndikuchititseni manyazi. Moti nʼkutheka kuti pakati panu palibe wina wanzeru zokwanira kuti aziweruza mlandu pakati pa Akhristu?
1Corinthians6:6 Koma mʼmalo mwake mʼbale atengera ku bwalo la mlandu mʼbale mnzake kukaweruzidwa. Zonsezi pamaso pa akunja!
1Corinthians6:7 Chokha choti mwakasumirana chikuonetseratu kuti mwagonjetsedwa kale. Bwanji osangolola kuti ena akulakwireni? Bwanji osangolola kuti ena akubereni?
1Corinthians6:8 Mʼmalo mwake

1Corinthians6:10 kapena akuba
1Corinthians6:11 Ndipo umu ndi mmene ena mwa inu munalili. Koma munatsukidwa
1Corinthians6:12 Inu mumati
1Corinthians6:13 Inu mumati
1Corinthians6:14 Mwamphamvu zake Mulungu anaukitsa Ambuye kwa akufa
1Corinthians6:15 Kodi simukudziwa kuti matupi anuwo ndi ziwalo za Khristu mwini? Kodi tsono ndingatenge ziwalo za Khristu nʼkuzisandutsa ziwalo za mkazi wadama? Zosatheka!
1Corinthians6:16 Kodi simukudziwa kuti amene amadzipereka kwa mkazi wadama
1Corinthians6:17 Koma amene amadzipereka kwa Ambuye
1Corinthians6:18 Thawani dama. Machimo onse amene munthu amachita amakhala kunja kwa thupi lake

1Corinthians6:20 Ndinu ochita kugulidwa. Nʼchifukwa chake lemekezani Mulungu mʼthupi lanu.
1Corinthians7:1 Tsopano pa zinthu zomwe munandilembera nʼkwabwino kuti munthu asakwatire.
1Corinthians7:2 Koma chifukwa choti chigololo chawanda
1Corinthians7:3 Mwamuna akwaniritse udindo wake wa pa banja kwa mkazi wake
1Corinthians7:4 Thupi la mkazi wokwatiwa si la iye mwini yekha koma ndi la mwamuna wakenso. Momwemonso
1Corinthians7:5 Musamakanizane
1Corinthians7:6 Ndikunena zimenezi mokulolani chabe osati mokulamulani.
1Corinthians7:7 Ine ndikanakonda anthu akanakhala ngati ine. Koma poti munthu aliyense ali ndi mphatso yakeyake yochokera kwa Mulungu
1Corinthians7:8 Tsono kwa osakwatira onse
1Corinthians7:9 Koma ngati sangathe kudziretsa
1Corinthians7:10 Kwa amene ali pa banja ndikupatsani lamulo ili (osati langa koma la Ambuye): Mkazi asalekane ndi mwamuna wake.
1Corinthians7:11 Koma ngati atatero
1Corinthians7:12 Kwa ena onse ndikunena izi (ineyo osati Ambuye); ngati mʼbale wina ali ndi mkazi wosakhulupirira ndipo mkaziyo walola kukhala pa banja ndi mʼbaleyo
1Corinthians7:13 Ngati mayi wina ali ndi mwamuna wosakhulupirira ndipo mwamunayo walola kukhala pa banja ndi mayiyo
1Corinthians7:14 Pakuti mwamuna wosakhulupirirayo amayeretsedwa chifukwa cha mkazi wakeyo
1Corinthians7:15 Koma ngati wosakhulupirira achoka
1Corinthians7:16 Kodi iwe

1Corinthians7:23 Munagulidwa ndi mtengowapatali
1Corinthians7:24 Abale

1Corinthians7:26 Chifukwa cha masautso a masiku ano
1Corinthians7:27 Kodi ndinu wokwatira? Musalekane. Kodi ndinu wosakwatira? Musafunefune mkazi.
1Corinthians7:28 Komabe ngati mukwatira simunachimwe; ndipo ngati namwali akwatiwa sanachimwenso. Koma amene walowa mʼbanja adzakumana ndi zovuta zambiri mʼmoyo uno
1Corinthians7:29 Abale
1Corinthians7:30 Amene akulira akhale monga ngati sakulira. Amene akukondwa akhale ngati sakukondwa. Amene akugula zinthu akhale ngati alibe zinthuzo.
1Corinthians7:31 Amene akugwiritsa ntchito zinthu za dziko lapansi lino
1Corinthians7:32 Ine ndikufuna kuti mumasuke ku nkhawa zanu. Munthu wosakwatira amangolabadira za Ambuye
1Corinthians7:33 Koma wa pa banja amalabadira za dziko lapansi lino
1Corinthians7:34 ndipo chifukwa ichi amatanganidwa kwambiri. Mkazi wosakwatiwa kapena namwali
1Corinthians7:35 Ndikunena izi kufuna kuthandiza inu nomwe osati kukupanikizani. Ine ndikufuna mukhale moyenera mosadzigawa pa kudzipereka kwanu kwa Ambuye.
1Corinthians7:36 Ngati wina akuganiza kuti akumulakwira namwali yemwe anapalana naye ubwenzi
1Corinthians7:37 Koma ngati wina motsimikiza mtima wake
1Corinthians7:38 Choncho amene akukwatira namwali amene ali naye pa ubwenzi
1Corinthians7:39 Mkazi amamangika ndi lamulo la ukwati nthawi zonse pamene mwamuna wake ali ndi moyo. Koma mwamuna wake akamwalira
1Corinthians7:40 Mʼmaganizo anga
1Corinthians8:1 Tsopano za chakudya choperekedwa nsembe kwa mafano: Ife tidziwa kuti tonse tili ndi chidziwitso. Komatu chidziwitso chokha chimadzitukumula
1Corinthians8:2 Munthu amene amaganiza kuti amadziwa kanthu
1Corinthians8:3 Koma munthu amene amakonda Mulungu amadziwika ndi Mulunguyo.
1Corinthians8:4 Choncho kunena za chakudya choperekedwa nsembe kwa mafano; ife tikudziwa kuti mafano si kanthu nʼpangʼonongʼono pomwe pa dziko lapansi
1Corinthians8:5 Popeza kuti ngakhale pali yotchedwa milungu
1Corinthians8:6 koma kwa ife pali Mulungu mmodzi yekha
1Corinthians8:7 Koma saliyense amadziwa zimenezi. Alipo ena ozolowera mafano kwambiri mwakuti akadya chakudya chotere amaganiza kuti chakudyacho chinaperekedwa nsembe kwa mafano. Ndiye poti chikumbumtima chawo nʼchofowoka chimadetsedwadi.
1Corinthians8:8 Koma chakudya sichitisendeza kufupi ndi Mulungu. Tikapanda kudya si vuto
1Corinthians8:9 Komabe samalani kuti ufulu wanu ochita zinthu usafike pokhumudwitsa ofowoka.
1Corinthians8:10 Pakuti ngati aliyense wachikumbumtima chofowoka akakuonani achidziwitsonu mukudya mʼnyumba yopembedzera mafano
1Corinthians8:11 Kotero kuti chifukwa cha chidziwitso chanu mʼbale wofowokayu amene chifukwa cha iye
1Corinthians8:12 Mukamachimwira abale anu motere ndikuwawonongera chikumbumtima chawo chofowokacho
1Corinthians8:13 Nʼchifukwa chake ngati zimene ine ndimadya zichititsa mʼbale wanga kugwa mu tchimo
1Corinthians9:1 Kodi sindine mfulu? Kodi sindine mtumwi? Kodi sindinamuone Ambuye athu Yesu? Kodi inu sindiye zotsatira za ntchito yanga mwa Ambuye?
1Corinthians9:2 Ngakhale kwa ena sindingakhale mtumwi
1Corinthians9:3 Kwa iwo wofuna kundizenga milandu ndimawayankha kuti:
1Corinthians9:4 Kodi ife tilibe ulamuliro wakudya ndi kumwa?
1Corinthians9:5 Kodi ife tilibe ulamuliro wotenga mkazi wokhulupirira nʼkumayenda naye monga amachitira atumwi ena ndi abale awo a Ambuye ndiponso Kefa?
1Corinthians9:6 Kodi kapena ine ndekha ndi Barnaba ndiye tikuyenera kugwira ntchito kuti tipeze zotisowa?
1Corinthians9:7 Ndani angagwire ntchito ya usilikali namadzipezera yekha zofunika zonse? Kodi ndani amadzala mpesa koma wosadyako zipatso zake? Ndani amaweta nkhosa koma wosamwako mkaka wake?
1Corinthians9:8 Kodi moti zimene ndikunenazi ndimaganizo a umunthu chabe? Kodi Malamulo sakunena chimodzimodzinso?
1Corinthians9:9 Popeza analemba mʼMalamulo a Mose kuti
1Corinthians9:10 Ndithu Iyeyo amanena za ifenso
1Corinthians9:11 Ngati tidzala mbewu yauzimu pakati panu
1Corinthians9:12 Ngati ena ali ndi ufulu wothandizidwa ndi inu
1Corinthians9:13 Kodi simukudziwa kuti wogwira ntchito mʼNyumba ya Mulungu amapeza chakudya chawo mʼNyumbamo
1Corinthians9:14 Chomwechonso Ambuye akulamula kuti wolalikira Uthenga Wabwino azilandira thandizo lawo polalikira Uthenga Wabwinowo.
1Corinthians9:15 Koma ine sindinagwiritse ntchito ufulu woterewu. Sindikulemba izi ndi chiyembekezo choti mundichitire zoterezi. Kuli bwino ndife kusiyana nʼkuti wina alande zomwe ndimazinyadira.
1Corinthians9:16 Komatu ndikamalalikira Uthenga Wabwino
1Corinthians9:17 Ngati ndikugwira ntchitoyi mwakufuna kwanga
1Corinthians9:18 Tsono mphotho yanga ndi chiyani? Ndi iyi: kuti polalikira Uthenga Wabwino ndiwupereke kwaulere komanso kuti ndisagwiritse ntchito ufulu wanga polalikira uthengawo.
1Corinthians9:19 Ngakhale ndine mfulu ndipo sindine kapolo wa munthu
1Corinthians9:20 Kwa Ayuda ndimakhala ngati Myuda kuti ndikope Ayuda. Kwa olamulidwa ndi Malamulo ndimakhala ngati wolamulidwa nawo (ngakhale kuti sindine wolamulidwa ndi Malamulowo) kuti ndikope amene amalamulidwa ndi Malamulo.
1Corinthians9:21 Kwa amene alibe Malamulo ndimakhala wopanda Malamulo (ngakhale kuti sindine wopanda Malamulo a Mulungu koma ndili pansi pa ulamuliro wa Khristu) kuti ndikope wopanda Malamulo.
1Corinthians9:22 Kwa ofowoka ndimakhala wofowoka
1Corinthians9:23 Ndimachita zonsezi chifukwa cha Uthenga Wabwino
1Corinthians9:24 Kodi simukudziwa kuti pa mpikisano wa liwiro onse amathamanga ndithu
1Corinthians9:25 Aliyense wochita mpikisano amakonzekera mwamphamvu. Amachita izi kuti alandire mphotho yankhata yamaluwa yomwe imafota. Koma ife timachita izi kuti tilandire mphotho yosafota.
1Corinthians9:26 Choncho sindithamanga monga wothamanga wopanda cholinga; komanso sindichita mpikisano wankhonya monga munthu amene amangomenya mophonya.
1Corinthians9:27 Ine ndimazunza thupi langa ndi kulisandutsa kapolo kuti nditatha kulalikira ena

1Corinthians10:21 Simungamwe chikho cha Ambuye

1Corinthians10:26 Popeza kuti

1Corinthians10:28 Koma ngati wina akuwuzani kuti

1Corinthians10:31 Nʼchifukwa chake chilichonse mungadye kapena kumwa
1Corinthians10:32 Musakhumudwitse aliyense
1Corinthians10:33 Mu zonse ndikuyesetsa kukondweretsa aliyense mʼnjira iliyonse. Popeza sindikufunafuna zokondweretsa ine ndekha koma zokomera ambiri kuti apulumutsidwe.
1Corinthians11:1 Tsatirani chitsanzo changa
1Corinthians11:2 Ndikukuyamikani chifukwa chondikumbukira pa zonse ndiponso posunga ziphunzitso monga ndinakuphunzitsirani.
1Corinthians11:3 Tsopano ndikufuna muzindikire kuti Khristu ndiye mutu wa munthu aliyense
1Corinthians11:4 Mwamuna aliyense wopemphera kapena kunenera ataphimba mutu wake akunyoza mutu wakewo.
1Corinthians11:5 Ndipo mkazi aliyense wopemphera kapena kunenera asanaphimbe mutu wake sakulemekeza mutu wakewo. Kuli chimodzimodzi kumeta mutu wake.
1Corinthians11:6 Ngati mkazi saphimba kumutu kwake
1Corinthians11:7 Mwamuna sayenera kuphimba kumutu popeza ndi chifaniziro ndi ulemerero wa Mulungu; pamene mkazi ndi ulemerero wa mwamuna.
1Corinthians11:8 Pakuti mwamuna sachokera kwa mkazi
1Corinthians11:9 Ndipo mwamuna sanalengedwe chifukwa cha mkazi
1Corinthians11:10 Pa chifukwa ichi
1Corinthians11:11 Komabe mwa Ambuye
1Corinthians11:12 Pakuti monga mkazi anachokera kwa mwamuna
1Corinthians11:13 Dziweruzeni. Kodi nʼchabwino kuti mkazi apemphere kwa Mulungu wopanda chophimba kumutu?
1Corinthians11:14 Kodi chikhalidwe chathu sichitiphunzitsa kuti nʼchamanyazi kuti mwamuna akhale ndi tsitsi lalitali
1Corinthians11:15 koma mkazi akakhala ndi tsitsi lalitali ndi ulemerero wake? Pakuti mkazi anapatsidwa tsitsi lalitali monga chophimba kumutu.
1Corinthians11:16 Ngati wina akufuna kutsutsapo pa zimenezi
1Corinthians11:17 Koma popereka malangizo awa sindikufuna kukuyamikirani popeza mʼmisonkhano yanu mumachita zoyipa kuposa zabwino.
1Corinthians11:18 Choyamba
1Corinthians11:19 Nʼzosakayikitsa kuti pali kugawikana pakati panu kuti adziwike amene ndi ovomerezeka ndi Mulungu.
1Corinthians11:20 Tsono
1Corinthians11:21 Pakuti mukamadya
1Corinthians11:22 Kodi mulibe nyumba zanu kumene mungamadyere ndi kumwa? Kapena mumapeputsa mpingo wa Mulungu ndi kuchititsa manyazi amene alibe kalikonse? Ndikunena chiyani kwa inu? Moti ndikuyamikireni pa zimenezi? Ayi
1Corinthians11:23 Pakuti zimene ndinalandira kwa Ambuye ndi zomwe ndinakupatsani. Ambuye Yesu
1Corinthians11:24 Atayamika ndi kumunyema ananena kuti
1Corinthians11:25 Chimodzimodzi
1Corinthians11:26 Pakuti nthawi zonse pamene mudya bulediyu ndikumwa chikhochi
1Corinthians11:27 Chifukwa chake
1Corinthians11:28 Munthu adzisanthule yekha asanadye buledi kapena kumwa chikhochi.
1Corinthians11:29 Popeza aliyense amene adya kapena kumwa mosazindikira thupi la Ambuye
1Corinthians11:30 Nʼchifukwa chake pakati panu ambiri mwa inu ndi ofowoka ndi odwala
1Corinthians11:31 Koma tikanadziyesa tokha sitikaweruzidwanso.
1Corinthians11:32 Pamene tiweruzidwa ndi Ambuye
1Corinthians11:33 Ndiye tsono abale anga
1Corinthians11:34 Ngati wina ali ndi njala
1Corinthians12:1 Tsopano abale anga okondedwa
1Corinthians12:2 Inu mukudziwa kuti pamene munali akunja
1Corinthians12:3 Nʼchifukwa chake ndikuwuzani kuti palibe munthu amene ali ndi Mzimu wa Mulungu angayankhule kuti

1Corinthians16:1 Tsopano za zopereka zothandiza anthu a Ambuye a ku Yerusalemu. Muchite zomwe ndinawuza mipingo ya ku Galatiya kuti ichite.

1Corinthians16:3 Pamenepo
1Corinthians16:4 Ngati kutaoneka kuti nʼkoyenera kuti ndipite nawo
1Corinthians16:5 Ndidzafika kwanuko nditadutsa ku Makedoniya pakuti ndikuyembekezera kudzera ku Makedoniyako.
1Corinthians16:6 Mwina ndidzakhala nanu kanthawi kochepa kapenanso nyengo yonse yozizira
1Corinthians16:7 Sindikufuna kuti ndikuoneni tsopano mongodutsa chabe
1Corinthians16:8 Koma ndikhala ndili ku Efeso mpaka nthawi ya Pentekosite
1Corinthians16:9 pakuti mwayi waukulu wapezeka woti nʼkugwira ntchito yaphindu
1Corinthians16:10 Ngati Timoteyo afike kwanuko
1Corinthians16:11 Wina aliyense asamunyoze. Muthandizeni kupitiriza ulendo wake mwamtendere kubwereranso kuli ine. Ndikumuyembekeza pamodzi ndi abale ena.
1Corinthians16:12 Tsono kunena za mʼbale wathu
1Corinthians16:13 Khalani tcheru; khazikikani mʼchikhulupiriro chanu; limbani mtima; khalani amphamvu.

1Corinthians16:16 kuti muziwamvera anthu oterewa

1Corinthians16:18 Pakuti anatsitsimutsa mzimu wanga ndi wanu womwe. Anthu a mtundu oterewa ngofunika kuwalemekeza.
1Corinthians16:19 Mpingo wa mʼchigawo cha ku Asiya ukupereka moni. Akula ndi Prisila akuperekanso moni wachisangalalo
1Corinthians16:20 Abale onse kuno akupereka moni wawo. Patsanani moni wachikondi chenicheni.

2Corinthians6:15 Pali mgwirizano wanji pakati pa Khristu ndi Beliyali? Kapena munthu wokhulupirira angayanjane bwanji ndi munthu wosakhulupirira?

2Corinthians9:3 Koma ndikutumiza abalewo kuti kukunyadirani kwathu pa zimenezi kutsimikizike kuti si kwachabe ndi kuti mukhale okonzeka monga ndinanenera.

2Corinthians10:1 Mwa kufatsa ndi kuleza mtima kwa Khristu
2Corinthians10:2 Ndikukupemphani kuti ndikadzafika kumeneko ndisadzachite kuyankhula mwamphamvu monga mmene ndimayembekezera kudzachita kwa anthu ena amene amaganiza kuti machitidwe athu ndi ofanana ndi anthu a dziko lapansi.
2Corinthians10:3 Ngakhale ife timakhala mʼdziko lapansi
2Corinthians10:4 Pakuti zida zathu zankhondo si zida za dziko lapansi. Koma ndi mphamvu zochokera kwa Mulungu zotha kugwetsa malinga.
2Corinthians10:5 Timagonjetsa maganizo onse onyenga ndiponso kudzikuza kulikonse kolimbana ndi anthu kuti asadziwe Mulungu. Ndipo timagonjetsa ganizo lililonse kuti limvere Khristu.
2Corinthians10:6 Ndipo ife tidzakhala okonzeka kulanga aliyense wosamvera ngati inuyo mutakhala omvera kwenikweni.
2Corinthians10:7 Inu mukuweruza potengera zimene maso anu akuona. Ngati wina akutsimikiza kuti ndi wake wa Khristu
2Corinthians10:8 Tsono ngakhale nditadzitama momasuka za ulamuliro umene Ambuye anatipatsa woti tikukuzeni osati kukuwonongani
2Corinthians10:9 Ine sindikufuna kuoneka ngati ndikukuopsezani ndi makalata anga.
2Corinthians10:10 Pakuti ena amati
2Corinthians10:11 Anthu oterewa ayenera kuzindikira kuti zomwe timalemba mʼmakalata tili kutali ndi zomwe tidzakhale tili komweko.
2Corinthians10:12 Sitikudziyika kapena kudzifananiza tokha ndi anthu ena amene amadziyenereza okha. Pamene akudzifanizira okha podziyerekeza ndi anzawo a mʼgulu lawo lomwe
2Corinthians10:13 Komabe
2Corinthians10:14 Pakuti sitikudzitama modutsa malire ngati kuti sitinafike kwa inu

2Corinthians10:16 kuti tikalalikire Uthenga Wabwino mu zigawo zina kupitirira kwanuko. Pakuti sitikufuna kudzitama pa ntchito yogwira ena kale mʼdera la munthu wina.

2Corinthians11:13 Pakuti anthu oterewa ndi atumwi onama
2Corinthians11:14 Sizododometsa zimenezi

2Corinthians11:20 Kunena zoona mumangololera aliyense; amene amakusandutsani akapolo
2Corinthians11:21 Ndikuvomera mwamanyazi kuti ife sitinali olimba mtima kuti nʼkuchita zinthu zimenezi. Ndikuyankhula ngati chitsiru kuti chimene wina aliyense akhoza kudzitama nacho
2Corinthians11:22 Kodi iwo ndi Ahebri? Inenso ndine Mhebri. Kodi iwo ndi Aisraeli? Inenso ndine Mwisraeli. Kodi iwo ndi zidzukulu za Abrahamu? Inenso ndine mdzukulu wa Abrahamu.

2Corinthians13:3 popeza mufuna chitsimikizo chakuti Khristu akuyankhula kudzera mwa ine. Iye siwofowoka pofuna kuchita nanu koma ndi wamphamvu pakati panu.
2Corinthians13:4 Pofuna kutsimikizira

Galatians1:5 Ulemerero ukhale kwa Mulunguyo mpaka muyaya. Ameni.
Galatians1:6 Ine ndikudabwa kuti mukusiya mwamsangamsanga chotere Mulungu amene anakuyitanani mwachisomo cha Khristu ndipo mwatembenuka ndi kutsatira uthenga wina wosiyana
Galatians1:7 umene si Uthenga Wabwino konse. Pali anthu ena amene akukusokonezani komanso akufuna kupotoza Uthenga Wabwino wa Khristu.

Galatians1:9 Monga tanena kale

Galatians1:13 Pakuti inu munamva za moyo wanga wakale mʼChiyuda
Galatians1:14 Ine ndinkapambana Ayuda ambiri a msinkhu wanga pochita za Chiyuda
Galatians1:15 Koma Mulungu

Galatians1:18 Pambuyo pake
Galatians1:19 Ine sindinaonane ndi atumwi enawo koma Yakobo yekha
Galatians1:20 Ine ndikutsimikizira inu pamaso pa Mulungu kuti zimene ndikukulemberani si zonama ayi.
Galatians1:21 Pambuyo pake ndinapita ku Siriya ndi ku Kilikiya.
Galatians1:22 Koma sindimadziwika ndi nkhope ku mipingo ya ku Yudeya imene ili mwa Khristu.
Galatians1:23 Iwo anangomva mbiri yokha yakuti
Galatians1:24 Ndipo iwo anayamika Mulungu chifukwa cha ine.
Galatians2:1 Kenaka
Galatians2:2 Ine ndinapita chifukwa Mulungu anachita kundionetsera kuti ndipite ndipo ndinakakumana ndi atsogoleri mu msonkhano mwamseri ndi kuwafotokozera Uthenga Wabwino umene ndimalalikira pakati pa anthu a mitundu ina. Ndinachita zimenezi kuti ndikhale ndi chitsimikizo kuopa kuti mwina ndinathamanga kapena ndimathamanga liwiro pachabe.
Galatians2:3 Komatu ngakhale Tito
Galatians2:4 Nkhani iyi inayambika chifukwa abale ena achinyengo amene analowerera pakati pathu kuti adzaone za ufulu umene tili nawo mwa Khristu Yesu ndikuti atisandutse akapolo.
Galatians2:5 Ife sitinawagonjere ndi pangʼono pomwe
Galatians2:6 Koma kunena za aja ankaoneka ngati ofunika kwambiri
Galatians2:7 Makamaka anaona kuti ine ndinapatsidwa ntchito yolalikira Uthenga Wabwino kwa anthu a mitundu ina monga momwe Petro anapatsidwa ntchito yolalikira Uthenga Wabwino kwa Ayuda.

Galatians2:9 Yakobo

Galatians2:11 Petro atafika ku Antiokeya
Galatians2:12 Pakuti asanafike anthu otumidwa ndi Yakobo

Galatians3:1 Agalatiya opusa inu
Galatians3:2 Ine ndikufuna ndiphunzire kuchokera kwa inu chinthu chimodzi ichi: Kodi munalandira Mzimu pochita ntchito za lamulo
Galatians3:3 Kani ndinu opusa chotere? Inu mutayamba ndi Mzimu
Galatians3:4 Kodi munavutika kwambiri pachabe
Galatians3:5 Kodi Mulungu amene anakupatsani Mzimu wake ndi kuchita zodabwitsa pakati panu
Galatians3:6 Nʼchimodzimodzinso Abrahamu
Galatians3:7 Tsono zindikirani kuti amene akhulupirira
Galatians3:8 Malemba anaonetseratu kuti Mulungu adzalungamitsa anthu a mitundu ina mwachikhulupiriro
Galatians3:9 Choncho iwo amene ali ndi chikhulupiriro ndi odalitsidwa pamodzi ndi Abrahamu
Galatians3:10 Onse amene amadalira ntchito za lamulo ndi otembereredwa
Galatians3:11 Chodziwikiratu nʼchakuti palibe amene amalungamitsidwa pamaso pa Mulungu ndi lamulo
Galatians3:12 Koma chikhulupiriro si Malamulo
Galatians3:13 Khristu anatiwombola ku temberero la lamulo pokhala temberero mʼmalo mwathu
Galatians3:14 Iye anatiwombola ife ndi cholinga chakuti madalitso woperekedwa kwa Abrahamu abwere kwa anthu a mitundu ina kudzera mwa Khristu Yesu
Galatians3:15 Abale
Galatians3:16 Malonjezo awa anaperekedwa kwa Abrahamu ndi kwa mbewu yake. Malemba sakunena kuti
Galatians3:17 Chimene ndikutanthauza ine ndi ichi: Malamulo amene anabwera patatha zaka 430
Galatians3:18 Ngati madalitso athu akudalira ntchito za lamulo ndiye kuti madalitsowo sakupatsidwa chifukwa cha lonjezo. Koma Mulungu mwachisomo chake anadalitsa Abrahamu kudzera mu lonjezo.
Galatians3:19 Nanga tsono cholinga cha lamulo chinali chiyani? Linaperekedwa chifukwa cha zolakwa mpaka itafika mbewu imene lonjezo limanena. Malamulowo anaperekedwa ndi angelo kudzera mwa mʼkhalapakati.
Galatians3:20 Ngakhale zili chomwecho
Galatians3:21 Kodi ndiye kuti lamulo limatsutsana ndi malonjezo a Mulungu? Ayi. Nʼkosatheka! Pakuti ngati tikanapatsidwa malamulo opatsa moyo ndiye kuti mwa lamulo tikanakhala olungama.
