Philippians1:1 Paulo ndi Timoteyo
Philippians1:2 Chisomo ndi mtendere zochokera kwa Mulungu Atate athu ndi Ambuye Yesu Khristu zikhale kwa inu.
Philippians1:3 Ndimayamika Mulungu wanga nthawi zonse ndikakumbukira inu.
Philippians1:4 Mʼmapemphero anga onse opempherera inu
Philippians1:5 chifukwa mwakhala mukundithandiza polalikira Uthenga Wabwino kuyambira tsiku loyamba mpaka tsopano.
Philippians1:6 Sindikukayika konse kuti Iye amene anayamba ntchito yabwino mwa inu adzayipitiriza ndi kuyimaliza mpaka pa tsiku la kubweranso kwa Khristu Yesu.
Philippians1:7 Kwa ine ndi bwino kuti ndiziganiza zotere za nonsenu
Philippians1:8 Mulungu angandichitire umboni kuti ndimakulakalakani ndi chikondi cha Khristu Yesu.
Philippians1:9 Ndipo pemphero langa ndi lakuti chikondi chanu chipitirire kukulirakulira pa chidziwitso ndi kuzama mʼmaganizo
Philippians1:10 kuti mukhoza kuzindikira chabwino koposa zonse ndi chiti kuti muthe kukhala wopanda chodetsa ndi wopanda chilema kufikira tsiku la Khristu.
Philippians1:11 Ndipo moyo wanu udzakhala odzazidwa ndi chipatso cha chilungamo chimene chimachokera mwa Yesu Khristu. Pakuti zimenezi zidzapereka ulemerero ndi matamando kwa Mulungu.
Philippians1:12 Tsopano abale
Philippians1:13 Chotsatira chake nʼchakuti zadziwika bwino lomwe kwa onse amene ali ku nyumba yaufumu kuti ine ndili mʼmaunyolo chifukwa cha Khristu.
Philippians1:14 Moti chifukwa cha maunyolo angawa
Philippians1:15 Nʼzoonadi kuti ena amalalikira Khristu chifukwa cha kaduka ndi mikangano
Philippians1:16 Olalikira ndi zolinga zabwinowa amachita izi mwachikondi
Philippians1:17 Ena aja amalalikira Khristu modzikonda osati moona mtima namaganiza kuti kutero kubweretsa mavuto pamene ndili mʼmaunyolo.
Philippians1:18 Nanga kodi zimenezo zili ndi ntchito? Chofunika ndi chakuti Khristu alalikidwe
Philippians1:19 pakuti ndikudziwa kuti chifukwa cha mapemphero anu ndi thandizo lochokera kwa Mzimu wa Yesu Khristu
Philippians1:20 Ndili ndi chiyembekezo chonse kuti sindidzachita manyazi ndi pangʼono pomwe
Philippians1:21 Pakuti kwa ine kukhala moyo ndi Khristu ndipo kufa ndi phindu.
Philippians1:22 Ngati nditi ndipitirire kukhala ndi moyo mʼthupi ndiye kuti kwa ine ndi kugwira ntchito yopindulitsa. Kodi ndisankhe chiyani? Sindikudziwa.
Philippians1:23 Ndathinidwa ndi zinthu ziwirizi: Ndikulakalaka kunyamuka kuti ndikakhale ndi Khristu
Philippians1:24 Komanso nʼkofunika kwambiri kuti ndikhalebe mʼthupi chifukwa cha inu.
Philippians1:25 Ndili ndi chitsimikizo
Philippians1:26 kuti pokhala nanunso
Philippians1:27 Chilichonse chimene chingachitike
Philippians1:28 osachita mantha ndi pangʼono pomwe ndi amene akutsutsana nanu. Ichi ndi chizindikiro kwa iwo kuti adzawonongedwa
Philippians1:29 Pakuti inu mwapatsidwa mwayi osati ongokhulupirira Khristu kokha
Philippians1:30 Inunso mukudutsa mʼzowawa zomwe zija munaona ndikudutsamo inenso ndipo pano mukumva kuti ndikukumana nazobe.
Philippians2:1 Ngati muli ndi chilimbikitso chilichonse chifukwa cholumikizana ndi Khristu
Philippians2:2 tsono tsirizani chimwemwe changa pokhala amaganizo ofanana
Philippians2:3 Musachite kalikonse ndi mtima odzikonda chabe kapena odzitukumula chabe. Koma khalani odzichepetsa ndipo aliyense aziona mnzake ngati womuposa iyeyo.
Philippians2:4 Musamangofuna zokomera inu nokha koma aliyense azifuna zokomeranso ena.
Philippians2:5 Pa ubale wanu wina ndi mnzake
Philippians2:6 Iyeyu
Philippians2:7 Koma anadzichepetsa kotheratu nakhala ndi khalidwe ngati la kapolo ndi kukhala munthu ngati anthu ena onse.
Philippians2:8 Ndipo pokhala munthu choncho anadzichepetsa yekha ndipo anamvera mpaka imfa yake
Philippians2:9 Choncho Mulungu anamukweza Iye kukhala wapamwamba kwambiri
Philippians2:10 kuti pakumva dzina la Yesu
Philippians2:11 ndipo lilime lililonse livomereze kuti Yesu Khristu ndi Ambuye kuchitira ulemu Mulungu Atate.
Philippians2:12 Tsono
Philippians2:13 pakuti ndi Mulungu amene amagwira ntchito mwa inu kuti mufune ndi kuchita zimene zimamukondweretsa Iyeyo.
Philippians2:14 Muzichita zonse mosawiringula kapena mosatsutsapo
Philippians2:15 kuti mukhale wopanda cholakwa ndi angwiro
Philippians2:16 powawuza mawu amoyo. Ndipo ine ndidzatha kunyadira pa tsiku la Khristu kuti sindinathamange kapena kugwira ntchito pachabe.
Philippians2:17 Koma ngakhale ndikuthiridwa ngati nsembe ya chakumwa yoperekedwa pa nsembe ndi pa utumiki wochokera mʼchikhulupiriro chanu
Philippians2:18 Chomwechonso
Philippians2:19 Ngati Ambuye Yesu alola
Philippians2:20 Ndilibenso wina monga iyeyu amene ali ndi chidwi chenicheni pa za moyo wanu.
Philippians2:21 Pakuti aliyense amangofuna zokomera iye yekha osati zokomera Yesu Khristu.
Philippians2:22 Koma inu mukudziwa kuti Timoteyo wadzionetsa yekha
Philippians2:23 Choncho ndikuyembekezera kumutuma msanga ndikangodziwa mmene zinthu zanga ziyendere.
Philippians2:24 Ndipo ndikukhulupirira kuti Ambuye akalola ine mwini ndidzafikanso kwanuko posachedwapa.
Philippians2:25 Koma ndikuganiza kuti nʼkofunika kuti ndikutumizireni mʼbale wanga Epafrodito
Philippians2:26 Pakuti akukulakalakani nonsenu ndipo akusauka mu mtima chifukwa munamva kuti akudwala.
Philippians2:27 Zoonadi ankadwala ndipo anatsala pangʼono kumwalira. Koma Mulungu anamuchitira chifundo
Philippians2:28 Choncho khumbo langa lofulumiza kumutumiza lakula
Philippians2:29 Mulandireni mwa Ambuye ndi chimwemwe chachikulu

Philippians4:10 Ndikukondwa kwambiri mwa Ambuye kuti patapita nthawi tsopano mwayambanso kuonetsa kuti mumandiganizira. Zoonadi
Philippians4:11 Sindikunena izi chifukwa choti ndikusowa thandizo
Philippians4:12 Ndimadziwa kusauka nʼkutani
Philippians4:13 Ndikhoza kuchita zonse kudzera mwa Iye amene amandipatsa mphamvu.
Philippians4:14 Komatu munachita bwino kundithandiza mʼmavuto anga.
Philippians4:15 Ndipo inu Afilipi mukudziwa kuti masiku oyambirira olalikira Uthenga Wabwino
Philippians4:16 Pakuti ngakhale pamene ndinali ku Tesalonika
Philippians4:17 Osati ndikufuna mphatso zanu
Philippians4:18 Ndalandira zonse ndipo ndili nazo zokwanira zoposa zosowa zanga popeza ndalandira kwa Epafrodito mphatso zochuluka zimene munatumiza. Ndizo zopereka za fungo labwino
Philippians4:19 Ndipo Mulungu wanga adzakwaniritsa zosowa zanu monga mwa chuma chake chaulemerero mwa Khristu Yesu.

Philippians4:21 Perekani moni kwa oyera mtima onse mwa Khristu Yesu. Abale amene ali ndi ine akupereka moni wawo.
Philippians4:22 Oyera mtima onse akupereka moni
Philippians4:23 Chisomo cha Ambuye Yesu Khristu chikhale ndi mzimu wanu. Ameni.
Colossians1:1 Paulo
Colossians1:2 Kulembera abale oyera mtima ndi okhulupirira a ku Kolose mwa Khristu. Chisomo ndi mtendere kwa inu zochokera kwa Mulungu Atate athu.
Colossians1:3 Timayamika Mulungu Atate wa Ambuye athu Yesu Khristu
Colossians1:4 Timayamika chifukwa tinamva za chikhulupiriro chanu mwa Khristu Yesu ndi za chikondi chanu pa oyera mtima onse.
Colossians1:5 Chikhulupiriro ndi chikondi
Colossians1:6 umene unafika kwa inu. Pa dziko lonse lapansi Uthenga Wabwino ukubereka chipatso ndi kukula monga momwe zakhala zikuchitikira pakati panu kuyambira tsiku limene munawumva ndi kuzindikira chisomo cha Mulungu mu choonadi chonse.
Colossians1:7 Inu munaphunzira zimenezi kuchokera kwa Epafra
Colossians1:8 Iye anatiwuza za chikondi chanu chimene Mzimu anakupatsani.
Colossians1:9 Chifukwa cha ichi
Colossians1:10 Ndipo tikupempherera zimenezi ndi cholinga chakuti inu mukhale moyo oyenera Ambuye ndi kumukondweretsa mʼnjira zonse. Kubereka chipatso pa ntchito iliyonse yabwino
Colossians1:11 Timapempheranso kuti Mulungu akulimbikitseni ndi mphamvu yake yonse ya ulemerero wake
Colossians1:12 ndi kuyamika Atate nthawi zonse
Colossians1:13 Pakuti Iye anatipulumutsa ku ulamuliro wa mdima ndi kutibweretsa mu ufumu wa Mwana wake wokondedwa.
Colossians1:14 Mwa Iyeyu ife tinawomboledwa ndi kukhululukidwa machimo.
Colossians1:15 Mwanayu ndiye chithunzi cha Mulungu wosaonekayo. Iye ndiye Mwana wake woyamba kubadwa ndi wolamulira zolengedwa zonse.
Colossians1:16 Pakuti zinthu zonse zinalengedwa kudzera mwa Iye. Zinthu zakumwamba ndi za pa dziko lapansi
Colossians1:17 Iyeyo analipo zinthu zonse zisanalengedwe ndipo zinthu zonse zimamangika pamodzi mwa Iye.
Colossians1:18 Iye ndiyenso mutu wa thupi
Colossians1:19 Pakuti kunamukomera Mulungu kuti umulungu wake wonse ukhalemo mwa Khristu.
Colossians1:20 Ndipo kudzera mwa Iye Mulungu ayanjanitsenso zinthu zonse ndi Iye mwini
Colossians1:21 Kale inu munali kutali ndi Mulungu ndipo munali adani a Mulungu mʼmaganizo mwanu chifukwa cha khalidwe lanu loyipa.
Colossians1:22 Koma tsopano Iye anakuyanjanitsani mʼthupi la Khristu kudzera mu imfa kuti akuperekeni pamaso pake oyera
Colossians1:23 ngati mupitirirabe kukhala mʼchikhulupiriro chanu
Colossians1:24 Tsopano ine ndikukondwa kuti ndinavutika chifukwa cha inu
Colossians1:25 Ine ndakhala mtumiki wake mwa lamulo limene Mulungu anandipatsa kuti ndipereke Mawu a Mulungu athunthu
Colossians1:26 chinsinsi chimene chakhala chikubisika kwa nthawi ndi mibado
Colossians1:27 Kwa iwo amene Mulungu anawasankha kuti awadziwitse pakati pa a mitundu ina
Colossians1:28 Ife tikulalikira Khristu
Colossians1:29 Ndi cholinga chimenechi

1Thessalonians1:7 Ndipo potero munakhala chitsanzo kwa abale onse a ku Makedoniya ndi Akaya.

1Thessalonians5:2 chifukwa mukudziwa bwino lomwe kuti tsiku la Ambuye lidzafika ngati mbala usiku.
1Thessalonians5:3 Pamene anthu akunena kuti
1Thessalonians5:4 Koma inu abale
1Thessalonians5:5 Nonse ndinu ana a kuwunika ndi ana a usana. Sindife anthu a usiku kapena mdima.
1Thessalonians5:6 Chomwecho tsono
1Thessalonians5:7 Pakuti amene akugona
1Thessalonians5:8 Koma popeza ndife a usana
1Thessalonians5:9 Pakuti Mulungu sanatisankhe kuti tikavutike ndi mkwiyo koma kuti tilandire chipulumutso kudzera mwa Ambuye athu Yesu Khristu.
1Thessalonians5:10 Iye anatifera ndi cholinga chakuti
1Thessalonians5:11 Choncho limbikitsanani wina ndi mnzake ndi kuthandizana kukula mu mzimu
1Thessalonians5:12 Tsopano tikukupemphani abale kuti muziwalemekeza amene akugwira ntchito pakati panu
1Thessalonians5:13 Muziwachitira ulemu kwambiri mwachikondi chifukwa cha ntchito yawo. Mukhale pa mtendere wina ndi mnzake.
1Thessalonians5:14 Ndipo tikukupemphani abale
1Thessalonians5:15 Onetsetsani kuti wina asabwezere choyipa kwa omuchitira choyipa koma nthawi zonse yesetsani kukhala okoma mtima kwa wina ndi mnzake; ndiponso ndi kwa anthu ena onse.
1Thessalonians5:16 Kondwerani nthawi zonse.
1Thessalonians5:17 Pempherani kosalekeza.
1Thessalonians5:18 Yamikani mu zonse
1Thessalonians5:19 Musazimitse moto wa Mzimu Woyera.
1Thessalonians5:20 Musanyoze mawu a uneneri.
1Thessalonians5:21 Yesani zinthu zonse. Gwiritsitsani chimene ndi chabwino.
1Thessalonians5:22 Mupewe choyipa cha mtundu wina uliwonse.
1Thessalonians5:23 Mulungu mwini
1Thessalonians5:24 Amene anakuyitanani ndi wokhulupirika ndipo Iye adzachita zimenezi.
1Thessalonians5:25 Abale
1Thessalonians5:26 Perekani moni wachikondi kwa onse.
1Thessalonians5:27 Pamaso pa Ambuye ndikulamula kuti kalatayi iwerengedwe kwa abale onse.
1Thessalonians5:28 Chisomo cha Ambuye athu Yesu Khristu chikhale nanu.
2Thessalonians1:1 Paulo
2Thessalonians1:2 Chisomo ndi mtendere kwa inu kuchokera kwa Mulungu Atate ndi Ambuye Yesu Khristu.
2Thessalonians1:3 Ife tiyenera kuyamika Mulungu nthawi zonse chifukwa cha inu abale. Ndipo tiyenera kutero chifukwa chikhulupiriro chanu chikukulirakulirabe
2Thessalonians1:4 Nʼchifukwa chake
2Thessalonians1:5 Zonsezi zikutsimikiza kuti Mulungu amaweruza molungama. Zotsatira zake ndi zakuti mudzatengedwa kukhala oyenera kulowa mu ufumu wa Mulungu umene mukuwuvutikira.
2Thessalonians1:6 Mulungu ndi wolungama ndipo adzalanga amene amakusautsaniwo
2Thessalonians1:7 ndikukupatsani mpumulo amene mukusautsidwa
2Thessalonians1:8 Iye adzalanga amene sadziwa Mulungu ndi amene samvera Uthenga Wabwino wa Ambuye athu Yesu.
2Thessalonians1:9 Adzalangidwa ndi chiwonongeko chamuyaya ndipo sadzaonanso nkhope ya Ambuye ndi ulemerero wamphamvu zake
2Thessalonians1:10 pa tsiku limene iye adzabwera kudzalemekezedwa mwa oyera mtima ndi kuyamikidwa ndi onse amene anakhulupirira. Inu mudzakhala nawo mʼgulumo chifukwa munakhulupirira umboni wathu.
2Thessalonians1:11 Nʼchifukwa chake timakupemphererani nthawi zonse
2Thessalonians1:12 Ife timapempherera zimenezi kuti dzina la Ambuye athu Yesu lilemekezedwe mwa inu
2Thessalonians2:1 Pa za kubweranso kwa Ambuye athu Yesu Khristu ndiponso za kusonkhana kwathu kuti tikumane naye
2Thessalonians2:2 kuti musagwedezeke msanga mʼmaganizo kapena kuopsezedwa ndi uneneri
2Thessalonians2:3 Musalole kuti wina aliyense akunamizeni mwa njira ina iliyonse. Pakuti tsikulo lisanafike
2Thessalonians2:4 Iyeyo adzatsutsa ndi kudziyika pamwamba pa chilichonse chimene anthu amachitcha mulungu kapena amachipembedza. Iyeyo adzadzikhazika mʼNyumba ya Mulungu ndi kudzitcha Mulungu.
2Thessalonians2:5 Kodi simukukumbukira kuti pamene ndinali nanu pamodzi ndinkakuwuzani zimenezi?
2Thessalonians2:6 Ndipo tsopano mukudziwa chimene chikumuletsa kuonekera
2Thessalonians2:7 Pakuti mphamvu yobisika yoyipitsitsa ikugwira ntchito ngakhale tsopano; koma amene akutchinga mphamvuyo adzapitiriza kutero mpaka pamene wotchingayo adzachotsedwe.
2Thessalonians2:8 Ndipo kenaka woyipitsitsayo adzaonekera
2Thessalonians2:9 Woyipitsitsayo adzabwera ndi mphamvu za Satana. Adzaonetsa mphamvu zake pochita zizindikiro ndi zodabwitsa zachinyengo.
2Thessalonians2:10 Iye adzagwiritsa ntchito mtundu uliwonse wachinyengo kupusitsa amene akuwonongeka. Iwo akuwonongeka chifukwa akukana kukonda choonadi ndi kuti apulumutsidwe.
2Thessalonians2:11 Chifukwa cha chimenechi
2Thessalonians2:12 Choncho adzalangidwa onse amene sanakhulupirire choonadi
2Thessalonians2:13 Koma tiyenera kuyamika Mulungu chifukwa cha inu abale okondedwa mwa Ambuye
2Thessalonians2:14 Iye anakuyitanirani zimenezi kudzera mwa uthenga wathu wabwino
2Thessalonians2:15 Kotero tsono
2Thessalonians2:16 Ambuye athu Yesu Khristu mwini ndi Mulungu Atate wathu
2Thessalonians2:17 akulimbikitseni ndi kukupatsani mphamvu yogwirira ntchito ndi kuyankhula zabwino zilizonse.
2Thessalonians3:1 Potsiriza
2Thessalonians3:2 Ndipo pempherani kuti tilanditsidwe mʼmanja mwa anthu ovuta ndi oyipa
2Thessalonians3:3 Koma Ambuye ndi wokhulupirika
2Thessalonians3:4 Tili ndi chikhulupiriro mwa Ambuye kuti mukuchita zonse ndipo mudzapitirira kuchita zimene tinakulamulirani.
2Thessalonians3:5 Ambuye atsogolere mitima yanu kuti mudziwe chikondi cha Mulungu ndiponso kupirira kumene Khristu amapereka.
2Thessalonians3:6 Abale
2Thessalonians3:7 Pakuti inu mukudziwa zimene muyenera kuchita pofuna kutitsatira. Ife sitinali alesi pamene tinali nanu
2Thessalonians3:8 ndipo sitinadye chakudya cha aliyense osalipira. Komatu tinkagwira ntchito mwamphamvu usiku ndi usana kuti tisakhale cholemetsa kwa aliyense.
2Thessalonians3:9 Sitinachite zimenezi chifukwa choti tinalibe mphamvu zolamula kuti mutithandize koma kuti tikhale chitsanzo choti mutsatire.
2Thessalonians3:10 Pakuti ngakhale pamene tinali nanu
2Thessalonians3:11 Ife tikumva kuti pakati panu pali ena amene ndi alesi. Iwo safuna kugwira ntchito
2Thessalonians3:12 Mʼdzina la Ambuye Yesu Khristu
2Thessalonians3:13 Koma inu abale
2Thessalonians3:14 Ngati wina aliyense akana kumvera malangizo athu a mʼkalatayi
2Thessalonians3:15 Komatu musamutenge kukhala mdani
2Thessalonians3:16 Tsopano Ambuye mwini mtendere akupatseni mtendere nthawi zonse mwa njira iliyonse. Ambuye akhale ndi inu nonse.
2Thessalonians3:17 Ine Paulo
2Thessalonians3:18 Chisomo cha Ambuye athu Yesu Khristu chikhale ndi inu nonse.
1Timothy1:1 Paulo
1Timothy1:2 Kwa Timoteyo mwana wanga weniweni mʼchikhulupiriro. Chisomo
1Timothy1:3 Monga ndinakupempha pamene ndinkapita ku Makedoniya
1Timothy1:4 kapena kumangoyika mitima pa nthano zopeka ndi kufufuza za mayina a makolo awo. Zinthu zotere zimapititsa mʼtsogolo mikangano mʼmalo mwa ntchito ya Mulungu yomwe ndi ya chikhulupiriro.
1Timothy1:5 Cholinga cha lamuloli ndi chikondi
1Timothy1:6 Anthu ena anapatuka pa zimenezi ndipo anatsata nkhani zopanda tanthauzo.
1Timothy1:7 Iwo amafuna kukhala aphunzitsi amalamulo
1Timothy1:8 Tikudziwa kuti Malamulo ndi abwino ngati munthu awagwiritsa ntchito bwino.
1Timothy1:9 Tikudziwanso kuti Malamulo sakhazikitsidwa chifukwa cha anthu olungama
1Timothy1:10 Malamulo amayikidwa chifukwa cha anthu achigololo ndi ochita zadama ndi amuna anzawo
1Timothy1:11 Chiphunzitso chimene chimagwirizana ndi Uthenga Wabwino wonena za ulemerero wa Mulungu wodala
1Timothy1:12 Ndikuthokoza Khristu Yesu Ambuye athu
1Timothy1:13 Ngakhale kuti kale ndinali wachipongwe
1Timothy1:14 Chisomo cha Ambuye athu chinatsanulidwa pa ine mochuluka
1Timothy1:15 Mawu odalirika ndi woyenera kuwavomereza kwathunthu ndi awa: Yesu Khristu anabwera pa dziko lapansi kudzapulumutsa ochimwa
1Timothy1:16 Ndipo pa chifukwa chimenechi
1Timothy1:17 Tsopano kwa Mfumu yamuyaya
1Timothy1:18 Mwana wanga Timoteyo
1Timothy1:19 utagwiritsitsa chikhulupiriro ndi chikumbumtima chabwino. Ena anazikana zimenezi motero chikhulupiriro chawo chinawonongeka.
1Timothy1:20 Ena mwa amenewa ndi Humenayo ndi Alekisandro
1Timothy2:1 Tsono choyamba ndikukupemphani kuti mupempherere anthu onse. Mapemphero anu akhale opemba
1Timothy2:2 Mupempherere mafumu ndi onse aulamuliro
1Timothy2:3 Izi ndi zabwino ndipo zimakondweretsa Mulungu Mpulumutsi wathu
1Timothy2:4 amene amafuna kuti anthu onse apulumutsidwe ndipo kuti adziwe choonadi.
1Timothy2:5 Pakuti pali Mulungu mmodzi yekha ndi Mʼkhalapakati mmodzi yekha pakati pa Mulungu ndi anthu
1Timothy2:6 Iyeyu anadzipereka kukhala dipo lowombolera anthu onse. Umenewu ndi umboni umene waperekedwa mu nthawi yake yoyenera.
1Timothy2:7 Nʼchifukwa chake anandisankha kukhala mlaliki ndiponso mtumwi wophunzitsa anthu a mitundu ina mawu achikhulupiriro choona. Sindikunama ayi
1Timothy2:8 Choncho ndikufuna kuti paliponse popemphera
1Timothy2:9 Ndikufunanso kuti amayi azivala mwaulemu
1Timothy2:10 Koma adzikongoletse ndi ntchito zabwino zoyenera mayi wopembedza Mulungu.
1Timothy2:11 Amayi azikhala chete pophunzitsidwa ndi mtima ogonjera kwathunthu.
1Timothy2:12 Ine sindikulola kuti amayi aziphunzitsa kapena kulamulira amuna; koma akhale chete.
1Timothy2:13 Pakuti Adamu ndiye anayamba kupangidwa kenaka Hava.
1Timothy2:14 Ndipo Adamu si amene ananyengedwa koma mkazi ndiye amene ananyengedwa nachimwa.
1Timothy2:15 Ndipo mkazi adzapulumutsidwa pobereka mwana ngati apitiriza kukhala mʼchikhulupiriro
1Timothy3:1 Mawu woona ndi awa: Ngati munthu akufunitsitsa atakhala woyangʼanira
1Timothy3:2 Tsono woyangʼanira ayenera kukhala munthu wopanda chotsutsika nacho
1Timothy3:3 Asakhale chidakwa
1Timothy3:4 Akhale wodziwa kusamala bwino banja lake ndi kulera ana ake bwino
1Timothy3:5 (Ngati munthu sadziwa kusamala banja lake lomwe
1Timothy3:6 Asakhale wongotembenuka mtima kumene kuopa kuti angadzitukumule napezeka pa chilango monga Satana.
1Timothy3:7 Ayeneranso kukhala munthu wambiri yabwino ndi akunja
1Timothy3:8 Momwemonso atumiki
1Timothy3:9 Ayenera kugwiritsa mozama choonadi cha chikhulupiriro ndi kukhala ndi chikumbumtima chabwino.
1Timothy3:10 Ayambe ayesedwa kaye
1Timothy3:11 Momwemonso
1Timothy3:12 Mtumiki akhale wokhulupirika kwa mkazi wake ndipo ayenera kukhala wosamalira bwino ana ake ndi onse a pa khomo pake.
1Timothy3:13 Iwo amene atumikira bwino amakhala ndi mbiri yabwino ndipo amakhala chitsimikizo chachikulu cha chikhulupiriro chawo mwa Khristu Yesu.
1Timothy3:14 Ngakhale ndili ndi chiyembekezo choti ndifika komweko posachedwapa
1Timothy3:15 Ine zina zikandichedwetsa kubwera
1Timothy3:16 Mosakayikira
1Timothy4:1 Mzimu akunena momveka bwino kuti mʼmasiku otsiriza anthu ena adzataya chikhulupiriro chawo ndi kutsatira mizimu yonyenga ndi zinthu zophunzitsidwa ndi ziwanda.
1Timothy4:2 Ziphunzitso zimenezi zimachokera ku chinyengo cha anthu onama
1Timothy4:3 Iwo amaletsa anthu ukwati ndi kuwalamula kuti asamadye zakudya zina
1Timothy4:4 Pakuti chilichonse chimene Mulungu analenga ndi chabwino
1Timothy4:5 pakuti chimayeretsedwa ndi mawu a Mulungu ndi pemphero.
1Timothy4:6 Ngati abale uwalangiza zimenezi
1Timothy4:7 Koma upewe nkhani zachabe ndi nthano za amayi okalamba; mʼmalo mwake udziphunzitse kukhala moyo wolemekeza Mulungu.
1Timothy4:8 Pakuti kulimbitsa thupi kumapindulitsapo pangʼono
1Timothy4:9 Amenewa ndi mawu odalirika ndi oyenera kuwalandira kwathunthu.
1Timothy4:10 Nʼchifukwa chake timagwira ntchito molimbika ndi kuyesetsa
1Timothy4:11 Lamulira ndi kuphunzitsa zinthu zimenezi.
1Timothy4:12 Usalole kuti wina akupeputse chifukwa ndiwe wachinyamata
1Timothy4:13 Mpaka nditabwera
1Timothy4:14 Usanyozere mphatso yako yomwe inapatsidwa kwa iwe kudzera mʼmawu auneneri pamene gulu la akulu ampingo linakusanjika manja.
1Timothy4:15 Uzichita zimenezi mosamalitsa ndi modzipereka kwathunthu
1Timothy4:16 Samala kwambiri moyo wako ndi ziphunzitso zako. Uzichitabe zimenezi chifukwa ukatero
1Timothy5:1 Usadzudzule munthu wachikulire mokalipa
1Timothy5:2 Amayi achikulire uwatenge ngati amayi ako ndipo amayi achitsikana uwatenge ngati alongo ako
1Timothy5:3 Uziwachitira ulemu akazi amasiye amene ali okhaokha.
1Timothy5:4 Koma ngati mkazi wamasiye ali ndi ana ndi zidzukulu
1Timothy5:5 Mkazi wamasiye amene ali yekha ndi wopanda womuthandiza
1Timothy5:6 Koma mkazi wamasiye amene amangokhalira kuchita zosangalatsa moyo wake
1Timothy5:7 Pereka malangizo amenewa kwa anthu kuti akhale opanda zolakwa.
1Timothy5:8 Ngati wina sasamalira abale ake
1Timothy5:9 Mayi wamasiye aliyense amene sanakwanitse zaka 60 zakubadwa
1Timothy5:10 Akhale mayi woti amadziwika bwino pa ntchito zake zabwino monga kulera ana
1Timothy5:11 Akazi amasiye achitsikana
1Timothy5:12 Zikatero amadziweruza okha chifukwa aphwanya lonjezo lawo loyamba.
1Timothy5:13 Komanso amakhala ndi chizolowezi cha ulesi ndi kumangoyenda khomo ndi khomo. Ndipo sikungokhala aulesi kokha komanso kuchita miseche
1Timothy5:14 Kotero
1Timothy5:15 Akazi amasiye ena apatuka kale nʼkumatsatira Satana.
1Timothy5:16 Ngati mayi aliyense wokhulupirira ali ndi akazi amasiye amene akuwasamalira
1Timothy5:17 Akulu ampingo amene amayangʼanira bwino zochitika za mu mpingo
1Timothy5:18 Pakuti Mawu a Mulungu amati
1Timothy5:19 Usamamvere mawu oneneza akulu ampingo pokhapokha patakhala mboni ziwiri kapena zitatu.
1Timothy5:20 Akulu ampingo amene akuchimwa
1Timothy5:21 Ndikukulamulira pamaso pa Mulungu
1Timothy5:22 Usafulumire kusanjika manja munthu
1Timothy5:23 Uleke kumangomwa madzi okha
1Timothy5:24 Anthu ena machimo awo amaonekeratu poyera
1Timothy5:25 Momwemonso
1Timothy6:1 Onse amene ali mu ukapolo ayenera kuona ambuye awo ngati oyenera kuwachitira ulemu
1Timothy6:2 Amene ambuye awo ndi okhulupirira
1Timothy6:3 Ngati wina aphunzitsa zosiyana ndi zimenezi
1Timothy6:4 ameneyo ndi wodzitukumula ndipo sakudziwa chilichonse. Iyeyo ali ndi maganizo oyipa
1Timothy6:5 ndi kulimbana kosatha pakati pa anthu amitima yopotoka amene alandidwa choonadi ndipo amaganiza kuti kulemekeza Mulungu ndi njira yopezera chuma.
1Timothy6:6 Koma kulemekeza Mulungu kuli ndi phindu lalikulu.
1Timothy6:7 Pakuti sitinabweretse kanthu mʼdziko lapansi
1Timothy6:8 Koma ngati tili ndi chakudya ndi zovala
1Timothy6:9 Anthu amene amafuna kulemera amagwa mʼmayesero ndi mu msampha ndi mʼzilakolako zambiri zopusa ndi zoopsa zimene zimagwetsera anthu mʼchitayiko ndi mʼchiwonongeko.
1Timothy6:10 Pakuti kukonda ndalama ndiye muzu wa zoyipa za mitundu yonse. Anthu ena ofunitsitsa ndalama
1Timothy6:11 Koma iwe
1Timothy6:12 Menya nkhondo yabwino yachikhulupiriro. Gwiritsitsa moyo wosatha umene anakuyitanira pamene unavomereza bwino lomwe pamaso pa mboni zambiri.
1Timothy6:13 Ndikukulamula pamaso pa Mulungu amene amapatsa moyo zinthu zonse
1Timothy6:14 Usunge lamuloli mopanda banga ndi cholakwa kufikira Ambuye athu Yesu Khristu ataonekera.
1Timothy6:15 Pa nthawi yake Mulungu adzamubweretsa kwa ife. Mulungu ndi wodalitsika ndipo Iye yekha ndiye Wolamulira
1Timothy6:16 Ndiye yekha wosafa ndipo amakhala mʼkuwala koopsa. Mulungu amene munthu aliyense sanamuone. Kwa Iye kukhale ulemu ndi mphamvu mpaka muyaya. Ameni.
1Timothy6:17 Anthu onse amene ali ndi chuma uwalamule kuti asanyade kapena kuyika mitima yawo pa chuma chimene nʼchosadalirika. Koma chiyembekezo chawo chikhale mwa Mulungu amene amatipatsa mowolowamanja zonse zotisangalatsa.
1Timothy6:18 Uwalamule kuti azichita zabwino
1Timothy6:19 Potero adzadziwunjikira chuma chokhalitsa ngati maziko okhazikika a nthawi zakutsogolo
1Timothy6:20 Timoteyo
1Timothy6:21 Anthu ena chifukwa chovomereza nzeru zotere
2Timothy1:1 Paulo mtumwi wa Khristu Yesu mwa chifuniro cha Mulungu. Anandituma kuti ndilalike za lonjezo la moyo umene uli mwa Khristu Yesu.
2Timothy1:2 Kwa Timoteyo
2Timothy1:3 Ndikuyamika Mulungu amene ndimamutumikira ndi chikumbumtima chosatsutsika
2Timothy1:4 Ndikamakumbukira misozi yako
2Timothy1:5 Ndakumbukira za chikhulupiriro chako choona chimene chinayamba mwa agogo ako a Loisi ndi mwa amayi ako Yunike ndipo ndikutsimikiza mtima kuti chilinso mwa iwe.
2Timothy1:6 Nʼchifukwa chake ndikukukumbutsa kuti upemerere monga amachitira moto
2Timothy1:7 Pakuti Mzimu amene Mulungu anatipatsa
2Timothy1:8 Choncho usachite manyazi kuchitira umboni Ambuye athu
2Timothy1:9 Iye anatipulumutsa ndipo anatiyitanira ku moyo oyera mtima
2Timothy1:10 Koma tsopano Mulungu watiwululira kudzera mʼkuoneka kwa Mpulumutsi wathu
2Timothy1:11 Ine ndinasankhidwa kukhala wamthenga
2Timothy1:12 Nʼchifukwa chake ndikuvutika monga ndililimu. Komabe zimenezi sizikundichititsa manyazi
2Timothy1:13 Zimene unamva kwa ine
2Timothy1:14 Samalira bwino zokoma zimene anakusungitsa. Uzisamalire mothandizidwa ndi Mzimu Woyera amene amakhala mwa ife.
2Timothy1:15 Iwe udziwa kuti onse a mʼchigawo cha Asiya anandithawa
2Timothy1:16 Mulungu achitire chifundo banja lonse la Onesiforo chifukwa ankandisangalatsa kawirikawiri ndipo sankachita nane manyazi ngakhale ndinali womangidwa ndi maunyolo.
2Timothy1:17 Mʼmalo mwake
2Timothy1:18 Ambuye amulole kuti adzalandire chifundo kwa Ambuye pa tsiku lijalo! Ukudziwa bwino momwe iye anandithandizira mʼnjira zosiyanasiyana ku Efeso.
2Timothy2:1 Tsono iwe
2Timothy2:2 Ndipo zinthu zimene unamva ine ndikuziyankhula pamaso pa mboni zambiri
2Timothy2:3 Umve nane zowawa
2Timothy2:4 Palibe msilikali amene ali pa ntchito amagwiranso ntchito za anthu wamba
2Timothy2:5 Chimodzimodzinso
2Timothy2:6 Mlimi wolimbika ndi amene amayembekezereka kukhala woyambirira kulandira gawo la zokolola.
2Timothy2:7 Lingalira zimene ndikunenazi
2Timothy2:8 Kumbukira Yesu Khristu wochokera ku mtundu wa Davide kuti anauka kwa akufa. Uwu ndiye uthenga wanga wabwino
2Timothy2:9 umene ndikuwuvutikira choterewu mpaka kumangidwa ndi maunyolo ngati wakuba. Koma mawu a Mulungu sanamangidwe ndi maunyolo.
2Timothy2:10 Choncho ndikupirira chilichonse chifukwa cha osankhidwa
2Timothy2:11 Mawu oyenera kuwadalira ndi awa: Ngati ife tinafa naye pamodzi
2Timothy2:12 Ngati tinapirira
2Timothy2:13 Ngati ndife osakhulupirika
2Timothy2:14 Uziwakumbutsa anthu a Mulungu zinthu izi. Uwachenjeze pamaso pa Mulungu kuti asamakangane pa za mawu. Zimenezi nʼzopanda phindu ndipo zimangowononga amene akumvawo.
2Timothy2:15 Uyesetse kukhala wovomerezeka pamaso pa Mulungu monga wantchito wopanda chifukwa chochitira manyazi amene amalalikira mawu achoonadi molondola.
2Timothy2:16 Upewe nkhani zopanda pake
2Timothy2:17 Chiphunzitso chawo chidzafalikira ngati chilonda. Mwa anthuwa muli Humenayo ndi Fileto.
2Timothy2:18 Iwowa apatuka pa choonadi. Iwo amaphunzitsa kuti kuuka kwa akufa kunachitika kale
2Timothy2:19 Komabe maziko olimba
2Timothy2:20 Mʼnyumba yayikulu simukhala ziwiya zagolide ndi zasiliva zokha
2Timothy2:21 Munthu akadziyeretsa nʼkusiya ntchito za wambazi
2Timothy2:22 Thawa zilakolako zoyipa zachinyamata. Funafuna chilungamo
2Timothy2:23 Ukane matsutsano oyipa ndi opusa
2Timothy2:24 Ndiponso mtumiki wa Ambuye asamakangane ndi anthu
2Timothy2:25 Otsutsana naye awalangize mofatsa
2Timothy2:26 Motero nzeru zawo zidzabweramo
2Timothy3:1 Koma dziwa izi: Mʼmasiku otsiriza kudzafika nthawi zoopsa kwambiri.
2Timothy3:2 Anthu adzakhala odzikonda
2Timothy3:3 Adzakhala wopanda chikondi
2Timothy3:4 opereka anzawo kwa adani awo
2Timothy3:5 Adzakhala ndi maonekedwe achipembedzo koma mphamvu yake ndi kumayikana. Anthu amenewa uziwapewa.
2Timothy3:6 Iwowa ndi anthu aja amene amayendayenda mʼmakomo a anthu nʼkumanyenga akazi ofowoka mʼmaganizo
2Timothy3:7 amaphunzira nthawi zonse koma samatha kuzindikira choonadi.
2Timothy3:8 Monga momwe Yanesi ndi Yambere anawukira Mose
2Timothy3:9 Koma sadzapita nazo patali kwambiri zimenezi
2Timothy3:10 Tsono iwe
2Timothy3:11 mazunzo anga
2Timothy3:12 Kunena zoona
2Timothy3:13 pomwe anthu oyipa ndi onyenga adzanka nayipirayipira
2Timothy3:14 Koma iwe pitiriza zimene waziphunzira ndi kuzivomereza
2Timothy3:15 Kuyambira uli wamngʼono wakhala ukudziwa Malemba Oyera
2Timothy3:16 Malemba onse anawalembetsa ndi Mulungu
2Timothy3:17 kuti munthu wa Mulungu akonzekere bwino lomwe kugwira ntchito iliyonse yabwino.
2Timothy4:1 Pamaso pa Mulungu ndi pamaso pa Khristu Yesu
2Timothy4:2 Lalikira Mawu; khala wokonzeka pa nthawi yake
2Timothy4:3 Pakuti idzafika nthawi imene anthu adzakana chiphunzitso choona. Mʼmalo mwake
2Timothy4:4 Sadzafuna kumva choona koma adzafuna kumva nthano chabe.
2Timothy4:5 Koma iwe
2Timothy4:6 Pakuti moyo wanga wayamba kale kuthiridwa ngati nsembe
2Timothy4:7 Ndamenya nkhondo yabwino
2Timothy4:8 Tsopano mphotho yanga ikundidikira imene ndi chipewa cha chilungamo
2Timothy4:9 Uyesetse kubwera kuno msanga.
2Timothy4:10 Paja Dema anandisiya chifukwa chokonda dziko lapansi lino
2Timothy4:11 Ndatsala ndi Luka yekha basi. Mutenge Marko ndipo ubwere naye kuno
2Timothy4:12 Ndatumiza Tukiko ku Efeso.
2Timothy4:13 Pobwera
2Timothy4:14 Alekisandro
2Timothy4:15 Iwenso ukhale naye tcheru chifukwa anatsutsa kwambiri uthenga wathu.
2Timothy4:16 Podziteteza koyamba pa mlandu wanga
2Timothy4:17 Koma Ambuye anayima nane limodzi
2Timothy4:18 Ambuye adzandilanditsa ku chilichonse chofuna kundichita choyipa ndipo adzandisamalira bwino mpaka kundilowetsa chonse mu ufumu wake wakumwamba. Kwa Iye kukhale ulemerero mpaka muyaya.
2Timothy4:19 Pereka moni kwa Prisila ndi Akura pamodzi ndi banja lonse la Onesiforo.
2Timothy4:20 Erasto anatsalira ku Korinto. Trofimo ndinamusiya akudwala ku Mileto.
2Timothy4:21 Uyesetse kubwera kuno nthawi yozizira isanafike. Eubulo akupereka moni
2Timothy4:22 Ambuye akhale ndi mzimu wako. Chisomo chikhale ndi inu nonse.
Titus1:1 Ndine Paulo
Titus1:2 ndi kuwapatsa chiyembekezo cha moyo wosatha
Titus1:3 Pa nthawi yake Mulungu
Titus1:4 Kwa Tito
Titus1:5 Ndinakusiya ku Krete kuti ulongosole zonse zimene ndinazisiya zisanathe ndiponso usankhe akulu ampingo mʼmizinda yonse
Titus1:6 Mkulu wampingo akhale munthu wopanda cholakwa
Titus1:7 Popeza mkulu wa mpingo amayendetsa ntchito za banja la Mulungu
Titus1:8 Koma akhale wosamala bwino alendo
Titus1:9 Iye ayenera kugwiritsa mawu okhulupirika monga tinaphunzitsira
Titus1:10 Paja pali anthu ambiri osaweruzika
Titus1:11 Ayenera kuletsedwa kuyankhula chifukwa akusokoneza mabanja athunthu pophunzitsa zinthu zomwe sayenera kuwaphunzitsa. Iwo amachita izi kuti apeze ndalama mwachinyengo.
Titus1:12 Mneneri wina
Titus1:13 Mawu amenewa ndi woona. Nʼchifukwa chake
Titus1:14 kuti asasamalenso nthano za Chiyuda
Titus1:15 Kwa oyera mtima
Titus1:16 Iwo amati amadziwa Mulungu
Titus2:1 Koma iwe uziphunzitsa zogwirizana ndi chiphunzitso choona.
Titus2:2 Phunzitsa amuna achikulire kuti akhale osaledzera
Titus2:3 Chimodzimodzinso
Titus2:4 Tsono atha kulangiza amayi achichepere kukonda amuna awo ndi ana awo.
Titus2:5 Kuwaphunzitsa kukhala odziletsa ndi oyera mtima
Titus2:6 Momwemonso
Titus2:7 Pa zonse iwe mwini ukhale chitsanzo pa ntchito zabwino. Pa chiphunzitso chako uwonetsa kuona mtima ndi kutsimikiza mtima kwako.
Titus2:8 Phunzitsa choonadi kuti anthu asapeze chokutsutsa
Titus2:9 Phunzitsa akapolo kuti azigonjera ambuye awo mu zinthu zonse ndi kuwakondweretsa. Asamatsutsane nawo
Titus2:10 kapena kumawabera
Titus2:11 Pakuti chisomo cha Mulungu chimene chimapulumutsa chaonekera kwa anthu onse.
Titus2:12 Chisomo chimatiphunzitsa kukana moyo osalemekeza Mulungu komanso zilakolako za dziko lapansi. Ndipo chimatiphunzitsa kukhala moyo odziletsa
Titus2:13 pamene tikudikira chiyembekezo chodala; kuonekera kwa ulemerero wa Mulungu wathu wamkulu ndi Mpulumutsi
Titus2:14 amene anadzipereka yekha chifukwa cha ife kutiwombola ku zoyipa zonse ndi kudziyeretsera yekha anthu amene ndi akeake
Titus2:15 Tsono zimenezi ndi zinthu zomwe uyenera kuphunzitsa. Uziwalimbikitsa anthu ndi kuwatsutsa komwe. Uzichita zimenezi ndi ulamuliro wonse. Wina aliyense asakupeputse ayi.
Titus3:1 Uwakumbutse anthu kuti azigonjera oweruza ndi olamulira
Titus3:2 Asamachitire chipongwe aliyense
Titus3:3 Nthawi ina tinali opusa
Titus3:4 Koma kukoma mtima ndi chikondi cha Mulungu Mpulumutsi wathu chitaonekera
Titus3:5 Iye anatipulumutsa
Titus3:6 amene anatipatsa mowolowamanja kudzera mwa Yesu Khristu Mpulumutsi wathu
Titus3:7 kuti titalungamitsidwa mwachisomo chake
Titus3:8 Mawuwa ndi okhulupirika ndipo ine ndikufuna kuti iwe utsindike zinthu izi
Titus3:9 Koma upewe kufufuzafufuza zopusa
Titus3:10 Munthu woyambitsa mipatuko umuchenjeze koyamba
Titus3:11 Iwe udziwe kuti munthu wotero ngosokoneza ndi wochimwa
Titus3:12 Ndikadzamutuma Artema kapena Tukiko kwanuko
Titus3:13 Uyesetse chilichonse ungathe kuthandiza Zena katswiri wa malamulo ndi Apolo
Titus3:14 Anthu athu aphunzire kudzipereka pogwira ntchito zabwino
Titus3:15 Onse amene ali ndi ine akupereka moni. Upereke moni kwa amene amatikonda ife mʼchikhulupiriro. Chisomo chikhale ndi inu nonse.
Philemon1:1 Kuchokera kwa Paulo
Philemon1:2 Kwa Apiya mlongo wathu
Philemon1:3 Chisomo ndi mtendere zochokera kwa Mulungu Atate athu ndi Ambuye Yesu Khristu zikhale ndi inu.
Philemon1:4 Ine ndimayamika Mulungu wanga nthawi zonse ndikakukumbukira iwe mʼmapemphero anga.
Philemon1:5 Pakuti ndamva za chikondi chako
Philemon1:6 Ine ndikupemphera kuti mgwirizano wako ndi ife mʼchikhulupiriro ukhale opindulitsa pozamitsa nzeru zako zozindikira zinthu zilizonse zabwino zimene timagawana chifukwa cha Khristu.
Philemon1:7 Mʼbale
Philemon1:8 Tsopano ngakhale kuti mwa Khristu nditha kulimba mtima ndi kulamulira kuti uchite zimene uyenera kuchita
Philemon1:9 komabe ndikupempha mwachikondi. Ine Paulo
Philemon1:10 ndikukupempha chifukwa cha mwana wanga Onesimo
Philemon1:11 Anali wopanda phindu kwa iwe
Philemon1:12 Ine ndikumutumizanso kwa iwe tsopano
Philemon1:13 Ndikanakonda ndikanakhala naye kuno kuti iyeyo azinditumikira mʼmalo mwako pamene ndili mu unyolo chifukwa cha Uthenga Wabwino.
Philemon1:14 Koma sindikufuna kuchita kanthu osakufunsa
Philemon1:15 Mwina chifukwa chimene unasiyana naye kwa kanthawi ndi chakuti ukhale nayenso nthawi zonse.
Philemon1:16 Osati ngati kapolo
Philemon1:17 Tsono ngati umati ndine mnzako
Philemon1:18 Ngati anakulakwira kapena kukongola kanthu kalikonse
Philemon1:19 Ine
Philemon1:20 Mʼbale
Philemon1:21 Ine ndili ndi chitsimikizo cha kumvera kwako pamene ndikukulembera kalatayi. Ndikulemba ndikudziwa kuti udzachita ngakhale kuposa zimene ndakupemphazi.
Philemon1:22 Chinthu chinanso ndi ichi: undikonzere malo
Philemon1:23 Epafra
Philemon1:24 Atumiki anzanga awa
Philemon1:25 Chisomo cha Ambuye Yesu Khristu chikhale ndi mzimu wako.
Hebrews1:1 Kale lija Mulungu ankayankhula ndi makolo athu pa nthawi zosiyanasiyana ndiponso mwa njira zosiyanasiyana kudzera mwa aneneri.
Hebrews1:2 Koma masiku otsiriza ano
Hebrews1:3 Mwanayo ndiye kuwala kwa ulemerero wa Mulungu
Hebrews1:4 Mwanayu ndi wamkulu koposa angelo
Hebrews1:5 Kodi ndi kwa mngelo uti
Hebrews1:6 Pamene Mulungu amatuma Mwana wake woyamba kubadwa ku dziko lapansi anati
Hebrews1:7 Iye ponena za angelo akuti
Hebrews1:8 Koma za Mwana wake akuti
Hebrews1:9 Mwakonda chilungamo ndi kudana ndi zoyipa; Nʼchifukwa chake
Hebrews1:10 Mulungu akutinso
Hebrews1:11 Zimenezi zidzatha
Hebrews1:12 Mudzazipindapinda ngati chofunda; ndipo zidzasinthidwa ngati chovala. Koma Inu simudzasintha
Hebrews1:13 Kodi ndi kwa Mngelo uti kumene Mulungu ananenapo kuti
Hebrews1:14 Kodi angelo onse si mizimu yotumikira odzalandira chipulumutso?
Hebrews2:1 Nʼchifukwa chake
Hebrews2:2 Popeza uthenga umene unayankhulidwa kudzera mwa angelo unali okhazikika ndithu
Hebrews2:3 Nanga ife tidzapulumuka bwanji tikapanda kusamala chipulumutso chachikulu chotere? Ambuye ndiye anayamba kuyankhula za chipulumutsochi
Hebrews2:4 Mulungu anachitiranso umboni pochita zizindikiro
Hebrews2:5 Mulungu sanapereke kwa angelo ulamuliro wa dziko limene likubwerali
Hebrews2:6 Koma palipo pena pamene wina anachitira umboni kuti
Hebrews2:7 Munamuchepetsa pangʼono kusiyana ndi angelo; munamupatsa ulemerero ndi ulemu.
Hebrews2:8 Munamupatsa ulamuliro pa zinthu zonse.” Poyika zinthu zonse pansi pa ulamuliro wake
Hebrews2:9 Koma tikuona Yesu
Hebrews2:10 Mulungu amene analenga zinthu zonse ndipo zinthu zonse zilipo chifukwa cha Iye ndi mwa Iye
Hebrews2:11 Popeza iye amene ayeretsa ndi oyeresedwa onse ndi abanja limodzi. Nʼchifukwa chake Yesu sachita manyazi kuwatcha iwo abale ake.
Hebrews2:12 Iye akuti
Hebrews2:13 Ndiponso
Hebrews2:14 Tsono popeza kuti anawo ndi anthu
Hebrews2:15 Pakuti ndi njira yokhayi imene Iye angamasule amene pa moyo wawo wonse anali ngati akapolo chifukwa choopa imfa.
Hebrews2:16 Pakuti tikudziwanso kuti sathandiza angelo
Hebrews2:17 Chifukwa cha zimenezi
Hebrews2:18 Popeza Iye mwini anamva zowawa pamene anayesedwa
Hebrews3:1 Nʼchifukwa chake abale oyera mtima
Hebrews3:2 Iye anali wokhulupirika kwa Mulungu amene anamupatsa udindowo
Hebrews3:3 Yesu anapezeka woyenera kulandira ulemu waukulu kuposa Mose
Hebrews3:4 Pakuti nyumba iliyonse imamangidwa ndi munthu wina
Hebrews3:5 Mose anali wokhulupirika monga mtumiki mʼnyumba yonse ya Mulungu
Hebrews3:6 Koma Khristu ndi wokhulupirika monga mwana pa nyumba ya Mulungu. Ndipo ndife nyumba yake ngati tipitirire kulimbika mtima ndi kunyadira zomwe tikuyembekerazo.
Hebrews3:7 Tsono monga Mzimu Woyera akuti
Hebrews3:8 musawumitse mitima yanu ngati munachitira pamene munawukira
Hebrews3:9 Pamene makolo anu anandiputa ndi kundiyesa
Hebrews3:10 Nʼchifukwa chake ndinawukwiyira mʼbadowo
Hebrews3:11 Kotero Ine ndinalumbira nditakwiya kuti
Hebrews3:12 Abale samalani
Hebrews3:13 Koma muzilimbikitsana tsiku ndi tsiku
Hebrews3:14 Pakuti timakhala anzake a Khristu
Hebrews3:15 Monga kunanenedwa kuti
Hebrews3:16 Nanga amene anamva ndi kuwukira anali ndani? Kodi si onse amene Mose anawatulutsa mu Igupto?
Hebrews3:17 Nanga amene Mulungu anawakwiyira zaka makumi anayi anali ndani? Kodi si anthu amene anachimwa
Hebrews3:18 Nanga Mulungu ankanena za ndani kuti sadzalowa mu mpumulo wake? Pajatu ankanena za anthu amene sanamvere aja.
Hebrews3:19 Tsono ife tikuona kuti sanalowe chifukwa cha kusakhulupirika kwawo.
Hebrews4:1 Popeza lonjezo lakuti tidzalowe mu mpumulo umene anatilonjeza lilipobe
Hebrews4:2 Pakuti Uthenga Wabwino unalalikidwa kwa ife
Hebrews4:3 Tsono ife amene takhulupirira talowa mu mpumulo
Hebrews4:4 Pena pake wayankhula za tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri mʼmawu awa: “Pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri
Hebrews4:5 Pa ndime inonso akunena za zomwezo pamene akuti
Hebrews4:6 Popeza kwatsalabe kuti ena adzalowe mu mpumulowo
Hebrews4:7 Nʼchifukwa chake Mulungu anayikanso tsiku lina limene analitcha “Lero.” Patapita nthawi yayitali Iye anayankhula za tsiku lomweli kudzera mwa Davide
Hebrews4:8 Ngati Yoswa akanalowetsa anthu mu mpumulo
Hebrews4:9 Kotero tsono kwatsala mpumulo wa Sabata kwa anthu a Mulungu;
Hebrews4:10 Pakuti aliyense amene analowa mu mpumulo wa Mulungu anapuma pa ntchito zake
Hebrews4:11 Tiyeni tsono tiyesetse kulowa mu mpumulo
Hebrews4:12 Paja Mawu a Mulungu ndi amoyo ndi amphamvu. Ndi akuthwa koposa lupanga lakuthwa konsekonse. Amalowa mpaka molumikizirana moyo ndi mzimu
Hebrews4:13 Palibe kanthu kobisika pamaso pa Mulungu. Zinthu zonse zili poyera ndi zovundukuka pamaso pa Iye amene tiyenera kumufotokozera zonse zimene tachita.
Hebrews4:14 Popeza kuti tili ndi Mkulu wa ansembe wopambana
Hebrews4:15 Pakuti sitili ndi Mkulu wa ansembe amene sangathe kutimvera chifundo chifukwa cha zofowoka zathu. Koma tili naye amene anayesedwa mʼnjira zonse monga ife
Hebrews4:16 Tiyeni tsono tiyandikire ku mpando waufumu
Hebrews5:1 Mkulu wa ansembe aliyense amasankhidwa kuchokera pakati pa anthu ndipo amayikidwa kuti aziwayimirira pamaso pa Mulungu
Hebrews5:2 Popeza kuti iye mwini ali ndi zofowoka zake
Hebrews5:3 Chifukwa cha ichi
Hebrews5:4 Palibe amene amadzipatsa yekha ulemu wotere
Hebrews5:5 Nʼchifukwa chake Khristu sanadzipatse yekha ulemu wokhala Mkulu wa ansembe. Koma Mulungu anamuwuza kuti
Hebrews5:6 Ndipo penanso anati
Hebrews5:7 Yesu
Hebrews5:8 Ngakhale Iye anali Mwana wa Mulungu anaphunzira kumvera pomva zowawa.
Hebrews5:9 Atasanduka wangwiro kotheratu
Hebrews5:10 Ndipo Mulungu anamuyika kukhala Mkulu wa ansembe
Hebrews5:11 Tili ndi zambiri zoti tinganene pa zimenezi
Hebrews5:12 Ngakhale kuti pa nthawi ino munayenera kukhala aphunzitsi
Hebrews5:13 Aliyense amene amangodya mkaka okha
Hebrews5:14 Koma chakudya cholimba ndi cha anthu okhwima msinkhu
Hebrews6:1 Tsono tiyeni tisangoyima pa maphunziro oyambirira enieni a Khristu koma tipitirire kuti mukule msinkhu. Tisaphunzitsenso zinthu zomwe zili ngati maziko
Hebrews6:2 za maubatizo
Hebrews6:3 Ndipo Mulungu akalola
Hebrews6:4 Nʼkosatheka kuwabwezanso anthu amene nthawi ina anawunikiridwa. Iwowa analawapo mphatso yochokera kumwamba
Hebrews6:5 Analawa kukoma kwa mawu a Mulungu ndi mphamvu za nthawi ikubwera.
Hebrews6:6 Popeza anabwerera mʼmbuyo
Hebrews6:7 Nthaka yolandira mvula kawirikawiri nʼkubala mbewu zopindulitsa oyilima
Hebrews6:8 Koma nthaka yobereka minga ndi nthula ndi yopanda phindu ndipo ili pafupi kutembereredwa. Matsiriziro ake idzatenthedwa mʼmoto.
Hebrews6:9 Okondedwa anga
Hebrews6:10 Mulungu ndi wolungama
Hebrews6:11 Ife tikufuna kuti aliyense wa inu aonetse changu chomwechi mpaka kumapeto
Hebrews6:12 Ife sitikufuna kuti inu mukhale aulesi
Hebrews6:13 Pamene Mulungu ankamulonjeza Abrahamu
Hebrews6:14 “Ine ndidzakudalitsa ndithu
Hebrews6:15 Ndipo Abrahamu atayembekezera mofatsa
Hebrews6:16 Anthu amalumbira mʼdzina la wina amene akuwaposa
Hebrews6:17 Momwemonso Mulungu pofuna kutsimikizira anthu amene adzalandire lonjezo
Hebrews6:18 Mulungu anachita zinthu ziwiri
Hebrews6:19 Chiyembekezo chimenechi tili nacho ngati nangula wa moyo wathu. Nʼchokhazikika ndi chosagwedezeka ndipo chimalowa mʼkatikati mwa malo opatulika
Hebrews6:20 Yesu anatitsogolera kupita kumeneko
Hebrews7:1 Melikizedeki ameneyu anali mfumu ya ku Salemu
Hebrews7:2 Ndipo Abrahamu anamupatsa chakhumi cha zonse anafunkha. Choyamba dzina la Melikizedeki likutanthauza
Hebrews7:3 Alibe abambo kapena mayi
Hebrews7:4 Mukuona tsono kuti munthuyo anali wamkulu ndithu
Hebrews7:5 Tsono lamulo likuti
Hebrews7:6 Melikizedeki sanali wochokera kwa Levi
Hebrews7:7 Mosakayika konse
Hebrews7:8 Ansembe amene amalandira chakhumi amafa
Hebrews7:9 Wina angathe kunena kuti Levi
Hebrews7:10 chifukwa pamene Melikizedeki anakumana ndi Abrahamu nʼkuti Levi ali mʼthupi la kholo lake.
Hebrews7:11 Kukanatheka kukhala wangwiro mwa unsembe wa Levi
Hebrews7:12 Pakuti pamene unsembe usintha
Hebrews7:13 Ambuye athu Yesu
Hebrews7:14 Pakuti nʼzodziwika bwino kuti Ambuye athu anachokera fuko la Yuda. Kunena za fuko limeneli
Hebrews7:15 Ndipo zimene tanenazi zimamveka bwino ngati tiona kuti pafika wansembe wina wofanana ndi Melikizedeki.
Hebrews7:16 Yesu sanakhale wansembe chifukwa cha malamulo monga mwa mabadwidwe ake koma mwamphamvu ya moyo wosatha.
Hebrews7:17 Pakuti Mulungu anamuchitira umboni kuti
Hebrews7:18 Choncho lamulo loyamba lachotsedwa chifukwa linali lofowoka ndi lopanda phindu.
Hebrews7:19 Tsono Malamulo sangathe kusandutsa chilichonse kukhala changwiro
Hebrews7:20 Izi sizinachitiketu wopanda lumbiro. Ena ankakhala ansembe popanda lumbiro.
Hebrews7:21 Koma Yesu ankakhala wansembe ndi lumbiro pamene Mulungu anati
Hebrews7:22 Chifukwa cha lumbiroli
Hebrews7:23 Tsono ansembe akale aja analipo ambiri
Hebrews7:24 Koma Yesu popeza ndi wamuyaya
Hebrews7:25 Chifukwa chake Iye amapulumutsa kwathunthu amene amabwera kwa Mulungu kudzera mwa Iyeyo. Iye ali ndi moyo nthawi zonse kuti adziwapempherera iwo.
Hebrews7:26 Uyu ndi Mkulu wa ansembe amene tikumufuna chifukwa ndi woyera
Hebrews7:27 Kusiyana ndi akulu a ansembe ena aja
Hebrews7:28 Pakuti lamulo limasankha anthu amene ndi ofowoka kukhala akulu a ansembe; koma lumbiro
Hebrews8:1 Fundo yayikulu pa zimene tikunenazi ndi iyi: Tili naye ife Mkulu wa ansembe
Hebrews8:2 Ndipo akutumikira mʼmalo opatulika
Hebrews8:3 Mkulu wa ansembe aliyense amasankhidwa kuti azipereka mphatso ndi nsembe kwa Mulungu
Hebrews8:4 Ngati iye akanakhala pa dziko lapansi
Hebrews8:5 Iwo amatumikira pamalo opatulika amene ndi chithunzi ndi chifanizo cha zimene zili kumwamba. Ichi ndi chifukwa chake Mose anachenjezedwa pamene anali pafupi kumanga Tenti: “Uwonetsetse kuti wapanga zonse monga momwe ndikukuonetsera pa phiri pano.”
Hebrews8:6 Koma Yesu analandira utumiki wopambana kuposa wawo monga Iyenso ali Nkhoswe ya pangano lopambana kuposa lakale lija
Hebrews8:7 Ngati pangano loyamba lija likanakhala langwiro
Hebrews8:8 Koma Mulungu anapeza zolakwika pakati pa anthu ndipo anati
Hebrews8:9 Silidzakhala ngati pangano limene ndinachita ndi makolo awo
Hebrews8:10 Tsono ili ndi pangano ndidzapangane ndi nyumba ya Israeli: Atapita masiku amenewa
Hebrews8:11 Sipadzafunikanso wina kuti aphunzitse mnzake
Hebrews8:12 Pakuti Ine ndidzawakhululukira zoyipa zawo
Hebrews8:13 Ponena kuti
Hebrews9:1 Pangano loyamba lija linali ndi malamulo okhudza chipembedzo
Hebrews9:2 Anthu ankamanga chihema. Mʼchipinda choyamba munali choyikapo nyale
Hebrews9:3 Kuseri kwa chinsalu chotchinga chachiwiri kunkatchedwa Malo Opatulika kwambiri.
Hebrews9:4 Mʼmenemo munali guwa lansembe lagolide lofukizirapo lubani. Munalinso Bokosi la Chipangano lokutidwa ndi golide. Mʼbokosimo munali mʼphika wagolide mʼmene ankasungiramo mana ndi ndodo ya Aaroni imene inaphuka ija
Hebrews9:5 Pamwamba pa bokosilo panali zifanizo za angelo otchedwa akerubi aulemerero
Hebrews9:6 Zinthu zonsezi zitakonzedwa
Hebrews9:7 Koma Mkulu wa ansembe yekha ndiye ankalowa chipinda chachiwiri chija kamodzi kokha pa chaka. Iye sankalowamo wopanda magazi. Magaziwo ankapereka nsembe kwa Mulungu chifukwa cha iye mwini ndiponso chifukwa cha machimo a anthu amene ankachita mosazindikira.
Hebrews9:8 Mwa njira imeneyi Mzimu Woyera ankaonetsa kuti njira yolowera ku malo opatulika inali isanaonetsedwe pamene Chihema choyamba chinali chilipo.
Hebrews9:9 Zimenezi nʼzofanizira chabe
Hebrews9:10 Inali nkhani ya zakudya
Hebrews9:11 Koma Khristu atafika monga Mkulu wa ansembe wa zinthu zokoma zimene zilipo tsopano
Hebrews9:12 Iye sanalowemo ndi magazi ambuzi yayimuna
Hebrews9:13 Ngati magazi ambuzi yayimuna
Hebrews9:14 nʼkoposa kotani magazi a Khristu
Hebrews9:15 Pa chifukwa chimenechi Khristu ndi mʼkhalapakati wa pangano latsopano
Hebrews9:16 Ngati munthu alemba pangano losiyira ena chuma
Hebrews9:17 chifukwa pangano lotere limakhala ndi mphamvu ngati wolembayo wamwalira. Siligwira ntchito pamene wolembayo ali ndi moyo.
Hebrews9:18 Nʼchifukwa chake pangano loyamba lija silinachitike popanda kukhetsa magazi.
Hebrews9:19 Mose atawawuza anthu onse malamulo
Hebrews9:20 Iye anati
Hebrews9:21 Momwemonso Mose anawaza magazi pa Chihema chija ndiponso pa zipangizo zonse zogwiritsa ntchito pa chipembedzo.
Hebrews9:22 Monga mwa malamulo titha kunena kuti
Hebrews9:23 Tsono panafunika kuti zinthu zingofanizira zenizeni za kumwamba
Hebrews9:24 Pakuti Khristu sanalowe mʼmalo opatulika omangidwa ndi anthu amene anali chifaniziro cha malo enieniwo. Iye analowa kumwamba kwenikweniko kuti azionekera pamaso pa Mulungu chifukwa cha ife.
Hebrews9:25 Iye sanalowe kumwamba kuti azikadziperekanso nsembe kachiwiri monga momwe mkulu wa ansembe ankachitira chaka ndi chaka ku Malo Opatulika kwambiri ndi magazi amene sanali ake.
Hebrews9:26 Zikanatero bwenzi Khristu atamva zowawa kambirimbiri chilengedwere cha dziko lapansi. Koma tsopano anaoneka kamodzi kokha chifukwa cha onse pa nthawi yotsiriza kuti achotse tchimo podzipereka yekha nsembe.
Hebrews9:27 Popeza kunayikika kwa munthu kufa kamodzi ndipo kenaka kuweruzidwa
Hebrews9:28 momwemonso Khristu anadzipereka nsembe kamodzi kokha kuchotsa machimo a anthu ambiri. Ndipo Iye adzaonekanso kachiwiri
Hebrews10:1 Malamulo ndi chithunzithunzi cha zinthu zabwino zimene zikubwera
Hebrews10:2 Ngati zikanamatero iwowo akanasiya kupereka nsembezo. Pakuti opembedzawo akanamayeretsedwa kamodzi kokha
Hebrews10:3 Koma nsembezo zimawakumbutsa anthuwo machimo awo chaka ndi chaka.
Hebrews10:4 Chifukwa nʼkosatheka kuti magazi angʼombe yayimuna ndi mbuzi yayimuna achotse machimo.
Hebrews10:5 Nʼchifukwa chake Khristu atabwera pa dziko lapansi anati
Hebrews10:6 Simunakondwere nazo nsembe zopsereza ndi nsembe zopereka chifukwa cha tchimo.
Hebrews10:7 Tsono
Hebrews10:8 Poyamba Iye anati
Hebrews10:9 Pamenepo Iye anati
Hebrews10:10 Chifukwa chakuti Yesu Khristu anachita zimene Mulungu anafuna kuti achite
Hebrews10:11 Wansembe aliyense amayimirira tsiku ndi tsiku nʼkutumikira
Hebrews10:12 Koma pamene wansembe uyu anapereka kamodzi kokha nsembe imodzi yokha chifukwa cha machimo
Hebrews10:13 Kumeneko akudikira tsono kuti Mulungu asandutse adani ake kukhala chopondapo mapazi ake.
Hebrews10:14 Chifukwa cha nsembe imodzi Iye anasandutsa angwiro kwamuyaya iwo amene akuwayeretsa.
Hebrews10:15 Mzimu Woyera nayenso akuchitira umboni za zimenezi kwa ife. Poyamba Iye anati
Hebrews10:16 “Ili ndi pangano limene ndidzachita nawo atapita masiku amenewo
Hebrews10:17 Ndipo akutinso: “Sindidzakumbukiranso konse machimo awo ndi zolakwa zawo.”
Hebrews10:18 Ndipo pamene machimo akhululukidwa
Hebrews10:19 Ndipo tsono abale
Hebrews10:20 Iye anatitsekulira njira yatsopano ndi yamoyo kudutsa chinsalu chotchinga
Hebrews10:21 Ndiponso tili ndi wansembe wamkulu woyangʼanira nyumba ya Mulungu.
Hebrews10:22 Tsono tiyeni tiyandikire kwa Mulungu ndi mtima woona ndi wodzaza ndi chikhulupiriro. Popeza mitima yathu yayeretsedwa
Hebrews10:23 Tiyeni tigwiritsitse mosagwedezeka zimene timaziyembekezera ndi kuzivomereza
Hebrews10:24 Tiziganizira mmene tingalimbikitsirane wina ndi mnzake pokondana ndi kuchita ntchito zabwino.
Hebrews10:25 Tiyeni tisaleke kusonkhana kwathu pamodzi monga mmene ena amachitira
Hebrews10:26 Ngati ife tipitirira kuchimwa mwadala pamene tikudziwa choona
Hebrews10:27 Koma kumangodikira kokha ndi mantha chiweruzo ndiponso moto woopsa umene udzawononga adani a Mulungu
Hebrews10:28 Aliyense amene amakana malamulo a Mose amaphedwa popanda nʼchifundo chomwe
Hebrews10:29 Koposa kotani nanga ululu wachilango chimene adzalandire munthu amene amapeputsa Mwana wa Mulungu
Hebrews10:30 Pakuti timadziwa amene anati
Hebrews10:31 Nʼchinthu choopsa kugwa mʼmanja a Mulungu wamoyo.
Hebrews10:32 Kumbukirani masiku akale aja mutangowunikiridwa chatsopano
Hebrews10:33 Nthawi zina ankakunyozani pagulu ndi kukuzunzani. Nthawi zina munkamva zowawa pamodzi ndi amene ankasautsidwa chotere.
Hebrews10:34 Munkawamvera chisoni amene anali mʼndende ndiponso munkalola mokondwera kuti akulandeni katundu wanu chifukwa munkadziwa kuti muli nacho chuma choposa ndi chosatha.
Hebrews10:35 Tsono musataye kulimbika mtima kwanuko pakuti mudzalandira nako mphotho yayikulu.
Hebrews10:36 Nʼkofunika kuti mupirire kuti pamene muchita chifuniro cha Mulungu mudzalandire zimene Iye analonjeza.
Hebrews10:37 Pakuti nʼkanthawi kochepa chabe
Hebrews10:38 Koma wolungama wangayo adzakhala ndi moyo mwachikhulupiriro. Ndipo ngati iye abwerera mʼmbuyo chifukwa cha mantha
Hebrews10:39 Koma ife sindife amodzi a iwo obwerera mʼmbuyo mwa mantha ndi owonongedwa
Hebrews11:1 Tsopano chikhulupiriro ndi kusakayika konse pa zinthu zimene tikuziyembekeza
Hebrews11:2 Ndi chikhulupiriro chimenechi makolo athu akale anayamikidwa.
Hebrews11:3 Ndi chikhulupiriro timazindikira kuti dziko lapansi ndi la mmwamba zinapangidwa ndi Mawu a Mulungu
Hebrews11:4 Ndi chikhulupiriro Abele anapereka kwa Mulungu nsembe yoposa imene Kaini anapereka. Ndi chikhulupiriro anatchedwa munthu wolungama Mulungu atayamikira zopereka zake. Ngakhale iye anafa
Hebrews11:5 Ndi chikhulupiriro Enoki anatengedwa wamoyo
Hebrews11:6 Ndipo popanda chikhulupiriro nʼkosatheka kukondweretsa Mulungu
Hebrews11:7 Ndi chikhulupiriro
Hebrews11:8 Ndi chikhulupiriro Abrahamu atayitanidwa kuti apite ku dziko limene anamulonjeza kuti lidzakhala lake
Hebrews11:9 Ndi chikhulupiriro chomwecho anakhala ngati mlendo mʼdziko lija limene Mulungu anamulonjeza. Anakhala mʼmatenti monganso anachitira Isake ndi Yakobo
Hebrews11:10 Pakuti amadikira mudzi wokhala ndi maziko
Hebrews11:11 Ndi chikhulupiriro Sara analandira mphamvu zokhala ndi pakati ngakhale kuti zaka zake zobala mwana zinali zitapita kale
Hebrews11:12 Nʼchifukwa chake mwa munthu mmodzi
Hebrews11:13 Onsewa anakhalabe mwachikhulupiriro mpaka anafa. Iwo sanalandire zimene Mulungu anawalonjeza; iwo anangozionera chapatali ndi kuzilandira. Ndipo iwo anavomereza kuti analidi alendo ndi osakhazikika pa dziko lapansi.
Hebrews11:14 Anthu amene amanena zinthu zotere amaonekeratu kuti akufuna dziko lawo lenileni.
Hebrews11:15 Akanakhala kuti akuganizira za dziko limene analisiya akanapeza mpata obwerera kwawo.
Hebrews11:16 Mʼmalo mwake
Hebrews11:17 Ndi chikhulupiriro Abrahamu
Hebrews11:18 Za mwana ameneyu Mulungu anamuwuza iye kuti
Hebrews11:19 Abrahamu amazindikira kuti Mulungu angathe kuukitsa akufa
Hebrews11:20 Ndi chikhulupiriro Isake anadalitsa Yakobo ndi Esau pa zatsogolo lawo.
Hebrews11:21 Ndi chikhulupiriro
Hebrews11:22 Ndi chikhulupiriro Yosefe ali pafupi kumwalira anayankhula za kutuluka kwa Aisraeli mu Igupto ndipo anawawuza zoti adzachite ndi mafupa ake.
Hebrews11:23 Ndi chikhulupiriro Mose atabadwa makolo ake anamubisa miyezi itatu
Hebrews11:24 Ndi chikhulupiriro Mose atakula
Hebrews11:25 Iye anasankha kuzunzika nawo limodzi anthu a Mulungu kuposa kusangalala ndi zokondweretsa za uchimo kwa nthawi yochepa.
Hebrews11:26 Anaona kuti kuzunzika chifukwa cha Khristu kunali kwa mtengowapatali kuposa chuma cha ku Igupto
Hebrews11:27 Ndi chikhulupiriro anachoka ku Igupto wosaopa ukali wa mfumu. Iye anapirira chifukwa anamuona Mulungu amene ndi wosaonekayo.
Hebrews11:28 Ndi chikhulupiriro anachita Paska ndi kuwaza magazi
Hebrews11:29 Ndi chikhulupiriro Aisraeli anawoloka Nyanja Yofiira ngati pa mtunda powuma
Hebrews11:30 Ndi chikhulupiriro mpanda wa Yeriko unagwa
Hebrews11:31 Ndi chikhulupiriro Rahabe
Hebrews11:32 Kodi ndinenenso chiyani? Nthawi yandichepera yoti ndinene za Gideoni
Hebrews11:33 amene ndi chikhulupiriro anagonjetsa mafumu
Hebrews11:34 anazimitsa moto waukali
Hebrews11:35 Amayi ena analandira anthu awo amene anafa
Hebrews11:36 Ena anawaseka ndi kuwakwapula
Hebrews11:37 Anagendedwa miyala; anachekedwa pakati; ena anaphedwa ndi lupanga. Iwo anayendayenda atavala zikopa zankhosa ndi zikopa zambuzi
Hebrews11:38 Dziko lapansi silinawayenere. Anayendayenda mʼzipululu ndi mapiri
Hebrews11:39 Onsewa anayamikidwa chifukwa cha chikhulupiriro chawo
Hebrews11:40 Mulungu anatikonzera ife kanthu koposa
Hebrews12:1 Tsono popeza ifenso tazunguliridwa ndi gulu lalikulu la mboni
Hebrews12:2 Tiyeni tiyangʼanitsitse Yesu
Hebrews12:3 Muzilingalira za Iye amene anapirira udani waukulu chotere wochokera kwa anthu ochimwa
Hebrews12:4 Polimbana ndi uchimo
Hebrews12:5 Kodi mwayiwala mawu olimbitsa mtima aja
Hebrews12:6 Chifukwa Ambuye amadzudzula amene amawakonda ndipo amalanga aliyense amene amamulandira.”
Hebrews12:7 Pamene mukupirira masautso monga chilango
Hebrews12:8 Ngati inu simulangidwa
Hebrews12:9 Komanso
Hebrews12:10 Abambo athu ankatilanga kwa kanthawi kochepa monga amaonera kufunika kwake
Hebrews12:11 Palibe chilango chimene chimaoneka kuti ndi chabwino pa nthawiyo
Hebrews12:12 Nʼchifukwa chake limbitsani manja anu otopa ndi mawondo anu ogowoka.
Hebrews12:13 Muziyenda mʼnjira zowongoka
Hebrews12:14 Yesetsani kukhala pa mtendere ndi anthu onse ndi kukhala oyera mtima
Hebrews12:15 Yangʼanitsitsani kuti wina aliyense asachiphonye chisomo cha Mulungu ndiponso kuti pasaphuke muzu wamkwiyo umene udzabweretsa mavuto ndi kudetsa ambiri.
Hebrews12:16 Yangʼanitsitsani kuti pasakhale wina wachigololo. Kapena wosapembedza ngati Esau
Hebrews12:17 Monga inu mukudziwa
Hebrews12:18 Inu simunafike ku phiri limene mungathe kulikhudza
Hebrews12:19 limene pali kulira kwa lipenga
Hebrews12:20 Iwo anachita mantha ndi lamulo lija lakuti
Hebrews12:21 Maonekedwenso a Mose anali woopsa kwambiri
Hebrews12:22 Koma inu mwafika ku Phiri la Ziyoni
Hebrews12:23 Mwafika mu mpingo wa ana oyamba kubadwa
Hebrews12:24 Kwa Yesu mʼkhalapakati wa pangano latsopano
Hebrews12:25 Chenjerani kuti musakane kumvera amene akuyankhula nanu. Anthu amene anakana kumvera iye amene anawachenjeza uja pa dziko lapansi pano
Hebrews12:26 Pa nthawiyo mawu ake anagwedeza dziko lapansi
Hebrews12:27 Mawu akuti
Hebrews12:28 Popeza tikulandira ufumu umene sungagwedezeke
Hebrews12:29 Pakuti Mulungu wathu ndi moto wonyeketsa.
Hebrews13:1 Pitirizani kukondana monga abale.
Hebrews13:2 Musayiwale kusamalira alendo
Hebrews13:3 Muzikumbukira amene ali mʼndende ngati kuti inunso ndi omangidwa
Hebrews13:4 Ukwati muziwulemekeza nonse
Hebrews13:5 Mtima wanu usakonde ndalama koma mukhutitsidwe ndi zimene muli nazo
Hebrews13:6 Kotero ife tikunena molimba mtima kuti
Hebrews13:7 Muzikumbukira atsogoleri anu
Hebrews13:8 Yesu Khristu ndi yemweyo dzulo
Hebrews13:9 Musasocheretsedwe ndi ziphunzitso zosiyanasiyana zachilendo. Nʼkwabwino kuti mitima yathu ilimbikitsidwe ndi chisomo osati ndi chakudya
Hebrews13:10 Ife tili ndi guwa lansembe
Hebrews13:11 Mkulu wa ansembe amatenga magazi kukapereka nsembe chifukwa cha machimo
Hebrews13:12 Nʼchifukwa chakenso Yesu anafera kunja kwa mzinda kuti ayeretse anthu ake kudzera mʼmagazi ake.
Hebrews13:13 Tiyeni tsono
Hebrews13:14 Pakuti ife tilibe mzinda wokhazikika koma tikudikira mzinda umene ukubwera.
Hebrews13:15 Tsono
Hebrews13:16 Ndipo musayiwale kumachita zabwino ndi kuthandiza ena
Hebrews13:17 Muzimvera atsogoleri anu ndi kugonjera ulamuliro wawo
Hebrews13:18 Mutipempherere ifenso. Pakuti tikutsimikiza kuti tili ndi chikumbumtima changwiro ndipo timafuna kuchita zinthu zonse mwaulemu.
Hebrews13:19 Ine ndikukupemphani kuti mundipempherere kuti Mulungu andibwezere kwa inu msanga.
Hebrews13:20 Mulungu wamtendere
Hebrews13:21 akupatseni chilichonse chabwino kuti muchite chifuniro chake ndipo Mulungu achite mwa ife
Hebrews13:22 Ndikukupemphani abale kuti mulandire mawu anga achilimbikitso
Hebrews13:23 Ine ndikufuna kuti inu mudziwe kuti mʼbale wathu Timoteyo wamasulidwa. Ngati iye angafike msanga ndibwera naye kudzakuonani.
Hebrews13:24 Mupereke moni kwa atsogoleri anu onse ndiponso kwa anthu onse a Mulungu. Abale ochokera ku Italiya akupereka moni.
Hebrews13:25 Chisomo chikhale ndi inu nonse.
James1:1 Yakobo
James1:2 Abale
James1:3 Inu mukudziwa kuti kuyesedwa kwa chikhulupiriro chanu kumabweretsa chipiriro.
James1:4 Chipiriro chiyenera kugwira ntchito yake kuti mukhale okhwima ndi angwiro
James1:5 Ngati wina pakati panu akusowa nzeru
James1:6 Koma pamene mupempha
James1:7 Munthu wotere asayembekezere kulandira kalikonse kuchokera kwa Ambuye.
James1:8 Iyeyu ndi munthu wa mitima iwiri
James1:9 Abale omwe ndi anthu wamba anyadire pamene akwezedwa.
James1:10 Koma olemera anyadire pamene atsitsidwa
James1:11 Pakuti dzuwa limatuluka nʼkutentha kwake
James1:12 Wodala ndi munthu amene amapirira mʼmayesero
James1:13 Munthu akayesedwa asanene kuti
James1:14 Koma munthu aliyense amayesedwa akakokedwa ndi zilakolako zake zoyipa ndi kukopedwa nazo.
James1:15 Pamenepo
James1:16 Musanyengedwe abale anga okondedwa.
James1:17 Mphatso iliyonse yabwino ndi yangwiro imachokera kumwamba
James1:18 Iye anasankha kutibereka ife kudzera mʼmawu a choonadi
James1:19 Abale anga okondedwa
James1:20 Pakuti mkwiyo wa munthu subweretsa chilungamo chimene amafuna Mulungu.
James1:21 Choncho chotsani chizolowezi choyipa ndi khalidwe loyipa pakati panu
James1:22 Musamangomvetsera chabe mawu
James1:23 Munthu aliyense amene amangomva mawu koma osachita zimene mawuwo amanena
James1:24 Akadziyangʼana amachoka
James1:25 Koma munthu amene amayangʼana mwachidwi lamulo langwiro limene limapatsa ufulu ndi kupitiriza kutero
James1:26 Ngati wina amadziyesa ngati ndi wachipembedzo
James1:27 Chipembedzo chimene Mulungu Atate athu amachivomereza kuti ndi changwiro ndi chopanda zolakwika ndi ichi: kusamalira ana amasiye ndi akazi amasiye pa mavuto awo
James2:1 Abale anga
James2:2 Tangoganizirani
James2:3 Ngati musamala kwambiri munthu wovala bwinoyu uja
James2:4 kodi simunachite tsankho pakati panu ndi kukhala oweruza a maganizo oyipa?
James2:5 Tamverani abale anga okondedwa
James2:6 Koma mwakhala mukunyoza amphawi. Kodi si anthu olemerawa amene akukudyerani masuku pamutu? Si anthu amenewa amene amakukokerani ku bwalo la milandu?
James2:7 Kodi si omwewa amene amachita chipongwe dzina la wolemekezeka
James2:8 Ngati musungadi lamulo laufumu lija lopezeka mʼMalemba lakuti
James2:9 Koma mukamaonetsa tsankho mukuchimwa
James2:10 Pakuti amene amasunga Malamulo onse
James2:11 Pakuti amene anati “Usachite chigololo” ndi yemweyonso anati “Usaphe.” Ngati suchita chigololo koma umapha
James2:12 Muziyankhula ndi kuchita zinthu monga anthu amene mudzaweruzidwe ndi lamulo limene limapereka ufulu
James2:13 chifukwa munthu woweruza mopanda chifundo
James2:14 Abale anga
James2:15 Tangoganizirani
James2:16 Ngati mmodzi wa inu amuwuza kuti
James2:17 Chomwechonso
James2:18 Koma wina anganene kuti
James2:19 Mumakhulupirira kuti kuli Mulungu mmodzi yekha. Mumachita bwino. Komatu ngakhale ziwanda zimakhulupirira zimenezi ndipo zimanjenjemera ndi mantha.
James2:20 Munthu wopusa iwe
James2:21 Kodi Abrahamu kholo lathu sanatengedwe kukhala wolungama chifukwa cha zimene anachita pamene anapereka mwana wake Isake pa guwa lansembe?
James2:22 Tsono mukuona kuti chikhulupiriro chake ndi ntchito zabwino zinkachitika pamodzi
James2:23 Ndipo Malemba akunena kuti
James2:24 Tsono mukuona kuti munthu amasanduka wolungama ndi ntchito zabwino osati ndi chikhulupiriro chokha ayi.
James2:25 Nʼchimodzimodzinso
James2:26 Monga thupi lopanda mzimu ndi lakufa
James3:1 Abale anga
James3:2 Tonsefe timapunthwa mʼnjira zambiri. Ngati wina salakwa poyankhula
James3:3 Tikayika tizitsulo mʼkamwa mwa akavalo kuti atimvere
James3:4 Taonani sitima zapamadzi. Ngakhale ndi zazikulu kwambiri ndipo zimakankhidwa ndi mphepo yamphamvu
James3:5 Momwemonso
James3:6 Lilime nalonso ndi moto
James3:7 Mitundu yonse ya nyama
James3:8 koma palibe munthu amene angaweta lilime. Lilime ndipo silitha kupuma
James3:9 Ndi lilime lomwelo timatamanda Ambuye ndi Atate athu
James3:10 Mʼkamwa momwemo mutuluka matamando ndi kulalata. Abale anga
James3:11 Kodi madzi abwino ndi a mchere angatuluke pa kasupe mmodzi?
James3:12 Abale anga
James3:13 Ndani mwa inu amene ndi wanzeru ndi womvetsa zinthu? Mulekeni aonetse ndi makhalidwe ake abwino kuti nzeru ndiye zikutsogolera kudzichepetsa kwake ndi zochita zake
James3:14 Koma ngati muli ndi mtima wakaduka ndi odzikonda
James3:15 “Nzeru” zotere sizochokera kumwamba koma ndi za mʼdziko lapansi
James3:16 Pakuti pamene pali kaduka ndi kudzikonda pomweponso pamakhala chisokonezo ndi zochitika zoyipa zonse.
James3:17 Koma nzeru imene imachoka kumwamba
James3:18 Anthu amtendere amene amadzala mtendere amakolola chilungamo.
James4:1 Nʼchiyani chimene chimayambitsa ndewu ndi mapokoso pakati panu? Kodi sizichokera ku zilakolako zimene zimalimbana mʼkati mwanu?
James4:2 Mumalakalaka zinthu koma simuzipeza
James4:3 Koma ngakhale mumapempha simulandira
James4:4 Inu anthu achigololo
James4:5 Kapena mukuganiza kuti Malemba amanena popanda chifukwa kuti Mulungu amafunitsitsa mwansanje mzimu umene Iye anayika kuti uzikhala mwa ife?
James4:6 Koma amatipatsa chisomo chochuluka. Nʼchifukwa chake Malemba amati
James4:7 Dziperekeni nokha kwa Mulungu. Mukaneni Mdierekezi ndipo adzakuthawani.
James4:8 Sendezani kufupi ndi Mulungu ndipo Iye adzasendeza kwa inu. Sambani mʼmanja mwanu
James4:9 Chitani chisoni chifukwa cha zimene mwachita
James4:10 Dzichepetseni pamaso pa Ambuye ndipo Iye adzakukwezani.
James4:11 Abale musamanenane. Aliyense wonenera zoyipa mʼbale wake kapena kumuweruza
James4:12 Pali mmodzi yekha Wopereka Malamulo ndi Woweruza. Ndiye amene akhoza kupulumutsa ndi kuwononga. Kodi ndiwe yani kuti uziweruza mnzako?
James4:13 Tsono tamverani
James4:14 Chifukwa chiyani mukutero? Inu simukudziwa zimene ziti zichitike mawa. Kodi moyo wanu ndi wotani? Inu muli ngati nkhungu imene imangooneka kwa kanthawi kochepa ndipo kenaka ndikuzimirira.
James4:15 Koma inuyo muyenera kunena kuti
James4:16 Koma mmene zililimu mumangodzitama ndi kudzikuza. Kudzitama konse kotereku ndi koyipa.
James4:17 Aliyense amene amadziwa zabwino zimene amayenera kuchita koma osazichita
James5:1 Tsono tamverani
James5:2 Chuma chanu chawola ndipo njenjete zadya zovala zanu.
James5:3 Golide ndi siliva wanu zachita dzimbiri. Dzimbirilo lidzakhala umboni wokutsutsani ndi kuwononga mnofu wanu ngati moto. Mwadziwunjikira chuma pa masiku ano otsiriza.
James5:4 Taonani
James5:5 Mwakhala pa dziko lapansi pano moyo ofewa ndipo mwalidyera dziko lapansi. Mwadzinenepetsa pa tsiku lokaphedwa.
James5:6 Mwaweruza kuti ndi wolakwa ndipo mwapha munthu wosalakwa
James5:7 Tsono abale
James5:8 Inunso mukhale owugwira mtima ndi osasinthika chifukwa Ambuye ali pafupi kubwera.
James5:9 Abale
James5:10 Abale
James5:11 Monga mukudziwa
James5:12 Koposa zonse
James5:13 Kodi alipo wina mwa inu amene ali pa mavuto? Apemphere. Kodi wina wakondwa? Ayimbe nyimbo zolemekeza.
James5:14 Kodi alipo wina mwa inu akudwala? Ayitane akulu ampingo kuti adzamupempherere ndi kumudzoza mafuta mʼdzina la Ambuye.
James5:15 Ndipo pemphero lachikhulupiriro lidzachiritsa munthu wodwalayo ndipo Ambuye adzamuutsa. Ngati wachimwa adzakhululukidwa.
James5:16 Choncho
James5:17 Eliya anali munthu ngati ife. Iye anapemphera mwamphamvu kuti mvula isagwe ndipo sinagwedi kwa zaka zitatu ndi theka.
James5:18 Kenaka anapempheranso
James5:19 Abale anga
James5:20 kumbukirani izi: Aliyense wobweza wochimwa kuchoka ku cholakwa chake

1Peter1:19 Koma munawomboledwa ndi magazi a mtengowapatali a Khristu

1Peter2:14 kaya ndi mabwanamkubwa

1Peter3:2 pamene aona moyo wanu wachiyero ndi moyo woopa Mulungu.

1Peter3:4 Mʼmalo mwake kudzikongoletsa kwanu kukhale kwa munthu wa mʼkatimo
1Peter3:5 Pakuti umo ndi mmene akazi oyera mtima akale amene anali ndi chiyembekezo pa Mulungu anadzikongoletsera. Iwo ankagonjera amuna awo

1Peter3:13 Ndani angakuchitireni zoyipa ngati muchita changu kuchita zabwino?
1Peter3:14 Koma ngakhale mumve zowawa chifukwa cha chilungamo
1Peter3:15 Koma lemekezani Khristu mʼmitima mwanu ngati Ambuye wanu. Khalani okonzeka nthawi zonse kuyankha aliyense amene akufunsani za chiyembekezo chimene muli nacho.
1Peter3:16 Koma chitani zimenezi mofatsa ndi mwaulemu
1Peter3:17 Nʼkwabwino ngati ndi chifuniro cha Mulungu kumva zowawa chifukwa chochita zabwino kusiyana ndi kumva zowawa chifukwa chochita zoyipa.
1Peter3:18 Pakuti Khristu anafa chifukwa cha machimo kamodzi kokha kufera onse
1Peter3:19 Ndipo ali ngati mzimu chomwecho anapita ndi kukalalikira mizimu imene inali mʼndende
1Peter3:20 ya anthu amene sanamvere Mulungu atadikira moleza mtima pa nthawi imene Nowa ankapanga chombo. Mʼchombo chija anthu owerengeka okha
1Peter3:21 Madziwo akufanizira ubatizo umene lero ukukupulumutsaninso
1Peter3:22 amene anapita kumwamba ndipo ali kudzanja lamanja la Mulungu komwe angelo ndi maulamuliro ndi amphamvu amamvera Iye.
1Peter4:1 Popeza kuti Khristu anamva zowawa mʼthupi lake
1Peter4:2 Chifukwa cha ichi
1Peter4:3 Pakuti mwataya kale nthawi yambiri mʼmbuyomu pochita zimene anthu osapembedza amachita
1Peter4:4 Anthu osapembedza amadabwa pamene simuthamangira nawo kuchita zoyipitsitsazi
1Peter4:5 Koma adzafotokoza okha mlandu wawo kwa Mulungu amene wakonzeka kuweruza amoyo ndi akufa.
1Peter4:6 Pa chifukwa chimenechi
1Peter4:7 Chimaliziro cha zinthu zonse chili pafupi. Choncho khalani maso ndi odziletsa kuti muthe kupemphera.
1Peter4:8 Koposa zonse muzikondana wina ndi mnzake kwambiri
1Peter4:9 Muzisamalirana wina ndi mnzake osamanyinyirika.
1Peter4:10 Aliyense agwiritse ntchito mokhulupirika mphatso iliyonse imene anayilandira potumikira ena ngati adindo ogwiritsa bwino ntchito mphatso za Mulungu za mitundumitundu.
1Peter4:11 Ngati wina ayankhula
1Peter4:12 Abale okondedwa musadabwe ndi mayesero owawa amene mukukumana nawo ngati kuti china chake chachilendo chakuchitikirani.
1Peter4:13 Koma kondwerani popeza mukumva zowawa pamodzi ndi Khristu
1Peter4:14 Ngati akuchitani chipongwe chifukwa cha dzina la Khristu
1Peter4:15 Ngati mumva zowawa
1Peter4:16 koma ngati mumva zowawa chifukwa ndinu Mkhristu
1Peter4:17 Pakuti nthawi yafika kuti chiweruzo chiyambe mʼnyumba ya Mulungu
1Peter4:18 Monga Malemba akuti
1Peter4:19 Nʼchifukwa chake
