1Peter5:2 Wetani gulu la Mulungu limene lili mʼmanja mwanu
1Peter5:3 Musakhale ngati mafumu pa amene mukuwayangʼanira
1Peter5:4 Ndipo Mʼbusa wamkulu akadzaonekera
1Peter5:5 Momwemonso
1Peter5:6 Choncho
1Peter5:7 Tayani pa Iye nkhawa zanu zonse chifukwa ndiye amakusamalani.
1Peter5:8 Khalani odziretsa ndi atcheru. Mdani wanu mdierekezi amayendayenda monga mkango wobangula kufunafuna wina kuti amumeze.
1Peter5:9 Mukaneni iye
1Peter5:10 Ndipo Mulungu wachisomo chonse
1Peter5:11 Kwa Iye kukhale mphamvu mpaka muyaya
1Peter5:12 Mothandizidwa ndi Sila
1Peter5:13 Imani mwamphamvu mʼchisomochi. Mlongo wanu amene ali ku Babuloni
1Peter5:14 Mupatsane moni ndi mpsopsono wachikondi. Mtendere ukhale ndi inu nonse amene muli mwa Khristu.
2Peter1:1 Ndine Simoni Petro
2Peter1:2 Chisomo ndi mtendere zochuluka zikhale nanu pomudziwa Mulungu ndi Yesu Ambuye athu.
2Peter1:3 Mulungu mwa mphamvu zake anatipatsa zonse zofunika kukhala moyo opembedza
2Peter1:4 Mwa ulemerero ndi ubwino wakewo
2Peter1:5 Choncho
2Peter1:6 Pa nzeru muwonjezerepo kudziretsa
2Peter1:7 Pa khalidwe lolemekeza Mulungu muwonjezerepo chifundo cha ubale
2Peter1:8 Ngati zonsezi zikhala mwa inu nʼkumachuluka
2Peter1:9 Koma ngati wina alibe zimenezi
2Peter1:10 Nʼchifukwa chake abale anga
2Peter1:11 Mudzalandiridwa bwino kwambiri mu ufumu wosatha wa Ambuye ndi Mpulumutsi wathu Yesu Khristu.
2Peter1:12 Tsono ine ndidzakukumbutsani nthawi zonse za zinthu zimenezi
2Peter1:13 Ndikuganiza kuti nʼkoyenera ndikanali mu msasa uno
2Peter1:14 chifukwa ndikudziwa kuti posachedwapa ndikuchoka mu msasa uno
2Peter1:15 Ndipo ndidzayesetsa kuti nditachoka
2Peter1:16 Ife sitinatsate nkhani zongopeka titakuwuzani za mphamvu zake ndi zakubweranso kwa Ambuye athu Yesu Khristu
2Peter1:17 Pakuti Iye analandira ulemu ndi ulemerero kuchokera kwa Mulungu Atate atamufikira mawu ochokera ku ulemerero wa ukulu akuti
2Peter1:18 Ifeyo tinamva mawuwa akuchokera kumwamba pamene tinali naye pamodzi pa phiri lopatulika lija.
2Peter1:19 Tsono ifenso tili ndi mawu a uneneri amene ndi odalirika kwambiri ndipo inu mudzachita bwino mukawasamalira mawuwa
2Peter1:20 Kuposa zonse
2Peter1:21 Pakuti mawu a uneneri sanadze mwa kufuna kwa anthu
2Peter2:1 Koma panalinso aneneri onama pakati pa Aisraeli
2Peter2:2 Ambiri adzatsata njira zawo zochititsa manyazi ndipo chifukwa cha iwowa
2Peter2:3 Pofuna kupeza chuma
2Peter2:4 Pakuti Mulungu sanalekerere angelo atachimwa paja
2Peter2:5 Iye sanalekerere dziko lapansi kalelo
2Peter2:6 Mulungu anaweruza mizinda ya Sodomu ndi Gomora nayiwononga ndi moto
2Peter2:7 Koma Iye anapulumutsa Loti
2Peter2:8 (Pakuti munthu wolungamayo
2Peter2:9 Tsono mutha kuona kuti Ambuye amadziwa kuwapulumutsa kwake pa mayesero anthu opembedza. Amadziwanso kusunga osalungama kuti alangidwe mpaka tsiku la chiweruzo.
2Peter2:10 Makamaka amene amatsata zilakolako zonyansa zathupi nanyoza ulamuliro. Anthu amenewa ndi odzikuza
2Peter2:11 Komatu ngakhale angelo
2Peter2:12 Koma anthu awa amachita chipongwe zinthu zimene sakuzidziwa. Ali ngati zirombo zopanda nzeru. Zirombo zolengedwa kuti zigwidwe ndi kuwonongedwa
2Peter2:13 Iwo adzalangidwa chifukwa cha zoyipa zimene anachita. Koma chimene chimawakomera ndi kumangochita zokondweretsa thupi masanasana. Iwo ali ngati mawanga ndi zilema. Podya nanu pamodzi amakondwera kuchita za chinyengo.
2Peter2:14 Ndi maso awo odzaza ndi chigololo
2Peter2:15 Iwo anasiya njira yolungama ndipo anapatuka kutsata njira ya Baalamu mwana wa Beori
2Peter2:16 Koma anadzudzulidwa chifukwa cha kulakwa kwakeko. Bulu
2Peter2:17 Anthu amenewa ali ngati akasupe wopanda madzi
2Peter2:18 Pakuti anayankhula mawu opanda pake ndi onyada
2Peter2:19 Amawalonjeza ufulu
2Peter2:20 Ngati anapulumuka ku zodetsa za dziko lapansi podziwa Ambuye ndi Mpulumutsi wathu Yesu Khristu
2Peter2:21 Kukanakhala bwino akanapanda kudziwa njira ya chilungamo
2Peter2:22 Kwa iwo miyambi iyi ndi yoona
2Peter3:1 Inu okondedwa
2Peter3:2 Ndikufuna kuti mukumbukire mawu amene anayankhulidwa kale ndi aneneri oyera mtima ndiponso lamulo limene Ambuye ndi Mpulumutsi wathu analipereka kudzera mwa atumwi.
2Peter3:3 Poyamba mudziwe kuti mʼmasiku otsiriza kudzafika anthu onyoza
2Peter3:4 Iwo adzati
2Peter3:5 Koma iwo akuyiwala dala kuti Mulungu atanena mawu
2Peter3:6 Ndi madzinso achigumula
2Peter3:7 Dziko la kumwamba ndi lapansi la masiku ano akulisunga ndi mawu omwewo kuti adzalitentha ndi moto. Akuzisunga mpaka tsiku limene adzaweruza ndi kuwononga anthu onse osapembedza Mulungu.
2Peter3:8 Koma abale okondedwa
2Peter3:9 Ambuye sazengereza kuchita zimene analonjeza
2Peter3:10 Koma tsiku la Ambuye lidzafika ngati mbala. Pa tsikuli zinthu zakumwamba zidzachoka ndi phokoso lalikulu. Zinthu zonse zidzawonongedwa ndi moto
2Peter3:11 Popeza kuti zinthu zonse zidzawonongedwa motere
2Peter3:12 pamene mukuyembekezera tsiku la Mulungu ndi kufulumiza kufika kwake. Pa tsiku limeneli zinthu zakumwamba zidzawonongedwa ndi moto
2Peter3:13 Koma ife tikudikira kumwamba kwatsopano ndi dziko lapansi latsopano
2Peter3:14 Chomwecho okondedwa
2Peter3:15 Zindikirani kuti kuleza mtima kwa Ambuye kukutanthauza chipulumutso
2Peter3:16 Iye walemba chimodzimodzi makalata ake onse
2Peter3:17 Nʼchifukwa chake
2Peter3:18 Koma kulani mu chisomo ndi mʼchidziwitso cha Ambuye ndi Mpulumutsi wathu Yesu Khristu. Kwa Iye kukhale ulemerero tsopano mpaka muyaya. Ameni.
1John1:1 Tikukulalikirani za Mawu a moyo amene analipo kuyambira pachiyambi
1John1:2 Moyowo unaoneka
1John1:3 Tikukulalikirani chimene tinachiona ndi kumva
1John1:4 Tikukulemberani zimenezi kuti chimwemwe chathu chikhale chathunthu.
1John1:5 Uthenga umene tinamva kwa Iye ndipo tikuwulalikira kwa inu ndi uwu: Mulungu ndiye kuwunika ndipo mwa Iye mulibe mdima konse.
1John1:6 Tikanena kuti timayanjana naye
1John1:7 Koma tikamayenda mʼkuwunika
1John1:8 Tikanena kuti tilibe tchimo
1John1:9 Koma tikavomereza machimo athu
1John1:10 Ife tikanena kuti sitinachimwe
1John2:1 Inu Ana anga okondedwa
1John2:2 Iyeyo ndiye nsembe yopepesera machimo athu
1John2:3 Ife timatsimikiza kuti tikumudziwa ngati tikusunga malamulo ake.
1John2:4 Munthu akamanena kuti
1John2:5 Koma munthu aliyense akamvera mawu ake
1John2:6 Aliyense amene amati amakhala mwa Mulungu
1John2:7 Okondedwa
1John2:8 Komabe ndi lamulo latsopano limene ndikukulemberani. Choonadi chake chikuoneka mwa Yesu ndiponso mwa inu
1John2:9 Aliyense amene amati ali mʼkuwunika
1John2:10 Aliyense amene amakonda mʼbale wake amakhalanso mʼkuwunika
1John2:11 Koma aliyense wodana ndi mʼbale wake ali mu mdima ndipo akuyenda mu mdima. Iyeyo sakudziwa kumene akupita
1John2:12 Inu ana okondedwa
1John2:13 Inu abambo
1John2:14 Ana okondedwa
1John2:15 Musamakonde dziko lapansi kapena chilichonse cha dziko lapansi. Ngati munthu wina aliyense akonda dziko lapansi
1John2:16 Pakuti zonse za mʼdziko lapansi
1John2:17 Dziko lapansi likupita pamodzi ndi zilakolako zake
1John2:18 Ana anga
1John2:19 Anthu amenewa anachoka pakati pathu
1John2:20 Koma inu muli ndi kudzoza kochokera kwa Woyerayo
1John2:21 Sindikukulemberani chifukwa choti simudziwa choonadi ayi
1John2:22 Wabodzayo ndani? Ndi munthu aliyense amene amanena kuti Yesu si Mpulumutsi. Munthu woteroyo ndi wokana Khristu
1John2:23 Aliyense wokana Mwana alibenso Atate. Wovomereza Mwana alinso ndi Atate.
1John2:24 Onetsetsani kuti zimene munazimva kuyambira pachiyambi zikhalebe mwa inu. Ngati zikhala mwa inu
1John2:25 Ndipo chimene anatilonjeza nʼchimenechi: moyo wosatha.
1John2:26 Ine ndikukulemberani zimenezi kuti ndikuwuzeni za amene akufuna kukusocheretsani.
1John2:27 Koma za inu
1John2:28 Tsopano ana okondedwa
1John2:29 Popeza mukudziwa kuti Khristu ndi wolungama
1John3:1 Taonani kukula kwake kwa chikondi chimene Atate anatikonda nacho
1John3:2 Abale okondedwa
1John3:3 Aliyense amene ali ndi chiyembekezo ichi mwa Iye adziyeretse yekha
1John3:4 Aliyense amene amachimwa amaphwanya lamulo; pakuti tchimo ndi kuphwanya lamulo.
1John3:5 Koma inu mukudziwa kuti Yesu anabwera kuti adzachotse machimo athu. Ndipo mwa Iye mulibe tchimo.
1John3:6 Aliyense wokhala mwa Khristu sachimwa. Aliyense amene amachimwa sanamuone kapena kumudziwa.
1John3:7 Ana okondedwa
1John3:8 Iye amene amachimwa ndi wa Satana
1John3:9 Aliyense amene ndi mwana wa Mulungu
1John3:10 Mmenemu ndi mmene timadziwira ana a Mulungu ndi amene ali ana a mdierekezi. Aliyense amene sachita chilungamo si mwana wa Mulungu; ngakhalenso amene sakonda mʼbale wake.
1John3:11 Uthenga umene munawumva kuyambira pachiyambi ndi uwu: Tizikondana wina ndi mnzake.
1John3:12 Musakhale ngati Kaini
1John3:13 Abale anga
1John3:14 Ife tikudziwa kuti tinatuluka mu imfa ndi kulowa mʼmoyo
1John3:15 Aliyense amene amadana ndi mʼbale wake ndi wakupha
1John3:16 Mmene timadziwira chikondi chenicheni ndi umu: Yesu anapereka moyo wake chifukwa cha ife. Ndipo nafenso tiyenera kupereka miyoyo yathu chifukwa cha abale athu.
1John3:17 Ngati wina ali ndi chuma ndipo nʼkuona mʼbale wake akusowa
1John3:18 Ana okondedwa
1John3:19 Pamenepo tidzadziwa kuti tili pa choonadi ndipo tidzakhala okhazikika mtima pamaso pa Mulungu
1John3:20 nthawi zonse pamene mtima wathu utitsutsa. Pakuti Mulungu ndi wamkulu kuposa mitima yathu ndipo Iye amadziwa zonse.
1John3:21 Anzanga okondedwa
1John3:22 Ndipo timalandira chilichonse chimene tichipempha kwa Iye
1John3:23 Ndipo lamulo lake ndi ili: kukhulupirira dzina la Mwana wake
1John3:24 Iwo amene amamvera malamulo ake amakhala mwa Iye
1John4:1 Anzanga okondedwa
1John4:2 Mungathe kuzindikira Mzimu wa Mulungu motere: Mzimu uliwonse umene umavomereza kuti Yesu Khristu anabwera mʼthupi
1John4:3 koma mzimu uliwonse umene suvomereza Yesu
1John4:4 Inu ana okondedwa
1John4:5 Aneneri onyengawa ndi ochokera mʼdziko lapansi
1John4:6 Ife ndi ochokera kwa Mulungu
1John4:7 Anzanga okondedwa
1John4:8 Aliyense amene alibe chikondi sadziwa Mulungu
1John4:9 Mmene Mulungu anaonetsera chikondi chake pakati pathu ndi umu: Iye anatumiza Mwana wake mmodzi yekha ku dziko lapansi kuti mwa Iyeyo tikhale ndi moyo.
1John4:10 Chikondi ndi ichi: osati kuti ife ndife amene tinamukonda Mulungu
1John4:11 Anzanga okondedwa
1John4:12 Palibe amene anaonapo Mulungu
1John4:13 Ife tikudziwa kuti timakhala mwa Iye ndipo Iyeyo amakhala mwa ife chifukwa anatipatsa Mzimu wake.
1John4:14 Ndipo taona ndipo tikuchitira umboni
1John4:15 Ngati aliyense avomereza kuti Yesu ndi Mwana wa Mulungu
1John4:16 Tikudziwa ndipo timadalira chikondi chimene Mulungu ali nacho pa ife. Mulungu ndiye chikondi. Aliyense amene amakhala moyo wachikondi
1John4:17 Chikondi chafika pachimake penipeni pakati pathu
1John4:18 Mulibe mantha mʼchikondi. Koma chikondi ndi changwiro chimachotsa mantha
1John4:19 Ife timakonda Mulungu chifukwa ndiye anayamba kutikonda.
1John4:20 Ngati wina anena kuti
1John4:21 Ndipo Iye anatipatsa lamulo lakuti: Aliyense amene amakonda Mulungu ayenera kukondanso mʼbale wake.
1John5:1 Aliyense amene amakhulupirira kuti Yesu ndi Khristu
1John5:2 Chodziwira kuti timakonda ana a Mulungu nʼchakuti timakonda Mulungu ndi kusunga malamulo ake.
1John5:3 Pakuti kukonda Mulungu ndiye kusunga malamulo ake. Ndipo malamulo ake siwolemetsa
1John5:4 chifukwa aliyense amene ndi mwana wa Mulungu amagonjetsa dziko lapansi. Chikhulupiriro chathu ndicho timagonjetsera dziko lapansi.
1John5:5 Ndani amagonjetsa dziko lapansi? Yekhayo amene amakhulupirira kuti Yesu ndi Mwana wa Mulungu.
1John5:6 Uyu ndiye anabwera mwa madzi ndi magazi
1John5:7 Pakuti pali atatu amene amachitira umboni.
1John5:8 Mzimu Woyera
1John5:9 Timalandira umboni wa anthu
1John5:10 Aliyense amene amakhulupirira Mwana wa Mulungu ali nawo umboniwu mu mtima mwake
1John5:11 Ndipo umboniwo ndi uwu: Mulungu anatipatsa moyo wosatha
1John5:12 Iye amene ali ndi Mwana ali ndi moyo
1John5:13 Ine ndikulemba zimenezi kwa inu
1John5:14 Ife timalimba mtima tikamafika pamaso pa Mulungu
1John5:15 Ndipo ngati tikudziwa kuti amatimvera
1John5:16 Ngati wina aona mʼbale wake akuchita tchimo losadzetsa imfa
1John5:17 Chilichonse chosalungama ndi tchimo ndipo pali tchimo losadzetsa imfa.
1John5:18 Tikudziwa kuti aliyense amene ndi mwana wa Mulungu sachimwirachimwirabe. Yesu
1John5:19 Tikudziwa kuti ndife ana a Mulungu ndi kuti dziko lonse lapansi lili pansi pa ulamuliro wa woyipayo.
1John5:20 Tikudziwa kuti Mwana wa Mulungu anafika ndipo anatipatsa nzeru
1John5:21 Ana okondedwa
2John1:1 Ndine mkulu wampingo
2John1:2 Timakukondani chifukwa cha choonadi chimene chimakhala mwa ife ndipo chidzakhala mwa ife mpaka muyaya.
2John1:3 Chisomo
2John1:4 Ndinakondwera kwambiri nditapeza ana anu ena akuyenda mʼchoonadi
2John1:5 Ndipo tsopano
2John1:6 Ndipo chikondi ndiye kuyenda momvera malamulo ake. Lamulo lake ndi lakuti mukhale moyo wachikondi monga munamva kuyambira pachiyambi.
2John1:7 Ndikunena zimenezi chifukwa anthu ambiri onyenga
2John1:8 Chenjerani kuti mungataye chimene mwagwirira ntchito
2John1:9 Aliyense amene sasunga chiphunzitso cha Khristu
2John1:10 Ngati wina aliyense abwera kwa inu osaphunzitsa zimenezi
2John1:11 Aliyense wolandira munthu wotere ndiye kuti akuvomerezana nazo ntchito zake zoyipa.
2John1:12 Ndili nazo zambiri zoti ndikulembereni
2John1:13 Ana a mlongo wanu wosankhidwa ndi Mulungu akupereka moni.
3John1:1 Ndine mkulu wampingo
3John1:2 Wokondedwa
3John1:3 Ine ndinali ndi chimwemwe chachikulu pamene abale ena anafika nʼkundifotokozera za kukhulupirika kwako pa choonadi ndiponso mmene umayendera motsata choonadi.
3John1:4 Palibe chondikondweretsa kwambiri kuposa kumva kuti ana anga akukhala mʼchoonadi.
3John1:5 Wokondedwa
3John1:6 Iwo anafotokozera mpingo za chikondi chako. Chonde uwathandize kupitiriza ulendo mʼnjira yokondweretsa Mulungu.
3John1:7 Pakuti ananyamuka ulendo wawo chifukwa cha dzina la Ambuye
3John1:8 Ife tiyenera kumathandiza anthu oterewa
3John1:9 Ndinalembera mpingo
3John1:10 Tsono ndikabwera ndidzakumbutsa zimene iye amachita. Iye amafalitsa nkhani zabodza zonena ife. Ndipo sakhutira ndi zimenezo
3John1:11 Wokondedwa
3John1:12 Aliyense akumuchitira umboni wabwino wa Demetriyo. Ngakhale choona chomwe chimamuchitira umboni
3John1:13 Ndili ndi zambiri zoti ndikulembereni
3John1:14 Ndiyembekezera kufika kwanuko posachedwapa
3John1:15 Mtendere ukhale nawe. Abwenzi anu kuno akupereka moni. Upereke moni kwa abwenzi onse mmodzimmodzi.
Jude1:1 Ndine Yuda
Jude1:2 Chifundo
Jude1:3 Okondedwa
Jude1:4 Pakuti anthu ena amene za chilango chawo zinalembedwa kale
Jude1:5 Ngakhale munazidziwa kale zonsezi
Jude1:6 Ndipo mukumbukire angelo amene sanakhutire ndi maudindo awo
Jude1:7 Musayiwale mizinda ya Sodomu ndi Gomora ija
Jude1:8 Nʼchimodzimodzinso zimene akuchita anthu amenewa potsata maloto awo
Jude1:9 Koma ngakhale mkulu wa angelo Mikayeli
Jude1:10 Koma anthu awa amachita chipongwe zinthu zimene sakuzidziwa. Ndipo zinthu zimene amazidziwa ndi nzeru zachibadwa
Jude1:11 Tsoka kwa iwo chifukwa anatsatira njira ya Kaini. Iwo athamangira phindu
Jude1:12 Anthu amenewa ndiwo amayipitsa maphwando anu achikondi. Amadya nanu mopanda manyazi ndipo ali ngati abusa amene amangodzidyetsa okha. Anthuwa ali ngati mitambo yowuluzika ndi mphepo
Jude1:13 Iwowa ali ngati mafunde awukali apanyanja
Jude1:14 Enoki
Jude1:15 kuti adzaweruze aliyense
Jude1:16 Anthu amenewa amangʼungʼudza ndi kudandaula. Amatsatira zilakolako zawo zoyipa. Amayankhula zodzitamandira ndipo amanamiza ena pofuna kupeza phindu.
Jude1:17 Koma okondedwa
Jude1:18 Iwo anakuwuzani kuti
Jude1:19 Anthu amenewa ndi amene akubweretsa mipatuko pakati panu
Jude1:20 Koma inu okondedwa
Jude1:21 Khalani mʼchikondi cha Mulungu pamene mukudikira chifundo cha Ambuye athu Yesu Khristu kuti akubweretsereni moyo wosatha.
Jude1:22 Muwachitire chifundo amene akukayika.
Jude1:23 Ena muwapulumutse powalanditsa ku moto. Enanso muwachitire chifundo
Jude1:24 Kwa Iye amene angathe kukusungani kuti mungagwe mʼmachimo
Jude1:25 kwa Mulungu yekhayo
Revelation1:1 Vumbulutso lochokera kwa Yesu Khristu
Revelation1:2 amene akuchitira umboni chilichonse chimene anachiona. Awa ndi Mawu a Mulungu ndi umboni wa Yesu Khristu.
Revelation1:3 Ngodala munthu amene awerenga mawu oneneratu zamʼtsogolo ndi iwo amene amamva ndi kusunga zolembedwa mʼbukuli pakuti nthawi yayandikira.
Revelation1:4 Ndine Yohane
Revelation1:5 ndiponso kuchokera kwa Yesu Khristu mboni yokhulupirika
Revelation1:6 ndipo watisandutsa mafumu ndi ansembe kuti tizitumikira Mulungu ndi Atate ake. Kwa Iye kukhale ulemerero ndi mphamvu ku nthawi zosatha
Revelation1:7 “Onani akubwera ndi mitambo
Revelation1:8 “Ine ndine Alefa ndi Omega
Revelation1:9 Ine Yohane mʼbale wanu ndi mnzanu mʼmasautso ndi mu ufumu ndi mukupirira kwambiri
Revelation1:10 Pa tsiku la Ambuye ndinanyamulidwa ndi Mzimu ndipo ndinamva kumbuyo kwanga mawu ofuwula ngati lipenga
Revelation1:11 amene anati
Revelation1:12 Nditatembenuka kuti ndione amene amandiyankhulayo
Revelation1:13 Pakati pa zoyikapo nyalezo ndinaona wina wooneka ngati Mwana wa Munthu atavala mkanjo wofika kumapazi ake ndipo anamangirira lamba wagolide pa chifuwa pake.
Revelation1:14 Tsitsi lake linali loyera ngati thonje
Revelation1:15 Mapazi ake anali ngati chitsulo choti chili mʼngʼanjo yamoto
Revelation1:16 Mʼdzanja lake lamanja ananyamula nyenyezi zisanu ndi ziwiri
Revelation1:17 Nditamuona ndinagwa pa mapazi ake ngati wakufa. Kenaka Iye anasanjika dzanja lake lamanja pa ine nati
Revelation1:18 Ine ndine Wamoyo; ndinali wakufa ndipo taona ndine wamoyo mpaka muyaya! Ndipo ndili ndi makiyi a imfa ndi Hade.
Revelation1:19 “Chomwecho
Revelation1:20 Tanthauzo la nyenyezi zisanu ndi ziwiri zimene waziona mʼdzanja langa lamanja ndi la zoyikapo nyale zagolide zisanu ndi ziwiri ndi ili: Nyenyezi zisanu ndi ziwiri ndi angelo a mipingo isanu ndi iwiri ija
Revelation2:1 “Lembera mngelo wa mpingo wa ku Efeso kuti: Awa ndi mawu ochokera kwa amene ali ndi nyenyezi zisanu ndi ziwiri zija mʼdzanja lake lamanja amene akuyenda pakati pa zoyikapo nyale zisanu ndi ziwiri zagolide.
Revelation2:2 Ine ndimadziwa zochita zako
Revelation2:3 Iwe wapirira ndipo wakumana ndi zovuta chifukwa cha dzina langa
Revelation2:4 Komabe ndili ndi chotsutsana nawe: Wataya chikondi chako chapoyamba.
Revelation2:5 Kumbukirani kuti munagwa kuchokera patali. Lapa ndikuchita zinthu zimene unkachita poyamba. Ngati sulapa ndidzabwera ndikukuchotsera choyikapo nyale chako pamalo pake.
Revelation2:6 Komabe chokomera chako ndi chakuti umadana ndi zochita za Anikolai
Revelation2:7 Amene ali ndi makutu
Revelation2:8 “Lembera mngelo wa mpingo wa ku Simurna kuti: Awa ndi mawu ochokera kwa amene ndi Woyamba ndi Wotsiriza
Revelation2:9 Ine ndimadziwa masautso ako ndi umphawi wako
Revelation2:10 Musachite mantha ndi zimene muti musauke nazo posachedwapa. Ndithu
Revelation2:11 Amene ali ndi makutu
Revelation2:12 “Lembera mngelo wa mpingo wa ku Pergamo kuti: Awa ndi mawu ochokera kwa amene ali ndi lupanga lakuthwa konsekonse.
Revelation2:13 Iye akuti
Revelation2:14 Komabe
Revelation2:15 Chimodzimodzinso inuyo muli ndi ena amene amatsatira ziphunzitso za Anikolai.
Revelation2:16 Tsono tembenukani mtima. Mukapanda kutero
Revelation2:17 Amene ali ndi makutu
Revelation2:18 “Lembera mngelo wampingo wa ku Tiyatira kuti: Awa ndi mawu ochokera kwa Mwana wa Mulungu
Revelation2:19 Iye akuti: Ndimadziwa ntchito zanu
Revelation2:20 Komabe ndili ndi chinthu chokudzudzula nacho. Umamulekerera mkazi uja Yezebeli amene amadzitcha yekha kuti ndi mneneri. Iye amaphunzitsa atumiki anga kuti azichita zadama ndi kumadya zansembe zoperekedwa ku mafano.
Revelation2:21 Ndamupatsa nthawi kuti aleke zachigololo zake koma sakufuna.
Revelation2:22 Tsono ndidzamugwetsa mʼmasautso ndipo amene amachita naye zadama zakezo ndidzawasautsa kwambiri akapanda kulapa ndi kuleka njira za mkaziyo.
Revelation2:23 Ana ake ndidzawakantha ndi kuwapheratu. Kotero mipingo yonse idzadziwa kuti Ine ndine uja amene ndimafufuza mʼmitima mwa anthu ndi mʼmaganizo mwawo. Aliyense wa inu ndidzachita naye monga mwa ntchito zake.
Revelation2:24 Tsopano ndikunena kwa enanu a ku Tiyatira
Revelation2:25 Inu mungogwiritsa zimene munaphunzira basi
Revelation2:26 Amene adzapambana ndi kuchita chifuniro changa mpaka kumapeto
Revelation2:27 Adzayilamulira ndi ndodo yachitsulo ndipo nadzayiphwanyaphwanya ngati mbiya. Ulamuliro umenewu ndi omwe ndinalandira kwa Atate anga.
Revelation2:28 Ine ndidzamupatsanso nthanda
Revelation2:29 Amene ali ndi makutu
Revelation3:1 “Lembera mngelo wampingo wa ku Sarde kuti: Awa ndi mawu ochokera kwa amene amasunga mizimu isanu ndi iwiri ya Mulungu ndi nyenyezi zisanu ndi ziwiri. Iye akuti: Ndimadziwa ntchito zako; umadziwika kuti ndiwe wamoyo koma ndiwe wakufa.
Revelation3:2 Dzuka! Limbitsa zimene zatsalira zomwe zatsala pangʼono kufa
Revelation3:3 Choncho
Revelation3:4 Komabe uli ndi anthu angapo mu Sarde amene sanadetse zovala zawo. Amenewa adzayenda ndi Ine atavala zoyera popeza ndi oyenera kutero.
Revelation3:5 Amene adzapambane adzavala zoyera ngati ena aja. Sindidzafafaniza dzina lake mʼbuku lamoyo
Revelation3:6 Amene ali ndi makutu
Revelation3:7 “Lembera mngelo wampingo wa ku Filadefiya kuti: Awa ndi mawu ochokera kwa amene ndi woyera ndi woonadi
Revelation3:8 Iye akuti
Revelation3:9 Amene ndi mpingo wa Satana
Revelation3:10 Popeza mwasunga mawu anga woti mupirire ndipo mwawugwira mtima
Revelation3:11 Ine ndikubwera msanga. Gwiritsitsa chimene uli nacho kuti wina angakulande chipewa chako chaufumu.
Revelation3:12 Iye amene adzapambane ndidzamusandutsa mzati wa mʼNyumba ya Mulungu wanga. Sadzatulukamonso. Pa iye ndidzalemba dzina la Mulungu wanga ndi dzina la mzinda wa Mulungu wanga
Revelation3:13 Amene ali ndi makutu
Revelation3:14 “Lembera mngelo wampingo wa ku Laodikaya kuti: Awa ndi mawu ochokera kwa Ameni
Revelation3:15 Ine ndimadziwa ntchito zako
Revelation3:16 Tsono popeza ndiwe wofunda chabe
Revelation3:17 Iwe umati: ‘Ndine wolemera
Revelation3:18 Ndikukulangiza kuti ugule kwa Ine golide woyengedwa ndi moto kuti ukhale wolemera. Ugule zovala zoyera kuti uvale ndi kuphimba umaliseche wako wochititsa manyaziwo. Ndiponso ugule kwa Ine mankhwala a mʼmaso kuti uwone.
Revelation3:19 Amene ndimawakonda ndimawadzudzula ndi kuwalanga. Choncho chita changu ndipo lapa.
Revelation3:20 Taonani ndayima pa khomo ndikugogoda. Ngati wina amva mawu anga natsekula chitseko
Revelation3:21 Amene adzapambana
Revelation3:22 Amene ali ndi makutu

Revelation4:2 Nthawi yomweyo ndinatengedwa ndi Mzimu Woyera
Revelation4:3 Ndipo amene anakhalapoyo anali wa maonekedwe ngati miyala ya jasipa ndi sardiyo. Utawaleza wooneka ngati simaragido unazinga mpando waufumuwo.
Revelation4:4 Kuzungulira mpando waufumuwu panalinso mipando ina yaufumu yokwana 24 ndipo panakhala akuluakulu 24 atavala zoyera ndipo anavala zipewa zaufumu zagolide pamutu.
Revelation4:5 Kumpando waufumuwo kunkatuluka mphenzi
Revelation4:6 Patsogolo pa mpando waufumu pomwepo panalinso ngati nyanja yagalasi yonyezimira ngati mwala wa krustalo. Pakatinʼpakati
Revelation4:7 Chamoyo choyamba chinali ngati mkango
Revelation4:8 Chamoyo chilichonse chinali ndi mapiko asanu ndi limodzi
Revelation4:9 Nthawi zonse zamoyozo zimapereka ulemerero
Revelation4:10 Izi zikamachitika akuluakulu 24 aja amadzigwetsa pansi pamaso pa wokhala pa mpando waufumuyo
Revelation4:11 “Ndinu woyeneradi kulandira ulemerero ndi ulemu ndi mphamvu
Revelation5:1 Kenaka ndinaona buku mʼdzanja la wokhala pa mpando waufumu uja. Bukulo linali lolembedwa mbali zonse ndipo linali lomatidwa ndi zomatira zisanu ndi ziwiri.
Revelation5:2 Ndipo ndinaona mngelo wamphamvu akulengeza ndi mawu okweza kuti
Revelation5:3 Koma panalibe ndi mmodzi yemwe kumwamba kapena pa dziko lapansi kapena kunsi kwa dziko lapansi woti afutukule bukulo kapena kuona zamʼkati mwake.
Revelation5:4 Ndinalira kwambiri chifukwa panalibe amene anapezeka woyenera kufutukula bukuli kapena kuona zamʼkati mwake.
Revelation5:5 Tsono mmodzi mwa akuluakulu aja anati kwa ine
Revelation5:6 Kenaka ndinaona Mwana Wankhosa akuoneka ngati wophedwa atayimirira pakatikati pa mpando waufumu uja ndi zamoyo zinayi zija ndi akuluakulu aja. Mwana Wankhosayo anali ndi nyanga zisanu ndi ziwiri ndi maso asanu ndi awiri omwe ndi Mizimu isanu ndi iwiri ya Mulungu yomwe anayitumiza ku dziko lonse lapansi.
Revelation5:7 Iye anabwera natenga buku lija limene linali mʼdzanja lamanja la wokhala pa mpando waufumuyo.
Revelation5:8 Ndipo atalitenga
Revelation5:9 Ndipo ankayimba nyimbo yatsopano yakuti
Revelation5:10 Inu munawasandutsa kukhala mtundu waufumu ndi ansembe otumikira Mulungu
Revelation5:11 Kenaka nditayangʼananso ndinamva mawu a angelo ambiri
Revelation5:12 Ndipo angelowo anayimba ndi mawu ofuwula akuti
Revelation5:13 Kenaka ndinamva mawu a cholengedwa chilichonse kumwamba
Revelation5:14 Zamoyo zinayi zija zinati: “Ameni
Revelation6:1 Ndinaona pamene Mwana Wankhosa anatsekula chomatira choyamba cha zomatira zisanu ndi ziwiri zija. Ndipo ndinamva chimodzi mwa zamoyo zinayi zija chikunena liwu lomveka ngati bingu kuti
Revelation6:2 Nditayangʼana patsogolo pake ndinaona kavalo woyera! Wokwerapo wake anali ndi uta ndipo anapatsidwa chipewa chaufumu
Revelation6:3 Mwana Wankhosa atatsekula chomatira chachiwiri
Revelation6:4 Pamenepo kavalo wina wofiira anatulukira. Wokwerapo wake anapatsidwa mphamvu yochotsa mtendere pa dziko lapansi ndi kuchititsa anthu kuti aziphana wina ndi mnzake. Iyeyu anapatsidwa lupanga lalikulu.
Revelation6:5 Mwana Wankhosa atatsekula chomatira chachitatu
Revelation6:6 Ndinamva ngati liwu kuchokera pakati pa zamoyo zinayi zija likuti
Revelation6:7 Mwana Wankhosa atatsekula chomatira chachinayi
Revelation6:8 Nditayangʼana patsogolo panga ndinaona kavalo wotuwa! Wokwerapo wake dzina lake linali Imfa ndipo Hade inali kumutsatira pambuyo pake. Anapatsidwa ulamuliro pa gawo limodzi la magawo anayi a dziko lapansi kuti aphe ndi lupanga
Revelation6:9 Mwana Wankhosa atatsekula chomatira chachisanu
Revelation6:10 Iwo anafuwula kuti
Revelation6:11 Pamenepo aliyense wa anthuwo anapatsidwa mwinjiro woyera ndipo anawuzidwa kuti adikire pangʼono kufikira chiwerengero cha anzawo ndi abale awo amene anayeneranso kuphedwa ngati iwo
Revelation6:12 Ndinayangʼanitsitsa pamene ankatsekula chomatira chachisanu ndi chimodzi. Ndipo panachitika chivomerezi champhamvu. Dzuwa linada ngati chiguduli chopanga ndi bweya wambuzi wakuda. Mwezi wonse unafiira ngati magazi
Revelation6:13 ndipo nyenyezi zakuthambo zinagwa pa dziko lapansi ngati muja zimagwera nkhuyu zotsalira mu mtengo mphepo yamphamvu ikawomba.
Revelation6:14 Thambo linachoka ngati amayalulira mphasa ndipo phiri lililonse ndi chilumba chilichonse zinachotsedwa pa malo pake.
Revelation6:15 Kenaka
Revelation6:16 Iwo anafuwulira mapiri ndi matanthwe kuti
Revelation6:17 Pakuti tsiku lalikulu la mkwiyo wawo lafika ndipo ndi ndani angathe kulimbapo?”
Revelation7:1 Zitatha izi ndinaona angelo anayi atayima pa mbali zinayi za dziko lapansi
Revelation7:2 Kenaka ndinaona mngelo wina akuchokera kummawa
Revelation7:3 “Musawononge dziko
Revelation7:4 Choncho ndinamva chiwerengero cha amene ankayenera kulembedwa chizindikiro aja. Analipo okwanira 144
Revelation7:5 	Ochokera fuko la Yuda analipo 12
Revelation7:6 	ochokera fuko la Aseri analipo 12
Revelation7:7 	ochokera fuko la Simeoni analipo 12
Revelation7:8 	ochokera fuko la Zebuloni analipo 12
Revelation7:9 Zitatha izi ndinayangʼana patsogolo panga ndipo ndinaona gulu lalikulu la anthu loti munthu sangathe kuliwerenga lochokera dziko lililonse
Revelation7:10 Ndipo ankafuwula mokweza kuti: “Chipulumutso chimachokera kwa Mulungu wathu
Revelation7:11 “Angelo onse anayimirira kuzungulira mpando waufumu uja
Revelation7:12 Iwo anati
Revelation7:13 Pamenepo mmodzi wa akuluakulu aja anandifunsa kuti
Revelation7:14 Ine ndinayankha kuti
Revelation7:15 Nʼchifukwa chake
Revelation7:16 ‘Iwowa sadzamvanso njala
Revelation7:17 Pakuti Mwana Wankhosa amene ali pakati pa mpando waufumu adzakhala mʼbusa wawo. ‘Iye adzawatsogolera ku akasupe a madzi amoyo.’ ‘Ndipo Mulungu adzawapukuta misozi yonse mʼmaso mwawo.’ ”
Revelation8:1 Atatsekula chomatira chachisanu ndi chiwiri
Revelation8:2 Ndipo ndinaona angelo asanu ndi awiri aja amene amayimirira pamaso pa Mulungu
Revelation8:3 Mngelo wina amene anali ndi chofukizira chagolide anabwera nayimirira pa guwa lansembe. Anapatsidwa lubani wambiri kuti amupereke pamodzi ndi mapemphero a anthu onse oyera mtima pa guwa lansembe lagolide patsogolo pa mpando waufumu.
Revelation8:4 Fungo la lubani pamodzi ndi mapemphero a oyera mtima zinakwera kumwamba kwa Mulungu kuchokera mʼdzanja la mngeloyo.
Revelation8:5 Kenaka mngeloyo anatenga chofukizira nachidzaza ndi moto wochokera pa guwa lansembe ndi kuponya pa dziko lapansi ndipo nthawi yomweyo panachitika mabingu
Revelation8:6 Angelo asanu ndi awiri anakonzekera kuyimba malipenga asanu ndi awiri.
Revelation8:7 Mngelo woyamba anayimba lipenga lake ndipo kunabwera matalala ndi moto wosakanizana ndi magazi ndipo unaponyedwa pa dziko lapansi. Gawo limodzi la magawo atatu a dziko lapansi linapsa
Revelation8:8 Mngelo wachiwiri anayimba lipenga lake
Revelation8:9 Gawo limodzi mwa magawo atatu a zolengedwa zonse zamoyo za mʼnyanja
Revelation8:10 Mngelo wachitatu anayimba lipenga lake
Revelation8:11 Dzina la nyenyeziyo ndi Chowawa. Gawo limodzi la magawo atatu a madzi anasanduka owawa ndipo anthu ambiri anafa chifukwa cha madzi owawawo.
Revelation8:12 Mngelo wachinayi anayimba lipenga lake
Revelation8:13 Ndinayangʼananso ndipo ndinaona ndi kumva chiwombankhanga chimene chinkawuluka mlengalenga kwambiri chikuyankhula mofuwula kuti
Revelation9:1 Mngelo wachisanu anayimba lipenga lake
Revelation9:2 Nyenyeziyo itatsekula pa chidzenje chakuyacho panatuluka utsi ngati wochokera mʼngʼanjo yayikulu. Dzuwa ndi thambo zinada chifukwa cha utsi ochokera mʼdzenjemo.
Revelation9:3 Ndipo mʼkati mwa utsimo munatuluka dzombe kukalowa mʼdziko lapansi ndipo linapatsidwa mphamvu zoluma ngati za zinkhanira pa dziko lapansi.
Revelation9:4 Dzombelo linalamulidwa kuti lisawononge udzu wa pa dziko lapansi
Revelation9:5 Silinapatsidwe mphamvu yowapha koma yowazunza kwa miyezi isanu. Ndipo ululu umene anthuwo anawumva unali ngati wa chinkhanira chikaluma munthu.
Revelation9:6 Masiku amenewo anthu adzafunafuna imfa koma sadzayipeza. Adzalakalaka kufa koma imfa izidzawathawa.
Revelation9:7 Dzombe linkaoneka ngati akavalo okonzekera nkhondo. Pamitu pawo panali ngati zipewa zaufumu zagolide ndipo nkhope zawo ngati za anthu.
Revelation9:8 Tsitsi lawo linali ngati la amayi
Revelation9:9 Dzombelo linavala za pachifuwa zachitsulo. Phokoso la mapiko awo linali ngati phokoso la magaleta ankhondo ambiri okokedwa ndi akavalo othamangira ku nkhondo.
Revelation9:10 Linali ndi michira ngati zinkhanira ndi mbola. Mʼmichira yake munali mphamvu yozunza nayo anthu kwa miyezi isanu.
Revelation9:11 Mfumu yawo inali mngelo wolamulira Chidzenje chakuya chija. Mʼchihebri dzina lake ndi Abadoni ndipo mʼChigriki ndi Apoliyoni (tanthauzo lake ndiye kuti
Revelation9:12 Tsoka loyamba lapita; matsoka ena awiri akubwerabe.
Revelation9:13 Mngelo wachisanu ndi chimodzi anayimba lipenga lake
Revelation9:14 Liwulo linati kwa mngelo wachisanu ndi chimodzi amene anali ndi lipenga uja
Revelation9:15 Ndipo anamasulidwadi angelo anayi aja amene anasungidwa kukonzekera ora ili
Revelation9:16 Ndinamva chiwerengero cha ankhondo a pa akavalo aja
Revelation9:17 Akavalo ndi okwerapo amene ndinaona mʼmasomphenya anga ankaoneka motere: Zovala za pachifukwa pawo zinali zofiira ngati moto
Revelation9:18 Gawo limodzi la magawo atatu a anthu linaphedwa ndi miliri yamoto
Revelation9:19 Mphamvu za akavalowo inali mʼkamwa mwawo ndi mʼmichira mwawo; pakuti michira yawo inali ngati njoka; ndi mitu imene inkalumira.
Revelation9:20 Anthu ena onse amene sanaphedwe ndi miliri imeneyi sanalapebe kuti asiye ntchito zawo zoyipa. Iwo sanasiye kupembedza ziwanda ndi mafano agolide
Revelation9:21 Sanalapenso kuleka zakupha
Revelation10:1 Kenaka ndinaona mngelo wina wamphamvu akutsika kuchokera kumwamba. Anavala mtambo ndipo anali ndi utawaleza pamutu pake. Nkhope yake inali ngati dzuwa
Revelation10:2 Mʼdzanja lake munali kabuku kakangʼono kotsekulidwa. Phazi lake lamanja linaponda mʼnyanja ndipo phazi lake lamanzere linaponda pa mtunda.
Revelation10:3 Mngeloyo anafuwula kwambiri ngati kubangula kwa mkango. Atangofuwula
Revelation10:4 Mabingu asanu ndi awiriwo atangogunda
Revelation10:5 Kenaka mngelo amene ndinamuona ataponda mʼnyanja ndi ku mtunda uja

Revelation10:10 Ndinatenga kabukuko mʼdzanja la mngeloyo ndipo ndinadyadi. Mʼkamwa mwanga kankazuna ngati uchi
Revelation10:11 Ndipo anandiwuza kuti
Revelation11:1 Ndinapatsidwa bango longa ndodo yoyezera ndipo ndinawuzidwa kuti
Revelation11:2 Koma bwalo lakunja ulisiye
Revelation11:3 Ndipo ndidzapereka mphamvu kwa mboni zanga ziwiri
Revelation11:4 Mboni ziwirizo ndi mitengo iwiri ya olivi ndi zoyikapo nyale ziwiri zija zimene zili pamaso pa Ambuye wa dziko lapansi.
Revelation11:5 Ngati wina atafuna kuzipweteka mbonizo
Revelation11:6 Mbonizo zili ndi mphamvu yomanga mvula kuti isagwe pa nthawi imene akulalikirayo; ndipo zili ndi mphamvu yosanduliza madzi kukhala magazi ndi yokantha dziko lapansi ndi miliri ya mitundumitundu nthawi iliyonse imene zingafune.
Revelation11:7 Tsono zikadzatsiriza umboni wawowo
Revelation11:8 Mitembo yawo idzakhala ili gone pabwalo la mu mzinda waukulu umene mozimbayitsa umatchedwa Sodomu ndi Igupto
Revelation11:9 Kwa masiku atatu ndi theka
Revelation11:10 Anthu okhala pa dziko lapansi adzasangalala nazo zimenezi. Adzachita chikondwerero ndi kutumizirana mphatso
Revelation11:11 Koma patapita masiku atatu ndi theka aja
Revelation11:12 Kenaka aneneri aja anamva mawu ofuwula ochokera kumwamba owawuza kuti
Revelation11:13 Nthawi yomweyo panachitika chivomerezi choopsa mwakuti chigawo chimodzi cha magawo khumi a mzinda chinagwa. Anthu 7
Revelation11:14 Tsoka lachiwiri lapita; koma tsoka lachitatu likubwera posachedwapa.
Revelation11:15 Mngelo wachisanu ndi chiwiri anawomba lipenga lake

Revelation12:1 Chizindikiro chachikulu chinaoneka kuthambo; mayi atavala dzuwa
Revelation12:2 Mayiyo anali woyembekezera ndipo pa nthawi yake yochira analira mokuwa chifukwa cha ululu wakubala.
Revelation12:3 Kenaka ku thambo kunaonekanso chizindikiro china; chinjoka chachikulu kwambiri
Revelation12:4 Mchira wake unakokolola gawo limodzi la magawo atatu a nyenyezi kuzichotsa ku thambo ndi kuziponya pa dziko lapansi. Chinjoka chija chinadzayima patsogolo pa mayi uja amene anali pafupi kuberekayu kuti mwanayo akangobadwa chimudye.
Revelation12:5 Mayiyo anabereka mwana wamwamuna amene adzalamulira anthu a mitundu ina yonse ndi ndodo yachitsulo. Ndipo mwanayo analandidwa ku dzanja la mayiyo ndi kupita naye kwa Mulungu ku mpando wake waufumu.
Revelation12:6 Mayiyo anathawira ku chipululu ku malo kumene Mulungu anamukonzera
Revelation12:7 Zitatero
Revelation12:8 Koma analibe mphamvu ndipo anagonjetsedwa nathamangitsidwa kumwambako.
Revelation12:9 Chinjoka chachikulu chija chinagwetsedwa pansi. Ichocho ndiye njoka yakalekale ija yotchedwa Mdierekezi kapena Satana
Revelation12:10 Kenaka ndinamva mawu ofuwula kumwamba akunena kuti
Revelation12:11 Abale athuwo anamugonjetsa ndi magazi a Mwana Wankhosa ndiponso mawu a umboni wawo. Iwo anadzipereka kwathunthu
Revelation12:12 Choncho
Revelation12:13 Pamene chinjokacho chinaona kuti chagwetsedwa pa dziko lapansi
Revelation12:14 Mayiyo anapatsidwa mapiko awiri a chiwombankhanga chachikulu kuti athawire ku malo ake aja a ku chipululu. Kumeneko adzasamalidwako zaka zitatu ndi theka kuti chinjoka chija chisamupeze.
Revelation12:15 Kenaka chinjoka chija chinalavulira mayiyo madzi ambiri ngati mtsinje
Revelation12:16 Koma dziko lapansi linamuthandiza mayiyo. Nthaka inatsekuka ndi kumeza mtsinje uja unachokera mʼkamwa mwa chinjokacho.

Revelation12:18 Kenaka ndinaona chinjokacho chitayima mʼmbali mwa nyanja.
Revelation13:1 Ndipo ndinaona chirombo chikutuluka mʼnyanja. Chinali ndi nyanga khumi ndi mitu isanu ndi iwiri. Pa nyanga iliyonse chinavala chipewa chaufumu
Revelation13:2 Chirombo chimene ndinachionacho chinali ngati kambuku
Revelation13:3 Umodzi wa mitu wa chirombocho unkaoneka ngati uli ndi bala losati nʼkupola
Revelation13:4 Anthu anapembedza chinjoka chija chifukwa chinapereka ulamuliro wake kwa chirombocho. Nachonso chirombo chija anachipembedza nʼkumafunsa kuti
Revelation13:5 Chirombo chija chinaloledwa kuyankhula mawu onyada ndi achipongwe kwa Mulungu. Chinapatsidwa mphamvu zolamulira pa miyezi 42.
Revelation13:6 Ndipo chinayamba kuyankhula mawu achipongwe onyoza Mulungu
Revelation13:7 Chinaloledwa kuchita nkhondo ndi oyera mtima ndi kuwagonjetsa. Ndipo chinapatsidwanso mphamvu zolamulira anthu a fuko lililonse
Revelation13:8 Anthu onse okhala pa dziko lapansi adzapembedza chirombocho
Revelation13:9 Iye amene ali ndi makutu

Revelation13:11 Kenaka ndinaona chirombo china chikutuluka mʼnthaka. Chinali ndi nyanga ziwiri ngati mwana wankhosa koma kuyankhula kwake ngati chinjoka.
Revelation13:12 Chinalamulira ndi mphamvu zonse za chirombo choyamba chija
Revelation13:13 Ndipo chinachita zizindikiro zazikulu zodabwitsa
Revelation13:14 Chifukwa cha zizindikiro zimene chinaloledwa kuchita mʼmalo mwa chirombo choyamba chija
Revelation13:15 Chirombo cha chiwirichi chinapatsidwa mphamvu zakupereka mpweya kwa fano la chirombo choyamba chija kuti liyankhule ndi kuphetsa aliyense wokana kupembedza fanolo.
Revelation13:16 Chinakakamiza aliyense

Revelation13:18 Pano pafunika nzeru. Munthu amene ali ndi nzeru atanthauze nambala ya chirombocho

Revelation14:4 Awa ndiwo amene sanadzidetse koma anadzisunga ndipo sanadziyipitse ndi akazi. Anthu amenewa ndiwo ankatsatira Mwana Wankhosa kulikonse kumene ankapita. Ndiwo amene anagulidwa pakati pa anthu a dziko lapansi kuti akhale oyambirira kuperekedwa kwa Mulungu ndi kwa Mwana Wankhosa.
Revelation14:5 Iwo sananenepo bodza ndipo alibe cholakwa.

Revelation14:12 Pamenepa ndi pofunika kupirira kwa anthu oyera mtima amene amasunga malamulo a Mulungu ndi kukhalabe okhulupirika kwa Yesu.

Revelation15:7 Ndipo kenaka chimodzi cha zamoyo zinayi zija chinapereka kwa angelo asanu ndi awiri mbale zisanu ndi ziwiri zodzaza ndi ukali wa Mulungu amene ali ndi moyo mpaka muyaya.

Revelation16:1 Kenaka ndinamva mawu ofuwula kuchokera ku Nyumba ya Mulungu ija kuwuza angelo asanu ndi awiri kuti
Revelation16:2 Mngelo woyamba anapita natsanula mbale yake pa dziko lapansi ndipo zilonda zoyipa ndi zowawa zinabuka pa anthu amene anali ndi chizindikiro cha chirombo chija
Revelation16:3 Mngelo wachiwiri anapita natsanula mbale yake pa nyanja ndipo madzi ake anasanduka magazi
Revelation16:4 Mngelo wachitatu anapita natsanula mbale yake pa mitsinje ndi akasupe amadzi ndipo zinasanduka magazi.
Revelation16:5 Kenaka ndinamva mngelo wolamulira madzi uja akuti
Revelation16:6 pakuti iwo anakhetsa magazi a oyera anu ndi aneneri anu
Revelation16:7 Kenaka ndinamva mawu ochokera ku guwa lansembe akuti
Revelation16:8 Mngelo wachinayi anapita natsanula mbale yake pa dzuwa ndipo dzuwa linapatsidwa mphamvu yopsereza anthu ndi moto.
Revelation16:9 Anapserera nako kutentha kwakukuluko ndipo anatukwana Mulungu
Revelation16:10 Mngelo wachisanu anapita natsanula mbale yake pa mpando waufumu wa chirombo chija ndipo mdima unagwa ponse pamene panali ufumu wake. Anthu analuma malilime awo chifukwa cha ululu.
Revelation16:11 Ndipo anatukwana Mulungu wakumwamba chifukwa cha maululu awo ndi zilonda zawo koma anakana kulapa pa zimene anachita.
Revelation16:12 Mngelo wachisanu ndi chimodzi anapita natsanula mbale yake pa mtsinje waukulu wa Yufurate
Revelation16:13 Kenaka ndinaona mizimu yoyipa itatu imene inkaoneka ngati achule; inatuluka mʼkamwa mwa chinjoka chija
Revelation16:14 Imeneyi ndiyo mizimu ya ziwanda imene imachita zizindikiro zodabwitsa ndipo imatuluka kupita kwa mafumu a dziko lonse
Revelation16:15 “Taonani
Revelation16:16 Kenaka mizimu ija inasonkhanitsa pamodzi mafumu ku malo amene mʼChihebri amatchedwa Armagedo.
Revelation16:17 Mngelo wachisanu ndi chiwiri anatsanulira mbale yake mu mlengalenga ndipo ku Nyumba ya Mulungu kunamveka mawu ofuwula kuchokera ku mpando waufumu kuti
Revelation16:18 Kenaka kunachitika mphenzi
Revelation16:19 Mzinda waukuluwo unagawika magawo atatu ndipo mizinda ya mitundu ya anthu inagwa. Mulungu anakumbukira Babuloni Wamkulu namupatsa chikho chake chodzaza ndi vinyo wa ukali wa mkwiyo wake.
Revelation16:20 Chilumba chilichonse chinathawa ndipo mapiri sanaonekenso.
Revelation16:21 Matalala akuluakulu olemera pafupifupi makilogalamu makumi asanu anagwa kuchokera kumwamba kugwera pa anthu. Ndipo anthu anatukwana Mulungu chifukwa cha mliri wa matalala popeza unali mliri woopsa kwambiri.
Revelation17:1 Mmodzi wa angelo asanu ndi awiri aja amene anali ndi mbale zisanu ndi ziwiri anadza nati kwa ine
Revelation17:2 Mafumu a dziko lapansi amachita naye chigololo ndipo okhala pa dziko lapansi analedzera ndi vinyo wa zigololo zake.”
Revelation17:3 Kenaka mngeloyo anandinyamula mwa Mzimu Woyera kupita nane ku chipululu. Kumeneko ndinaona mkazi atakhala pa chirombo chofiira chokutidwa ndi mayina a chipongwe ndipo chinali ndi mitu isanu ndi iwiri ndi nyanga khumi.
Revelation17:4 Mkaziyo anavala zovala za pepo ndi zofiira nadzikongoletsa ndi golide
Revelation17:5 Pa mphumi pake panalembedwa dzina lodabwitsa: BABULONI WAMKULU MAYI WA AKAZI ADAMA NDI WAZOYIPITSA ZA DZIKO LAPANSI.
Revelation17:6 Ndinaona kuti mkaziyo anali ataledzera ndi magazi a oyera mtima
Revelation17:7 Kenaka mngelo uja anati kwa ine
Revelation17:8 Chirombo chimene wachionachi chinalipo kale koma tsopano kulibe ndipo chidzatuluka ku chidzenje chakuya ndi kupita kukawonongedwa. Anthu okhala pa dziko lapansi amene mayina awo sanalembedwe mʼbuku lamoyo kuyambira pa kulengedwa kwa dziko lapansi adzadabwa pamene adzaona chirombocho
Revelation17:9 “Zimenezi zikufunika kuganizira mwanzeru. Mitu isanu ndi iwiriyo ndi mapiri asanu ndi awiri pomwe mkazi uja amakhalirapo. Yomweyonso ndi mafumu asanu ndi awiri.
Revelation17:10 Mafumu asanu anagwa
Revelation17:11 Chirombo chomwe chinalipo kale ndipo tsopano kulibe ndiyo mfumu yachisanu ndi chitatu. Iyo ndi ya mʼgulu la asanu ndi awiriwo ndipo ikupita kukawonongedwa.
Revelation17:12 “Nyanga khumi unaziona zija ndi mafumu khumi amene sanapatsidwe ulamuliro
Revelation17:13 Mafumuwo ali ndi cholinga chimodzi ndipo adzapereka mphamvu ndi ulamuliro wawo kwa chirombocho.
Revelation17:14 Iwo adzachita nkhondo ndi Mwana Wankhosa
Revelation17:15 Kenaka mngeloyo anati kwa ine
Revelation17:16 Nyanga khumi ndi chirombo unazionazo zidzadya mkazi wadamayo. Zidzamufwifwitsa ndi kumusiya wamaliseche; zidzadya nyama yake ndi kumutentha ndi moto.
Revelation17:17 Pakuti Mulungu wayika ichi mʼmitima mwawo kuti akwaniritse cholinga chake povomerezana kupereka mphamvu zawo zolamulira kwa chirombo
Revelation17:18 Mkazi unamuonayo ndi mzinda waukulu umene ulamulira mafumu a dziko lapansi.”
Revelation18:1 Zitatha izi ndinaona mngelo wina akutsika kuchokera kumwamba. Iye anali ndi ulamuliro waukulu
Revelation18:2 Mngeloyo anafuwula ndi mawu amphamvu kuti: “ ‘Wagwa! Wagwa Babuloni Wamkulu!’ Wasandulika mokhalamo ziwanda ndi kofikako mizimu yonse yoyipa ndi mbalame zonse zonyansa ndi zodetsedwa.
Revelation18:3 Pakuti mayiko onse amwa vinyo ozunguza mutu wazigololo zake. Mafumu a dziko lapansi achita naye chigololo
Revelation18:4 Ndiponso ndinamva mawu ena kuchokera kumwamba akuti: “ ‘Anthu anga tulukani
Revelation18:5 pakuti machimo ake awunjikana mpaka kumwamba
Revelation18:6 Bwezerani Iye monga momwe iye anakuchitirani. Mubwezereni mowirikiza pa zimene anachita. Mumusakanizire magawo awiri kuchokera mʼchikho chake.
Revelation18:7 Mumuzunze
Revelation18:8 Chifukwa chake miliri yake idzamugonjetsa tsiku limodzi; imfa
Revelation18:9 “Mafumu a dziko lapansi
Revelation18:10 Iwo adzayima kutali nalira chifukwa choopsedwa ndi mazunzo ake. “ ‘Tsoka! Tsoka mzinda waukulu iwe
Revelation18:11 “Amalonda a dziko lapansi adzalira nakhuza maliro ake chifukwa palibenso amene akugula katundu wawo
Revelation18:12 katundu wagolide
Revelation18:13 zokometsera zakudya
Revelation18:14 “Iwo adzanena kuti
Revelation18:15 Amalonda amene anagulitsa zinthu izi napeza chuma kuchokera kwa iye adzayima patali potero ataopsedwa ndi mazunzo ake. Adzalira ndi kukhuza maliro
Revelation18:16 ndipo adzalira mokuwa kuti
Revelation18:17 Chuma chambiri choterechi chafika powonongeka mu ora limodzi!’ “Oyendetsa sitima ndi onse oyenda pa sitima ya pamadzi
Revelation18:18 Akadzaona utsi wa kunyeka kwake
Revelation18:19 Adzathira fumbi pamitu pawo ndipo adzalira nakhuza maliro kuti
Revelation18:20 “Kondwerani chifukwa cha iye inu kumwamba! Kondwerani oyera mtima ndi atumwi ndi aneneri! Mulungu wamuweruza iye monga momwe anakuchitirani inu.”
Revelation18:21 Kenaka mngelo wamphamvu ananyamula mwala waukulu ngati mphero yayikulu nawuponya mʼnyanja nanena kuti
Revelation18:22 Mwa iwe simudzamvekanso liwu la woyimba zeze
Revelation18:23 Kuwala kwa nyale sikudzawunikanso mwa inu. Mawu a mkwati ndi mkwatibwi sadzamvekanso mwa iwe. Amalonda anu anali akuluakulu a dziko lapansi. Mitundu yonse inasokonezedwa ndi zamatsenga zako.
Revelation18:24 Mwa iye munapezeka magazi a aneneri ndi a oyera mtima
Revelation19:1 Zitatha izi
Revelation19:2 pakuti chiweruzo chake ndi choona ndi cha chilungamo. Iye waweruza mkazi wadama wotchuka uja amene anayipitsa dziko lonse lapansi ndi zigololo zake. Iye wabwezera pa mkaziyo magazi a atumiki ake.”
Revelation19:3 Ndipo anafuwulanso kuti
Revelation19:4 Akuluakulu 24 aja ndi zamoyo zinayi zija anadzigwetsa pansi kupembedza Mulungu amene anakhala pa mpando waufumu. Ndipo anafuwula kuti
Revelation19:5 Kenaka mawu anachoka ku mpando waufumu kuti
Revelation19:6 Kenaka ndinamva chimene chinamveka ngati gulu lalikulu
Revelation19:7 Tiyeni tisangalale ndi kukondwera ndi kumutamanda! Pakuti nthawi ya ukwati wa Mwana Wankhosa yafika
Revelation19:8 Wapatsidwa nsalu yoyera kwambiri
Revelation19:9 Kenaka mngelo anandiwuza kuti
Revelation19:10 Pamenepo ndinadzigwetsa pa mapazi ake kumupembedza. Koma anandiwuza kuti
Revelation19:11 Ndinaona kumwamba kutatsekuka ndipo patsogolo panga panali kavalo woyera
Revelation19:12 Maso ake anali ngati malawi amoto
Revelation19:13 Iye anavala mkanjo woviyika mʼmagazi
Revelation19:14 Magulu ankhondo akumwamba ankamutsatira atakwera pa akavalo oyera
Revelation19:15 Mʼkamwa mwake munatuluka lupanga lakuthwa limene anati akaphe nalo mitundu ya anthu. Iye adzalamulira ndi ndodo yachitsulo. Iye anaponda choponderamo mphesa cha ukali wa Mulungu Wamphamvuzonse.
Revelation19:16 Pa chovala ndi pa ntchafu pake panalembedwa dzina ili: MFUMU YA MAFUMU NDI MBUYE WA AMBUYE.
Revelation19:17 Ndipo ndinaona mngelo atayimirira pa dzuwa amene anafuwula ndi mawu okweza kwa mbalame zonse zowuluka mlengalenga kuti
Revelation19:18 Kuti mudye mnofu wa mafumu
Revelation19:19 Kenaka ndinaona chirombo chija ndi mafumu a dziko lapansi ndi magulu ankhondo atasonkhana pamodzi kuti achite nkhondo ndi wokwera pa kavalo ndi ankhondo ake.
Revelation19:20 Koma chirombocho chinagwidwa pamodzi ndi mneneri wonyenga uja amene anachita zizindikiro zodabwitsa pamaso pake. Ndi zizindikirozi anasocheretsa amene analembedwa chizindikiro cha chirombocho napembedza fano lake. Onse awiri anaponyedwa amoyo mʼnyanja yamoto yasulufule wotentha.
Revelation19:21 Ena onse anaphedwa ndi lupanga lija linatuluka mʼkamwa mwa wokwera pa kavalo uja
Revelation20:1 Ndipo ndinaona mngelo akutsika kuchokera kumwamba ali ndi kiyi ya ku chidzenje chakuya chija atanyamula mʼdzanja lake unyolo waukulu.
Revelation20:2 Iye anachigwira chinjokacho
Revelation20:3 Anamuponya ku chidzenje chakuya chija namutsekera ndi kiyi ndi kumatirira pa khomopo kuti asatulukenso kukanyenga mitundu ya anthu mpaka patapita zaka 1
Revelation20:4 Ndinaona mipando yaufumu pamene anakhalapo anthu amene anapatsidwa mphamvu zoweruza. Ndipo ndinaona mizimu ya amene anadulidwa makosi chifukwa cha umboni wa Yesu ndi chifukwa cha Mawu a Mulungu. Iwo sanapembedze nawo chirombo kapena fano lake ndipo sanalembedwe chizindikiro chake pa mphumi zawo kapena pa manja awo. Iwo anakhalanso ndi moyo nalamulira pamodzi ndi Khristu zaka 1
Revelation20:5 (Akufa ena onse sanaukenso mpaka zitatha zaka 1
Revelation20:6 Odala ndi oyera mtima amene adzaukitsidwa nawo pa kuukitsidwa koyamba. Imfa yachiwiri ilibe mphamvu pa iwo koma adzakhala ansembe a Mulungu ndi a Khristu ndipo adzalamulira naye pamodzi zaka 1
Revelation20:7 Zaka 1
Revelation20:8 ndipo adzapita kukanyenga mitundu ya anthu kumbali zonse zinayi za dziko lapansi
Revelation20:9 Iwo anayenda ponseponse pa dziko lapansi nazinga msasa wa anthu a Mulungu
Revelation20:10 Ndipo Mdierekezi amene anawanyenga
Revelation20:11 Kenaka ndinaona Mpando Waufumu waukulu woyera ndi Iye amene anakhalapo. Dziko lapansi ndi kumwamba zinathawa pamaso pake ndipo panalibenso malo awo.
Revelation20:12 Ndipo ndinaona akufa
Revelation20:13 Nyanja inapereka amene anaferamo ndipo imfa ndi Hade zinapereka akufa ake ndipo munthu aliyense anaweruzidwa monga mwa ntchito zake.
Revelation20:14 Kenaka imfa ndi Hade zinaponyedwa mʼnyanja ya moto. Nyanja yamoto ndiyo imfa yachiwiri.
Revelation20:15 Ngati dzina la wina aliyense silinapezeke mʼBuku Lamoyo
Revelation21:1 Kenaka ndinaona kumwamba kwatsopano ndi dziko lapansi latsopano pakuti kumwamba koyamba ndi dziko lapansi loyamba zinapita ndipo kunalibenso nyanja ina iliyonse.
Revelation21:2 Ndinaona mzinda wopatulika
Revelation21:3 Ndipo ndinamva mawu ofuwula kuchokera ku Mpando Waufumu kuti
Revelation21:4 ‘Mulungu adzapukuta misozi yonse mʼmaso mwawo. Sikudzakhalanso imfa kapena kukhuza maliro kapena kulira kapena ululu popeza zakale zapita.’ ”
Revelation21:5 Amene anakhala pa mpando waufumuyo anati
Revelation21:6 Iye anandiwuza kuti
Revelation21:7 Iye amene adzapambane adzalandira zonsezi
Revelation21:8 Koma amantha
Revelation21:9 Mmodzi wa angelo asanu ndi awiri aja
Revelation21:10 Ndipo anandinyamula mwa Mzimu Woyera kupita nane ku phiri lalikulu ndi lalitali nandionetsa mzinda wopatulika
Revelation21:11 Unawala ndi ulemerero wa Mulungu
Revelation21:12 Mzindawo unali ndi mpanda waukulu ndi wautali
Revelation21:13 Kummawa kunali zipata zitatu
Revelation21:14 Mpanda wa mzindawu unali ndi maziko khumi ndi awiri ndipo pa mazikopo panali mayina khumi ndi awiri a atumwi a Mwana Wankhosa.
Revelation21:15 Mngelo amene ankayankhula nane uja anali ndi ndodo yagolide yoyezera mzindawo
Revelation21:16 Mzindawo unamangidwa mofanana kutalika kwake
Revelation21:17 Anayesa mpanda uja ndipo kuchindikala kwake kunali kopitirirapo mamita 65 monga mwa muyeso wa anthu umene mngelo anagwiritsa ntchito.
Revelation21:18 Mpandawo unapangidwa ndi yasipa
Revelation21:19 Maziko a mpanda wa mzindawo anali okongoletsedwa ndi miyala yamtengowapatali ya mtundu uliwonse. Maziko oyamba anali yasipa
Revelation21:20 achisanu ndi sardiyo
Revelation21:21 Zipata khumi ndi ziwiri zija zinapangidwa ndi ngale
Revelation21:22 Ine sindinaone Nyumba ya Mulungu iliyonse mu mzindawo chifukwa Ambuye Mulungu Wamphamvuzonse ndi Mwana Wankhosa ndiwo Nyumba yake.
Revelation21:23 Palibe chifukwa choti dzuwa kapena mwezi ziwale popeza mu mzindawo ulemerero wa Mulungu ndiwo umawalamo ndipo nyale yake ndi Mwana Wankhosa uja.
Revelation21:24 Mitundu ya anthu idzayenda mʼkuwala kwake ndipo mafumu a dziko lapansi adzabweretsa ulemerero wawo mu mzindamo.
Revelation21:25 Zipata zake sizidzatsekedwa ngakhale tsiku limodzi lomwe pakuti sikudzakhala usiku kumeneko.
Revelation21:26 Ulemerero ndi ulemu wa mitundu ya anthu adzapita nazo kumeneko.
Revelation21:27 Kanthu kosayeretsedwa sikadzalowamo
Revelation22:1 Ndipo mngeloyo anandionetsa mtsinje wamadzi amoyo
Revelation22:2 Ukuyenda pakati pa msewu waukulu wa mu mzindawo. Mbali iliyonse ya mtsinjewo kunali mtengo wamoyo
Revelation22:3 Sipadzakhalanso temberero lililonse. Mpando waufumu wa Mulungu ndi wa Mwana Wankhosa udzakhala mu mzindawo
Revelation22:4 Iwo adzaona nkhope yake ndipo dzina lake lidzalembedwa pa mphumi zawo.
Revelation22:5 Sipadzakhalanso usiku. Sadzafuna kuwala kwa nyale kapena kwa dzuwa pakuti Ambuye Mulungu adzakhala kuwala kwawo. Ndipo adzalamulira kwamuyaya.
Revelation22:6 Mngeloyo anandiwuza kuti
Revelation22:7 “Taonani
Revelation22:8 Ine Yohane
Revelation22:9 Koma mngeloyo anandiwuza kuti
Revelation22:10 Kenaka anandiwuza kuti
Revelation22:11 Wochita zoyipa apitirire kuchita zoyipazo; wochita zonyansa apitirire kuchita zonyansazo; wochita zabwino apitirire kuchita zabwinozo; ndipo woyera mtima apitirire kukhala woyera mtima.”
Revelation22:12 “Taonani
Revelation22:13 Ine ndine Alefa ndi Omega
Revelation22:14 “Odala amene achapa mikanjo yawo
Revelation22:15 Kunja kuli agalu
Revelation22:16 “Ine Yesu
Revelation22:17 Mzimu Woyera ndi mkwatibwi akuti
Revelation22:18 Ndikuchenjeza aliyense amene akumva mawu onena zamʼtsogolo a mʼbukuli kuti
Revelation22:19 Ndipo wina akachotsapo mawu onena zamʼtsogolo a mʼbuku ili
Revelation22:20 Iye amene akuchitira umboni pa zinthu izi akuti
